Genesis1:1 Pachiyambi Mulungu adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi. 
Genesis1:2 Dziko lapansi ndipo linali lopanda kanthu; ndipo mdima unali pamwamba pa nyanja; ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unalinkufungatira pamwamba pa madzi. 
Genesis1:3 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Kuyere; ndipo kunayera." 
Genesis1:4 Ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kuyerako kunali kwabwino; ndipo Mulungu analekanitsa kuyera ndi mdima. 
Genesis1:5 Ndipo Mulungu anacha kuyerako Usana, ndi mdimawo anautcha Usiku. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku loyamba." 
Genesis1:6 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Pakhale thambo pakati pamadzi, lilekanitse madzi ndi madzi." 
Genesis1:7 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga thambo, nalekanitsa madzi anali pansi pa thambolo ndi madzi anali pamwamba pa thambolo; ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:8 Ndipo Mulungu analitcha thambolo Kumwamba. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lachiwiri." 
Genesis1:9 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Madzi a pansi pa kumwamba asonkhane pamodzi pa malo amodzi, uoneke mtunda: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:10 Ndipo Mulungu adautcha mtundawo Dziko lapansi; kusonkhana kwa madziko ndipo adatcha Nyanja: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino. 
Genesis1:11 Mulungu ndipo anati, Dziko lapansi limere udzu, therere lobala mbeu, ndi mtengo wazipatso wakubala zipatso monga mwa mtundu wake, momwemo muli mbeu yake, pa dziko lapansi: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:12 Ndipo dziko lapansi linamera udzu, therere lobala mbeu monga mwa mtundu wake, ndi mtengo wakubala zipatso, momwemo muli mbeu yake, monga mwa mtundu wake; ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino." 
Genesis1:13 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lachitatu." 
Genesis1:14 Ndipo Mulungu anati, Pakhale zounikira pa thambo la kumwamba, zakulekanitsa usana ndi usiku; zikhale zizindikiro ndi nyengo, ndi masiku, ndi zaka;" 
Genesis1:15 Zikhale zounikira m'thambo la kumwamba, kuti ziunikire pa dziko lapansi: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:16 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zounikira zazikulu ziwiri; chounikira chachikulu chakulamulira usana, chounikira chaching'ono chakulamulira usiku, ndi nyenyezi zomwe." 
Genesis1:17 Mulungu ndipo adaika zimenezo m'thambo la kumwamba, kuti ziunikire pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis1:18 Nizilamulire usana ndi usiku, nizilekanitse kuyera ndi mdima: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino." 
Genesis1:19 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lachinai." 
Genesis1:20 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Madzi abale zochuluka zamoyo zoyendayenda, ndi mbalame ziuluke pamwamba pa dziko lapansi ndi pamlengalenga." 
Genesis1:21 Mulungu ndipo adalenga zinsomba zazikulu ndi zoyendayenda zamoyo zakuchuluka m'madzi mwa mitundu yao, ndi mbalame zamapiko, yonse monga mwa mtundu wake: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino." 
Genesis1:22 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa zimenezo, nati, Zibalane, zichuluke, zidzaze madzi a m'nyanja, ndi mbalame zichuluke pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis1:23 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lachisanu." 
Genesis1:24 Ndipo adati Mulungu, Dziko lapansi libale zamoyo monga mwa mitundu yao, ng'ombe, ndi zokwawa, ndi zinyama za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:25 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zinyama za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao; ndi ng'ombe monga mwa mtundu wake, ndi zonse zokwawa pansi monga mwa mitundu yao; ndipo Mulungu anaona kuti kunali kwabwino." 
Genesis1:26 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Tipange munthu m'chifanizo chathu, monga mwa chikhalidwe chathu: alamulire pa nsomba za m'nyanja, ndi pa mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi pa ng'ombe, ndi pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndi pa zokwawa zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis1:27 Mulungu ndipo adalenga munthu m'chifanizo chake, m'chifanizo cha Mulungu adamlenga iye; adalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi." 
Genesis1:28 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa iwo, ndipo adati kwa iwo, Mubalane, muchuluke, mudzaze dziko lapansi, muligonjetse: mulamulire pa nsomba za m'nyanja, ndi pa mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi zamoyo zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis1:29 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Taonani, ndakupatsani inu therere lonse lakubala mbeu lili pa dziko lapansi, ndi mitengo yonse m'mene muli chipatso cha mtengo wakubala mbeu; chidzakhala chakudya cha inu:" 
Genesis1:30 ndiponso ndapatsa zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi, ndi mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi zakukwawa zonse za dziko lapansi m'mene muli moyo, therere laliwisi lonse likhale chakudya: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:31 Ndipo anaziona Mulungu zonse zimene adazipanga, ndipo, taonani, zinali zabwino ndithu. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lachisanu ndi chimodzi." 
Genesis2:1 Ndipo zinatha kupangidwa zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, ndi khamu lao lonse." 
Genesis2:2 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri Mulungu anamaliza ntchito yonse anaipanga; ndipo anapuma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ku ntchito yake yonse. 
Genesis2:3 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri, naliyeretsa limenelo: chifukwa limenelo adapuma ku ntchito yake yonse imene Mulungu anailenga ndi kupanga." 
Genesis2:4 Imeneyo ndiyo mibadwo yao ya zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, pamene zinalengedwa, tsiku lomwe Yehova Mulungu anapanga dziko lapansi ndi zakumwamba." 
Genesis2:5 Ndi zomera zonse za m'munda zisanakhale m'dziko lapansi, ndiponso matherere onse a m'munda asanamere; chifukwa Yehova Mulungu sanavumbitsire mvula pa dziko lapansi, ndipo panalibe munthu wakulima nthaka;" 
Genesis2:6 koma inakwera nkhungu yotuluka pa dziko lapansi, niithirira ponse pamwamba pa nthaka." 
Genesis2:7 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba munthu ndi dothi lapansi, nauzira mpweya wa moyo m'mphuno mwake; munthuyo nakhala wamoyo." 
Genesis2:8 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anabzala m'munda ku Edeni chakum'mawa; momwemo ndipo adaika munthu adamuumbayo. 
Genesis2:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anameretsa m'nthaka mitengo yonse yokoma m'maso ndi yabwino kudya; ndiponso mtengo wa moyo pakati pa mundapo, ndi mtengo wakudziwitsa zabwino ndi zoipa." 
Genesis2:10 Ndipo unatuluka m'Edeni mtsinje wakuthirira m'mundamo, m'menemo ndipo unalekana nuchita miyendo inai." 
Genesis2:11 Dzina la wakuyamba Pisoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Havila, m'mene muli golide;" 
Genesis2:12 golide wa dziko ali wabwino; ndimonso muli bedola ndi mwala wasohamu. 
Genesis2:13 Dzina la mtsinje wachiwiri ndi Gihoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Kusi. 
Genesis2:14 Dzina la mtsinje wachitatu ndi Tigrisi: umenewo ndiwo wakuyenda cha kum'mawa kwake kwa Asiriya. Mtsinje wachinai ndi Yufurate. 
Genesis2:15 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anatenga munthuyo, namuika iye m'munda wa Edeni kuti aulime nauyang'anire." 
Genesis2:16 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anamuuza munthuyo, nati, Mitengo yonse ya m'munda udyeko;" 
Genesis2:17 koma mtengo wakudziwitsa zabwino ndi zoipa usadye umenewo; chifukwa tsiku lomwe udzadya umenewo udzafa ndithu. 
Genesis2:18 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anati, Si kwabwino kuti munthu akhale yekha; ndidzampangira womthangatira iye." 
Genesis2:19 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba ndi nthaka zamoyo zonse za m'thengo, ndi mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga; ndipo anapita nazo kwa Adamu kuti aone maina omwe adzazicha; ndipo maina omwe onse anazicha Adamu zamoyo zonse, omwewo ndiwo maina ao." 
Genesis2:20 Adamu ndipo anazitcha maina zinyama zonse, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga ndi zamoyo zonse za m'thengo: koma kwa Adamu sanapezedwa womthangatira iye." 
Genesis2:21 Koma Yehova Mulungu anamgonetsa Adamu tulo tatikulu, ndipo anagona; ndipo anatengako nthiti yake imodzi, natsekapo ndi mnofu pamalo pake." 
Genesis2:22 Ndipo nthitiyo anaichotsa Yehova Mulungu mwa Adamu anaipanga mkazi, ndipo ananka naye kwa Adamu." 
Genesis2:23 Ndipo anati Adamu, Uyu tsopano ndiye fupa la mafupa anga, ndi mnofu wa mnofu wanga; ndipo adzatchedwa Mkazi, chifukwa anamtenga mwa mwamuna." 
Genesis2:24 Chifukwa chotero mwamuna adzasiya atate wake ndi amake nadzadziphatika kwa mkazi wake: ndipo adzakhala thupi limodzi. 
Genesis2:25 Onse awiri ndipo anali amaliseche, mwamuna ndi mkazi wake, ndipo analibe manyazi." 
Genesis3:1 Ndipo njoka inali yakuchenjera yoposa zamoyo zonse za m'thengo zimene anazipanga Yehova Mulungu. Ndipo inati kwa mkaziyo, Eya! Kodi anatitu Mulungu, Usadye mitengo yonse ya m'mundamu?" 
Genesis3:2 Mkaziyo ndipo anati kwa njoka, Zipatso za mitengo ya m'mundamu tidye." 
Genesis3:3 Koma zipatso za mtengo umene uli m'kati mwa munda, Mulungu anati, Musadye umenewo, musakhudze umenewo, mungadzafe." 
Genesis3:4 Njokayo ndipo inati kwa mkaziyo, Kufa simudzafai;" 
Genesis3:5 chifukwa adziwa Mulungu kuti tsiku limene mukadya umenewo, adzatseguka maso anu, ndipo mudzakhala ngati Mulungu, wakudziwa zabwino ndi zoipa." 
Genesis3:6 Ndipo pamene anaona mkaziyo kuti mtengo unali wabwino kudya, ndi kuti unali wokoma m'maso, mtengo wolakalakika wakupatsa nzeru, anatenga zipatso zake, nadya, napatsanso mwamuna wake amene ali naye, nadya iyenso." 
Genesis3:7 Ndipo anatseguka maso ao a onse awiri, nadziwa kuti anali amaliseche: ndipo adasoka masamba amkuyu, nadzipangira matewera." 
Genesis3:8 Ndipo anamva mau a Yehova Mulungu alinkuyendayenda m'munda nthawi yamadzulo: ndipo anabisala Adamu ndi mkazi wake pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu pakati pa mitengo ya m'munda. 
Genesis3:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaitana mwamunayo nati kwa iye, Uli kuti?" 
Genesis3:10 Ndipo anati, Ndinamva mau anu m'mundamu, ndipo ndinaopa chifukwa ndinali wamaliseche ine; ndipo ndinabisala." 
Genesis3:11 Ndipo anati, Ndani anakuuza iwe kuti uli wamaliseche? Kodi wadya za mtengo uja, umene ndinakuuza iwe kuti usadye?" 
Genesis3:12 Ndipo anati mwamunayo, Mkazi amene munandipatsa ine kuti akhale ndi ine, ameneyo anandipatsa ine za mtengo, ndipo ndinadya." 
Genesis3:13 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anati kwa mkaziyo, Chiyani chimene wachitachi? Ndipo anati mkaziyo, Njoka inandinyenga ine, ndipo ndinadya." 
Genesis3:14 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu kwa njokayo, Chifukwa kuti wachita ichi, wotembereredwa ndiwe wopambana ndi zinyama zonse ndi zamoyo zonse za m'thengo: uziyenda ndi pamimba pako, uzidya fumbi masiku onse a moyo wako:" 
Genesis3:15 ndipo ndidzaika udani pakati pa iwe ndi mkaziyo, ndi pakati pa mbeu yako ndi mbeu yake; ndipo idzalalira mutu wako, ndipo iwe udzalalira chitende chake." 
Genesis3:16 Kwa mkaziyo ndipo anati, Ndidzachulukitsa kusauka kwako ndi potenga mimba pako; udzasauka pakubala: udzakhumba mwamuna wako, ndipo iye adzakulamulira iwe." 
Genesis3:17 Kwa Adamu ndipo anati, Chifukwa kuti wamvera mau a mkazi wako, nudya za mtengo umene ndinakuuza iwe kuti, Usadyeko; nthaka ikhale yotembereredwa chifukwa cha iwe; m'kusauka udzadyako masiku onse a moyo wako:" 
Genesis3:18 minga ndi mitula idzakubalira iwe; ndipo udzadya therere la m'thengo: 
Genesis3:19 m'thukuta la nkhope yako udzadya chakudya, kufikira kuti udzabwerera kunthaka: chifukwa kuti m'menemo unatengedwa: chifukwa kuti ndiwe fumbi, ndi kufumbiko udzabwerera." 
Genesis3:20 Ndipo mwamuna anamutcha dzina la mkazi wake, Heva; chifukwa ndiye amake wa amoyo onse." 
Genesis3:21 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anapangira Adamu ndi mkazi wake malaya azikopa, nawaveka iwo." 
Genesis3:22 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu, Taonani, munthuyo akhala ngati mmodzi wa ife, wakudziwa zabwino ndi zoipa: ndipo tsopano kuti asatambasule dzanja lake ndi kutenga za mtengo wa moyo, ndi kudya, ndi kukhala ndi moyo nthawi zonse," 
Genesis3:23 Yehova Mulungu anamtulutsa iye m'munda wa Edeni, kuti alime nthaka m'mene anamtenga iye." 
Genesis3:24 Ndipo anamuingitsa munthuyo; nakhazika akerubi cha kum'mawa kwake kwa munda wa Edeni, ndi lupanga lamoto lakuzungulira ponsepo, lakusunga njira ya ku mtengo wa moyo." 
Genesis4:1 Ndipo mwamunayo anadziwa mkazi wake Heva: ndipo anatenga pakati, nabala Kaini, ndipo anati, Ndalandira munthu kwa Yehova." 
Genesis4:2 Ndipo anabalanso mphwake Abele. Abele anakhala mbusa wa nkhosa, koma Kaini anali wakulima nthaka." 
Genesis4:3 Ndipo panali atapita masiku, Kaini anatenga zipatso za nthaka, nsembe ya kwa Yehova." 
Genesis4:4 Ndiponso Abele anatenga iyenso mwana woyamba wa nkhosa zake ndi mafuta omwe. Yehova ndipo anayang'anira Abele ndi nsembe yake: 
Genesis4:5 koma sanayang'anire Kaini ndi nsembe yake. Kaini ndipo anakwiya kwambiri, niigwa nkhope yake." 
Genesis4:6 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Kaini, Ukwiyiranji? Yagweranji nkhope yako?" 
Genesis4:7 Ukachita zabwino, sudzalandiridwa kodi? Ukaleka kuchita zabwino, uchimo ubwatama pakhomo: kwa iwe kudzakhala kulakalaka kwake, ndipo iwe udzamlamulira iye." 
Genesis4:8 Kaini ndipo ananena ndi Abele mphwake. Ndipo panali pamene anali kumunda, Kaini anamuukira Abele mphwake, namupha." 
Genesis4:9 Yehova ndipo anati kwa Kaini, Ali kuti Abele mphwako? Ndipo anati, Sindidziwai: kodi ndine woyang'anira mphwanga?" 
Genesis4:10 Ndipo anati, Wachita chiyani? Mau a mwazi wa mphwako andifuulira Ine kunthaka." 
Genesis4:11 Tsopano ndiwe wotembereredwa kunthaka, imene inatsegula pakamwa pake kulandira pa dzanja lako mwazi wa mphwako:" 
Genesis4:12 pamene udzalima panthaka siidzaperekanso kwa iwe mphamvu yake: udzakhala wothawathawa ndi woyendayenda pa dziko lapansi. 
Genesis4:13 Ndipo Kaini anati kwa Yehova, Kulangidwa kwanga nkwakukulu kosapiririka." 
Genesis4:14 Taonani, mwandiingitsa ine lero lomwe padziko; ndi pankhope panu ndidzabisika; ndipo ndidzakhala wothawathawa ndi woyendayenda pa dziko lapansi; ndipo kudzatero kuti onse akundipeza adzandipha." 
Genesis4:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Chifukwa chake aliyense amene adzapha Kaini kudzabwezedwa kwa iye kasanu ndi kawiri. Ndipo Yehova anaika chizindikiro pa Kaini, kuti asamuphe aliyense akampeza." 
Genesis4:16 Ndipo Kaini anatuluka pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo anakhala m'dziko la Nodi, kum'mawa kwake kwa Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Ndipo Kaini anamdziwa mkazi wake; ndipo anatenga pakati, nabala Enoki: ndipo anamanga mudzi, nautcha dzina lake la mudziwo monga dzina la mwana wake, Enoki." 
Genesis4:18 Kwa Enoki ndipo kunabadwa Iradi; Iradi ndipo anabala Mehuyaele; Mehuyaele ndipo anabala Metusaele; Metusaele ndipo anabala Lameki. 
Genesis4:19 Ndipo Lameki anadzitengera yekha akazi awiri: dzina lake la wina ndi Ada, dzina lake la mnzake ndi Zila." 
Genesis4:20 Ndipo Ada anabala Yabala; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo okhala m'mahema, akuweta ng'ombe." 
Genesis4:21 Ndi dzina la mphwake ndilo Yubale; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo oimba zeze ndi chitoliro. 
Genesis4:22 Ndipo Zila, iyenso anabala Tubala-Kaini, mwini wakuphunzitsa amisiri onse a mkuwa ndi a chitsulo; mlongo wake wa Tubala-Kaini ndi Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameki ndipo anati kwa akazi ake, Tamvani mau anga, Ada ndi Zila; inu akazi a Lameki, mverani kunena kwanga: Ndapha munthu wakundilasa ine, ndapha mnyamata wakundipweteka ine." 
Genesis4:24 Ngati Kaini adzabwezeredwa kasanu ndi kawiri, koma Lameki makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
Genesis4:25 Ndipo Adamu anadziwanso mkazi wake; ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna, namutcha dzina lake Seti: Chifukwa, nati iye, Mulungu wandilowezera ine mbeu ina m'malo mwa Abele amene Kaini anamupha." 
Genesis4:26 Ndiponso kwa Seti, kwa iye kunabadwa mwana wamwamuna: anamutcha dzina lake Enosi: pomwepo anthu anayamba kutchula dzina la Yehova." 
Genesis5:1 Ili ndi buku la mibadwo ya Adamu. Tsiku lomwe Mulungu analenga munthu anamlenga m'chifanizo cha Mulungu; 
Genesis5:2 anawalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi, nawadalitsa iwo natcha mtundu wao anthu, tsiku lomwe anawalenga iwo." 
Genesis5:3 Ndipo Adamu anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu, nabala mwana wamwamuna m'chifanizo chake; namutcha dzina lake Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Masiku ake Adamu atabala Seti, anali zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu; ndipo anabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis5:5 Masiku ake onse anakhala ndi moyo Adamu anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai, kudza makumi atatu; ndipo anamwalira." 
Genesis5:6 Ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza zisanu, nabala Enosi;" 
Genesis5:7 ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Enosi, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri: ndipo anabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi:" 
Genesis5:8 masiku ake onse a Seti anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi ndi ziwiri; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:9 Ndipo Enosi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi anai, nabala Kenani;" 
Genesis5:10 ndipo anakhala ndi moyo Enosi, atabala Kenani, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza khumi ndi zisanu: ndipo anabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis5:11 Masiku ake onse a Enosi anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:12 Ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, ndipo anabala Mahalalele:" 
Genesis5:13 ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Mahalalele zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi anai, ndipo anabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi;" 
Genesis5:14 masiku ake onse a Kenani anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:15 Ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu, nabala Yaredi;" 
Genesis5:16 ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Yaredi, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi atatu, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi:" 
Genesis5:17 masiku ake onse a Mahalalele anali zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi anai ndi zisanu; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:18 Ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri, nabala Enoki;" 
Genesis5:19 ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Enoki, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi;" 
Genesis5:20 masiku ake onse a Yaredi anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri: ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:21 Ndipo Enoki anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu, nabala Metusela:" 
Genesis5:22 ndipo Enoki anayendabe ndi Mulungu, atabala Metusela, zaka mazana atatu, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi;" 
Genesis5:23 masiku ake onse a Enoki anali mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi zisanu; 
Genesis5:24 ndipo Enoki anayendabe ndi Mulungu; ndipo panalibe iye; pakuti Mulungu anamtenga. 
Genesis5:25 Ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri, nabala Lameki;" 
Genesis5:26 ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Lameki, zaka mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi awiri, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi:" 
Genesis5:27 masiku ake onse a Metusela anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu ndi zinai; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:28 Ndipo Lameki anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi ziwiri, nabala mwana wamwamuna;" 
Genesis5:29 namutcha dzina lake Nowa, ndi kuti, Yemweyu adzatonthoza mtima wathu pa ntchito zathu zovuta za manja athu, chifukwa cha nthaka imene anaitemberera Yehova;" 
Genesis5:30 ndipo Lameki anakhala ndi moyo atabala Nowa, zaka mazana asanu kudza makumi asanu ndi anai ndi zisanu, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi:" 
Genesis5:31 masiku ake onse a Lameki anali zaka mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:32 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu; ndipo Nowa anabala Semu ndi Hamu ndi Yafeti. 
Genesis6:1 Ndipo panali pamene anthu anayamba kuchuluka padziko, ndi ana akazi anawabadwira iwo," 
Genesis6:2 kuti ana amuna a Mulungu anayang'ana ana akazi a anthu, kuti iwo anali okongola; ndipo anadzitengera okha akazi onse amene anawasankha." 
Genesis6:3 Ndipo anati Yehova, Mzimu wanga sudzakangana ndi anthu nthawi zonse, chifukwa iwonso ndiwo thupi lanyama: koma masiku ake adzakhala zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi awiri." 
Genesis6:4 Pa dziko lapansi panali anthu akulukulu masiku omwewo ndiponso pambuyo pake, ana amuna a Mulungu atalowa kwa ana akazi a anthu, ndipo anabalira iwo ana, amenewo ndiwo anthu amphamvu akalekale, anthu omveka." 
Genesis6:5 Ndipo anaona Yehova kuti kuipa kwa anthu kunali kwakukulu pa dziko lapansi, ndiponso kuti ndingaliro zonse za maganizo a mitima yao zinali zoipabe zokhazokha." 
Genesis6:6 Ndipo Yehova anamva chisoni chifukwa anapanga munthu pa dziko lapansi, ndipo anavutika m'mtima mwake." 
Genesis6:7 Ndipo anati Yehova, Ndidzafafaniza anthu amene ndawalenga pa dziko lapansi; anthu, ndi nyama, ndi zokwawa, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga: pakuti ndimva chisoni chifukwa ndapanga izo." 
Genesis6:8 Koma Nowa anapeza ufulu pamaso pa Yehova. 
Genesis6:9 Mibadwo ya Nowa ndi iyi: Nowa anali munthu wolungama ndi wangwiro m'mibadwo yake; Nowa anayendabe ndi Mulungu. 
Genesis6:10 Ndipo Nowa anabala ana amuna atatu, Semu, Hamu ndi Yafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Ndipo dziko lapansi linavunda pamaso pa Mulungu, dziko lapansi ndipo linadzala ndi chiwawa." 
Genesis6:12 Ndipo Mulungu anaona dziko lapansi, ndipo taonani, linavunda; pakuti anthu onse anavunditsa njira yao pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis6:13 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa, Chimaliziro chake cha anthu onse chafika pamaso panga; pakuti dziko lapansi ladzala ndi chiwawa chifukwa cha iwo; taonani, ndidzaononga iwo pamodzi ndi dziko lapansi." 
Genesis6:14 Udzipangire wekha chingalawa cha mtengo wanjale; upangemo zipinda m'chingalawamo, ndipo upake ndi utoto m'kati ndi kunja." 
Genesis6:15 Kupanga kwake ndi kotere: m'litali mwake mwa chingalawa mikono mazana atatu, m'mimba mwake mikono makumi asanu, m'msinkhu mwake mikono makumi atatu." 
Genesis6:16 Uike zenera m'chingalawacho, ulimalize ndi kusiya mkono umodzi pamwamba pake: khomo la chingalawa uike m'mbali mwake; nuchipange ndi nyumba yapansi, ndi yachiwiri, ndi yachitatu." 
Genesis6:17 Ndine, taonani, ndipo Ine ndidzadzetsa chigumula cha madzi pa dziko lapansi, kuti chiononge zamoyo zonse, m'mene muli mpweya wa moyo pansi pa thambo; zinthu zonse za m'dziko lapansi zidzafa." 
Genesis6:18 Koma ndidzakhazikitsa ndi iwe pangano langa; ndipo udzalowa m'chingalawamo iwe ndi ana ako ndi mkazi wako, ndi akazi a ana ako pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Genesis6:19 Ndipo zonse zokhala ndi moyo, ziwiriziwiri za mtundu wao ulowetse m'chingalawamo, kuti zikhale ndi moyo pamodzi ndi iwe; zikhale zamphongo ndi zazikazi." 
Genesis6:20 Za mbalame monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zinyama monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zokwawa zonse za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao, ziwiriziwiri monga mwa mitundu yao, zidzadza kwa iwe kuti zikhale ndi moyo." 
Genesis6:21 Ndipo iwe udzitengereko wekha zakudya zonse zodyedwa, nudzisonkhanitsire izi wekha: ndipo zidzakhala zakudya za iwe ndi za iwo." 
Genesis6:22 Chotero anachita Nowa, monga mwa zonse anamlamulira iye Mulungu, momwemo anachita." 
Genesis7:1 Ndipo anati Yehova kwa Nowa, Talowani, iwe ndi akunyumba ako onse m'chingalawamo; chifukwa ndakuona iwe kuti uli wolungama pamaso panga m'mbadwo uno." 
Genesis7:2 Nyama zonse zodyedwa udzitengereko wekha zisanu ndi ziwiri, zisanu ndi ziwiri, yamphongo ndi yaikazi yake; ndi nyama zosadyedwa ziwiriziwiri yamphongo ndi yaikazi yake." 
Genesis7:3 Ndiponso mbalame za kumlengalenga zisanu ndi ziwiri, zisanu ndi ziwiri, yaimuna ndi yaikazi, kuti mbeu ikhale ndi moyo pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Genesis7:4 Pakuti akapita masiku asanu ndi awiri Ine ndidzavumbitsa mvula pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku; ndi zinthu zamoyo zonse zomwe ndazipanga ndidzaziononga pa dziko lapansi. 
Genesis7:5 Ndipo anachita Nowa monga mwa zonse anamlamulira iye Yehova. 
Genesis7:6 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu ndi limodzi, pamene chigumula cha madzi chinali pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis7:7 Ndipo analowa Nowa ndi ana ake ndi mkazi wake ndi akazi a ana ake m'chingalawamo, chifukwa cha madzi a chigumula." 
Genesis7:8 Nyama zodyedwa ndi nyama zosadyedwa, ndi mbalame, ndi zonse zokwawa pansi," 
Genesis7:9 zinalowa ziwiriziwiri kwa Nowa m'chingalawamo, yamphongo ndi yaikazi, monga momwe Mulungu anamlamulira Nowa." 
Genesis7:10 Ndipo panali pamene anapita masiku asanu ndi awiri, madzi a chigumula anali pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis7:11 Chaka cha mazana asanu ndi limodzi cha moyo wa Nowa, mwezi wachiwiri, tsiku la khumi ndi asanu ndi awiri la mwezi, tsiku lomwelo akasupe onse a madzi aakulu anasefuka, ndi mazenera a kumwamba anatseguka." 
Genesis7:12 Ndipo mvula inali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku. 
Genesis7:13 Tsiku lomwelo analowa m'chingalawamo Nowa, ndi Semu, ndi Hamu, ndi Yafeti, ana a Nowa, ndi mkazi wake wa Nowa, ndi akazi atatu a ana ake pamodzi nao:" 
Genesis7:14 iwo, ndi zamoyo zonse monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zinyama zonse monga mwa mitundu yao, zokwawa zonse zokwawa pa dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zouluka zonse monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi mbalame zonse za mitundumitundu." 
Genesis7:15 Ndipo zinalowa kwa Nowa m'chingalawamo ziwiriziwiri zamoyo zonse, m'mene muli mpweya wa moyo." 
Genesis7:16 Zimene zinalowazo, zinalowa yamphongo ndi yaikazi zamoyo zonse, monga momwe Mulungu anamlamulira iye: ndipo Yehova anamtsekera iye." 
Genesis7:17 Ndipo chigumula chinali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai: ndipo madzi anachuluka natukula chingalawa, ndipo chinakwera pamwamba pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis7:18 Ndipo madzi anapambana, nachuluka ndithu pa dziko lapansi, ndipo chingalawa chinayandama pamadzi." 
Genesis7:19 Ndipo madzi anapambana ndithu pa dziko lapansi; anamizidwa mapiri aatali onse amene anali pansi pa thambo lonse. 
Genesis7:20 Madzi anapambana ndithu nakwera mikono khumi ndi isanu: namizidwa mapiri. 
Genesis7:21 Ndipo zinafa zamoyo zonse zoyenda pa dziko lapansi, zouluka, ndi nyama, ndi zamoyo, ndi zokwawa zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi, ndi anthu onse:" 
Genesis7:22 zonse zimene m'mphuno zao munali mpweya wa mzimu wa moyo, zonse zinali pamtunda, zinafa." 
Genesis7:23 Ndipo zinaonongedwa zamoyo zonse zimene zinali pa dziko lapansi, anthu, ndi nyama, ndi zokwawa, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga; ndipo zinaonongedwa pa dziko lapansi: anatsala Nowa yekha ndi amene anali pamodzi naye m'chingalawa." 
Genesis7:24 Ndipo anapambana madzi pa dziko lapansi masiku zana kudza makumi asanu. 
Genesis8:1 Ndipo Mulungu anakumbukira Nowa ndi zamoyo zonse, ndi nyama zonse zimene zinali pamodzi naye m'chingalawamo; ndipo Mulungu anapititsa mphepo pa dziko lapansi, naphwa madzi;" 
Genesis8:2 ndipo anatsekedwa akasupe a madzi aakulu ndi mazenera a kumwamba, niletsedwa mvula ya kumwamba;" 
Genesis8:3 ndipo madzi anaphweraphwerabe pa dziko lapansi: pamene anatha masiku zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu madzi anachepa. 
Genesis8:4 Ndipo chingalawa chinaima pa mapiri a Ararati, mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, tsiku lakhumi ndi asanu ndi awiri la mwezi." 
Genesis8:5 Ndipo madzi analinkuchepa kufikira mwezi wakhumi; mwezi wakhumi tsiku loyamba mwezi ndipo padaoneka mitu ya mapiri. 
Genesis8:6 Ndipo panali atapita masiku makumi anai, Nowa anatsegula pa zenera la chingalawa limene analipanga:" 
Genesis8:7 ndipo anatulutsa khungubwi, ndipo anatuluka kunka kwina ndi kwina kufikira adaphwa madzi pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:8 Ndipo anatulutsa njiwa imchokere, kuti aone kapena madzi anaphwa pamwamba pa dziko lapansi;" 
Genesis8:9 koma njiwayo siinapeza popondapo phazi lake, nibwera kwa iye kuchingalawako, pakuti madzi analipo pa dziko lonse lapansi; ndipo anatulutsa dzanja lake, naitenga, nailowetsa kwa iye m'chingalawamo." 
Genesis8:10 Ndipo analinda masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; natulutsanso njiwayo m'chingalawamo; 
Genesis8:11 ndipo njiwa inadza kwa iye madzulo; ndipo, taonani, m'kamwa mwake munali tsamba la azitona lothyoledwa: ndipo anadziwa Nowa kuti madzi analimkuphwa pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:12 Ndipo analindanso masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; natulutsa njiwayo: ndipo siinabweranso konse kwa iye. 
Genesis8:13 Ndipo panali chaka cha mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza chimodzi, mwezi woyamba, tsiku loyamba mwezi, madzi anaphwa pa dziko lapansi; ndipo Nowa anachotsa chindwi lake pachingalawa, nayang'ana, ndipo taonani, padauma pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:14 Mwezi wachiwiri tsiku la makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri la mwezi, lidauma dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:15 Mulungu ndipo ananena kwa Nowa, kuti," 
Genesis8:16 Tulukamoni m'chingalawamo, iwe ndi ana ako, ndi mkazi wako, ndi akazi a ana ako pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Genesis8:17 Tulutsa pamodzi ndi iwe zamoyo zonse zili ndi iwe za nyama zonse, zouluka, ndi zinyama, ndi zokwawa zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi; kuti ziswane pa dziko lapansi, zibalane, zichuluke pa dziko lapansi, zibalane, zichuluke pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:18 Ndipo anatuluka Nowa ndi ana ake, ndi mkazi wake, ndi akazi a ana ake, pamodzi naye:" 
Genesis8:19 zinyama zonse, zokwawa zonse, zouluka zonse, ndi zonse zokwawa pa dziko lapansi, monga mwa mitundu yao, zinatuluka m'chingalawamo." 
Genesis8:20 Ndipo Nowa anamanga guwa la nsembe la Yehova; natengapo nyama zodyedwa zonse ndi mbalame zodyedwa zonse napereka nsembe zopsereza paguwapo. 
Genesis8:21 Ndipo Yehova anamva chonunkhira chakukondweretsa; nati Yehova m'mtima mwake, Sindidzatembereranso konse nthaka chifukwa cha munthu; pakuti ndingaliro ya mtima wa munthu ili yoipa kuyambira pa unyamata wake; sindidzaphanso konse zinthu zonse zamoyo, monga momwe ndachitiramo." 
Genesis8:22 Pakukhalabe masiku a dziko lapansi, nthawi yakubzala ndi yakukunkha, chisanu ndi mafundi, malimwe ndi msakasa, usana ndi usiku sizidzalekai." 
Genesis9:1 Ndipo Mulungu anadalitsa Nowa ndi ana ake, nati kwa iwo, Mubalane, muchuluke, mudzaze dziko lapansi." 
Genesis9:2 Kuopsa kwanu, ndi kuchititsa mantha kwanu kudzakhala pa zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi, ndi pa zouluka zonse za m'mlengalenga; ndi pa zonse za m'nyanja, zapatsidwa m'dzanja lanu." 
Genesis9:3 Zoyenda zonse zamoyo zidzakhala zakudya zanu; monga therere laliwisi ndakupatsani inu zonsezo. 
Genesis9:4 Koma nyama, m'mene muli moyo wake, ndiwo mwazi wake, musadye." 
Genesis9:5 Zoonatu mwazi wanu wa miyoyo yanu ndidzafuna; pa dzanja la zinyama zonse ndidzaufuna: ndi pa dzanja la munthu, pa dzanja la mbale wake wa munthu ndidzaufuna moyo wa munthu." 
Genesis9:6 Amene akhetsa mwazi wa munthu, ndi munthunso mwazi wake udzakhetsedwa: chifukwa m'chifanizo cha Mulungu Iye anampanga munthu." 
Genesis9:7 Ndi inu, mubalane, muchuluke; muswane pa dziko lapansi, nimuchuluke m'menemo." 
Genesis9:8 Ndipo Mulungu ananena kwa Nowa ndi kwa ana ake pamodzi naye, kuti," 
Genesis9:9 Ndipo Ine, taonani, Ine ndikhazikitsa pangano langa pamodzi ndi inu, ndi mbeu zanu pambuyo panu;" 
Genesis9:10 ndi zamoyo zonse zili pamodzi ndi inu, zouluka, ng'ombe, ndi zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi, pamodzi ndi inu; zonse zotuluka m'chingalawa, zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi." 
Genesis9:11 Ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa pangano langa pamodzi ndi inu; zamoyo zonse sizidzamalizidwanso konse ndi madzi a chigumula; ndipo sikudzakhalanso konse chigumula cha kuononga dziko lapansi. 
Genesis9:12 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Ichi ndichi chizindikiro cha pangano limene ndipangana ndi Ine ndi inu, ndi zamoyo zonse zili pamodzi ndi inu, ku mibadwomibadwo;" 
Genesis9:13 ndiika utawaleza wanga m'mtambomo, ndipo udzakhala chizindikiro cha pangano lopangana ndi Ine ndi dziko lapansi." 
Genesis9:14 Ndipo padzakhala pophimba ndi mtambo Ine dziko lapansi, utawo udzaoneka m'mtambomo;" 
Genesis9:15 ndipo ndidzakumbukira pangano langa limene lili ndi Ine ndi inu, ndi zamoyo zonse zokhala ndi moyo; ndipo madzi sadzakhalanso konse chigumula chakuononga zamoyo zonse." 
Genesis9:16 Ndipo utawo udzakhala m'mtambo; ndipo ndidzauyang'anira kuti ndikumbukire pangano lachikhalire lili ndi Mulungu ndi zamoyo zonse zokhala ndi moyo pa dziko lapansi. 
Genesis9:17 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa, Ichi ndichi chizindikiro cha pangano ndalikhazikitsa popangana ndi Ine ndi zamoyo zonse za pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis9:18 Ndi ana amuna a Nowa amene anatuluka m'chingalawa ndiwo Semu, ndi Hamu, ndi Yafeti: Hamu ndiye atate wake wa Kanani." 
Genesis9:19 Amenewa ndiwo ana amuna atatu a Nowa: ndiwo anafalikira dziko lonse lapansi. 
Genesis9:20 Ndipo anayamba Nowa kukhala munthu wakulima nthaka, ndipo analima munda wamphesa:" 
Genesis9:21 namwa vinyo wake, naledzera; ndipo anali wamaliseche m'kati mwa hema wake." 
Genesis9:22 Ndipo Hamu atate wake wa Kanani, anauona umaliseche wa atate wake, nauza abale ake awiri amene anali kunja." 
Genesis9:23 Semu ndi Yafeti ndipo anatenga chofunda, nachiika pa mapewa ao a onse awiri, nayenda chambuyo, nafunditsa umaliseche wa atate wao: nkhope zao zinali chambuyo, osaona umaliseche wa atate ao." 
Genesis9:24 Nowa ndipo anauka kwa kuledzera kwake, nadziwa chimene anamchitira iye mwana wake wamng'ono." 
Genesis9:25 Ndipo anati, Wotembereredwa ndi Kanani; adzakhala kwa abale ake kapolo wa akapolo." 
Genesis9:26 Ndipo anati, Ayamikike Yehova, Mulungu wa Semu; Kanani akhale kapolo wake." 
Genesis9:27 Mulungu akuze Yafeti, akhale iye m'mahema a Semu; Kanani akhale kapolo wake." 
Genesis9:28 Ndipo Nowa anakhala ndi moyo chigumula chitapita, zaka mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu." 
Genesis9:29 Ndipo masiku onse a Nowa anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu: ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis10:1 Mibadwo ya ana a Nowa, Semu, Hamu ndi Yafeti, ndi iyi; kwa iwo ndipo kunabadwa ana amuna, chitapita chigumula chija." 
Genesis10:2 Ana amuna a Yafeti: Gomeri, ndi Magogi, ndi Madai, ndi Yavani, ndi Tubala, ndi Meseki ndi Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Ndi ana amuna a Gomeri: Asikenazi, ndi Rifati, ndi Togarima." 
Genesis10:4 Ndi ana amuna a Yavani: Elisa, ndi Tarisisi, ndi Kitimu, ndi Dodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Amenewo ndipo anagawa zisi za amitundu m'maiko mwao, onse amene monga mwa chinenedwe chao; ndi mwa mabanja ao, ndi m'mitundu yao." 
Genesis10:6 Ndi ana amuna a Hamu: Kusi, ndi Ejipito, ndi Puti, ndi Kanani." 
Genesis10:7 Ndi ana amuna a Kusi: Seba, ndi Havila, ndi Sabita, ndi Raama, ndi Sabiteka; ndi ana a Raama: Sheba ndi Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Ndipo Kusi anabala Nimirodi; ndipo iye anayamba kukhala wamphamvu pa dziko lapansi. 
Genesis10:9 Iye ndiye mpalu wamphamvu pamaso pa Yehova: chifukwa chake kunanenedwa, Monga Nimirodi mpalu wamphamvu pamaso pa Yehova." 
Genesis10:10 Ndipo kuyamba kwake kwa ufumu wake kunali Babiloni, ndi Ereke, ndi Akadi, ndi Kaline, m'dziko la Sinara." 
Genesis10:11 M'dziko momwemo iye anatuluka kunka ku Asiriya, namanga Ninive, ndi mudzi wa Rehoboti, ndi Kala," 
Genesis10:12 ndi Reseni pakati pa Ninive ndi Kala: umenewo ndi mudzi waukulu. 
Genesis10:13 Ejipito ndipo anabala Ludimu, ndi Anamimu, ndi Lehabu, ndi Nafituhimu," 
Genesis10:14 ndi Patirusimu, ndi Kasiluhimu, m'menemo ndipo anatuluka Afilisti, ndi Kafitori." 
Genesis10:15 Ndipo Kanani anabala Sidoni woyamba wake, ndi Heti:" 
Genesis10:16 ndi Ayebusi, ndi Aamori, ndi Agirigasi;" 
Genesis10:17 ndi Ahivi, ndi Aariki, ndi Asini;" 
Genesis10:18 ndi Aaravadi, ndi Aazemari, ndi Ahamati; pambuyo pake pamenepo ndipo mabanja a Akanani anafalikira." 
Genesis10:19 Ndipo malire a Akanani anayamba pa Sidoni, pakunka ku Gerari ndi ku Gaza; pakunka ku Sodomu, ndi ku Gomora, ndi Adima, ndi Zeboimu, kufikira ku Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Amenewa ndi ana amuna a Hamu monga mwa mabanja ao, mwa zinenedwe zao, m'maiko ao, m'mitundu yao." 
Genesis10:21 Ndiponso kwa Semu atate wa ana onse a Eberi, mkulu wa Yafeti, kwa iye kunabadwa ana." 
Genesis10:22 Ana amuna a Semu; Elamu, ndi Asiriya, ndi Aripakisadi, ndi Ludi, ndi Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Ndi ana a Aramu: Uzi ndi Huli ndi Getere, ndi Masi." 
Genesis10:24 Aripakisadi ndipo anabala Sela; ndipo Sela anabala Eberi. 
Genesis10:25 Kwa Eberi ndipo kunabadwa ana amuna awiri; dzina la wina ndi Pelegi; chifukwa kuti m'masiku ake dziko lapansi linagawanikana; dzina la mphwake ndi Yokotani. 
Genesis10:26 Ndipo Yokotani anabala Alimodadi, ndi Selefi, ndi Hazara-Maveti, ndi Yera;" 
Genesis10:27 ndi Hadoramu ndi Uzali, ndi Dikila;" 
Genesis10:28 ndi Obala, ndi Abimaele, ndi Sheba;" 
Genesis10:29 ndi Ofiri ndi Havila, ndi Yobabu; onse amenewa ndi ana a Yokotani." 
Genesis10:30 Kwao kunayamba pa Mesa pakunka ku Sefari phiri la kum'mawa. 
Genesis10:31 Amenewa ndi ana a Semu, monga mwa mabanja ao, mwa zinenedwe zao, m'maiko ao, m'mitundu yao." 
Genesis10:32 Amenewo ndi mabanja a ana a Nowa monga mwa mibadwo yao, m'mitundu yao: ndi amenewo anagawanika mitundu pa dziko lapansi, chitapita chigumula." 
Genesis11:1 Ndipo dziko lapansi linali la chinenedwe chimodzi ndi chilankhulidwe chimodzi. 
Genesis11:2 Ndipo panali pamene anayendayenda ulendo kum'mawa, anapeza chigwa m'dziko la Sinara, ndipo anakhala kumeneko." 
Genesis11:3 Ndipo ananenana wina ndi wina, Tiyeni tipange njerwa, tiziochetse. Ndipo anali ndi njerwa naziyesa miyala, ndi katondo anayesa matope." 
Genesis11:4 Ndipo anati, Tiyeni, timange mudzi ndi nsanja, pamutu pake pafikire kumwamba; ndipo tidzipangire ife tokha dzina kuti tisabalalike pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Genesis11:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsikira kudzaona mudzi ndi nsanja imene analinkumanga ana a anthu. 
Genesis11:6 Ndipo Yehova anati, Taonani, anthu ali amodzi, ndipo onse ali nacho chinenedwe chao chimodzi; ndipo ichi ayamba kuchita: ndipo tsopano palibe kanthu kakuletsedwa nao kamene akafuna kuchita." 
Genesis11:7 Tiyeni, titsike, pomwepo tisokoneze chinenedwe chao, kuti wina asamvere chinenedwe cha mnzake." 
Genesis11:8 Ndipo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndipo analeka kumanga mudzi." 
Genesis11:9 Chifukwa chake anatcha dzina lake Babele; pakuti kumeneko Yehova anasokoneza chinenedwe cha dziko lonse lapansi; kuyambira pamenepo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Genesis11:10 Mibadwo ya Semu ndi iyi: Semu anali wa zaka zana limodzi ndipo anabala Aripakisadi, chitapita chigumula zaka ziwiri;" 
Genesis11:11 ndipo Semu anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana asanu, atabala Aripakisadi, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:12 Ndipo Aripakisadi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu kudza zisanu nabala Sela; 
Genesis11:13 ndipo Aripakisadi anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana anai kudza zitatu, atabala Sela, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:14 Ndipo Sela anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu, nabala Eberi;" 
Genesis11:15 ndipo Sela anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana anai kudza zitatu, atabala Eberi, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:16 Ndipo Eberi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu kudza zinai, nabala Pelegi;" 
Genesis11:17 ndipo Eberi anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana anai kudza makumi awiri, atabala Pelegi, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:18 Ndipo Pelegi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu, nabala Reu;" 
Genesis11:19 ndipo Pelegi anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana awiri kudza zisanu ndi zinai, atabala Reu, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:20 Ndipo Reu anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu kudza ziwiri, nabala Serugi:" 
Genesis11:21 ndipo Reu anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana awiri kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri, atabala Serugi, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:22 Ndipo Serugi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu, nabala Nahori:" 
Genesis11:23 ndipo Serugi anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana awiri, atabala Nahori, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:24 Ndipo Nahori anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi awiri kudza zisanu ndi zinai, nabala Tera:" 
Genesis11:25 ndipo Nahori anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi kudza khumi ndi zisanu ndi zinai, atabala Tera, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Genesis11:26 Ndipo Tera anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, nabala Abramu, ndi Nahori ndi Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Mibadwo ya Tera ndi iyi: Tera anabala Abramu, ndi Nahori, ndi Harani; ndipo Harani anabala Loti." 
Genesis11:28 Ndipo anafa Harani pamaso pa atate wake Tera m'dziko la kubadwa kwake, m'Uri wa kwa Akaldeya." 
Genesis11:29 Ndipo Abramu ndi Nahori, anadzitengera okha akazi; dzina lake la mkazi wa Abramu ndilo Sarai; ndi dzina lake la mkazi wa Nahori ndilo Milika, mwana wake wa Harani, atate wake wa Milika, ndi atate wake wa Isika." 
Genesis11:30 Koma Sarai anali wouma; analibe mwana. 
Genesis11:31 Ndipo Tera anatenga Abramu mwana wake wamwamuna, ndi Loti mwana wa Harani, mwana wake wamwamuna, ndi Sarai mpongozi wake, mkazi wa mwana wake Abramu; ndipo anatuluka pamodzi nao ku Uri wa kwa Akaldeya kuti amuke ku dziko la Kanani, ndipo anafika ku Harani, nakhala kumeneko." 
Genesis11:32 Masiku a Tera anali zaka mazana awiri kudza zisanu; ndipo anafa Tera m'Harani. 
Genesis12:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Abramu, Tuluka iwe m'dziko lako, ndi kwa abale ako, ndi kunyumba ya atate wako, kunka ku dziko limene ndidzakusonyeza iwe;" 
Genesis12:2 ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe mtundu waukulu, ndipo ndidzakudalitsa iwe, ndi kubukitsa dzina lako; nukhale iwe mdalitso;" 
Genesis12:3 ndipo ndidzadalitsa amene akudalitsa iwe; ndi kutemberera iye amene akutemberera iwe; ndipo mwa iwe adzadalitsidwa mabanja onse a dziko lapansi. 
Genesis12:4 Ndipo anamuka Abramu monga Yehova ananena kwa iye, ndipo Loti anamuka pamodzi naye: ndipo Abramu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza zisanu, pamene anatuluka m'Harani." 
Genesis12:5 Ndipo Abramu anatenga Sarai mkazi wake, ndi Loti mwana wa mphwake, ndi chuma chao chimene anasonkhanitsa, ndi miyoyo imene anabala m'Harani; natuluka kunka ku dziko la Kanani, ndipo anadza ku dziko la Kanani." 
Genesis12:6 Ndipo Abramu anapitira m'dziko kufikira ku malo a Sekemu, kufikira ku mtengo wathundu wa ku More. Akanani anali m'dzikomo nthawi yomweyo." 
Genesis12:7 Ndipo Yehova anaonekera kwa Abramu nati, Ndidzapatsa mbeu yako dziko lino: pamenepo anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe amene anamuonekera iye." 
Genesis12:8 Ndipo iye anachoka kumeneko kunka kuphiri la kum'mawa kwa Betele, namanga hema wake; Betele anali kumadzulo, ndi Ai anali kum'mawa: kumeneko ndipo anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe, naitanira dzina la Yehova." 
Genesis12:9 Ndipo Abramu anayenda ulendo wake, nayendayenda kunka kumwera." 
Genesis12:10 Ndipo munali njala m'dzikomo, ndipo anatsikira Abramu ku Ejipito kukakhala kumeneko, chifukwa kuti njala inali yaikulu m'dziko m'menemo." 
Genesis12:11 Ndipo panali pamene anayandikira kulowa m'Ejipito, anati kwa Sarai mkazi wake, Taonani, ndidziwa kuti ndiwe mkazi wokongola maonekedwe ako;" 
Genesis12:12 ndipo padzakhala pamene adzakuona iwe Aejipito, adzati, Uyu ndi mkazi wake: ndipo adzandipha ine, koma iwe adzakuleka ndi moyo." 
Genesis12:13 Uzikanenatu, kuti iwe ndiwe mlongo wanga: kuti chidzakhala chabwino ndi ine, chifukwa cha iwe, ndi kuti moyo wanga usungike ndi iwe." 
Genesis12:14 Ndipo panali pamene Abramu analowa m'Ejipito, Aejipito anaona kuti mkazi anali wokongola kwambiri." 
Genesis12:15 Ndipo akalonga ake a Farao anamuona iye, namyamikira iye kwa Farao; ndipo anamuka ndi mkazi kunyumba kwake kwa Farao." 
Genesis12:16 Ndipo anamchitira Abramu bwino chifukwa cha iyeyo; ndipo anali nazo nkhosa, ndi ng'ombe, ndi abulu, ndi akapolo, ndi adzakazi, ndi abulu akazi, ndi ngamira." 
Genesis12:17 Koma Yehova anavutitsa Farao ndi banja lake ndi nthenda zazikulu chifukwa cha Sarai mkazi wake wa Abramu. 
Genesis12:18 Ndipo Farao anaitana Abramu, nati, Nanga nchiyani ichi wandichitira ine? Chifukwa chanji sunandiuza ine kuti ndiye mkazi wako?" 
Genesis12:19 Chifukwa chanji unati, Ndiye mlongo wanga? Kotero ndinamtenga iye akhale mkazi wanga; tsopano suyu mkazi wako; mtenge nuchoke." 
Genesis12:20 Ndipo Farao analamulira anthu ake za iye; ndipo anamperekeza iye m'njira ndi mkazi wake ndi zonse anali nazo. 
Genesis13:1 Ndipo anakwera Abramu kuchoka ku Ejipito, iye ndi mkazi wake, ndi zonse anali nazo, ndi Loti pamodzi naye, kunka ku dziko la kumwera." 
Genesis13:2 Ndipo Abramu anali wolemera ndithu ndi ng'ombe ndi siliva ndi golide. 
Genesis13:3 Ndipo anankabe ulendo wake kuchokera ku dziko la kumwera kunka ku Betele, kufikira kumalo kumene kunali hema wake poyamba paja pakati pa Betele ndi Ai;" 
Genesis13:4 kumalo kwa guwa la nsembe analimanga iye kumeneko, poyamba paja; ndipo pamenepo Abramu anaitanira dzina la Yehova." 
Genesis13:5 Ndiponso Loti anayenda ndi Abramu anali ndi nkhosa ndi ng'ombe ndi mahema. 
Genesis13:6 Ndipo dziko silinathe kuwakwanira iwo, kuti akhale pamodzi: chifukwa kuti chuma chao chinali chambiri, ndipo sanathe kukhala pamodzi." 
Genesis13:7 Ndipo panali ndeu, abusa a Abramu kudana ndi abusa a Loti: Akanani ndi Aperizi ndipo analinkukhala nthawi yomweyo m'dzikomo." 
Genesis13:8 Ndipo Abramu anati kwa Loti, Tisachite ndeu, ine ndi iwe, abusa anga ndi abusa ako: chifukwa kuti ife ndife abale." 
Genesis13:9 Dziko lonse silili pamaso pako kodi? Ulekanetu ndi ine: ukanka iwe ku dzanja lamanzere, ine ndinka ku dzanja lamanja: ukanka iwe ku dzanja lamanja, ine ndinka ku dzanja lamanzere." 
Genesis13:10 Ndipo Loti anatukula maso ake nayang'ana chigwa chonse cha Yordani kuti chonsecho chinali ndi madzi ambiri, asanaononge Yehova Sodomu ndi Gomora, monga munda wa Yehova, monga dziko la Ejipito pakunka ku Zowari." 
Genesis13:11 Ndipo Loti anasankha chigwa chonse cha Yordani; ndipo Loti anachoka ulendo wake kunka kum'mawa: ndipo analekana wina ndi mnzake. 
Genesis13:12 Ndipo Abramu anakhala m'dziko la Kanani, ndipo Loti anakhala m'midzi ya m'chigwa, nasendeza hema wake kufikira ku Sodomu." 
Genesis13:13 Ndipo anthu a ku Sodomu anali oipa ndi ochimwa kwambiri pamaso pa Yehova. 
Genesis13:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Abramu, atalekana naye Loti, Tukulatu maso ako, nuyang'anire kuyambira kumene uliko, kumpoto, ndi kumwera, ndi kum'mawa, ndi kumadzulo:" 
Genesis13:15 chifukwa kuti dziko lonse limene ulinkuona, ndidzakupatsa iwe ndi mbeu yako nthawi yonse." 
Genesis13:16 Ndipo ndidzayesa mbeu yako monga fumbi lapansi: chotere kuti ngati munthu angathe kuwerenga fumbi lapansi, chomwechonso mbeu yako idzawerengedwa." 
Genesis13:17 Tauka, nuyendeyende m'dzikoli m'litali mwake ndi m'mimba mwake; chifukwa kuti ndidzakupatsa iwe limenelo." 
Genesis13:18 Ndipo Abramu anasuntha hema wake nafika nakhala pa mitengo yathundu ya pa Mamure, imene ili m'Hebroni, nammangira Yehova kumeneko guwa la nsembe." 
Genesis14:1 Ndipo panali masiku a Amurafere mfumu ya Sinara, ndi Ariyoki mfumu ya Elasara, ndi Kedorilaomere mfumu ya Elamu, ndi Tidala mfumu ya Goimu," 
Genesis14:2 iwo anathira nkhondo pa Bera mfumu ya Sodomu, ndi pa Birisa, mfumu ya Gomora, ndi pa Sinabe mfumu ya Adima, ndi pa Semebera mfumu ya Zeboimu, ndi pa mfumu ya Bela (kumeneko ndi ku Zowari)." 
Genesis14:3 Onse amenewo anadziphatikana pa chigwa cha Sidimu (pamenepo ndi pa Nyanja ya Mchere). 
Genesis14:4 Zaka khumi ndi ziwiri iwo anamtumikira Kedorilaomere, chaka chakhumi ndi chitatu anapanduka." 
Genesis14:5 Chaka chakhumi ndi chinai ndipo anadza Kedorilaomere ndi mafumu amene anali naye, nawakantha Arefaimu m'Asiteroti-Karanaimu, ndi Azuzimu m'Hamu, ndi Aemimu m'Savekiriyataimu," 
Genesis14:6 ndi Ahori pa phiri lao Seiri kufikira ku Eliparani, kumene kuli m'mbali mwa chipululu." 
Genesis14:7 Ndipo anabwera nafika ku Enimisipati (kumeneko ndi ku Kadesi), nakantha dziko lonse la Aamaleke, ndiponso Aamori amene akhala m'Hazazoni-Tamara." 
Genesis14:8 Ndipo anatuluka mfumu ya Sodomu, ndi ya Gomora, ndi mfumu ya Adima, ndi mfumu ya Zeboimu, ndi mfumu ya Bela (kumeneko ndi ku Zowari) ndipo anawathira nkhondo m'chigwa cha Sidimu;" 
Genesis14:9 ndi Kedorilaomere mfumu ya Elamu, ndi Tidala mfumu ya Goimu, ndi Amurafere mfumu ya Sinara, ndi Ariyoki mfumu ya Elasara; mafumu anai kugwirana ndi asanu." 
Genesis14:10 Chigwa cha Sidimu chinali ndi zitengetenge thoo; ndipo anathawa mafumu a ku Sodomu ndi Gomora nagwa m'menemo: amene anatsala anathawira kuphiri. 
Genesis14:11 Ndipo anatenga chuma chonse cha Sodomu ndi Gomora ndi zakudya zao zonse, namuka." 
Genesis14:12 Ndipo anagwira Loti mwana wa Abramu amene anakhala m'Sodomu, ndi chuma chake, namuka." 
Genesis14:13 Ndipo anadza wina amene anapulumuka namuuza Abramu Muhebri; ndipo iye analinkukhala pa mitengo yathundu ya pa Mamure Mwamori, mkulu wake wa Esikolo, ndi mkulu wake wa Anere; amenewo ndiwo opangana naye Abramu." 
Genesis14:14 Pamene anamva Abramu kuti mphwake anagwidwa, anatuluka natsogolera anyamata ake opangika, obadwa kunyumba kwake, mazana atatu kudza khumi ndi asanu ndi atatu, nawalondola kufikira ku Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Ndipo anadzigawanizira iwo usiku, iye ndi anyamata ake, nawakantha, nawapirikitsa kufikira ku Hoba, ndiko ku dzanja lamanzere la ku Damasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Ndipo anabwera nacho chuma chonse, nabwera naye Loti yemwe ndi chuma chake, ndi akazi ndi anthu omwe." 
Genesis14:17 Ndipo anatuluka mfumu ya Sodomu kukomana naye, atabwera anatha kuwakantha Kedorilaomere ndi mafumu amene anali naye, ku chigwa cha Save (ndiko ku chigwa cha mfumu)," 
Genesis14:18 Ndipo Melkizedeki mfumu ya ku Salemu, anatuluka nao mkate ndi vinyo: iye ndiye wansembe wa Mulungu Wamkulukulu." 
Genesis14:19 Ndipo anamdalitsa iye, nati, Abramu adalitsike ndi Mulungu Wamkulukulu, mwini kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi;" 
Genesis14:20 ayamikike Mulungu Wamkulukulu amene wapereka adani ako m'dzanja lako. Ndipo anampatsa iye limodzi la magawo khumi la zonse. 
Genesis14:21 Mfumu ya Sodomu ndipo inati kwa Abramu, Ndipatse ine anthu, nutenge chuma iwe wekha." 
Genesis14:22 Ndipo Abramu anati kwa mfumu ya Sodomu, Dzanja langa ndamtukulira Yehova, Mulungu Wamkulukulu, mwini kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi" 
Genesis14:23 kuti sindidzatenga ngakhale thonje ngakhale chingwe cha nsapato, ngakhale kanthu kalikonse kako, kuti unganene, Ndamlemeza Abramu;" 
Genesis14:24 koma chokhachi anadya anyamata, ndi gawo lao la anthu amene ananka pamodzi ndi ine, Anere, Esikolo, ndi Mamure, iwo atenge gawo lao." 
Genesis15:1 Zitapita izo, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Abramu m'masomphenya, kuti, Usaope, Abramu, Ine ndine chikopa chako ndi mphotho yako yaikulukulu." 
Genesis15:2 Ndipo Abramu anati, Ambuye Mulungu, mudzandipatsa ine chiyani popeza ndine wopanda mwana, ndi amene adzakhala mwini nyumba yanga ndiye Eliyezere wa ku Damasiko?" 
Genesis15:3 Ndipo Abramu anati, Taonani, simunandipatse ine mbeu; ndipo, taonani, wobadwa m'nyumba mwanga adzalowa m'malo mwanga." 
Genesis15:4 Ndipo, taonani, mau a Yehova anadza kwa iye kuti, Uyu sadzakhala wakulowa m'malo mwako; koma iye amene adzatuluka m'chuuno mwako, ndiye adzakhala wakulowa m'malo mwako." 
Genesis15:5 Ndipo anamtulutsa iye kunja, nati, Tayang'anatu kumwamba, uwerenge nyenyezi, ngati ukhoza kuziwerenga zimenezo: ndipo anati kwa iye, Zoterezo zidzakhala mbeu zako." 
Genesis15:6 Ndipo anakhulupirira Yehova, ndipo kunayesedwa kwa iye chilungamo." 
Genesis15:7 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ine ndine Yehova amene ndinatulutsa iwe m'Uri wa kwa Akaldeya, kuti ndikupatse iwe dziko limeneli likhale lakolako." 
Genesis15:8 Ndipo anati, Ambuye Mulungu, nanga ndidzadziwa bwanji kuti lidzakhala cholowa changa?" 
Genesis15:9 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Kanditengere Ine ng'ombe yaikazi ya zaka zitatu, ndi mbuzi yaikazi ya zaka zitatu, ndi tonde wa zaka zitatu, ndi njiwa, ndi bunda." 
Genesis15:10 Ndipo anatenga iye zonse zimenezo, nazidula pakati, naika bandu popenyana ndi linzake: koma mbalame sanazidule." 
Genesis15:11 Pamene miimba inatsikira panyama, Abramu anaingitsa iyo." 
Genesis15:12 Ndipo linalinkulowa dzuwa, ndi tulo tatikulu tinamgwera Abramu: ndipo taonani, kuopsa kwa mdima waukulu kunamgwera iye." 
Genesis15:13 Ndipo anati kwa Abramu, Dziwitsa ndithu kuti mbeu zako zidzakhala alendo m'dziko la eni, nizidzatumikira iwo, ndipo iwo adzasautsa izo zaka mazana anai;" 
Genesis15:14 ndiponso mtunduwo adzautumikira, Ine ndidzauweruza: ndiponso pambuyo pake adzatuluka ndi chuma chambiri." 
Genesis15:15 Ndipo iwe udzanka kwa makolo ako m'mtendere; nudzaikidwa ndi ukalamba wabwino. 
Genesis15:16 Koma iwo adzabweranso kuno mbadwo wachinai: pakuti mphulupulu za Aamori sizinakwaniridwe. 
Genesis15:17 Ndipo panali pamene litalowa dzuwa ndi kudza mdima, taonani, ng'anjo yofuka utsi ndi muuni wamoto wapita pakati pa mabanduwo." 
Genesis15:18 Tsiku lomwelo Yehova anapangana chipangano ndi Abramu, nati, Ndidzapatsa mbeu zako dziko ili, kuyambira pa mtsinje wa ku Ejipito kufikira pa mtsinje waukulu, mtsinje wa Yufurate:" 
Genesis15:19 Akeni ndi Akenizi, Akadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 ndi Ahiti, ndi Aperizi, ndi Arefaimu," 
Genesis15:21 ndi Aamori, ndi Akanani, ndi Agirigasi, ndi Ayebusi." 
Genesis16:1 Ndipo Sarai mkazi wake wa Abramu sanambalire iye mwana; ndipo anali ndi mdzakazi, wa ku Ejipito, dzina lake Hagara." 
Genesis16:2 Ndipo Sarai anati kwa Abramu, Taonanitu, Yehova anandiletsa ine kuti ndisabale: lowanitu kwa mdzakazi wanga; kapena ndikalandire ndi iye ana. Ndipo Abramu anamvera mau a Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Ndipo Sarai mkazi wake wa Abramu anatenga Hagara mdzakazi wake wa ku Ejipito, Abramu atakhala m'dziko la Kanani zaka khumi, nampereka iye kwa Abramu mwamuna wake, kuti akhale mkazi wake." 
Genesis16:4 Ndipo analowa kwa Hagara, ndipo iye anatenga pakati. Pamene anaona kuti anatenga pakati, anapeputsa wakuka wake m'maso mwake." 
Genesis16:5 Ndipo Sarai anati kwa Abramu, kusauka kwanga kukhale pa iwe: ndakupatsa iwe mdzakazi wanga pamtima pako; ndipo pakuona kuti anatenga pakati anandipeputsa ine m'maso mwake: Yehova aweruze pakati pa iwe ndi ine." 
Genesis16:6 Koma Abramu anati kwa Sarai, Taona, mdzakazi wako ali m'dzanja lako, umchitire iye chimene chikukomera m'maso mwako. Ndipo Sarai anamsautsa iye, ndipo anathawa kumaso kwake." 
Genesis16:7 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anampeza iye pa kasupe wa madzi m'chipululu, pa kasupe wa pa njira ya ku Suri." 
Genesis16:8 Ndipo anati, Hagara, mdzakazi wake wa Sarai, ufumira kuti? Unka kuti? Ndipo anati, Ndithawa ine kumaso kwake kwa wakuka wanga Sarai." 
Genesis16:9 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye, Bwera kwa wakuka wako, udzichepetse wekha pamanja pake." 
Genesis16:10 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye, Ndidzachulukitsa ndithu mbeu zako, kuti unyinji wao sudzawerengeka." 
Genesis16:11 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye, Taona, uli ndi pakati, ndipo udzabala mwana wamwamuna; nudzamutcha dzina lake Ismaele; chifukwa Yehova anamva kusauka kwako." 
Genesis16:12 Ndipo iye adzakhala munthu wa m'thengo; ndipo dzanja lake lidzakhala lotsutsana ndi anthu onse, ndi manja a anthu onse adzakhala otsutsana naye: ndipo iye adzakhala pamaso pa abale ake onse." 
Genesis16:13 Ndipo anatcha dzina la Yehova amene ananena naye, Ndinu Mulungu wakundiona ine; pakuti anati, Kodi kunonso ndayang'ana pambuyo pake pa Iye amene wakundiona ine?" 
Genesis16:14 Chifukwa chake chitsimecho chinatchedwa Beere-Lahai-Roi; taonani chili pakati pa Kadesi ndi Beredi. 
Genesis16:15 Ndipo Hagara anambalira Abramu mwana wamwamuna ndipo Abramu anatcha dzina la mwana wake amene anambalira iye Hagara, Ismaele." 
Genesis16:16 Ndipo Abramu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi chimodzi, pamene Hagara anambalira Abramu Ismaele." 
Genesis17:1 Pamene Abramu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu ndi zinai, Yehova anamuonekera Abramu nati kwa iye, Ine ndine Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse; yenda iwe pamaso panga, nukhale wangwiro." 
Genesis17:2 Ndipo ndidzapangana pangano langa ndi Ine ndi iwe, ndipo ndidzachulukitsa iwe kwambiri." 
Genesis17:3 Ndipo Abramu anagwa nkhope pansi, ndipo Yehova ananena naye kuti," 
Genesis17:4 Koma Ine, taona, pangano langa lili ndi iwe, ndipo udzakhala iwe atate wa khamu la mitundu." 
Genesis17:5 Sudzatchedwanso dzina lako Abramu, koma dzina lako lidzakhala Abrahamu; chifukwa kuti ndakuyesa iwe atate wa khamu la mitundu." 
Genesis17:6 Ndipo ndikubalitsa iwe ndithu, ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe mitundu, ndipo mafumu adzatuluka mwa iwe." 
Genesis17:7 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa pangano langa ndi Ine ndi iwe pa mbeu zako za pambuyo pako m'mibadwo yao, kuti likhale pangano la nthawi zonse, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wako ndi wa mbeu zako za pambuyo pako." 
Genesis17:8 Ndipo ndidzakupatsa iwe ndi mbeu zako za pambuyo pako, dziko la maulendo anu, dziko lonse la Kanani likhale lako nthawi zonse: ndipo Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wao." 
Genesis17:9 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Abrahamu, Koma iwe, uzikumbukira pangano langa, iwe ndi mbeu zako za pambuyo pako m'mibadwo yao." 
Genesis17:10 Ili ndi pangano langa limene uzisunga pakati pa Ine ndi iwe ndi mbeu zako za pambuyo pako: azidulidwa amuna onse a mwa inu. 
Genesis17:11 Muzidula khungu lanu; ndipo chidzakhala chizindikiro cha pangano pakati pa Ine ndi inu. 
Genesis17:12 A masiku asanu ndi atatu azidulidwa mwa inu, ana amuna onse m'mibadwo mwanu, amene abadwa m'nyumba ndi amene agulidwa ndi ndalama kwa alendo ali onse, wosakhala mwa mbeu zako." 
Genesis17:13 Azidulidwatu amene abadwa m'nyumba mwako ndi amene agulidwa ndi ndalama zako: ndipo pangano langa lidzakhala m'thupi mwako pangano losatha. 
Genesis17:14 Ndipo mwamuna wosadulidwa, wosadulidwa khungu lake, munthuyo amsadze mwa anthu a mtundu wake; waphwanya pangano langa." 
Genesis17:15 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Abrahamu, Koma Sarai mkazi wako, usam'tcha dzina lake Sarai, koma dzina lake ndi Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ndipo ndidzamdalitsa iye, ndiponso ndidzakupatsa iwe mwana wamwamuna wobadwa mwa iye, inde, ndidzamdalitsa iye, ndipo adzakhala amake amitundu, mafumu a anthu adzatuluka mwa iye." 
Genesis17:17 Ndipo Abrahamu adagwa nkhope pansi, naseka, nati m'mtima mwake, Kodi mwana adzabadwa kwa iye amene ali wa zaka zana? Kodi Sara wa zaka makumi asanu ndi anai adzabala?" 
Genesis17:18 Ndipo Abrahamu anati kwa Mulungu, Ha! Ismaele akhale ndi moyo pamaso panu!" 
Genesis17:19 Ndipo Mulungu anati, Koma Sara mkazi wako adzakubalira iwe mwana wamwamuna; ndipo udzamutcha dzina lake Isaki; ndipo ndidzalimbikitsa naye pangano langa, kuti likhale pangano la nthawi zonse, la ku mbeu zake za pambuyo pake." 
Genesis17:20 Koma za Ismaele, ndamvera iwe: taona, ndamdalitsa iye, ndipo ndidzamchulukitsa iye ndithu; adzabala akalonga khumi ndi awiri, ndipo ndidzamuyesa iye mtundu waukulu." 
Genesis17:21 Koma pangano langa ndidzalimbikitsa ndi Isaki, amene Sara adzakubalira iwe nthawi yomwe yino chaka chamawa." 
Genesis17:22 Ndipo analeka kunena naye, ndipo Mulungu anakwera kuchokera kwa Abrahamu." 
Genesis17:23 Ndipo Abrahamu anatenga Ismaele mwana wake ndi onse amene anabadwa m'nyumba mwake, ndi onse amene anagulidwa ndi ndalama zake, amuna onse a mwa anthu a kunyumba kwake kwa Abrahamu, nadula khungu lao tsiku lomwelo, monga Mulungu ananena naye." 
Genesis17:24 Ndipo Abrahamu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu ndi zinai, pamene anadulidwa m'khungu lake." 
Genesis17:25 Ndipo Ismaele mwana wake anali wa zaka khumi ndi zitatu pamene anadulidwa m'khungu lake. 
Genesis17:26 Tsiku lomwelo anadulidwa Abrahamu ndi Ismaele mwana wake. 
Genesis17:27 Ndipo amuna onse a m'nyumba mwake obadwa m'nyumba, ndi ogulidwa ndi ndalama kwa alendo, anadulidwa pamodzi naye." 
Genesis18:1 Ndipo Yehova anamuonekera iye pa mtengo yathundu ya ku Mamure, pamene anakhala pa khomo la hema wake pakutentha dzuwa." 
Genesis18:2 Ndipo anatukula maso ake, nayang'ana, taonani, anthu atatu anaima pandunji pake; pamene anaona iwo, anawathamangira kuchoka ku khomo la hema kukakomana nao, nawerama pansi, nati," 
Genesis18:3 Mbuyanga, ngatitu ndi ndikapeza ufulu pamaso panu, musapitiriretu pa kapolo wanu;" 
Genesis18:4 nditengetu madzi pang'ono, ndikusambitseni mapazi anu, mupumule pansi pa mtengo;" 
Genesis18:5 ndipo ndidzatenga chakudya pang'ono, nimutonthoze mitima yanu; mutatero mudzapitirira, chifukwa mwafika kwa kapolo wanu. Ndipo anati, Chita chomwecho monga momwe wanena." 
Genesis18:6 Ndipo Abrahamu analowa msanga m'hema wake kwa Sara, nati, Konza msanga miyeso itatu ya ufa wosalala, nuumbe, nupange mikate." 
Genesis18:7 Ndipo Abrahamu anafulumira kunka kuzoweta, natenga kamwana ka ng'ombe kofewa ndi kabwino, napatsa mnyamata, ndipo anafulumira kuphika." 
Genesis18:8 Ndipo anatenga mafuta amkaka, ndi mkaka, ndi kamwana ka ng'ombe kamene anaphika, naziika patsogolo pao; ndipo iye anaimirira iwo patsinde pa mtengo, ndipo anadya." 
Genesis18:9 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ali kuti Sara mkazi wako? Ndipo anati, Taonani m'hemamo." 
Genesis18:10 Ndipo anati, Ndidzabwera kwa iwe ndithu pakufika nyengo yake; taonani Sara mkazi wako adzakhala ndi mwana wamwamuna. Ndipo Sara anamva pakhomo pa hema amene anali pambuyo pake." 
Genesis18:11 Koma Abrahamu ndi Sara anali okalamba, anapitirira masiku ao; ndipo kunaleka kwa Sara konga kumachita ndi akazi;" 
Genesis18:12 ndipo Sara anaseka m'mtima mwake, nati, Kodi ndidzakhala ndi kukondwa ine nditakalamba, ndiponso mbuyanga ali wokalamba?" 
Genesis18:13 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Abrahamu, Bwanji anaseka Sara, kuti, Kodi ndidzabala ine ndithu, ine amene ndakalamba?" 
Genesis18:14 Kodi chilipo chinthu chomkanika Yehova? Pa nthawi yoikidwa ndidzabwera kwa iwe, pakufika nyengo yake, ndipo Sara adzakhala ndi mwana wamwamuna." 
Genesis18:15 Koma Sara anakana, nati, Sindinasekai; chifukwa anaopa. Ndipo anati, Iai; koma unaseka." 
Genesis18:16 Ndipo anthuwo anauka kuchokera kumeneko nayang'ana ku Sodomu; ndipo Abrahamu ananka nao kuwaperekeza. 
Genesis18:17 Ndipo Yehova adati, Kodi ndidzabisira Abrahamu chimene ndichita?" 
Genesis18:18 Pakuti Abrahamu adzakhala ndithu wamkulu ndi wamphamvu, ndipo mitundu yonse ya dziko lapansi idzadalitsika mwa iye?" 
Genesis18:19 Chifukwa ndamdziwa iye kuti alamulire ana ake ndi banja lake la pambuyo pake, kuti asunge njira ya Yehova, kuchita chilungamo ndi chiweruziro, kuti Yehova akamtengere Abrahamu chomwe anamnenera iye." 
Genesis18:20 Ndipo anati Yehova, Popeza kulira kwa Sodomu ndi Gomora kuli kwakukulu, ndipo popeza kuchimwa kwao kuli kulemera ndithu," 
Genesis18:21 ndidzatsikatu ndikaone ngati anachita monse monga kulira kwake kumene kunandifikira: ngati sanatero ndidzadziwa. 
Genesis18:22 Ndipo anthuwo anatembenuka nachoka kumeneko, napita kunka ku Sodomu. Koma Abrahamu anaimabe pamaso pa Yehova." 
Genesis18:23 Ndipo Abrahamu anayandikira nati, Kodi mudzaononga olungama pamodzi ndi oipa?" 
Genesis18:24 Kapena alipo olungama makumi asanu m'kati mwa mudzi; kodi mudzaononga, simudzasiya malowo chifukwa cha olungama makumi asanu ali momwemo?" 
Genesis18:25 Musamatero ai, kupha olungama pamodzi ndi oipa, kuta olungama akhale monga oipa; musamatero ai; kodi sadzachita zoyenera woweruza wa dziko lonse lapansi?" 
Genesis18:26 Ndipo anati Yehova, Ndikapeza m'Sodomu olungama makumi asanu m'kati mwa mudzi, ndidzasiya malo onse chifukwa cha iwo." 
Genesis18:27 Ndipo anayankha Abrahamu nati, Taonanitu, ndadziyesera kunena kwa Ambuye, ine ndine fumbi ndi phulusa:" 
Genesis18:28 kapena akaperewera asanu pa olungama makumi asanuwo; kodi mudzaononga mudzi wonse chifukwa cha kuperewera asanu? Ndipo anati, Ndikapeza makumi anai ndi asanu sindidzauononga." 
Genesis18:29 Ndipo ananenanso kwa Iye nati, Kapena akapezedwa makumi anai m'menemo. Ndipo anati, Sindidzachita chifukwa cha makumi anai." 
Genesis18:30 Ndipo anati, Asakwiyetu Ambuye, ndipo ndidzanenanso: kapena akapezedwa makumi atatu m'menemo? Ndipo anati, Ndikapeza makumi atatu m'menemo sindidzachita." 
Genesis18:31 Ndipo anati, Taonanitu, ndadziyesera kunena kwa Ambuye: kapena akapezedwa makumi awiri m'menemo. Ndipo anati, Sindidzachita chifukwa cha makumi awiri." 
Genesis18:32 Ndipo anati, Asakwiyetu Ambuye, ndipo ndidzanena kamodzi aka kokha: kapena akapezedwa khumi m'menemo? Ndipo anati, Sindidzachita chifukwa cha khumi." 
Genesis18:33 Ndipo Yehova anapita atatha kunena naye Abrahamu: ndipo Abrahamu anabwera kumalo kwake. 
Genesis19:1 Ndipo anadza ku Sodomu madzulo amithenga awiri; ndipo Loti anakhala pa chipata cha Sodomu, ndipo Loti anaona iwo, nauka kuti akakomane nao, ndipo anaweramitsa pansi nkhope yake." 
Genesis19:2 Ndipo anati, Taonanitu, Ambuye anga, tembenukanitu, kulowa m'nyumba mwa kapolo wanu, mugone usiku wonse, mutsuke mapazi anu, ndipo mudzalawira m'mawa kunka ulendo wanu. Ndipo anati, Iai; koma tigone m'khwalalamu usiku wonse." 
Genesis19:3 Ndipo anawaumiriza iwo ndithu: ndipo anapatukira kwa iye, nalowa m'nyumba mwake; ndipo anawakonzera iwo madyerero, naphika mikate yopanda chotupitsa, ndipo anadya." 
Genesis19:4 Koma asanagone, anthu a m'mudzimo anthu a Sodomu, anazinga nyumba, anyamata ndi okalamba, anthu onse a m'mbali zonse;" 
Genesis19:5 ndipo anamuitana Loti, nati kwa iye, Ali kuti anthu amene anadza kwa iwe madzulo ano, utitulutsire iwo kuti tiwadziwe." 
Genesis19:6 Ndipo Loti anatulukira kwa iwo pakhomo, natseka chambuyo pakhomo pake." 
Genesis19:7 Ndipo anati, Abale anga, musachitetu koipa kotere." 
Genesis19:8 Taonanitu, ndili ndi ana akazi awiri, amene sanadziwe mwamuna; ndiwatulutsire iwo kwa inu, muchite nao chomwe chikomera inu; koma anthu awa musawachitire iwo kanthu; chifukwa kuti anadza iwo pansi pa mthunzi wa chindwi langa." 
Genesis19:9 Ndipo anati iwo, Baima; natinso, Uyu anadza kuno kukhala ngati mlendo, ndipo afuna kutilamulira; tsopano tidzakuchitira iwe koipa koposa iwo. Ndipo iwo anamkakamiza munthuyo Loti ndithu, nayandikira kuti aswe chitseko." 
Genesis19:10 Koma anthu aja anatulutsa dzanja lao, namlowetsa Loti momwe anali iwo m'nyumba, natseka pakhomo." 
Genesis19:11 Ndipo anachititsa khungu m'maso mwa anthu amene anali pakhomo pa nyumba, ang'ono ndi akulu, ndipo anavutika kufufuza pakhomo." 
Genesis19:12 Ndipo anthu aja anati kwa Loti, Kodi muli nao ena pano? Mkamwini, ndi ana ako amuna, ndi ana ako akazi, ndi onse ali nao m'mudzi muno, utuluke nao m'malo muno:" 
Genesis19:13 popeza ife tidzaononga malo ano, chifukwa kulira kwao kwakula pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo Yehova anatitumiza ife kuti tiuononge." 
Genesis19:14 Ndipo anatuluka Loti nanena nao akamwini ake amene anakwata ana ake akazi, nati, Taukani, tulukani m'malo muno; popeza Yehova adzaononga mudziwu; koma akamwini ake anamyesa wongoseka." 
Genesis19:15 Pamene kunacha, amithengawo anafulumiza Loti, nati, Uka, tenga mkazi wako, ndi ana ako akazi awiri amene ali kunowa, kuti munganyeke m'mphulupulu ya mudzi." 
Genesis19:16 Koma anachedwa; ndipo anthuwo anamgwira dzanja lake, ndi dzanja la mkazi wake ndi dzanja la ana ake akazi awiri; chifukwa cha kumchitira chifundo Yehova; ndipo anamtulutsa iye, namuika kunja kwa mudzi." 
Genesis19:17 Ndipo panali pamene anawatulutsa iwo kunja, anati, Tapulumuka ndi moyo wako; usacheuke, usakhale pachigwa paliponse; thawira kuphiri, kuti unganyeke." 
Genesis19:18 Ndipo Loti anati kwa iwo, Iaitu, mfumu;" 
Genesis19:19 taonanitu, kapolo wanu anapeza ufulu pamaso panu, ndipo munakuza chifundo chanu, chimene munandichitira ine, pakupulumutsa moyo wanga; ine sindikhoza kuthawira kuphiri kuti chingandipeze ine choipacho ndingafe;" 
Genesis19:20 taonanitu, mudzi uwu uli pafupi pothawirapo, ndipo uli waung'ono; ndithawiretu kumeneko, suli waung'ono nanga? Ndipo ndidzakhala ndi moyo." 
Genesis19:21 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Taona, ndikuvomereza iwe pamenepanso kuti sindidzaononga mudzi uwu umene wandiuza." 
Genesis19:22 Fulumira, thawira kumeneko; pakuti sindithai kuchita kanthu usadafike kumeneko. Chifukwa chake anatcha dzina la mudziwo Zowari." 
Genesis19:23 Ndipo dzuwa lidakwera pa dziko pamene Loti anafika ku Zowari. 
Genesis19:24 Ndipo Yehova anavumbitsa pa Sodomu ndi pa Gomora miyala ya sulufure ndi moto kutuluka kwa Mulungu kumwamba; 
Genesis19:25 ndipo anaononga midziyo, ndi chigwa chonse, ndi onse akukhala m'midzimo, ndi zimene zimera panthaka." 
Genesis19:26 Koma mkazi wake anacheuka ali pambuyo pake pa Loti, nasanduka mwala wamchere." 
Genesis19:27 Ndipo Abrahamu analawira m'mamawa kunka kumalo kumene anaima pamaso pa Yehova: 
Genesis19:28 ndipo anayang'anira ku Sodomu ndi ku Gomora ndi ku dziko lonse la chigwa, ndipo anapenya, taonanitu, utsi wa dzikolo unakwera, monga utsi wa ng'anjo." 
Genesis19:29 Ndipo panali pamene Mulungu anaononga midzi ya m'chigwa, Mulungu anakumbukira Abrahamu, natulutsa Loti pakati pa chionongeko, pamene anaononga midzi m'mene anakhalamo Loti." 
Genesis19:30 Ndipo Loti anabwera kutuluka m'Zowari nakhala m'phiri ndi ana akazi awiri pamodzi naye: chifukwa anaopa kukhala m'Zowari, ndipo anakhala m'phanga, iye ndi ana ake akazi." 
Genesis19:31 Woyamba ndipo anati kwa wamng'ono, Atate wathu akalamba, ndipo palibe pa dziko lapansi mwamuna amene adzalowa kwa ife monga amachita pa dziko lonse lapansi:" 
Genesis19:32 tiyeni, timwetse atate vinyo, tidzagona naye, kuti tisunge mbeu za atate wathu." 
Genesis19:33 Ndipo anamwetsa atate wao vinyo usiku womwewo; woyamba ndipo analowa nagona naye atate wake; ndipo sanadziwe pomwe anagona ndi pomwe anauka. 
Genesis19:34 Ndipo panali m'mamawa, woyamba anati kwa wamng'ono, Taona, ndinagona ine ndi atate wanga usiku walero: timwetsenso iye usikunso: udzalowe nugone naye kuti tisunge mbeu za atate wathu." 
Genesis19:35 Ndipo anamwetsa vinyo atate wao usiku womwenso; wamng'ono ndipo anauka nagona naye; ndipo iye sanadziwe pomwe anagona ndi pomwe anauka. 
Genesis19:36 Ndipo ana akazi awiri a Loti anali ndi pakati pa atate wao. 
Genesis19:37 Woyamba ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna, namtcha dzina lake. Mowabu; yemweyo ndi atate wa Amowabu kufikira lero." 
Genesis19:38 Wamng'ono ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna, namtcha dzina lake Benami; yemweyo ndi atate wa Aamoni kufikira lero." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahamu ndipo anachoka kumeneko kunka ku dziko la kumwera, ndipo anakhala pakati pa Kadesi ndi Suri, ndipo anakhala ngati mlendo m'Gerari." 
Genesis20:2 Ndipo Abrahamu anati za Sara mkazi wake, Iye ndiye mlongo wanga: ndipo Abimeleki mfumu ya Gerari anatumiza namtenga Sara" 
Genesis20:3 Koma Mulungu anadza kwa Abimeleki m'kulota kwa usiku, nati kwa iye, Taona, wakufa iwe, chifukwa cha mkazi amene wamtenga: pakuti iye ndiye mkazi wa mwini." 
Genesis20:4 Koma Abimeleki sanayandikire naye; ndipo anati, Ambuye, kodi mudzaphanso mtundu wolungama?" 
Genesis20:5 Kodi iye sanati kwa ine, Ndiye mlongo wanga: ndipo mkazi iye yekha anati, Iye ndiye mlongo wanga: ndi mtima wanga wangwiro ndi manja anga osachimwa ndachita ine ichi." 
Genesis20:6 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa iye m'kulota, Inde ndidziwa Ine, kuti wachita icho ndi mtima wangwiro, ndipo Inenso ndinakuletsa iwe kuti usandichimwire ine: chifukwa chake sindinakuloleza iwe kuti umkhudze mkaziyo." 
Genesis20:7 Tsopano, umbwezere munthuyo mkazi wake; chifukwa iye ndiye mneneri, ndipo adzakupempherera iwe, ndipo udzakhala ndi moyo: koma ukaleka kumbwezera, udziwe kuti udzafa ndithu, iwe ndi onse amene uli nao." 
Genesis20:8 Ndipo Abimeleki analawira m'mamawa, naitana anyamata ake onse, nanena zonse zimenezo m'makutu mwao, ndipo anthu anaopa kwambiri" 
Genesis20:9 Ndipo Abimeleki anaitana Abrahamu, nati kwa iye, Watichitira ife chiyani iwe? Ndakuchimwiranji iwe kuti waufikitsa pa ine ndi pa ufumu wanga uchimo waukulu? Wandichitira ine zosayenera kuzichita." 
Genesis20:10 Ndipo Abimeleki anati kwa Abrahamu, Unaona chiyani iwe kuti wachita ichi?" 
Genesis20:11 Ndipo Abrahamu anati, Chifukwa ndinati, Pompano palibe ndithu kumuopa Mulungu, ndipo adzandipha ine chifukwa cha mkazi wanga." 
Genesis20:12 Koma ndiye mlongo wanga ndithu, mwana wa atate wanga, koma si mwana wa amai wanga: ndipo anakhala ndi ine mkazi wanga." 
Genesis20:13 Ndipo panali pamene Mulungu anandiyendetsa ine kunyumba kwa atate wanga, ndinati kwa mkaziyo, Ichi ndicho chokoma mtima udzandichitire ine, konse kumene tidzafika ife, uzinena za ine, Iye ndiye mlongo wanga." 
Genesis20:14 Ndipo Abimeleki anatenga nkhosa ndi ng'ombe ndi akapolo ndi adzakazi nampatsa Abrahamu, nambwezera iye Sara mkazi wake." 
Genesis20:15 Ndipo Abimeleki anati, Taona dziko langa lili pamaso pako; kumene kuli kwabwino pamaso pako takhala kumeneko." 
Genesis20:16 Kwa Sara ndipo anati, Taona, ndapatsa mlongo wako ndalama zasiliva mazana khumi; taona, izo ndizo zoyeretsa maso za kwa onse amene ali ndi iwe: ndi pamaso pa onse ukhale wolungama." 
Genesis20:17 Ndipo Abrahamu anapemphera Mulungu, ndipo Mulungu anachiritsa Abimeleki, ndi mkazi wake, ndi adzakazi ake; ndipo anabala ana." 
Genesis20:18 Pakuti Yehova anatseketsa mimba yonse ya a m'nyumba ya Abimeleki, chifukwa cha Sara mkazi wake wa Abrahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Ndipo Yehova anayang'anira Sara monga momwe anati, ndipo Yehova anamchitira iye monga ananena." 
Genesis21:2 Ndipo Sara anatenga pakati, nambalira Abrahamu m'ukalamba wake mwana wamwamuna, nthawi yomweyo Mulungu anamuuza iye." 
Genesis21:3 Ndipo Abrahamu anamutcha dzina lake la mwana wake wamwamuna amene anabala iye, amene anambalira iye Sara, Isaki." 
Genesis21:4 Ndipo Abrahamu anamdula mwana wake wamwamuna Isaki pamene anali wa masiku ake asanu ndi atatu, monga Mulungu anamlamulira iye." 
Genesis21:5 Ndipo Abrahamu anali wa zaka zana limodzi pamene anambadwira iye Isaki mwana wake. 
Genesis21:6 Ndipo Sara anati, Mulungu anandisekeretsa ine; onse akumva adzasekera pamodzi ndi ine." 
Genesis21:7 Ndipo anati, Akadatero ndani kwa Abrahamu kuti Sara adzayamwitsa ana? Pakuti ndambalira iye mwana wamwamuna m'ukalamba wake." 
Genesis21:8 Ndipo anakula mwanayo naletsedwa kuyamwa: ndipo Abrahamu anakonza madyerero akulu tsiku lomwe analetsedwa Isaki kuyamwa. 
Genesis21:9 Ndipo Sara anaona mwana wake wamwamuna wa Hagara Mwejipito, amene anambalira Abrahamu, alinkuseka." 
Genesis21:10 Chifukwa chake anati kwa Abrahamu, Chotsa mdzakazi uyo, ndi mwana wake wamwamuna; chifukwa mwana wa mdzakazi uyo sadzalowa m'nyumba pamodzi naye mwana wanga Isaki." 
Genesis21:11 Ndipo mauwo anaipira Abrahamu chifukwa cha mwana wake. 
Genesis21:12 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Abrahamu, Usaipidwe nao, chifukwa cha mnyamatayo, ndi chifukwa cha mdzakazi wako; momwe monse akunenera iwe Sara umvere iwe mau ake; chifukwa kuti mwa Isaki zidzaitanidwa mbeu zako." 
Genesis21:13 Ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa mdzakazi uyo ndidzayesa mtundu, chifukwa iye ndiye mbeu yako." 
Genesis21:14 Ndipo Abrahamu analawira m'mamawa, natenga mkate ndi mchenje wa madzi, nampatsa Hagara, naika paphewa pake, ndi mwana, namchotsa iye: ndipo iye anamuka, nasocherera m'chipululu cha Beereseba." 
Genesis21:15 Ndipo anatha madzi a m'mchenje ndipo anaika mwana pansi pa chitsamba. 
Genesis21:16 Ndipo ananka nakhala pansi popenyana naye patali, monga pakugwa muvi: chifukwa anati, Ndisaone kufa kwa mwana. Ndipo anakhala popenyana naye, nakweza mau ake nalira." 
Genesis21:17 Ndipo Mulungu anamva mau a mnyamatayo, ndi mthenga wa Mulungu anamuitana Hagara, ndi mau odzera kumwamba, nati kwa iye, Watani Hagara? Usaope; chifukwa Mulungu anamva mau a mnyamata kumene ali." 
Genesis21:18 Tauka, nuukitse mnyamatayo, ndi kumgwira m'dzanja lako; chifukwa ndidzamuyesa iye mtundu waukulu." 
Genesis21:19 Ndipo Mulungu anamtsegula m'maso mwake, ndipo anaona chitsime cha madzi; namuka nadzaza mchenje ndi madzi, nampatsa mnyamata kuti amwe." 
Genesis21:20 Ndipo Mulungu anakhala ndi mnyamata, ndipo anakula iye; nakhala m'chipululu, nakhala wauta." 
Genesis21:21 Ndipo anakhala m'chipululu cha Parani; ndipo amake anamtengera iye mkazi wa ku dziko la Ejipito. 
Genesis21:22 Ndipo panali nthawi yomweyo, Abimeleki ndi Fikolo kazembe wa nkhondo yake anati kwa Abrahamu, kuti, Mulungu ali pamodzi ndi iwe m'zonse uzichita iwe;" 
Genesis21:23 tsopano iwe undilumbirire ine pano pa Mulungu kuti sudzandinyenga ine, kapena mwana wanga, kapena mdzukulu wanga: koma monga ufulu ndakuchitira iwe udzandichitire ine, ndi dziko lomwe wakhalamo, ngati mlendo." 
Genesis21:24 Ndipo Abrahamu anati, Ine ndidzalumbira." 
Genesis21:25 Ndipo Abrahamu anamdzudzula Abimeleki chifukwa cha chitsime cha madzi, anyamata ake a Abimeleki anachilanda." 
Genesis21:26 Ndipo anati Abimeleki, Sindinadziwe amene anachita icho; ndipo iwe sunandiuze ine, ndiponso sindinamve koma lero lino." 
Genesis21:27 Ndipo Abrahamu anatenga nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, nampatsa Abimeleki, ndipo anapangana pangano onse awiriwo." 
Genesis21:28 Ndipo Abrahamu anapatula anaankhosa akazi asanu ndi awiri pa okha. 
Genesis21:29 Ndipo Abimeleki anati kwa Abrahamu, Nanga anaankhosa akazi asanu ndi awiri amene wapatula pa okha?" 
Genesis21:30 Ndipo anati, Anaankhosa akazi asanu ndi awiriwa uwalandire pa dzanja langa, kuti akhale mboni zanga, kuti ndakumba ine chitsime chimenechi." 
Genesis21:31 Chifukwa chake anatcha malowo Beereseba: chifukwa pamenepo analumbira onse awiri. 
Genesis21:32 Ndipo anapangana pangano pa Beereseba: ndipo anauka Abimeleki ndi Fikolo kazembe wa nkhondo yake, nabwera kunka ku dziko la Afilisti." 
Genesis21:33 Ndipo Abrahamu anaoka mtengo wa bwemba pa Beereseba, naitanira pamenepo dzina la Yehova, Mulungu wa nthawi zonse." 
Genesis21:34 Ndipo Abrahamu anakhala ngati mlendo masiku ambiri m'dziko la Afilisti. 
Genesis22:1 Ndipo panali zitapita zimenezo, Mulungu anamuyesa Abrahamu nati kwa iye, Abrahamu; ndipo anati, Ndine pano." 
Genesis22:2 Ndipo anati, Tengatu mwana wako, wamwamuna wayekhayo, Isaki, amene ukondana naye, numuke ku dziko la Moriya; numpereke iye kumeneko nsembe yopsereza pa limodzi la mapiri lomwe ndidzakuuza iwe." 
Genesis22:3 Ndipo Abrahamu analawira m'mamawa namanga bulu wake, natengako anyamata ake awiri pamodzi naye, ndi Isaki mwana wake, nawaza nkhuni za nsembe yopsereza, nauka, nanka kumalo komwe Mulungu anamuuza iye." 
Genesis22:4 Tsiku lachitatu Abrahamu anatukula maso ake naona malowo patali. 
Genesis22:5 Ndipo Abrahamu anati kwa anyamata ake, Khalani kuno ndi bulu, ine ndi mwanayu tinka uko, ndipo tikapemphera ndi kubweranso kwa inu." 
Genesis22:6 Ndipo Abrahamu anatenga nkhuni za nsembe yopsereza, nazisenzetsa Isaki mwana wake; natenga moto m'dzanja lake ndi mpeni; nayenda pamodzi onse awiri." 
Genesis22:7 Ndipo Isaki ananena ndi Abrahamu atate wake, nati, Atate wanga; ndipo iye anati, Ndine pano, mwana wanga. Ndipo anati, Taonani moto ndi nkhuni; koma mwanawankhosa wa nsembe yopsereza ali kuti?" 
Genesis22:8 Ndipo Abrahamu anati, Mwana wanga, Mulungu adzadzifunira yekha mwanawankhosa wa nsembe yopsereza; nayenda pamodzi onse awiri." 
Genesis22:9 Ndipo anafika kumalo komwe Mulungu anamuuza iye; ndipo Abrahamu anamanga guwa la nsembe nakonza nkhuni, namanga Isaki mwana wake, namuika iye pa guwa la nsembe pamwamba pa nkhuni." 
Genesis22:10 Ndipo Abrahamu anatambasula dzanja lake, natenga mpeni kuti amuphe mwana wake." 
Genesis22:11 Koma mthenga wa Yehova anamuitana iye ndi mau odzera kumwamba, nati, Abrahamu, Abrahamu; ndi iye anati, Ndine pano." 
Genesis22:12 Ndipo mthenga anati, Usaike dzanja lako pa mwana, usamchitire iye kanthu; chifukwa tsopano ndidziwa kuti iwe umuopa Mulungu wako, pakuti sunandikanize ine mwana wako, mwana wako wayekha." 
Genesis22:13 Ndipo Abrahamu anatukula maso ake nayang'ana taonani, pambuyo pake nkhosa yamphongo yogwiridwa ndi nyanga zake m'chiyangoyangomo; ndipo ananka Abrahamu nakatenga nkhosa yamphongoyo, naipereka nsembe yopsereza m'malo mwa mwana wake." 
Genesis22:14 Ndipo Abrahamu anatcha dzina lake la malowo Yehova-Yire: monga ati lero lomwe, M'phiri la Yehova chidzaoneka." 
Genesis22:15 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuitana Abrahamu ndi mau odzera kumwamba kachiwiri," 
Genesis22:16 nati, Pa Ine ndekha ndalumbira, ati Yehova, popeza wachita ichi, sunandikaniza mwana wako, mwana wako yekha," 
Genesis22:17 kudalitsa ndidzakudalitsa iwe, kuchulukitsa ndidzachulukitsa mbeu zako monga nyenyezi za kumwamba, monga mchenga wa m'mphepete mwa nyanja; ndipo mbeu zako zidzagonjetsa chipata cha adani ao;" 
Genesis22:18 m'mbeu zako mitundu yonse ya dziko lapansi idzadalitsidwa: chifukwa wamvera mau anga. 
Genesis22:19 Ndipo Abrahamu anabwera kwa anyamata ake, ndipo anauka nayenda pamodzi kumuka ku Beereseba; ndipo anakhala Abrahamu pa Beereseba." 
Genesis22:20 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, anauza Abrahamu kuti, Taonani, Milika iyenso anambalira Nahori mphwako ana;" 
Genesis22:21 Uzi woyamba ndi Buzi mphwake, ndi Kemuwele atate wake wa Aramu;" 
Genesis22:22 ndi Kesedi, ndi Hazo, ndi Pilidasi ndi Yidilafi, ndi Betuele." 
Genesis22:23 Ndimo Betuele anabala Rebeka: amenewa asanu ndi atatu Milika anambalira Nahori mphwake wa Abrahamu. 
Genesis22:24 Ndipo mkazi wake wamng'ono, dzina lake Reuma, iyenso anabala Teba, ndi Gahamu, ndi Tahasi, ndi Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Ndipo Sara anali wa zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi awiri ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri: ndizo zaka za moyo wa Sara. 
Genesis23:2 Ndipo Sara anafa m'Kiriyati-Ariba (ndiwo Hebroni), m'dziko la Kanani; ndipo Abrahamu anadza ku maliro a Sara, kuti amlire." 
Genesis23:3 Ndipo Abrahamu anauka pa wakufa wake, nanena kwa ana a Hiti, nati," 
Genesis23:4 Ine ndine mlendo wakukhala ndi inu: mundipatse ndikhale ndi manda pamodzi ndi inu, kuti ndiike wakufa wanga ndisamthirenso maso." 
Genesis23:5 Ndipo ana a Hiti anayankha Abrahamu nati kwa iye," 
Genesis23:6 Mutimvere ife mfumu, ndinu kalonga wamkulu pakati pa ife; muike wakufa wanu m'manda mwathu mosankhika: palibe munthu yense wa ife adzakaniza manda ake, kuti muike wakufa wanu." 
Genesis23:7 Ndipo anauka Abrahamu naweramira anthu a m'dzikomo, ana a Hiti." 
Genesis23:8 Ndipo ananena nao, kuti, Ngati mukandivomereza kuti ndiike wakufa wanga ndisamthirenso maso, mundimvere ine, mundinenere ine kwa Efuroni mwana wake wa Zohari," 
Genesis23:9 kuti andipatse ine phanga la Makipela, limene lili pansonga pa munda wake; pa mtengo wake wonse andipatse pakati pa inu, ndikhale nao manda."
