Genesis38:28 Ndipo panali pamene anabala kuti mmodzi anatulutsa dzanja; ndipo namwino anatenga chingwe chofiira namanga pa dzanja lake, kuti, Uyu anayamba kubadwa." 
Genesis38:29 Ndipo panali pamene iye anabweza dzanja lake, kuti, taona, mbale wake anabadwa, ndipo namwino anati, Wadziposolera wekha bwanji? Chifukwa chake dzina lake linatchedwa Perezi." 
Genesis38:30 Ndipo pambuyo pake anabadwa mbale wake, amene anali ndi chingwe chofiira pamkono pake, dzina lake linatchedwa Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Ndipo anatsika naye Yosefe kunka ku Ejipito; ndipo Potifara, nduna ya Farao, kazembe wa alonda, Mwejipito, anamgula iye m'manja mwa Aismaele amene anatsika naye kunka kumeneko." 
Genesis39:2 Ndipo Yehova anali ndi Yosefe; ndipo iye anali wolemeralemera; nakhala m'nyumba ya mbuyake Mwejipito. 
Genesis39:3 Ndipo mbuyake anaona kuti Yehova anali ndi iye, ndi kuti Yehova anamlemereza m'dzanja lake zonse anazichita." 
Genesis39:4 Ndipo Yosefe anapeza ufulu pamaso pake, ndipo anamtumikira iye; ndipo anamuyesa iye woyang'anira pa nyumba yake, naika m'manja mwake zonse anali nazo." 
Genesis39:5 Ndipo panali chiyambire anamuyesa iye woyang'anira pa nyumba yake, ndi pa zake zonse, Yehova anadalitsa nyumba ya Mwejipito chifukwa cha Yosefe; ndipo mdalitso wa Yehova unali pa zake zonse, m'nyumba ndi m'munda." 
Genesis39:6 Ndipo iye anasiya zake zonse m'manja a Yosefe: osadziwa chomwe anali nacho, koma chakudya chimene anadya. Ndipo Yosefe anali wokoma thupi ndi wokongola." 
Genesis39:7 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, kuti mkazi wa mbuyake anamyang'anira maso Yosefe: ndipo mkaziyo anati, Gona ndi ine." 
Genesis39:8 Koma iye anakana, nati kwa mkazi wa mbuyake, Taonani, mbuyanga sadziwa chimene chili ndi ine m'nyumbamu, ndipo anaika zake zonse m'manja anga;" 
Genesis39:9 mulibe wina m'nyumba wamkulu ndine; ndipo sanandikanize ine kanthu, koma iwe, chifukwa kuti uli mkazi wake: nanga ndikachita choipa chachikulu ichi bwanji ndi kuchimwira Mulungu?" 
Genesis39:10 Ndipo pali pakunenanena ndi Yosefe tsiku ndi tsiku, iye sanamvere mkazi kugona naye kapena kukhala naye." 
Genesis39:11 Ndipo panali, nthawi yomweyo, iye analowa m'nyumba kuti agwire ntchito yake; ndipo munalibe amuna a m'nyumba m'katimo." 
Genesis39:12 Ndipo mkazi anagwira iye chofunda chake, nati, Gona ndi ine; ndipo anasiya chofunda chake m'dzanja lake nathawa, natulukira kubwalo." 
Genesis39:13 Ndipo panali pamene mkazi anaona kuti anasiya chofunda chake m'dzanja lake, nathawira kubwalo," 
Genesis39:14 anaitana amuna a m'nyumba yake, nanena ndi iwo kuti, Taonani, walowetsa kwa ife Muhebri kuti atiseke ife, analowa kwa ine kugona ndi ine, ndipo ndinafuula ndi mau akulu:" 
Genesis39:15 ndipo panali pamene iye anamva kuti ndinakweza mau anga ndi kufuula, iye anasiya chofunda chake kwa ine nathawira kubwalo." 
Genesis39:16 Ndipo anasunga chofunda chake chikhale ndi iye kufikira atabwera kwao mbuyake. 
Genesis39:17 Ndipo ananena kwa iye monga mau awa, anati, Analowa kwa ine kapolo wa Chihebri uja, munabwera naye kwathu, kundipunza ine:" 
Genesis39:18 ndipo panali pamene ndinakweza mau anga ndi kufuula, iye anasiya chovala chake kwa ine, nathawira kunja." 
Genesis39:19 Ndipo panali pamene mbuyake anamva mau a mkazi wake, amene ananena kwa iye, kuti, Choterochi anandichitira ine kapolo wako; kuti iye anapsa mtima." 
Genesis39:20 Ndipo mbuyake wa Yosefe anamtenga iye namuika m'kaidi, umo anamangidwa akaidi a mfumu: ndipo iye anali m'mwemo m'kaidimo." 
Genesis39:21 Koma Yehova anali ndi Yosefe namchitira iye zokoma, nampatsa ufulu pamaso pa woyang'anira kaidi." 
Genesis39:22 Ndipo woyang'anira kaidi anapereka m'manja a Yosefe akaidi onse okhala m'kaidimo, ndipo zonse iwo anazichita m'menemo, iye ndiye wozichita." 
Genesis39:23 Woyang'anira m'kaidi sanayang'anire kanthu kalikonse kamene kanali m'manja a Yosefe, chifukwa Yehova anali ndi iye; ndipo zimene anazichita, Yehova anazipindulitsa." 
Genesis40:1 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, wopereka chikho wa mfumu ya Aejipito ndi wophika mkate wake anamchimwira mbuye wao mfumu ya Aejipito." 
Genesis40:2 Ndipo Farao anakwiyira akulu ake awiriwo wamkulu wa opereka chikho, ndi wamkulu wa ophika mkate." 
Genesis40:3 Ndipo anaika iwo asungidwe m'nyumba ya kazembe wa alonda, m'kaidi, umo anamangidwa Yosefe." 
Genesis40:4 Ndipo kazembe wa alonda anapereka iwo kwa Yosefe, ndipo iye anawatumikira iwo: ndipo anakhala nthawi mosungidwamo." 
Genesis40:5 Ndipo analota maloto onse awiri, yense loto lake, usiku umodzi, yense monga mwa kumasulira kwa loto lake, wopereka chikho ndi wophika mkate wa mfumu ya Aejipito, amene anamangidwa m'kaidi." 
Genesis40:6 Ndipo Yosefe analowa kwa iwo m'mawa, nawaona iwo, taonani, anali oziya." 
Genesis40:7 Ndipo anafunsa akulu a Farao osungidwa naye m'nyumba ya mbuyake, kuti, Nkhope zanu zagwa bwanji lero?" 
Genesis40:8 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Ife talota maloto, ndipo tilibe wotimasulira. Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo, Kodi Mwini kumasulira si ndiye Mulungu? Mundifotokozeretu." 
Genesis40:9 Ndipo wopereka chikho wamkulu anafotokozera Yosefe loto lake, nati kwa iye, M'kulota kwanga, taona, mpesa unali pamaso panga:" 
Genesis40:10 ndipo m'mpesamo munali nthambi zitatu: ndipo unali wonga unaphuka, ndipo maluwa ake anaphuka; nabala matsamvu ake mphesa zakucha;" 
Genesis40:11 ndipo chikho cha Farao chinali m'dzanja langa: ndipo ndinatenga mphesa, ndi kufinyira m'chikho cha Farao ndi kupereka chikho m'dzanja la Farao." 
Genesis40:12 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iye, Kumasulira kwake ndi uwu: nthambi zitatu ndizo masiku atatu;" 
Genesis40:13 akali masiku atatu Farao adzatukula mutu wako, nadzabwezera iwe ntchito yako; ndipo udzapereka chikho cha Farao m'dzanja lake, monga kale lomwe m'mene unali wopereka chikho chake." 
Genesis40:14 Koma undikumbukire ine m'mene kudzakhala bwino ndi iwe, ndipo undichitiretu ine kukoma mtima: nunditchule ine kwa Farao, nunditulutse ine m'nyumbamu:" 
Genesis40:15 chifukwa kuti ndinabedwa ndithu m'dziko la Ahebri; ndiponso pano sindinachite kanthu kakundiikira ine m'dzenjemu. 
Genesis40:16 Pamene wophika mkate anaona kuti kumasulira kwake kunali kwabwino, iye anati kwa Yosefe, Inenso ndinalimkulota, ndipo, taonani, malichero atatu a mikate yoyera anali pamtu panga;" 
Genesis40:17 m'lichero lapamwamba munali mikate ya Farao ya mitundumitundu; ndipo mbalame zinadya ya m'lichero la pamutu panga. 
Genesis40:18 Ndipo Yosefe anayankha nati, Kumasulira kwake ndi uku: malichero atatu ndiwo masiku atatu;" 
Genesis40:19 akali masiku atatu Farao adzakweza mutu wako ndi kuuchotsa, nadzakupachika iwe pamtengo: ndipo mbalame zidzadya mnofu wako." 
Genesis40:20 Ndipo panali tsiku lachitatu ndilo tsiku lakubadwa kwake kwa Farao, iye anakonzera anyamata ake madyerero, ndipo anakweza mutu wa wopereka chikho wamkulu ndi mutu wa wophika mkate wamkulu pakati pa anyamata ake." 
Genesis40:21 Ndipo anabwezanso wopereka chikho ku ntchito yake; ndipo iye anapereka chikho m'manja a Farao. 
Genesis40:22 Koma anampachika wophika mkate wamkulu; monga Yosefe anawamasulira. 
Genesis40:23 Koma wopereka chikho wamkulu sanakumbukire Yosefe, koma anamuiwala." 
Genesis41:1 Ndipo panali zitapita zaka ziwiri zamphumphu, Farao analota; ndipo, taonani, anaima panyanja." 
Genesis41:2 Ndipo, taonani, zinatuluka m'nyanja ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri za maonekedwe okoma ndi zonenepa; ndipo zinadya mabango." 
Genesis41:3 Ndipo, taonani ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zinatuluka m'nyanjamo pambuyo pao, za maonekedwe oipa ndi zoonda; ndipo zinaima pa ng'ombe zinazo m'mphete mwa nyanja." 
Genesis41:4 Ndipo ng'ombe zazikazi za maonekedwe oipa ndi zoonda zinadya ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri za maonekedwe abwino ndi zonenepazo. Ndipo Farao anauka. 
Genesis41:5 Ndipo anagona nalotanso kachiwiri; ndipo taonani, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri za tirigu zinamera pa mbuwa imodzi, zonenepa ndi zabwino." 
Genesis41:6 Ndipo, taonani, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri, zoonda zopserera ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, zinamera pambuyo pao." 
Genesis41:7 Ndipo ngala zoondazo zinameza ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa ndi zodzalazo. Ndipo Farao anauka, ndipo, taonani, analota." 
Genesis41:8 Ndipo panali m'mamawa mtima wake unavutidwa; ndipo anatumiza naitana amatsenga onse a m'Ejipito, ndi anzeru onse a momwemo: ndipo Farao anafotokozera iwo loto lake; koma panalibe mmodzi anakhoza kuwamasulira iwo kwa Farao." 
Genesis41:9 Pamenepo wopereka chikho wamkulu anati kwa Farao, kuti, Ine ndidzakumbukira zochimwa zanga lero." 
Genesis41:10 Farao anakwiya ndi anyamata ake, nandiika ine ndisungidwe m'nyumba ya kazembe wa alonda, ine ndi wophika mkate wamkulu:" 
Genesis41:11 ndipo tinalota loto usiku umodzi ine ndi iye; tinalota munthu yense monga mwa kumasulira kwa loto lake. 
Genesis41:12 Ndipo panali ndi ife mnyamata Muhebri, kapolo wa kazembe wa alonda, ndipo ife tinafotokozera iye, ndipo iye anatimasulira ife maloto athu; kwa munthu yense monga loto lake anatimasulira." 
Genesis41:13 Ndipo panali monga momwe iye anatimasulira, momwemo mudachitika; ine anandibwezera mu utumiki wanga, mnzanga anampachika." 
Genesis41:14 Ndipo Farao anatumiza nakaitana Yosefe; ndipo anamtulutsa iye msanga m'dzenjemo: ndipo iye anameta, napindula malaya ake, nalowa kwa Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao ndipo anati kwa Yosefe, Ine ndalota loto, koma palibe wondimasulira; ndipo ndamva alikunena za iwe kuti, ukamva loto udziwa kumasulira." 
Genesis41:16 Ndipo Yosefe anayankha Farao kuti, Si mwa ine; koma Mulungu adzayankha Farao mwamtendere." 
Genesis41:17 Ndipo Farao ananena kwa Yosefe, M'loto langa taona, ndinaima m'mphepete mwa nyanja;" 
Genesis41:18 ndipo taona, zinatuluka m'nyanjamo ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri, zonenepa ndi za maonekedwe abwino; ndipo zinadya m'mabango;" 
Genesis41:19 ndipo taona, ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zina zinatuluka pambuyo pao zosauka ndi za maonekedwe oipa ndi zoonda, zoipa zotere sindinazione m'dziko la Ejipito;" 
Genesis41:20 ndipo ng'ombe zazikazi zoonda ndi za maonekedwe oipa zinadya ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa. 
Genesis41:21 Ndipo pamene zinadya sizinadziwika kuti zinadya; koma zinaipabe m'maonekedwe ao monga poyamba. 
Genesis41:22 Pamenepo ndinauka. Ndipo ndinaona m'kulota kwanga, taona, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zinamera pa mbuwa imodzi zodzala ndi zabwino;" 
Genesis41:23 ndipo, taona, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zina zofota, zoonda, zopserera ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, zinamera pambuyo pao;" 
Genesis41:24 ndipo ngala zoonda zinameza ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino; ndipo ndinafotokozera amatsenga: koma panalibe wondimasulira ine. 
Genesis41:25 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa Farao, Loto la Farao lili limodzi: chimene Mulungu ati achite wam'masulira Farao." 
Genesis41:26 Ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri: loto lili limodzi." 
Genesis41:27 Ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zoonda ndi za maonekedwe oipa zinatuluka pambuyo pao ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndiponso ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zopanda kanthu zopserera ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala." 
Genesis41:28 Ichi ndi chinthu chimene ndinena kwa Farao: chimene Mulungu ati achite wasonyeza kwa Farao. 
Genesis41:29 Taonani, zidzafika zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zakuchuluka chakudya m'dziko lonse la Ejipito;" 
Genesis41:30 ndipo pambuyo pao zidzauka zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala; ndipo anthu adzaiwala zochuluka zonsezo m'dziko la Ejipito; ndipo njala idzapululutsa dziko; 
Genesis41:31 ndipo zochuluka sizidzazindikirika chifukwa cha njala ikudza m'mbuyoyo, pakuti idzavuta." 
Genesis41:32 Ndipo lotolo linabwezedwa kawiri kwa Farao, chifukwa chinthu chili chokhazikika ndi Mulungu, ndipo Mulungu afulumira kuchichita." 
Genesis41:33 Tsopano, Farao afunefune munthu wakuzindikira ndi wanzeru, amkhazike iye ayang'anire dziko la Ejipito." 
Genesis41:34 Farao achite chotere, alembe woyang'anira dziko wosonkhetsa limodzi la magawo asanu la dziko la Ejipito m'zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zakuchuluka dzinthu." 
Genesis41:35 Iwo asonkhanitse chakudya chonse cha zaka zabwino izo zilinkudzazo, aunjike tirigu m'manja a Farao akhale chakudya m'midzi, namsunge." 
Genesis41:36 Ndipo chakudyacho chidzakhala m'dziko chosonkhera zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala imene idzakhala m'dziko la Ejipito; kuti dziko lisaonongedwe ndi njala. 
Genesis41:37 Ndipo chinthucho chinali chabwino m'maso mwa Farao, ndi m'maso mwa anyamata ake." 
Genesis41:38 Ndipo Farao anati kwa anyamata ake, Kodi ife tidzaone munthu ngati uyu, mzimu wa Mulungu uli m'mtima mwake?" 
Genesis41:39 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Popeza Mulungu wakuonetsa iwe zonsezo palibe wina wakuzindikira ndi wanzeru ngati iwe." 
Genesis41:40 Uziyang'anira pa nyumba yanga, ndipo anthu anga onse adzalamulidwa mwa mau ako; pa mpando wachifumu pokha ine ndidzakuposa iwe." 
Genesis41:41 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Taona, ndakhazika iwe wolamulira dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Genesis41:42 Ndipo Farao anachotsa mphete yosindikizira yake pa dzanja lake, naiveka pa dzanja la Yosefe, namveka iye ndi zovalira zabafuta, naika unyolo wagolide pakhosi pake;" 
Genesis41:43 ndipo anamkweza iye m'galeta wake wachiwiri amene anali naye: ndipo anafuula patsogolo pa iye, Gwadani; ndipo anamkhazika iye wolamulira dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Genesis41:44 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Ine ndine Farao, ndipo popanda iwe palibe munthu aliyense adzatukula dzanja lake kapena mwendo wake m'dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Genesis41:45 Ndipo Farao anamutcha dzina la Yosefe Zafenati-Panea; ndipo anampatsa akwatire Asenati mwana wamkazi wa Potifera wansembe wa Oni. Ndipo Yosefe anatuluka wolamulira, nayendayenda m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Genesis41:46 Ndipo Yosefe anali wa zaka makumi atatu pamene iye anaima pamaso pa Farao mfumu ya Aejipito. Ndipo Yosefe anatuluka pamaso pa Farao, napitapita pa dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Genesis41:47 Ndipo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zakuchuluka dzinthu nthaka inabala zambirimbiri. 
Genesis41:48 Ndipo anasonkhanitsa chakudya chonse cha zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri chimene chinali m'dziko la Ejipito, nasunga chakudyacho m'midzi; chakudya cha m'minda, yozinga midzi yonse, anachisunga m'menemo." 
Genesis41:49 Ndipo Yosefe anasunga tirigu ngati mchenga wa panyanja, wambirimbiri kufikira analeka kuwerenga; chifukwa anali wosawerengeka." 
Genesis41:50 Ndipo kwa Yosefe anabadwa ana amuna awiri, chisanafike chaka cha njala, amene Asenati mwana wamkazi wa Potifera wansembe wa Oni anambalira iye." 
Genesis41:51 Ndipo Yosefe anamutcha dzina la woyamba Manase, chifukwa anati iye, Mulungu wandiiwalitsa ine zovuta zanga zonse, ndi nyumba yonse ya atate wanga." 
Genesis41:52 Ndipo dzina la wachiwiri anamutcha Efuremu: chifukwa Mulungu anandibalitsa ine m'dziko la kusauka kwanga. 
Genesis41:53 Ndipo zaka zakuchuluka dzinthu zisanu ndi ziwiri za m'dziko la Ejipito, zinatha." 
Genesis41:54 Ndipo zinayamba kufika zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala, monga ananena Yosefe; ndipo munali njala m'maiko monse; koma m'dziko lonse la Ejipito munali chakudya." 
Genesis41:55 Ndipo pamene dziko lonse la Ejipito linali ndi njala, anthu anafuulira Farao awapatse chakudya; ndipo Farao anati kwa Aejipito onse, Pitani kwa Yosefe: chimene iye anena kwa inu chitani." 
Genesis41:56 Ndipo njala inali pa dziko lonse lapansi; ndipo Yosefe anatsegula nkhokwe zonse nagulitsa Aejipito: ndipo njala inakula m'dziko la Ejipito. 
Genesis41:57 Ndipo maiko onse anafika ku Ejipito kudzagula tirigu kwa Yosefe: chifukwa njala inakula m'dziko lonse lapansi. 
Genesis42:1 Ndipo anaona Yakobo kuti m'Ejipito munali tirigu, nati Yakobo kwa ana ake amuna, Chifukwa chanji mulinkuyang'anana?" 
Genesis42:2 Ndipo iye anati, Taonani, ndamva kuti m'Ejipito muli tirigu, mutsikireko mutigulire kumeneko; kuti tikhale ndi moyo, tisafe." 
Genesis42:3 Ndipo abale ake a Yosefe khumi anatsikira kukagula tirigu m'Ejipito. 
Genesis42:4 Koma Yakobo sanamtume Benjamini mphwake wa Yosefe, pamodzi ndi abale ake, chifukwa anati, Choipa chingam'gwere iye." 
Genesis42:5 Ndipo ana amuna a Israele anadza kudzagula mwa iwo amene anadzako, pakuti m'dziko la Kanani munali njala." 
Genesis42:6 Ndipo Yosefe anali wolamulira dziko; ndiye amene anagulitsa kwa anthu onse a m'dziko; ndipo anafika abale ake a Yosefe, namweramira pansi, nkhope zao pansi." 
Genesis42:7 Ndipo Yosefe anaona abale ake, ndipo anazindikira iwo, koma anadziyesetsa kwa iwo ngati mlendo, nanena kwa iwo mwankhanza: ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mufuma kuti inu? Nati iwo, Ku dziko la Kanani kudzagula chakudya." 
Genesis42:8 Ndipo Yosefe anazindikira abale ake, koma iwo sanamzindikire iye." 
Genesis42:9 Ndipo Yosefe anakumbukira maloto amene analota za iwo, ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ozonda inu; mwadzera kudzaona usiwa wa dziko." 
Genesis42:10 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Iai, mbuyanga, koma akapolo anu adzera kudzagula chakudya." 
Genesis42:11 Tonse tili ana amuna a munthu mmodzi; tili oona, akapolo anu, sitili ozonda." 
Genesis42:12 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Iai, koma mwadzera kuti muone usiwa wa dziko." 
Genesis42:13 Nati iwo, Akapolo anu ndife abale khumi, ana amuna a munthu mmodzi m'dziko la Kanani; ndipo, taonani, wamng'ono ali ndi atate wathu lero; ndipo palibe mmodzi." 
Genesis42:14 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo, Ndicho chimene ndinakunenani inu, kuti, Ndinu ozonda." 
Genesis42:15 Mudzayesedwa ndi ichi, pali moyo wa Farao, simudzatuluka muno, koma akadze kuno mphwanu ndiko." 
Genesis42:16 Tumizani mmodzi wa inu akatenge, adze naye mphwanu: ndipo inu mudzamangidwa kuti mau anu ayesedwe, ngati zoona zili mwa inu: penatu, pali moyo wa Farao, muli ozonda ndithu." 
Genesis42:17 Ndipo anaika onse m'kaidi masiku atatu. 
Genesis42:18 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo tsiku lachitatu, Chitani ichi, kuti mukhale ndi moyo; ine ndiopa Mulungu;" 
Genesis42:19 ngati muli oona, mmodzi wa abale anu amangidwe m'kaidi momwemo; mukani inu, mupite naye tirigu wa njala ya mabanja anu;" 
Genesis42:20 koma mukatenge mphwanu kudza naye kwa ine, kuti atsimikizidwe mau anu ndipo simudzafa. Ndipo anachita chomwecho." 
Genesis42:21 Ndipo iwo anati wina ndi mnzake, Tachimwiratu mbale wathu, pamene tinaona kuvutidwa kwa mtima wake, potipembedzera ife, koma ife tinakana kumvera, chifukwa chake kuvutidwa kumene kwatifikira." 
Genesis42:22 Ndipo Rubeni anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi sindinanena kwa inu kuti, Musachimwire mwanayu; ndipo inu munakana kumvera? Chifukwa chakenso, taonani mwazi wake ufunidwa." 
Genesis42:23 Ndipo sanadziwe kuti Yosefe anamva; chifukwa anali ndi womasulira. 
Genesis42:24 Ndipo anawafotokozera iwo nalira, nawatembenukiranso, nanena nao, nampatula Simeoni mwa iwo, nammanga iye pamaso pao." 
Genesis42:25 Ndipo Yosefe analamulira kuti adzaze zotengera zao ndi tirigu, ndi kubweza ndalama zao, aliyense m'thumba mwake, ndi kuwapatsa phoso la panjira; ndipo anatero nao." 
Genesis42:26 Ndipo anasenzetsa abulu ao tirigu wao nachokapo. 
Genesis42:27 Ndipo pamene wina wa iwo anamasula thumba lake kuti adyetse bulu wake pachigono, anapeza ndalama zake; taonani, zinali kukamwa kwa thumba lake." 
Genesis42:28 Ndipo iye anati kwa abale ake, Wandibwezera ine ndalama zanga, taonani, zili kukamwa kwa thumba langa; ndipo mitima yao inawadera iwo, nanthunthumira, natembenukirana wina ndi mnzake kuti, Nchiyani ichi Mulungu watichitira ife?" 
Genesis42:29 Ndipo anadza kwa Yakobo atate wao ku dziko la Kanani, namfotokozera iye zonse zinaonekera kwa iwo;" 
Genesis42:30 kuti, Munthu mwini dziko, ananena ndi ife mwankhalwe, natiyesa ife ozonda dziko." 
Genesis42:31 Koma ife tinati kwa iye, Tili anthu oona; sitili ozonda;" 
Genesis42:32 tili abale khumi ndi awiri, ana a atate wathu; wina palibe, ndipo lero wamng'ono ali ndi atate wathu m'dziko la Kanani." 
Genesis42:33 Ndipo munthuyo mwini dziko anati kwa ife, Momwemu ndidzadziwa kuti muli anthu oona; siyani mmodzi wa abale anu pamodzi ndi ine, tengani tirigu wa njala ya kwanu, mukani;" 
Genesis42:34 idzani naye mphwanu kwa ine, ndipo ndidzadziwa kuti simuli ozonda koma anthu oona: chomwecho ndidzakubwezerani inu mbale wanu, ndipo mudzachita malonda m'dziko muno." 
Genesis42:35 Ndipo panali pamene analikukhuthula matumba ao, taonani, phukusi la ndalama la yense linali m'thumba lake; ndipo pamene iwo ndi atate ao anaona mapukusi a ndalama anaopa." 
Genesis42:36 Ndipo Yakobo atate wao anati kwa iwo, Munandilanda ine ana; Yosefe palibe, Simeoni palibe, ndipo mudzachotsa Benjamini: zonse zimene zandigwera." 
Genesis42:37 Ndipo Rubeni anati kwa atate wake, kuti, Muwaphe ana anga amuna awiri ndikapanda kumbweza iye kwa inu; mumpereke iye m'manja mwanga, ndipo ine ndidzambwezanso kwa inu." 
Genesis42:38 Ndipo iye anati, Mwana wanga sadzatsikira ndi inu, chifukwa kuti mkulu wake wafa, ndipo watsala iye yekha; ngati choipa chikamgwera iye m'njira m'mene mupitamo, inu mudzatsitsira ndi chisoni imvi zanga kumanda." 
Genesis43:1 Ndipo njala inakula m'dzikomo. 
Genesis43:2 Ndipo panali pamene atatha kudya tirigu yense anatengayo ku Ejipito atate wao anati kwa iwo, Pitaninso, mukatigulire ife chakudya pang'ono." 
Genesis43:3 Ndipo Yuda ananena ndi iye kuti, Munthu uja anatilimbitsira mau kuti, simudzaonanso nkhope yanga, koma mphwanu akhale ndi inu ndiko." 
Genesis43:4 Ngati mudzatuma mphwathu pamodzi ndi ife, tidzatsikira ndi kugulira inu chakudya." 
Genesis43:5 Koma mukapanda kumtuma iye sititsika; pakuti munthu uja anati kwa ife, Simudzaona nkhope yanga, ngati mphwanu sali ndi inu." 
Genesis43:6 Ndipo Israele anati, Chifukwa ninji munandichitira ine choipa chotero kuti munamuuza munthuyo muli ndi mphwanu?" 
Genesis43:7 Ndipo iwo anati, Munthuyo anafunsitsa za ife, ndi za abale athu, kuti, Atate wanu alipo? Kodi muli ndi mphwanu? Ndipo tinamfotokozera iye monga mwa mau amenewo: ngati tinadziwa kuti iye adzati, Idzani naye mphwanu?" 
Genesis43:8 Ndipo Yuda anati kwa atate wake Israele, Mumtume mnyamata pamodzi ndi ine ndipo ife tidzanyamuka ndi kupita; kuti tikhale ndi moyo tisafe, ife ndi inu ndi ana athu ang'ono." 
Genesis43:9 Ine ndidzakhala chikole, pa manja anga mudzamfunsa: ndikapanda kumbwezera kwa inu ndi kumuimitsa pamaso panu, chifukwa chake chidzakhala pa ine masiku onse:" 
Genesis43:10 pakuti tikadaleka kuchedwa mwenzi tsopano titabwera kawiri. 
Genesis43:11 Ndipo Israele atate wao anati kwa iwo, Ngati chomwecho tsopano chitani ichi: tengani zipatso za m'dziko muno m'zotengera zanu, mumtengere munthu uja mphatso, mafuta amankhwala pang'ono, ndi uchi pang'ono, zonunkhira ndi mure, ndi mfula, ndi katungurume;" 
Genesis43:12 nimutenge ndalama zowirikiza m'manja mwanu; ndipo ndalama zimene zinabwezedwa kukamwa kwa matumba anu mutengenso m'manja mwanu; kapena sanachite dala; 
Genesis43:13 mutengenso mphwanu, nimunyamuke, mupitenso kwa munthu uja:" 
Genesis43:14 Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse adzakupatsani inu chifundo pamaso pa munthu uja, kuti akumasulireni inu mbale wanu wina ndi Benjamini. Ndipo ine, ngati ndikhala wopanda ana, ndikhalatu." 
Genesis43:15 Amunawo ndipo anatenga mphatso natenga ndalama zowirikiza m'manja mwao, ndi Benjamini; ndipo ananyamuka ndi kutsikira ku Ejipito, naima pamaso pa Yosefe." 
Genesis43:16 Ndipo pamene Yosefe anaona Benjamini pamodzi nao, anati kwa tsanyumba wake, Lowa nao anthuwo m'nyumba, kaphere iwo, kakonzere, chifukwa anthuwo adzadya ndi ine usana uno." 
Genesis43:17 Munthuyo anachita monga anamuuza Yosefe, ndipo munthuyo analowa nao anthuwo m'nyumba ya Yosefe." 
Genesis43:18 Anthuwo ndipo anaopa, chifukwa analowezedwa m'nyumba ya Yosefe; nati, Chifukwa cha ndalama zija zinabwezedwa m'matumba athu nthawi yoyamba ija, ife tilowezedwa, kuti aone chifukwa ndi ife, atigwere ife, atiyese ife akapolo, ndi abulu athu." 
Genesis43:19 Ndipo anayandikira kwa tsanyumba wa Yosefe, ndipo ananena ndi iye pa khomo la nyumba, nati," 
Genesis43:20 Mfumu, tinatsikira ndithu nthawi yoyamba kudzagula chakudya:" 
Genesis43:21 ndipo panali pamene ife tinafika pachigono, tinamasula matumba athu, ndipo taonani ndalama za yense zinali kukamwa kwa thumba lake, ndalama zathu mkulemera kwake; ndipo tabwera nazo m'manja mwathu." 
Genesis43:22 Ndalama zina tatenga m'manja mwathu kuti tigule chakudya: sitimdziwa amene anaika ndalama zathu m'matumba athu. 
Genesis43:23 Ndipo iye anati, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu, musaope; Mulungu wanu ndi Mulungu wa atate wanu anakupatsani inu chuma m'matumba anu; ine ndinali nazo ndalama zanu. Pamenepo anawatulutsira Simeoni." 
Genesis43:24 Ndipo munthuyo analowetsa anthu m'nyumba ya Yosefe, nawapatsa iwo madzi, natsuka mapazi ao, napatsa abulu ao chakudya." 
Genesis43:25 Ndipo anakonzeratu mphatso asanafike Yosefe usana; chifukwa anamva kuti adzadya chakudya pamenepo. 
Genesis43:26 Pamene Yosefe anadza kunyumba kwake, analowa nazo m'nyumba mphatso zinali m'manja mwao, namweramira iye pansi." 
Genesis43:27 Ndipo anafunsa iwo za ubwino wao, nati, Kodi atate wanu ali ndi moyo? Wokalamba uja amene munanena uja: kodi alipo?" 
Genesis43:28 Ndipo iwo anati, Kapolo wanu atate wathu ali bwino, alipo. Ndipo anawerama, namgwadira iye." 
Genesis43:29 Ndipo iye anatukula maso ake naona Benjamini mphwake, mwana wa amake, nati, Kodi uyu ndi mphwanu wamng'ono uja, amene munanena ndi ine uja? Ndipo iye anati, Mulungu akuchitire iwe ufulu, mwana wanga." 
Genesis43:30 Yosefe ndipo anafulumira, chifukwa mtima wake unakhumbitsa mphwake, ndipo anafuna polirira; nalowa m'chipinda chake naliramo." 
Genesis43:31 Ndipo anasamba nkhope yake, natuluka; ndipo anadziletsa, nati, Ikani chakudya." 
Genesis43:32 Ndipo anamuikira iye chake pa yekha, ndi iwo chao pa okha, ndi Aejipito akudya naye chao pa okha; chifukwa Aejipito sanathei kudya chakudya pamodzi ndi Ahebri: chifukwa kuchita chomwecho nkunyansira Aejipito." 
Genesis43:33 Ndipo anakhala pamaso pake, woyamba monga ukulu wake, ndi wamng'ono monga ung'ono wake; ndipo anazizwa wina ndi wina." 
Genesis43:34 Ndipo anawagawira mitanda ya patsogolo pake; koma mtanda wa Benjamini unaposa mitanda ya onsewo kasanu. Ndipo anamwa, nasekera pamodzi ndi iye." 
Genesis44:1 Ndipo Yosefe anauza tsanyumba wake kuti, Dzaza matumba a anthuwo ndi chakudya, monga angathe kunyamula, ndi kuika ndalama za yense kukamwa kwa thumba lake." 
Genesis44:2 Nuike chikho changa, chikho chasiliva chija, kukamwa kwa thumba la wamng'ono, pamodzi ndi ndalama za tirigu zake. Ndipo iye anachita monga mau ananena Yosefe." 
Genesis44:3 Pamene kudacha, anamukitsa anthu iwo ndi abulu ao." 
Genesis44:4 Atatuluka m'mudzi asanamuke patali, Yosefe anati kwa tsanyumba wake, Tanyamuka, talondola anthu aja, ukawapeza unene nao, Chifukwa chanji mwabwezera zoipa m'malo mwa zabwino?" 
Genesis44:5 Kodi si ndicho chomwera nacho mbuyanga, naombeza ula nacho? Mwachitira choipa pakutero." 
Genesis44:6 Ndipo anapeza iwo, nanena nao mau omwewo." 
Genesis44:7 Nati kwa iye, Bwanji mbuyanga anena mau otere? Ngati nkutheka kuti akapolo anu achite chotero?" 
Genesis44:8 Taonani, ndalama zija, tinazipeza kukamwa kwa matumba athu, tinazibwezanso kwa inu kutuluka m'dziko la Kanani; nanga bwanji tingabe m'nyumba ya mbuyanga kapena siliva kapena golide?" 
Genesis44:9 Iye wa akapolo anu ampeza nacho afe, ndipo ifenso tidzakhala akapolo a mbuyanga." 
Genesis44:10 Ndipo iye anati, Tsononso chikhale monga mwa mau anu: iye amene ampeza nacho adzakhala kapolo wanga; ndipo inu mudzakhala opanda chifukwa." 
Genesis44:11 Ndipo anafulumira natsitsa pansi yense thumba lake, namasula yense thumba lake." 
Genesis44:12 Ndipo iye anafunafuna kuyambira pa wamkulu naleka pa wamng'ono nachipeza chikho m'thumba la Benjamini: 
Genesis44:13 ndipo anang'amba zovala zao, nasenzetsa yense bulu wake, nabwera kumudzi." 
Genesis44:14 Yudanso ndi abale ake anadza kunyumba ya Yosefe; ndipo iye akali pamenepo; ndipo anagwa pansi patsogolo pake. 
Genesis44:15 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo, Ichi nchiyani mwachichita? Kodi simudziwa kuti munthu ngati ine ndingathe kuzindikira ndithu?" 
Genesis44:16 Ndipo Yuda anati, Kodi tidzati bwanji kwa mbuyanga? Kodi tidzanenanji? Kapena tidzawiringula ife bwanji? Mulungu wapeza mphulupulu ya akapolo anu; taonani, tili akapolo a mbuyanga, ife ndi iye amene anampeza nacho chikho m'dzanja lake." 
Genesis44:17 Ndipo iye anati, Ngati kutheka kuti ndichite chotero! Munthu amene anampeza nacho m'dzanja lake adzakhala kapolo wanga: koma inu, kazipitani ndi mtendere kwa atate wanu." 
Genesis44:18 Ndipo Yuda anayandikira kwa iye nati, Mfumu, kapolo wanu aneneretu m'makutu a mbuyanga, mtima wanu usapse pokwiya ndi kapolo wanu; chifukwa muli ngati Farao." 
Genesis44:19 Mbuyanga anafunsa akapolo ake kuti, Kodi muli ndi atate wanu kapena mbale wanu?" 
Genesis44:20 Ndipo tinati kwa mbuyanga, Tili ndi atate, munthu wokalamba, ndi mwana wa ukalamba wake wamng'ono; mbale wake wafa, ndipo iye yekha watsala wa amake, ndipo atate wake amkonda iye." 
Genesis44:21 Ndipo munati kwa akapolo anu, Munditengere iye, kuti ndimuone iye m'maso mwanga." 
Genesis44:22 Ndipo ife tinati kwa mbuyanga, Mnyamata sangathei kumsiya atate wake; pakuti akamsiya atate wake, atate wake adzafa." 
Genesis44:23 Ndipo munati kwa akapolo anu, Koma ngati mbale wanu safika pamodzi ndi inu, simudzaonanso konse nkhope yanga." 
Genesis44:24 Ndipo panali titakwera kunka kwa kapolo wanu atate wanga, tinamfotokozera iye mau a mbuyanga." 
Genesis44:25 Ndipo atate wathu anati, Mupitenso mutigulire ife chakudya pang'ono." 
Genesis44:26 Ndipo ife tinati, Sitingathe kupita; mphwathu wamng'ono akakhala ndi ife, pamenepo tidzapita; pakuti sitingaone nkhope ya munthu uja, mphwathu wamng'ono akapanda kukhala ndi ife." 
Genesis44:27 Ndipo kapolo wanu atate wanga anati kwa ife, Inu mudziwa kuti mkazi wanga anandibalira ine ana amuna awiri;" 
Genesis44:28 wina anatuluka kwa ine ndipo ndinati, Zoonatu, wakadzulidwa; ndipo sindidzamuonanso iye;" 
Genesis44:29 ndipo ngati mukandichotsera ameneyonso, ndipo ngati chimgwera choipa, mudzanditsitsira ndi chisoni imvi zanga kumanda." 
Genesis44:30 Chifukwa chake ndikafika kwa kapolo wanu atate wanga, ndipo mnyamata akapanda kukhala ndi ife; popeza moyo wanu uli womangidwa ndi moyo wa mnyamatayo;" 
Genesis44:31 kudzakhala pakuona kuti mnyamatayo palibe, adzafa; ndipo akapolo anu adzamtsitsira ndi chisoni imvi za atate wathu kumanda." 
Genesis44:32 Pakuti kapolo wanu anadziyesa chikole cha mnyamata pa atate wanga, kuti, Ndikapanda kumbwezeranso kwa inu, pamenepo ndidzakhala ndi chifukwa kwa atate wanga nthawi zonse." 
Genesis44:33 Tsopanotu, mtumiki wanu akhale kapolo wa mbuyanga m'malo mwa mnyamata; mnyamatayo akwere pamodzi ndi abale ake." 
Genesis44:34 Pakuti ndidzakwera bwanji kwa atate wanga, mnyamatayo akapanda kukhala ndi ine? Ndingaone choipa chidzagwera atate wanga." 
Genesis45:1 Ndipo Yosefe sanakhoze kudziletsa pamaso pa onse amene anaima naye: nati, Tulutsa anthu onse pamaso panga. Ndipo panalibe munthu pamodzi ndi iye pamene Yosefe anadziululira yekha kwa abale ake." 
Genesis45:2 Ndipo analira momveka, ndipo anamva Aejipito, ndipo anamva a m'nyumba ya Farao." 
Genesis45:3 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa abale ake, Ine ndine Yosefe; kodi akali ndi moyo atate wanga? Ndipo abale ake sanakhoze kumyankha iye; pakuti anavutidwa pakumuona iye." 
Genesis45:4 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa abale ake, Muyandikiretu kwa ine; nayandikira. Ndipo iye anati, Ine ndine Yosefe mbale wanu, ine ndemwe munandigulitsa ndilowe m'Ejipito." 
Genesis45:5 Tsopano musapwetekwe mtima, musadzikwiyira inu nokha, kuti munandigulitsa ine kuno, pakuti Mulungu ananditumiza ine patsogolo panu kuti ndisunge moyo." 
Genesis45:6 Zaka ziwirizi muli njala m'dziko muno; ndipo zatsala zaka zisanu, zopanda kulima kapena kusenga." 
Genesis45:7 Ndipo Mulungu anatumiza ine patsogolo panu kuti ndikhazike inu mutsale m'dziko lapansi, ndi kusunga inu amoyo ndi chipulumutso chachikulu." 
Genesis45:8 Ndipo tsopano sindinu amene munanditumiza ine ndifike kuno, koma Mulungu, ndipo anandiyesa ine atate wa Farao, ndi mwini banja lake lonse, ndi wolamulira dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Genesis45:9 Fulumirani. Kwerani kunka kwa atate wanga, muti kwa iye, Chotere ati Yosefe mwana wanu, Mulungu wandiyesa ine mwini Ejipito lonse: tsikirani kwa ine, musachedwe." 
Genesis45:10 Ndipo mudzakhala m'dziko la Goseni, mudzakhala pafupi ndi ine, inu ndi ana anu, ndi ana a ana anu, ndi nkhosa zanu, ndi zoweta zanu, ndi zonse muli nazo;" 
Genesis45:11 ndipo ndidzachereza inu komweko; pakuti zatsala zaka zisanu za njala; kuti mungafikire umphawi, inu ndi banja lanu, ndi onse muli nao." 
Genesis45:12 Taonani, maso anu aona, ndi maso a mphwanga Benjamini, kuti ndi m'kamwa mwanga ndilikulankhula ndi inu." 
Genesis45:13 Ndipo mudzafotokozera atate wanga za ulemerero wanga wonse m'Ejipito, ndi zonse mwaziona; ndipo muzifulumira ndi kutsitsira kuno atate wanga." 
Genesis45:14 Ndipo anagwa pakhosi pake pa Benjamini, nalira; ndipo Benjamini nalira pakhosi pake." 
Genesis45:15 Ndipo anampsompsona abale ake onse, nalirira iwo; ndipo pambuyo pake abale ake onse anacheza naye." 
Genesis45:16 Ndipo mbiri yake inamveka m'nyumba ya Farao, kuti abale ake a Yosefe afika; ndipo inamkomera Farao, ndi anyamata ake." 
Genesis45:17 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Nena ndi abale ako, Chitani ichi; senzetsani nyama zanu, ndi kupita kunka ku dziko la Kanani;" 
Genesis45:18 katengeni atate wanu ndi mabanja anu, nimudze kwa ine; ndipo ndidzakupatsani inu zabwino za dziko la Ejipito, ndipo mudzadya zonenepa za dzikoli." 
Genesis45:19 Tsopano mwalamulidwa chitani ichi; muwatengere ana anu ndi akazi magaleta a m'dziko la Ejipito; nimubwere naye atate wanu. 
Genesis45:20 Musasamalire chuma chanu; popeza zabwino za dziko lonse la Ejipito ndi zanu. 
Genesis45:21 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita chotero: ndipo Yosefe anawapatsa iwo magaleta monga analamulira Farao, nawapatsa phoso la panjira." 
Genesis45:22 Onse anawapatsa yense zovala zopindula; koma Benjamini anampatsa masekeli a siliva mazana atatu ndi zovala zopindula zisanu. 
Genesis45:23 Kwa atate wake anatumiza zotere: abulu khumi osenza zinthu zabwino za m'Ejipito, ndi abulu akazi khumi osenza tirigu, ndi chakudya, ndi phoso la atate la panjira." 
Genesis45:24 Ndipo anamukitsa abale ake, ndipo anachoka; ndipo anati kwa iwo, Musakangane panjira." 
Genesis45:25 Ndipo anakwera kutuluka m'Ejipito, nafika ku dziko la Kanani kwa Yakobo atate wao." 
Genesis45:26 Ndipo anamfotokozera iye kuti, Yosefe akali ndi moyo, ndipo alamulira m'dziko lonse la Ejipito. Pamenepo mtima wake unakomoka, pakuti sanawakhulupirire iwo." 
Genesis45:27 Ndipo anamfotokozera iye mau onse a Yosefe amene ananena ndi iwo; ndipo pamene anaona magaleta amene Yosefe anatumiza kuti amtengeremo, mtima wa Yakobo atate wao unatsitsimuka;" 
Genesis45:28 ndipo Israele anati, Chakwana; Yosefe mwana wanga akali ndi moyo; ndidzamuka ndikamuone iye ndisanafe." 
Genesis46:1 Ndipo Israele anamuka ulendo wake ndi zonse anali nazo, nafika ku Beereseba, napereka nsembe kwa Mulungu wa Isaki atate wake." 
Genesis46:2 Ndipo Mulungu ananena kwa Israele, m'masomphenya a usiku, nati, Yakobo, Yakobo." 
Genesis46:3 Nati iye, Ndine pano. Ndipo anati, Ine ndine Mulungu, Mulungu wa atate wako; usaope kunka ku Ejipito; pakuti pamenepo ndidzakusandutsa iwe mtundu waukulu;" 
Genesis46:4 Ine ndidzatsikira pamodzi ndi iwe ku Ejipito; ndipo Ine ndidzakubwezanso ndithu; ndipo Yosefe adzaika dzanja lake pamaso pako. 
Genesis46:5 Ndipo Yakobo anachoka ku Beereseba, ndipo ana amuna a Israele anamnyamula Yakobo atate wao, ndi ana ao ang'ono, ndi akazi ao, m'magaleta amene Farao anatumiza kuti amnyamule iye." 
Genesis46:6 Ndipo anatenga ng'ombe zao ndi chuma chao anachipeza m'dziko la Kanani, nadza ku Ejipito, Yakobo ndi mbeu zake zonse pamodzi ndi iye;" 
Genesis46:7 ana ake amuna, ndi zidzukulu zake zazimuna, ndi ana akazi ake, ndi zidzukulu zake zazikazi, ndi mbeu zake zonse anadza nazo m'Ejipito." 
Genesis46:8 Maina a ana a Israele amene anadza m'Ejipito ndi awa: Yakobo ndi ana amuna ake: Rubeni mwana wamwamuna woyamba wa Yakobo. 
Genesis46:9 Ndi ana amuna a Rubeni: Hanoki, ndi Palu, ndi Hezironi, ndi Karimi." 
Genesis46:10 Ndi ana amuna a Simeoni: Yemuwele ndi Yamini, ndi Ohadi, ndi Yakini, ndi Zohari, ndi Shaulo, mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi wa ku Kanani." 
Genesis46:11 Ndi ana amuna a Levi: Geresoni, Kohati, ndi Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Ndi ana amuna a Yuda: Eri, ndi Onani, ndi Sela, ndi Perezi, ndi Zera; koma Eri ndi Onani anafa m'dziko la Kanani. Ndi ana amuna a Perezi ndiwo Hezironi ndi Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Ndi ana amuna a Isakara: Tola ndi Puva, ndi Iyobu, ndi Simironi." 
Genesis46:14 Ndi ana amuna a Zebuloni: Seredi, ndi Eloni ndi Yaleele." 
Genesis46:15 Amenewo ndi ana amuna a Leya, amene anambalira Yakobo m'Padanaramu, pamodzi ndi mwana wamkazi wake Dina; ana aamuna ndi aakazi onse ndiwo anthu makumi atatu kudza atatu." 
Genesis46:16 Ndi ana amuna a Gadi: Zifiyoni, ndi Hagi, ndi Suni, ndi Eziboni, ndi Eri, ndi Arodi, ndi Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Ndi ana amuna a Asere: Imina, ndi Isiva, ndi Isivi, ndi Beriya, ndi Sera mlongo wao; ndi ana a Beriya: Hebere, ndi Malikiele." 
Genesis46:18 Amenewa ndi ana a Zilipa, amene Labani anampatsa Leya mwana wake wamkazi, amenewo anambalira Yakobo, anthu khumi ndi asanu ndi mmodzi." 
Genesis46:19 Ana a Rakele mkazi wake wa Yakobo: Yosefe ndi Benjamini. 
Genesis46:20 Kwa Yosefe kunabadwa m'dziko la Ejipito Manase ndi Efuremu, amene Asenati mwana wamkazi wa Potifera wansembe wa Oni anambalira iye." 
Genesis46:21 Ndi ana amuna a Benjamini: Bela ndi Bekere, ndi Asibele, ndi Gera, ndi Naamani, ndi Ehi ndi Rosi, Mupimu ndi Hupimu, ndi Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Amenewo ndi ana a Rakele, amene anabadwira Yakobo; anthu onse ndiwo khumi ndi anai." 
Genesis46:23 Ndi ana amuna a Dani: Husimu. 
Genesis46:24 Ndi ana amuna a Nafutali: Yazeele, ndi Guni, ndi Yezere ndi Silemu" 
Genesis46:25 Amenewa ndi ana a Biliha, amene Labani anampatsa Rakele mwana wake wamkazi, amenewo anambalira Yakobo; anthu onse ndiwo asanu ndi awiri." 
Genesis46:26 Ndi anthu onse amene anadza ndi Yakobo m'Ejipito, amene anatuluka m'chuuno mwake, pamodzi ndi akazi a ana amuna a Yakobo ndiwo makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi mmodzi;" 
Genesis46:27 ndi ana amuna a Yosefe, amene anambadwira iye m'Ejipito ndiwo anthu awiri; anthu onse a mbumba ya Yakobo, amene analowa m'Ejipito anali makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
Genesis46:28 Ndipo anatumiza Yuda patsogolo pake kwa Yosefe, amtsogolere kumuonetsa njira yonka ku Goseni: ndipo anafika ku dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis46:29 Ndipo Yosefe anamanga galeta lake nakwera kunka kukakomana naye Israele atate wake, ku Goseni, ndipo anadzionetsera yekha kwa iye, nagwera pakhosi pake nakhala m'kulira pakhosi pake." 
Genesis46:30 Ndipo Israele anati kwa Yosefe, Ndife tsopano, popeza ndaona nkhope yako, kuti ukali ndi moyo." 
Genesis46:31 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa abale ake, ndi kwa mbumba ya atate wake, Ndidzanka, ndikauze Farao, ndipo ndidzati kwa iye, Abale anga ndi mbumba ya atate wanga, amene anali m'dziko la Kanani, afika kwa ine;" 
Genesis46:32 ndipo anthuwo ali abusa chifukwa anakhala oweta ng'ombe; ndipo anadza ndi nkhosa zao ndi ng'ombe zao ndi zonse ali nazo. 
Genesis46:33 Ndipo padzakhala pamene Farao adzaitana inu, nadzati, Ntchito yanu njotani?" 
Genesis46:34 Mudzati, Akapolo anu akhala oweta ng'ombe chiyambire ubwana wathu kufikira tsopano, ife ndi atate athu; kuti mukhale m'dziko la Goseni; chifukwa abusa onse anyansira Aejipito." 
Genesis47:1 Ndipo Yosefe analowa nauza Farao nati, Atate wanga ndi abale anga, ndi nkhosa zao ndi ng'ombe zao, ndi zonse ali nazo, anachokera ku dziko la Kanani; ndipo, taonani, ali m'dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis47:2 Ndipo mwa abale ake anatengako anthu asanu, nawaonetsa iwo kwa Farao." 
Genesis47:3 Ndipo Farao anati kwa abale ake, Ntchito yanu njotani? Ndipo iwo anati kwa Farao, Akapolo anu ndi abusa, ife ndi atate athu." 
Genesis47:4 Nati kwa Farao, Tafika kuti tikhale m'dzikomo; popeza palibe podyetsa zoweta za akapolo anu; pakuti njala yakula m'dziko la Kanani. Mulole tsopano akapolo anu akhale m'dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis47:5 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Atate wako ndi abale ako afika kwa iwe;" 
Genesis47:6 dziko la Ejipito lili pamaso pako: uwakhazike atate wako ndi abale ako pa dera lokometsetsa la dziko; akhale m'dziko la Goseni; ndipo ngati udziwa anthu anzeru a mwa iwo, uwaike iwo ayang'anire ng'ombe zanga." 
Genesis47:7 Ndipo Yosefe analowa naye Yakobo atate wake, namuika iye pamaso pa Farao; ndipo Yakobo anamdalitsa Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yakobo, Masiku a zaka za moyo wanu ndi angati?" 
Genesis47:9 Ndipo Yakobo anati kwa Farao, Masiku a zaka za ulendo wanga ndi zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu; masiku a zaka za moyo wanga ali owerengeka ndi oipa, sanafikire masiku a zaka za moyo wa makolo anga m'masiku a ulendo wao." 
Genesis47:10 Ndipo Yakobo anamdalitsa Farao, natuluka pamaso pa Farao." 
Genesis47:11 Ndipo Yosefe anakhazika atate wake ndi abale ake, napatsa iwo pokhala m'dziko la Ejipito, m'dera lokometsetsa la m'dziko, m'dziko la Ramsesi, monga analamulira Farao." 
Genesis47:12 Ndipo Yosefe anachereza atate wake ndi abale ake, ndi mbumba yonse ya atate wake ndi chakudya monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Genesis47:13 Ndipo munalibe chakudya m'dziko lonse; pakuti njala inalimba kwambiri; chifukwa chake dziko la Ejipito ndi dziko la Kanani tinalefuka chifukwa cha njalayo. 
Genesis47:14 Ndipo Yosefe anasonkhanitsa ndalama zonse anazipeza m'dziko la Ejipito ndi m'dziko la Kanani, za tirigu amene anagula; ndipo Yosefe anapereka ndalama kunyumba ya Farao." 
Genesis47:15 Ndipo zitatha ndalama zonse m'dziko la Ejipito ndi m'dziko la Kanani, Aejipito onse anadza kwa Yosefe, nati, Mutipatse ife chakudya; tiferenji pamaso panu? Zatsirizika ndalama." 
Genesis47:16 Ndipo Yosefe anati, Mundipatse ng'ombe zanu: ndipo ndidzakupatsani inu mtengo wa ng'ombe zanu ngati ndalama zatsirizika." 
Genesis47:17 Ndipo anadza nazo ng'ombe zao kwa Yosefe, ndipo Yosefe anapatsa iwo chakudya chosinthana ndi akavalo, ndi nkhosa ndi ng'ombe ndi abulu; ndipo anawadyetsa iwo ndi chakudya chosinthana ndi zoweta zao zonse chaka chimenecho." 
Genesis47:18 Chitatha chaka chimenecho, anadza kwa iye chaka chachiwiri, nati kwa iye, Sitibisira mbuyathu kuti ndalama zathu zonse zatha; ndipo zoweta za ng'ombe nza mbuyathu: palibe kanthu kotsala pamaso pa mbuyathu, koma matupi athu ndi maiko athu;" 
Genesis47:19 tiferenji pamaso panu, ife ndi dziko lathu? Mutigule ife ndi dziko lathu ndi chakudya, ndipo ife ndi dziko lathu tidzakhala akapolo a Farao; ndipo mutipatse ife mbeu, kuti tikhale ndi moyo, tisafe, ndi kuti dziko lisakhale labwinja." 
Genesis47:20 Ndipo Yosefe anamgulira Farao dziko lonse la Ejipito, chifukwa Aejipito anagulitsa yense munda wake, chifukwa njala inakula pa iwo; ndipo dziko linakhala la Farao." 
Genesis47:21 Tsono anthu, anasunthira iwo kumidzi kuchokera kumphepete kwa malire a Ejipito kufikira kumphepete kwina kwake." 
Genesis47:22 Koma dziko la ansembe lokha sanagule, chifukwa ansembe analandira gawo lao kwa Farao, nadya gawolo anawapatsa Farao; chifukwa chake sanagulitse dziko lao." 
Genesis47:23 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa anthu, Taonani, ndamgulira Farao inu ndi dziko lanu lero lomwe, taonani, mbeu zanu siizi, mubzale m'dziko." 
Genesis47:24 Ndipo padzakhala pakukunkha, muzipatsa limodzi la mwa magawo asanu kwa Farao, koma magawo anai ndi anu, mbeu za munda, ndi za chakudya chanu, ndi cha ana anu ndi mabanja anu." 
Genesis47:25 Ndipo iwo anati, Watipulumutsa miyoyo yathu; tipeze ufulu pamaso pa mbuyanga, ndipo tidzakhala akapolo a Farao." 
Genesis47:26 Ndipo Yosefe analamulira lamulo la pa dziko la Ejipito kufikira lero, kuti Farao alandire limodzi la mwa magawo asanu; koma dziko la ansembe lokha silinakhala la Farao." 
Genesis47:27 Ndipo Israele anakhala m'dziko la Ejipito, m'dziko la Goseni; nakhala nazo zaozao m'menemo, nabalana nachuluka kwambiri." 
Genesis47:28 Ndipo Yakobo anakhala m'dziko la Ejipito zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri; ndipo masiku a Yakobo zaka za moyo wake zinali zaka zana limodzi mphambu makumi anai kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Genesis47:29 Ndipo nthawi inayandikira kuti Israele adzafa, ndipo anaitana Yosefe mwana wake wamwamuna, nati kwa iye, Ngati ndapeza ufulu pamaso pako, ikatu dzanja lako pansi pa ntchafu yanga, nundichitire ine zabwino ndi zoona: usandiikatu ine m'Ejipito;" 
Genesis47:30 koma pamene ndidzagona ndi makolo anga, udzanditenge ine kutuluka m'dziko la Ejipito, ukandiike ine m'manda mwao. Ndipo iye anati, Ndidzachita monga mwanena." 
Genesis47:31 Ndipo anati, Undilumbirire ine; namlumbirira iye. Ndipo Israele anawerama kumutu kwa kama." 
Genesis48:1 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, anthu anati kwa Yosefe, Taonani, atate wanu wadwala: ndipo iye anatenga ana ake amuna awiri, Manase ndi Efuremu, apite naye." 
Genesis48:2 Ndipo anthu anamuuza Yakobo nati, Taonani, mwana wanu Yosefe alinkudza kwa inu; ndipo Israele anadzilimbitsa nakhala tsonga pakama." 
Genesis48:3 Ndipo Yakobo anati kwa Yosefe, Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse anaonekera kwa ine pa Luzi m'dziko la Kanani nandidalitsa ine, nati kwa ine," 
Genesis48:4 Taona, ndidzakubalitsa iwe, ndidzakuchulukitsa iwe, ndidzakusandutsa iwe khamu la anthu a mitundu; ndipo ndidzapatsa mbeu yako ya pambuyo pako dziko ili likhale laolao chikhalire." 
Genesis48:5 Tsopano ana ako amuna awiri, amene anakubadwira iwe m'dziko la Ejipito, ndisanadze kwa iwe ku Ejipito, ndiwo anga; Efuremu ndi Manase, monga Rubeni ndi Simeoni, ndiwo anga." 
Genesis48:6 Koma obala iwe udzawabala pambuyo pao, ndiwo ako; awatche dzina la abale ao m'cholowa chao." 
Genesis48:7 Tsono ine, pamene ndinachokera ku Padani, Rakele anamwalira pambali panga m'dziko la Kanani m'njira, itatsala nthawi yaing'ono tisadafike ku Efurata; ndipo ndidamuika iye pamenepo pa njira ya ku Efurata (ndiwo Betelehemu)." 
Genesis48:8 Ndipo Israele anayang'ana ana amuna a Yosefe, nati, Ndani awa?" 
Genesis48:9 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa atate wake, Amenewa ndi ana anga, amene Mulungu wandipatsa ine pano. Ndipo iye anati, Udze naotu kwa ine, ndipo ndidzawadalitsa." 
Genesis48:10 Koma maso a Israele anali akhungu m'ukalamba wake, ndipo sanathei kuona. Ndipo anadza nao pafupi; ndipo anapsompsona iwo, nawafungatira." 
Genesis48:11 Ndipo Israele anati kwa Yosefe, Sindinaganizira kuti ndione nkhope yako: ndipo, taona, Mulungu wandionetsa ine mbeu zako zomwe." 
Genesis48:12 Ndipo Yosefe anatulutsa iwo pakati pa maondo ake, nawerama ndi nkhope yake pansi." 
Genesis48:13 Ndipo Yosefe anatenga iwo onse awiri, Efuremu m'dzanja lake lamanja ku dzanja lamanzere la Yakobo, ndi Manase m'dzanja lake lamanzere ku dzanja lamanja la Israele, nadza nao pafupi ndi iye." 
Genesis48:14 Ndipo Israele anatambalitsa dzanja lake lamanja, naliika pa mutu wa Efuremu, amene ndiye wamng'ono, ndi dzanja lake lamanzere pa mutu wa Manase, anapingasitsa manja ake dala; chifukwa Manase anali woyamba." 
Genesis48:15 Ndipo anadalitsa Yosefe, nati, Mulungu, pamaso pake anayenda makolo anga Abrahamu ndi Isaki, Mulungu amene anandidyetsa ine nthawi zonse za moyo wanga kufikira lero," 
Genesis48:16 mthenga amene anandiombola ine ku zoipa zonse, adalitse anyamatawa; dzina langa litchulidwe pa iwo, ndi dzina la makolo anga Abrahamu ndi Isaki; iwo akule, nakhale khamu pakati pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis48:17 Ndipo pamene Yosefe anaona kuti atate wake anaika dzanja lake lamanja pa mutu wa Efuremu, kudamuipira iye; ndipo anatukula dzanja la atate wake, kulichotsa pa mutu wa Efuremu ndi kuliika pa mutu wa Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa atate wake, Msatero atate wanga, chifukwa uyu ndi woyamba; ikani dzanja lanu lamanja pa mutu wake." 
Genesis48:19 Koma anakana atate wake, nati, Ndidziwa mwananga, ndidziwa; iyenso adzakhala mtundu wa anthu, iyenso adzakula; koma mphwake adzakhala wamkulu ndi iye, ndipo mbeu zake zidzakhala mitundu yambirimbiri." 
Genesis48:20 Ndipo anadalitsa iwo tsiku lomwelo, nati, Mwa iwe Israele adzadalitsa, kuti, Mulungu akuyese iwe monga Efuremu ndi monga Manase; ndipo anaika Efuremu woyamba wa Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Ndipo Israele anati kwa Yosefe, Taona, ndilinkufa ine; Mulungu adzakhala ndi iwe, adzakubwezanso iwe ku dziko la makolo ako." 
Genesis48:22 Ndipo ine ndakupatsa iwe gawo limodzi loposa la abale ako, limene ndinalanda m'dzanja la Aamori ndi lupanga langa ndi uta wanga." 
Genesis49:1 Ndipo Yakobo anaitana ana ake amuna, nati, Sonkhanani inu, kuti ndikuuzeni inu chimene chidzakugwerani inu masiku akudzawo." 
Genesis49:2 Sonkhanani, tamvani, ana amuna a Yakobo; tamverani Israele atate wanu." 
Genesis49:3 Rubeni, ndiwe woyamba wanga, mphamvu yanga ndi chiyambi cha mphamvu yanga; ulemu wopambana, ndi mphamvu yopambana." 
Genesis49:4 Wobwabwada ngati madzi; sudzapambana; chifukwa unakwera pa kama wa atate wako; pamenepo unaipitsapo; anakwera paja ndigonapo. 
Genesis49:5 Simeoni ndi Levi ndiwo abale; zida za mphulupulu ndizo malupanga ao. 
Genesis49:6 Mtima wangawe, usalowe mu chiungwe chao; ulemerero wanga, usadziphatike pa masonkhano ao; chifukwa m'kukwiya kwao anapha munthu. M'kufuna kwao anapundula ng'ombe." 
Genesis49:7 Kutembereredwe kukwiya kwao, chifukwa kunali koopsa; ndi kupsa mtima kwao, chifukwa kunali kwankhalwe. Ndidzawagawanitsa m'Yakobo. Ndidzabalalitsa iwo m'Israele." 
Genesis49:8 Yuda, abale ako adzakuyamika iwe; dzanja lako lidzakhala pa khosi la adani ako; ana amuna a atate wako adzakuweramira." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda ndi mwana wa mkango, kuchokera kuzomotola, mwananga, wakwera; anawerama pansi, anabwatama ngati mkango, ndipo ngati mkango waukazi; ndani adzamukitsa iye?" 
Genesis49:10 Ndodo yachifumu siidzachoka mwa Yuda, kapena wolamulira pakati pa mapazi ake, kufikira atadza Silo; ndipo anthu adzamvera iye." 
Genesis49:11 Adamanga mwana wa kavalo wake pampesa, ndi mwana wa bulu wake pa mpesa wosankhika; natsuka malaya ake m'vinyo, ndi chofunda chake m'mwazi wa mphesa." 
Genesis49:12 Maso ake adzafiira ndi vinyo, ndipo mano ake adzayera ndi mkaka." 
Genesis49:13 Zebuloni adzakhala m'mphepete mwa nyanja; ndipo iye adzakhala dooko la ngalawa; ndipo malire ake adakhala pa Sidoni. 
Genesis49:14 Isakara ndiye bulu wolimba, alinkugona pakati pa makola." 
Genesis49:15 Ndipo anaona popumulapo kuti panali pabwino, ndi dziko kuti linali lokondweretsa; ndipo anaweramitsa phewa lake kuti anyamule, nakhala kapolo wakugwira ntchito ya msonkho." 
Genesis49:16 Dani adzaweruza anthu ake, monga limodzi la mafuko a Israele." 
Genesis49:17 Dani adzakhala njoka m'khwalala, songo panjira, imene iluma zitende za kavalo, kuti womkwera wake agwe chambuyo." 
Genesis49:18 Ndadikira chipulumutso chanu, Yehova." 
Genesis49:19 Ndi Gadi, achifwamba adzampsinja iye; koma iye adzapsinja pa chitende chao." 
Genesis49:20 Ndi Asere, chakudya chake ndicho mafuta, ndipo adzapereka zolongosoka zachifumu." 
Genesis49:21 Nafutali ndi mbawala yomasuka; apatsa mau abwino. 
Genesis49:22 Yosefe ndi nthambi yobala, nthambi yobala pambali pa kasupe; nthambi zake ziyangayanga palinga." 
Genesis49:23 Eni uta anavutitsa iye kwambiri, namponyera iye, namzunza." 
Genesis49:24 Koma uta wake unakhala wamphamvu, ndi mikono ya manja ake inalimbitsidwa. Ndi manja a Wamphamvu wa Yakobo. (Kuchokera kumeneko ndi mbusa, mwala wa Israele,)" 
Genesis49:25 Ndi Mulungu wa atate wako amene adzakuthangata iwe, ndi Wamphamvuyonse, amene adzakudalitsa iwe. Ndi madalitso a Kumwamba, madalitso a madzi akuya akukhala pansi, madalitso a mawere, ndi a mimba." 
Genesis49:26 Madalitso a atate wako apambana mphamvu ndi madalitso a makolo anga, aufikira ku malekezero a patali a mapiri a chikhalire. Adzakhala pa mutu wa Yosefe, ndi pakati pa mutu wa iye amene ali wolekanitsidwa ndi abale ake." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamini ndiye mmbulu wakulusalusa; m'mamawa adzadya chomotola, madzulo adzagawa zofunkha." 
Genesis49:28 Awa onse ndiwo mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israele: izo ndizo zomwe ananena kwa iwo atate wao nawadalitsa; yense monga mdalitso wake anawadalitsa. 
Genesis49:29 Ndipo analangiza iwo nati kwa iwo, Ine nditi ndisonkhanizidwe kwa anthu a mtundu wanga; mundiike ine pamodzi ndi makolo anga m'phanga lili m'munda wa Efuroni Muhiti," 
Genesis49:30 m'phanga lili m'munda wa Makipela, umene uli patsogolo pa Mamure, m'dziko la Kanani, limene Abrahamu analigula kwa Efuroni Muhiti pamodzi ndi munda, likhale poikira pake:" 
Genesis49:31 pamenepo anaika Abrahamu ndi Sara mkazi wake; pamenepo anaika Isaki ndi Rebeka mkazi wake: pamenepo ndinaika Leya: 
Genesis49:32 munda ndi phanga lili m'menemo, zinagulidwa kwa ana a Hiti" 
Genesis49:33 Pamene Yakobo anatha kulangiza ana ake amuna, anafunya mapazi ake pakama, natsirizika, nasonkhanizidwa kwa anthu a mtundu wake." 
Genesis50:1 Ndipo Yosefe anagwa pa nkhope ya atate wake, namlirira iye nampsompsona iye." 
Genesis50:2 Ndipo Yosefe anauza akapolo ake asing'anga kuti akonze atate wake ndi mankhwala osungira thupi: ndipo asing'anga anakonza Israele. 
Genesis50:3 Ndipo anatha masiku ake makumi anai a iye; chifukwa chomwecho amatsiriza masiku akukonza thupi; ndipo Aejipito anamlira iye masiku makumi asanu ndi awiri. 
Genesis50:4 Atapita masiku akumlira iye, Yosefe anati kwa mbumba ya Farao, kuti, Ngatitu ndapeza ufulu pamaso panu, nenanitu m'makutu a Farao kuti," 
Genesis50:5 Atate wanga anandilumbiritsa ine, kuti, Taona, ndilinkufa; m'manda m'mene ndadzikonzeratu ndekha m'dziko la Kanani, m'menemo udzandiika ine. Tsopano mundiloletu, ndikwereko, ndipite, ndikaike atate wanga, nditatero ndidzabweranso." 
Genesis50:6 Ndipo Farao anati, Pita, kaike atate wako, monga iye anakulumbiritsa iwe." 
Genesis50:7 Ndipo Yosefe anapita kukaika atate wake; ndipo anakwera pamodzi ndi akapolo onse a Farao, ndi akulu a pa mbumba yake, ndi akulu onse a m'dziko la Ejipito," 
Genesis50:8 ndi mbumba yonse ya Yosefe ndi abale ake, ndi mbumba ya atate wake: ang'ono ao okha, ndi nkhosa zao, ndi ng'ombe zao, anazisiya m'dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis50:9 Ndipo anakwera pamodzi ndi iye magaleta ndi apakavalo; ndipo panali khamu lalikulu. 
Genesis50:10 Ndipo anafika pa dwale la Atadi, lili tsidya lija la Yordani, pamenepo anamlira maliro a atate wake masiku asanu ndi limodzi." 
Genesis50:11 Ndipo pamene anthu okhala m'dzikomo, Akanani, anaona maliro a m'dwale la Atadi, anati, Awa ndi maliro akulu a Aejipito: chifukwa chake dzina la pamenepo linatchedwa Abele-Mizraimu, pali tsidya lija la Yordani." 
Genesis50:12 Ndipo ana ake amuna anamchitira iye monga anawalamulira iwo; 
Genesis50:13 chifukwa kuti ana ake amuna anamnyamula iye kulowa naye m'dziko la Kanani, ndi kumuika iye m'phanga la munda wa Makipela, limene Abrahamu analigula pamodzi ndi munda, likhale poikira pake, kwa Efuroni Muhiti, patsogolo pa Mamure." 
Genesis50:14 Ndipo ataika atate wake, Yosefe anabwera ku Ejipito, iye ndi abale ake, ndi onse amene anakwera pamodzi naye kukaika atate wake." 
Genesis50:15 Ndipo pamene abale ake a Yosefe anaona kuti atate wao anafa, anati, Kapena Yosefe adzatida ife, ndipo adzatibwezera ife zoipa zonse tidamchitira iye." 
Genesis50:16 Ndipo anatumiza mthenga kwa Yosefe kuti, Atate wathu asanafe analamulira, kuti," 
Genesis50:17 Muziti chotero kwa Yosefe, Mukhululukiretu tsopano kulakwa kwa abale anu, ndi kuchimwa kwao, chifukwa kuti anakuchitirani inu choipa; tsopano mutikhululukiretu kulakwa kwa akapolo a Mulungu wa atate wanu. Ndipo Yosefe analira pamene iwo ananena ndi iye." 
Genesis50:18 Ndiponso abale ake anamuka namgwadira pamaso pake; nati, Taonani, ife ndife akapolo anu." 
Genesis50:19 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo, Musaope; pakuti ndili ine kodi m'malo a Mulungu?" 
Genesis50:20 Koma inu, munandipangira ine choipa; koma Mulungu anachipangira chabwino, kuti kuchitike monga lero, kupulumutsa amoyo anthu ambiri." 
Genesis50:21 Ndipo tsopano musaope; ine ndidzachereza inu, ndi ana anu ang'ono. Ndipo anawatonthoza iwo mitima yao, nanena nao mokoma mtima." 
Genesis50:22 Ndipo Yosefe anakhala m'Ejipito, iye, ndi mbumba ya atate wake; ndipo Yosefe anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi ndi khumi." 
Genesis50:23 Ndipo Yosefe anaona ana a Efuremu a mbadwo wachitatu; ananso a Makiri mwana wamwamuna wa Manase anabadwa pa maondo a Yosefe. 
Genesis50:24 Yosefe ndipo anati kwa abale ake, Ndilinkufa ine, koma Mulungu adzaonekera kwa inu, adzakuchotsani inu m'dziko muno kubwera kunka ku dziko limene analumbirira kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa Isaki, ndi kwa Yakobo." 
Genesis50:25 Ndipo Yosefe analumbiritsa ana a Israele kuti, Mulungu adzaonekera kwa inu ndithu, ndipo mudzakwera nao mafupa anga kuchokera kuno." 
Genesis50:26 Ndipo anafa Yosefe, anali wa zaka zana limodzi ndi khumi; ndipo anakonza thupi lake ndi mankhwala osungira, ndipo anamuika iye m'bokosi m'Ejipito." 
Exodus1:1 Ndipo maina a ana a Israele, amene analowa m'Ejipito ndi Yakobo ndi awa, analowa munthu ndi banja lake:" 
Exodus1:2 Rubeni, Simeoni, Levi ndi Yuda;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakara, Zebuloni, ndi Benjamini;" 
Exodus1:4 Dani ndi Nafutali, Gadi ndi Asere." 
Exodus1:5 Ndipo amoyo onse amene anatuluka m'chuuno mwake mwa Yakobo ndiwo makumi asanu ndi awiri; koma Yosefe anali m'Ejipito. 
Exodus1:6 Ndipo anafa Yosefe, ndi abale ake onse, ndi mbadwo uwo wonse." 
Exodus1:7 Ana a Israele ndipo anaswana, nabalana, nachuluka, nakhala nazo mphamvu zazikulu; ndipo dziko linadzala nao." 
Exodus1:8 Pamenepo inalowa mfumu yatsopano m'ufumu wa Ejipito, imene siinadziwa Yosefe." 
Exodus1:9 Ndipo ananena ndi anthu ake, Taonani, anthu, ndiwo ana a Israele, achuluka, natiposa mphamvu." 
Exodus1:10 Tiyeni, tiwachenjerere angachuluke, ndi kuphatikizana ndi adani athu ikafika nkhondo, ndi kulimbana nafe, ndi kuchoka m'dzikomo." 
Exodus1:11 Potero anawaikira akulu a misonkho kuti awasautse ndi akatundu ao. Ndipo anammangira Farao midzi yosungiramo chuma, ndiyo Pitomu ndi Ramsesi." 
Exodus1:12 Koma monga momwe anawasautsiramo, momwemo anachuluka, momwemonso anafalikira. Ndipo anavutika chifukwa cha ana Israele." 
Exodus1:13 Ndipo Aejipito anawagwiritsa ana a Israele ntchito yosautsa; 
Exodus1:14 nawawitsa moyo wao ndi ntchito yolimba, ya dothi ndi ya njerwa, ndi ntchito zonse za pabwalo, ntchito zao zonse zimene anawagwiritsa nzosautsa." 
Exodus1:15 Ndipo mfumu ya Aejipito inanena ndi anamwino a Ahebri, dzina lake la wina ndiye Sifira, dzina la mnzake ndiye Puwa;" 
Exodus1:16 ninati, Pamene muchiza akazi a Ahebri nimuwaone pamipando; akakhala mwana wamwamuna, mumuphe; akakhala wamkazi, akhale ndi moyo." 
Exodus1:17 Koma anamwino anaopa Mulungu, ndipo sanachite monga mfumu ya Aejipito inawauza, koma analeka ana amuna akhale ndi moyo." 
Exodus1:18 Ndipo mfumu ya Aejipito inaitana anamwino, ninena nao, Mwachita ichi chifukwa ninji, ndi kuleka ana amunawo akhale ndi moyo?" 
Exodus1:19 Ndipo anamwino ananena ndi Farao, Popeza akazi a Ahebri safanana ndi akazi a Aejipito; pakuti ali ndi mphamvu, naona ana asanafike anamwino." 
Exodus1:20 Potero Mulungu anawachitira zabwino anamwino; ndipo anthuwo anachuluka, nakhala nazo mphamvu zazikulu." 
Exodus1:21 Ndipo kunatero kuti, popeza anamwino anaopa Mulungu, Iye anawamangitsira mabanja." 
Exodus1:22 Ndipo Farao analamulira anthu ake onse, ndi kuti, Ana amuna onse akabadwa aponyeni m'nyanja, koma ana akazi onse alekeni amoyo." 
Exodus2:1 Ndipo anamuka munthu wa banja la Levi, natenga mwana wamkazi wa Levi." 
Exodus2:2 Ndipo anaima mkaziyo, naona mwana wamwamuna; m'mene anamuona kuti ali wokoma, anambisa miyezi itatu." 
Exodus2:3 Koma pamene sanathe kumbisanso, anamtengera kabokosi kagumbwa, napakapo nkhunga ndi phula; naikamo mwanayo, nakaika pakati pa mabango m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Exodus2:4 Ndipo mlongo wake anaima patali, adziwe chomwe adzamchitira." 
Exodus2:5 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Farao anatsikira kukasamba m'nyanja; ndipo atsikana ake anayendayenda m'mbali mwa nyanja; ndipo iye anaona kabokosi pakati pa mabango, natuma mdzakazi wake akatenge." 
Exodus2:6 Pamene anakavundukula, anapenya mwanayo; ndipo taonani, khandalo lilikulira. Ndipo anamva naye chifundo, nati, Uyu ndiye wa ana a Ahebri." 
Exodus2:7 Pamenepo mlongo wake ananena ndi mwana wamkazi wa Farao, Ndipite ine kodi kukuitanirani woyamwitsa wa Ahebri, akuyamwitsireni mwanayo?" 
Exodus2:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Farao ananena naye, Pita. Napita namwaliyo, nakaitana amake wa mwanayo." 
Exodus2:9 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Farao ananena naye, Pita naye mwana uyu, ndi kundiyamwitsira iye, ndidzakupatsa mphotho yako. Ndipo mkaziyo anatenga mwanayo, namyamwitsa." 
Exodus2:10 Ndipo atakula mwanayo, anapita naye kwa mwana wamkazi wa Farao, ndipo iye anakhala mwana wake. Ndipo anamutcha dzina lake Mose, nati, Chifukwa ndinamvuula m'madzi." 
Exodus2:11 Ndipo kunali masiku amenewo, atakula Mose, kuti anatulukira kukazonda abale ake, napenya akatundu ao; ndipo anaona munthu Mwejipito ali kukantha Muhebri, wa abale ake." 
Exodus2:12 Ndipo anaunguza kwina ndi kwina, ndipo pamene anaona kuti palibe munthu, anakantha Mwejipito, namfotsera mumchenga." 
Exodus2:13 M'mawa mwake anatulukanso, ndipo, taonani, anthu awiri Ahebri alikugwirana; ndipo ananena ndi wochimwayo, kuti, Umpandiranji mnzako?" 
Exodus2:14 Koma anati, Wakuika iwe ndani ukhale mkulu ndi woweruza wathu? Kuteroku ukuti undiphe, monga unamupha Mwejipito? Ndipo Mose anachita mantha, nanena, Ndithu chinthuchi chadziwika." 
Exodus2:15 Pamene Farao anachimva ichi, anafuna kupha Mose. Koma Mose anathawa pankhope pa Farao, nakhala m'dziko la Midiyani; nakhala pansi pachitsime." 
Exodus2:16 Ndipo wansembe wa Midiyani anali nao ana akazi asanu ndi awiri, amene anadza kudzatunga madzi; ndipo anadzaza mimwero kuti amwetse gulu la atate wao." 
Exodus2:17 Pamenepo anadza abusa nawapirikitsa; koma Mose anauka nawathandiza, namwetsa gulu lao." 
Exodus2:18 M'mene anafika kwa Reuwele atate wao, iye anati, Mwabwera msanga bwanji lero?" 
Exodus2:19 Ndipo anati iwo, Munthu Mwejipito anatilanditsa m'manja a abusa, natitungiranso madzi okwanira, namwetsa gululi." 
Exodus2:20 Ndipo anati kwa ana ake akazi, Ali kuti iye? Mwamsiyiranji munthuyo? Kamuitaneni, adzadye chakudya." 
Exodus2:21 Ndipo Mose anavomera kukhala naye munthuyo; ndipo anampatsa Mose mwana wake wamkazi Zipora. 
Exodus2:22 Ndipo anaona mwana, ndi Mose anamutcha dzina lake Geresomo; pakuti anati, Ndakhala mlendo m'dziko la eni." 
Exodus2:23 Ndipo kunali pakupita masiku ambiri aja, idafa mfumu ya Aejipito; ndi ana a Israele anatsitsa moyo chifukwa cha ukapolo wao, nalira, ndi kulira kwao kunakwera kwa Mulungu chifukwa cha ukapolowo." 
Exodus2:24 Ndipo Mulungu anamva kubuula kwao, ndi Mulungu anakumbukira chipangano chake ndi Abrahamu, ndi Isaki, ndi Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Ndipo Mulungu anapenya Aisraele, ndi Mulungu anadziwa." 
Exodus3:1 Koma Mose analikuweta gulu la Yetero mpongozi wake, wansembe wa ku Midiyani; natsogolera gululo m'tsogolo mwa chipululu, nafika kuphiri la Mulungu, ku Horebu." 
Exodus3:2 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera m'chilangali chamoto chotuluka m'kati mwa chitsamba; ndipo anapenya, ndipo taonani, chitsamba chilikuyaka moto, koma chosanyeka chitsambacho." 
Exodus3:3 Ndipo Mose anati, Ndipatuketu, ndikaone chooneka chachikulucho, chitsambacho sichinyeka bwanji." 
Exodus3:4 Pamene Yehova anaona kuti adapatuka kukapenya, Mulungu ali m'kati mwa chitsamba, anamuitana, nati, Mose, Mose. Ndipo anati, Ndili pano." 
Exodus3:5 Ndipo Iye anati, Usayandikire kuno; vula nsapato zako ku mapazi ako, pakuti pamalo pamene upondapo iwe, mpopatulika." 
Exodus3:6 Ananenanso, Ine ndine Mulungu wa atate wako, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isaki, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo. Ndipo Mose anabisa nkhope yake; popeza anaopa kuyang'ana Mulungu." 
Exodus3:7 Ndipo Yehova anati, Ndapenyetsetsa mazunzo a anthu anga ali m'Ejipito, ndamvanso kulira kwao chifukwa cha akuwafulumiza; pakuti ndidziwa zowawitsa zao;" 
Exodus3:8 ndipo ndatsikira kuwalanditsa m'manja a anthu a Ejipito, ndi kuwatulutsa m'dziko lija akwere nalowe m'dziko labwino ndi lalikulu, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi; ku malo a Akanani, ndi Ahiti, ndi Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Ndipo tsopano, taona kulira kwa ana a Israele kwandifikira; ndapenyanso kupsinjika kumene Aejipito awapsinja nako." 
Exodus3:10 Tiye tsopano, ndikutuma kwa Farao, kuti utulutse anthu anga, ana a Israele m'Ejipito." 
Exodus3:11 Koma Mose anati kwa Mulungu Ndine yani ine kuti ndipite kwa Farao, ndi kuti nditulutse ana a Israele m'Ejipito?" 
Exodus3:12 Ndipo Iye anati, Ine ndidzakhala ndi iwe; ndipo ichi ndi chizindikiro cha iwe, chakuti ndakutuma ndine; utatulutsa anthuwo m'Ejipito, mudzatumikira Mulungu paphiri pano." 
Exodus3:13 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Mulungu, Onani, pakufika ine kwa ana a Israele, ndi kunena nao, Mulungu wa makolo anu wandituma kwa inu; ndipo akakanena ndi ine, Dzina lake ndani? Ndikanena nao chiyani?" 
Exodus3:14 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Mose, INE NDINE YEMWE NDILI INE. Anatinso, Ukatero ndi ana a Israele, INE NDINE wandituma kwa inu." 
Exodus3:15 Ndipo Mulungu ananenanso kwa Mose, Ukatero ndi ana a Israele, Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isaki, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo anandituma kwa inu; ili ndi dzina langa nthawi yosatha, ichi ndi chikumbukiro changa m'mibadwomibadwo." 
Exodus3:16 Muka, nukasonkhanitse akulu a Israele, nunene nao, Yehova, Mulungu wa makolo anu anandionekera ine, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isaki ndi Yakobo, ndi kuti, Ndakuzondani ndithu, ndi kuona chomwe akuchitirani m'Ejipito;" 
Exodus3:17 ndipo ndanena, Ndidzakukwezani kukutulutsani m'mazunzo a Aejipito, kukulowezani m'dziko la Akanani, ndi Ahiti, ndi Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi." 
Exodus3:18 Ndipo adzamvera mau ako; ndipo ukapite iwe ndi akulu a Israele, kwa mfumu ya Aejipito, ndi kukanena naye, Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri wakomana ndi ife; tiloleni, timuke tsopano ulendo wa masiku atatu m'chipululu, kuti timphere nsembe Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus3:19 Koma Ine ndidziwa kuti mfumu ya Aejipito siidzalola inu kumuka, inde lingakhale ndi dzanja lamphamvu ai." 
Exodus3:20 Ndipo ndidzatambasula dzanja langa, ndi kukantha Aejipito ndi zozizwa zanga zonse ndizichita pakati pake; ndi pambuyo pake adzakulolani kumuka." 
Exodus3:21 Ndipo ndidzapatsa anthu awa ufulu pamaso pa anthu a Ejipito; ndipo kudzakhala, pamene mutuluka simudzatuluka opanda kanthu;" 
Exodus3:22 koma mkazi yense adzafunse mnzake, ndi mlendo wokhala m'nyumba mwake, ampatse zokometsera zasiliva, ndi zokometsera zagolide, ndi zovala; ndipo mudzaveke nazo ana anu aamuna ndi aakazi; ndipo mudzafunkhe za Aejipito." 
Exodus4:1 Ndipo Mose anayankha nati, Koma taonani, sadzakhulupirira ine, kapena kumvera mau anga; pakuti adzanena, Yehova sanakuonekere iwe." 
Exodus4:2 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Icho nchiyani m'dzanja lako? Nati, Ndodo." 
Exodus4:3 Ndipo ananena Iye, Iponye pansi. Naiponya pansi, ndipo inasanduka njoka; ndipo Mose anaithawa." 
Exodus4:4 Koma Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasula dzanja lako, nuigwire kumchira; ndipo anatambasula dzanja lake, naigwira, nikhalanso ndodo m'dzanja lake;" 
Exodus4:5 kuti akhulupirire kuti wakuonekera Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isaki, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Exodus4:6 Ndipo Yehova ananenanso naye, Longa dzanja lako pachifuwa pako. Ndipo analonga dzanja lake pachifuwa pake, nalitulutsa, taonani, dzanja lake linali lakhate, lotuwa ngati chipale chofewa." 
Exodus4:7 Ndipo ananena iye, Bwerezanso dzanja lako pachifuwa pako. Ndipo anabwerezanso dzanja lake pachifuwa pake; nalitulutsa pachifuwa pake, taonani, linasandukanso lomwe lakale." 
Exodus4:8 Ndipo kudzatero, ngati sakhulupirira iwe, ndi kusamvera mau a chizindikiro choyamba, adzakhulupirira mau a chizindikiro chotsirizachi." 
Exodus4:9 Ndipo kudzatero, akapanda kukhulupirira zingakhale zizindikiro izi, ndi kusamvera mau ako, ukatunge madzi a kunyanja ndi kuthira pamtunda; ndi madzi watunga ku nyanjayo adzasanduka mwazi pamtunda." 
Exodus4:10 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Mverani, Ambuye, ine ndine munthu wosowa ponena, kapena dzulo, kapena kale, kapena chilankhulire Inu ndi kapolo wanu, pakuti ndine wa m'kamwa molemera, ndi wa lilime lolemera." 
Exodus4:11 Koma Yehova ananena naye, Anampangira munthu m'kamwa ndani? Kapena analenga munthu wosalankhula ndani, kapena wogontha, kapena wamaso, kapena wakhungu? Si ndine Yehova kodi?" 
Exodus4:12 Ndipo tsopano muka, ndipo Ine ndidzakhala m'kamwa mwako, ndi kukuphunzitsa chomwe ukalankhule." 
Exodus4:13 Koma anati, Mverani, Ambuye, tumizani pa dzanja la iye amene mudzamtuma." 
Exodus4:14 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unamyakira Mose, ndipo anati, Nanga Aroni Mlevi mbale wako sialipo kodi? Ndidziwa kuti kulankhula alankhula. Ndipo, taona, atuluka kudzakomana ndiwe; ndipo pakuona iwe adzakondwera m'mtima mwake." 
Exodus4:15 Ndipo ukalankhule naye, ndi kumpangira mau; ndipo Ine ndidzakhala m'kamwa mwako, ndi m'kamwa mwake, ndipo ndidzakuphunzitsani inu chimene mukachite." 
Exodus4:16 Ndipo iye adzakulankhulira iwe kwa anthu; ndipo kudzatero, kuti iye adzakhala kwa iwe ngati m'kamwa, ndi iwe udzakhala kwa iye ngati Mulungu." 
Exodus4:17 Ndipo ukaigwire m'dzanja lako ndodo iyi, imene ukachite nayo zizindikirozo." 
Exodus4:18 Ndipo Mose anabwera namuka kwa Yetero mpongozi wake, nanena naye, Ndimuketu, ndibwerere kunka kwa abale anga amene ali m'Ejipito, ndikaone ngati akali ndi moyo. Ndipo Yetero ananena ndi Mose, Pita bwino." 
Exodus4:19 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'Midiyani, Muka, bwerera kunka ku Ejipito; pakuti adafa anthu onse amene anafuna moyo wako." 
Exodus4:20 Pamenepo Mose anatenga mkazi wake ndi ana ake amuna, nawakweza pa bulu, nabwerera kunka ku dziko la Ejipito; ndipo Mose anagwira ndodo ya Mulungu m'dzanja lake." 
Exodus4:21 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Pakumuka iwe kubwerera kunka ku Ejipito, usamalire uchite zozizwa zonse ndaziika m'dzanja lako, pamaso pa Farao; koma Ine ndidzalimbitsa mtima wake kuti asadzalole anthu kupita." 
Exodus4:22 Pamenepo ukanene ndi Farao, Atero Yehova Mwana wanga, mwana wanga woyamba ndiye Israele." 
Exodus4:23 Ndipo ndanena ndi iwe, Mlole mwana wanga amuke, kuti anditumikire Ine; koma wakana kumlola kuti asamuke; taona, Ine ndidzamupha mwana wako wamwamuna, mwana wako woyamba." 
Exodus4:24 Ndipo kunali panjira, kuchigono, Yehova anakomana naye, nafuna kumupha." 
Exodus4:25 Koma Zipora anatenga mpeni wamwala, nadula khungu la mwana wake, naliponya pa mapazi ake; nati, Pakuti iwe ndiwe mkwati wanga wamwazi. Ndipo Iye anamleka." 
Exodus4:26 Pamenepo anati mkaziyo, Mkwati wamwazi iwe, chifukwa cha mdulidwe." 
Exodus4:27 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Aroni, Muka kuchipululu kukakomana ndi Mose. Ndipo anamuka, nakomana naye pa phiri la Mulungu, nampsompsona." 
Exodus4:28 Ndipo Mose anauza Aroni mau onse a Yehova amene adamtuma nao, ndi zizindikiro zonse zimene adamlamulira." 
Exodus4:29 Pamenepo Mose ndi Aroni anamuka nasonkhanitsa akulu onse a ana a Israele; 
Exodus4:30 ndipo Aroni anawafotokozera mau onse amene Yehova adauza Mose, nachita zizindikiro zija pamaso pa anthu." 
Exodus4:31 Ndipo anthuwo anakhulupirira; ndipo pamene anamva kuti Yehova adawazonda ana a Israele, ndi kuti adaona mazunzo ao, anawerama, nalambira Mulungu." 
Exodus5:1 Ndipo pambuyo pake Mose ndi Aroni analowa nanena ndi Farao, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele, Lola anthu anga apite, kundichitira madyerero m'chipululu." 
Exodus5:2 Koma Farao anati, Yehova ndani, kuti ndimvere mau ake ndi kulola Israele apite? Sindimdziwa Yehova, ndiponso sindidzalola Israele apite." 
Exodus5:3 Ndipo iwo anati, Mulungu wa Ahebri wakomana ndi ife; timuketu ulendo wa masiku atatu m'chipululu, kumphera nsembe Yehova Mulungu wathu; kuti angatikanthe ndi mliri, kapena ndi lupanga." 
Exodus5:4 Ndipo mfumu ya Aejipito inanena nao, Inu, Mose ndi Aroni, chifukwa ninji mumasulira anthu ntchito zao? Mukani ku akatundu anu." 
Exodus5:5 Farao anatinso, Taonani, anthu a m'dziko ndiwo ambiri tsopano; ndipo inu muwapumitsa ku akatundu ao." 
Exodus5:6 Ndipo tsiku lomwelo Farao analamulira akufulumiza anthu, ndi akapitao ao, ndi kuti," 
Exodus5:7 Musawapatsanso anthu udzu wakupanga nao njerwa monga kale; apite okha adzifunire udzu. 
Exodus5:8 Ndipo muziwawerengera njerwa, monga momwe anapanga kale; musachepsapo, popeza achita chilezi; chifukwa chake alikufuula, ndi kuti, Timuke, timphere nsembe Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus5:9 Ilimbike ntchito pa amunawo, kuti aigwiritsitse, asasamalire mau amabodza." 
Exodus5:10 Ndipo akufulumiza anthu ndi akapitao ao anatuluka, nanena ndi anthu ndi kuti, Atero Farao, Kulibe kukupatsani udzu." 
Exodus5:11 Mukani inu nokha, dzifunireni udzu komwe muupeza; pakuti palibe kanthu kadzachepa pa ntchito yanu." 
Exodus5:12 Pamenepo anthuwo anabalalika m'dziko lonse la Ejipito kufuna chiputu ngati udzu. 
Exodus5:13 Ndipo akufulumiza anawakakamiza, ndi kuti, Tsirizani ntchito zanu, ntchito ya tsiku pa tsiku lake, monga muja munali ndi udzu." 
Exodus5:14 Ndipo anapanda akapitao a ana a Israele, amene ofulumiza a Farao adawaika, ndi kuti, Nanga dzulo ndi lero simunatsiriza bwanji ntchito yanu yoneneka ya njerwa, monga kale?" 
Exodus5:15 Pamenepo akapitao a ana a Israele anafika nalirira Farao, nati, Mwatero bwanji ndi akapolo anu?" 
Exodus5:16 Udzu osawapatsa akapolo anu, ndipo amanena ndi ife, Umbani njerwa; ndipo, taonani, amapanda akapolo anu; koma kulakwa nkwa anthu anu." 
Exodus5:17 Koma iye anati, Aulesi inu, aulesi: chifukwa chake mulikunena, Timuke, timphere nsembe Yehova." 
Exodus5:18 Mukani tsopano, gwirani ntchito; pakuti sadzakupatsani udzu, koma muonetse chiwerengero chake cha njerwa." 
Exodus5:19 Ndipo akapitao a ana a Israele anaona kuti kudawaipira, pamene ananena, Musamachepetsa njerwa zanu, ntchito ya tsiku pa tsiku lake." 
Exodus5:20 Ndipo potuluka kwa Farao iwo anakomana ndi Mose ndi Aroni, alikuima popenyana nao;" 
Exodus5:21 ndipo ananena nao, Yehova akupenyeni, naweruze; pakuti mwatinyansitsa pamaso pa Farao, ndi pamaso pa anyamata ake, ndi kuwapatsa lupanga m'dzanja lao kutipha nalo." 
Exodus5:22 Pamenepo Mose anabwerera namka kwa Yehova, nati, Ambuye, mwawachitiranji choipa anthuwa? Mwandituma bwanji?" 
Exodus5:23 Popeza kuyambira kuja ndinafika kwa Farao kulankhula m'dzina lanu, anawachitira choipa anthuwa; ndipo simunalanditsa anthu anu konse." 
Exodus6:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa Mose, Tsopano udzaona chomwe ndidzachitira Farao; pakuti ndi dzanja lamphamvu adzawalola apite, inde ndi dzanja lamphamvu adzawaingitsa m'dziko lake." 
Exodus6:2 Ndipo Mulungu ananena ndi Mose, nati kwa iye, Ine ndine YEHOVA:" 
Exodus6:3 ndipo ndinaonekera Abrahamu, Isaki ndi Yakobo, Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse; koma sindinadziwika kwa iwo ndi dzina langa YEHOVA." 
Exodus6:4 Ndipo ndinakhazikitsanso nao chipangano changa, kuwapatsa dziko la Kanani, dziko la maulendo ao, anali alendo m'mwemo." 
Exodus6:5 Ndamvanso kubuula kwa ana a Israele, amene Aejipito awayesa akapolo; ndipo ndakumbukira chipangano changa." 
Exodus6:6 Chifukwa chake nena kwa ana a Israele Ine ndine Yehova, ndipo ndidzakutulutsani pansi pa akatundu a Aejipito ndipo ndidzakulanditsani ku ukapolo wanu; ndipo ndidzakuombolani ndi dzanja lotambasuka, ndi maweruzo akulu;" 
Exodus6:7 ndipo ndidzalandira inu mukhale anthu anga, ndipo ndidzakhala Ine Mulungu wanu; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, wakutulutsa inu pansi pa akatundu a Aejipito." 
Exodus6:8 Ndipo ndidzakulowetsani m'dziko limene ndinakweza dzanja langa kunena za ilo, kuti ndilipereke kwa Abrahamu, kwa Isaki ndi kwa Yakobo; ndipo ndidzakupatsani ilo likhale lanulanu; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Exodus6:9 Ndipo Mose ananena chomwecho ndi ana a Israele; koma sanamvere Mose chifukwa cha kuwawa mtima, ndi ukapolo wolemera." 
Exodus6:10 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus6:11 Lowa, lankhula ndi Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, kuti alole ana a Israele atuluke m'dziko lake." 
Exodus6:12 Koma Mose ananena pamaso pa Yehova, ndi kuti, Onani, ana a Israele sanandimvere ine; adzandimvera bwanji Farao, ndine wa milomo yosadula?" 
Exodus6:13 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nawalangiza za ana a Israele, ndi za Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, kuti atulutse ana a Israele m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus6:14 Akulu a mbumba za makolo ao ndi awa: ana amuna a Rubeni, woyamba wa Israele ndiwo: Hanoki ndi Palu, Hezironi, ndi Karimi; amene ndiwo mabanja a Rubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Ndi ana amuna a Simeoni ndiwo: Yemuwele, ndi Yamini, ndi Ohadi, Yakini, ndi Zohari, ndi Shaulo mwana wa mkazi wa Mkanani; amene ndiwo mabanja a Simeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Ndipo maina a ana amuna a Levi, mwa kubadwa kwao ndiwo: Geresoni, ndi Kohati, ndi Merari; ndipo zaka za moyo wa Levi ndizo zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Exodus6:17 Ana amuna a Geresoni ndiwo: Libini ndi Simei, mwa mabanja ao." 
Exodus6:18 Ndi ana amuna a Kohati ndiwo: Amuramu ndi Izihara, ndi Hebroni, ndi Uziyele; ndipo zaka za moyo wa Kohati ndizo zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu ndi kudza zitatu." 
Exodus6:19 Ndipo ana amuna a Merari ndiwo: Mali ndi Musi. Amenewo ndiwo mabanja a Levi mwa kubadwa kwao. 
Exodus6:20 Ndipo Amuramu anadzitengera Yokebede mlongo wa atate wake akhale mkazi wake; ndipo anambalira Aroni ndi Mose; ndi zaka za moyo wa Amuramu ndizo zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Exodus6:21 Ndi ana amuna a Izihara ndiwo: Kora ndi Nefegi, ndi Zikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Ndi ana amuna a Uziyele ndiwo: Misaele, ndi Elizafani, ndi Sitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Ndipo Aroni anadzitengera Eliseba, mwana wamkazi wa Aminadabu, mlongo wake wa Nasoni, akhale mkazi wake; ndipo anambalira Nadabu ndi Abihu, Eleazara ndi Itamara." 
Exodus6:24 Ndipo ana amuna a Kora ndiwo: Asiri ndi Elikana, ndi Abiyasafu; amenewo ndiwo mabanja a Akora." 
Exodus6:25 Ndipo Eleazara mwana wa Aroni anadzitengera mkazi wa ana akazi a Putiyele akhale mkazi wake, ndipo anambalira Finehasi. Amenewo ndi akulu a makolo a Alevi mwa mabanja ao." 
Exodus6:26 Omwewo ndiwo Aroni ndi Mose amene Yehova ananena nao, Tulutsani ana a Israele m'dziko la Ejipito mwa makamu ao." 
Exodus6:27 Awa ndi omwewo ananena ndi Farao, mfumu ya Aejipito, awatulutse ana a Israele m'Ejipito; Mose ndi Aroni amenewa." 
Exodus6:28 Ndipo kunali, tsiku limene Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'dziko la Ejipito," 
Exodus6:29 Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti, Ine ndine Yehova; lankhula ndi Farao mfumu ya Aejipito zonsezi Ine ndizinena nawe." 
Exodus6:30 Koma Mose anati pamaso pa Yehova, Onani, ine ndili wa milomo yosadula ndipo Farao adzandimvera bwanji?" 
Exodus7:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Taona, ndakuika ngati Mulungu kwa Farao; ndi Aroni mkulu wako adzakhala mneneri wako." 
Exodus7:2 Iwe uzilankhula zonse ndikulamulira; ndi Aroni mkulu wako azilankhula kwa Farao, kuti alole ana a Israele atuluke m'dziko lake." 
Exodus7:3 Koma Ine ndidzaumitsa mtima wake wa Farao, ndipo ndidzachulukitsa zizindikiro ndi zozizwa zanga m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus7:4 Koma Farao sadzamvera inu, ndipo ndidzaika dzanja langa pa Aejipito, ndipo ndidzatulutsa makamu anga, anthu anga ana a Israele, m'dziko la Ejipito ndi maweruzo akulu." 
Exodus7:5 Ndipo Aejipito adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakutambasula Ine dzanja langa pa Aejipito, ndikutulutsa ana a Israele pakati pao." 
Exodus7:6 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anachita monga Yehova anawalamulira, momwemo anachita." 
Exodus7:7 Ndipo Mose anali nazo zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu, ndi Aroni anali nazo zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zitatu, pamene ananena ndi Farao." 
Exodus7:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, ndi kuti," 
Exodus7:9 Pamene Farao adzalankhula nanu, ndi kuti, Dzichitireni chodabwitsa; pamenepo uzinena ndi Aroni, Tenga ndodo yako, iponye pansi pamaso pa Farao, isanduke chinjoka." 
Exodus7:10 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni analowa kwa Farao, nachita monga momwe Yehova adawalamulira; ndipo Aroni anaponya pansi ndodo yake pamaso pa Farao, ndi pamaso pa anyamata ake, ndipo inasanduka chinjoka." 
Exodus7:11 Pamenepo Farao anaitananso anzeru, ndi amatsenga; ndipo alembi a Aejipito, iwonso anachita momwemo ndi matsenga ao." 
Exodus7:12 Pakuti yense anaponya pansi ndodo yake, ndipo zinasanduka zinjoka; koma ndodo ya Aroni inameza ndodo zao." 
Exodus7:13 Koma mtima wa Farao unalimba, ndipo sanamvere iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus7:14 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Walemera mtima wa Farao, akana kulola anthu apite." 
Exodus7:15 Muka kwa Farao m'mawa; taona, atuluka kunka kumadzi; nuime kumlinda m'mbali mwa nyanja; ndi ndodo idasanduka njokayo uigwire m'dzanja lako." 
Exodus7:16 Ndipo ukanena naye, Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri anandituma kwa inu, ndi kuti, Lola anthu anga amuke kuti anditumikire m'chipululu; koma, taona, sunamvera ndi pano."
