Exodus7:17 Atero Yehova, Ndi ichi udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova; taonani, ndidzapanda madzi ali m'nyanja ndi ndodo ili m'dzanja langa, ndipo adzasanduka mwazi." 
Exodus7:18 Ndi nsomba zili m'nyanja zidzafa, ndi nyanja idzanunkha; ndi Aejipito adzachita mtima useru ndi kumwa madzi a m'nyanjamo." 
Exodus7:19 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Nena ndi Aroni, Tenga ndodo yako, nutambasule dzanja lako pa madzi a m'Ejipito, pa nyanja yao, pa ngalande zao, ndi pa matamanda ao, ndi pa matawale ao onse amadzi, kuti asanduke mwazi; mukhale mwazi m'dziko lonse la Ejipito, m'zotengera zamtengo, ndi zamwala." 
Exodus7:20 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anachita monga momwe Yehova adawalamulira; nasamula ndodo, napanda madzi ali m'nyanjamo pamaso pa Farao, ndi pamaso pa anyamata ake; ndipo madzi onse a m'nyanjamo anasanduka mwazi." 
Exodus7:21 Ndi nsomba za m'nyanjamo zinafa; ndi nyanjayo inanunkha; ndipo Aejipito sanakhoze kumwa madzi a m'nyanjamo; ndipo munali mwazi m'dziko lonse la Ejipito. 
Exodus7:22 Ndipo alembi a Aejipito anachita momwemo ndi matsenga ao; koma mtima wa Farao unalimba, ndipo sanamvere iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus7:23 Ndipo Farao anatembenuka, nalowa m'nyumba yake, osasamalira ichi chomwe mumtima mwake." 
Exodus7:24 Koma Aejipito onse anakumba m'mphepete mwa nyanja kufuna madzi akumwa; pakuti sanakhoze kumwa madzi a m'nyanjamo. 
Exodus7:25 Ndipo anafikira masiku asanu ndi awiri atapanda nyanja Yehova. 
Exodus8:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lowa kwa Farao, nunene naye, Atero Yehova, Lola anthu anga amuke, kuti anditumikire." 
Exodus8:2 Ndipo ukakana kuwalola amuke, taona, Ine ndidzapanda dziko lako lonse ndi achule;" 
Exodus8:3 ndipo m'nyanjamo mudzachuluka achule, amene adzakwera nadzalowa m'nyumba mwako, ndi m'chipinda chogona iwe, ndi pakama pako, ndi m'nyumba ya anyamata ako, ndi pa anthu ako, m'michembo yanu yoocheramo, ndi m'mbale zanu zoumbiramo." 
Exodus8:4 Ndipo achule adzakwera pa iwe, ndi pa anthu ako, ndi pa anyamata ako onse." 
Exodus8:5 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Nena ndi Aroni, Tambasula dzanja lako ndi ndodo yako, panyanja, pangalande, ndi pamatamanda, nukweretse achule pa dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus8:6 Ndipo Aroni anatambasula dzanja lake pa madzi a m'Ejipito; ndipo anakwera achule, nakuta dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus8:7 Ndipo alembi anachita momwemo ndi matsenga ao, nakweretsa achule pa dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus8:8 Pamenepo Farao anaitana Mose ndi Aroni, nati, Mundipembere Yehova, kuti andichotsere ine ndi anthu anga achulewo; ndipo ndidzalola anthu amuke, kuti amphere Yehova nsembe." 
Exodus8:9 Koma Mose anati kwa Farao, Ulemu ndi wanu, wa ine ai; ndipembere inu ndi anyamata anu ndi anthu anu liti, kuti aonongeke achulewo, achokere inu ndi nyumba zanu, atsale m'nyanja mokha?" 
Exodus8:10 Ndipo anati, Mawa. Nati Mose, Kukhale monga mau anu, kuti muziwe, kuti palibe wina wonga Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus8:11 Ndipo achule adzachokera inu, ndi nyumba zanu, ndi anyamata anu, ndi anthu anu; adzatsala m'nyanja mokha." 
Exodus8:12 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anatuluka kwa Farao; ndi Mose anafuulira kwa Yehova kunena za achule amene adawaika pa Farao. 
Exodus8:13 Ndipo Yehova anachita monga mwa mau a Mose; nafa achulewo kuchokera m'zinyumba, ndi m'mabwalo, ndi m'minda." 
Exodus8:14 Ndipo anawaola miulumiulu; ndi dziko linanunkha. 
Exodus8:15 Koma pamene Farao anaona kuti panali kupuma, anaumitsa mtima wake, osamvera iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus8:16 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Nena ndi Aroni, Samula ndodo yako, nupande fumbi lapansi, kuti lisanduke nsabwe m'dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Exodus8:17 Ndipo anachita chomwecho; pakuti Aroni anasamula dzanja lake ndi ndodo yake, napanda fumbi lapansi, ndipo panali nsabwe pa anthu ndi pa zoweta; fumbi lonse lapansi linasanduka nsabwe m'dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Exodus8:18 Alembi anateronso ndi matsenga ao kuonetsa nsabwe, koma sanakhoza; ndipo panali nsabwe pa anthu, ndi pa zoweta." 
Exodus8:19 Pamenepo alembi anati kwa Farao, Chala cha Mulungu ichi; koma mtima wa Farao unalimba, osamvera iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus8:20 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose Uuke ulawire mamawa, nuime pamaso pa Farao; taona, atuluka kunka kumadzi; nunene naye, Atero Yehova, Lola anthu anga amuke, anditumikire." 
Exodus8:21 Pakuti ukapanda kulola anthu anga amuke, taona, ndidzatuma mizaza pa iwe, ndi pa anyamata ako, ndi pa anthu ako, ndi pa nyumba zako; ndipo nyumba za Aejipito zidzadzala nayo mizaza, ndi nthaka yomwe imene ikhalapo." 
Exodus8:22 Ndipo tsiku ilo ndidzalemba malire dziko la Goseni, m'mene mukhala anthu anga, kuti pamenepo pasakhale mizaza; kotero kuti udziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova pakati pa dzikoli." 
Exodus8:23 Ndipo ndidzaika chosiyanitsa pakati pa anthu anga ndi anthu ako; mawa padzakhala chizindikiro ichi. 
Exodus8:24 Ndipo Yehova anachita chomwecho; ndipo kunafika magulu a mizaza m'nyumba ya Farao, ndi m'nyumba za anyamata ake, ndi m'dziko lonse la Ejipito; dziko linaipatu chifukwa cha mizazayo." 
Exodus8:25 Pamenepo Farao anaitana Mose ndi Aroni, nati, Mukani, mphereni nsembe Mulungu wanu m'dzikomu." 
Exodus8:26 Koma Mose anati, Sikuyenera kutero; pakuti tidzamphera Yehova Mulungu wathu chonyansa cha Aejipito; taonani, ngati tikamphera nsembe chonyansa cha Aejipito pamaso pao sadzatiponya miyala kodi?" 
Exodus8:27 Timuke ulendo wa masiku atatu m'chipululu, tikamphere Yehova Mulungu wathu nsembe, monga adzanena nafe." 
Exodus8:28 Ndipo Farao anati, Ndidzakulolani mumuke, kuti mukamphere nsembe Yehova Mulungu wanu m'chipululu; komatu musamuke kutalitu: mundipembere." 
Exodus8:29 Ndipo Mose anati, Onani, ndilikutuluka ine kwanu, ndidzapemba Yehova kuti mizaza ichoke mawa kwa Farao, ndi kwa anyamata ake, ndi kwa anthu ake; komatu, Farao asanyengenso ndi kukana kulola anthuwa amuke kukamphera nsembe Yehova." 
Exodus8:30 Ndipo Mose anatuluka kwa Farao, napemba Yehova." 
Exodus8:31 Ndipo Yehova anachita monga mwa mau a Mose; nachotsera Farao ndi anyamata ake ndi anthu ake mizazayo, sunatsala ndi umodzi wonse." 
Exodus8:32 Koma Farao anaumitsa mtima wake nthawi yomweyonso, ndipo sanalola anthu amuke." 
Exodus9:1 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lowa kwa Farao, numuuze, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Ahebri, Lola anthu anga amuke, kuti anditumikire." 
Exodus9:2 Pakuti ukakana kuwalola amuke, ndi kuwagwira chigwiritsire," 
Exodus9:3 taona, dzanja la Yehova lidzakhala pa zoweta zako za kubusa, pa akavalo, pa abulu, pa ngamira, pa ng'ombe, ndi pa zoweta zazing'ono ndi kalira woopsa." 
Exodus9:4 Ndipo Yehova adzasiyanitsa pakati pa zoweta za Israele ndi zoweta za Ejipito; kuti kasafe kanthu kalikonse ka ana a Israele. 
Exodus9:5 Ndipo Yehova anaika nthawi yakuti, nati, Mawa Yehova adzachita chinthu ichi m'dzikomu." 
Exodus9:6 Ndipo m'mawa mwake Yehova anachita chinthucho, ndipo zinafa zoweta zonse za m'Ejipito; koma sichinafa chimodzi chonse cha zoweta za ana a Israele." 
Exodus9:7 Ndipo Farao anatuma, taonani, sichidafa chingakhale chimodzi chomwe cha zoweta za Aisraele. Koma mtima wa Farao unauma, ndipo sanalole anthu amuke." 
Exodus9:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, Tengani phulusa la ng'anjo lodzala manja; ndi Mose aliwaze kuthambo pamaso pa Farao." 
Exodus9:9 Ndipo lidzakhala fumbi losalala pa dziko lonse la Ejipito, ndipo lidzakhala pa anthu ndi pa zoweta ngati zilonda zobuka ndi matuza, m'dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Exodus9:10 Ndipo anatenga phulusa la m'ng'anjo, naima pamaso pa Farao; ndi Mose analiwaza kuthambo; ndipo linakhala zilonda zobuka ndi matuza pa anthu ndi pa zoweta." 
Exodus9:11 Ndipo alembi sanakhoza kuima pamaso pa Mose chifukwa cha zilondazo; popeza panali zilonda pa alembi ndi pa Aejipito onse. 
Exodus9:12 Koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wa Farao, kuti sanamvere iwo; monga Yehova adalankhula ndi Mose." 
Exodus9:13 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Uka nulawire mamawa, nuime pamaso pa Farao, nunene naye, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri, Lola anthu anga amuke, akanditumikire." 
Exodus9:14 Pakuti nthawi yino ndidzatuma miliri yanga yonse pamtima pako, ndi pa anyamata ako, ndi pa anthu ako; kuti udziwe kuti palibe wina wonga Ine pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Exodus9:15 Pakuti ndatambasula dzanja langa tsopano, kuti ndikupande iwe ndi anthu ako ndi mliri, ndi kuti uonongeke pa dziko lapansi." 
Exodus9:16 Koma ndithu chifukwa chake ndakuimika kuti ndikuonetse mphamvu yanga, ndi kuti alalikire dzina langa pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Exodus9:17 Kodi udzikwezanso pa anthu anga, ndi kusawalola amuke?" 
Exodus9:18 Taona, mawa monga nthawi yino ndidzavumbitsa mvumbi wa matalala, sipadakhala unzake m'Ejipito kuyambira tsiku lija lidakhazikika kufikira lero lino." 
Exodus9:19 Ndipo tsopano, tumiza, thawitsa zoweta zako ndi zonse uli nazo pabwalo; pakuti anthu onse ndi zoweta zonse zopezeka pabwalo, zosasonkhanidwa m'nyumba, matalala adzazigwera, ndipo zidzafa." 
Exodus9:20 Iyeyu wa anyamata a Farao wakuopa mau a Yehova anathawitsira m'zinyumba anyamata ake ndi zoweta zake; 
Exodus9:21 koma iyeyu wosasamalira mau a Yehova anasiya anyamata ndi zoweta zake kubusa. 
Exodus9:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasula dzanja lako kuthambo, kuti pakhale matalala pa dziko lonse la Ejipito, pa anthu ndi pa zoweta, ndi pa zitsamba zonse za kuthengo, m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus9:23 Pamenepo Mose anasamulira ndodo yake kuthambo, ndipo Yehova anatumiza bingu ndi matalala, ndi moto unatsikira pansi; ndipo Yehova anavumbitsa matalala pa dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus9:24 Potero panali matalala, ndi moto wakutsikatsika pakati pa matalala, choopsa ndithu; panalibe chotere m'dziko lonse la Ejipito chiyambire mtundu wao." 
Exodus9:25 Ndipo matalala anapanda m'dziko lonse la Ejipito zonse za pabwalo, kuyambira anthu kufikira zoweta; ndipo matalala anapanda zitsamba zonse za kuthengo, nathyola mitengo yonse ya kuthengo." 
Exodus9:26 M'dziko la Goseni mokha, mokhala ana a Israele, munalibe matalala." 
Exodus9:27 Ndipo Farao anatumiza, naitana Mose ndi Aroni, nanena nao, Ndachimwa tsopano; Yehova ndiye wolungama, ine ndi anthu anga ndife oipa." 
Exodus9:28 Pembani kwa Yehova; chifukwa akwanira ndithu mabingu a Mulungu ndi matalala; ndipo ndidzakulolani mumuke, osakhalanso." 
Exodus9:29 Ndipo Mose ananena naye, Potuluka m'mudzi ine, ndidzasasatulira manja anga kwa Yehova; mabingu adzaleka, ndi matalala sadzakhalaponso; kuti mudziwe kuti dziko lapansi nla Yehova." 
Exodus9:30 Koma inu ndi anyamata anu ndidziwa kuti simudzayamba kuopa nkhope ya Yehova Mulungu. 
Exodus9:31 Ndipo thonje ndi barele zinayoyoka; pakuti barele lidafula, ndi thonje lidayamba maluwa." 
Exodus9:32 Koma tirigu ndi rai sizinayoyoka popeza amabzala m'mbuyo. 
Exodus9:33 Ndipo Mose anatuluka kwa Farao m'mudzi nasasatulira manja ake kwa Yehova; ndipo mabingu ndi matalala analeka, ndi mvula siinavumbanso padziko." 
Exodus9:34 Pamene Farao anaona kuti mvula ndi matalala ndi mabingu zidaleka anaonjezanso kuchimwa, naumitsa mtima wake, iye ndi anyamata ake." 
Exodus9:35 Potero mtima wa Farao unalimba, ndipo sanalole ana a Israele amuke; monga Yehova adalankhula mwa Mose." 
Exodus10:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lowa kwa Farao; pakuti ndaumitsa mtima wake, ndi mtima wa anyamata ake, kuti ndiike zizindikiro zanga izi pakati pao;" 
Exodus10:2 ndi kuti ufotokozere m'makutu a ana ako, ndi a zidzukulu zako, chomwe ndidzachita m'Ejipito, ndi zizindikiro zanga zimene ndinaziika pakati pao; kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Exodus10:3 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni analowa kwa Farao nanena naye, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri, Ukana kudzichepetsa pamaso panga kufikira liti? Lola anthu anga amuke, akanditumikire;" 
Exodus10:4 pakuti ukakana kulola anthu anga amuke, taona, mawa ndidzafikitsa dzombe m'dziko lako;" 
Exodus10:5 ndipo lidzakuta nkhope ya dziko, kotero kuti palibe munthu adzakhoza kuona dziko; ndipo lidzadya zotsalira zidapulumuka, zidatsalira inu pamatalala, ndipo lidzadya mtengo uliwonse wokuphukirani kuthengo;" 
Exodus10:6 ndipo lidzadzaza m'nyumba zako, ndi m'nyumba za anyamata ako onse, ndi m'nyumba za Aejipito onse; sanachione chotere atate ako kapena makolo ako, kuyambira tsiku lija lakukhala iwo pa dziko lapansi kufikira lero lino. Ndipo anatembenuka, natuluka kwa Farao." 
Exodus10:7 Ndipo anyamata ake a Farao ananena naye, Ameneyo amatichitira msampha kufikira liti? Lolani anthuwo amuke, akatumikire Yehova Mulungu wao. Kodi simunayambe kudziwa kuti Ejipito laonongeka?" 
Exodus10:8 Ndipo anawabwereretsa Mose ndi Aroni kwa Farao, nanena nao, Mukani, katumikireni Yehova Mulungu wanu. Koma amene adzapitawo ndiwo yani?" 
Exodus10:9 Ndipo Mose anati, Tidzamuka ndi ana athu ndi akulu athu, ndi ana athu aamuna ndi aakazi; tidzamuka nazo nkhosa zathu ndi ng'ombe zathu; pakuti tili nao madyerero a Yehova." 
Exodus10:10 Ndipo ananena nao, Momwemo, Yehova akhale nanu ngati ndilola inu ndi ana ang'ono anu mumuke; chenjerani pakuti pali choipa pamaso panu." 
Exodus10:11 Chotero ai, mukani tsopano, inu amuna akulu, tumikirani Yehova pakuti ichi muchifuna. Ndipo anawapirikitsa pamaso pa Farao." 
Exodus10:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasulira dzanja lako pa dziko la Ejipito, lidze dzombe, kuti likwere pa dziko la Ejipito, lidye zitsamba zonse za m'dziko, ndizo zonse adazisiya matalala." 
Exodus10:13 Pamenepo Mose analoza ndodo yake pa dziko la Ejipito; ndipo Yehova anaombetsa padziko mphepo ya kum'mawa usana wonse, ndi usiku womwe; ndipo kutacha mphepo ya kum'mawa inadza nalo dzombe." 
Exodus10:14 Ndipo dzombe linakwera pa dziko lonse la Ejipito, ndipo linatera pakati pa malire onse Ejipito, lambirimbiri; lisanafike ili panalibe dzombe lotere longa ili, ndipo litapita ili sipadzakhalanso lotere." 
Exodus10:15 Pakuti linakuta nkhope ya dziko lonse kuti dziko linada; ndipo linadya zitsamba zonse za m'dziko, ndi zipatso zonse za mitengo zimene matalala adazisiya; ndipo sipanatsala chabiriwiri chilichonse, pamitengo kapena pa zitsamba za kuthengo, m'dziko lonse la Ejipito." 
Exodus10:16 Pamenepo Farao anafulumira kuitana Mose ndi Aroni; nati, Ndalakwira Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi inu." 
Exodus10:17 Ndipo tsopano, ndikhululukiretu kulakwa kwanga nthawi yino yokha, nimundipembere kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuti andichotsere imfa yino yokha." 
Exodus10:18 Ndipo anatuluka kwa Farao, napemba Yehova." 
Exodus10:19 Ndipo Yehova anabweza mphepo yolimbatu ya kumadzulo, imene inapita nalo dzombe niliponya m'Nyanja Yofiira: silinatsala dzombe limodzi pakati pa malire onse a Ejipito." 
Exodus10:20 Koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wa Farao, ndipo sanalole ana a Israele amuke." 
Exodus10:21 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasulira dzanja lako kuthambo, ndipo padzakhala mdima pa dziko la Ejipito, ndiwo mdima wokhudzika." 
Exodus10:22 Ndipo Mose anatambasulira dzanja lake kuthambo; ndipo munali mdima bii m'dziko lonse la Ejipito masiku atatu; 
Exodus10:23 sanaonane, sanaukenso munthu pamalo pake, masiku atatu; koma kwa ana onse a Israele kudayera m'nyumba zao." 
Exodus10:24 Ndipo Farao anaitana Mose, nati, Mukani, tumikirani Yehova; nkhosa zanu ndi ng'ombe zanu zokha zitsale; mumuke nao ana anu ang'ononso." 
Exodus10:25 Koma Mose anati, Mutipatsenso m'dzanja mwathu nsembe zophera ndi nsembe zopsereza, kuti timkonzere Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus10:26 Zoweta zathu zomwe tidzapita nazo; chosatsala chiboda chimodzi; pakuti mwa izo tiyenera kutenga zakutumikira nazo Yehova Mulungu wathu; ndipo tisanafikeko, sitidziwa umo tidzamtumikira Yehova." 
Exodus10:27 Koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wake wa Farao, ndipo anakana kuwaleka amuke." 
Exodus10:28 Ndipo Farao ananena naye, Choka pano, uzichenjera usaonenso nkhope yanga; pakuti tsiku limene uonanso nkhope yanga udzafa." 
Exodus10:29 Ndipo Mose anati, Mwanena bwino; sindidzaonanso nkhope yanu." 
Exodus11:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Watsala mliri umodzi ndidzamtengera Farao, ndi Ejipito; pambuyo pake adzakulolani muchoke kuno; pamene akulolani kupita, zoonadi adzakuingitsani kuno konse." 
Exodus11:2 Lankhula tsopano m'makutu a anthu, kuti mwamuna yense apemphe kwa mnzake, ndi mkazi yense kwa mnzake, zokometsera zasiliva ndi zagolide." 
Exodus11:3 Ndipo Yehova anawapatsa anthu chisomo pamaso pa Aejipito. Munthuyo Mose ndiyenso wamkulu ndithu m'dziko la Ejipito, pamaso pa anyamata a Farao, ndi pamaso pa anthu." 
Exodus11:4 Ndipo Mose anati, Atero Yehova, Monga pakati pa usiku ndidzatuluka Ine kunka pakati pa Aejipito;" 
Exodus11:5 ndipo ana oyamba a m'dziko la Ejipito adzafa, kuyambira mwana woyamba wa Farao wokhala pa mpando wachifumu wake, kufikira mwana woyamba wa mdzakazi wokhala pa miyala yopera; ndi ana onse oyamba a zoweta." 
Exodus11:6 Ndipo kudzakhala kulira kwakukulu m'dziko lonse la Ejipito, kunalibe kunzake kotere, sikudzakhalanso kunzake kotere." 
Exodus11:7 Koma palibe galu adzafunyitsira lilime lake ana onse a Israele ngakhale anthu kapena zoweta; kuti mudziwe kuti Yehova asiyanitsa pakati pa Aejipito ndi Aisraele. 
Exodus11:8 Ndipo anyamata ako onse awa adzanditsikira, nadzandigwadira, ndi kuti, Tulukani inu, ndi anthu onse akukutsatani; ndipo pambuyo pake ndidzatuluka. Ndipo anatuluka kwa Farao wakupsa mtima." 
Exodus11:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Farao sadzamvera inu; kuti zozizwa zanga zichuluke m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus11:10 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anachita zozizwa izi zonse pamaso pa Farao; koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wake wa Farao, ndipo sanalole ana a Israele atuluke m'dziko lake." 
Exodus12:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kuti," 
Exodus12:2 Mwezi uno uzikhala kwa inu woyamba wa miyezi; muziuyesa mwezi woyamba wa chaka. 
Exodus12:3 Mulankhule ndi msonkhano wonse wa Israele ndi kuti, Tsiku lakhumi la mwezi uno adzitengere munthu yense mwanawankhosa, monga mwa mabanja a atate ao, mwanawankhosa pabanja." 
Exodus12:4 Banja likaperewera mwanawankhosa, munthu ndi mnzake ali pafupi pa nyumba yake atenge monga mwa kufikira kwa anthu ao; muziwerengera mwanawankhosa monga mwa kudya kwao." 
Exodus12:5 Mwanawankhosa wanu azikhala wangwiro, wamwamuna, wa chaka chimodzi; muzimtenga ku nkhosa kapena ku mbuzi." 
Exodus12:6 Ndipo mukhale naye chisungire kufikira tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi womwe; ndipo bungwe lonse la anthu a Israele lizimupha madzulo. 
Exodus12:7 Ndipo azitengako mwazi, naupake pa mphuthu za mbali ndi ya pamwamba m'nyumba zimene adyeramo." 
Exodus12:8 Ndipo azidya nyamayo usiku womwewo, yoocha pamoto, ndi mkate wopanda chotupitsa; aidye ndi ndiwo zowawa." 
Exodus12:9 Musaidya yaiwisi, kapena yophika ndi madzi konse ai, koma yoocha pamoto; mutu wake ndi miyendo yake ndi matumbo ake." 
Exodus12:10 Ndipo musasiyako kufikira m'mawa; koma yotsalira kufikira m'mamawayo muipsereze ndi moto. 
Exodus12:11 Ndipo muziidya chotero: okwinda m'chuuno, nsapato zanu pa mapazi anu ndodo yanu m'dzanja lanu, ndipo muziidya msanga; ndiye Paska wa Yehova." 
Exodus12:12 Pakuti ndidzapita pakati pa dziko la Ejipito usiku womwewo, ndi kukantha ana oyamba onse m'dziko la Ejipito, anthu ndi zoweta; ndipo ndidzachita maweruzo pa milungu yonse ya Aejipito; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Exodus12:13 Ndipo mwaziwo udzakhala chizindikiro kwa inu pa nyumba zimene mukhalamo; pamene ndiona mwaziwo ndidzapitirira inu, ndipo sipadzakhala mliri wakukuonongani, pakukantha Ine dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus12:14 Ndipo tsiku lino lidzakhala kwa inu chikumbutso, muzilisunga la chikondwerero cha Yehova; ku mibadwo yanu muzilisunga la chikondwerero, likhale lemba losatha." 
Exodus12:15 Masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa; lingakhale tsiku loyamba muzichotsa chotupitsa m'nyumba zanu; pakuti aliyense wakudya mkate wa chotupitsa kuyambira tsiku loyamba kufikira tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri, munthu amene adzasadzidwa kwa Israele." 
Exodus12:16 Ndipo tsiku loyamba kukhale kusonkhana kopatulika, ndi tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri kukhalenso kusonkhana kopatulika; pasachitike ntchito masikuwo, zokhazi zakudya anthu onse ndizo muzichita." 
Exodus12:17 Ndipo muzisunga chikondwerero a Mkate wopanda chotupitsa; pakuti tsiku lomwe lino ndinatulutsa makamu anu m'dziko la Ejipito; chifukwa chake muzisunga tsiku lino m'mibadwo yanu, lemba losatha." 
Exodus12:18 Mwezi woyamba, tsiku lake lakhumi ndi chinai madzulo ake, muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa, kufikira tsiku la makumi awiri mphambu limodzi la mwezi, madzulo ake." 
Exodus12:19 Chisapezeke chotupitsa m'nyumba zanu masiku asanu ndi awiri; pakuti aliyense wakudya kanthu ka chotupitsa, munthuyo adzasadzidwa ku msonkhano wa Israele, angakhale ndiye mlendo kapena wobadwa m'dziko." 
Exodus12:20 Musadye kanthu ka chotupitsa; mokhala inu monse muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa. 
Exodus12:21 Pamenepo Mose anaitana akulu onse a Israele, nanena nao, Pitani, dzitengereni anaankhosa monga mwa mabanja anu, nimuphere Paska." 
Exodus12:22 Ndipo muzitenga mpukutu wa hisope, ndi kuuviika m'mwazi uli m'mbale, ndi kupaka mwazi uli m'mbalemo pa mphuthu ya pamwamba ndi pambali; koma inu, asatuluke munthu pakhomo pa nyumba yake kufikira m'mawa." 
Exodus12:23 Pakuti Yehova adzapita pakatipo kukantha Aejipito; koma pamene adzaona mwaziwo pa mphuthu pamwamba ndi za pambali, Yehova adzapitirira pakhomopo, osalola woononga alowe m'nyumba zanu kukukanthani." 
Exodus12:24 Ndipo muzisunga chinthu ichi chikhale lemba la kwa inu, ndi kwa ana anu ku nthawi zonse." 
Exodus12:25 Ndipo kudzakhala, pamene mulowa m'dziko limene Yehova adzakupatsani, monga analankhula, muzisunga kutumikira kumeneku." 
Exodus12:26 Ndipo kudzakhala, pamene ana anu adzanena ndi inu, Kutumikiraku muli nako nkutani?" 
Exodus12:27 Mudzati, Ndiko nsembe ya Paska wa Yehova, amene anapitirira nyumba za ana a Israele m'Ejipito, pamene anakantha Aejipito, napulumutsa nyumba zathu." 
Exodus12:28 Ndipo anthu anawerama, nalambira. Ndipo ana a Israele anamuka nachita monga Yehova adalamulira Mose ndi Aroni; anachita momwemo." 
Exodus12:29 Ndipo panakhala pakati pa usiku, Yehova anakantha ana oyamba onse a m'dziko la Ejipito, kuyambira mwana woyamba wa Farao wakukhala pa mpando wachifumu wake kufikira mwana woyamba wa wam'nsinga ali m'kaidi; ndi ana oyamba onse a zoweta." 
Exodus12:30 Ndipo Farao anauka usiku, iye ndi anyamata ake onse ndi Aejipito onse; ndipo kunali kulira kwakukulu m'Ejipito; pakuti panalibe nyumba yopanda wakufa m'mwemo." 
Exodus12:31 Ndipo anaitana Mose ndi Aroni usiku, nati, Ukani, tulukani pakati pa anthu anga, inu ndi ana a Israele; ndipo mukani katumikireni Yehova, monga mwanena." 
Exodus12:32 Muka nazoni zoweta zanu zazing'ono ndi zazikulu, monga mwanena; chokani, ndi kundidalitsa inenso." 
Exodus12:33 Ndipo Aejipito anaumiriza anthuwo, nafulumira kuwatulutsa m'dziko; pakuti anati, Tili akufa tonse." 
Exodus12:34 Ndipo anthu anatenga mtanda wao usanatupe, ndi zoumbiramo zao zomangidwa m'zovala zao pa mapewa ao." 
Exodus12:35 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita monga mwa mau a Mose; napempha Aejipito zokometsera zasiliva, ndi zagolide, ndi zovala." 
Exodus12:36 Ndipo Yehova anapatsa anthu chisomo pamaso pa Aejipito, ndipo sanawakanize. Ndipo anawafunkhira Aejipito." 
Exodus12:37 Ndipo ana a Israele anayenda ulendo wakuchokera ku Ramsesi kufikira ku Sukoti, zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi oyenda okha, ndiwo amuna, osawerenga ana." 
Exodus12:38 Ndipo anthu ambiri osokonezeka anakwera nao; ndi nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, zoweta zambirimbiri." 
Exodus12:39 Ndipo anaotcha timitanda topanda chotupitsa ta mtanda umene anabwera nao ku Ejipito, popeza sadaikamo chotupitsa; pakuti adawapirikitsa ku Ejipito, ndipo sanathe kuchedwa, kapena kudzikonzeratu kamba." 
Exodus12:40 Ndipo kukhala kwa ana a Israele anakhala m'Ejipito ndiko zaka mazana anai kudza makumi atatu. 
Exodus12:41 Ndipo kunakhala pakutha zaka mazana anai kudza makumi atatu, inde panakhala tsiku lomwelo, makamu onse a Yehova anatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus12:42 Ndiwo usiku wosungira Yehova ndithu, chifukwa cha kuwatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito; usiku womwe uno ukhale wosungira Yehova ana onse a Israele ku mibadwo yao." 
Exodus12:43 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aroni, Lemba la Paska ndi ili: mwana wa mlendo aliyense asadyeko;" 
Exodus12:44 koma kapolo wa mwini aliyense, wogula ndi ndalama, utamdula, ndipo adyeko." 
Exodus12:45 Mlendo kapena wolembedwa ntchito asadyeko. 
Exodus12:46 Audye m'nyumba imodzi; usatulukira nayo kubwalo nyama ina; ndipo musathyole fupa lake. 
Exodus12:47 Msonkhano wonse wa Israele uzichita ichi. 
Exodus12:48 Koma akakhala nanu mlendo, nakonzera Yehova Paska, adulidwe amuna ake onse, ndipo pamenepo asendere kuuchita; nakhale ngati wobadwa m'dziko; koma wosadulidwa aliyense asadyeko." 
Exodus12:49 Pakhale lamulo lomweli pa wobadwa m'dziko, ndi pa mlendo wakukhala pakati pa inu." 
Exodus12:50 Ndipo ana onse a Israele anachita monga Yehova adawalamulira Mose ndi Aroni, momwemo anachita." 
Exodus12:51 Ndipo kunakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti Yehova anatulutsa ana a Israele m'dziko la Ejipito, monga mwa makamu ao." 
Exodus13:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi kuti," 
Exodus13:2 Ndipatulire Ine yense woyamba kubadwa, wotsegulira pa amake mwa ana a Israele, mwa anthu ndi mwa zoweta; ndiwo anga." 
Exodus13:3 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi anthu, Kumbukirani tsiku lino limene munatuluka m'Ejipito, m'nyumba ya akapolo; pakuti Yehova anakutulutsani muno ndi dzanja lamphamvu; ndipo asadye kanthu ka chotupitsa." 
Exodus13:4 Mutuluka lero lino mwezi wa Abibu. 
Exodus13:5 Ndipo kudzakhala atakulowetsa Yehova m'dziko la Akanani, ndi la Ahiti, ndi la Aamori ndi la Ahivi, ndi la Ayebusi, limene analumbira ndi makolo ako kukupatsa, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi, uzikasunga kutumikira kumeneku mwezi uno." 
Exodus13:6 Masiku asanu ndi awiri uzikadya mkate wopanda chotupitsa, ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri likhale la madyerero a Yehova;" 
Exodus13:7 Azikadya mkate wopanda chotupitsa masiku asanu ndi awiriwo ndipo kasaoneke kanthu ka chotupitsa kwanu; inde chotupitsa chisaoneke kwanu m'malire ako onse. 
Exodus13:8 Ndipo ukauze mwana wako wamwamuna tsikulo, ndi kuti, Nditero chifukwa chomwe Yehova anandichitira ine potuluka ine m'Ejipito." 
Exodus13:9 Ndipo chizikhala ndi iwe ngati chizindikiro pa dzanja lako, ndi chikumbutso pakati pa maso ako; kuti chilamulo cha Yehova chikhale m'kamwa mwako; pakuti Yehova anakutulutsa m'Ejipito ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Exodus13:10 Chifukwa chake uzikasunga lemba ili pa nyengo yake chaka ndi chaka. 
Exodus13:11 Ndipo kudzakhala, atakulowetsa Yehova m'dziko la Akanani, monga anakulumbirira iwe ndi makolo ako, ndipo anakupatsa ilo," 
Exodus13:12 kuti uzikapatulira Yehova onse oyamba kubadwa ndi oyamba onse uli nao odzera kwa zoweta; amunawo ndi a Yehova. 
Exodus13:13 Koma woyamba yense wa bulu uzimuombola ndi mwanawankhosa; ndipo ukapanda kumuombola uzimthyola khosi; koma oyamba onse a munthu mwa ana ako uziwaombola. 
Exodus13:14 Ndipo kudzakhala, akakufunsa mwana wako masiku akudzawo ndi kuti, Ichi nchiyani? Ukanene naye, Yehova anatitulutsa m'Ejipito, m'nyumba ya akapolo, ndi dzanja lamphamvu;" 
Exodus13:15 ndipo kunakhala, pamene Farao anadziumitsa kuti tisamuke, Yehova anawapha onse oyamba kubadwa m'dziko la Ejipito, kuyambira oyamba a anthu, kufikira oyamba a zoweta; chifukwa chake ndimphera nsembe Yehova zazimuna zoyamba kubadwa zonse; koma oyamba onse a ana anga ndiwaombola." 
Exodus13:16 Ndipo chizikhala ngati chizindikiro pa dzanja lako, ndi chapamphumi pakati pa maso ako; pakuti Yehova anatitulutsa m'Ejipito ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Exodus13:17 Ndipo kunakhala pamene Farao adalola anthu amuke, Mulungu sanawatsogolere njira ya dziko la Afilisti, ndiyo yaifupi; pakuti Mulungu anati, Angadodome anthuwo pakuona nkhondo ndi kubwerera m'mbuyo kunka ku Ejipito." 
Exodus13:18 Koma Mulungu anawazungulitsa anthuwo, ku njira ya kuchipululu ya Nyanja Yofiira; ndipo ana a Israele anakwera kuchokera m'dziko la Ejipito okonzeka." 
Exodus13:19 Ndipo Mose anamuka nao mafupa a Yosefe; pakuti adawalumbiritsatu ana a Israele ndi kuti, Mulungu adzakuzondani ndithu ndipo mukakwere nao mafupa anga osawasiya kuno." 
Exodus13:20 Ndipo anachokera ku Sukoti, nagona ku Etamu, pa malekezero a chipululu." 
Exodus13:21 Ndipo Yehova anawatsogolera usana ndi mtambo njo kuwatsogolera m'njira; ndi usiku ndi moto njo, wakuwawalitsira; kuti ayende usana ndi usiku;" 
Exodus13:22 sanachotse mtambo usana, kapena mtambo wamoto usiku, pamaso pa anthu." 
Exodus14:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi kuti," 
Exodus14:2 Lankhula ndi anthu a Israele, kuti abwerere m'mbuyo nagone patsogolo pa Pihahiroti, pakati pa Migidoli ndi nyanja, patsogolo pa Baala-Zefoni; pandunji pake mugone panyanja." 
Exodus14:3 Ndipo Farao adzanena za ana a Israele, Azimidwa dziko, chipululu chawatsekera." 
Exodus14:4 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa mtima wake wa Farao kuti awalondole; ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa pa Farao ndi pa nkhondo yake yonse; pamenepo Aejipito adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, ndipo anachita chomwecho." 
Exodus14:5 Ndipo anauza mfumu ya Aejipito kuti anthu adathawa; ndi mtima wa Farao ndi wa anyamata ake inasandulikira anthuwo, ndipo anati, Ichi nchiyani tachita, kuti talola Israele amuke osatigwiriranso ntchito?" 
Exodus14:6 Ndipo anamanga galeta lake, napita nao anthu ake;" 
Exodus14:7 napita nao magaleta osankhika mazana asanu ndi limodzi, ndi magaleta onse a m'Ejipito, ndi akapitao ao onse." 
Exodus14:8 Ndipo Yehova analimbitsa mtima wa Farao, mfumu ya Aejipito, ndipo iye analondola ana a Israele; koma ana a Israele adatuluka ndi dzanja lokwezeka." 
Exodus14:9 Ndipo Aejipito anawalondola, ndiwo akavalo ndi magaleta onse a Farao, ndi apakavalo ake, ndi nkhondo yake, nawapeza ali kuchigono kunyanja, pa Pihahiroti, patsogolo pa Baala-Zefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Ndipo pamene Farao anayandikira ana a Israele anatukula maso ao, taonani, Aejipito alinkutsata pambuyo pao; ndipo anaopa kwambiri; ndi ana a Israele anafuulira kwa Yehova." 
Exodus14:11 Ndipo anati kwa Mose, Kodi mwatichotsera kuti tikafe m'chipululu chifukwa panalibe manda m'Ejipito? Nchiyani ichi mwatichitira kuti mwatitulutsa m'Ejipito?" 
Exodus14:12 Si awa mauwo tinalankhula nanu m'Ejipito ndi kuti, Tilekeni, kuti tigwirire ntchito Aejipito? Pakuti kutumikira Aejipito kutikomera si kufa m'chipululu ai." 
Exodus14:13 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi anthu, Musaope, chilimikani, ndipo penyani chipulumutso cha Yehova, chimene adzakuchitirani lero; pakuti Aejipito mwawaona lerowa, simudzawaonanso konse." 
Exodus14:14 Yehova adzakugwirirani nkhondo, ndipo inu mudzakhala chete." 
Exodus14:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Ufuuliranji kwa Ine? Lankhula ndi ana a Israele kuti aziyenda." 
Exodus14:16 Ndipo iwe nyamula ndodo yako, nutambasulire dzanja lako kunyanja, nuigawe, kuti ana a Israele alowe pakati pa nyanja pouma." 
Exodus14:17 Ndipo Ine, taonani, ndidzalimbitsa mitima ya Aejipito, kuti alowemo powatsata; ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa pa Farao, ndi pa nkhondo yake yonse, pa magaleta ake, ndi pa okwera pa akavalo ake." 
Exodus14:18 Ndipo Aejipito adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, polemekezedwa Ine pa Farao, pa magaleta ake, ndi pa okwera pa akavalo ake." 
Exodus14:19 Ndipo mthenga wa Mulungu, wakutsogolera ulendo wa Israele, unachokako, nutsata pambuyo pao; ndipo mtambo njo uja unachoka patsogolo pao, nuima pambuyo pao;" 
Exodus14:20 nulowa pakati pa ulendo wa Aejipito ndi ulendo wa Aisraele; ndipo mtambo unachita mdima, komanso unaunikira usiku; ndipo ulendo wina sunayandikizana ndi unzake usiku wonse." 
Exodus14:21 Ndipo Mose anatambasulira dzanja lake kunyanja; ndipo Yehova anabweza nyanja ndi mphepo yolimba ya kum'mawa usiku wonse, naumitsa nyanja; ndipo madziwo anagawikana." 
Exodus14:22 Ndipo ana a Israele analowa pakati pa nyanja pouma; ndi madziwo anakhala kwa iwo ngati khoma palamanja, ndi palamanzere." 
Exodus14:23 Ndipo Aejipito anawalondola, nalowa pakati pa nyanja powatsata, ndiwo akavalo onse a Farao, magaleta ake, ndi apakavalo ake." 
Exodus14:24 Ndipo kunali, ulonda wa mamawa, Yehova ali m'moto ndi m'mtambo njo anapenyera pa ulendo wa Aejipito, nauvuta ulendo wa Aejipito." 
Exodus14:25 Ndipo anagulula njinga za magaleta ao, nawayendetsa molemetsa; pamenepo Aejipito anati, Tithawe pamaso pa Israele; pakuti Yehova alikuwagwirira nkhondo pa Aejipito." 
Exodus14:26 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasulira dzanja lako kunyanja, kuti madziwo abwerere kudzamiza Aejipito, magaleta ao, ndi apakavalo ao." 
Exodus14:27 Ndipo Mose anatambasulira dzanja lake kunyanja, ndi nyanja inabwerera m'mayendedwe ake mbandakucha; ndipo Aejipito pothawa anakomana nayo; ndipo Yehova anakutumula Aejipito m'kati mwa nyanja." 
Exodus14:28 Popeza madziwo anabwerera, namiza magaleta ndi apakavalo, ndiwo nkhondo yonse ya Farao imene idalowa pambuyo pao m'nyanja; sanatsale wa iwowa ndi mmodzi yense." 
Exodus14:29 Koma ana a Israele anayenda pouma pakati pa nyanja; ndi madziwo anakhala ngati khoma kwa iwo, palamanja ndi lamanzere." 
Exodus14:30 Chomwecho Yehova anapulumutsa Israele tsiku lomwelo m'manja a Aejipito; ndipo Israele anaona Aejipito akufa m'mphepete mwa nyanja. 
Exodus14:31 Ndipo Israele anaiona ntchito yaikulu imene Yehova anachitira Aejipito, ndipo anthuwo anaopa Yehova; nakhulupirira Yehova ndi mtumiki wake Mose." 
Exodus15:1 Pamenepo Mose ndi ana a Israele anaimbira Yehova nyimbo iyi, nanena, ndi kuti, Ndidzaimbira Yehova pakuti wapambanatu; kavalo ndi wokwera wake anawaponya m'nyanja." 
Exodus15:2 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga, ndipo wakhala chipulumutso changa; ameneyo ndiye Mulungu wanga, ndidzamlemekeza; ndiye Mulungu wa kholo langa, ndidzamveketsa." 
Exodus15:3 Yehova ndiye wankhondo; dzina lake ndiye Yehova. 
Exodus15:4 Magaleta a Farao ndi nkhondo yake anawaponya m'nyanja; ndi akazembe ake osankhika anamira m'Nyanja Yofiira. 
Exodus15:5 Nyanja inawamiza; anamira mozama ngati mwala. 
Exodus15:6 Dzanja lanu lamanja, Yehova, lalemekezedwa ndi mphamvu, dzanja lanu lamanja, Yehova, laphwanya mdani." 
Exodus15:7 Ndipo ndi ukulu wanu waukulu mwapasula akuukira Inu; mwatumiza mkwiyo wanu, unawanyeketsa ngati chiputu." 
Exodus15:8 Ndipo ndi mpumo wa m'mphuno mwanu madzi anaunjikika, mayendedwe ake anakhala chilili ngati mulu; zozama zinalimba m'kati mwa nyanja." 
Exodus15:9 Mdani anati, Ndiwalondola, ndiwapeza, ndidzagawa zofunkha; ndidzakhuta nao mtima; ndidzasolola lupanga langa, dzanja langa lidzawaononga." 
Exodus15:10 Munaombetsa mphepo yanu, nyanja inawamiza; anamira m'madzi aakulu ngati mtovu." 
Exodus15:11 Afanana ndi Inu ndani mwa milungu, Yehova? Afanana ndi Inu ndani, wolemekezedwa, woyera, woopsa pomyamika, wakuchita zozizwa?" 
Exodus15:12 Mwatambasula dzanja lanu lamanja, nthaka inawameza." 
Exodus15:13 Mwa chifundo chanu mwatsogolera anthu amene mudawaombola; mwamphamvu yanu mudawalondolera njira yakunka pokhala panu poyera. 
Exodus15:14 Mitundu ya anthu idamva, inanthunthumira; kuda mtima kwagwira anthu okhala m'Filistiya." 
Exodus15:15 Pamenepo mafumu a Edomu anadabwa; agwidwa nako kunthunthumira amphamvu a ku Mowabu; okhala m'Kanani onse asungunuka mtima. 
Exodus15:16 Kuopa kwakukulu ndi mantha ziwagwera; pa dzanja lanu lalikulu akhala chete ngati mwala; kufikira apita anthu anu, Yehova, kufikira apita anthu amene mudawaombola." 
Exodus15:17 Mudzawafikitsa, ndi kuwaoka pa phiri la cholowa chanu, pamalo pamene munadzipangira mukhalepo, Yehova, malo oyera, amene manja anu, Ambuye, adakhazikika." 
Exodus15:18 Yehova adzachita ufumu nthawi yonka muyaya. 
Exodus15:19 Pakuti akavalo a Farao analowa m'nyanja, ndi magaleta ake ndi apakavalo ake, ndipo Yehova anawabwezera madzi a m'nyanja; koma ana a Israele anayenda pouma pakati pa nyanja." 
Exodus15:20 Ndipo Miriyamu mneneriyo, mlongo wa Aroni, anagwira lingaka m'dzanja lake; ndipo akazi onse anatuluka kumtsata ndi malingaka ndi kuthira mang'ombe." 
Exodus15:21 Ndipo Miriyamu anawayankha, Imbirani Yehova, pakuti wapambanatu; kavalo ndi wokwera wake anawaponya m'nyanja." 
Exodus15:22 Ndipo Mose anatsogolera Israele kuchokera ku Nyanja Yofiira, ndipo anatulukako nalowa m'chipululu cha Suri; nayenda m'chipululu masiku atatu, osapeza madzi." 
Exodus15:23 Pamene anafika ku Mara sanakhoze kumwa madzi a Mara, pakuti anali owawa; chifukwa chake anatcha dzina lake Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Ndipo anthu anadandaulira Mose, ndi kuti, Tidzamwa chiyani?" 
Exodus15:25 Ndipo iye anafuulira kwa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anamsonyeza mtengo ndipo anauponya m'madzimo, ndi madzi anasanduka okoma. Pamenepo anawapangira lemba ndi chiweruzo, ndi pomwepa anawayesa;" 
Exodus15:26 ndipo anati, Ngati udzamveratu mau a Yehova, Mulungu wako, ndi kuchita zoona pamaso pake, ndi kutchera khutu pa malamulo ake, ndi kusunga malemba ake onse, za nthenda zonse ndinaziika pa Aejipito sindidzaziika pa iwe nnena imodzi; pakuti Ine Yehova ndine wakuchiritsa iwe." 
Exodus15:27 Ndipo anafika pa Elimu, ndi pamenepo panali akasupe a madzi khumi ndi awiri, ndi akanjedza makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anamanga chigono chao pomwepo pa madziwo." 
Exodus16:1 Ndipo anachoka ku Elimu, ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israele linalowa m'chipululu cha Sini, ndicho pakati pa Elimu ndi Sinai, tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi wachiwiri atatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus16:2 Ndipo khamu lonse la ana a Israele linadandaulira Mose ndi Aroni m'chipululu 
Exodus16:3 nanena nao ana a Israele, Ha? Mwenzi titafa ndi dzanja la Yehova m'dziko la Ejipito, pokhala ife pa miphika ya nyama, pakudya mkate ife chokhuta; pakuti mwatitulutsa kudza nafe m'chipululu muno kudzapha msonkhano uwu wonse ndi njala." 
Exodus16:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, ndidzavumbitsira inu mkate wodzera kumwamba; ndipo anthu azituluka ndi kuola muyeso wa tsiku pa tsiku lake, kuti ndiwayese, ngati ayenda m'chilamulo changa kapena iai." 
Exodus16:5 Ndipo kudzakhala tsiku lachisanu ndi chimodzi, kuti azikonza umene adabwera nao, ataonjezapo muyeso unzake wa pa tsiku limodzi." 
Exodus16:6 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ananena ndi ana onse a Israele, Madzulo mudzadziwa kuti Yehova anakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito;" 
Exodus16:7 ndi m'mawa mwake mudzaona ulemerero wa Yehova, popeza alinkumva mulikudandaulira Yehova; pakuti ife ndife chiyani, kuti mutidandaulira ife?" 
Exodus16:8 Nanenanso Mose, Pakukupatsani Yehova nyama ya kudya madzulo, ndi mkate wokhuta m'mawa, atero popeza Yehova adamva madandaulo anu amene mumdandaulira nao. Koma ife ndife chiyani? Simulikudandaulira ife koma Yehova." 
Exodus16:9 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni, Nena ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israele, Yandikizani pamaso pa Yehova, pakuti anamva madandaulo anu." 
Exodus16:10 Ndipo kunakhala, pakunena Aroni ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israele kuti iwo anatembenukira kuchipululu, ndipo, taonani, ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka mumtambo." 
Exodus16:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus16:12 Ndamva madandaulo a ana a Israele; lankhula nao ndi kuti, Madzulo mudzadya nyama, ndi m'mawa mudzakhuta mkate; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Exodus16:13 Ndipo kunali madzulo zinakwera zinziri, ndipo zinakuta tsasa, ndi m'mawa padagwa mame pozungulira tsasa." 
Exodus16:14 Ndipo atasansuka mame adagwawo, taonani, pankhope pa chipululu pali kanthu kakang'ono kamphumphu, kakang'ono ngati chipale panthaka." 
Exodus16:15 Ndipo pamene ana a Israele anakaona, anati wina ndi mnzake, Nchiyani ichi? Pakuti sanadziwe ngati nchiyani. Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Ndiwo mkatewo Yehova wakupatsani ukhale chakudya chanu." 
Exodus16:16 Amenewo ndiwo mau walamulira Yehova, Aoleko yense monga mwa njala yake; munthu mmodzi omeri limodzi, monga momwe muli, yense atengere iwo m'hema mwake." 
Exodus16:17 Ndipo ana a Israele anatero, naola wina wambiri, wina pang'ono." 
Exodus16:18 Ndipo pamene anayesa ndi omeri, iye amene adaola wambiri sunamtsalira, ndi iye amene adaola pang'ono sunamsowa; yense anaola monga mwa njala yake." 
Exodus16:19 Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Palibe munthu asiyeko kufikira m'mawa." 
Exodus16:20 Koma sanammvere Mose; ndipo ena anasiyako kufikira m'mawa; koma unagwa mphutsi, nununkha. Ndipo Mose anakwiya nao." 
Exodus16:21 Ndipo anauola m'mawa ndi m'mawa, yense monga mwa njala yake; popeza likatentha dzuwa umasungunuka." 
Exodus16:22 Ndipo kunali tsiku lachisanu ndi chimodzi, anaola mkate, naonjezapo linzake, maomeri awiri pa munthu mmodzi; ndipo akazembe a khamulo anadza nauza Mose." 
Exodus16:23 Ndipo ananena nao, Ichi ndi chomwe Yehova analankhula, Mawa ndiko kupuma, Sabata lopatulika la Yehova; chimene muziocha, ochani, ndi chimene muziphika phikani; ndi chotsala chikukhalireni chosungika kufikira m'mawa." 
Exodus16:24 Ndipo anausunga kufikira m'mawa, monga adalamulira Mose; koma sunanunkha, ndipo sunagwa mphutsi." 
Exodus16:25 Ndipo Mose anati, Muudye lero; pakuti lero ndilo Sabata la Yehova; simuupeza lero pabwalo." 
Exodus16:26 Muziola uwu masiku asanu ndi limodzi; koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndilo la Sabata, pamenepo padzakhala palibe." 
Exodus16:27 Ndipo kunali tsiku la Sabata, kuti anthu ena anatuluka kukaola, koma sanaupeze." 
Exodus16:28 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Mukana kusunga zouza zanga ndi malamulo anga kufikira liti?" 
Exodus16:29 Taonani, popeza Yehova anakupatsani Sabata, chifukwa chake tsiku lachisanu ndi chimodzi alikupatsa inu mkate wofikira masiku awiri; khalani yense m'malo mwake munthu asatuluke m'malo mwake tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri." 
Exodus16:30 Ndipo anthu anapumula tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri. 
Exodus16:31 Ndipo mbumba ya Israele inautcha dzina lake Mana; ndiwo ngati zipatso zampasa, oyera; powalawa akunga timitanda tosanganiza ndi uchi." 
Exodus16:32 Ndipo Mose anati, Awa ndi mau anauza Yehova, Dzazani omeri nao, asungikire mibadwo yanu; kuti aone mkatewo ndinakudyetsani nao m'chipululu, muja ndinakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Exodus16:33 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni, Tenga mphika, nuthiremo mana odzala omeri, nuuike pamaso pa Yehova, usungikire mibadwo yanu." 
Exodus16:34 Monga Yehova anauza Mose, momwemo Aroni anauika patsogolo pa Mboni, usungikeko." 
Exodus16:35 Ndipo ana a Israele anadya mana zaka makumi anai, kufikira atalowa dziko la midzi; anadya mana kufikira analowa malire a dziko la Kanani." 
Exodus16:36 Koma omeri ndilo limodzi la magawo khumi la efa. 
Exodus17:1 Ndipo khamu lonse la ana a Israele linachoka m'chipululu cha Sini, M'zigono zao, monga mwa mau a Yehova, nagona m'Refidimu. Koma kumeneko kunalibe madzi akumwa anthu." 
Exodus17:2 Pamenepo anthu anatsutsana ndi Mose, nati, Tipatseni madzi timwe. Koma Mose ananena nao, Mutsutsana nane bwanji? Muyeseranji Yehova?" 
Exodus17:3 Ndipo pomwepo anthu anamva ludzu lokhumba madzi; ndi anthu anadandaulira Mose, nati, Munatikwezeranji kuchokera ku Ejipito, kudzatipha ife ndi ana athu ndi zoweta zathu ndi ludzu?" 
Exodus17:4 Ndipo Mose anafuulira kwa Yehova, ndi kuti, Ndiwachitenji anthuwa? Andilekera pang'ono kundiponya miyala." 
Exodus17:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Pita pamaso pa anthu, nutenge pamodzi nawe akulu ena a Israele; nutenge m'dzanja mwako ndodo ija unapanda nayo nyanja, numuke." 
Exodus17:6 Taona, ndidzaima pamaso pako pathanthwe m'Horebu; ndipo upande thanthwe, nadzatulukamo madzi, kuti anthu amwe. Ndipo Mose anachita chomwecho pamaso pa akulu a Israele." 
Exodus17:7 Ndipo anatcha dzina la malowo Masa, ndi Meriba, chifukwa cha kutsutsana kwa ana a Israele; popezanso anayesa Yehova, ndi kuti, Kodi Yehova ali pakati pa ife, kapena iai?" 
Exodus17:8 Pamenepo anadza Amaleke, nayambana ndi Israele m'Refidimu." 
Exodus17:9 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yoswa, Utisankhulire amuna, nutuluke kuyambana naye Amaleke; mawa ndidzaima pamwamba pa chitunda, ndi ndodo ya Mulungu m'dzanja langa." 
Exodus17:10 Ndipo Yoswa anachita monga Mose adanena naye, nayambana ndi Amaleke; ndipo Mose, ndi Aroni, ndi Huri anakwera pamwamba pa chitunda." 
Exodus17:11 Ndipo kunakhala, pamene Mose anakweza dzanja lake Israele analakika; koma pamene anatsitsa dzanja lake Amaleke analakika." 
Exodus17:12 Koma manja a Mose analema; ndipo anatenga mwala, nauika pansi pa iye, nakhala pamenepo; ndipo Aroni ndi Huri anagwiriziza manja ake, wina mbali ina, wina mbali ina; ndi manja ake analimbika kufikira litalowa dzuwa." 
Exodus17:13 Ndipo Yoswa anathyola Amaleke ndi anthu ake ndi ku ukali kwa lupanga. 
Exodus17:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lembera ichi m'buku, chikhale chikumbutso, nuchimvetse Yoswa; kuti ndidzafafaniza konse chikumbukiro cha Amaleke pansi pa thambo." 
Exodus17:15 Ndipo Mose anamanga guwa la nsembe, nalitcha dzina lake Yehova Nisi:" 
Exodus17:16 nati, Yehova walumbira: padzakhala nkhondo ya Yehova pa Amaleke m'mibadwomibadwo." 
Exodus18:1 Ndipo Yetero, wansembe wa Midiyani, mpongozi wa Mose, anamva zonse zimene Mulungu adachitira Mose ndi Israele anthu ake, kuti Yehova adatulutsa Israele m'Ejipito." 
Exodus18:2 Ndipo Yetero, mpongozi wa Mose, anabwera naye Zipora mkazi wa Mose (atamtuma kwao), ndi ana ake awiri;" 
Exodus18:3 dzina la winayo ndiye Geresomo, pakuti anati, Ndakhala mlendo m'dziko lachilendo;" 
Exodus18:4 ndi dzina la mnzake ndiye Eliyezere; pakuti anati, Mulungu wa kholo langa anakhala thandizo langa nandilanditsa ku lupanga la Farao." 
Exodus18:5 Ndipo Yetero, mpongozi wa Mose, anadza ndi ana ake amuna ndi mkazi wake kwa Mose kuchipululu kumene adamangako, pa phiri la Mulungu;" 
Exodus18:6 nati kwa Mose, Ine mpongozi wako Yetero ndadza kwa iwe, ndi mkazi wako, ndi ana ake omwe awiri." 
Exodus18:7 Ndipo Mose anatuluka kukakomana ndi mpongozi wake, nawerama, nampsompsona; nafunsana ali bwanji, nalowa m'hema." 
Exodus18:8 Ndipo Mose anafotokozera mpongozi wake zonse Yehova adazichitira Farao ndi Aejipito chifukwa cha Israele; ndi mavuto onse anakomana nao panjira, ndi kuti Yehova adawalanditsa." 
Exodus18:9 Ndipo Yetero anakondwera chifukwa cha zabwino zonse Yehova adazichitira Israele, ndi kuwalanditsa m'dzanja la Aejipito." 
Exodus18:10 Nati Yetero, Woyamikika Yehova, amene anakulanditsani m'dzanja la Aejipito, ndi m'dzanja la Farao; amene analanditsa anthu awa pansi pa dzanja la Aejipito." 
Exodus18:11 Tsopano ndidziwa kuti Yehova ali wamkulu ndi milungu yonse, pakuti momwe anadzikuza okha momwemo anawaposa." 
Exodus18:12 Ndipo Yetero, mpongozi wa Mose, anamtengera Mulungu nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe zophera; ndipo Aroni ndi akulu onse a Israele anadza kudzadya mkate ndi mpongozi wa Mose pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Exodus18:13 Ndipo kunatero kuti m'mawa mwake Mose anakhala pansi kuweruzira anthu milandu yao; ndipo anthu anakhala chilili pamaso pa Mose kuyambira m'mawa kufikira madzulo. 
Exodus18:14 Ndipo pamene mpongozi wake wa Mose anaona zonsezi iye anawachitira anthu, anati, Chinthu ichi nchiyani uwachitira anthuchi? Umakhala pa wekha bwanji, ndi anthu onse amakhala chilili pamaso pako kuyambira m'mawa kufikira madzulo?" 
Exodus18:15 Ndipo Mose anati kwa mpongozi wake, Chifukwa anthu amadza kwa ine kudzafunsira Mulungu;" 
Exodus18:16 akakhala nao mlandu adza kwa ine, kuti ndiweruze pakati pa munthu ndi mnansi wake, ndi kuti ndiwadziwitse malemba a Mulungu, ndi malamulo ake." 
Exodus18:17 Koma mpongozi wa Mose ananena naye, Chinthu uchitachi sichili chabwino ai." 
Exodus18:18 Udzalema konse, iwe ndi anthu amene uli nao; pakuti chikukanika chinthu ichi; sungathe kuchichita pa wekha." 
Exodus18:19 Tamvera mau anga tsopano, ndikupangire nzeru, ndi Mulungu akhale nawe; ukhale m'malo mwa anthu kwa Mulungu, nupite nayo milandu kwa Mulungu;" 
Exodus18:20 nuwamasulire malemba, ndi malamulo, ndi kuwadziwitsa njira imene ayenera kuyendamo, ndi ntchito imene ayenera kuchita." 
Exodus18:21 Koma iwe, dzisankhire mwa anthu ako onse, amuna amtima, akuopa Mulungu, amuna oona, akudana nalo phindu la chinyengo; nuwaikire iwo oterewa, akulu a pa zikwi, akulu a pa mazana, akulu a pa makumi asanu, akulu a pa makhumi;" 
Exodus18:22 ndipo iwo aweruze milandu ya anthu nthawi zonse; ndipo kudzakhala kuti milandu yaikulu yonse abwere nayo kwa iwe; koma milandu yaing'ono yonse aweruze okha; potero idzakuchepera ntchito, ndi iwo adzasenza nawe." 
Exodus18:23 Ukachite chinthuchi, ndi Mulungu akakuuza chotero, udzakhoza kupirira, ndi anthu awa onse adzapita kwao mumtendere." 
Exodus18:24 Ndipo Mose anamvera mau a mpongozi wake, nachita zonse adazinena." 
Exodus18:25 Ndipo Mose anasankha amuna amtima mwa Aisraele onse, nawaika akulu a pa anthu, akulu a pa zikwi, akulu a pa mazana, akulu a pa makumi asanu, ndi akulu a pa makumi." 
Exodus18:26 Ndipo anaweruza anthu nthawi zonse; mlandu wakuwakanika amabwera nao kwa Mose, ndi milandu yaing'ono yonse amaweruza okha." 
Exodus18:27 Ndipo Mose analola mpongozi wake amuke; ndipo anachoka kunka ku dziko lake. 
Exodus19:1 Mwezi wachitatu atatuluka ana a Israele m'dziko la Ejipito, tsiku lomwelo, analowa m'chipululu cha Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Pakuti anachoka ku Refidimu, nalowa m'chipululu cha Sinai, namanga tsasa m'chipululumo; ndipo Israele anamanga tsasa pamenepo pandunji pa phirilo." 
Exodus19:3 Ndipo Mose anakwera kwa Mulungu; ndipo Yehova ali m'phirimo anamuitana, ndi kuti, Uzitero kwa mbumba ya Yakobo, nunene kwa ana a Israele, kuti," 
Exodus19:4 Inu munaona chimene ndinachitira Aejipito; ndi kuti ndanyamula inu monga pa mapiko a mphungu, ndi kubwera nanu kwa Ine ndekha." 
Exodus19:5 Ndipo tsopano, ngati mudzamvera mau anga ndithu, ndi kusunga chipangano changa, ndidzakuyesani chuma changa cha padera koposa mitundu yonse ya anthu; pakuti dziko lonse lapansi ndi langa;" 
Exodus19:6 ndipo ndidzakuyesani ufumu wanga wa ansembe, ndi mtundu wopatulika. Awa ndi mau amene ukalankhule ndi ana a Israele." 
Exodus19:7 Ndipo Mose anadza, naitana akulu a anthu, nawaikira pamaso pao mau awa onse amene Yehova adamuuza." 
Exodus19:8 Ndipo anthu onse anavomera pamodzi, nati, Zonse adazilankhula Yehova tidzazichita. Ndipo Mose anabwera nao mau a anthu kwa Yehova." 
Exodus19:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, ndikudza kwa iwe mu mtambo wakuda bii, kuti anthu amve pamene ndilankhula ndi iwe, ndi kuti akuvomereze nthawi zonse. Pakuti Mose adauza Yehova mau a anthuwo." 
Exodus19:10 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Muka kwa anthuwo, nuwapatulitse lero ndi mawa, ndipo atsuke zovala zao." 
Exodus19:11 Nakonzekeretu tsiku lachitatu; pakuti tsiku lachitatu Yehova adzatsika pa phiri la Sinai pamaso pa anthu onse. 
Exodus19:12 Ndipo ukalembere anthu malire pozungulira, ndi kuti, Muzichenjera musakwere m'phiri, musakhudza chilekezero chake; wokhudza phirilo adzaphedwa ndithu;" 
Exodus19:13 dzanja lililonse lisalikhudze, wakulikhudza azimponyatu miyala, kapena kumpyoza; ngakhale choweta ngakhale munthu, zisakhale ndi moyo. Pamene lipenga libanika liu lake azikwera m'phirimo." 
Exodus19:14 Ndipo Mose anatsika m'phiri kunka kwa anthu, nawapatulitsa anthu; natsuka iwo zovala zao." 
Exodus19:15 Ndipo anati kwa anthu, Mukonzekeretu tsiku lachitatu nimusayandikiza mkazi." 
Exodus19:16 Ndipo kunali tsiku lachitatu, m'mawa, panali mabingu ndi zimphezi, ndi mtambo wakuda bii paphiripo, ndi liu la lipenga lolimbatu; ndi anthu onse okhala kutsasa ananjenjemera." 
Exodus19:17 Ndipo Mose anatulutsa anthu kutsasa, kuti akomane ndi Mulungu; ndipo anaima patsinde pa phiri." 
Exodus19:18 Ndipo phiri la Sinai linafuka monsemo, popeza Yehova anatsikira m'moto pamenepo; ndi utsi wake unakwera ngati utsi wa m'ng'anjo, ndi phiri lonse linagwedezeka kwambiri." 
Exodus19:19 Ndipo pamene liu la lipenga linamveka linakulirakulira, Mose ananena, ndi Mulungu anamyankha ndi mau." 
Exodus19:20 Ndipo Yehova anatsikira pa phiri la Sinai, pamutu pake pa phiri; ndipo Yehova anaitana Mose akwere pamutu pa phiri; ndi Mose anakwerapo." 
Exodus19:21 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tsika, chenjeza anthu, kuti angapyolere kwa Yehova kudzaona, ndipo angagwe ambiri a iwowa." 
Exodus19:22 Ansembenso, akuyandikiza kwa Yehova adzipatulitse, angawapasule Yehova." 
Exodus19:23 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Anthu sangathe kukwera m'phiri la Sinai; pakuti Inu mwatichenjeza, ndi kuti, Lemba malire m'phirimo, ndi kulipatula." 
Exodus19:24 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Muka, tsika; nukwere iwe ndi Aroni pamodzi ndi iwe; koma ansembe ndi anthu asapyole kukwera kwa Yehova, angawapasule." 
Exodus19:25 Pamenepo Mose anawatsikira anthu, nanena nao." 
Exodus20:1 Ndipo Mulungu ananena mau onse amenewa, nati:" 
Exodus20:2 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako, amene ndinatulutsa iwe ku dziko la Ejipito, kunyumba ya akapolo" 
Exodus20:3 Usakhale nayo milungu ina koma Ine ndekha. 
Exodus20:4 Usadzipangire iwe wekha fano losema, kapena chifaniziro chilichonse cha zinthu za m'thambo la kumwamba, kapena za m'dziko lapansi, kapena za m'madzi a pansi pa dziko." 
Exodus20:5 Usazipembedzere izo, usazitumikire izo; chifukwa Ine Yehova Mulungu wako ndili Mulungu wansanje, wakulanga ana chifukwa cha atate ao, kufikira mbadwo wachitatu ndi wachinai wa iwo amene akudana ndi Ine;" 
Exodus20:6 ndi kuwachitira chifundo anthu zikwizikwi a iwo amene akondana ndi Ine, nasunga malamulo anga." 
Exodus20:7 Usatchule dzina la Yehova Mulungu wako pachabe; chifukwa Yehova sadzamuyesa iye wosachimwa, amene atchula pachabe dzina lakelo." 
Exodus20:8 Udzikumbukira tsiku la Sabata, likhale lopatulika." 
Exodus20:9 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi uzigwira, ndi kumaliza ntchito zako zonse;" 
Exodus20:10 koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndilo Sabata la Yehova Mulungu wako; usagwire ntchito iliyonse, kapena iwe wekha, kapena mwana wako wamwamuna, kapena mwana wako wamkazi, kapena wantchito wako wamwamuna, kapena wantchito wako wamkazi, kapena nyama zako, kapena mlendo amene ali m'mudzi mwako;" 
Exodus20:11 chifukwa masiku asanu ndi limodzi Yehova adamaliza zakumwamba ndi zapansi, ndi nyanja, ndi zinthu zonse zili m'menemo, napumula tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri; chifukwa chake Yehova anadalitsa tsiku la Sabata kuti likhale lopatulika." 
Exodus20:12 Uzilemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako; kuti achuluke masiku ako m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wako akupatsa iwe. 
Exodus20:13 Usaphe. 
Exodus20:14 Usachite chigololo. 
Exodus20:15 Usabe. 
Exodus20:16 Usamnamizire mnzako. 
Exodus20:17 Usasirire nyumba yake ya mnzako, usasirire mkazi wake wa mnzako, kapena wantchito wake wa mwamuna, kapena wantchito wake wamkazi, kapena ng'ombe yake, kapena bulu wake, kapena kanthu kalikonse ka mnzako." 
Exodus20:18 Ndipo anthu onse anaona mabingu ndi zimphezi, ndi liu la lipenga ndi phiri lilikufuka; ndipo pamene anthu anaziona, ananjenjemera, naima patali." 
Exodus20:19 Ndipo anati kwa Mose, Mulankhule nafe ndinu, ndipo tidzamva; koma asalankhule nafe Mulungu, kuti tingafe." 
Exodus20:20 Ndipo Mose anati kwa anthu, Musaope; pakuti Mulungu wadza kukuyesani ndi kuti kumuopa Iye kukhale pamaso panu, kuti musachimwe" 
Exodus20:21 Ndipo anthu anaima patali, koma Mose anayandikiza ku mdima waukulu kuli Mulungu." 
Exodus20:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Uzitero ndi ana a Israele, kuti, Mwapenya nokha kuti ndalankhula nanu, kuchokera kumwamba." 
Exodus20:23 Musapange milungu yasiliva ikhale pamodzi ndi Ine; musadzipangire milungu yagolide. 
Exodus20:24 Undiumbire guwa la nsembe ladothi, nundiphere pomwepo nsembe zako zopsereza, ndi nsembe zako zamtendere, nkhosa zako ndi ng'ombe zako; paliponse ndikumbukiritsa anthu dzina langa ndidzakudzera ndi kukudalitsa." 
Exodus20:25 Ndipo ukandimangira guwa la nsembe lamiyala, usalimanga ndi miyala yosema; ukakwezapo chosemera chako, waliipsa." 
Exodus20:26 Kapena usakwere ndi makwerero ku guwa langa la nsembe, kuti angaoneke maliseche ako pamenepo." 
Exodus21:1 Ndipo awa ndiwo maweruzo amene uziika pamaso pao. 
Exodus21:2 Ukagula mnyamata Muhebri, azigwira ntchito zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi; koma chachisanu ndi chiwiri azituluka waufulu chabe." 
Exodus21:3 Akalowa ali yekha azituluka ali yekha; akakhala ndi mkazi, mkazi wake azituluka naye." 
Exodus21:4 Akampatsa mkazi mbuye wake, ndipo akambalira ana aamuna ndi aakazi, mkaziyo ndi ana ake azikhala a mbuye wake, ndipo azituluka ali yekha." 
Exodus21:5 Koma mnyamatayo akanenetsa, Ndikonda mbuye wanga, mkazi wanga, ndi ana anga; sindituluka waufulu;" 
Exodus21:6 pamenepo mbuye wake azifika naye kwa oweruza, nafike naye kukhomo, kapena kumphuthu, ndipo mbuye wake amboole khutu lake ndi lisungulo; ndipo iye azimgwirira ntchito masiku onse." 
Exodus21:7 Ndipo munthu akagulitsa mwana wake wamkazi akhale mdzakazi, iyeyu asatuluke monga amatuluka anyamata." 
Exodus21:8 Akapanda kumkonda mbuye wake, amene anamtoma mwini yekha, azilola kuti amuombole; alibe mphamvu yakumgulitsa kwa anthu achilendo, popeza wachita naye monyenga." 
Exodus21:9 Koma ngati amtomera mwana wake wamwamuna, amchitire monga kuyenera ana akazi." 
Exodus21:10 Akamtengera mkazi wina, asachepetse chakudya chake, zovala zake, ndi za ukwati zakezake." 
Exodus21:11 Ndipo akapanda kumchitira izi zitatu, azituluka chabe, osaperekapo ndalama." 
Exodus21:12 Iye amene akantha munthu kotero kuti wafa, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:13 Koma akapanda kumlalira, koma Mulungu akalola akomane ndi mnzake, ndidzakuikirani pothawirapo iye." 
Exodus21:14 Koma munthu akachita dala pa mnzake, kumupha monyenga; uzimchotsa ku guwa langa la nsembe, kuti afe." 
Exodus21:15 Munthu wakukantha atate wake, kapena amai wake, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:16 Iye wakuba munthu, angakhale wamgulitsa, kapena akampeza m'dzanja lake, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:17 Munthu wakutemberera atate wake, kapena amai wake, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:18 Akalimbana amuna, ndipo wina akakantha mnzake ndi mwala, kapena ndi nkhonya, wosafa iye, koma wakhulungira pakama;" 
Exodus21:19 akaukanso, nakayendayenda pabwalo ndi ndodo yake, womkanthayo azikhala womasuka; pakutsotsa pake pokha azimbwezera, namchizitse konse." 
Exodus21:20 Munthu akakantha mnyamata wake, kapena mdzakazi wake, ndi ndodo, ndipo akafa padzanja pake; ameneyo aliridwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:21 Koma akakhala wosafa tsiku limodzi kapena awiri, asalirike, pakuti ndiye ndalama ya mbuye wake." 
Exodus21:22 Akayambana amuna, nakakantha mkazi ali ndi pakati, kotero kuti abala, koma alibe kuphwetekwa; alipe ndithu, monga momwe amtchulira mwamuna wa mkaziyo; apereke monga anena oweruza." 
Exodus21:23 Koma ngati kuphweteka kukalipo, uzipereka moyo kulipa moyo," 
Exodus21:24 diso kulipa diso, dzino kulipa dzino, dzanja kulipa dzanja, phazi kulipa phazi," 
Exodus21:25 kutentha kulipa kutentha, bala kulipa bala, mkwapulo kulipa mkwapulo." 
Exodus21:26 Munthu akampanda mnyamata wake, kapena mdzakazi wake, padiso, nalithudzula, azimlola amuke waufulu chifukwa cha diso lake." 
Exodus21:27 Ndipo akagulula dzino la mnyamata wake, kapena dzino la mdzakazi wake, azimlola amuke waufulu chifukwa cha dzino lake." 
Exodus21:28 Ng'ombe ikatunga mwamuna kapena mkazi, nafa, aiponyetu miyala ng'ombeyo, osadya nyama yake; koma mwini ng'ombeyo azimasuka." 
Exodus21:29 Koma ngati ng'ombe ikatunga masiku adapitawo, ndipo anamchenjeza mwiniyo, koma osaisunga iye, ndipo ikapha mwamuna kapena mkazi, aiponye miyala ng'ombeyo, ndi mwini wakeyo amuphenso." 
Exodus21:30 Akamuikira dipo, azipereka chiombolo cha moyo wake monga mwa zonse adamuikira." 
Exodus21:31 Ingakhale yatunga mwana wamwamuna kapena wamkazi, aichitire monga mwa chiweruzo ichi." 
Exodus21:32 Ng'ombeyo ikatunga mnyamata kapena mdzakazi, azipatsa mbuye wake ndalama za masekeli a siliva makumi atatu, ndipo ng'ombeyo aiponye miyala." 
Exodus21:33 Munthu akafukula dzenje, kapena akakumba dzenje, osalivundikira, ndipo ikagwamo ng'ombe kapena bulu," 
Exodus21:34 mwini dzenje azilipa; azilipa ndalama kwa mwini nyamayo, koma yakufayo ndi yake." 
Exodus21:35 Ng'ombe ya mwini ikapweteka ng'ombe ya mnzake, nifa, azigulitsa ng'ombe yamoyoyo, nagawe ndalama zake; naigawe, ndi yakufa yomweyo." 
Exodus21:36 Kapena kudadziwika kuti ng'ombe ikatunga masiku adapitawo, koma osaisunga mwiniyo, azilipa ndithu, ng'ombe kulipa ng'ombe, koma yakufayo ndi yake." 
Exodus22:1 Munthu akaba ng'ombe, kapena nkhosa, nakaipha kapena kuigulitsa, azilipa ng'ombe zisanu pa ng'ombeyo, ndi nkhosa zinai pa nkhosayo." 
Exodus22:2 Akampeza wakuba alimkuboola, nakamkantha kotero kuti wafa, palibe chamwazi." 
Exodus22:3 Litamtulukira dzuwa, pali chamwazi; wakubayo azilipa ndithu; ngati alibe kanthu, amgulitse pa umbala wake." 
Exodus22:4 Akachipeza chakubacho chili m'dzanja lake chamoyo, ngakhale ng'ombe, kapena bulu, kapena nkhosa, alipe mowirikiza." 
Exodus22:5 Munthu akadyetsa choweta pabusa kapena pa munda wamphesa, atamasula choweta chake, ndipo chitadya podyetsa pa mwini wake; alipe podyetsa pake poposa, ndi munda wa mphesa wake woposa." 
Exodus22:6 Ukayaka moto, nukalandira kuminga, kotero kuti unyeketsa mulu wa tirigu, kapena tirigu wosasenga, kapena munda; woyatsa motoyo alipe ndithu." 
Exodus22:7 Munthu akaikiza ndalama kapena chuma kwa mnansi wake, ndipo zibeka m'nyumba ya munthuyo; akapeza mbala, ilipe chowirikiza." 
Exodus22:8 Akapanda kumpeza mbalayo, abwere naye mwini nyumbayo kwa oweruza, kumuyesa ngati anaika dzanja lake pa chuma cha mnansi wake." 
Exodus22:9 Mlandu uliwonse wa cholakwa, kunena za ng'ombe, za bulu, za nkhosa, za chovala, za kanthu kalikonse kotayika, munthu anenako kali kake; mlandu wa onse awiri ufike kwa oweruza; iye amene oweruza amtsutsa alipe chowirikiza kwa mnansi wake." 
Exodus22:10 Munthu akaikiza bulu, kapena ng'ombe, kapena nkhosa, kapena choweta china kwa mnansi wake, ndipo chikafa, kapena chiphwetekwa, kapena wina achipirikitsa osachiona munthu;" 
Exodus22:11 lumbiro la Yehova likhale pakati pa iwo awiri, kuti sanatulutse dzanja lake pa chuma cha mnansi wake; ndipo mwiniyo azivomereza, ndipo asalipe." 
Exodus22:12 Koma ngati chidabedwa kwaoko ndithu, alipe kwa mwiniyo." 
Exodus22:13 Ngati chajiwa ndithu, abwere nacho chikhale mboni; asalipe pa chojiwacho." 
Exodus22:14 Munthu akabwereka chinthu kwa mnansi wake, ndipo chiphwetekwa, kapena chifa, mwiniyo palibe, azilipa ndithu." 
Exodus22:15 Akakhalapo mwiniyo, asalipe; ngati chagwirira ntchito yakulipira, chadzera kulipira kwake." 
Exodus22:16 Munthu akanyenga namwali wosapalidwa ubwenzi, nakagona naye, alipetu kuti akhale mkazi wake." 
Exodus22:17 Atate wake akakana konse kumpatsa iye, alipe ndalama monga mwa cholipa cha anamwali." 
Exodus22:18 Wanyanga usamlola akhale ndi moyo. 
Exodus22:19 Aliyense agona ndi choweta aphedwe ndithu. 
Exodus22:20 Wakuphera nsembe mulungu wina, wosati Yehova yekha, aonongeke konse." 
Exodus22:21 Ndipo usasautsa mlendo kapena kumpsinja; pakuti munali alendo m'dziko la Ejipito. 
Exodus22:22 Musazunza mkazi wamasiye, kapena mwana wamasiye aliyense." 
Exodus22:23 Ukawazunza ndi kakuti konse, nakandilirira pang'ono ponse iwowa, ndidzamvadi kulira kwao;" 
Exodus22:24 ndi mkwiyo wanga idzayaka, ndipo ndidzapha inu ndi lupanga; ndipo akazi anu adzakhala amasiye, ndi ana anu omwe." 
Exodus22:25 Ukakongoletsa ndalama anthu anga osauka okhala nanu, usamkhalira ngati wangongole; usamwerengera phindu." 
Exodus22:26 Ukati ulandire chikole kaya chovala cha mnansi wako, koma polowa dzuwa uchibwezere kwa iye;" 
Exodus22:27 popeza chofunda chake ndi ichi chokha, ndicho chovala cha pathupi pake; azifundira chiyani pogona? Ndipo kudzakhala kuti akandifuulira Ine, ndidzamva; pakuti Ine ndine wachisomo." 
Exodus22:28 Usapeputsa oweruza, kapena kutemberera mkulu wa anthu a mtundu wako." 
Exodus22:29 Usachedwa kuperekako zipatso zako zochuluka, ndi zothira zako. Woyamba wa ana ako amuna undipatse Ine." 
Exodus22:30 Uzitero nazo ng'ombe zako, ndi nkhosa zako; masiku asanu ndi atatu akhale ndi amai wake; tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu uzimpereka kwa Ine." 
Exodus22:31 Ndipo muzindikhalira Ine anthu opatulika; chifukwa chake musamadya nyama yojiwa kuthengo; itayireni agalu. 
Exodus23:1 Usatola mbiri yopanda pake; usathandizana naye woipa ndi kukhala mboni yochititsa chiwawa. 
Exodus23:2 Usatsata unyinji wa anthu kuchita choipa; kapena usachita umboni kumlandu, ndi kupatukira kutsata unyinji ndi kukhotetsa mlandu;" 
Exodus23:3 kapena usakometsera munthu wosauka pa mlandu wake. 
Exodus23:4 Ukakomana ndi ng'ombe kapena bulu wa mdani wako zilimkusokera, uzimbwezera izo ndithu." 
Exodus23:5 Ukaona bulu wa munthu wakudana nawe alikugona pansi ndi katundu wake, ndipo ukadaleka kuthandiza, koma uzimthandiza ndithu." 
Exodus23:6 Usakhotetsa mlandu wa mnzako waumphawi. 
Exodus23:7 Uzikhala kutali ndi mlandu wonama; ndipo usapha munthu wosachimwa ndi wolungama; pakuti sindidzayesa wolungama munthu woipa. 
Exodus23:8 Usalandira chokometsera mlandu; pakuti chokometsera mlandu chidetsa maso a openya, nichisanduliza mlandu wa olungama." 
Exodus23:9 Usampsinja mlendo; pakuti mudziwa mtima wa mlendo popeza munali alendo m'dziko la Ejipito. 
Exodus23:10 Ndipo uzibzala m'munda mwako zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi, ndi kututa zipatso zako;" 
Exodus23:11 koma chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri uuleke, ugone; kuti aumphawi a anthu a mtundu wako adyemo, ndipo zotsalira nyama za kuthengo zizidye; momwemo uzichita ndi munda wako wamphesa, ndi munda wako wa azitona." 
Exodus23:12 Uzichita ntchito yako masiku asanu ndi limodzi, koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri uzipumula; kuti ng'ombe yako ndi bulu wako zipumule, ndi kuti mwana wa mdzakazi wako ndi mlendo atsitsimuke." 
Exodus23:13 Ndipo samalirani zonse ndanena ndi inu; nimusatchule dzina la milungu ina; lisamveke pakamwa pako. 
Exodus23:14 Muzindichitira Ine madyerero katatu m'chaka. 
Exodus23:15 Uzisunga chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa; masiku asanu ndi awiri uzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa, monga ndinakuuza, nyengo yoikika, mwezi wa Abibu, pakuti m'menemo unatuluka m'Ejipito; koma asaoneke munthu pamaso panga opanda kanthu;" 
Exodus23:16 ndi chikondwerero cha Masika, zipatso zoyamba za ntchito zako, zimene udazibzala m'munda; ndi chikondwerero cha Kututa, pakutha chaka, pamene ututa ntchito zako za m'munda." 
Exodus23:17 Katatu m'chaka amuna onse azioneka pamaso pa Ambuye Yehova. 
Exodus23:18 Usapereka mwazi wa nsembe yanga pamodzi ndi mkate wachotupitsa; ndi mafuta a madyerero anga asagonamo kufikira m'mawa. 
Exodus23:19 Uzibwera nazo zoyambayamba za m'munda mwako kunyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wako. Usaphike mwanawambuzi mu mkaka wa make. 
Exodus23:20 Taona, ndituma mthenga akutsogolere, kukusunga panjira, ndi kukufikitsa pamaso pomwe ndakonzeratu." 
Exodus23:21 Musamalire iye, ndi kumvera mau ake; musamwawitsa mtima, pakuti sadzakhululukira zolakwa zanu; popeza dzina langa lili m'mtima mwake." 
Exodus23:22 Pakuti ukamveratu mau ake, ndi kuchita zonse ndizilankhula, ndidzakhala mdani wa adani ako, ndipo ndidzasautsa akusautsa iwe." 
Exodus23:23 Pakuti mthenga wanga adzakutsogolera, nadzakufikitsa kwa Aamori, ndi Ahiti, ndi Aperizi, ndi Akanani, Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi; ndipo ndidzawaononga." 
Exodus23:24 Usagwadira milungu yao, kapena kuwatumikira, kapena kuchita monga mwa ntchito zao; koma uwapasule konse, ndi kugamulatu zoimiritsa zao." 
Exodus23:25 Ndipo muzitumikira Yehova Mulungu wanu, potero adzadalitsa chakudya chako, ndi madzi ako; ndipo ndidzachotsa nthenda pakati pa iwe." 
Exodus23:26 M'dziko mwanu simudzakhala wakutaya mwana, kapena wosabala; ndidzakwaniritsa kuwerenga kwa masiku ako." 
Exodus23:27 Ndidzatumiza kuopsa kwanga kukutsogolere, ndipo ndidzapirikitsa anthu onse amene udzafika kwao, ndipo ndidzachita kuti adani ako onse adzakuonetsa m'mbuyo mwao." 
Exodus23:28 Ndipo ndidzatumiza mavu akutsogolere amene adzaingitsa Ahivi, Akanani, ndi Ahiti, pamaso pako." 
Exodus23:29 Sindidzawaingitsa pamaso pako chaka chimodzi; kuti dziko lingakhale bwinja, ndi zilombo za kuthengo zingakuchulukire." 
Exodus23:30 Ndidzawaingitsa pang'onopang'ono pamaso pako, kufikira utachuluka, ndi kulandira dziko cholowa chako." 
Exodus23:31 Ndipo ndidzalemba malire ako kuyambira ku Nyanja Yofiira, kufikira ku nyanja ya Afilisti, ndi kuyambira kuchipululu kufikira ku Nyanja; popeza ndidzapereka okhala m'dzikolo m'dzanja lako, ndipo uziwaingitsa pamaso pako." 
Exodus23:32 Usapangana nao, kapena ndi milungu yao." 
Exodus23:33 Asakhale m'dziko lako iwowa, kuti angakulakwitse pa Ine; pakuti ukatumikira milungu yao, kudzakukhalira msampha ndithu." 
Exodus24:1 Ndipo Iye ananena ndi Mose, Ukwere kudza kwa Yehova, iwe ndi Aroni, Nadabu ndi Abihu, ndi akulu a Israele makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo mugwadire pakudza kutali;" 
Exodus24:2 ndipo Mose yekha ayandikire kwa Yehova; koma asayandikire iwowa; ndi anthunso asakwere naye. 
Exodus24:3 Ndipo Mose anadza nafotokozera anthu mau onse a Yehova, ndi maweruzo onse; ndipo anthu onse anavomera pamodzi, nati, Mau onse walankhula Yehova tidzachita." 
Exodus24:4 Ndipo Mose analembera mau onse a Yehova, nalawira kuuka mamawa, namanga guwa la nsembe patsinde pa phiri, ndi zoimiritsa khumi ndi ziwiri, kwa mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israele." 
Exodus24:5 Ndipo anatuma ana a Israele a misinkhu ya anyamata, ndiwo anapereka nsembe zopsereza, naphera Yehova nsembe zamtendere, za ng'ombe." 
Exodus24:6 Ndipo Mose anagawa mwaziwo, nathira wina m'zotengera, nawaza wina pa guwa la nsembe" 
Exodus24:7 Ndipo anatenga buku la Chipangano, nawerenga m'makutu a anthu; ndipo iwo anati, Zonse zimene Yehova walankhula tidzachita, ndi kumvera." 
Exodus24:8 Ndipo Mose anatenga mwaziwo, nawaza pa anthu, nati Taonani mwazi wa chipangano, chimene Yehova anachita nanu, kunena za mau awa onse." 
Exodus24:9 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni, Nadabu ndi Abihu, ndi akulu a Israele makumi asanu ndi awiri anakwerako;" 
Exodus24:10 ndipo anapenya Mulungu wa Israele; ndipo pansi pa mapazi ake panali ngati mayalidwe oyera a miyala yasafiri, ndi ngati thupi la thambo loti mbee." 
Exodus24:11 Koma sanatulutse dzanja lake pa akulu a ena a Israele; ndipo anapenya Mulungu, nadya, namwa." 
Exodus24:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Ukwere kudza kwa Ine m'phiri muno, nukhale pompano; ndipo ndidzakupatsa magome amiyala, ndi chilamulo ndi malamulo ndawalembera kuti uwalangize." 
Exodus24:13 Ndipo anauka Mose, ndi Yoswa mtumiki wake; ndipo Mose anakwera m'phiri la Mulungu." 
Exodus24:14 Ndipo anati kwa akulu, Tilindeni kuno kufikira tidzabwera kwa inu; ndipo taonani, Aroni ndi Huri ali nanu; munthu akakhala ndi mlandu abwere kwa iwowa." 
Exodus24:15 Ndipo Mose anakwera m'phirimo, ndi mtambo unaphimba phirilo." 
Exodus24:16 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unakhalabe pa phiri la Sinai, ndi mtambo unaliphimba masiku asanu ndi limodzi; ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri Iye ali m'kati mwa mtambo anaitana Mose." 
Exodus24:17 Ndipo maonekedwe a ulemerero wa Yehova anali ngati moto wonyeketsa pamwamba pa phiri, pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
Exodus24:18 Ndipo Mose analowa m'kati mwa mtambo, nakwera m'phirimo; ndipo Mose anakhala m'phiri masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku." 
Exodus25:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus25:2 Lankhula ndi ana a Israele, kuti anditengere chopereka; ulandire chopereka changa kwa munthu aliyense mtima wake umfunitsa mwini." 
Exodus25:3 Ndipo choperekacho uchilandire kwa iwo ndi ichi: golide, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa," 
Exodus25:4 ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi ubweya wa mbuzi;" 
Exodus25:5 ndi zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira, ndi zikopa za akatumbu, ndi mtengo wakasiya;" 
Exodus25:6 mafuta akuunikira, zonunkhira za mafuta odzoza, ndi za chofukiza cha fungo lokoma;" 
Exodus25:7 miyala yaberulo, ndi miyala yoika paefodi, ndi pachapachifuwa." 
Exodus25:8 Ndipo andimangire malo opatulika; kuti ndikhale pakati pao. 
Exodus25:9 Monga mwa zonse Ine ndilikuonetsa iwe, chifaniziro cha Kachisi, ndi chifaniziro cha zipangizo zake zonse, momwemo uchimange." 
Exodus25:10 Ndipo azipanga likasa la mtengo wakasiya: utali wake mikono iwiri ndi hafu, kupingasa kwake mkono ndi hafu, msinkhu wake mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus25:11 Ndipo ulikute ndi golide woona, ulikute m'kati ndi kubwalo, nulipangire mkombero wagolide pozungulira pake." 
Exodus25:12 Ndipo uliyengere mphete zinai zagolide, ndi kuziika kumiyendo yake inai; mphete ziwiri pa mbali yake ina, ndi mphete ziwiri pa ina." 
Exodus25:13 Ndipo uzipanga mphiko za mtengo wakasiya, ndi kuzikuta ndi golide." 
Exodus25:14 Nupise mphiko m'mphetezo pa mbali zake za likasa, zakunyamulira nazo likasalo." 
Exodus25:15 Mphiko zikhale m'zimphete za likasa; asazisolole. 
Exodus25:16 Ndipo uziika m'likasamo mboni imene ndidzakupatsa. 
Exodus25:17 Ndipo uzipanga chotetezerapo cha golide woona; utali wake mikono iwiri ndi hafu, ndi kupingasa kwake mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus25:18 Uzipanganso akerubi awiri agolide; uwasule mapangidwe ake, pa mathungo ake awiri a chotetezerapo." 
Exodus25:19 Nupange kerubi mmodzi ku thungo lino, ndi kerubi wina ku thungo lina; upange akerubi ochokera kuchotetezerapo, pa mathungo ake awiri." 
Exodus25:20 Ndipo akerubi afunyululire mapiko ao m'mwamba, ndi kuphimba chotetezerapo ndi mapiko ao, ndi nkhope zao zipenyane; nkhope za akerubi zipenye kuchotetezerapo." 
Exodus25:21 Ndipo uziika chotetezerapo pamwamba pa likasa, ndi kuikamo mboni ndidzakupatsayo m'likasamo." 
Exodus25:22 Ndipo pomwepo ndidzakomana ndi iwe, ndi kulankhula ndi iwe, ndili pamwamba pa chotetezerapo, pakati pa akerubi awiriwo okhala pa likasa la mboni, zonse zimene ndidzakuuza za ana a Israele." 
Exodus25:23 Ndipo uzipanga gome la mtengo wakasiya; utali wake mikono iwiri, ndi kupingasa kwake mkono umodzi, ndi msinkhu wake mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus25:24 Ndipo ulikute ndi golide woona ndi kulipangira mkombero wagolide pozungulira pake. 
Exodus25:25 Nulipangire mitanda pozungulirapo yoyesa chikhato m'kupingasa kwake, ndi pamitanda pake pozungulira upangirepo mkombero wagolide." 
Exodus25:26 Nulipangire mphete zinai zagolide, ndi kuika mphetezo pangodya zinai zokhala pa miyendo yake inai." 
Exodus25:27 Mphetezo zikhale pafupi pa mitanda, zikhale zopisamo mphiko za kunyamulira nazo gome." 
Exodus25:28 Ndipo uzipanga mphiko za mtengo wakasiya, ndi kuzikuta ndi golide, kuti anyamulire nazo gome." 
Exodus25:29 Ndipo uzipanga mbale zake, ndi zipande zake, ndi mitsuko yake, ndi zikho zake zakuthira nazo; uzipanga za golide woona." 
Exodus25:30 Ndipo uziika mkate woonekera pa gomelo pamaso panga nthawi zonse. 
Exodus25:31 Ndipo uzipanga choikapo nyali cha golide woona; choikapocho chisulidwe mapangidwe ake, tsinde lake ndi thupi lake; zikho zake, mitu yake, ndi maluwa ake zikhale zochokera m'mwemo;" 
Exodus25:32 ndipo m'mbali zake mutuluke mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi; mphanda zitatu za choikapo nyalicho zituluke m'mbali yake ina, ndi mphanda zitatu za choikapo nyalicho zituluke m'mbali inzake." 
Exodus25:33 Ku mphanda ina kukhale zikho zitatu zopangika ngati katungurume, mutu ndi luwa; ndi ku mphanda inzake zikho zitatu zopangika ngati katungurume, mutu ndi luwa; zitere mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi zotuluka m'choikapo nyalicho." 
Exodus25:34 Ndipo pa choikapo nyali chomwe pakhale zikho zinai zopangika ngati katungurume, mitu yake ndi maluwa ake;" 
Exodus25:35 pakhale mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri zotuluka m'mwemo, ndi mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri zotuluka m'mwemo, ndi mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri zotuluka m'mwemo; itere ku mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi zotuluka m'choikapo nyalicho." 
Exodus25:36 Mitu yao ndi mphanda zao zikhale zotuluka m'mwemo; chonsechi chikhale chosulika chimodzi cha golide woona. 
Exodus25:37 Ndipo uzipanga nyali zake, zisanu ndi ziwiri; ndipo ayatse nyali zake, ziwale pandunji pake." 
Exodus25:38 Ndipo mbano zake, ndi zoolera zake, zikhale za golide woona." 
Exodus25:39 Achipange ichi ndi zipangizo izi zonse za talente wa golide woona. 
Exodus25:40 Ndipo uyang'anire uzipanga monga mwachifaniziro chao, chimene anakuonetsa m'phirimo." 
Exodus26:1 Ndipo uzipanga Kachisi ndi nsalu zophimba khumi, za bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira; uombemo akerubi, ntchito ya mmisiri." 
Exodus26:2 Utali wake wa nsalu yophimba imodzi ndiwo mikono makumi awiri kudza isanu ndi itatu, ndi kupingasa kwa nsalu imodzi ndiko mikono inai; nsalu zonse zikhale za muyeso umodzi." 
Exodus26:3 Nsalu zisanu zilumikizane ina ndi inzake; ndi nsalu zisanu zina zilumikizane ina ndi inzake. 
Exodus26:4 Ndipo uziika magango a nsalu ya madzi m'mphepete mwake mwa nsalu imodzi, ku mkawo wa chilumikizano; nuchite momwemo m'mphepete mwake mwa nsalu ya kuthungo ya chilumikizano china." 
Exodus26:5 Uziika magango makumi asanu pa nsalu yochingira imodzi, nuikenso magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwake mwa nsalu ya chilumikizano china; ndipo magango akomanizane lina ndi linzake." 
Exodus26:6 Uzipanganso zokowera makumi asanu zagolide, ndi kumanga nsaluzo pamodzi ndi zokowerazo; kuti Kachisi akhale mmodzi." 
Exodus26:7 Ndipo uziomba nsalu zophimba za ubweya wa mbuzi zikhale hema pamwamba pa Kachisi; uziomba nsalu khumi ndi imodzi. 
Exodus26:8 Utali wake wa nsalu imodzi ndiwo mikono makumi atatu, ndi kupingasa kwake kwa nsalu imodzi ndiko mikono inai; nsalu khumi ndi imodzi zikhale za muyeso womwewo." 
Exodus26:9 Nuzisoka pamodzi nsalu zisanu pa zokha, ndi nsalu zisanu ndi imodzi pa zokha, nupinde nsalu yachisanu ndi chimodziyo pa khomo la hema." 
Exodus26:10 Ndipo uziika magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwa nsalu imodzi, ya kuthungo ya chilumikizano, ndi magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwa nsalu ya kuthungo ya chilumikizano china." 
Exodus26:11 Ndipo uzipanga zokowera makumi asanu zamkuwa, ndi kukowetsa zokowerazo m'magangomo, ndi kumanga pamodzi hemalo likhale limodzi." 
Exodus26:12 Ndipo chotsalacho pa nsalu za hemalo, hafu yake ya nsalu yotsalirayo, ichinge pambuyo pake pa Kachisi." 
Exodus26:13 Ndi mkono wa pa mbali yino, ndi mkono wa pa mbali inzake, wakutsalira m'utali wake wa nsalu za hemalo, ichinge pambali zake za Kachisi, mbali yino ndi mbali ina, kumphimba." 
Exodus26:14 Ndipo uzipangira hema chophimba cha zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira, ndi chophimba za zikopa za akatumbu pamwamba pake." 
Exodus26:15 Ndipo uzipangira Kachisi matabwa oimirika, a mtengo wakasiya." 
Exodus26:16 Utali wake wa thabwa limodzi ndiwo mikono khumi, ndi kupingasa kwake kwa thabwali mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus26:17 Pa thabwa limodzi pakhale mitsukwa iwiri, yomangika pamodzi; uzitero pa matabwa onse a Kachisi." 
Exodus26:18 Ndipo uzipanga matabwa a Kachisi, matabwa makumi awiri ku mbali ya kumwera, kumwera." 
Exodus26:19 Nuzipanga makamwa makumi anai asiliva pansi pa matabwa makumi awiri; makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi kwa mitsukwa yake iwiri, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina kwa mitsukwa yake iwiri;" 
Exodus26:20 ndi pa mbali yake ina ya Kachisi, mbali ya kumpoto, pakhale matabwa makumi awiri; ndi makamwa asiliva makumi anai;" 
Exodus26:21 makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina." 
Exodus26:22 Ndipo uzipanga matabwa asanu ndi limodzi kwa mbali ya Kachisi ya kumbuyo. 
Exodus26:23 Nupange matabwa awiri angodya za Kachisi za kumbuyo. 
Exodus26:24 Ndipo akhale ophatikizika pamodzi patsinde, nakhalenso ophatikizika pamodzi kumutu kwake ndi mphete imodzi; azitero onse awiri; azikhala angodya ziwiri." 
Exodus26:25 Ndipo pakhale matabwa asanu ndi atatu, ndi makamwa ao asiliva, ndiwo makamwa khumi mphambu asanu ndi limodzi; makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina." 
Exodus26:26 Ndipo uzipanga mitanda ya mtengo wakasiya; isanu ya matabwa a pa mbali ina ya Kachisi," 
Exodus26:27 ndi mitanda isanu ya matabwa a pa mbali ina ya Kachisi, ndi mitanda isanu ya matabwa a pa mbali ya Kachisi ya kumbuyo kumadzulo." 
Exodus26:28 Ndi mtanda wa pakati pa matabwa ufikire kuthungo. 
Exodus26:29 Ndipo uzikuta matabwa ndi golide, ndi kupanga mphete zao zagolide zopisamo mitandayo; uzikutanso mitandayo ndi golide." 
Exodus26:30 Ndipo uutse Kachisi monga mwa makhalidwe ake amene anakusonyeza m'phiri. 
Exodus26:31 Ndipo uziomba nsalu yotchinga ya thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiirira ndi lofiira, ndi la bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, aiombe ndi akerubi ntchito ya mmisiri;" 
Exodus26:32 ndipo uichinge pa mizati inai ya mitengo wakasiya, zokuta ndi golide; zokowera zao zikhale zagolide, ndi makamwa anai asiliva." 
Exodus26:33 Ndipo uzitchinga nsalu yotchinga pa zokowerazo, nulowetse likasa la mboni kukati kwa nsalu yotchinga; ndipo nsalu yotchingayo idzakugawirani pakati pa malo opatulika ndi malo opatulika kwambiri." 
Exodus26:34 Ndipo uziika chotetezerapo pa likasa la mboni, m'malo opatulika kwambiri." 
Exodus26:35 Nuziika gomelo kunja kwa nsalu yotchinga, ndi choikapo nyali pandunji pa gome, pa mbali ya kumwera ya Kachisi; koma uike gomelo pa mbali ya kumpoto." 
Exodus26:36 Ndipo uziomba nsalu yotsekera pa khomo la hema, ya lakuda, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ntchito ya wopikula." 
Exodus26:37 Ndipo uzipangira nsalu yotsekerayo nsanamira zisanu za mtengo wakasiya, ndi kuzikuta ndi golide; zokowera zao zikhale zagolide; nuziyengera makamwa asanu amkuwa."
