Leviticus21:15 Asaipse mbeu yake mwa anthu a mtundu wake; popeza Ine ndine Yehova wakumpatula iye. 
Leviticus21:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus21:17 Nena ndi Aroni, kuti, Aliyense wa mbeu zako mwa mibadwo yao wakukhala nacho chilema, asayandikize kupereka mkate wa Mulungu wake." 
Leviticus21:18 Pakuti munthu aliyense wokhala nacho chilema, asayandikize; wakhungu, kapena wotsimphina, kapena wopunduka mphuno, kapena wamkulu chiwalo," 
Leviticus21:19 kapena munthu wopunduka phazi kapena wopunduka dzanja," 
Leviticus21:20 kapena wowerama, kapena wamfupi msinkhu, kapena wopunduka diso, kapena munthu wamphere, kapena wachipere, kapena wopunduka kumoto." 
Leviticus21:21 Wa mbeu ya Aroni wansembe asayandikize mmodzi wokhala nacho chilema, kupereka nsembe zamoto za Yehova; ali nacho chilema asayandikize kupereka chakudya cha Mulungu wake." 
Leviticus21:22 Adye chakudya cha Mulungu wake, chopatulika kwambiri, ndi chopatulika;" 
Leviticus21:23 koma asafike ku nsalu yotchinga, asayandikize ku guwa la nsembe, popeza ali nacho chilema; kuti angaipse malo anga opatulika; popeza Ine ndine Yehova wakuwapatula." 
Leviticus21:24 Momwemo Mose ananena ndi Aroni, ndi ana ake amuna, ndi ana onse a Israele." 
Leviticus22:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus22:2 Nena ndi Aroni ndi ana ake amuna, kuti azikhala padera ndi zinthu zopatulika za ana a Israele, zimene amandipatulira Ine, ndipo asaipse dzina langa loyera; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus22:3 Nena nao, Aliyense wa mbeu zanu zonse mwa mibadwo yanu, akayandikiza zinthu zopatulika, zimene ana a Israele azipatulira Yehova, pokhala ali nacho chomdetsa chake, azimsadza munthuyo pankhope panga; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus22:4 Munthu aliyense wa mbeu za Aroni wokhala ndi khate, kapena kukha, asadyeko zinthu zopatulika, kufikira atayera. Ndipo aliyense wokhudza chinthu chodetsedwa ndi wakufa, kapena mwamuna wogona uipa;" 
Leviticus22:5 ndi aliyense wokhudza chinthu chokwawa chakudetsedwa nacho, kapenanso munthu amene akamdetsa nacho, chodetsa chake chilichonse;" 
Leviticus22:6 munthu wokhudza chilichonse chotere adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo, ndipo asadye zinthu zopatulika, akapanda kusamba thupi lake ndi madzi." 
Leviticus22:7 Koma litalowa dzuwa, adzakhala woyera, ndi pambuyo pake adyeko zoyerazo, popeza ndizo chakudya chake." 
Leviticus22:8 Asamadya zakufa zokha, kapena zojiwa, kudzidetsa nazo; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus22:9 Potero asunge chilangizo changa, angasenzepo uchimo, ndi kufera m'mwemo, pakuchiipsa; Ine ndine Yehova wakuwapatula iwo." 
Leviticus22:10 Mlendo asadyeko chopatulikacho; wakungokhala, ndi wansembe, kapena wolembedwa ntchito, asadyeko chopatulikacho." 
Leviticus22:11 Koma wansembe atakagula munthu ndi ndalama zake, iyeyu adyeko; ndi iwo amene anabadwa m'nyumba yake, adyeko mkate wake." 
Leviticus22:12 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa wansembe akakwatibwa ndi mlendo, asadyeko nsembe yokweza ya zinthu zopatulika." 
Leviticus22:13 Koma mwana wamkazi wa wansembe akakhala wamasiye kapena wochotsedwa, ndipo alibe mwana, nabwerera kunyumba ya atate wake, monga muja anali mwana, adyeko mkate wa atate wake; koma mlendo asamadyako." 
Leviticus22:14 Ndipo munthu akadyako chinthu chopatulika mosadziwa, azionjezapo limodzi la magawo asanu, nalipereke kwa wansembe, pamodzi ndi chopatulikacho." 
Leviticus22:15 Potero asaipse zinthu zopatulika za ana a Israele, zopereka iwo kwa Yehova;" 
Leviticus22:16 ndi kuwasenzetsa mphulupulu yakuwapalamulitsa, pakudya iwo zopatulika zao; pakuti Ine ndine Yehova wakuwapatula." 
Leviticus22:17 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus22:18 Nena ndi Aroni, ndi ana ake amuna, ndi ana onse a Israele, nuti nao, Aliyense wa mbumba ya Israele, kapena wa alendo ali m'Israele, akabwera nacho chopereka chake, monga mwa zowinda zao zonse, kapena monga mwa zopereka zaufulu zao, zimene abwera nazo kwa Yehova zikhale nsembe zopsereza;" 
Leviticus22:19 kuti mulandiridwe, azibwera nayo yaimuna yopanda chilema, ya ng'ombe, kapena nkhosa kapena mbuzi." 
Leviticus22:20 Musamabwera nayo yokhala ndi chilema; popeza siidzalandirikira inu. 
Leviticus22:21 Ndipo munthu akabwera nayo nsembe yoyamika kwa Yehova, ya pa chowinda chachikulu, kapena ya pa chopereka chaufulu, ya ng'ombe kapena nkhosa, ikhale yangwiro kuti ilandirike; ikhale yopanda chilema." 
Leviticus22:22 Musamabwera nazo kwa Yehova yakhungu, kapena yoduka mwendo, kapena yopunduka, kapena yafundo, kapena yausemwe, kapena ya usemwe waukulu, musamazipereka kwa Yehova nsembe zamoto pa guwa la nsembe." 
Leviticus22:23 Ng'ombe kapena nkhosa yokula kapena yochepa chiwalo, ikhale nsembe yaufulu; koma pa chowinda siidzalandirika." 
Leviticus22:24 Nyama yofula, kapena chopwanya kapena chosansantha, kapena chotudzula, kapena chodula, musamabwera nazo kwa Yehova; inde musamachita ichi m'dziko mwanu." 
Leviticus22:25 Ndipo musamazilandira izi ku dzanja la mlendo ndi kubwera nazo zikhale chakudya cha Mulungu wanu; popeza zili nako kuvunda kwao; zili ndi chilema; sizidzalandirikira inu. 
Leviticus22:26 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus22:27 Zikamabadwa ng'ombe kapena nkhosa, kapena mbuzi, zikhale ndi make masiku asanu ndi awiri; kuyambira tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu ndi m'tsogolo mwake, idzalandirika ngati chopereka nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Leviticus22:28 Koma musamaipha ng'ombe kapena nkhosa pamodzi ndi mwana wake tsiku limodzimodzi. 
Leviticus22:29 Ndipo mukamaphera Yehova nsembe yoyamika, muiphere kuti mulandirike." 
Leviticus22:30 Idyedwe tsiku lomwelo; musamasiyako kufikira m'mawa; Ine ndine Yehova. 
Leviticus22:31 Potero muwasunge malamulo anga, ndi kuwachita; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus22:32 Musamaipsa dzina langa loyera; koma ndikhale woyera pakati pa ana a Israele; Ine ndine Yehova wakukupatulani," 
Leviticus22:33 amene ndinakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus23:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Nyengo zoikika za Yehova zimene muzilalikira zikhale masonkhano opatulika, ndizo nyengo zanga zoikika." 
Leviticus23:3 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi azigwira ntchito; koma lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndilo Sabata lakupumula, msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira ntchito konse; ndilo Sabata la Yehova m'nyumba zanu zonse." 
Leviticus23:4 Izi ndi nyengo zoikika za Yehova, masonkhano opatulika, zimene muzilalikira pa nyengo zoikika zao." 
Leviticus23:5 Mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mweziwo, madzulo, pali Paska wa Yehova." 
Leviticus23:6 Ndipo tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi womwewo ndilo chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa a Yehova; masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa. 
Leviticus23:7 Tsiku lake loyamba mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena. 
Leviticus23:8 Koma mubwere nayo kwa Yehova nsembe yamoto masiku asanu ndi awiri; pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri pakhale msonkhano wopatulika; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena. 
Leviticus23:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Leviticus23:10 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Mutakalowa m'dziko limene ndikupatsani, ndi kucheka dzinthu zake, pamenepo muzidza nao mtolo wa zipatso zoyamba za masika anu kwa wansembe;" 
Leviticus23:11 ndipo iye aweyule mtolowo pamaso pa Yehova, ulandirikire inu, tsiku lotsata Sabata wansembe aweyule." 
Leviticus23:12 Ndipo tsiku loweyula mtolowo, ukonze mwanawankhosa wopanda chilema, wa chaka chimodzi, akhale nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova." 
Leviticus23:13 Ndipo nsembe yaufa yake ikhale awiri a magawo khumi a efa wa ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya Yehova, ichite fungo lokoma; ndi nsembe yake yothira ikhale yavinyo, limodzi la magawo anai la hini." 
Leviticus23:14 Musamadya mkate, kapena tirigu wokazinga, kapena ngala zaziwisi, kufikira tsiku lomweli, kufikira mutadza nacho chopereka cha Mulungu wanu; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu m'nyumba zanu zonse." 
Leviticus23:15 Ndipo mudziwerengere kuyambira tsiku lotsata Sabata, kuyambira tsikuli mudadza nao mtolo wansembe yoweyula; pakhale masabata asanu ndi awiri amphumphu;" 
Leviticus23:16 muwerenge masiku makumi asanu kufikira tsiku lotsata sabata lachisanu ndi chiwiri; pamenepo mubwere nayo kwa Yehova nsembe ya ufa watsopano. 
Leviticus23:17 Mutuluke nayo m'zinyumba zanu mikate iwiri ya nsembe yoweyula, ikhale ya awiri a magawo khumi a efa; ikhale ya ufa wosalala, yopanga ndi chotupitsa, zipatso zoyamba za Yehova." 
Leviticus23:18 Ndipo mubwere nao pamodzi ndi mikate, anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri, opanda chilema a chaka chimodzi, ndi ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, ndi nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri; zikhale nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova, pamodzi ndi nsembe yao yaufa, ndi nsembe zao zothira, ndizo nsembe yamoto ya fungo lokoma la Yehova." 
Leviticus23:19 Mukonzenso mwanawambuzi mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo, ndi anaankhosa awiri a chaka chimodzi akhale nsembe yoyamika." 
Leviticus23:20 Ndi wansembe awaweyule, pamodzi ndi mkate wa zipatso zoyamba, nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova, pamodzi ndi anaankhosa awiriwo; zikhale zopatulikira Yehova, kuti zikhale za wansembe." 
Leviticus23:21 Ndipo mulalikire tsiku lomwelo; kuti mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena; ndilo lemba losatha m'nyumba zanu zonse, mwa mibadwo yanu yonse." 
Leviticus23:22 Ndipo pakukolola dzinthu za m'dziko mwanu, usamakololetsa m'mphepete mwa munda wako, nusamakunkha khunkha; uzisiyire wosauka ndi mlendo; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako." 
Leviticus23:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:24 Nena ndi ana a Israele, ndi kuti, Mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, tsiku loyamba la mweziwo, muzipumula, ndiko chikumbutso cha kuliza malipenga, msonkhano wopatulika." 
Leviticus23:25 Musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena; mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto ya Yehova. 
Leviticus23:26 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:27 Komatu, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi uwu wachisanu ndi chiwiri, ndilo tsiku la chitetezero; mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika, ndipo mudzichepetse; ndi kubwera nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus23:28 Musamagwira ntchito iliyonse tsiku limenelo; pakuti ndilo tsiku la chitetezero, kuchita chotetezera inu pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus23:29 Pakuti munthu aliyense wosadzichepetsa tsiku limenelo, amsadze kwa anthu a mtundu wake." 
Leviticus23:30 Ndi munthu aliyense wakugwira ntchito iliyonse tsiku limenelo, ndidzaononga munthuyo pakati pa anthu a mtundu wake." 
Leviticus23:31 Musamagwira ntchito iliyonse; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu, m'nyumba zanu zonse." 
Leviticus23:32 Likhale ndi inu Sabata lakupumula; ndipo mudzichepetse; tsiku lachisanu ndi chinai madzulo, kuyambira madzulo kufikira madzulo musunge Sabata lanu." 
Leviticus23:33 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:34 Nena ndi ana a Israele, kuti, Tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi uno wachisanu ndi chiwiri pali chikondwerero cha Misasa ya Yehova, masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Leviticus23:35 Tsiku loyamba likhale msonkhano wopatulika, musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena." 
Leviticus23:36 Masiku asanu ndi awiri mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova; tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; ndipo mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova; ndilo lotsirizira; musamagwira ntchito ya masiku ena. 
Leviticus23:37 Izi ndi nyengo zoikika za Yehova, zimene muzilalikira zikhale masonkhano opatulika, kukabwera nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova, nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe yaufa, nsembe yophera, ndi nsembe yothira, yonse pa tsiku lakelake;" 
Leviticus23:38 pamodzi ndi masabata a Yehova, ndi pamodzi ndi mphatso zanu, ndi pamodzi ndi zowinda zanu zonse, ndi pamodzi ndi zopereka zaufulu zanu, zimene muzipereka kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus23:39 Koma tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, mutatuta zipatso za m'dziko, muzisunga chikondwerero cha Yehova masiku asanu ndi awiri; tsiku loyamba mupumule, ndi tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu mupumule." 
Leviticus23:40 Ndipo tsiku loyambali mudzitengere nthambi za mitengo yokoma, nsomo za kanjedza, ndi nthambi za mitengo yovalira, ndi misondodzi ya kumtsinje; ndipo mukondwere pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Leviticus23:41 Ndipo musunge chikondwerero cha Yehova masiku asanu ndi awiri m'chaka; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu; musunge mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri. 
Leviticus23:42 Mukhale m'misasa masiku asanu ndi awiri; onse obadwa m'dziko mwa Israele akhale m'misasa; 
Leviticus23:43 kuti mibadwo yanu ikadziwe kuti ndinakhalitsa ana a Israele m'misasa, pamene ndinawatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus23:44 Ndipo Mose anafotokozera ana a Israele nyengo zoikika za Yehova. 
Leviticus24:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus24:2 Uza ana a Israele, kuti akutengere mafuta a azitona oyera opera akuunikira, kuti aziwalitsa nyali nthawi zonse." 
Leviticus24:3 Aroni aikonze kunja kwa nsalu yotchinga ya mboni, m'chihema chokomanako, kuyambira madzulo kufikira m'mawa, pamaso pa Yehova nthawi zonse; likhale lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu." 
Leviticus24:4 Akonze nyalizo pa choikapo nyali choona pamaso pa Yehova nthawi zonse. 
Leviticus24:5 Ndipo uzitenga ufa wosalala, ndi kuphika timitanda khumi ndi tiwiri; awiri a magawo khumi a efa afikane kamtanda kamodzi." 
Leviticus24:6 Ndipo utiike m'mizere iwiri, tisanu ndi kamodzi mzere umodzi, pa gome loyera, pamaso pa Yehova." 
Leviticus24:7 Nuike lubani loona ku mzere uliwonse, kuti likhale kumkate ngati chokumbutsa, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Leviticus24:8 Nthawi zonse tsiku la Sabata aukonze pamaso pa Yehova, chifukwa cha ana a Israele, ndilo pangano losatha." 
Leviticus24:9 Ndipo ukhale wa Aroni ndi ana ake, audye pamalo popatulika; pakuti auyese wopatulika kwambiri wochokera ku nsembe zamoto za Yehova; ndilo lemba losatha." 
Leviticus24:10 Ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi Wachiisraele, atate wake ndiye Mwejipito, anatuluka mwa ana a Israele; ndi mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi Wachiisraeleyo analimbana naye munthu Mwisraele kuchigono;" 
Leviticus24:11 ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi Wachiisraele anachitira Dzina mwano, natemberera; ndipo anadza naye kwa Mose. Dzina la mai wake ndiye Selomiti, mwana wa Dibiri, wa fuko la Dani." 
Leviticus24:12 Ndipo anamsunga m'kaidi, kuti awafotokozere m'mene anenere Yehova." 
Leviticus24:13 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Leviticus24:14 Tuluka naye wotembererayo kunja kwa chigono; ndipo onse adamumva aike manja ao pamutu pake, ndi khamu lonse limponye miyala afe." 
Leviticus24:15 Ndipo unene ndi ana a Israele, ndi kuti, Aliyense wotemberera Mulungu wake azisenza kuchimwa kwake." 
Leviticus24:16 Ndi iye wakuchitira mwano dzina la Yehova, amuphe ndithu; khamu lonse limponye miyala ndithu; mlendo ndi wobadwa m'dziko yemwe akachitira dzina la Yehova mwano, awaphe." 
Leviticus24:17 Munthu akakantha munthu mnzake aliyense kuti afe, amuphe ndithu." 
Leviticus24:18 Munthu akakantha nyama kuti ife, ambwezere ina; moyo kulipa moyo." 
Leviticus24:19 Munthu akachititsa mnansi wake chilema, monga umo anachitira momwemo amchitire iye;" 
Leviticus24:20 kuthyola kulipa kuthyola, diso kulipa diso, dzino kulipa dzino; monga umo anachitira munthu chilema, momwemo amchitire iye." 
Leviticus24:21 Iye wakukantha nyama kuti ife, ambwezere ina; iye wakupha munthu, amuphe." 
Leviticus24:22 Chiweruzo chanu chifanefane ndi mlendo ndi wobadwa m'dziko; pakuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus24:23 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israele, ndipo anatulutsa wotembererayo kunja kwa chigono, namponya miyala. Ndipo ana a Israele anachita monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Leviticus25:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'phiri la Sinai, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus25:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Mutakalowa m'dziko limene ndikupatsani, dzikoli lizisungira Yehova Sabata." 
Leviticus25:3 Zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi ubzale m'munda mwako, ndi zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi udzombole mphesa zako, ndi kucheka zipatso zake;" 
Leviticus25:4 koma chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri chikhale Sabata lakupumula la dziko, Sabata la Yehova; usamabzala m'munda mwako, usamadzombola mipesa yako." 
Leviticus25:5 Zophuka zokha zofikira masika usamazithyola, ndi mphesa za mipesa yako yosadzombola usazicheka; chikhale chaka chopumula dziko." 
Leviticus25:6 Ndipo Sabata la dzikoli likhale kwa inu la chakudya; kwa iwe, ndi mnyamata wako, ndi mdzakazi wako, ndi wolembedwa ntchito yako, ndi mlendo wako wakugonera kwanu;" 
Leviticus25:7 ndi ng'ombe zako, ndi nyama zili m'dziko lako; zipatso zake zonse zikhale chakudya chao." 
Leviticus25:8 Ndipo uziwerengera masabata a zaka asanu ndi awiri, zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kasanu ndi kawiri; kotero kuti zaka za masabata a zaka asanu ndi awiri, zifikire zaka makumi anai kudza zisanu ndi zinai." 
Leviticus25:9 Pamenepo uzitumizira lipenga lomveka m'mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, tsiku lakhumi la mweziwo; tsiku la chitetezero mutumizire lipenga lifikire m'dziko lanu lonse." 
Leviticus25:10 Ndipo muchipatule chaka cha makumi asanu, ndi kulalikira kwa onse okhala m'dzikomo kuti akhale aufulu; muchiyese chaka choliza lipenga; ndipo mubwerere munthu aliyense ku zakezake, ndipo mubwerere yense ku banja lake." 
Leviticus25:11 Muchiyese chaka cha makumi asanucho choliza lipenga, musamabzala, kapena kucheka zophuka zokha m'mwemo; kapena kucheka mphesa zake za mipesa yosadzombola." 
Leviticus25:12 Popeza ndicho chaka choliza lipenga; muchiyese chopatulika, mudye zipatso zake kunja kwa munda." 
Leviticus25:13 Chaka choliza lipenga ichi mubwerere nonse ku zakezake. 
Leviticus25:14 Ndipo ukagulitsa kanthu kwa mnansi wako, kapena kugula kanthu ka mnansi wako, musamasautsana;" 
Leviticus25:15 monga mwa kuwerenga kwake kwa zaka, chitapita choliza lipenga, uzigula kwa mnansi wako, ndi monga mwa kuwerenga kwa zaka za zipatso azigulitsa." 
Leviticus25:16 Monga mwa kuchuluka kwa zaka zake uonjeze mtengo wake, ndi monga mwa kuchepa kwa zaka zake uchepse mtengo wake; pakuti akugulitsa powerenga masiku ake." 
Leviticus25:17 Musamasautsana, koma uope Mulungu wako; popeza Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus25:18 M'mwemo muchite malemba anga, ndi kusunga maweruzo anga, ndi kuwachita; ndipo mudzakhala m'dzikomo okhazikika." 
Leviticus25:19 Dziko lidzaperekanso zipatso zake, ndipo mudzadya ndi kukhuta, ndi kukhalamo okhazikika." 
Leviticus25:20 Ndipo mukadzati, Tidzadyanji chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri? Taonani, sitidzabzala, sitidzakolola dzinthu;" 
Leviticus25:21 pamenepo ndidzauza dalitso langa litsike pa inu chaka chachisanu ndi chimodzi, ndipo chidzapatsa zipatso zofikira zaka zitatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Ndipo mubzale chaka chachisanu ndi chitatu, ndi kudya zipatso zasundwe; kufikira chaka chachisanu ndi chinai, mpaka zitacha zipatso zake mudzadya zasundwe." 
Leviticus25:23 Ndipo asaligulitse dziko chigulitsire; popeza dzikoli ndi langa; pakuti inu ndinu alendo akugonera ndi Ine. 
Leviticus25:24 Potero muzilola liomboledwe dziko lonse muli nalo. 
Leviticus25:25 Mbale wako akasaukira chuma, nakagulitsa chakechake, pamenepo mombolo wake, mbale wake weniweni azidza, naombole chimene mbale wake anagulitsacho." 
Leviticus25:26 Ndipo munthu akasowa mombolo, koma dzanja lake lachionetsa, nachipeza chofikira kuchiombola;" 
Leviticus25:27 pamenepo awerenge zaka za kugulitsa kwake, nabwezere wogulayo zotsalirapo nabwerere iye ku dziko lake." 
Leviticus25:28 Koma dzanja lake likapanda kupeza zofikira za kumbwezera, pamenepo chogulitsacho chikhale m'dzanja lake la iye adachigulayo, kufikira chaka choliza lipenga; koma chaka choliza lipenga chituluke, nabwerere iye ku dziko lake." 
Leviticus25:29 Munthu akagulitsa nyumba yogonamo, m'mudzi wa m'linga, aiombole chisanathe chaka choigulitsa; kufikira kutha chaka akhoza kuombola." 
Leviticus25:30 Ndipo akapanda kuiombola kufikira kutha kwake kwa chaka champhumphu, nyumba ili m'mudzi wa m'lingayi idzakhala yake ya iye adaigula yosamchokeranso mwa mibadwo yake; siidzatuluka chaka choliza lipenga." 
Leviticus25:31 Koma nyumba za m'midzi yopanda linga aziyese monga minda ya m'dziko; ziomboledwe, zituluke m'chaka choliza lipenga." 
Leviticus25:32 Kunena za midzi ya Alevi, nyumba za m'midzi yaoyao, Alevi akhoza kuziombola nthawi zonse." 
Leviticus25:33 Ndipo munthu akagula kwa Mlevi, nyumba yogulayo yokhala m'mudzi wakewake, ituluke m'chaka choliza lipenga, popeza nyumba za m'midzi ya Alevi ndizo zaozao mwa ana a Israele." 
Leviticus25:34 Koma dambo la podyera pao siligulika; popeza ndilo laolao kosatha. 
Leviticus25:35 Ndipo mbale wako akasaukira chuma, ndi dzanja lake lisowa; iwe uzimgwiriziza; akhale nawe monga mlendo wakugonera kwanu." 
Leviticus25:36 Usamambwezetsa phindu, kapena chionjezero; koma uope Mulungu wako; kuti mbale wako akhale nawe." 
Leviticus25:37 Musamampatsa ndalama zako polira phindu, kapena kumpatsa zakudya kuti aonjezerepo pochibwezera." 
Leviticus25:38 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndinakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, kukupatsani dziko la Kanani, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus25:39 Ndipo mbale wako akasaukira chuma, ndi kudzigulitsa kwa iwe; usamamgwiritsa ntchito monga kapolo;" 
Leviticus25:40 azikhala nawe ngati wolipidwa ntchito, ngati mlendo wako; akutumikire kufikira chaka choliza lipenga." 
Leviticus25:41 Pamenepo azituluka kukuchokera, iye ndi ana ake omwe, nabwerere ku mbumba yake; abwerere ku dziko laolao la makolo ake." 
Leviticus25:42 Pakuti iwo ndiwo atumiki anga, amene ndinawatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito; asamawagulitsa monga amagulitsa kapolo." 
Leviticus25:43 Usamamweruza momzunza; koma uope Mulungu wako. 
Leviticus25:44 Kunena za kapolo wako wamwamuna, kapena wamkazi amene ukhala nao; azikhala a amitundu akuzungulira inu, kwa iwowa muzigula akapolo aamuna ndi aakazi." 
Leviticus25:45 Muwagulenso ana a alendo akukhala mwa inu, a iwowa ndi a mabanja ao akukhala nanu, amene anabadwa m'dziko lanu; ndipo adzakhala anuanu." 
Leviticus25:46 Ndipo muwayese cholowa cha ana anu akudza m'mbuyo, akhale aoao; muwayese akapolo kosatha; koma za abale anu, ana a Israele, musamalamulirana mozunza." 
Leviticus25:47 Ndipo mlendo wakugonera kwanu akalemera chuma, ndi mbale wako wakukhala naye akasauka, nadzigulitsa kwa mlendo wakugonera kwanu, kapena kwa fuko la banja la mlendo;" 
Leviticus25:48 atatha kudzigulitsa, aomboledwe; wina wa abale ake amuombole;" 
Leviticus25:49 kapena mbale wa atate wake, kapena mwana wa mbale wa atate wake amuombole, kapena mbale wake aliyense wa banja lake amuombole; kapena akalemera chuma yekha adziombole yekha." 
Leviticus25:50 Ndipo awerengere amene anamgulayo kuyambira chaka adadzigulitsa kwa iye kufikira chaka choliza lipenga; ndipo mtengo wake ukhale monga mwa kuwerenga kwa zaka; amuyesere monga masiku a munthu wolipidwa. 
Leviticus25:51 Zikamtsalira zaka zambiri, monga mwa izi abwezere ndalama zakumuombola zochokera ku ndalama zomgulazo." 
Leviticus25:52 Ndipo zikamtsalira zaka pang'ono kufikira chaka choliza lipenga amwerengere; monga mwa zaka zake abwezere mtengo wake wakumuombola. 
Leviticus25:53 Akhale naye monga wolipidwa chaka ndi chaka; asamamlamulira momzunza pamaso pako. 
Leviticus25:54 Ndipo akapanda kumuombola motero, azituluka chaka choliza lipenga, iye ndi ana ake omwe." 
Leviticus25:55 Pakuti ana a Israele ndi atumiki anga; iwo ndiwo atumiki anga amene ndinawatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus26:1 Musamadzipangira mafano, kapena kudziutsira mafano osema, kapena choimiritsa, kapena kuika mwala wozokota m'dziko mwanu kuugwadira umene; popeza Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus26:2 Musunge masabata anga, ndi kuchitira ulemu malo anga opatulika; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus26:3 Mukamayenda m'malemba anga, ndi kusunga malamulo anga, ndi kuwachita;" 
Leviticus26:4 ndidzakupatsani mvula m'nyengo zake, ndi dziko lidzapereka zipatso zake, ndi mitengo ya m'minda idzabala zipatso zake." 
Leviticus26:5 Ndipo nyengo yopuntha tirigu idzafikira nyengo yotchera mphesa, ndi nyengo yotchera mphesa idzafikira nyengo zobzala; ndipo mudzakhuta nacho chakudya chanu, ndi kukhala m'dziko mwanu okhazikika." 
Leviticus26:6 Ndipo ndidzapatsa mtendere m'dzikomo, kuti mudzagone pansi, wopanda wina wakukuopsani; ndidzaletsanso zilombo zisakhale m'dzikomo, lupanga lomwe silidzapita m'dziko mwanu." 
Leviticus26:7 Mudzapirikitsa adani anu, ndipo adzagwa pamaso panu ndi lupanga." 
Leviticus26:8 Asanu a inu adzapirikitsa zana limodzi, ndi zana limodzi la inu adzapirikitsa zikwi khumi; ndi adani anu adzagwa pamaso panu ndi lupanga." 
Leviticus26:9 Ndipo ndidzatembenukira kwa inu, ndi kukubalitsani, ndi kukuchulukitsani; ndipo ndidzakhazika chipangano changa ndinapangana nanucho." 
Leviticus26:10 Ndipo mudzadya za sundwe wakale ndi kutulutsa zakale chifukwa cha zatsopano. 
Leviticus26:11 Ndidzamanga Kachisi wanga pakati pa inu, ndipo moyo wanga sudzanyansidwa nanu." 
Leviticus26:12 Ndipo ndidzayendayenda pakati pa inu, ndi kukhala Mulungu wanu ndi inu mudzakhala anthu anga." 
Leviticus26:13 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndinakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, kuti musakhale akapolo ao; ndipo ndinathyola mitengo ya magoli anu, ndi kukuyendetsani choweramuka." 
Leviticus26:14 Koma mukapanda kundimvera Ine, osachita malamulo awa onse;" 
Leviticus26:15 ndipo mukakaniza malemba anga, ndi moyo wanu ukanyansidwa nao maweruzo anga, kotero kuti simudzachita malamulo anga onse, koma kuthyola chipangano changa;" 
Leviticus26:16 ndidzachitira inu ichinso; ndidzakuikirani zoopsa, nthenda yoondetsa ya m'chifuwa ndi malungo, zakulanda maso ndi mphamvu, ndi kuzunza moyo; ndipo mudzabzala mbeu zanu chabe, popeza adani anu adzazidya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndipo nkhope yanga idzatsutsana nanu; kuti adani anu adzakukanthani, ndipo akudana ndi inu adzachita ufumu pa inu ndipo mudzathawa wopanda wakukulondolani." 
Leviticus26:18 Ndipo mukapanda kundimvera, zingakhale izi, ndidzaonjeza kukulangani kasanu ndi kawiri chifukwa cha zochimwa zanu." 
Leviticus26:19 Popeza ndidzathyola mphamvu yanu yodzikuza; ndi kusandutsa thambo lanu likhale ngati chitsulo ndi dziko lanu ngati mkuwa; 
Leviticus26:20 ndipo mudzachita nayo mphamvu yanu chabe; ndi nthaka yanu siidzapereka zipatso zake, ndi mitengo ya m'dziko siidzabala zobala zake." 
Leviticus26:21 Ndipo mukayenda motsutsana nane, osalola kumvera Ine; ndidzakuonjezerani miliri kasanu ndi kawiri, monga mwa zochimwa zanu." 
Leviticus26:22 Popeza ndidzatumiza chilombo cha kuthengo pakati pa inu, ndipo chidzalanda ana anu, ndi kuononga zoweta zanu nichidzachepetsa inu kuti mukhale pang'ono; ndi njira zanu zidzakhala zakufa." 
Leviticus26:23 Ndipo mukapanda kulangika nazo ndi kubwera kwa Ine, mukayenda motsutsana ndi Ine;" 
Leviticus26:24 Inenso ndidzayenda motsutsana ndi inu; ndipo ndidzakukanthani Inedi kasanu ndi kawiri chifukwa cha zoipa zanu. 
Leviticus26:25 Ndipo ndidzadzetsa kwa inu lupanga lakuchita chilango cha chipangano; kotero kuti mudzasonkhanidwa m'midzi mwanu; ndipo ndidzatumiza mliri pakati pa inu; ndipo mudzaperekedwa m'manja mwa mdani. 
Leviticus26:26 Pamene ndithyola mchirikizo wanu wa mkate, akazi khumi adzaphika mkate wanu mu mchembo umodzi, nadzabweza mkate wanu ndi kuuyesa; ndipo mudzadya, koma osakhuta." 
Leviticus26:27 Ndipo mukapanda kundimvera Ine, chingakhale ichi, ndi kuyenda motsutsana nane;" 
Leviticus26:28 Ine ndidzayenda nanu motsutsana mwa kukuzazirani, ndi kukulangani Inedi kasanu ndi kawiri chifukwa cha zochimwa zanu." 
Leviticus26:29 Ndipo mudzadya nyama ya ana anu amuna; inde nyama ya ana anu akazi mudzaidya. 
Leviticus26:30 Ndipo ndidzaononga malo amsanje anu, ndi kulikha zoimiritsa zanu za dzuwa, ndi kuponya mitembo yanu pa mitembo ya mafano anu; ndi moyo wanga udzanyansidwa nanu." 
Leviticus26:31 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa midzi yanu bwinja, ndi kupasula malo anu opatulika, wosanunkhiza Ine za fungo lanu lokoma." 
Leviticus26:32 Inde, ndidzapasula dzikoli, ndipo adani anu akukhala m'mwemo adzadabwa nako." 
Leviticus26:33 Ndipo ndidzabalalitsa inu mwa amitundu, ndi kusolola lupanga kukutsatani; ndi dziko lanu lidzakhala lopasuka, ndi midzi yanu idzakhala bwinja." 
Leviticus26:34 Pamenepo dzikoli lidzakondwera nao masabata ake, masiku onse a kupasuka kwake, pokhala inu m'dziko la adani anu; pamenepo dziko lidzapumula, ndi kukondwera nao masabata ake." 
Leviticus26:35 Masiku onse a kupasuka kwake lipumula; ndiko mpumulo udalisowa m'masabata anu, pokhala inu pamenepo." 
Leviticus26:36 Kunena za iwo akutsalira, ndidzalonga kukomoka kumtima kwao m'maiko a adani ao; ndi liu la tsamba lotengeka ndi mphepo lidzawapirikitsa; ndipo adzathawa monga amathawa lupanga; ndipo adzagwa wopanda wakuwalondola." 
Leviticus26:37 Ndipo adzakhumudwitsana monga pothawa lupanga, wopanda wakuwalondola; ndipo mudzakhala opanda mphamvu yakuima pamaso pa adani anu." 
Leviticus26:38 Ndipo mudzatayika mwa amitundu, ndi dziko la adani anu lidzakudyani." 
Leviticus26:39 Ndipo otsala mwa inu adzazunzika m'moyo ndi mphulupulu zao m'maiko a adani anu; ndiponso ndi mphulupulu za makolo ao adzazunzika m'moyo. 
Leviticus26:40 Pamenepo adzavomereza mphulupulu zao, ndi mphulupulu za makolo ao, pochita zosakhulupirika pa Ine; ndiponso popeza anayenda motsutsana ndi Ine," 
Leviticus26:41 Inenso ndinayenda motsutsana nao, ndi kuwatengera ku dziko la adani ao. Ngati tsono mtima wao wosadulidwa udzichepetsa, ndipo avomereza kulanga kwa mphulupulu zao;" 
Leviticus26:42 pamenepo ndidzakumbukira pangano langa ndi Yakobo; ndiponso pangano langa ndi Isaki, ndiponso pangano langa ndi Abrahamu ndidzakumbukira; ndipo ndidzakumbukira dzikoli." 
Leviticus26:43 Dziko lomwe lidzasiyidwa nao, ndi kukondwera ndi masabata ake, pokhala lopasuka, iwowa palibe; ndipo iwo adzavomereza kulanga kwa mphulupulu zao; popeza, inde popeza anakaniza maweruzo anga, ndi moyo wao unanyansidwa nao malemba anga." 
Leviticus26:44 Ndiponso pali ichinso: pokhala iwo m'dziko la adani ao sindidzawakaniza, kapena kunyansidwa nao, kuwaononga konse, ndi kuthyola pangano langa ndinapangana nao; popeza Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Leviticus26:45 Koma chifukwa cha iwo ndidzawakumbukira pangano la makolo ao, amene ndinawatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito pamaso pa amitundu, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wao; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus26:46 Awa ndi malemba ndi maweruzo ndi malamulo amene Yehova anaika pakati pa Iye ndi ana a Israele m'phiri la Sinai, ndi dzanja la Mose." 
Leviticus27:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus27:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Pamene munthu achita chowinda cha padera, anthuwo azikhala a Yehova monga mwa kuyesa kwako." 
Leviticus27:3 Ukayesa wamwamuna wa zaka makumi awiri kufikira wina wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi, uziwayesera a masekeli makumi asanu a siliva, monga mwa sekeli wa malo opatulika." 
Leviticus27:4 Koma akakhala wamkazi, umuyesere wa masekeli makumi atatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Akakhala munthu wa zaka zisanu kufikira wina wa zaka makumi awiri uwayesere, wamwamuna wa masekeli makumi awiri, ndi wamkazi wa masekeli khumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Akakhala mwana wa mwezi umodzi kufikira zaka zisanu, uziwayesera wamwamuna wa masekeli asanu a siliva, ndi wamkazi wa masekeli atatu a siliva." 
Leviticus27:7 Akakhala munthu wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi mphambu, akakhala wamwamuna, umuyesere wa masekeli khumi ndi asanu, akakhala wamkazi wa masekeli khumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Koma chuma chake chikapanda kufikira kuyesa kwako, amuike pamaso pa wansembe, kuti wansembeyo amuyese; ndipo wansembeyo amuyese, monga akhoza iye amene anawinda." 
Leviticus27:9 Ndipo chikakhala cha nyama imene anthu amabwera nayo ikhale chopereka cha Yehova, zonse zotere munthu akazipereka kwa Yehova zikhale zopatulika." 
Leviticus27:10 Asaisinthe, yokoma m'malo mwa yoipa, kapena yoipa m'malo mwa yokoma; ndipo akasinthadi nyama m'malo mwa inzake, pamenepo iyo ndi yosinthikayo zikhale zopatulika." 
Leviticus27:11 Ndipo chikakhala cha nyama yodetsa, imene sabwera nayo ikhale chopereka cha Yehova, aike nyamayi pamaso pa wansembe;" 
Leviticus27:12 ndipo wansembeyo aiyese mtengo wake, ingakhale yokoma kapena yoipa; monga uiyesa wansembewe, momwemo." 
Leviticus27:13 Ndipo akaiombola ndithu, pamenepo aonjezepo limodzi la magawo asanu la mtengo wake." 
Leviticus27:14 Munthu akapatula nyumba yake ikhale yopatulika kwa Yehova, wansembe aziiyesa mtengo wake, ingakhale yokoma kapena yoipa; monga wansembeyo aiyesa, ikhale momwemo." 
Leviticus27:15 Ndipo iye wakuipatula akaombola nyumba yake, aonjezepo limodzi la magawo asanu la ndalama za kuyesa kwako, ndipo idzakhala yake." 
Leviticus27:16 Munthu akapatulirako Yehova munda wakewake, uziuyesa monga mwa mbeu zake zikakhala; homeri wa barele uuyese wa masekeli makumi asanu a siliva." 
Leviticus27:17 Akapatula munda wake kuyambira chaka choliza lipenga, mundawo ukhale monga momwe unauyesera." 
Leviticus27:18 Akaupatula munda wake chitapita chaka choliza lipenga, wansembe azimwerengera ndalama monga mwa zaka zotsalira kufikira chaka choliza lipenga, nazichepsako pa kuyesa kwako." 
Leviticus27:19 Ndipo wakupatula mundayo akauomboladi, aonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu la ndalama za kuyesa kwako, ndipo uzikhalitsa wake." 
Leviticus27:20 Koma akapanda kuombola mundawo, kapena atagulitsa mundawo kwa munthu wina, suomboledwanso;" 
Leviticus27:21 koma potuluka m'chaka choliza lipenga, mundawo ukhale wopatulikira Yehova, ngati munda woperekedwa chiperekere kwa Mulungu; ukhale wakewake wa wansembe." 
Leviticus27:22 Ndipo akapatulira Yehova munda woti adaugula, wosati wogawako ku munda wakewake;" 
Leviticus27:23 pamenepo wansembeyo amwerengere mtengo wake wa kuyesa kwako kufikira chaka choliza lipenga; ndipo apereke kuyesa kwako tsiku lomwelo, chikhale chinthu chopatulikira Yehova." 
Leviticus27:24 Chaka choliza lipenga mundawo ubwerere kwa iye amene adaugulitsa, kwa iye amene dzikoli ndi lakelake." 
Leviticus27:25 Ndipo kuyesa kwako konse kukhale monga mwa sekeli wa malo opatulika sekeli ndi magera makumi awiri. 
Leviticus27:26 Komatu woyamba kubadwa mwa nyama akhale wobadwa woyamba wa Yehova, munthu asampatule; ingakhale ng'ombe ingakhale nkhosa, ndiye wa Yehova." 
Leviticus27:27 Koma akakhala wa nyama zodetsa, azimuombola monga mwa kuyesa kwako, naonjezepo limodzi la magawo asanu la mtengo wake; ndipo akapanda kumuombola, amgulitse monga mwa kuyesa kwako." 
Leviticus27:28 Koma asachigulitse kapena kuchiombola chinthu choperekedwa chiperekere kwa Mulungu, chimene munthu achipereka chiperekere kwa Yehova, chotengako ku zonse ali nazo, ngakhale munthu, kapena nyama, kapena munda wakewake; chilichonse choperekedwa chiperekere kwa Mulungu nchopatulika kwambiri." 
Leviticus27:29 Asamuombole munthu woperekedwa chiperekere kwa Mulungu; amuphe ndithu. 
Leviticus27:30 Limodzi mwa magawo khumi la zonse m'dziko, la mbeu zake za dziko, la zipatso za mtengo, ndilo la Yehova; likhale lopatulikira Yehova." 
Leviticus27:31 Koma munthu akaombolatu kanthu ka limodzi la magawo khumiwo aonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu. 
Leviticus27:32 Ndipo limodzi la magawo khumi lonse la ng'ombe, kapena la nkhosa, kapena la mbuzi, zilizonse zimapita pansi pa ndodo, limodzi la magawo khumi likhala lopatulikira Yehova." 
Leviticus27:33 Asafunse ngati yabwino kapena yoipa, kapena kuisintha; koma akaisinthatu, pamenepo iyo ndi yosinthikayo zikhale zopatulika zonse ziwiri; asamaiombola." 
Leviticus27:34 Awa ndi malamulo, amene Yehova anauza Mose, awauze ana a Israele, m'phiri la Sinai." 
Numbers1:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'chipululu cha Sinai, m'chihema chokomanako, tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachiwiri, chaka chachiwiri atatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kuti," 
Numbers1:2 Werenga khamu lonse la ana a Israele, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba ya makolo ao ndi kuwerenga maina ao, amuna onse mmodzimmodzi." 
Numbers1:3 Iwe ndi Aroni muwawerenge monga mwa magulu ao, onse m'Israele akutuluka ku nkhondo, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu." 
Numbers1:4 Ndipo pamodzi ndi inu pakhale munthu mmodzi wa mafuko onse; yense mkulu wa nyumba ya kholo lake. 
Numbers1:5 Ndipo maina a amuna amene aime nanu ndi awa: wa Rubeni, Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri." 
Numbers1:6 Wa Simeoni, Selumiele mwana wa Zurishadai." 
Numbers1:7 Wa Yuda, Nasoni mwana wa Aminadabu." 
Numbers1:8 Wa Isakara, Netanele mwana wa Zuwara." 
Numbers1:9 Wa Zebuloni, Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni." 
Numbers1:10 Wa ana a Yosefe: wa Efuremu, Elisama mwana wa Amihudi; wa Manase, Gamaliele mwana wa Pedazuri." 
Numbers1:11 Wa Benjamini, Abidani mwana wa Gideoni." 
Numbers1:12 Wa Dani, Ahiyezere mwana wa Amisadai." 
Numbers1:13 Wa Asere, Pagiyele mwana wa Okarani." 
Numbers1:14 Wa Gadi, Eliyasafu mwana wa Deuwele." 
Numbers1:15 Wa Nafutali, Ahira mwana wa Enani." 
Numbers1:16 Iwo ndiwo oitanidwa a khamu, akalonga a mafuko a makolo ao; ndiwo akulu a zikwizo za Israele." 
Numbers1:17 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anatenga anthu awa, onenedwa maina ao;" 
Numbers1:18 nasonkhanitsa khamu lonse tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachiwiri, ndipo iwo anawakumbira magwero ao kutchula mabanja ao, ndi nyumba za makolo ao, ndi kuwerenga maina kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu mmodzimmodzi." 
Numbers1:19 Monga Yehova anauza Mose, momwemo anawawerenga m'chipululu cha Sinai." 
Numbers1:20 Ndipo ana a Rubeni, mwana woyamba wa Israele, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina mmodzimmodzi, amuna onse kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:21 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Rubeni, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers1:22 A ana a Simeoni, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, owerengedwa ao, powerenga maina mmodzimmodzi, amuna onse kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:23 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Simeoni, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi zinai kudza mazana atatu." 
Numbers1:24 A ana a Gadi, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:25 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Gadi, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu." 
Numbers1:26 A ana a Yuda, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:27 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Yuda, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu zinai kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
Numbers1:28 A ana a Isakara, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:29 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Isakara, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zinai kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:30 A ana a Zebuloni, kubadwa kwao, monga nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:31 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Zebuloni, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:32 A ana a Yosefe, ndiwo a ana a Efuremu, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:33 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Efuremu, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers1:34 A ana a Manase, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:35 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Manase, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana awiri." 
Numbers1:36 A ana a Benjamini, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:37 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Benjamini, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:38 A ana a Dani, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:39 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Dani, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers1:40 A ana a Asere, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:41 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Asere, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu chimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers1:42 A ana a Nafutali, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:43 owerengedwa ao a fuko la Nafutali, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zitatu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:44 Iwo ndiwo amene anawerengedwa, amene Mose anawerenga pamodzi ndi Aroni, ndi akalonga a Israele, ndiwo amuna khumi ndi awiri; yense kunenera nyumba ya kholo lake." 
Numbers1:45 Potero owerengedwa onse a ana a Israele monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akutulukira kunkhondo m'Israele;" 
Numbers1:46 inde owerengedwa onse ndiwo zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi makumi asanu. 
Numbers1:47 Koma Alevi monga mwa fuko la makolo ao sanawerengedwe mwa iwo. 
Numbers1:48 Popeza Yehova adalankhula ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers1:49 Fuko la Levi lokha usaliwerenge, kapena kuona kufikira kwao mwa ana a Israele;" 
Numbers1:50 koma iwe, uike Alevi asunge Kachisi wa mboni, ndi zipangizo zake zonse, ndi zonse ali nazo; azinyamula Kachisi, ndi zipangizo zake zonse; namtumikire, namange mahema ao pozungulira pa Kachisi." 
Numbers1:51 Ndipo akati amuke naye Kachisiyo, Alevi amgwetse, ndipo akati ammange, Alevi amuimike; ndipo mlendo akayandikizako amuphe." 
Numbers1:52 Ndipo ana a Israele amange mahema ao, yense ku chigono chake, ndi yense ku mbendera yake, monga mwa makamu ao." 
Numbers1:53 Koma Alevi amange mahema ao pozungulira pa Kachisi wa mboni, kuti mkwiyo ungagwere khamu la ana a Israele; ndipo Alevi azidikira Kachisi wa mboni." 
Numbers1:54 Momwemo ana a Israele anachita monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose; anachita momwemo. 
Numbers2:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers2:2 Ana a Israele azimanga mahema ao yense ku mbendera yake, ya chizindikiro cha nyumba ya kholo lake; amange mahema ao popenyana ndi chihema chokomanako pozungulira." 
Numbers2:3 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao ku m'mawa kotuluka dzuwa ndiwo a mbendera ya chigono cha Yuda, monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana Yuda ndiye Nasoni mwana wa Aminadabu." 
Numbers2:4 Ndipo khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri, mphambu zinai, kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
Numbers2:5 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Isakara; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Isakara ndiye Netanele mwana wa Zuwara. 
Numbers2:6 Ndipo khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zinai kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:7 Ndi fuko la Zebuloni: kalonga wa ana a Zebuloni ndiye Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni. 
Numbers2:8 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:9 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Yuda ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi chimodzi mphambu mazana anai, monga mwa makamu ao. Ndiwo azitsogolera ulendo." 
Numbers2:10 Mbendera ya chigono cha Rubeni ikhale kumwera monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Rubeni ndiye Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri. 
Numbers2:11 Ndi khamu lake, ndi olembedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers2:12 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Simeoni; ndi kalonga wa ana a Simeoni ndiye Selumiele mwana wa Zurishadai. 
Numbers2:13 Ndi khamu lake ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi zinai kudza mazana atatu." 
Numbers2:14 Ndi fuko la Gadi; kalonga wa ana a Gadi ndiye Eliyasafu mwana wa Reuwele. 
Numbers2:15 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu." 
Numbers2:16 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Rubeni ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi chimodzi kudza mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu, monga mwa makamu ao. Ndiwo azitsatana nao otsogolerawo." 
Numbers2:17 Pamenepo khamu la Alevi azimuka nacho chihema chokomanako, pakati pa makamu; monga amamanga mahema ao, momwemo azimuka ulendo wao, munthu yense pamalo pake, monga mwa mbendera zao." 
Numbers2:18 Mbendera ya chigono cha Efuremu izikhala kumadzulo monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Efuremu ndiye Elisama mwana wa Amihudi. 
Numbers2:19 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers2:20 Ndipo oyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Manase; ndi kalonga wa ana a Manase ndiye Gamaliele mwana wa Pedazuri. 
Numbers2:21 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana awiri." 
Numbers2:22 Ndi fuko la Benjamini: kalonga wa ana a Benjamini ndiye Abidani mwana wa Gideoni. 
Numbers2:23 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:24 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Efuremu ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu kudza zana limodzi, monga mwa makamu ao. Iwo ndiwo aziyenda gulu lachitatu paulendo." 
Numbers2:25 Mbendera ya chigono cha Dani izikhala kumpoto monga mwa makamu ao; ndi kalonga wa ana a Dani ndiye Ahiyezere mwana wa Amisadai. 
Numbers2:26 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers2:27 Ndipo iwo a kumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a fuko la Asere; ndi kalonga wa ana a Asere ndiye Pagiyele mwana wa Okarani. 
Numbers2:28 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu chimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers2:29 Ndi fuko la Nafutali: ndi kalonga wa ana a Nafutali ndiye Ahira mwana wa Enani. 
Numbers2:30 Ndi khamu lake, ndi owerengedwa ake, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zitatu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:31 Owerengedwa onse a chigono cha Dani ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi. Iwo ndiwo aziyenda m'mbuyo paulendo, monga mwa mbendera zao." 
Numbers2:32 Amenewo ndiwo anawerengedwa a ana a Israele monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao; owerengedwa onse a m'zigono, monga mwa makamu ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi kasanu ndi kamodzi mphambu zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi makumi asanu." 
Numbers2:33 Koma sanawerenge Alevi mwa ana a Israele; monga Yehova adauza Mose. 
Numbers2:34 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose, momwemo anamanga mahema ao pa mbendera zao, momwemonso anayenda paulendo, yense monga mwa mabanja ake, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ake." 
Numbers3:1 Mibadwo ya Aroni ndi Mose, tsiku lija Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'phiri la Sinai, ndi iyo." 
Numbers3:2 Ndipo maina ao a ana amuna a Aroni ndi awa: Woyamba Nadabu, ndi Abihu, Eleazara, ndi Itamara." 
Numbers3:3 Awa ndi maina a ana amuna a Aroni, ansembe odzozedwawo, amene anawadzaza manja ao achite ntchito ya nsembe." 
Numbers3:4 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu anafa pamaso pa Yehova muja anabwera nao moto wachilendo pamaso pa Yehova, m'chipululu cha Sinai, ndipo analibe ana; koma Eleazara ndi Itamara anachita ntchito ya nsembe pamaso pa atate wao Aroni." 
Numbers3:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers3:6 Sendera nalo kuno fuko la Levi, ndi kuwaika pamaso pa Aroni wansembe, kuti amtumikire." 
Numbers3:7 Ndipo azisunga udikiro wake, ndi udikiro wa khamu lonse pa khomo la chihema chokomanako, kuchita ntchito ya Kachisi." 
Numbers3:8 Ndipo asunge zipangizo zonse za chihema chokomanako, ndi udikiro wa ana a Israele, kuichita ntchito ya Kachisi." 
Numbers3:9 Ndipo uzipereka Alevi kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ake amuna; apatsidwa kwa iye ndithu, ochokera kwa ana a Israele." 
Numbers3:10 Koma uike Aroni ndi ana ake amuna, azisunga ntchito yao ya nsembe; ndi mlendo wakusendera pafupi amuphe." 
Numbers3:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers3:12 Ndipo taonani, Ine ndatenga Alevi kuwachotsa pakati pa ana a Israele m'malo mwa ana oyamba onse, oyamba kubadwa mwa ana a Israele; ndipo Aleviwo ndi anga." 
Numbers3:13 Pakuti ana oyamba onse ndi anga; tsiku lija ndinakantha ana oyamba onse m'dziko la Ejipito ndinadzipatulira ana oyamba onse m'Israele, kuyambira munthu kufikira choweta; ndiwo anga; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Numbers3:14 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'chipululu cha Sinai, nati" 
Numbers3:15 Werenga ana a Levi monga mwa nyumba ya makolo ao, monga mwa mabanja ao; uwawerenge mwamuna yense wa mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu." 
Numbers3:16 Ndipo Mose anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova, monga adamuuza." 
Numbers3:17 Ndipo ana a Levi maina ao ndi awa: Geresoni, ndi Kohati ndi Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Ndi ana a Geresoni maina ao ndi awa, monga mwa mabanja ao: Libini, ndi Simei." 
Numbers3:19 Ndi ana a Kohati monga mwa mabanja ao: Amuramu ndi Izihara, Hebroni ndi Uziyele." 
Numbers3:20 Ndi ana a Merari monga mwa mabanja ao: Mali ndi Musi. Awa ndi mabanja a Alevi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao. 
Numbers3:21 Banja la Libini, ndi mabanja a Simei, ndiwo a Geresoni; ndiwo mabanja a Geresoni." 
Numbers3:22 Owerengedwa ao, powawerenga amuna onse, kuyambira mwana wa mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu, owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers3:23 Mabanja a Ageresoni azimanga mahema ao pambuyo pa Kachisi kumadzulo. 
Numbers3:24 Ndipo kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo a Ageresoni ndiye Eliyasafu mwana wa Laele. 
Numbers3:25 Ndipo udikiro wa ana a Geresoni m'chihema, chokomanako ndiwo Kachisi, ndi chihema, chophimba chake, ndi nsalu yotsekera pa khomo la chihema chokomanako," 
Numbers3:26 ndi nsalu zotchinga za kubwalo, ndi nsalu yotsekera pa chipata cha pabwalo, lokhala ku Kachisi, ndi ku guwa la nsembe pozungulira, ndi zingwe zake za ku ntchito zake zonse." 
Numbers3:27 Banja la Aamuramu, ndi banja la Aizihara, ndi banja la Ahebroni, ndi banja la Auziyele ndiwo a Kohati; ndiwo mabanja a Akohati." 
Numbers3:28 Powawerenga amuna onse, kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi, akusunga udikiro wa pa malo opatulika." 
Numbers3:29 Mabanja a ana a Kohati azimanga mahema ao pa mbali ya Kachisi ya kumwera. 
Numbers3:30 Ndipo kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo ao ya mabanja a Akohati ndiye Elizafani mwana wa Uziyele. 
Numbers3:31 Ndipo udikiro wao ndiwo likasa, ndi gome, ndi choikapo nyali, ndi magome a nsembe, ndi zipangizo za malo opatulika zimene achita nazo, ndi nsalu yotchinga, ndi ntchito zake zonse." 
Numbers3:32 Ndipo kalonga wa akalonga a Alevi ndiye Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembeyo; ndiye aziyang'anira osunga udikiro wa pa malo opatulika. 
Numbers3:33 Banja la Amali, ndi banja la Amusi ndiwo a Merari; ndiwo mabanja a Merari." 
Numbers3:34 Ndipo owerengedwa ao, powerenga amuna onse, kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu, ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi chimodzi kudza mazana awiri." 
Numbers3:35 Ndi kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo ya mabanja la Merari ndiye Zuriyele mwana wa Abihaili; azimanga mahema ao pa mbali ya Kachisi ya kumpoto. 
Numbers3:36 Ndipo choyang'anira iwo, udikiro wao wa ana a Merari ndiwo matabwa a Kachisi, ndi mitanda yake, ndi mizati ndi nsanamira zake, ndi makamwa ake, ndi zipangizo zake zonse, ndi ntchito zake zonse;" 
Numbers3:37 ndi nsichi za pabwalo pozungulira, ndi makamwa ake, ndi zichiri zake, ndi zingwe zake." 
Numbers3:38 Ndipo amene adamanga mahema ao pa khomo la Kachisi, kum'mawa, pa khomo la chihema chokomanako kotulukira dzuwa, ndiwo Mose ndi Aroni, ndi ana ake amuna, akusunga udikiro wa malo opatulika, ndiwo udikiro wa ana a Israele; koma mlendo wakuyandikizako amuphe." 
Numbers3:39 Owerengedwa onse a Alevi, adawawerenga Mose ndi Aroni, powauza Yehova, monga mwa mabanja ao, amuna mphambu, ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri." 
Numbers3:40 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Werenga amuna oyamba kubadwa onse a ana a Israele kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu nuone chiwerengo cha maina ao." 
Numbers3:41 Ndipo unditengere Ine Alevi (Ine ndine Yehova) m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israele; ndi ng'ombe za Alevi m'malo mwa zoyamba kubadwa zonse mwa ng'ombe za ana a Israele. 
Numbers3:42 Ndipo Mose anawawerenga, monga Yehova adamuuza, oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israele." 
Numbers3:43 Ndipo amuna onse oyamba kubadwa, powerenga maina, kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu, owerengedwa ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu atatu." 
Numbers3:44 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers3:45 Landira Alevi m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israele, ndi ng'ombe za Alevi m'malo mwa ng'ombe zao; ndipo Alevi azikhala anga; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Numbers3:46 Kunena za mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza atatuwo oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israele, akuposa Alevi, akaomboledwe," 
Numbers3:47 ulandire masekeli asanu pa munthu mmodzi; uwalandire pa muyeso wa sekeli wa malo opatulika (sekeli ndiwo magera makumi awiri); 
Numbers3:48 nupereke ndalama zimene akuposawo anaomboledwa nazo kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ake amuna. 
Numbers3:49 Pamenepo Mose analandira ndalama zoombola nazo kwa iwo akuposa aja adawaombola Alevi; 
Numbers3:50 analandira ndalamazo kwa oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israele; masekeli chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu asanu, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika." 
Numbers3:51 Ndipo Mose anapatsa Aroni ndi ana ake ndalama zoombola nazo monga mwa mau a Yehova, monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers4:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers4:2 Werengani ana a Kohati pakati pa ana a Levi, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:3 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu, kufikira zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kuti agwire ntchito ya chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers4:4 Ntchito ya ana a Kohati m'chihema chokomanako ndi iyi, kunena za zinthu zopatulika kwambiri:" 
Numbers4:5 akati amuke a m'chigono, Aroni ndi ana ake amuna azilowa, natsitse nsalu yotchinga, ndi kuphimba nayo likasa la mboni," 
Numbers4:6 ndi kuikapo chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu; ndi kuyalapo nsalu yamadzi yeniyeni, ndi kupisako mphiko zake." 
Numbers4:7 Ndi pa gome la mkate woonekera ayale nsalu yamadzi, naikepo mbale zake, ndi zipande, ndi mitsuko, ndi zikho zakuthira nazo; mkate wa chikhalire uzikhalaponso." 
Numbers4:8 Ndipo ayale pa izi nsalu yofiira, ndi kuliphimba ndi chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kupisako mphiko zake." 
Numbers4:9 Ndipo atenge nsalu yamadzi, ndi kuphimba choikapo nyali younikira, ndi nyali zake, ndi mbano zake, ndi zoolera zake, ndi zotengera zake zonse za mafuta zogwira nazo ntchito yake." 
Numbers4:10 Ndipo achimange ndi chipangizo zake zonse m'chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kuziika pa chonyamulira." 
Numbers4:11 Ndipo pa guwa la nsembe lagolide aziyala nsalu ya madzi, naliphimbe ndi chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kupisako mphiko zake." 
Numbers4:12 Natenge zipangizo zake zonse za utumiki, zimene atumikira nazo m'malo opatulika, nazimange m'nsalu yamadzi, ndi kuziphimba ndi chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kuziika pachonyamulira." 
Numbers4:13 Ndipo azichotsa mapulusa pa guwa la nsembe, ndi kuyala pa ilo nsalu yofiirira." 
Numbers4:14 Naikepo zipangizo zake zonse, zimene atumikira nazo pamenepo, mbale za zofukiza, mitungo, ndi zoolera, ndi mbale zowazira, zipangizo zonse za guwa la nsembe; nayalepo chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kupisako mphiko zake." 
Numbers4:15 Atatha Aroni ndi ana ake amuna kuphimba malo opatulika, ndi zipangizo zake zonse za malo opatulika, pofuna kumuka am'chigono; atatero, ana a Kohati adze kuzinyamula; koma asakhudze zopatulikazo, kuti angafe. Zinthu izi ndizo akatundu a ana a Kohati adze m'chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers4:16 Ndipo zoyang'anira Eleazara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe, ndizo mafuta a nyaliyo, ndi chofukiza cha fungo lokoma, ndi nsembe yaufa kosalekeza, ndi mafuta odzoza, udikiro wa Kachisi opatulika, ndi zipangizo zake." 
Numbers4:17 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers4:18 Musamasadza fuko la mabanja a Kohati kuwachotsa pakati pa Alevi; 
Numbers4:19 koma muzitero nao kuti akhale ndi moyo, osafa ai, poyandikiza iwo zopatulika kwambirizo; Aroni ndi ana ake amuna alowe, namuikire munthu yense ntchito yake ndi katundu wake." 
Numbers4:20 Koma asalowe kukaona zopatulikazo pozikulunga, kuti angafe." 
Numbers4:21 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers4:22 Werenganso ana a Geresoni, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Numbers4:23 Uwawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu, kufikira a zaka makumi asanu; onse akulowa kutumikira utumikiwo, kuchita ntchitoyi m'chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers4:24 Ntchito ya mabanja a Ageresoni, pogwira ntchito ndi kusenza katundu ndi iyi;" 
Numbers4:25 azinyamula nsalu zophimba za Kachisi, ndi chihema chokomanako, chophimba chake, ndi chophimba cha zikopa za akatumbu chili pamwamba pake, ndi nsalu yotsekera pa khomo la chihema chokomanako;" 
Numbers4:26 ndi nsalu zochingira za pabwalo, ndi nsalu yotsekera ku chipata cha pabwalo lili pa Kachisi ndi pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira, ndi zingwe zao, ndi zipangizo zonse za ntchito zao, ndi zonse achita nazo; m'menemo muli ntchito zao." 
Numbers4:27 Ntchito yonse ya ana a Ageresoni, kunena za akatundu ao ndi ntchito zao zonse, ikhale monga adzanena Aroni ndi ana ake amuna; ndipo muwaike adikire akatundu ao onse." 
Numbers4:28 Iyi ndi ntchito ya mabanja a ana a Geresoni m'chihema chokomanako; ndipo Itamara mwana wa Aroni wansembe ayang'anire udikiro wao. 
Numbers4:29 Kunena za ana a Merari, Uwawerenge monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao." 
Numbers4:30 Uwawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kuchita ntchito ya chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers4:31 Ndipo udikiro wa akatundu ao, monga mwa ntchito zao zonse m'chihema chokomanako ndi ichi: matabwa a Kachisi, ndi mitanda yake, ndi mizati ndi nsanamira zake, ndi makamwa ake;" 
Numbers4:32 ndi nsichi za kubwalo kozungulira, ndi makamwa ake, ndi zichiri zake, ndi zingwe zake, pamodzi ndi zipangizo zake zonse, ndi ntchito yake yonse; ndipo muziwerenga zipangizo za udikiro wa akatundu ao ndi kuwatchula maina ao." 
Numbers4:33 Iyi ndi ntchito ya mabanja a ana a Merari, monga mwa ntchito zao zonse m'chihema chokomanako, mowauza Itamara mwana wa Aroni wansembe." 
Numbers4:34 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ndi akalonga a khamu anawerenga ana a Akohati monga mwa mabanja ao, ndi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:35 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kuti agwire ntchito m'chihema chokomanako;" 
Numbers4:36 ndipo owerengedwa ao monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu. 
Numbers4:37 Awa ndi owerengedwa a mabanja a Akohati, onse akutumikira m'chihema chokomanako, amene Mose ndi Aroni anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers4:38 Ndipo ana owerengedwa a Geresoni, monga mwa mabanja ao, ndi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:39 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kuti agwire ntchito m'chihema chokomanako," 
Numbers4:40 owerengedwa ao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza makumi atatu." 
Numbers4:41 Amenewo ndiwo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Geresoni, onse akutumikira m'chihema chokomanako, adawawerenga Mose ndi Aroni monga mwa mau a Yehova." 
Numbers4:42 Ndipo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Merari, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:43 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu kuti agwire ntchito m'chihema chokomanako," 
Numbers4:44 owerengedwa ao monga mwa mabanja ao, ndiwo zikwi zitatu ndi mazana awiri." 
Numbers4:45 Amenewo ndiwo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Merari, amene Mose ndi Aroni anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers4:46 Owerengedwa onse a Alevi, amene Mose ndi Aroni ndi akalonga a Israele anawawerengera, monga mwa mabanja ao, ndi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:47 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa kugwira ntchito ya utumikiwu, ndiyo ntchito ya akatundu m'chihema chokomanako;" 
Numbers4:48 owerengedwawo ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi zitatu kudza mazana asanu mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu. 
Numbers4:49 Anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova ndi dzanja la Mose, onse monga mwa ntchito zao, ndi monga mwa akatundu ao; anawawerenga monga momwe Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers5:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers5:2 Uza ana a Israele kuti azitulutsa m'chigono akhate onse, ndi onse akukhala nako kukha, ndi odetsedwa chifukwa cha akufa;" 
Numbers5:3 muwatulutse amuna ndi akazi muwatulutsire kunja kwa chigono, kuti angadetse chigono chao, chimene ndikhala m'kati mwakemo." 
Numbers5:4 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita chotero, nawatulutsira kunja kwa chigono; monga Yehova adanena ndi Mose momwemo ana a Israele anachita." 
Numbers5:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers5:6 Nena ndi ana a Israele, ndi kuti Mwamuna kapena mkazi akachita tchimo lililonse amachita anthu, kuchita mosakhulupirika pa Yehova, nakapalamuladi;" 
Numbers5:7 azivomereza tchimo lake adalichita; nabwezere chopalamulacho monsemo, naonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu, ndi kuchipereka kwa iye adampalamulayo." 
Numbers5:8 Koma munthuyo akapanda kukhala nayo nkhoswe imene akaibwezere chopalamulacho, chopalamula achibwezera Yehovacho chikhale cha wansembe; pamodzi ndi nkhosa yamphongo ya chotetezerapo, imene amchitire nayo chomtetezera." 
Numbers5:9 Ndipo nsembe zokweza zonse za zinthu zopatulika za ana a Israele, zimene abwera nazo kwa wansembe zisanduka zake." 
Numbers5:10 Zopatulika za munthu aliyense ndi zake: zilizonse munthu aliyense akapatsa wansembe, zasanduka zake." 
Numbers5:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers5:12 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Mkazi wa mwini akapatukira mwamuna wake, nakamchitira mosakhulupirika," 
Numbers5:13 ndi munthu akagona naye, koma kumbisikira maso a mwamuna wake, ndi kumng'unira; nadetsedwa mkaziyo, koma palibe mboni yomtsutsa, kapena sanamgwire alimkuchita;" 
Numbers5:14 ndipo ukamgwira mwamuna mtima wansanje, kuti achitire nsanje mkazi wake, popeza wadetsedwa; kapena ukamgwira mtima wansanje, kuti amchitire mkazi wake nsanje angakhale sanadetsedwe;" 
Numbers5:15 pamenepo mwamunayo azidza naye mkazi wake kwa wansembe, nadze nacho chopereka chake, limodzi la magawo khumi la efa wa ufa wabarele; asathirepo mafuta, kapena kuikapo lubani; popeza ndiyo nsembe yaufa yansanje, nsembe yaufa yachikumbutso, yakukumbutsa mphulupulu." 
Numbers5:16 Ndipo wansembe abwere naye, namuike pamaso pa Yehova;" 
Numbers5:17 natenge madzi opatulika m'mbale yadothi wansembeyo, natengeko fumbi lili pansi m'Kachisi, wansembeyo nalithire m'madzimo." 
Numbers5:18 Pamenepo wansembeyo aike mkaziyo pamaso pa Yehova, navula mutu wa mkaziyo, naike nsembe yaufa yachikumbutso m'manja mwake, ndiyo nsembe yaufa yansanje; ndipo m'manja mwake mwa wansembe muzikhala madzi owawa akudzetsa temberero." 
Numbers5:19 Ndipo wansembe amlumbiritse, nanene kwa mkazi, Ngati sanagone nawe munthu mmodzi yense, ngati sunapatukira kuchidetso, pokhala ndiwe wa mwamuna wako, upulumuke ku madzi owawa awa akudzetsa temberero." 
Numbers5:20 Koma iwe, ngati wapatukira mwamuna wako, ngati wadetsedwa, kuti wagona nawe munthu, wosati mwamuna wako;" 
Numbers5:21 pamenepo wansembe alumbiritse mkazi lumbiro lakutemberera, ndi wansembe anene kwa mkazi, Yehova akuike ukhale temberero ndi lumbiro pakati pa anthu a mtundu wako, pakuondetsa Yehova m'chuuno mwako, ndi kukutupitsa thupi lako;" 
Numbers5:22 ndipo madzi awa akudzetsa temberero adzalowa m'matumbo mwako, nadzakutupitsa thupi lako ndi kuondetsa m'chuuno mwako; ndipo mkaziyo aziti, Amen, Amen." 
Numbers5:23 Ndipo wansembe alembere matemberero awa m'buku, ndi kuwafafaniza ndi madzi owawawa." 
Numbers5:24 Ndipo amwetse mkaziyo madzi owawa akudzetsa temberero; ndi madzi odzetsa temberero adzalowa mwa iye nadzamwawira. 
Numbers5:25 Ndipo wansembe atenge nsembe yaufa yansanje m'manja mwa mkazi, naweyule nsembe yaufa pamaso pa Yehova, nabwere nayo ku guwa la nsembe." 
Numbers5:26 Wansembe atengekonso nsembe yaufa wodzala manja, chikumbutso chake, nachitenthe pa guwa la nsembe; ndipo atatero amwetse mkazi madziwo." 
Numbers5:27 Ndipo atammwetsa madziwo, kudzatero, ngati wadetsedwa, nachita mosakhulupirika pa mwamuna wake, madzi odzetsa tembererowo adzalowa mwa iye nadzamwawira, nadzamtupitsa thupi lake, ndi m'chuuno mwake mudzaonda; ndi mkaziyo adzakhala temberero pakati pa anthu a mtundu wake." 
Numbers5:28 Koma ngati mkazi sanadetsedwe, nakhala woyera, pamenepo adzapulumuka, nadzaima." 
Numbers5:29 Ichi ndi chilamulo cha nsanje, pamene mkazi, pokhala naye mwamuna wake, ampatukira nadetsedwa;" 
Numbers5:30 kapena pamene mtima wansanje umgwira mwamuna, ndipo achitira mkazi wake nsanje; pamenepo aziika mkazi pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo wansembe amchitire chilamulo ichi chonse." 
Numbers5:31 Mwamunayo ndiye wosachita mphulupulu, koma mkazi uyo asenze mphulupulu yake." 
Numbers6:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers6:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Mwamuna kapena mkazi akadzipatulira kulonjeza chowinda cha Mnaziri, kudzipatulira kwa Yehova;" 
Numbers6:3 azisala vinyo ndi kachasu; asamwe vinyo wosasa, kapena kachasu wosasa, kapena chakumwa chonse cha mphesa, asamwe; asadye mphesa zaziwisi kapena zouma." 
Numbers6:4 Masiku onse a kusala kwake asadye kanthu kopangika ndi mphesa, kuyambira nthanga zake kufikira khungu lake." 
Numbers6:5 Masiku onse a chowinda chake chakusala, lumo lisapite pamutu pake; kufikira adatha masikuwo adadzipatulira kwa Yehova, azikhala wopatulika; aleke nzera za tsitsi lake zimeretu." 
Numbers6:6 Masiku onse akudzipatulira kwa Yehova asayandikize mtembo. 
Numbers6:7 Asadzidetse ndi atate wake, kapena mai wake, mbale wake, kapena mlongo wake, akafa iwowa; popeza chowindira Mulungu wake chili pamutu pake." 
Numbers6:8 Masiku onse a kusala kwake akhala wopatulikira kwa Yehova. 
Numbers6:9 Munthu akafa chikomo pali iye, ndipo akadetsa mutu wake wowinda; pamenepo azimeta mutu wake tsiku la kumyeretsa kwake, tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri aumete." 
Numbers6:10 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu adze nazo njiwa ziwiri, kapena maunda awiri, kwa wansembe;" 
Numbers6:11 ndipo wansembe akonze imodzi nsembe yauchimo, ndi ina nsembe yopsereza, namtetezere popeza anachimwa nao mtembowo; ndipo apatulire mutu wake tsiku lomwelo." 
Numbers6:12 Ndipo awapatulire Yehova masiku a kusala kwake, nadze nayo nkhosa yamphongo ya chaka chimodzi ikhale nsembe yopalamula; koma masiku adapitawa azikhala chabe, popeza anadetsa kusala kwake." 
Numbers6:13 Ndipo chilamulo cha Mnaziri, atatha masiku a kusala kwake ndi ichi: azidza naye ku khomo la chihema chokomanako;" 
Numbers6:14 pamenepo abwere nacho chopereka chake kwa Yehova, nkhosa yamphongo ya chaka chimodzi yopanda chilema, ikhale nsembe yopsereza, ndi nkhosa yaikazi yopanda chilema ikhale nsembe yauchimo, ndi nkhosa yamphongo yopanda chilema ikhale nsembe yoyamika;" 
Numbers6:15 ndi dengu la mkate wopanda chotupitsa, timitanda ta ufa wosalala tosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndi timitanda taphanthi todzoza ndi mafuta, ndi nsembe yao yaufa, ndi nsembe zao zothira." 
Numbers6:16 Ndipo wansembe azibwera nazo pamaso pa Yehova, nakonze nsembe yake yauchimo, ndi nsembe yake yopsereza;" 
Numbers6:17 naphe nkhosa yamphongo yoyamika ya Yehova, pamodzi ndi dengu la mkate wopanda chotupitsa; wansembe akonzenso nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers6:18 Pamenepo Mnaziriyo amete mutu wake wa kusala kwake pa khomo la chihema chokomanako, natenge tsitsi la pa mutu wake wa kusala, naliike pamoto wokhala pansi pa nsembe yoyamika." 
Numbers6:19 Ndipo wansembe atenge mwendo wamwamba wophika wa nkhosa yamphongo, ndi kamtanda kamodzi kopanda chotupitsa ka m'dengu, ndi kamtanda kaphanthi kopanda chotupitsa kamodzi, ndi kuziika m'manja mwa Mnaziri, atameta kusala kwake;" 
Numbers6:20 ndipo wansembe aziweyula nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova; ichi nchopatulikira wansembe, pamodzi ndi nganga ya nsembe yoweyula, pamodzi ndi mwendo wa nsembe yokweza; ndipo atatero Mnaziri amwe vinyo." 
Numbers6:21 Ichi ndi chilamulo cha Mnaziri wakuwinda, ndi cha chopereka chake cha Yehova chifukwa cha kusala kwake, pamodzi nacho chimene dzanja lake likachipeza; azichita monga mwa chowinda chake anachiwinda, mwa chilamulo cha kusala." 
Numbers6:22 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers6:23 Nena ndi Aroni ndi ana ake, ndi kuti, Uzidalitsa ana a Israele motero; uziti nao," 
Numbers6:24 Yehova akudalitse iwe, nakusunge;" 
Numbers6:25 Yehova awalitse nkhope yake pa iwe, nakuchitire chisomo;" 
Numbers6:26 Yehova akweze nkhope yake pa iwe, nakupatse mtendere." 
Numbers6:27 Potero aike dzina langa pa ana a Israele; ndipo ndidzawadalitsa. 
Numbers7:1 Ndipo kunali kuti tsiku lomwe Mose anatsiriza kumuutsa Kachisi, namdzoza ndi kumpatula, ndi zipangizo zake zonse, ndi guwa la nsembe, ndi zipangizo zake zonse, nazidzoza ndi kuzipatula;" 
Numbers7:2 akalonga a Israele, akulu a nyumba za makolo ao, anapereka nsembe, ndiwo akalonga a mafuko akuyang'anira owerengedwa;" 
Numbers7:3 anadza nacho chopereka chao pamaso pa Yehova, magaleta ophimbika asanu ndi mmodzi, ndi kalonga mmodzi ng'ombe imodzi; nabwera nazo pakhomo pa Kachisi." 
Numbers7:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers7:5 Uzilandira kwa iwo, kuti zikhale zakuchitira ntchito ya chihema chokomanako; nuzipereke kwa Alevi, yense monga mwa ntchito yake." 
Numbers7:6 Ndipo Mose analandira magaleta ndi ng'ombe, nazipereka kwa Alevi." 
Numbers7:7 Anapatsa ana a Geresoni magaleta awiri ndi ng'ombe zinai, monga mwa ntchito yao;" 
Numbers7:8 napatsa ana a Merari magaleta anai ndi ng'ombe zisanu ndi zitatu, monga mwa ntchito yao; wakuziyang'anira ndiye Itamara mwana wa Aroni wansembe." 
Numbers7:9 Koma sanapatse ana a Kohati kanthu; popeza ntchito yao ndiyo ya zinthu zopatulika, zimene amazisenza pa mapewa ao." 
Numbers7:10 Ndipo akalonga anabwera nazo za kupereka chiperekere guwa la nsembe tsiku lodzozedwa ili; inde akalongawo anabwera nacho chopereka chao pa guwa la nsembelo. 
Numbers7:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Akalonga onse, yense pa tsiku lake, apereke zopereka zao za kupereka chiperekere guwa la nsembe." 
Numbers7:12 Wakubwera nacho chopereka chake tsiku loyamba ndiye Nasoni mwana wa Aminadabu, wa fuko la Yuda:" 
Numbers7:13 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake ndiko masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwirizo zodzala ndi ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:14 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:15 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:16 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:17 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Nasoni mwana wa Aminadabu." 
Numbers7:18 Tsiku lachiwiri Netanele mwana wa Zuwara, kalonga wa Isakara, anabwera nacho chake:" 
Numbers7:19 anabwera nacho chopereka chake mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:20 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:21 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:22 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:23 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Netanele mwana wa Zuwara." 
Numbers7:24 Tsiku lachitatu kalonga wa ana a Zebuloni, ndiye Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni:" 
Numbers7:25 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzaza ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:26 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:27 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:28 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:29 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni." 
Numbers7:30 Tsiku lachinai Elizuri, mwana wa Sedeuri, kalonga wa ana a Rubeni:" 
Numbers7:31 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika, zonse ziwiri zodzaza ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:32 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:33 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:34 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:35 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri." 
Numbers7:36 Tsiku lachisanu kalonga wa ana a Simeoni, ndiye Selumiele, mwana wa Zurishadai:" 
Numbers7:37 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:38 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:39 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:40 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:41 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Selumiele mwana wa Zurishadai." 
Numbers7:42 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chimodzi kalonga wa ana a Gadi, Eliyasafu mwana wa Deuwele:" 
Numbers7:43 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu; mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:44 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:45 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:46 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:47 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Eliyasafu mwana wa Deuwele." 
Numbers7:48 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri kalonga wa ana a Efuremu Elisama mwana wa Amihudi: 
Numbers7:49 chopereka chake mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:50 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:51 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:52 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:53 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa za mphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Elisama mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu kalonga wa ana a Manase ndiye Gamaliele mwana wa Pedazuri: 
Numbers7:55 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:56 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:57 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:58 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:59 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Gamaliele mwana wa Pedazuri." 
Numbers7:60 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chinai kalonga wa ana a Benjamini, ndiye Abidani mwana wa Gideoni:" 
Numbers7:61 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:62 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:63 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:64 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:65 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Abidani mwana wa Gideoni." 
Numbers7:66 Tsiku lakhumi kalonga wa ana a Dani, ndiye Ahiyezere mwana wa Amisadai:" 
Numbers7:67 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:68 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:69 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:70 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:71 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Ahiyezere mwana wa Amisadai." 
Numbers7:72 Tsiku la khumi ndi limodzi kalonga wa ana a Asere, ndiye Pagiyele mwana wa Okarani;" 
Numbers7:73 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:74 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:75 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:76 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:77 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ndicho chopereka cha Pagiyele mwana wa Okarani." 
Numbers7:78 Tsiku lakhumi ndi chiwiri kalonga wa ana a Nafutali, ndiye Ahira mwana wa Enani:"
