Numbers7:79 chopereka chake ndicho mbale imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwake masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:80 chipande chimodzi chagolide cha masekeli khumi, chodzala ndi chofukiza;" 
Numbers7:81 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwanawankhosa mmodzi wa chaka chimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:82 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; 
Numbers7:83 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, anaankhosa asanu a chaka chimodzi; ichi ndi chopereka cha Ahira mwana wa Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Uku ndi kupereka chiperekere guwa la nsembe, ndi akalonga a Israele, tsiku la kudzoza kwake: mbale zasiliva khumi ndi ziwiri, mbale zowazira zasiliva khumi ndi ziwiri, zipande zagolide khumi ndi ziwiri;" 
Numbers7:85 mbale yasiliva yonse masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, ndi mbale yowazira yonse masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri; siliva wonse wa zotengerazo ndizo masekeli zikwi ziwiri ndi mazana anai, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika." 
Numbers7:86 Zipande zagolide ndizo khumi ndi ziwiri, zodzala ndi chofukiza, chipande chonse masekeli khumi, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; golide wonse wa zipandezo ndiwo masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri;" 
Numbers7:87 ng'ombe zonse za nsembe yopsereza ndizo ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo khumi ndi ziwiri, anaankhosa a chaka chimodzi khumi ndi awiri, pamodzi ndi nsembe yao yaufa; ndi atonde a nsembe zauchimo khumi ndi awiri;" 
Numbers7:88 ndi ng'ombe zonse za nsembe yoyamika ndizo ng'ombe makumi awiri ndi zinai, nkhosa zamphongo makumi asanu ndi limodzi, atonde makumi asanu ndi limodzi, anaankhosa a chaka chimodzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi. Uku ndi kupereka chiperekere, litadzozedwa guwa la nsembe." 
Numbers7:89 Ndipo polowa Mose ku chihema chokomanako, kunena ndi Iye, anamva mau akunena naye ochokera ku chotetezerapo chili pa likasa la mboni, ochokera pakati pa akerubi awiriwo; ndipo Iye ananena naye." 
Numbers8:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers8:2 Nena kwa Aroni, nuti naye, Pamene uyatsa nyalizo, nyali zisanu ndi ziwirizo ziwale pandunji pake pa choikapo nyalicho." 
Numbers8:3 Ndipo Aroni anachita chotero; anayatsa nyalizo kuti ziwale pandunji pake pa choikapo nyali, monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers8:4 Ndipo mapangidwe ake a choikapo nyali ndiwo golide wosula; kuyambira tsinde lake kufikira maluwa ake anachisula; monga mwa maonekedwe ake Yehova anaonetsa Mose, momwemo anachipanga choikapo nyali." 
Numbers8:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers8:6 Uwatenge Alevi pakati pa ana a Israele, nuwayeretse." 
Numbers8:7 Ndipo utere nao kuwayeretsa: uwawaze madzi akuchotsa zoipa, ndipo apititse lumo pa thupi lao lonse, natsuke zovala zao, nadziyeretse." 
Numbers8:8 Pamenepo atenge ng'ombe yamphongo ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta; utengenso ng'ombe yamphongo ina ikhale nsembe yauchimo." 
Numbers8:9 Ndipo ubwere nao Alevi pakhomo pa chihema chokomanako; nuwasonkhanitse khamu lonse la ana a Israele; 
Numbers8:10 nubwere nao Alevi pamaso pa Yehova; ndi ana a Israele aike manja ao pa Alevi; 
Numbers8:11 ndi Aroni apereke Alevi ngati nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova, yochokera kwa ana a Israele, kuti akhale akuchita ntchito ya Yehova," 
Numbers8:12 Ndipo Alevi aike manja ao pa mitu ya ng'ombezo; pamenepo ukonze imodzi ikhale nsembe yauchimo, ndi inzake, nsembe yopsereza za Yehova, kuchita chotetezera Alevi." 
Numbers8:13 Ndipo uimike Alevi pamaso pa Aroni, ndi pamaso pa ana ake, ndi kuwapereka ngati nsembe yoweyula kwa Yehova." 
Numbers8:14 Momwemo upatule Alevi mwa ana a Israele; kuti Alevi akhale anga. 
Numbers8:15 Ndipo atatero alowe Alevi kuchita ntchito ya chihema chokomanako; ndipo uwayeretse, ndi kuwapereka ngati nsembe yoweyula." 
Numbers8:16 Pakuti aperekedwa konse kwa Ine ochokera mwa ana a Israele; ndadzitengera iwo m'malo mwa onse akutsegula m'mimba, ndiwo oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israele." 
Numbers8:17 Pakuti oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israele ndi anga, mwa anthu ndi zoweta; tsiku lija ndinakantha oyamba kubadwa onse m'dziko la Ejipito, ndinadzipatulira iwo akhale anga." 
Numbers8:18 Ndipo ndatenga Alevi m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israele. 
Numbers8:19 Ndipo ndapereka Alevi akhale mphatso ya kwa Aroni ndi ana ake amuna yochokera mwa ana a Israele, kuchita ntchito ya ana a Israele, m'chihema chokomanako ndi kuchita chotetezera ana a Israele; kuti pasakhale mliri pakati pa ana a Israele, pakuyandikiza ana a Israele ku malo opatulika." 
Numbers8:20 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israele anachitira Alevi monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose kunena za Alevi; momwemo ana a Israele anawachitira. 
Numbers8:21 Ndipo Alevi anadziyeretsa, natsuka zovala zao; ndi Aroni anawapereka ngati nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova; ndi Aroni anawachitira chotetezera kuwayeretsa." 
Numbers8:22 Ndipo atatero, Alevi analowa kuchita ntchito yao m'chihema chokomanako pamaso pa Aroni, ndi pamaso pa ana ake amuna; monga Yehova anauza Mose kunena za Alevi, momwemo anawachitira." 
Numbers8:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers8:24 Ichi ndi cha Alevi: kuyambira ali wa zaka makumi awiri ndi zisanu ndi mphambu azilowa kutumikira utumikiwu mu ntchito ya chihema chokomanako; 
Numbers8:25 ndipo kuyambira zaka makumi asanu azileka kutumikira utumikiwu, osachitanso ntchitoyi;" 
Numbers8:26 koma atumikire pamodzi ndi abale ao m'chihema chokomanako, kusunga udikirowo, koma osagwira ntchito. Utere nao Alevi kunena za udikiro wao." 
Numbers9:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'chipululu cha Sinai, mwezi woyamba wa chaka chachiwiri atatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kuti," 
Numbers9:2 Ana a Israele achite Paska pa nyengo yoikidwa. 
Numbers9:3 Tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mweziwo, madzulo, muziuchita, pa nyengo yake yoikidwa; muuchite monga mwa malemba ake onse, ndi maweruzo ake onse." 
Numbers9:4 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israele, kuti achite Paska." 
Numbers9:5 Ndipo anachita Paska mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mweziwo, madzulo m'chipululu cha Sinai; monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose, momwemo ana a Israele anachita." 
Numbers9:6 Pamenepo panali amuna, anadetsedwa ndi mtembo wa munthu, ndipo sanakhoze kuchita Paska tsiku lomwelo; m'mwemo anafika pamaso pa Mose ndi pamaso pa Aroni tsiku lomwelo;" 
Numbers9:7 nanena naye amunawa, Tadetsedwa ife ndi mtembo wa munthu; atiletseranji, kuti tisabwere nacho chopereka cha Yehova pa nyengo yake yoikidwa, pakati pa ana a Israele?" 
Numbers9:8 Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Baimani; ndimve chouza Yehova za inu." 
Numbers9:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers9:10 Nena ndi ana a Israele, ndi kuti, Angakhale munthu wa inu kapena wa mibadwo yanu, adetsedwa, chifukwa cha mtembo, kapena pokhala paulendo, koma azichitira Yehova Paska." 
Numbers9:11 Mwezi wachiwiri, tsiku lake lakhumi ndi chinai, madzulo, auchite; audye ndi mkate wopanda chotupitsa ndi msuzi wowawa." 
Numbers9:12 Asasiyeko kufikira m'mawa, kapena kuthyolapo fupa; auchite monga mwa lemba lonse la Paska." 
Numbers9:13 Munthu akakhala woyera, wosakhala paulendo, koma akaleka kuchita Paska, amsadze munthuyo kwa anthu a mtundu wake; popeza sanabwere nacho chopereka cha Yehova pa nyengo yake yoikidwa, munthuyu asenze kuchimwa kwake." 
Numbers9:14 Ndipo mlendo akakhala mwa inu, nakachitira Yehova Paska, azichita monga mwa lemba la Paska, ndi monga mwa chiweruzo chake; lemba likhale limodzi kwa inu, ndi kwa mlendo, ndi kwa wobadwa m'dziko." 
Numbers9:15 Ndipo tsiku loutsa Kachisi mtambo unaphimba Kachisi, ndiwo chihema chokomanako; ndicho chihema chaumboni, ndipo madzulo padaoneka pa Kachisi ngati moto, kufikira m'mawa." 
Numbers9:16 Kudatero kosalekeza; mtambo umachiphimba, ndi moto umaoneka usiku." 
Numbers9:17 Ndipo pokwera mtambo kuchokera kuchihema, utatero ana a Israele amayenda ulendo wao; ndipo pamalo pokhala mtambo, pamenepo ana a Israele amamanga mahema ao." 
Numbers9:18 Pakuwauza Yehova ana a Israele amayenda ulendo, powauza Yehova amamanga mahema ao; masiku onse mtambo ukakhala pamwamba pa Kachisi amakhala m'chigono." 
Numbers9:19 Ndipo pakukhalitsa mtambo masiku ambiri pamwamba pa Kachisi, pamenepo ana a Israele anasunga udikiro wa Yehova osayenda ulendo." 
Numbers9:20 Ndipo pokhala mtambo pamwamba pa Kachisi masiku pang'ono; pamenepo anakhala m'chigono monga awauza Yehova, nayendanso ulendo monga anauza Yehova." 
Numbers9:21 Koma mtambo ukakhala kuyambira madzulo kufikira m'mawa; pokwera mtambo m'mawa, ayenda ulendo." 
Numbers9:22 Ngakhale masiku awiri, kapena mwezi, kapena masiku ambiri, pokhalitsa mtambo pamwamba pa Kachisi ndi kukhalapo, ana a Israele anakhala m'chigono, osayenda ulendo; koma pakukwera uwu, anayenda ulendo." 
Numbers9:23 Powauza Yehova amanga mahema, powauza Yehova ayenda ulendo; anasunga udikiro wa Yehova powauza Yehova mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers10:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers10:2 Dzipangire malipenga awiri asiliva; uwasule mapangidwe ake; uchite nao poitana khamu, ndi poyendetsa a m'zigono." 
Numbers10:3 Akaliza, khamu lonse lisonkhane kuli iwe ku khomo la chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers10:4 Akaliza limodzi, pamenepo akalonga, akulu a zikwi a m'Israele, azisonkhana kuli iwe." 
Numbers10:5 Mukaliza chokweza ayende a m'zigono za kum'mawa. 
Numbers10:6 Mukalizanso chokweza, a m'zigono za kumwera ayende; alize chokweza pakumuka." 
Numbers10:7 Pomemeza msonkhano mulize, wosati chokweza ai." 
Numbers10:8 Ana amuna a Aroni, ansembe, ndiwo aziliza malipenga; ndipo akhale kwa inu lemba losatha ku mibadwo yanu." 
Numbers10:9 Ndipo pamene mupita kunkhondo m'dziko lanu kuchita nkhondo pa mdani wakusautsa inu, mulize chokweza ndi malipenga; ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakumbukira inu, nadzakupulumutsani kwa adani anu." 
Numbers10:10 Momwemo tsiku lakukondwera inu, ndi nyengo zoikidwa zanu, ndi poyamba miyezi yanu, muziliza malipenga pa nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi pa nsembe zanu zoyamika; ndipo akhale kwa inu chikumbutso pamaso pa Mulungu wanu; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Numbers10:11 Ndipo kunachitika, chaka chachiwiri, mwezi wachiwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri la mweziwo, kuti mtambo unakwera kuchokera kwa Kachisi wa mboni." 
Numbers10:12 Ndipo ana a Israele anayenda monga mwa maulendo ao, kuchokera m'chipululu cha Sinai; ndi mtambo unakhala m'chipululu cha Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Potero anayamba ulendo wao monga mwa mau a Yehova ndi dzanja la Mose. 
Numbers10:14 Ndipo anayamba kuyenda ambendera ya chigono cha ana a Yuda monga mwa magulu ao; woyang'anira gulu lake ndiye Nasoni mwana wa Aminadabu. 
Numbers10:15 Ndi pa gulu la fuko la ana a Isakara panali Netanele mwana wa Zuwara. 
Numbers10:16 Ndi gulu la fuko la ana a Zebuloni panali Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni. 
Numbers10:17 Ndipo anagwetsa Kachisi; ndi ana a Geresoni, ndi ana a Merari, akunyamula Kachisi, anamuka naye." 
Numbers10:18 Ndi a mbendera ya chigono cha Rubeni, anayenda monga mwa magulu ao; ndipo pa gulu lake anayang'anira Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri." 
Numbers10:19 Ndi pa gulu la fuko la ana a Simeoni anayang'anira Selumiele mwana wa Zurishadai. 
Numbers10:20 Ndi pa gulu la fuko la ana a Gadi anayang'anira Eliyasafu mwana wa Deuwele. 
Numbers10:21 Pamenepo Akohati anayenda, ndi kunyamula zopatulika, ndi enawo anautsiratu Kachisi asanafike iwowa." 
Numbers10:22 Ndipo anayenda a mbendera ya chigono cha ana a Efuremu, monga mwa magulu ao; ndi pa gulu lake anayang'anira Elisama mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Ndi pa gulu la fuko la ana a Manase anayang'anira Gamaliele mwana wa Pedazuri. 
Numbers10:24 Ndi pa gulu la fuko la ana a Benjamini anayang'anira Abidani mwana wa Gideoni. 
Numbers10:25 Pamenepo anayenda a mbendera ya chigono cha ana a Dani, ndiwo a m'mbuyombuyo a zigono zonse, monga mwa magulu ao; ndi pa gulu lake anayang'anira Ahiyezere mwana wa Amisadai." 
Numbers10:26 Ndi pa gulu la fuko la ana a Asere anayang'anira Pagiyele mwana wa Okarani. 
Numbers10:27 Ndi pa gulu la fuko la ana a Nafutali anayang'anira Ahira mwana wa Enani. 
Numbers10:28 Potero maulendo a ana a Israele anakhala monga mwa magulu ao; nayenda ulendo wao. 
Numbers10:29 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Hobabu mwana wa Reuwele Mmidiyani mpongozi wa Mose, Ife tili kuyenda kunka ku malo amene Yehova anati, Ndidzakupatsani awa; umuke nafe, tidzakuchitira zokoma; popeza Yehova wanenera Israele zokoma." 
Numbers10:30 Koma anati kwa iye, Sindidzamuka nanu; koma ndipita ku dziko langa, ndi kwa abale anga." 
Numbers10:31 Koma anati, Usatisiyetu; popeza udziwa poyenera kumanga ife m'chipululu, ndipo udzakhala maso athu." 
Numbers10:32 Ndipo kudzatero, ukamuka nafe, inde, kudzali kuti zokoma zilizonse Yehova atichitira ife, zomwezo tidzakuchitira iwe." 
Numbers10:33 Ndipo anayenda kuchokera kuphiri la Yehova ulendo wa masiku atatu; ndipo likasa la chipangano cha Yehova, linawatsogolera ulendo wa masiku atatu kuwafunira popumulira." 
Numbers10:34 Ndipo mtambo wa Yehova unali pamwamba pao msana, pakuyenda iwo kuchokera kuchigono." 
Numbers10:35 Ndipo kunali pakuchokera kunka nalo likasa, Mose anati, Ukani Yehova, abalalike adani anu; akuda Inu athawe pamaso panu." 
Numbers10:36 Ndi pakupumula ili anati, Bwerani Yehova kwa zikwizikwi za Israele." 
Numbers11:1 Ndipo anthu anaipa, namadandaula m'makutu a Yehova; ndipo pamene Yehova anamva anapsa mtima; ndi moto wa Yehova unayaka pakati pao, nunyeketsa ku chilekezero cha chigono." 
Numbers11:2 Pamenepo anthu anafuulira kwa Mose; ndi Mose anapemphera kwa Yehova, ndi motowo unazimika." 
Numbers11:3 Ndipo anatcha malowo dzina lake Tabera; popeza moto wa Yehova udayaka pakati pao. 
Numbers11:4 Ndipo anthu osokonezeka ali pakati pao anagwidwa nacho chilakolako; ndi ana a Israele omwe analiranso, nati, Adzatipatsa nyama ndani?" 
Numbers11:5 Tikumbukira nsomba tinazidya m'Ejipito chabe, minkhaka, ndi mavwende, ndi anyezi a mitundu itatu;" 
Numbers11:6 koma tsopano moyo wathu waphwa; tilibe kanthu pamaso pathu koma mana awa. 
Numbers11:7 Ndipo mana ananga zipatso zampasa, ndi maonekedwe ake ngati maonekedwe a bedola." 
Numbers11:8 Anthu amanka, nawaola, nawapera ndi mphero, kapena kuwasinja mumtondo, nawaphika m'mphika, nawaumba timitanda; ndi powalawa anali ngati timitanda tokazinga ndi mafuta." 
Numbers11:9 Ndipo pakugwa mame pachigono usiku, mana anagwapo." 
Numbers11:10 Ndipo Mose anamva anthu alikulira m'mabanja ao, yense pakhomo pa hema wake; ndipo Yehova anapsa mtima ndithu, ndipo kudamuipira Mose." 
Numbers11:11 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Munachitiranji choipa mtumiki wanu? Ndalekeranji kupeza ufulu pamaso panu, kuti muika pa ine katundu wa anthu awa onse?" 
Numbers11:12 Kodi ndinaima nao anthu awa onse? Kodi ndinawabala, kuti munene nane, Uwayangate ngati mlezi afukata khanda, kunka nao ku dzikolo mudalumbirira makolo ao?" 
Numbers11:13 Ndidzaiona kuti nyama yakuwapatsa anthu awa onse? Pakuti amalirira ine, ndi kuti, Tipatseni nyama, tidye." 
Numbers11:14 Sinditha kuwasenza anthu awa onse ndekha, pakuti andilemera ine." 
Numbers11:15 Ndipo ngati mundichitira chotero, mundiphetu tsopano apa, ngati ndapeza ufulu pamaso panu, ndisayang'ane tsoka langa." 
Numbers11:16 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Undisonkhanitsire amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri mwa akulu a Israele, amene uwadziwa kuti ndiwo akulu a anthu, ndi akapitao ao; nubwere nao ku chihema chokomanako, kuti aimeko pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Numbers11:17 Pamenepo ndidzatsika ndi kulankhula nawe komweko; ndipo ndidzatengako mzimu uli pa iwe, ndi kuika pa iwowa; adzakuthandiza kusenza katundu wa anthu awa, kuti usasenze wekha." 
Numbers11:18 Ndipo unene ndi anthu, Mudzipatuliretu, mawa mudzadya nyama; popeza mwalira m'makutu a Yehova, ndi kuti, Adzatipatsa nyama ndani? Popeza tinakhala bwino m'Ejipito. Potero Yehova adzakupatsani nyama, ndipo mudzadya." 
Numbers11:19 Simudzadya tsiku limodzi, kapena masiku awiri, kapena masiku asanu, kapena masiku khumi, kapena masiku makumi awiri;" 
Numbers11:20 koma mwezi wamphumphu, kufikira ibwera m'mphuno mwako, ndi kuti ufukidwa nayo, pakuti mwakaniza Yehova wakukhala pakati pa inu, ndi kulira pamaso pake, ndi kuti, Tinatulukiranji m'Ejipito?" 
Numbers11:21 Ndipo Mose anati, Anthu amene ndili pakati pao, ndiwo zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi oyenda pansi, ndipo Inu mwanena, Ndidzawapatsa nyama, kuti adye mwezi wamphumphu." 
Numbers11:22 Kodi adzawaphera magulu a nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, kuwakwanira? Kapena kodi nsomba zonse za m'nyanja zidzawasonkhanira pamodzi, kuwakwanira?" 
Numbers11:23 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Kodi dzanja la Mulungu lafupikira? Tsopano udzapenya ngati mau anga adzakuchitikira kapena iai." 
Numbers11:24 Ndipo Mose anatuluka, nauza anthu mau a Yehova; nasonkhanitsa akulu a anthu makumi asanu ndi awiri, nawaimika pozungulira pa chihema." 
Numbers11:25 Ndipo Yehova anatsika mumtambo, nanena naye, natengako mzimu uli pa iye, nauika pa akulu makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo kunali kuti pokhala mzimu pa iwowa, ananenera; koma osabwerezanso." 
Numbers11:26 Koma amuna awiri anatsalira m'chigono, dzina la wina ndiye Elidadi, dzina la mnzake ndiye Medadi; ndipo mzimuwo unakhala pa iwo; iwo ndiwo mwa oitanidwawo, koma sanatuluke kunka kuchihema; ndipo ananenera m'chigono." 
Numbers11:27 Ndipo anathamanga anyamata, nauza Mose, nati, Elidadi ndi Medadi alikunenera m'chigono." 
Numbers11:28 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, mtumiki wa Mose kuyambira ubwana wake, anayankha nati, Mose, mfumu yanga, aletseni." 
Numbers11:29 Koma Mose anati kwa iye, Kodi uchita nsanje nao chifukwa cha ine? Mwenzi anthu onse a Yehova atakhala aneneri? Mwenzi Yehova atawaikira mzimu wake!" 
Numbers11:30 Ndipo Mose ndi akulu onse a Israele anasonkhana kuchigono. 
Numbers11:31 Ndipo kudachokera mphepo kwa Yehova, nidza nazo zinziri zochokera kunyanja, nizitula kuchigono, ulendo wa tsiku limodzi dera lino, ndi ulendo wa tsiku limodzi dera lina, pozungulira pa chigono, ndipo zinabisa nthaka ngati muyeso wa mikono iwiri." 
Numbers11:32 Ndipo anthu anauka tsiku lonselo, ndi usiku wake wonse, ndi mawa lake lonse, nakusa zinzirizo; wokusa pang'ono anakusa zodzaza mahomeri khumi; ndipo anadziyanikira izi pozungulira pa chigono." 
Numbers11:33 Nyamayi ikali pakati pa mano, asanaitafune, Mulungu anapsa mtima pa anthuwa, ndipo Yehova anawakantha anthu ndi kukantha kwakukulu ndithu." 
Numbers11:34 Ndipo anatcha malowo dzina lake Kibroti-Hatava; popeza pamenepo anaika anthu osusuka. 
Numbers11:35 Kuchokera ku Kibroti-Hatava anthuwo anayenda kunka ku Hazeroti; nakhala ku Hazeroti. 
Numbers12:1 Ndipo Miriyamu ndi Aroni anatsutsana naye Mose chifukwa cha mkazi mtundu wake Mkusi amene adamtenga; popeza adatenga mkazi Mkusi. 
Numbers12:2 Ndipo anati, Kodi Yehova wanena ndi Mose yekha? Sananenanso ndi ife nanga? Ndipo Yehova anamva." 
Numbers12:3 Koma munthuyu Mose ndiye wofatsa woposa anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi. 
Numbers12:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, ndi Aroni, ndi Miriyamu modzidzimutsa, Tulukani inu atatu kudza ku chihema chokomanako. Pamenepo anatuluka atatuwo." 
Numbers12:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsika mumtambo njo, naima pa khomo la chihema, naitana Aroni ndi Miriyamu; natuluka onse awiri." 
Numbers12:6 Ndipo anati, Tamvani, tsono mau anga; pakakhala mneneri pakati pa inu, Ine Yehova ndidzizindikiritsa kwa iye m'masomphenya, ndinena naye m'kulota." 
Numbers12:7 Satero mtumiki wanga Mose; ndiye wokhulupirika m'nyumba mwanga monse. 
Numbers12:8 Ndimanena naye pakamwa ndi pakamwa, moonekera, osati mophiphiritsa; ndipo amapenyerera maonekedwe a Yehova; potero munalekeranji kuopa kutsutsana naye mtumiki wanga, Mose." 
Numbers12:9 Pamenepo Yehova anawapsera mtima iwo; nawachokera Iye. 
Numbers12:10 Ndipo mtambo unachoka pachihema; ndipo taonani, Miriyamu anali wakhate, wa mbu ngati chipale chofewa; ndipo Aroni anapenya Miriyamu, taonani, anali wakhate." 
Numbers12:11 Ndipo Aroni anati kwa Mose, Mfumu yanga, musatiikiretu kuchimwa kumene tapusa nako, ndi kuchimwa nako." 
Numbers12:12 Asakhaletu iye ngati wakufa, amene dera lina la mnofu wake watha potuluka iye m'mimba mwa make." 
Numbers12:13 Ndipo Mose anafuulira kwa Yehova, ndi kuti, Mchiritsenitu, Mulungu." 
Numbers12:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Atate wake akadamlavulira malovu pankhope pake sakadachita manyazi masiku asanu ndi awiri? Ambindikiritse kunja kwa chigono masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndipo atatero amlandirenso." 
Numbers12:15 Pamenepo anambindikiritsa Miriyamu kunja kwa chigono masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anthu sanayende ulendo kufikira atamlandiranso Miriyamu. 
Numbers12:16 Ndipo atatero anthuwo ananka ulendo wao kuchokera ku Hazeroti, namanga mahema ao m'chipululu cha Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers13:2 Udzitumire amuna, kuti azonde dziko la Kanani, limene ndilikupatsa ana a Israele; utumize munthu mmodzi wa fuko lililonse la makolo ao, yense kalonga pakati pa anzake." 
Numbers13:3 Ndipo Mose anawatumiza kuchokera ku chipululu cha Parani monga mwa mau a Yehova; amuna onsewa ndiwo akulu a ana a Israele. 
Numbers13:4 Maina ao ndi awa: wa fuko la Rubeni, Samuwa mwana wa Zakuri." 
Numbers13:5 Wa fuko la Simeoni, Safati mwana wa Hori." 
Numbers13:6 Wa fuko la Yuda, Kalebe mwana wa Yefune." 
Numbers13:7 Wa fuko la Isakara, Igala mwana wa Yosefe." 
Numbers13:8 Wa fuko la Efuremu, Hoseya mwana wa Nuni." 
Numbers13:9 Wa fuko la Benjamini, Paliti mwana wa Rafu." 
Numbers13:10 Wa fuko la Zebuloni, Gadiele mwana wa Sodi." 
Numbers13:11 Wa fuko la Yosefe, wa fuko la Manase, Gadi mwana wa Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Wa fuko la Dani, Amiyele mwana wa Gemali." 
Numbers13:13 Wa fuko la Asere, Seturi mwana wa Mikaele." 
Numbers13:14 Wa fuko la Nafutali, Nabi mwana wa Vofusi." 
Numbers13:15 Wa fuko la Gadi, Geuwele mwana wa Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Awa ndi maina a amunawo Mose anawatumira azonde dziko. Ndipo Mose anamutcha Hoseya mwana wa Nuni Yoswa. 
Numbers13:17 Potero Mose anawatuma azonde dziko la Kanani, nanena nao, Kwerani uko kumwera, nimukwere kumapiri;" 
Numbers13:18 mukaone dziko umo liliri; ndi anthu akukhala m'mwemo, ngati ali amphamvu kapena ofooka, ngati achepa kapena achuluka;" 
Numbers13:19 ndi umo liliri dzikoli lokhalamo iwo, ngati lokoma, kapena loipa; ndi umo iliri midziyo akhalamo iwo, ngati akhala poyera kapena m'malinga;" 
Numbers13:20 ndi umo iliri nthaka, ngati yopatsa, kapena yosuka, ngati pali mitengo, kapena palibe. Ndipo limbikani mtima, nimubwere nazo zipatso za m'dzikomo. Koma nyengoyi ndiyo nyengo yoyamba kupsa mphesa." 
Numbers13:21 Pamenepo anakwerako, nazonda dziko kuyambira chipululu za Zini kufikira Rehobu, polowa ku Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Ndipo anakwera njira ya kumwera nafika ku Hebroni; ndi apa panali Ahimani, Sesai, ndi Talimai, ana a Anaki. (Koma atamanga Hebroni zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri ndipo anamanga Zowani m'Ejipito.)" 
Numbers13:23 Ndipo anadza ku chigwa cha Esikolo, nachekako tsango limodzi la mphesa, nalisenza awiri mopika; anabwera nazonso makangaza ndi nkhuyu." 
Numbers13:24 Malowa anawatcha chigwa cha Esikolo, chifukwa cha tsangolo ana a Israele analichekako." 
Numbers13:25 Pamenepo anabwerera atazonda dziko, atatha masiku makumi anai." 
Numbers13:26 Ndipo anamuka, nadza kwa Mose, ndi Aroni, ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israele, ku chipululu cha Parani ku Kadesi; ndipo anabwezera mau iwowa, ndi khamu lonse, nawaonetsa zipatso za dzikoli." 
Numbers13:27 Ndipo anafotokozera, nati Tinakafika ku dziko limene munatitumirako, ndilo ndithu moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi; ndi zipatso zake siizi." 
Numbers13:28 Komatu anthu okhala m'dzikomo ngamphamvu; ndi midziyo nja malinga, yaikulu ndithu; ndipo tinaonakonso ana a Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Aamaleke akhala m'dziko la kumwera; ndi Ahiti, ndi Ayebusi, ndi Aamori, akhala ku mapiri, ndi Akanani akhala kunyanja, ndi m'mphepete mwa Yordani." 
Numbers13:30 Koma Kalebe anatontholetsa anthu pamaso pa Mose, nati, Tikwere ndithu ndi kulilandira lathulathu; popeza tikhozadi kuchita kumene." 
Numbers13:31 Koma anthu adakwera nayewo anati, Sitikhoza kuwakwerera anthuwo; popeza atiposa mphamvu." 
Numbers13:32 Ndipo anaipsira ana a Israele mbiri ya dziko adalizonda, ndilo dziko lakutheramo anthu okhalamo; ndi anthu onse tidaona pakati pake ndiwo anthu aatali misinkhu." 
Numbers13:33 Tinaonakonso Anefili, ana a Anaki, obadwa ndi Anefili; ndipo tinaoneka m'maso mwathu ngati ziwala; momwemonso tinaoneka m'maso mwao." 
Numbers14:1 Pamenepo khamu lonse linakweza mau ao, nafuula; ndipo anthuwo analira usikuwo." 
Numbers14:2 Ndipo ana onse a Israele anadandaulira Mose ndi Aroni; ndi khamu lonse linanena nao, Mwenzi tikadafa m'dziko la Ejipito; kapena mwenzi tikadafa m'chipululu muno!" 
Numbers14:3 Ndipo Yehova atitengeranji kudza nafe kudziko kuno, kuti tigwe nalo lupanga? Akazi athu ndi makanda athu adzakhala chakudya chao; kodi sikuli bwino tibwerere ku Ejipito?" 
Numbers14:4 Ndipo anati wina ndi mnzake, Tiike mtsogoleri, tibwerere ku Ejipito." 
Numbers14:5 Pamenepo Mose ndi Aroni anagwa nkhope pansi pamaso pa msonkhano wonse wa khamu la ana a Israele. 
Numbers14:6 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, ndiwo a iwo aja adazonda dzikolo, anang'amba zovala zao;" 
Numbers14:7 nanena ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israele, nati, Dziko tapitamo kulizonda, ndilo dziko lokometsetsa ndithu." 
Numbers14:8 Yehova akakondwera nafe, adzatilowetsa m'dzikomo, ndi kutipatsa ilo; ndilo dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi." 
Numbers14:9 Chokhachi musamapikisana naye Yehova, musamaopa anthu a m'dzikomo; pakuti ndiwo mkate wathu; mthunzi wao wawachokera, ndipo Yehova ali nafe; musamawaopa." 
Numbers14:10 Koma khamu lonse lidati liwaponye miyala. Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka m'chihema chokomanako kwa ana onse a Israele. 
Numbers14:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Anthu awa adzaleka liti kundinyoza? Ndipo adzayamba liti kundikhulupirira, chinkana zizindikiro zonse ndinazichita pakati pao?" 
Numbers14:12 Ndidzawakantha ndi mliri, ndi kuwachotsera cholowa chao, ndipo ndidzakusandutsa iwe mtundu wa anthu waukulu ndi wamphamvu koposa iwowa." 
Numbers14:13 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Pamenepo Aejipito adzamva; popeza munakweza anthu awa ndi mphamvu yanu kuwachotsa pakati pao;" 
Numbers14:14 ndipo adzawauza okhala m'dziko muno; adamva kuti inu Yehova muli pakati pa anthu awa; pakuti muoneka mopenyana, Yehova ndi mtambo wanu umaima pamwamba pao, ndipo muwatsogolera, ndi mtambo njo msana, ndi moto njo usiku." 
Numbers14:15 Ndipo mukapha anthu awa ngati munthu mmodzi, pamenepo amitundu amene adamva mbiri yanu adzanena, ndi kuti," 
Numbers14:16 Popeza Yehova sanakhoze kuwalowetsa anthu awa m'dziko limene anawalumbirira, chifukwa chake anawapha m'chipululu." 
Numbers14:17 Ndipo tsopano, ikuletu mphamvu ya Mbuye wanga, monga mudanena, ndi kuti," 
Numbers14:18 Yehova ndiye wolekereza, ndi wa chifundo chochuluka, wokhululukira mphulupulu ndi kulakwa, koma wosamasula wopalamula; wakuwalanga ana chifukwa cha mphulupulu ya atate ao, kufikira mbadwo wachitatu ndi wachinai." 
Numbers14:19 Khululukiranitu mphulupulu ya anthu awa, monga mwa chifundo chanu chachikulu, ndi monga mudalekerera anthu awa, kuyambira Ejipito kufikira tsopano." 
Numbers14:20 Ndipo Yehova anati, Ndakhululukira monga mwa mau ako:" 
Numbers14:21 koma ndithu, pali Ine, dziko lonse lapansi lidzadzazidwa ndi ulemerero wa Yehova;" 
Numbers14:22 popeza anthu onse awa amene adaona ulemerero wanga, ndi zizindikiro zanga, ndidazichita m'Ejipito ndi m'chipululu, koma anandiyesa Ine kakhumi aka, osamvera mau anga;" 
Numbers14:23 sadzaona dzikoli ndidalumbirira makolo ao, ngakhale mmodzi wa iwo akundinyoza Ine, sadzaliona;" 
Numbers14:24 koma mtumiki wanga Kalebe, popeza anali nao mzimu wina, nanditsata monsemo, ndidzamlowetsa iyeyu m'dziko muja analowamo; ndi mbeu zake zidzakhala nalo." 
Numbers14:25 Koma Aamaleke ndi Akanani akhala m'chigwamo; tembenukani mawa, nimumke ulendo wanu kuchipululu, njira ya ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Numbers14:26 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers14:27 Ndileke khamu loipa ili lakudandaula pa Ine kufikira liti? Ndidamva madandaulo a ana a Israele, amene amandidandaulira." 
Numbers14:28 Nunene nao, Pali Ine ati Yehova, ndidzachitira inu ndithu monga mwanena m'makutu mwanga;" 
Numbers14:29 mitembo yanu idzagwa m'chipululu muno; ndi owerengedwa anu onse, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, akudandaula pa Ine;" 
Numbers14:30 simudzalowa inu m'dzikolo, ndinakwezapo dzanja langa kukukhalitsani m'mwemo, koma Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni ndiwo." 
Numbers14:31 Koma makanda anu, amene munanena za iwowa kuti adzakhala chakudya, amenewo ndidzawalowetsa, ndipo adzadziwa dzikolo mudalikana." 
Numbers14:32 Koma inu, mitembo yanu idzagwa m'chipululu muno." 
Numbers14:33 Ndipo ana anu adzakhala oyendayenda m'chipululu zaka makumi anai, nadzasenza kupulukira kwanu, kufikira mitembo yanu yatha m'chipululu." 
Numbers14:34 Monga mwa kuwerenga kwa masiku amene munazonda dziko, masiku makumi anai, tsiku limodzi kuwerenga chaka chimodzi, mudzasenza mphulupulu zanu, zaka makumi anai, ndipo mudzadziwa kuti ndaleka lonjezano langa." 
Numbers14:35 Ine Yehova ndanena, ndidzachitira ndithu ichi khamu ili lonse loipa lakusonkhana kutsutsana nane; adzatha m'chipululu muno, nadzafamo." 
Numbers14:36 Ndipo amunawo, amene Mose anawatumiza kukazonda dziko, amene anabwera nadandaulitsa khamu lonse pa iye, poipsa mbiri ya dziko," 
Numbers14:37 amuna amene anaipsa mbiri ya dziko, anafa ndi mliri pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers14:38 Koma Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, anakhala ndi moyo mwa amuna aja adamukawo kukazonda dziko." 
Numbers14:39 Ndipo Mose anauza ana a Israele mau onse awa; ndipo anthu anamva chisoni chambiri. 
Numbers14:40 Ndipo anauka mamawa, nakwera pamwamba pa phiri, nati, Tili pano, tidzakwera kunka ku malo amene Yehova ananena; popeza tachimwa." 
Numbers14:41 Ndipo Mose anati, Mutero chifukwa ninji kulakwira mau a Yehova, popeza simudzapindula nako?" 
Numbers14:42 Musakwereko, pakuti Yehova sali pakati pa inu; kuti angakukantheni adani anu." 
Numbers14:43 Pakuti Aamaleke ndi Akanani ali komweko patsogolo panu, ndipo mudzagwa ndi lupanga; popeza mwabwerera m'mbuyo osatsata Yehova, chifukwa chake Yehova sadzakhala nanu." 
Numbers14:44 Koma anakwera pamwamba pa phiri modzikuza; koma likasa la chipangano la Yehova, ndi Mose, sanachoke kuchigono." 
Numbers14:45 Pamenepo anatsika Aamaleke, ndi Akanani, akukhala m'phirimo nawakantha, nawapha kufikira ku Horoma." 
Numbers15:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose nati," 
Numbers15:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Mukakalowa m'dziko lokakhalamo inu, limene ndilikupatsa inu," 
Numbers15:3 ndipo mukakonzera Yehova nsembe yamoto, nsembe yopsereza, kapena yophera, pochita chowinda cha padera, kapena nsembe yaufulu, kapena nsembe ya pa nyengo zanu zoikika, kumchitira Yehova fungo lokoma, la ng'ombe kapena nkhosa;" 
Numbers15:4 pamenepo iye wobwera nacho chopereka chake kwa Yehova, azibwera nayo nsembe yaufa, limodzi la magawo khumi la efa wa ufa wosalala, wosanganiza ndi limodzi la magawo anai la hini la mafuta;" 
Numbers15:5 ndipo uzikonzera nsembe yopsereza kapena yophera, vinyo wa nsembe yothira, limodzi la magawo anai la hini, ukhale wa mwanawankhosa mmodzi." 
Numbers15:6 Kapena ukonzere nkhosa yamphongo nsembe yaufa, awiri mwa magawo khumi a efa wa ufa wosalala, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, limodzi la magawo atatu la hini." 
Numbers15:7 Ndipo ubwere naye vinyo wa nsembe yothira, limodzi la magawo atatu la hini, achitire Yehova fungo lokoma." 
Numbers15:8 Ndipo pamene mukonza ng'ombe ikhale nsembe yopsereza, kapena yophera, kuchita chowinda cha padera, kapena ikhale nsembe yoyamika ya Yehova;" 
Numbers15:9 abwere nayo, pamodzi ndi ng'ombeyo, nsembe ya efa wa ufa wosalala, atatu mwa magawo khumi wosanganiza ndi mafuta, limodzi la magawo awiri la hini." 
Numbers15:10 Ndipo ubwere naye vinyo wa nsembe yothira limodzi la magawo awiri la hini, ndiye nsembe yamoto ya fungo lokoma, ya Yehova." 
Numbers15:11 Kudzatero ndi ng'ombe iliyonse, kapena nkhosa yamphongo iliyonse, kapena mwanawankhosa aliyense, kapena mwanawambuzi aliyense." 
Numbers15:12 Monga mwa kuwerenga kwake kwa izi muzikonza, muzitero ndi yonse monga mwa kuwerenga kwake." 
Numbers15:13 Onse akubadwa m'dzikomo achite izi momwemo, pobwera nayo kwa Yehova nsembe yamoto ya fungo lokoma." 
Numbers15:14 Ndipo akakhala nanu mlendo, kapena aliyense wakukhala pakati pa inu mwa mibadwo yanu, nakachitira Yehova nsembe yamoto ya fungo lokoma; monga muchita inu, momwemo iyenso," 
Numbers15:15 Kunena za khamu, pakhale lemba limodzi kwa inu, ndi kwa mlendo wakukhala kwanu, ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu; monga mukhala inu, momwemo mlendo pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers15:16 Pakhale chilamulo chimodzi ndi chiweruzo chimodzi kwa inu ndi kwa mlendo wakukhala kwanu. 
Numbers15:17 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers15:18 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Pamene mulowa m'dziko limene ndilikukulowetsani," 
Numbers15:19 kudzali, pakudya inu mkate wa m'dzikolo, muzikwezera Yehova nsembe yokweza." 
Numbers15:20 Pa mtanda wanu woyamba muperekeko kamtanda, kakhale nsembe yokweza; monga mumachitira nsembe yokweza ya popuntha tirigu, momwemo muzikakweza," 
Numbers15:21 Muzipatsa Yehova nsembe yokweza yoitenga ku mtanda wanu woyamba, mwa mibadwo yanu." 
Numbers15:22 Ndipo pamene mulakwa, osachita mau awa onse amene Yehova ananena ndi Mose;" 
Numbers15:23 ndizo zonse Yehova anakuuzani ndi dzanja la Mose, kuyambira tsikulo Yehova anauza, ndi kunkabe m'mibadwo yanu;" 
Numbers15:24 pamenepo kudzali, ngati anachichita osati dala, osachidziwa khamulo, khamu lonse lipereke ng'ombe yamphongo ikhale nsembe yopsereza, ya fungo lokoma ya Yehova, pamodzi ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira, monga mwa chiweruzo chake; ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo." 
Numbers15:25 Ndipo wansembe azichita chotetezera khamu lonse la ana a Israele, ndipo adzakhululukidwa; popeza sanachite dala, ndipo anadza nacho chopereka chao, nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova, ndi nsembe yao yauchimo pamaso pa Yehova, chifukwa cha kulakwa osati dala." 
Numbers15:26 Ndipo khamu lonse la ana a Israele, adzakhululukidwa, ndi mlendo yemwe wakukhala pakati pao; popeza khamu lonse linachichita osati dala." 
Numbers15:27 Ndipo akachimwa munthu mmodzi osati dala, abwere nayo mbuzi yamsoti ya chaka chimodzi, ikhale nsembe yauchimo." 
Numbers15:28 Ndipo wansembe achite chomtetezera munthu wakulakwa, osalakwa dala pamaso pa Yehova, kumchita chomtetezera; ndipo adzakhululukidwa." 
Numbers15:29 Kunena za wobadwa m'dziko mwa ana a Israele, ndi mlendo wakukhala pakati pao, mukhale nacho chilamulo chimodzi kwa iye wakuchita kanthu kosati dala." 
Numbers15:30 Koma munthu wakuchita kanthu dala, ngakhale wobadwa m'dziko kapena mlendo, yemweyo achitira Yehova mwano; ndipo munthuyo amsadze pakati pa anthu a mtundu wake." 
Numbers15:31 Popeza ananyoza mau a Yehova, nathyola lamulo lake; munthuyu amsadze konse; mphulupulu yake ikhale pa iye." 
Numbers15:32 Ndipo pokhala ana a Israele m'chipululu, anapeza munthu wakufuna nkhuni tsiku la Sabata." 
Numbers15:33 Ndipo amene adampezawo alinkufuna nkhuni anabwera naye kwa Mose ndi Aroni, ndi kwa khamu lonse." 
Numbers15:34 Ndipo anathanga wamsunga, popeza sichinanenedwa choyenera kumchitira iye." 
Numbers15:35 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Amuphe munthuyu ndithu; khamu lonse limponye miyala kunja kwa chigono." 
Numbers15:36 Pamenepo khamu lonse linamtulutsa kunja kwa chigono, ndi kumponya miyala, ndipo anafa; monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers15:37 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers15:38 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuwauze kuti adziombere mphonje m'mphepete mwa zovala zao, mwa mibadwo yao, naike pamphonje m'mphepetemo thonje lamadzi." 
Numbers15:39 Ndipo chikhale kwa inu mphonje, yakuti muziyang'anirako, ndi kukumbukira malamulo onse a Yehova, ndi kuwachita, ndi kuti musamazondazonda kutsata za m'mtima mwanu, ndi za m'maso mwanu zimene mumatsata ndi chigololo;" 
Numbers15:40 kuti mukumbukire ndi kuchita malamulo anga onse, ndi kukhala wopatulikira Mulungu wanu." 
Numbers15:41 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, wakukutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Numbers16:1 Koma Kora, mwana wa Izihara, mwana wa Kohati, mwana wa Levi, anatenga Datani ndi Abiramu, ana a Eliyabu, ndi Oni mwana wa Peleti, ana a Rubeni;" 
Numbers16:2 ndipo anauka pamaso pa Mose, pamodzi ndi amuna mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu a ana a Israele, ndiwo akalonga a khamulo, oitanidwa a msonkhano, amuna omveka." 
Numbers16:3 Ndipo anasonkhana motsutsana pa Mose ndi Aroni, nanena nao, Mukula mphamvu inu, pakuti khamu lonse nlopatulika, onsewa, ndipo Yehova ali pakati pao; mudzikuza bwanji pa msonkhano wa Yehova?" 
Numbers16:4 Pamene Mose anamva ichi anagwa nkhope yake pansi; 
Numbers16:5 nanena ndi Kora ndi khamu lake lonse, ndi kuti, M'mawa Yehova adzatizindikiritsa anthu ake ndi ayani, wopatulika ndani, amene adzamsendeza pafupi pa Iye; ndi iye amene anamsankha adzamsendeza pafupi pa Iye." 
Numbers16:6 Chitani ichi; dzitengereni mbale za zofukiza, Kora, ndi khamu lake lonse;" 
Numbers16:7 nimuikemo moto, muikenso chofukiza pamenepo, pamaso pa Yehova, mawa; ndipo kudzali kuti amene Yehova amsankha, wopatulika ndiye; mwakula mphamvu, inu ana a Levi." 
Numbers16:8 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi Kora, Tamvani tsono, inu ana a Levi;" 
Numbers16:9 kodi muchiyesa chinthu chaching'ono, kuti Mulungu wa Israele anakusiyanitsani ku khamu la Israele, kukusendezani pafupi pa Iye, kuchita ntchito ya Kachisi wa Yehova, ndi kuima pamaso pa khamu kuwatumikira;" 
Numbers16:10 ndi kuti anakusendeza iwe, ndi abale ako onse, ana a Levi, pamodzi ndi iwe? Ndipo kodi mufunanso ntchito ya nsembe?" 
Numbers16:11 Chifukwa chake, iwe ndi khamu lonse mwasonkhana kutsutsana ndi Yehova; ndipo Aroniyo ndani, kuti mudandaule pa iye?" 
Numbers16:12 Ndipo Mose anatuma kukaitaniza Datani ndi Abiramu, ana a Eliyabu; koma anati, Sitifikako:" 
Numbers16:13 kodi ndi chinthu chaching'ono kuti watikweza kutichotsa m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi, kutipha m'chipululu; koma udziyesanso ndithu kalonga wa ife?" 
Numbers16:14 Ndiponso sunatilowetsa m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi, kapena kutipatsa cholowa cha minda, ndi minda yamphesa; kodi udzakolowola amuna awa maso ao: Sitifikako." 
Numbers16:15 Pamenepo Mose adapsa mtima, ndipo anati kwa Yehova, Musasamalira chopereka chao; sindinalanda bulu wao mmodzi, kapena kuchitira choipa mmodzi wa iwowa." 
Numbers16:16 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Kora, Iwe ndi khamu lako lonse mukhale pamaso pa Yehova mawa, iwe ndi iwowa, ndi Aroni;" 
Numbers16:17 nimutenge munthu yense mbale yake yofukizamo, nimuike chofukiza m'mwemo, nimubwere nazo, yense mbale yake yofukizamo pamaso pa Yehova, mbale zofukizamo mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu; ndi iwe, ndi Aroni, yense mbale yake yofukizamo." 
Numbers16:18 Potero munthu yense anatenga mbale yake yofukizamo, naikamo moto, naikapo chofukiza, naima pa khomo la chihema chokomanako pamodzi ndi Mose ndi Aroni." 
Numbers16:19 Ndipo Kora anasonkhanitsa khamu lonse mopikisana nao ku khomo la chihema chokomanako; ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka kwa khamu lonse. 
Numbers16:20 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers16:21 Dzipatuleni pakati pa khamu lino, kuti ndiwathe m'kamphindi." 
Numbers16:22 Ndipo anagwa nkhope zao pansi, nati, Mulungu, ndinu Mulungu wa mizimu ya anthu onse, walakwa munthu mmodzi, ndipo kodi mukwiya nalo khamu lonse?" 
Numbers16:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers16:24 Nena ndi khamulo, ndi kuti, Kwerani kuchoka pozungulira mahema a Kora, Datani, ndi Abiramu." 
Numbers16:25 Ndipo Mose anauka namuka kwa Datani ndi Abiramu; ndi akulu a Israele anamtsata. 
Numbers16:26 Ndipo ananena ndi khamulo, nati, Chokanitu ku mahema a anthu awa oipa, musamakhudza kanthu kao kalikonse, mungaonongeke m'zochimwa zao zonse." 
Numbers16:27 Potero anakwera kuchokera pozungulira mahema a Kora, Datani, ndi Abiramu, ndipo Datani ndi Abiramu anatuluka, naima pakhomo pa mahema ao, ndi akazi ao, ndi ana ao amuna, ndi makanda ao." 
Numbers16:28 Ndipo Mose anati, Ndi ichi mudzadziwa kuti Yehova wanditumiza ine kuchita ntchito izi zonse, ndi kuti sizifuma m'mtima mwangamwanga." 
Numbers16:29 Akafa anthu awa monga amafa anthu onse, kapena akasungika monga amasungika anthu onse, Yehova sananditumize ine." 
Numbers16:30 Koma Yehova akalenga chinthu chatsopano, ndi nthaka ikayasama pakamwa pake, nikawameza ndi zonse ali nazo, nakatsikira iwo kumanda ali ndi moyo; pamenepo mudzadziwa kuti anthu awa anyoza Mulungu." 
Numbers16:31 Ndipo kunali, pakutha iye kunena mau awa onse, nthaka inang'ambika pansi pao;" 
Numbers16:32 ndi dziko linayasama pakamwa pake ndi kuwameza, iwo ndi mabanja ao, ndi amuna ao onse akutsata Kora, ndi akatundu ao onse." 
Numbers16:33 Chomwecho iwowa, ndi onse anali nao, anatsikira kumanda ali ndi moyo, ndi dziko linasunama pa iwo, ndipo anaonongeka pakati pa msonkhano." 
Numbers16:34 Ndipo Aisraele onse akukhala pozinga pao anathawa pakumva kufuula kwao; pakuti anati, Lingatimeze dziko ifenso." 
Numbers16:35 Ndipo moto unatuluka kwa Yehova, ndi kunyeketsa amuna mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu aja akubwera nacho chofukiza." 
Numbers16:36 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers16:37 Nena ndi Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembe, kuti aphule mbale zofukiza pakati pa moto, nutaye makalawo uko kutali: pakuti zili zopatulika;" 
Numbers16:38 mbale zofukizazo za iwo amene adachimwira moyo waowao, ndipo azisule zaphanthiphanthi, zikhale chivundikiro cha guwa la nsembe; popeza anabwera nazo pamaso pa Yehova, chifukwa chake zikhala zopatulika; ndipo zidzakhala chizindikiro kwa ana a Israele." 
Numbers16:39 Ndipo Eleazara wansembe anatenga mbale zofukiza zamkuwa, zimene anthu opsererawo adabwera nazo; ndipo anazisula zaphanthiphanthi zikhale chivundikiro cha guwa la nsembe;" 
Numbers16:40 chikhale chikumbutso kwa ana a Israele, kuti mlendo, wosati wa mbeu ya Aroni, asasendere kuchita chofukiza pamaso pa Yehova; angakhale monga Kora ndi khamu lake; monga Yehova adanena naye ndi dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers16:41 Koma m'mawa mwake khamu lonse la ana a Israele anadandaula pa Mose ndi Aroni, nati, Mwapha anthu a Yehova, inu." 
Numbers16:42 Ndipo kunali, posonkhanidwa khamulo kutsutsana nao Mose ndi Aroni, kuti anacheukira chihema chokomanako; taonani, mtambo unachiphimba, ndi ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka." 
Numbers16:43 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anadza kukhomo kwa chihema chokomanako. 
Numbers16:44 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers16:45 Kwerani kuchoka pakati pa khamu lino, kuti ndiwathe m'kamphindi. Pamenepo adagwa nkhope zao pansi." 
Numbers16:46 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni, Tenga mbale yako yofukiza, nuikemo moto wa ku guwa la nsembe, nuikepo chofukiza, nufulumire kumuka ku khamulo, nuwachitire chowatetezera; pakuti watuluka mkwiyo pamaso pa Yehova; wayamba mliri." 
Numbers16:47 Ndipo Aroni anatenga monga Mose adanena, nathamanga kulowa pakati pa msonkhano; ndipo taonani, udayamba mliri pakati pa anthu; ndipo anaikapo chofukiza nawachitira anthu chowatetezera." 
Numbers16:48 Ndipo anaima pakati pa akufa ndi amoyo; ndi mliri unaleka. 
Numbers16:49 Koma akufa nao mliri ndiwo zikwi khumi ndi zinai mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri, osawerenga aja adafera chija cha Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Ndipo Aroni anabwera kwa Mose ku khomo la chihema chokomanako; ndi mliri unaleka. 
Numbers17:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers17:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nulandire kwa yense ndodo, banja lililonse la makolo ndodo imodzi, mtsogoleri wa mafuko ao onse monga mwa mabanja a makolo ao azipereka ndodo, zikhale khumi ndi ziwiri; nulembe dzina la yense pa ndodo yake." 
Numbers17:3 Ndipo ulembe dzina la Aroni pa ndodo ya Levi; pakuti pakhale ndodo imodzi pa mkulu yense wa nyumba za makolo ao. 
Numbers17:4 Ndipo uziike m'chihema chokomanako, chakuno cha mboni, kumene ndikomana ndi inu." 
Numbers17:5 Ndipo kudzali, kuti ndodo ya munthu ndimsankheyo, idzaphuka; ndipo ndidzadziletsera madandaulo a ana a Israele amene adandaula nao pa inu." 
Numbers17:6 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israele, ndipo akalonga ao onse anapereka, yense ndodo imodzi, monga mwa mabanja a makolo ao, ndodo khumi ndi ziwiri; ndi ndodo ya Aroni inakhala pakati pa ndodo zao." 
Numbers17:7 Ndipo Mose anaika ndodozo pamaso pa Yehova m'chihema cha mboni. 
Numbers17:8 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwake, kuti Mose analowa m'chihema cha mboni; ndipo taonani, ndodo ya Aroni, ya pa banja la Levi, inaphuka, nionetsa timaani, nichita maluwa, nipatsa akatungurume." 
Numbers17:9 Ndipo Mose anatulutsa ndodo zonse kuzichotsa pamaso pa Yehova, azione ana onse a Israele; ndipo anapenya, natenga yense ndodo yake." 
Numbers17:10 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Bweza ndodo ya Aroni kuiika chakuno cha mboni, isungike ikhale chizindikiro cha pa ana opikisana; kuti unditsirizire madandaulo ao, kuti ungafe." 
Numbers17:11 Ndipo Mose anachita monga Yehova adamuuza, momwemo anachita." 
Numbers17:12 Pamenepo ana a Israele ananena ndi Mose, nati, Taonani, tikufa, tionongeka, tionongeka tonse." 
Numbers17:13 Yense wakuyandikiza Kachisi wa Yehova amwalira; kodi tidzatha nkufa? 
Numbers18:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Aroni, Iwe ndi ana ako amuna ndi banja la kholo lako pamodzi ndi iwe muzisenza mphulupulu ya malo opatulika; ndipo iwe ndi ana ako amuna pamodzi ndi iwe musenze mphulupulu ya ntchito yanu ya nsembe." 
Numbers18:2 Ndiponso abale ako, fuko la Alevi, fuko la kholo lako, uwayandikizitse pamodzi ndi iwe, kuti aphatikane ndi iwe, ndi kukutumikira; koma iwe ndi ana ako pamodzi ndi iwe mukhale ku khomo la chihema cha mboni." 
Numbers18:3 Ndipo asunge udikiro wako, ndi udikiro wa chihema chonse; koma asayandikize zipangizo za malo opatulika, ndi guwa la nsembe, kuti mungafe, iwo ndi inu." 
Numbers18:4 Koma aziphatikana nawe, nazisunga udikiro wa chihema chokomanako, kuchita ntchito yonse ya chihema; koma mlendo asayandikize inu." 
Numbers18:5 Ndipo musunge udikiro wa malo opatulika, ndi udikiro wa guwa la nsembe; kuti pasakhalenso mkwiyo pa ana a Israele." 
Numbers18:6 Ndipo Ine, taonani, ndinatenga abale anu Alevi kuwachotsa pakati pa ana a Israele; ndiwo mphatso yanu, yopatsidwa kwa Yehova, kuchita ntchito ya chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers18:7 Ndipo iwe ndi ana ako amuna pamodzi ndi iwe muchite ntchito yanu ya nsembe, pa zonse za ku guwa la nsembe, ndi za m'kati mwa nsalu yotchinga; ndipo mutumikire; ndikupatsani ntchito yanu ya nsembe, utumiki wopatsika kwaulere; koma mlendo wakuyandikiza amuphe." 
Numbers18:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Aroni, Ndipo taona, Ine ndakupatsa udikiro wa nsembe zanga zokweza, ndizo zopatulika zonse za ana a Israele; chifukwa cha kudzozedwaku ndazipereka kwa iwe, ndi kwa ana ako amuna, likhale lemba losatha." 
Numbers18:9 Izi ndi zako pa zinthu zopatulika kwambiri, zosafika kumoto; zopereka zao zonse, ndi nsembe zao zonse zaufa, ndi nsembe zao zonse zauchimo, ndi nsembe zao zonse zopalamula, zimene andibwezera Ine, zikhale zopatulika kwambiri za iwe ndi za ana ako amuna." 
Numbers18:10 Muzizidya izi monga zopatulika kwambiri; mwamuna yense adyeko; uziyese zopatulika. 
Numbers18:11 Zako ndi izinso: nsembe yokweza ya mphatso yao, ndi nsembe zoweyula zonse za ana a Israele; ndazipereka kwa iwe, ndi kwa ana ako amuna ndi kwa ana ako akazi pamodzi ndi iwe, likhale lemba losatha; oyera onse a m'banja lako adyeko." 
Numbers18:12 Mafuta onse okometsetsa, ndi vinyo watsopano, ndi tirigu yense wokometsetsa. Zipatso zao zoyamba zimene aziperekako kwa Yehova, ndazipereka kwa iwe." 
Numbers18:13 Zipatso zoyamba zonse zili m'dziko mwao, zimene amadza nazo kwa Yehova, zikhale zako; oyera onse a m'banja lako adyeko." 
Numbers18:14 Zilizonse zoperekedwa chiperekere m'Israele ndi zako. 
Numbers18:15 Zilizonse zoyambira kubadwa mwa zamoyo zonse zimene abwera nazo kwa Yehova, mwa anthu ndi mwa nyama, ndi zako; koma munthu woyamba kubadwa uzimuombola ndithu; ndi nyama yodetsa yoyamba kubadwa uziiombola." 
Numbers18:16 Ndipo zimene ziti zidzaomboledwa uziombole kuyambira za mwezi umodzi, monga mwa kuyesa kwako, pa ndalama za masekeli asanu, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika, ndiwo magera makumi awiri." 
Numbers18:17 Koma ng'ombe yoyamba kubadwa, kapena nkhosa yoyamba kubadwa, kapena mbuzi yoyamba kubadwa, usaziombola; ndizo zopatulika; uwaze mwazi wake pa guwa la nsembe, ndi kufukiza mafuta ao, nsembe yamoto ya fungo lokoma kwa Yehova." 
Numbers18:18 Ndipo nyama yake ndi yako, ndiyo nganga ya nsembe yoweyula ndi mwendo wathako wa kulamanja, ndizo zako." 
Numbers18:19 Nsembe zokweza zonse za zinthu zopatulika, zimene ana a Israele azikweza kwa Yehova, ndazipereka kwa iwe, ndi kwa ana ako amuna ndi kwa ana ako akazi pamodzi ndi iwe, likhale lemba losatha; ndilo pangano lamchere losatha, pamaso pa Yehova, kwa iwe ndi mbeu zako pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Numbers18:20 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Aroni, Ulibe cholowa m'dziko lao, ulibe gawo pakati pao; Ine ndine gawo lako ndi cholowa chako pakati pa ana a Israele." 
Numbers18:21 Ndipo taonani, ndawaninkha ana a Levi limodzi la magawo khumi mwa zonse m'Israele, likhale cholowa chao, mphotho ya pa ntchito yao alikuichita, ntchito ya chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers18:22 Ndipo kuyambira tsopano ana a Israele asayandikize chihema chokomanako, angamasenze uchimo kuti angafe." 
Numbers18:23 Koma Alevi azichita ntchito ya chihema chokomanako, iwo ndiwo azisenza mphulupulu yao; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu; ndipo asakhale nacho cholowa pakati pa ana a Israele." 
Numbers18:24 Popeza ndapatsa Alevi limodzi la magawo khumi, la ana a Israele, limene apereka nsembe yokweza kwa Yehova, likhale cholowa chao; chifukwa chake ndanena nao, Asadzakhale nacho cholowa mwa ana a Israele." 
Numbers18:25 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers18:26 Unenenso ndi Alevi, nuti nao, Pamene mulandira kwa ana a Israele, limodzi la magawo khumi limene ndakupatsani likhale cholowa chanu chochokera kwao, muziperekako nsembe yokweza ya Yehova, limodzi la magawo khumi la limodzi la magawo khumi." 
Numbers18:27 Ndipo akuyesereninso nsembe yanu yokweza monga tirigu wa padwale, monga mopondera mphesa modzala." 
Numbers18:28 Momwemo inunso muzipereka kwa Yehova nsembe yokweza yochokera ku magawo anu onse a magawo khumi, a zonse muzilandira kwa ana a Israele; ndipo muperekeko nsembe yokweza ya Yehova kwa Aroni wansembe." 
Numbers18:29 Mupereke nsembe zokweza zonse za Yehova kuzitenga ku mphatso zanu zonse, kusankhako zokometsetsa ndizo zopatulika zake." 
Numbers18:30 Chifukwa chake unene nao, Pamene mukwezako zokometsetsa zake, zidzayesedwanso kwa Alevi ngati zipatso za padwale, ndi zipatso za mopondera mphesa." 
Numbers18:31 Ndipo muzidye pamalo ponse, inu ndi a pabanja panu; popeza ndizo mphotho yanu mwa ntchito yanu m'chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers18:32 Ndipo simudzasenzapo uchimo, mutakwezako zokometsetsa zake; ndipo musamaipsa zinthu zopatulika za ana a Israele, kuti mungafe." 
Numbers19:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers19:2 Ili ndi lemba la chilamulo Yehova adalamulirachi, ndi kuti, Nena ndi ana a Israele kuti azikutengera ng'ombe yamsoti yofiira, yangwiro yopanda chilema, yosamanga m'goli;" 
Numbers19:3 ndipo muipereke kwa Eleazara wansembe, naitulutse iye kunja kwa chigono, ndipo wina aiphe pamaso pake." 
Numbers19:4 Ndipo Eleazara wansembe atengeko mwazi wake ndi chala chake, nawazeko mwazi wake kasanu ndi kawiri pakhomo pa chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers19:5 Pamenepo atenthe ng'ombe yamsotiyo pamaso pake; atenthe chikopa chake ndi nyama yake, ndi mwazi wake, pamodzi ndi chipwidza chake." 
Numbers19:6 Ndipo wansembe atenge mtengo wamkungudza, ndi hisope, ndi ubweya wofiira, naziponye pakati pa moto ilikupsererapo ng'ombe yamsoti." 
Numbers19:7 Pamenepo wansembe atsuke zovala zake, nasambe thupi lake ndi madzi; ndipo atatero alowenso kuchigono; koma wansembeyo adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo." 
Numbers19:8 Ndipo iye wakutentha ng'ombeyo atsuke zovala zake, nasambe thupi lake ndi madzi, nadzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo." 
Numbers19:9 Ndipo munthu woyera aole mapulusa a ng'ombe yaikaziyo, nawaike kunja kwa chigono, m'malo moyera: ndipo awasungire khamu la ana a Israele akhale a madzi akusiyanitsa; ndiwo nsembe yauchimo." 
Numbers19:10 Ndipo wakuola mapulusayo a ng'ombe yaikazi atsuke zovala zake, nadzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo; ndipo likhale lemba losatha kwa ana a Israele, ndi kwa mlendo wakukhala pakati pao." 
Numbers19:11 Iye wakukhudza mtembo wa munthu aliyense adzakhala wodetsedwa masiku asanu ndi awiri; 
Numbers19:12 iyeyo adziyeretse nao tsiku lachitatu, ndi pa tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri adzakhala woyera; koma akapanda kudziyeretsa tsiku lachitatu, sadzakhala woyera tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri." 
Numbers19:13 Aliyense wakukhudza mtembo wa munthu aliyense wakufa, osadziyeretsa, aipsa Kachisi wa Yehova; amsadze munthuyo kwa Israele; popeza sanamwaze madzi akusiyanitsa; ndiye wodetsedwa; kudetsedwa kwake kukali pa iye." 
Numbers19:14 Chilamulo ndi ichi: Munthu akafa m'hema, yense wakulowa m'hemamo, ndi yense wakukhala m'hemamo, adzakhala wodetsedwa masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers19:15 Ndi zotengera zonse zovundukuka, zopanda chivundikiro chomangikapo, zili zodetsedwa." 
Numbers19:16 Ndipo aliyense wakukhudza munthu wophedwa ndi lupanga, kapena mtembo, kapena fupa la munthu, kapena manda, pathengo poyera, adzakhala wodetsedwa masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers19:17 Ndipo atengereko wodetsedwayo mapulusa akupsererawo a nsembe yauchimo, nathirepo m'chotengera madzi oyenda;" 
Numbers19:18 ndi munthu woyera atenge hisope, namviike m'madzimo, ndi kuwawaza pahema ndi pa zotengera zonse, ndi pa anthu anali pomwepo, ndi pa iye wakukhudza fupa, kapena wophedwa, kapena wakufa, kapena manda." 
Numbers19:19 Ndipo woyerayo awaze pa wodetsedwayo tsiku lachitatu, ndi tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri; ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri amyeretse; ndipo atsuke zovala zake, nasambe m'madzi, nadzakhala woyera madzulo." 
Numbers19:20 Koma munthu wakukhala wodetsedwa, koma wosadziyeretsa, azimsadza munthuyo pakati pa msonkhano, popeza waipsa malo opatulika a Yehova; sanamwaze madzi akusiyanitsa; ndiye wodetsedwa." 
Numbers19:21 Ndipo likhale kwa iwo lemba losatha; kuti iye wakuwaza madzi akusiyanitsa azitsuka zovala zake; ndi iye wakukhudza madzi akusiyanitsa adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo. 
Numbers19:22 Ndipo chilichonse munthu wodetsedwa achikhudza chidzakhala chodetsedwa; ndi munthu wakuchikhudza adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo. 
Numbers20:1 Ndipo ana a Israele, ndilo khamu lonse, analowa m'chipululu cha Zini mwezi woyamba; ndipo anthu anakhala m'Kadesi; kumeneko anafa Miriyamu, naikidwa komweko." 
Numbers20:2 Ndipo khamulo linasowa madzi; pamenepo anasonkhana kutsutsana nao Mose ndi Aroni. 
Numbers20:3 Ndipo anthu anatsutsana ndi Mose, nanena, nati, Mwenzi titangomwalira muja abale athu anamwalira pamaso pa Yehova!" 
Numbers20:4 Mwalowa nao bwanji msonkhano wa Yehova m'chipululu muno, kuti tifere mommuno, ife ndi zoweta zathu?" 
Numbers20:5 Ndipo munatikwezeranji kutitulutsa m'Ejipito, kutilowetsa m'malo oipa ano? Si malo a mbeu awa, kapena mkuyu, kapena mpesa kapena makangaza; ngakhale madzi akumwa palibe." 
Numbers20:6 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anachoka pamaso pa msonkhano kunka ku khomo la chihema chokomanako, nagwa nkhope zao pansi; ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unaonekera iwo." 
Numbers20:7 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers20:8 Tenga ndodoyo, nusonkhanitse khamulo; iwe ndi Aroni mbale wako, munene ndi thanthwe pamaso pao, kuti liwapatse madzi; potero uwatulutsire madzi m'thanthwe, ndi kumwetsa khamu la anthu ndi zoweta zao." 
Numbers20:9 Ndipo Mose anatenga ndodoyo kuichotsa pamaso pa Yehova, monga Iye anamuuza iye." 
Numbers20:10 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anasonkhanitsa msonkhano pathanthwe, nanena nao iye, Tamvanitu, opikisana naye inu; kodi tikutulutsireni madzi m'thanthwe umu?" 
Numbers20:11 Ndipo Mose anasamula dzanja lake, napanda thanthwe kawiri ndi ndodo; ndipo madzi anatulukamo ochuluka, ndi khamulo linamwa, ndi zoweta zao zomwe." 
Numbers20:12 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, Popeza simunandikhulupirira Ine, kundipatula Ine pamaso pa ana a Israele, chifukwa chake simudzalowetsa msonkhano uwu m'dziko ndinawapatsali." 
Numbers20:13 Awa ndi madzi a Meriba; popeza ana a Israele anatsutsana ndi Yehova, ndipo anapatulidwa mwa iwowa." 
Numbers20:14 Pamenepo Mose anatumiza amithenga ochokera ku Kadesi kumuka kwa mfumu ya Edomu, ndi kuti, Atero mbale wanu Israele, Mudziwa zowawa zonse zinatigwera;" 
Numbers20:15 kuti makolo athu anatsikira kunka ku Ejipito, ndipo tinakhala m'Ejipito masiku ambiri; ndipo Aejipito anachitira zoipa ife, ndi makolo athu." 
Numbers20:16 Pamenepo tinafuulira kwa Yehova, ndipo anamva mau athu, natuma mthenga, natitulutsa m'Ejipito; ndipo, taonani, tili m'Kadesi, ndiwo mudzi wa malekezero a malire anu." 
Numbers20:17 Tipitetu pakati pa dziko lanu; sitidzapitira pamunda, kapena munda wampesa, sitidzamwa madzi a m'zitsime; tidzatsata mseu wachifumu; sitidzapatukira kulamanja kapena kulamanzere, mpaka titapitirira malire anu." 
Numbers20:18 Koma Edomu ananena naye, Usapitire pakati pa ine, kuti ndingatuluke kukomana nawe ndi lupanga." 
Numbers20:19 Ndipo ana a Israele ananena naye, Tidzatsata mseu; ndipo tikakamwa madzi ako, ine ndi zoweta zanga, pamenepo ndidzapatsa mtengo wake; sindifuna kanthu kena koma kungopitapo mwa njira." 
Numbers20:20 Koma anati, Usapitirepo. Ndipo Edomu anatulukira kukumana naye ndi anthu ambiri, ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Numbers20:21 Potero Edomu anakana kulola Israele kupitira pa malire ake; chifukwa chake Aisraele anampatukira. 
Numbers20:22 Ndipo anayenda ulendo kuchokera ku Kadesi; ndi ana a Israele, ndilo khamu lonse, anadza kuphiri la Hori." 
Numbers20:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni m'phiri la Hori, pa malire a dziko la Edomu, ndi kuti," 
Numbers20:24 Aroni adzaitanidwa kunka kwa anthu a mtundu wake; pakuti sadzalowa m'dziko limene ndapatsa ana a Israele, popeza munapikisana ndi mau anga ku madzi a Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Tenga Aroni ndi Eleazara mwana wake, nukwere nao m'phiri la Hori;" 
Numbers20:26 nuvule Aroni zovala zake, numveke Eleazara mwana wake; ndipo Aroni adzaitanidwa kunka kwa anthu a mtundu wake, nadzafa komweko." 
Numbers20:27 Pamenepo Mose anachita monga adamulamula Yehova; ndipo anakwera m'phiri la Hori pamaso pa khamu lonse. 
Numbers20:28 Ndipo Mose anavula Aroni zovala zake, naveka Eleazara mwana wake; ndipo Aroni anafa pomwepo pamwamba pa phiri. Pamenepo Mose ndi Eleazara anatsika m'phirimo." 
Numbers20:29 Pamene khamu lonse linaona kuti Aroni adamwalira, anamlira Aroni masiku makumi atatu, ndiyo mbumba yonse ya Israele." 
Numbers21:1 Pamene Mkanani, mfumu ya Aradi, wokhala kumwera, anamva kuti Israele anadzera njira ya Atarimu, anathira nkhondo pa Israele, nagwira ena akhale ansinga." 
Numbers21:2 Ndipo Israele analonjeza chowinda kwa Yehova, nati, Mukadzaperekatu anthu awa m'dzanja langa, ndidzaononga midzi yao konse." 
Numbers21:3 Ndipo Yehova anamvera mau a Israele, napereka Akanani; ndipo anawaononga konse ndi midzi yao yomwe; natcha dzina lake la malowo Horoma." 
Numbers21:4 Ndipo anayenda ulendo kuchokera kuphiri la Hori, nadzera njira ya Nyanja Yofiira, kupaza ku dziko la Edomu; ndi mtima wa anthu unada chifukwa cha njirayo." 
Numbers21:5 Ndipo anthu ananena motsutsana ndi Mulungu, ndi Mose, ndi kuti, Mwatikwezeranji kutichotsa ku Ejipito kuti tifere m'chipululu? Pakuti mkate ndi madzi palibe, ndi mtima wathu walema nao mkate wachabe uwu." 
Numbers21:6 Pamenepo Yehova anatumiza njoka zamoto pakati pa anthu, ndipo zinaluma anthu; nafapo anthu ambiri a Israele." 
Numbers21:7 Ndipo anthu anadza kwa Mose, nati, Tachimwa, popeza tinanena motsutsana ndi Yehova, ndi inu; pempherani kwa Yehova kuti atichotsere njokazi. Ndipo Mose anawapempherera anthu." 
Numbers21:8 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Upange njoka yamoto, nuiike pa mtengo wake; ndipo kudzali, kuti onse olumwa, akuipenya njokayo, adzakhala ndi moyo." 
Numbers21:9 Ndipo Mose anapanga njoka yamkuwa, naiika pamtengo; ndipo kunali, njoka itamluma munthu aliyense, nakapenyetsetsa iye pa njoka yamkuwa, nakhala ndi moyo." 
Numbers21:10 Pamenepo ana a Israele anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema m'Oboti." 
Numbers21:11 Ndipo anachoka ku Oboti, namanga mahema ku Iyeabarimu, m'chipululu chakuno cha Mowabu, kotulukira dzuwa." 
Numbers21:12 Pochokapo anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema m'chigwa cha Zeredi." 
Numbers21:13 Atachokako anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema tsidya lina la Arinoni, wokhala m'chipululu, wogwera ku malire a Aamori; popeza Arinoni ndiwo malire a Mowabu, pakati pa Mowabu ndi Aamori." 
Numbers21:14 Chifukwa chake, ananena m'buku la Nkhondo za Yehova, Waheba m'Sufa, ndi miyendo ya Arinoni;" 
Numbers21:15 ndi zigwa za miyendoyo zakutsikira kwao kwa Ari, ndi kuyandikizana ndi malire a Mowabu." 
Numbers21:16 Ndipo atachokapo anamuka ku Beere, ndicho chitsime chimene Yehova anachinena kwa Mose, Sonkhanitsa anthu, ndipo ndidzawapatsa madzi." 
Numbers21:17 Pamenepo Israele anaimba nyimbo iyi, Tumphuka chitsime iwe; muchithirire mang'ombe;" 
Numbers21:18 chitsime adakumba mafumu, adachikonza omveka a anthu; atanena mlamuli, ndi ndodo zao. Ndipo atachoka kuchipululu anamuka ku Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 atachoka ku Matana ku Nahaliyele; atachoka ku Nahaliyele ku Bamoti; 
Numbers21:20 atachoka ku Bamoti ku chigwa chili m'dziko la Mowabu, ku mutu wa Pisiga, popenyana ndi chipululu." 
Numbers21:21 Ndipo Israele anatuma amithenga kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, ndi kuti," 
Numbers21:22 Ndipitire pakati pa dziko lako; sitidzapatuka kulowa m'munda, kapena m'munda wampesa, sitidzamwako madzi a m'zitsime; tidzatsata mseu wachifumu, kufikira tapitirira malire ako." 
Numbers21:23 Ndipo Sihoni sanalole Israele apitire m'malire ake; koma Sihoni anamemeza anthu ake onse, nadzakomana naye Israele m'chipululu, nafika ku Yahazi, nathira nkhondo pa Israele." 
Numbers21:24 Ndipo Israele anamkantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nalanda dziko lake likhale laolao, kuyambira Arinoni kufikira Yaboki, kufikira ana a Amoni; popeza malire a ana a Amoni ndiwo olimba." 
Numbers21:25 Ndipo Israele analanda midzi iyi yonse; nakhala Israele m'midzi yonse ya Aamori; m'Hesiboni ndi milaga yake yonse. 
Numbers21:26 Popeza Hesiboni ndiwo mudzi wa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, imene idathira nkhondo pa mfumu idafayo ya Mowabu, nilanda dziko lake m'dzanja lake kufikira Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Chifukwa chake iwo akunena mophiphiritsa akuti, Idzani ku Hesiboni, mudzi wa Sihoni umangike, nukhazikike." 
Numbers21:28 Popeza moto unatuluka m'Hesiboni, chirangali cha moto m'mudzi wa Sihoni; chatha Ari wa Mowabu, eni misanje ya Arinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Tsoka kwa iwe, Mowabu! Mwaonongeka, anthu a Kemosi inu, anapereka ana ake amuna opulumuka, ndi ana ake akazi akhale ansinga, kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori." 
Numbers21:30 Tinawagwetsa; Hesiboni waonongeka kufikira ku Diboni, ndipo tinawapululutsa kufikira ku Nofa. Ndiwo wakufikira ku Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Chomwecho Israele anakhala m'dziko la Aamori. 
Numbers21:32 Ndipo Mose anatumiza anthu akazonde Yazere, nalanda milaga yake, napirikitsa Aamori a komweko." 
Numbers21:33 Ndipo anatembenuka nakwera kudzera njira ya ku Basani; ndipo Ogi mfumu ya ku Basani anatuluka kukumana nao, iye ndi anthu ake onse, kudzachita nao nkhondo ku Ederei." 
Numbers21:34 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Usamuopa; popeza ndampereka m'manja mwako, iye ndi anthu ake onse, ndi dziko lake; umchitire monga umo unachitira Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori anakhalayo ku Hesiboni." 
Numbers21:35 Ndipo anamkantha iye, ndi ana ake amuna ndi anthu ake onse, kufikira sanatsale ndi mmodzi yense; nalanda dziko lake likhale laolao." 
Numbers22:1 Ndipo ana a Israele anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema m'zigwa za Mowabu, tsidya la Yordani ku Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Ndipo Balaki mwana wa Zipori anaona zonse Israele anachitira Aamori. 
Numbers22:3 Ndipo Mowabu anachita mantha akulu ndi anthuwo, popeza anachuluka; nada mtima Mowabu chifukwa cha ana a Israele." 
Numbers22:4 Ndipo Mowabu anati kwa akulu a Midiyani, Tsopano msonkhano uwu udzanyambita zonse zili pozinga pathu, monga ng'ombe zinyambita msipu wa kubusa. Ndipo Balaki mwana wa Zipori anali mfumu ya Mowabu masiku amenewo." 
Numbers22:5 Ndipo anatuma amithenga kwa Balamu mwana wa Beori, ku Petori, wokhala kumtsinje, wa dziko la anthu a mtundu wake, kuti amuitane, ndi kuti, Taonani, anatuluka anthu m'dziko la Ejipito; taonani, aphimba nkhope ya dziko, nakhala popenyana ndi ine." 
Numbers22:6 Ndipo tsopano, idzatu, nunditembererere anthu awa; popeza andiposa mphamvu; kapena ndidzawapambana, kuti tiwakanthe, ndi kuti ndiwapirikitse m'dziko; pakuti ndidziwa kuti iye amene umdalitsa adalitsika, ndi iye amene umtemberera atemberereka." 
Numbers22:7 Ndipo akulu a Mowabu ndi akulu a Midiyani anamuka ndi mphotho za maula m'dzanja lao; anadza kwa Balamu, nanena naye mau a Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Ndipo ananena nao, Mugone kuno usiku uno, ndidzakubwezerani mau, monga Yehova adzanena ndi ine; pamenepo mafumu a Mowabu anagona ndi Balamu." 
Numbers22:9 Ndipo Mulungu anadza kwa Balamu, nati, Anthu awa ali ndi iwe ndiwo ayani?" 
Numbers22:10 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Mulungu, Balaki mwana wa Zipori mfumu ya Mowabu, anatumiza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Numbers22:11 Taonani, anthu awa adatuluka m'Ejipito aphimba nkhope ya dziko, idzatu unditembererere awa; kapena ndidzakhoza kulimbana nao nkhondo, ndi kuwapirikitsa." 
Numbers22:12 Koma Mulungu anati kwa Balamu, Usapita nao; usatemberera anthuwa; pakuti adalitsika." 
Numbers22:13 Ndipo Balamu anauka m'mawa, nati kwa akalonga a Balaki, Mukani ku dziko lanu; popeza Yehova andikaniza kuti ndisapite nanu." 
Numbers22:14 Pamenepo akalonga a Mowabu ananyamuka, nafika kwa Balaki, nati Alikukana Balamu kudza nafe." 
Numbers22:15 Koma Balaki anaonjeza kutumanso akalonga, ochuluka, ndi omveka koposa awa." 
Numbers22:16 Ndipo anadza kwa Balamu, nati kwa iye, Atero Balaki mwana wa Zipori, Pasakhaletu chinthu chakukuletsa kudza kwa ine;" 
Numbers22:17 popeza ndidzakuchitira ulemu waukulu, ndipo zonse unena ndi ine ndidzachita; chifukwa chake idzatu, unditembererere anthu awa." 
Numbers22:18 Ndipo Balamu anayankha nati kwa anyamata a Balaki, Chinkana Balaki andipatsa nyumba yake yodzala ndi siliva ndi golide, sindikhoza kutumpha mau a Yehova Mulungu wanga, kuchepsako kapena kuonjezako." 
Numbers22:19 Ndikupemphani, tsono, khalani pano inu usiku uno womwe; kuti ndidziwe chomwe Yehova adzanenanso nane." 
Numbers22:20 Ndipo Mulungu anadza kwa Balamu usiku, nanena naye, Akadza kukuitana anthuwa, nyamuka, kunka nao, koma mau okhaokha ndinena ndi iwe, ndiwo ukachite." 
Numbers22:21 Pamenepo Balamu anauka m'mawa namanga bulu wake, namuka nao akalonga a ku Mowabu." 
Numbers22:22 Koma anapsa mtima Mulungu chifukwa cha kupita iye, ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anadziika m'njira wotsutsana naye. Ndipo anali wokwera pa bulu wake, ndi anyamata ake awiri anali naye." 
Numbers22:23 Ndipo buluyo anaona mthenga wa Yehova alikuima m'njira, ndi lupanga lake ku dzanja lake; ndi bulu anapatuka m'njira, nalowa kuthengo; ndipo Balamu anampanda bulu kumbwezera kunjira." 
Numbers22:24 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anaima m'njira yopapatiza ya minda yampesa; mbali ina kuli linga, mbali ina linga." 
Numbers22:25 Ndipo bulu anaona mthenga wa Yehova, nadzikankhira kulinga, nakanikiza phazi la Balamu kulinga; ndipo anampandanso." 
Numbers22:26 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anapitiriranso, naima popapatiza, popanda popatukira kulamanja kapena kulamanzere." 
Numbers22:27 Ndipo bulu wake anaona mthenga wa Yehova, nagona pansi, Balamu ali pamsana pake; ndipo Balamu adapsa mtima, nampanda bulu ndi ndodo." 
Numbers22:28 Ndipo Yehova anatsegula pakamwa pake pa bulu, nati uyu kwa Balamu, Ndakuchitanji, kuti wandipanda katatu tsopano?" 
Numbers22:29 Pamenepo Balamu anati kwa bulu, Chifukwa wandipeputsa; mukadakhala lupanga m'dzanja langa tsopano, ndikadakupha iwe." 
Numbers22:30 Ndipo bulu anati kwa Balamu, Si ndine bulu wako amene umayenda wokwera pa ine chiyambire ndili wako kufikira lero lino? Kodi ndikakuchitira chotere ndi kale lonse? Ndipo anati, Iai." 
Numbers22:31 Pamenepo Yehova anapenyetsa maso a Balamu, naona iye mthenga wa Yehova alikuima m'njira, lupanga losolola lili kudzanja, ndipo anawerama mutu wake, nagwa nkhope yake pansi." 
Numbers22:32 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova ananena naye, Wapandiranji bulu wako katatu tsopano? Taona, ndatuluka kuti nditsutsane nawe popeza njira iyi ikugwetsa chamtu pamaso panga;" 
Numbers22:33 koma bulu anandiona, nandipatukira nthawi izi zitatu pondiona; akadapanda kundipatukira, ndikadakupha iwe ndithu, ndi kumsunga iye wamoyo." 
Numbers22:34 Pamenepo Balamu anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova, Ndachimwa, popeza sindinadziwa kuti munaima mondiletsa m'njira; ndipo tsopano, ngati chikuipirani, ndibwerera." 
Numbers22:35 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Balamu, Pita nao anthuwa; koma mau okhaokha ndinena ndi iwe, ndiwo ukanene. Potero Balamu anamuka nao akalonga a Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Pamene Balaki anamva kuti wafika Balamu, anamtulukira kukakomana naye kumudzi wa Mowabu, wokhala m'mphepete mwa Arinoni, ndiwo ku malekezero a malire ake." 
Numbers22:37 Ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Kodi sindinatumiza kwa iwe ndithu kukakuitana? Unalekeranji kudza kwa ine? Sindikhoza kodi kukuchitira ulemu?" 
Numbers22:38 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Taonani, ndafika kwa inu; ngati ndili nayo mphamvu konse tsopano kunena kanthu? Mau amene Mulungu aike m'kamwa mwanga ndiwo ndidzanena." 
Numbers22:39 Ndipo Balamu anamuka ndi Balaki, nafika iwo ku Kiriyati-Huzoti." 
Numbers22:40 Pamenepo Balaki anapha ng'ombe ndi nkhosa, natumizira Balamu, ndi akalonga okhala naye." 
Numbers22:41 Ndipo kunali kuti m'mawa, Balaki anatenga Balamu, nakwera naye ku misanje ya Baala, ndi kumeneko anaona malekezero a anthuwo." 
Numbers23:1 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Ndimangireni kuno maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, nimundikonzere kuno ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Numbers23:2 Ndipo Balaki anachita monga Balamu ananena; ndipo Balaki ndi Balamu anapereka pa guwa la nsembe lililonse ng'ombe ndi nkhosa yamphongo. 
Numbers23:3 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Imani pa nsembe yopsereza yanu, ndipite ine, kapena Yehova akadza kukomana ndi ine; ndipo chimene akandionetsa ine ndidzakufotokozerani. Ndipo anapita pamsanje poyera." 
Numbers23:4 Pamenepo Mulungu anakomana ndi Balamu; ndipo ananena ndi iye, Ndakonza maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, ndipo ndapereka ng'ombe ndi nkhosa yamphongo pa guwa la nsembe lililonse." 
Numbers23:5 Ndipo Yehova anaika mau m'kamwa mwa Balamu, nati, Bwerera kwa Balaki, nukanene chakutichakuti." 
Numbers23:6 Ndipo anabwerera kwa iye, ndipo, taonani, analikuima pa nsembe yopsereza yake, iye ndi akalonga onse a Mowabu." 
Numbers23:7 Ndipo ananena fanizo lake, nati, Ku Aramu ananditenga Balaki, mfumu ya Mowabu ananditenga ku mapiri a kum'mawa, Idza, udzanditembererere Yakobo. Idza, nudzanyoze Israele." 
Numbers23:8 Ndidzatemberera bwanji amene Mulungu sanamtemberere? Ndidzanyoza bwanji, amene Yehova sanamnyoze?" 
Numbers23:9 Pakuti, pokhala pamwamba pa matanthwe ndimpenya, pokhala pa zitunda ndimuyang'ana; taonani, ndiwo anthu akukhala pa okha. Osadziwerengera pakati pa amitundu ena." 
Numbers23:10 Adzawerenga ndani fumbi la Yakobo, kapena kuwerenga limodzi la magawo anai la Israele? Ndipo ine ndife monga amafa oongoka mtima, chitsiriziro changa chifanane nacho chake!" 
Numbers23:11 Pamenepo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Wandichitiranji? Ndinakutenga utemberere adani anga, ndipo taona, wawadalitsa ndithu." 
Numbers23:12 Ndipo anayankha nati, Chimene achiika m'kamwa mwanga Yehova, sindiyenera kodi kunena ichi?" 
Numbers23:13 Ndipo Balaki anati naye, Tiyetu, upite nane kumalo kwina, kumene ukawaona; udzaona malekezero ao okha, osawaona onse; ndipo pokhala pamenepo ukanditembererere iwo." 
Numbers23:14 Ndipo anamuka naye ku thengo la Zofimu, pamwamba pa Pisiga, namangako maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, napereka ng'ombe ndi nkhosa yamphongo pa guwa la nsembe lililonse." 
Numbers23:15 Ndipo anati kwa Balaki, Imani pano pa nsembe yopsereza yanu, ndipite ine ndikakomane ndi Iye uko." 
Numbers23:16 Ndipo Yehova anakomana naye Balamu, naika mau m'kamwa mwake, nati, Bwerera kwa Balaki, nukanene chakutichakuti." 
Numbers23:17 Ndipo anadza kuli iye, ndipo taona, analikuima pa nsembe yake yopsereza, ndi akalonga a Mowabu pamodzi naye. Ndipo Balaki anati kwa iye, Wanenanji Yehova?" 
Numbers23:18 Ndipo ananena fanizo lake, nati, Ukani, Balaki, imvani; ndimvereni, mwana wa Zipori." 
Numbers23:19 Mulungu sindiye munthu, kuti aname; kapena mwana wa munthu, kuti aleke; kodi anena, osachita?" 
Numbers23:20 Kapena kulankhula, osachitsimikiza? Taonani, ndalandira mau akudalitsa, popeza Iye wadalitsa, sinditha kusintha." 
Numbers23:21 Sayang'anira mphulupulu ili m'Yakobo, kapena sapenya kupulukira kuli m'Israele. Yehova Mulungu wake ali ndi iye, ndi mfuu wa mfumu uli pakati pao." 
Numbers23:22 Mulungu awatulutsa m'Ejipito; mphamvu yake ikunga ya njati. 
Numbers23:23 Pakuti palibe nyanga pakati pa Yakobo, kapena ula mwa Israele; pa nyengo yake adzanena kwa Yakobo ndi Israele, chimene Mulungu achita." 
Numbers23:24 Taonani, anthuwo auka ngati mkango waukazi, nadzitukumula ngati mkango waumuna. Sugonanso kufikira utadya nyama yogwira, utamwa mwazi wa zophedwa." 
Numbers23:25 Ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Usawatemberera konse, kapena kuwadalitsa konse." 
Numbers23:26 Koma Balamu anayankha nati kwa Balaki, Sindinakuuzani ndi kuti, Chilichonse achinena Yehova, chomwecho ndizichita?" 
Numbers23:27 Ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Tiyetu, ndimuke nawe kumalo kwina; kapena kudzakomera pamaso pa Mulungu kuti unditembererere iwo pokhala kumeneko." 
Numbers23:28 Ndipo Balaki ananka naye Balamu pamwamba pa Peori, popenyana ndi chipululu." 
Numbers23:29 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Mundimangire pano maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, nimundikonzere pano ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Numbers23:30 Ndipo Balaki anachita monga adanena Balamu, napereka ng'ombe ndi nkhosa yamphongo pa guwa la nsembe lililonse." 
Numbers24:1 Pamene Balamu anaona kuti kudakomera pamaso pa Yehova kudalitsa Israele, sanamuke, monga nthawi zija zina, ku nyanga zolodzera, koma anayang'ana nkhope yake kuchipululu." 
Numbers24:2 Ndipo Balamu anakweza maso ake, naona Israele alikukhala monga mwa mafuko ao; ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unadza pa iye." 
Numbers24:3 Pamenepo ananena fanizo lake, nati, Balamu mwana wa Beori anenetsa, ndi munthuyo anatsinzina maso anenetsa;" 
Numbers24:4 anenetsa wakumva mau a Mulungu, wakuona masomphenya a Wamphamvuyonse, wakugwa pansi maso ake openyuka." 
Numbers24:5 Ha? Mahema ako ngokoma, Yakobo; zokhalamo zako, Israele!" 
Numbers24:6 Ziyalika monga zigwa, monga minda m'mphepete mwa nyanja, monga khonje wooka Yehova, monga mikungudza m'mphepete mwa madzi." 
Numbers24:7 Madzi adzayenda natuluka m'zotungira zake, ndi mbeu zake zidzakhala ku madzi ambiri, ndi mfumu yake idzamveka koposa Agagi, ndi ufumu wake udzamveketsa." 
Numbers24:8 Mulungu amtulutsa m'Ejipito; ali nayo mphamvu yonga ya njati; adzawadya amitundu, ndiwo adani ake. Nadzamphwanya mafupa ao, ndi kuwapyoza ndi mivi yake." 
Numbers24:9 Anauthama, nagona pansi ngati mkango, ngati mkango waukazi; adzamuutsa ndani? Wodalitsika aliyense wakudalitsa iwe, wotemberereka aliyense wakutemberera iwe." 
Numbers24:10 Pamenepo Balaki anapsa mtima pa Balamu, naomba m'manja; ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Ndinakuitana kutemberera adani anga, ndipo unawadalitsa ndithu katatu tsopano." 
Numbers24:11 Chifukwa chake thawira ku malo ako tsopano; ndikadakuchitira ulemu waukulu; koma, taona, Yehova wakuletsera ulemu." 
Numbers24:12 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Kodi sindinauzanso amithenga anu amene munawatumiza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Numbers24:13 Chinkana Balaki akandipatsa nyumba yake yodzala ndi siliva ndi golide, sindikhoza kutumpha mau a Yehova, kuchita chokoma kapena choipa ine mwini wake; chonena Yehova ndicho ndidzanena ine?" 
Numbers24:14 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, ndimuka kwa anthu a mtundu wanga; tiyeni, ndidzakulangizani, ndi kukuuzani zimene anthu awa adzachitira anthu anu, masiku otsiriza." 
Numbers24:15 Ndipo ananena fanizo lake, nati, Balamu mwana wa Beori anenetsa, ndi munthu wotsinzina masoyo anenetsa;" 
Numbers24:16 anenetsa wakumva mau a Mulungu, ndi kudziwa nzeru ya Wam'mwambamwamba, wakuona masomphenya a Wamphamvuyonse, wakugwa pansi wopenyuka maso." 
Numbers24:17 Ndimuona, koma tsopano ai; ndimpenya, koma si pafupi ai; idzatuluka nyenyezi m'Yakobo, ndi ndodo yachifumu idzauka m'Israele, nidzakantha malire a Mowabu, nidzapasula ana onse a Seti." 
Numbers24:18 Ndi Edomu adzakhala akeake, Seiri lomwe lidzakhala lakelake, ndiwo adani ake; koma Israele adzachita zamphamvu." 
Numbers24:19 Ndipo wina wotuluka m'Yakobo adzachita ufumu; nadzapasula otsalira m'mudzi. 
Numbers24:20 Ndipo anayang'ana ku Amaleke, nanena fanizo lake, nati, Amaleke ndiye woyamba wa amitundu; koma chitsiriziro chake, adzaonongeka ku nthawi zonse." 
Numbers24:21 Ndipo anayang'ana Akeni, nanena fanizo lake, nati, kwanu nkokhazikika, wamanga chisa chako m'thanthwe." 
Numbers24:22 Koma Kaini adzaonongeka, kufikira Asiriya adzakumanga nsinga." 
Numbers24:23 Ndipo ananena fanizo lake, nati, Ha! Adzakhala ndi moyo ndani pakuchita ichi Mulungu?" 
Numbers24:24 Koma zombo zidzafika kuchokera ku dooko la Kitimu, ndipo adzasautsa Asiriya, nadzasautsa Eberi, koma iyenso adzaonongeka." 
Numbers24:25 Ndipo Balamu anauka, namuka nabwerera kumalo kwake; ndi Balaki yemwe ananka njira yake." 
Numbers25:1 Ndipo Israele anakhala m'Sitimu, ndipo anthu anayamba kuchita chigololo ndi ana akazi a Mowabu;" 
Numbers25:2 popeza anaitana anthuwo adze ku nsembe za milungu yao; ndipo anthuwo anadya, nagwadira milungu yao." 
Numbers25:3 Pamene Israele anaphatikana ndi Baala-Peori, Yehova anapsa mtima pa Israele." 
Numbers25:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Gwira akulu onse a anthu nuwapachikire Yehova, pali dzuwa poyera, kuti mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova uchoke kwa Israele." 
Numbers25:5 Ndipo Mose anati kwa oweruza a Israele, Iphani, yense anthu ake adaphatikanawo ndi Baala-Peori." 
Numbers25:6 Ndipo, taonani, anadza wina wa ana a Israele, nabwera naye mkazi Mmidiyani kudza naye kwa abale ake, pamaso pa Mose, ndi pamaso pa khamu lonse la ana a Israele, pakulira iwo pa khomo la chihema chokomanako." 
Numbers25:7 Pamene Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe, anachiona, anauka pakati pa khamu, natenga nthungo m'dzanja lake;" 
Numbers25:8 natsata munthu Mwisraele m'hema, nawamoza onse awiri, munthu Mwisraele ndi mkaziyo m'mimba mwake. Pamenepo mliri unaletseka kwa ana a Israele." 
Numbers25:9 Ndipo akufa nao mliri ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri ndi zinai. 
Numbers25:10 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers25:11 Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe, wabweza kuzaza kwanga pa ana a Israele, popeza anachita nsanje ndi nsanje yanga pakati pao, kotero kuti sindinawatha ana a Israele m'nsanje yanga." 
Numbers25:12 Chifukwa chake nena, Taonani, ndimpatsa iye pangano langa la mtendere;" 
Numbers25:13 ndipo lidzakhala kwa iye, ndi kwa mbeu zake zakumtsata pangano la unsembe wosatha, popeza anachita nsanje chifukwa cha Mulungu wake, anawachitira ana a Israele chowatetezera." 
Numbers25:14 Koma dzina la Mwisraele adamuphayo, ndiye amene adamupha pamodzi ndi mkazi Mmidiyani, ndiye Zimiri mwana wa Salu, mfumu ya nyumba ya makolo mwa Asimeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Ndi dzina la mkazi Mmidiyani adamuphayo ndiye Kozibi mwana wamkazi wa Zuri; ndiye mkulu wa anthu a nyumba ya makolo m'Midiyani. 
Numbers25:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers25:17 Sautsa Amidiyani ndi kuwakantha; 
Numbers25:18 popeza akusautsani ndi manyengo ao amene anakunyengani nao; m'chija cha Peori, ndi cha Kozibi, mwana wamkazi wa kalonga wa ku Midiyani, mlongo wao, amene adamupha tsiku la mliri, m'chija cha Peori." 
Numbers26:1 Ndipo kunali, utatha mliriwo, Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembe, nati," 
Numbers26:2 Werenga khamu lonse la ana a Israele, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, onse akutulukira kunkhondo m'Israele."
