Numbers26:3 Pamenepo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe ananena nao m'zidikha za Mowabu pa Yordani kufupi ku Yeriko, ndi kuti," 
Numbers26:4 Awawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu; monga Yehova anawauza Mose ndi ana a Israele, amene adatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Numbers26:5 Rubeni, ndiye woyamba kubadwa wa Israele; ana amuna a Rubeni ndiwo: Hanoki, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahanoki; Palu, ndiye kholo la banja la Apalu;" 
Numbers26:6 Hezironi, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahezironi; Karimi, ndiye kholo la banja la Akarimi." 
Numbers26:7 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Arubeni; owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi atatu. 
Numbers26:8 Mwana wamwamuna wa Palu ndiye Eliyabu. 
Numbers26:9 Ndi ana a Eliyabu: Nemuwele, ndi Datani ndi Abiramu. Iwo ndiwo Datani ndi Abiramu omwe aja oitanidwa a khamu, amene anatsutsana ndi Mose ndi Aroni mu msonkhano wa Kora, muja anatsutsana ndi Yehova;" 
Numbers26:10 ndipo dziko linayasama pakamwa pake, ndi kuwameza pamodzi ndi Kora, pakufa msonkhano uja; muja moto unaononga amuna mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu, nakhala iwo chizindikiro." 
Numbers26:11 Koma sanafe ana amuna a Kora. 
Numbers26:12 Ana amuna a Simeoni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Nemuwele, ndiye kholo la banja la Anemuwele; Yamini, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayamini; Yakini, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayakini;" 
Numbers26:13 Zera, ndiye kholo la banja la Azera; Shaulo, ndiye kholo la banja la Ashaulo." 
Numbers26:14 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Asimeoni, zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana ziwiri." 
Numbers26:15 Ana amuna a Gadi monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Zefoni, ndiye kholo la banja la Azefoni; Hagi, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahagi; Suni, ndiye kholo la banja la Suni;" 
Numbers26:16 Ozini, ndiye kholo la banja la Aozini; Eri, ndiye kholo la banja la Aeri;" 
Numbers26:17 Arodi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aarodi; Areli, ndiye kholo la banja la Aareli." 
Numbers26:18 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a ana a Gadi, monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi anai ndi mazana asanu." 
Numbers26:19 Ana amuna a Yuda, ndiwo Eri ndi Onani; ndipo Eri ndi Onani anamwalira m'dziko la Kanani." 
Numbers26:20 Ndipo ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Sela, ndiye kholo la banja la Asela; Perezi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aperezi; Zera, ndiye kholo la banja la Azera." 
Numbers26:21 Ndipo ana a Perezi ndiwo: Hezironi, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahezironi; Hamuli, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Yuda monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers26:23 Ana amuna a Isakara monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Tola, ndiye kholo la banja la Atola; Puva, ndiye kholo la banja la Apuni;" 
Numbers26:24 Yasubu, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayasubu; Simironi, ndiye kholo la banja la Asimironi." 
Numbers26:25 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Isakara monga mwa owerengedwa ao; zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zinai kudza mazana atatu. 
Numbers26:26 Ana amuna a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Seredi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aseredi; Eloni, ndiye kholo la banja la Aeloni; Yaleele, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayaleele." 
Numbers26:27 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Zebuloni monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers26:28 Ana amuna a Yosefe monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Manase ndi Efuremu. 
Numbers26:29 Ana a Manase ndiwo: Makiri, ndiye kholo la banja la Amakiri; ndipo Makiri anabala Giliyadi; ndiye kholo la banja la Agiliyadi." 
Numbers26:30 Ana a Giliyadi ndiwo: Iyezere, ndiye kholo la banja la Aiyezere; Heleki, ndiye kholo la banja la Aheleki;" 
Numbers26:31 ndi Asiriele, ndiye kholo la banja la Aasiriele; ndi Sekemu, ndiye kholo la banja la Asekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 ndi Semida, ndiye kholo la banja la Asemida; ndi Hefere, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahefere." 
Numbers26:33 Ndipo Zelofehadi mwana wa Hefere analibe ana amuna, koma ana akazi ndiwo; ndipo maina a ana akazi a Tselofekadi ndiwo Mala ndi Nowa, Hogila, Milika ndi Tiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Iwo ndiwo mabanja ao a Manase; ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri. 
Numbers26:35 Ana amuna a Efuremu monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Sutela, ndiye kholo la banja la Asutela; Bekere, ndiye kholo la banja la Abekere; Tahani, ndiye kholo la banja la Atahani." 
Numbers26:36 Ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa Sutela ndiye Erani, ndiye kholo la banja la Aerani." 
Numbers26:37 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a ana a Efuremu monga mwa owerengedwa ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu. Iwo ndiwo ana amuna a Yosefe monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Numbers26:38 Ana amuna a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Bela, ndiye kholo la banja la Abela; Asibele, ndiye kholo la banja la Aasibele; Ahiramu, ndiye kholo la banja la Aahiramu;" 
Numbers26:39 Sefufamu ndiye kholo la banja la Asefufamu; Hufamu, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Ndipo ana amuna a Bela ndiwo Aridi ndi Naamani; Aridi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aaridi; Naamani, ndiye kholo la banja la Anaamani." 
Numbers26:41 Iwo ndiwo ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao; ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi. 
Numbers26:42 Mwana wamwamuna wa Dani monga mwa mabanja ake ndiye Suhamu, ndiye kholo la banja la Asuhamu. Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Dani monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Numbers26:43 Mabanja onse a Asuhamu monga mwa owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zinai kudza mazana anai. 
Numbers26:44 Ana amuna a Asere monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Imina, ndiye kholo la banja la Imina; Isivi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aisivi; Beriya, ndiye kholo la banja la Aberiya." 
Numbers26:45 Ana a Beriya ndiwo: Hebere, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahebere; Malikiele, ndiye kholo la banja la Amalikiele." 
Numbers26:46 Ndipo dzina la mwana wamkazi wa Asere ndiye Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a ana amuna a Asere monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zitatu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers26:48 Ana amuna a Nafutali monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Yazeele, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayezeele; Guni, ndiye kholo la banja la Aguni;" 
Numbers26:49 Yezere, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayezere; Silemu, ndiye kholo la banja la Asilemu." 
Numbers26:50 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Nafutali, monga mwa mabanja ao; ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers26:51 Iwo ndiwo owerengedwa ao a ana a Israele, zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu chimodzi kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi atatu." 
Numbers26:52 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers26:53 Dziko ligawikire iwowa monga mwa kuwerenga kwa maina, likhale cholowa chao." 
Numbers26:54 Ochulukawo, uwachulukitsire cholowa chao; ochepawo uwachepetsere cholowa chao; ampatse yense cholowa chake monga mwa owerengedwa ake." 
Numbers26:55 Koma aligawe ndi kuchita maere; cholowa chao chikhale monga mwa maina a mafuko a makolo ao. 
Numbers26:56 Agawire ochuluka ndi ochepa cholowa chao monga mwa kuchita maere. 
Numbers26:57 Ndipo awa ndi owerengedwa ao a Alevi monga mwa mabanja ao: Geresoni, ndiye kholo la banja la Ageresoni; Kohati, ndiye kholo la banja la Akohati; Merari, ndiye kholo la banja la Amerari." 
Numbers26:58 Awa ndi mabanja a Alevi: banja la Alibini, banja la Ahebroni, banja la Amali, banja la Amusi, banja la Akora. Ndipo Kohati anabala Amuramu." 
Numbers26:59 Ndipo dzina lake la mkazi wake wa Amuramu ndiye Yokebede, mwana wamkazi wa Levi, wobadwira Levi m'Ejipito; ndipo iye anambalira Amuramu, Aroni ndi Mose, ndi Miriyamu mlongo wao." 
Numbers26:60 Ndipo Nadabu ndi Abihu, Eleazara ndi Itamara anabadwira Aroni." 
Numbers26:61 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu adafa, muja anabwera nao moto wachilendo pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers26:62 Ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zitatu, mwamuna yense wa mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu; popeza sanawerengedwe pakati pa ana a Israele; chifukwa sanawapatse cholowa mwa ana a Israele." 
Numbers26:63 Iwo ndiwo amene anawerengedwa ndi Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe, amene anawerenga ana a Israele m'zidikha za Mowabu ku Yordani pafupi pa Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Koma pakati pao panalibe mmodzi wa iwo amene anawerengedwa ndi Mose ndi Aroni wansembe, amene anawerenga ana a Israele m'chipululu cha Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Popeza Yehova adanena za iwowa, Adzafatu m'chipululu. Ndipo sanatsalire mmodzi wa iwowa koma Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Pamenepo anayandikiza ana akazi a Zelofehadi mwana wa Hefere, ndiye mwana wa Giliyadi, ndiye mwana wa Makiri, ndiye mwana wamwamuna wa Manase, wa mabanja a Manase mwana wa Yosefe; ndipo maina a ana ake akazi ndiwo, Mala, Nowa, Hogila ndi Milika ndi Tiriza." 
Numbers27:2 Ndipo anaima pamaso pa Mose, ndi pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, ndi pamaso pa akalonga; ndi khamu lonse, pakhomo pa chihema chokomanako, ndi kuti," 
Numbers27:3 Atate wathu adamwalira m'chipululu, ndipo sanakhale iye pakati pa msonkhano wa iwo akusonkhana kutsutsana ndi Yehova, mu msonkhano wa Kora; koma anafera zoipa zakezake; ndipo analibe ana amuna." 
Numbers27:4 Lichotsedwerenji dzina la atate wathu pakati pa banja lake, popeza alibe mwana wamwamuna? Tipatseni dziko lathulathu pakati pa abale a atate wathu." 
Numbers27:5 Ndipo Mose anapita nao mlandu wao pamaso pa Yehova. 
Numbers27:6 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers27:7 Ana akazi a Zelofehadi anena zoona; uwapatse ndithu cholowa chikhale chaochao pakati pa abale a atate wao; nuwalandiritse cholowa cha atate wao. 
Numbers27:8 Ndipo unene ndi ana a Israele, ndi kuti, Akafa munthu wamwamuna wopanda mwana wamwamuna, cholowa chake achilandire mwana wake wamkazi." 
Numbers27:9 Ndipo akapanda kukhala naye mwana wamkazi, mupatse abale ake cholowa chake." 
Numbers27:10 Ndipo akapanda kukhala nao abale, mupatse abale a atate wake cholowa chake." 
Numbers27:11 Ndipo akapanda abale a atate wake, mupatse wa chibale chake woyandikizana naye wa fuko lake cholowa chake, likhale lakelake; ndipo likhale kwa ana a Israele lemba monga Yehova wamuuza Mose." 
Numbers27:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Kwera m'phiri ili la Abarimu, nupenye dziko limene ndapatsa ana a Israele." 
Numbers27:13 Utaliona iwenso udzaitanidwa kunka kwa anthu a mtundu wako, monga anaitanidwa Aroni mbale wako;" 
Numbers27:14 popeza munapikisana nao mau anga m'chipululu cha Zini, potsutsana nane khamulo, osandipatula Ine pa madziwo pamaso pao. Ndiwo madzi a Meriba m'Kadesi, m'chipululu cha Zini." 
Numbers27:15 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi Yehova, nati," 
Numbers27:16 Yehova, Mulungu wa mizimu ya anthu onse, aike munthu pa khamulo," 
Numbers27:17 wakutuluka pamaso pao, ndi kulowa pamaso pao, wakuwatulutsa ndi kuwalowetsa; kuti khamu la Ambuye lisakhale ngati nkhosa zopanda mbusa." 
Numbers27:18 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Utenge Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndiye munthu mwa iye muli mzimu, nuike dzanja lako pa iye;" 
Numbers27:19 numuimike pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, ndi pamaso pa khamu lonse; numlangize pamaso pao." 
Numbers27:20 Ndipo umuikirepo ulemerero wako, kuti khamu lonse la ana a Israele ammvere." 
Numbers27:21 Ndipo aime pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, amene amfunsire monga mwa chiweruzo cha Urimu pamaso pa Yehova; ponena iye azituluka, ndi ponena iye azilowa, ndi iye ndi ana onse a Israele pamodzi naye, ndiwo khamu lonse." 
Numbers27:22 Ndipo Mose anachita monga Yehova adamuuza; natenga Yoswa namuimitsa pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, ndi pamaso pa khamu lonse;" 
Numbers27:23 namuikira manja ake, namlangiza monga Yehova adanena ndi dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers28:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers28:2 Uza ana a Israele, nuti nao, Muzisamalira kubwera nacho kwa Ine chopereka changa, chakudya changa cha nsembe zanga zamoto, cha fungo lokoma, pa nyengo yake yoikika." 
Numbers28:3 Ndipo unene nao, Nsembe yamoto imene muzibwera nayo kwa Yehova ndiyi: anaankhosa awiri a chaka chimodzi opanda chilema, tsiku ndi tsiku, nsembe yamoto yosalekeza." 
Numbers28:4 Mwanawankhosa mmodziyo umpereke m'mawa, ndi mwanawankhosa winayo umpereke madzulo;" 
Numbers28:5 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi la efa wa ufa wosalala ukhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi limodzi la magawo anai la hini wa mafuta opera." 
Numbers28:6 Ndiyo nsembe yopsereza kosalekeza, yoikika kuphiri la Sinai, ichite fungo lokoma, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Numbers28:7 Ndi nsembe yake yothira ya mwanawankhosa mmodziyo ndiyo limodzi la magawo anai la hini; m'malo opatulika uthirire Yehova nsembe yothira ya chakumwa cholimba. 
Numbers28:8 Ndi mwanawankhosa winayo umpereke madzulo; monga nsembe yaufa ya m'mawa, ndi nsembe yothira yake, umpereke; ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya fungo lokoma la Yehova." 
Numbers28:9 Ndipo tsiku la Sabata anaankhosa awiri a chaka chimodzi, opanda chilema, ndi awiri a magawo khumi a efa wa ufa wosalala, ukhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndi nsembe yake yothira;" 
Numbers28:10 ndiyo nsembe yopsereza ya tsiku la Sabata lililonse, pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers28:11 Ndipo poyamba miyezi yanu muzibwera nayo nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova: ng'ombe zamphongo ziwiri, ndi nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ndi anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri a chaka chimodzi opanda chilema;" 
Numbers28:12 ndi atatu a magawo khumi a efa wa ufa wosalala, ikhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndiwo wa ng'ombe iliyonse; ndi awiri a magawo khumi a ufa wosalala, ikhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndiwo wa nkhosa yamphongo imodziyo;" 
Numbers28:13 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi la ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa, ndiwo wa mwanawankhosa yense; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza ya fungo lokoma, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Numbers28:14 Ndipo nsembe zake zothira ndizo: limodzi la magawo khumi la hini wa vinyo ndiwo wa ng'ombe imodzi, ndi limodzi la magawo atatu la hini likhale la nkhosa yamphongo, ndi limodzi la magawo anai a hini likhale la mwanawankhosa; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza ya mwezi uliwonse kunena miyezi yonse ya chaka." 
Numbers28:15 Ndi tonde mmodzi, akhale nsembe yauchimo ya Yehova; aikonze pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers28:16 Ndipo mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi pali Paska wa Yehova." 
Numbers28:17 Ndipo tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi uwu pali zikondwerero; masiku asanu ndi awiri azidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa. 
Numbers28:18 Tsiku loyamba pali kusonkhana kopatulika; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena; 
Numbers28:19 koma mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto, nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova; ng'ombe ziwiri zamphongo, ndi nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ndi anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri a chaka chimodzi; akhale kwa inu opanda chilema;" 
Numbers28:20 ndi nsembe yao ya efa wa ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta; mupereke atatu a magawo khumi akhale a ng'ombe, ndi awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo;" 
Numbers28:21 upereke limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwanawankhosa mmodzi; uzitero ndi anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri; 
Numbers28:22 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo, yakutetezera inu." 
Numbers28:23 Mupereke izi pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza ya m'mawa, ndiyo ya nsembe yopsereza kosalekeza." 
Numbers28:24 Momwemo mupereke chakudya cha nsembe yamoto cha fungo lokoma la Yehova, tsiku ndi tsiku, masiku asanu ndi awiri, chakupereka pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers28:25 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri mukhale nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena. 
Numbers28:26 Momwemonso tsiku la zipatso zoyamba, pobwera nayo nsembe ya ufa watsopano kwa Yehova, m'chikondwerero chanu cha Masabata, muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena." 
Numbers28:27 Pamenepo muzipereka nsembe yopsereza ya fungo lokoma kwa Yehova; ng'ombe zamphongo ziwiri, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri a chaka chimodzi;" 
Numbers28:28 ndi nsembe yake ya efa wa ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a ng'ombe imodzi, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo imodzi," 
Numbers28:29 limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwanawankhosa mmodzi, momwemo ndi anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers28:30 tonde mmodzi wakutetezera inu. 
Numbers28:31 Mupereke izi pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, zikhale kwa inu zopanda chilema, ndi nsembe zake zothira." 
Numbers29:1 Ndipo mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, tsiku loyamba la mweziwo, muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena; likukhalireni inu tsiku lakuliza malipenga." 
Numbers29:2 Pamenepo muzipereka nsembe yopsereza ya fungo lokoma kwa Yehova; ng'ombe imodzi yamphongo, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri a chaka chimodzi opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:3 ndi nsembe yao yaufa, ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a efa wa ng'ombeyo, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo," 
Numbers29:4 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwanawankhosa mmodzi, momwemo ndi anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers29:5 ndi tonde mmodzi wa nsembe yauchimo, yakutetezera inu;" 
Numbers29:6 pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza ya pamwezi, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira, monga mwa lemba lake, zikhale za fungo lokoma, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Numbers29:7 Ndipo tsiku la khumi la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri uwu muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; pamenepo mudzichepetse, musamagwira ntchito;" 
Numbers29:8 koma mubwere nayo nsembe yopsereza kwa Yehova, ya fungo lokoma; ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri a chaka chimodzi; akhale kwa inu opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:9 ndi nsembe yao ya ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a efa wa ng'ombe, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo imodziyo;" 
Numbers29:10 limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwanawankhosa mmodzi, momwemo ndi anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers29:11 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo, pamodzi ndi nsembe yauchimo yotetezera, ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira." 
Numbers29:12 Ndipo tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena, koma muchitire Yehova madyerero masiku asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers29:13 ndipo mubwere nayo nsembe yopsereza, ndiyo nsembe yamoto, ya fungo lokoma kwa Yehova: ng'ombe zamphongo khumi ndi zitatu, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, anaankhosa khumi ndi anai, a chaka chimodzi, akhale opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:14 ndi nsembe yake yaufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a efa wa ng'ombe imodzi, momwemo nazo ng'ombe khumi ndi zitatuzo, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, momwemo nazo nkhosa zamphongo ziwirizo;" 
Numbers29:15 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwanawankhosa mmodzi, momwemo nao anaankhosa khumi ndi anai;" 
Numbers29:16 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers29:17 Ndipo tsiku lachiwiri muzibwera nazo ng'ombe zamphongo khumi ndi ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, anaankhosa khumi ndi anai a chaka chimodzi, opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:18 ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za anaankhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwake, ndi kutsata lemba lake;" 
Numbers29:19 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira." 
Numbers29:20 Ndi tsiku lachitatu ng'ombe khumi ndi imodzi, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, anaankhosa khumi ndi anai a chaka chimodzi opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:21 ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za anaankhosa monga mwa kuwerenga kwake, ndi kutsata lemba lake;" 
Numbers29:22 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers29:23 Ndi tsiku lachinai ng'ombe khumi, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, anaankhosa khumi ndi anai, a chaka chimodzi, opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:24 nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za anaankhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwake, ndi kutsata lemba lake;" 
Numbers29:25 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers29:26 Ndi tsiku lachisanu ng'ombe zisanu ndi zinai, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, anaankhosa khumi ndi anai, a chaka chimodzi, opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:27 ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za anaankhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwake, ndi kutsata lemba lake;" 
Numbers29:28 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers29:29 Ndi tsiku lachisanu ndi chimodzi ng'ombe zisanu ndi zitatu, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, anaankhosa khumi ndi anai, a chaka chimodzi, opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:30 ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za anaankhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwake, ndi kutsata lemba lake;" 
Numbers29:31 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers29:32 Ndi tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, anaankhosa khumi ndi anai, a chaka chimodzi, opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:33 ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa yamphongo, ndi za anaankhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwake, ndi kutsata lemba lake;" 
Numbers29:34 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers29:35 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu muzikhala nalo tsiku loletsa; musamachita ntchito ya masiku ena; 
Numbers29:36 koma mubwere nayo nsembe yopsereza ndiyo nsembe yamoto, ya fungo lokoma kwa Yehova: ng'ombe imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri, a chaka chimodzi, opanda chilema;" 
Numbers29:37 nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe zake zothira za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za anaankhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwake, ndi kutsata lemba lake;" 
Numbers29:38 ndi tonde mmodzi wa nsembe yauchimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosakeleza, ndi nsembe yake yaufa, ndi nsembe yake yothira." 
Numbers29:39 Izi muzikonzera Yehova mu zikondwerero zanu zoikika, pamodzi ndi zowinda zanu, ndi zopereka zanu zaufulu, za nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi za nsembe zanu zaufa, ndi za nsembe zanu zothira, ndi za nsembe zanu zoyamika." 
Numbers29:40 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israele monga mwa zonse Yehova adamuuza Mose. 
Numbers30:1 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi akulu a mafuko a ana a Israele, nati, Chinthu anachilamulira Yehova ndi ichi:" 
Numbers30:2 Munthu akachitira Yehova chowinda, kapena akalumbira lumbiro ndi kumangira moyo wake chodziletsa, asaipse mau ake; azichita monga mwa zonse zotuluka m'kamwa mwake." 
Numbers30:3 Ndipo mkazi akachitira Yehova chowinda, nakadzimanga nacho chodziletsa, pokhala ali m'nyumba ya atate wake, m'unamwali;" 
Numbers30:4 ndipo atate wake akamva chowinda chake, ndi chodziletsa chake anamanga moyo wake nacho, koma wakhala naye chete atate wake; pamenepo zowinda zake zonse zidzakhazikika, ndi chodziletsa chilichonse wamanga nacho moyo wake chidzakhazikika." 
Numbers30:5 Koma atate wake akamletsa tsiku lakumva iye; zowinda zake zonse, ndi zodziletsa zake zonse anamanga nazo moyo wake, sizidzakhazikika; ndipo Yehova adzamkhululukira, popeza atate wake anamletsa." 
Numbers30:6 Ndipo akakwatibwa naye mwamuna, pokhala ali nazo zowinda zake, kapena zonena zopanda pake za milomo yake, zimene anamanga nazo moyo wake;" 
Numbers30:7 nakazimva mwamuna wake, nakakhala naye chete tsiku lakuzimva iye; pamenepo zowinda zake zidzakhazikika, ndi zodziletsa anamanga nazo moyo wake zidzakhazikika." 
Numbers30:8 Koma mwamuna wake akamletsa tsiku lakumva iye; pamenepo adzafafaniza chowinda chake anali nacho, ndi zonena zopanda pake za milomo yake, zimene anamanga nazo moyo wake; ndipo Yehova adzamkhululukira." 
Numbers30:9 Koma chowinda cha mkazi wamasiye, kapena mkazi wochotsedwa, zilizonse anamanga nazo moyo wake zidzamkhazikikira." 
Numbers30:10 Ndipo ngati anawinda m'nyumba ya mwamuna wake, kapena anamanga moyo wake ndi chodziletsa ndi kulumbirapo," 
Numbers30:11 ndipo mwamuna wake anamva, koma anakhala naye chete osamletsa, pamenepo zowinda zake zonse zidzakhazikika, ndi zodziletsa zonse anamanga nazo moyo wake zidzakhazikika." 
Numbers30:12 Koma ngati mwamuna wake anazifafanizadi tsiku lakuzimva iye, zonse zotuluka m'milomo yake kunena za zowinda zake, kapena za chodziletsa cha moyo wake sizidzakhazikika; ndipo Yehova adzamkhululukira iye." 
Numbers30:13 Chowinda chilichonse, ndi cholumbira chilichonse chodziletsa chakuchepetsa nacho moyo, mwamuna wake achikhazikira, kapena mwamuna wake achifafaniza." 
Numbers30:14 Koma mwamuna wake akhala naye chete tsiku ndi tsiku; pamenepo akhazikira zowinda zake zonse, kapena zodziletsa zake zonse, zili pa iye; wazikhazikitsa, popeza anakhala naye chete tsikuli anazimva iye." 
Numbers30:15 Koma akazifafaniza atatha kuzimva; pamenepo adzasenza mphulupulu yake. 
Numbers30:16 Awa ndi malemba amene Yehova analamulira Mose, a pakati pa mwamuna ndi mkazi wake, pakati pa atate ndi mwana wake wamkazi, akali namwali, m'nyumba ya atate wake." 
Numbers31:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers31:2 Abwezereni chilango Amidiyani chifukwa cha ana a Israele; utatero udzaitanidwa kunka kwa anthu a mtundu wako. 
Numbers31:3 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi anthu, nati, Adzikonzere ena mwa inu zida za nkhondo, alimbane nao Amidiyani, kuwabwezera Amidiyani chilango cha Yehova." 
Numbers31:4 Muwatume kunkhondo a fuko limodzi, chikwi chimodzi, atere mafuko onse a Israele." 
Numbers31:5 Ndipo anapereka mwa zikwi za Israele, a fuko limodzi chikwi chimodzi, anthu zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri okonzekeratu ndi zankhondo." 
Numbers31:6 Ndipo Mose anawatuma a fuko limodzi chikwi chimodzi, kunkhondo, iwowa ndi Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara wansembe, kunkhondo, ndi zipangizo zopatulika, ndi malipenga oliza m'dzanja lake." 
Numbers31:7 Ndipo anawathira nkhondo Amidiyani, monga Yehova adamuuza Mose; nawapha amuna onse." 
Numbers31:8 Ndipo anapha mafumu a Amidiyani pamodzi ndi ophedwa ao ena; ndiwo Evi, ndi Rekemu, ndi Zuri, ndi Huri, ndi Reba, mafumu asanu a Amidiyani; namupha Balamu mwana wa Beori ndi lupanga." 
Numbers31:9 Ndipo ana a Israele anagwira akazi a Amidiyani, ndi ana ang'ono, nafunkha ng'ombe zao zonse, ndi zoweta zao zonse, ndi chuma chao chonse." 
Numbers31:10 Ndipo anatentha ndi moto midzi yao yonse yokhalamo iwo, ndi zigono zao zonse." 
Numbers31:11 Ndipo anapita nazo zofunkha zonse, ndi zakunkhondo zonse, ndizo anthu ndi nyama." 
Numbers31:12 Ndipo anadza nao andende, ndi zakunkhondo, ndi zofunkha, kwa Mose, ndi kwa Eleazara wansembe, ndi kwa khamu la ana a Israele, kuchigono, ku zidikha za Mowabu, zili ku Yordani pafupi pa Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Ndipo Mose, ndi Eleazara wansembe, ndi akalonga onse a khamulo, anatuluka kukomana nao kunja kwa chigono." 
Numbers31:14 Ndipo Mose anakwiya nao akazembe a nkhondoyi, atsogoleri a zikwi, atsogoleri a mazana, akufuma kunkhondo adaithira." 
Numbers31:15 Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Kodi mwasunga ndi moyo akazi onse?" 
Numbers31:16 Taonani, awa analakwitsa ana a Israele pa Yehova ndi cha Peori chija, monga adawapangira Balamu; kotero kuti kunali mliri m'khamu la Yehova." 
Numbers31:17 Ndipo tsono iphani amuna onse mwa anawo, iphaninso akazi onse akudziwa mwamuna mogona naye." 
Numbers31:18 Koma ana akazi onse osadziwa mwamuna mogona naye, asungeni ndi moyo akhale anu." 
Numbers31:19 Ndipo mukhale m'misasa kunja kwa chigono masiku asanu ndi awiri; aliyense adapha munthu, ndi aliyense wakukhudza wophedwa, mudziyeretse tsiku lachitatu ndi lachisanu ndi chiwiri, inu ndi andende anu." 
Numbers31:20 Muyeretse zovala zanu zonse, zipangizo zonse zachikopa, ndi zoomba zonse za ubweya wa mbuzi, ndi zipangizo zonse za mtengo." 
Numbers31:21 Ndipo Eleazara wansembe ananena ndi ankhondo adapita kunkhondowo, Lemba la chilamulocho Yehova analamulira Mose ndi ili:" 
Numbers31:22 Golide, ndi siliva, mkuwa, chitsulo, ndolo ndi mtovu zokha," 
Numbers31:23 zonse zakulola moto, mupititse m'moto, ndipo zidzakhala zoyera; koma muziyeretsenso ndi madzi akusiyanitsa. Koma zonse zosalola moto, muzipititse m'madzi." 
Numbers31:24 Ndipo muzitsuke zovala zanu tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri, kuti mukhale oyera; ndipo mutatero mulowe m'chigono." 
Numbers31:25 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers31:26 Werengani zakunkhondo, ndizo anthu, ndi zoweta, iwe, ndi Eleazara wansembe, ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo za khamulo;" 
Numbers31:27 nugawe zakunkhondo pawiri; pakati pa othira nkhondo amene anatuluka kunkhondo, ndi khamu lonse." 
Numbers31:28 Ndipo usonkhetse anthu ankhondo akutuluka kunkhondo apereke kwa Yehova: munthu mmodzi mwa anthu mazana asanu, mwa ng'ombe, mwa abulu, mwa nkhosa ndi mbuzi, momwemo." 
Numbers31:29 Uzitenge ku gawo lao, ndi kuzipereka kwa Eleazara wansembe, zikhale nsembe yokweza ya Yehova." 
Numbers31:30 Ndipo ku gawo la ana a Israele utenge munthu mmodzi mwa anthu makumi asanu, mwa ng'ombe, mwa abulu, mwa nkhosa ndi mbuzi, mwa zoweta zonse, momwemo; nuzipereke kwa Alevi, akusunga udikiro wa Kachisi wa Yehova." 
Numbers31:31 Ndipo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe anachita monga Yehova anamuuza Mose. 
Numbers31:32 Ndipo zakunkhondo, zotsalira zofunkha zonse adazifunkha ankhondowa, ndizo nkhosa zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza zisanu," 
Numbers31:33 ndi ng'ombe zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu ziwiri," 
Numbers31:34 ndi abulu zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu chimodzi," 
Numbers31:35 ndi anthu, ndiwo akazi osadziwa mwamuna mogona naye, onse pamodzi zikwi makumi atatu ndi ziwiri." 
Numbers31:36 Ndipo limodzi la magawo awiri, ndilo gawo la iwo adatuluka kunkhondo, linafikira nkhosa zikwi mazana atatu mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers31:37 Ndi msonkho wa Yehova wankhosa ndiwo mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu zisanu. 
Numbers31:38 Ndipo ng'ombe zidafikira zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi; pamenepo msonkho wa Yehova ndiwo makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu ziwiri. 
Numbers31:39 Ndipo abulu anafikira zikwi makumi atatu ndi mazana asanu; pamenepo msonkho wa Yehova ndiwo makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu mmodzi. 
Numbers31:40 Ndipo anthu anafikira zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi chimodzi; pamenepo msonkho wa Yehova ndiwo anthu makumi atatu mphambu awiri. 
Numbers31:41 Ndipo Mose anapereka zamsonkhozo, ndizo nsembe yokweza ya Yehova, kwa Eleazara wansembe, monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Numbers31:42 Ndipo kunena za gawo la ana a Israele, limene Mose adalichotsa kwa anthu ochita nkhondowo," 
Numbers31:43 (ndipo gawo la khamulo ndilo nkhosa zikwi mazana atatu mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu," 
Numbers31:44 ndi ng'ombe zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi," 
Numbers31:45 ndi abulu zikwi makumi atatu ndi mazana asanu," 
Numbers31:46 ndi anthu zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi chimodzi,)" 
Numbers31:47 mwa gawolo la ana a Israele Mose anatenga munthu mmodzi mwa makumi asanu, ndi zoweta momwemo, nazipereka kwa Alevi, akusunga udikiro wa Kachisi wa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Numbers31:48 Pamenepo akazembe a pa ankhondo zikwi, atsogoleri a zikwi, ndi atsogoleri a mazana, anayandikiza kwa Mose;" 
Numbers31:49 nati kwa Mose, Atumiki anu anawerenga ankhondo tinali nao, ndipo sanasowe munthu mmodzi wa ife." 
Numbers31:50 Ndipo tabwera nacho chopereka cha Yehova, yense chimene anachipeza, zokometsera zagolide, unyolo, zikwinjiri, mphete zosindikizira, nsapule, ndi mkanda, kuchita chotetezera moyo wathu pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers31:51 Ndipo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe analandira golideyo kwa iwowo, ndizo zokometsera zonse zokonzeka." 
Numbers31:52 Ndipo golide yense wa nsembe yokweza ya Yehova amene anapereka kwa Yehova, wofuma kwa atsogoleri a zikwi, ndi atsogoleri a mazana, ndiwo masekeli zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu." 
Numbers31:53 Popeza wankhondo yense anadzifunkhira yekha. 
Numbers31:54 Ndipo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe analandira golide kwa akulu a zikwi ndi a mazana, nalowa naye ku chihema chokomanako, chikumbutso cha ana a Israele pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers32:1 Koma ana a Rubeni ndi ana Gadi anali nazo zoweta zambirimbiri; ndipo anapenyerera dziko la Yazere, ndi dziko la Giliyadi, ndipo taonani, malowo ndiwo malo a zoweta." 
Numbers32:2 Pamenepo ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni anadza nanena ndi Mose, ndi Eleazara wansembe, ndi akalonga a khamulo, nati," 
Numbers32:3 Ataroti, ndi Diboni, ndi Yazere, ndi Nimira, ndi Hesiboni, ndi Eleyale, ndi Sibima, ndi Nebo, ndi Beoni," 
Numbers32:4 dzikoli Yehova analikantha pamaso pa khamu la Israele, ndilo dziko la zoweta ndipo anyamata anu ali nazo zoweta." 
Numbers32:5 Ndipo anati, Ngati tapeza ufulu pamaso panu, mupatse anyamata anu dziko ili likhale laolao; tisaoloke Yordani." 
Numbers32:6 Ndipo Mose anati kwa ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni, Kodi abale anu apite kunkhondo, ndi inu mukhale pansi kuno?" 
Numbers32:7 Ndipo mufoketseranji mtima wa ana a Israele kuti asaoloke ndi kulowa dzikoli Yehova anawapatsa? 
Numbers32:8 Anatero makolo anu, muja ndinawatumiza achoke ku Kadesi-Baranea kukaona dziko." 
Numbers32:9 Popeza atakwera kunka ku chigwa cha Esikolo, naona dziko, anafoketsa mtima wa ana a Israele, kuti asalowe dzikoli Yehova adawapatsa." 
Numbers32:10 Ndipo Yehova anapsa mtima tsiku lija, nalumbira Iye, nati," 
Numbers32:11 Anthu adakwerawo kutuluka m'Ejipito, kuyambira wa zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu sadzaona dziko limene ndinalumbirira Abrahamu, ndi Isaki, ndi Yakobo; popeza sananditsate Ine ndi mtima wonse;" 
Numbers32:12 koma Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, Mkenizi, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni ndiwo; popeza anatsata Yehova ndi mtima wonse." 
Numbers32:13 Ndipo Yehova anapsa mtima pa Israele, nawayendetsayendetsa m'chipululu zaka makumi anai, kufikira utatha mbadwo wonsewo udachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers32:14 Ndipo taonani, mwauka m'malo mwa makolo anu, gulu la anthu ochimwa, kuonjezanso mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova pa Israele." 
Numbers32:15 Pakuti mukabwerera m'mbuyo kusamtsata Iye, adzawasiyanso m'chipululu, ndipo mudzaononga anthu awa onse." 
Numbers32:16 Ndipo anayandikiza, nati Tidzamangira zoweta zathu makola kuno, ndi ana athu midzi;" 
Numbers32:17 koma ife tidzakhala okonzeka ndi kufulumira pamaso pa ana a Israele, kufikira tidawafikitsa kumalo kwao; ndi ang'ono athu adzakhala m'midzi ya malinga chifukwa cha okhala m'dzikomo." 
Numbers32:18 Sitidzabwerera kwathu, kufikira ana a Israele atalandira yense cholowa chake." 
Numbers32:19 Pakuti sitidzalandira pamodzi nao tsidya la Yordani, ndi m'tsogolo mwake; popeza cholowa chathu tachilandira tsidya lino la Yordani kum'mawa." 
Numbers32:20 Ndipo Mose anati nao, Ngati mudzachita ichi, ndi kudzikonza kunkhondo pamaso pa Yehova," 
Numbers32:21 ndi kuoloka Yordani pamaso pa Yehova okonzeka onse mwa inu, kufikira atapirikitsa adani ake pamaso pake," 
Numbers32:22 ndi dziko lagonjera Yehova; mutatero mudzabwerere, ndi kukhala osachimwira Yehova ndi Israele; ndipo dziko ili lidzakhala lanulanu pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers32:23 Koma mukapanda kutero, taonani, mwachimwira Yehova; ndipo zindikirani kuti tchimo lanu lidzakupezani." 
Numbers32:24 Dzimangireni midzi ya ana anu, ndi makola a zoweta zanu; ndipo muzichite zotuluka m'kamwa mwanu." 
Numbers32:25 Ndipo ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni ananena ndi Mose, nati, Anyamata anu adzachita monga mbuyanga alamulira." 
Numbers32:26 Ana athu, akazi athu, zoweta zathu, ndi ng'ombe zathu zonse, zidzakhala komweko m'midzi ya ku Giliyadi;" 
Numbers32:27 koma anyamata anu adzaoloka, yense wokonzekera ndi zankhondo pamaso pa Yehova kunkhondo, monga wanena mbuyanga." 
Numbers32:28 Pamenepo Mose anamuuza Eleazara wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi akulu a makolo a mafuko a ana a Israele za iwo." 
Numbers32:29 Ndipo Mose anati kwa iwo, Ngati ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni aoloka nanu Yordani, yense wokonzekera ndi zankhondo pamaso pa Yehova, ndi dziko lagonjera inu; pamenepo muwapatse dziko la Giliyadi likhale laolao;" 
Numbers32:30 koma akapanda kuoloka nanu okonzeka, akhale nao maiko aoao pakati pa inu m'dziko la Kanani." 
Numbers32:31 Ndipo ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni anayankha, nati, Monga Yehova anati kwa anyamata anu momwemo tidzachita." 
Numbers32:32 Tidzaoloka okonzeka pamaso pa Yehova ku dziko la Kanani, koma cholowa chathuchathu chikhale tsidya lino la Yordani." 
Numbers32:33 Ndipo Mose anawapatsa, ndiwo ana a Gadi, ndi ana a Rubeni ndi fuko la hafu la Manase mwana wa Yosefe, dziko la Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, ndi dziko la Ogi mfumu ya Basani, dzikoli ndi midzi yake m'malire mwao, ndiyo midzi ya dziko lozungulirako." 
Numbers32:34 Ndipo ana a Gadi anamanga Diboni, ndi Ataroti, ndi Aroere;" 
Numbers32:35 Ataroti-Sofani, Yazere, ndi Yogobeha;" 
Numbers32:36 ndi Betenimura, ndi Beteharani: midzi ya m'malinga, ndi makola a zoweta." 
Numbers32:37 Ndipo ana a Rubeni anamanga Hesiboni, ndi Eleyale, ndi Kiriyataimu;" 
Numbers32:38 ndi Nebo, ndi Baala-Meoni (anasintha maina ao), ndi Sibima; ndipo anaitcha midzi adaimanga ndi maina ena." 
Numbers32:39 Ndipo ana a Makiri mwana wa Manase ananka ku Giliyadi, naulanda, napirikitsa Aamori anali m'mwemo." 
Numbers32:40 Ndipo Mose anapatsa Makiri mwana wa Manase Giliyadi; ndipo anakhala m'menemo. 
Numbers32:41 Ndipo Yairi mwana wa Manase ananka nalanda midzi yao, naitcha Havoti-Yairi." 
Numbers32:42 Ndipo Noba ananka nalanda Kenati, ndi milaga yake, nautcha Noba, dzina lake." 
Numbers33:1 Maulendo a ana a Israele amene anatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito monga mwa makamu ao, ndi dzanja la Mose ndi Aroni, ndi awa." 
Numbers33:2 Ndipo Mose analembera matulukidwe ao monga mwa maulendo ao, monga mwa mau a Yehova; ndipo maulendo ao ndi awa monga mwa matulukidwe ao." 
Numbers33:3 Ndipo anachokera ku Ramsesi mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi woyamba; atachita Paska m'mawa mwake ana a Israele, anatuluka ndi dzanja lokwezeka pamaso pa Aejipito onse," 
Numbers33:4 pamene Aejipito analikuika oyamba kubadwa ao onse, amene Yehova adawakantha; Yehova adaweruzanso milungu yao." 
Numbers33:5 Ndipo ana a Israele anachokera ku Ramsesi, nayenda namanga ku Sukoti." 
Numbers33:6 Nachokera ku Sukoti, nayenda namanga m'Etamu, ndiko ku malekezero a chipululu." 
Numbers33:7 Ndipo anachokera ku Etamu, nayenda nabwerera ku Pihahiroti, ndiko kutsogolo kwake kwa Baala-Zefoni; namanga iwo patsogolo pa Migidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Ndipo anachokera ku Pihahiroti, naoloka pakati pa nyanja nalowa m'chipululu; nayenda ulendo wa masiku atatu m'chipululu cha Etamu, namanga m'Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Ndipo anachokera ku Mara, nayenda nafika ku Elimu, ku Elimu ndiko kuli akasupe khumi ndi awiri a madzi, ndi akanjedza makumi asanu ndi awiri; namanga iwo komweko." 
Numbers33:10 Ndipo anachokera ku Elimu, nayenda namanga ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Numbers33:11 Nachokera ku Nyanja Yofiira, nayenda namanga m'chipululu cha Sini." 
Numbers33:12 Nachokera ku chipululu cha Sini, nayenda namanga m'Dofika." 
Numbers33:13 Nachokera ku Dofika, nayenda namanga m'Alusi." 
Numbers33:14 Nachokera ku Alusi, nayenda namanga m'Refidimu; kumeneko kunalibe madzi kuti anthu amwe." 
Numbers33:15 Ndipo anachokera ku Refidimu, nayenda namanga m'chipululu cha Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Nachokera ku chipululu cha Sinai, nayenda namanga m'Kibroti-Hatava." 
Numbers33:17 Nachokera ku Kibroti-Hatava, nayenda namanga m'Hazeroti." 
Numbers33:18 Nachokera ku Hazeroti, nayenda namanga m'Ritima." 
Numbers33:19 Nachokera ku Ritima, nayenda namanga m'Rimoni-Perezi." 
Numbers33:20 Nachokera ku Rimoni-Perezi, nayenda namanga m'Libina." 
Numbers33:21 Nachokera ku Libina, nayenda namanga m'Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Nachokera Risa, nayenda namanga m'Kehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Nachokera ku Kehelata, nayenda namanga m'phiri la Sefera." 
Numbers33:24 Nachokera kuphiri la Sefera, nayenda namanga m'Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Nachokera ku Harada, nayenda namanga m'Makeloti." 
Numbers33:26 Nachokera ku Makeloti, nayenda namanga m'Tahata." 
Numbers33:27 Nachokera ku Tahata, nayenda namanga m'Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Nachokera ku Tera, nayenda namanga m'Mitika." 
Numbers33:29 Nachokera ku Mitika, nayenda namanga m'Hasimona." 
Numbers33:30 Nachokera ku Hasimona, nayenda namanga m'Meseroti." 
Numbers33:31 Nachokera ku Meseroti, nayenda namanga m'Bene-Yaakani." 
Numbers33:32 Nachokera ku Bene-Yaakani, nayenda namanga m'Hori Hagidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Nachokera ku Hori Hagidigadi, nayenda namanga m'Yotibata." 
Numbers33:34 Nachokera ku Yotibata, nayenda namanga m'Aborona." 
Numbers33:35 Nachokera ku Aborona, nayenda namanga m'Eziyoni-Gebere." 
Numbers33:36 Nachokera ku Eziyoni-Gebere, nayenda namanga m'chipululu cha Zini (ndiko Kadesi)." 
Numbers33:37 Nachokera ku Kadesi, nayenda namanga m'phiri la Hori, ku malekezero a dziko la Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Ndipo Aroni wansembe anakwera m'phiri la Hori pa mau a Yehova, nafa komweko, atatuluka ana a Israele m'dziko la Ejipito zaka makumi anai, mwezi wachisanu, tsiku loyamba la mwezi." 
Numbers33:39 Ndipo Aroni ndiye wa zaka zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza zitatu pakufa iye m'phiri la Hori. 
Numbers33:40 Ndipo Mkanani, mfumu ya Aradi, wakukhala kumwera m'dziko la Kanani, anamva za kudza kwao kwa ana a Israele." 
Numbers33:41 Ndipo anachokera kuphiri la Hori, nayenda namanga m'Zalimona." 
Numbers33:42 Nachokera ku Zalimona, nayenda namanga m'Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Nachokera ku Punoni, nayenda namanga m'Oboti." 
Numbers33:44 Nachokera ku Oboti, nayenda namanga m'Iyeabarimu, m'malire a Mowabu." 
Numbers33:45 Nachokera ku Iyimu, nayenda namanga m'Diboni Gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Nachokera ku Diboni Gadi, nayenda namanga m'Alimoni-Dibulataimu." 
Numbers33:47 Nachokera ku Alimoni-Dibulataimu, nayenda namanga m'mapiri a Abarimu, chakuno cha Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Nachokera ku mapiri a Abarimu, nayenda namanga m'zidikha za Mowabu pa Yordani ku Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Ndipo anamanga pa Yordani, kuyambira ku Beteyesimoti kufikira ku Abele-Sitimu m'zidikha za Mowabu." 
Numbers33:50 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'zidikha za Mowabu pa Yordani ku Yeriko, nati," 
Numbers33:51 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Mutaoloka Yordani kulowa m'dziko la Kanani," 
Numbers33:52 mupirikitse onse okhala m'dziko pamaso panu, ndi kuononga mafano ao onse a miyala, ndi kuononga mafano ao onse oyenga, ndi kupasula misanje yao yonse;" 
Numbers33:53 ndipo mulande dziko, ndi kukhala m'mwemo, pakuti ndinakupatsani inu dzikoli likhale lanulanu." 
Numbers33:54 Ndipo mulandire dzikoli ndi kuchita maere monga mwa mabanja anu; cholowa chao chichulukire ochulukawo, cholowa chao chichepere ochepawo; kumene maere amgwera munthu, kumeneko nkwake; mulandire cholowa chanu monga mwa mafuko a makolo anu." 
Numbers33:55 Koma mukapanda kupirikitsa okhala m'dziko pamaso panu, pamenepo iwo amene muwalola atsale adzakhala ngati zotwikira m'maso mwanu, ndi minga m'mbali zanu, nadzakuvutani m'dziko limene mukhalamo." 
Numbers33:56 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti monga ndinayesa kuchitira iwowa, ndidzakuchitirani inu." 
Numbers34:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers34:2 Uza ana a Israele, nunene nao, Mutalowa m'dziko la Kanani, ndilo dziko logwera inu, likhale cholowa chanu, dziko la Kanani monga mwa malire ake," 
Numbers34:3 dera lanu la kumwera lidzakhala lochokera ku chipululu cha Zini, kutsata m'mphepete mwa Edomu, ndi malire anu a kumwera adzakhala ochokera ku malekezero a Nyanja ya Mchere kum'mawa;" 
Numbers34:4 ndi malire anu adzapinda kuchokera kumwera kunka pokwera Akarabimu, ndi kupitirira ku Zini; ndi kutuluka kwake adzachokera kumwera ku Kadesi-Baranea, nadzatuluka kunka ku Hazara-Adara, ndi kupita kunka ku Azimoni;" 
Numbers34:5 ndipo malirewo adzapinda ku Azimoni kunka ku mtsinje wa Ejipito, ndi kutuluka kwao adzatuluka kunyanja." 
Numbers34:6 Kunena za malire a kumadzulo Nyanja Yaikulu ndiyo malire anu; ndiyo malire anu a kumadzulo. 
Numbers34:7 Malire anu a kumpoto ndiwo: kuyambira ku Nyanja Yaikulu mulinge kuphiri la Hori: 
Numbers34:8 kuchokera kuphiri la Hori mulinge polowera Hamati; ndipo kutuluka kwake kwa malire kudzakhala ku Zedadi. 
Numbers34:9 Ndipo malirewo adzatuluka kunka ku Zifuroni, ndi kutuluka kwake kudzakhala ku Hazara-Enani; ndiwo malire anu a kumpoto." 
Numbers34:10 Ndipo mudzilembere malire a kum'mawa ochokera ku Hazara-Enani kunka ku Sefamu; 
Numbers34:11 ndi malire adzatsika ku Sefamu kunka ku Ribula, kum'mawa kwa Aini; ndipo malire adzatsika, nadzafikira mbali ya nyanja ya Kinereti kum'mawa," 
Numbers34:12 ndi malire adzatsika ku Yordani, ndi kutuluka kwake kudzakhala ku Nyanja ya Mchere; ili ndili dziko lanu monga mwa malire ake polizinga." 
Numbers34:13 Ndipo Mose anauza ana a Israele, nati, Ili ndi dzikoli mudzalandira ndi kuchita maere, limene Yehova analamulira awapatse mafuko asanu ndi anai ndi hafu;" 
Numbers34:14 popeza fuko la ana a Rubeni monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, ndi fuko la ana a Gadi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, adalandira, ndi fuko la hafu la Manase lalandira cholowa chao;" 
Numbers34:15 mafuko awiriwa ndi hafu adalandira cholowa chao tsidya lija la Yordani ku Yeriko, kum'mawa, kotulukira dzuwa." 
Numbers34:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers34:17 Maina a amunawo adzakugawirani dziko likhale cholowa chanu, ndi awa: Eleazara wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni." 
Numbers34:18 Muwatengenso akalonga, kalonga mmodzi ku fuko limodzi, agawe dziko likhale cholowa chao." 
Numbers34:19 Maina a amunawo ndiwo: wa fuko la Yuda, Kalebe mwana wa Yefune." 
Numbers34:20 Wa fuko la ana a Simeoni, Semuele mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers34:21 Wa fuko la Benjamini, Elidadi mwana wa Kisiloni." 
Numbers34:22 Wa fuko la ana a Dani, kalonga Buki mwana wa Yogili." 
Numbers34:23 Wa ana a Yosefe; wa fuko la ana a Manase, kalonga Haniyele mwana wa Efodi." 
Numbers34:24 Wa fuko la ana a Efuremu, kalonga Kemuwele mwana wa Sifutani." 
Numbers34:25 Wa fuko la ana a Zebuloni, kalonga Elizafani mwana wa Paranaki." 
Numbers34:26 Wa fuko la ana a Isakara, kalonga Palatiele mwana wa Azani." 
Numbers34:27 Wa fuko la ana a Asere, kalonga Ahihudi mwana wa Selomi." 
Numbers34:28 Wa fuko la ana a Nafutali, kalonga Pedahele mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers34:29 Iwo ndiwo amene Yehova analamulira agawire ana a Israele cholowa chao m'dziko la Kanani. 
Numbers35:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'zidikha za Mowabu, pa Yordani, ku Yeriko, ndi kuti," 
Numbers35:2 Uza ana a Israele, kuti apatseko Alevi cholowa chaochao, midzi yokhalamo; muwapatsenso Alevi mabusa akuzungulira midzi." 
Numbers35:3 Ndipo midzi ndiyo yokhalamo iwowa; ndi mabusa akhale a ng'ombe zao, ndi zoweta zao, inde nyama zao zonse." 
Numbers35:4 Ndipo mabusa a midziyo, imene muipereke kwa Alevi ndiwo a mikono chikwi chimodzi kuyambira kulinga kufikira kunja." 
Numbers35:5 Ndipo muyese kunja kwa mudzi, mbali ya kum'mawa mikono zikwi ziwiri, ndi mbali ya kumwera mikono zikwi ziwiri, ndi mbali ya kumadzulo mikono zikwi ziwiri, ndi mbali ya kumpoto mikono zikwi ziwiri; ndi mudziwo pakati; ndiwo mabusa a kumidzi." 
Numbers35:6 Ndipo midziyo muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyo midzi ija isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako; imene muipereke kuti wakupha mnzake athawireko; ndipo pamodzi ndi iyi muperekenso midzi makumi anai ndi iwiri. 
Numbers35:7 Midzi yonse muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyo midzi makumi anai ndi isanu ndi itatu, iyo pamodzi ndi mabusa ao." 
Numbers35:8 Ndipo kunena za midziyo muiperekeyo yaoyao ya ana a Israele, okhala nayo yambiri mutengeko yambiri; okhala nayo pang'ono mutengeko pang'ono; onse operekako midzi yao kwa Alevi monga mwa cholowa chao adachilandira." 
Numbers35:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers35:10 Nena ndi ana a Israele, nuti nao, Pakuoloka inu Yordani kulowa m'dziko la Kanani," 
Numbers35:11 muikire midzi ikukhalireni midzi yopulumukirako; kuti wakupha mnzake wosati dala athawireko. 
Numbers35:12 Ndipo midziyo ikukhalireni yakupulumuka wolipsa; kuti wakupha mnzake asafe, kufikira ataima pamaso pa msonkhano amweruze." 
Numbers35:13 Ndipo midziyo muipereke ikukhalireni midzi isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako. 
Numbers35:14 Mupereke midzi itatu tsidya lino la Yordani, ndi midzi itatu mupereke m'dziko la Kanani, ndiyo yopulumukirako." 
Numbers35:15 Midzi isanu ndi umodzi imene ndiyo yopulumukirako ana a Israele, ndi mlendo, ndi wokhala pakati pao; kuti aliyense adamupha munthu osati dala athawireko." 
Numbers35:16 Koma akamkantha ndi chipangizo chachitsulo, kuti wafa, ndiye wakupha munthu; wakupha munthu nayenso amuphe ndithu." 
Numbers35:17 Kapena akamkantha m'dzanja muli mwala, wakufetsa munthu, ndipo wafa, ndiye wakupha munthu; wakupha munthu nayenso amuphe ndithu." 
Numbers35:18 Kapena akamkantha m'dzanja muli chipangizo chamtengo, chakufetsa munthu, ndipo wafa, ndiye wakupha munthu; wakupha munthu nayenso amuphe ndithu." 
Numbers35:19 Wolipsa mwazi mwini wake aphe wakupha munthuyo; pakumpeza amuphe. 
Numbers35:20 Ndipo akampyoza momkwiyira, kapena kumponyera kanthu momlalira, kuti wafa;" 
Numbers35:21 kapena kumpanda ndi dzanja lake momuda, kuti wafa, womkanthayo nayenso amuphe ndithu; ndiye wakupha munthu; wolipsa mwazi aphe wakupha munthuyo akampeza." 
Numbers35:22 Koma akampyoza modzidzimuka, osamuda, kapena kumponyera kanthu osamlalira," 
Numbers35:23 kapena kumponyera mwala wakufetsa munthu, osamuona, namgwetsera uwu, kuti wafa, koma sindiye mdani wake, kapena womfunira choipa;" 
Numbers35:24 pamenepo msonkhano uziweruza pakati pa wokantha mnzakeyo ndi wolipsa mwaziyo monga mwa maweruzo awa; 
Numbers35:25 ndipo msonkhano umlanditse wakupha munthu m'dzanja la wolipsa mwazi, ndi msonkhanowo umbwezere kumudzi wake wopulumukirako, kumene adathawirako; ndipo azikhalamo kufikira atafa mkulu wa ansembe wodzozedwa ndi mafuta opatulika." 
Numbers35:26 Koma wakupha munthu akatuluka nthawi iliyonse kulumpha malire a mudzi wake wopulumukirako kumene anathawirako; 
Numbers35:27 nakampeza wolipsa mwazi kunja kwa malire a mudzi wake wothawirako, ndipo wolipsa mwazi akapha wakupha munthu, alibe kuchimwira mwazi;" 
Numbers35:28 popeza wakupha munthu akadakhala m'mudzi wake wopulumukirako kufikira atafa mkulu wa ansembe; koma atafa mkulu wa ansembe wakupha munthuyo abwere ku dziko lakelake. 
Numbers35:29 Ndipo izi zikhale kwa inu lemba la chiweruzo mwa mibadwo yanu, m'nyumba zanu zonse." 
Numbers35:30 Aliyense wakantha munthu, wakupha munthuyo aziphedwa pakamwa pa mboni; koma mboni ya munthu mmodzi isafikire kuti munthu afe." 
Numbers35:31 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola moyo wa iye adapha munthu, napalamula imfa; koma aziphedwa ndithu." 
Numbers35:32 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola iye amene adathawira kumudzi wake wopulumukirako, kuti abwerenso kukhala m'dziko, kufikira atafa mkulu wa ansembe." 
Numbers35:33 Ndipo musamaipsa dziko muli m'mwemo; popeza mwazi uipsa dziko; pakuti kulibe kutetezera dziko chifukwa cha mwazi anaukhetsa m'mwemo, koma ndi mwazi wa iye anaukhetsa ndiwo." 
Numbers35:34 Usamadetsa dziko ukhala m'mwemo, limene ndikhalitsa pakati pake; popeza Ine Yehova ndikhalitsa pakati pa ana a Israele." 
Numbers36:1 Ndipo akulu a makolo a mabanja a ana a Giliyadi, mwana wa Makiri, mwana wa Manase, wa mabanja a ana a Yosefe, anayandikiza, nanena pamaso pa Mose, ndi pamaso pa akalonga, ndiwo akulu a makolo a ana a Israele;" 
Numbers36:2 nati, Yehova analamulira mbuye wanga mupatse ana a Israele dzikoli mochita maere likhale cholowa chao; ndipo Yehova analamulira mbuye wathu mupatse ana ake akazi cholowa cha Zelofehadi mbale wathu." 
Numbers36:3 Ndipo akakwatibwa nao ana amuna a mafuko ena a ana a Israele, achichotse cholowa chao ku cholowa cha makolo athu, nachionjeze ku cholowa cha fuko limene adzakhalako; chotero achichotse ku maere a cholowa chathu." 
Numbers36:4 Ndipo pofika chaka choliza cha ana a Israele adzaphatikiza cholowa chao ku cholowa cha fuko limene akhalako; chotero adzachotsa cholowa chao ku cholowa cha fuko la makolo athu. 
Numbers36:5 Ndipo Mose analamulira ana a Israele monga mwa mau a Yehova, nati, Fuko la ana a Yosefe linena zoona." 
Numbers36:6 Cholamulira Yehova za ana akazi a Zelofehadi ndi ichi, kuti, Akwatibwe nao amene afuna eni ake; komatu akwatibwe nao a banja la fuko la makolo ao okhaokha." 
Numbers36:7 Motero cholowa cha ana a Israele sichidzanka ku fuko ndi fuko; popeza ana a Israele adzamamatira yense ku cholowa cha fuko la makolo ake. 
Numbers36:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi yense wa mafuko a ana a Israele, wakukhala nacho cholowa, akwatibwe ndi wina wa banja la fuko la kholo lake, kuti ana a Israele akhale nacho yense cholowa cha makolo ake." 
Numbers36:9 Motero cholowa cha ana a Israele sichidzanka ku fuko ndi fuko, pakuti mafuko a ana a Israele adzamamatira lonse ku cholowa chakechake." 
Numbers36:10 Monga Yehova adalamulira Mose, momwemo ana akazi a Zelofehadi anachita;" 
Numbers36:11 popeza Mala, Tiriza, ndi Hogila, ndi Milika, ndi Nowa, ana akazi a Zelofehadi, anakwatibwa ndi ana amuna a abale a atate wao." 
Numbers36:12 Anakwatibwa mwa mabanja a ana a Manase mwana wa Yosefe; ndipo cholowa chao chinakhala m'fuko la banja la atate wao. 
Numbers36:13 Awa ndi malamulo ndi maweruzo, amene Yehova analamulira ana a Israele ndi dzanja la Mose m'zidikha za Mowabu pa Yordani ku Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Awa ndi mau amene Mose ananena kwa Israele wonse, tsidya la Yordani m'chipululu, m'chidikha cha pandunji pa Sufu, pakati pa Parani, ndi Tofele, ndi Labani, ndi Hazeroti, ndi Dizahabu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Ulendo wake wochokera ku Horebu wofikira ku Kadesi-Baranea, wodzera njira ya phiri la Seiri, ndiwo wa masiku khumi ndi limodzi." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ndipo kunali, chaka cha makumi anai, mwezi wakhumi ndi umodzi, tsiku loyamba la mweziwo, Mose ananena ndi ana a Israele, monga mwa zonse Yehova adamlamulira awauze;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 atakantha Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wakukhala m'Hesiboni, ndi Ogi mfumu ya Basani, wakukhala m'Asitaroti, ku Ederei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Tsidya lija la Yordani, m'dziko la Mowabu, Mose anayamba kufotokozera chilamulo ichi, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy1:6 Yehova Mulungu wathu ananena ndi ife m'Horebu, ndi kuti Yakwanira nthawi yokhala inu m'phiri muno;" 
Deuteronomy1:7 bwererani, yendani ulendo wanu ndi kumuka ku mapiri a Aamori, ndi koyandikizana nao, kuchidikha, kumapiri, ndi kunsi ndi kumwera, ndi kumphepete kwa nyanja, dziko la Akanani, ndi Lebanoni, kufikira mtsinje waukulu wa Yufurate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Taonani, ndakupatsani dzikoli pamaso panu, lowani landirani dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isaki, ndi Yakobo, kuti ili ndidzawapatsa iwo ndi mbeu zao pambuyo pao." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Ndipo muja ndinanena ndi inu, ndi kuti, Sinditha ine kukunyamulani ndekha;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuchulukitsani, ndipo taonani, lero muchuluka ngati nyenyezi za kumwamba." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu, achulukitsire chiwerengero chanu chalero ndi chikwi chimodzi, nakudalitseni monga Iye ananena nanu!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ndikasenza bwanji ndekha kupsinya kwanu, ndi katundu wanu, ndi kulimbana kwanu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Dzifunireni amuna anzeru, ndi ozindikira bwino, ndi odziwika mwa mafuko anu, ndipo ndidzawaika akhale akulu anu." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Pamenepo munandiyankha ndi kuti, Mau mwanenawa ndi abwino kuwachita." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Potero ndinatenga akulu a mafuko anu, amuna anzeru, ndi odziwika, ndi kuwaika akhale akulu anu, atsogoleri a zikwi, ndi atsogoleri a mazana, ndi atsogoleri a makumi, ndi akapitao, a mafuko anu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ndipo ndinauza oweruza anu muja, ndi kuti, Mverani milandu ya pakati pa abale anu, ndi kuweruza kolungama pakati pa munthu ndi mbale wake, ndi mlendo wokhala naye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Musamasamalira munthu poweruza mlandu; ang'ono ndi akulu muwamvere chimodzimodzi; musamaopa nkhope ya munthu; popeza chiweruzo ncha Mulungu; ndipo mlandu ukakukanikani mubwere nao kwa ine, ndidzaumva." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ndipo ndinakuuzani muja zonse muyenera kuzichita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Pamenepo tinayenda ulendo kuchokera ku Horebu, ndi kubzola m'chipululu chachikulu ndi choopsa chija chonse munachionachi, pa njira ya ku mapiri a Aamori, monga Yehova Mulungu wathu anatiuza; ndipo tinadza ku Kadesi-Baranea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ndipo ndinati kwa inu, Mwafikira mapiri a Aamori, amene Yehova Mulungu wathu atipatsa." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Taonani, Yehova Mulungu wanu wapatsa dzikoli pamaso panu; kwerakoni, landirani, monga Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu, wanena ndi inu; musamachita mantha, musamatenga nkhawa." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Ndipo munayandikiza kwa ine inu nonse, ndi kuti, Titumize amuna atitsogolere, kuti akatizondere dziko ndi kutibwezera mau akunena za njira ya kukwera nayo ife pomka komwemo, ndi za midzi yoti tidzafikako." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ndipo chinandikomera chinthu ichi; ndipo ndinatenga amuna khumi ndi awiri a inu, fuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi;" 
Deuteronomy1:24 amenewa anatembenuka nakwera kumapiri nalowa ku chigwa cha Esikolo, nachizonda." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ndipo anatengako zipatso za dzikoli m'manja mwao, natsikira nazo kwa ife, natibwezera mau ndi kuti, Dzikoli Yehova Mulungu wathu atipatsa ndi labwino." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Koma simunafuna kukwerako, ndipo munapikisana nao mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ndipo munadandaula m'mahema mwanu, ndi kuti, Popeza anatida Yehova, Iye anatitulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito, kutipereka m'manja mwa Aamori, ationonge." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Tikwere kuti? Abale athu atimyukitsa mitima yathu, ndi kuti, Anthuwo ndiwo akulu ndi atali akuposa ife; midzi ndi yaikulu ndi ya malinga ofikira m'mwamba: tinaonakonso ana a Anaki." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Pamenepo ndinati kwa inu, Musamaopsedwa, musamachita mantha nao." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Yehova Mulungu wanu wakutsogolera inu, Iye adzathirira inu nkhondo, monga mwa zonse anakuchitirani m'Ejipito pamaso panu;" 
Deuteronomy1:31 ndi kuchipululu, kumene munapenya kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anakunyamulani, monga anyamula mwana wake wamwamuna, m'njira monse munayendamo, kufikira mutalowa m'malo muno." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Koma m'chinthu ichi simunakhulupirira Yehova Mulungu wanu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 amene anakutsogolerani m'njira, kukufunirani malo akumanga mahema anu ndi moto usiku, kukuonetserani njira yoyendamo inu, ndi mumtambo usana." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Ndipo Yehova anamva mau a kunena kwanu, nakwiya, nalumbira, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy1:35 Palibe mmodzi wa anthu awa a mbadwo uno woipa adzaona dziko lokomalo ndinalumbira kupatsa makolo anuli. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Koma Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, iye adzaliona; ndidzampatsa iye dziko limene anapondapo, ndi ana ake; popeza analimbika ndi kutsata Yehova." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Yehova anakwiya ndi inenso chifukwa cha inu, ndi kuti, Iwenso sudzalowamo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, wakuima pamaso pako, iye adzalowamo; umlimbitse mtima; popeza iye adzalandiritsa Israele." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ndipo ana anu amene mudanena, Adzakhala ogulidwa, ndi ana anu osadziwa chabwino kapena choipa ndi pano, iwo adzalowamo, ndidzawapatsa iwo ili, adzalilandira ndi iwo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Koma inu, bwererani, mukani ulendo wanu kuchipululu, njira ya ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Pamenepo munayankha ndi kunena ndi ine, Tachimwira Yehova, tidzakwera ndi kuthira nkhondo monga mwa zonse Yehova Mulungu wathu atiuza. Ndipo munadzimangira munthu yense zida zake za nkhondo, nimunakonzeka kukwera kunka kumapiri." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Koma Yehova anati kwa ine, Nena nao, Musakwerako, kapena kuthira nkhondo; popeza sindili pakati panu; angakukantheni adani anu." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Pamene ndinanena ndi inu simunamvera; koma munatsutsana nao mau a Yehova ndi kuchita modzikuza, nimunakwera kunka kumapiri." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ndipo Aamori, akukhala m'mapiri muja, anatuluka kukomana ndi inu, nakupirikitsani, monga zimachita njuchi, nakukanthani m'Seiri, kufikira ku Horoma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ndipo munabwerera ndi kulira pamaso pa Yehova; koma Yehova sanamvere mau anu, kapena kukutcherani khutu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Potero munakhala m'Kadesi masiku ambiri, monga mwa masiku munakhalako." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Pamenepo tinabwerera, ndi kuyenda kunka kuchipululu, kutsata njira ya Nyanja Yofiira, monga Yehova adanena ndi ine; ndipo tinapaza phiri la Seiri masiku ambiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi ine, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy2:3 Yakwanira nthawi yakupaza inu phiri ili; tembenukani kunka kumpoto. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ndipo uuze anthu, ndi kuti, Mukapite kubzola malire a abale anu, ana a Esau okhala m'Seiri; ndipo adzakuopani; muchenjere ndithu;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 musalimbana nao; popeza sindikupatsakoni dziko lao, pangakhale popondapo phazi lanu ai; pakuti ndapatsa Esau phiri la Seiri likhale lakelake." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Mugulane nao chakudya ndi ndalama, kuti mudye; mugulane naonso madzi kuti mumwe." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anakudalitsani mu ntchito zonse za manja anu; anadziwa kuyenda kwanu m'chipululu ichi chachikulu; zaka izi makumi anai Yehova Mulungu wanu anakhala ndi inu; simunasowa kanthu. 
Deuteronomy2:8 Potero tinapitirira abale athu, ana a Esau okhala m'Seiri, njira ya chidikha, ku Elati ndi ku Eziyoni-Gebere. Pamenepo tinatembenuka ndi kudzera njira ya chipululu cha Mowabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Usavuta Mowabu, kapena kuutsana naye nkhondo; popeza sindidzakupatsako dziko lake likhale lakolako; pakuti ndinapatsa ana a Loti Ari likhale laolao." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Aemimu anakhalamo kale, ndiwo anthu akulu, ndi ambiri, ndi ataliatali, ngati Aanaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Anawayesa iwonso Arefaimu, monga Aanaki; koma Amowabu awatcha Aemimu." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ndipo Ahori anakhala m'Seiri kale, koma ana a Esau analanda dziko lao, nawaononga pamaso pao, nakhala m'malo mwao; monga Israele anachitira dziko lakelake, limene Yehova anampatsa)." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Ukani tsopano, olokani mtsinje wa Zeredi. Ndipo tinaoloka mtsinje wa Zeredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Ndipo masiku amene tinayenda kuchokera ku Kadesi-Baranea, kufikira tidaoloka mtsinje wa Zeredi, ndiwo zaka makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu; kufikira utatha mbadwo wonse wa amuna ankhondo m'chigono, monga Yehova adawalumbirira." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Komanso dzanja la Yehova linatsutsana nao, kuwaononga m'chigono, kufikira adawatha." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Ndipo kunali, atatha kufa amuna onse ankhondo mwa anthu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Yehova ananena ndi ine, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy2:18 Lero lomwe utumphe malire a Mowabu, ndiwo Ari." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ndipo pamene uyandikiza popenyana ndi ana a Amoni, usawavuta, kapena kuutsana nao; popeza sindidzakupatsako dziko la ana a Amoni likhale lakolako; popeza ndinapatsa ana a Loti ili likhale laolao." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ilinso aliyesa dziko la Arefaimu; Arefaimu anakhalamo kale; koma Aamoni awatcha Azamzumimu; 
Deuteronomy2:21 ndiwo anthu akulu, ndi ambiri, ndi atalitali, monga Aanaki; koma Yehova anawaononga pamaso pao; ndipo analanda dziko lao, nakhala m'malo mwao;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 monga Iye anachitira ana a Esau, akukhala m'Seiri, pamene anaononga Ahori pamaso pao; ndipo analanda dziko lao, nakhala m'malo mwao kufikira lero lomwe." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Kunena za Aavimu akukhala m'midzi kufikira ku Gaza, Akafitori, akufuma ku Kafitori, anawaononga, nakhala m'malo mwao)." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Uka, yenda ulendo wako, ndi kuoloka mtsinje wa Arinoni; taonani, ndapereka Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, Mwamori, ndi dziko lake m'dzanja lako; yamba kulilandira, ndi kuutsana naye nkhondo." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Tsiku lino ndiyamba kuopsetsa nawe ndi kuchititsa mantha nawe anthu a pansi pa thambo lonse, amene adzamva mbiri yako, nadzanjenjemera, nadzawawidwa chifukwa cha iwe." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ndipo ndinatuma amithenga ochokera ku chipululu cha Kedemoti kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni ndi mau a mtendere, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy2:27 Ndipitire m'dziko mwako; ndidzatsata mseu, osapatuka ine ku dzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere," 
Deuteronomy2:28 Undigulitse chakudya ndi ndalama, kuti ndidye; ndi kundipatsa madzi kwa ndalama, kuti ndimwe; chokhachi ndipitire choyenda pansi;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 monga anandichitira ana a Esau akukhala m'Seiri, ndi Amowabu akukhala m'Ari; kufikira nditaoloka Yordani kulowa dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wathu atipatsa." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Koma Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni sanatilole kupitira kwao; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu anaumitsa mzimu wake, nalimbitsa mtima wake, kuti ampereke m'dzanja lanu, monga lero lino." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Taona, ndayamba kupereka Sihoni ndi dziko lake pamaso pako; yamba kulandira dziko lake likhale lakolako." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Pamenepo Sihoni anatuluka kukomana nafe, iye ndi anthu ake onse, kugwirana nafe nkhondo ku Yahazi." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wathu anampereka iye pamaso pathu; ndipo tinamkantha, iye ndi ana ake amuna ndi anthu ake onse." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ndipo muja tinalanda midzi yake yonse; ndipo tinaononga konse midzi yonse, amuna ndi akazi ndi ana; sitinasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Zoweta zokha tinadzifunkhira, pamodzi ndi zofunkha za midzi tidailanda." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kuyambira ku Aroere, ndiko kumphepete kwa mtsinje wa Arinoni, ndi kumudzi wokhala kumtsinje kufikira ku Giliyadi, kunalibe mudzi wakutitalikira malinga ake; Yehova Mulungu wathu anapereka yonse pamaso pathu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ku dziko la ana a Amoni lokha simunayandikiza; dera lonse la mtsinje wa Yaboki, ndi midzi ya kumapiri, ndi kwina kulikonse Yehova Mulungu wathu anatiletsa." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Pamenepo tinatembenuka, ndi kubwera kunka njira ya ku Basani; ndipo Ogi mfumu ya Basani anatuluka kukomana nafe, kugwirana nafe nkhondo, iye ndi anthu ake onse, ku Ederei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Usamuopa; popeza ndampereka iye ndi anthu ake onse, ndi dziko lake, m'dzanja lako; umchitire monga umo unachitira Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, amene anakhala m'Hesiboni." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Potero Yehova Mulungu wathu anaperekanso m'manja mwathu Ogi mfumu ya Basani, ndi anthu ake onse, ndipo tinamkantha kufikira sanamtsalire ndi mmodzi yense." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ndipo muja tinalanda midzi yake yonse; kunalibe mudzi sitinaulanda m'manja mwao, midzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi, dera lonse la Arigobu, dziko la Ogi m'Basani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Yonseyi ndiyo midzi yozinga ndi malinga atali, zitseko, ndi mipiringidzo; pamodzi ndi midzi yambirimbiri yopanda malinga." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Ndipo tinaiononga konse, monga umo tinachitira Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, ndi kuononga konse midzi yonse, amuna, akazi ndi ana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Koma zoweta zonse ndi zofunkha za m'midzi, tinadzifunkhira tokha." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ndipo muja tinalanda dziko m'manja mwa mafumu awiri a Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordani, kuyambira mtsinje wa Arinoni kufikira phiri la Heremoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Asidoni alitcha Heremoni Sirioni, koma Aamori alitcha Seniri);" 
Deuteronomy3:10 midzi yonse ya kuchidikha, ndi Giliyadi lonse, ndi Basani lonse kufikira ku Saleka ndi Ederei, midzi ya dziko la Ogi m'Basani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Pakuti Ogi mfumu ya Basani anatsala yekha wa iwo otsalira Arefaimu; taonani, kama wake ndiye kama wachitsulo; sukhala kodi m'Raba wa ana a Amoni? Utali wake mikono isanu ndi inai, kupingasa kwake mikono inai, kuyesa mkono wa munthu)." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Ndipo dziko ili tinalilanda muja; kuyambira ku Aroere, wa ku mtsinje wa Arinoni, ndi dera lina la ku mapiri a Giliyadi, ndi midzi yake, ndinapatsa Arubeni ndi Agadi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ndi chotsalira cha Giliyadi, ndi Basani lonse, dziko la Ogi, ndinapatsa fuko la hafu la Manase; dziko lonse la Arigobu, pamodzi ndi Basani. (Ndilo lotchedwa dziko la Arefaimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairi mwana wa Manase analanda dziko lonse la Arigobu, kufikira malire a Agesuri ndi Amaakati; nalitcha dzina lake, Basani Havoti-Yairi, kufikira lero lino)." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ndipo ndinampatsa Makiri Giliyadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Koma ndinapatsa Arubeni ndi Agadi kuyambira ku Giliyadi kufikira ku mtsinje wa Arinoni, pakati pa chigwa ndi malire ake, kufikira mtsinje wa Yaboki, ndiwo malire a ana a Amoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 ndi chidikha, ndi Yordani ndi malire ake, kuyambira ku Kinereti kufikira ku Nyanja ya Araba, ndiyo Nyanja ya Mchere, patsinde pa Pisiga, kum'mawa." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Ndipo ndinauza inu muja, ndi kuti, Yehova Mulungu wanu wakupatsani dziko ili likhale lanulanu, muoloke, amuna onse amphamvu ovala zida zao, pamaso pa abale anu ana a Israele." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Koma akazi anu, ndi ana anu, ndi zoweta zanu, (ndidziwa muli nazo zoweta zambiri), zikhale m'midzi yanu imene ndinakupatsani;" 
Deuteronomy3:20 kufikira Yehova atapumulitsa abale anu, monga anapumulitsa inu, nalandira iwonso dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu awapatsa tsidya lija la Yordani; pamenepo mudzabwerera munthu yense ku cholowa chake, chimene ndinakupatsani." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Ndipo ndinauza Yoswa muja, ndi kuti, Maso ako anapenya zonse Yehova Mulungu wanu anawachitira mafumu awa awiri; momwemo Yehova adzachitira maufumu onse kumene muolokerako." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Musawaopa popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndiye agwirira inu nkhondo." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ndipo ndinapempha chifundo kwa Yehova nthawi yomwe ija, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy3:24 Ambuye Yehova, mwayamba Inu kuonetsera mtumiki wanu ukulu wanu, ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu; pakuti Mulungu ndani m'mwamba kapena pa dziko lapansi wakuchita monga mwa ntchito zanu, ndi monga mwa mphamvu zanu?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ndioloketu, ndilione dziko lokomali lili tsidya la Yordani, mapiri okoma aja, ndi Lebanoni." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Koma Yehova anakwiya ndi ine, chifukwa cha inu, sanandimvere ine; ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Chikukwanire, usaonjezenso kunena ndi Ine za chinthuchi." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Kwera kumwamba ku Pisiga, nukweze maso ako kumadzulo, ndi kumpoto, ndi kumwera, ndi kum'mawa, nuyang'ane ndi maso ako; popeza sudzaoloka Yordani uyo." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Koma langiza Yoswa, numlimbitse mtima, ndi kumkhwimitsa, pakuti adzaoloka pamaso pa anthu awa, nadzawalandiritsa dziko ulionali likhale laolao." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Potero tinakhala m'chigwamo pandunji pa Betepeori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Ndipo tsopano, Israele, tamverani malemba ndi maweruzo, amene ndikuphunzitsani muwachite; kuti mukhale ndi moyo, ndi kulowa, ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu akupatsani." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Musamaonjeza pa mau amene ndikuuzani, kapena kuchotsapo, kuti musunge malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndikuuzani." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Maso anu anapenya chochita Yehova chifukwa cha Baala-Peori; pakuti amuna onse amene anatsata Baala-Peori, Yehova Mulungu wanu anawaononga pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Koma inu amene munamamatira Yehova Mulungu wanu muli ndi moyo nonsenu lero lomwe. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Taonani, ndinakuphunzitsani malemba ndi maweruzo, monga Yehova Mulungu wanga anandiuza ine, kuti muzichita chotero pakati pa dziko limene mumkako kulilandira likhale lanulanu." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Chifukwa chake asungeni, achiteni; pakuti ichi ndi nzeru zanu ndi chidziwitso chanu pamaso pa mitundu ya anthu akumva malemba ndi kuti, Ndithu mtundu waukulu uwu, ndiwo athu anzeru ndi akuzindikira." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Pakuti mtundu waukulu wa anthu ndi uti, wakukhala ndi Mulungu pafupi pao monga amakhala Yehova Mulungu wathu, pamene paliponse timaitanira Iye?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ndipo mtundu waukulu wa anthu ndi uti, wakukhala nao malemba ndi maweruzo olungama, akunga chilamulo ichi chonse ndichiika pamaso panu lero lino?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Chokhachi, dzichenjerani nokha, ndi kusunga moyo wanu mwachangu, kuti mungaiwale zinthuzi adaziona maso anu, ndi kuti zisachoke kumtima kwanu masiku onse a moyo wanu; koma muzidziwitsa ana anu ndi zidzukulu zanu." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Tsikuli munaima pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu m'Horebu muja Yehova anati kwa ine, Ndisonkhanitsire anthu, ndidzawamvetsa mau anga, kuti aphunzire kundiopa Ine masiku ao onse akukhala ndi moyo pa dziko lapansi, ndi kuti aphunzitse ana ao." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Ndipo munayandikiza ndi kuima patsinde pa phiri; ndi phirilo linayaka moto kufikira pakati pa thambo; kunali mdima, ndi mtambo, inde mdima bii." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Pamenepo Yehova ananena ndi inu ali pakati pa moto; munamva kunena kwa mau, osaona maonekedwe, koma kunenako." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Pamenepo anakufotokozerani chipangano chake, chimene anakulamulirani kuchichita, ndiwo Mau Khumi; nawalemba pa magome awiri amiyala." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Ndipo Yehova anandilamulira muja ndikuphunzitseni malemba ndi maweruzo, kuti mukawachite m'dziko limene muolokerako kulilandira likhale lanulanu." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Potero dzichenjerani nao moyo wanu ndithu; popeza simunapenya mafanidwe konse tsikuli Yehova ananena ndi inu m'Horebu, ali pakati pa moto;" 
Deuteronomy4:16 kuti mungadziipse, ndi kudzipangira fano losema, lakunga chifaniziro chilichonse, mafanidwe a mwamuna kapena mkazi;" 
Deuteronomy4:17 mafanidwe a nyama iliyonse ili pa dziko lapansi, mafanidwe a mbalame iliyonse yamapiko yakuuluka m'mlengalenga," 
Deuteronomy4:18 mafanidwe a chinthu chilichonse chokwawa pansi, mafanidwe a nsomba iliyonse yokhala m'madzi pansi pa dziko;" 
Deuteronomy4:19 ndi kuti mungakweze maso anu kupenya kumwamba, ndipo poona dzuwa ndi mwezi ndi nyenyezi, khamu lonse la kumwamba, munganyengedwe ndi kuzigwadira, ndi kuzitumikira, zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anagawira mitundu yonse ya anthu pansi pa thambo lonse." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Koma Yehova anakutengani, nakutulutsani m'ng'anjo yamoto, m'Ejipito, mukhale kwa Iye anthu a cholowa chake, monga mukhala lero lino." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Yehova anakwiyanso nane chifukwa cha mau anu, nalumbira kuti sindidzaoloka Yordani ine, ndi kuti sindidzalowa m'dziko lokomali Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale cholowa chanu;" 
Deuteronomy4:22 pakuti ndidzafa m'dziko muno, osaoloka Yordani; koma inu mudzaoloka, ndi kulandira dziko ili lokoma likhale lanulanu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Dzichenjerani, mungaiwale chipangano cha Yehova Mulungu wanu, chimene anapangana nanu, ndi kuti mungadzipangire fano losema, chifaniziro cha kanthu kalikonse Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuletsani." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye moto wonyeketsa, ndi Mulungu wansanje." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Mutakabala ana, ndi zidzukulu, ndipo mutakakhala nthawi yaikulu m'dzikomo, ndi kudziipsa, ndi kupanga fano losema, m'chifaniziro cha kanthu kalikonse, ndi kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, kuutsa mkwiyo wake:" 
Deuteronomy4:26 ndiitana kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zichite mboni pa inu lero lino, kuti mudzaonongeka msangatu kuchotsedwa ku dziko limene muolokera Yordani kulilandira likhale lanulanu; masiku anu sadzachuluka pamenepo, koma mudzaonongeka konse." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Ndipo Yehova adzakubalalitsani mwa mitundu ya anthu, nimudzatsala pang'ono mwa amitundu, kumene Yehova adzakutsogolerani kwao." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ndipo kumeneko mudzatumikira milungu, ntchito ya manja a anthu, mtengo ndi mwala, yosapenya, kapena kumva, kapena kudya, kapena kununkhiza." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Koma mukafuna Yehova Mulungu wanu kumeneko, mudzampeza, ngati mumfunafuna ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Mukakhala nao msauko, zikakugwerani zonsezi, masiku otsiriza mudzabwerera kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kumvera mau ake;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye Mulungu wachifundo; sadzakusiyani, kapena kukuonongani, kapena kuiwala chipangano cha makolo anu chimene analumbirira iwo." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Pakuti, funsiranitu, masiku adapitawo, musanakhale inu, kuyambira tsikuli Mulungu analenga munthu pa dziko lapansi, ndi kuyambira malekezero ena a thambo kufikira malekezero anzake a thambo, ngati chinthu chachikulu chonga ichi chinamveka, kapena kuchitika?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Kodi pali mtundu wa anthu udamva mau a mulungu wina akunena pakati pa moto, monga mudamva inu, ndi kukhala ndi moyo?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kapena kodi anayesa Mulungu kumuka ndi kudzitengera mtundu mwa mtundu wina wa anthu, ndi mayesero, ndi zizindikiro, ndi zozizwa, ndi nkhondo, ndi mwa dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, ndi mwa zoopsa zachikulu, monga mwa zonse Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuchitirani m'Ejipito pamaso panu?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Inu munachiona ichi, kuti mudziwe kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu; palibe wina wopanda Iye." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Anakumvetsani mau ake kuchokera kumwamba, kuti akuphunzitseni; ndipo pa dziko lapansi anakuonetsani moto wake waukulu; nimunamva mau ake pakati pa moto." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ndipo popeza anakonda makolo anu, anasankha mbeu zao zakuwatsata, nakutulutsani pamaso pake ndi mphamvu yake yaikulu, m'Ejipito;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 kupirikitsa amitundu akulu ndi amphamvu oposa inu pamaso panu, kukulowetsani ndi kukupatsani dziko lao likhale cholowa chanu, monga lero lino." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Potero dziwani lero lino nimukumbukire m'mtima mwanu, kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu, m'thambo la kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi; palibe wina." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Muzisunga malemba ake, ndi malamulo ake, amene ndikuuzani lero lino, kuti chikukomereni inu ndi ana anu akukutsatani, ndi kuti masiku anu achuluke pa dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale lanu kosatha." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Pamenepo Mose anapatula midzi itatu tsidya lija la Yordani lotuluka dzuwa; 
Deuteronomy4:42 kuti athawireko wakupha munthu, osamupha mnansi wake dala, osamkwiyira ndi kale lonse; ndi kuti, akathawira ku umodzi wa midzi iyi, akhale ndi moyo:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 ndiyo Bezeri, m'chipululu, m'dziko lachidikha, ndiwo wa Arubeni; ndi Ramoti m'Giliyadi, ndiwo wa Agadi; ndi Golani, m'Basani, ndiwo wa Amanase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ndipo ichi ndi chilamulo Mose anachiika pamaso pa ana a Israele; 
Deuteronomy4:45 izi ndi mboni, ndi malemba, ndi maweruzo, Mose anazinena kwa ana a Israele, potuluka iwo m'Ejipito;" 
Deuteronomy4:46 tsidya lija la Yordani, m'chigwa cha pandunji pa Betepeori, m'dziko la Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wakukhala m'Hesiboni, amene Mose ndi ana a Israele anamkantha, potuluka iwo m'Ejipito;" 
Deuteronomy4:47 ndipo analanda dziko lake, ndi dziko la Ogi mfumu ya Basani, mafumu awiri a Aamori, akukhala tsidya lija la Yordani lotuluka dzuwa;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 kuyambira ku Aroere, ndiwo m'mphepete mwa mtsinje wa Arinoni, kufikira phiri la Sirioni (ndilo Heremoni)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ndi chidikha chonse tsidya lija la Yordani kum'mawa, kufikira ku Nyanja ya Araba, pa tsinde lake la Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Ndipo Mose anaitana Israele wonse, nanena nao, Tamverani, Israele, malemba ndi maweruzo ndinenawa m'makutu mwanu lero, kuti muwaphunzire, ndi kusamalira kuwachita." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Yehova Mulungu wathu anapangana nafe chipangano m'Horebu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Yehova sanachite chipangano ichi ndi makolo athu, koma ndi ife, ife amene tili ndi moyo tonsefe pano lero." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Yehova ananena ndi inu popenyana maso m'phirimo, ali pakati pa moto," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (ndinalinkuima pakati pa Yehova ndi inu muja, kukulalikirani mau a Yehova; popeza munachita mantha chifukwa cha moto, osakwera m'phirimo) ndi kuti:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako amene ndinakutulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito, m'nyumba ya akapolo." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Usakhale nayo milungu ina koma Ine ndekha. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Usadzipangire iwe wekha fano losema, kapena chifaniziro chilichonse cha zinthu za m'thambo la kumwamba, kapena za m'dziko lapansi, kapena za m'madzi a pansi pa dziko;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 usazipembedzere izo, usazitumikire izo; chifukwa Ine Yehova Mulungu wako ndine Mulungu wansanje, wakulanga ana chifukwa cha atate wao, kufikira mbadwo wachitatu ndi wachinai wa iwo amene akudana ndi Ine;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 ndi kuchitira chifundo anthu zikwi, a iwo amene akondana ndi Ine nasunga malamulo anga." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Usatchule dzina la Yehova Mulungu wako pachabe; chifukwa Yehova sadzamuyesa iye wosachimwa amene atchula pachabe dzina lakelo. 
Deuteronomy5:12 Samalira tsiku la Sabata likhale lopatulika, monga Yehova Mulungu wako anakulamulira." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi uzigwiritsa ntchito, ndi kuchita ntchito zako zonse;"
