Deuteronomy5:14 koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndilo Sabata la Yehova Mulungu wako; usamagwira ntchito iliyonse, iwe, kapena mwana wako wamwamuna, kapena mwana wako wamkazi, kapena wantchito wako wamwamuna, kapena wantchito wako wamkazi, kapena ng'ombe yako, kapena bulu wako, kapena zoweta zako zilizonse, kapena mlendo wokhala m'mudzi mwako; kuti wantchito wako wamwamuna ndi wantchito wako wamkazi apumule monga iwe mwini." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ndipo uzikumbukira kuti unali kapolo m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kuti Yehova Mulungu wako anakutulutsako ndi dzanja lamphamvu ndi mkono wotambasuka; chifukwa chake Yehova Mulungu wako anakulamulira kusunga tsiku la Sabata." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako, monga Yehova Mulungu wako anakulamulira; kuti masiku ako achuluke, ndi kuti chikukomere, m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wako akupatsa iwe." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Usaphe. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Usachite chigololo. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Usabe. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Usamnamizire mnzako. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Usasirire mkazi wake wa mnzako; usakhumbe nyumba yake ya mnzako, munda wake, kapena wantchito wake wamwamuna, kapena wantchito wake wamkazi, ng'ombe yake, kapena bulu wake, kapena kanthu kalikonse ka mnzako." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Yehova ananena mau awa kwa msonkhano wanu wonse, m'phirimo ali pakati pa moto, pamtambo, pamdima bii, ndi mau akulu; osaonjezapo kanthu. Ndipo anawalembera pa magome awiri amiyala, nandipatsa awa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Ndipo kunali, pamene munamva liu lotuluka pakati pa mdima, potentha phiri ndi moto, munayandikiza kwa ine, ndiwo mafumu onse a mafuko anu ndi akulu anu;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 ndipo munati, Taonani, Yehova Mulungu wathu anationetsa ulemerero wake, ndi ukulu wake, ndipo tidamva liu lake ali pakati pa moto; tapenya lero lino kuti Mulungu anena ndi munthu, ndipo akhala ndi moyo." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Ndipo tsopano tiferenji? Popeza moto waukulu uwu udzatitha. Tikaonjeza kumva mau a Yehova Mulungu wathu, tidzafa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Pakuti ndaniyo, wa zamoyo zonse adamva mau a Mulungu wamoyo wakunena ali pakati pa moto, monga ife nakhala ndi moyo?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Yandikizani inu, ndi kumva zonse Yehova Mulungu wathu adzati; ndipo inu munene ndi ife zonse zimene Yehova Mulungu wathu adzanena ndi inu; ndipo ife tidzazimva ndi kuzichita." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Ndipo Yehova anamva mau a kunena kwanu, pamene munanena ndi ine; ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Ndidamva mau a kunena kwao kwa anthu awa, amene ananena ndi iwe; chokoma chokhachokha adanenachi." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Ha? Mwenzi akadakhala nao mtima wotere wakundiopa Ine, ndi kusunga malamulo anga masiku onse, kuti chiwakomere iwo ndi ana ao nthawi zonse!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Muka, nuti nao, Bwererani ku mahema anu." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Koma iwe, uime kuno ndi Ine, ndinene ndi iwe malamulo onse, ndi malamba, ndi maweruzo, amene uziwaphunzitsa, kuti awachite m'dziko limene ndiwapatsa likhale laolao." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Potero muzisamalira kuchita monga Yehova Mulungu wanu anakulamulirani; musamapatuka kulamanzere kapena kulamanja. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Muziyenda m'njira yonse imene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakulamulirani, kuti mukakhale ndi moyo, ndi kuti chikukomereni, ndi kuti masiku anu achuluke m'dziko limene mudzakhala nalo lanulanu." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ndipo awa ndi malamulo, malemba, ndi maweruzo, amene Yehova Mulungu wanu analamulira kukuphunzitsani, kuti muziwachita m'dziko limene muolokerako kulilandira;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 kuti muope Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusunga malemba ake onse ndi malamulo ake, amene ndikuuzani inu ndi ana anu, ndi zidzukulu zanu, masiku onse a moyo wanu, ndi kuti masiku anu achuluke." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Potero imvani, Israele, musamalire kuwachita, kuti chikukomereni ndi kuti muchuluke chichulukire, monga Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu anena ndi inu, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Imvani, Israele; Yehova Mulungu wathu, Yehova ndiye mmodzi;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 ndipo muzikonda Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse, ndi mphamvu yanu yonse." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ndipo mau awa ndikuuzani lero, azikhala pamtima panu;" 
Deuteronomy6:7 ndipo muziwaphunzitsa mwachangu kwa ana anu, ndi kuwalankhula awa pokhala pansi m'nyumba zanu, ndi poyenda inu panjira, ndi pogona inu pansi, ndi pouka inu." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Ndipo muziwamanga padzanja panu ngati chizindikiro, ndipo akhale ngati chapamphumi pakati pa maso anu." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Ndipo muziwalembera pa mphuthu za nyumba zanu, ndi pa zipata zanu." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Ndipo kudzakhala, Yehova Mulungu wanu atakulowetsani m'dziko limene analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isaki, ndi Yakobo, kuti adzakupatsani ili; midzi yaikulu ndi yokoma, imene simunaimanga;" 
Deuteronomy6:11 ndi nyumba zodzala nazo zokoma zilizonse, zimene simunazidzaza, ndi zitsime zosema, zimene simunazisema, minda yampesa, ndi minda ya azitona, zimene simunazioka, ndipo mutakadya ndi kukhuta;" 
Deuteronomy6:12 pamenepo mudzichenjere mungaiwale Yehova, amene anakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, m'nyumba ya akapolo." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Muziopa Yehova Mulungu wanu; ndi kutumikira Iyeyu; ndipo polumbira muzitchula dzina lake. 
Deuteronomy6:14 Musamatsata milungu ina, milungu ina ya mitundu ya anthu akuzinga inu;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ali pakati panu, ndiye Mulungu wansanje; kuti ungapse mtima wa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kukuonongani, kukuchotsani pankhope pa dziko lapansi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Musamayesa Yehova Mulungu wanu, monga munamyesa m'Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Muzisunga mwachangu malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi mboni zake, ndi malemba ake, amene anakulamulirani." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Ndipo muzichita zolunjika ndi zokoma pamaso pa Yehova; kuti chikukomereni, ndi kuti mulowe kukalandira dziko lokomali Yehova analumbirira makolo anu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 kuingitsa adani anu onse pamaso panu, monga Yehova adanena." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Akakufunsani ana anu m'tsogolomo, ndi kuti, Mbonizo, ndi malemba, ndi maweruzo, zimene Yehova Mulungu wathu anakulamulirani, zitani?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Pamenepo muzinena kwa ana anu, Tinali akapolo a Farao m'Ejipito; ndipo Yehova anatitulutsa m'Ejipito ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Ndipo Yehova anapatsa zizindikiro ndi zozizwa zazikulu ndi zowawa m'Ejipito, pa Farao, ndi pa nyumba yake yonse, pamaso pathu;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 ndipo anatitulutsa komweko, kuti atilowetse, kutipatsa dzikoli analumbirira makolo athu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Ndipo Yehova anatilamulira tizichita malemba awa onse, kuopa Yehova Mulungu wathu, kuti tipindule nako masiku onse, kuti atisunge amoyo, monga lero lino." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ndipo kudzakhala kwa ife chilungamo, ngati tisamalira kuchita malamulo awa onse pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu, monga anatilamulira ife." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu atakulowetsani m'dziko limene mumkako kulilandira likhale lanulanu, ndipo atakataya amitundu ambiri pamaso panu, Ahiti, ndi Agirigasi, ndi Aamori, ndi Akanani, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi, mitundu isanu ndi iwiri yaikulu ndi yamphamvu yoposa inu;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 nakawapereka Yehova Mulungu wanu pamaso panu, ndipo mukawakanthe; pamenepo muwaononge konse; musapangana nao pangano, kapena kuwachitira chifundo." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ndipo musakwatitsane nao; musampatse mwana wake wamwamuna mwana wanu wamkazi, kapena kutenga mwana wake wamkazi akhale wa mwana wanu wamwamuna." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Popeza adzapatutsa mwana wanu aleke kunditsata Ine, kuti atumikire milungu ina; potero Yehova adzapsa mtima pa inu, ndipo adzakuonongani msanga." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Koma muzichita nao motero: mukapasule maguwa ao a nsembe, ndi kuphwanya zoimiritsa zao, ndi kulikha zifanizo zao, ndi kutentha mafano ao osema ndi moto." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Pakuti inu ndinu mtundu wa anthu wopatulika wa Yehova Mulungu wanu; Yehova Mulungu wanu anakusankhani, mukhale mtundu wa pa wokha wa Iye yekha, mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu akukhala pa nkhope ya dziko." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Yehova sanakondwere nanu, ndi kukusankhani chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwanu koposa mitundu yonse ina ya anthu, kapena kuchepera kwanu;" 
Deuteronomy7:8 koma Yehova anakutulutsani ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi kukuombolani m'nyumba ya akapolo, m'dzanja la Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, chifukwa Yehova akukondani, ndi chifukwa cha kusunga lumbiro lija analumbirira makolo anu." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Chifukwa chake dziwani kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye Mulungu; ndiye Mulungu wokhulupirika, wakusunga chipangano ndi chifundo ndi iwo akumkonda ndi kusunga malamulo ake, kufikira mibadwo zikwi." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Ndipo awabwezera onse akudana ndi Iye, pamaso pao, kuwaononga; sachedwa naye wakudana ndi Iye, ambwezera pamaso pake." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Potero muzisunga malamulo, ndi malemba, ndi maweruzo amene ndikuuzani lero kuwachita." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Ndipo kudzakhala, chifukwa cha kumvera inu maweruzo awa, ndi kuwasunga, ndi kuwachita, Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakusungirani chipangano ndi chifundo chimene analumbirira makolo anu;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 ndipo adzakukondani, ndi kukudalitsani, ndi kukuchulukitsani; adzadalitsanso zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, tirigu wanu, ndi vinyo wanu, ndi mafuta anu, zoswana za ng'ombe zanu, ndi anaankhosa anu, m'dziko limene analumbirira makolo anu kuti adzakupatsani." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Mudzakhala odalitsika koposa mitundu yonse ya anthu; sipadzakhala mwamuna kapena wamkazi wosabala pakati pa inu, kapena pakati pa zoweta zanu." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Ndipo Yehova adzakuchotserani nthenda zonse; sadzakuikirani nthenda zoipa zilizonse za Aejipito muzidziwa zija; koma adzaziika pa onse akudana ndi inu. 
Deuteronomy7:16 Ndipo mudzatha mitundu yonse ya anthu amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzapereka kwa inu; diso lanu lisawachitire chifundo; musamatumikira milungu yao; pakuti uku kudzakuchitirani msampha. 
Deuteronomy7:17 Mukadzanena m'mtima mwanu, Amitundu awa andichulukira; ndikhoza bwanji kuwapirikitsa?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Musamawaopa; mukumbukire bwino chimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anachitira Farao, ndi Ejipito wonse;" 
Deuteronomy7:19 mayesero akulu maso anu anawapenya, ndi zizindikiro, ndi zozizwa, ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakutulutsani nazo; Yehova Mulungu wanu adzatero nayo mitundu yonse ya anthu imene muwaopa." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Komanso Yehova Mulungu wanu adzatumiza mavu pakati pao, kufikira ataonongeka otsalawo, ndi akubisala pamaso panu." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Musamaopa pamaso pao; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu ali pakati pa inu, Mulungu wamkulu ndi woopsa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzataya amitundu awa pang'onopang'ono; simuyenera kuwaononga msanga, kuti zingakuchulukireni zilombo." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Koma Yehova Mulungu wanu adzawapereka pamaso panu, nadzawapirikitsa ndi kupirikitsa kwakukulu, kufikira ataonongeka." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Adzaperekanso mafumu ao m'dzanja mwanu, ndipo muwafafanize maina ao pansi pa thambo; palibe munthu mmodzi adzaima pamaso panu, kufikira mutawaononga." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Mafano osema a milungu yao muwatenthe ndi moto; musamasirira siliva ndi golide zili pa iwo, kapena kudzitengera izi; mungakodwe nazo; pakuti izi zinyansira Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Musamalowa nacho chonyansachi m'nyumba mwanu, kuti mungaonongeke konse pamodzi nacho; muziipidwa nacho konse, ndi kunyansidwa nacho konse; popeza ndi chinthu choyenera kuonongeka konse." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Muzisamalira kuchita malamulo onse amene ndikuuzani lero lino, kuti mukhale ndi moyo, ndi kuchuluka, ndi kulowa, ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Ndipo mukumbukire njira yonse imene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuyendetsani m'chipululu zaka izi makumi anai, kuti akuchepetseni, kukuyesani, kudziwa chokhala mumtima mwanu, ngati mudzasunga malamulo ake, kapena iai." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Ndipo anakuchepetsani, nakumvetsani njala, nakudyetsani ndi mana, amene simunawadziwe, angakhale makolo anu sanawadziwe; kuti akudziwitseni kuti munthu sakhala wamoyo ndi mkate wokha, koma munthu akhala wamoyo ndi zonse zakutuluka m'kamwa mwa Yehova." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Zovala zanu sizinatha pathupi panu, phazi lanu silinatupa zaka izi makumi anai." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Ndipo muzindikire m'mtima mwanu, kuti monga munthu alanga mwana wake, momwemo Yehova Mulungu wanu akulangani inu." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Ndipo muzisunga malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuyenda m'njira zake, ndi kumuopa." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu akulowetsani m'dziko lokoma, dziko la mitsinje yamadzi, la akasupe ndi la maiwe akutuluka m'zigwa, ndi m'mapiri;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 dziko la tirigu ndi barele, ndi mipesa, ndi mikuyu, ndi makangaza; dziko la azitona a mafuta, ndi uchi;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 dziko loti mudzadyamo mkate wosapereweza; simudzasowamo kanthu; dziko loti miyala yake nja chitsulo, ndi m'mapiri ake mukumbe mkuwa." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ndipo mudzadya ndi kukhuta, ndi kuyamika Yehova Mulungu wanu chifukwa cha dziko lokomali anakupatsani." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Chenjerani mungaiwale Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kusasunga malamulo ake, ndi maweruzo ake, ndi malemba ake, amene ndikuuzani lero lino;" 
Deuteronomy8:12 kuti, mutadya ndi kukhuta, ndi kumanga nyumba zokoma, ndi kukhalamo;" 
Deuteronomy8:13 ndipo zitachuluka ng'ombe zanu, ndi nkhosa zanu, zitachulukanso siliva wanu ndi golide wanu, zitachulukanso zonse muli nazo;" 
Deuteronomy8:14 mtima wanu ungatukumuke, nimungaiwale Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene anakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, m'nyumba ya akapolo;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 amene anakutsogolerani m'chipululu chachikulu ndi choopsacho, munali njoka zamoto, ndi zinkhanira, mouma mopanda madzi; amene anakutulutsirani madzi m'thanthwe lansangalabwi;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 amene anakudyetsani m'chipululu ndi mana, amene makolo anu sanawadziwe; kuti akuchepetseni, ndi kuti akuyeseni, kuti akuchitireni chokoma potsiriza panu;" 
Deuteronomy8:17 ndipo munganene m'mtima mwanu, Mphamvu yanga ndi mkono wanga wolimba zinandifunira chuma ichi." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Koma mukumbukire Yehova Mulungu wanu, popeza ndi Iyeyu wakupatsani mphamvu yakuonera chuma; kuti akhazikitse chipangano chake chimene analumbirira makolo anu, monga chikhala lero lino." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti mukaiwalatu Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kutsata milungu ina ndi kuitumikira, ndikuchitirani mboni lero lino kuti mudzaonongeka ndithu." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Monga amitundu amene Yehova awaononga pamaso panu, momwemo mudzaonongeka; chifukwa cha kusamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Imvani Israele; mulikuoloka Yordani lero lino, kulowa ndi kulandira amitundu akulu ndi amphamvu akuposa inu, midzi yaikulu ndi ya malinga ofikira kuthambo," 
Deuteronomy9:2 anthu akulu ndi atalitali, ana a Aanaki, amene muwadziwa, amene munamva mbiri yao, ndi kuti, Adzaima ndani pamaso pa ana a Anaki?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Potero mudziwe lero lino, kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amene aoloka pamaso panu ngati moto wonyeketsa; Iye adzawaononga, Iye adzawagwetsa pamaso panu; potero mudzawapirikitsa, ndi kuwaononga msanga, monga Yehova analankhula ndi inu." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Musamanena mumtima mwanu, atawapirikitsa pamaso panu Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuti, Chifukwa cha chilungamo changa Yehova anandilowetsa kudzalandira dziko ili; pakuti Yehova awapirikitsa pamaso panu chifukwa cha zoipa za amitundu awa." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Simulowa kulandira dziko lao chifukwa cha chilungamo chanu, kapena mtima wanu woongoka; koma Yehova Mulungu wanu awapirikitsa pamaso panu chifukwa cha zoipa za amitundu awa, ndi kuti akhazikitse mau amene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, ndi Isaki, ndi Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Potero mudziwe, kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu sakupatsani dziko ili lokoma mulilandire, chifukwa cha chilungamo chanu; pakuti inu ndinu mtundu wa anthu opulukira." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Kumbukirani, musamaiwala, kuti munakwiyitsa Yehova Mulungu wanu m'chipululu; kuyambira tsikuli munatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito, kufikira munalowa m'malo muno munapikisana ndi Yehova." 
Deuteronomy9:8 M'Horebu momwe munautsa mkwiyo wa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anakwiya nanu kukuonongani. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Muja ndinakwera m'phiri kukalandira magome amiyala, ndiwo magome a chipangano chimene Yehova anapangana ndi inu, ndinakhala m'phiri masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku; osadya mkate osamwa madzi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Ndipo Yehova anapereka kwa ine magome awiri amiyala, olembedwa ndi chala cha Mulungu; ndipo panalembedwa pamenepo monga mwa mau onse amene Yehova adanena ndi inu m'phirimo, ali pakati pa moto, tsiku lakusonkhana." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ndipo kunali, atatha masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku, kuti Yehova anandipatsa magome awiriwo amiyala, ndiwo magome a chipangano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Uka, fulumira kutsika kuno popeza anthu ako unawatulutsa m'Ejipitowa anadziipsa; anapatuka msanga m'njira ndinawalamulirayi; anadzipangira fano loyenga." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Yehova ananenanso ndi ine, ndi kuti, Ndapenya anthu awa, taona, awa ndi anthu opulukira;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 undileke, ndiwaononge, ndi kufafaniza dzina lao pansi pa thambo; ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe mtundu wa anthu wamphamvu ndi waukulu woposa iwo." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Pamenepo ndinatembenuka ndi kutsika m'phiri, ndi phirilo linatentha ndi moto; ndi magome awiri a chipangano anali m'manja mwanga." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ndipo ndinapenya, taonani, mudachimwira Yehova Mulungu wanu; mudadzipangira mwanawang'ombe woyenga; mudapatuka msanga m'njira imene Yehova adalamulira inu." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Pamenepo ndinagwira magome awiriwo, ndi kuwataya achoke m'manja anga awiri, ndi kuwaswa pamaso panu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ndipo ndinagwa pansi pamaso pa Yehova, monga poyamba paja, masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku, osadya mkate osamwa madzi, chifukwa cha machimo anu onse mudachimwa, ndi kuchita choipacho pamaso pa Yehova, kuutsa mkwiyo wake." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Pakuti ndinachita mantha chifukwa cha mkwiyo waukali, umene Yehova anakwiya nao pa inu kukuonongani. Koma Yehova anandimvera nthawi ijanso." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Ndipo Yehova anakwiya kwambiri ndi Aroni kumuononga; koma ndinampempherera Aroni nthawi yomweyo. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ndipo ndinatenga tchimo lanu, mwanawang'ombe mudampangayo, ndi mumtentha ndi moto, ndi kumphwanya, ndi kumpera bwino kufikira atasalala ngati fumbi; ndipo ndinataya fumbi lake m'mtsinje wotsika m'phirimo." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Ku Tabera, ndi ku Masa, ndi ku Kibroti-Hatava, munautsanso mkwiyo wa Yehova." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ndipo pamene Yehova anakutumizani kuchokera ku Kadesi-Baranea, ndi kuti Kwerani, landirani dziko limene ndakupatsani; munapikisana nao mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, osamkhulupirira, kapena kumvera mau ake." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Munakhala opikisana ndi Yehova kuyambira tsikuli ndinakudziwani. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Ndipo ndinagwa pansi pamaso pa Yehova masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku ndinagwa pansiwa; popeza Yehova adati kuti adzakuonongani. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ndipo ndinapemphera kwa Yehova ndi kuti, Yehova Mulungu, musaononga anthu anu ndi cholowa chanu, amene mudawaombola mwa ukulu wanu, amene munawatulutsa m'Ejipito ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Kumbukirani atumiki anu, Abrahamu, Isaki, ndi Yakobo; musapenyerera kupulukira kwa anthu awa, kapena choipa chao, kapena tchimo lao;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 kuti linganene dziko limene mudatitulutsako, Popeza Yehova sanakhoze kuwalowetsa m'dziko limene adanena nao, ndi popeza anadana nao, anawatulutsa kuti awaphe m'chipululu." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Koma iwo ndiwo anthu anu ndi cholowa chanu, amene mudatulutsa ndi mphamvu yanu yaikulu ndi dzanja lanu lotambasuka." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Masiku aja Yehova anati kwa ine, Dzisemere magome awiri amiyala onga oyamba aja, nukwere kuno kwa Ine m'phiri umu, nudzipangire likasa lamtengo." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ndipo ndidzalembera pa magomewo mauwo anali pa magome oyamba aja amene unawaswa, ndipo uwaike m'likasamo." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Potero ndinapanga likasa la mtengo wakasiya, ndinasemanso magome awiri amiyala onga oyamba aja, ndi kukwera m'phirimo, magome awiri ali m'manja mwanga." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Ndipo analembera pamagome, monga mwa malembedwe oyamba, mau khumiwo, amene Yehova adanena ndi inu m'phirimo, ali pakati pa moto, tsiku la kusonkhanako; ndipo Yehova anandipatsa awa." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ndipo ndinatembenuka ndi kutsika m'phiri, ndi kuika magome m'likasa ndinalipanga, ali m'menemo monga Yehova anandilamulira ine." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Ndipo ana a Israele anayenda ulendo wao kuchokera ku zitsime za ana a Yaakani kufikira ku Mosera. Kumeneko anamwalira Aroni, ndi kumeneko anamuika; ndipo Eleazara mwana wake anachita ntchito ya nsembe m'malo mwake." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Kuchokerako ananka ulendo ku Gudigoda, ndi kuchokera ku Gudigoda kunka ku Yotibata, dziko la mitsinje yamadzi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Masiku aja Yehova anapatula fuko la Levi, linyamule likasa la chipangano la Yehova, liimirire pamaso pa Yehova kumtumikira, ndi kudalitsa m'dzina lake kufikira lero lino." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Chifukwa chake Levi alibe gawo kapena cholowa pamodzi ndi abale ake; Yehova mwini wake ndiye cholowa chake, monga Yehova Mulungu wake ananena naye." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Ndipo ndinakhala m'phiri monga poyamba paja, masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku; ndipo Yehova anandimvera ine pameneponso; Yehova sanafune kukuonongani." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Uka, tenga ulendo pamaso pa anthu; kuti alowe ndi kulandira dzikoli ndinalumbirira makolo ao kuti ndidzawapatsa." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Ndipo tsopano, Israele, Yehova Mulungu wanu afunanji nanu, koma kuti muziopa Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuyenda m'njira zake zonse, ndi kukonda, ndi kutumikira Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse," 
Deuteronomy10:13 kusunga malamulo a Yehova, ndi malemba ake, amene ndikuuzani lero kuti kukukomereni inu?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Taonani thambo, ndi kumwambamwamba, dziko lapansi, ndi zonse zili m'mwemo ndi zake za Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Koma Yehova anakondwera nao makolo anu kuwakonda, nasankha mbeu zao zakuwatsata, ndiwo inu, mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu, monga kuli lero lino." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Potero dulani khungu la mitima yanu, ndipo musamapulukiranso." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye Mulungu wa milungu, ndi Mbuye wa ambuye; Mulungu wamkulu, wamphamvu, ndi woopsa, wosasamalira nkhope za anthu, kapena kulandira chokometsera mlandu." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Aweruzira ana amasiye ndi mkazi wamasiye; ndipo akonda mlendo, ndi kumpatsa chakudya ndi chovala." 
Deuteronomy10:19 M'mwemo mukondane naye mlendo; popeza munali alendo m'dziko la Ejipito. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Muziopa Yehova Mulungu wanu; mumtumikire Iyeyo; mummamatire Iye, ndi kulumbira pa dzina lake." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Iye ndiye lemekezo lanu, Iye ndiye Mulungu wanu, amene anachita nanu zazikulu ndi zoopsa izi, mudaziona m'maso mwanu." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Makolo anu anatsikira ku Ejipito ndiwo anthu makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu anakusandulizani tsopano muchuluke ngati nyenyezi za kumwamba. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Chifukwa chake muzikonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kusunga chilangizo chake, ndi malemba ake, ndi maweruzo ake, ndi malamulo ake, masiku onse." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Ndipo dziwani lero lino; pakuti sindinena ndi ana anu osadziwa, ndi osapenya kulanga kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ukulu wake, dzanja lake lamphamvu, ndi mkono wake wotambasuka," 
Deuteronomy11:3 ndi zizindikiro zake, ndi ntchito zake, adazichitira Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, ndi dziko lake lonse pakati pa Ejipito;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 ndi chochitira Iye nkhondo ya Ejipito, akavalo ao, ndi agaleta ao; kuti anawamiza m'madzi a Nyanja Yofiira, muja anakutsatani m'mbuyo, ndi kuti Yehova anawaononga kufikira lero lino;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 ndi chimene anakuchitirani m'chipululu, kufikira munadza kumalo kuno;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 ndi chimene anachitira Datani ndi Abiramu, ana a Eliyabu, mwana wa Rubeni; muja nthaka inatsegula pakamwa pake, ndi kuwameza iwo, ndi mabanja ao, ndi mahema ao, ndi za moyo zonse zakuwatsata pakati pa Israele wonse." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Koma maso anu anapenya ntchito yonse yaikulu ya Yehova anaichita. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Potero muzisunga malamulo onsewa ndikuuzani lero lino, kuti mukhale amphamvu, ndi kulowa ndi kulandira dziko, limene mumkako kulilandira;" 
Deuteronomy11:9 ndi kuti masiku anu achuluke m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu, kuti adzawapatsa iwo ndi mbeu zao, dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Pakuti dziko limene mumkako kulilandira ndi losanga dziko la Ejipito lija mudatulukako, kumene kuja munafesa mbeu zanu, ndi kuzithirira ndi phazi lanu, monga munda watherere;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 koma dziko limene mumkako kulilandira ndilo dziko la mapiri ndi zigwa; limamwa madzi a mvula ya kumwamba; 
Deuteronomy11:12 ndilo dziko loti Yehova Mulungu wanu alisamalira, maso a Yehova Mulungu wanu akhalapo chikhalire, kuyambira chaka mpaka kutsiriza chaka." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Ndipo kudzakhala mukasamalira chisamalire malamulo anga amene ndikuuzani lero lino, kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kumtumikira ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse," 
Deuteronomy11:14 ndidzapatsa mvula ya dziko lanu m'nyengo yake, ya chizimalupsa ndi ya masika, kuti mutute tirigu wanu, ndi vinyo wanu, ndi mafuta anu." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndipo ndidzapatsa msipu wa zoweta zanu podyetsa panu; mudzadyanso nimudzakhuta. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Dzichenjerani nokha, angachete mitima yanu, nimungapatuke, ndi kutumikira milungu ina, ndi kuipembedza;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 ndi kuti Mulungu angapse mtima pa inu, nangatseke kumwamba, kuti isowe mvula, ndi kuti nthaka isapereke zipatso zake; ndi kuti mungaonongeke msanga m'dziko lokomali Yehova akupatsani." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Chifukwa chake muzisunga mau anga awa mumtima mwanu ndi m'moyo mwanu; ndi kuwamanga ngati chizindikiro pamanja panu; ndipo zikhale zapamphumi pakati pa maso anu. 
Deuteronomy11:19 Ndipo muziwaphunzitsa ana anu, ndi kuwalankhula awa pokhala inu pansi m'nyumba mwanu, ndi poyenda inu panjira, ndi pogona inu pansi, ndi pakuuka inu pomwe." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Ndipo muziwalembera pa mphuthu za nyumba zanu, ndi pa zipata zanu;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 kuti masiku anu ndi masiku a ana anu achuluke m'dziko limene Yehova analumbira kwa makolo anu kuti adzawapatsali, monga masiku a thambo lili pamwamba pa dziko." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Pakuti mukasunga chisungire malamulo awa onse amene ndikuuzani kuwachita; kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuyenda m'njira zake zonse, ndi kummamatira;" 
Deuteronomy11:23 Yehova adzapirikitsa amitundu awa onse pamaso panu, ndipo mudzalanda amitundu akulu ndi amphamvu oposa inu." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Pamalo ponse padzapondapo phazi lanu ndi panu, kuyambira chipululu ndi Lebanoni, kuyambira pa mtsinjewo, mtsinje wa Yufurate, kufikira nyanja ya m'tsogolo, ndiwo malire anu." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Palibe munthu adzaima pamaso panu; Yehova Mulungu wanu adzanjenjemeretsa ndi kuopsa dziko lonse mudzapondapo, chifukwa cha inu, monga anenana ndi inu." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Taonani, ndilikuika pamaso panu lero dalitso ndi temberero;" 
Deuteronomy11:27 dalitso, ngati mudzamvera malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu amene ndikuuzani lero lino;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 koma temberero, ngati simudzamvera malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kupatuka m'njira ndikuuzani lero lino, kutsata milungu ina imene simunaidziwa." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Ndipo kudzakhala, atakulowetsani Yehova Mulungu wanu m'dziko limene mumkako kulilandira, munene mdalitso pa phiri la Gerizimu, ndi temberero pa phiri la Ebala." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Sakhala kodi tsidya lija la Yordani, m'tseri mwake mwa njira yake yolowa dzuwa, m'dziko la Akanani, akukhala m'chidikha, pandunji pake pa Giligala, pafupi pa mathundu a More?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Pakuti mulinkuoloka Yordani kulowa ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani; ndipo mudzachilandira cholowa chanu, ndi kukhalamo." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Potero samalirani kuchita malemba ndi maweruzo onse ndiwaika pamaso panu lero lino. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Awa ndi malemba ndi maweruzo, muziwasamalirawa kuwachita m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu anakupatsani likhale lanulanu, masiku onse akukhala ndi moyo inu pa dziko lapansi." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Muononge konse malo onse, amitundu amene mudzawalanda anatumikirako milungu yao, pa mapiri aatali, ndi pa zitunda, ndi pansi pa mitengo yonse yabiriwiri;" 
Deuteronomy12:3 nimugumule maguwa ao a nsembe, ndi kuphwanya zoimiritsa zao, ndi kutentha zifanizo zao, ndi kulikha mafano osema a milungu yao; ndipo muononge dzina lao lichoke m'malomo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Musamatero ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Koma kumalo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha mwa mafuko anu onse kuikapo dzina lake, ndiko ku chokhalamo chake, muzifunako, ndi kufikako;" 
Deuteronomy12:6 ndi kubwera nazo kumeneko nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi nsembe zanu zophera, ndi magawo anu onse a magawo khumi, ndi nsembe yokweza ya dzanja lanu, ndi zowinda zanu, ndi nsembe zanu zaufulu, ndi zoyamba kubadwa za ng'ombe zanu, ndi za nkhosa ndi mbuzi zanu;" 
Deuteronomy12:7 ndipo kumeneko muzidya pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kukondwera nazo zonse mudazigwira ndi dzanja lanu, inu ndi a pa banja lanu, m'mene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakudalitsani." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Musamadzichita monga mwa zonse tizichita kuno lero, yense kuchita chilichonse chiyenera m'maso mwake;" 
Deuteronomy12:9 pakuti mpaka lero simunafikira mpumulo ndi cholowa, zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakupatsani." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Koma mudzaoloka Yordani, ndi kukhala m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akulandiritsani; ndipo adzakupumulitsani akulekeni adani anu onse pozungulirapo, ndipo mudzakhala mokhazikika." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Pamenepo padzakhala malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha kukhalitsako dzina lake, kumeneko muzibwera nazo zonse ndikuuzanizi; nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi nsembe zanu zophera, magawo anu onse a magawo khumi, ndi nsembe yokweza dzanja lanu, ndi zowinda zanu zosankhika zimene muzilonjezera Yehova." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ndipo mudzakondwera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, inu ndi ana anu amuna, ndi ana anu akazi, ndi antchito anu amuna, ndi antchito anu akazi, ndi Mlevi ali m'midzi mwanu, popeza alibe gawo kapena cholowa pamodzi ndi inu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Dzichenjerani nokha, musamapereka nsembe zanu zopsereza pamalo ponse upaona:" 
Deuteronomy12:14 koma pamalo pamene Yehova adzasankha, mwa limodzi la mafuko anu, pamenepo muzipereka nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi pamenepo muzichita zonse ndikuuzani." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Koma monga mwa chikhumbu chonse cha moyo wanu muiphe ndi kudya nyama m'midzi yanu yonse, monga mwa mdalitso wa Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupatsani; odetsa ndi oyera adyeko, monga yamphoyo ndi yangondo." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Mwazi wao wokha musamadya; muziuthira panthaka ngati madzi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Simukhoza kudya m'mudzi mwanu limodzi la magawo khumi la tirigu wanu, kapena la vinyo wanu, kapena la mafuta anu, kapena oyamba kubadwa a ng'ombe zanu kapena la nkhosa ndi mbuzi zanu, kapena zowinda zanu zilizonse muzilonjeza kapena nsembe zanu zaufulu, kapena nsembe yokweza ya m'dzanja lanu;" 
Deuteronomy12:18 koma muzizidya pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu m'malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha, inu, ndi ana anu amuna, ndi ana anu akazi, ndi antchito anu amuna, ndi antchito anu akazi, ndi Mlevi ali m'mudzi mwanu; nimukondwere pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu m'zonse mudazigwira ndi dzanja lanu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Dzichenjerani nokha, musataye Mlevi masiku onse akukhala inu m'dziko mwanu." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Akadzakuza malire a dziko lanu Yehova Mulungu wanu, monga ananena ndi inu, ndipo mukadzati, Ndidye nyama, popeza moyo wanga ukhumba kudya nyama; mudye nyama monga umo monse ukhumba moyo wanu." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha kuikako dzina lake akakutanimphirani, muziphako ng'ombe zanu ndi nkhosa ndi mbuzi zanu zimene Yehova anakupatsani, monga ndinakuuzani, ndi kuzidya m'mudzi mwanu, monga umo monse ukhumba moyo wanu." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Koma monga umo amadya mphoyo ndi ngondo momwemo uzizidya; odetsa ndi oyera adyeko chimodzimodzi. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Koma mulimbikepo ndi kusadya mwaziwo; popeza mwazi ndiwo moyo, nimusamadya moyo pamodzi ndi nyama yake." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Musamadya uwu; muuthire pansi ngati madzi. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Musamadya uwu; kuti chikukomereni inu, ndi ana anu akudza m'mbuyo mwanu, pakuchita inu zoyenera pamaso pa Yehova." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Zopatulika zanu zokha zimene muli nazo, ndi zowinda zanu, muzitenge, ndi kupita nazo ku malo amene Yehova adzasankha;" 
Deuteronomy12:27 ndipo mupereke nsembe zanu zopsereza, nyama zao ndi mwazi wao, pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu; ndipo athire mwazi wa nsembe zanu zophera pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu, koma nyama yake muidye." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Samalirani ndi kumvera mau awa onse ndikuuzaniwa, kuti chikukomereni inu, ndi ana anu akudza m'mbuyo mwanu nthawi zonse, pochita inu zokoma ndi zoyenera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu akadzadulatu amitundu pamaso panu, kumene mulowako kuwalandira, ndipo mutawalandira, ndi kukhala m'dziko lao," 
Deuteronomy12:30 dzichenjerani nokha mungakodwe ndi kuwatsata, ataonongeka pamaso panu; ndi kuti mungafunsire milungu yao, ndi kuti, Amitundu awa atumikira milungu yao bwanji? Ndichite momwemo inenso." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Musamatero ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu; pakuti zilizonse zinyansira Yehova, zimene azida Iye, iwowa anazichitira milungu yao; pakuti angakhale ana ao amuna ndi ana ao akazi awatentha m'moto, nsembe ya milungu yao." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Chilichonse ndikuuzani, muchisamalire kuchichita; musamaonjezako, kapena kuchepsako." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Akauka pakati pa inu mneneri, kapena wakulota maloto, nakakupatsani chizindikiro kapena chozizwa;" 
Deuteronomy13:2 ndipo chizindikiro kapena chozizwa adanenachi chifika, ndi kuti, Titsate milungu ina, imene simunaidziwa, ndi kuitumikira;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 musamamvera mau a mneneri uyu, kapena wolota maloto uyu; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu akuyesani, kuti adziwe ngati mukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Muziyenda kutsata Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kumuopa, ndi kusunga malamulo ake, ndi kumvera mau ake, ndi kumtumikira Iye, ndi kummamatira." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Ndipo mneneriyo, kapena wolota malotoyo, mumuphe; popeza ananena chosiyanitsa ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene anakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, nakuombolani m'nyumba ya akapolo; kuti akucheteni mutaye njira imene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakulamulirani muziyendamo. Potero muzichotsa choipacho pakati pa inu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Mbale wanu, ndiye mwana wa mai wanu, kapena mwana wanu wamwamuna, kapena mwana wanu wamkazi, kapena mkazi wa kumtima kwanu, kapena bwenzi lanu, ndiye ngati moyo wanuwanu, akakukakamizani m'tseri, ndi kuti, Tipite titumikire milungu ina, imene simunaidziwa, inu, kapena makolo anu;" 
Deuteronomy13:7 ndiyo milungu ya mitundu ya anthu akuzungulira inu, akukhala pafupi pali inu, kapena akukhala patali pali inu, kuyambira malekezero a dziko lapansi kufikira malekezero ena a dziko lapansi;" 
Deuteronomy13:8 musamavomerezana naye, kapena kumvera iye; diso lanu lisamchitire chifundo, kapena kumleka, kapena kumbisa;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 koma muzimupha ndithu; liyambe dzanja lanu kukhala pa iye kumupha, ndi pamenepo dzanja la anthu onse." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Nimuzimponya miyala, kuti afe; popeza anayesa kukuchetani muleke Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene anakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, m'nyumba ya akapolo." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Kuti Israele wonse amve, ndi kuopa, ndi kusaonjeza kuchita choipa chotere chonga ichi pakati pa inu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Ukamva za umodzi wa midzi yanu, imene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani kukhalako, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy13:13 Amuna ena opanda pake anatuluka pakati pa inu, nacheta okhala m'mudzi mwao, ndi kuti, Timuke titumikire milungu ina, imene simunaidziwa;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 pamenepo muzifunsira, ndi kulondola, ndi kufunsitsa; ndipo taonani, chikakhala choona, chatsimikizika chinthuchi, kuti chonyansa chotere chachitika pakati pa inu;" 
Deuteronomy13:15 muzikanthatu okhala m'mudzi muja ndi lupanga lakuthwa; ndi kuononga konse, ndi zonse zili m'mwemo, ng'ombe zake zomwe, ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Ndipo muzikundika zofunkha zake zonse pakati pakhwalala pake, nimutenthe ndi moto mudzi, ndi zofunkha zake zonse konse, pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu; ndipo udzakhala mulu ku nthawi zonse; asaumangenso." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ndipo pasamamatire padzanja panu kanthu ka chinthu choti chionongeke; kuti Yehova aleke mkwiyo wake waukali, nakuchitireni chifundo, ndi kukumverani nsoni, ndi kukuchulukitsani monga analumbirira makolo anu;" 
Deuteronomy13:18 pakumvera inu mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusunga malamulo ake onse amene ndikuuzani lero lino, kuchita zoyenera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Inu ndinu ana a Yehova Mulungu wanu; musamadzicheka, kapena kumeta tsitsi pakati pa maso chifukwa cha akufa." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Popeza ndinu mtundu wa anthu opatulikira Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndipo Yehova anakusankhani mukhale mtundu wa anthu wa pa wokha wa Iye yekha, mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu okhala pankhope pa dziko lapansi." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Musamadya chonyansa chilichonse. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Nyamazi muyenera kumadya ndi izi: ng'ombe, nkhosa, ndi mbuzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 ngondo, ndi nswala ndi mphoyo, ndi mphalapala, ndi ngoma, ndi nyumbu, ndi mbalale." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Ndipo nyama iliyonse yogawanika chiboda, nikhala yogawanikadi chiboda, nibzikula, imeneyo muyenera kudya." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Koma izi zokha simuyenera kuzidya mwa zobzikulazo, kapena zogawanika chiboda: ngamira, ndi kalulu, ndi mbira, popeza zibzikula, koma zosagawanika chiboda, muziyese zodetsa;" 
Deuteronomy14:8 ndi nkhumba, popeza igawanika chiboda koma yosabzikula, muiyese yodetsa; musamadya nyama yao, musamakhudza mitembo yao." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Mwa zonse zili m'madzi muyenera kumadya izi: zilizonse zili nazo zipsepse ndi mamba, zimenezi muyenera kumadya;" 
Deuteronomy14:10 koma zilizonse zopanda zipsepse kapena mamba musamadya; muziyese zonyansa. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Mbalame zosadetsa zonse muyenera kumadya. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Koma izi ndi zimene simuyenera kumadya: mphungu, ndi nkhwazi, ndi chikambi," 
Deuteronomy14:13 ndi kamtema, ndi mphamba, ndi muimba monga mwa mtundu wake;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 ndi khungubwi aliyense monga mwa mtundu wake; 
Deuteronomy14:15 ndi nthiwatiwa, ndi chipudo, ndi kakowa, ndi kabawi monga mwa mtundu wake;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 ndi nkhutukutu, ndi manchichi, ndi tsekwe;" 
Deuteronomy14:17 ndi vuwo, ndi dembo, ndi nswankhono;" 
Deuteronomy14:18 ndi indwa, ndi chimeza, monga mwa mtundu wake, ndi sadzu, ndi mleme." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ndipo zokwawa zonse zakuuluka muziyesa zonyansa; musamazidya. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Mbalame zonse zosadetsa muyenera kumadya. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Musamadya chinthu chilichonse chitafa chokha; muzipereka icho kwa mlendo ali m'mudzi mwanu, achidye ndiye; kapena uchigulitse kwa mlendo; popeza ndinu mtundu wa anthu wopatulika wa Yehova Mulungu wanu. Musamaphika mwanawambuzi mu mkaka wa make." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Muzipereka ndithu limodzi la magawo khumi la zipatso zonse za mbeu zanu, zofuma kumunda, chaka ndi chaka." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Ndipo muzidye pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, m'malo m'mene asankhamo Iye, kukhalitsamo dzina lake; limodzi la magawo khumi la tirigu wanu, la vinyo wanu, ndi la mafuta anu, ndi oyamba kubadwa a ng'ombe zanu ndi a nkhosa ndi mbuzi zanu; kuti muphunzire kuopa Yehova Mulungu wanu masiku onse." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Ndipo ikakutalikirani njira kotero kuti simukhoza kulinyamula, popeza malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha, kuikapo dzina lake, akutanimphirani; atakudalitsani Yehova Mulungu wanu;" 
Deuteronomy14:25 pamenepo mulisinthe ndalama, ndi kumanga ndalama ikhale m'dzanja mwanu, ndi kupita ku malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha;" 
Deuteronomy14:26 ndipo mugule ndi ndalamazo chilichonse moyo wanu ukhumba, ng'ombe kapena nkhosa, kapena vinyo, kapena chakumwa cholimba, kapena chilichonse moyo wanu ukufunsani; nimudye pomwepo pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kukondwera, inu ndi a pabanja panu." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Koma Mlevi wokhala m'mudzi mwanu, musamamtaya, popeza alibe gawo kapena cholowa pamodzi ndi inu." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Pakutha pake pa zaka zitatu muzitulutsa magawo onse a magawo khumi a zipatso zanu za chaka icho, ndi kuwalinditsa m'mudzi mwanu;" 
Deuteronomy14:29 ndipo abwere Mlevi, popeza alibe gawo kapena cholowa pamodzi ndi inu, ndi mlendo, ndi ana amasiye, ndi mkazi wamasiye, okhala m'mudzi mwanu, nadye nakhute; kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu akakudalitseni mu ntchito zonse za dzanja lanu muzichitazi." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Pakutha pake pa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri pakhale chilekerero. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Chilekererocho ndichi: okongoletsa onse alekerere chokongoletsa mnansi wake; asachifunse kwa mnansi wake, kapena mbale wake; popeza analalikira chilekerero cha Yehova." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Muyenera kuchifunsa kwa mlendo; koma chanu chilichonse chili ndi mbale wanu, dzanja lanu lichilekerere;" 
Deuteronomy15:4 ndiko kuti pasakhale waumphawi mwa inu; pakuti Yehova adzakudalitsani kwambiri m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale cholowa chanuchanu; 
Deuteronomy15:5 chokhachi mumvere chimverere mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuti musamalire kuchita malamulo awa onse amene ndikuuzani lero lino." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani, monga ananena nanu; ndipo mudzakongoletsa amitundu ambiri, osakongola nokha; nimudzachita ufumu pa amitundu ambiri, koma iwo sadzachita ufumu pa inu." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Akakhala ndi inu munthu waumphawi, ndiye wina wa abale anu, m'umodzi wa midzi yanu, m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, musakhakala mtima wanu, kapena kuumitsa dzanja lanu kukaniza mbale wanu waumphawi;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 koma muzimtansira dzanja lanu ndithu ndi kumkongoletsa ndithu zofikira kusowa kwake, monga umo amasowa." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Dzichenjerani, mungakhale mau opanda pake mumtima mwanu, ndi kuti, Chayandika chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri, chaka cha chilekerero; ndipo diso lanu lingaipire mbale wanu waumphawi, osampatsa kanthu; ndipo iye angalirire inu kwa Yehova; ndipo mwa inu mungakhale tchimo." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Muzimpatsa ndithu, osawawa mtima wanu pompatsa; popeza, chifukwa cha ichi Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani mu ntchito zanu zonse, ndi m'zonse muikapo dzanja lanu." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Popeza waumphawi salekana m'dziko, chifukwa chake ndikuuzani ndi kuti, Dzanja lanu mulitansire ndithu mbale wanu, ndi ozunzika anu, ndi aumphawi anu, a m'dziko mwanu." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Mukagula mbale wanu, Muhebri wamwamuna kapena Muhebri wamkazi, ndipo adzakutumikira zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi; koma chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri umlole achoke kwanu waufulu." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ndipo pomlola iwe achoke kwanu waufulu, musamamlola achoke wopanda kanthu;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 mumlemeze nazo za nkhosa ndi mbuzi zanu, ndi za popondera mphesa, ndi za mosungira vinyo; monga Yehova Mulungu wanu anakudalitsani mumninkhe uyu." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Ndipo mukumbukire kuti munali akapolo m'dziko la Ejipito, ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuombolani; chifukwa chake ndikuuzani ichi lero lino." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Ndipo kudzakhala, akanena ndi inu, Sindituluka kuchoka kwanu; popeza akonda inu ndi nyumba yanu, popeza kumkomera kwanu;" 
Deuteronomy15:17 pamenepo muzitenga lisungulo, ndi kulipisa m'khutu mwake, kulikanikiza ndi chitseko, ndipo adzakhala kapolo wanu kosalekeza. Muzichitanso momwemo ndi adzakazi anu." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Musamayesa nchosautsa, pomlola akuchokereni waufulu; popeza anakugwirirani ntchito zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi monga wolipidwa wakulandira chowirikiza; potero Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani m'zonse muzichita." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Zazimuna zonse zoyamba kubadwa, zobadwa mwa ng'ombe zanu ndi mwa nkhosa ndi mbuzi zanu, muzizipatulira Yehova Mulungu wanu; musamagwiritsa ntchito yoyamba kubadwa mwa ng'ombe zanu, kapena kusenga yoyamba kubadwa ya nkhosa kapena mbuzi zanu." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Muzidye chaka ndi chaka pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, m'malo amene Yehova adzasankha, inu ndi a m'banja mwanu." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Koma ikakhala nacho chilema, yotsimphina, kapena yakhungu, chilema chilichonse choipa, musamaiphera nsembe Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Muidye m'mudzi mwanu; odetsa ndi oyera aidye chimodzimodzi, monga mphoyo ndi nswala." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Mwazi wake wokha musamadya; muuthire pansi ngati madzi. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Samalirani mwezi wa Abibu, kuti muzichitira Yehova Mulungu wanu Paska; popeza m'mwezi wa Abibu Yehova Mulungu wanu anakutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito usiku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ndipo muziphera Yehova Mulungu wanu nsembe ya Paska, ya nkhosa ndi ya ng'ombe, m'malo amene Yehova adzasankha kukhalitsamo dzina lake." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Musamadyera nayo mkate wa chotupitsa; masiku asanu ndi awiri mudyere nayo mkate wopanda chotupitsa, ndiwo mkate wa chizunziko popeza munatuluka m'dziko la Ejipito mofulumira; kuti mukumbukire tsiku lotuluka inu m'dziko la Ejipito masiku onse a moyo wanu." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Ndipo m'malire mwanu monse musaoneke chotupitsa masiku asanu ndi awiri; nyama yomwe muiphere nsembe tsiku loyamba madzulo, isatsaleko usiku wonse kufikira m'mawa." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Simuyenera kuphera nsembe ya Paska m'midzi yanu iliyonse, imene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani;" 
Deuteronomy16:6 koma pamalo pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha kukhalitsapo dzina lake, pamenepo muphere nsembe ya Paska, madzulo, polowa dzuwa, nyengo ya kutuluka inu m'Ejipito." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Ndipo muiphike ndi kuidya m'malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha; koma m'mawa mwake mubwerere kunka ku mahema anu. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi muzidya mkate wopanda chotupitsa; ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri ndilo loletsa, la Yehova Mulungu wanu; musamagwira ntchito pamenepo." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Mudziwerengere masabata asanu ndi awiri; muyambe kuwerenga masabata asanu ndi awiri poyambira kusenga tirigu wachilili. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Ndipo muchitire Yehova Mulungu wanu chikondwerero cha Masabata, ndiwo msonkho waufulu wa dzanja lanu, umene mupereke monga Yehova Mulungu wanu akudalitsani." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Ndipo mukondwere pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, inu ndi ana anu amuna, ndi ana anu akazi, ndi antchito anu amuna, ndi antchito anu akazi, ndi Mlevi wokhala m'mudzi mwanu, ndi mlendo, ndi mwana wamasiye, ndi mkazi wamasiye, okhala pakati pa inu, m'malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha kukhalitsako dzina lake." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Ndipo mukumbukire kuti munali akapolo m'Ejipito; musamalire kuchita malemba awa. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Mudzichitire chikondwerero cha Misasa masiku asanu ndi awiri, mutasunga za padwale ndi za mopondera mphesa;" 
Deuteronomy16:14 nimukondwere m'madyerero mwanu, inu, ndi ana anu amuna, ndi ana anu akazi, ndi antchito anu amuna, ndi antchito anu akazi, ndi Mlevi, ndi mlendo, ndi mwana wamasiye, ndi mkazi wamasiye okhala m'mudzi mwanu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Masiku asanu ndi awiri muchitire Yehova Mulungu wanu madyerero m'malo amene Yehova adzasankha; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudalitsani m'zipatso zanu zonse, ndi m'ntchito zonse za manja anu; nimukondwere monsemo." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Amuna onse azioneka pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu m'malo amene Iye adzasankha, katatu m'chaka; pa chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa, pa chikondwerero cha masabata, ndi pa chikondwerero cha Misasa; ndipo asaoneke pamaso pa Yehova opanda kanthu;" 
Deuteronomy16:17 apereke yense monga mwa mphatso ya m'dzanja lake, monga mwa mdalitso wa Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupatsani." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Mudziikire oweruza ndi akapitao m'midzi yanu yonse imene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, monga mwa mafuko anu; ndipo aweruze anthu ndi chiweruzo cholungama." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Musamapotoza chiweruzo, musamasamalira munthu, kapena kulandira chokometsera mlandu; popeza chokometsera mlandu chidetsa maso a anzeru, nichiipsa mau a olungama." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Chilungamo, chilungamo ndicho muzichitsata, kuti mukhale ndi moyo ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Musazike zifanizo zilizonse pafupi pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu, limene mwadzimangira." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Ndipo musamadziutsira choimiritsa chilichonse chimene Yehova Mulungu wanu adana nacho. 
Deuteronomy17:1 Musamaphera Yehova Mulungu wanu nsembe ya ng'ombe, kapena nkhosa, yokhala nacho chilema, kapena chilichonse choipa; pakuti chinyansira Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Akapeza pakati panu, m'mudzi wanu wina umene anakupatsani Yehova Mulungu wanu, wamwamuna kapena wamkazi wakuchita chili choipa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kulakwira chipangano chake," 
Deuteronomy17:3 nakatumikira milungu ina, naigwadira iyo, kapena dzuwa, kapena mwezi, kapena wina wa khamu la kuthambo, losauza Ine;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 ndipo akakuuzani, nimudamva, pamenepo muzifunsira, ndipo taonani, chikakhala choonadi, choti nzenizeni, chonyansachi chachitika m'Israele;" 
Deuteronomy17:5 pamenepo mutulutse mwamunayo kapena mkaziyo, anachita choipacho, kunka naye ku zipata zanu, ndiye wamwamuna kapena wamkazi; ndipo muwaponye miyala, kuti afe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Pakamwa pa mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu amuphe iye amene akuti afe; asamuphe pakamwa pa mboni imodzi. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Liyambe kumgwera dzanja la mboniyo kumupha; pamenepo dzanja la anthu onse. Potero muzichotsa choipacho pakati panu. 
Deuteronomy17:8 Ukakukanikani mlandu pouweruza, ndiwo wakunena zamwazi, kapena zakutsutsana, kapena zakupandana, ndiyo milandu yakutengana m'midzi mwanu; pamenepo muziuka ndi kukwera kunka ku malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 nimufike kwa ansembe, Alevi, ndi kwa woweruza wa m'masiku awo; nimufunsire; ndipo adzakufotokozerani maweruzidwe ake." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Ndipo muchite monga momwe ananena mau akufotokozeraniwo, ku malo amene Yehova adzawasankha; nimusamalire kuchita monga mwa zonse akulangizanizi." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Monga momwe anena malamulo akulangizani, ndi monga mwa chiweruzo akufotokozerani muchite; mau akufotokozerani musawapatukire kulamanja kapena kulamanzere." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Koma munthu wakuchita modzikuza, osamvera wansembe wokhala chilili kutumikirako pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, kapena woweruza, munthuyo afe; ndipo muchotse choipacho kwa Israele." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Ndipo anthu onse adzamva ndi kuchita mantha, osachitanso modzikuza." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Mutakalowa m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, ndi kulilandira lanulanu, ndi kukhalamo; ndipo mukanena, Tidziikire mfumu, monga amitundu onse akutizinga;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 mumuiketu mfumu yanu imene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzaisankha; wina pakati pa abale anu mumuike mfumu yanu; simuyenera kudziikira mlendo, wosakhala mbale wanu." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Koma asadzichulukitsire akavalo iye, kapena kubwereretsa anthu anke ku Ejipito, kuti achulukitse akavalo; popeza Yehova anati nanu, Musamabwereranso njira iyi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Ndipo asadzichulukitsire akazi, kuti ungapatuke mtima wake; kapena asadzichulukitsire kwambiri siliva ndi golide." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Ndipo kudzali, pakukhala iye pa mpando wachifumu wa ufumu wake, adzilemberere chofanana cha chilamulo ichi m'buku, achitenge pa ichi chili pamaso pa ansembe Alevi;" 
Deuteronomy17:19 ndipo azikhala nacho, nawerengemo masiku onse a moyo wake; kuti aphunzire kuopa Yehova Mulungu wake, kusunga mau onse a chilamulo ichi ndi malemba awa, kuwachita;" 
Deuteronomy17:20 kuti mtima wake usadzikuze pa abale ake, ndi kuti asapatukire lamulolo, kulamanja kapena kulamanzere; kuti achuluke masiku ake, m'ufumu wake, iye ndi ana ake pakati pa Israele." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Ansembe Alevi, fuko lonse la Levi, alibe gawo kapena cholowa pamodzi ndi Israele; azizidya nsembe zamoto za Yehova, ndi cholowa chake." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Alibe cholowa pakati pa abale ao; Yehova mwini wake ndiye cholowa chao, monga ananena nao." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Ndipo zoyenera ansembe, awapatse anthu akuphera nsembe ndizo: ingakhale ng'ombe kapena nkhosa azipatsa wansembe mwendo wamwamba, ndi ya m'masaya ndi chifu." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Zipatso zoyamba za tirigu wanu, za vinyo wanu, ndi za mafuta anu ndi ubweya woyamba kuusenga, muwapatse izi." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu anawasankha mwa mafuko anu onse, aimirire natumikire m'dzina la Yehova, iwo ndi ana ao amuna kosalekeza." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Ndipo Mlevi akachokera kumudzi wanu wina m'Israele monse, kumene akhalako, nakadza ndi chifuniro chonse cha moyo wake ku malo amene Yehova adzasankha;" 
Deuteronomy18:7 pamenepo azitumikira m'dzina la Yehova Mulungu wake, monga amachita abale ake onse Alevi akuimirirako pamaso pa Yehova." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Chakudya chao chizifanana, osawerengapo zolowa zake zogulitsa." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Mutakalowa m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, musamaphunzira kuchita monga mwa zonyansa za amitundu aja." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Asapezeke mwa inu munthu wakupitiriza mwana wake wamwamuna kapena mwana wake wamkazi ku moto wa ula, wosamalira mitambo, kapena wosamalira kulira kwa mbalame, kapena wanyanga." 
Deuteronomy18:11 Kapena wotsirika, kapena wobwebweta, kapena wopenduza, kapena wofunsira akufa." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Popeza aliyense wakuchita izi Yehova anyansidwa naye; ndipo chifukwa cha zonyansa izi Yehova Mulungu wanu awapirikitsa pamaso panu. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Mukhale angwiro ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Pakuti amitundu awa amene mudzawalandira, amamvera iwo akuyesa mitambo, ndi a ula; koma inu, Yehova Mulungu wanu sakulolani kuchita chotero." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakuukitsirani mneneri wa pakati panu, wa abale anu, wonga ine; muzimvera iye;" 
Deuteronomy18:16 monga mwa zonse munafunsa Yehova Mulungu wanu m'Horebu, tsiku lakusonkhana lija, ndi kuti, Tisamvenso mau a Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndipo tisaonenso moto waukulu uwu, kuti tingafe." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Chokoma ananenachi." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndidzawaukitsira mneneri wa pakati pa abale ao, wonga iwe; ndipo ndidzampatsa mau anga m'kamwa mwake, ndipo adzanena nao zonse ndimuuzazi." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti munthu wosamvera mau anga amene amanena m'dzina langa, ndidzamfunsa." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Koma mneneri wakuchita modzikuza ndi kunena mau m'dzina langa, amene sindinamlamulira anene, kapena kunena m'dzina la milungu ina, mneneri ameneyo afe." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Ndipo mukati m'mtima mwanu, Tidzazindikira bwanji mau amene Yehova sananene?" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Mneneri akanena m'dzina la Yehova, koma mau adanenawa sachitika, nisafika, ndiwo mau Yehova sanawanene; mneneriyo ananena modzikuza, musamuope iye." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu ataononga amitundu, amene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani dziko lao, ndipo mutalilandira lanulanu, ndi kukhala m'midzi mwao, ndi m'nyumba zao;" 
Deuteronomy19:2 pamenepo mudzipatulire midzi itatu pakati pa dziko lanu, limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale lanulanu." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Mudzikonzere njira, ndi kugawa malire a dziko lanu, limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale lanulanu, patatu; kuti wakupha munthu athawireko." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ndipo mlandu wa munthu wakupha mnzake wakuthawirako nakhala ndi moyo ndiwo: wakupha mnzake osati dala, osamuda kale lonse;" 
Deuteronomy19:5 monga ngati munthu analowa kunkhalango ndi mnzake kutema mitengo, ndi dzanja lake liyendetsa nkhwangwa kutema mtengo, ndi nkhwangwa iguluka m'mpinimo, nikomana ndi mnzake, nafa nayo; athawire ku wina wa midzi iyi, kuti akhale ndi moyo;" 
Deuteronomy19:6 kuti wolipsa mwazi angalondole wakupha mnzake, pokhala mtima wake watentha, nampeza, popeza njira njaitali, namkantha kuti wafa; angakhale sanapalamule imfa, poona sanamude kale lonse." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Chifukwa chake ndikuuzani ndi kuti, Mudzipatulire midzi itatu." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu akakulitsa malire anu, monga analumbirira makolo anu, ndi kukupatsani dziko lonse limene ananena kwa makolo anu kuwapatsa ili;" 
Deuteronomy19:9 ukadzasunga lamulo ili lonse kulichita, limene ndikuuzani lero lino, kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuyenda m'njira zake masiku onse; pamenepo mudzionjezere midzi itatu ina pamodzi ndi itatu iyi;" 
Deuteronomy19:10 kuti angakhetse mwazi wosachimwa pakati pa dziko lanu, limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale cholowa chanu, pangakhale mwazi pa inu." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Koma munthu akamuda mnzake, namlalira, ndi kumuukira ndi kumkantha moyo wake, kuti wafa; nakathawira ku wina wa midzi iyi;" 
Deuteronomy19:12 pamenepo akulu a mudzi wake atumize ndi kumtengako ndi kumpereka m'manja mwa wolipsa mwazi, kuti afe." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Diso lanu lisamchitire chifundo, koma muchotse mwazi wosachimwa m'Israele, kuti chikukomereni." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Musamasendeza malire a mnansi wanu, amene adawaika iwo a kale lomwe, m'cholowa chanu mudzalandirachi, m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale lanulanu." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Mboni imodzi isamaukira munthu pa mphulupulu iliyonse, kapena tchimo lililonse adalichimwa; pakamwa pa mboni ziwiri, kapena pakamwa pa mboni zitatu mlandu utsimikizike." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Mboni yachiwawa ikaukira munthu kumneneza ndi kuti analakwa; 
Deuteronomy19:17 pamenepo anthu onse awiri, pakati pao pali makaniwo, aziima pamaso pa Yehova, pamaso pa ansembe ndi oweruza okhala m'masiku awa;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 ndipo oweruza afunsitse bwino; ndipo taonani, mboniyo ikakhala mboni yonama, yomnamizira mbale wake;" 
Deuteronomy19:19 mumchitire monga iye anayesa kumchitira mbale wake; motero muchotse choipacho pakati panu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Ndipo otsalawo adzamva, nadzaopa, ndi kusachitanso monga choipacho pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ndipo diso lanu lisachite chifundo, moyo kulipa moyo, diso kulipa diso, dzino kulipa dzino, dzanja kulipa dzanja, phazi kulipa phazi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Pamene mutuluka pa mdani wanu kunkhondo, ndi kuona akavalo ndi magaleta ndi anthu akuchulukira inu, musawaopa; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene anakukwezani kukutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, ali ndi inu." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Ndipo kudzali, pamene muyandikiza kunkhondo, ayandikize wansembe nanene ndi anthu," 
Deuteronomy20:3 nati nao, Tamverani, Israele, muyandikiza kunkhondo lero pa adani anu; musafumuka mitima yanu; musachita mantha, kapena kunjenjemera, kapena kuopsedwa pamaso pao;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye wakumuka nanu, kugwirira inu pa adani anu, kukupulumutsani." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Ndipo akapitao anene ndi anthu, ndi kuti, Ndani munthuyo anamanga nyumba yatsopano, osalowamo? Amuke nabwerere kunyumba kwake, kuti angafe kunkhondo nangalowemo munthu wina." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ndipo ndani munthuyo anaoka munda wamphesa osalawa zipatso zake? Amuke nabwerere kunyumba yake, kuti angafe kunkhondo, nangalawe munthu wina zipatso zake." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ndipo munthuyo ndani anapala bwenzi ndi mkazi osamtenga? Amuke nabwerere kunyumba kwake, kuti angafe kunkhondo, nangamtenge munthu wina." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Pamenepo akapitao anenenso kwa anthu, ndi kuti, Munthuyo ndani wakuchita mantha ndi wofumuka mtima? Amuke nabwerere kunyumba kwake, ingasungunuke mitima ya abale ake monga mtima wake." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ndipo kudzali, atatha akapitao kunena ndi anthu, aike akazembe a makamu atsogolere anthu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Pamene muyandikiza mudzi kuchita nao nkhondo, muziufuulira ndi mtendere." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ndipo kudzali, ukakubwezerani mau a mtendere, ndi kukutsegulirani, pamenepo anthu onse opereka m'mwemo akhale akapolo anu, nadzakugwirirani ntchito yathangata." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Koma ukapanda kuchita zamtendere ndi inu, koma kuchita nkhondo nanu, pamenepo muumangire tsasa." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Ndipo pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu aupereka m'dzanja lanu, mukanthe amuna ake onse ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Koma akazi ndi ana ndi ng'ombe ndi zonse zili m'mudzimo, zankhondo zake zonse, mudzifunkhire nokha; ndipo mudye zankhondo za adani anu, zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupatsani." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Muzitero nayo midzi yonse yokhala kutalitali ndi inu, yosakhala midzi ya amitundu awa." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Koma za midzi ya amitundu awa, imene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, ikhale cholowa chanu, musasiyepo chamoyo chilichonse chakupuma;" 
Deuteronomy20:17 koma muwaononge konse Ahiti, ndi Aamori, Akanani, ndi Aperizi, Ahivi ndi Ayebusi; monga Yehova Mulungu wanu anakulamulirani;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 kuti angakuphunzitseni kuchita monga mwa zonyansa zao zonse, amazichitira milungu yao; ndipo mungachimwire Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Pamene mumangira tsasa mudzi masiku ambiri, pouthirira nkhondo kuugwira, usamaononga mitengo yake ndi kuitema ndi nkhwangwa; pakuti ukadyeko, osailikha; pakuti mtengo wa m'munda ndiwo munthu kodi kuti uumangire tsasa?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Koma mitengo yoidziwa inu kuti si ndiyo mitengo yazipatso, imeneyi muiononge ndi kuilikha; ndipo mudzi wochita nanu nkhondo muumangire machemba, mpaka mukaugonjetsa." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Akapeza munthu waphedwa m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale lanulanu, nagona pamunda, wosadziwika wakumkantha," 
Deuteronomy21:2 pamenepo azituluka akulu anu ndi oweruza anu, nayese kumidzi yomzinga wophedwayo;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 ndipo kudzali kuti mudzi wakukhala kufupi kwa munthu wophedwayo, inde akulu a mudzi uwu atenge ng'ombe yaikazi yosagwira ntchito, yosakoka goli;" 
Deuteronomy21:4 ndipo akulu a mudzi uwu atsike nayo ng'ombeyo ku chigwa choyendako madzi, chosalima ndi chosabzala, nayidula khosi ng'ombeyo m'chigwamo;" 
Deuteronomy21:5 ndipo ansembe, ana a Levi, ayandikize; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anasankha iwo kumtumikira ndi kudalitsa m'dzina la Yehova; ndipo kutengana konse ndi kupandana konse kukonzeke monga mwa mau awa." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Ndipo akulu onse a mudziwo wokhala pafupi pa munthu wophedwayo azisamba manja ao pa ng'ombeyo yodulidwa khosi m'chigwamo; 
Deuteronomy21:7 nayankhe nati, Manja athu sanakhetse mwazi uwu, ndi maso athu sanauone." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Landirani, Yehova, chotetezera anthu anu Israele, amene munawaombola, ndipo musalole mwazi wosachimwa ukhale pakati pa anthu anu Israele; ndipo adzawatetezera cha mwaziwo." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Chotero mudzichotsere mwazi wosachimwa pakati panu, pakuti wachita choyenera pamaso pa Yehova." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Pamene mutuluka kunka ku nkhondo ya pa adani anu, ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu awapereka m'manja mwanu, ndipo muwagwira akhale akapolo anu;" 
Deuteronomy21:11 mukaona mwa akapolowa mkazi wokongola, mukamkhumba, ndi kufuna mumtenga akhale mkazi wanu;" 
Deuteronomy21:12 pamenepo mufike naye kwanu kunyumba yanu; ndipo amete tsitsi la pamutu pake, ndi kutenga makadabo ake;" 
Deuteronomy21:13 navule zovala za ukapolo wake, nakhale m'nyumba mwanu, nalire atate wake, ndi mai wake mwezi wamphumphu; ndipo atatero mulowe naye ndi kukhala mwamuna wake, ndi iye akhale mkazi wanu." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Ndipo kudzali, mukapanda kukondwera naye, mumlole apite komwe afuna; koma musamgulitsa ndalama konse, musamamuyesa chuma, popeza wamchepetsa." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Munthu akakhala nao akazi awiri, wina wokondana naye, wina wodana naye, nakambalira ana, wokondana naye, ndi wodana naye yemwe; ndipo mwana wamwamuna woyamba akakhala wa iye uja anadana naye;" 
Deuteronomy21:16 pamenepo kudzali, tsiku lakugawira ana ake amuna chuma chake, sangakhoze kuyesa mwana wa wokondana naye woyamba kubadwa, wosati mwana wa wodana naye, ndiye woyamba kubadwatu." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Koma azivomereza wobadwa woyamba, mwana wa wodana naye, ndi kumwirikizira gawo lake la zake zonse; popeza iye ndiye chiyambi cha mphamvu yake; zoyenera woyamba kubadwa nzake." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Munthu akakhala naye mwana wamwamuna wopulukira, ndi wopikisana naye, wosamvera mau a atate wake, kapena mau a mai wake, wosawamvera angakhale anamlanga;" 
Deuteronomy21:19 azimgwira atate wake ndi mai wake, ndi kutulukira naye kwa akulu a mudzi wake, ndi ku chipata cha malo ake;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 ndipo anene kwa akulu a mudzi wake, Mwana wathu wamwamuna uyu ngwopulukira ndi wopikisana nafe, wosamvera mau athu, ndiye womwazamwaza, ndi woledzera." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Pamenepo amuna onse a mudzi wake amponye miyala kuti afe; chotero muchotse choipacho pakati panu; ndipo Israele wonse adzamva, nadzaopa." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Munthu akakhala nalo tchimo loyenera imfa, kuti amuphe, ndipo wampachika;" 
Deuteronomy21:23 mtembo wake usakhale pamtengo usiku wonse, koma mumuike ndithu tsiku lomwelo; pakuti wopachikidwa pamtengo atembereredwa ndi Mulungu; kuti mungadetse dziko lanu limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale cholowa chanu." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Mukapenya ng'ombe kapena nkhosa ya mbale wako zilikusokera musamazilekerera, muzimbwezera mbale wanu ndithu." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Ndipo ngati mbale wanu sakhala pafupi ndi inu, kapena mukapanda kumdziwa, mubwere nayo kwanu kunyumba yanu, kuti ikhale kwanu, kufikira mbale wanu akaifuna, ndipo wambwezera iyo." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Mutero nayenso bulu wake; mutero nachonso chovala chake, mutero nachonso chotayika chilichonse cha mbale wanu, chakumtayikira mukachipeza ndi inu; musamazilekerera." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Mukapenya bulu kapena ng'ombe ya mbale wanu, zitagwa m'njira, musamazilekerera; mumthandize ndithu kuziutsanso." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Mkazi asavale chovala cha mwamuna, kapena mwamuna asavale chovala cha mkazi; pakuti aliyense wakuchita izi Yehova Mulungu wanu anyansidwa naye." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Mukachipeza chisa cha mbalame panjira, mumtengo kapena panthaka pansi, muli ana kapena mazira, ndi make alikuumatira ana kapena mazira, musamatenga make pamodzi ndi ana;" 
Deuteronomy22:7 muloletu make amuke, koma mudzitengere ana; kuti chikukomereni, ndi kuti masiku anu achuluke." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Pamene mumanga nyumba yatsopano, muzimanga kampanda pa tsindwi lake, kuti ungatengere nyumba yanu mwazi, akagwako munthu." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Musamabzala mbeu zosiyana m'munda wanu wamphesa, kuti zingaipsidwe mbeu zonse udazibzala, ndi zipatso za munda wamphesa zomwe." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Musamalima ndi bulu ndi ng'ombe zikoke pamodzi. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Musamavala nsalu yosokonezeka yaubweya pamodzi ndi thonje. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Mudzipangire mphonje pangodya zinai za chofunda chanu chimene mudzifunda nacho. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Munthu akatenga mkazi, nalowana naye, namuda," 
Deuteronomy22:14 namneneza zoutsa mbiri yamanyazi, ndi kumveketsa dzina loipa, ndi kuti, Ndinamtenga mkazi uyu, koma polowana naye sindinapeza zizindikiro zakuti ndiye namwali ndithu;" 
Deuteronomy22:15 pamenepo atate wa namwaliyo ndi mai wake azitenga ndi kutuluka nazo zizindikiro za unamwali wake wa namwaliyo, kunka nazo kwa akulu a mudzi kuchipata;" 
Deuteronomy22:16 ndipo atate wa namwaliyo azinena kwa akulu, Ndinampatsa munthuyu mwana wanga wamkazi akhale mkazi wake, koma amuda;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 ndipo, taonani, wamneneza zoutsa mbiri yamanyazi, ndi kuti, Sindinapeza zizindikiro za unamwali wake m'mwana wako wamkazi; koma si izi zizindikiro za unamwali wa mwana wanga wamkazi. Ndipo azifunyulula chovalacho pamaso pa akulu a mudziwo." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Pamenepo akulu a mudziwo azitenga munthuyu ndi kumkwapula; 
Deuteronomy22:19 ndi kumlipitsa masekeli makumi okhaokha khumi a siliva, ndi kuipereka kwa atate wa namwaliyo, popeza anamveketsa dzina loipa namwali wa Israele, ndipo azikhala mkazi wake, sakhoza kumchotsa masiku ake onse." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Koma chikakhala choona ichi, kuti zizindikiro zakuti ndiye namwali zidamsowa namwaliyo;" 
Deuteronomy22:21 pamenepo azimtulutsa namwaliyo ku khomo la nyumba ya atate wake, ndipo amuna a mudzi wake azimponya miyala kuti afe; popeza anachita chopusa m'Israele, kuchita chigololo m'nyumba ya atate wake; chotero uzichotsa choipacho pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Akampeza munthu alikugona ndi mkazi wokwatibwa ndi mwamuna; afe onse awiri, mwamuna wakugona ndi mkazi, ndi mkazi yemwe; chotero muzichotsa choipacho mwa Israele." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Pakakhala namwali, wosadziwa mwamuna, wopalidwa ubwenzi ndi mwamuna, ndipo anampeza m'mudzi mwamuna, nagona naye;" 
Deuteronomy22:24 muziwatulutsa onse awiri kunka nao ku chipata cha mudzi uwo, ndi kuwaponya miyala kuti afe; namwaliyo popeza sanafuule angakhale anali m'mudzi; ndi mwamuna popeza anachepetsa mkazi wa mnansi wake; chotero muzichotsa choipacho pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Koma mwamuna akapeza namwali wopalidwa bwenzi kuthengo, namgwira mwamunayo, nagona naye; pamenepo afe mwamuna yekha wogona naye;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 koma namwaliyo musamamchitira kanthu; namwaliyo alibe tchimo loyenera imfa; pakuti mlandu uwu ukunga munthu waukira mnzake namupha; 
Deuteronomy22:27 pakuti anampeza kuthengo; namwali wopalidwa bwenziyo anafuula, koma panalibe wompulumutsa." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Munthu akapeza namwali wosadziwa mwamuna, ndiye wosapalidwa ubwenzi, nakamgwira nagona naye, napezedwa iwo," 
Deuteronomy22:29 pamenepo mwamuna amene anagona naye azipatsa atate wake wa namwaliyo masekeli makumi asanu a siliva, ndipo azikhala mkazi wake; popeza anamchepetsa; sakhoza kumchotsa masiku ake onse." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Munthu asatenge mkazi wa atate wake, kapena kuvula atate wake." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Munthu wophwetekwa, wophwanyika kapena wofulika, asalowe m'msonkhano wa Yehova." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Mwana wa m'chigololo asalowe m'msonkhano wa Yehova, ngakhale mbadwo wake wakhumi usalowe m'msonkhano wa Yehova." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Mwamoni kapena Mmowabu asalowe m'msonkhano wa Yehova; ngakhale mbadwo wao wakhumi usalowe m'msonkhano wa Yehova, ku nthawi zonse;" 
Deuteronomy23:4 popeza sanakumana nanu ndi mkate ndi madzi m'njira muja munatuluka m'Ejipito; popezanso anakulembererani Balamu mwana wa Beori wa ku Petori wa Mesopotamiya, kuti akutemberereni." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu sanafune kumvera Balamu; koma Yehova Mulungu wanu anakusandulizirani tembererolo likhale mdalitso, popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu anakukondani." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Musawafunira mtendere, kapena chowakomera masiku anu onse ku nthawi zonse." 
Deuteronomy23:7 Musamanyansidwa naye Mwedomu, popeza ndiye mbale wanu; musamanyansidwa naye Mwejipito, popeza munali alendo m'dziko lake." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Ana obadwa nao a mbadwo wachitatu alowe m'msonkhano wa Yehova. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Nkhondo yanu ikatuluka pa adani anu, mudzisunge kusachita choipa chilichonse." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Pakakhala munthu pakati pa inu, ndiye wosayera chifukwa chochitika usiku, azituluka kunja kwa chigono, asalowe pakati pa chigono;" 
Deuteronomy23:11 koma kudzali pofika madzulo, asambe m'madzi; ndipo litalowa dzuwa alowe pakati pa chigono." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Mukhale nao malo kunja kwa chigono kumene muzimukako kuthengo; 
Deuteronomy23:13 nimukhale nacho chokumbira mwa zida zanu; ndipo kudzali, pakukhala inu pansi kuthengo mukumbe nacho, ndi kutembenuka ndi kufotsera chakutulukacho;" 
Deuteronomy23:14 popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu ayenda pakati pa chigono chanu kukupulumutsani ndi kupereka adani anu pamaso panu; chifukwa chake chigono chanu chikhale chopatulika; kuti angaone kanthu kodetsa mwa inu, ndi kukupotolokerani." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Musamapereka kwa mbuye wake kapolo wopulumuka kwa mbuye wake kuthawira kwa inu; 
Deuteronomy23:16 akhale nanu, pakati panu, ku malo asankhako iye m'mudzi mwanu mwina momkonda; musamamsautsa." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Pasakhale mkazi wachigololo pakati pa ana akazi a Israele, kapena wachigololo pakati pa ana amuna a Israele." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Musamabwera nayo mphotho ya wachigololo, kapena mtengo wake wa galu kulowa nazo m'nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wanu, chifukwa cha chowinda chilichonse; pakuti onse awiriwa Yehova Mulungu wanu anyansidwa nao." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Musamakongoletsa mbale wanu mopindulitsa; phindu la ndalama, phindu la chakudya, phindu la kanthu kalikonse kokongoletsa." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Mukongoletse mlendo mopindulitsa; koma mbale wanu musamamkongoletsa mopindulitsa, kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu akudalitseni mwa zonse muzigwira ndi dzanja lanu, m'dziko limene mulowamo kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Mukawindira Yehova Mulungu wanu chowinda, musamachedwa kuchichita; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakufunsani za ichi ndithu ndipo mukadachimwako." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Koma mukapanda kulonjeza chowinda, mulibe kuchimwa." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Chotuluka pa milomo yanu muchisamalire ndi kuchichita; monga munalonjezera Yehova Mulungu wanu, chopereka chaufulu munachilonjeza pakamwa panu." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Mukalowa m'munda wamphesa wa mnansi wanu, mudyeko mphesa ndi kukhuta nazo monga mufuna eni; koma musaika kanthu m'chotengera chanu." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Mukalowa m'tirigu wosasenga wa mnansi wanu, mubudule ngala ndi dzanja lanu, koma musasengako ndi chisenga tirigu wachilili wa mnansi wanu." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Munthu akatenga mkazi akhale wake, kudzali, ngati sapeza ufulu pamaso pake, popeza anapeza mwa iye kanthu kosayenera, amlembere kalata wa chilekanitso, ndi kumpereka uyu m'dzanja lake, ndi kumtulutsa m'nyumba mwake." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Ndipo atatuluka m'nyumba mwake, amuke nakhale mkazi wa mwamuna wina." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Ndipo akamuda mwamuna wachiwiriyo, nakamlemberanso kalata wa chilekanitso, ndi kumpereka uyu m'dzanja lake, nakamtulutsa m'nyumba mwake; kapena akamwalira mwamuna wotsirizayo, amene anamtenga akhale mkazi wake;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 pamenepo mwamuna woyamba anamchotsayo sangathe kumtenganso akhale mkazi wake, atadetsedwa iye; pakuti ichi ndi chonyansa pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo usamachimwitsa dziko, limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale cholandira chanu." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Munthu akatenga mkazi watsopano, asatuluke nayo nkhondo, kapena asamchititse kanthu kalikonse; akhale waufulu kunyumba yake chaka chimodzi, nakondweretse mkazi adamtengayo." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Munthu asalandire chikole mphero, ngakhale mwanamphero, popeza alandirapo chikole moyo wa munthu." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Akampeza munthu waba mbale wake wina wa ana a Israele, namuyesa kapolo, kapena wamgulitsa, afe wakubayo; potero muzichotsa choipacho pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Chenjerani nayo nthenda yakhate, kusamaliratu, ndi kuchita monga mwa zonse akuphunzitsani ansembe Alevi; monga ndinalamulira iwo, momwemo muzisamalira kuchita." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Kumbukirani chimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anachitira Miriyamu panjira, potuluka inu m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Mukakongoletsa mnansi wanu ngongole iliyonse, musamalowa m'nyumba mwake kudzitengera chikole chake." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Muime pabwalo, ndi munthu amene umkongoletsayo azituluka nacho chikolecho kwa inu muli pabwalo." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ndipo akakhala munthu waumphawi musagone muli nacho chikole chake; 
Deuteronomy24:13 polowa dzuwa mumbwezeretu chikolecho, kuti agone m'chovala chake, ndi kukudalitsani; ndipo kudzakukhalirani chilungamo pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Musamasautsa wolembedwa ntchito, wakukhala waumphawi ndi wosauka, wa abale anu kapena wa alendo ali m'dziko mwanu, m'midzi mwanu." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Pa tsiku lake muzimpatsa kulipira kwake, lisalowepo dzuwa; pakuti ndiye waumphawi, ndi mtima wake ukhumba uku; kuti angakulirireni kwa Yehova, ndipo kukukhalireni tchimo." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Atate asaphedwere ana, ndi ana asaphedwere atate; munthu yense aphedwere tchimo lakelake." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Musamaipsa mlandu wa mlendo, kapena wa ana amasiye; kapena kutenga chikole chovala cha mkazi wamasiye;" 
Deuteronomy24:18 koma muzikumbukira kuti munali akapolo m'Ejipito, ndi kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuombolaniko; chifukwa chake ndikuuzani kuchita chinthu ichi." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Mutasenga dzinthu zanu m'munda mwanu, ndipo mwaiwala mtolo m'mundamo, musabwererako kuutenga; ukhale wa mlendo, wa mwana wamasiye, ndi wa mkazi wamasiye; kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu akudalitseni m'ntchito zonse za manja anu." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Mutagwedeza mtengo wanu wa azitona musayesenso nthambi mutatha nazo; akhale a mlendo, a mwana wamasiye, ndi a mkazi wamasiye." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Mutatchera m'munda wanu wamphesa, musakunkha pambuyo panu; zikhale za mlendo, za mwana wamasiye, ndi za mkazi wamasiye." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Ndipo muzikumbukira kuti munali akapolo m'dziko la Ejipito; chifukwa chake ndikuuzani kuchita chinthu ichi. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Pakakhala ndeu pakati pa anthu, nakapita kukaweruzidwa iwowa, nakaweruza mlandu wao oweruza; azimasula wolungama, namange woipa." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Ndipo kudzali, wochita choipa akayenera amkwapule, woweruza amgonetse kuti amkwapule pamaso pake, amwerengere zofikira choipa chake." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Amkwapule kufikira makumi anai, asaonjezepo; pakuti, akaonjezapo ndi kumkwapula mikwapulo yambiri, angapeputse mbale wanu pamaso panu." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Musamapunamiza ng'ombe popuntha tirigu. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Abale akakhala pamodzi, nafa wina wa iwowa, wopanda mwana wamwamuna, mkazi wa wakufayo asakwatibwe ndi mlendo wakunja; mbale wa mwamuna wake alowane naye, namtenge akhale mkazi wake, namchitire zoyenera mbale wa mwamuna wake." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ndipo kudzali, kuti woyamba kubadwa amene adzambala, adzalowa dzina lake la mbale wake wakufayo, kuti dzina lake lisafafanizidwe m'Israele." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Ndipo ngati mwamunayo safuna kutenga mkazi wa mbale wake, mkazi wa mbale wakeyo azikwera kunka kuchipata, kwa akulu, ndi kuti, Mbale wa mwamuna wanga akana kuutsira mbale wake dzina m'Israele; safuna kundichitira ine zoyenera mbale wa mwamuna." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Pamenepo akulu a mudzi wake amuitane, ndi kulankhula naye; ndipo akaimirira ndi kuti, Sindifuna kumtenga;" 
Deuteronomy25:9 pamenepo mkazi wa mbale wake azimyandikiza pamaso pa akulu, nachotse nsapato yake ku phazi la mwamunayo, ndi kumthira malovu pankhope pake, ndi kumyankha ndi kuti, Atere naye mwamuna wosamanga nyumba ya mbale wake." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ndipo azimutcha dzina lake m'Israele, Nyumba ya uje anamchotsa nsapato." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Akalimbana wina ndi mnzake, nakayandikiza mkazi wa winayo kulanditsa mwamuna wake m'dzanja la wompandayo, nakatulutsa dzanja lake, ndi kumgwira kudzivalo;" 
Deuteronomy25:12 pamenepo muzidula dzanja lake; diso lanu lisamchitire chifundo. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Musamakhala nayo m'thumba mwanu miyala ya miyeso iwiri, waukulu ndi waung'ono." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Musamakhala nayo m'nyumba yanu miyeso ya efa yosiyana, waukulu ndi waung'ono." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Muzikhala nao mwala wa muyeso wofikira ndi woyenera; mukhale nao muyeso wa efa wofikira ndi woyenera; kuti masiku anu achuluke m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Pakuti onse akuchita zinthu izi, onse akuchita chisalungamo, Yehova Mulungu wanu anyansidwa nao." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Kumbukirani chochitira inu Amaleke panjira, potuluka inu m'Ejipito;" 
Deuteronomy25:18 kuti anakomana ndi inu panjira, nakantha onse ofooka akutsala m'mbuyo mwanu, pakulema ndi kutopa inu; ndipo sanaope Mulungu." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ndipo kudzali, pamene Yehova Mulungu wanu atakupumulitsirani adani anu onse ozungulira, m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale cholowa chanuchanu, kuti muzifafaniza chikumbutso cha Amaleke pansi pa thambo; musamaiwala." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Ndipo kudzali, utakalowa m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale cholowa chanu, ndipo mwachilandira ndi kukhala m'mwemo;" 
Deuteronomy26:2 kuti muzitengako zoyamba za zipatso zonse za nthaka, zakubwera nazo inu zochokera m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani; ndi kuziika mudengu, ndi kupita ku malo amene Yehova Mulungu wanu adzasankha kukhalitsako dzina lake." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Ndipo mufike kwa wansembe wakukhala m'masiku awa, ndi kunena naye, Ndivomereza lero lino kwa Yehova Mulungu wako, kuti ndalowa m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo athu, kuti adzatipatsa ili." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Ndipo wansembe alandire dengu m'manja mwanu, ndi kuuika pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Ndipo muyankhe ndi kuti pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, Kholo langa ndiye Mwaramu wakuti atayike, natsika kunka ku Ejipito, nagoneragonera komweko ali nao anthu pang'ono, nasandukako mtundu waukulu, wamphamvu, ndi wochuluka anthu ake;" 
Deuteronomy26:6 koma Aejipito anatichitira choipa, natizunza, natisenza ntchito yolimba." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Pamenepo tinafuulira kwa Yehova, Mulungu wa makolo athu; ndipo Yehova anamva mau athu, napenya kuzunzika kwathu, ndi ntchito yathu yolemetsa, ndi kupsinjika kwathu;"
