Deuteronomy26:8 ndipo Yehova anatitulutsa m'Ejipito ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, ndi kuopsa kwakukulu, ndi zizindikiro, ndi zodabwitsa;" 
Deuteronomy26:9 ndipo anabwera nafe kumalo kuno, natipatsa dziko ili ndilo dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, ndabwera nazo zoyamba za zipatso za nthaka, zimene Inu, Yehova, mwandipatsa. Ndipo muziike pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu;" 
Deuteronomy26:11 ndipo mukondwere nazo zokoma zonse zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, inu ndi nyumba zanu, inu ndi Mlevi, ndi mlendo ali pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Mutatha kugawa magawo khumi, zobala zanu zonse chaka chachitatu, ndicho chaka chogawa magawo khumi, muzizipereka kwa Mlevi, kwa mlendo, kwa mwana wamasiye, ndi kwa mkazi wamasiye, kuti adye m'midzi mwanu, ndi kukhuta." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Ndipo munene pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, Ndachotsa zopatulika m'nyumba mwanga, ndi kuzipereka kwa Mlevi, ndi kwa mlendo, ndi kwa mwana wamasiye, ndi kwa mkazi wamasiye, monga mwa lamulo lanu lonse munandilamulira ine; sindinalakwira malamulo anu, kapena kuwaiwala." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Sindinadyako m'chisoni changa, kapena kuchotsako podetsedwa, kapena kuperekako kwa akufa; ndamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanga; ndachita monga mwa zonse munandilamulira ine." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Penyani muli mokhalamo mwanu mopatulika, m'mwamba, ndipo dalitseni anthu anu Israele, ndi nthaka imene munatipatsa, monga munalumbirira makolo athu, dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Lero lino Yehova Mulungu wanu akulamulirani kuchita malemba ndi maweruzo awa; potero muzimvera ndi kuwachita ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Mwalonjezetsa Yehova lero kuti adzakhala Mulungu wanu, ndi kuti mudzayenda m'njira zake, ndi kusunga malemba ake, ndi malamulo ake, ndi maweruzo ake, ndi kumvera mau ake." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Ndipo Yehova wakulonjezetsani lero kuti mudzakhala anthu akeake a pa okha, monga ananena ndi inu, ndi kuti mudzasunga malamulo ake onse;" 
Deuteronomy26:19 kuti akukulitseni koposa amitundu onse anawalenga, wolemekezeka, womveka dzina, ndi waulemu; ndi kuti mukhale mtundu wa anthu wopatulikira Yehova Mulungu wanu monga ananena." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Ndipo Mose ndi akulu a Israele anauza anthu, nati, Sungani malamulo onse ndikuuzani lero." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Ndipo kudzali, tsiku lakuoloka inu Yordani kulowa dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, kuti mudziutsire miyala yaikulu, ndi kuimata ndi njeresa;" 
Deuteronomy27:3 ndipo mulemberepo mau onse a chilamulo ichi, mutaoloka; kuti mulowe m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi, monga Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu ananena ndi inu." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ndipo kudzali, mutaoloka Yordani, muutse miyala iyi ndikuuzani lero, m'phiri la Ebala, ndi kuimata ndi njeresa." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Ndipo komweko mumangire Yehova Mulungu wanu guwa la nsembe, guwa la nsembe lamiyala; musakwezepo pangizo chachitsulo." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Mumange guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wanu lamiyala yosasema; ndi kuperekapo nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu; 
Deuteronomy27:7 ndi kuphera nsembe zoyamika, ndi kudyapo, ndi kukondwera pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Ndipo mulembere pa miyalayi mau onse a chilamulo ichi mopenyeka bwino. 
Deuteronomy27:9 Ndipo Mose, ndi ansembe Alevi ananena ndi Israele wonse, ndi kuti, Khalani chete, imvanitu, Israele; lero lino mwasanduka mtundu wa anthu wa Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Potero muzimvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuchita malamulo ake ndi malemba ake, amene ndikuuzani lero lino." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Ndipo Mose anauza anthu tsiku lomwelo, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy27:12 Aimirire awa pa phiri la Gerizimu kudalitsa anthu, mutaoloka Yordani: Simeoni ndi Levi, ndi Yuda, ndi Isakara, ndi Yosefe, ndi Benjamini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Naimirire awa pa phiri la Ebala, kutemberera: Rubeni, Gadi, ndi Asere, ndi Zebuloni, Dani ndi Nafutali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Ndipo ayankhe Alevi ndi kunena kwa amuna onse a Israele, ndi mau omveka." 
Deuteronomy27:15 Wotembereredwa munthu wakupanga fano losema kapena loyenga, lonyansidwa nalo Yehova, ntchito ya manja a mmisiri, ndi kuliika m'malo a m'tseri. Ndipo anthu onse ayankhe ndi kuti, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Wotembereredwa iye wakupeputsa atate wake kapena mai wake. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:17 Wotembereredwa iye wakusendeza malire a mnansi wake. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:18 Wotembereredwa wakusokeretsa wakhungu m'njira. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:19 Wotembereredwa iye wakuipsa mlandu wa mlendo, mwana wamasiye, ndi mkazi wamasiye. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Wotembereredwa iye wakugona ndi mkazi wa atate wake; popeza wavula atate wake. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Wotembereredwa iye wakugona ndi nyama iliyonse. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:22 Wotembereredwa iye wakugona ndi mlongo wake, mwana wamkazi wa atate wake, kapena mwana wamkazi wa make. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Wotembereredwa iye wakugona ndi mpongozi wake. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:24 Wotembereredwa iye wakukantha mnansi wake m'tseri. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:25 Wotembereredwa iye wakulandira chamwazi chakuti akanthe munthu wosachimwa. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:26 Wotembereredwa iye wosavomereza mau a chilamulo ichi kuwachita. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Ndipo kudzali, mukadzamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu mwachangu, ndi kusamalira kuchita malamulo ake onse amene ndikuuzani lero, kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakukulitsani koposa amitundu onse a pa dziko lapansi;" 
Deuteronomy28:2 ndipo madalitso awa onse adzakugwerani, ndi kukupezani, mukadzamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Mudzakhala odala m'mudzi, ndi odala kubwalo." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Zidzakhala zodala zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, ndi zipatso za zoweta zanu, zoswana za ng'ombe zanu, ndi zoswana za nkhosa zanu." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Lidzakhala lodala dengu lanu, ndi choumbiramo mkate wanu." 
Deuteronomy28:6 Mudzakhala odala polowa inu, mudzakhala odala potuluka inu." 
Deuteronomy28:7 Yehova adzakantha adani anu akukuukirani; adzakudzerani njira imodzi, koma adzathawa pamaso panu njira zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Yehova adzakulamulirani dalitso m'nkhokwe zanu, ndi m'zonse mutulutsirako dzanja lanu; ndipo adzakudalitsani m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Yehova adzakukhazikirani yekha mtundu wa anthu wopatulika, monga anakulumbirirani; ngati mudzasunga malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuyenda m'njira zake." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Ndipo anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi adzaona kuti akutchulani dzina la Yehova; nadzakuopani. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Ndipo Yehova adzakuchulukitsirani zokoma, m'zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi m'zipatso za zoweta zanu, ndi m'zipatso za nthaka yanu, m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu kuti adzakupatsani ilo." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Yehova adzakutsegulirani chuma chake chokoma, ndicho thambo la kumwamba, kupatsa dziko lanu mvula m'nyengo yake, ndi kudalitsa ntchito zonse za dzanja lanu; ndipo mudzakongoletsa amitundu ambiri, osakongola nokha." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Ndipo Yehova adzakuyesani mutu, si mchira ai; ndipo mudzakhala wa pamwamba pokha, si wapansi ai; ngati mudzamvera malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndikuuzani lero, kuwasunga ndi kuwachita;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 osapatukira mau ali onse ndikuuzani lero, kulamanja, kapena kulamanzere, kutsata milungu ina kuitumikira." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Koma kudzali, mukapanda kumvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusamalira kuchita malamulo ake onse ndi malemba ake amene ndikuuzani lero, kuti matemberero awa onse adzakugwerani ndi kukupezani." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Mudzakhala otembereredwa m'mudzi, ndi otembereredwa pabwalo." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Lidzakhala lotembereredwa dengu lanu ndi choumbiramo mkate wanu. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Zidzakhala zotembereredwa zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, zoswana za ng'ombe zanu, ndi zoswana za nkhosa zanu." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Mudzakhala otembereredwa polowa inu, ndi otembereredwa potuluka inu." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Yehova adzakutumizirani temberero, chisokonezeko, ndi kudzudzula monsemo mukatulutsa dzanja lanu kuchita kanthu, kufikira mwaonongeka, kufikira mwatayika msanga, chifukwa cha zochita inu zoipa, zimene wandisiya nazo." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Yehova adzakumamatiritsani mliri, kufikira akakuthani kukuchotsani kudziko, kumene mupitako kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi nthenda yoondetsa ya chifuwa, ndi malungo, ndi chibayo, ndi kutentha thupi, ndi lupanga, chinsikwi ndi chinoni; ndipo zidzakutsatani kufikira mwatayika." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ndipo thambo lanu la pamwamba pamutu panu lidzakhala ngati mkuwa, ndi dziko lili pansi panu ngati chitsulo." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Yehova adzasanduliza mvula ya dziko lanu ikhale fumbi ndi phulusa; zidzakutsikirani kuchokera kumwamba, kufikira mwaonongeka." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Yehova adzalola adani anu akukantheni; mudzawatulukira njira imodzi, koma mudzawathawa pamaso pao njira zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndipo mudzagwedezeka pakati pa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Ndipo mitembo yanu idzakhala chakudya cha mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi zilombo zonse za pa dziko lapansi, ndipo palibe wakuziingitsa." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi zilombo za ku Ejipito, ndi nthenda yotuluka mudzi, ndi chipere, ndi mphere, osachira nazo." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi misala, ndi khungu, ndi kuzizwa mumtima;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 ndipo mudzafufuza usana, monga wakhungu amafufuza mumdima, ndipo simudzapindula nazo njira zanu; koma mudzakhala wopsinjika, nadzakuberani masiku onse, wopanda wina wakukupulumutsani." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Mudzapalana ubwenzi ndi mkazi, koma mwamuna wina adzagona naye; mudzamanga nyumba, osakhala m'mwemo; mudzaoka munda wamphesa, osalawa zipatso zake." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Adzapha ng'ombe yanu, pamaso panu, osadyako inu; adzalanda bulu wanu molimbana pamaso panu, osakubwezerani; adzapereka nkhosa zanu kwa adani anu, wopanda wina wakukupulumutsani." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Adzapereka ana anu aamuna ndi aakazi kwa anthu a mtundu wina, ndipo m'maso mwanu mudzada ndi kupenyerera, powalirira tsiku lonse; koma mulibe mphamvu m'dzanja lanu." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Mtundu wa anthu umene simudziwa udzadya zipatso za nthaka yanu ndi ntchito zanu zonse; ndipo mudzakhala wopsinjika ndi wophwanyika masiku onse; 
Deuteronomy28:34 nimudzakhala oyeruka chifukwa chomwe muchiona ndi maso anu. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi chilonda choipa chosachira nacho kumaondo, ndi kumiyendo, kuyambira pansi pa phazi lanu kufikira pamwamba pa mutu panu." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Yehova adzamukitsa inu, ndi mfumu yanu imene mudzadziikira, kwa mtundu wa anthu umene simudziwa, inu kapena makolo anu; ndipo mudzatumikirako milungu ina ya mitengo ndi miyala." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ndipo mudzakhala chodabwitsa, ndi nkhani, ndi nthanthi, mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu amene Yehova akutsogoleraniko." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Mudzatuluka nazo mbeu zambiri kumunda, koma mudzakolola pang'ono; popeza dzombe lidzazitha." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Mudzaoka m'minda yamphesa ndi kuilima, koma osamwa vinyo wake, kapena kutchera mphesa zake, popeza mbozi zidzaidya." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Mudzakhala nayo mitengo ya azitona m'malire anu onse, osadzola mafuta; popeza zipatso za mitengo ya azitona zidzapululuka." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Mudzabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi, osakhala nao, popeza adzalowa ukapolo." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Mitengo yanu yonse ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu zidzakhala zaozao za dzombe. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Mlendo wokhala pakati panu adzakulirakulira inu, koma inu mudzacheperachepera." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Iye adzakukongoletsani, osamkongoletsa ndinu; iye adzakhala mutu, koma inu ndinu mchira." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Ndipo matemberero awa onse adzakugwerani, nadzakulondolani, ndi kukupezani, kufikira mwaonongeka, popeza simunamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusunga malamulo ake ndi malemba ake amene anakulamulirani;" 
Deuteronomy28:46 ndipo zidzakukhalirani inu ndi mbeu zanu ngati chizindikiro ndi chozizwa, nthawi zonse." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Popeza simunatumikira Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi chimwemwe ndi mokondwera mtima, chifukwa cha kuchuluka zinthu zonse;" 
Deuteronomy28:48 chifukwa chake mudzatumikira adani anu amene Yehova adzakutumizirani, ndi njala, ndi ludzu, ndi usiwa, ndi kusowa zinthu zonse; ndipo adzaika goli lachitsulo pakhosi panu, kufikira atakuonongani." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Yehova adzakutengerani mtundu wa anthu wochokera kutali ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, monga iuluka mphungu; mtundu wa anthu amene simunamva malankhulidwe ao;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 mtundu wa anthu wa nkhope yaukali, wosamalira nkhope ya wokalamba, wosamchitira chifundo mwana;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 ndipo adzadya zipatso za ng'ombe zanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, kufikira mwaonongeka; osakusiyirani tirigu, vinyo, kapena mafuta, zoswana ng'ombe zanu, zoswana nkhosa zanu, kufikira atakuonongani." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Ndipo adzakuzingani m'midzi mwanu monse, kufikira adagwa malinga anu atali ndi olimba, amene munawakhulupirira, m'dziko lanu lonse; inde, adzakuzingani m'midzi mwanu monse, m'dziko lanu lonse limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Ndipo mudzadya chipatso cha thupi lanu, nyama ya ana anu aamuna ndi aakazi amene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupatsani; pakukumangirani tsasa ndi kukupsinjani adani anu." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Mwamuna wololopoka nkhongono ndi wanyonga pakati pa inu, diso lake lidzaipira mbale wake, ndi mkazi wa pa mtima wake, ndi ana ake otsalira;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 osapatsako mmodzi yense wa iwowa nyama ya ana ake alinkudyayo, popeza sikamtsalira kanthu; pakukumangirani tsasa ndi kukupsinjani mdani wanu m'midzi mwanu monse." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Mkazi wololopoka nkhongono ndi wanyonga pakati pa inu, wosayesa kuponda pansi ndi phazi lake popeza ndiye wanyonga, ndi wololopoka nkhongono, diso lake lidzamuipira mwamuna wa pamtima pake, ndi mwana wake wamwamuna ndi wamkazi;" 
Deuteronomy28:57 ndicho chifukwa cha matenda akutuluka pakati pa mapazi ake, ndi ana ake adzawabala; popeza adzawadya m'tseri posowa zinthu zonse; pakukumangirani tsasa ndi kukupsinjani mdani wanu m'midzi mwanu." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Mukapanda kusamalira kuchita mau onse a chilamulo ichi olembedwa m'buku ili, kuopa dzina ili la ulemerero ndi loopsa, ndilo Yehova Mulungu wanu;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 Yehova adzachita miliri yanu ndi ya ana anu ikhale yodabwitsa, miliri yaikulu ndi yokhalitsa, ndi nthenda zoipa ndi zokhalitsa." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Ndipo adzakubwezerani nthenda zonse za Ejipito, zimene munaziopa; ndipo zidzakumamatirani inu." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Ndiponso nthenda zonse ndi miliri yonse zosalembedwa m'buku la chilamulo ichi, Yehova adzakutengerani izi, kufikira mwaonongeka." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Ndipo mudzatsala anthu pang'ono, mungakhale mudachuluka ngati nyenyezi za m'mwamba; popeza simunamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Ndipo kudzali kuti, monga Yehova anakondwera nanu kukuchitirani zabwino, ndi kukuchulukitsani; momwemo Yehova adzakondwera nanu kutayikitsa ndi kuononga inu, ndipo adzakuzulani kudziko kumene mulowako kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Ndipo Yehova adzakubalalitsani mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu, kuyambira malekezero a dziko lapansi kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi; ndipo kumeneko mudzatumikira milungu ina, imene simunaidziwa, inu ndi makolo anu, yamitengo ndi yamiyala." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Ndipo mwa a mitundu iyi simudzapumula, inde sipadzakhala popumulira phazi lanu; koma Yehova adzakupatsani kumeneko mtima wonjenjemera, m'maso mwanu mudzada, mudzafa ndi kulefuka mtima." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Ndipo moyo wanu udzakhala wanjiranjira pamaso panu, ndipo mudzachita mantha usiku ndi usana, osakhazika mtima za moyo wanu." 
Deuteronomy28:67 M'mawa mudzati, Mwenzi atafika madzulo! Ndi madzulo mudzati, Mwezi utafika m'mawa! Chifukwa cha mantha a m'mtima mwanu amene mudzaopa nao, ndi chifukwa cha zopenya maso anu zimene mudzazipenya." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Ndipo Yehova adzakubwezerani ku Ejipito ndi ngalawa, pa njira imene ndinati kwa inu, kuti, Simudzaionanso; ndipo kumeneko mudzadzigulitsa kwa adani anu mukhale akapolo ndi adzakazi; koma palibe wogula inu." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Awa ndi mau a chipangano chimene Yehova analamulira Mose achichite ndi ana a Israele m'dziko la Mowabu, pamodzi ndi chipanganocho anachita nao m'Horebu." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Ndipo Mose anaitana Israele wonse, nati nao, Munapenya inu zonse zimene Yehova anachitira Farao, ndi anyamata ake onse, ndi dziko lake lonse, pamaso panu m'dziko la Ejipito;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 mayesero akuluwa maso anu anawapenya, zizindikirozo, ndi zozizwa zazikulu zija;" 
Deuteronomy29:4 koma Yehova sanakupatseni mtima wakudziwa, ndi maso akupenya, ndi makutu akumva, kufikira lero lino." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndipo ndinakutsogolerani zaka makumi anai m'chipululu; zovala zanu sizinatha pathupi panu, ndi nsapato zanu sizinatha pa phazi lanu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Simunadya mkate, simunamwa vinyo kapena chakumwa cholimba; kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ndipo pamene munafika pamalo pano, Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, ndi Ogi mfumu ya Basani, anatuluka kudzakomana nafe kunkhondo, ndipo tinawakantha;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 ndipo tinalanda dziko lao, ndi kulipereka likhale cholowa chao cha Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi fuko la hafu la Manase." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Chifukwa chake sungani mau a chipangano ichi ndi kuwachita, kuti muchite mwanzeru m'zonse muzichita." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Muimirira inu nonse lero lino pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu; mafumu anu, mafuko anu, akulu anu, ndi akapitao anu, amuna onse a Israele," 
Deuteronomy29:11 makanda anu, akazi anu, ndi mlendo wanu wakukhala pakati pa zigono zanu, kuyambira wotema nkhuni kufikira wotunga madzi;" 
Deuteronomy29:12 kuti mulowe chipangano cha Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi lumbiriro lake, limene Yehova Mulungu wanu achita ndi inu lero lino;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 kuti adzikhazikire inu, mtundu wake wa anthu lero lino, ndi kuti akhale kwa inu Mulungu, monga ananena ndi inu, ndi monga analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isaki, ndi Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Koma sindichita chipangano ichi ndi lumbiro ili ndi inu nokha; 
Deuteronomy29:15 komanso ndi iye wakuimirira pano nafe lero lino pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndiponso ndi iye wosakhala pano nafe lero lino." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Pakuti mudziwa chikhalidwe chathu m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kuti tinapyola pakati pa amitundu amene munawapyola;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 ndipo munapenya zonyansa zao, ndi mafano ao, mtengo ndi mwala, siliva ndi golide, zokhala pakati pao;" 
Deuteronomy29:18 kuti angakhale pakati pa inu mwamuna, kapena mkazi, kapena banja, kapena fuko, mtima wao watembenuka kusiyana naye Yehova Mulungu wathu lero lino, kuti apite ndi kutumikira milungu ya amitundu aja; kuti ungakhale pakati pa inu muzu wakubala ndulu ndi chowawa." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ndipo kungakhale, akamva mau a lumbiro ili adzadzidalitsa m'mtima mwake, ndi kuti, Ndidzakhala nao mtendere, ndingakhale ndiyenda nao mtima wanga wopulukira, kuledzera nditamva ludzu;" 
Deuteronomy29:20 Yehova sadzamkhululukira, koma pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova ndi nsanje yake zidzamfukira munthuyo; ndipo temberero lonse lolembedwa m'buku ili lidzamkhalira; ndipo Yehova adzafafaniza dzina lake pansi pa thambo." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ndipo Yehova adzamsiyanitsa ndi mafuko onse a Israele ndi kumchitira choipa, monga mwa matemberero onse a chipangano cholembedwa m'buku ili la chilamulo." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Ndipo mbadwo ukudza, ana anu akuuka mutafa inu, ndi mlendo wochokera ku dziko lakutali, adzati, pakuona iwo miliri ya dziko ili, ndi nthendazi, Yehova awadwalitsa nazo." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Ndi kuti lidapsa dziko lake lonse ndi sulufure, ndi mchere, kuti sabzalamo, kapena siliphukitsa kanthu kapena sumerapo msipu, monga kupasula kwake kwa Sodomu ndi Gomora, Adima, ndi Zeboimu, imene Yehova anaipasula m'mkwiyo wake ndi ukali wake;" 
Deuteronomy29:24 inde amitundu onse adzati, Yehova anachitira dziko ili chotero chifukwa ninji? Nchiyani kupsa mtima kwakukulu kumene?" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Pamenepo adzati, popeza analeka chipangano cha Yehova, Mulungu wa makolo ao, chimene anachita nao pakuwatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 napita natumikira milungu ina, naigwadira, milungu imene sanaidziwa, imene sanawagawira;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 chifukwa chake Yehova anapsera mtima dziko ili kulitengera temberero lonse lolembedwa m'buku ili. 
Deuteronomy29:28 Ndipo Yehova anawazula m'nthaka mwao mokwiya ndi mozaza, ndi m'ukali waukulu, nawaponya m'dziko lina, monga lero lino." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Zinsinsi nza Yehova Mulungu wathu; koma zovumbuluka nza ife ndi ana athu kosatha, kuti tichite mau onse a chilamulo ichi." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Ndipo kudzakhala, zikakugwerani zonsezi, mdalitso ndi temberero, ndinaikazi pamaso panu, ndipo mukazikumbukira mumtima mwanu mwa amitundu onse, amene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupirikitsiraniko;" 
Deuteronomy30:2 nimukabwerera kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kumvera mau ake, monga mwa zonse ndikuuzani lero lino, inu ndi ana anu, ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 pamenepo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzauchotsa ukapolo wanu, ndi kukuchitirani chifundo; nadzabwera ndi kukumemezani mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu, kumene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakubalalitsiraniko." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Otayika anu akakhala ku malekezero a thambo, Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakumemezani kumeneko, nadzakutenganiko;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakulowetsani m'dziko lidakhala laolao la makolo anu, nilidzakhala lanulanu; ndipo adzakuchitirani zokoma, ndi kukuchulukitsani koposa makolo anu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudulani mtima wanu, ndi mtima wa mbeu zanu, kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse, kuti mukhale ndi moyo." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzaika matemberero awa onse pa adani anu, ndi iwo akukwiya ndi inu, amene anakulondolani." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Pamenepo mutembenuke ndi kumvera mau a Yehova, ndi kuchita malamulo ake onse amene ndikuuzani lero lino." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakuchulukitsirani ntchito zonse za dzanja lanu, zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi zipatso za zoweta zanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, zikukomereni; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakondweranso kukuchitirani zokoma; monga anakondwera ndi makolo anu;" 
Deuteronomy30:10 ngati mudzamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuwasunga malamulo ake ndi malemba ake olembedwa m'buku la chilamulo ichi; ngati mudzabwerera kudza kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Pakuti lamulo ili ndikuuzani lero lino, silikukanikani kulizindikira, kapena silikhala kutali." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Silikhala m'mwamba, kuti mukati, Adzatikwerera m'mwamba ndani, ndi kubwera nalo kwa ife, ndi kutimvetsa ili, kuti tilichite?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Ndipo silikhala tsidya la nyanja, kuti mukati, Adzatiolokera ndani tsidya la nyanja, ndi kutitengera ili, ndi kutimvetsa ili, kuti tilichite?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Pakuti mauwa ali pafupifupi ndi inu, m'kamwa mwanu, ndi m'mtima mwanu, kuwachita." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Tapenyani, ndaika pamaso panu lero lino moyo ndi zokoma, imfa ndi zoipa;" 
Deuteronomy30:16 popeza ndikuuzani lero kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuyenda m'njira zake, ndi kusunga malamulo ake ndi malemba ake ndi maweruzo ake, kuti mukakhale ndi moyo ndi kuchuluka, ndi kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu akakudalitseni m'dziko limene mulowako kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Koma mukatembenukira mtima wanu, osamvera inu, nimukacheteka, ndi kugwadira milungu ina ndi kuitumikira;" 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndikulalikirani inu lero, kuti mudzatayika ndithu, masiku anu sadzachuluka m'dziko limene muolokera Yordani kulowamo kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ndichititsa mboni lero, kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zitsutse inu; ndaika pamaso panu moyo ndi imfa, mdalitso ndi temberero; potero, sankhani moyo, kuti mukhale ndi moyo, inu ndi mbeu zanu;" 
Deuteronomy30:20 kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, kumvera mau ake, ndi kummamatira Iye, pakuti Iye ndiye moyo wanu, ndi masiku anu ochuluka; kuti mukhale m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isaki, ndi Yakobo, kuwapatsa ili." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Ndipo Mose anamuka nanena mau awa kwa Israele wonse," 
Deuteronomy31:2 nati nao, Ndine munthu wa zaka zana ndi makumi awiri lero lino; sindikhozanso kutuluka ndi kulowa; ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Sudzaoloka Yordani uyu." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye adzaoloka pamaso panu, Iye ndiye adzaononga amitundu awo pamaso panu, ndipo mudzawalandira. Yoswa ndiye adzakutsogolerani pooloka, monga ananena Yehova." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Ndipo Yehova adzawachitira monga anachitira Sihoni ndi Ogi, mafumu a Aamori, ndi dziko lao limene analiononga." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Yehova akadzawapereka pamaso panu, muziwachitira monga mwa lamulo lonse ndakuuzani." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Khalani amphamvu, limbikani mitima, musamachita mantha, kapena kuopsedwa chifukwa cha iwowa; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amene amuka nanu; Iye sadzakusowani, kapena kukusiyani." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Ndipo Mose anaitana Yoswa, nati naye pamaso pa Israele wonse, Khala wamphamvu, nulimbe mtima; pakuti udzalowa nao anthu awa m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo ao kuwapatsa ilo; ndipo iwe udzawalandiritsa ilo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Ndipo Yehova, Iye ndiye amene akutsogolera; Iye adzakhala ndi iwe, Iye sadzakusowa kapena kukusiya; usamachita mantha, usamatenga nkhawa." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Ndipo Mose analembera chilamulo ichi, nachipereka kwa ansembe, ana a Levi, akunyamula likasa la chipangano la Yehova, ndi kwa akulu onse a Israele." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Ndipo Mose anawauza, ndi kuti, Pakutha pake pa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, pa nyengo yoikika ya m'chaka chakulekerera, pa chikondwerero cha Misasa;" 
Deuteronomy31:11 pakufika Israele wonse kuoneka pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, m'malo amene adzasankha, muzilalikira chilamulo ichi pamaso pa Israele wonse, m'makutu mwao." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Sonkhanitsani anthu, amuna ndi akazi ndi ana ang'ono, ndi mlendo wokhala m'midzi mwanu, kuti amve, ndi kuti aphunzire kuopa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kusamalira kuchita mau onse a chilamulo ichi;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 ndi kuti ana ao osadziwa amve, naphunzire kuopa Yehova Mulungu wanu, masiku onse akukhala ndi moyo inu kudziko kumene muolokera Yordani kulilandira likhale lanulanu." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, ayandikira masiku ako akuti uyenera kufa; kaitane Yoswa, nimuoneke m'chihema chokomanako, kuti ndimlangize. Namuka Mose ndi Yoswa, naoneka m'chihema chokomanako." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Ndipo Yehova anaoneka m'chihema, m'mtambo njo; ndipo mtambo njo unaima pa khomo la chihema." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, udzagona tulo ndi makolo ako; ndi anthu awa adzauka, nadzatsata ndi chigololo milungu yachilendo ya dziko limene analowa pakati pake, nadzanditaya Ine, ndi kuthyola chipangano changa ndinapangana naocho." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Pamenepo ndidzawapsera mtima tsiku ilo, ndipo ndidzawataya, ndi kuwabisira nkhope yanga, ndipo adzathedwa, ndi zoipa ndi zovuta zambiri zidzawafikira; kotero kuti adzati tsiku lija, Sizitifikira kodi zoipa izi popeza Mulungu wathu sakhala pakati pa ife?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Koma Ine ndidzabisatu nkhope yanga tsiku lija chifukwa cha zoipa zonse adazichita; popeza anadzitembenukira milungu ina. 
Deuteronomy31:19 Ndipo tsopano mudzilemberere nyimbo iyi, ndi kuphunzitsa ana a Israele iyi; muiike m'kamwa mwao, kuti nyimbo iyi indichitire mboni yotsutsa ana a Israele." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Pakuti nditakalowetsa awa m'dziko limene ndinalumbirira makolo ao, moyenda mkaka ndi uchi ngati madzi; ndipo atadya nakhuta, nanenepa, pamenepo adzatembenukira milungu ina, ndi kuitumikira, ndi kundipeputsa Ine, ndi kuthyola chipangano changa." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ndipo kudzakhala, zitawafikira zoipa ndi zovuta zambiri, nyimbo iyi idzachita mboni pamaso pao; popeza siidzaiwalika m'kamwa mwa mbeu zao; popeza ndidziwa zolingirira zao azichita lero lino, ndisanawalowetse m'dziko limene ndinalumbira." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Potero Mose analembera nyimboyi tsiku lomweli, naiphunzitsa ana a Israele." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ndipo anauza Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, nati Khala wamphamvu, nulimbe mtima; pakuti udzalowa nao ana a Israele m'dziko limene ndinawalumbirira; ndipo Ine ndidzakhala ndi iwe." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ndipo kunali, Mose atatha kulembera mau a chilamulo ichi m'buku, kufikira atalembera onse," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Mose anauza Alevi akunyamula likasa la chipangano la Yehova, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy31:26 Landirani buku ili la chilamulo, nimuliike pambali pa likasa la chipangano la Yehova Mulungu wanu, likhale komweko mboni yakutsutsa inu." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Pakuti ndidziwa kupikisana kwanu, ndi kupulukira kwanu; taonani, pokhala ndikali ndi moyo pamodzi ndi inu lero, mwapikisana ndi Yehova; koposa kotani nanga nditamwalira ine!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ndisonkhanitsire akulu onse a mafuko anu, ndi akapitao anu, kuti ndinene mau awa m'makutu mwao, ndi kuchititsa mboni kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zitsutse iwo." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti nditamwalira ine mudzadziipsa ndithu, ndi kupatuka m'njira imene ndinakuuzani; ndipo chidzakugwerani choipa masiku otsiriza; popeza mudzachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, kuutsa mkwiyo wake ndi ntchito za manja anu." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Ndipo Mose ananena mau a nyimbo iyi m'makutu mwa msonkhano wonse wa Israele, kufikira adatha." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Kumwamba kutchere khutu, ndipo ndidzanena; ndi dziko lapansi limve mau a m'kamwa mwanga." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Chiphunzitso changa chikhale ngati mvula; maneno anga agwe ngati mame; ngati mvula yowaza pamsipu, ndi monga madontho a mvula pazitsamba." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Pakuti ndidzalalika dzina la Yehova. Nenani kuti Mulungu wathu ndi wamkulu. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Thanthwe, ntchito yake ndi yangwiro; pakuti njira zake zonse ndi chiweruzo; Mulungu wokhulupirika ndi wopanda chisalungamo; Iye ndiye wolungama ndi wolunjika." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Anamchitira zovunda si ndiwo ana ake, chilema nchao; iwo ndiwo mbadwo wopulukira ndi wokhotakhota." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Kodi mubwezera Yehova chotero, anthu inu opusa ndi opanda nzeru? Kodi si ndiye Atate wanu, Mbuye wanu; anakulengani, nakukhazikitsani?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Kumbukirani masiku akale, zindikirani zaka za mibadwo yambiri; funsani atate wanu, adzakufotokozerani; akulu anu, adzakuuzani." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Pamene Wam'mwambamwamba anagawira amitundu cholowa chao, pamene anagawa ana a anthu, anaika malire a mitundu ya anthu, monga mwa kuwerenga kwao kwa ana a Israele." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Pakuti gawo la Yehova ndilo anthu ake; Yakobo ndiye muyeso wa cholowa chake. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Anampeza m'dziko la mabwinja, m'chipululu cholira chopanda kanthu; anamzinga, anamlangiza, anamsunga ngati kamwana ka m'diso." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Monga mphungu ikasula chisa chake, nikapakapa pa ana ake, Iye anayala mapiko ake, nawalandira, nawanyamula pa mapiko ake." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Yehova yekha anamtsogolera, ndipo palibe mulungu wachilendo naye." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Anamuyendetsa pa misanje ya dziko lapansi, ndipo anadya zipatso za m'minda; namyamwitsa uchi wa m'thanthwe, ndi mafuta m'mwala wansangalabwe;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 mafuta a mkaka wang'ombe, ndi mkaka wankhosa, ndi mafuta a anaankhosa, ndi nkhosa zamphongo za mtundu wa ku Basani, ndi atonde, ndi impso zonenepa zatirigu; ndipo munamwa vinyo, mwazi wamphesa." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Koma Yesuruni anasanduka wonenepa, natazira; wasanduka wonenepa, wakula, wakuta ndi mafuta; pamenepo anasiya Mulungu amene anamlenga, napeputsa thanthwe la chipulumutso chake." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Anamchititsa nsanje ndi milungu yachilendo, anautsa mkwiyo wake ndi zonyansa." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Anaziphera nsembe ziwanda, si ndizo Mulungu ai; milungu yosadziwa iwo, yatsopano yofuma pafupi, imene makolo anu sanaiope." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Mwaleka Thanthwe limene linakubalani, mwaiwala Mulungu amene anakulengani." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Ndipo Yehova anachiona, nawanyoza, pakuipidwa nao ana ake amuna, ndi akazi." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Ndipo Iye anati, Ndidzawabisira nkhope yanga, ndidzaona kutsiriza kwao; popeza iwo ndiwo mbadwo wopulukira, ana osakhulupirika iwo." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Anautsa nsanje yanga ndi chinthu chosati Mulungu; anautsa mkwiyo wanga ndi zopanda pake zao. Ndidzautsa nsanje yao ndi iwo osakhala mtundu wa anthu; ndidzautsa mkwiyo wao ndi mtundu wa anthu opusa. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Pakuti wayaka moto mu mkwiyo wanga, utentha kumanda kunsi ukutha dziko lapansi ndi zipatso zake, nuyatsa maziko a mapiri." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndidzawaunjikira zoipa; ndidzawathera mivi yanga. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Adzaonda nayo njala adzanyekeka ndi makala a moto, chionongeko chowawa; ndipo ndidzawatumizira mano a zilombo, ndi ululu wa zokwawa m'fumbi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Pabwalo lupanga lidzalanda, ndi m'zipinda mantha; lidzaononga mnyamata ndi namwali, woyamwa pamodzi ndi munthu waimvi." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndinati, Ndikadawauzira ndithu, ndikadafafaniza chikumbukiro chao mwa anthu." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Ndikadapanda kuopa mkwiyo wa pa mdani, angayese molakwa outsana nao, anganene, Lakwezeka dzanja lathu, ndipo Yehova sanachite ichi chonse." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Popeza iwo ndiwo mtundu wa anthu wosowa uphungu konse, ndipo alibe chidziwitso." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Akadakhala nazo nzeru, akadazindikira ichi, akadasamalira chitsirizo chao!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Mmodzi akadapirikitsa zikwi, awiri akadathawitsa zikwi khumi, akadapanda kuwagulitsa Thanthwe lao, akadapanda kuwapereka Yehova." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Popeza thanthwe lao nlosanga Thanthwe lathu, oweruza a pamenepo ndiwo adani athu." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Pakuti mpesa wao ndiwo wa ku Sodomu, ndi wa m'minda ya ku Gomora; mphesa zao ndizo mphesa zandulu, matsangwi ao ngowawa." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Vinyo wao ndiwo ululu wa zinjoka, ndi ululu waukali wa mphiri." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Kodi sichisungika ndi Ine, cholembedwa chizindikiro mwa chuma changa chenicheni?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kubwezera chilango nkwanga, kubwezera komwe, pa nyengo ya kuterereka phazi lao; pakuti tsiku la tsoka lao layandika, ndi zinthu zowakonzeratu zifulumira kudza." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Popeza Yehova adzaweruza anthu ake, nadzachitira nsoni anthu ake; pakuona Iye kuti mphamvu yao yatha, wosatsala womangika kapena waufulu." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Pamenepo adzati, Ili kuti milungu yao, thanthwe limene anathawirako?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Imene inadya mafuta a nsembe zao zophera, nimwa vinyo wa nsembe yao yothira? Iuke nikuthandizeni, Ikhale pobisalapo panu." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Tapenyani tsopano kuti Ine ndine Iye, ndipo palibe mulungu koma Ine; ndipha Ine, ndikhalitsanso ndi moyo, ndikantha, ndichizanso Ine; ndipo palibe wakulanditsa m'dzanja langa." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Pakuti ndikweza dzanja langa kuloza kumwamba, ndipo nditi, Pali moyo wanga kosatha," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ndikanola lupanga langa lonyezimira, ndi dzanja langa likagwira chiweruzo; ndidzabwezera chilango ondiukira, ndi kulanga ondida." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Mivi yanga ndiiledzeretsa nao mwazi, ndi lupanga langa lidzalusira nyama; ndi mwazi wa ophedwa ndi ogwidwa, ndi mutu wachitsitsi wa mdani." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Kondwerani, amitundu inu, ndi anthu ake; adzalipsira mwazi wa atumiki ake, adzabwezera chilango akumuukira, nadzafafanizira zoipa dziko lake, ndi anthu ake." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Ndipo anadza Mose nanena mau onse a nyimbo iyi m'makutu mwa anthu, iye, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ndipo Mose anatha kunena mau awa onse kwa Israele wonse; 
Deuteronomy32:46 nati nao, Ikani mitima yanu pa mau onse ndikuchitirani nao mboni lero; kuti muuze ana anu asamalire kuwachita mau onse a chilamulo ichi." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Pakuti sichikhala kwa inu chinthu chopanda pake, popeza ndicho moyo wanu, ndipo mwa chinthu ichi mudzachulukitsa masiku anu m'dziko limene muolokera Yordani, kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose tsiku lomweli, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy32:49 Kwera m'phiri muno mwa Abarimu, phiri la Nebo, lokhala m'dziko la Mowabu, popenyana ndi Yeriko; nupenye dziko la Kanani, limene ndipereka kwa ana a Israele likhale laolao;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 nufe m'phiri m'mene ukweramo, nuitanidwe kunka kwa anthu a mtundu wako; monga Aroni mbale wako anafa m'phiri la Hori, naitanidwa kunka kwa anthu a mtundu wake;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 popeza munandilakwira pakati pa ana a Israele ku madzi a Meriba wa Kadesi m'chipululu cha Zini, popeza simunandipatula Ine pakati pa ana a Israele." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Pakuti udzapenya dzikoli pandunji pako; koma osalowako ku dziko limene ndipatsa ana a Israele. 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ndipo mdalitso, Mose munthu wa Mulungu anadalitsa nao ana a Israele asanafe, ndi uwu." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Ndipo anati, Yehova anafuma ku Sinai, nawatulukira ku Seiri; anaoneka wowala pa phiri la Parani, anafumira kwa opatulika zikwizikwi; ku dzanja lamanja lake kudawakhalira lamulo lamoto." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Inde akonda mitundu ya anthu; opatulidwa ake onse ali m'dzanja mwanu; ndipo akhala pansi ku mapazi anu; yense adzalandirako mau anu. 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mose anatiuza chilamulo, cholowa cha msonkhano wa Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Ndipo Iye anali mfumu m'Yesuruni, pakusonkhana mafumu a anthu, pamodzi ndi mafuko a Israele." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Rubeni akhale ndi moyo, asafe, koma amuna ake akhale owerengeka." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Za Yuda ndi izi; ndipo anati, Imvani, Yehova, mau a Yuda, ndipo mumfikitse kwa anthu ake; manja ake amfikire; ndipo mukhale inu thandizo lake pa iwo akumuukira." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ndipo za Levi anati, Tumimu ndi Urimu wanu zikhala ndi wokondedwa wanu, amene mudamuyesa m'Masa, amene mudalimbana naye ku madzi a Meriba;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 amene anati za atate wake ndi amai wake, sindinamuone; Sanazindikire abale ake, sanadziwe ana ake omwe; popeza anasamalira mau anu, nasunga chipangano chanu." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Adzaphunzitsa Yakobo maweruzo anu, ndi Israele chilamulo chanu; adzaika chofukiza pamaso panu, ndi nsembe yopsereza yamphumphu pa guwa la nsembe lanu." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Dalitsani, Yehova, mphamvu yake, nimulandire ntchito ya manja ake; akantheni m'chuuno iwo akumuukira, ndi iwo akumuda, kuti asaukenso." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Za Benjamini anati, Wokondedwa wa Yehova adzakhala ndi Iye mokhazikika; am'phimba tsiku lonse, inde akhalitsa pakati pa mapewa ake." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ndipo za Yosefe anati, Yehova adalitse dziko lake; ndi zinthu zofunikatu za m'mwamba, ndi mame, ndi madzi okhala pansipo;" 
Deuteronomy33:14 ndi zipatso zofunikatu za dzuwa, ndi zomera zofunikatu za mwezi," 
Deuteronomy33:15 ndi zinthu zoposa za mapiri akale, ndi zinthu zofunikatu za zitunda zosatha," 
Deuteronomy33:16 ndi zinthu zofunikatu za dziko lapansi, ndi kudzala kwake, ndi chivomerezo cha Iye anakhala m'chitsambayo. Mdalitso ufike pa mutu wa Yosefe, ndi pakati pa mutu wake wa iye wokhala padera ndi abale ake." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Woyamba kubadwa wa ng'ombe yake, ulemerero ndi wake; nyanga zake ndizo nyanga zanjati; adzatunga nazo mitundu ya anthu pamodzi, kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi. Iwo ndiwo zikwi khumi za Efuremu, iwo ndiwo zikwi za Manase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ndi za Zebuloni anati, Kondwera, Zebuloni, ndi kutuluka kwako; ndi Isakara, m'mahema mwako." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Adzaitana mitundu ya anthu afike kuphiri; apo adzaphera nsembe za chilungamo; popeza adzayamwa zochuluka za m'nyanja, ndi chuma chobisika mumchenga." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ndi za Gadi anati, Wodala iye amene akuza Gadi; akhala ngati mkango waukazi, namwetula dzanja, ndi pakati pa mutu pomwe." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Ndipo anadzisankhira gawo loyamba, popeza kumeneko kudasungika gawo la wolamulira; ndipo anadza ndi mafumu a anthu, anachita chilungamo cha Yehova, ndi maweruzo ake ndi Israele." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ndi za Dani anati, Dani ndiye mwana wa mkango, wakutumpha motuluka m'Basani." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Za Nafutali anati, Nafutali, wokhuta nazo zomkondweretsa, wodzala ndi mdalitso wa Yehova; landira kumadzulo ndi kumwera." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ndi za Asere anati, Asere adalitsidwe mwa anawo; akhale wovomerezeka mwa abale ake, aviike phazi lake m'mafuta." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Nsapato zako zikhale za chitsulo ndi mkuwa; ndipo monga masiku ako momwemo mphamvu yako. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Palibe wina ngati Mulungu, Yesuruni iwe, wakuyenda wokwera pathambo, kukuthandiza, ndi pa mitambo m'ukulu wake." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Mulungu wamuyaya ndiye mokhaliramo mwako; ndi pansipo pali manja osatha. Ndipo aingitsa mdani pamaso pako, nati, Ononga." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Ndipo Israele akhala mokhazikika pa yekha; kasupe wa Yakobo; akhala m'dziko la tirigu ndi vinyo; inde thambo lake likukha mame. 
Deuteronomy33:29 Wodala iwe, Israele; akunga iwe ndani, mtundu wa anthu opulumutsidwa ndi Yehova, ndiye chikopa cha thandizo lako, Iye amene akhala lupanga la ukulu wako! Ndi adani ako adzakugonjera; ndipo udzaponda pa misanje yao." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Ndipo Mose anakwera kuchokera ku zidikha za Mowabu, kunka kuphiri la Nebo, pamwamba pa Pisiga, popenyana ndi Yeriko. Ndipo Yehova anamuonetsa dziko lonse la Giliyadi, kufikira ku Dani;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 ndi Nafutali lonse, ndi dziko la Efuremu, ndi Manase, ndi dziko lonse la Yuda, kufikira nyanja ya m'tsogolo;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 ndi kumwera, ndi chidikha cha chigwa cha Yeriko, mudzi wa migwalangwa, kufikira ku Zowari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Si ili dziko ndinalumbirira Abrahamu, Isaki ndi Yakobo, ndi kuti, Ndidzalipereka kwa mbeu zako. Ndinakuonetsa ili m'maso, koma sudzaolokako." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Ndipo Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anamwalirako m'dziko la Mowabu, monga mwa mau a Yehova." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Ndipo Iye anamuika m'chigwa m'dziko la Mowabu popenyana ndi Betepeori; koma palibe munthu wakudziwa kumanda kwake kufikira lero lino. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Ndipo zaka zake za Mose ndizo zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri, pakumwalira iye; diso lake silinachita mdima, ndi mphamvu yake siidaleka." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Ndipo ana a Israele analira Mose m'zidikha za Mowabu masiku makumi atatu; potero anatha masiku akulira maliro a Mose. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni anadzala ndi mzimu wanzeru; popeza Mose adamuikira manja ake; ndi ana a Israele anamvera iye, nachita monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Ndipo sanaukenso mneneri m'Israele ngati Mose, amene Yehova anadziwana naye popenyana maso;" 
Deuteronomy34:11 kunena za zizindikiro ndi zozizwa zonse zimene Yehova anamtumiza kuzichita m'dziko la Ejipito kwa Farao, ndi anyamata ake onse, ndi dziko lake lonse;" 
Deuteronomy34:12 ndi kunena za dzanja la mphamvu lonse, ndi choopsa chachikulu chonse, chimene Mose anachita pamaso pa Israele wonse." 
Joshua1:1 Ndipo atafa Mose mtumiki wa Yehova, Yehova anati kwa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni mnyamata wa Mose," 
Joshua1:2 Mose mtumiki wanga wafa; tauka tsono, nuoloke Yordani uyu, iwe ndi anthu awa onse, kulowa m'dzikomo ndilikuwapatsa, ndiwo ana a Israele." 
Joshua1:3 Pali ponse phazi lanu lidzapondapo ndinakupatsani, monga ndinanena ndi Mose." 
Joshua1:4 Kuyambira chipululu, ndi Lebanoni uyu, kufikira mtsinje waukulu mtsinje wa Yufurate, dziko lonse la Ahiti, ndi kufikira Nyanja Yaikulu ku malowero a dzuwa, ndiwo malire anu." 
Joshua1:5 Palibe munthu adzatha kuima pamaso pako masiku onse a moyo wako; monga ndinakhala ndi Mose momwemo ndidzakhala ndi iwe; sindidzakusowa, sindidzakusiya." 
Joshua1:6 Khala wamphamvu, nulimbike mtima, pakuti udzagawira anthu awa dzikoli likhale cholowa chao, ndilo limene ndinalumbirira makolo ao kuwapatsa." 
Joshua1:7 Komatu khala wamphamvu, nulimbike mtima kwambiri, kuti usamalire kuchita monga mwa chilamulo chonse anakulamuliracho Mose mtumiki wanga; usachipatukire ku dzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere, kuti ukachite mwanzeru kulikonse umukako." 
Joshua1:8 Buku ili la chilamulo lisachoke pakamwa pako; koma ulingiriremo usana ndi usiku, kuti usamalire kuchita monga mwa zonse zolembedwamo; popeza ukatero udzakometsa njira yako, nudzachita mwanzeru." 
Joshua1:9 Kodi sindinakulamulira iwe? Khala wamphamvu, nulimbike mtima, usaope, kapena kutenga nkhawa, pakuti Yehova Mulungu wako ali ndi iwe kulikonse umukako." 
Joshua1:10 Pamenepo Yoswa analamulira akapitao a anthu, ndi kuti," 
Joshua1:11 Pitani pakati pa chigono, nimulamulire anthu, ndi kuti, Mudzikonzeretu kamba, pakuti asanapite masiku atatu mudzaoloka Yordani uyu, kulowa ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, likhale lanulanu." 
Joshua1:12 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, ndi kuti," 
Joshua1:13 Kumbukirani mau amene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakulamulirani inu, kuti, Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani mpumulo, nadzakupatsani dziko lino." 
Joshua1:14 Akazi anu, ana anu, ndi zoweta zanu zikhale m'dzikoli anakuninkhani Mose, tsidya lino la Yordani; koma inu muoloke okonzeka kunkhondo pamaso pa abale anu, ngwazi zonse, ndi kuwathandiza;" 
Joshua1:15 mpaka Yehova atapatsa abale anu mpumulo, monga umo anakuninkhirani inu, naonso alandira dzikolo awaninkha Yehova Mulungu wanu; pamenepo mubwerere ku dziko lanulanu, ndi kukhala nalo, limene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakupatsani tsidya lino la Yordani la kum'mawa," 
Joshua1:16 Ndipo anamyankha Yoswa, nati, Zonse mwatilamulira tidzachita, ndipo kulikonse mutitumako tidzamuka." 
Joshua1:17 Monga momwe tinamvera mau onse a Mose momwemo tidzamvera inu; komatu akhale ndi inu Yehova Mulungu wanu monga anakhala ndi Mose. 
Joshua1:18 Aliyense wakupikisana ndi inu, osamvera mau anu mulimonse mukamlamulira, aphedwe; komatu khalani wamphamvu, nimulimbike mtima." 
Joshua2:1 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ali ku Sitimu, anatuma amuna awiri mosadziwika kukazonda, ndi kuti, Mukani, mulipenye dzikolo, ndi ku Yeriko. Ndipo anamuka nalowa m'nyumba ya mkazi wadama, dzina lake Rahabi, nagona momwemo." 
Joshua2:2 Ndipo wina anaiuza mfumu ya Yeriko, kuti, Taonani, usiku uno alowa muno amuna a ana a Israele, kulizonda dziko." 
Joshua2:3 Ndipo mfumu ya Yeriko inatuma wina kwa Rahabi, ndi kuti, Tulutsa amunawo anafika kwanu, amene analowa m'nyumba mwako; popeza anadzera kulizonda dziko lonse." 
Joshua2:4 Koma mkaziyo anatenga amuna awiriwo, nawabisa; natero, Inde, amunawo anandifikira; koma sindinadziwa uko afuma;" 
Joshua2:5 ndipo m'mene akadati atseke pachipata, kutada, anatuluka amunawo; uko anamuka amunawo osakudziwa ine; muwalondole msanga, pakuti mudzawapeza." 
Joshua2:6 Koma adawakweretsa patsindwi, nawabisa ndi mitengo yanthamza yoyanika patsindwi." 
Joshua2:7 Ndipo amunawo anawalondola pa njira ya ku Yordani yonka kudooko; ndipo atatuluka akuwalondola, anatseka pachipata." 
Joshua2:8 Koma asanagone iwo, anawakwerera patsindwi iye," 
Joshua2:9 nati kwa amunawo, Ndidziwa kuti Yehova wakupatsani dzikoli, ndi kuti kuopsa kwanu kwatigwera, ndi kuti okhala m'dziko onse asungunuka pamaso panu." 
Joshua2:10 Popeza tidamva kuti Yehova anaphwetsa madzi a m'Nyanja Yofiira pamaso panu, muja mudatuluka m'Ejipito; ndi chija munachitira mafumu awiri a Aamori okhala tsidya la Yordani, ndiwo Sihoni ndi Ogi, amene mudawaononga konse." 
Joshua2:11 Ndipo titamva ichi mitima yathu inasungunuka; analibenso mtima ndi mmodzi yense, chifukwa cha inu; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndiye Mulungu wa m'mwamba umo, ndi pa dziko lapansi." 
Joshua2:12 Ndipo tsopano, mundilumbiriretu kwa Yehova, popeza ndakuchitirani chifundo, kuti inunso mudzachitira chifundo a m'nyumba ya atate wanga ndi kundipatsa chizindikiro choona," 
Joshua2:13 kuti mudzawasunga ndi moyo atate wanga ndi mai wanga, ndi alongo anga ndi abale anga, ndi zonse ali nazo, ndi kupulumutsa miyoyo yathu kuimfa." 
Joshua2:14 Ndipo amunawo anati kwa iye, Moyo wathu ndiwo moyo wanu, mukapanda kuwulula chodzera ife; ndipo kudzakhala kuti, pakutipatsa ife dziko ili Yehova, tidzakuchitira chifundo ndi choonadi." 
Joshua2:15 Pamenepo anawatsitsa pazenera ndi chingwe; popeza nyumba yake inali pa linga la mudzi, nakhala iye palingapo." 
Joshua2:16 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mukani kuphiri, olondola angakupezeni; mubisale kumeneko masiku atatu, mpaka atabwerera olondolawo, pamenepo muyende ulendo wanu." 
Joshua2:17 Ndipo amunawo anati kwa iye, Sitidzachimwira lumbiro lako ili watilumbiritsali." 
Joshua2:18 Taona, tikadzalowa m'dzikomo ife, uzimanga chingwe ichi chofiira pazenera pamene watitsitsira; ndipo udzasonkhanitsa m'nyumbamo atate wako ndi mai wako ndi abale ako ndi a m'nyumba onse a atate wako." 
Joshua2:19 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti aliyense akadzatuluka pa khomo la nyumba yako kubwalo, imfa imeneyi ndi yake, tilibe kupalamula ife; koma aliyense adzakhala ndi iwe m'nyumba, likamfikira dzanja, imfa imeneyi ndi yathu." 
Joshua2:20 Koma ukawulula chodzera ifecho tidzamasukira lumbiro lako watilumbiritsali. 
Joshua2:21 Nati iye, Momwemo, monga mwa mau anu. Ndipo anawauza amuke, iwo namuka; namanga iye chingwe chofiiracho pazenera." 
Joshua2:22 Ndipo anayenda iwo, nafika kuphiri, nakhalako masiku atatu mpaka atabwerera olondolawo; popeza olondolawo anawafunafuna panjira ponse, osawapeza." 
Joshua2:23 Pamenepo amuna awiriwo anabwerera, natsika m'phirimo naoloka, nafika kwa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, namfotokozera zonse zidawagwera." 
Joshua2:24 Ndipo anati kwa Yoswa, Zoonadi, Yehova wapereka dziko lonse m'manja mwathu; ndiponso nzika zonse zasungunuka pamaso pathu." 
Joshua3:1 Ndipo Yoswa analawirira mamawa, kuchoka ku Sitimu, nafika ku Yordani, iye ndi ana onse a Israele; nagona komweko, asanaoloke." 
Joshua3:2 Ndipo kunali atapita masiku atatu, akapitao anapita pakati pa chigono;" 
Joshua3:3 nalamulira anthu, ndi kuti, Mukadzaona likasa la chipangano la Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi ansembe Aleviwo atalisenza, pamenepo muchoke kwanu ndi kulitsata." 
Joshua3:4 Koma pakhale dera pakati pa inu ndi ilo, monga mikono zikwi ziwiri poliyesa; musaliyandikire, kuti mudziwe njira imene muziyendamo; popeza simunapita njirayi kufikira lero." 
Joshua3:5 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa anthu, Mudzipatule, pakuti mawa Yehova adzachita zodabwitsa pakati pa inu." 
Joshua3:6 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ansembe, Senzani likasa la chipangano, nimuoloke pamaso pa anthu. Nasenza iwo likasa la chipangano, natsogolera anthu." 
Joshua3:7 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Lero lino ndidzayamba kukukuza pamaso pa Aisraele onse, kuti adziwe, kuti monga momwe ndinakhalira ndi Mose, momwemo ndidzakhala ndi iwe." 
Joshua3:8 Ndipo uzilamulira ansembe akunyamula likasa la chipangano, ndi kuti, Pamene mufika kumphepete kwa madzi a Yordani muziima m'Yordani." 
Joshua3:9 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ana a Israele, Idzani kuno, mumve mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua3:10 Nati Yoswa, Ndi ichi mudzadziwa kuti Mulungu wamoyo ali pakati pa inu, ndi kuti adzapirikitsa ndithu pamaso panu Akanani, ndi Ahiti, ndi Ahivi, ndi Aperizi, ndi Agirigasi, ndi Aamori, ndi Ayebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Taonani, likasa la chipangano la Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi lioloka Yordani pamaso panu." 
Joshua3:12 Ndipo tsono, mudzitengere amuna khumi ndi awiri mwa mafuko a Israele, fuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi." 
Joshua3:13 Ndipo kudzakhala, akaima mapazi a ansembe akusenza likasa la Yehova Ambuye wa dziko lonse, m'madzi a Yordani, adzadulidwa madziwo, ndiwo madzi ochokera kumagwero, nadzaima mulu umodzi." 
Joshua3:14 Ndipo kunali pochoka anthu ku mahema ao kukaoloka Yordani, ansembe anasenza likasa la chipangano pamaso pa anthu." 
Joshua3:15 Ndipo pamene iwo akusenza likasa anafika ku Yordani, nathibika m'mphepete mwa madzi mapazi a ansembe akusenza likasa, pakuti Yordani asefuka m'magombe ake onse, nyengo yonse ya masika," 
Joshua3:16 pamenepo madzi ochokera kumagwero anaima, nauka ngati mulu, kutalitu ku Adama, ndiwo mudzi wa ku mbali ya Zaretani; koma madzi akutsikira kunka ku nyanja ya chidikha, ndiyo Nyanja ya Mchere, anadulidwa konse; ndipo anthu anaoloka pandunji pa Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Ndipo ansembe akulisenza likasa la chipangano la Yehova, anaima pouma pakati pa Yordani, ndi Aisraele onse anaoloka pouma mpaka mtundu wonse unatha kuoloka Yordani." 
Joshua4:1 Ndipo kunali, utatha kuoloka Yordani mtundu wonse, Yehova ananena ndi Yoswa, nati," 
Joshua4:2 Mudzitengere mwa anthu, amuna khumi ndi awiri, fuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi;" 
Joshua4:3 ndipo muwalamulire iwo ndi kuti, Mudzitengere pano pakati pa Yordani, poimapo mapazi a ansembe, miyala khumi ndi iwiri, ndi kuoloka nayo, ndi kuiika m'mogona m'mene mugonamo usiku uno." 
Joshua4:4 Pamenepo Yoswa anaitana amuna khumi ndi awiriwo amene anawaikiratu mwa ana a Israele, fuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi;" 
Joshua4:5 nanena nao Yoswa, Olokani, kutsogolera likasa la Yehova Mulungu wanu pakati pa Yordani, nimudzisenzere yense mwala paphewa pake, monga mwa kuwerenga kwa mafuko a ana a Israele;" 
Joshua4:6 kuti ichi chikhale chizindikiro pakati pa inu. Akakufunsani ana anu m'tsogolomo, ndi kuti, Miyala iyi nja chiyani ndi inu?" 
Joshua4:7 Munene nao, Chifukwa madzi a Yordani anadulidwa patsogolo pa likasa la chipangano cha Yehova; muja lidaoloka Yordani, madzi a Yordani anadulidwa; ndipo miyala iyi idzakhala chikumbutso cha ana a Israele chikhalire." 
Joshua4:8 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita monga Yoswa anawalamulira, nasenza miyala khumi ndi iwiri pakati pa Yordani, monga Yehova adalankhula ndi Yoswa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwa mafuko a ana a Israele; ndipo anaoloka nayo kunka kogona, naiika komweko." 
Joshua4:9 Ndipo Yoswa anaimika miyala khumi ndi iwiri pakati pa Yordani, poimapo mapazi a ansembe akusenza likasa la chipangano; ikhala komweko kufikira lero lino." 
Joshua4:10 Pakuti ansembe akusenza likasa anaima pakati pa Yordani, mpaka zitatha zonse Yehova adazilamulira Yoswa anene kwa anthu, monga mwa zonse Mose adalamulira Yoswa; ndipo anthu anafulumira kuoloka." 
Joshua4:11 Ndipo kunali, atatha kuoloka anthu onse, likasa la Yehova linaoloka, ndi ansembe, pamaso pa anthu." 
Joshua4:12 Ndipo ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi gawo lija la fuko la Manase anaoloka ndi zida zao pamaso pa ana a Israele, monga Mose adanena nao;" 
Joshua4:13 ngati zikwi makumi anai ankhondo okonzeka anaoloka pamaso pa Yehova kuthira nkhondo ku zidikha za Yeriko. 
Joshua4:14 Tsiku lomwelo Yehova anakulitsa Yoswa pamaso pa Aisraele onse; ndipo anamuopa monga anaopa Mose, masiku onse a moyo wake." 
Joshua4:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa," 
Joshua4:16 Lamulira ansembe akusenza likasa la umboni, kuti akwere kutuluka m'Yordani." 
Joshua4:17 Pamenepo Yoswa analamulira ansembe, ndi kuti, Kwerani kutuluka m'Yordani." 
Joshua4:18 Ndipo kunali, atakwera ansembe akusenza likasa la chipangano la Yehova, kutuluka pakati pa Yordani, nakwera pamtunda mapazi a ansembe, madzi a m'Yordani anabwera m'njira mwake, nasefuka m'magombe ake onse monga kale." 
Joshua4:19 Ndipo anthu anakwera kutuluka m'Yordani tsiku lakhumi la mwezi woyamba, namanga misasa ku Giligala, mbali ya ku m'mawa kwa Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Ndipo Yoswa anaimika ku Giligala miyala ija khumi ndi iwiri adaitenga m'Yordani. 
Joshua4:21 Ndipo anati kwa ana a Israele, Ana anu akadzafunsa atate ao masiku akudza, ndi kuti, Miyala iyi nja chiyani?" 
Joshua4:22 Pamenepo muzidziwitsa ana anu, ndi kuti, Israele anaoloka Yordani uyu pouma." 
Joshua4:23 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anaphwetsa madzi a Yordani pamaso panu, mpaka mutaoloka; monga Yehova Mulungu wanu anachitira Nyanja Yofiira, imene anaiphwetsa pamaso pathu, mpaka titaoloka;" 
Joshua4:24 kuti mitundu yonse ya pa dziko lapansi idziwe dzanja la Yehova, kuti ndilo lamphamvu; kuti iope Yehova Mulungu wanu masiku onse." 
Joshua5:1 Ndipo kunali, pamene mafumu onse a Aamori okhala tsidya la kumadzulo la Yordani, ndi mafumu onse a Akanani okhala ku nyanja anamva kuti Yehova anaphwetsa madzi a Yordani pamaso pa ana a Israele mpaka titaoloka, mtima wao unasungunuka, analibenso moyo chifukwa cha ana a Israele." 
Joshua5:2 Nthawi imeneyo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Udzisemere mipeni yamiyala nudulenso ana a Israele kachiwiri." 
Joshua5:3 Ndipo Yoswa anadzisemera mipeni yamiyala nadula ana a Israele pa Gibea-Naraloti. 
Joshua5:4 Koma chifukwa chakuti Yoswa anawadula ndi ichi: anthu onse otuluka m'Ejipito, anthu amuna, ndiwo amuna onse ankhondo, adafa m'chipululu panjira, atatuluka m'Ejipito." 
Joshua5:5 Pakuti anthu onse anatulukawo anadulidwa; koma anthu onse obadwa m'chipululu panjira potuluka m'Ejipito sanadulidwe. 
Joshua5:6 Pakuti ana a Israele anayenda m'chipululu zaka makumi anai, mpaka mtundu wonse wa amuna ankhondo otuluka m'Ejipito udatha, chifukwa cha kusamvera mau a Yehova; ndiwo amene Yehova anawalumbirira kuti sadzawaonetsa dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo ao kudzatipatsa, ndilo dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uchi." 
Joshua5:7 Koma ana ao amuna amene anawautsa m'malo mwao, iwowa Yoswa anawadula; popeza anakhala osadulidwa, pakuti sanawadule panjira." 
Joshua5:8 Ndipo kunali, atatha kudula mtundu wonse, anakhala m'malo mwao m'chigono mpaka adachira." 
Joshua5:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Lero lino ndakukunkhunizirani mtonzo wa Ejipito. Chifukwa chake dzina la malowo analitcha Giligala kufikira lero lino." 
Joshua5:10 Ndipo ana a Israele anamanga misasa ku Giligala; nachita Paska tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi, madzulo, m'zidikha za Yeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Ndipo m'mawa mwake atatha Paska, anadya tirigu wakhwimbi wa m'dziko, mikate yopanda chotupitsa ndi tirigu wokazinga tsiku lomwe lija." 
Joshua5:12 Koma m'mawa mwake mana analeka, atadya iwo tirigu wakhwimbi wa m'dziko; ndipo ana a Israele analibenso mana; koma anadya zipatso za dziko la Kanani chaka chomwe chija." 
Joshua5:13 Ndipo kunali, pokhala Yoswa ku Yeriko, anakweza maso ake, napenya, ndipo taona, panaima munthu pandunji pake ndi lupanga lake losolola m'dzanja lake; namuka Yoswa kuli iye, nati iye, Uvomerezana ndi ife kapena ndi adani athu?" 
Joshua5:14 Nati, Iai, koma ndadza ine, kazembe wa ankhondo a Yehova. Pamenepo Yoswa anagwa nkhope yake pansi, napembedza, nati kwa iye, Anenanji Ambuyanga kwa mtumiki wake?" 
Joshua5:15 Ndipo kazembe wa ankhondo a Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Vula nsapato yako pa phazi lako; pakuti malo upondapo mpopatulika. Nachita Yoswa chomwecho." 
Joshua6:1 Koma ku Yeriko anatseka pazipata, natsekedwa chifukwa cha ana a Israele, panalibe wotuluka, panalibenso wolowa." 
Joshua6:2 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa Yoswa, Taona, ndapereka m'dzanja lako Yeriko ndi mfumu yake, ndi ngwazi zake." 
Joshua6:3 Ndipo muzizungulira mudzi inu nonse ankhondo, kuuzungulira mudzi kamodzi. Muzitero masiku asanu ndi limodzi." 
Joshua6:4 Ndipo ansembe asanu ndi awiri azinyamula mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga za nkhosa zamphongo, natsogolere nazo likasa; koma tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri mudzizungulira mudziwo kasanu ndi kawiri, ndi ansembe aziliza mphalasazo." 
Joshua6:5 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti akaliza chilizire ndi nyanga ya nkhosa yamphongo, nimumva kulira kwa mphalasa, anthu onse afuule mfuu yaikulu; ndipo linga la mudziwo lidzagwa pomwepo, ndi anthu adzakwera ndi kulowamo yense kumaso kwake." 
Joshua6:6 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni anaitana ansembe, nanena nao, Senzani likasa la chipangano, ndi ansembe asanu ndi awiri anyamule mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga za nkhosa zamphongo, kutsogolera nazo likasa la Yehova." 
Joshua6:7 Nati kwa anthu, Pitani, muzizungulira mudzi, ndi ankhondo ndi zida zao atsogolere likasa la Yehova." 
Joshua6:8 Ndipo atanena kwa anthu Yoswa, ansembe asanu ndi awiri akunyamula mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga za nkhosa zamphongo pamaso pa Yehova, anapita naliza mphalasazo; ndipo likasa la chipangano cha Yehova linawatsata." 
Joshua6:9 Ndipo okonzeka kunkhondo anatsogolera ansembe akuliza mphalasa, koma akudza m'mbuyo anatsata likasa, ansembe ali chiombere poyenda iwo." 
Joshua6:10 Ndipo Yoswa analamulira anthu, ndi kuti, Musamafuula, kapena kumveketsa mau anu, asatuluke konse mau m'kamwa mwanu, mpaka tsiku lakunena nanu ine, Fuulani; pamenepo muzifuula." 
Joshua6:11 Ndipo anazungulitsa likasa la Yehova mudzi, kuzungulira kamodzi; pamenepo analowa kuchigono, nagona m'mwemo." 
Joshua6:12 Ndipo Yoswa analawira mamawa, ndi ansembe anasenza likasa la Yehova." 
Joshua6:13 Ndipo ansembe asanu ndi awiri, akunyamula mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga za nkhosa zamphongo ndi kutsogolera nazo likasa la Yehova, anayenda chiyendere naliza mphalasazo; ndi okonzeka kunkhondowo anawatsogolera, ndi akudza m'mbuyo anatsata likasa la Yehova, ansembe ali chiombere poyenda iwo." 
Joshua6:14 Ndipo tsiku lachiwiri anazungulira mudzi kamodzi, nabwera kuchigono; anatero masiku asanu ndi limodzi." 
Joshua6:15 Ndipo kunali, tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri analawira mamawa, mbandakucha, nazungulira mudzi mommuja kasanu ndi kawiri; koma tsiku lijalo anazungulira mudzi kasanu ndi kawiri." 
Joshua6:16 Ndipo kunali, pa nthawi yachisanu ndi chiwiri, pamene ansembe analiza mphalasa, Yoswa anati kwa anthu, Fuulani; pakuti Yehova wakupatsani mudziwo." 
Joshua6:17 Koma mudziwo udzaperekedwa kwa Yehova ndi kuonongeka konse, uwu ndi zonse zili m'mwemo; Rahabi yekha wadamayo adzakhala ndi moyo, iye ndi onse ali naye m'nyumba, chifukwa anabisa mithenga tinawatumawo." 
Joshua6:18 Ndipo inu, musakhudze choperekedwacho, mungadziononge konse, potapa choperekedwacho; ndi kuononga konse chigono cha Israele ndi kuchisautsa." 
Joshua6:19 Koma siliva yense, ndi golide yense, ndi zotengera za mkuwa ndi chitsulo zikhala chopatulikira Yehova; zilowe m'mosungira chuma cha Yehova." 
Joshua6:20 Ndipo anthu anafuula, naliza mphalasa ansembe; ndipo kunali, pamene anthu anamva kulira kwa mphalasa, anafuula anthu ndi mfuu yaikulu, niligwa linga pomwepo; nakwera anthu kulowa m'mudzi, yense kumaso kwake; nalanda mudziwo." 
Joshua6:21 Ndipo anapereka kuziononga ndi lupanga lakuthwa zonse za m'mudzi, amuna ndi akazi omwe, ana ndi nkhalamba zomwe, kudza ng'ombe, ndi nkhosa, ndi abulu, ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
Joshua6:22 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa amuna awiri anazonda dzikowo, Lowani m'nyumba ya mkazi wadamayo, ndi kutulutsamo mkaziyo ndi zonse ali nazo, monga munamlumbirira iye." 
Joshua6:23 Pamenepo anyamata ozondawo analowa, natulutsa Rahabi, ndi atate wake ndi mai wake ndi abale ake, ndi onse anali nao; anatulutsanso achibale ake onse; nawaika kunja kwa chigono cha Israele." 
Joshua6:24 Ndipo anatentha mudzi ndi moto, ndi zonse zinali m'mwemo; koma siliva ndi golide ndi zotengera zamkuwa ndi zachitsulo anaziika m'mosungira chuma cha nyumba ya Yehova." 
Joshua6:25 Koma Rahabi, mkazi wadamayo ndi banja la atate wake, ndi onse anali nao, Yoswa anawasunga ndi moyo; ndipo anakhala pakati pa Israele mpaka lero lino; chifukwa anabisa mithenga imene Yoswa anaituma kuzonda Yeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Ndipo Yoswa anawalumbirira nyengo ija, ndi kuti, Wotembereredwa pamaso pa Yehova munthu amene adzauka ndi kumanga mudzi uwu wa Yeriko; adzamanga kuzika kwake ndi kutayapo mwana wake woyamba, nadzaimika zitseko zake ndi kutayapo mwana wake wotsirizira." 
Joshua6:27 Potero Yehova anakhala ndi Yoswa; ndi mbiri yake inabuka m'dziko lonse. 
Joshua7:1 Koma ana a Israele analakwa ndi choperekedwacho; popeza Akani mwana wa Karimi, mwana wa Zabidi, mwana wa Zera, wa fuko la Yuda, anatapa choperekedwacho; ndi mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira ana a Israele." 
Joshua7:2 Ndipo Yoswa anatuma amuna kuchokera ku Yeriko apite ku Ai, ndiwo pafupi pa Betaveni, kum'mawa kwa Betele; nanena nao, Kwerani ndi kukazonda dziko. Nakwera amunawo, nazonda Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ndipo anabwera kwa Yoswa, nati kwa iye, Asakwere anthu onse; koma akwere amuna ngati zikwi ziwiri kapena zitatu kukantha Ai; musalemetsa anthu onse kumkako, pakuti a komweko ndi owerengeka." 
Joshua7:4 Potero mwa anthu anakwerako amuna monga zikwi zitatu; koma anathawa pamaso pa amuna a ku Ai. 
Joshua7:5 Ndipo amuna a ku Ai anawakantha amuna, ngati makumi atatu mphambu asanu ndi mmodzi; nawapirikitsa kuyambira pachipata mpaka ku Sebarimu, nawakantha potsika; ndi mitima ya anthu inasungunuka inga madzi." 
Joshua7:6 Ndipo Yoswa anang'amba zovala zake, nagwa nkhope yake pansi, ku likasa la Yehova, mpaka madzulo, iye ndi akuluakulu a Israele, nathira fumbi pamitu pao." 
Joshua7:7 Ndipo Yoswa anati, Ha! Ambuye, Yehova, mwaolotseranji anthu awa pa Yordani, kutipereka ife m'dzanja la Aamori, kutiononga ife? Mwenzi titalola ndi kukhala tsidya lija la Yordani!" 
Joshua7:8 Ndidzanenanji, Ambuye, Israele atabwerera m'mbuyo pamaso pa adani ao?" 
Joshua7:9 Akadzamva ichi Akanani ndi okhala m'dziko onse, adzatizinga ndi kuduliratu dzina lathu pa dziko lapansi; ndipo mudzachitiranji dzina lanu lalikulu?" 
Joshua7:10 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Tauka, wagweranji pankhope pako chotere?" 
Joshua7:11 Israele wachimwa, nalakwiranso chipangano changa, ndinawalamuliracho; natengakonso choperekedwacho; anabanso, nanyenganso, nachiika pakati pa akatundu ao." 
Joshua7:12 Mwa ichi ana a Israele sangathe kuima pamaso pa adani ao, awafulatira adani ao, pakuti aperekedwa aonongeke. Sindidzakhalanso nanu mukapanda kuononga choperekedwacho, kuchichotsa pakati pa inu." 
Joshua7:13 Tauka, patula anthu, nuti, Mudzipatulire mawa; pakuti atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Pali choperekedwa chionongeke pakati pako, Israele iwe; sukhoza kuima pamaso pa adani ako, mpaka mutachotsa choperekedwacho pakati panu." 
Joshua7:14 Koma m'mawa adzakuyandikitsani, fuko ndi fuko; ndipo kudzali kuti fukoli Yehova aliwulula lidzayandikira mwa zibale zake; ndi chibale Yehova achiwulula chidzayandikira monga mwa a nyumba ake; ndi a m'nyumbawo Yehova awawulula adzayandikira mmodzimmodzi." 
Joshua7:15 Ndipo kudzali kuti iye wogwidwa ali nacho choperekedwacho adzatenthedwa ndi moto, iye ndi zonse ali nazo chifukwa analakwira chipangano cha Yehova, ndi chifukwa anachita chopusa m'Israele." 
Joshua7:16 Ndipo Yoswa analawira mamawa, nayandikizitsa Israele, fuko ndi fuko; ndi fuko la Yuda linagwidwa;" 
Joshua7:17 nayandikizitsa zibale za Yuda, nagwira chibale cha Azera; nayandikizitsa chibale cha Azera, mmodzimmodzi, nagwidwa Zabidi;" 
Joshua7:18 nayandikizitsa a m'nyumba yake mmodzimmodzi; ndipo Akani, mwana wa Karimi, mwanu wa Zabidi, mwana wa Zera, wa fuko la Yuda anagwidwa." 
Joshua7:19 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa Akani, Mwana wanga, uchitiretu ulemu Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, numlemekeze Iye; nundiuze tsopano, wachitanji? Usandibisire." 
Joshua7:20 Ndipo Akani anayankha Yoswa nati, Zoonadi, ndachimwira Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, ndachita zakutizakuti;" 
Joshua7:21 pamene ndinaona pazofunkha malaya abwino a ku Babiloni, ndi masekeli mazana awiri a siliva, ndi chikute chagolide, kulemera kwake masekeli makumi asanu, ndinazikhumbira ndi kuzitenga; ndipo taonani, ndazibisa m'nthaka pakati pa hema wanga, ndi siliva pansi pakepo." 
Joshua7:22 Pamenepo Yoswa anatuma mithenga, iwo nathamangira kuhema; ndipo taonani, zidabisika m'hema mwake ndi siliva pansi pake." 
Joshua7:23 Ndipo anazichotsa pakati pa hema, nabwera nazo kwa Yoswa ndi kwa ana onse a Israele, nazitula pamaso pa Yehova." 
Joshua7:24 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi Aisraele onse naye, anatenga Akani mwana wa Zera, ndi siliva, ndi malayawo, ndi chikute chagolide, ndi ana ake aamuna ndi aakazi, ndi ng'ombe zake, ndi abulu ake, ndi nkhosa zake, ndi hema wake ndi zake zonse; nakwera nazo ku chigwa cha Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Ndipo Yoswa anati, Watisautsiranji? Yehova adzakusautsa lero lino. Ndipo Aisraele onse anamponya miyala, nawatentha ndi moto, nawaponya miyala." 
Joshua7:26 Ndipo anamuunjikira mulu waukulu wamiyala, wokhalako kufikira lero lino; ndipo Yehova anatembenuka kusiya mkwiyo wake waukulu. Chifukwa chake anatcha dzina lake la malowo, Chigwa cha Akori, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua8:1 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Usaope, kapena kutenga nkhawa, tenga anthu onse a nkhondo apite nawe, ndipo tauka, kwera ku Ai; taona, ndapereka m'dzanja lako mfumu ya ku Ai, ndi anthu ake ndi mudzi wake ndi dziko lake;" 
Joshua8:2 ndipo uzimchitira Ai ndi mfumu yake monga umo unamchitira Yeriko ndi mfumu yake; koma zofunkha zake ndi ng'ombe zake mudzifunkhire nokha; udziikire anthu alalire kukhonde kwa mudzi. 
Joshua8:3 Pamenepo anauka Yoswa, ndi anthu onse a nkhondo, kuti akwere ku Ai; ndipo Yoswa anasankha amuna zikwi makumi atatu, ndiwo ngwazi, nawatumiza apite usiku," 
Joshua8:4 nawalamulira ndi kuti, Taonani, muzikhala olalira kukhonde kwa mudzi; musakhalira kutali ndi mudzi, koma mukhale okonzekeratu nonse;" 
Joshua8:5 ndipo ine, ndi anthu onse ali nane, tidzayandikira mudzi; ndipo kudzali, pamene atuluka kudzakomana nafe, monga poyamba paja, tidzathawa pamaso pao;" 
Joshua8:6 ndipo adzatuluka kutitsata mpaka tidawakokera asiyane ndi mudzi; pakuti adzanena, Atithawa pamaso pathu monga poyamba paja; nafenso tidzathawa pamaso pao;" 
Joshua8:7 pamenepo muziuka m'molalira ndi kulowa m'mudzi; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu; adzaupereka m'manja mwanu. 
Joshua8:8 Ndipo kudzali, mutagwira mudzi, muzitentha mudziwo ndi moto; muzichita monga mwa mau a Yehova; taonani, ndakulamulirani." 
Joshua8:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawatuma, namuka iwo kulowa m'molalira, nakhala pakati pa Betele ndi Ai, kumadzulo kwa Ai; koma Yoswa anakhala mwa anthu usiku uja." 
Joshua8:10 Ndipo Yoswa analawira m'mamawa, nayesa anthu, nakwera, iye ndi akulu a Israele, pamaso pa anthu a ku Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Ndi anthu onse a nkhondo okhala naye anakwera, nayandikira nafika pamaso pa mudzi, namanga misasa kumpoto kwa Ai; koma pakati pa iye ndi Ai panali chigwa." 
Joshua8:12 Ndipo anatenga amuna ngati zikwi zisanu, nawaika m'molalira pakati pa Betele ndi Ai, kumadzulo kwa mudzi." 
Joshua8:13 Momwemo anaika anthu, khamu lonse lokhala kumpoto kwa mudzi, ndi olalira ao kumadzulo kwa mudzi, ndipo usiku uja Yoswa analowa pakati pa chigwa." 
Joshua8:14 Ndipo kunali, pamene mfumu ya ku Ai anachiona, anafulumira iwo, nalawira mamawa, natuluka amuna a m'mudzi kuthirana ndi Israele, iye ndi anthu ake onse, poikidwiratu patsogolo pa chidikha; popeza sanadziwe kuti amlalira kukhonde kwa mudzi." 
Joshua8:15 Ndipo Yoswa ndi Aisraele onse anaoneka ngati a ku Ai alikuwathyola, nathawira njira ya kuchipululu." 
Joshua8:16 Pamenepo anthu onse okhala m'mudzi, anaitanidwa awapirikitse, nampirikitsa Yoswa, nakokedwa kusiyana ndi mudzi." 
Joshua8:17 Ndipo sanatsale mwamuna mmodzi yense m'Ai kapena m'Betele osatulukira kwa Israele; nasiya mudzi wapululu, napirikitsa Israele." 
Joshua8:18 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Tambasula nthungoyo ili m'dzanja lako iloze ku Ai, pakuti ndidzaupereka m'dzanja lako. Ndipo Yoswa anatambasula nthungoyo inali m'dzanja lake kuloza mudzi." 
Joshua8:19 Nauka msanga olalirawo m'mbuto mwao, nathamanga pamene anatambasula dzanja lake, nalowa m'mudzi, naugwira; nafulumira nayatsa mudziwo." 
Joshua8:20 Pamene amuna a ku Ai anacheuka, anapenya, ndipo taonani, utsi wa mudzi unakwera kumwamba; nasowa mphamvu iwo kuthawa chakuno kapena chauko; ndi anthu othawira kuchipululu anatembenukira owapirikitsa." 
Joshua8:21 Ndipo pakupenya Yoswa ndi Israele yense kuti olalirawo adagwira mudzi, ndi kuti utsi wa mudzi unakwera, anabwerera, nawapha amuna a ku Ai." 
Joshua8:22 A kumudzinso anawatulukira; potero anakhala pakati pa Israele, ena mbali ina, ena mbali ina; ndipo anawakantha, mpaka sanatsale kapena kupulumuka wa iwo ndi mmodzi yense." 
Joshua8:23 Koma mfumu ya ku Ai anamgwira wamoyo, nadza naye kwa Yoswa." 
Joshua8:24 Ndipo kunali, atatha Israele kupha nzika zonse za ku Ai, kuthengo, kuchipululu kumene anawapirikitsira, natha onse kugwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa mpaka adathedwa onse, Aisraele onse anabwerera ku Ai, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
Joshua8:25 Ndipo onse amene adagwa tsiku lija, amuna ndi akazi, ndiwo zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri, anthu onse a ku Ai." 
Joshua8:26 Popeza Yoswa sanabweze dzanja lake limene anatambasula nalo nthungo, mpaka ataononga konse nzika zonse za ku Ai." 
Joshua8:27 Koma ng'ombe ndi zofunkha za mudzi uwu Israele anadzifunkhira monga mwa mau a Yehova amene analamulira Yoswa. 
Joshua8:28 Ndipo Yoswa anatentha Ai, nausandutsa muunda ku nthawi yonse, bwinja kufikira lero lino." 
Joshua8:29 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Ai, anampachika pamtengo mpaka madzulo; koma polowa dzuwa Yoswa analamulira kuti atsitse mtembo wake pamtengo; ndipo anauponya polowera pa chipata cha mudzi; naunjikako mulu waukulu wamiyala, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua8:30 Pomwepo Yoswa anamangira Yehova Mulungu wa Israele guwa la nsembe m'phiri la Ebala," 
Joshua8:31 monga Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu adalamulira ana a Israele, monga mulembedwa m'buku la chilamulo cha Mose, guwa la nsembe la miyala yosasema, yoti palibe munthu anakwezapo chitsulo; ndipo anafukizirapo Yehova nsembe zopsereza, naphera nsembe zoyamika." 
Joshua8:32 Ndipo analembapo pa miyalayi chitsanzo cha chilamulo cha Mose, chimene analembera pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
Joshua8:33 Ndipo Aisraele onse, ndi akulu ao, ndi akapitao ao, ndi oweruza ao anaima chakuno ndi chauko cha likasa, pamaso pa ansembe Alevi, akusenza likasa la chipangano la Yehova, mbadwa ndi alendo omwe; ena a iwo pandunji pa phiri la Gerizimu, ndi ena pandunji pa phiri la Ebala; monga Mose, mtumiki wa Yehova, adalamulira poyamba paja kuti adalitse anthu a Israele." 
Joshua8:34 Atatero, anawerenga mau onse a chilamulo, dalitso ndi temberero, monga mwa zonse zolembedwa m'buku la chilamulo." 
Joshua8:35 Panalibe mau amodzi a zonse adazilamulira Mose osawerenga Yoswa pamaso pa msonkhano wonse wa Israele, ndi akazi ndi ang'ono, ndi alendo akuyenda pakati pao." 
Joshua9:1 Ndipo kunali, pakumva ichi mafumu onse a tsidya ilo la Yordani, kumapiri ndi kuchidikha, ndi ku madooko onse a Nyanja Yaikulu, pandunji pa Lebanoni: Ahiti ndi Aamori, Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi;" 
Joshua9:2 anasonkhana kuponyana ndi Yoswa ndi Israele, ndi mtima umodzi." 
Joshua9:3 Koma pamene nzika za Gibiyoni zinamva zimene Yoswa adachitira Yeriko ndi Ai," 
Joshua9:4 zinachita momchenjerera, nizimuka nizioneka ngati mithenga, nizitenga matumba akale pa abulu ao, ndi matumba a vinyo akale ndi ong'ambika ndi omangamanga;" 
Joshua9:5 ndi nsapato zakale za zigamba pa mapazi ao, nizivala nsanza; ndi mikate yonse ya kamba wao inali youma ndi yoyanga nkhungu." 
Joshua9:6 Ndipo zinamuka kwa Yoswa kumisasa ku Giligala, niziti kwa iye ndi kwa amuna a Israele, Tachokera dziko lakutali, chifukwa chake mupangane nafe." 
Joshua9:7 Ndipo amuna a Israele anati kwa Ahivi, Kapena mulimkukhala pakati pa ife, ndipo tipanganenji ndi inu?" 
Joshua9:8 Koma anati kwa Yoswa, Ndife akapolo anu. Pamenepo Yoswa anati kwa iwo, Ndinu ayani? Ndipo mufuma kuti?" 
Joshua9:9 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Akapolo anu afumira dziko la kutalitali, chifukwa cha dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanu; pakuti tidamva mbiri yake, ndi zonse anachita m'Ejipito," 
Joshua9:10 ndi zonse anachitira mafumu awiri a Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordani, Sihoni mfumu ya ku Hesiboni, ndi Ogi mfumu ya ku Basani wokhala ku Asitaroti." 
Joshua9:11 Ndipo akulu athu ndi nzika zonse za m'dziko mwathu zidanena nafe ndi kuti, Mutenge m'dzanja lanu kamba wa paulendo, kakomane naoni, nimunene nao, Ndife akapolo anu; ndipo tsopano mupangane nafe." 
Joshua9:12 Mkate wathu uwu tinadzitengera kamba m'nyumba zathu, ukali wamoto, tsiku lotuluka ife kudza kwanu kuno; koma tsopano, taonani uli wouma ndi woyanga nkhungu;" 
Joshua9:13 ndi matumba a vinyo awa tinawadzaza akali atsopano; ndipo taonani, ang'ambika; ndi malaya athu awa ndi nsapato zathu zatha, chifukwa cha ulendo wochokera kutali ndithu." 
Joshua9:14 Pamenepo amunawo analandirako kamba wao, osafunsira pakamwa pa Yehova." 
Joshua9:15 Ndipo Yoswa anachitirana nao mtendere napangana nao, akhale amoyo; ndi akalonga a msonkhano anawalumbirira." 
Joshua9:16 Ndipo kunali, atatha kupangana nao masiku atatu, anamva kuti ndiwo anansi ao, ndi kuti kwao ndi pakati pao." 
Joshua9:17 Ndipo ana a Israele anayenda ulendo, nafika kumidzi yao tsiku lachitatu. Koma midzi yao ndiyo Gibiyoni, ndi Kefira, ndi Beeroti ndi Kiriyati-Yearimu." 
Joshua9:18 Ndipo ana a Israele sanawakanthe, pakuti akalonga a msonkhano adawalumbirira kwa Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele. Ndipo msonkhano wonse unadandaula pa akalonga." 
Joshua9:19 Koma akalonga onse ananena kwa msonkhano wonse, Tinawalumbirira kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, m'mwemo sitikhoza kuwachitira kanthu." 
Joshua9:20 Tidzawachitira ichi, ndi kuwasunga amoyo; ungatigwere mkwiyo chifukwa cha lumbirolo tidawalumbirira." 
Joshua9:21 Ndipo akalonga ananena nao, Akhale ndi moyo; ndipo anasanduka akutema nkhuni, ndi otungira madzi msonkhano wonse; monga akalonga adanena nao." 
Joshua9:22 Ndipo Yoswa anawaitana, nanena nao, kuti, Mwatinyenga chifukwa ninji, ndi kuti, Tikhala kutalitali ndi inu, pokhala kwanu kuli pakati pa ife?" 
Joshua9:23 Ndipo tsopano mukhale otembereredwa, palibe mmodzi wa inu adzamasuka wosakhala kapolo, ndi kutemera nkhuni, ndi kutungira madzi nyumba ya Mulungu wanga." 
Joshua9:24 Ndipo anamyankha Yoswa nati, Popeza anatiuzitsa akapolo anu kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu analamulira mtumiki wake Mose kukupatsani dziko lonseli, ndi kupasula nzika zonse za m'dziko pamaso panu; potero tinaopera kwambiri moyo wathu pamaso panu, ndipo tinachita chinthuchi." 
Joshua9:25 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, tili m'dzanja lanu; monga muyesa chokoma ndi choyenera kutichitira ife, chitani." 
Joshua9:26 Pamenepo anawachitira chotero, nawalanditsa m'dzanja la ana a Israele, angawaphe." 
Joshua9:27 Ndipo tsiku lija Yoswa anawasandutsa akutema nkhuni, ndi otungira madzi msonkhanowo, ndi guwa la nsembe la Yehova, mpaka lero lino, pamalopo akadzasankha." 
Joshua10:1 Ndipo kunali, pamene Adoni-Zedeki mfumu ya Yerusalemu anamva kuti Yoswa adalanda Ai, ndi kumuononga konse; nachitira Ai ndi mfumu yake monga adachitira Yeriko ndi mfumu yake; ndi kuti nzika za Gibiyoni zinachitirana mtendere ndi Israele, nizikhala pakati pao;" 
Joshua10:2 anaopa kwambiri, popeza Gibiyoni ndi mudzi waukulu, monga wina wa midzi yachifumu, popezanso unaposa Ai kukula kwake, ndi amuna ake onse ndiwo amphamvu." 
Joshua10:3 Chifukwa chake Adoni-Zedeki mfumu ya Yerusalemu anatuma kwa Hohamu, mfumu ya Hebroni, ndi kwa Piramu mfumu ya Yaramuti, ndi kwa Yafiya mfumu ya Lakisi, ndi kwa Debiri mfumu ya Egiloni, ndi kuti," 
Joshua10:4 Kwerani kwanga kuno, ndi kundithandiza kuti tikanthe Gibiyoni, pakuti unachitirana mtendere ndi Yoswa ndi ana a Israele." 
Joshua10:5 Pamenepo mafumu asanu a Aamori, ndiwo mfumu ya ku Yerusalemu, mfumu ya ku Hebroni, mfumu ya ku Yaramuti, mfumu ya ku Lakisi, mfumu ya ku Egiloni anasonkhana, nakwera iwo ndi makamu ao onse namanga misasa pa Gibiyoni, nauthira nkhondo." 
Joshua10:6 Ndipo amuna a ku Gibiyoni anatumira Yoswa mau kuchigono ku Giligala, ndi kuti, Musalekerere akapolo anu; mutikwerere msanga, ndi kutipulumutsa, ndi kutithandiza; pakuti mafumu onse a Aamori, akukhala kumapiri atisonkhanira." 
Joshua10:7 Pamenepo Yoswa anakwera kuchokera ku Giligala, iye ndi anthu onse a nkhondo pamodzi naye, ndi ngwazi zonse." 
Joshua10:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Yoswa, Usawaope, pakuti ndawapereka m'dzanja lako; palibe mmodzi wa iwo adzaima pamaso pako." 
Joshua10:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawadzidzimukitsa; popeza anakwera kuchokera ku Giligala usiku wonse. 
Joshua10:10 Ndipo Yehova anawamwaza pamaso pa Israele, ndipo anawakantha makanthidwe akulu ku Gibiyoni, nawapirikitsa pa njira yokwera pa Betehoroni, nawakantha mpaka Azeka, ndi mpaka Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Ndipo kunali, pakuthawa iwo pamaso pa Israele, potsikira pa Betehoroni, Yehova anawagwetsera miyala yaikulu yochokera kumwamba mpaka pa Azeka, nafa iwo; akufa ndi miyala yamatalala anachuluka ndi iwo amene ana a Israele anawapha ndi lupanga." 
Joshua10:12 Pomwepo Yoswa ananena kwa Yehova tsiku limene Yehova anapereka Aamori pamaso pa ana a Israele; ndipo anati pamaso pa Israele, Dzuwa iwe, linda, pa Gibiyoni, ndi Mwezi iwe, m'chigwa cha Ayaloni." 
Joshua10:13 Ndipo dzuwa linalinda, ndi mwezi unaima mpaka anthu adabwezera chilango adani ao. Kodi ichi sichilembedwa m'buku la Yasara? Ndipo dzuwa linakhala pakati pa thambo, losafulumira kulowa ngati tsiku lamphumphu." 
Joshua10:14 Ndipo panalibe tsiku lotere kale lonse kapena m'tsogolomo, lakuti Yehova anamvera mau a munthu; pakuti Yehova anathirira Israele nkhondo." 
Joshua10:15 Pamenepo Yoswa anabwezera, ndi Aisraele onse pamodzi naye, ku chigono cha ku Giligala." 
Joshua10:16 Ndipo mafumu awa asanu anathawa, nabisala m'phanga la ku Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Ndipo anauza Yoswa ndi kuti, Mafumu asanuwa apezeka obisala m'phanga la ku Makeda." 
Joshua10:18 Ndipo Yoswa anati, Kunkhunizirani miyala yaikulu kukamwa kwa phanga, ndi kuikapo anthu, awasunge;"
