Joshua10:19 koma inu musaime, pirikitsani adani anu, ndi kukantha a m'mbuyo mwao; musawalole alowe m'midzi mwao; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anawapereka m'dzanja lanu." 
Joshua10:20 Ndipo kunali, Yoswa ndi ana a Israele atatha kuwakantha, makanthidwe akulukulu mpaka atatha psiti, ndipo otsala a iwo atalowa m'midzi ya malinga," 
Joshua10:21 anthu onse anabwerera kuchigono kwa Yoswa pa Makeda ndi mtendere. Palibe munthu anachitira chipongwe mmodzi yense wa ana a Israele. 
Joshua10:22 Pamenepo Yoswa anati, Tsegula pakamwa pa phanga ndi kunditulutsira m'phanga mafumu asanuwo." 
Joshua10:23 Ndipo anatero, natulutsira m'phanga mafumu asanuwo, mfumu ya ku Yerusalemu, mfumu ya ku Hebroni, mfumu ya ku Yaramuti, mfumu ya ku Lakisi, mfumu ya ku Egiloni." 
Joshua10:24 Ndipo kunali, atatulutsira Yoswa mafumu awa, Yoswa anaitana amuna onse a Israele, ndipo anati kwa akazembe a anthu a nkhondo amene anamuka naye, Yandikirani, pondani pa makosi a mafumu awa. Nayandikira iwo, naponda pa makosi ao." 
Joshua10:25 Pamenepo Yoswa ananena nao, Musaope, musatenge nkhawa; khalani amphamvu, nimulimbike mtima; pakuti Yehova adzatero ndi adani anu onse amene mugwirana nao nkhondo." 
Joshua10:26 Ndipo atatero, Yoswa anawakantha nawapha, nawapachika pa mitengo isanu; nalikupachikidwa pa mitengo mpaka madzulo." 
Joshua10:27 Ndipo kunali, nthawi yakulowa dzuwa, Yoswa analamulira kuti awatsitse kumitengo; ndipo anawataya m'phanga m'mene adabisala; naika miyala yaikulu pakamwa pa phanga, mpaka lero lomwe lino." 
Joshua10:28 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira Makeda tsiku lomwe lija ndi kuukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi mfumu yake yomwe; anawaononga konse, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense, nachitira mfumu ya ku Makeda monga anachitira mfumu ya ku Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisraele onse naye anapitirira kuchokera ku Makeda kunka ku Libina, nathira nkhondo pa Libina;" 
Joshua10:30 ndipo Yehova anapereka uwunso, ndi mfumu yake m'dzanja la Israele; ndipo anaukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, osasiyamo ndi mmodzi yense; namchitira mfumu yake monga anachitira mfumu ya ku Yeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi Aisraele onse naye, anapitirira kuchokera ku Libina kunka ku Lakisi; namanga misasa, nathira nkhondo pa uwo;" 
Joshua10:32 napereka Yehova Lakisi m'dzanja la Israele, ndipo anaulanda tsiku lachiwiri, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo monga mwa zonse anachitira Libina." 
Joshua10:33 Pamenepo Horamu mfumu ya Gezere anakwera kudzathandiza Lakisi; ndipo Yoswa anamkantha iye ndi anthu ake mpaka sanamsiyire ndi mmodzi yense. 
Joshua10:34 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi Aisraele onse naye, anapitirira kuchokera ku Lakisi mpaka ku Egiloni; namanga misasa, nathira nkhondo." 
Joshua10:35 Naulanda tsiku lomwelo, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nawaononga konse amoyo onse anali m'mwemo tsiku lomwelo, monga mwa zonse anachitira Lakisi." 
Joshua10:36 Ndipo Yoswa ndi Aisraele onse naye anakwera kuchokera ku Egiloni mpaka ku Hebroni, nauthira nkhondo;" 
Joshua10:37 naulanda, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi mfumu yake ndi midzi yake yonse, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense, monga mwa zonse anachitira Egiloni; koma anauononga konse, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo." 
Joshua10:38 Pamenepo Yoswa, ndi Aisraele onse naye, anabwerera kudza ku Debiri, nauthira nkhondo," 
Joshua10:39 naulanda, ndi mfumu yake ndi midzi yake yonse; naikantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, naononga konse amoyo onse anali m'mwemo; sanasiye ndi mmodzi yense; monga anachitira Hebroni momwemo anachitira Debiri ndi mfumu yake, monganso anachitira Libina ndi mfumu yake." 
Joshua10:40 Motero Yoswa anakantha dziko lonse, la kumapiri, la kumwera, la kuchidikha, la kuzigwa, ndi mafumu ao onse; sanasiyepo ndi mmodzi yense; koma anaononga psiti zonse zampweya, monga Yehova Mulungu wa Israele adalamulira." 
Joshua10:41 Ndipo Yoswa anawakantha kuyambira Kadesi-Baranea mpaka ku Gaza, ndi dziko lonse la Goseni mpaka ku Gibiyoni." 
Joshua10:42 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira mafumu awa onse ndi dziko lao nthawi yomweyi; chifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anathirira Israele nkhondo. 
Joshua10:43 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisraele onse naye, anabwerera kuchigono ku Giligala." 
Joshua11:1 Ndipo kunali, pamene Yabini mfumu ya ku Hazori anachimva, anatuma kwa Yobabu mfumu ya ku Madoni, ndi kwa mfumu ya ku Simironi, ndi kwa mfumu ya ku Akisafu," 
Joshua11:2 ndi kwa mafumu akukhala kumpoto kumapiri, ndi kuchigwa kumwera kwa Kineroti, ndi kuchidikha, ndi ku mitunda ya Dori kumadzulo;" 
Joshua11:3 kwa Akanani kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo, ndi kwa Aamori ndi Ahiti, ndi Aperizi ndi Ayebusi kumapiri, ndi kwa Ahivi kunsi kwa Heremoni, m'dziko la Mizipa." 
Joshua11:4 Ndipo anatuluka, iwo ndi makamu ao onse nao, anthu ambiri, kuchuluka kwao ngati mchenga uli m'mphepete mwa nyanja; ndi akavalo ndi magaleta ambirimbiri." 
Joshua11:5 Ndipo mafumu awa onse anasonkhana, nadza namanga pamodzi ku madzi a Meromu, kumthira Israele nkhondo." 
Joshua11:6 Koma Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Usaope chifukwa cha iwowa; pakuti mawa, dzuwa lino ndidzawapereka onse ophedwa pamaso pa Israele; uziwadula mitsindo akavalo ao, ndi kutentha agaleta ao ndi moto." 
Joshua11:7 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi anthu onse a nkhondo naye, anawadzera modzidzimutsa ku madzi a Meromu, nawagwera." 
Joshua11:8 Ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja la Israele, ndipo anawakantha, nawapirikitsa mpaka ku Sidoni waukulu, ndi ku Misirefoti-Maimu, ndi ku chigwa cha Mizipa ku m'mawa; nawakantha mpaka sanawasiyire ndi mmodzi yense." 
Joshua11:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawachitira monga Yehova adamuuza: nadula akavalo ao mitsindo, natentha magaleta ao ndi moto." 
Joshua11:10 Ndipo Yoswa anabwerera m'mbuyo nthawi imeneyi nalanda Hazori nakantha mfumu yake ndi lupanga; pakuti kale Hazori unali waukulu wa maufumu aja onse. 
Joshua11:11 Ndipo anakantha amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi kuwaononga konse, osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense wakupuma mpweya; ndipo anatentha Hazori ndi moto." 
Joshua11:12 Ndipo Yoswa analanda midzi yonse ya mafumu awa, ndi mafumu ao omwe nawakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nawaononga konse; monga Mose mtumiki wa Yehova adalamulira." 
Joshua11:13 Koma midzi yonse yomangidwa pa zitunda zao Israele sanaitenthe, koma wa Hazori wokha; umenewu Yoswa anautentha." 
Joshua11:14 Ndi zofunkha zonse za midzi iyi ndi ng'ombe ana a Israele anadzifunkhira; koma anakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa anthu onse mpaka adawaononga osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense wopuma mpweya. 
Joshua11:15 Monga Yehova adalamulira Mose mtumiki wake, momwemo Mose analamulira Yoswa; momwemonso anachita Yoswa; sanachotsepo mau amodzi pa zonse Yehova adalamulira Mose." 
Joshua11:16 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonselo, la kumapiri, ndi la kumwera, ndi dziko lonse la Goseni, ndi dziko la kuchidikha, ndi la kuchigwa; ndi la kumapiri la Israele, ndi la ku chidikha chake;" 
Joshua11:17 kuyambira phiri la Halaki lokwera kunka ku Seiri, mpaka Baala-Gadi m'chigwa cha Lebanoni patsinde pa phiri la Heremoni; nagwira mafumu ao onse, nawakantha, nawapha." 
Joshua11:18 Yoswa anathira nkhondo mafumu awa onse nthawi yaikulu. 
Joshua11:19 Palibe mudzi wakupangana mtendere ndi ana a Israele, koma Ahivi okhala m'Gibiyoni; anaigwira yonse ndi nkhondo." 
Joshua11:20 Pakuti chidadzera kwa Yehova kulimbitsa mitima yao kuti athirane nao Aisraele nkhondo kuti Iye awaononge konse, kuti asawachitire chifundo koma awaononge, monga Yehova adalamulira Mose." 
Joshua11:21 Ndipo Yoswa anadza nthawi yomweyo, napasula Aanaki kuwachotsa kumapiri, ku Hebroni, ku Debiri, ku Anabu, ndi ku mapiri onse a Yuda, ndi ku mapiri onse a Israele; Yoswa anawaononga konse, ndi midzi yao yomwe." 
Joshua11:22 Panalibe Aanaki otsala m'dziko la ana a Israele; koma m'Gaza ndi m'Gati ndi m'Asidodi anatsalamo ena. 
Joshua11:23 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonse monga mwa zonse Yehova adazinena kwa Mose; ndipo Yoswa analipereka kwa Israele, likhale laolao, fuko lililonse gawo lake. Ndipo dziko linapumula nkhondo." 
Joshua12:1 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene ana a Israele anawakantha, nalanda dziko lao tsidya la Yordani kum'mawa, kuyambira chigwa cha Arinoni, mpaka phiri la Heremoni, ndi chidikha chonse cha kum'mawa;" 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori wokhala m'Hesiboni, wochita ufumu kuyambira ku Aroere ndiwo m'mphepete mwa chigwa cha Arinoni, ndi pakati pa chigwa ndi pa Giliyadi wogawika pakati, kufikira mtsinje wa Yaboki, ndiwo malire a ana a Amoni;" 
Joshua12:3 ndi pachidikha mpaka nyanja ya Kineroti kum'mawa, ndi mpaka nyanja ya kuchidikha, ndiyo Nyanja ya Mchere kum'mawa, njira ya Beteyesimoti; ndi kumwera pansi pa matsikiro a Pisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Nalandanso malire a Ogi mfumu ya Basani wotsala wa Arefaimu, wokhala ku Asitaroti ndi ku Ederei," 
Joshua12:5 nachita ufumu m'phiri la Heremoni, ndi m'Saleka, ndi m'Basani lonse, mpaka malire a Agesuri, ndi a Maakati, ndi Giliyadi wogawika pakati, malire a Sihoni mfumu ya ku Hesiboni." 
Joshua12:6 Mose mtumiki wa Yehova ndi ana a Israele anawakantha; ndi Mose mtumiki wa Yehova analipereka kwa Arubeni, ndi Agadi ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, likhale cholowa chao." 
Joshua12:7 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene Yoswa ndi ana a Israele anawakantha tsidya lija la Yordani kumadzulo, kuyambira Baala-Gadi m'chigwa cha Lebanoni mpaka phiri la Halaki lokwera kunka ku Seiri; ndipo Yoswa analipereka kwa mafuko a Israele, likhale laolao, monga mwa magawo ao;" 
Joshua12:8 kumapiri ndi kuchigwa, ndi kuchidikha, ndi kumatsikiro, ndi kuchipululu, ndi kumwera: Ahiti, Aamori, ndi Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi ndi Ayebusi:" 
Joshua12:9 mfumu ya ku Yeriko, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Ai, ndiwo m'mbali mwa Betele, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:10 mfumu ya ku Yerusalemu, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Hebroni, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:11 mfumu ya ku Yaramuti, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Lakisi, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:12 mfumu ya ku Egiloni, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Gezere, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:13 mfumu ya ku Debiri, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Gederi, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:14 mfumu ya ku Horoma, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Aradi, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:15 mfumu ya ku Libina, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Adulamu, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:16 mfumu ya ku Makeda, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Betele, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:17 mfumu ya ku Tapuwa, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Hefere, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:18 mfumu ya ku Afeki, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Lasaroni, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:19 mfumu ya ku Madoni, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Hazori, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:20 mfumu ya ku Simironi-Meroni, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Akisafu, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:21 mfumu ya ku Taanaki, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Megido, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:22 mfumu ya ku Kedesi, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Yokoneamu ku Karimele, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:23 mfumu ya ku Dori, mpaka ponyamuka pa Dori, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Goimu m'Galileya, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:24 mfumu ya ku Tiriza, imodzi. Mafumu awa onse ndiwo makumi atatu ndi imodzi." 
Joshua13:1 Ndipo Yoswa anakalamba, wa zaka zambiri; ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Wakalamba, wa zaka zambiri, ndipo latsala dziko lalikulukulu, alilandire cholowa chao." 
Joshua13:2 Dziko lotsala ndilo: malire onse a Afilisti, ndi Agesuri onse," 
Joshua13:3 kuyambira Sihori wokhala chakuno cha Ejipito mpaka malire a Ekeroni kumpoto, loyesedwa la Akanani; akalonga asanu a Afilisti, a ku Gaza, ndi a ku Asidodi, a ku Asikeloni, a ku Gati, ndi a ku Ekiro, ndi Avimu;" 
Joshua13:4 kumwera dziko lonse la Akanani, ndi Meara ndiwo wa Asidoni, mpaka ku Afeki, mpaka ku malire a Aamori;" 
Joshua13:5 ndi dziko la Agebala, ndi Lebanoni, lonse kum'mawa, kuyambira Baala-Gadi pa tsinde la phiri la Heremoni, mpaka polowera pake pa Hamati;" 
Joshua13:6 nzika zonse za kumapiri kuyambira Lebanoni, mpaka Misirefoti-Maimu, Asidoni onse; ndidzawainga pamaso pa ana a Israele, koma limeneli uwagawire Aisraele, likhale cholowa chao, monga ndinakulamulira." 
Joshua13:7 Ndipo tsopano uwagawire mafuko asanu ndi anai, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, dziko ili likhale cholowa chao." 
Joshua13:8 Pamodzi ndi iye Arubeni ndi Agadi analandira cholowa chao, chimene Mose adawapatsa tsidya ilo la Yordani kum'mawa, monga Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anawapatsa;" 
Joshua13:9 kuyambira pa Aroere, wokhala m'mphepete mwa chigwa cha Arinoni, ndi mudzi uli pakati pa chigwa, ndi chidikha chonse cha Medeba mpaka ku Diboni;" 
Joshua13:10 ndi midzi yonse ya Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wakuchita ufumu m'Hesiboni, mpaka malire a ana a Amoni;" 
Joshua13:11 ndi Giliyadi, ndi malire a Agesuri, ndi Amaakati, ndi phiri lonse la Heremoni, ndi Basani lonse mpaka ku Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 ufumu wonse wa Ogi m'Basani, wa kuchita ufumu m'Asitaroti, ndi m'Ederei (yemweyo anatsala pa otsala a Arefaimu); pakuti Mose anakantha awa, nawainga." 
Joshua13:13 Koma ana a Israele sanainge Agesuri kapena Amaakati; koma Gesuri, ndi Maakati amakhala pakati pa Israele, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua13:14 Koma fuko la Levi sanalipatse cholowa; nsembe za Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, zochitika ndi moto, ndizo cholowa chake, monga Iye adanena naye." 
Joshua13:15 Ndipo Mose anapatsira fuko la ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua13:16 Malire ao anayambira ku Aroere wokhala m'mphepete mwa chigwa cha Arinoni, ndi mudzi uli pakati pa chigwa ndi chidikha chonse cha ku Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 Hesiboni ndi midzi yake yonse yokhala pachidikha; Diboni, ndi Bamoti-Baala ndi Bete-Baala-Meoni;" 
Joshua13:18 ndi Yahazi ndi Kedemoti, ndi Mefaati;" 
Joshua13:19 ndi Kiriyataimu, ndi Sibima, ndi Zeretisahara, m'phiri la kuchigwa;" 
Joshua13:20 ndi Betepeori, ndi matsikiro a Pisiga, ndi Beteyesimoti;" 
Joshua13:21 ndi midzi yonse ya kuchidikha, ndi ufumu wonse wa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wochita ufumu m'Hesiboni, amene Mose anamkantha pamodzi ndi akalonga a Midiyani, Evi, ndi Rekemu, ndi Zuri, ndi Huri ndi Reba, akalonga a Sihoni, nzika za m'dziko." 
Joshua13:22 Ana a Israele anaphanso ndi lupanga Balamu mwana wa Beori, mlauli uja, pamodzi ndi ena adawaphawo." 
Joshua13:23 Ndipo malire a ana a Rubeni ndiwo Yordani ndi malire ake. Ndicho cholandira cha ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi yake ndi milaga yake." 
Joshua13:24 Ndipo Mose anapatsira fuko la Gadi, ana a Gadi, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua13:25 Ndipo malire ao ndiwo Yazere, ndi midzi yonse ya Giliyadi, ndi dziko la ana a Amoni logawika pakati, mpaka ku Aroere, wokhala chakuno cha Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 ndi kuyambira Hesiboni mpaka Ramati-Mizipe, ndi Betonimu; ndi kuyambira Mahanaimu mpaka malire a Debiri;" 
Joshua13:27 ndipo m'chigwa Beteharamu, ndi Betenimura, ndi Sukoti, ndi Zafoni, chotsala cha ufumu wa Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, Yordani ndi malire ake, mpaka malekezero a nyanja ya Kinereti, tsidya lija la Yordani kum'mawa." 
Joshua13:28 Ichi ndi cholowa cha ana a Gadi, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi yake ndi milaga yake." 
Joshua13:29 Mose anaperekanso cholowa kwa fuko la Manase logawika pakati, ndicho cha fuko la Manase logawika pakati monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua13:30 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Mahanaimu, Basani lonse, ufumu wonse wa Ogi mfumu ya ku Basani, ndi midzi yonse ya Yairi, yokhala m'Basani, midzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi;" 
Joshua13:31 ndi Giliyadi logawika pakati, ndi Asitaroti ndi Ederei, midzi ya ufumu wa Ogi m'Basani, inali ya ana a Makiri mwana wa Manase, ndiwo ana a Makiri ogawika pakati, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua13:32 Izi ndi zolowazi Mose anazigawira m'zidikha za Mowabu, tsidya ilo la Yordani ku Yeriko, kum'mawa." 
Joshua13:33 Koma fuko la Levi, Mose analibe kulipatsa cholowa: Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, ndiye cholowa chao, monga ananena nao." 
Joshua14:1 Ndipo awa ndi maiko ana a Israele anawalanda m'dziko la Kanani, amene Eleazara wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi akulu a nyumba za atate a mafuko a ana a Israele, anawagawira." 
Joshua14:2 Kulandira kwao kunachitika ndi kulota maere, monga Yehova adalamulira mwa dzanja la Mose, kunena za mafuko asanu ndi anai ndi fuko logawika pakati." 
Joshua14:3 Pakuti Mose adapatsa mafuko awiri, ndi fuko logawika pakati, cholowa tsidya ilo la Yordani; koma sanapatse Alevi cholowa pakati pao." 
Joshua14:4 Pakuti ana a Yosefe ndiwo mafuko awiri, Manase ndi Efuremu; ndipo sanawagawire Alevi kanthu m'dziko, koma midzi yokhalamo ndi dziko lozungulirako likhale la zoweta zao ndi chuma chao." 
Joshua14:5 Monga Yehova analamulira Mose, momwemo ana a Israele anachita, nagawana dziko." 
Joshua14:6 Pamenepo ana a Yuda anadza kwa Yoswa ku Giligala; ndi Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkenizi ananena naye, Mudziwa chimene Yehova adanena kwa Mose munthu wa Mulungu za ine ndi za inu m'Kadesi-Baranea." 
Joshua14:7 Ndinali ine wa zaka makumi anai muja Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anandituma kuchokera ku Kadesi-Baranea, kukazonda dziko; ndipo ndinambwezera mau, monga momwe anakhala mumtima mwanga." 
Joshua14:8 Koma abale anga amene anakwera nane anasungunutsa mitima ya anthu; koma ine ndinamtsata Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi mtima wanga wonse. 
Joshua14:9 Ndipo Mose analumbira tsiku lomwelo ndi kuti, Zedi, dzikoli phazi lako lapondapo lidzakhala cholowa chako, ndi cha ana ako kosalekeza, chifukwa unatsata Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi mtima wonse." 
Joshua14:10 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, Yehova anandisunga ndi moyo, monga ananena, zaka izi makumi anai ndi zisanu kuyambira nthawi ija Yehova ananena kwa Mose mau awa, poyenda Israele m'chipululu; ndipo tsopano taonani, ndine wa zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu, kudza zisanu lero lino." 
Joshua14:11 Koma lero lino ndili wamphamvu monga tsiku lija anandituma Mose; monga mphamvu yanga pamene paja, momwemo mphamvu yanga tsopano, kugwira nkhondo, ndi kutuluka ndi kulowa." 
Joshua14:12 Ndipo tsopano, ndipatseni phiri ili limene Yehova ananenera tsiku lija; pakuti udamva tsiku lijalo kuti Aanaki anali komweko, ndi midzi yaikulu ndi yamalinga; kapena Yehova adzakhala ndi ine, kuti ndiwaingitse monga ananena Yehova." 
Joshua14:13 Pamenepo Yoswa anamdalitsa, napatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Hebroni likhale cholowa chake." 
Joshua14:14 Chifukwa chake Hebroni likhala cholowa chake cha Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkenizi mpaka lero lino; popeza anatsata Yehova Mulungu wa Israele ndi mtima wonse. 
Joshua14:15 Koma kale dzina la Hebroni linali mudzi wa Araba, ndiye munthu wamkulu pakati pa Aanaki. Ndipo dziko linapumula nkhondo." 
Joshua15:1 Ndipo gawo la fuko la ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao linafikira malire a Edomu, ku chipululu cha Zini kumwera, ku malekezero a kumwera." 
Joshua15:2 Ndi malire ao a kumwera, anayambira ku malekezero a Nyanja ya Mchere, ku nyondo yoloza kumwera;" 
Joshua15:3 natuluka kumwera kwa chikweza cha Akarabimu, napitirira ku Zini, nakwera kumwera kwa Kadesi-Baranea, napitirira ku Hezironi, nakwera ku Adara, nazungulira ku Karika;" 
Joshua15:4 napitirira ku Azimoni, natuluka ku mtsinje wa Ejipito; ndi malekezero a malirewa anali ku Nyanja Yaikulu; awa ndi malire anu a kumwera." 
Joshua15:5 Ndi malire a kum'mawa ndiwo Nyanja ya Mchere, mpaka mathiriro ake a Yordani. Ndi malire a kumpoto anayambira nyondo ya nyanja ku mathiriro a Yordani;" 
Joshua15:6 nakwera malire kunka ku Betehogila, napitirira kumpoto kwa Betaraba; nakwera malire kunka ku mwala wa Bohani mwana wa Rubeni;" 
Joshua15:7 nakwera malire kunka ku Debiri, kuchokera ku chigwa cha Akori, ndi kumpoto kupenyera Giligala ndiko kundunji kwa chikweza cha Adumimu, ndiko kumwera kwa mtsinje; napitirira malire kunka ku madzi a Enisemesi, ndi matulukiro ake anali ku Enirogele;" 
Joshua15:8 nakwera malire kunka ku chigwa cha mwana wa Hinomu, kumbali kwa Ayebusi, kumwera, ndiko Yerusalemu; nakwera malire kunka kumwamba kwa phiri lokhala patsogolo pa chigwa cha Hinomu kumadzulo, ndilo ku mathero ake a chigwa cha Refaimu kumpoto." 
Joshua15:9 Ndipo analemba malire kuyambira pamwamba pa phiri mpaka chitsime cha madzi cha Nefitowa, natulukira malire kumidzi ya phiri la Efuroni; ndipo analemba malire kunka ku Baala, ndiwo Kiriyati-Yearimu." 
Joshua15:10 Ndipo malire anazungulira kuyambira ku Baala kunka kumadzulo, kuphiri la Seiri, napitirira kumbali kwa phiri la Yearimu kumpoto, ndilo Kesaloni, natsikira ku Betesemesi, napitirira ku Timna;" 
Joshua15:11 natuluka malire kunka ku mbali ya Ekeroni kumpoto; ndipo analemba malire kunka ku Sikeroni, napitirira kuphiri la Baala, natuluka ku Yabinele; ndipo matulukiro a malire anali kunyanja." 
Joshua15:12 Ndi malire a kumadzulo anali ku Nyanja Yaikulu ndiwo malire ake. Awa ndi malire a ana a Yuda pozungulira monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua15:13 Koma Yoswa anampatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune gawo mwa ana a Yuda, monga Yehova adamlamulira, ndiwo mudzi wa Araba, ndiye atate wa Anaki, ndiwo Hebroni." 
Joshua15:14 Ndipo Kalebe anaingitsako ana amuna atatu a Anaki, ndiwo Sesai, ndi Ahimani, ndi Talimai, ana a Anaki." 
Joshua15:15 Nakwera komweko kunka kwa nzika za Debiri; koma kale dzina la Debiri ndilo Kiriyati-Sefere. 
Joshua15:16 Ndipo Kalebe anati, Iye amene akantha Kiriyati-Sefere, naulanda, yemweyo ndidzampatsa Akisa mwana wanga akhale mkazi wake." 
Joshua15:17 Ndipo Otiniyele mwana wa Kenazi, mbale wake wa Kalebe, anaulanda; ndipo anampatsa Akisa mwana wake akhale mkazi wake." 
Joshua15:18 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anamdzera, anamkangamiza mwamuna wake kuti apemphe atate wake ampatse munda; ndipo anatsika pa bulu; pamenepo Kalebe ananena naye, Ufunanji?" 
Joshua15:19 Nati iye, Mundipatse dalitso; popeza mwandipatsa dziko la kumwera, ndipatseninso zitsime za madzi. Pamenepo anampatsa zitsime za kumtunda, ndi zitsime za kunsi." 
Joshua15:20 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua15:21 Ndipo midzi ya ku malekezero a fuko la ana a Yuda ku malire a Edomu, kumwera ndiwo, Kabizeeli ndi Edere, ndi Yaguru;" 
Joshua15:22 ndi Kina ndi Dimona, ndi Adada;" 
Joshua15:23 ndi Kedesi, ndi Hazori, ndi Itinani;" 
Joshua15:24 Zifi ndi Telemu ndi Bealoti; 
Joshua15:25 ndi Hazori-Hadata, ndi Keriyoti-Hezironi, ndiwo Hazori;" 
Joshua15:26 Amama ndi Sema ndi Molada; 
Joshua15:27 ndi Hazara-Gada, ndi Hesimoni, ndi Betepeleti;" 
Joshua15:28 ndi Hazara-Suwala, ndi Beereseba, ndi Biziyotiya;" 
Joshua15:29 Baala, ndi Iyimu, ndi Ezemu;" 
Joshua15:30 ndi Elitoladi, ndi Kesili ndi Horoma;" 
Joshua15:31 ndi Zikilagi, ndi Madimana ndi Sanisana;" 
Joshua15:32 ndi Lebaoti, ndi Silihimu, ndi Aini ndi Rimoni; midzi yonse ndiyo makumi awiri kudza isanu ndi inai; pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:33 Ku chigwa, Esitaoli, ndi Zora ndi Asina;" 
Joshua15:34 ndi Zanowa, ndi Enganimu, Tapuwa, ndi Enamu;" 
Joshua15:35 Yaramuti, ndi Adulamu, Soko, ndi Azeka;" 
Joshua15:36 ndi Saaraimu, ndi Aditaimu, ndi Gedera, ndi Gederotaimu; midzi khumi ndi inai pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:37 Zenani, ndi Hadasa, ndi Megidali-Gadi;" 
Joshua15:38 ndi Dileani, ndi Mizipa, ndi Yokotele;" 
Joshua15:39 Lakisi ndi Bozikati ndi Egiloni; 
Joshua15:40 ndi Kaboni, ndi Lahamasi, ndi Kitilisi;" 
Joshua15:41 ndi Gederoti, Betedagoni, ndi Naama, ndi Makeda; midzi khumi ndi isanu ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:42 Libina ndi Eteri ndi Asani; 
Joshua15:43 ndi Ifuta ndi Asina ndi Nezibu; 
Joshua15:44 ndi Keila ndi Akizibu, ndi Maresa; midzi isanu ndi inai pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:45 Ekeroni pamodzi ndi midzi yake ndi milaga yao; 
Joshua15:46 kuyambira ku Ekeroni mpaka kunyanja, yonse ya ku mbali ya Asidodi, pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:47 Asidodi, midzi yake ndi milaga yake; Gaza, midzi yake ndi milaga yake; mpaka mtsinje wa Ejipito, ndi Nyanja Yaikulu ndi malire ake." 
Joshua15:48 Ndi kumapiri Samiri, ndi Yatiri, ndi Soko;" 
Joshua15:49 ndi Dana, ndi Kiriyati-Sana, ndiwo Debiri;" 
Joshua15:50 ndi Anabu, ndi Esitemowa, ndi Animu;" 
Joshua15:51 ndi Goseni, ndi Holoni, ndi Gilo; midzi khumi ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:52 Arabu, ndi Duma, ndi Esani;" 
Joshua15:53 ndi Yanimu, ndi Betetapuwa, ndi Afeka;" 
Joshua15:54 ndi Humata, ndi Kiriyati-Ariba, ndiwo Hebroni, ndi Ziyori; midzi isanu ndi inai pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:55 Maoni, Karimele, ndi Zifi, ndi Yuta;" 
Joshua15:56 ndi Yezireele, ndi Yokodeamu, ndi Zanowa;" 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Gibea ndi Timna; midzi khumi pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:58 Halahulu, Betezuri, ndi Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 ndi Maarati, ndi Betanoti, ndi Elitekoni; midzi isanu ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriyati-Baala, ndiwo Kiriyati-Yearimu ndi Raba; midzi iwiri pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:61 M'chipululu, Betaraba, Midini, ndi Sekaka;" 
Joshua15:62 ndi Nibisani, ndi Mudzi wa Mchere, ndi Engedi; midzi isanu ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua15:63 Koma ana a Yuda sanakhoze kuingitsa Ayebusi, nzika za Yerusalemu: m'mwemo Ayebusi anakhala pamodzi ndi ana a Yuda, ku Yerusalemu, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua16:1 Ndipo gawo la ana a Yosefe linatuluka kuchokera ku Yordani ku Yeriko, ku madzi a Yeriko kum'mawa, kuchipululu, nakwera kuchokera ku Yeriko kunka kumapiri ku Betele;" 
Joshua16:2 natuluka ku Betele kunka ku Luzi, napitirira kunka ku malire a Aariki, ku Ataroti;" 
Joshua16:3 natsikira kumadzulo kunka ku malire a Ayafileti, ku malire a Betehoroni wa kunsi, ndi ku Gezere; ndi matulukiro ake anali kunyanja." 
Joshua16:4 Motero ana a Yosefe, Manase ndi Efuremu analandira cholowa chao," 
Joshua16:5 Ndipo malire a ana a Efuremu, monga mwa mabanja ao, ndiwo: malire a cholowa chao kum'mawa ndiwo Ataroti-Adara, mpaka Betehoroni wa kumtunda;" 
Joshua16:6 natuluka malire kumadzulo ku Mikametati kumpoto; nazungulira malire kum'mawa kunka ku Taanatisilo, naupitirira kum'mawa kwake kwa Yanowa:" 
Joshua16:7 natsika kuchokera ku Yanowa, kunka ku Ataroti, ndi ku Naara, nafika ku Yeriko, natuluka ku Yordani." 
Joshua16:8 Kuyambira ku Tapuwa malire anamuka kumadzulo ku mtsinje wa Kana; ndi matulukiro ake anali kunyanja. Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Efuremu monga mwa mabanja ao; 
Joshua16:9 pamodzi ndi midzi adaipatulira ana a Efuremu pakati pa cholowa cha ana a Manase, midzi yonse pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua16:10 Ndipo sanaingitse Akanani akukhala m'Gezere; koma Akanani anakhala pakati pa Efuremu, kufikira lero lino, nawaumiriza kugwira ntchito yathangata." 
Joshua17:1 Gawo la fuko la Manase ndi ili: pakuti anali woyamba wa Yosefe. Makiri mwana woyamba wa Manase, atate wa Giliyadi, popeza ndiye munthu wa nkhondo, anakhala nayo Giliyadi ndi Basani." 
Joshua17:2 Ndipo maere anagwera ana ena otsala a Manase monga mwa mabanja ao; ana a Abiyezere ndi ana a Heleki, ndi ana a Asiriele, ndi ana a Sekemu ndi ana a Hefere, ndi ana a Semida; awa ndi ana amuna a Manase mwana wa Yosefe, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua17:3 Koma Zelofehadi, mwana wa Hefere, mwana wa Giliyadi, mwana wa Makiri, mwana wa Manase, analibe ana amuna koma ana akazi ndiwo; ndipo maina a ana ake akazi ndiwo: Mala, ndi Nowa, Hogila, Milika ndi Tiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Ndipo anayandikira pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, ndi pamaso pa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi pamaso pa akalonga, ndi kuti, Yehova analamulira Mose atipatse cholowa pakati pa abale athu; chifukwa chake anawapatsa monga mwa lamulo la Yehova, cholowa pakati pa abale a atate wao." 
Joshua17:5 Ndipo anamgwera Manase magawo khumi, osawerenga dziko la Giliyadi ndi Basani lokhala tsidya lija la Yordani:" 
Joshua17:6 popeza ana akazi a Manase adalandira cholowa pakati pa ana ake amuna; ndi dziko la Giliyadi linakhala la ana a Manase otsala. 
Joshua17:7 Ndipo malire a Manase anayambira ku Asere, kunka ku Mikametati, wokhala chakuno cha Sekemu; namuka malire ku dzanja lamanja kwa nzika za Enitapuwa." 
Joshua17:8 Dziko la Tapuwa linali la Manase; koma Tapuwa mpaka malire a Manase linakhala la ana a Efuremu. 
Joshua17:9 Natsikira malire ku mtsinje wa Kana, kumwera kwa mtsinje; midzi iyi inakhala ya Efuremu pakati pa midzi ya Manase; ndi malire a Manase anali kumpoto kwa mtsinje; ndi matulukiro ake anali kunyanja;" 
Joshua17:10 kumwera nkwa Efuremu ndi kumpoto nkwa Manase, ndi malire ake ndi nyanja; ndi kumpoto anakomana ndi Asere, ndi kum'mawa anakomana ndi Isakara." 
Joshua17:11 Ndipo m'Isakara ndi m'Asere Manase anali nao Beteseani ndi midzi yake, ndi Ibleamu ndi midzi yake, ndi nzika za Dori ndi midzi yake, ndi nzika za Endori ndi midzi yake, ndi nzika za Taanaki ndi midzi yake, ndi nzika za Megido ndi midzi yake; dziko la mapiri atatu." 
Joshua17:12 Koma ana a Manase sanathe kuingitsa a m'midzi aja, popeza Akanani anafuna kukhala m'dziko lija." 
Joshua17:13 Ndipo kunali pamene ana a Israele atakula mphamvu anasonkhetsa Akanani osawaingitsa onse. 
Joshua17:14 Pamenepo ana a Yosefe ananena ndi Yoswa, ndi kuti, Watipatsiranji cholowa chathu chamaere chimodzi ndi gawo limodzi, popeza ife ndife anthu aunyinji, pakuti Yehova anatidalitsa ndi pano pomwe?" 
Joshua17:15 Ndipo Yoswa ananena nao, Ngati muli anthu aunyinji, kwerani kuli mitengoko, ndi kudziswera minda m'dziko la Aperizi ndi la Arefaimu; akakucheperani malo kuphiri la Efuremu." 
Joshua17:16 Ndipo ana a Yosefe anati, Ku phiriko sikudzatifikira; ndipo Akanani onse akukhala m'dziko la chigwa ali nao magaleta achitsulo, iwo akukhala m'Beteseani, ndi midzi yake ndi iwo omwe akukhala m'chigwa cha Yezireele." 
Joshua17:17 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe, kwa Efuremu ndi Manase, ndi kuti, Inu ndinu anthu aunyinji, muli nayo mphamvu yaikulu; simudzakhala nalo gawo limodzi lokha;" 
Joshua17:18 koma kuphiriko kudzakhala kwanu pakuti pangakhale mpa mitengo, mudzisweretu minda, ndi matulukiro ake adzakhala anu; pakuti mudzaingitsa Akanani angakhale ali nao magaleta achitsulo, angakhale ali amphamvu." 
Joshua18:1 Ndipo msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israele unasonkhana ku Silo, nuutsa komweko chihema chokomanako; ndipo dziko linawagonjera." 
Joshua18:2 Ndipo anatsala mwa ana a Israele mafuko asanu ndi awiri osawagawira cholowa chao. 
Joshua18:3 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ana a Israele, Muchedwa mpaka liti kulowa ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu anakupatsani?" 
Joshua18:4 Mudzifunire amuna, fuko lililonse amuna atatu; kuti ndiwatume, anyamuke, nayendeyende iwo pakati pa dziko, nalilembe monga mwa cholowa chao; nabwerenso kwa ine." 
Joshua18:5 Ndipo adzaligawa magawo asanu ndi awiri; Yuda adzakhala m'malire ake kumwera, ndi a m'nyumba ya Yosefe adzakhala m'malire mwao kumpoto." 
Joshua18:6 Ndipo muzilemba dziko likhale magawo asanu ndi awiri, ndi kubwera nao kuno kwa ine malembo ake; ndipo ndidzakuloterani maere pano pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Joshua18:7 Pakuti Alevi alibe gawo pakati pa inu; pakuti unsembe wa Yehova ndiwo cholowa chao. Koma Gadi, ndi Rubeni, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati adalandira cholowa chao tsidya lija la Yordani kum'mawa, chimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova adawapatsa." 
Joshua18:8 Ndipo amunawo ananyamuka, namuka; ndipo Yoswa analamulira opita kulemba dzikowo, ndi kuti, Mukani, muyendeyende pakati pa dziko, ndi kulilemba, nimubwerenso kwa ine, ndipo ndidzakuloterani maere pano pamaso pa Yehova pa Silo." 
Joshua18:9 Namuka amunawo, napitapita pakati pa dziko, nalilemba m'buku, nayesa midzi yake, magawo asanu, nabwera kwa Yoswa ku chigono ku Silo." 
Joshua18:10 Ndipo Yoswa anawalotera maere ku Silo pamaso pa Yehova; ndi apo Yoswa anawagawira ana a Israele dziko, monga mwa magawo ao." 
Joshua18:11 Ndipo maere a fuko la ana a Benjamini anakwera monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a gawo lao anatuluka pakati pa ana a Yuda ndi ana a Yosefe. 
Joshua18:12 Ndipo malire ao a kumpoto anachokera ku Yordani; ndi malire anakwera ku mbali ya Yeriko kumpoto, nakwera pakati pa mapiri kumadzulo; ndi matulukiro ake anali ku chipululu cha Betaveni." 
Joshua18:13 Ndipo malire anapitirirapo kunka ku Luzi, ku mbali ya Luzi, momwemo ndi Betele, kumwera; ndi malire anatsikira kunka ku Ataroti-Adara, kuphiri lokhala kumwera kwa Betehoroni wa kunsi." 
Joshua18:14 Ndipo malire analembedwa nazungulira ku mbali ya kumadzulo kunka kumwera, kuchokera kuphiri pokhala patsogolo pa Betehoroni, kumwera kwake; ndi matulukiro ake anali ku Kiriyati-Baala, womwewo ndi Kiriyati-Yearimu, mudzi wa ana a Yuda; ndiyo mbali ya kumadzulo." 
Joshua18:15 Ndipo mbali ya kumwera inayambira polekezera Kiriyati-Yearimu; natuluka malire kunka kumadzulo, natuluka kunka ku chitsime cha madzi a Nefitowa;" 
Joshua18:16 natsikira malire kunka polekezera phiri lokhala patsogolo pa chigwa cha mwana wa Hinomu, ndicho cha m'chigwa cha Refaimu kumpoto; natsikira ku chigwa cha Hinomu, ku mbali ya Ayebusi kumwera, natsikira ku Enirogele;" 
Joshua18:17 nalembedwa kunka kumpoto, natuluka ku Enisemesi, natuluka ku Geliloti, ndiwo pandunji pokwerera pa Adumimu; natsikira ku mwala wa Bohani mwana wa Rubeni;" 
Joshua18:18 napitirira ku mbali ya pandunji pa Betaraba kumpoto, natsirika kunka ku Araba;" 
Joshua18:19 napitirira malire kunka ku mbali ya Betehogila kumpoto; ndi matulukiro ake a malire anali ku nyondo ya kumpoto ya Nyanja ya Mchere; pa kulekezera kwa kumwera kwa Yordani; ndiwo malire a kumwera. 
Joshua18:20 Ndipo malire ake mbali ya kum'mawa ndiwo Yordani, ndicho cholowa cha ana a Benjamini, kunena za malire ake pozungulira pake, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua18:21 Koma midzi ya fuko la ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo Yeriko, ndi Betehogila, ndi Emekezizi;" 
Joshua18:22 ndi Betaraba, ndi Zemaraimu, ndi Betele;" 
Joshua18:23 ndi Avimu ndi Para, ndi Ofura;" 
Joshua18:24 ndi Kefaramoni, ndi Ofini, ndi Geba; midzi khumi ndi iwiri pamodzi ndi milaga yao;" 
Joshua18:25 Gibiyoni ndi Rama, ndi Beeroti;" 
Joshua18:26 ndi Mizipa, ndi Kefira, ndi Moza;" 
Joshua18:27 ndi Rekemu, ndi Iripele ndi Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 ndi Zela, Haelefe, ndi Yebusi, womwewo ndi Yerusalemu, Gibea ndi Kiriyati-Yearimu; midzi khumi ndi inai pamodzi ndi milaga yake. Ndicho cholowa cha ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:1 Ndipo maere achiwiri anamtulukira Simeoni, fuko la ana a Simeoni monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi cholowa chao chinali pakati pa cholowa cha ana a Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Ndipo anali nacho cholowa chao Beereseba, kapena Sheba, ndi Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 ndi Hazara-Suwala, ndi Bala, ndi Ezemu;" 
Joshua19:4 ndi Elitoladi, ndi Betuli, ndi Horoma;" 
Joshua19:5 ndi Zikilagi, ndi Betemara-Kaboti, ndi Hazara-Susa:" 
Joshua19:6 ndi Betelebaoti, ndi Saruheni; midzi khumi ndi itatu ndi milaga yao;" 
Joshua19:7 Aini, Rimoni ndi Eteri ndi Asani; midzi inai ndi milaga yao;" 
Joshua19:8 ndi milaga yonse yozungulira midzi iyi mpaka Baalati-Bere ndiwo Rama kumwera. Ndicho cholowa cha fuko la ana a Simeoni, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:9 M'gawo la ana a Yuda muli cholowa cha ana a Simeoni; popeza gawo la ana a Yuda linawachulukira; chifukwa chake ana a Simeoni anali nacho cholowa pakati pa cholowa chao. 
Joshua19:10 Ndipo maere achitatu anakwerera ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a cholowa chao anafikira ku Saridi; 
Joshua19:11 nakwera malire ao kunka kumadzulo ndi ku Mareyala nafikira ku Dabeseti, nafikira ku mtsinje wa patsogolo pa Yokoneamu;" 
Joshua19:12 ndi kuchokera ku Saridi anazungulira kunka kum'mawa kumatulukira dzuwa, mpaka malire a Kisiloti-Tabori; natuluka kunka ku Daberati, nakwera ku Yafiya;" 
Joshua19:13 ndi pochoka pamenepo anapitirira kunka kum'mawa ku Gatihefere, ku Etikazini; natuluka ku Rimoni umene ulembedwa mpaka ku Neya," 
Joshua19:14 nauzungulira malire kumpoto, kunka ku Hanatoni; ndi matulukiro ake anali ku chigwa cha Ifutahele;" 
Joshua19:15 ndi Katati, ndi Nahalala ndi Simironi, ndi Idala ndi Betelehemu: midzi khumi ndi iwiri ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:16 Ichi ndi cholowa cha ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi iyi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:17 Maere achinai anamtulukira Isakara, kunena za ana a Isakara monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:18 Ndi malire ao anali ku Yezireele, ndi Kesuloti, ndi Sunemu;" 
Joshua19:19 ndi Hafaraimu, ndi Siyoni, ndi Anaharati;" 
Joshua19:20 ndi Rabiti ndi Kisiyoni, ndi Ebezi;" 
Joshua19:21 ndi Remeti ndi Enganimu ndi Enihada, ndi Betepazezi;" 
Joshua19:22 ndi malire anafikira ku Tabori, ndi Sahazuma, ndi Betesemesi; ndi matulukiro a malire ao anali ku Yordani; midzi khumi ndi isanu ndi umodzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:23 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Isakara, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:24 Ndipo maere achisanu analitulukira fuko la ana a Asere monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua19:25 Ndi malire ao ndiwo Helekati, ndi Hali, ndi Beteni ndi Akisafu;" 
Joshua19:26 ndi Alamumeleki, ndi Amada, ndi Misala; nafikira ku Karimele kumadzulo ndi ku Sihori-Libinati;" 
Joshua19:27 nazungulira kotulukira dzuwa ku Betedagoni, nafikira ku Zebuloni ndi ku chigwa cha Ifutahele, kumpoto ku Betemeke, ndi Neiyeli; natulukira ku Kabulu kulamanzere," 
Joshua19:28 ndi Ebroni, ndi Rehobu, ndi Hamoni, ndi Kana, mpaka ku Sidoni wamkulu;" 
Joshua19:29 nazungulira malire kunka ku Rama, ndi kumudzi wa linga la Tiro; nazungulira malire kunka ku Hosa; ndi matulukiro ake anali kunyanja, kuchokera ku Mahalabu mpaka ku Akizibu;" 
Joshua19:30 Uma womwe ndi Afeki, ndi Rehobu; midzi makumi awiri mphambu iwiri ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:31 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Asere monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi iyi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:32 Maere achisanu ndi chimodzi anatulukira ana a Nafutali, ana a Nafutali monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:33 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Helefe ku thundu wa ku Zaananimu, ndi Adami-Nekebu, ndi Yabinele, mpaka ku Lakumu; ndi matulukiro ake anali ku Yordani;" 
Joshua19:34 nazungulira malire kunka kumadzulo ku Azinoti-Tabori, natulukira komweko kunka ku Hukoku; nafikira ku Zebuloni kumwera, nafikira ku Asere kumadzulo, ndi ku Yuda pa Yordani kum'mawa." 
Joshua19:35 Ndipo midzi yamalinga ndiyo Zidimu, Zeri, ndi Hamati, Rakati, ndi Kinereti;" 
Joshua19:36 ndi Adama, ndi Rama, ndi Hazori;" 
Joshua19:37 ndi Kedesi, ndi Ederei, ndi Enihazori;" 
Joshua19:38 ndi Yironi, ndi Migidalele, Horemu, ndi Betanati, ndi Betesemesi; midzi khumi ndi isanu ndi inai, ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:39 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Nafutali, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:40 Maere achisanu ndi chiwiri anatulukira fuko la ana a Dani, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:41 Ndipo malire a cholowa chao anali Zora, ndi Esitaoli, ndi Irisemesi;" 
Joshua19:42 Saalabini, ndi Ayaloni ndi Itila;" 
Joshua19:43 ndi Eloni ndi Timna ndi Ekeroni; 
Joshua19:44 ndi Eliteke, ndi Gibetoni, ndi Baalati;" 
Joshua19:45 ndi Yehudi, ndi Beneberaki, ndi Gatirimoni;" 
Joshua19:46 ndi Meyarikoni, ndi Rakoni, ndi malire pandunji pa Yopa." 
Joshua19:47 Koma malire a ana a Dani anatuluka kupitirira iwowa; pakuti ana a Dani anakwera nathira nkhondo ku Lesemu, naulanda naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, naulandira, nakhala m'mwemo, nautcha Lesemu, Dani; ndilo dzina la Dani atate wao." 
Joshua19:48 Ichi ndi cholowa cha fuko la ana a Dani, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi iyi ndi milaga yao." 
Joshua19:49 Ndipo atatha kuligawa dziko likhale cholowa chao monga mwa malire ake, ana a Israele anapatsa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni cholowa pakati pao;" 
Joshua19:50 monga mwa lamulo la Yehova anampatsa mudzi umene anawapempha, ndiwo Timnati-Sera, ku mapiri a Efuremu; ndipo anamanga mudziwo nakhala m'mwemo." 
Joshua19:51 Izi ndizo zolowa anazigawa Eleazara wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi akulu a nyumba za atate a mafuko a ana a Israele, zikhale zaozao, ndi kulota maere ku Silo pamaso pa Yehova ku khomo la chihema chokomanako. Momwemo anatha kuligawa dziko." 
Joshua20:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa," 
Joshua20:2 Nena ndi ana a Israele ndi kuti, Mudziikire midzi yopulumukirako, monga ndinanena kwa inu mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Joshua20:3 Kuti athawireko wakupha munthu osamupha dala, osadziwa; ndipo idzakhalire inu yopulumukirako, kumpulumuka wolipsa mwazi." 
Joshua20:4 Munthu akathawira umodzi wa midzi iyi, aziima polowera pa chipata cha mudziwo, nafotokozere mlandu wake m'makutu a akulu a mudziwo; pamenepo azimlandira kumudzi kwao, ndi kumpatsa malo, kuti akhale pakati pao." 
Joshua20:5 Ndipo akamlondola wolipsa mwazi, asampereke m'dzanja lake wakupha mnzakeyo; pakuti anakantha mnansi wake mosadziwa, osamuda kale." 
Joshua20:6 Ndipo azikhala m'mudzimo mpaka adzaima pamaso pa msonkhano anene mlandu wake, mpaka atafa mkulu wa ansembe wa m'masiku omwewo; pamenepo wakupha mnzake azibwerera ndi kufika kumudzi kwake, ndi nyumba yake, kumudzi kumene adathawako." 
Joshua20:7 Ndipo anapatula Kedesi m'Galileya ku mapiri a Nafutali, ndi Sekemu ku mapiri a Efuremu, ndi mudzi wa Ariba ndiwo Hebroni ku mapiri a Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Ndipo tsidya lija la Yordani kum'mawa kwa Yeriko, anaika Bezeri m'chipululu, kuchidikha, wa fuko la Rubeni, ndi Ramoti m'Giliyadi wa fuko la Gadi, ndi Golani m'Basani wa fuko la Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Iyi ndi midzi yoikidwira ana onse a Israele, ndi mlendo wakukhala pakati pao kuti athawireko aliyense wakupha munthu, ndi kuti asafe ndi dzanja la wolipsa mwazi, asanaime pamaso pa msonkhano." 
Joshua21:1 Pamenepo akulu a nyumba za atate a Alevi anayandikira kwa Eleazara wansembe, ndi kwa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi kwa akulu a nyumba za atate a mafuko a ana a Israele;" 
Joshua21:2 nanena nao ku Silo m'dziko la Kanani, ndi kuti Yehova analamulira mwa dzanja la Mose kuti atipatse midzi yokhalamo ife, ndi mabusa a zoweta zathu." 
Joshua21:3 Ndipo ana a Israele anapatsa Alevi, kutapa pa cholowa chao, monga mwa lamulo la Yehova, midzi iyi ndi mabusa ao." 
Joshua21:4 Ndipo maere anatulukira mabanja a Akohati; ndipo molota maere ana a Aroni wansembe, ndiwo Alevi, analandira motapa pa fuko la Yuda, ndi pa fuko la Simeoni, ndi pa fuko la Benjamini, midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
Joshua21:5 Ndipo ana otsala a Kohati analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a fuko la Efuremu, ndi pa fuko la Dani, ndi pa fuko la Manase logawika pakati, midzi khumi." 
Joshua21:6 Ndipo ana a Geresoni analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a fuko la Isakara, ndi pa fuko la Asere, ndi pa fuko la Nafutali, ndi pa fuko la Manase logawika pakati m'Basani, midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
Joshua21:7 Ana a Merari, monga mwa mabanja ao, analandira motapa pa fuko la Rubeni, ndi pa fuko la Gadi, ndi pa fuko la Zebuloni midzi khumi ndi iwiri." 
Joshua21:8 Motero ana a Israele anapatsa Alevi midzi iyi ndi mabusa ao, molota maere, monga Yehova adalamulira mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Joshua21:9 Ndipo anapatsa motapa pa fuko la ana a Yuda, ndi pa fuko la ana a Simeoni, midzi iyi yotchulidwa maina ao;" 
Joshua21:10 kuti ikhale ya ana a Aroni a mabanja a Akohati, a ana a Levi, pakuti maere oyamba adatulukira iwowa." 
Joshua21:11 Ndipo anawapatsa mudzi wa Araba, ndiye atate wa Anaki, womwewo ndi Hebroni, ku mapiri a Yuda, ndi mabusa ake ozungulirapo." 
Joshua21:12 Koma minda ya mudzi ndi milaga yake anapatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, ikhale yake." 
Joshua21:13 Ndipo kwa ana a Aroni wansembe anapatsa Hebroni ndi mabusa ake, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzake, ndi Libina ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:14 ndi Yatiri ndi mabusa ake, ndi Esitemowa ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:15 ndi Holoni ndi mabusa ake, ndi Debiri ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:16 ndi Aini ndi mabusa ake, ndi Yuta ndi mabusa ake, ndi Betesemesi ndi mabusa ake; midzi isanu ndi inai yotapira mafuko awiri aja." 
Joshua21:17 Ndipo motapira fuko la Benjamini, Gibiyoni ndi mabusa ake, Geba ndi mabusa ake," 
Joshua21:18 Anatoti ndi mabusa ake, ndi Alimoni ndi mabusa ake; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:19 Midzi yonse ya ana a Aroni, ansembe, ndiyo khumi ndi itatu, ndi mabusa ao." 
Joshua21:20 Ndipo mabanja a ana a Kohati, Aleviwo, otsala a ana a Kohati, analandira midzi ya maere ao motapira pa fuko la Efuremu." 
Joshua21:21 Ndipo anawapatsa Sekemu ndi mabusa ake ku mapiri a Efuremu, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzakeyo, ndi Gezere ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:22 ndi Kibizaimu ndi mabusa ake, Betehoroni ndi mabusa ake; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:23 Ndipo motapira fuko la Dani, Eliteke ndi mabusa ake, ndi Gibetoni ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:24 Ayaloni ndi mabusa ake, Gatirimoni ndi mabusa ake; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:25 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Manase logawika pakati, Taanaki ndi mabusa ake, ndi Gatirimoni ndi mabusa ake; midzi iwiri." 
Joshua21:26 Midzi yonse ya mabanja a ana otsala a Kohati ndiyo khumi ndi mabusa ao. 
Joshua21:27 Ndipo anapatsa ana a Geresoni, a mabanja a Alevi, motapira pa fuko la Manase logawika pakati, Golani m'Basani ndi mabusa ake, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzakeyo; ndi Beesetera ndi mabusa ake; midzi iwiri." 
Joshua21:28 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Isakara, Kisiyoni ndi mabusa ake, Daberati ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:29 Yaramuti ndi mabusa ake, Enganimu ndi mabusa ake; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:30 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Asere, Misala ndi mabusa ake, Abidoni ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:31 Helekati ndi mabusa ake, ndi Rehobu ndi mabusa ake; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:32 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Nafutali, Kedesi m'Galileya ndi mabusa ake, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzakeyo, ndi Hamotidori ndi mabusa ake, ndi Karitani ndi mabusa ake, midzi itatu." 
Joshua21:33 Midzi yonse ya Ageresoni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo midzi khumi ndi itatu ndi mabusa ao. 
Joshua21:34 Ndipo anapatsa kwa mabanja a ana a Merari, otsala a Alevi, motapira pa fuko la Zebuloni, Yokoneamu ndi mabusa ake, ndi Karita ndi mabusa ake," 
Joshua21:35 Dimina ndi mabusa ake, Nahalala ndi mabusa ake; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:36 Ndipo motapira pa fuko la Rubeni, Bezeri ndi mabusa ake, ndi Yahazi ndi mabusa ake," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoti ndi mabusa ake, ndi Mefaati ndi mabusa ake; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:38 Ndipo motapira m'fuko la Gadi, Ramoti m'Giliyadi ndi mabusa ake, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzakeyo, ndi Mahanaimu ndi mabusa ake;" 
Joshua21:39 Hesiboni ndi mabusa ake, Yazere ndi mabusa ake: yonse pamodzi midzi inai." 
Joshua21:40 Yonseyi ndiyo midzi ya ana a Merari monga mwa mabanja ao, ndiwo otsala a mabanja a Alevi; ndipo gawo lao ndilo midzi khumi ndi iwiri." 
Joshua21:41 Midzi yonse ya Alevi, pakati pa cholowa cha ana a Israele ndiyo midzi makumi anai kudza isanu ndi itatu, ndi mabusa ao." 
Joshua21:42 Midzi iyi yonse inali nao mabusa ao pozungulira pao: inatero midzi iyi yonse. 
Joshua21:43 Motero Yehova anawapatsa Israele dziko lonse adalumbiralo kuwapatsa makolo ao: ndipo analilandira laolao, nakhala m'mwemo." 
Joshua21:44 Ndipo Yehova anawapatsa mpumulo pozungulira ponse, monga mwa zonse adalumbirira makolo ao; ndipo pamaso pao sipanaima munthu mmodzi wa adani ao onse; Yehova anapereka adani ao onse m'manja mwao." 
Joshua21:45 Sikadasowa kanthu konse ka zinthu zokoma zonse Yehova adazinenera nyumba ya Israele; zidachitika zonse. 
Joshua22:1 Pamenepo Yoswa anaitana Arubeni ndi Agadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati," 
Joshua22:2 nanena nao, Mwasunga inu zonsezo anakulamulirani Mose mtumiki wa Yehova; mwamveranso mau anga m'zonse ndinakulamulirani inu;" 
Joshua22:3 simunasiya abale anu masiku awa ambiri mpaka lero lino, koma mwasunga chisungire lamulo la Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua22:4 Ndipo tsopano Yehova Mulungu wanu wapumitsa abale anu, monga adanena nao; potero bwererani tsopano, mukani ku mahema anu, ku dziko la cholowa chanu chimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakuninkhani tsidya lija la Yordani." 
Joshua22:5 Koma samalirani bwino kuti muchite chilangizo ndi chilamulo zimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakulamulirani, kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuyenda m'njira zake zonse ndi kusunga malamulo ake, ndi kumuumirira Iye, ndi kumtumikira Iye ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Joshua22:6 Momwemo Yoswa anawadalitsa, nawauza amuke; ndipo anamuka ku mahema ao." 
Joshua22:7 Ndipo gawo limodzi la fuko la Manase, Mose anawapatsa cholowa m'Basani; koma gawo lina Yoswa anawaninkha cholowa pakati pa abale ao tsidya lija la Yordani kumadzulo. Ndiponso pamene Yoswa anawauza amuke ku mahema ao, anawadalitsa;" 
Joshua22:8 nanena nao ndi kuti, Bwererani nacho chuma chambiri ku mahema anu, ndi zoweta zambirimbiri, ndi siliva, ndi golide, ndi mkuwa, ndi chitsulo, ndi malaya ambirimbiri; mugawane nao abale anu zofunkha kwa adani anu." 
Joshua22:9 Ndipo ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati anabwerera, nachoka kwa ana a Israele ku Silo, ndiwo wa m'dziko la Kanani kunka ku dziko la Giliyadi, ku dziko laolao, limene anakhala eni ake, monga mwa lamulo la Yehova, mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Joshua22:10 Ndipo pamene anafikira mbali ya ku Yordani, ndilo la m'dziko la Kanani, ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati anamanga ku Yordani guwa la nsembe, guwa lalikulu maonekedwe ake." 
Joshua22:11 Ndipo ana a Israele anamva anthu akuti, Taonani ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati anamanga guwa la nsembe pandunji pa dziko la Kanani, ku mbali ya ku Yordani, ku mbali ya ana a Israele." 
Joshua22:12 Pamene ana a Israele anamva ichi msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israele anasonkhana ku Silo, kuti awakwerere kuwathira nkhondo." 
Joshua22:13 Ndipo ana a Israele anatumiza kwa ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, ku dziko la Giliyadi, Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara wansembe," 
Joshua22:14 ndi akalonga khumi naye; nyumba imodzi ya atate kalonga mmodzi, kotero ndi mafuko onse a Israele; yense wa iwowa ndiye mkulu wa nyumba ya atate ao mwa mabanja a Israele." 
Joshua22:15 M'mene anafika kwa ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, ku dziko la Giliyadi, ananena nao ndi kuti," 
Joshua22:16 Utero msonkhano wonse wa Yehova, Cholakwa ichi nchiyani mwalakwira nacho Mulungu wa Israele, ndi kumtembenukira Yehova lero lino kusamtsatanso, popeza munadzimangira guwa la nsembe kupikisana ndi Yehova lero lino?" 
Joshua22:17 Kodi mphulupulu ya ku Peori itichipera, imene sitinadziyeretsera mpaka lero lino, ungakhale mliri unadzera msonkhano wa Yehova," 
Joshua22:18 kuti mubwerera lero lino kusatsata Yehova? Ndipo kudzakhala kuti popeza lero mupikisana ndi Yehova, mawa adzakwiyira msonkhano wonse wa Israele." 
Joshua22:19 Koma mukayesa dziko la cholowa chanu nchodetsa, olokani kulowa m'dziko la cholowa cha Yehova m'mene chihema cha Yehova chikhalamo, nimukhale nacho cholowa pakati pa ife; koma musapikisana ndi Yehova kapena kupikisana nafe, ndi kudzimangira nokha guwa la nsembe, pamodzi ndi guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Joshua22:20 Kodi Akani mwana wa Zera sanalakwe m'choperekedwacho, ndipo mkwiyo unagwera msonkhano wonse wa Israele? Osangoonongeka yekha munthuyo mu mphulupulu yake." 
Joshua22:21 Pamenepo ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati anayankha, nanena ndi akulu a mabanja a Israele," 
Joshua22:22 Yehova Chauta Mulungu, Yehova Chauta Mulungu, Iye adziwa, ndi Israele adzadziwa; ngati mopikisana, ngati molakwira Yehova," 
Joshua22:23 tadzimangira guwa la nsembe, kubwerera kusamtsata Yehova, musatipulumutsa lero lino; kapena ngati kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza, kapena nsembe yaufa, kapena kuperekapo nsembe zoyamika, achifunse Yehova mwini wake;" 
Joshua22:24 ndipo ngati ife sitinachita ichi chifukwa cha kuopa mlandu, ndi kuti, Masiku akudzawo ana anu akadzanena ndi ana athu, ndi kuti, Muli chiyani inu kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israele?" 
Joshua22:25 Pakuti Yehova anaika Yordani ukhale malire pakati pa ife ndi inu, ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi; mulibe gawo ndi Yehova; motero ana anu adzaleketsa ana athu asaope Yehova." 
Joshua22:26 Chifukwa chake tinati, Tiyeni tikonzeretu zotimangira guwa la nsembe, si kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza ai, kapena nsembe yophera ai;" 
Joshua22:27 koma lidzakhala mboni pakati pa ife ndi inu, ndi pakati pa mibadwo yathu ya m'tsogolo, kuti tikachita ntchito ya Yehova pamaso pake ndi nsembe zathu zopsereza, ndi zophera, ndi zoyamika; kuti ana anu asanene ndi ana athu m'tsogolomo, Mulibe gawo ndi Yehova." 
Joshua22:28 Chifukwa chake tinati, Kudzali, akadzatero kwa ife, kapena kwa mibadwo yathu m'tsogolomo, kuti tidzati, Tapenyani, chitsanzo cha guwa la nsembe la Yehova, chomanga makolo athu, si kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza ai, kapena nsembe yophera ai, koma ndilo mboni pakati pa ife ndi inu." 
Joshua22:29 Sikungatheke kuti tipikisane ndi Yehova ndi kubwerera lero kusatsata Yehova, kumanga guwa la nsembe la kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza, la nsembe yaufa, kapena yophera, pamodzi ndi guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wathu lokhala pakhomo pa chihema chake." 
Joshua22:30 Pamene Finehasi wansembe, ndi akalonga a msonkhano ndi akulu a mabanja a Israele okhala naye anamva mau adawanena ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi ana a Manase, anawakomera pamaso pao." 
Joshua22:31 Ndipo Finehasi, mwana wa Eleazara wansembe ananena ndi ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi ana a Manase, lero lino tidziwa kuti Yehova ali pakati pa ife, pakuti simunalakwira nacho Yehova; tsopano mwalanditsa ana a Israele m'dzanja la Yehova." 
Joshua22:32 Ndipo Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara wansembe, ndi akalonga anabwerera kuchokera kwa ana a Rubeni, ndi kwa ana a Gadi, m'dziko la Giliyadi, kudza ku dziko la Kanani kwa ana a Israele, nawabwezera mau." 
Joshua22:33 Ndipo mauwo anakomera ana a Israele pamaso pao; ndi ana a Israele analemekeza Mulungu, osanenanso za kuwakwerera ndi kuwathira nkhondo, kuliononga dziko lokhalamo ana a Rubeni ndi ana a Gadi." 
Joshua22:34 Ndipo ana a Rubeni ndi ana a Gadi analitcha guwa la nsembelo: Ndilo mboni pakati pa ife kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu. 
Joshua23:1 Ndipo atapita masiku ambiri, Yehova atapumulitsa Israele kwa adani ao onse akuwazungulira, ndipo Yoswa adakalamba nakhala wa zaka zambiri;" 
Joshua23:2 Yoswa anaitana Aisraele onse, akuluakulu ao, ndi akulu ao, ndi oweruza ao, ndi akapitao ao, nanena nao, Ndakalamba, ndine wa zaka zambiri;" 
Joshua23:3 ndipo munapenya zonse Yehova Mulungu anachitira mitundu iyi yonse ya anthu chifukwa cha inu; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye anakuthirirani nkhondo. 
Joshua23:4 Taonani, ndakugawirani mitundu ya anthu iyi yotsala ikhale cholowa cha mafuko anu, kuyambira ku Yordani, ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu ndinaipasula, mpaka ku Nyanja Yaikulu ku malowero a dzuwa." 
Joshua23:5 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu Iyeyu adzawapirikitsa pamaso panu, ndi kulanda dziko lao kuwachotsa pamaso panu, ndipo mudzalandira dziko lao likhale cholowa chanu; monga Yehova Mulungu wanu ananena ndi inu." 
Joshua23:6 Koma mulimbike mtima kwambiri kusunga ndi kuchita zonse zolembedwa m'buku la chilamulo cha Mose, osachipatukira kulamanja kapena kulamanzere;" 
Joshua23:7 osalowa pakati pa amitundu awa otsala mwa inu; kapena kutchula dzina la milungu yao; osalumbiritsa nalo, kapena kuitumikira, kapena kuigwadira;" 
Joshua23:8 koma muumirire Yehova Mulungu wanu, monga munachita mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua23:9 Pakuti Yehova anaingitsa pamaso panu mitundu yaikulu ndi yamphamvu; koma inu, palibe munthu anaima pamaso panu mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua23:10 Munthu mmodzi wa inu adzapirikitsa anthu chikwi chimodzi; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amathirira inu nkhondo monga ananena ndi inu. 
Joshua23:11 Potero mudzisamalire ndithu kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Joshua23:12 Koma, mukadzabwerera m'mbuyo pang'ono pokha ndi kuumirira otsala a mitundu awa, ndiwo akutsala pakati pa inu, ndi kukwatitsana nao, ndi kulowana nao, naonso kulowana nanu;" 
Joshua23:13 dziwani ndithu kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu sadzalandanso dziko la amitundu awa kuwachotsa pamaso panu; koma adzakhala kwa inu deka ndi msampha ndi mkwapulo m'nthiti mwanu, ndi minga m'maso mwanu, mpaka mudzatayika m'dziko lokoma ili anakupatsani Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua23:14 Ndipo taonani, lero lino ndilikumuka njira ya dziko lonse lapansi; ndipo mudziwa m'mitima yanu yonse, ndi m'moyo mwa inu nonse, kuti pa mau okoma onse Yehova Mulungu wanu anawanena za inu sanagwe padera mau amodzi; onse anachitikira inu, sanasowepo mau amodzi." 
Joshua23:15 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti monga zakugwerani zokoma zonse anakunenerani Yehova Mulungu wanu, momwemo Yehova adzakutengerani zoipa zonse mpaka atakuonongani kukuchotsani m'dziko lokoma ili anakupatsani Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua23:16 Mukalakwira chipangano cha Yehova Mulungu wanu chimene analamulira inu ndi kumuka ndi kutumikira milungu ina ndi kuigwadira, mkwiyo wa Mulungu udzayakira inu, nimudzatayika msanga m'dziko lokomali anakupatsani." 
Joshua24:1 Ndipo Yoswa anasonkhanitsa mafuko onse a Israele ku Sekemu, naitana akuluakulu a Israele ndi akulu ao, ndi oweruza ao, ndi akapitao ao; ndipo anadzilangiza pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Joshua24:2 Ndipo Yoswa ananena ndi anthu onse, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Kale lija makolo anu anakhala tsidya lija la mtsinje, ndiye Tera, atate wa Abrahamu ndi atate wa Nahori; natumikira milungu ina iwowa." 
Joshua24:3 Ndipo ndinamtenga kholo lanu Abrahamu tsidya lija la mtsinje, ndi kumuyendetsa m'dziko lonse la Kanani ndi kuchulukitsa mbeu zake ndi kumpatsa Isaki." 
Joshua24:4 Ndi kwa Isaki ndinapatsa Yakobo ndi Esau, ndipo ndinampatsa Esau phiri la Seiri likhale lakelake; koma Yakobo ndi ana ake anatsikira kunka ku Ejipito." 
Joshua24:5 Pamenepo ndinatuma Mose ndi Aroni, ndipo ndinasautsa Aejipito, monga ndinachita pakati pake; ndipo nditatero ndinakutulutsani." 
Joshua24:6 Ndipo ndinatulutsa atate anu m'Ejipito; ndipo munadza kunyanja; koma Aejipito analondola atate anu ndi magaleta ndi apakavalo mpaka ku Nyanja Yofiira. 
Joshua24:7 Ndipo pamene anafuula kwa Yehova, anaika mdima pakati pa inu ndi Aejipito nawatengera nyanja, nawamiza; ndi maso anu anapenya chochita Ine m'Ejipito; ndipo munakhala m'chipululu masiku ambiri." 
Joshua24:8 Pamenepo ndinakulowetsani inu m'dziko la Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordani; nagwirana nanu iwowa; ndipo ndinawapereka m'dzanja lanu, nimunalandira dziko lao likhale lanulanu; ndipo ndinawaononga pamaso panu." 
Joshua24:9 Pamenepo Balaki mwana wa Zipori, mfumu ya Mowabu, anauka naponyana ndi Israele; natuma naitana Balamu mwana wa Beori atemberere inu;" 
Joshua24:10 koma sindinafuna kumvera Balamu, potero anakudalitsani chidalitsire, ndipo ndinakulanditsani m'dzanja lake." 
Joshua24:11 Pamenepo munaoloka Yordani, ndi kufika ku Yeriko; ndi eni ake a ku Yeriko anaponyana nanu nkhondo, Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Akanani, ndi Ahiti, ndi Agirigasi, Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi; ndipo ndinawapereka m'dzanja lanu." 
Joshua24:12 Ndipo ndinatuma mavu atsogolere inu, amene anawaingitsa pamaso panu, ndiwo mafumu awiri a Aamori; osati ndi lupanga lako, kapena ndi uta wako ai." 
Joshua24:13 Ndipo ndinakupatsani dziko limene simunagwiramo ntchito, ndi midzi simunaimanga, ndipo mukhala m'mwemo; mukudya za m'minda yamphesa, ndi minda ya azitona imene simunaioka." 
Joshua24:14 Ndipo tsopano, opani Yehova ndi kumtumikira ndi mtima wangwiro ndi woona; nimuchotse milungu imene makolo anu anaitumikira tsidya lija la mtsinje, ndi m'Ejipito; nimutumikire Yehova." 
Joshua24:15 Ndipo ngati kutumikira Yehova kukuipirani mudzisankhire lero amene mudzamtumikira, kapena milungu imene anaitumikira makolo anu okhala tsidya lija la mtsinje, kapena milungu ya Aamori amene mukhala m'dziko lao; koma ine, ndi a m'nyumba yanga, tidzatumikira Yehova." 
Joshua24:16 Ndipo anthu anayankha, nati, Sikungatheke kuti timsiye Yehova, ndi kutumikira milungu ina;" 
Joshua24:17 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi Iye amene anatikweza kutitulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito kunyumba ya akapolo, nachita zodabwitsa zazikuluzo pamaso pathu, natisunga m'njira monse tidayendamo, ndi pakati pa anthu onse amene tinapita pakati pao;" 
Joshua24:18 ndipo Yehova anaingitsa pamaso pathu anthu awa onse, ngakhale Aamori okhala m'dzikomo; chifukwa chake ifenso tidzatumikira Yehova, pakuti ndiye Mulungu wathu." 
Joshua24:19 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa anthu, Simukhoza inu kutumikira Yehova pakuti ndiye Mulungu woyera, ndi Mulungu wansanje; sadzalekerera zolakwa zanu, kapena zochimwa zanu." 
Joshua24:20 Mukasiya Yehova, ndi kutumikira milungu yachilendo, adzatembenuka ndi kukuchitirani choipa, ndi kukuthani, angakhale anakuchitirani chokoma." 
Joshua24:21 Ndipo anthu anati kwa Yoswa, Iaitu, koma tidzatumikira Yehova." 
Joshua24:22 Ndipo Yoswa ananena ndi anthu, Inu mwadzichitira mboni inu nokha kuti mwadzisankhira Yehova kumtumikira Iye. Ndipo anati, Ndife mboni." 
Joshua24:23 Ndipo tsopano, chotsani milungu yachilendo ili pakati pa inu, ndi kulozetsa mitima yanu kwa Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele." 
Joshua24:24 Ndipo anthu anati kwa Yoswa, Tidzamtumikira Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi kumvera mau ake." 
Joshua24:25 Motero Yoswa anachita pangano ndi anthu tsiku lija, nawaikira lemba ndi chiweruzo m'Sekemu." 
Joshua24:26 Ndipo Yoswa analembera mau awa m'buku la chilamulo cha Mulungu; natenga mwala waukulu, nauimitsa apo patsinde pa thundu wokhala pa malo opatulika a Yehova." 
Joshua24:27 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa anthu onse, Taonani, mwala uwu udzakhala mboni yotitsutsa; pakuti udamva mau onse a Yehova amene ananena kwa ife; ndipo udzakhala mboni yotsutsa inu, mungakanize Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua24:28 Pamenepo Yoswa anauza anthu amuke, yense ku cholowa chake." 
Joshua24:29 Ndipo kunali, zitatha izi, Yoswa mwana wa Nuni mtumiki wa Yehova, adafa, wa zaka zana ndi khumi." 
Joshua24:30 Ndipo anamuika m'malire a cholowa chake m'Timnati-Sera, ndiwo ku mapiri a Efuremu kumpoto kwa phiri la Gaasi." 
Joshua24:31 Ndipo Israele anatumikira Yehova masiku onse a Yoswa, ndi masiku onse a akuluakulu otsala atafa Yoswa, amene anadziwa ntchito yonse ya Yehova anaichitira Israele." 
Joshua24:32 Ndipo mafupa a Yosefe amene ana a Israele anakwera nao kuchokera ku Ejipito anawaika ku Sekemu, pa kadziko kamene adakagula Yakobo kwa ana a Hamori atate wa Sekemu ndi kuwapatsa ndalama zana; ndipo anakhala cholowa cha ana a Yosefe." 
Joshua24:33 Eleazaranso mwana wa Aroni anafa; ndipo anamuika pa phiri la Finehasi mwana wake, limene adampatsa ku mapiri a Efuremu." 
Judges1:1 Ndipo atafa Yoswa, ana a Israele anafunsira kwa Yehova ndi kuti, Adzayamba ndani kutikwerera pa Akanani kuwathira nkhondo?" 
Judges1:2 Ndipo Yehova anati, Akwere Yuda; taonani, ndapereka dzikoli m'dzanja lake." 
Judges1:3 Ndipo Yuda ananena ndi Simeoni mkulu wake, Kwera nane ku gawo langa kuti tiwathire nkhondo Akanani; ndipo inenso ndidzamuka nawe ku gawo lako. Namuka naye Simeoni." 
Judges1:4 Ndipo Yuda atakwera, Yehova anapereka Akanani ndi Aperizi m'dzanja lao, ndipo anakantha a iwowa anthu zikwi khumi ku Bezeki." 
Judges1:5 Ndipo anapeza Adoni-Bezeki m'Bezeki, namthira nkhondo nakantha Akanani ndi Aperizi." 
Judges1:6 Koma Adoni-Bezeki anathawa; ndipo anampirikitsa, namgwira, namdula zala zazikulu za m'manja ndi za m'mapazi." 
Judges1:7 Pamenepo anati Adoni-Bezeki, Mafumu makumi asanu ndi awiri odulidwa zala zazikulu za m'manja ndi m'mapazi anaola kakudya kao pansi pa gome panga; monga ndinachita ine, momwemo Mulungu wandibwezera. Ndipo anadza naye ku Yerusalemu, nafa iye komweko." 
Judges1:8 Ndipo ana a Yuda anachita nkhondo pa Yerusalemu, naulanda, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, natentha mudzi ndi moto." 
Judges1:9 Ndipo atatero ana a Yuda anatsika kuthirana nao nkhondo Akanani akukhala kumapiri, ndi kumwera ndi kuchidikha." 
Judges1:10 Ndipo Yuda anamuka kwa Akanani akukhala m'Hebroni; koma kale dzina la Hebroni ndilo mudzi wa Ariba; ndipo anakantha Sesai, ndi Ahimani, ndi Talimai." 
Judges1:11 Pochoka pamenepo anamuka kwa nzika za ku Debiri, koma kale dzina la Debiri ndilo mudzi wa Kiriyati-Sefere." 
Judges1:12 Ndipo Kalebe anati, Iye amene akantha mudzi wa Kiriyati-Sefere, naulanda, yemweyo ndidzampatsa Akisa mwana wanga wamkazi akhale mkazi wake." 
Judges1:13 Ndipo Otiniyele, mwana wa Kenazi mng'ono wa Kalebe anaulanda, ndipo anampatsa Akisa mwana wake wamkazi akhale mkazi wake." 
Judges1:14 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anamdzera, anamkakamiza mwamuna wake kuti apemphe atate wake ampatse munda; natsika pa bulu wake; ndipo Kalebe ananena naye, Ufunanji?" 
Judges1:15 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Mundipatse dalitso; popeza mwandipatsa dziko la kumwera, ndipatsenso zitsime za madzi. Pamenepo Kalebe anampatsa zitsime za kumtunda ndi zitsime za kunsi." 
Judges1:16 Ndipo ana a Mkeni mlamu wake wa Mose, anakwera kutuluka m'mudzi wa m'migwalangwa pamodzi ndi ana a Yuda, nalowa m'chipululu cha Yuda chokhala kumwera kwa Aradi; namuka iwo nakhala ndi anthuwo." 
Judges1:17 Ndipo Yuda anamuka ndi Simeoni mkulu wake, nakantha Akanani akukhala m'Zefati, nauononga konse. Koma dzina la mudziwo analitcha Horoma." 
Judges1:18 Yuda analandanso Gaza ndi malire ake, ndi Asikeloni ndi malire ake ndi Ekeroni ndi malire ake." 
Judges1:19 Ndipo Yehova anali ndi Yuda, iye nawaingitsa a kumapiri, osaingitsa nzika za kuchigwa, popeza zinali nao magaleta achitsulo." 
Judges1:20 Ndipo anapatsa Kalebe Hebroni monga Mose adanena; iye nawaingitsa komweko ana amuna atatu a Anaki. 
Judges1:21 Koma ana a Benjamini sanaingitse Ayebusi okhala m'Yerusalemu; koma Ayebusi anakhala m'Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi ana a Benjamini, mpaka lero lino." 
Judges1:22 Ndipo anakwera iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe, naonso kunka ku Betele; ndipo Yehova anakhala nao." 
Judges1:23 Ndipo iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe anatumiza ozonda ku Betele. Koma kale dzina la mudziwo ndilo Luzi. 
Judges1:24 Ndipo alonda anaona munthu alikutuluka m'mudzi, nanena naye, Utionetsetu polowera m'mudzi, ndipo tidzakuchitira chifundo." 
Judges1:25 Nawaonetsa polowera m'mudzi iye, naukantha mudzi iwowa ndi lupanga lakuthwa; koma analola munthuyo ndi banja lake lonse amuke." 
Judges1:26 Ndipo munthuyo anamuka ku dziko la Ahiti, namanga mudzi, nautcha dzina lake Luzi; ndilo dzina lake mpaka lero lino." 
Judges1:27 Koma Manase sanaingitse a ku Beteseani ndi midzi yake kapena a Taanaki ndi midzi yake, kapena nzika za ku Dori ndi midzi yake, kapena nzika za ku Ibleamu ndi midzi yake, kapena nzika za ku Megido ndi midzi yake; koma Akanani anakhumba kukhala m'dziko muja." 
Judges1:28 Ndipo kunali, atakula mphamvu Israele, anasonkhetsa Akanani, osawaingitsa onse." 
Judges1:29 Ndipo Efuremu sanaingitse Akanani okhala m'Gezere; koma Akanani anakhala m'Gezere pakati pao. 
Judges1:30 Zebuloni sanaingitse nzika za ku Kitironi, kapena za ku Nahaloli; koma Akanani anakhala pakati pao, nawasonkhera." 
Judges1:31 Asere sanaingitse nzika za ku Ako, kapena nzika za ku Sidoni, kapena a Alabu, kapena a Akizibu, kapena a Heliba, kapena a Afiki, kapena a Rehobu;" 
Judges1:32 koma Asere anakhala pakati pa Akanani nzika za kudziko; pakuti sanawaingitse. 
Judges1:33 Nafutali sanaingitse nzika za ku Betesemesi, kapena nzika za ku Betanati; koma anakhala pakati pa Akanani, nzika za kudziko; koma nzika za ku Betesemesi, ndi a ku Betanati zinawasonkhera." 
Judges1:34 Ndipo Aamori anakankha ana a Dani akhale kumapiri pakuti sanawalole atsikire kuchigwa; 
Judges1:35 Aamori anakhumbanso kukhala kuphiri la Heresi, ku Ayaloni, ndi ku Saalibimu; koma dzanja la a m'nyumba ya Yosefe linawalaka, nakhala iwo akupereka msonkho." 
Judges1:36 Ndipo malire a Aamori anayambira pokwerera pa Akarabimu, pathanthwe ku Sela, ndi pokwererapo." 
Judges2:1 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anakwera kuchokera ku Giligala kunka ku Bokimu. Ndipo anati, Ndinakukweretsani kuchokera ku Ejipito, ndi kulowetsa inu m'dziko limene ndinalumbirira makolo anu; ndipo ndinati, Sindidzathyola chipangano changa nanu ku nthawi yonse;" 
Judges2:2 ndipo inu, musamachita pangano ndi nzika za m'dziko ili; muzigamula maguwa ao a nsembe. Koma simunamvera mau anga; mwachichita ichi chifukwa ninji?" 
Judges2:3 Chifukwa chakenso ndinati, Sindidzawapirikitsa kuwachotsa pamaso panu; koma adzakhala ngati minga m'nthiti zanu, ndi milungu yao idzakhalira inu msampha." 
Judges2:4 Ndipo kunali, pamene mthenga wa Yehova ananena mau awa kwa ana onse a Israele, anthuwo anakweza mau ao, nalira misozi." 
Judges2:5 Potero analitcha dzina la malowo Bokimu: namphera Yehova nsembe pomwepo. 
Judges2:6 Pamene Yoswa atawalola anthu amuke, ana a Israele anamuka, yense ku cholowa chake, dziko likhale laolao." 
Judges2:7 Ndipo anthuwo anatumikira Yehova masiku onse a Yoswa, ndi masiku onse a akuluakulu otsala atafa Yoswa, amene adaona ntchito yaikulu yonse ya Yehova anaichitira Israele." 
Judges2:8 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, mtumiki wa Yehova anafa wa zaka zake zana ndi khumi." 
Judges2:9 Ndipo anamuika m'malire a cholowa chake m'Timnati-Heresi, ku mapiri a Efuremu, kumpoto kwa phiri la Gaasi." 
Judges2:10 Ndiponso mbadwo uwu wonse unasonkhanidwa kuikidwa kwa makolo ao; nuuka mbadwo wina pambuyo pao; wosadziwa Yehova kapena ntchitoyi adaichitira Israele. 
Judges2:11 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, natumikira Abaala;" 
Judges2:12 nasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, amene adawatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito, natsata milungu ina, milungu ya mitundu ya anthu okhala pozungulira pao, naigwadira; nautsa mkwiyo wa Yehova." 
Judges2:13 Ndipo anasiya Yehova, natumikira Baala ndi Asitaroti." 
Judges2:14 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele, ndipo anawapereka m'manja a ofunkha kuti awafunkhe; nawagulitsa m'dzanja la adani ao akuwazungulira osakhozanso iwowo kuima pamaso pa adani ao." 
Judges2:15 Kuli konse anatuluka, dzanja la Yehova linawakhalira moipa, monga Yehova adanena, ndi monga Yehova adawalumbirira; nasautsika kwambiri iwowa." 
Judges2:16 Ndipo Yehova anautsa oweruza, amene anawapulumutsa m'dzanja la iwo akuwafunkha." 
Judges2:17 Koma sanamvere angakhale oweruza ao, pakuti anamuka kupembedza milungu ina, naigwadira; anapatuka msanga m'njira yoyendamo makolo ao, pomvera malamulo a Yehova; sanatero iwowa." 
Judges2:18 Ndipo pamene Yehova anawaukitsira oweruza, Yehova anakhala naye woweruzayo, nawapulumutsa m'dzanja la adani ao masiku onse a woweruzayo; pakuti Yehova anagwidwa chisoni pa kubuula kwao chifukwa cha iwo akuwapsinja ndi kuwatsendereza." 
Judges2:19 Koma kunali atafa woweruzayo anabwerera m'mbuyo, naposa makolo ao ndi kuchita moipitsa, ndi kutsata milungu ina kuitumikira ndi kuigwadira, sanaleke kanthu ka machitidwe ao kapena ka njira yao yatcheni." 
Judges2:20 Ndipo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele; nati Iye, Popeza mtundu uwu unalakwira chipangano changa chimene ndinalamulira makolo ao, osamvera mau anga;" 
Judges2:21 Inenso sindionjeza kuingitsa pamaso pao a mitundu ina imene Yoswa adaisiya pakufa iyeyu; 
Judges2:22 kuti ndiyese nayo Israele ngati adzasunga njira ya Yehova kuyendamo monga anaisunga makolo ao, kapena iai." 
Judges2:23 Motero Yehova analeka mitundu iyi osaiingitsa msanga, ndipo sadaipereka m'dzanja la Yoswa." 
Judges3:1 Ndipo iyo ndiyo mitundu ya anthu anaisiyapo Yehova kuyesa nayo Israele, ndiwo onse amene sanadziwe nkhondo zonse za Kanani;" 
Judges3:2 chifukwa chake ndicho chokha chakuti adziwitse mibadwo ya ana a Israele ndi kuwaphunzitsa nkhondo, ngakhale iwo okhaokha osaidziwa konse kale;" 
Judges3:3 anasiya mafumu asanu a Afilisti ndi Akanani onse, ndi Asidoni, ndi Ahivi okhala m'phiri la Lebanoni, kuyambira phiri la Baala-Heremoni mpaka polowera ku Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Amenewo anakhala choyesera Israele kuti Yehova adziwe ngati adzamvere malamulo ake, amene analamulira makolo ao mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Judges3:5 Ndipo ana a Israele anakhala pakati pa Akanani, Ahiti, ndi Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi;" 
Judges3:6 nakwatira ana akazi a iwowa, napereka ana ao akazi kwa ana amuna a iwowa natumikira milungu yao." 
Judges3:7 Ndipo ana a Israele anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, naiwala Yehova Mulungu wao, natumikira Abaala ndi zifanizo." 
Judges3:8 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele ndipo anawagulitsa m'dzanja la Kusani-Risataimu, mfumu ya Mesopotamiya; ndi ana a Israele anatumikira Kusani-Risataimu zaka zisanu ndi zitatu." 
Judges3:9 Ndipo pamene ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova, Yehova anaukitsira ana a Israele mpulumutsi amene anawapulumutsa, ndiye Otiniyele mwana wa Kenazi, mng'ono wake wa Kalebe." 
Judges3:10 Ndipo unamdzera mzimu wa Yehova, iye naweruza Israele, natuluka kunkhondo; napereka Yehova Kusani-Risataimu mfumu ya Mesopotamiya m'dzanja lake; ndi dzanja lake linamlaka Kusani-Risataimu." 
Judges3:11 Pamenepo dziko linapumula zaka makumi anai; ndi Otiniyele mwana wa Kenazi anafa. 
Judges3:12 Koma ana a Israele anaonjezanso kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova; pamenepo Yehova analimbitsa Egiloni mfumu ya Mowabu pa Israele, popeza anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova." 
Judges3:13 Ndipo anadzisonkhanitsira ana a Amoni ndi a Amaleke, namuka nakantha Israele, nalanda mudzi wa m'migwalangwa nakhalamo." 
Judges3:14 Ndipo ana a Israele anatumikira Egiloni mfumu ya Mowabu zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu. 
Judges3:15 Koma pamene ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova, Yehova anawaukitsira mpulumutsi, Ehudi mwana wa Gera, Mbenjamini, munthu wamanzere, ndipo ana a Israele anatumiza mtulo m'dzanja lake kwa Egiloni mfumu ya Mowabu." 
Judges3:16 Ndipo Ehudi anadzisulira lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse utali wake mkono; nalimangirira pansi pa zovala zake pa ntchafu ya kulamanja. 
Judges3:17 Ndipo anapereka mtulo kwa Egiloni, mfumu ya Mowabu; koma Egiloni ndiye munthu wonenepa ndithu." 
Judges3:18 Ndipo atatha kupereka mtulowo, anauza anthu onyamula mtulo achoke." 
Judges3:19 Koma iye mwini anabwerera pa mafano osema ali ku Giligala, nati, Ndili nao mau achinsinsi kwa inu, mfumu. Nati iye, Khalani chete. Ndipo anatuluka onse akuimapo." 
Judges3:20 Ndipo Ehudi anamdzera alikukhala pa yekha m'chipinda chosanja chopitidwa mphepo. Nati Ehudi, Ndili nao mau a Mulungu akukuuzani. Nauka iye pa mpando wake." 
Judges3:21 Ndipo Ehudi anatulutsa dzanja lake lamanzere nagwira lupanga ku ntchafu ya kulamanja nampyoza m'mimba mwake; 
Judges3:22 ndi chigumbu chake chinalowa kutsata mpeni wake; ndi mafuta anaphimba mpeniwo, pakuti sanasolole lupanga m'mimba mwake; nilituluka kumbuyo." 
Judges3:23 Pamenepo Ehudi anatuluka kukhonde namtsekera pamakomo pa chipinda chosanja nafungulira. 
Judges3:24 Ndipo atatuluka iye, anadza akapolo ake; napenya, ndipo taonani pamakomo pa chipinda chosanja mpofungulira; nati iwo, Angophimba mapazi m'chipinda chake chosanja chopitidwa mphepo." 
Judges3:25 Ndipo analindirira mpaka anachita manyazi; koma taonani, sanatsegule pamakomo pa chipinda chosanja. Pamenepo anatenga mfungulo natsegula; ndipo taonani, mbuye wao wagwa pansi, wafa." 
Judges3:26 Ndipo Ehudi anapulumuka pakuchedwa iwo, napitirira pa mafano osema, napulumuka kufikira Seira." 
Judges3:27 Ndipo kunali, pakufika iye anaomba lipenga ku mapiri a Efuremu; ndi ana a Israele anatsika naye kuchokera kumapiri, nawatsogolera iye." 
Judges3:28 Ndipo ananena nao, Nditsateni ine, pakuti Yehova wapereka adani anu Amowabu m'manja mwanu. Ndipo anatsika ndi kumtsata, natsekereza Amowabu madooko a Yordani, osalola mmodzi aoloke." 
Judges3:29 Ndipo anakantha Amowabu nyengo ija anthu zikwi khumi, onsewa anthu amoyo, ndi ngwazi; ndipo sanapulumuke ndi mmodzi yense." 
Judges3:30 Motero anagonjetsa Mowabu tsiku lija pansi pa dzanja la Israele. Ndipo dziko linapumula zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu. 
Judges3:31 Atapita iye kunali Samigara, mwana wa Anati amene anakantha Afilisti mazana asanu ndi limodzi ndi mtoso wa ng'ombe; nayenso anapulumutsa Israele." 
Judges4:1 Ndipo ana a Israele anaonjeza kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, atafa Ehudi." 
Judges4:2 Ndipo Yehova anawagulitsa m'dzanja la Yabini mfumu ya Kanani, wochita ufumu ku Hazori; kazembe wake wa nkhondo ndiye Sisera, wokhala ku Haroseti wa amitundu." 
Judges4:3 Ndipo ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova; pakuti anali nao magaleta achitsulo mazana asanu ndi anai; napsinja ana a Israele kolimba zaka makumi awiri. 
Judges4:4 Ndipo Debora, mneneri wamkazi, ndiye mkazi wake wa Lapidoti, anaweruza Israele nyengo ija." 
Judges4:5 Ndipo anakhala patsinde pa mgwalangwa wa Debora pakati pa Rama ndi Betele ku mapiri a Efuremu; ndi ana a Israele anakwera kwa iye awaweruze. 
Judges4:6 Ndipo anatuma, naitana Baraki mwana wa Abinowamu, achoke m'Kedesi-Nafutali; nanena naye, Kodi Yehova Mulungu wa Israele sanalamulire ndi kuti, Muka, nulunjike kuphiri la Tabori, nuwatenge, apite nawe anthu zikwi khumi a ana a Nafutali ndi ana a Zebuloni?" 
Judges4:7 Ndipo ndidzamkoka Sisera, kazembe wa nkhondo ya Yabini, akudzere ku mtsinje wa Kisoni, ndi magaleta ake, ndi aunyinji ake; ndipo ndidzampereka m'dzanja lako." 
Judges4:8 Ndipo Baraki anati kwa iye, Ukamuka nane, ndidzamuka; ukapanda kumuka nane, sindimuka." 
Judges4:9 Nati iye, Kumuka ndidzamuka nawe, koma ulendo umukawo, sudzachita nao ulemu; pakuti Yehova adzagulitsa Sisera m'dzanja la mkazi. Motero Debora anauka namuka ndi Baraki ku Kedesi." 
Judges4:10 Ndipo Baraki anaitana Zebuloni ndi Nafutali asonkhane ku Kedesi; iye nakwera ndi anthu zikwi khumi akumtsata; Deboranso anakwera kunka naye. 
Judges4:11 Ndipo Hebere Mkeni anadzisiyanitsa ndi Akeni, ndi ana a Hobabu mlamu wake wa Mose, namanga mahema ake mpaka thundu wa m'Zaananimu, ndiwo wa ku Kedesi." 
Judges4:12 Ndipo anauza Sisera kuti Baraki mwana wa Abinowamu wakwera kuphiri la Tabori. 
Judges4:13 Pamenepo Sisera anasonkhanitsa magaleta ake onse ndiwo magaleta mazana asanu ndi anai achitsulo, ndi anthu onse okhala naye, kuyambira Haroseti wa amitundu mpaka mtsinje wa Kisoni." 
Judges4:14 Ndipo Debora anati kwa Baraki, Nyamuka; pakuti ili ndi tsikuli Yehova wapereka Sisera m'dzanja lako; sanatuluke kodi Yehova pamaso pako? Potero Baraki anatsika kuphiri la Tabori ndi amuna zikwi khumi akumtsata." 
Judges4:15 Ndipo Ambuye anaononga Sisera ndi magaleta onse ndi gulu lankhondo lonse, ndi lupanga lakuthwa pamaso pa Baraki; koma Sisera anatsika pagaleta nathawa choyenda pansi." 
Judges4:16 Koma Baraki anatsata magaleta ndi gululo mpaka Haroseti wa amitundu; ndi gulu lonse lankhondo la Sisera linagwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa, sanatsale munthu ndi mmodzi yense." 
Judges4:17 Koma Sisera anathawira choyenda pansi ku hema wa Yaele mkazi wa Hebere Mkeni; pakuti panali mtendere pakati pa Yabini mfumu ya Hazori, ndi nyumba ya Hebere Mkeni." 
Judges4:18 Ndipo Yaele anatuluka kukomana ndi Sisera, nanena naye, Patuka, mbuye wanga, patukira kwa ine kuno; usaope. Ndipo anapatukira kwa iye kulowa m'hema, namfunda ndi chimbwi." 
Judges4:19 Pamenepo ananena naye, Ndipatsetu madzi pang'ono ndimwe; popeza ndine waludzu. Ndipo anatsegula thumba la mkaka, nampatsa amwe, namfunda." 
Judges4:20 Ndipo Sisera ananena naye, Taima pakhomo pa hema, ndipo kudzali, akadza munthu, akakufunsa akati, Pali munthu pano kodi? Uziti, Palibe." 
Judges4:21 Pamenepo Yaele mkazi wa Hebere anatenga chichiri cha hema, natenga nyundo m'dzanja lake namdzera monyang'ama, nakhomera chichiri chilowe m'litsipa mwake; nichinapyoza kulowa m'nthaka; popeza anali m'tulo tofa nato ndi kulema; nafa." 
Judges4:22 Ndipo taonani, pomlondola Sisera Barakiyo, Yaele anatuluka kukomana naye, nati kwa iye, Idza kuno, ndidzakuonetsa munthu umfunayo. Potero anamdzera, ndipo taonani, Sisera wagwa, wafa, ndi chichiri m'litsipa mwake." 
Judges4:23 Momwemo Mulungu anagonjetsa tsiku lija Yabini mfumu ya Kanani pamaso pa ana a Israele. 
Judges4:24 Ndipo dzanja la ana a Israele linamkabe ndi kulimbika pa Yabini mfumu ya Kanani mpaka adamuononga Yabini mfumu ya Kanani. 
Judges5:1 Ndipo Debora ndi Baraki mwana wa Abinowamu anaimba tsiku lomwelo ndi kuti," 
Judges5:2 Lemekezani Yehova pakuti atsogoleri m'Israele anatsogolera, pakuti anthu anadzipereka mwaufulu." 
Judges5:3 Imvani mafumu inu; tcherani makutu, akalonga inu; ndidzamuimbira ine Yehova, inetu; ndidzamuimbira nyimbo, Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele." 
Judges5:4 Yehova, muja mudatuluka m'Seiri, muja mudayenda kuchokera ku thengo la Edomu, dziko linanjenjemera, thambo lomwe linakha, inde mitambo inakha madzi." 
Judges5:5 Mapiri anagwedezeka pamaso pa Yehova, Sinai lili pamaso pa Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele." 
Judges5:6 Masiku a Samigara, mwana wa Anati, masiku a Yaele maulendo adalekeka ndi apanjira anayenda mopazapaza." 
Judges5:7 Milaga idalekeka m'Israele, idalekeka. Mpaka ndinauka ine Debora, ndinauka ine amai wa Israele." 
Judges5:8 Anasankha milungu yatsopano, pamenepo nkhondo inaoneka kuzipata. Ngati chikopa kapena nthungo zidaoneka mwa zikwi makumi anai a Israele?" 
Judges5:9 Mtima wanga uvomerezana nao olamulira a m'Israele, amene anadzipereka mwaufulu mwa anthu. Lemekezani Yehova." 
Judges5:10 Inu akuyenda okwera pa abulu oyera, inu akukhala poweruzira, ndi inu akuyenda m'njira, fotokozerani." 
Judges5:11 Posamveka phokoso la amauta potunga madzi, pomwepo adzafotokozera zolungama anazichita Yehova, zolungama anazichita m'milaga yake, m'Israele. Pamenepo anthu a Yehova anatsikira kuzipata." 
Judges5:12 Galamuka, Debora, galamuka, galamuka, galamuka, unene nyimbo; uka, Baraki, manga nsinga ndende zako, mwana wa Abinowamu, iwe." 
Judges5:13 Pamenepo omveka otsala anatsika ndi anthu; Yehova ananditsikira pakati pa achamuna. 
Judges5:14 Anafika Aefuremu amene adika mizu m'Amaleke; Benjamini anakutsata iwe pakati pa anthu ako. Ku Makiri kudachokera olamulira, ndi ku Zebuloni iwo akutenga ndodo ya mtsogoleri."
