Judges5:15 Akalonga a Isakara anali ndi Debora; monga Isakara momwemo Baraki, anawatuma m'chigwa namka choyenda pansi. Pa mitsinje ya Rubeni panali zotsimikiza mtima zazikulu." 
Judges5:16 Wakhaliranji pakati pa makola, kumvera kulira kwa zoweta? Ku timitsinje ta Rubeni kunali zotsimikiza mtima zazikulu." 
Judges5:17 Giliyadi anakhala tsidya lija la Yordani; ndi Dani, akhaliranji m'zombo? Asere anakhala pansi m'mphepete mwa nyanja, nakhalitsa pa nyondo yake ya nyanja." 
Judges5:18 Zebuloni ndiwo anthu anataya moyo wao mpaka imfa, Nafutali yemwe poponyana pamisanje." 
Judges5:19 Anadza mafumu nathira nkhondo; pamenepo anathira nkhondo mafumu a Kanani. M'Taanaki, ku madzi a Megido; osatengako phindu la ndalama." 
Judges5:20 Nyenyezi zinathira nkhondo yochokera kumwamba, m'mipita mwao zinathirana ndi Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Mtsinje wa Kisoni unawakokolola, mtsinje uja wakale, mtsinje wa Kisoni. Yenda mwamphamvu, moyo wangawe." 
Judges5:22 Pamenepo ziboda za akavalo zinaguguda. Ndi kutumphatumpha, kutumphatumpha kwa anthu ake eni mphamvu." 
Judges5:23 Mutemberere Merozi, ati mthenga wa Yehova, mutemberere chitemberere nzika zake; pakuti sanadzathandize Yehova, kumthandiza Yehova pa achamuna." 
Judges5:24 Wodalitsika, woposa akazi, akhale Yaele mkazi wa Hebere Mkeni. Akhale wodalitsika woposa akazi a m'hema." 
Judges5:25 Mwamunayo anapempha madzi, anampatsa mkaka, anamtengera mafuta a mkaka m'chotengera cha mfulu." 
Judges5:26 Dzanja lake analitambasulira kuchichiri, ndi dzanja lake lamanja ku nyundo ya antchito, nakhomera Sisera, nakantha mutu wake, inde, anaphwanya napyoza m'litsipa mwake." 
Judges5:27 Pa mapazi ake anabzong'onyoka, anagwa, anagona; pa mapazi ake anabzong'onyoka, anagwa; pobzong'onyokapo, pamenepo wagwa wafa." 
Judges5:28 Anapenyerera ali pazenera, nafuula Make wa Sisera, pa sefa wake, achedweranji galeta wake? Zizengerezeranji njinga za magaleta ake?" 
Judges5:29 Akazi anzake omveka anzeru anamyankha; koma anadziyankhira yekha mau. 
Judges5:30 Kodi sanapeze, sanagawe zofunkha? Namwali, anamwali awiri kwa munthu aliyense. Chofunkha cha nsalu za mawangamawanga kwa Sisera; chofunkha cha nsalu za mawangamawanga, za maluwa, nsalu za mawangamawanga, za maluwa konsekonse, kwa chofunkha cha khosi lake." 
Judges5:31 Adani anu onse, Yehova, atayike momwemo. Koma iwo akukonda Inu akhale ngati dzuwa lotuluka mu mphamvu yake. Ndipo dziko linapumula zaka makumi anai." 
Judges6:1 Koma ana a Israele anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja la Midiyani zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Judges6:2 Pamene dzanja la Midiyani linalaka Israele, ana a Israele anadzikonzera ming'ang'ala ya m'mapiri, ndi mapanga, ndi malinga chifukwa cha Midiyani." 
Judges6:3 Ndipo kunali, akabzala Israele, amakwera Amidiyani, ndi Amaleke, ndi ana a kum'mawa, inde amawakwerera;" 
Judges6:4 nawamangira misasa, namaononga zipatso za m'dziko mpaka ufika ku Gaza, osawasiyira chochirira njala m'Israele, ngakhale nkhosa, kapena ng'ombe, kapena bulu." 
Judges6:5 Pakuti anakwera nazo zoweta zao ndi mahema ao, analowa ngati dzombe kuchuluka kwao; iwowa ndi ngamira zao zomwe nzosawerengeka; ndipo analowa m'dziko kuliononga." 
Judges6:6 Ndipo Israele anafooka kwambiri chifukwa cha Midiyani; ndipo ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova. 
Judges6:7 Ndipo kunali, pamene ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova chifukwa cha Midiyani," 
Judges6:8 Yehova anatuma munthu mneneri kwa ana a Israele, nanena nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Ine ndinakukwezani kuchokera m'Ejipito, ndi kukutulutsani m'nyumba ya ukapolo;" 
Judges6:9 ndipo ndinakulanditsani m'dzanja la Aejipito, ndi m'dzanja la onse akupsinja inu, ndi kuwaingitsa pamaso panu, ndi kukupatsani dziko lao;" 
Judges6:10 ndipo ndinati kwa inu, Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu; musamaopa milungu ya Aamori amene mukhala m'dziko lao; koma simunamvera mau anga." 
Judges6:11 Pamenepo anadza mthenga wa Yehova, nakhala patsinde pa thundu wokhala m'Ofura, wa Yowasi Mwabiyezere; ndi mwana wake Gideoni analikuomba tirigu m'mopondera mphesa, awabisire Amidiyani." 
Judges6:12 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera, nati kwa iye, Yehova ali nawe, ngwazi iwe, wamphamvu iwe." 
Judges6:13 Ndipo Gideoni ananena naye, Mbuye wanga, ngati Yehova ali nafe chatigwera ife bwanji chonsechi? Ndipo zili kuti zodabwitsa zake zonse zimene makolo athu anatiwerengera, ndi kuti, Sanatikweze kodi Yehova kuchokera m'Ejipito? Koma tsopano Yehova watitaya natipereka m'dzanja la Midiyani." 
Judges6:14 Pamenepo Yehova anamtembenukira, nati, Muka nayo mphamvu yako iyi, nupulumutse Israele m'dzanja la Midiyani. Sindinakutuma ndi Ine kodi?" 
Judges6:15 Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Ha! Mbuye, ndidzapulumutsa Israele ndi chiyani? Taonani, banja langa lili loluluka m'Manase, ndipo ine ndine wamng'ono m'nyumba ya atate wanga." 
Judges6:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Popeza Ine ndidzakhala nawe udzakantha Amidiyani ngati munthu mmodzi." 
Judges6:17 Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Ngati mundikomera mtima mundionetse chizindikiro tsopano chakuti ndi Inu wakunena nane." 
Judges6:18 Musachoke pano, ndikupemphani, mpaka ndikudzerani ndi kutulutsa chopereka changa ndi kuchiika pamaso panu. Ndipo anati, Ndidzalinda mpaka ubwera." 
Judges6:19 Ndipo Gideoni analowa, nakonza kambuzi ndi mikate yopanda chotupitsa ya efa wa ufa; nyamayi anaiika m'lichero, ndi msuzi anauthira mumbale, natuluka nazo kwa Iye ali patsinde pa thundu, nazipereka." 
Judges6:20 Koma mthenga wa Mulungu ananena naye, Tenga nyamayi ndi mikate yopanda chotupitsa ndi kuziika pathanthwe pano ndi kutsanula msuzi. Ndipo anatero." 
Judges6:21 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anatambasula nsonga ya ndodo inali m'dzanja lake, nakhudza nyamayi ndi mikate yopanda chotupitsa; ndipo unatuluka moto m'thanthwe nunyeketsa nyama ndi mikate yopanda chotupitsa; ndi mthenga wa Yehova anakanganuka pamaso pake." 
Judges6:22 Pamenepo Gideoni anaona kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova, nati Gideoni, Tsoka ine, Yehova Mulungu! Popeza ndaona mthenga wa Yehova maso ndi maso." 
Judges6:23 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Mtendere ukhale ndi iwe, usaope, sudzafa." 
Judges6:24 Pamenepo Gideoni anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe pomwepo; nalitcha Yehova-ndiye-mtendere; likali m'Ofura wa Aabiyezere ndi pano pomwe. 
Judges6:25 Ndipo kunali, usiku womwe uja Yehova ananena naye, Tenga ng'ombe ya atate wako, ndiyo ng'ombe yachiwiri ya zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, nugamule guwa la nsembe la Baala ndilo la atate wako, nulikhe chifanizo chili pomwepo;" 
Judges6:26 numangire Yehova Mulungu wako guwa la nsembe pamwamba pa lingali, monga kuyenera; nutenge ng'ombe yachiwiriyo, nufukize nsembe yopsereza; nkhuni zake uyese chifanizo walikhacho." 
Judges6:27 Pamenepo Gideoni anatenga amuna khumi mwa anyamata ake, nachita monga Yehova adanena naye; ndipo kunali, popeza anaopa akunyumba ya atate wake, ndi amuna akumudziwo, sanachichite msana, koma usiku." 
Judges6:28 Ndipo pakuuka mamawa amuna akumudziwo, taonani, guwa la nsembe la Baala litagamuka, ndi chifanizo chinali pomwepo chitalikhidwa ndi ng'ombe yachiwiri yoperekedwa pa guwa la nsembe adalimanga." 
Judges6:29 Nanenana wina ndi mnzake, Wachita ichi ndani? Ndipo atafunafuna nafunsafunsa, anati, Gideoni, mwana wa Yowasi wachita ichi." 
Judges6:30 Pamenepo amuna akumudziwo anati kwa Yowasi, Umtulutse mwana wako kuti afe; pakuti anagamula guwa la nsembe la Baala, pakutinso analikha chifanizo chinali pomwepo." 
Judges6:31 Koma Yowasi anati kwa onse akumuimirira, Kodi inu mumnenera Baala mlandu? Kapena kodi mudzampulumutsa iye? Iye amene amnenera mlandu aphedwe kukali m'mawa; akakhala mulungu adzinenere yekha mlandu, popeza wina wamgamulira guwa lake la nsembe." 
Judges6:32 Chifukwa chake anamutcha tsiku lija Yerubaala, ndi kuti, Amnenere mlandu Baala popeza anamgamulira guwa lake la nsembe." 
Judges6:33 Pamenepo Amidiyani onse ndi Aamaleke ndi ana a kum'mawa anasonkhana pamodzi naoloka, namanga misasa m'chigwa cha Yezireele." 
Judges6:34 Koma mzimu wa Yehova unavala Gideoni; naomba lipenga iye, ndi a banja la Abiyezere analalikidwa kumtsata iye." 
Judges6:35 Ndipo anatuma mithenga kwa Manase konse; ndi iwonso analalikidwa kumtsata iye; natuma mithenga kwa Asere, ndi kwa Zebuloni, ndi kwa Nafutali; iwo nadzakomana nao." 
Judges6:36 Ndipo Gideoni anati kwa Mulungu, Mukadzapulumutsa Israele ndi dzanja langa monga mwanena," 
Judges6:37 taonani, ndidzaika chikopa cha ubweya popunthira tirigu; pakakhala mame pachikopa pokha, ndi panthaka ponse pouma, pamenepo ndidzadziwa kuti mudzapulumutsa Israele ndi dzanja langa monga mwanena." 
Judges6:38 Ndipo kunatero; pakuti anauka mamawa, nafinya chikopacho, nakamula mame a pachikopa, madzi ake odzala mbale." 
Judges6:39 Ndipo Gideoni ananena ndi Mulungu, Mkwiyo wanu usandiyakire, ndinene kamodzi kokha: ndikuyeseni kamodzi kokha ndi chikopa; paume pachikopa pokha, ndi panthaka ponse pakhale mame." 
Judges6:40 Ndipo Mulungu anatero usiku uja; pakuti panauma pachikopa pokha, ndi panthaka ponse panali mame." 
Judges7:1 Pamenepo Yerubaala, ndiye Gideoni, ndi anthu onse okhala naye anauka mamawa, namanga misasa pa chitsime cha Harodi, ndi misasa ya Midiyani inali kumpoto kwao, pa phiri la More m'chigwa." 
Judges7:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni. Anthu ali ndi iwe andichulukira kuti ndipereke Midiyani m'dzanja lao; angadzitame Israele pa Ine, ndi kuti, Dzanja la ine mwini landipulumutsa." 
Judges7:3 Ndipo tsopano, kalalike m'makutu a anthu, ndi kuti, Aliyense wochita mantha, nanjenjemera, abwerere nachoke pa phiri la Giliyadi. Ndipo anabwererako anthu zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri, natsalako zikwi khumi." 
Judges7:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Gideoni, Anthu akali ochuluka; tsikira nao kumadzi, ndipo ndidzakuyesera iwo komweko; ndipo kudzali kuti iye amene ndimnena kwa iwe, Uyo azimuka nawe, yemweyo azimuka nawe; koma aliyense ndimnena kwa iwe, Uyo asamuke nawe, yemweyo asamuke." 
Judges7:5 Ndipo anatsikira nao anthu kumadzi; ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni, Aliyense akapiza madzi pa lilime lake, monga akhatira galu, ameneyo amuike pa yekha; momwemo aliyense agwada pakumwa." 
Judges7:6 Ndi kuwerenga kwa iwo akukhatira, ndi kuika dzanja lao kukamwa kwao, ndiko mazana atatu; koma ena onse anagwada pakumwa madzi." 
Judges7:7 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Gideoni, Ndi anthu mazana atatu akukhatira ndidzakupulumutsani, ndi kupereka Amidiyani m'dzanja lako; koma amuke anthu awa onse, yense kumalo kwake." 
Judges7:8 Pamenepo anthu anatenga kamba m'dzanja lao, ndi malipenga ao; ndipo anauza amuna onse a Israele amuke, yense kuhema kwake; koma anaimika amuna mazana atatuwo; ndipo misasa ya Midiyani inali kunsi kwake m'chigwa." 
Judges7:9 Ndipo kunali usiku womwewo, kuti Yehova ananena naye, Tauka, tatsikira kumisasa; pakuti ndaipereka m'dzanja lako." 
Judges7:10 Koma ngati uopa kutsika, utsike naye Pura mnyamata wako kumisasa;" 
Judges7:11 nudzamva zonena iwo; utatero manja ako adzalimbikitsidwa kutsikira kumisasa. Pamenepo anatsikira ndi Pura mnyamata wake ku chilekezero cha anthu azida a m'misasa. 
Judges7:12 Ndipo Amidiyani ndi Aamaleke ndi ana onse a kum'mawa ali gonere m'chigwa, kuchuluka kwao ngati dzombe; ndi ngamira zao zosawerengeka, kuchuluka kwao ngati mchenga wa m'mphepete mwa nyanja." 
Judges7:13 Ndipo pakufikako Gideoni, taonani, panali munthu analikufotokozera mnzake loto, nati, Taona, kulota ndinalota, ndipo tapenya, mtanda wa mkate wabarele unakunkhulirakunkhulira m'misasa ya Midiyani, nufika kuhema, numgunda nagwa, numpidigula kuti hema anakhala chigwere." 
Judges7:14 Ndipo mnzake anayankha nati, Ichi si china konse koma lupanga la Gideoni mwana wa Yowasi, munthu wa Israele; Mulungu wapereka Midiyani ndi a m'misasa onse m'dzanja lake." 
Judges7:15 Ndipo kunali, pakumva Gideoni kufotokozera kwa lotolo ndi tanthauzo lake, anadziwerama; nabwera ku misasa ya Israele nati, Taukani, pakuti Yehova wapereka a m'misasa a Midiyani m'dzanja lanu." 
Judges7:16 Ndipo anagawa amuna mazana atatu akhale magulu atatu, napatsa malipenga m'manja a iwo onse, ndi mbiya zopanda kanthu, ndi miuni m'kati mwa mbiyazo." 
Judges7:17 Ndipo ananena nao, Mundipenyerere ine, ndi kuchita momwemo; ndipo taonani, pakufika ine pa chilekezero cha misasa, kudzali, monga ndichita ine, momwemo muzichita inu." 
Judges7:18 Pamene ndiomba lipenga, ine ndi onse okhala nane, inunso muziomba lipenga pozungulira ponse pa misasa, ndi kunena kuti, Yehova ndi Gideoni." 
Judges7:19 Motero Gideoni ndi amuna zana anali naye anafikira ku chilekezero cha misasa poyambira ulonda wa pakati, atasintha alonda tsopano apa; ndipo anaomba malipenga, naphwanya mbiya zokhala m'manja mwao." 
Judges7:20 Ndi magulu atatuwo anaomba malipenga, naswa mbiyazo, nagwira miuni ndi dzanja lao lamanzere, ndi malipenga m'dzanja lao lamanja kuwaomba; ndipo anafuula, Lupanga la Yehova ndi la Gideoni." 
Judges7:21 Ndipo anaima yense m'mbuto mwake pozungulira misasa; pamenepo anathamanga a m'misasa onse, nafuula, nathawa." 
Judges7:22 Ndipo mazana atatuwa anaomba malipenga, ndipo Yehova anakanthanitsa yense mnzake ndi lupanga m'misasa monse; ndi a m'misasa anathawa mpaka ku Betesita ku Zerera, mpaka ku malire a Abele-Mehola pa Tabati." 
Judges7:23 Pamenepo anthu a Israele analalikidwa kuchokera ku Nafutali, ndi ku Asere, ndi ku Manase yense, nalondola Amidiyani." 
Judges7:24 Gideoni anatumanso mithenga ku mapiri onse a Efuremu ndi kuti, Tsikani, kukomana ndi Amidiyani ndi kutsekereza madooko asanafike iwowa, mpaka ku Betebara ndi Yordani. Potero amuna onse a Efuremu anasonkhana pamodzi natsekereza madooko mpaka ku Betebara, ndi Yordani." 
Judges7:25 Ndipo anagwira akalonga awiri a Midiyani, Orebu ndi Zeebu; namupha Orebu ku thanthwe la Orebu; ndi Zeebu anamupha ku choponderamo mphesa cha Zeebu, nalondola Amidiyani; ndipo anadza nayo mitu ya Orebu ndi Zeebu kwa Gideoni tsidya lija la Yordani." 
Judges8:1 Ndipo amuna a Efuremu anati kwa iye, Ichi watichitira nchiyani, osatiitana popita iwe kulimbana ndi Amidiyani? Natsutsana naye kolimba." 
Judges8:2 Koma ananena nao, Ndachitanji tsopano monga inu? Kodi kukunkha mphesa kwa Efuremu sikuposa kutchera mphesa kwa Abiyezere?" 
Judges8:3 Mulungu anapereka m'dzanja lanu akalonga a Midiyani, Orebu ndi Zeebu, ndipo ndinakhoza kuchitanji monga inu? Pamenepo mkwiyo wao unamlezera, atanena mau awa." 
Judges8:4 Ndipo Gideoni anafika ku Yordani, naoloka, iye ndi amuna mazana atatu anali naye, ali otopa koma ali chilondolere." 
Judges8:5 Ndipo ananena kwa amuna a ku Sukoti, Mupatsetu anthu awa akunditsata mitanda yamkate; pakuti atopa, ndipo ndilikulondola Zeba ndi Zalimuna mafumu a Midiyani." 
Judges8:6 Koma akalonga a ku Sukoti anati, Kodi manja a Zeba ndi Zalimuna ali m'dzanja lako tsopano apa, kuti ife tiwaninkhe ankhondo ako mkate?" 
Judges8:7 Ndipo Gideoni anati, Chifukwa chake, Yehova akapereka Zeba ndi Zalimuna m'dzanja langa, ndidzapuntha nyama yanu ndi minga ya m'chipululu ndi mitungwi." 
Judges8:8 Ndipo anachokapo kukwera ku Penuwele, nanena nao momwemo; ndipo amuna a ku Penuwele anamyankha monga adamyankha amuna a ku Sukoti." 
Judges8:9 Ndipo ananenanso kwa amuna a ku Penuwele ndi kuti, Ndikabwerera ndi mtendere ndidzagumula nsanja iyi." 
Judges8:10 Zeba ndi Zalimuna ndipo anali m'Karikori, ndi a m'misasa ao pamodzi nao, amuna monga zikwi khumi ndi zisanu; ndiwo otsala onse a khamu lonse la ana a kum'mawa; popeza atagwa amuna zikwi zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri akusolola lupanga." 
Judges8:11 Ndipo Gideoni anakwerera njira ya iwo okhala m'mahema kum'mawa kwa Noba, ndi Yogobeha, nakantha khamulo popeza khamulo linakhala lokhazikika mtima." 
Judges8:12 Ndipo Zeba ndi Zalimuna anathawa; koma anawatsata, nagwira mafumu awiri a Midiyani Zeba ndi Zalimuna, nanjenjemeretsa khamu lonse." 
Judges8:13 Pamenepo Gideoni mwana wa Yowasi anabwerera kunkhondo pokwerera pa Heresi. 
Judges8:14 Ndipo anagwira mnyamata wa anthu a ku Sukoti, nafunsira; ndipo anamsimbira akalonga a ku Sukoti, ndi akulu ake amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri." 
Judges8:15 Ndipo anafika kwa amuna a ku Sukoti, nati, Tapenyani Zeba ndi Zalimuna amene munanditonza nao ndi kuti, Kodi manja a Zeba ndi Zalimuna akhala m'dzanja lako, kuti tiwaninkhe mkate amuna ako akulema?" 
Judges8:16 Ndipo anagwira akulu a m'mudzi ndi minga ya kuchipululu ndi mitungwi, nawalanga nazo amuna a ku Sukoti." 
Judges8:17 Ndipo anagamula nsanja ya Penuwele, napha amuna akumudzi." 
Judges8:18 Pamenepo anati kwa Zeba ndi Zalimuna, Amunawo munawapha ku Tabori anali otani? Iwo nayankha, Monga iwe momwemo iwowa; yense wakunga mwana wa mfumu." 
Judges8:19 Ndipo anati, Ndiwo abale anga, ana a mai wanga. Pali Yehova mukadawasunga amoyo, sindikadakuphani." 
Judges8:20 Nati kwa Yetere mwana wake woyamba, Tauka, nuwaphe. Koma mnyamatayo sanasolole lupanga lake; pakuti anaopa, pokhala anali mnyamata." 
Judges8:21 Pamenepo Zeba ndi Zalimuna anati, Tauka iwe mwini nutigwere; pakuti monga munthu momwemo mphamvu yake. Ndipo Gideoni anauka nawapha Zeba ndi Zalimuna, nalanda mphande zinali kukhosi kwa ngamira zao." 
Judges8:22 Pamenepo anthu a Israele anati kwa Gideoni, Mutilamulire ndi inu, ndi mwana wanu, ndi mdzukulu wanu, pakuti mwatipulumutsa m'dzanja la Amidiyani." 
Judges8:23 Koma Gideoni ananena nao. Sindidzalamulira inu, ngakhale mwana wanga sadzalamulira inu; Yehova adzalamulira inu." 
Judges8:24 Gideoni anatinso kwa iwo, Mundilole ndipemphe kanthu kamodzi kwa inu, mundipatse aliyense maperere mwa zofunkha zanu; pakuti anali nao maperere agolide, pokhala anali Aismaele." 
Judges8:25 Ndipo anayankha, Kupereka tiwapereka; nayalapo chovala, naponyamo yense maperere a mwa zofunkha zao." 
Judges8:26 Ndipo kulemera kwake kwa maperere agolide adawapempha ndiko masekeli chikwi chimodzi ndi mazana asanu ndi awiri; osawerenga mphande, ndi zitunga ndi zovala zachibakuwa za pa mafumu a ku Midiyani, osawerenganso maunyolo okhala pa makosi a ngamira zao." 
Judges8:27 Ndipo Gideoni anawapanga fano, naliika m'mudzi mwake, ndiwo Ofura; ndi Israele yense analitsata kuligwadira pomwepo; ndipo linakhala kwa Gideoni ndi nyumba yake ngati msampha." 
Judges8:28 Motero anagonjetsa Amidiyani pamaso pa ana a Israele, osaweramutsanso mitu yao iwowa. Ndipo dziko lidapumula zaka makumi anai m'masiku a Gideoni." 
Judges8:29 Ndipo Yerubaala, mwana wa Yowasi anamuka, nakhala m'nyumba ya iye yekha." 
Judges8:30 Nakhala nao ana amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri Gideoni, anawabala ndi iye; popeza anali nao akazi ambiri." 
Judges8:31 Ndipo mkazi wake wamng'ono wokhala m'Sekemu, iyenso anambalira mwana wamwamuna; namutcha dzina lake Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Ndipo Gideoni mwana wa Yowasi anafa atakalamba bwino, naikidwa m'manda a Yowasi atate wake, m'Ofura wa Aabiyezere." 
Judges8:33 Ndipo kunali, atafa Gideoni, ana a Israele anabwereranso nagwadira Abaala, nayesa Baala-Beriti mulungu wao." 
Judges8:34 Ndi ana a Israele sanakumbukire Yehova Mulungu wao, amene anawapulumutsa m'dzanja la adani ao onse pozungulira ponse;" 
Judges8:35 osachitira chifundo nyumba ya Yerubaala, ndiye Gideoni, monga mwa zokoma zonse iye anachitira Israele." 
Judges9:1 Koma Abimeleki mwana wa Yerubaala anamuka ku Sekemu kwa abale a amai wake, nanena nao, ndi kwa banja lonse la nyumba ya atate wa amai wake, ndi kuti," 
Judges9:2 Nenanitu m'makutu mwa eni ake onse a ku Sekemu, Chokomera inu nchiti, akulamulireni ana amuna onse a Yerubaala ndiwo amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri, kapena akulamulireni mwamuna mmodzi? Mukumbukirenso kuti ine ndine wa fuko lanu ndi nyama yanu." 
Judges9:3 Pamenepo abale a amake anamnenera mau awa onse m'makutu a eni ake onse a Sekemu; ndi mitima yao inalunjika kutsata Abimeleki; pakuti anati, Ndiye mbale wathu." 
Judges9:4 Ndipo anampatsa ndalama makumi asanu ndi awiri za m'nyumba ya Baala-Beriti; ndipo Abimeleki analembera nazo anthu opanda pake ndi opepuka amene anamtsata. 
Judges9:5 Ndipo anamuka kunyumba ya atate wake ku Ofura, nawapha abale ake ana a Yerubaala, ndiwo amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri, pa thanthwe limodzi; koma Yotamu mwana wamng'ono wa Yerubaala anatsalako; pakuti anabisala." 
Judges9:6 Pamenepo anasonkhana eni ake onse a ku Sekemu, ndi nyumba yonse ya Milo, namuka namlonga Abimeleki ufumu pa thundu wa choimiritsa chili m'Sekemu." 
Judges9:7 Ndipo atamuuza Yotamu, anamuka iye naimirira pamutu pa phiri la Gerizimu, nakweza mau ake, nafuula, nanena nao, Mundimvere ine, eni ake a ku Sekemu inu, kuti Mulungu amvere inu." 
Judges9:8 Kumuka inamuka mitengo kudzidzozera mfumu; niti kwa mtengo wa azitona, Ukhale iwe mfumu yathu." 
Judges9:9 Koma mtengo wa azitona unati kwa iwo, Ngati ndidzasiya kunona kwanga kumene alemekeza nako Mulungu ndi anthu kukalenga pa mitengo?" 
Judges9:10 Pamenepo mitengo inati kwa mkuyu. Tiye iwe, ukhale mfumu yathu." 
Judges9:11 Koma mkuyu unanena nao, Ngati ndidzasiya kuzuna kwanga, ndi zipatso zanga zokoma kukalenga pa mitengo?" 
Judges9:12 Pamenepo mitengo inati kwa mpesa, Tiye iwe, ukhale mfumu yathu." 
Judges9:13 Koma mpesa unanena nao, Ngati ndidzasiya vinyo wanga wakusekeretsa Mulungu ndi anthu, kukalenga pa mitengo?" 
Judges9:14 Pamenepo mitengo yonse inati kwa nkandankhuku, Tiye iwe, ukhale mfumu yathu." 
Judges9:15 Ndipo nkandankhuku unati kwa mitengo, Mukandidzoza mfumu yanu moonadi, tiyeni, thawirani ku mthunzi wanga; mukapanda kutero utuluke moto m'nkandankhuku ndi kunyeketsa mikungudza ya Lebanoni." 
Judges9:16 Ndipo tsopano, ngati mwachita moona ndi mwangwiro pakulonga Abimeleki ufumu, ngatinso mwamchitira chokoma Yerubaala ndi nyumba yake, ndi kumchitira monga anayenera manja ake;" 
Judges9:17 pakuti atate wanga anakugwirirani nkhondo, nataya moyo wake, nakupulumutsani m'dzanja la Amidiyani;" 
Judges9:18 koma mwaukira nyumba ya atate wanga lero lino, ndi kuwapha ana ake, ndiwo amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri, pa thanthwe limodzi; ndipo mwalonga Abimeleki mwana wa mdzakazi wake, akhale mfumu ya pa eni ake a ku Sekemu, chifukwa ali mbale wanu;" 
Judges9:19 ngati tsono mwachitira Yerubaala ndi nyumba yake zoona ndi zangwiro lero lino, kondwerani naye Abimeleki, nayenso akondwere nanu;" 
Judges9:20 koma ngati simunatero, utuluke moto kwa Abimeleki, nunyeketse eni ake a ku Sekemu ndi nyumba ya Milo; nutuluke moto kwa eni ake a ku Sekemu, ndi kunyumba yake ya Milo, nunyeketse Abimeleki." 
Judges9:21 Pamenepo Yotamu anafulumira, nathawa, namuka ku Beere, nakhala komweko, chifukwa cha Abimeleki mbale wake." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki atakhala kalonga wa Israele zaka zitatu," 
Judges9:23 Mulungu anatumiza mzimu woipa pakati pa Abimeleki ndi eni ake a ku Sekemu; ndi eni ake a ku Sekemu anamchitira Abimeleki mosakhulupirika; 
Judges9:24 kuti chiwawa adachitira ana amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri a Yerubaala chimdzere, ndi kuti mwazi wao uikidwe pa mbale wao Abimeleki anawaphayo, ndi pa eni ake a ku Sekemu, amene analimbikitsa manja ake, awaphe abale ake." 
Judges9:25 Ndipo eni ake a ku Sekemu anaika omlalira pamwamba pa mapiri; amene anawawanya onse akudzera njirayi; ndipo anamuuza Abimeleki. 
Judges9:26 Ndipo Gaala, mwana wa Ebedi anadza ndi abale ake, napita ku Sekemu; ndi eni ake a ku Sekemu anamkhulupirira." 
Judges9:27 Ndipo anatuluka kunka kuminda, natchera mphesa m'mindamo, naponda mphesa, napereka nsembe yolemekeza, nalowa m'nyumba ya mulungu wao, nadya, namwa, natemberera Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Pamenepo Gaala, mwana wa Ebedi anati, Abimeleki ndani, ndi Sekemu ndani, kuti timtumikire? Sindiye mwana wa Yerubaala kodi? Ndi Zebuli kazembe wake? Mutumikire amuna a Hamori atate wa Sekemu; koma ameneyo timtumikire chifukwa ninji?" 
Judges9:29 Mwenzi anthu awa akadakhala m'dzanja langa; ndikadamchotsadi Abimeleki. Ndipo anati kwa Abimeleki, Chulukitsa khamu lako, nutuluke." 
Judges9:30 Pamene Zebuli woyang'anira mudzi anamva mau a Gaala mwana wa Ebedi, anapsa mtima." 
Judges9:31 Natuma mithenga kwa Abimeleki ku Aruma monyenga nati, Taonani Gaala mwana wa Ebedi ndi abale ake afika ku Sekemu; ndipo taonani, akupandukitsirani mudzi." 
Judges9:32 Ndipo tsopano, taukani usiku, inu ndi anthu okhala nanu ndi kulalira kuthengo;" 
Judges9:33 ndipo kukhale kuti m'mawa, pakutuluka dzuwa, muuke mamawa mugwere mudziwo; ndipo taonani, akakutulukirani iye ndi anthu ali naye, uzimchitira monga lidziwa dzanja lako." 
Judges9:34 Pamenepo Abimeleki anauka ndi anthu onse anali naye, usiku; nalalira a ku Sekemu, magulu anai." 
Judges9:35 Ndipo Gaala mwana wa Ebedi anatuluka, naima polowera pa chipata cha mudzi; naika Abimeleki ndi anthu anali naye m'molalira." 
Judges9:36 Ndipo pamene Gaala anapenya anthuwo anati kwa Zebuli, Taona, alikutsika anthu kuchokera pamwamba pa mapiri. Koma Zebuli ananena naye, Uona mthunzi wa mapiri ndi kuyesa anthu." 
Judges9:37 Koma Gaala ananenanso, nati, Tapenya alikutsika anthu pakati pa dziko, ndi gulu limodzi lidzera njira ya ku thundu wa alauli." 
Judges9:38 Pamenepo Zebuli anati kwa iye, Pakamwa pako mpoti tsopano, muja udanena, Ndani Abimeleki kuti timtumikire? Awa si anthuwo unawapeputsa? Utuluke tsopano, nulimbane nao." 
Judges9:39 Ndipo Gaala anatuluka pamaso pao pa eni ake a ku Sekemu, nalimbana ndi Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Koma Abimeleki anampirikitsa, nathawa iye pamaso pake; nagwa olasidwa ambiri mpaka polowera pa chipata." 
Judges9:41 Ndipo Abimeleki anakhala ku Aruma; ndi Zebuli anaingitsa Gaala ndi abale ake kuti asakhale m'Sekemu. 
Judges9:42 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwake, kuti anthu anatuluka kunka kuminda; ndipo anauza Abimeleki." 
Judges9:43 Pamenepo anatenga anthu, nawagawa magulu atatu, nalalira m'minda; napenya, ndipo taonani, anthu alimkutuluka m'mudzi; nawaukira iye nawakantha." 
Judges9:44 Ndi Abimeleki ndi magulu okhala naye anathamanga naima polowera pa chipata cha mudzi; ndi magulu awiriwo anagwera onse okhala m'munda, nawakantha." 
Judges9:45 Ndipo Abimeleki analimbana ndi mudzi tsiku lija lonse; nalanda mudzi nawapha anthu anali m'mwemo; napasula mudzi; nawazapo mchere. 
Judges9:46 Ndipo pamene eni ake onse a nsanja ya ku Sekemu anachimva, analowa m'ngaka ya nyumba ya Eliberiti." 
Judges9:47 Ndipo anauza Abimeleki kuti amuna onse a nsanja ya ku Sekemu asonkhane. 
Judges9:48 Pamenepo Abimeleki anakwera kunka kuphiri la Zalimoni, iye ndi anthu onse anali naye; natenga nkhwangwa m'dzanja lake Abimeleki, nadula nthambi kumitengo, nainyamula ndi kuiika paphewa pake, nati kwa anthu okhala naye, Ichi munachiona ndachita, fulumirani, muchite momwemo." 
Judges9:49 Ndi anthu onse anadulanso yense nthambi yake, natsata Abimeleki, naziika pangaka, natentha nazo ngakayo ndi moto; motero anthu onse a nsanja ya ku Sekemu anafanso, amuna ndi akazi ngati chikwi chimodzi." 
Judges9:50 Pamenepo Abimeleki anamuka ku Tebezi, naumangira Tebezi misasa, naulanda." 
Judges9:51 Koma m'mudzimo munali nsanja yolimba nathawira kumeneko amuna ndi akazi onse, ndi eni ake onse a mudziwo, nadzitsekereza m'mwemo, nakwera patsindwi pa nsanja." 
Judges9:52 Ndipo Abimeleki anafika kunsanja, nalimbana nayo nkhondo, nayandikira kukhomo kwa nsanja, aitenthe ndi moto." 
Judges9:53 Ndipo mkazi wina anaponya mwana wa mphero pamutu pa Abimeleki, naphwanya bade lake." 
Judges9:54 Pamenepo anaitana msanga mnyamata wake wosenza zida zake, nanena naye, Solola lupanga lako nundiphe, angamanenere anthu, ndi kuti, Anamupha ndi mkazi. Nampyoza mnyamata wake, nafa iye." 
Judges9:55 Pamene amuna a Israele anaona kuti adafa Abimeleki anamuka yense kumalo kwake. 
Judges9:56 Momwemo Mulungu anambwezera Abimeleki choipacho anachitira atate wake ndi kuwapha abale ake makumi asanu ndi awiri. 
Judges9:57 Ndipo Mulungu anawabwezera choipa chonse cha amuna a ku Sekemu pamitu pao, ndipo linawagwera temberero la Yotamu mwana wa Yerubaala." 
Judges10:1 Atafa Abimeleki, anauka kupulumutsa Israele Tola mwana wa Puwa, mwana wa Dodo munthu wa Isakara; nakhala iye m'Samiri ku mapiri a Efuremu." 
Judges10:2 Ndipo anaweruza Israele zaka makumi awiri ndi zitatu, nafa, naikidwa m'Samiri." 
Judges10:3 Atafa iye, anauka Yairi Mgiliyadi, naweruza Israele zaka makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri." 
Judges10:4 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi atatu okwera pa ana a abulu makumi atatu, iwo ndipo anali nayo midzi makumi atatu, otchedwa midzi ya Yairi, mpaka lero lino, ndiyo m'dziko la Giliyadi." 
Judges10:5 Nafa Yairi, naikidwa m'Kamoni." 
Judges10:6 Ndipo ana a Israele anaonjeza kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, natumikira Abaala, ndi Aasitaroti, ndi milungu ya Aramu, ndi milungu ya Sidoni, ndi milungu ya Mowabu, ndi milungu ya ana a Amoni, ndi milungu ya Afilisti; ndipo anamleka Yehova osamtumikira." 
Judges10:7 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israele, nawagulitsa m'dzanja la Afilisti, ndi m'dzanja la ana a Amoni." 
Judges10:8 Ndipo anaphwanya napsinja ana a Israele chaka chija, natero ndi ana onse a Israele okhala tsidya lija la Yordani m'dziko la Aamori, ndilo Giliyadi, zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu." 
Judges10:9 Ndipo ana a Amoni anaoloka Yordani kuthiranso nkhondo Yuda ndi Benjamini, ndi nyumba ya Efuremu; napsinjika kwambiri Israele." 
Judges10:10 Ndipo ana a Israele anafuula kwa Yehova ndi kuti, Takuchimwirani, popeza tasiya Mulungu wathu ndi kutumikira Abaala." 
Judges10:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ana a Israele, Kodi sindinakupulumutsani kwa Aejipito ndi kwa Aamori, ndi kwa ana a Amoni, ndi kwa Afilisti?" 
Judges10:12 Asidoni omwe, ndi Aamaleke, ndi Amaoni anakupsinjani. Pamenepo munafuula kwa Ine, ndipo ndinakupulumutsani m'dzanja lao." 
Judges10:13 Koma mwandisiya Ine ndi kutumikira milungu ina, chifukwa chake sindikupulumutsaninso." 
Judges10:14 Mukani ndi kufuulira kwa milungu munaisankha, ikupulumutseni nyengo ya kusauka kwanu." 
Judges10:15 Koma ana a Israele anati kwa Yehova, Tachimwa, mutichitire monga mwa zonse zikomera pamaso panu; komatu mutipulumutse lero lino, tikupemphani." 
Judges10:16 Pamenepo anachotsa milungu yachilendo pakati pao, natumikira Yehova; ndipo mtima wake unagwidwa chisoni chifukwa cha mavuto a Israele." 
Judges10:17 Ndipo ana a Amoni analalikiridwa, namanga misasa m'Giliyadi. Ndi ana a Israele anasonkhana namanga misasa ku Mizipa." 
Judges10:18 Ndipo anthu, akalonga a Giliyadi, ananenana wina ndi mnzake, Ndaniyo adzayamba kulimbana ndi ana a Amoni? Iye adzakhala mkulu wa onse okhala m'Giliyadi." 
Judges11:1 Yefita Mgiliyadi ndipo anali ngwazi yamphamvu, ndiye mwana wa mkazi wadama; koma Giliyadi adabala Yefita." 
Judges11:2 Ndipo mkazi wa Giliyadi anambalira ana amuna; koma atakula ana amuna a mkaziyo anampirikitsa Yefita, nanena naye, Sudzalandira cholowa m'nyumba ya atate wako; pakuti ndiwe mwana wa mkazi wina." 
Judges11:3 Pamenepo Yefita anathawa abale ake, nakhala m'dziko la Tobu; ndipo anyamata opanda pake anasonkhana kwa Yefita, natuluka naye pamodzi." 
Judges11:4 Ndipo kunali, atapita masiku, ana a Amoni anachita nkhondo ndi Israele," 
Judges11:5 ndipo kunatero, pamene ana a Amoni anathira nkhondo pa Israele, akulu a Giliyadi anamuka kutenga Yefita m'dziko la Tobu;" 
Judges11:6 nati kwa Yefita, Tiye ukhale kazembe wathu kuti tilimbane ndi ana a Amoni." 
Judges11:7 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa akulu a Giliyadi, Simunandida kodi, ndi kundichotsa m'nyumba ya atate wanga? Ndipo mundidzeranji tsopano pokhala muli m'kusauka?" 
Judges11:8 Ndipo akulu a Giliyadi ananena ndi Yefita, Chifukwa chake chakuti takubwerera tsopano ndicho kuti umuke nafe ndi kuchita nkhondo ndi ana a Amoni, nudzakhala mkulu wathu wa pa onse okhala m'Giliyadi." 
Judges11:9 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa akulu a Giliyadi, Mukandifikitsanso kwathu kuchita nkhondo ndi ana a Amoni, nakawapereka Yehova pamaso panga, ndidzakhala mkulu wanu kodi?" 
Judges11:10 Ndipo akulu a Giliyadi anati kwa Yefita, Yehova ndiye wakumvera pakati pa ife, tikapanda kuchita monga momwe wanena." 
Judges11:11 Pamenepo Yefita anamuka ndi akulu a Giliyadi, ndipo anthu anamuika mkulu wao ndi mtsogoleri wao; ndipo Yefita ananena mau ake onse pamaso pa Yehova ku Mizipa." 
Judges11:12 Ndipo Yefita anatuma mithenga kwa mfumu ya ana a Amoni, ndi kuti, Ndi chiyani ndi inu ndi kuti mwandidzera kuthira nkhondo dziko langa?" 
Judges11:13 Ndipo mfumu ya ana a Amoni inati kwa mithenga ya Yefita, Chifukwa Israele analanda dziko langa pakukwera iye kuchokera ku Ejipito, kuyambira Arinoni mpaka Yaboki, ndi mpaka Yordani; ndipo tsopano undibwezere maikowa mwamtendere." 
Judges11:14 Ndipo Yefita anatumanso mithenga kwa mfumu ya ana a Amoni; 
Judges11:15 nanena naye, Atero Yefita, Israele sanalande dziko la Mowabu kapena dziko la ana a Amoni;" 
Judges11:16 pakuti pakukwera iwo kuchokera ku Ejipito Israele anayenda m'chipululu mpaka Nyanja Yofiira, nafika ku Kadesi;" 
Judges11:17 pamenepo Israele anatuma mithenga kwa mfumu ya Edomu, ndi kuti, Ndikupemphani ndipitire pakati pa dziko lanu; koma mfumu ya Edomu siinamvera. Natumanso kwa mfumu ya Mowabu; nayenso osalola; ndipo Israele anakhala m'Kadesi." 
Judges11:18 Pamenepo anayenda m'chipululu, naphazira dziko la Edomu, ndi dziko la Mowabu, nadzera kum'mawa kwa dziko la Mowabu, namanga misasa tsidya lija la Arinoni; osalowa malire a Mowabu, pakuti Arinoni ndi malire a Mowabu." 
Judges11:19 Ndipo Israele anatuma mithenga kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, mfumu ya ku Hesiboni; nanena naye Israele, Tikupemphani tipitire pakati pa dziko lanu, kunka kwathu." 
Judges11:20 Koma Sihoni sanakhulupirire Israele kuti apitire pakati pa malire ake; koma Sihoni anamemeza anthu ake onse, namanga misasa ku Yahazi, nathira nkhondo Israele." 
Judges11:21 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anapereka Sihoni ndi anthu ake onse m'dzanja la Israele, ndipo anawakantha, ndi Israele, analandira cholowa chake, dziko lonse la Aamori, nzika za m'dziko lija." 
Judges11:22 Ndipo analandira akhale cholowa chao, malire onse a Aamori, kuyambira Arinoni mpaka Yaboki, ndi kuyambira chipululu mpaka Yordani." 
Judges11:23 Motero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anaingitsa Aamori, pamaso pa anthu ake Israele, ndipo kodi liyenera kukhala cholowa chanu?" 
Judges11:24 Chimene akulandiritsani Kemosi mulungu wanu, simuchilandira cholowa chanu kodi? Momwemo aliyense Yehova Mulungu wathu waingitsa pamaso pathu, zakezo tilandira cholowa chathu." 
Judges11:25 Ndipo tsopano kodi inu ndinu wabwino woposa Balaki mwana wa Zipori, mfumu ya Mowabu; anatengana konse ndi Israele iyeyu kodi, kapena kuchita nao nkhondo konse kodi?" 
Judges11:26 Pokhala Israele m'Hesiboni ndi midzi yake, ndi m'Aroere ndi midzi yake ndi m'midzi yonse yokhala m'mphepete mwa Arinoni zaka mazana atatu; munalekeranji kulandanso nthawi ija?" 
Judges11:27 Potero sindinakuchimwirani ine, koma mundichitira choipa ndinu kundithira nkhondo; Yehova Woweruzayo, aweruze lero lino pakati pa ana a Israele ndi ana a Amoni." 
Judges11:28 Koma mfumu ya ana a Amoni sanamvere mau a Yefita anamtumizirawo. 
Judges11:29 Pamenepo mzimu wa Yehova unamdzera Yefita, napitira iye ku Giliyadi, ndi Manase, napitira ku Mizipa wa Giliyadi, ndi kuchokera ku Mizipa wa Giliyadi anapitira kwa ana a Amoni." 
Judges11:30 Ndipo Yefita anawindira Yehova chowinda, nati, Mukaperekatu ana a Amoni m'dzanja langa," 
Judges11:31 ndipo kudzali kuti chilichonse chakutuluka pakhomo pa nyumba yanga kudzakomana nane pakubweranso ine ndi mtendere kuchokera kwa ana a Amoni, chidzakhala cha Yehova, ndipo ndidzachipereka nsembe yopsereza." 
Judges11:32 Potero Yefita anapita kwa ana a Amoni kuwathira nkhondo; ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja lake; 
Judges11:33 nawakantha kuyambira ku Aroere mpaka ufika ku Miniti, ndiyo midzi makumi awiri, ndi ku Abele-Keranimu, makanthidwe akulu ndithu. Motero ana a Amoni anagonjetsedwa pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
Judges11:34 Pofika Yefita ku Mizipa kunyumba yake, taonani, mwana wake wamkazi anatuluka kudzakomana naye ndi malingaka ndi kuthira mang'ombe; ndipo iyeyu anali mwana wake mmodzi yekha, analibe mwana wina wamwamuna kapena wamkazi." 
Judges11:35 Ndipo kunali, pakumuona anang'amba zovala zake, nati, Tsoka ine, mwana wanga, wandiweramitsa kwakukulu, ndiwe wa iwo akundisaukitsa ine; pakuti ndamtsegulira Yehova pakamwa panga ine, ndipo sinditha kubwerera." 
Judges11:36 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Atate wanga, mwamtegulira Yehova pakamwa panu, mundichitire ine monga umo mudatulutsa mau pakamwa panu; popeza Yehova anakuchitirani inu chilango pa adani anu, pa ana a Amoni." 
Judges11:37 Ndipo anati kwa atate wake, Andichitire ichi, andileke miyezi iwiri, kuti ndichoke ndi kutsikira kumapiri, ndi kulirira unamwali wanga, ine ndi anzanga." 
Judges11:38 Nati iye, Muka. Namuuza amuke akakhale miyezi iwiri; namuka iye ndi anzake, nalirira unamwali wake pamapiri." 
Judges11:39 Ndipo kunali pakutha miyezi iwiri, anabwerera kwa atate wake amene anamchitira monga mwa chowinda chake anachiwinda; ndipo sanamdziwe mwamuna. Motero unali mwambo m'Israele," 
Judges11:40 kuti ana akazi a Israele akamuka chaka ndi chaka kumliririra mwana wa Yefita wa ku Giliyadi, masiku anai pa chaka." 
Judges12:1 Pamenepo amuna a Efuremu analalikidwa, napita kumpoto; nati kwa Yefita, Wapitiriranji kuthira nkhondo ana a Amoni, osatiitana ife timuke nawe? Tidzakutenthera nyumba yako ndi moto pamtu pako." 
Judges12:2 Ndipo Yefita anati kwa iwo, Ine ndi anthu anga tinatsutsana kwakukulu ndi ana a Amoni, koma pamene ndinakuitanani inu simunandipulumutsa m'dzanja lao." 
Judges12:3 Ndipo pakuona ine kuti simundipulumutsa, ndinataya moyo wanga ndi kupita kwa ana a Amoni; ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja langa; mwakwereranji tsono lero lino kundichitira nkhondo?" 
Judges12:4 Pamenepo Yefita anamemeza amuna onse a m'Giliyadi nalimbana naye Efuremu; ndipo amuna a Giliyadi anakantha Efuremu, chifukwa adati, Inu Agiliyadi ndinu akuthawa Efuremu, pakati pa Efuremu ndi pakati pa Manase." 
Judges12:5 Ndipo Agiliyadi anatsekereza madooko a Yordani a Efuremu; ndipo kunatero kuti, akati othawa a Efuremu, Ndioloke, amuna a Giliyadi anati kwa Iye, Ndiwe Mwefuremu kodi? Akati, Iai;" 
Judges12:6 pamenepo anati kwa iye, Unene tsono Shiboleti; ndipo akati, Siboleti, osakhoza kutchula bwino, amgwira namupha padooko pomwe pa Yordani; ndipo anagwa a Efuremu nthawi ija, zikwi makumi anai mphambu ziwiri." 
Judges12:7 Ndipo Yefita anaweruza Israele zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi; nafa Yefita Mgiliyadi, naikidwa m'mudzi wina wa Giliyadi." 
Judges12:8 Ndi pambuyo pake Ibizani wa ku Betelehemu anaweruza Israele. 
Judges12:9 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi atatu; ndi ana akazi makumi atatu anawakwatitsa kwina, natengera ana ake amuna ana akazi makumi atatu ochokera kwina. Ndipo anaweruza Israele zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Judges12:10 Nafa Ibizani naikidwa ku Betelehemu. 
Judges12:11 Ndi pambuyo pake Eloni Mzebuloni anaweruza Israele; naweruza Israele zaka khumi. 
Judges12:12 Nafa Eloni Mzebuloni naikidwa m'Ayaloni m'dziko la Zebuloni. 
Judges12:13 Ndi pambuyo pake Abidoni mwana wa Hilele wa ku Piratoni anaweruza Israele. 
Judges12:14 Ndipo anali nao ana amuna makumi anai ndi zidzukulu zazimuna makumi atatu, akuyenda okwera pa ana a abulu makumi asanu ndi awiri; naweruza Israele zaka zisanu ndi zitatu." 
Judges12:15 Nafa Abidoni mwana wa Hilele wa ku Piratoni, naikidwa m'Piratoni m'dziko la Efuremu ku mapiri a Amaleke." 
Judges13:1 Ndipo ana a Israele anaonjeza kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova; nawapereka Yehova m'dzanja la Afilisti zaka makumi anai. 
Judges13:2 Ndipo panali munthu wina wa Zora wa banja la Adani, dzina lake ndiye Manowa; ndi mkazi wake analibe mwana, sanabala." 
Judges13:3 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera mkaziyo nanena naye, Taona tsopano, ulibe mwana wosabala iwe; koma udzaima ndi kubala mwana wamwamuna." 
Judges13:4 Chifukwa chake udzisamalire, usamwe vinyo kapena choledzeretsa, nusadye chinthu chilichonse chodetsa;" 
Judges13:5 pakuti taona, udzaima, nudzabala mwana wamwamuna; pamutu pake sipadzafika lumo; pakuti mwanayo adzakhalira kwa Mulungu Mnaziri chibadwire; nadzayamba iye kupulumutsa Israele m'dzanja la Afilisti." 
Judges13:6 Pamenepo anadza mkaziyo, nanena ndi mwamuna wake ndi kuti, Wandidzera munthu wa Mulungu; maonekedwe ake ndiwo ngati maonekedwe a mthenga wa Mulungu oopsa ndithu; ndipo sindinamfunsa uko achokera kapena sanandiuzenso dzina lake;" 
Judges13:7 koma anati kwa ine, Taona, udzaima, ndi kubala mwana wamwamuna; ndipo tsopano usamwe vinyo kapena choledzeretsa, nusadye chilichonse chodetsa; pakuti mwanayo adzakhalira kwa Mulungu Mnaziri chibadwire mpaka tsiku la kufa kwake." 
Judges13:8 Pamenepo Manowa anapembedza Yehova, nati, Yehova, ndikupemphani, atidzerenso munthu wa Mulungu mudamtumayo, natilangize icho tizichitira mwanayo akadzabadwa." 
Judges13:9 Ndipo Mulungu anamvera mau a Manowa; ndi mthenga wa Mulungu anamdzeranso mkaziyo, pamene anali m'munda, mwamuna wake Manowa palibe." 
Judges13:10 Ndipo mkaziyo anafulumira nathamanga, nauza mwamuna wake, nanena naye, Taona, wandionekera munthu anandidzerayo tsiku lija." 
Judges13:11 Nanyamuka Manowa natsata mkazi wake, namdzera mwamuna uja, nanena naye, Kodi ndinu mwamuna uja munalankhula ndi mkaziyu? Ndipo anati, Ndine amene." 
Judges13:12 Nati Manowa, Achitike tsopano mau anu; koma makhalidwe ake a mwanayo ndi machitidwe ake adzatani?" 
Judges13:13 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Manowa, Zonse ndinazinena ndi mkazi azisamalire." 
Judges13:14 Chilichonse chichokera kumpesa asadyeko, asamwe vinyo kapena choledzeretsa, kapena kudya chilichonse chodetsa; zonse ndinamlamulira azisunge." 
Judges13:15 Ndipo Manowa anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova, Tiloleni tikuchedwetseni kuti tikukonzereni mwanawambuzi." 
Judges13:16 Koma mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Manowa, Ungakhale undichedwetsa, sindidzadya mkate wako; ndipo ukakonza nsembe yopsereza, uziipereka kwa Yehova. Pakuti Manowa sanadziwe kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova." 
Judges13:17 Ndipo Manowa anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova, Dzina lanu ndani, kuti, atachitika mau anu, tikuchitireni ulemu." 
Judges13:18 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye, Ufunsiranji dzina langa, popeza lili lodabwitsa?" 
Judges13:19 Pamenepo Manowa anatenga mwanawambuzi pamodzi ndi nsembe yaufa, nazipereka kwa Yehova pathanthwe; ndipo mthengayo anachita modabwitsa, ndi Manowa ndi mkazi wake ali chipenyere." 
Judges13:20 Pakuti kunali, pakukwera lawi la moto pa guwa la nsembe kumwamba, mthenga wa Yehova anakwera m'lawi la pa guwalo; ndi Manowa ndi mkazi wake ali chipenyere; nagwa iwowa nkhope zao pansi." 
Judges13:21 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova sanaonekerenso kwa Manowa kapena kwa mkazi wake. Pamenepo anadziwa Manowa kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova. 
Judges13:22 Nati Manowa kwa mkazi wake, Tidzafa ndithu pakuti taona Mulungu." 
Judges13:23 Koma mkazi wake ananena naye, Yehova akadafuna kutipha, sakadalandira nsembe yopsereza ndi nsembe yaufa pa dzanja lathu, kapena kutionetsa izi zonse, kapena kutimvetsa zoterezi nthawi yino." 
Judges13:24 Ndipo mkaziyo anabala mwana wamwamuna namutcha dzina lake Samisoni; nakula mwanayo, Yehova namdalitsa." 
Judges13:25 Ndipo mzimu wa Yehova unayamba kumfulumiza mtima ku misasa ya Dani pakati pa Zora ndi Esitaoli. 
Judges14:1 Ndipo Samisoni anatsikira ku Timna, naona mkazi wa ku Timna wa ana akazi a Afilisti." 
Judges14:2 Nakwera iye, nauza atate wake ndi amai wake, nati, Ndapenya mkazi m'Timna wa ana akazi a Afilisti; ndipo tsono munditengere uyu akhale mkazi wanga." 
Judges14:3 Koma atate wake ndi amai wake ananena naye, Kodi palibe mkazi mwa ana akazi a abale ako, kapena mwa anthu a mtundu wanga onse, kuti wamuka kutenga mkazi wa Afilisti osadulidwawo? Nati Samisoni kwa atate wake, Nditengereni iye, pakuti andikonda pamaso panga." 
Judges14:4 Koma atate wake ndi amai wake sanadziwe kuti chidachokera kwa Yehova ichi; popeza analikufuna kutola chifukwa ndi Afilisti. Ndipo nthawi ija Afilisti analamulira Israele. 
Judges14:5 Pamenepo anatsikira Samisoni, ndi atate wake ndi mai wake ku Timna, nadza ku minda yamphesa ya Timna; ndipo taona, mwana wa mkango wakomana naye namdzumira." 
Judges14:6 Ndipo unamgwera iye kolimba mzimu wa Yehova, naung'amba monga akadang'amba mwanawambuzi, wopanda kanthu m'dzanja lake; koma sanauze atate wake kapena amai wake chimene adachichita." 
Judges14:7 Ndipo anatsika nakamba ndi mkazi, namkonda Samisoni pamaso pake." 
Judges14:8 Atapita masiku ndipo anabweranso kudzamtenga, napatuka iye kukaona mtembo wa mkango; ndipo taona, m'chitanda cha mkango munali njuchi zoundana, ndi uchi." 
Judges14:9 Ndipo anaufula ndi dzanja lake, nayenda, namadya alimkuyenda, nadza kwa atate wake ndi amai wake, nawapatsa, nadya iwo; koma sanawauze kuti adaufula uchiwo m'chitanda cha mkango." 
Judges14:10 Ndipo atate wake anatsikira kwa mkazi; ndi Samisoni anakonzerapo madyerero; pakuti amatero anyamata. 
Judges14:11 Ndipo kunali, pamene anamuona, anabwera nao anzake makumi atatu akhale naye." 
Judges14:12 Nanena nao Samisoni, Mundilole ndikuphereni mwambi; mukanditanthauziratu uwu m'masiku asanuwa a madyerero, ndi kumasulira uwu, ndidzakupatsani malaya a nsalu yabafuta makumi atatu ndi zovala zosinthanitsa makumi atatu;" 
Judges14:13 koma ngati simukhoza kunditanthauzira uwu mudzandipatsa ndinu malaya a nsalu yabafuta makumi atatu ndi zovala zosinthanitsa makumi atatu. Pamenepo ananena naye, Mwambi wako tiumve." 
Judges14:14 Ndipo ananena nao, Chakudya chinatuluka m'mwini kudya, ndi chozuna chinatuluka m'mwini mphamvu. Ndipo masiku atatu sanakhoze kutanthauzira mwambiwo." 
Judges14:15 Koma kunali, tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri anati kwa mkazi wa Samisoni, Kopa mwamuna wako, atitanthauzire mwambiwo; tingatenthe iwe ndi nyumba ya atate wako ndi moto. Kodi mwatiitana kulanda zathu; si momwemo?" 
Judges14:16 Ndipo mkazi wa Samisoni analira pamaso pake, nati, Ungondida, osandikonda; waphera anthu a mtundu wanga mwambi, osanditanthauzira ine. Ndipo ananena naye, Taona, sindinatanthauzira atate wanga kapena amai wanga, kodi ndikutanthauzire iwe?" 
Judges14:17 Ndipo analira pamaso pake masiku asanu ndi awiriwo pochitika madyerero ao; koma kunali kuti tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri anamuuza, popeza anamuumiriza; ndipo anatanthauzira anthu a mtundu wake mwambiwo." 
Judges14:18 Ndipo amuna a pamudzi anati kwa Samisoni tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri, lisanalowe dzuwa, Chozuna choposa uchi nchiyani; ndi champhamvu choposa mkango nchiyani? Pamenepo ananena nao, Mukadapanda kulima ndi ng'ombe yanga, simukadatha kumasulira mwambi wanga." 
Judges14:19 Ndipo mzimu wa Yehova unamgwera Samisoni, natsikira iye kwa Asikeloni, nawakantha amuna makumi atatu, natenga zovala zao, nawapatsa omasulira mwambiwo zovala zosinthanitsa. Koma adapsa mtima, nakwera kunka kunyumba ya atate wake." 
Judges14:20 Ndipo mkazi wake wa Samisoni anakhala wa mnzake, amene adakhala bwenzi lake." 
Judges15:1 Ndipo kunali atapita masiku, nyengo ya kucheka tirigu Samisoni anakacheza ndi mkazi wake ndi kumtengera mwanawambuzi, nati, Ndidzalowa kwa mkazi wanga kuchipinda. Koma atate wake sanamlole kulowamo." 
Judges15:2 Nati atate wake, Ndinanenetsa kuti umuda konse, potero ndinampereka kwa bwenzi lako; mng'ono wake sakoma koposa iye nanga? Ukhale naye, m'malo mwa winayu." 
Judges15:3 Koma Samisoni, ananena nao, Nthawi yino ndikhala wosapalamula pa Afilisti, powachitira choipa ine." 
Judges15:4 Namuka Samisoni, nagwira ankhandwe mazana atatu, natenga miuni, nalunza michira, naika muuni pakati pa michira iwiri iliyonse." 
Judges15:5 Nayatsa miuni, nawataya ku tirigu wosacheka wa Afilisti, natentha miulu, ndi tirigu wosacheka yemwe, ndi minda ya azitona yomwe." 
Judges15:6 Pamenepo Afilisti anati, Wachita ichi ndani? Nati, Samisoni mkamwini wa munthuyo wa ku Timna, popeza analanda mkazi wake, nampereka kwa mnzake. Pamenepo Afilisti anakwera namtentha mkaziyo ndi atate wake ndi moto." 
Judges15:7 Ndipo Samisoni ananena nao, Mukatero ndidzakubwezerani chilango ndi pamenepo ndidzaleka." 
Judges15:8 Ndipo anawakantha nyung'unyu ndi ntchafu, makanthidwe akulu; natsika nakhala m'phanga mwa thanthwe la ku Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Pamenepo Afilisti anakwera, namanga misasa m'Yuda, natandika m'Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Ndipo anthu a Yuda anati, Mwatikwerera chifukwa ninji? Nati iwo, Takwera kumanga Samisoni, kumchitira iye monga anatichitira ife." 
Judges15:11 Pamenepo anatsikira ku phanga la Etamu amuna zikwi zitatu a ku Yuda, nati kwa Samisoni, Sudziwa kodi kuti Afilisti ndiwo akutilamulira ife? Nchiyani ichi watichitira? Nati iye kwa iwowa, Monga anandichitira ine ndawachitira iwo." 
Judges15:12 Ndipo ananena naye, Tatsika ife tikumange, kuti tikupereke m'dzanja la Afilisti, Nanena nao Samisoni, Mundilumbirire kuti simudzandigwera nokha." 
Judges15:13 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Iai, koma kumanga tidzakumanga, ndi kukupereka m'dzanja lao; koma kupha sitikupha iwe. Nammanga iye ndi zingwe ziwiri zatsopano, nakwera naye kuchokera kuthanthwe." 
Judges15:14 Pamene anafika ku Lehi Afilisti anafuula pokomana naye; koma mzimu wa Yehova unamgwera kolimba, ndi zingwe zokhala pa manja ake zinanga thonje lopserera ndi moto, ndi zomangira zake zinanyotsoka pa manja ake." 
Judges15:15 Ndipo anapeza chibwano chatsopano cha bulu, natambasula dzanja lake nachigwira, nakantha nacho amuna chikwi chimodzi." 
Judges15:16 Nati Samisoni, Ndi chibwano cha bulu, miulumiulu, amuna chikwi ndawakantha ndi chibwano cha bulu." 
Judges15:17 Ndipo kunali, atatha kunena, anataya chibwano m'dzanja lake; nawatcha malowo Ramatilehi ndiko kunena chitunda cha chibwano." 
Judges15:18 Ndipo anamva ludzu lambiri, naitana kwa Yehova, nati, Mwapatsa Inu chipulumutso ichi chachikulu ndi dzanja la kapolo wanu; ndipo kodi ndife nalo ludzu tsopano ndi kugwa m'dzanja la osadulidwa awa?" 
Judges15:19 Pamenepo Mulungu anang'amba pokumbika paja pa Lehi, natulukamo madzi; namwa iye, nubwera moyo wake, natsitsimuka iye; chifukwa chake anawatcha dzina lake, Kasupe wa wofuula, ndiwo m'Lehi mpaka lero lino." 
Judges15:20 Ndipo Samisoni anaweruza Israele m'masiku a Afilisti zaka makumi awiri. 
Judges16:1 Ndipo Samisoni anamuka ku Gaza, naonako mkazi wadama, nalowana naye." 
Judges16:2 Koma wina anauza a ku Gaza, ndi kuti, Samisoni walowa kuno. Pamenepo anamzinga, namlalira usiku wonse pa chipata cha mudzi, nakhala chete usiku wonse ndi kuti, Tidikire mpaka kucha, pamenepo tidzamupha." 
Judges16:3 Koma Samisoni anagona mpaka pakati pa usiku, nauka pakati pa usiku, nagwira zitseko za pa chipata cha mudzi, ndi mphuthu ziwirizo, nazichotsa ndi mpiringidzo womwe, naziika pa mapewa ake, nakwera nazo pamwamba pa phiri lili pandunji pa Hebroni." 
Judges16:4 Ndipo pambuyo pake kunali kuti anakonda mkazi m'chigwa cha Soreki, dzina lake ndiye Delila." 
Judges16:5 Ndipo akalonga a Afilisti anamkwerera mkaziyo, nanena naye, Umkope nuone umo muchokera mphamvu yake yaikulu, ndi umo tingakhoze kumtha khama, kuti timmange kumzunza; ndipo tidzakupatsa aliyense ndalama mazana khumi ndi limodzi." 
Judges16:6 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samisoni, Ndikupempha, undiuze umo muchokera mphamvu yako yaikulu, ndi chimene angakumange nacho, kuti akuzunze." 
Judges16:7 Nanena naye Samisoni, Akandimanga nazo nsinga zatsopano zisanu ndi ziwiri zosauma, ndidzakhala wofooka, wakunga munthu wina." 
Judges16:8 Pamenepo akalonga a Afilisti anakwera nazo kwa mkaziyo nsinga zatsopano zisanu ndi ziwiri zosauma; ndipo iye anammanga nazo. 
Judges16:9 Koma anali nao omlalira m'chipinda cha m'kati. Nanena naye, Afilisti akugwera, Samisoni. Pamenepo anadula nsingazi, monga iduka m'khosi yathonje pokhudza moto. M'mwemo mphamvu yake siinadziwike." 
Judges16:10 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samisoni, Taona, wandipusitsa, ndi kundiuza mabodza; undiuze tsopano, ndikupempha, chimene angakumange nacho." 
Judges16:11 Nanena naye, Akandimangitsa nazo zingwe zatsopano, zosagwira nazo ntchito pamenepo ndidzakhala wofooka wakunga munthu wina." 
Judges16:12 Ndipo Delila anatenga nsinga zatsopano, nammanga nazo, nanena naye, Afilisti akugwera, Samisoni. Ndi omlalira analikulinda m'chipinda cha m'kati. Koma anazidula pa manja ake ngati thonje." 
Judges16:13 Pamenepo Delila anati kwa Samisoni, Mpaka tsopano wandipusitsa, ndi kundiuza mabodza; undiuze chimene angakumange nacho. Nanena naye, Ukaomba njombi zisanu ndi ziwiri za pamutu panga mwa thonje loyala ndiko." 
Judges16:14 Ndipo anachimanga ndi phanga, nati kwa iye, Akugwera Afilisti, Samisoni; nagalamuka iye patulo take, nazula phanga la pamtanda, ndi thonje loyala lomwe." 
Judges16:15 Pamenepo ananena naye, Ukati bwanji, Ndikukonda, osamvana nane mtima wako? Wandipusitsa katatu tsopano, osandiuza umo muchokera mphamvu yako yaikulu." 
Judges16:16 Ndipo kunali, popeza anamuumiriza masiku onse ndi mau ake, namkakamiza, moyo wake unavutika nkufuna kufa." 
Judges16:17 Pomwepo anamfotokozera mtima wake wonse, nanena naye, Pamutu panga sipanapite lumo, pakuti ndine Mnaziri wa Mulungu chiyambire mimba ya mai wanga; akandimeta, mphamvu yanga idzandichokera, ndidzakhala wofooka wakunga munthu wina aliyense." 
Judges16:18 Ndipo pamene Delila anaona kuti adamfotokozera mtima wake wonse, anatuma naitana akalonga a Afilisti, ndi kuti, Kwerani nthawi yino, pakuti wandifotokozera za mtima wake wonse. Nakwera akalonga a Afilisti nadza kwa iye nabwera nazo ndalamazo m'dzanja lao." 
Judges16:19 Pamenepo anamgonetsa pa mabondo ake, naitana munthu, nameta njombi zake zisanu ndi ziwiri; nayamba kumzunza, nimchokera mphamvu yake." 
Judges16:20 Ndipo anati, Afilisti akugwera, Samisoni. Nagalamuka iye m'tulo take, nati, Ndizituluka ngati nthawi zina, ndi kudzitakasika. Koma sanadziwe kuti Yehova adamchokera." 
Judges16:21 Pamenepo Afilisti anamgwira, namkolowola maso, natsika naye ku Gaza, nammanga ndi maunyolo amkuwa; namperetsa m'kaidi." 
Judges16:22 Koma atammetsa tsitsi la pamutu pake linayamba kumeranso. 
Judges16:23 Ndipo anasonkhana akalonga a Afilisti kuperekera Dagoni mulungu wao nsembe yaikulu, ndi kusekerera; pakuti anati, Mulungu wathu wapereka Samisoni mdani wathu m'dzanja lathu." 
Judges16:24 Ndipo pakumuona anthu analemekeza mulungu wao, pakuti anati, Mulungu wathu wapereka m'dzanja lathu mdani wathu, ndiye wakupasula dziko lathu, amene anatiphera ambiri." 
Judges16:25 Ndipo kunali, pakukondwera mitima yao, anati, Kaitaneni Samisoni, atisewerere. Naitana Samisoni m'kaidi; nasewera iye pamaso pao; ndipo anamuka iye pakati pa mizati." 
Judges16:26 Ndipo Samisoni anati kwa mnyamata womgwira dzanja, Ndileke, ndikhudze mizati imene nyumba ikhazikikapo, kuti nditsamirepo." 
Judges16:27 Koma nyumbayi inadzala ndi amuna ndi akazi; ndi akalonga onse a Afilisti anali momwemo ndi patsindwi panali amuna ndi akazi ngati zikwi zitatu akuyang'ana pakusewera Samisoni. 
Judges16:28 Pamenepo Samisoni anaitana kwa Yehova, nati, Yehova, Mulungu, mundikumbukire, ndikupemphani, ndi kundilimbitsa, ndikupemphani, nthawi yino yokha, Mulungu, kuti ndidzilipsiriretu tsopano apa Afilisti, chifukwa cha maso anga awiri." 
Judges16:29 Ndipo Samisoni anagwira mizati iwiri ya pakati imene nyumba inakhazikikapo, natsamirapo wina ndi dzanja lamanja, ndi unzake ndi dzanja lamanzere." 
Judges16:30 Nati Samisoni, Ndife nao Afilisti; nadziweramira mwamphamvu; ndipo nyumba idagwa pa akalonga, ndi pa anthu onse anali m'mwemo. Motero akufa amene anawapha pa kufa kwake anaposa amene anawapha akali moyo." 
Judges16:31 Pamenepo anatsika abale ake ndi banja lonse la atate wake, namnyamula, nakwera naye, namuika pakati pa Zora ndi Esitaoli, m'manda a Manowa atate wake. Ndipo adaweruza Israele zaka makumi awiri." 
Judges17:1 Ndipo ku mapiri a Efuremu kunali munthu dzina lake ndiye Mika. 
Judges17:2 Ndipo iye anati kwa amai wake, Ndalama zija mazana khumi ndi limodzi anakuberani zimene munatembererapo, ndi kunenanso m'makutu mwanga, taonani ndalamazo ndili nazo, ndinazitenga ndine. Pamenepo amai wake anati, Yehova adalitse mwana wanga." 
Judges17:3 Nabwezera amake ndalama zija mazana khumi ndi limodzi; nati amai wake, Kupatula ndapatulira Yehova ndalamazo zichoke ku dzanja langa, zimuke kwa mwana wanga, kupanga nazo fano losema ndi fano loyenga; m'mwemo ndikubwezera izi." 
Judges17:4 Ndipo pamene anambwezera mai wake ndalamazo, mai wake anatapako ndalama mazana awiri, nazipereka kwa woyenga, ndiye anazipanga fano losema ndi fano loyenga; ndipo linakhala m'nyumba ya Mika." 
Judges17:5 Koma munthuyu Mika anali nayo nyumba ya milungu, napanga chovala cha wansembe, ndi timafano, namninkha zansembe mwana wake wina wamwamuna, amene anakhala wansembe wake." 
Judges17:6 Masikuwa panalibe mfumu m'Israele, yense anachita chomuyenera m'maso mwake." 
Judges17:7 Ndipo panali mnyamata wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda wa banja la Yuda, ndiye Mlevi, nagonera iye komweko." 
Judges17:8 Adachokera munthuyo m'mudzi m'Betelehemu-Yuda, kugonera paliponse akapeza pokhala; ndi pa ulendo wake anafika ku mapiri a Efuremu, kunyumba ya Mika." 
Judges17:9 Ndipo Mika ananena naye, Ufumira kuti? Nati kwa iye, Ndine Mlevi wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda, ndilikumuka kugonera kumene ndikapeza pokhala." 
Judges17:10 Nanena naye Mika, Khalitsa nane, nukhale atate wanga, ndi wansembe wanga, ndipo ndidzakupatsa ndalama khumi pachaka, ndi chovala chofikira, ndi zakudya zako. Nalowa Mleviyo." 
Judges17:11 Ndi Mleviyo anavomera kukhalitsa ndi munthuyo; ndi mnyamatayo anamkhalira ngati mmodzi wa ana ake. 
Judges17:12 Ndipo Mika anamninkha zansembe Mleviyo, ndi mnyamatayo anakhala wansembe wake, nakhala m'nyumba ya Mika." 
Judges17:13 Nati Mika, Tsopano ndidziwa kuti Yehova adzandichitira chokoma, popeza ndili naye Mlevi akhale wansembe wanga." 
Judges18:1 Masiku ajawo panalibe mfumu m'Israele; masiku ajanso fuko la Adani anadzifunira cholowa chakukhalako; pakuti kufikira tsiku lija sichinawagwera cholowa chao pakati pa mafuko a Israele. 
Judges18:2 Ndipo ana a Dani anatuma a banja lao amuna asanu a mwa iwo onse, anthu olimba mtima, a ku Zora, ndi a ku Esitaoli, kuzonda dziko ndi kufunafunamo; nanena nao, Mukani, mufunefune m'dziko. Nafika iwo ku mapiri a Efuremu kunyumba ya Mika, nagona komweko." 
Judges18:3 Pokhala iwo m'nyumba ya Mika, anazindikira mau a mnyamata Mleviyo, napatukirako, nanena naye, Anadza nawe kuno ndani? Uchitanji muno? Ukhala nacho chiyani kuno?" 
Judges18:4 Ndipo ananena nao, Mika anandichitira chakutichakuti, napangana nane za ntchito, ndipo ndikhala wansembe wake." 
Judges18:5 Pamenepo ananena naye, Utifunsire kwa Mulungu, kuti tidziwe ngati ulendo wathu timukawo udzakoma." 
Judges18:6 Nanena nao wansembeyo, Mukani mumtendere, ulendo wanu muyendawo uli pamaso pa Yehova." 
Judges18:7 Pamenepo amuna asanuwa anachoka, nafika ku Laisi; naona anthu anali m'mwemo, kuti anakhala okhazikika mtima, monga anakhala Asidoni, odekha ndi osatekeseka; popeza m'dzikomo munalibe mwini bwalo wakuchititsa manyazi m'chinthu chilichonse; nasiyana kutali ndi Asidoni, ndipo analibe kanthu ndi munthu aliyense." 
Judges18:8 Ndipo asanuwo anafikanso kwa abale ao ku Zora ndi Esitaoli; ndi abale ao ananena nao, Mutani inu?" 
Judges18:9 Nati iwo, Taukani, tiwakwerere; pakuti tapenya dziko, ndipo taonani, ndilo lokoma ndithu; ndi inu muli chete kodi? Musamachita ulesi kumuka ndi kulowa kulandira dzikolo." 
Judges18:10 Pomuka inu mudzafikira anthu okhazikika mtima ndi dziko lachitando; pakuti Mulungu walipereka m'dzanja lanu; pamenepo mposasowa kanthu kalikonse kali pa dziko lapansi. 
Judges18:11 Pamenepo amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi, omangira zida za nkhondo m'chuuno, anaphumulako a banja la a Dani, anachokera ku Zora, ndi ku Esitaoli." 
Judges18:12 Nakwera namanga misasa m'Kiriyati-Yearimu, m'Yuda; chifukwa chake anatcha dzina lake la malowo chigono cha Dani, mpaka lero; taona, ali m'tseri mwa Kiriyati-Yearimu." 
Judges18:13 Ndipo anapitirira komweko kunka ku mapiri a Efuremu, nadza kunyumba ya Mika." 
Judges18:14 Pamenepo anayankha amuna asanu anamukawo kukazonda dziko la Laisi, nanena ndi abale ao, Kodi mudziwa kuti m'nyumba izi muli chovala cha wansembe, ndi timafano ndi fano losema, ndi fano lonyenga? Ndipo tsopano dziwani choyenera inu kuchita." 
Judges18:15 Napatuka iwo kumkako, nafika kunyumba ya mnyamata Mleviyo, ndiyo nyumba ya Mika, namfunsa ngati ali bwanji." 
Judges18:16 Ndipo amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi omangira zida zao za nkhondo m'chuuno, ndiwo a ana a Dani, analikuima polowera pa chipata;" 
Judges18:17 koma amuna asanu omukawo kukazonda dziko anakwera analowako, natenga fano losema, ndi chovala cha wansembe ndi timafano, ndi fano loyenga; ndi wansembe anaima polowera pa chipata pamodzi ndi amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi omangira zida za nkhondo m'chuuno." 
Judges18:18 Atalowa iwo m'nyumba ya Mika, natengako fano losema, chovala cha wansembe, ndi timafano, ndi fano loyenga, wansembeyo ananena nao, Muchitanji?" 
Judges18:19 Ndipo ananena naye, Khala chete, tseka pakamwa pako, numuke nafe, nutikhalire atate ndi wansembe wathu; chikukomera nchiti, kukhala wansembe wa nyumba ya munthu mmodzi, kapena kukhala wansembe wa fuko ndi banja m'Israele?" 
Judges18:20 Nukondwera mtima wa wansembeyo, natenga iye chovala cha wansembe, ndi timafano ndi fano losema, nalowa pakati pa anthu." 
Judges18:21 Atatero anabwerera, nachoka, natsogoza ana ang'ono ndi zoweta ndi akatundu." 
Judges18:22 Atafika kutali ndi nyumba ya Mika, Mikayo anawamemeza amuna a m'nyumba zoyandikizana ndi yake, natsata ndi kuwapeza ana a Dani." 
Judges18:23 Ndipo anafuula kwa ana a Dani. Nacheuka iwo nati kwa Mika, Chakusowa chiyani, kuti wamemeza anthu ako?" 
Judges18:24 Nati iye, Mwanditengera milungu yanga ndinaipanga, ndi wansembe, ndi kuchoka; chinditsaliranso chiyani? Ndipo muneneranji kwa ine, Chakusowa nchiyani?" 
Judges18:25 Koma ana a Dani anati kwa iye, Mau ako asamveke ndi ife, angakugwere anthu owawa mtima, nukataya moyo wako ndi wa iwo a m'nyumba mwako." 
Judges18:26 Nayenda ulendo wao ana a Dani; ndipo Mika pakuona kuti anamposa mphamvu, anatembenuka nabwerera kunyumba kwake." 
Judges18:27 M'mwemo anatenga zimene Mika adachipanga, ndi wansembe anali naye, nafika ku Laisi, kwa anthu odekha ndi okhazikika mtima, nawakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, natentha mudzi wao ndi moto." 
Judges18:28 Ndipo panalibe wolanditsa, popeza ku Sidoni nkutali, ndipo analibe kuyenderana ndi anthu ena; ndiko ku chigwa chokhala ku Beterehobu. Pamenepo anamanganso mudziwo, nakhala m'mwemo." 
Judges18:29 Ndipo analitcha dzina la mudziwo Dani, kutsata dzina la atate wao Dani wombala Israele; koma poyambapo dzina la mudzi linali Laisi." 
Judges18:30 Ndipo ana a Dani anadziimitsira fano losemalo; ndi Yonatani mwana wa Geresomo mwana wa Manase, iye ndi ana ake amuna anali ansembe a fuko la Adani mpaka tsiku lija anatenga ndende anthu a m'dziko." 
Judges18:31 Motero anadziikira fano losema la Mika, limene adalipanga, masiku onse okhala nyumba ya Mulungu ku Silo." 
Judges19:1 Ndipo kunali, masiku aja, pamene panalibe mfumu m'Israele, panali munthu Mlevi wogonera kuseri kwa mapiri a Efuremu amene anadzitengera mkazi wamng'ono wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda." 
Judges19:2 Koma mkazi wake wamng'ono anachita chigololo akali naye, namchokera kunka kunyumba ya atate wake ku Betelehemu-Yuda, nakhalako nthawi ya miyezi inai." 
Judges19:3 Koma anauka mwamuna wake namtsata kukamba naye zamtima, kumbwezanso; napita ndi mnyamata wake, ndi abulu awiri. Ndipo mkaziyo anadza naye kunyumba ya atate wake. Ndipo pakumuona atate wa mkaziyo anakondwera kukomana naye." 
Judges19:4 Ndipo mpongozi wake, ndiye atate wa mkaziyo, anamuimika kuti akhale naye masiku atatu; nadya namwa nagona komweko." 
Judges19:5 Ndipo kunali, tsiku lachinai, analawirira mamawa, nanyamuka iye kuchoka; koma atate wa mkaziyo anati kwa mkamwini wake, Limbitsa mtima wako ndi mkate pang'ono, ndipo utatero upite." 
Judges19:6 Nakhala pansi nadya namwa onse awiri pamodzi; nati kwa munthuyo atate wa mkaziyo, Uvomere, ugone kuno usiku, nusekerere mtima wako." 
Judges19:7 Ndipo munthuyo ananyamuka kuti amuke; koma mpongozi wakeyo anamkakamiza, nagonanso komweko." 
Judges19:8 Nalawirira mamawa tsiku lachisanu kuti amuke, koma atate wa mkaziyo anati, Ulimbitse mtima wako, nulindire lipendeke dzuwa; nadya iwo onse awiri." 
Judges19:9 Pamenepo munthuyo ananyamuka kuchoka, iye ndi mkazi wake wamng'ono ndi mnyamata wake; koma mpongozi wake, atate wa mkaziyo, ananena naye, Tapenya, lapendeka dzuwa, ugone kuno usiku; tapenya lapendekatu dzuwa, ugone kuno, nusekerere mtima wako; nimulawire mamawa kunka ulendo wanu kwanu." 
Judges19:10 Koma munthuyo anakana kugonako usiku, nanyamuka, nachoka, nadza pandunji pa Yebusi (ndiwo Yerusalemu); ndi pamodzi naye panali abulu awiri omangirira mbereko; anali nayenso mkazi wake wamng'ono." 
Judges19:11 Pofika iwo pa Yebusi linalimkulowa dzuwa, ndi mnyamata anati kwa mbuye wake, Tiyeni, tipatukire mudzi uwu wa Ayebusi ndi kugona pomwepa." 
Judges19:12 Koma mbuye wake ananena naye, Tisapatukire mudzi wachilendo, wosati wa ana a Israele, koma tipitirire kunka ku Gibea." 
Judges19:13 Nati kwa mnyamata wake, Tiyeni, tiyandikire kwinako: tigone m'Gibea, kapena m'Rama." 
Judges19:14 Napitirira iwo, nayenda, ndi dzuwa linawalowera pafupi pa Gibea, ndiwo wa Benjamini." 
Judges19:15 Napatukirako, kuti alowe nagone ku Gibea; nalowa iye, nakhala pansi m'khwalala la mudziwo, pakuti panalibe wina wowalandira m'nyumba agonemo, wakuwapatsa pogona." 
Judges19:16 Ndipo taonani, munthu nkhalamba anachokera ku ntchito yake kumunda madzulo; munthuyu ndiye wa ku mapiri a Efuremu, nagonera ku Gibea; koma anthu pamenepo ndiwo Abenjamini." 
Judges19:17 Pamene anakweza maso ake anaona munthu wa pa ulendoyo m'khwalala la mudzi; ndi nkhalambayo inati, Umuka kuti? Ufumira kuti?" 
Judges19:18 Ndipo ananena nayo, Tili kuchokera ku Betelehemu-Yuda, kunka ku mbali za mapiri a Efuremu, ndiko ndifumira ine; koma ndidamuka ku Betelehemu-Yuda; ndipo tsopano ndili kumuka kunyumba ya Yehova; koma palibe munthu wondipatsa nyumba." 
Judges19:19 Ngakhale udzu ndi chakudya cha abulu athu ziliko; ndi mkate ndi vinyo zilikonso kwa ine ndi kwa mdzakazi wako ndi kwa mnyamata wokhala ndi akapolo ako; kosasowa kanthu. 
Judges19:20 Ndipo nkhalambayo inati, Mtendere ukhale ndi iwe, komatu, zosowa zako zonse ndidzakupatsa ndi ine; pokhapo usagone m'khwalala." 
Judges19:21 Pamenepo anamlonga m'nyumba yake, napatsa abulu chakudya; ndipo iwo anasamba mapazi ao, nadya, namwa." 
Judges19:22 Pokondweretsa iwo mitima yao, taonani amuna a m'mudziwo, ndiwo anthu otama zopanda pake, anazinga nyumba, nagogodagogoda pachitseko; nati kwa mwini nyumba nkhalambayo ndi kuti, Tulutsa mwamunayo adalowa m'nyumba mwako kuti timdziwe." 
Judges19:23 Ndipo munthu mwini nyumba anawatulukira nanena nao, Iai, abale anga, musachite choipa chotere; popeza mwamuna uyu walowa m'nyumba mwanga, musachite chopusa ichi." 
Judges19:24 Taonani, mwana wanga wamkazi ndiye namwali, ndi mkazi wake wamng'ono siwa; ndiwatulutse iwo, muwachepetse iwo, ndi kuwachitira monga muyesa chokoma; koma mwamuna uyu musamchitire chopusa ichi." 
Judges19:25 Koma amunawo sanafune kumvera; motero munthuyu anagwira mkazi wake wamng'ono, natuluka naye kwa iwo kunja; namdziwa iwo, nachita naye zoipa usiku wonse mpaka m'mawa; namlola achoke mbandakucha." 
Judges19:26 Nadza mkaziyo, kutacha, nagwa pakhomo pa nyumba ya munthu padali mbuye wake, kufikira kutayera." 
Judges19:27 Pamene mbuye wake anauka mamawa, natsegula pakhomo pa nyumba, natuluka kunka ulendo wake, taona, mkazi wake wamng'ono, atagwa pakhomo pa nyumba ndi manja ake pachiundo." 
Judges19:28 Ndipo ananena naye, Tauka, timuke; koma panalibe womyankha. Pamenepo anamuika pa bulu; nanyamuka mwamunayo, namka kwao." 
Judges19:29 Ndipo pofika iye kunyumba kwake, anatenga mpeni, nagwira mkazi wake wamng'onoyo namgawa chiwalochiwalo magawo khumi ndi awiri, namtumiza ku malire onse a Israele." 
Judges19:30 Ndipo kunali kuti onse amene anachiona anati, Sichinachitika, inde sichinaoneka chotere chiyambire tsiku lokwera ana a Israele kutuluka m'dziko la Ejipito mpaka lero lino; lingiriranipo, mupangane nzeru, nimunene." 
Judges20:1 Pamenepo anatuluka ana onse a Israele, nuunjikana msonkhano kwa Yehova ku Mizipa ngati munthu mmodzi, kuyambira ku Dani mpaka Beereseba ndi dziko la Giliyadi lomwe." 
Judges20:2 Ndipo akulu a anthu onse a mafuko onse a Israele anadziimika mu msonkhano wa anthu a Mulungu, anthu oyenda pansi zikwi mazana anai akusolola lupanga." 
Judges20:3 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anamva kuti ana a Israele adakwera kunka ku Mizipa. Nati ana a Israele, Nenani, choipa ichi chinachitika bwanji?" 
Judges20:4 Ndipo Mlevi, mwamuna wa mkazi anaphedwayo, anayankha nati, Ndinadza ine ku Gibea wa Benjamini, ine ndi mkazi wanga wamng'ono, kugonako." 
Judges20:5 Nandiukira eni ake a Gibea, nandizingira nyumba usiku; nafuna kundipha ine, namchitira choipa mkazi wanga wamng'ono, nafa iye." 
Judges20:6 Pamenepo ndinagwira mkazi wanga wamng'ono ndi kumgawa ndi kumtumiza m'dziko lonse la cholowa cha Israele, pakuti anachita chochititsa manyazi ndi chopusa m'Israele." 
Judges20:7 Taonani, inu nonse, ndinu ana a Israele, mudzinenere mau ndi kudzipangira nokha kuno." 
Judges20:8 Ndipo anthu onse anauka ngati munthu mmodzi, ndi kuti, Palibe mmodzi wa ife adzamuka kuhema kwake, kapena kupatukira nyumba yake," 
Judges20:9 koma tsopano ichi ndicho tidzachitira Gibea: tidzaukwerera ndi kulota maere. 
Judges20:10 Ndipo tidzatapa amuna khumi limodzi pa zana limodzi, mwa mafuko onse a Israele; ndi zana limodzi pa zikwi chimodzi, ndi chikwi chimodzi pa zikwi khumi kutengera anthu kamba; kuti pakufika ku Gibea wa Benjamini, auchitire monga mwa chopusa chonse unachita m'Israele." 
Judges20:11 Potero amuna onse a Israele anasonkhanira mudziwo, olunzika ngati munthu mmodzi." 
Judges20:12 Ndipo mafuko a Israele anatuma anthu mwa fuko lonse la Benjamini, ndi kuti, Choipa chanji ichi chinachitika mwa inu?" 
Judges20:13 Ndipo tsopano perekani amunawo otama zopanda pake, okhala m'Gibea, kuti tiwaphe, ndi kuchotsera Israele choipachi. Koma Benjamini sanafune kumvera mau a abale ao, ana a Israele." 
Judges20:14 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anasonkhana kuchokera kumidzi kunka ku Gibea, kuti atuluke kulimbana ndi ana a Israele." 
Judges20:15 Ndipo anawerenga ana a Benjamini a m'midzi tsiku lija amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi akusolola lupanga; osawerenga okhala m'Gibea, ndiwo amuna osankhika mazana asanu ndi awiri." 
Judges20:16 Mwa anthu awa onse munali amuna osankhika mazana asanu ndi awiri amanzere, yense wa iwo amaponya mwala mwa maluli osaphonya." 
Judges20:17 Ndipo anawerenga amuna a Israele, osati Benjamini, amuna zikwi mazana anai osolola lupanga, anthu a nkhondo okhaokha." 
Judges20:18 Nauka ana a Israele, nakwera kunka ku Betele, nafunsira kwa Mulungu, nati, Ayambe ndani kutikwerera pa ana a Benjamini? Ndipo Yehova anati, Ayambe ndi Yuda." 
Judges20:19 Nauka ana a Israele m'mawa, naumangira Gibea misasa." 
Judges20:20 Ndipo amuna a Israele anatuluka kulimbana ndi Benjamini; ndi amuna a Israele anawandandalikira nkhondo ku Gibea. 
Judges20:21 Pamenepo ana a Benjamini anatuluka m'Gibea, naononga a Israele tsiku lija zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri, kuwagoneka pansi." 
Judges20:22 Koma anthu, ndiwo amuna a Israele, anadzilimbitsa nanikanso nkhondo kumene anandandalika tsiku loyambalo." 
Judges20:23 Ndipo ana a Israele anakwera nalira misozi pamaso pa Yehova mpaka madzulo; nafunsira kwa Yehova ndi kuti, Ndiyandikizenso kodi kulimbana nkhondo ndi ana a Benjamini mbale wanga? Ndipo Yehova anati, Mumkwerere." 
Judges20:24 Potero ana a Israele anayandikira ana a Benjamini m'mawa mwake. 
Judges20:25 Ndipo Benjamini anawatulukira ku Gibea m'mawa mwake, naononganso a ana a Israele amuna zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu kuwagoneka pansi; ndiwo onse osolola lupanga." 
Judges20:26 Pamenepo ana onse a Israele ndi anthu onse anakwera nafika ku Betele, nalira misozi, nakhala pansi pomwepo pamaso pa Yehova, nasala chakudya tsiku lomwelo mpaka madzulo; napereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zoyamika pamaso pa Yehova." 
Judges20:27 Ndipo ana a Israele anafunsira kwa Yehova; pakuti likasa la chipangano la Mulungu linakhala komweko masiku aja," 
Judges20:28 namaima ku likasalo Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara mwana wa Aroni, masiku aja; nati, Kodi nditulukenso kulimbana nkhondo ndi ana a Benjamini mbale wanga, kapena ndileke? Ndipo Yehova anati, Kwerani, pakuti mawa ndidzampereka m'dzanja lako." 
Judges20:29 Ndipo Israele anaika olalira Gibea pozungulira pake. 
Judges20:30 Ndipo ana a Israele anakwerera ana a Benjamini tsiku lachitatu, nanika pa Gibea monga nthawi zina." 
Judges20:31 Natuluka ana a Benjamini kukomana ndi anthuwo, nakokedwa kutali ndi mudzi, nayamba kuwakantha ndi kuwapha anthu amuna a Israele, ngati makumi atatu monga nthawi zina, m'makwalala, limodzi la awo lokwera kunka ku Betele, ndi lina ku Gibea kuthengo." 
Judges20:32 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anati, Tawakantha pamaso pathu monga poyamba paja. Koma ana a Israele anati, Tithawe, tiwakokere kutali ndi mudzi kumakwalala." 
Judges20:33 Nauka amuna onse a Israele m'malo ao nanika ku Baala-Tamara; natuluka Aisraele olalira aja m'malo mwao, kumwera kwa Geba." 
Judges20:34 Ndipo anadza pandunji pa Gibea amuna osankhika m'Israele monse zikwi khumi, nikula nkhondo; koma sanadziwe kuti choipa chili pafupi kuwakhudza." 
Judges20:35 Ndipo Yehova anakantha Benjamini pamaso pa Israele; ndi ana a Israele anawaononga a Benjamini tsiku lija amuna zikwi makumi awiri ndi zisanu, kudza zana limodzi; awa onse ndiwo akusolola lupanga." 
Judges20:36 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anaona kuti takanthidwa; popeza amuna a Israele anawapatsa Abenjamini malo, pakuti anatama olalira amene anawaikiratu pa Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Nafulumira olalirawo nathamangira Gibea, nabalalika olalirawo, nakantha mudzi wonse ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
Judges20:38 Koma kunali chizindikiro choikika pakati pa amuna a Israele ndi olalirawo, ndicho chakuti afukitse mtambo wa utsi kumudzi." 
Judges20:39 Ndi nkhondo ya Israele inathawa, ndipo Benjamini anayamba kuwakantha ndi kuwagwaza amuna a Israele, ngati amuna makumi atatu, pakuti anati, Ndithu tawakantha konse pamaso pathu, monga ku nkhondo yoyambayo." 
Judges20:40 Koma pamene mtambo unayamba kukwera m'mudzi ngati utsi uli tolo, Abenjamini anacheuka, ndipo taonani, pamodzi ponse panafuka utsi kumwamba." 
Judges20:41 Natembenuka amuna a Israele; nadabwa amuna a Benjamini; popeza anaona kuti chidawagwera choipa. 
Judges20:42 Nabwerera iwo pamaso pa amuna a Israele kunka njira ya chipululu; koma nkhondo inawalondetsa; ndi aja otuluka m'mudzi anawaononga pakati pao. 
Judges20:43 Anawazinga Abenjamini, anawapirikitsa, nawapondereza pampumulo mpaka pandunji pa Gibea, kotulukira dzuwa." 
Judges20:44 Ndipo adagwa a Benjamini amuna zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu; iwo onse ndiwo ngwazi. 
Judges20:45 Natembenuka iwo, nathawira kuchipululu ku thanthwe la Rimoni; koma anawakunkha m'makwalala amuna zikwi zisanu; nawalondetsa ku Gidomu, nakantha a iwowa amuna zikwi ziwiri." 
Judges20:46 Potero onse amene adagwa a Benjamini tsiku lija, ndiwo amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu, akusolola lupanga; iwo onse ndiwo ngwazi." 
Judges20:47 Koma amuna mazana asanu ndi limodzi anabwerera nathawira kuchipululu, ku thanthwe la Rimoni, nakhala m'thanthwe la Rimoni miyezi inai." 
Judges20:48 Ndipo amuna a Israele anabwereranso kwa ana a Benjamini, nawakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa a m'mudzi wonse, ndi zoweta, ndi zonse adazipeza; anatenthanso midzi yonse anaipeza." 
Judges21:1 Koma amuna a Israele adalumbira ku Mizipa, ndi kuti, Palibe mmodzi wa ife adzapereka mwana wake wamkazi kwa Mbenjamini akhale mkazi wake." 
Judges21:2 Ndipo anthu anadza ku Betele, nakhala pansi pomwepo pamaso pa Mulungu mpaka madzulo; nakweza mau ao ndi kulira misozi yambiri." 
Judges21:3 Nati iwo, Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, chachitika ichi chifukwa ninji m'Israele, kuti lasowa lero fuko limodzi m'Israele?" 
Judges21:4 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwake, anthu analawirira mamawa namangako guwa la nsembe, napereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zoyamika." 
Judges21:5 Nati ana a Israele, Ndani iye mwa mafuko onse a Israele amene sanakwere kudza kumsonkhano kwa Yehova? Pakuti panali lumbiro lalikulu pa iye wosakwera kudza kwa Yehova ku Mizipa, ndi kuti, Aphedwe ndithu." 
Judges21:6 Ndipo ana a Israele anamva chifundo chifukwa cha Benjamini mbale wao, nati, Fuko limodzi lalikhidwa pa Israele leroli." 
Judges21:7 Tidzatani kuwafunira otsalawo akazi, popeza tinalumbira ife pa Yehova kuti sitidzawapatsa ana athu akazi akhale akazi ao?" 
Judges21:8 Nati iwo, Kodi pali lina la mafuko a Israele losakwera kudza kwa Yehova ku Mizipa? Ndipo taonani, kuchokera ku Yabesi-Giliyadi sanadze mmodzi kumisasa, kumsonkhano." 
Judges21:9 Pakuti pamene anawerenga anthu, taonani, panalibe mmodzi komweko wa okhala m'Yabesi-Giliyadi." 
Judges21:10 Ndipo msonkhano unatumizako amuna zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri, ndiwo ngwazi, nawalamulira ndi kuti, Mukani, nimuwakanthe okhala m'Yabesi-Giliyadi ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi akazi ndi ana ang'ono." 
Judges21:11 Ndipo chimene mukachite ndi ichi: mukaononge konse mwamuna aliyense, ndi mkazi aliyense wodziwa mwamuna mogona naye." 
Judges21:12 Ndipo anapeza mwa anthu a Yabesi-Giliyadi anamwali mazana anai osadziwa mwamuna mogona naye; nabwera nao kumisasa ku Silo, ndiwo a m'dziko la Kanani." 
Judges21:13 Ndipo msonkhano wonse unatumiza mau kwa ana a Benjamini okhala m'thanthwe la Rimoni, nawalalikira mtendere." 
Judges21:14 Nakwera Abenjamini nthawi ija, ndipo anawapatsa akazi amene anawasunga amoyo mwa akazi a Yabesi-Giliyadi; koma sanawafikire." 
Judges21:15 Ndipo anthu anamva chifundo pa Benjamini, pakuti Yehova adang'amba mafuko a Israele." 
Judges21:16 Pamenepo akulu a msonkhano anati, Tidzatani, kuwafunira akazi otsalawo, popeza akazi anatha psiti m'Benjamini?" 
Judges21:17 Nati iwo, Pakhale cholowa cha iwo opulumuka a Benjamini, lingafafanizidwe fuko m'Israele." 
Judges21:18 Koma sitikhoza ife kuwapatsa ana athu akazi akhale akazi ao; pakuti ana a Israele adalumbira ndi kuti, Atembereredwe wakupatsa Abenjamini mkazi." 
Judges21:19 Nati iwo, Taonani, pali madyerero a Yehova chaka ndi chaka ku Silo, ndiko kumpoto kwa Betele, kum'mawa kwa mseu wokwera kuchokera ku Betele kunka ku Sekemu, ndi kumwera kwa Lebona." 
Judges21:20 Ndipo analamulira ana a Benjamini ndi kuti, Mukani, mulalire m'minda yamphesa;" 
Judges21:21 nimuyang'ane, ndipo taonani, atatuluka ana akazi a Silo kuvinavina, pamenepo mutuluke m'minda yamphesa ndi kudzigwirira yense mkazi wake mwa ana akazi a Silo, ndi kumuka naye ku dziko la Benjamini." 
Judges21:22 Ndipo kudzali, akatifikira atate ao kapena alongo ao kunena nafe mlandu, tidzanena nao, Mutipatse awa, pakuti sitinawatengera yense mkazi wake kunkhondo; pakuti inunso simunawaninkha awa; mukadatero mukadapalamula tsopano." 
Judges21:23 Nachita chotere ana a Benjamini, nadzitengera akazi monga mwa kuwerenga kwao, a ovina aja, amene anawatenga mwachifwamba; namuka iwo nabwerera ku cholowa chao, namanga midzi, nakhalamo." 
Judges21:24 Ndipo ana a Israele anachokako nthawi ija yense kunka ku fuko lake, ndi banja lake, natulukako yense kunka ku cholowa chake." 
Judges21:25 Panalibe mfumu m'Israele masiku aja; yense anachita chomkomera pamaso pake. 
Ruth1:1 Ndipo masiku akuweruza oweruzawo munali njala m'dziko. Ndipo munthu wa ku Betelehemu-Yuda anamuka nakagonera m'dziko la Mowabu, iyeyu, ndi mkazi wake, ndi ana ake amuna awiri." 
Ruth1:2 Dzina la munthuyo ndiye Elimeleki, ndi dzina la mkazi wake ndiye Naomi, ndi maina a ana ake awiri ndiwo Maloni, ndi Kilioni; ndiwo Aefurati a ku Betelehemu-Yuda. Iwowa ndipo analowa m'dziko la Mowabu, nakhala komweko." 
Ruth1:3 Ndipo Elimeleki mwamuna wake wa Naomi anamwalira; natsala iye ndi ana ake awiri. 
Ruth1:4 Nadzitengera iwo akazi a ku Mowabu; wina dzina lake ndiye Oripa, mnzake dzina lake ndiye Rute; ndipo anagonera komweko ngati zaka khumi." 
Ruth1:5 Koma Maloni ndi Kilioni anamwalira onse awiri; motero ana ake amuna awiri ndi mwamuna wake anamsiya mkaziyo. 
Ruth1:6 Pamenepo ananyamuka iyeyu ndi apongozi ake kuti abwerere kuchoka m'dziko la Mowabu; pakuti adamva m'dziko la Mowabu kuti Yehova adasamalira anthu ake ndi kuwapatsa chakudya. 
Ruth1:7 Natuluka iye kumene anakhalako ndi apongozi ake awiri pamodzi naye; namka ulendo wao kubwerera ku dziko la Yuda. 
Ruth1:8 Ndipo Naomi anati kwa apongozi ake awiri, Mukani, bwererani yense wa inu kunyumba ya amai wake; Yehova akuchitireni zokoma, monga umo munachitira akufa aja ndi ine." 
Ruth1:9 Yehova akuloleni mupeze mpumulo yense m'nyumba ya mwamuna wake. Nawapsompsona, nakweza iwo mau ao nalira misozi." 
Ruth1:10 Ndipo ananena naye, Iai, koma tidzapita nanu kwa anthu a kwanu." 
Ruth1:11 Nati Naomi, Bwererani, ana anga, mudzatsagana nane bwanji? Ngati ndili nao m'mimba mwanga ana amuna ena kuti akhale amuna anu?" 
Ruth1:12 Bwererani, ana anga, mukani, pakuti ndakalambitsa ine, sindikhoza kukhala naye mwamuna. Ngakhale ndikati, Ndili nacho chiyembekezo, ndikhala naye mwamuna usiku uno, ndi kubalanso ana amuna;"
