2Kings19:29 Ndi ichi ndi chizindikiro chako: chaka chino mudzadya za mphulumukwa, ndi chaka cha mawa za mankhokwe, ndi chaka chamkucha muzibzala ndi kukolola, muzioka minda yampesa ndi kudya zipatso zake." 
2Kings19:30 Ndipo opulumuka a nyumba ya Yuda otsalawo adzaphukanso mizu, ndi kupatsa zipatso pamwamba." 
2Kings19:31 Pakuti ku Yerusalemu kudzatuluka otsala, ndi akupulumukawo kuphiri la Ziyoni; changu cha Yehova wa makamu chidzachita ichi." 
2Kings19:32 Chifukwa chake atero Yehova za mfumu ya Asiriya, Iye sadzalowa m'mudzi muno, kapena kuponyamo muvi, kapena kufikako ndi chikopa, kapena kuundira mtumbira." 
2Kings19:33 Adzabwerera njira yomweyo anadzera, ndipo sadzalowa m'mudzi muno, ati Yehova." 
2Kings19:34 Pakuti ndidzatchinjiriza mudzi uno kuupulumutsa, chifukwa cha Ine mwini, ndi chifukwa cha Davide mtumiki wanga." 
2Kings19:35 Ndipo kunali, usiku womwewo mthenga wa Yehova anatuluka, nakantha m'misasa ya Aasiriya zikwi zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu, ndipo pouka anthu mamawa, taonani, onsewo ndi mitembo." 
2Kings19:36 Nachoka Senakeribu mfumu ya Asiriya, namuka, nabwerera, nakhala ku Ninive." 
2Kings19:37 Ndipo kunali popembedza iye m'nyumba ya Nisiroki mulungu wake, Adrameleki ndi Sarezere anamkantha ndi lupanga; napulumukira ku dziko la Ararati. Ndipo Esarahadoni mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Kings20:1 Masiku ajawo Hezekiya anadwala, nafuna kufa. Namdzera Yesaya mneneri mwana wa Amozi, nanena naye, Atero Yehova, Siyira banja lako; pakuti udzafa, sudzakhala ndi moyo." 
2Kings20:2 Pamenepo anatembenuzira nkhope yake kukhoma, napemphera kwa Yehova, ndi kuti," 
2Kings20:3 Mukumbukire Yehova kuti ndinayendabe pamaso panu m'choonadi, ndi mtima wangwiro, ndi kuchita zokoma m'kuona kwanu. Nalira Hezekiya kulira kwakukulu." 
2Kings20:4 Ndipo kunali, asanatulukire Yesaya m'kati mwa mudzi, anamdzera mau a Yehova, ndi kuti," 
2Kings20:5 Bwerera, nunene kwa Hezekiya mtsogoleri wa anthu anga, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Davide kholo lako, Ndamva pemphero lako, ndapenya misozi yako; taona, ndidzakuchiritsa, tsiku lachitatu udzakwera kunka kunyumba ya Yehova." 
2Kings20:6 Ndipo ndakuonjezera pa masiku ako zaka khumi ndi zisanu; ndidzakupulumutsa iwe ndi mudzi uno m'dzanja la mfumu ya Asiriya; ndidzatchinjiriza mudzi uno, chifukwa cha Ine ndekha, ndi chifukwa cha Davide mtumiki wanga." 
2Kings20:7 Nati Yesaya, Tenga nchinchi yankhuyu. Naitenga, naiika pafundo, nachira iye." 
2Kings20:8 Nati Hezekiya kwa Yesaya, Chizindikiro chake nchiyani kuti Yehova adzandichiza, ndi kuti ndidzakwera kunka kunyumba ya Yehova tsiku lachitatu?" 
2Kings20:9 Nati Yesaya, Chizindikiro ndichi akupatsa Yehova, kuti Yehova adzachichita chonena Iye; kodi mthunzi umuke m'tsogolo makwerero khumi, kapena ubwerere m'mbuyo makwerero khumi?" 
2Kings20:10 Nati Hezekiya, Kutsikira mthunzi makwerero khumi nkopepuka, kutero ai; koma mthunzi ubwerere makwerero khumi." 
2Kings20:11 Nafuulira kwa Yehova Yesaya mneneriyo, nabweza Iye mthunzi m'mbuyo makwerero khumi, ndiwo amene udatsikira pa makwerero a Ahazi." 
2Kings20:12 Nthawi ija Merodaki-Baladani mwana wa Baladani mfumu ya Babiloni anatumiza akalata ndi mtulo kwa Hezekiya, popeza adamva kuti adadwala Hezekiya." 
2Kings20:13 Ndipo Hezekiya anawamvera, nawaonetsa nyumba yonse ya chuma chake, siliva, ndi golide, ndi zonunkhira, ndi mafuta okometsetsa, ndi nyumba ya zida zake, ndi zonse zopezeka pachuma pake; panalibe kanthu m'nyumba mwake, kapena m'ufumu wake wonse osawaonetsa Hezekiya." 
2Kings20:14 Koma Yesaya mneneri anadza kwa mfumu Hezekiya, nati kwa iye, Anatani anthu awa? Anadza kwa inu kufumira kuti? Nati Hezekiya, Afumira dziko la kutali ku Babiloni." 
2Kings20:15 Nati iye, Anaona chiyani m'nyumba mwanu? Nati Hezekiya, Zonse za m'nyumba mwanga anaziona, palibe kanthu pachuma changa kosawaonetsa." 
2Kings20:16 Ndipo Yesaya anati kwa Hezekiya, Tamverani mau a Yehova." 
2Kings20:17 Taonani, akudza masiku kuti zonse za m'nyumba mwako, ndi zokundika makolo ako mpaka lero, zidzatengedwa kunka ku Babiloni, kosasiyidwa kanthu konse, ati Yehova." 
2Kings20:18 Nadzatenga ena a ana ako otuluka mwa iwe, amene udzawabala, nadzakhala iwo adindo m'chinyumba cha mfumu ya Babiloni." 
2Kings20:19 Pamenepo Hezekiya anati kwa Yesaya, Mau a Yehova udawanena ndi abwino. Natinso, Si momwemo nanga, mtendere ndi choonadi zikakhala masiku anga?" 
2Kings20:20 Machitidwe ena tsono a Hezekiya, ndi mphamvu yake yonse, ndi umo anamangira dziwe ndi mchera, nautengera mudzi madzi, sizilembedwa kodi m'buku la machitidwe a mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings20:21 Nagona Hezekiya ndi makolo ake; nakhala mfumu m'malo mwake Manase mwana wake. 
2Kings21:1 Manase anali wa zaka khumi ndi ziwiri polowa iye ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu zaka makumi asanu ndi zisanu m'Yerusalemu; ndi dzina la make ndiye Hepeziba." 
2Kings21:2 Ndipo anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonyansa za amitundu amene Yehova anawaingitsa pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
2Kings21:3 Pakuti anamanganso misanje, imene Hezekiya atate wake adaiononga; nautsira Baala maguwa a nsembe, nasema chifanizo, monga anachita Ahabu mfumu ya Israele, nagwadira khamu lonse la kuthambo, nalitumikira." 
2Kings21:4 Namanga iye maguwa a nsembe m'nyumba ya Yehova imene Yehova adainenera kuti, M'Yerusalemu ndidzaika dzina langa." 
2Kings21:5 Nalimangira khamu lonse la kuthambo maguwa a nsembe m'mabwalo awiri a nyumba ya Yehova. 
2Kings21:6 Napititsa mwana wake pamoto, naombeza maula, nachita zanyanga, naika obwebweta ndi openda; anachita zoipa zambiri pamaso pa Yehova kuutsa mkwiyo wake." 
2Kings21:7 Ndipo anaika chifanizo chosema chimene adachipanga m'nyumba ija Yehova adainenera kwa Davide ndi kwa Solomoni mwana wake kuti, M'nyumba muno ndi m'Yerusalemu umene ndausankha mwa mafuko onse a Israele ndidzaikamo dzina langa kosatha." 
2Kings21:8 Ndipo sindidzachotsanso mapazi a Israele m'dziko ndidalipereka kwa makolo ao; chokhachi asamalire kuchita monga mwa zonse ndawalamulira ndi monga mwa chilamulo chonse anawalamulira Mose mtumiki wanga. 
2Kings21:9 Koma sanamvere, nawalakwitsa Manase, nawachititsa choipa, kuposa amitundu amene Yehova adawaononga pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
2Kings21:10 Pamenepo Yehova ananena mwa atumiki ake aneneri, ndi kuti," 
2Kings21:11 Popeza Manase mfumu ya Yuda anachita zonyansa izi, pakuti zoipa zake zinaposa zonse adazichita Aamori, amene analipo asanabadwe iye, nalakwitsanso Yuda ndi mafano ake;" 
2Kings21:12 chifukwa chake atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Taonani, nditengera Yerusalemu ndi Yuda choipa, chakuti yense achimvera chidzamliritsa mwini khutu." 
2Kings21:13 Ndipo ndidzayesa pa Yerusalemu chingwe choongolera cha Samariya, ndi chingwe cholungamitsira chilili cha nyumba ya Ahabu; ndidzapukuta Yerusalemu monga umo apukutira mbale, kuipukuta ndi kuivundikira." 
2Kings21:14 Ndipo ndidzataya chotsala cha cholowa changa, ndi kuwapereka m'dzanja la adani ao, nadzakhala iwo chakudya ndi chofunkha cha adani ao onse;" 
2Kings21:15 popeza anachita choipa pamaso panga, nautsa mkwiyo wanga chitulukire makolo ao m'Ejipito, mpaka lero lino." 
2Kings21:16 Ndiponso Manase anakhetsa mwazi wambiri wosachimwa mpaka anadzaza m'Yerusalemu monsemo, osawerenga kulakwa kwake analakwitsa nako Yuda, ndi kuchita choipa pamaso pa Yehova." 
2Kings21:17 Machitidwe ena tsono a Manase, ndi zochimwa zonse anazichita, sizinalembedwa kodi m'buku la machitidwe a mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings21:18 Nagona Manase ndi makolo ake, naikidwa m'munda wa nyumba yake, m'munda wa Uza, nakhala mfumu m'malo mwake Amoni mwana wake." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri polowa iye ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu zaka ziwiri m'Yerusalemu; ndi dzina la make ndiye Mesulemeti mwana wa Haruzi wa ku Yotiba." 
2Kings21:20 Nachita iye choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo amachitira Manase atate wake." 
2Kings21:21 Nayenda iye m'njira monse anayendamo atate wake, natumikira mafano anawatumikira atate wake, nawagwadira;" 
2Kings21:22 nasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ake, sanayende m'njira ya Yehova." 
2Kings21:23 Ndipo anyamata ake a Amoni anamchitira chiwembu, napha mfumuyo m'nyumba yakeyake." 
2Kings21:24 Koma anthu a m'dzikomo anapha onse akumchitira chiwembu mfumu Amoni; ndipo anthu a m'dzikomo anamlonga ufumu Yosiya mwana wake m'malo mwake. 
2Kings21:25 Machitidwe ena tsono a Amoni adawachita, sanalembedwa kodi m'buku la machitidwe a mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings21:26 Naikidwa iye m'manda mwake m'munda wa Uza; nakhala mfumu m'malo mwake Yosiya mwana wake. 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya ndiye wa zaka zisanu ndi zitatu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu zaka makumi atatu mphambu chimodzi m'Yerusalemu; ndi dzina la make ndi Yedida mwana wa Adaya wa ku Bozikati." 
2Kings22:2 Nachita iye zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova, nayenda m'njira yonse ya Davide kholo lake, osapatukira ku dzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere." 
2Kings22:3 Ndipo kunali chaka chakhumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu cha Yosiya, mfumuyi inatuma Safani mwana wa Azaliya mwana wa Mesulamu, mlembi, kunyumba ya Yehova, ndi kuti," 
2Kings22:4 Kwera kwa Hilikiya mkulu wa ansembe, awerenge ndalama zimene anthu anabwera nazo kunyumba ya Yehova, ndizo zimene olindira pakhomo anasonkhetsa anthu; azipereke m'dzanja la antchito akuyang'anira nyumba ya Yehova;" 
2Kings22:5 iwo azipereke kwa ogwira ntchito ya m'nyumba ya Yehova, akonze mogamuka nyumbayi," 
2Kings22:6 kwa amisiri a mitengo, ndi omanga nyumba, ndi omanga linga; ndi kuti agule mitengo ndi miyala yosema kukonza nazo nyumbayi." 
2Kings22:7 Koma sanawawerengere ndalamazo zoperekedwa m'dzanja lao, pakuti anachita mokhulupirika." 
2Kings22:8 Ndipo Hilikiya mkulu wa ansembe anati kwa Safani mlembi, Ndapeza buku la chilamulo m'nyumba ya Yehova. Napereka Hilikiya bukulo kwa Safani, iye naliwerenga." 
2Kings22:9 Ndipo Safani mlembiyo anadza kwa mfumu, nambwezera mfumu mau, nati, Anyamata anu anakhuthula ndalama zopereka m'nyumba, nazipereka m'dzanja la antchito akuyang'anira nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Kings22:10 Ndipo Safani mlembiyo anafotokozera mfumu, ndi kuti, Hilikiya wansembe wandipatsa buku. Nawerengamo Safani pamaso pa mfumu." 
2Kings22:11 Ndipo kunali, atamva mfumu mau a m'buku la chilamulo, inang'amba zovala zake." 
2Kings22:12 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira Hilikiya wansembe, ndi Ahikamu mwana wa Safani, ndi Akibori mwana wa Mikaya, ndi Safani mlembi, ndi Asaya mnyamata wa mfumu, ndi kuti," 
2Kings22:13 Mukani, funsirani ine, ndi anthu, ndi Yuda yense, kwa Yehova za mau a buku ili adalipeza; pakuti mkwiyo wa Yehova wotiyakira ife ndi waukulu; popeza atate athu sanamvere mau a buku ili, kuchita monga mwa zonse zotilemberamo." 
2Kings22:14 Namuka Hilikiya wansembe, ndi Ahikamu, ndi Akibori, ndi Safani, ndi Asaya, kwa Hulida mneneri wamkazi, ndiye mkazi wa Salumu mwana wa Tikiva, mwana wa Harihasi, wosunga zovala za mfumu; analikukhala iye m'Yerusalemu m'dera lachiwiri, nalankhula naye." 
2Kings22:15 Ndipo Hulida ananena nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Muuze munthuyo anakutumizani kwa ine," 
2Kings22:16 Atero Yehova, Taonani, nditengera malo ano choipa, ndi iwo okhalamo, chokwaniritsa mau onse a m'buku adaliwerenga mfumu ya Yuda;" 
2Kings22:17 popeza anandisiya Ine, nafukizira zonunkhira milungu ina, kuti autse mkwiyo wanga ndi ntchito zonse za manja ao; chifukwa chake mkwiyo wanga udzayakira malo ano wosazimikanso." 
2Kings22:18 Koma kwa mfumu ya Yuda amene anakutumizani kufunsira kwa Yehova, muzitero naye, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Kunena za mau udawamva," 
2Kings22:19 popeza mtima wako ngoolowa, ndipo unadzichepetsa pamaso pa Yehova muja udamva zonenera Ine malo ano ndi anthu okhalamo, kuti adzakhala abwinja, ndi temberero; ndipo unang'amba zovala zako ndi kulira misozi pamaso panga, Inenso ndakumvera, ati Yehova." 
2Kings22:20 Chifukwa chake, taona, ndidzakusonkhanitsa ukhale ndi makolo ako, nudzatengedwa ulowe m'manda mwako mumtendere; ndipo sudzaona m'maso mwako choipa chonse ndidzachifikitsira malo ano. Ndipo anambwezera mfumu mau." 
2Kings23:1 Pamenepo mfumu inatumiza anthu, namsonkhanitsira akulu onse a Yuda ndi a m'Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:2 Nikwera mfumu kunka kunyumba ya Yehova, ndi amuna onse a Yuda, ndi onse okhala m'Yerusalemu pamodzi naye, ndi ansembe, ndi aneneri, ndi anthu onse ang'ono ndi akulu; nawerenga iye m'makutu mwao mau onse a m'buku la chipangano adalipeza m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Kings23:3 Niima mfumu pachiunda, nichita pangano pamaso pa Yehova, kutsata Yehova ndi kusunga malamulo ake, ndi mboni zake, ndi malemba ake, ndi mtima wonse ndi moyo wonse, kukhazikitsa mau a chipangano cholembedwa m'buku ili; ndipo anthu onse anaimiririra panganoli." 
2Kings23:4 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira Hilikiya mkulu wa ansembe, ndi ansembe a gawo lachiwiri, ndi olindira pakhomo, atulutse m'Kachisi wa Yehova zipangizo adazipangira Baala, ndi chifanizo adazipangira Baala, ndi chifanizo chija, ndi khamu lonse la kuthambo; nazitentha kunja kwa Yerusalemu ku thengo la ku Kidroni, natenga phulusa lake kunka nalo ku Betele." 
2Kings23:5 Naletsa ansembe opembedza mafano, amene mafumu a Yuda anawaika afukize zonunkhira pa misanje m'midzi ya Yuda, ndi pamalo pozinga Yerusalemu; iwo omwe ofukizira zonunkhira Baala, ndi dzuwa, ndi mwezi, ndi nthanda, ndi khamu lonse la kuthambo." 
2Kings23:6 Natulutsa chifanizocho m'nyumba ya Yehova kunja kwa Yerusalemu ku mtsinje wa Kidroni; nachitenthera ku mtsinje wa Kidroni, nachipera chikhale fumbi, naliwaza fumbi lake pa manda a ana a anthu." 
2Kings23:7 Nagamula nyumba za anyamata adama okhala kunyumba ya Yehova, kumene akazi anaomba nsalu zolenjeka za chifanizocho." 
2Kings23:8 Natulutsa ansembe onse m'midzi ya Yuda, nawaipitsira misanje, imene ansembe adafukizapo zonunkhira, kuyambira Geba kufikira Beereseba; napasula misanje ya kuzipata, yokhala polowera pa chipata cha Yoswa kazembe wa mudzi, yokhala ku dzanja lako lamanzere kwa chipata cha mudzi." 
2Kings23:9 Koma ansembe a misanje sanakwere kudza ku guwa la nsembe la Yehova ku Yerusalemu; koma anadya mkate wopanda chotupitsa pakati pa abale ao. 
2Kings23:10 Anawaipitsiranso Tofeti, wokhala m'chigwa cha ana a Hinomu; kuti asapitirize mmodzi yense mwana wake wamwamuna kapena wamkazi pamoto kwa Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Nachotsanso akavalo amene mafumu a Yuda adapereka kwa dzuwa, polowera nyumba ya Yehova, ku chipinda cha Natani-Meleki mdindoyo, chokhala kukhonde; natentha magaleta a dzuwa ndi moto." 
2Kings23:12 Ndi maguwa a nsembe anali patsindwi pa chipinda chosanja cha Ahazi adawapanga mafumu a Yuda, ndi maguwa a nsembe adawapanga Manase m'mabwalo awiri a nyumba ya Yehova, mfumu inawagumula, niwachotsa komweko, nitaya fumbi lao ku mtsinje wa Kidroni." 
2Kings23:13 Ndipo mfumu inawaipitsira misanje yokhala kum'mawa kwa Yerusalemu, ndiyo ya ku dzanja lamanja la phiri la chionongeko, imene Solomoni mfumu ya Israele adaimangira Asitoreti chonyansa cha Asidoni, ndi Kemosi chonyansa cha Mowabu, ndi Milikomu chonyansa cha ana a Amoni." 
2Kings23:14 Nathyolathyola zoimiritsa, nalikha zifanizo, nadzaza pamalo pao ndi mafupa a anthu." 
2Kings23:15 Anagumulanso guwa la nsembe linali ku Betele, ndi msanje adaumanga Yerobowamu mwana wa Nebati wolakwitsa Israele uja; guwa la nsembelo, ndi msanje womwe anagumula; natentha msanje, naupondereza ukhale fumbi, natentha chifanizo." 
2Kings23:16 Ndipo potembenuka Yosiya anaona manda okhalako kuphiri, natumiza anthu natulutsa mafupa kumanda, nawatentha pa guwa la nsembe, kuliipitsa, monga mwa mau a Yehova anawalalikira munthu wa Mulungu wolalikira izi." 
2Kings23:17 Anatinso, Chizindikiro ichi ndichiona nchiyani? Namuuza anthu a m'mudziwo, Ndicho manda a munthu wa Mulungu anafuma ku Yuda, nalalikira izi mwazichitira guwa la nsembe la ku Betele." 
2Kings23:18 Nati iye, Mlekeni, munthu asakhudze mafupa ake. Naleka iwo mafupa ake akhale pamodzi ndi mafupa a mneneri uja anatuluka m'Samariya." 
2Kings23:19 Ndi nyumba zonse zomwe za ku misanje yokhala m'midzi ya Samariya, adazimanga mafumu a Israele kuutsa nazo mkwiyo wa Yehova, Yosiya anazichotsa, nazichitira monga mwa ntchito zonse adazichita ku Betele." 
2Kings23:20 Ndipo anapha ansembe onse a misanje okhalako pa maguwa a nsembe, natentha mafupa a anthu pamenepo, nabwerera kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira anthu onse, kuti, Mchitireni Yehova Mulungu wanu Paska, monga mulembedwa m'buku ili la chipangano." 
2Kings23:22 Zedi silinachitika Paska lotere chiyambire masiku a oweruza anaweruza Israele, ngakhale m'masiku a mafumu a Israele, kapena mafumu a Yuda;" 
2Kings23:23 koma Paska ili analichitira Yehova m'Yerusalemu, Yosiya atakhala mfumu zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu." 
2Kings23:24 Ndiponso obwebweta, ndi openda, ndi aterafi, ndi mafano, ndi zonyansa zonse zidaoneka m'dziko la Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu, Yosiya anazichotsa; kuti alimbitse mau a chilamulo olembedwa m'buku adalipeza Hilikiya wansembe m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Kings23:25 Ndipo asanabadwe iye panalibe mfumu wolingana naye, imene inatembenukira kwa Yehova ndi mtima wake wonse, ndi moyo wake wonse, ndi mphamvu yake yonse, monga mwa chilamulo chonse cha Mose; atafa iyeyu sanaukenso wina wolingana naye." 
2Kings23:26 Koma Yehova sanakhululuke mkwiyo wake waukulu waukali umene adapsa mtima nao pa Yuda, chifukwa cha zoputa zonse Manase adaputa nazo mkwiyo wake." 
2Kings23:27 Nati Yehova, Ndidzachotsa Yudanso pamaso panga, monga umo ndinachotsera Israele; ndipo ndidzataya mudzi uwu ndidausankha, ndiwo Yerusalemu, ndi nyumba ndidainena, Dzina langa lidzakhala komweko." 
2Kings23:28 Machitidwe ena tsono a Yosiya, ndi zonse anazichita, sizinalembedwa kodi m'buku la machitidwe a mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Masiku ake Farao Neko mfumu ya Aejipito anakwerera mfumu ya Asiriya ku mtsinje wa Yufurate; ndipo mfumu Yosiya anatuluka kuponyana naye, koma anapha Yosiya ku Megido, atamuona." 
2Kings23:30 Ndipo anyamata ake anamtengera wakufa m'galeta, nabwera naye ku Yerusalemu kuchokera ku Megido, namuika m'manda akeake. Ndipo anthu a m'dziko anatenga Yehowahazi mwana wa Yosiya, namdzoza, namlonga ufumu m'malo mwa atate wake." 
2Kings23:31 Yehowahazi anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zitatu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu miyezi itatu m'Yerusalemu ndi dzina la make ndiye Hamutala mwana wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina." 
2Kings23:32 Nachita iye choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo monse adachita makolo ake." 
2Kings23:33 Ndipo Farao Neko anammanga m'Ribula, m'dziko la Hamati; kuti asachite ufumu m'Yerusalemu; nasonkhetsa dzikoli msonkho wa matalente zana limodzi la siliva, ndi talente limodzi la golide." 
2Kings23:34 Ndipo Farao Neko analonga ufumu Eliyakimu mwana wa Yosiya, m'malo mwa Yosiya atate wake, nasanduliza dzina lake likhale Yehoyakimu; koma anapita naye Yehowahazi, nafika iye m'Ejipito, nafa komweko." 
2Kings23:35 Ndipo Yehoyakimu anapereka siliva ndi golide kwa Farao, koma anasonkhetsa dzikoli lipereke ndalamazi; monga mwa lamulo la Farao anasonkhetsa anthu a m'dziko siliva ndi golide, yense monga mwa kuyesedwa kwake, kuzipereka kwa Farao Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu anali wa zaka makumi awiri ndi zisanu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu zaka khumi ndi chimodzi m'Yerusalemu; ndi dzina la make ndiye Zebida mwana wa Pedaya wa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Nachita iye choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonse adazichita makolo ake." 
2Kings24:1 Masiku ake Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni anakwerako, Yehoyakimu nagwira mwendo wake zaka zitatu; pamenepo anatembenuka nampandukira." 
2Kings24:2 Ndipo Yehova anamtumizira magulu a Ababiloni, ndi magulu a Aaramu, ndi magulu a Amowabu, ndi magulu a ana a Amoni, nawatumiza pa Yuda kuliononga, monga mwa mau a Yehova adawanena ndi dzanja la atumiki ake aneneriwo." 
2Kings24:3 Zedi ichi chinadzera Yuda mwa lamulo la Yehova, kuwachotsa pamaso pake, chifukwa cha zolakwa za Manase, monga mwa zonse anazichita;" 
2Kings24:4 ndiponso chifukwa cha mwazi wosachimwa adaukhetsa; popeza anadzaza Yerusalemu ndi mwazi wosachimwa; ndipo Yehova sanafune kukhululukira. 
2Kings24:5 Machitidwe ena tsono a Yehoyakimu, ndi zonse anazichita, sizinalembedwa kodi m'buku la machitidwe a mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Nagona Yehoyakimu ndi makolo ake, ndipo Yehoyakini mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Kings24:7 Koma mfumu ya Aejipito sinabwerezanso kutuluka m'dziko lake, pakuti mfumu ya Babiloni idalanda kuyambira ku mtsinje wa Ejipito kufikira ku mtsinje Yufurate, ndilo lonse anali nalo mfumu ya Aejipito." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakini anali wa zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu polowa iye ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu miyezi itatu; ndi dzina la make ndiye Nehusita mwana wa Elinatani wa ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Nachita iye choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo monse adachita atate wake." 
2Kings24:10 Nthawi ija anyamata a Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni anakwerera Yerusalemu, naumangira mudziwo misasa." 
2Kings24:11 Nafika Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni kumudzi, ataumangira misasa anyamata ake," 
2Kings24:12 Ndipo Yehoyakini mfumu ya Yuda anatulukira kwa mfumu ya Babiloni, iye ndi make, ndi anyamata ake, ndi akalonga ake, ndi adindo ake; mfumu ya Babiloni nimtenga chaka chachisanu ndi chitatu cha ufumu wake." 
2Kings24:13 Natulutsa kuchotsa komweko chuma chonse cha nyumba ya Yehova, ndi chuma cha nyumba ya mfumu, naduladula zipangizo zonse zagolide adazipanga Solomoni mfumu ya Israele m'Kachisi wa Yehova, monga Yehova adanena." 
2Kings24:14 Nachoka nao a m'Yerusalemu onse, ndi akalonga onse, ndi ngwazi zonse, ndiwo andende zikwi khumi, ndi amisiri onse, ndi osula onse; sanatsale ndi mmodzi yense, koma anthu osauka okhaokha a m'dziko." 
2Kings24:15 Nachoka naye Yehoyakini kunka naye ku Babiloni, ndi make wa mfumu, ndi akazi a mfumu, ndi adindo ake, ndi omveka a m'dziko; anachoka nao andende ku Yerusalemu kunka nao ku Babiloni." 
2Kings24:16 Ndi anthu amphamvu onse, ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi amisiri, ndi osula chikwi chimodzi, onsewo achamuna oyenera nkhondo, omwewo mfumu ya Babiloni anadza nao andende ku Babiloni." 
2Kings24:17 Ndipo mfumu ya Babiloni analonga Mataniya mbale wa atate wake akhale mfumu m'malo mwake, nasanduliza dzina lake likhale Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu chimodzi polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu zaka khumi ndi chimodzi m'Yerusalemu; ndi dzina la make ndiye Hamutala mwana wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina." 
2Kings24:19 Nachita iye choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonse adachita Yehoyakimu." 
2Kings24:20 Pakuti mwa mkwiyo wa Yehova zonse zidachitika m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda, mpaka adawataya pamaso pake; ndipo Zedekiya anapandukira mfumu ya Babiloni." 
2Kings25:1 Ndipo kunali chaka chachisanu ndi chinai cha ufumu wake, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni, iye ndi khamu lake lonse anadzera Yerusalemu, naumangira misasa, naumangira timalinga mouzinga." 
2Kings25:2 Ndipo mudziwo unazingidwa ndi timalinga mpaka chaka chakhumi ndi chimodzi cha mfumu Zedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chinai la mwezi wachinai njala idakula m'mudzimo, panalibe chakudya kwa anthu a m'dzikomo." 
2Kings25:4 Pamenepo linga la mudziwo linagamulidwa, nathawira ankhondo onse usiku, njira ya ku chipata cha pakati pa makoma awiri, ili ku munda wa mfumu; Ababiloni tsono anali pamudzi pouzinga; nimuka mfumu pa njira ya kuchidikha." 
2Kings25:5 Koma nkhondo ya Ababiloni inalondola mfumu, niipeza m'zidikha za Yeriko; koma nkhondo yake yonse inambalalikira." 
2Kings25:6 Ndipo anaigwira mfumu, nakwera nayo kwa mfumu ya Babiloni ku Ribula, naweruza mlandu wake." 
2Kings25:7 Napha ana a Zedekiya pamaso pake, namkolowola Zedekiya maso ake, nammanga ndi maunyolo amkuwa, namuka naye ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:8 Ndipo mwezi wachisanu, tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri la mweziwo, ndicho chaka chakhumi mphambu chisanu ndi chinai cha mfumu Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni, Nebuzaradani mkulu wa olindirira, ndiye mnyamata wa mfumu ya Babiloni, anadza ku Yerusalemu," 
2Kings25:9 natentha nyumba ya Yehova, ndi nyumba ya mfumu, ndi nyumba zonse za m'Yerusalemu; ndi nyumba zonse zazikulu anazitentha ndi moto." 
2Kings25:10 Ndi khamu lonse la Ababiloni linali ndi mkulu wa olindirira linagumula linga la Yerusalemu louzinga. 
2Kings25:11 Ndi anthu otsalira m'mudzi, ndi opanduka akuthawira kwa mfumu ya Babiloni, ndi aunyinji otsalira, Nebuzaradani mkulu wa olindirira anamuka nao andende." 
2Kings25:12 Koma mkulu wa olindirira anasiya osaukadi a m'dziko akhale osunga minda yampesa, ndi alimi." 
2Kings25:13 Ndipo zoimiritsa zamkuwa zinali m'nyumba ya Yehova, ndi maphaka ake, ndi thawale lamkuwa, zinali m'nyumba ya Yehova, Ababiloni anazithyolathyola, natenga mkuwa wake kunka nao ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:14 Nachotsanso miphika, ndi zoolera, ndi zozimira nyali, ndi zipande, ndi zipangizo zonse zamkuwa zimene anatumikira nazo." 
2Kings25:15 Ndi zopalira moto, ndi mbale zowazira za golide yekhayekha, ndi zasiliva yekhayekha, mkulu wa asilikali anazichotsa." 
2Kings25:16 Nsanamira ziwiri, thawale limodzi, ndi maphakawo adazipangira nyumba ya Yehova Solomoni, mkuwa wa zipangizo izi zonse sanakhoze kuyesa kulemera kwake." 
2Kings25:17 Msinkhu wake wa nsanamira imodzi ndiwo mikono khumi mphambu isanu ndi itatu, ndi pamwamba pake mutu wamkuwa; ndi msinkhu wake wa mutuwo ndiwo mikono itatu, ndi ukonde, ndi makangaza pamutu pouzinga, zonse zamkuwa; ndi nsanamira inzake inali nazo zomwezo pamodzi ndi ukonde." 
2Kings25:18 Ndipo mkulu wa olindirira anatenga Seraya wansembe wamkulu, ndi Zefaniya wansembe wachiwiri, ndi olindira pakhomo atatu;" 
2Kings25:19 natenga m'mudzimo mdindo woikidwa woyang'anira ankhondo; ndi anthu asanu a iwo openya nkhope ya mfumu opezeka m'mudzimo; ndi mlembi, kazembe wa nkhondo wolembera anthu a m'dziko; ndi anthu a m'dziko makumi asanu ndi limodzi opezeka m'mudzimo." 
2Kings25:20 Ndipo Nebuzaradani mkulu wa olindirira anawatenga, napita nao kwa mfumu ya Babiloni ku Ribula." 
2Kings25:21 Niwakantha mfumu ya Babiloni, niwaphera ku Ribula m'dziko la Hamati. Motero anamuka nao Ayuda andende kuwachotsa m'dziko lao." 
2Kings25:22 Koma kunena za anthu otsalira m'dziko la Yuda, amene adawasiya Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni, iyeyu anamuika Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu mwana wa Safani akhale wowalamulira." 
2Kings25:23 Ndipo pamene anamva akazembe onse a makamu, iwo ndi anthu ao, kuti mfumu ya Babiloni adaika Gedaliya wowalamulira, anadza kwa Gedaliya ku Mizipa, ndiwo Ismaele mwana wa Netaniya, ndi Yohanani mwana wa Kareya, ndi Seraya mwana wa Tanumeti wa ku Netofa, ndi Yazaniya mwana wa Mmaakati, iwo ndi anthu ao omwe." 
2Kings25:24 Nawalumbirira Gedaliya iwo ndi anthu ao, nanena nao, Musamaopa anyamata a Ababiloni; khalani m'dziko; tumikirani mfumu ya Babiloni, ndipo kudzakukomerani." 
2Kings25:25 Koma kunali mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri anadza Ismaele mwana wa Netaniya mwana wa Elisama, wa mbumba yachifumu, ndi anthu khumi pamodzi naye, nakantha Gedaliya; nafa iye, ndi Ayuda, ndi Ababiloni okhala naye ku Mizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Pamenepo ananyamuka anthu onse ang'ono ndi akulu, ndi akazembe a makamu, nadza ku Ejipito; pakuti anaopa Ababiloni." 
2Kings25:27 Ndipo kunali chaka cha makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri cha kumtenga ndende Yehoyakini mfumu ya Yuda, mwezi wakhumi ndi ziwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri mphambu asanu ndi awiri la mwezi, Evili-Merodaki mfumu ya Babiloni anamuweramutsa mutu wake wa Yehoyakini mfumu ya Yuda atuluke m'kaidi, chaka cholowa iye ufumu wake;" 
2Kings25:28 nakamba naye zokoma, namkweza mpando wake waulemu upose mipando ya mafumu anali pamodzi naye m'Babiloni." 
2Kings25:29 Nasintha zovala zake za m'kaidi, namadya iye mkate pamaso pake masiku onse a moyo wake." 
2Kings25:30 Ndi kunena za chakudya chake, panali chakudya chosalekeza chopatsidwa kwa iye ndi mfumu, tsiku lililonse gawo lake, masiku onse a moyo wake." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seti, Enosi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalalele, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoki, Metusela, Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 Nowa, Semu, Hamu, ndi Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Ana a Yafeti: Gomeri, ndi Magogi, ndi Madai, ndi Yavani, ndi Tubala, ndi Meseki, ndi Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Ndi ana a Gomeri: Asikenazi, Difati, ndi Togarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Ndi ana a Yavani: Elisa, ndi Tarisisi, Kitimu, ndi Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ana a Hamu: Kusi, ndi Ejipito, Puti, ndi Kanani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Ndi ana a Kusi: Seba, ndi Havila, ndi Sabita, ndi Raama, ndi Sabiteka. Ndi ana a Raama: Sheba, ndi Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Ndi Kusi anabala Nimirodi; iye anayamba kukhala wamphamvu pa dziko. 
1Chronicles1:11 Ndi Ejipito anabala Aludi, ndi Aanamimu, ndi Alehabu, ndi Anafituhimu," 
1Chronicles1:12 ndi Apatirusi, ndi Akasiluhimu, (kumene anafuma Afilisti), ndi Akafitori." 
1Chronicles1:13 Ndi Kanani anabala Sidoni mwana wake woyamba, ndi Heti," 
1Chronicles1:14 ndi Ayebusi, ndi Aamori, ndi Agirigasi," 
1Chronicles1:15 ndi Ahivi, ndi Aariki, ndi Asini," 
1Chronicles1:16 ndi Aaravadi, ndi Azemari, ndi Ahamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ana a Semu: Elamu, ndi Asiriya, ndi Aripakisadi, ndi Ludi, ndi Aramu, ndi Uzi, ndi Huli, ndi Getere, ndi Meseki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Ndi Aripakisadi anabala Sela; ndi Sela anabala Eberi. 
1Chronicles1:19 Ndi Eberi anabala ana amuna awiri, dzina la winayo ndiye Pelegi, popeza masiku ake dziko linagawanika; ndi dzina la mbale wake ndiye Yokotani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Ndipo Yokotani anabala Alimodadi, ndi Selefi, ndi Hazara-Maveti, ndi Yera;" 
1Chronicles1:21 ndi Hadoramu, ndi Uzali, ndi Dikila;" 
1Chronicles1:22 ndi Ebala, ndi Abimaele, ndi Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 ndi Ofiri, ndi Havila, ndi Yobabu. Awa onse ndiwo ana a Yokotani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Semu, Aripakisadi, Sela;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahori, Tera;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Abramu, (ndiye Abrahamu)." 
1Chronicles1:28 Ana a Abrahamu: Isaki, ndi Ismaele." 
1Chronicles1:29 Mibadwo yao ndi awa; woyamba wa Ismaele Nebayoti; ndi Kedara ndi Adibeele, ndi Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misima, ndi Duma, Masa, Hadadi, ndi Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafisi, ndi Kedema. Awa ndi ana a Ismaele." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ndi ana a Ketura mkazi wamng'ono wa Abrahamu anabala Zimirani, ndi Yokisani, ndi Medani, ndi Midiyani, ndi Isibaki, ndi Suwa. Ndi ana a Yokisani: Sheba, ndi Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Ndi ana a Midiyani: Efa, ndi Efere, ndi Hanoki, ndi Abida, ndi Elida. Awa onse ndiwo ana a Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ndipo Abrahamu anabala Isaki. Ana a Isaki: Esau, ndi Israele." 
1Chronicles1:35 Ana a Esau: Elifazi, Reuwele, ndi Yeusi, ndi Yalamu, ndi Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Ana a Elifazi: Temani, ndi Omara, Zefi, ndi Gatamu, Kenazi, ndi Timna, ndi Amaleke." 
1Chronicles1:37 Ana a Reuwele: Nahati, Zera, Sama, ndi Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ndi ana a Seiri: Lotani, ndi Sobala, ndi Zibiyoni, ndi Ana, ndi Disoni, ndi Ezere, ndi Disani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Ndi ana a Lotani: Hori, ndi Homamu; ndipo Timna ndiye mlongo wake wa Lotani." 
1Chronicles1:40 Ana a Sobala: Aliyani, ndi Manahati, ndi Ebala, Sefi, ndi Onamu. Ndi ana a Zibiyoni: Aiya ndi Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mwana wa Ana: Disoni. Ndi ana a Disoni: Hamurani, ndi Esibani, ndi Itirani, ndi Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ana a Ezere: Bilihani, ndi Zaavani, ndi Yaakani. Ana a Disani: Uzi, ndi Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Mafumu tsono akuchita ufumu m'dziko la Edomu, pakalibe mfumu wakuchita ufumu pa ana a Israele, ndiwo Bela mwana wa Beori; ndi dzina la mudzi wake ndilo Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ndipo anafa Bela; ndi Yobabu mwana wa Zera wa ku Bozira anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake. 
1Chronicles1:45 Namwalira Yobabu; ndi Husamu wa ku dziko la Atemani anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake. 
1Chronicles1:46 Namwalira Husamu; ndi Hadadi mwana wa Bedadi, amene anakantha Midiyani ku thengo la Mowabu, anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake; ndi dzina la mudzi wake ndi Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Namwalira Hadadi; ndi Samila wa ku Masireka anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake. 
1Chronicles1:48 Namwalira Samila: ndi Shaulo wa ku Rehoboti ku nyanja anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake. 
1Chronicles1:49 Namwalira Shaulo; ndi Baala-Hanani mwana wa Akibori anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake. 
1Chronicles1:50 Namwalira Baala-Hanani; ndi Hadadi anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake; ndipo dzina la mudzi wake ndi Pai; ndi dzina la mkazi wake ndiye Mehetabele mwana wamkazi wa Matiredi mwana wamkazi wa Mezahabu. 
1Chronicles1:51 Namwalira Hadadi. Ndipo mafumu a Edomu ndiwo mfumu Timna, mfumu Aliva, mfumu Yeteti;" 
1Chronicles1:52 mfumu Oholibama, mfumu Ela, mfumu Pinoni;" 
1Chronicles1:53 mfumu Kenazi, mfumu Temani, mfumu Mibizara;" 
1Chronicles1:54 mfumu Magadiele, mfumu Iramu. Awa ndi mafumu a Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Ana a Israele ndi awa: Rubeni, Simeoni, Levi, ndi Yuda, Isakara, ndi Zebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Yosefe, ndi Benjamini, Nafutali, Gadi, ndi Asere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Ana a Yuda ndiwo Eri, ndi Onani, ndi Sela; Batisuwa Mkanani anambalira atatu amenewa. Koma Eri mwana woyamba wa Yuda anali woipa pamaso pa Yehova, ndi Iye anamupha." 
1Chronicles2:4 Ndi Tamara mpongozi wake anambalira Perezi ndi Zera. Ana amuna onse a Yuda ndiwo asanu. 
1Chronicles2:5 Ana a Perezi: Hezironi, ndi Hamuli." 
1Chronicles2:6 Ndi ana a Zera: Zimiri, ndi Etani, ndi Hemani, ndi Kalikoli, ndi Dara; onse pamodzi ndi asanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ndi ana a Karimi: Akara wovuta Israeleyo, amene analakwira choperekedwa chiperekerecho." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ndi mwana wa Etani: Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Ndi ana a Hezironi anambadwirawo: Yerameele, ndi Ramu, ndi Kalebe." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ndi Ramu anabala Aminadabu; ndi Aminadabu anabala Nasoni kalonga wa ana a Yuda; 
1Chronicles2:11 ndi Nasoni anabala Salimoni, ndi Salimoni anabala Bowazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 ndi Bowazi anabala Obedi, ndi Obedi anabala Yese," 
1Chronicles2:13 ndi Yese anabala mwana wake wamwamuna woyamba Eliyabu, ndi Abinadabu wachiwiri, ndi Simea wachitatu," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanele wachinai, Radai wachisanu," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu wachisanu ndi chimodzi, Davide wachisanu ndi chiwiri;" 
1Chronicles2:16 ndi alongo ao ndiwo Zeruya ndi Abigaile. Ndi ana a Zeruya: Abisai ndi Yowabu, ndi Asahele; atatu." 
1Chronicles2:17 Ndi Abigaile anabala Amasa; ndi atate wa Amasa ndiye Yetere Mwismaele. 
1Chronicles2:18 Ndi Kalebe mwana wa Hezironi anabala ana ndi Azuba mkazi wake, ndi Yerioti; ndipo ana ake ndiwo Yesere, ndi Sobabu, ndi Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Namwalira Azuba, ndi Kalebe anadzitengera Efurata, amene anambalira Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ndi Huri anabala Uri, ndi Uri anabala Bezalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ndipo pambuyo pake Hezironi analowa kwa mwana wamkazi wa Makiri atate wa Giliyadi, amene anamtenga akhale mkazi wake, pokhala wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi mwamunayo; ndipo mkaziyo anambalira Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Ndi Segubu anabala Yairi, amene anali nayo midzi makumi awiri mphambu itatu m'dziko la Giliyadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ndi Gesuri ndi Aramu analanda midzi ya Yairi, pamodzi ndi Kenati ndi milaga yake; ndiyo midzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi. Iwo onse ndiwo ana a Makiri atate wa Giliyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ndipo atafa Hezironi m'Kalebe-Efurata, Abiya mkazi wa Hezironi anambalira Asiriya atate wa Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Ndi ana a Yerameele mwana woyamba wa Hezironi ndiwo: woyamba Ramu, ndi Buna, ndi Oreni, ndi Ozemu, ndi Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ndipo Yerameele anali naye mkazi wina dzina lake ndiye Atara, ndiye make wa Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ndipo ana a Ramu mwana woyamba wa Yerameele ndiwo Maazi, ndi Yamini, ndi Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Ndi ana a Onamu ndiwo Samai, ndi Yada; ndi ana a Samai: Nadabu, ndi Abisuri." 
1Chronicles2:29 Ndipo dzina la mkazi wa Abisuri ndiye Abihaili; ndipo anambalira Abani, ndi Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ndi ana a Nadabu: Seledi ndi Apaimu; koma Seledi anamwalira wopanda ana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Ndi mwana wa Apaimu: Isi. Ndi mwana wa Isi: Sesani. Ndi mwana wa Sesani: Alai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Ndi ana a Yada mbale wa Samai: Yetere, ndi Yonatani; namwalira Yetere wopanda ana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Ndi ana a Yonatani: Peleti, ndi Zaza. Ndiwo ana a Yerameele." 
1Chronicles2:34 Ndipo Sesani analibe ana amuna, koma ana akazi. Ndi Sesani anali naye mnyamata Mwejipito dzina lake ndiye Yara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Ndipo Sesani anampatsa Yara mnyamata wake mwana wake wamkazi akhale mkazi wake, ndipo anambalira Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Ndipo Atai anabala Natani, ndi Natani anabala Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 ndi Zabadi anabala Efilala, ndi Efilala anabala Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 ndi Obedi anabala Yehu, ndi Yehu anabala Azariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 ndi Azariya anabala Helezi, ndi Helezi anabala Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 ndi Eleasa anabala Sisimai, ndi Sisimai anabala Salumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 ndi Salumu anabala Yekamiya, ndi Yekamiya anabala Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ndi ana a Kalebe mbale wa Yerameele ndiwo Mesa mwana wake woyamba, ndiye atate wa Zifi; ndi ana a Maresa atate wa Hebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Ndi ana a Hebroni: Kora, ndi Tapuwa, ndi Rekemu, ndi Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Ndi Sema anabala Rahama atate wa Yorikeamu, ndi Rekemu anabala Samai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Ndi mwana wa Samai ndiye Maoni; ndipo Maoni ndiye atate wa Betezuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Ndi Efa mkazi wamng'ono wa Kalebe anabala Harani, ndi Moza, ndi Gazezi; ndi Harani anabala Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ndi ana a Yadai: Regemu, ndi Yotamu, ndi Gesani, ndi Peleti, ndi Efa, ndi Saafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka mkazi wamng'ono wa Kalebe anabala Sebere, ndi Tirihana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Iyeyu anabalanso Saafi atate wa Madimana, Seva atate wa Makibena, ndi atate wa Gibea; ndi mwana wamkazi wa Kalebe ndiye Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ana a Kalebe ndi awa: mwana wa Huri, mwana woyamba wa Efurata, Sobala atate wa Kiriyati-Yearimu." 
1Chronicles2:51 Salima atate wa Betelehemu, Harefi atate wa Betegadere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Ndipo Sobala atate wa Kiriyati-Yearimu anali ndi ana: Harowe, ndi Hazi Amenuwoti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ndi mabanja a Kiriyati-Yearimu: Aitiri, ndi Aputi, ndi Asumati, ndi Amisrai; Azorati ndi Aestaoli anafuma kwa iwowa." 
1Chronicles2:54 Ana a Salima: Betelehemu, ndi Anetofa, Ataroti-Beti-Yowabu, ndi Hazi Amanahati, ndi Azori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ndi mabanja a alembi okhala ku Yabezi: Atirati, Asimeati, Asukati. Iwo ndiwo Akeni ofuma ku Hamati, kholo la nyumba ya Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ana a Davide tsono ombadwira ku Hebroni: woyamba Aminoni wa Ahinowamu wa ku Yezireele, wachiwiri Daniele wa Abigaile wa ku Karimele," 
1Chronicles3:1 Ana a Davide tsono ombadwira ku Hebroni: woyamba Aminoni wa Ahinowamu wa ku Yezireele, wachiwiri Daniele wa Abigaile wa ku Karimele," 
1Chronicles3:2 wachitatu Abisalomu mwana wa Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Talimai mfumu ya Gesuri, wachinai Adoniya mwana wa Hagiti," 
1Chronicles3:3 wachisanu Sefatiya wa Abitala, wachisanu ndi chimodzi Itireamu wa mkazi wake Egila." 
1Chronicles3:4 Anambadwira asanu ndi mmodzi m'Hebroni; ndi pomwepo anakhala mfumu zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi miyezi isanu ndi iwiri; ndi m'Yerusalemu anakhala mfumu zaka makumi atatu mphambu zitatu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ndipo ombadwira m'Yerusalemu ndi awa: Simea, ndi Sobabu, ndi Natani, ndi Solomoni, anai a Batisuwa mwana wamkazi wa Amiyele;" 
1Chronicles3:6 ndi Ibara, ndi Elisama, ndi Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 ndi Noga, ndi Nefegi, ndi Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 ndi Elisama, ndi Eliyada, ndi Elifeleti, asanu ndi anai." 
1Chronicles3:9 Onsewa ndiwo ana a Davide, pamodzi ndi ana a akazi aang'ono; ndipo Tamara ndiye mlongo wao." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ndipo mwana wa Solomoni ndiye Rehobowamu, Abiya mwana wake, Asa mwana wake, Yehosafati mwana wake," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yoramu mwana wake, Ahaziya mwana wake, Yowasi mwana wake," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amaziya mwana wake, Azariya mwana wake, Yotamu mwana wake," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahazi mwana wake, Hezekiya mwana wake, Manase mwana wake," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni mwana wake, Yosiya mwana wake." 
1Chronicles3:15 Ndi ana a Yosiya: woyamba Yohanani, wachiwiri Yehoyakimu, wachitatu Zedekiya, wachinai Salumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ndi ana a Yehoyakimu: Yekoniya mwana wake, Zedekiya mwana wake." 
1Chronicles3:17 Ndi mwana wa Yekoniya: Asiri, Sealatiele mwana wake," 
1Chronicles3:18 ndi Malikiramu, ndi Pedaya, ndi Senazara, Yekamiya, Hosama, Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Ndi ana a Pedaya: Zerubabele ndi Simei; ndi ana a Zerubabele: Mesulamu, ndi Hananiya; ndipo Selomiti ndiye mlongo wao," 
1Chronicles3:20 ndi Hasuba, ndi Ohele, ndi Berekiya, ndi Hasadiya, ndi Yusabu-hesede; asanu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ndi ana a Hananiya: Pelatiya, ndi Yesaya, ana a Refaya, ana a Arinani, ana a Obadiya, ana a Sekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ndi mwana wa Sekaniya: Semaya; ndi ana a Semaya: Hatusi, ndi Igala, ndi Bariya, ndi Neariya, ndi Safati; asanu ndi mmodzi." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ndi ana a Neariya: Eliyoenai, ndi Hizikiya, ndi Azirikamu, atatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ndi ana a Eliyoenai: Hodaviya, ndi Eliyasibu, ndi Pelaya, ndi Akubu, ndi Yohanani, ndi Delaya, ndi Anani, asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ana a Yuda: Perezi, Hezironi, ndi Karimi, ndi Huri, ndi Sobala." 
1Chronicles4:2 Ndipo Reaya mwana wa Sobala anabala Yahati; ndi Yahati anabala Ahumai, ndi Lahadi. Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Azorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 Iwo ndiwo a atate wa Etamu: Yezireele, ndi Isima, ndi Idibasi; ndipo dzina la mlongo wao ndiye Hazeleleponi," 
1Chronicles4:4 ndi Penuwele atate wa Gedori, ndi Ezere atate wa Husa. Awa ndi ana a Huri woyamba wa Efurata atate wa Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ndipo Asiriya atate wa Tekowa anali nao akazi awiri: Hela, ndi Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Ndi Naara anambalira Ahuzamu, ndi Hefere, ndi Temeni, ndi Haahasitari. Iwo ndiwo ana a Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ndi ana a Hela ndiwo Zereti, Izihara, ndi Etinani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Ndipo Hakozi anabala Anubu, ndi Zobeba, ndi mabanja a Ahariyele mwana wa Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Ndipo Yabezi analemekezedwa koposa abale ake; ndi make anamutcha dzina lake Yabezi, ndi kuti, Popeza ndambala mwaululu." 
1Chronicles4:10 Ndipo Yabezi anaitana kwa Mulungu wa Israele, ndi kuti, Mundidalitse ndithu, ndi kukulitsa malire anga; ndi dzanja lanu likhale ndi ine, nimundisunge, kuti choipa chisandivute. Ndipo Mulungu anafikitsa chopempha iye." 
1Chronicles4:11 Ndipo Kelubu mbale wa Suha anabala Mehiri, ndiye atate wa Esitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Ndi Esitoni, anabala Beterafa, ndi Paseya, ndi Tehina atate wa Irinahasi. Awa ndi anthu a Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Ndi ana a Kenazi: Otiniyele, ndi Seraya; ndi mwana wa Otiniyele: Hatati." 
1Chronicles4:14 Ndipo Meonotai anabala Ofura; ndi Seraya anabala Yowabu atate wa Geharasimu; popeza iwo ndiwo amisiri. 
1Chronicles4:15 Ndi ana a Kalebe mwana wa Yefune: Iru, Ela, ndi Naamu; ndi ana a Ela, ndi Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ndi ana a Yehalelele: Zifi, ndi Zifa, Tiriya, ndi Asarele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ndi ana a Ezara: Yetere, ndi Meredi, ndi Efere, ndi Yaloni; ndipo anabala Miriyamu, ndi Samai, ndi Isiba atate wa Esitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Ndi mkazi wake Myuda anabala Yeredi atate wa Gedori, ndi Hebere atate wa Soko, ndi Yekutiyele atate wa Zanowa. Ndipo awa ndi ana a Bitiya mwana wamkazi wa Farao, amene Meredi anamtenga." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ndi ana a mkazi wa Hodiya, mlongo wake wa Nahamu, ndiwo atate a Keila Mgarimi ndi Esitemowa Mmaaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ndi ana a Simoni; Aminoni, ndi Rina, Benihanani, ndi Tiloni. Ndi ana a Isi: Zoheti, ndi Benizoheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ana a Sela mwana wa Yuda: Eri atate wa Leka, ndi Laada atate wa Maresa, ndi mabanja a nyumba ya iwo oomba bafuta wa thonje losansitsa a nyumba ya Asibeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 ndi Yokimu, ndi amuna a Kozeba, ndi Yowasi, ndi Sarafi wolamulira m'Mowabu, ndi Yasubilehemu; koma mau awa ndiwo a kale lomwe." 
1Chronicles4:23 Iwo ndiwo oumba mbiya, ndi okhala m'Netaimu, ndi m'Gedera; anakhala komweko ndi mfumu m'ntchito yake." 
1Chronicles4:24 Ana a Simeoni: Nemuwele, ndi Yamini, Yaribu, Zera, Shaulo," 
1Chronicles4:25 Salumu mwana wake, Mibisamu mwana wake, Misima mwana wake." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ndi ana a Misima: Hamuele mwana wake, Zakuri mwana wake, Simei mwana wake." 
1Chronicles4:27 Ndipo Simei anali nao ana amuna khumi mphambu asanu ndi mmodzi, ndi ana akazi asanu ndi mmodzi; koma abale ake analibe ana ambiri, ndi banja lao lonse silinachulukitsa ngati ana a Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ndipo anakhala ku Beereseba, ndi Molada, ndi Hazara-Suwala," 
1Chronicles4:29 ndi ku Biliha, ndi ku Ezemu, ndi ku Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 ndi ku Betuele, ndi ku Horoma, ndi ku Zikilagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 ndi ku Betemara-Kaboti, ndi ku Hazara-Susimu, ndi ku Betebiri, ndi ku Saaraimu. Iyi ndi midzi yao, mpaka ufumu wa Davide, pamodzi ndi milaga yao." 
1Chronicles4:32 Etamu, ndi Aini, Rimoni, ndi Tokeni, ndi Asani, midzi isanu;" 
1Chronicles4:33 ndi milaga yao yonse pozungulira pake pa midzi yomweyi, mpaka Baala. Apo ndi pokhala pao ndipo ali nao mawerengedwe a maina ao." 
1Chronicles4:34 Ndi Mesobabu, ndi Yamuleki, ndi Yosa mwana wa Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 ndi Yowele, ndi Yehu mwana wa Yosibiya, mwana wa Seraya, mwana wa Asiyele;" 
1Chronicles4:36 ndi Eliyoenai, ndi Yaakoba, ndi Yesohaya, ndi Asaya, ndi Adiyele, ndi Yesimiele, ndi Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 ndi Ziza mwana wa Sifi, mwana wa Aloni, mwana wa Yedaya, mwana wa Simiri, mwana wa Semaya;" 
1Chronicles4:38 awa otchedwa maina ndiwo akalonga m'mabanja ao, ndi nyumba za makolo ao zinachuluka kwambiri." 
1Chronicles4:39 Ndipo anamuka mpaka polowera ku Gedori kum'mawa kwa chigwa, kufunafuna podyetsa zoweta zao." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ndipo anapeza podyetsa ponenepetsa ndi pabwino, ndipo dzikoli ndi lachitando ndi lodikha ndi losungikamo, pakuti okhalako kale ndiwo a Hamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Iwo tsono olembedwa maina anadza masiku a Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda, nakantha mahema ao ndi zokhalamo zao, naziononga konse mpaka lero, nakhala m'malo mwao; popeza panali podyetsa zoweta zao pamenepo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ndipo ena a iwowa a ana a Simeoni, amuna mazana asanu, ananka kuphiri la Seiri; akuwatsogolera ndiwo Pelatiya, ndi Neariya, ndi Refaya, ndi Uziyele; ana a Isi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Nakantha otsala a Aamaleke adapulumukawo, nakhala komweko mpaka lero lino." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ndipo ana a Rubeni mwana woyamba wa Israele, (pakuti ndiye mwana woyamba; koma popeza anaipsa kama wa atate wake ukulu wake unapatsidwa kwa ana a Yosefe mwana wa Israele, koma m'buku la chibadwidwe asayesedwe monga mwa ukulu wake." 
1Chronicles5:2 Pakuti Yuda anakula mphamvu mwa abale ake, ndi mtsogoleri anafuma kwa iyeyu, koma ukulu ngwa Yosefe);" 
1Chronicles5:3 ana a Rubeni mwana woyamba wa Israele: Hanoki, ndi Palu, Hezironi, ndi Karimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ana a Yowele: Semaya mwana wake, Gogi mwana wake, Simei mwana wake," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika mwana wake, Reaya mwana wake, Baala mwana wake," 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera mwana wake, amene Tigilati-Pilesere mfumu ya ku Asiriya anamtenga ndende; ndiye kalonga wa Arubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ndi abale ake monga mwa mabanja ao, powerenga chibadwidwe cha mibadwo yao: akulu ndiwo Yeiyele, ndi Zekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 ndi Bela mwana wa Azazi, mwana wa Sema, mwana wa Yowele, wokhala ku Aroere, ndi kufikira ku Nebo ndi Baala-Meoni;" 
1Chronicles5:9 ndi kum'mawa anakhala mpaka polowera kuchipululu kuyambira mtsinje wa Yufurate; pakuti zoweta zao zinachuluka m'dziko la Giliyadi. 
1Chronicles5:10 Ndipo masiku a Saulo anagwirana nkhondo ndi Ahagiri, amene adagwa ndi dzanja lao; ndipo anakhala m'mahema mwao kum'mawa konse kwa Giliyadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ndi ana a Gadi anakhala pandunji pao m'dziko la Basani mpaka Saleka: 
1Chronicles5:12 Yowele mkulu wao, ndi Safamu wachiwiri, ndi Yanai, ndi Safati m'Basani;" 
1Chronicles5:13 ndi abale ao a nyumba za makolo ao: Mikaele, ndi Mesulamu, ndi Sheba, ndi Yorai, ndi Yakani, ndi Ziya, ndi Eberi; asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles5:14 Awa ndi ana a Abihaili, mwana wa Huri, mwana wa Yarowa, mwana wa Giliyadi, mwana wa Mikaele, mwana wa Yesisai, mwana wa Yado, mwana wa Buzi," 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mwana wa Abidiyele, mwana wa Guni, ndiye mkulu wa nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ndipo anakhala m'Giliyadi m'Basani, ndi m'midzi yake, ndi podyetsa pake ponse pa Saroni, mpaka malire ao." 
1Chronicles5:17 Onsewo anawerengedwa monga mwa mabuku a chibadwidwe chao, masiku a Yotamu mfumu ya Yuda, ndi m'masiku a Yerobowamu mfumu ya Israele." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ana a Rubeni, ndi a Gadi, ndi limodzi la magawo awiri a fuko la Manase, ngwazi, amuna akugwira chikopa ndi lupanga, ndi kuponya mivi, ozolowera nkhondo, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zinai mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi akutuluka kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ndipo anagwirana nkhondo ndi Ahagiri, ndi Yeturi, ndi Nafisi, ndi Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ndipo anathandizidwa polimbana nao; ndi Ahagiri anaperekedwa m'dzanja lao, ndi onse anali nao; pakuti anafuulira kwa Mulungu pomenyana nao, ndipo anapembedzeka nao, popeza anamkhulupirira Iye." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ndipo analanda zoweta zao, ngamira zao zikwi makumi asanu, ndi nkhosa zikwi mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu, ndi abulu zikwi ziwiri, ndi amuna zikwi zana limodzi." 
1Chronicles5:22 Pakuti adagwa, nafa ambiri, popeza nkhondoyi nja Mulungu. Ndipo anakhala m'malo mwao mpaka anatengedwa ndende." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ndi ana a limodzi la magawo awiri a fuko la Manase anakhala m'dziko; anachuluka kuyambira Basani kufikira Baala-Heremoni, ndi Seniri, ndi phiri la Heremoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ndipo akulu a nyumba za makolo ao ndi awa: Efere, ndi Isi, ndi Eliyele, ndi Aziriele, ndi Yeremiya, ndi Hodaviya, ndi Yadiyele, anthu amphamvu ndithu, anthu omveka, akulu a nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles5:25 Koma analakwira Mulungu wa makolo ao, nachita chigololo, ndi kutsata milungu ya mitundu ya anthu a m'dziko, amene Mulungu adaononga pamaso pao." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ndipo Mulungu wa Israele anautsa mzimu wa Pulo mfumu ya Asiriya, ndi mzimu wa Tigilati-Pilesere mfumu ya Asiriya, ndiye anawatenga ndende; ndiwo Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, nafika nao ku Hala, ndi Habori, ndi Hara ndi ku mtsinje wa Gozani, mpaka lero lino." 
1Chronicles6:1 Ana a Levi: Geresomo, Kohati, ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ndi ana a Kohati: Amuramu, Izihara, ndi Hebroni, ndi Uziyele." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ndi ana a Amuramu: Aroni, ndi Mose, ndi Miriyamu. Ndi ana a Aroni: Nadabu, ndi Abihu, Eleazara, ndi Itamara." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazara anabala Finehasi, Finehasi anabala Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles6:5 ndi Abisuwa anabala Buki, ndi Buki anabala Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 ndi Uzi anabala Zerahiya, ndi Zerahiya anabala Meraiyoti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiyoti anabala Amariya, ndi Amariya anabala Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:8 ndi Ahitubi anabala Zadoki, ndi Zadoki anabala Ahimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 ndi Ahimaazi anabala Azariya, ndi Azariya anabala Yohanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 ndi Yohanani anabala Azariya (ndiye amene anachita ntchito ya nsembe m'nyumba anaimanga Solomoni m'Yerusalemu)," 
1Chronicles6:11 ndi Azariya anabala Amariya, ndi Amariya anabala Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:12 ndi Ahitubi anabala Zadoki, ndi Zadoki anabala Salumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 ndi Salumu anabala Hilikiya, ndi Hilikiya anabala Azariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 ndi Azariya anabala Seraya, ndi Seraya anabala Yehozadaki," 
1Chronicles6:15 ndi Yehozadaki analowa undende muja Yehova anatenga ndende Yuda ndi Yerusalemu ndi dzanja la Nebukadinezara. 
1Chronicles6:16 Ana a Levi: Geresomo, Kohati ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ndipo maina a ana a Geresomo ndi awa: Libini, ndi Simei." 
1Chronicles6:18 Ndipo ana a Kohati ndiwo Amuramu, ndi Izihara, ndi Hebroni, ndi Uziyele." 
1Chronicles6:19 Ana a Merari: Mali ndi Musi. Ndi mabanja a Alevi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao ndi awa. 
1Chronicles6:20 Wa Geresomo: Libini mwana wake, Yahati mwana wake, Zima mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:21 Yowa mwana wake, Ido mwana wake, Zera mwana wake, Yeterai mwana wake." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ana a Kohati: Aminadabu mwana wake, Kora mwana wake, Asiri mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elikana mwana wake, ndi Ebiyasafu mwana wake, ndi Asiri mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahati mwana wake, Uriyele mwana wake, Uziya mwana wake, ndi Shaulo mwana wake." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ndi ana a Elikana: Amasai, ndi Ahimoti." 
1Chronicles6:26 Elikana: ana a Elikana Zofai mwana wake, ndi Nahati mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliyabu mwana wake, Yerohamu mwana wake, Elikana mwana wake." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ndi ana a Samuele: woyamba Yowele, ndi wachiwiri Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ana a Merari: Mali, Libini mwana wake, Simei mwana wake, Uza mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:30 Simea mwana wake, Hagiya mwana wake, Asaya mwana wake." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ndipo iwo aja Davide anawaimika a udindo wa nyimbo m'nyumba ya Yehova, litafikira kupumula likasalo, ndi awa." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ndipo anatumikira ndi kuimba pakhomo pa Kachisi wa chihema chokomanako mpaka Solomoni adamanga nyumba ya Yehova m'Yerusalemu, naimirira m'utumiki wao monga mwa malongosoledwe ao." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ndipo oimirirawo, ndi ana ao, ndi awa: a ana a Akohati, Hemani woimbayo, mwana wa Yowele, mwana wa Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:34 mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Yerohamu, mwana wa Eliyele, mwana wa Towa," 
1Chronicles6:35 mwana wa Zufu, mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Mahati, mwana wa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Yowele, mwana wa Azariya, mwana wa Zefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 mwana wa Tahati, mwana wa Asiri, mwana wa Ebiyasafu, mwana wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 mwana wa Izihara, mwana wa Kohati, mwana wa Levi, mwana wa Israele." 
1Chronicles6:39 Ndi mbale wake Asafu wokhala ku dzanja lake lamanja, ndiye Asafu mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Simea," 
1Chronicles6:40 mwana wa Mikaele, mwana wa Baaseiya, mwana wa Malikiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 mwana wa Etini, mwana wa Zera, mwana wa Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 mwana wa Etani, mwana wa Zima, mwana wa Simei," 
1Chronicles6:43 mwana wa Yahati, mwana wa Geresomo, mwana wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ndi ku dzanja lamanzere abale ao ana a Merari: Etani mwana wa Kisi, mwana wa Abidi, mwana wa Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 mwana wa Hasabiya, mwana wa Amaziya, mwana wa Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 mwana wa Amizi, mwana wa Bani, mwana wa Semeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 mwana wa Mali, mwana wa Musi, mwana wa Merari, mwana wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ndi abale ao Alevi anaikidwa achite za utumiki zilizonse za Kachisi wa nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Chronicles6:49 Koma Aroni ndi ana ake ankafukiza pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza, ndi pa guwa la nsembe yofukiza, chifukwa cha ntchito yonse ya malo opatulika kwambiri, ndi kuchitira Israele chowatetezera, monga mwa zonse Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu adawauza." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ndipo ana a Aroni ndiwo Eleazara mwana wake, Finehasi mwana wake, Abisuwa mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki mwana wake, Uzi mwana wake, Zerahiya mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiyoti mwana wake, Amariya mwana wake, Ahitubi mwana wake," 
1Chronicles6:53 Zadoki mwana wake, Ahimaazi mwana wake." 
1Chronicles6:54 Pokhala pao tsono monga mwa madera ao m'malire mwao ndi awa: kwa ana a Aroni a mabanja a Akohati, pakuti maere oyamba adagwera iwowa," 
1Chronicles6:55 kwa iwo anapereka Hebroni m'dziko la Yuda, ndi podyetsa pake pozungulira pake;" 
1Chronicles6:56 koma minda ya mudzi ndi milaga yake anapatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Ndi kwa ana a Aroni anapereka midzi yopulumukirako: Hebroni, ndi Libina ndi mabusa ake, ndi Yatiri, ndi Esitemowa ndi mabusa ake." 
1Chronicles6:58 Ndi Hileni ndi mabusa ake, ndi Debiri ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:59 ndi Asani ndi mabusa ake, ndi Betesemesi ndi mabusa ake;" 
1Chronicles6:60 ndi ku fuko la Benjamini Geba ndi mabusa ake, ndi Alemeti ndi mabusa ake, ndi Anatoti ndi mabusa ake. Midzi yao yonse mwa mabanja ao ndiyo midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Ndipo otsala a ana a Kohati analandira mwa maere, motapa pa mabanja a fuko, pa fuko la Manase logawika pakati, midzi khumi." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ndi kwa ana a Geresomo monga mwa mabanja ao, motapa pa fuko la Isakara, ndi pa fuko la Asere, ndi pa fuko la Nafutali, ndi pa fuko la Manase m'Basani, midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ana a Merari analandira mwa maere monga mwa mabanja ao, motapa pa fuko la Rubeni, ndi pa fuko la Gadi, ndi pa fuko la Zebuloni, midzi khumi ndi iwiri." 
1Chronicles6:64 Ndipo ana a Israele anapatsa Alevi midzi ndi mabusa ao. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ndipo anapatsa mwamaere, motapa pa fuko la ana a Yuda, ndi pa fuko la Simeoni, ndi pa fuko la ana a Benjamini, midzi iyi yotchulidwa maina ao." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ndi mabanja ena a ana a Kohati anali nayo midzi ya malire ao, yotapa pa fuko la Efuremu." 
1Chronicles6:67 Ndipo anawapatsa midzi yopulumukiramo: Sekemu ndi mabusa ake ku mapiri a Efuremu, Gezere ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:68 ndi Yokomeamu ndi mabusa ake, ndi Betehoroni ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:69 ndi Ayaloni ndi mabusa ake, ndi Gatirimoni ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:70 ndi motapa pa fuko la Manase logawika pakati, Anere ndi mabusa ake, ndi Bileamu ndi mabusa ake, kwa otsala a mabanja a ana a Kohati." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ana a Geresomo analandira motapa pa mabanja a fuko la Manase logawika pakati, Golani m'Basani ndi mabusa ake, ndi Asitaroti ndi mabusa ake;" 
1Chronicles6:72 ndi motapa pa fuko la Isakara, Kedesi ndi mabusa ake, Daberati ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:73 ndi Ramoti ndi mabusa ake, ndi Anemu ndi mabusa ake;" 
1Chronicles6:74 ndi motapa pa fuko la Asere, Masala ndi mabusa ake, ndi Abidoni ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:75 ndi Hukoki ndi mabusa ake, ndi Rehobu ndi mabusa ake;" 
1Chronicles6:76 ndi motapa pa fuko la Nafutali, Kedesi m'Galileya ndi mabusa ake, ndi Hamoni ndi mabusa ake, ndi Kiriyataimu ndi mabusa ake." 
1Chronicles6:77 Amerari (otsala a Alevi) analandira, motapa pa fuko la Zebuloni, Rimoni ndi mabusa ake, Tabori ndi mabusa ake;" 
1Chronicles6:78 ndi tsidya lija la Yordani kum'mawa kwa Yeriko analandira, motapa pa fuko la Rubeni, Bezeri m'chipululu ndi mabusa ake, ndi Yahazi ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:79 ndi Kedemoti ndi mabusa ake, ndi Mefaati ndi mabusa ake;" 
1Chronicles6:80 ndi motapa m'fuko la Gadi, Ramoti m'Giliyadi ndi mabusa ake, ndi Mahanaimu ndi mabusa ake," 
1Chronicles6:81 ndi Hesiboni ndi mabusa ake, ndi Yazere ndi mabusa ake." 
1Chronicles7:1 Ana a Isakara ndiwo Tola, ndi Puwa, Yasubu ndi Simironi; anai." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ndi ana a Tola: Uzi, ndi Refaya, ndi Yeriyele, ndi Yamai, ndi Ibisamu, ndi Semuele, akulu a nyumba za makolo; ao ndiwo a Tola, ngwazi zamphamvu, m'mibadwo yao; kuwerenga kwao, masiku a Davide ndiko zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ndi mwana wa Uzi: Izrahiya; ndi ana a Izrahiya: Mikaele, ndi Obadiya, ndi Yowele, ndi Isiya; onse asanuwa ndiwo akulu." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ndi pamodzi nao mwa mibadwo yao, mwa nyumba za makolo ao, panali magulu a nkhondo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi, popeza anachuluka akazi ao ndi ana ao." 
1Chronicles7:5 Ndi abale ao mwa mabanja onse a Isakara, ngwazi zamphamvu, oyesedwa mwa chibadwidwe chao, onsewa ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi zitatu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
1Chronicles7:6 Ana a Benjamini ndiwo Bela, ndi Bekere, ndi Yediyaele, atatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ndi ana a Bela: Eziboni, ndi Uzi, ndi Uziyele, ndi Yerimoti, ndi Iri, asanu; akulu a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zamphamvu, owerengedwa m'mabuku a chibadwidwe zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri kudza makumi atatu ndi anai." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ndi ana a Bekere: Zimira, ndi Yowasi, ndi Eliyezere, ndi Eliyoenai, ndi Omuri, ndi Yeremoti, ndi Abiya, ndi Anatoti, ndi Alemeti. Onsewa ndiwo ana a Bekere." 
1Chronicles7:9 Ndipo anayesedwa mwa chibadwidwe chao, mwa mibadwo yao, akulu a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zamphamvu zikwi makumi awiri mphambu mazana awiri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ndi mwana wa Yediyaele: Bilihani; ndi ana a Bilihani: Yeusi, ndi Benjamini, ndi Ehudi, ndi Kenana, ndi Zetani, ndi Tarisisi, ndi Ahisahara." 
1Chronicles7:11 Onsewa ndiwo ana a Yediyaele; ndiwo akulu a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zamphamvu zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza mazana awiri akutuluka kugulu kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Supimu yemwe ndi Hupimu ana a Iri, ndi Husimu mwana wa Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Ana a Nafutali: Yaziyele, ndi Guni, ndi Yezere, ndi Salumu, ana a Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ana a Manase ndiwo Asiriele amene mkazi wake anambala. Koma mkazi wake wamng'ono Mwaramu anabala Makiri atate wa Giliyadi; 
1Chronicles7:15 ndi Makiri anadzitengera mkazi, mlongo wake wa Hupimu ndi Supimu, dzina lake ndiye Maaka. Ndipo dzina la mwana wachiwiri wa Manase ndiye Zelofehadi. Ndi Zelofehadi anali ndi ana akazi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Ndi Maaka mkazi wa Makiri anabala mwana, namutcha dzina lake Peresi, ndi dzina la mbale wake ndiye Seresi, ndi ana ake ndiwo Ulamu, ndi Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ndi mwana wa Ulamu: Bedani; ndiwo ana a Giliyadi mwana wa Makiri mwana wa Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Ndi mlongo wake Hamoleketi anabala Isihodi, ndi Abiyezere, ndi Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Ndi ana a Semida ndiwo Ahiyani, ndi Sekemu, ndi Liki, ndi Aniyamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ndi ana a Efuremu: Sutela, ndi Beredi mwana wake, ndi Tahati mwana wake, ndi Eleada mwana wake, ndi Tahati mwana wake," 
1Chronicles7:21 ndi Zabadi mwana wake, ndi Sutela mwana wake, ndi Ezere, ndi Eleadi, amene anthu a Gati obadwa m'dziko anamupha, popeza anatsikira kukalanda zoweta zao." 
1Chronicles7:22 Ndipo Efuremu atate wao, anachita maliro masiku ambiri, ndi abale ake anadza kudzamtonthoza mtima." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ndipo analowa kwa mkazi wake, naima iye, nabala mwana, namutcha dzina lake Beriya, popeza m'nyumba mwake mudaipa." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ndipo mwana wake wamkazi ndiye Seera, amene anamanga Betehoroni wa kunsi, ndi Betehoroni wa kumtunda, ndi Uzeniseera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ndipo Refa anali mwana wake, ndi Resefi, ndi Tela mwana wake, ndi Tahani mwana wake," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladani mwana wake, Amihudi mwana wake, Elisama mwana wake," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni mwana wake, Yoswa mwana wake." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ndipo dziko lao, ndi pokhala pao ndizo Betele ndi milaga yake, ndi kum'mawa Naarani, ndi kumadzulo Gezere ndi milaga yake, ndi Sekemu ndi milaga yake, mpaka Aya ndi milaga yake;" 
1Chronicles7:29 ndi kumalire a ana a Manase; Beteseani ndi milaga yake, Taanaki ndi milaga yake, Megido ndi milaga yake, Dori ndi milaga yake. M'menemo anakhala ana a Yosefe mwana wa Israele." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ana a Asere: Imina, ndi Isiva, ndi Isivi, ndi Beriya, ndi Sera mlongo wao." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ndi ana a Beriya: Hebere, ndi Malikiele, ndiye atate wa Birizaiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Ndi Hebere anabala Yafileti, ndi Somere, ndi Hotamu, ndi Suwa mlongo wao." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ndi ana a Yafileti: Pasaki, ndi Bimala, ndi Asivati. Awa ndi ana a Yafileti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ndi ana a Semeri: Ahi, ndi Roga, Yehuba, ndi Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ndi ana a Helemu mbale wake: Zofa, ndi Imina, ndi Selesi, ndi Amala." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ana a Zofa: Suwa, ndi Harenefere, ndi Suwala, ndi Beri, ndi Imira," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezere, ndi Hodi, ndi Sama, ndi Silisa, ndi Itirani, ndi Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ndi ana a Yetere: Yefune, ndi Pisipa, ndi Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ndi ana a Ula: Ara, ndi Haniyele, ndi Riziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Awa onse ndiwo ana a Asere, akulu a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zosankhika ndi zamphamvu, akulu mwa akalonga. Oyesedwa mwa chibadwidwe chao otumikira kunkhondo ndiwo amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi." 
1Chronicles8:1 Ndipo Benjamini anabala Bela mwana wake woyamba, Asibele wachiwiri, ndi Ahara wachitatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha wachinai, ndi Rafa wachisanu." 
1Chronicles8:3 Ndi Bela anali ndi ana: Adara, ndi Gera, ndi Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 ndi Abisuwa, ndi Naamani, ndi Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 ndi Gera, ndi Sefufani, ndi Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ndi ana a Ehudi ndi awa: ndiwo akulu a nyumba za makolo ao a iwo okhala ku Geba, ndipo anawatenga ndende kunka ku Manahati," 
1Chronicles8:7 natenga ndende Naamani, ndi Ahiya, ndi Gera, ndipo, anabala Uza, ndi Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Ndipo Saharaimu anabala ana ku dziko la Mowabu, atachotsa akazi ake Husimu ndi Baara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Ndipo Hodesi mkazi wake anambalira Yobabu, ndi Zibiya, ndi Mesa, ndi Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 ndi Yeuzi, ndi Sakiya, ndi Mirima. Awa ndi ana ake akulu a nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ndi Husimu anambalira Abitubu, ndi Elipaala." 
1Chronicles8:12 Ndi ana a Elipaala: Eberi, ndi Misamu, ndi Semedi, amene anamanga Ono, ndi Lodi ndi milaga yake," 
1Chronicles8:13 ndi Beriya, ndi Sema; ndiwo akulu a nyumba za makolo a iwo okhala m'Ayaloni, amene anathawitsa okhala m'Gati;" 
1Chronicles8:14 ndi Ahiyo, Sasaki, ndi Yeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 ndi Zebadiya, ndi Aradi, ndi Edere," 
1Chronicles8:16 ndi Mikaele, ndi Isipa, ndi Yoha, ana a Beriya;" 
1Chronicles8:17 ndi Zebadiya, ndi Mesulamu, ndi Hiziki, ndi Hebere," 
1Chronicles8:18 ndi Isimerai, ndi Iziliya, ndi Yobabu, ana a Elipaala;" 
1Chronicles8:19 ndi Yakimu, ndi Zikiri, ndi Zabidi," 
1Chronicles8:20 ndi Eliyenai, ndi Ziletai, ndi Eliyele," 
1Chronicles8:21 ndi Adaya, ndi Beraya, ndi Simiratu, ana a Simei;" 
1Chronicles8:22 ndi Isipani, ndi Eberi, ndi Eliyele," 
1Chronicles8:23 ndi Abidoni, ndi Zikiri, ndi Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 ndi Hananiya, ndi Elamu, ndi Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 ndi Ifidea, ndi Penuwele, ana a Sasaki;" 
1Chronicles8:26 ndi Samuserai, ndi Sehariya, ndi Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 ndi Yaaresiya ndi Eliya, ndi Zikiri, ana a Yerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Awa ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo mwa mibadwo yao, ndiwo akulu anakhala m'Yerusalemu awa." 
1Chronicles8:29 Ndipo m'Gibiyoni anakhala atate a Gibiyoni, dzina la mkazi wake ndiye Maaka;" 
1Chronicles8:30 ndi mwana wake woyamba ndiye Abidoni, opondana naye ndi Zuri, ndi Kisi, ndi Baala, ndi Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 ndi Gedori, ndi Ahiyo, ndi Zekeri." 
1Chronicles8:32 Ndipo Mikiloti anabala Simea. Ndi iwonso anakhala pamodzi ndi abale ao m'Yerusalemu, popenyana ndi abale ao." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ndipo Nere anabala Kisi, ndi Kisi anabala Saulo, ndi Saulo anabala Yonatani, ndi Malikisuwa, ndi Abinadabu, ndi Esibaala." 
1Chronicles8:34 Ndi mwana wa Yonatani, ndiye Meribaala; ndi Meribaala anabala Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Ndi ana a Mika: Pitoni, ndi Meleki, ndi Tareya, ndi Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ndi Ahazi anabala Yehoyada, ndi Yehoyada anabala Alemeti, ndi Azimaveti, ndi Zimiri; ndi Zimiri anabala Moza;" 
1Chronicles8:37 ndi Moza anabala Bineya, mwana wake ndiye Rafa, mwana wake Eleasa, mwana wake Azele;" 
1Chronicles8:38 ndipo Azele anali nao ana asanu ndi mmodzi, maina ao ndiwo Azirikamu, Bokeru, ndi Ismaele, ndi Seyariya, ndi Obadiya, ndi Hanani. Onsewa ndiwo ana a Azele." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ndipo ana a Eseki mbale wake: Ulamu mwana wake woyamba, Yeusi wachiwiri, ndi Elifeleti wachitatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ndipo ana a Ulamu ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu, ndiwo oponya mivi, nakhala nao ana ambiri ndi zidzukulu zana limodzi. Onsewa ndiwo a ana a Benjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Ndipo Aisraele onse anawerengedwa mwa chibadwidwe chao; ndipo taonani, alembedwa m'buku la mafumu a Israele; ndipo Yuda anatengedwa ndende kunka ku Babiloni chifukwa cha kulakwa kwao." 
1Chronicles9:2 Okhala m'dziko oyamba tsono, akukhala mwaomwao m'midzi mwao, ndiwo Israele, ansembe, Alevi, ndi Anetini." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ndipo m'Yerusalemu munakhala a ana a Yuda, ndi a ana a Benjamini, ndi a ana a Efuremu ndi Manase:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai mwana wa Amihudi, mwana wa Omuri, mwana wa Imuri, mwana wa Bani, wa ana a Perezi mwana wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ndipo a Asiloni: Asaya woyamba, ndi ana ake." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ndi a ana a Zera: Yeuwele ndi abale ao mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai. 
1Chronicles9:7 Ndi a ana a Benjamini: Salu mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Hodaviya, mwana wa Hasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 ndi Ibineya mwana wa Yerohamu, ndi Ela mwana wa Uzi, mwana wa Mikiri, ndi Mesulamu mwana wa Sefatiya, mwana wa Reuwele, mwana wa Ibineya," 
1Chronicles9:9 ndi abale ao monga mwa mibadwo yao mazana asanu ndi anai mphambu makumi asanu kudza asanu ndi mmodzi. Onsewa ndiwo akulu a nyumba za makolo ao m'nyumba za makolo ao. 
1Chronicles9:10 Ndi a ansembe: Yedaya, ndi Yehoyaribu, ndi Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 ndi Azariya mwana wa Hilikiya, mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Zadoki, mwana wa Meraiyoti, mwana wa Ahitubi, mtsogoleri wa m'nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
1Chronicles9:12 ndi Adaya mwana wa Yerohamu, mwana wa Pasuri, mwana wa Malikiya, ndi Maasai mwana wa Adiyele, mwana wa Yazera, mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Mesilemiti, mwana wa Imeri," 
1Chronicles9:13 ndi abale ao, akulu a nyumba za makolo ao chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi, anthu odziwitsitsa ntchito ya utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ndi a Alevi: Semaya mwana wa Hasubu, mwana wa Azirikamu, mwana wa Hasabiya, a ana a Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 ndi Bakibakara, Heresi, ndi Galali, ndi Mataniya mwana wa Mika, mwana wa Zikiri, mwana wa Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 ndi Obadiya mwana wa Semaya, mwana wa Galali, mwana wa Yedutuni, ndi Berekiya mwana wa Asa, mwana wa Elikana, wokhala m'midzi ya Anetofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ndi odikira pakhomo: Salumu, ndi Akubu, ndi Talimoni, ndi Ahimani ndi abale ao; Salumu ndi mkulu wao," 
1Chronicles9:18 amene adadikira pa chipata cha mfumu kum'mawa mpaka pomwepo, ndiwo odikira pakhomo a tsasa la ana a Levi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Ndipo Salumu mwana wa Kore, mwana wa Ebiyasafu, mwana wa Kora, ndi abale ake a nyumba ya atate wake; Akora anayang'anira ntchito ya utumiki, osunga zipata za Kachisi monga makolo ao; anakhala m'chigono cha Yehova osunga polowera;" 
1Chronicles9:20 ndi Finehasi mwana wa Eleazara anali mtsogoleri wao kale, ndipo Yehova anali naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwana wa Meselemiya anali wodikira pakhomo pa chihema chokomanako. 
1Chronicles9:22 Iwo onse osankhidwa akhale odikira kuzipata ndiwo mazana awiri mphambu khumi ndi awiri. Iwo anawerengedwa monga mwa chibadwidwe chao, m'midzi mwao, amene Davide ndi Samuele mlauli anawaika m'udindo wao." 
1Chronicles9:23 Momwemo iwo ndi ana ao anayang'anira zipata za kunyumba ya Yehova, ndiyo nyumba ya Kachisi, m'udikiro wao." 
1Chronicles9:24 Pa mbali zinai panali odikira kum'mawa, kumadzulo, kumpoto, ndi kumwera." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ndi abale ao m'midzi mwao akafikafika, atapita masiku asanu ndi awiri masabata onse, kuti akhale nao;" 
1Chronicles9:26 pakuti odikira anai akulu, ndiwo Alevi, anali m'udindo wao, nayang'anira zipinda ndi mosungiramo chuma m'nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ndipo amagona usiku m'zipinda zozinga nyumba ya Mulungu, popeza udikiro wake ndi wao; kuitsegula m'mawa ndi m'mawa ndi kwaonso." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ndi ena a iwo anayang'anira zipangizo za utumikiwo, pakuti analowa nazo ataziwerenga, natuluka nazo ataziwerenga." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ndi ena a iwo anaikidwa ayang'anire zipangizo zilizonse, ndi zipangizo zonse za malo opatulika, ndi ufa wosalala, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi lubani, ndi zonunkhira." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ndi ana ena a ansembe anasanganiza chisanganizo cha zonunkhira. 
1Chronicles9:31 Ndi Matitiya wina wa Alevi, ndiye mwana woyamba wa Salumu Mkora, anaikidwa ayang'anire zokazingidwa m'ziwaya." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ndi ena a abale ao, a ana a Akohati, anayang'anira mkate woonekera, kuukonza masabata onse." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ndipo awa ndi oimba akulu a nyumba za makolo a Alevi, okhala m'zipinda, omasuka ku ntchito zina; pakuti anali nayo ntchito yao usana ndi usiku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Awa ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo a Alevi mwa mibadwo yao, ndiwo akulu; anakhala ku Yerusalemu awa." 
1Chronicles9:35 Ndipo m'Gibiyoni munakhala atate wa Gibiyoni Yeiyele, dzina la mkazi wake ndiye Maaka;" 
1Chronicles9:36 ndi mwana wake woyamba ndiye Abidoni, opondana naye ndi Zuri, ndi Kisi, ndi Baala, ndi Nere, ndi Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 ndi Gedori, ndi Ahiyo, ndi Zekariya, ndi Mikiloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Ndi Mikiloti anabala Simeamu. Ndipo iwonso anakhala pamodzi ndi abale ao m'Yerusalemu, pandunji pa abale ao." 
1Chronicles9:39 Ndipo Nere anabala Kisi, ndi Kisi anabala Saulo, ndi Saulo anabala Yonatani, ndi Malikisuwa, ndi Abinadabu, ndi Esibaala." 
1Chronicles9:40 Ndipo mwana wa Yonatani ndiye Meribaala; ndi Meribaala anabala Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Ndi ana a Mika: Pitoni, ndi Meleki, ndi Tareya, ndi Ahazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ndi Ahazi anabala Yara, ndi Yara anabala Alemeti, ndi Azimaveti, ndi Zimiri; ndi Zimiri anabala Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 ndi Moza anabala Bineya, ndi Refaya mwana wake, Eleasa mwana wake, Azele mwana wake;" 
1Chronicles9:44 ndi Azele anali nao ana asanu ndi mmodzi, maina ao ndi awa; Azirikamu, Bokeru, ndi Ismaele, ndi Seyariya, ndi Obadiya, ndi Hanani; awa ndi ana a Azele." 
1Chronicles10:1 Afilisti tsono analimbana nkhondo ndi Israele; ndipo amuna a Israele anathawa pamaso pa Afilisti, nagwa ophedwa pa phiri la Gilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Ndipo Afilisti anaumirira kutsata Saulo ndi ana ake, ndi Afilistiwo anawapha Yonatani, ndi Abinadabu, ndi Malikisuwa, ana a Saulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ndi nkhondoyi inamkulira Saulo, ndi amauta anampeza; ndipo anatenga nkhawa chifukwa cha amauta." 
1Chronicles10:4 Pamenepo Saulo anati kwa wonyamula zida zake, Solola lupanga lako, nundipyoze nalo, angafike osadulidwa awa ndi kundiseka. Koma wonyamula zida zake anakana, popeza anaopa kwambiri. Pomwepo Saulo anatenga lupanga lake, naligwera." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ndipo pamene wonyamula zida zake anaona kuti Saulo wafa, anagwera nayenso lupanga lake, nafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Momwemo anafa Saulo, ndi ana ake atatu; ndi nyumba yake yonse idafa pamodzi." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ndipo pamene amuna onse a Israele okhala m'chigwamo anaona kuti anathawa, ndi kuti Saulo ndi ana ake adafa, anasiya midzi yao, nathawa; nadza Afilisti, nakhala m'menemo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ndipo m'mawa mwake anafika Afilisti kuvula za ophedwa, napeza Saulo ndi ana ake adagwa pa phiri la Gilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ndipo anamvula natenga mutu wake, ndi zida zake, natumiza ku dziko la Afilisti pozungulirapo, kulalika m'mafano ao ndi mwa anthu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ndipo anaika zida zake m'nyumba ya milungu yao, napachika mutu wake m'nyumba ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ndipo onse a Yabesi-Giliyadi, atamva zonse Afilisti adachitira Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 anauka ngwazi zonse, nachotsa mtembo wa Saulo, ndi mitembo ya ana ake, nabwera nayo ku Yabesi, naika mafupa ao patsinde pa mtengo wathundu ku Yabesi, nasala masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles10:13 Momwemo Saulo anafa, chifukwa cha kulakwa kwake analakwira Yehova, kulakwira mau a Yehova amene sanawasunge; ndiponso chifukwa cha kufunsira wobwebweta, kufunsirako," 
1Chronicles10:14 osafunsira kwa Yehova; chifukwa chake anamupha, napambutsira ufumu kwa Davide mwana wa Yese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Pamenepo Aisraele onse anasonkhana kwa Davide ku Hebroni, ndi kuti, Taonani, ife ndife fupa lanu, ndi mnofu wanu." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ngakhale kale lomwe, pokhala mfumu Sauloyo, wotuluka ndi kulowa nao Aisraele ndinu; ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu anati kwa inu, Uzidyetsa anthu anga Aisraele, nukhale mtsogoleri wa anthu anga Israele." 
1Chronicles11:3 Akulu onse omwe a Israele anadza kwa mfumu ku Hebroni; ndipo Davide anapangana nao pangano ku Hebroni pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo anamdzoza Davide akhale mfumu ya Israele monga mwa mau a Yehova, ndi dzanja la Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Namuka Davide ndi Aisraele onse naye ku Yerusalemu, ndiwo Yebusi; ndipo Ayebusi nzika za m'dziko zinali komweko." 
1Chronicles11:5 Ndipo nzika za m'Yebusi zinati kwa Davide, Sungalowe muno. Koma Davide analanda linga la Ziyoni, ndiwo mudzi wa Davide." 
1Chronicles11:6 Nati Davide, Aliyense woyamba kukantha Ayebusi, yemweyo adzakhala mkulu ndi mtsogoleri. Nayamba kukwerako Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya, nakhala mkulu iyeyu." 
1Chronicles11:7 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'lingamo; chifukwa chake analitcha mudzi wa Davide. 
1Chronicles11:8 Ndipo anamanga mudzi pozungulira pake, kuyambira ku Milo ndi pozungulira pake; ndi Yowabu anakonzanso potsala pa mudzi." 
1Chronicles11:9 Ndipo Davide anakulakulabe, pakuti Yehova wa makamu anali naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Akulu a amphamvu aja Davide anali nao akulimbika pamodzi naye m'ufumu wake, pamodzi ndi Aisraele onse, kumlonga ufumu, monga mwa mau a Yehova akunena za Israele, ndi awa." 
1Chronicles11:11 Kuwerenga kwa amphamvu aja Davide anali nao ndi uku: Yasobeamu mwana wa Muhakimoni, mkulu wa makumi atatu aja, anasamulira mazana atatu mkondo wake, nawapha nthawi imodzi." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ndi pambuyo pake Eleazara mwana wa Dodo Mwahohi, ndiye mmodzi wa atatu aja amphamvu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Anali pamodzi ndi Davide ku Pasidamimu muja; Afilisti anasonkhanako kunkhondo kumene kunali munda wodzala ndi barele; ndipo anthu anathawa pamaso pa Afilisti. 
1Chronicles11:14 Koma anadziimika pakati pa munda, naulanditsa, nakantha Afilisti; m'mwemo anawapulumutsa Yehova ndi chipulumutso chachikulu." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ndipo atatu a akulu makumi atatu anatsikira kuthanthwe kwa Davide, ku phanga la Adulamu; ndi nkhondo ya Afilisti idamanga misasa m'chigwa cha Refaimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Pamenepo Davide anali m'linga, ndi boma la asilikali a Afilisti linali ku Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Ndipo Davide analakalaka, nati, Ha? Mwenzi wina atandimwetsa madzi a m'chitsime cha ku Betelehemu chili kuchipata." 
1Chronicles11:18 Napyola atatuwo misasa ya Afilisti natunga madzi ku chitsime cha ku Betelehemu chili kuchipata, nabwera nao kwa Davide; koma Davide anakana kumwako, koma anawathirira kwa Yehova;" 
1Chronicles11:19 nati, Pali Mulungu wanga, kukhale kutali kwa ine kuchita ichi. Ngati ndidzamwa mwazi wa anthu awa? Akadataya moyo wao, inde akadataya moyo wao, pakukatenga madziwa. M'mwemo sanafune kuwamwa. Izi anazichita atatu amphamvuwa." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ndipo Abisai mbale wa Yowabu, ndiye wamkulu wa atatuwa; pakuti anasamulira mazana atatu mkondo wake, nawapha, namveka dzina pakati pa atatuwa." 
1Chronicles11:21 Mwa atatuwa iye anali waulemu woposa awiriwa, nasanduka mkulu wao; koma sanafike pa atatu oyamba aja." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada, mwana wa ngwazi ya ku Kabizeeli, wochita zachikulu, anapha ana awiri a Ariyele wa ku Mowabu; anatsikanso, napha mkango m'kati mwa dzenje nyengo ya chipale chofewa." 
1Chronicles11:23 Anaphanso Mwejipito munthu wamkulu, msinkhu wake mikono isanu, ndi m'dzanja la Mwejipito munali mkondo ngati mtanda woombera nsalu; ndipo anamtsikira ndi ndodo, nakwatula mkondo m'dzanja la Mwejipito, namupha ndi mkondo wake womwe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Izi anazichita Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada, namveka dzina mwa atatu amphamvuwo." 
1Chronicles11:25 Taonani, anali wa ulemu woposa makumi atatuwo, koma sanafike pa atatu oyamba aja; ndipo Davide anamuika mkulu wa olindirira ake." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ndipo amphamvuwo a magulu a nkhondo ndiwo Asahele mbale wa Yowabu, Elihanani mwana wa Dodo wa ku Betelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Samoti Muharodi, Helezi Mpeloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira mwana wa Ikesi wa ku Tekowa, Abiyezere wa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai Muhusa, Ilai Mwahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai Mnetofa, Heledi mwana wa Baana Mnetofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai mwana wa Ribai wa Gibea wa ana a Benjamini, Benaya Mpiratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai wa ku mitsinje ya Gaasi, Abiyele Mwarabati," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimaveti Mbaharumi, Eliyaba Msaaliboni;" 
1Chronicles11:34 ana a Hasemu Mgizoni; Yonatani mwana wa Sage Muharari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiyamu mwana wa Sakara Muharari, Elifala mwana wa Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefere Mmekerati, Ahiya Mpeloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Heziro wa ku Karimele, Naarai mwana wa Ezibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yowele mbale wa Natani, Mibara mwana wa Hagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki Mwamoni, Naharai Mbeeroti wonyamula zida za Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira Mwitiri, Garebu Mwitiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriya Muhiti, Zabadi mwana wa Alai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mwana wa Siza Mrubeni mkulu wa Arubeni, ndi makumi atatu pamodzi naye," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwana wa Maaka, ndi Yosafati Mmitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya Mwasiterati, Sama ndi Yeiyele ana a Hotamu wa ku Aroere," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediyaele mwana wa Simiri, ndi Yoha mbale wake Mtizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliyele Mmahavi, ndi Yeribai ndi Yosaviya ana a Elinaamu, ndi Itima Mmowabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliyele, ndi Obedi, ndi Yaasiyele Mmezobai." 
1Chronicles12:1 Anadzawo kwa Davide ku Zikilagi, akali chitsekedwere chifukwa cha Saulo mwana wa Kisi, ndi awa; ndiwo mwa amphamvuwo omthandiza kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles12:2 Anakoka mauta; naponya miyala, naponya mivi ndi uta ndi dzanja lamanja ndi lamanzere lomwe; ndiwo a abale ake a Saulo, Abenjamini."
