1Chronicles12:3 Mkulu wao ndiye Ahiyezere, ndi Yowasi, ana a Semaa wa ku Gibea; ndi Yeziyele, ndi Peleti, ana a Azimaveti; ndi Beraka, ndi Yehu wa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles12:4 ndi Isimaya wa ku Gibiyoni, wamphamvu mwa makumi atatuwo ndi woyang'anira makumi atatuwo, ndi Yeremiya, ndi Yahaziele, ndi Yohanani, ndi Yozabadi wa ku Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, ndi Yerimoti, ndi Bealiya, ndi Semariya, ndi Sefatiya wa ku Harufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 Elikana, ndi Isiya, ndi Azarele, ndi Yowezere, ndi Yasobeamu ndiwo Akora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 ndi Yowela, ndi Zebadiya, ana a Yerohamu wa ku Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ndi Agadi ena anapatukira kwa Davide ku linga la m'chipululu, ngwazi zamphamvu zozerewera nkhondo, zogwira chikopa ndi mkondo; nkhope zao zikunga nkhope za mikango, ndi liwiro lao longa la ngoma mumapiri:" 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezere mkulu wao, wachiwiri Obadiya, wachitatu Eliyabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 wachinai Misimana, wachisanu Yeremiya," 
1Chronicles12:11 wachisanu ndi chimodzi Atai, wachisanu ndi chiwiri Eliyele," 
1Chronicles12:12 wachisanu ndi chitatu Yohanani, wachisanu ndi chinai Elizabadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 wakhumi Yeremiya, wakhumi ndi chimodzi Makibanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Awa a ana a Gadi, anali atsogoleri a nkhondo; wamng'ono wa iwo anayang'anira zana limodzi, ndi wamkulu wa iwo anayang'anira chikwi chimodzi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Awa ndi omwe aja anaoloka Yordani mwezi woyamba, atadzala kusefukira magombe ake onse; nathawitsa onse okhala m'zigwa kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ndipo anadza ena a ana a Benjamini ndi Yuda kulinga kwa Davide. 
1Chronicles12:17 Ndipo Davide anatuluka kukomana nao, nayankha, nanena nao, Ngati mwandidzera mwamtendere kundithandiza, mtima wanga udzalumikizana nanu; koma ngati mwafika kundipereka kwa adani anga, popeza m'manja mwanga mulibe chiwawa, Mulungu wa makolo athu achione ndi kuchilanga." 
1Chronicles12:18 Pamenepo mzimu unavala Amasai, ndiye wamkulu wa makumi atatuwo, nati iye, Ndife anu, Davide, tivomerezana nanu mwana wa Yese inu: mtendere, mtendere ukhale ndi inu, ndi mtendere ukhale ndi athandizi anu; pakuti Mulungu wanu akuthandizani. Ndipo Davide anawalandira, nawaika akulu a magulu." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ena a Manase omwe anapatukira kwa Davide, muja iye anadza ndi Afilisti koponyana nkhondo ndi Saulo, koma sanawathandiza; popeza akalonga a Afilisti, atachita upo, anamuuza achoke, ndi kuti, Adzapatukira kwa mbuye wake Saulo ndi kutisandulikira." 
1Chronicles12:20 Pomuka iye ku Zikilagi anapatukira kwa iye a Manase: Adina, ndi Yozabadi, ndi Yediyaele, ndi Mikaele, ndi Yozabadi, ndi Elihu, ndi Ziletai, akulu a zikwi a ku Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ndipo anathandiza Davide aponyane nalo gulu la achifwamba, pakuti onse ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu, nakhala atsogoleri m'khamu la nkhondo." 
1Chronicles12:22 Pakuti nthawi yomweyo anadza kwa Davide kumthandiza, mpaka kunali nkhondo yaikulu, ngati nkhondo ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ndipo kuwerenga kwa akulu okonzekeratu kunkhondo, anadzawo kwa Davide ku Hebroni, kupambukitsa ufumu wa Saulo ukhale wake, monga mwa mau a Yehova, ndi uku." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ana a Yuda akunyamula zikopa ndi mikondo ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi atatu, okonzekeratu kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles12:25 A ana a Simeoni ngwazi zamphamvu za nkhondo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu zana limodzi. 
1Chronicles12:26 A ana a Levi zikwi zinai mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi. 
1Chronicles12:27 Ndipo Yehoyada, ndiye mtsogoleri wa nyumba ya Aroni, ndi pamodzi naye zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles12:28 ndi Zadoki, ndiye mnyamata, ngwazi yamphamvu, ndi a nyumba ya kholo lake akulu makumi awiri mphambu awiri." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ndi a ana a Benjamini, abale a Saulo, zikwi zitatu; pakuti mpaka pomwepo ochuluka a iwowa anaumirira nyumba ya Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ndi a ana a Efuremu zikwi makumi awiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi atatu, ngwazi zamphamvu, anthu omveka m'nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ndipo a fuko la Manase logawika pakati zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu, otchulidwa maina ao kuti adzalonge Davide mfumu." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ndi a ana a Isakara, anthu akuzindikira nyengo, akudziwa zoyenera Israele kuzichita, akulu ao ndiwo mazana awiri; ndi abale ao onse anapenyerera pakamwa pao." 
1Chronicles12:33 A Zebuloni akutuluka kukhamu, opangira nkhondo, monga mwa zida zilizonse za nkhondo, zikwi makumi asanu, akusunga malongosoledwe a nkhondo ndi mtima wosatekeseka." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ndi a Nafutali atsogoleri chikwi chimodzi, ndi pamodzi nao ogwira zikopa ndi mikondo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ndi a Adani akupangira nkhondo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi. 
1Chronicles12:36 Ndi a Asere akutuluka kukhamu, akupangira nkhondo, zikwi makumi anai." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ndi tsidya lija la Yordani a Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, ndi zina zilizonse za khamu kuchita nazo nkhondo, zikwi zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri." 
1Chronicles12:38 Onsewa, ndiwo anthu a nkhondo akusunga malongosoledwe a nkhondo, anadza ku Hebroni ndi mtima wangwiro kudzamlonga Davide mfumu ya Aisraele onse; ndi onse otsala a Israele omwe anali a mtima umodzi kumlonga Davide ufumu." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ndipo anali komweko kwa Davide masiku atatu kudya ndi kumwa, popeza abale ao anazikonzeratu." 
1Chronicles12:40 Ndiponso akuyandikizana nao mpaka Isakara ndi Zebuloni ndi Nafutali anabwera nao mkate osenzetsa abulu, ndi ngamira, ndi nyuru, ndi ng'ombe, zakudya zaufa, ndi nchinchi zankhuyu, ndi nchinchi zamphesa, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi ng'ombe, ndi nkhosa zochuluka; pakuti munali chimwemwe m'Israele." 
1Chronicles13:1 Ndipo Davide anafunsana ndi akulu a zikwi ndi a mazana, inde atsogoleri ali onse." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ndipo Davide anati kwa msonkhano wonse wa Israele, Chikakomera inu, ndipo chikachokera kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu, titumize konse kuti abale athu otsala m'dziko lonse la Israele, ndi ansembe ndi Alevi okhala nao m'midzi yao yokhala napo podyetsa, kuti asonkhane kwa ife;" 
1Chronicles13:3 ndipo tibwere nalo kwa ife likasa la Mulungu wathu, pakuti sitinafunako masiku a Saulo." 
1Chronicles13:4 Ndipo a msonkhano onse anati kuti adzachita; pakuti chidayenera chinthuchi pamaso pa anthu onse. 
1Chronicles13:5 M'mwemo Davide anamemeza Aisraele onse kuyambira Sihori wa ku Ejipito mpaka polowera ku Hamati, kutenga likasa la Mulungu ku Kiriyati-Yearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Ndipo Davide ndi Aisraele onse pamodzi naye anakwera kunka ku Baala, ndiko ku Kiriyati-Yearimu wa m'Yuda, kukwera nalo kuchokera komweko likasa la Mulungu Yehova wakukhala pa akerubi, kumene aitanirako Dzina." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ndipo anatengera likasa la Mulungu pa galeta watsopano kuchokera kunyumba ya Abinadabu; ndi Uza ndi Ahiyo anayendetsa ng'ombe za pa galetayo. 
1Chronicles13:8 Ndipo Davide ndi Aisraele onse anasewera pamaso pa Mulungu ndi mphamvu yao yonse; ndi nyimbo, ndi azeze, ndi zisakasa, ndi malingaka, ndi nsanje, ndi malipenga." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ndipo pamene anafika ku dwale la Kidoni, Uza anatambasula dzanja lake kulichirikiza likasa, pakuti ng'ombe zikadapulumuka." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ndi mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Uza, namkantha, chifukwa anatambasulira likasa dzanja lake, nafa komweko pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Chronicles13:11 Ndipo kudaipira Davide kuti Yehova adachita chipasulo ndi Uza; motero anatcha malowo Pereziuza, mpaka lero lino." 
1Chronicles13:12 Ndipo Davide anaopa Mulungu tsikulo, kuti, Ndidzafika nalo bwanji likasa la Mulungu kwathu?" 
1Chronicles13:13 M'mwemo Davide sanafike nalo likasa kwao kumudzi wa Davide, koma analipambutsira kunyumba ya Obededomu wa ku Giti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ndi likasa la Mulungu linakhala ndi banja la Obededomu m'nyumba mwake miyezi itatu; ndipo Yehova anadalitsa nyumba ya Obededomu, ndi zonse anali nazo." 
1Chronicles14:1 Ndipo Huramu mfumu ya Tiro anatumiza mithenga kwa Davide, ndi mikungudza, ndi amisiri omanga miyala, ndi amatabwa, kuti ammangire nyumba." 
1Chronicles14:2 Ndipo Davide anazindikira kuti Yehova adamkhazikitsa mfumu ya Israele; pakuti ufumu wake unakwezekadi, chifukwa cha anthu ake Israele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Ndipo Davide anatenga akazi ena ku Yerusalemu, nabala Davide ana aamuna ndi aakazi ena." 
1Chronicles14:4 Maina a ana anali nao m'Yerusalemu ndi awa: Samuwa, ndi Sobabu Natani, ndi Solomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 ndi Ibara, ndi Elisuwa, ndi Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 ndi Noga, ndi Nefegi, ndi Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 ndi Elisama, ndi Beeliyada, ndi Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Pamene Afilisti anamva kuti anamdzoza Davide akhale mfumu ya Aisraele onse, Afilisti onse anakwera kufunafuna Davide; ndipo Davide anamva, nawatulukira." 
1Chronicles14:9 Afilisti tsono anafika, nafalikira m'chigwa cha Refaimu." 
1Chronicles14:10 Ndipo Davide anafunsira kwa Mulungu, kuti, Ndikwere kodi kuyambana ndi Afilisti? Mudzawapereka m'dzanja langa kodi? Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Kwera, pakuti ndidzawapereka m'dzanja lako." 
1Chronicles14:11 Atafika tsono ku Baala-Perazimu, Davide anawakantha komweko; nati Davide, Mulungu anapasula adani anga ndi dzanja langa, ngati pokhamulira madzi. Chifukwa chake analitcha dzina la malowo Baala-Perazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ndipo anasiyako milungu yao; nalamula Davide, ndipo anaitentha ndi moto." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ndipo Afilisti anabwerezanso, nafalikira m'chigwamo." 
1Chronicles14:14 Ndipo Davide anafunsiranso kwa Mulungu, nanena Mulungu naye, Usakwera kuwatsata, uwazungulire, nuwadzere pandunji pa mitengo ya mkandankhuku." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ndipo kudzali, pakumva iwe kuwayula kunsonga kwa mitengo ya mkandankhuku, pamenepo utulukire kunkhondo; pakuti Mulungu watulukira pamaso pako kukantha gulu la Afilisti." 
1Chronicles14:16 Nachita Davide monga Yehova adamuuza, nakantha gulu la Afilisti kuyambira ku Gibiyoni kufikira ku Gezere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Ndipo mbiri ya Davide inabuka m'maiko onse, nafikitsira Yehova kuopsa kwake pa amitundu onse." 
1Chronicles15:1 Ndipo Davide anadzimangira nyumba m'mudzi mwake, nakonzeratu malo likasa la Mulungu, naliutsira hema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Pamenepo Davide anati, Sayenera ena kusenza likasa la Mulungu koma Alevi ndiwo; pakuti Yehova anawasankha iwo kusenza likasa la Mulungu, ndi kumtumikira Iye kosatha." 
1Chronicles15:3 Ndipo Davide anasonkhanitsira Aisraele onse ku Yerusalemu, akwere nalo likasa la Yehova kumalo kwake adalikonzera." 
1Chronicles15:4 Ndipo Davide anasonkhanitsa ana a Aroni ndi Alevi; 
1Chronicles15:5 a ana a Kohati, Uriyele mkulu wao, ndi abale ake zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri;" 
1Chronicles15:6 a ana a Merari, Asaya mkulu wao, ndi abale ake mazana awiri mphambu makumi awiri;" 
1Chronicles15:7 a ana a Geresomo, Yowele mkulu wao, ndi abale ake zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu;" 
1Chronicles15:8 a ana a Elizafani, Semaya mkulu wao, ndi abale ake mazana awiri;" 
1Chronicles15:9 a ana a Hebroni, Eliyele mkulu wao, ndi abale ake makumi asanu ndi atatu;" 
1Chronicles15:10 a ana a Uziyele, Aminadabu mkulu wao, ndi abale ake zana limodzi mphambu khumi ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ndipo Davide anaitana Zadoki ndi Abiyatara ansembe, ndi Alevi Uriyele, Asaya, ndi Yowele, Semaya, ndi Eliyele, ndi Aminadabu, nanena nao," 
1Chronicles15:12 Inu ndinu akulu a nyumba za makolo a Alevi, mudzipatule inu ndi abale anu omwe, kuti mukatenge ndi kukwera nalo likasa la Yehova Mulungu wa Israele ku malo ndalikonzera." 
1Chronicles15:13 Pakuti, chifukwa cha kusalinyamula inu poyamba paja, Yehova Mulungu wathu anachita chotipasula, popeza sitinamfunafuna Iye monga mwa chiweruzo." 
1Chronicles15:14 Momwemo ansembe ndi Alevi anadzipatula kuti akwere nalo likasa la Yehova Mulungu wa Israele. 
1Chronicles15:15 Ndipo ana a Alevi anasenza likasa la Mulungu pa mapewa ao, mphiko zili m'mwemo, monga Mose anawauza, monga mwa mau a Yehova." 
1Chronicles15:16 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi mkulu wa Alevi kuti aike abale ao oimbawo ndi zoimbira, zisakasa, ndi azeze, ndi nsanje, azimveketse ndi kukweza mau ao ndi chimwemwe." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ndipo Alevi anaika Hemani mwana wa Yowele, ndi a abale ake Asafu mwana wa Berekiya, ndi a ana a Merari, abale ao, Etani mwana wa Kusaya;" 
1Chronicles15:18 ndi pamodzi nao abale ao a kulongosola kwachiwiri, Zekariya, Beni, ndi Yaaziele, ndi Semiramoti, ndi Yehiyele, ndi Uni, Eliyabu, ndi Benaya, ndi Maaseiya, ndi Matitiya, ndi Elifelehu, ndi Mikineya, ndi Obededomu, ndi Yeiyele, odikirawo." 
1Chronicles15:19 Oimba tsono: Hemani, Asafu, ndi Etani, anaimba ndi nsanje zamkuwa;" 
1Chronicles15:20 ndi Zekariya, ndi Aziyele, ndi Semiramoti, ndi Yehiyele, ndi Uni, ndi Eliyabu, ndi Maaseiya, ndi Benaya, ndi zisakasa kuimbira mwa Alimoti;" 
1Chronicles15:21 ndi Matitiya, ndi Elifelehu, ndi Mikineya, ndi Obededomu, ndi Yeiyele, ndi Azaziya, ndi azeze akuimbira mwa Seminiti, kutsogolera maimbidwe." 
1Chronicles15:22 Ndi Kenaniya mkulu wa Alevi anayang'anira kusenzako; anawalangiza za kusenza, pakuti anali waluso." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ndi Berekiya ndi Elikana anali odikira likasa. 
1Chronicles15:24 Ndi Sebaniya, ndi Yosafati, ndi Netanele, ndi Amasai, ndi Zekariya, ndi Benaya, ndi Eliyezere, ansembe, analiza malipenga ku likasa la Mulungu; ndi Obededomu ndi Yehiya anali odikira a likasa." 
1Chronicles15:25 Momwemo Davide, ndi akuluakulu a Israele, ndi atsogoleri a zikwi, anamuka kukwera nalo likasa la chipangano la Yehova, kuchokera kunyumba ya Obededomu mokondwera." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ndipo popeza Mulungu anathandiza Alevi akusenza likasa la chipangano la Yehova, iwo anapha nsembe ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ndipo Davide anavala malaya abafuta, ndi Alevi onse akunyamula likasa, ndi oimba, ndi Kenaniya woyang'anira kusenzaku, pamodzi ndi oimba; Davide anavalanso efodi wabafuta." 
1Chronicles15:28 Momwemo Aisraele onse anakwera nalo likasa la chipangano la Yehova ndi kufuula, ndi kumveka kwa lipenga, ndi mphalasa, ndi nsanje zomveketsa, ndi zisakasa, ndi azeze." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ndipo polowa likasa la chipangano la Yehova m'mudzi wa Davide, Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Saulo anasuzumira pazenera, nao mfumu Davide alikutumphatumpha ndi kusewera; ndipo anampeputsa mumtima mwake." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ndipo analowa nalo likasa la Mulungu, naliika pakati pa hemalo Davide adaliutsira; ndipo anapereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zoyamika pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ndipo atatha Davide kupereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zoyamika, anadalitsa anthu m'dzina la Yehova." 
1Chronicles16:3 Nagwira aliyense wa Israele, wamwamuna ndi wamkazi, yense mtanda wa mkate, ndi nthuli ya nyama, ndi nchinchi ya mphesa zouma." 
1Chronicles16:4 Ndipo anaika Alevi ena atumikire ku likasa la Yehova, nalalikire, nayamike, nalemekeze Yehova Mulungu wa Israele." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ndiye mkulu wao, ndi otsatana naye Zekariya, Yeiyele, ndi Semiramoti, ndi Yehiyele, ndi Matitiya, ndi Eliyabu, ndi Benaya, ndi Obededomu, ndi Yeiyele, ndi zisakasa ndi azeze; koma Asafu ndi nsanje zomvekatu;" 
1Chronicles16:6 ndi Benaya ndi Yahaziele ansembe ndi malipenga kosalekeza, ku likasa la chipangano la Mulungu." 
1Chronicles16:7 Tsiku limenelo tsono Davide anayamba kuwapatsa nyimbo ya kuyamika nayo Yehova; ochita ndiwo Asafu ndi abale ake. 
1Chronicles16:8 Yamikani Yehova, itanani dzina lake; bukitsani mwa mitundu ya anthu zochita Iye." 
1Chronicles16:9 Muimbireni, muimbireni zomlemekeza; fotokozerani zodabwitsa zake zonse." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mudzitamandire ndi dzina lake lopatulika; mitima yao ya iwo ofuna Yehova ikondwere. 
1Chronicles16:11 Funsirani kwa Yehova ndi mphamvu yake; funani nkhope yake nthawi zonse. 
1Chronicles16:12 Kumbukirani zodabwitsa zake adazichita, zizindikiro zake, ndi maweruzo a pakamwa pake." 
1Chronicles16:13 Inu mbeu ya Israele mtumiki wake, inu ana a Yakobo, osankhika ake." 
1Chronicles16:14 Iye ndiye Yehova Mulungu wathu; maweruzo ake akhala pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
1Chronicles16:15 Kumbukirani chipangano chake kosatha, mauwo anawalamulira mibadwo zikwi;" 
1Chronicles16:16 chipanganocho anapangana ndi Abrahamu, ndi lumbiro lake ndi Isaki;" 
1Chronicles16:17 ndipo anachitsimikizira kwa Yakobo chikhale malemba, chikhale chipangano chosatha kwa Israele;" 
1Chronicles16:18 ndi kunena kuti, Ndidzakupatsa iwe dziko la Kanani, gawo la cholandira chako." 
1Chronicles16:19 Pokhala inu anthu owerengeka, inde anthu pang'ono, ndi alendo m'mwemo;" 
1Chronicles16:20 nayendayenda kuchokera mtundu wina kufikira mtundu wina, kuchokera ufumu wina kufikira anthu ena." 
1Chronicles16:21 Sanalole munthu awasautse; ndipo anadzudzula mafumu chifukwa cha iwowa; 
1Chronicles16:22 ndi kuti, Musamakhudza odzozedwa anga, musamachitira choipa aneneri anga." 
1Chronicles16:23 Muimbireni Yehova, inu dziko lonse lapansi, lalikirani chipulumutso chake tsiku ndi tsiku." 
1Chronicles16:24 Fotokozerani ulemerero wake mwa amitundu, zodabwitsa zake mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
1Chronicles16:25 Pakuti Yehova ali wamkulu, nayenera kulemekezedwa kwakukulu; ayenera amuope koposa milungu yonse." 
1Chronicles16:26 Pakuti milungu ya mitundu ya anthu ndiyo mafano; koma Yehova analenga zakumwamba. 
1Chronicles16:27 Pamaso pake pali ulemu ndi ukulu, m'malo mwake muli mphamvu ndi chimwemwe." 
1Chronicles16:28 Mchitireni Yehova, inu mafuko a mitundu ya anthu, mchitireni Yehova ulemerero ndi mphamvu." 
1Chronicles16:29 Mchitireni Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lake; bwerani nacho chopereka, ndipo fikani pamaso pake; lambirani Yehova m'chiyero chokometsetsa." 
1Chronicles16:30 Njenjemerani pamaso pake, inu dziko lonse lapansi, dziko lokhalamo anthu lomwe lakhazikika, kuti silingagwedezeke." 
1Chronicles16:31 Kukondwerere kumwamba, ndi dziko lapansi lisekerere; anene mwa amitundu, Yehova achita ufumu." 
1Chronicles16:32 Nyanja ikukume m'kudzala kwake, munda ukondwerere, ndi zonse zili m'mwemo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Pamenepo mitengo yonse ya kunkhalango idzafuula mokondwera pamaso pa Yehova; pakuti akudza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi. 
1Chronicles16:34 Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
1Chronicles16:35 Nimunene, Tipulumutseni, Mulungu wa chipulumutso chathu; mutisokolotse ndi kutilanditsa kwa amitundu, kuti tiyamike dzina lanu loyera, ndi kudzitamandira nacho chilemekezo chanu." 
1Chronicles16:36 Alemekezedwe Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, kuyambira kosayamba kufikira kosatha. Ndipo anthu onse anati, Amen! Nalemekeza Yehova." 
1Chronicles16:37 Ndipo anasiyako ku likasa la chipangano la Yehova Asafu ndi abale ake, atumikire kulikasa kosalekeza, monga umo mudzafunika tsiku ndi tsiku;" 
1Chronicles16:38 ndi Obededomu, ndi abale ake makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu asanu ndi atatu; ndi Obededomu mwana wa Yedutuni ndi Hosa akhale odikira;" 
1Chronicles16:39 ndi Zadoki wansembe, ndi abale ake ansembe, ku Kachisi wa Yehova, pa msanje unali ku Gibiyoni;" 
1Chronicles16:40 kupereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova pa guwa la nsembe zopsereza, kosalekeza, m'mawa ndi madzulo, monga mwa zonse zilembedwa m'chilamulo cha Yehova adachilamulira Israele;" 
1Chronicles16:41 ndi pamodzi nao Hemani, ndi Yedutuni, ndi osankhika otsalawo, otchulidwa maina, kuyamika Yehova; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha;" 
1Chronicles16:42 ndi pamodzi nao Hemani, ndi Yedutuni, ndi malipenga ndi nsanje za iwo akumveketsadi, ndi zoimbira nyimbo za Mulungu; ndi ana a Yedutuni anakhala kuchipata." 
1Chronicles16:43 Ndipo anachoka anthu onse, yense kunyumba yake, nabwera Davide kudalitsa nyumba yake." 
1Chronicles17:1 Ndipo pokhala Davide m'nyumba mwake, Davideyo anati kwa Natani mneneri, Taona, ndikhala ine m'nyumba yamikungudza, koma likasa la chipangano la Yehova likhala m'nsalu zotchinga." 
1Chronicles17:2 Ndipo Natani anati kwa Davide, Muchite zonse zili m'mtima mwanu; pakuti Mulungu ali nanu." 
1Chronicles17:3 Ndipo usiku womwewo mau a Mulungu anadzera Natani, ndi kuti," 
1Chronicles17:4 Kauze Davide mtumiki wanga, Atero Yehova, Usandimangire nyumba yokhalamo;" 
1Chronicles17:5 pakuti sindinakhala m'nyumba kuyambira tsiku lija ndinakwera naye Israele, kufikira lero lino; koma ndakhala ndikuyenda m'mahema uku ndi uku." 
1Chronicles17:6 Pali ponse ndinayenda nao Aisraele onse ndinanena kodi mau ndi woweruza aliyense wa Israele, amene ndinamuuza adyetse anthu anga, ndi kuti, Mwalekeranji kundimangira nyumba yamikungudza?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Chifukwa chake tsono, uzitero naye mtumiki wanga Davide, Atero Ambuye wa makamu, Ndinakutenga kubusa potsata iwe nkhosa, kuti ukhale mtsogoleri wa anthu anga Israele;" 
1Chronicles17:8 ndipo ndakhala ndi iwe kulikonse unamukako, ndi kuononga adani ako onse pamaso pako; ndipo ndakubukitsira dzina lakunga dzina la akulu okhala padziko." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ndipo ndaikira anthu anga Israele malo, ndi kuwaoka, kuti akhale m'malo mwao osasunthikanso; ndi ana osalungama sadzawapululanso monga poyamba paja;" 
1Chronicles17:10 ndi kuyambira kuja ndinaika oweruza ayang'anire anthu anga Israele; ndipo ndagonjetsa adani ako onse. Ndikuuzanso kuti Yehova adzakumangira banja. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ndipo kudzachitika, atakwanira masiku ako kuti uzipita kukhala ndi makolo ako, ndidzaukitsa mbeu yako pambuyo pako, ndiye wa ana ako; ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa ufumu wake." 
1Chronicles17:12 Iye adzandimangira nyumba; ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa mpando wachifumu wake kosatha. 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndidzakhala atate wake, ndi iye adzakhala mwana wanga; ndipo sindidzamchotsera chifundo changa monga muja ndinachotsera iye amene anakhala usanakhale iwe;" 
1Chronicles17:14 koma ndidzamkhazikitsa m'nyumba mwanga, ndi m'ufumu wanga kosatha; ndi mpando wa chifumu wake udzakhazikika kosatha." 
1Chronicles17:15 Monga mwa mau awa onse, ndi monga mwa masomphenya awa onse, momwemo Natani analankhula ndi Davide." 
1Chronicles17:16 Pamenepo mfumu Davide analowa nakhala pamaso pa Yehova, nati, Ndine yani, Yehova Mulungu, ndi nyumba yanga njotani kuti mwandifikitsa mpaka pano?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ndipo ichi nchaching'ono pamaso panu, Mulungu, koma mwanena za nyumba ya mtumiki wanu nthawi yam'tsogolo ndithu, ndipo mwandiyesera ngati munthu womveka, Yehova Mulungu." 
1Chronicles17:18 Anenenjinso Davide kwa inu za ulemu wochitikira mtumiki wanu? Pakuti mudziwa mtumiki wanu. 
1Chronicles17:19 Yehova, chifukwa cha mtumiki wanu, ndi monga mwa mtima wanu, mwachita ukulu uwu wonse, kundidziwitsa zazikulu izi zonse." 
1Chronicles17:20 Yehova, palibe wina wonga inu, palibenso Mulungu wina koma Inu; monga mwa zonse tazimva m'makutu mwathu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ndiwo ayani akunga anthu anu Israele, mtundu wa pa wokha wa pa dziko lapansi, amene Mulungu anakadziombolera mtundu wa anthu, kudzibukitsira dzina, mwa zazikulu ndi zoopsa, pakupirikitsa amitundu pamaso pa anthu anu amene munawaombola m'Ejipito?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Pakuti anthu anu Israele mudawayesa anthu anuanu kosatha; ndipo Inu, Yehova, munayamba kukhala Mulungu wao." 
1Chronicles17:23 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova, akhazikike kosalekeza mau mudanenawa za mtumiki wanu, ndi za nyumba yake, nimuchite monga mwanena." 
1Chronicles17:24 Inde likhazikike dzina lanu, likulitsidwe kosalekeza, ndi kuti, Yehova wa makamu ndiye Mulungu wa Israele; akhalira Israele Mulungu; ndi nyumba ya Davide mtumiki wanu ikhazikika pamaso panu." 
1Chronicles17:25 Pakuti Inu, Mulungu wanga, mwaululira mtumiki wanu kuti mudzammangira banja; momwemo mtumiki wanu waona mtima wakupemphera pamaso panu." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova, Inu ndinu Mulungu, ndipo mwanenera mtumiki wanu chokoma ichi;" 
1Chronicles17:27 chakukomerani kudalitsa nyumba ya mtumiki wanu, kuti ikhalebe kosatha pamaso panu; pakuti Inu Yehova mwadalitsa, ndipo idzadalitsika kosatha." 
1Chronicles18:1 Ndipo zitatha izi, Davide anakantha Afilisti, nawagonjetsa, nalanda Gati ndi midzi yake m'manja a Afilisti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Anakanthanso Mowabu; ndi Amowabu anakhala anthu a Davide, nabwera nazo mphatso." 
1Chronicles18:3 Ndipo Davide anakantha Hadadezere mfumu ya Zoba ku Hamati, pomuka iye kukhazikitsa ulamuliro wake ku mtsinje wa Yufurate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Ndipo Davide analanda magaleta ake chikwi chimodzi, ndi apakavalo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi oyenda pansi zikwi makumi awiri; Davide anadula mitsita akavalo onse okoka magaleta, koma anasungako ofikira magaleta zana limodzi." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ndipo Aaramu a ku Damasiko anadza kudzathandiza Hadadezere mfumu ya Zoba; koma Davide anakantha Aaramu amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri. 
1Chronicles18:6 Ndipo Davide anaika asilikali a boma m'Aramu wa Damasiko; ndi Aaramu anasanduka anthu a Davide, nabwera nazo mphatso. Ndipo Yehova anasunga Davide kulikonse anamukako." 
1Chronicles18:7 Natenga Davide zikopa zagolide zinali pa anyamata a Hadadezere, nabwera nazo ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Ndi ku Tibati, ndi ku Kuni, midzi ya Hadadezere, Davide anatenga mkuwa wambiri, ndiwo umene Solomoni anayenga nao thawale lamkuwa, ndi nsanamira, ndi zipangizo zamkuwa." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ndipo pakumva Tou, mfumu ya ku Hamati, kuti Davide adakantha khamu lonse la Hadadezere mfumu ya ku Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 anatumiza Hadoramu mwana wake kwa mfumu Davide, kumlonjera ndi kumdalitsa, popeza adayambana ndi Hadadezere, namkantha; pakuti Hadadezere adachita nkhondo ndi Tou; ndipo anali nazo zipangizo za mitundumitundu za golide ndi siliva ndi mkuwa." 
1Chronicles18:11 Izi zomwe mfumu Davide anazipatulira Yehova, pamodzi ndi siliva ndi golide adazitenga kwa amitundu onse, kwa Edomu, ndi kwa Mowabu, ndi kwa ana a Amoni, ndi kwa Afilisti, ndi kwa Amaleke." 
1Chronicles18:12 Ndipo Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anakantha Aedomu m'Chigwa cha Mchere zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu. 
1Chronicles18:13 Ndipo anaika asilikali a boma m'Edomu; ndi Aedomu onse anasanduka anthu a Davide. Ndipo Yehova anasunga Davide kulikonse anamukako. 
1Chronicles18:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala mfumu ya Aisraele onse, naweruza anthu ake onse, nawachitira chilungamo." 
1Chronicles18:15 Ndipo Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya anayang'anira khamu la nkhondo, ndi Yehosafati mwana wa Ahiludi anali wolemba mbiri." 
1Chronicles18:16 Ndi Zadoki mwana wa Ahitubi, ndi Ahimeleki mwana wa Abiyatara, anali ansembe, ndi Savisa anali mlembi," 
1Chronicles18:17 ndi Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anayang'anira Akereti ndi Apeleti; koma ana a Davide ndiwo oyamba ku dzanja la mfumu. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ndipo zitatha izi, Nahasi mfumu ya ana a Amoni anamwalira, ndi mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
1Chronicles19:2 Ndipo Davide anati, Ndidzamchitira zokoma mtima Hanuni mwana wa Nahasi, popeza atate wake anandichitira ine zokoma mtima. Momwemo Davide anatuma mithenga imtonthoze mtima pa atate wake. Pofika anyamata ake a Davide ku dziko la ana a Amoni kwa Hanuni kumtonthoza mtima," 
1Chronicles19:3 akalonga a ana a Amoni anati kwa Hanuni, Davide ali kuchitira atate wanu ulemu kodi, popeza anakutumizirani otonthoza? Sakudzerani kodi anyamata ake kufunafuna, ndi kugubuduza, ndi kuzonda dziko?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ndipo Hanuni anatenga anyamata a Davide, nawameta, nadula malaya ao pakati kufikira m'matako, nawaleka achoke." 
1Chronicles19:5 Pamenepo anamuka ena namuuza Davide za amunawa. Natumiza iye kukomana nao, pakuti amunawa anachita manyazi kwambiri. Ndipo mfumu inati, Balindani ku Yeriko mpaka zamera ndevu zanu; zitamera mubwere." 
1Chronicles19:6 Ndipo pamene ana a Amoni anaona kuti anadzinunkhitsa kwa Davide, Hanuni ndi ana a Amoni anatumiza matalente chikwi chimodzi a siliva, kudzilembera magaleta ndi apakavalo ku Mesopotamiya, ndi ku Aramu-Maaka, ndi ku Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Momwemo anadzilembera magaleta zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri, ndi mfumu ya Maaka ndi anthu ake; nadza iwo, namanga misasa chakuno cha Medeba. Ana a Amoni omwe anasonkhana m'midzi mwao, nadza kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles19:8 Pamene Davide anamva ichi anatuma Yowabu ndi gulu lonse la anthu amphamvu. 
1Chronicles19:9 Ndipo ana a Amoni anatuluka, nandandalitsa nkhondo ku chipata cha mudzi, ndi mafumu adadzawo anali pa okha kuthengo." 
1Chronicles19:10 Pakuona Yowabu tsono kuti nkhondo inamdzera kumaso ndi kumbuyo, anasankha amuna osankhika onse a Israele, nawanika ayambane ndi Aaramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Ndipo anthu otsala anawapereka m'dzanja la Abisai mbale wake; ndipo anadzinika ayambane ndi ana a Amoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 Ndipo anati, Akandiposa mphamvu Aaramu, udzandilanditsa ndiwe; koma akakuposa mphamvu ana a Amoni, ndidzakulanditsa ndine." 
1Chronicles19:13 Limbika mtima, tilimbikire anthu athu, ndi midzi ya Mulungu wathu; ndipo Yehova achite chomkomera." 
1Chronicles19:14 Pamenepo Yowabu ndi anthu anali naye anayandikira pamaso pa Aaramu kulimbana nao, ndipo anawathawa." 
1Chronicles19:15 Ndipo pakuona ana a Amoni kuti adathawa Aaramu, iwo omwe anathawa pamaso pa Abisai mbale wake, nalowa m'mudzi. Pamenepo Yowabu anadza ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ndipo pakuona Aaramu kuti Israele anawakantha, anatumiza mithenga, natuluka nao Aaramu akukhala tsidya lija la mtsinjewo; ndi Sofaki kazembe wa khamu la Hadadezere anawatsogolera." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ndipo anamuuza Davide; namemeza iye Aisraele onse, naoloka Yordani, nawadzera, nanika nkhondo ayambane nao. Atandandalitsa nkhondo Davide kuyambana ndi Aaramu, anaponyana naye." 
1Chronicles19:18 Ndipo Aaramu anathawa pamaso pa Israele; ndipo Davide anapha Aaramu apamagaleta zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi oyenda pansi zikwi makumi anai; napha Sofaki kazembe wa khamulo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ndipo pakuona anyamata a Hadadezere kuti Israele anawakantha, anapangana mtendere ndi Davide, namtumikira; ndi Aaramu anakana kuthandizanso ana a Amoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ndipo kunali, pofikanso chaka, nyengo yakutuluka mafumu, Yowabu anatsogolera khamu lamphamvu, napasula dziko la ana a Amoni, nadza, naumangira misasa Raba. Koma Davide anakhala ku Yerusalemu. Ndipo Yowabu anakantha Raba, naupasula." 
1Chronicles20:2 Ndipo Davide anatenga korona wa mfumu yao kumchotsa pamutu pake, napeza kulemera kwake talente wa golide; panalinso miyala ya mtengo wake pamenepo; ndipo anamuika pamutu pa Davide, natulutsa zankhondo za m'mudzimo zambiri ndithu." 
1Chronicles20:3 Natulutsanso anthu anali m'mwemo, nawacheka ndi mipeni ya manomano, ndi zipangizo zochekera zachitsulo, ndi nkhwangwa. Anatero Davide ndi midzi yonse ya ana a Amoni. Ndipo Davide ndi anthu onse anabwera ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ndipo zitatha izi, inauka nkhondo ku Gezere ndi Afilisti; pamenepo Sibekai Muhusa anapha Sipai wa ana a chimphona; ndipo anawagonjetsa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ndi Afilisti; ndi Elihanani mwana wa Yairi anapha Lami mbale wa Goliyati Mgiti, amene luti la mkondo wake linanga mtanda woombera nsalu." 
1Chronicles20:6 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ku Gati; kumeneko kunali munthu wa msinkhu waukulu, amene zala zake za kumanja ndi kumapazi ndizo makumi awiri mphambu zinai; zisanu ndi chimodzi ku dzanja lililonse, ndi zisanu ndi chimodzi ku phazi lililonse; nayenso anabadwa mwa chimphonacho." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ndipo potonza Israele iyeyu Yonatani mwana wa Simea mbale wake wa Davide anamkantha. 
1Chronicles20:8 Awa anabadwa mwa chimphonacho ku Gati, koma anagwa ndi dzanja la Davide ndi la anyamata ake." 
1Chronicles21:1 Pamenepo Satana anaukira Israele, nasonkhezera Davide awerenge Israele." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Yowabu ndi kwa akulu a anthu, Kawerengeni Israele kuyambira ku Beereseba kufikira ku Dani; nimundibwezere mau, kuti ndidziwe chiwerengo chao." 
1Chronicles21:3 Nati Yowabu, Yehova aonjezere pa anthu ake monga ali kazana; koma, mbuyanga mfumu, sali onse anyamata akapolo a mbuyanga? Nanga afuniranji chinthuchi mbuyanga, adzapalamulitsa Israele bwanji?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Koma mau a mfumu anamlaka Yowabu. Natuluka Yowabu, nakayendayenda mwa Aisraele onse, nadza ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ndipo Yowabu anapereka kwa Davide chiwerengo cha anthu owerengedwa. Ndipo Aisraele onse anali zikwi mazana khumi ndi limodzi osolola lupanga, ndi Yuda anali zikwi mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri akusolola lupanga." 
1Chronicles21:6 Koma sanawerenge Alevi ndi Abenjamini pakati pao; pakuti mau a mfumu anamnyansira Yowabu. 
1Chronicles21:7 Ndipo Mulungu anaipidwa nacho chinthuchi, chifukwa chake Iye anakantha Israele." 
1Chronicles21:8 Pamenepo Davide anati kwa Mulungu, Ndachimwa kwakukulu ndi kuchita chinthu ichi; koma tsopano, muchotse mphulupulu ya kapolo wanu, pakuti ndachita kopusa ndithu." 
1Chronicles21:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Gadi mlauli wa Davide, ndi kuti," 
1Chronicles21:10 Kanene kwa Davide kuti, Atero Yehova, Ndikuikira zitatu; dzisankhireko chimodzi ndikuchitire ichi." 
1Chronicles21:11 Nadza Gadi kwa Davide, nanena naye, Atero Yehova, Dzitengereko;" 
1Chronicles21:12 kapena zaka zitatu za njala; kapena miyezi itatu ya kuthedwa pamaso pa adani ako, ndi kuti lupanga la adani ako likupeze; kapena masiku atatu lupanga la Yehova, ndilo mliri m'dzikomo, ndi mthenga wakuononga wa Yehova mwa malire onse a Israele. Ulingirire tsono, ndimbwezere mau anji Iye amene anandituma ine?" 
1Chronicles21:13 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Gadi, Ndipsinjika kwambiri; ndigwere m'dzanja la Yehova, pakuti zifundo zake zichulukadi; koma ndisagwere m'dzanja la munthu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Momwemo Yehova anatumiza mliri pa Israele; ndipo adagwapo amuna zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri a Israele. 
1Chronicles21:15 Ndipo Mulungu anatuma mthenga ku Yerusalemu kuuononga; ndipo poti auononge, Yehova anapenya, naleka choipachi; nati kwa mthenga wakuononga, Chakwanira, bweza dzanja lako tsopano. Ndi mthenga wa Yehova anaima pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Ndipo Davide anakweza maso ake, naona mthenga wa Yehova alikuima pakati pa dziko ndi thambo, ali nalo lupanga losolola m'dzanja lake, lotambasukira pa Yerusalemu. Pamenepo Davide ndi akulu ovala ziguduli anagwa nkhope zao pansi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Mulungu, Si ndine nanga ndalamulira kuti awerenge anthu? Inde, ndine amene ndachimwa ndi kuchita choipa ndithu; koma nkhosa izi zinachitanji? Dzanja lanu, Yehova Mulungu wanga, linditsutse ine ndi nyumba ya atate wanga, koma lisatsutse anthu anu ndi kuwachitira mliri." 
1Chronicles21:18 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anauza Gadi kuti anene ndi Davide, akwere Davideyo kuutsira Yehova guwa la nsembe pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Ndipo Davide anakwera monga mwa mau a Gadi adawanena m'dzina la Yehova. 
1Chronicles21:20 Pocheuka Orinani anaona wamthengayo; ndi ana ake amuna anai anali naye anabisala. Koma Orinani analikupuntha tirigu. 
1Chronicles21:21 Ndipo pofika Davide kwa Orinani, Orinaniyo anapenyetsa, naona Davide, natuluka kudwale, nawerama kwa Davide, nkhope yake pansi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Davide tsono anati kwa Orinani, Ndipatse padwale pano kuti ndimangepo guwa la nsembe la Yehova; undipatse ili pa mtengo wake wonse, kuti mliri ulekeke pa anthu." 
1Chronicles21:23 Ndipo Orinani anati kwa Davide, Mulitenge, ndi mbuye wanga mfumu ichite chomkomera m'maso mwake; taonani, ndikupatsani ng'ombe za nsembe zopsereza; ndi zipangizo zopunthira zikhale nkhuni, ndi tirigu wa nsembe yaufa; ndizipereka zonse." 
1Chronicles21:24 Koma mfumu Davide anati kwa Orinani, Iai, koma ndidzaligula pa mtengo wake wonse; pakuti sindidzatengera Yehova chili chako, kapena kupereka nsembe yopsereza yopanda mtengo wake." 
1Chronicles21:25 Momwemo Davide anapatsa Orinani chogulira malowa golide wa masekeli mazana asanu ndi limodzi kulemera kwake. 
1Chronicles21:26 Ndipo Davide anamangira Yehova guwa la nsembe komweko; napereka nsembe zopsereza, ndi nsembe zoyamika, naitana kwa Yehova; ndipo anamyankha ali m'Mwamba ndi moto pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ndipo Yehova anauza wamthenga kuti abweze lupanga lake m'chimake. 
1Chronicles21:28 Nthawi yomweyi, pakuona Davide kuti Yehova anamvomereza pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi, anaphera nsembe pomwepo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Pakuti Kachisi wa Yehova amene Mose anapanga m'chipululu, ndi guwa la nsembe yopsereza, zinali pa msanje wa ku Gibiyoni nthawi yomweyi." 
1Chronicles21:30 Koma Davide sanathe kumuka kukhomo kwake kufunsira kwa Mulungu, pakuti anaopa lupanga la mthenga wa Yehova." 
1Chronicles22:1 Ndipo Davide anati, Pano padzakhala nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu, ndi pano padzakhala guwa la nsembe yopsereza la Israele." 
1Chronicles22:2 Ndipo Davide anati asonkhanitse alendo okhala m'dziko la Israele; iye naika osema miyala afukule miyala, aiseme kuti amange nayo nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles22:3 Nakonzeratu Davide chitsulo chochuluka cha misomali ya ku zitseko za zipata, ndi ya kuphatikizitsa; ndi mkuwa wochuluka wosauyesa kulemera kwake;" 
1Chronicles22:4 ndi mitengo yamikungudza yosaiwerenga; pakuti Asidoni ndi Atiro anabwera nayo kwa Davide mitengo yamikungudza yochuluka. 
1Chronicles22:5 Ndipo Davide anati, Solomoni mwana wanga ndiye mnyamata ndi wosakwima, ndi nyumba imene adzaimangira Yehova ikhale yaikulu yopambana, yomveka ndi ya ulemerero mwa maiko onse; ndiikonzeretu mirimo. Momwemo Davide anakonzeratu mochuluka asanamwalire." 
1Chronicles22:6 Pamenepo iye anaitana Solomoni mwana wake, namlangiza ammangire Yehova Mulungu wa Israele nyumba." 
1Chronicles22:7 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Solomoni mwana wake, Kunena za ine, kumtima kwanga kudati, ndilimangire dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanga nyumba." 
1Chronicles22:8 Koma mau a Yehova anandidzera, kuti, Wakhetsa mwazi wochuluka, popeza wachita nkhondo zazikulu; sudzamangira dzina langa nyumba, popeza wakhetsa pansi mwazi wambiri pamaso panga;" 
1Chronicles22:9 taona, udzabala mwana, ndiye adzakhala munthu wa phee; ndipo ndidzampumulitsira adani ake onse pozungulirapo, pakuti dzina lake lidzakhala Solomoni; ndipo ndidzapatsa Israele mtendere ndi bata masiku ake;" 
1Chronicles22:10 iyeyu adzamangira dzina langa nyumba; iye adzakhala mwana wanga, ndi Ine ndidzakhala Atate wake; ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa mpando wachifumu wa ufumu wake pa Israele, kosalekeza." 
1Chronicles22:11 Tsono, mwana wanga, Yehova akhale nawe; nulemerere, numange nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wako monga ananena za iwe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Chokhachi, Yehova akupatse nzeru ndi luntha, nakulangize za Israele, kuti usunge chilamulo cha Yehova Mulungu wako." 
1Chronicles22:13 Momwemo udzalemerera, ukasamalira kuchita malemba ndi maweruzo amene Yehova analangiza Mose za Israele; limbikatu, nulimbike mtima, usaope, usade mtima." 
1Chronicles22:14 Taona tsono, m'kuzunzika kwanga ndinakonzeratu nyumba ya Yehova matalente zikwi zana limodzi a golide, ndi matalente zikwizikwi a siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi chitsulo, osayesa kulemera kwake, pakuti zidachulukadi; mitengo yomwe ndi miyala ndakonzeratu; nuonjezereko." 
1Chronicles22:15 Uli naonso antchito ochuluka ofukula miyala, ndi amisiri a miyala ndi a mitengo, ndi amuna onse aluso akuchita ntchito zilizonse;" 
1Chronicles22:16 golide, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi chitsulo, nzosawerengeka; nyamuka, nuchite, Yehova akhale nawe." 
1Chronicles22:17 Davide analangizanso akalonga a Israele athandize Solomoni mwana wake, ndi kuti," 
1Chronicles22:18 Kodi Yehova Mulungu wanu sali nanu? Sanakupumulitseni pambali ponse? Pakuti anapereka nzika za m'dziko m'dzanja mwanga, ndi dziko lagonjetsedwa pamaso pa Yehova, ndi pamaso pa anthu ake." 
1Chronicles22:19 Perekani tsono mtima ndi moyo wanu kufunafuna Yehova Mulungu wanu; ndipo nyamukani ndi kumanga malo opatulika a Yehova Mulungu, kuti abwere nalo likasa la chipangano la Yehova, ndi zipangizo zopatulika za Mulungu, kunyumba imene idzamangidwira dzina la Yehova." 
1Chronicles23:1 Atakalamba tsono Davide ndi kuchuluka masiku, iye analonga mwana wake Solomoni akhale mfumu ya Israele." 
1Chronicles23:2 Ndipo anasonkhanitsa akulu onse a Israele, ndi ansembe ndi Alevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ndipo anawerengedwa Alevi oyambira zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu, ndipo chiwerengo chao kuwawerenga mmodzimmodzi ndicho amuna zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu." 
1Chronicles23:4 A iwowa zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai anayang'anira ntchito ya nyumba ya Yehova, ndi zikwi zisanu ndi chimodzi ndiwo akapitao ndi oweruza," 
1Chronicles23:5 ndi zikwi zinai odikira; ndi zikwi zinai analemekeza Yehova ndi zoimbira zimene ndinazipanga, anati Davide, kuti alemekeze nazo." 
1Chronicles23:6 Ndipo Davide anawagawa magawo monga mwa ana a Levi: Geresoni, Kohati, ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 A Ageresoni: Ladani ndi Simei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ana a Ladani: wamkulu ndi Yehiyele, ndi Zetamu, ndi Yowele; atatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Ana a Simei: Selomoti, ndi Haziyele, ndi Harani; atatu. Ndiwo akulu a nyumba za makolo a Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Ndi ana a Simei: Yahati, Zina, ndi Yeusi, ndi Beriya. Awa anai ndiwo ana a Simei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Wamkulu wa iwo ndi Yahati, mnzake ndi Ziza; koma Yeusi ndi Beriya analibe ana ambiri, potero anakhala nyumba ya kholo yowerengedwa pamodzi." 
1Chronicles23:12 Ana a Kohati: Amuramu, Izihara, Hebroni, ndi Uziyele; anai." 
1Chronicles23:13 Ana a Amuramu: Aroni, ndi Mose; ndipo Aroni anasankhidwa kuti apatule zopatulika kwambiri, iye ndi ana ake, kosalekeza, kufukiza pamaso pa Yehova, kumtumikira, ndi kudalitsa m'dzina lake kosatha." 
1Chronicles23:14 Kunena za Mose munthu wa Mulunguyo, ana ake anatchulidwa mwa fuko la Levi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Ana a Mose: Geresomo, ndi Eliyezere." 
1Chronicles23:16 Ana a Geresomo: wamkulu ndi Sebuele. 
1Chronicles23:17 Ndi ana a Eliyezere: wamkulu ndi Rehabiya. Ndipo Eliyezere analibe ana ena, koma ana a Rehabiya anachuluka kwambiri." 
1Chronicles23:18 Ana a Izihara: wamkulu ndiye Selomiti. 
1Chronicles23:19 Ana a Hebroni: wamkulu ndi Yeriya, wachiwiri ndi Amariya, wachitatu ndi Yahaziele, wachinai ndi Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Ana a Uziyele: wamkulu ndi Mika, wachiwiri ndi Isiya." 
1Chronicles23:21 Ana a Merari: Mali ndi Musi. Ndi ana a Mali: Eleazara ndi Kisi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Nafa Eleazara wopanda ana amuna, koma ana akazi ndiwo; ndi asuweni ao ana a Kisi anawatenga akhale akazi ai." 
1Chronicles23:23 Ana a Musi: Mali, ndi Edere, ndi Yeremoti; atatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Awa ndi ana a Levi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, ndiwo akulu a nyumba za makolo a iwo owerengedwa mwa chiwerengero cha maina mmodzimmodzi, akugwira ntchito ya utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu." 
1Chronicles23:25 Pakuti Davide anati, Yehova Mulungu wa Israele wapumulitsa anthu ake; ndipo akhala m'Yerusalemu kosatha;" 
1Chronicles23:26 ndiponso Alevi asasenzenso Kachisi ndi zipangizo zake zonse za utumiki wake. 
1Chronicles23:27 Pakuti monga mwa mau ake otsiriza a Davide, ana a Levi anawerengedwa kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu." 
1Chronicles23:28 Pakuti ntchito yao ndiyo kuimirira ana a Aroni, atumikire m'nyumba ya Yehova, m'mabwalo, ndi kuzipinda, ndi kuyeretsa zopatulika zonse; inde ntchito za utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
1Chronicles23:29 ya mkate woonekera womwe, ndi ya ufa wosalala wa nsembe yaufa, ndi ya timitanda taphanthiphanthi topanda chotupitsa, ndi ya chiwaya, ndi yakukazinga, ndi ya miyeso iliyonse;" 
1Chronicles23:30 ndi kuimirira m'mawa ndi m'mawa kuyamika ndi kulemekeza Yehova, momwemonso madzulo;" 
1Chronicles23:31 ndi kupereka nsembe zopsereza zonse kwa Yehova, za masabata, za pokhala mwezi, za nyengo zoikika, kuwerenga kwake monga mwa lemba lake, kosalekeza pamaso pa Yehova;" 
1Chronicles23:32 ndi kuti asunge udikiro wa chihema chokomanako, ndi udikiro wa malo opatulika ndi udikiro wa ana a Aroni abale ao, potumikira nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ndipo magawidwe a ana a Aroni ndi awa. Ana a Aroni: Nadabu, ndi Abihu, Eleazara, ndi Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:2 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu anafa, atate wao akali ndi moyo, opanda ana; momwemo Eleazara ndi Itamara anachita ntchito ya nsembe." 
1Chronicles24:3 Ndipo Davide pamodzi ndi Zadoki wa ana a Eleazara, ndi Ahimeleki wa ana a Itamara, anawagawa, monga mwa malongosoledwe ao m'utumiki wao." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ndipo anapeza kuti amuna akulu a ana a Eleazara anachuluka, a ana a Itamara anachepa; nawagawa motero: pa ana a Eleazara panali khumi mphambu asanu ndi mmodzi, akulu a nyumba za makolo; ndi pa ana a Itamara, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, panali asanu ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ndipo anawagawa ndi maere, awa ndi aja; pakuti panali akalonga a malo opatulika, ndi akalonga a kwa Mulungu, a ana a Eleazara ndi a ana a Itamara omwe." 
1Chronicles24:6 Ndi Semaya mwana wa Netanele mlembi, ndiye wa Alevi, anawalembera pamaso pa mfumu; ndi akalonga, ndi Zadoki wansembe, ndi Ahimeleki mwana wa Abiyatara, a akulu a nyumba za makolo a ansembe ndi Alevi, anatenga nyumba imodzi ya kholo lake ya Eleazara, ndi imodzi ya Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ndipo maere oyamba anamgwera Yehoyaribu, wachiwiri Yedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 wachitatu Harimu, wachinai Seorimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 wachisanu Malikiya, wachisanu ndi chimodzi Miyamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 wachisanu ndi chiwiri Hakozi, wachisanu ndi chitatu Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 wachisanu ndi chinai Yesuwa, wakhumi Sekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 wakhumi ndi chimodzi Eliyasibu, wakhumi ndi chiwiri Yakimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 wakhumi ndi chitatu Hupa, wakhumi ndi chinai Yesebeabu," 
1Chronicles24:14 wakhumi ndi chisanu Biliga, wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chimodzi Imeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chiwiri Heziri, wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chitatu Hapizeze," 
1Chronicles24:16 wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chinai Petahiya, wa makumi awiri Yehezikele," 
1Chronicles24:17 wa makumi awiri ndi chimodzi Yakini, wa makumi awiri ndi chiwiri Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 wa makumi awiri ndi chitatu Delaya, wa makumi awiri ndi chinai Maaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Awa ndi malongosoledwe ao m'utumiki wao kulowa m'nyumba ya Yehova, monga mwa chiweruzo adawapatsa Aroni atate wao, monga Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anamlamulira." 
1Chronicles24:20 Ndipo wa ana otsala a Levi: wa ana a Amuramu, Subaele; wa ana a Subaele, Yedeiya." 
1Chronicles24:21 Wa Rehabiya: wa ana a Rehabiya, mkulu ndi Isiya." 
1Chronicles24:22 Wa Aizihara: Selomoti; wa ana a Selomoti, Yahati." 
1Chronicles24:23 Ndi wa ana a Hebroni: mkulu ndi Yeriya, wachiwiri Amariya, wachitatu Yahaziele, wachinai Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles24:24 Wa ana a Uziyele, Mika; wa ana a Mika, Samiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 Mbale wa Mika, Isiya; a ana a Isiya, Zekariya." 
1Chronicles24:26 Ana a Merari: Mali ndi Musi; mwana wa Yaziya, Beno." 
1Chronicles24:27 Ana a Merari: wa Yaziya, Beno, ndi Sohamu, ndi Zakuri, ndi Ibiri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Wa Mali: Eleazara, ndiye wopanda ana." 
1Chronicles24:29 Wa Kisi: mwana wa Kisi, Yerameele." 
1Chronicles24:30 Ndi ana a Musi: Mali, ndi Edere, ndi Yerimoti. Awa ndi ana a Alevi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles24:31 Awanso anachita maere monga abale ao ana a Aroni, pamaso pa Davide mfumu, ndi Zadoki, ndi Ahimeleki, ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo za ansembe ndi Alevi; mkulu wa nyumba za makolo monga mng'ono wake." 
1Chronicles25:1 Ndipo Davide ndi akazembe a gulu la nkhondo anapatulira utumikiwo ena a ana a Asafu, ndi a Hemani, ndi a Yedutuni, anenere ndi azeze, ndi zisakasa, ndi nsanje; ndi chiwerengo cha antchito monga mwa kutumikira kwao ndicho:" 
1Chronicles25:2 a ana a Asafu: Zakuri, ndi Yosefe, ndi Netaniya, ndi Asarela, ana a Asafu; mwa chilangizo cha Asafu, wakunenera mwa chilangizo cha mfumu." 
1Chronicles25:3 A Yedutuni, ana a Yedutuni: Gedaliya, ndi Zeri, ndi Yesaya, Hasabiya, ndi Matitiya, asanu ndi mmodzi; mwa chilangizo cha atate wao Yedutuni, ndiye wakunenera ndi kuyamika ndi kulemeza Yehova ndi zeze." 
1Chronicles25:4 A Hemani, ana a Hemani: Bukiya, Mataniya, Uziyele, Sebuele, ndi Yerimoti, Hananiya, Hanani, Eliyata, Gidaliti, ndi Romamiti-Ezere, Yosibekasa, Maloti, Hotiri, Mahaziyoti;" 
1Chronicles25:5 awa onse ndiwo ana a Hemani mlauli wa mfumu m'mau a Mulungu, kuti akweze mphamvu yake. Ndipo Mulungu anapatsa Hemani ana amuna khumi ndi anai, ndi ana akazi atatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Onsewa anawalangiza ndi atate wao aimbe m'nyumba ya Yehova ndi nsanje, zisakasa ndi azeze; atumikire nazo m'nyumba ya Mulungu; ndipo Asafu, Yedutuni, ndi Hemani, anawalangiza ndi mfumu." 
1Chronicles25:7 Ndipo chiwerengo chao, pamodzi ndi abale ao ophunzitsidwa aimbire Yehova, onse anthetemya, ndiwo mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles25:8 Ndipo anachita maere pa udikiro wao, analingana onse, ang'ono ndi akulu, mphunzitsi ndi wophunzira." 
1Chronicles25:9 Maere oyamba tsono anagwera a banja la Asafu ndiye Yosefe; wachiwiri Gedaliya, iye ndi abale ake, ndi ana ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 wachitatu Zakuri, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 wachinai Iziri, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 wachisanu Netaniya, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 wachisanu ndi chimodzi Bukiya, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 wachisanu ndi chiwiri Yesarela, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:15 wachisanu ndi chitatu Yesaya, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 wachisanu ndi chinai Mataniya, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:17 wakhumi Simei, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 wakhumi ndi chimodzi Azarele, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 wakhumi ndi chiwiri Hasabiya, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 wakhumi ndi chitatu Subaele, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:21 wakhumi ndi chinai Matitiya, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 wakhumi ndi chisanu Yeremoti, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:23 wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chimodzi Hananiya, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chiwiri Yosibekasa, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chitatu Hanani, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 wakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chinai Maloti, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:27 wamakumi awiri Eliyata, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 wa makumi awiri ndi chimodzi Hotiri, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 wa makumi awiri ndi chiwiri Gidaliti, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:30 wa makumi awiri ndi chitatu Mahaziyoti, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:31 wa makumi awiri ndi chinai Romamiti-Ezere, ana ake ndi abale ake khumi ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles26:1 A magawidwe a odikira a Akora: Meselemiya mwana wa Kore wa ana a Asafu. 
1Chronicles26:2 Ndipo Meselemiya anali ndi ana, woyamba Zekariya, wachiwiri Yediyaele, wachitatu Zebadiya, wachinai Yatiniele," 
1Chronicles26:3 wachisanu Elamu, wachisanu ndi chimodzi Yehohanani, wachisanu ndi chiwiri Eliehoenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Ndipo Obededomu anali nao ana, woyamba Semaya, wachiwiri Yehozabadi, wachitatu Yowa, wachinai Sakara, wachisanu Netanele," 
1Chronicles26:5 wachisanu ndi chimodzi Amiyele, wachisanu ndi chiwiri Isakara, wachisanu ndi chitatu Peuletai; pakuti Mulungu adamdalitsa." 
1Chronicles26:6 Kwa Semaya mwana wake yemwe kunabadwa ana, akulamulira nyumba ya atate wao; pakuti anali ngwazi zamphamvu." 
1Chronicles26:7 Ana a Semaya: Otini, ndi Refaele, ndi Obedi, Elizabadi, amene abale ao ndiwo odziwa mphamvu, Elihu, ndi Semakiya." 
1Chronicles26:8 Onsewa ndiwo a ana a Obededomu; iwo ndi ana ao, ndi abale ao, anthu odziwa mphamvu yakutumikira, makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu awiri a Obededomu." 
1Chronicles26:9 Ndi Meselemiya anali ndi ana, ndi abale odziwa mphamvu khumi mphambu asanu ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa yemwe wa ana a Merari anali ndi ana, wamkulu ndi Simiri; pakuti ngakhale sanali wobadwa woyamba, atate wake anamuyesa wamkulu;" 
1Chronicles26:11 wachiwiri Hilikiya, wachitatu Tebaliya, wachinai Zekariya; ana ndi abale onse a Hosa ndiwo khumi ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Mwa iwowa munali magawidwe a odikira, mwa akulu a amuna akuchita udikiro wao, monga abale ao, kutumikira m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles26:13 Ndipo anachita maere ang'ono ndi akulu, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, kuchitira zipata zonse." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ndi maere a kum'mawa anagwera Selemiya. Ndipo anachitira maere Zekariya mwana wake, phungu wanzeru, ndi maere anamgwera kumpoto;" 
1Chronicles26:15 Obededomu kumwera, ndi ana ake nyumba ya akatundu." 
1Chronicles26:16 Supimu ndi Hosa kumadzulo, ku chipata cha Saleketi, ku mseu wokwerapo, udikiro pandunji pa udikiro." 
1Chronicles26:17 Kum'mawa kunali Alevi asanu ndi mmodzi, kumpoto anai tsiku ndi tsiku, kumwera anai tsiku ndi tsiku, ndi a nyumba ya akatundu awiri ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ku Parabara kumadzulo anai kumseu, ndi awiri ku Parabara." 
1Chronicles26:19 Awa ndi magawidwe a odikira; a ana a Akora, ndi a ana a Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Ndipo wa Alevi, Ahiya anayang'anira chuma cha nyumba ya Mulungu, ndi chuma cha zopatulika." 
1Chronicles26:21 Ana a Ladani: ana a Ladani a Ageresoni, akulu a nyumba za makolo a Ladani Mgeresoni, Yehiyeli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Ana a Yehiyeli: Zetamu ndi Yowele mbale wake, oyang'anira chuma cha nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles26:23 Aamuramu, Aizihara, Ahebroni, Auziyele;" 
1Chronicles26:24 ndi Sebuele mwana wa Geresomo, mwana wa Mose, ndiye mkulu woyang'anira zuma." 
1Chronicles26:25 Ndi abale ake a Eliyezere: Rehabiya mwana wake, ndi Yesaya mwana wake ndi Yoramu mwana wake, ndi Zikiri mwana wake, ndi Selomoti mwana wake." 
1Chronicles26:26 Selomoti amene ndi abale ake anayang'anira chuma chonse cha zinthu zopatulika, zimene Davide mfumu ndi akulu a nyumba za akulu, akulu a zikwi ndi mazana, adazipatula." 
1Chronicles26:27 Kutenga pa zofunkha kunkhondo, anapatulako kukonzera nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles26:28 Ndipo zonse adazipatula Samuele mlauli, ndi Saulo mwana wa Kisi, ndi Abinere mwana wa Nere, ndi Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya; aliyense anapatula kanthu kalikonse, anazisunga Selomoti ndi abale ake." 
1Chronicles26:29 A Aizihara: Kenaniya ndi ana ake anachita ntchito ya pabwalo ya Israele, akapitao ndi oweruza milandu." 
1Chronicles26:30 A Ahebroni: Hasabiya ndi abale ake odziwa mphamvu chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri anayang'anira Israele tsidya lino la Yordani kumadzulo, kuyang'anira ntchito yonse ya Yehova, ndi kutumikira mfumu." 
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriya ndiye mkulu wa Ahebroni, wa Ahebroni monga mwa mibadwo ya nyumba za makolo. Chaka cha makumi anai cha ufumu wa Davide anafunafuna, napeza mwa iwowa ngwazi zamphamvu ku Yazere wa ku Giliyadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Ndi abale ake ngwazi ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri, akulu a nyumba za makolo, amene mfumu Davide anaika akhale oyang'anira a Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi fuko la Manase logawika pakati, pa zinthu zonse za Mulungu ndi zinthu za mfumu." 
1Chronicles27:1 Ndipo ana a Israele monga mwa chiwerengo chao, kunena za akulu a nyumba za makolo ao, ndi akazembe a zikwi, ndi a mazana, ndi akapitao ao akutumikira mfumu mu ntchito iliyonse ya magawidwe, akulowa ndi kutuluka mwezi ndi mwezi, miyezi yonse ya chaka, chigawo chilichonse ncha amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:2 Woyang'anira chigawo choyamba cha mwezi, woyamba ndiye Yasobeamu mwana wa Zabidiele; m'chigawo mwake munali zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ndiye wa ana a Perezi, mkulu wa akazembe onse a khamu mwezi woyamba." 
1Chronicles27:4 Woyang'anira chigawo cha mwezi wachiwiri ndiye Dodai Mwahohi ndi chigawo chake; ndi Mikiloti mtsogoleri, ndi m'chigawo chake munali zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:5 Kazembe wachitatu wa khamu wa mwezi wachitatu ndiye Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada wansembe wamkulu; ndi m'chigawo mwake munalinso zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya ameneyo ndiye wamphamvu uja wa makumi atatu aja, woyang'anira chigawo chake ndi Amizabadi mwana wake." 
1Chronicles27:7 Wachinai wa mwezi wachinai ndiye Asahele mbale wa Yowabu, ndi pambuyo pake Zebadiya mwana wake; ndi m'chigawo mwake munali zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:8 Kazembe wachisanu wa mwezi wachisanu ndiye Samuti Mwizara; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:9 Wachisanu ndi chimodzi wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi ndiye Ira mwana wa Ikesi Mtekowa; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:10 Wachisanu ndi chiwiri wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri ndiye Helezi Mpeloni wa ana a Efuremu; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:11 Wachisanu ndi chitatu wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chitatu ndiye Sibekai Muhusa wa Azera; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:12 Wachisanu ndi chinai wa mwezi wachisanu ndi chinai ndiye Abiyezere Mwanatoti wa Abenjamini; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:13 Wakhumi wa mwezi wakhumi ndiye Maharai Mnetofa wa Azera; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:14 Wakhumi ndi chimodzi wa mwezi wakhumi ndi chimodzi ndiye Benaya Mpiratoni wa ana a Efuremu; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:15 Wakhumi ndi chiwiri wa mwezi wakhumi ndi chiwiri ndiye Helidai Mnetofa wa Otiniyele; ndi m'chigawo mwake zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:16 Koma oyang'anira mafuko a Israele ndi awa: wa Arubeni mtsogoleri wao ndiye Eliyezere mwana wa Zikiri; wa Asimeoni, Sefatiya mwana wa Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 wa Alevi, Hasabiya mwana wa Kemuwele; wa Aroni, Zadoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 wa Yuda, Elihu mbale wina wa Davide; wa Isakara, Omuri mwana wa Mikaele;" 
1Chronicles27:19 wa Zebuloni, Isimaya mwana wa Obadiya; wa Nafutali, Yerimoti mwana wa Aziriele;" 
1Chronicles27:20 wa ana a Efuremu, Hoseya mwana wa Azaziya; wa fuko la Manase logawika pakati, Yowele mwana wa Pedaya;" 
1Chronicles27:21 wa fuko la Manase logawika pakati m'Giliyadi, Ido mwana wa Zekariya; wa Benjamini, Yaasiyele mwana wa Abinere;" 
1Chronicles27:22 wa Dani, Azarele mwana wa Yerohamu. Awa ndi akazembe a mafuko a Israele." 
1Chronicles27:23 Koma Davide sanawerenge iwo a zaka makumi awiri ndi ochepapo, pakuti Yehova adati kuti adzachulukitsa Israele ngati nyenyezi za kuthambo." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu mwana wa Zeruya anayamba kuwerenga, koma sanatsirize; ndi mkwiyo unagwera Israele chifukwa cha ichi, ndipo chiwerengo chao sichinalembedwa m'buku la mbiri ya mfumu Davide." 
1Chronicles27:25 Ndipo woyang'anira chuma cha mfumu ndiye Azimaveti mwana wa Adiyele, ndi woyang'anira wa chuma cha m'minda, m'mizinda ndi m'milaga, ndi nyumba za nsanja, ndiye Yonatani mwana wa Uziya;" 
1Chronicles27:26 ndi woyang'anira iwo akugwira ntchito ya m'munda yakulima nthaka ndiye Eziri mwana wa Kelubu; 
1Chronicles27:27 ndi woyang'anira minda yamphesa ndiye Simei Mramati; ndi woyang'anira zipatso za minda yamphesa zisungike mosungiramo vinyo ndiye Zabidi Msifamu; 
1Chronicles27:28 ndi woyang'anira mitengo ya azitona, ndi yamikuyu yokhala kuzidikha kunsi, ndiye Baala-Hanani Mgederi; ndi woyang'anira zosungiramo mafuta ndiye Yowasi;" 
1Chronicles27:29 ndi woyang'anira ng'ombe zakudya m'Saroni ndiye Sitirai Msaroni; ndi woyang'anira ng'ombe za m'zigwa ndiye Safati mwana wa Adilai; 
1Chronicles27:30 ndi woyang'anira ngamira ndiye Obili Mwismaele; ndi woyang'anira abulu ndiye Yedeiya Mmeronoti; 
1Chronicles27:31 ndi woyang'anira zoweta zazing'ono ndiye Yazizi Mhagiri. Onsewa ndiwo akulu a zolemera zake za mfumu Davide. 
1Chronicles27:32 Ndipo Yonatani atate wake wina wa Davide anali phungu, munthu wanzeru ndi mlembi; ndi Yehiyele mwana wa Hakimoni anakhala ndi ana a mfumu;" 
1Chronicles27:33 ndi Ahitofele anali phungu wa mfumu, ndi Husai Mwariki anali bwenzi la mfumu;" 
1Chronicles27:34 ndi wotsatana ndi Ahitofele, Yehoyada mwana wa Benaya, ndi Abiyatara; koma kazembe wa nkhondo ya mfumu ndiye Yowabu." 
1Chronicles28:1 Pamenepo Davide anasonkhanitsa ku Yerusalemu akalonga a Israele, akalonga a mafuko, ndi akulu a zigawo zakutumikira mfumu, ndi akulu a zikwi, ndi akulu a mazana, ndi akulu a zolemera zonse, ndi zoweta zonse za mfumu, ndi ana ake; pamodzi ndi akapitao ndi anthu amphamvu, ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu onsewo." 
1Chronicles28:2 Ndipo mfumu Davide anaima chilili, nati, Mundimvere ine, abale anga ndi anthu anga, ine kumtima kwanga ndinafuna kulimangira likasa la chipangano la Yehova, ndi popondapo mapazi a Mulungu wathu nyumba yopumulira, ndipo ndidakonzeratu za nyumbayi." 
1Chronicles28:3 Koma Mulungu anati kwa ine, Sudzamangira dzina langa nyumba, popeza ndiwe munthu wa nkhondo wokhetsa mwazi." 
1Chronicles28:4 Komatu Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anasankha ine m'nyumba yonse ya atate wanga, ndikhale mfumu ya Israele kosatha; pakuti anasankhiratu Yuda akhale mtsogoleri, ndi m'nyumba ya Yuda nyumba ya atate wanga, ndi mwa ana a atate wanga ndinamkomera ndine, andilonge ufumu wa Israele yense;" 
1Chronicles28:5 ndi mwa ana anga onse (pakuti Yehova wandipatsa ana amuna ambiri), anasankha Solomoni mwana wanga akhale pa mpando wachifumu wa ufumu wa Yehova kuweruza Israele." 
1Chronicles28:6 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Solomoni mwana wako ndiye adzandimangira nyumba yanga ndi mabwalo anga; pakuti ndamsankha akhale mwana wanga, ndipo Ine ndidzakhala atate wake." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa ufumu wake kosatha, akalimbika kuchita malamulo anga ndi maweruzo anga monga lero lino." 
1Chronicles28:8 Ndipo tsopano, pamaso pa Aisraele onse, khamu la Yehova, ndi m'makutu a Mulungu wathu, sungani, nimufunefune malamulo onse a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuti mukhale nalo lanulanu dziko lokoma ili, ndi kulisiyira ana anu pambuyo panu cholowa chao kosalekeza." 
1Chronicles28:9 Ndipo iwe Solomoni mwana wanga, umdziwe Mulungu wa atate wako, umtumikire ndi mtima wangwiro ndi moyo waufulu; pakuti Yehova asanthula mitima yonse, nazindikira zolingirira zonse za maganizo; ukamfunafuna Iye udzampeza, koma ukamsiya Iye adzakusiya kosatha." 
1Chronicles28:10 Chenjera tsono, pakuti Yehova anakusankha iwe umange nyumba ya malo opatulika; limbika, nuchite." 
1Chronicles28:11 Pamenepo Davide anapatsa Solomoni mwana wake chifaniziro cha chipinda cholowera cha Kachisi, ndi cha nyumba zake, ndi cha zosungiramo chuma zake, ndi cha zipinda zosanjikizana zake, ndi cha zipinda zake za m'katimo, ndi cha Kachisi wotetezerepo;" 
1Chronicles28:12 ndi chifaniziro cha zonse anali nazo mwa mzimu, cha mabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova, ndi cha zipinda zonse pozungulirapo, cha zosungiramo chuma cha nyumba ya Mulungu, ndi cha zosungiramo chuma za zinthu zopatulika;" 
1Chronicles28:13 ndi cha magawidwe a ansembe ndi Alevi, ndi cha ntchito zonse za utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova, ndi cha zipangizo za utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova;" 
1Chronicles28:14 cha golide woyesedwa kulemera kwake wa zipangizo zagolide, wa zipangizo zonse za ntchito ya mtundu uliwonse; cha siliva wa zipangizo zasiliva woyesedwa kulemera kwake, wa zipangizo za ntchito ya mitundumitundu;" 
1Chronicles28:15 mwa kulemera kwakenso cha zoikapo nyali zagolide, ndi nyali zake zagolide, mwa kulemera kwake cha choikapo nyali chilichonse, ndi nyali zake; ndi cha zoikapo nyali zasiliva, siliva woyesedwa kulemera kwake wa choikapo nyali chilichonse, ndi nyali zake, monga mwa ntchito ya choikapo nyali chilichonse;" 
1Chronicles28:16 ndi golide woyesedwa kulemera kwake wa magome a mkate woonekera, wa gome lililonse; ndi siliva wa magome asiliva," 
1Chronicles28:17 ndi mitengo, ndi mbale zowazira, ndi zikho za golide woona, ndi cha mitsuko yake yagolide, woyesedwa kulemera kwake mtsuko uliwonse; ndi cha mitsuko yasiliva woyesedwa kulemera kwake mtsuko uliwonse;" 
1Chronicles28:18 ndi cha guwa la nsembe lofukizapo la golide woyengetsa woyesedwa kulemera kwake, ndi chifaniziro cha galeta wa akerubi agolide akufunyulula mapiko ao ndi kuphimba likasa la chipangano la Yehova." 
1Chronicles28:19 Chonsechi, anati Davide, anandidziwitsa ndi kuchilemba kuchokera kwa dzanja la Yehova; ndizo ntchito zonse za chifaniziro ichi." 
1Chronicles28:20 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Solomoni mwana wake, Limbika, nulimbe mtima, nuchichite; usaopa, kapena kutenga nkhawa; pakuti Yehova Mulungu, ndiye Mulungu wanga, ali nawe; sadzakusowa kapena kukutaya mpaka zitatha ntchito zonse za utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles28:21 Ndipo taona, pali zigawo za ansembe ndi Alevi, za utumiki wonse wa nyumba ya Mulungu; ndipo pamodzi nawe mu ntchito iliyonse pali onse ofuna eni ake aluso, achite za utumiki uliwonse; akulu omwe ndi anthu onse adzachita monga umo udzanenamo." 
1Chronicles29:1 Mfumu Davide ananenanso kwa khamu lonse, Mulungu wasankha mwana wanga Solomoni yekha, ndiye mnyamata ndi wosakhwima; ndipo ntchitoyi ndi yaikulu, pakuti chinyumbachi sichili cha munthu, koma cha Yehova Mulungu." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ndi mphamvu yanga yonse tsono ndakonzeratu nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, golide wa zija zagolide ndi siliva wa zija zasiliva, ndi mkuwa wa zija zamkuwa, chitsulo cha zija zachitsulo, ndi mtengo wa zija zamtengo, miyala yaberulo, ndi miyala yoikika, miyala yokometsera, ndi ya mawangamawanga, ndi miyala ya mtengo wake ya mitundumitundu ndi miyala yansangalabwe yochuluka." 
1Chronicles29:3 Ndiponso popeza ndikondwera nayo nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, chuma changachanga cha golide ndi siliva ndili nacho ndichipereka kunyumba ya Mulungu wanga, moonjezera ndi zonse ndazikonzeratu nyumba yopatulikayo;" 
1Chronicles29:4 ndicho matalente zikwi zitatu za golide, golide wa Ofiri; ndi matalente zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri a siliva woyengetsa, kumamatiza nazo makoma a nyumbazi;" 
1Chronicles29:5 golide wa zija zagolide, ndi siliva wa zija zasiliva, ndi za ntchito zilizonse akuzipanga manja a amisiri. Ndani uyo afuna mwini kudzipatulira kwa Yehova lero lino?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Pamenepo akulu a nyumba za makolo, ndi akulu a mafuko a Israele, ndi akulu a zikwi ndi a mazana pamodzi ndi iwo oyang'anira ntchito ya mfumu, anapereka mwaufulu," 
1Chronicles29:7 napereka ku utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu golide matalente zikwi zisanu, ndi madariki zikwi khumi; ndi siliva matalente zikwi khumi, ndi mkuwa matalente zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu, ndi chitsulo matalente zikwi zana limodzi." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ndipo amene anali nayo miyala ya mtengo wake anaipereka ku chuma cha nyumba ya Yehova, mwa dzanja la Yehiyele Mgeresoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Ndipo anthu anakondwera popeza anapereka mwaufulu; pakuti ndi mtima wangwiro anapereka mwaufulu kwa Yehova; mfumu Davide yemwe anakondwera ndi chimwemwe chachikulu. 
1Chronicles29:10 Motero Davide analemekeza Yehova pamaso pa khamu lonse, nati Davide, Wolemekezedwa Inu, Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Atate wathu ku nthawi zomka muyaya." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ukulu, ndi mphamvu, ndi ulemerero, ndi chipambano, ndi chifumu ndi zanu, Yehova; pakuti zonse zam'mwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi ndi zanu; ufumu ndi wanu, Yehova; ndipo mwakwezeka mutu wa pa zonse." 
1Chronicles29:12 Zolemera ndi ulemu zifuma kwanu, ndipo muchita ufumu pa zonse, ndi m'dzanja mwanu muli mphamvu yaikulu; kukuza ndi kupatsa onse mphamvu kuli m'dzanja lanu." 
1Chronicles29:13 Motero tsono, Mulungu wathu, tikuyamikani ndi kulemekeza dzina lanu lokoma." 
1Chronicles29:14 Koma ndine yani, ndi anthu anga ndiwo ayani, kuti tidzakhoza kupereka mwaufulu motere? Popeza zonsezi zifuma kwanu; takupatsani zofuma ku dzanja lanu." 
1Chronicles29:15 Pakuti ife ndife alendo pamaso panu, ndi ogonera, monga makolo athu onse; masiku athu a padziko akunga mthunzi, ndipo palibe kukhalitsa." 
1Chronicles29:16 Yehova Mulungu wathu, zounjikika izi zonse tazikonzeratu kukumangirani Inu nyumba ya dzina lanu loyera zifuma ku dzanja lanu, zonsezi ndi zanu." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ndidziwanso, Mulungu wanga, kuti muyesa mtima, nimukondwera nako kuongoka. Koma ine, ndi mtima wanga woongoka ndapereka zonsezi mwaufulu; ndipo tsopano ndaona mokondwera anthu anu okhala pompano, napereka kwa Inu mwaufulu." 
1Chronicles29:18 Yehova Mulungu wa Abrahamu, wa Isaki, ndi wa Israele makolo athu, musungitse ichi kosatha m'chilingaliro cha maganizo a mtima wa anthu anu, nimulunjikitse mitima yao kwanu," 
1Chronicles29:19 nimupatse Solomoni mwana wanga mtima wangwiro kusunga malamulo anu, mboni zanu, ndi malemba anu, ndi kuchita izi zonse, ndi kumanga chinyumbachi chimene ndakonzeratu mirimo yake." 
1Chronicles29:20 Ndipo Davide anati kwa khamu lonse, Mulemekeze tsono Yehova Mulungu wanu. Ndi khamu lonse linalemekeza Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, nawerama, nalambira Yehova, ndi mfumu." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ndipo anamphera Yehova nsembe, napereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova m'mawa mwake mwa tsiku lija, ndizo ng'ombe chikwi chimodzi, nkhosa zamphongo chikwi chimodzi, ndi anaankhosa chikwi chimodzi, pamodzi ndi nsembe zao zothira, ndi nsembe zochuluka za Aisraele onse:" 
1Chronicles29:22 nadya namwa pamaso pa Mulungu tsiku lomwelo ndi chimwemwe chachikulu. Ndipo analonga ufumu Solomoni mwana wa Davide kachiwiri, namdzozera Yehova akhale kalonga, ndi Zadoki akhale wansembe." 
1Chronicles29:23 Momwemo Solomoni anakhala pa mpando wachifumu wa Yehova, ndiye mfumu m'malo mwa Davide atate wake, nalemerera, namvera iye Aisraele onse." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ndi akulu onse, ndi amuna amphamvu onse, ndi ana amuna onse omwe a mfumu Davide, anagonjeratu kwa Solomoni mfumu." 
1Chronicles29:25 Ndipo Yehova anakuza Solomoni kwakukulu pamaso pa Aisraele onse, nampatsa ulemerero wachifumu, wakuti, asanakhale iyeyu, panalibe mfumu ya Israele inali nao wotero." 
1Chronicles29:26 Momwemo Davide mwana wa Yese adakhala mfumu ya Aisraele onse. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ndipo nthawi yoti anakhala mfumu ya Israele ndiyo zaka makumi anai; zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri anakhala mfumu m'Hebroni, ndi zaka makumi atatu anakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Nafa atakalamba bwino, wochuluka masiku, zolemera, ndi ulemerero; ndi Solomoni mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
1Chronicles29:29 Zochita mfumu Davide tsono, zoyamba ndi zotsiriza, taonani, zalembedwa m'buku la mau a Samuele mlauli, ndi m'buku la mau a Natani mneneri, ndi m'buku la mau a Gadi mlauli;" 
1Chronicles29:30 pamodzi ndi za ufumu wake wonse, ndi mphamvu yake, ndi za nthawizo zidampitira iye, ndi Israele, ndi maufumu onse a maiko." 
2Chronicles1:1 Ndipo Solomoni mwana wa Davide analimbikitsidwa m'ufumu wake, ndipo Yehova Mulungu wake anali naye, namkuza kwakukulu." 
2Chronicles1:2 Ndipo Solomoni analankhula ndi Aisraele onse, ndi akulu a zikwi ndi a mazana, ndi kwa oweruza, ndi kwa kalonga aliyense wa Israele, akulu a nyumba za makolo." 
2Chronicles1:3 Ndipo Solomoni ndi khamu lonse pamodzi naye anamuka ku msanje wa ku Gibiyoni; pakuti kumeneko kunali chihema chokomanako cha Mulungu adachimanga Mose mtumiki wa Yehova m'chipululu. 
2Chronicles1:4 Koma likasa la Mulungu Davide adakwera nalo kuchokera ku Kiriyati-Yearimu kunka kumene Davide adalikonzeratu malo; pakuti adaliutsiratu hema ku Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles1:5 Guwa la nsembe lomwe lamkuwa, adalipanga Bezalele mwana wa Uri mwana wa Huri linali komweko, ku khomo la Kachisi wa Yehova; ndipo Solomoni ndi khamulo anafunako." 
2Chronicles1:6 Nakwerako Solomoni ku guwa la nsembe pamaso pa Yehova linali ku chihema chokomanako, napereka pamenepo nsembe zopsereza chikwi chimodzi." 
2Chronicles1:7 Usiku womwewo Mulungu anaonekera kwa Solomoni, nati kwa iye, Pempha chomwe ndikupatse." 
2Chronicles1:8 Nati Solomoni kwa Mulungu, Mwachitira Davide atate wanga zokoma zambiri, ndipo mwandiika mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles1:9 Tsopano, Yehova Mulungu, likhazikike lonjezano lanu la kwa Davide atate wanga; pakuti mwandiika mfumu ya anthu akuchuluka ngati fumbi lapansi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Mundipatse tsono nzeru ndi chidziwitso, kuti ndituluke ndi kulowa pamaso pa anthu awa; pakuti angathe ndani kuweruza anthu anu awa ambiri?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Solomoni, Popeza chinali mumtima mwako ichi, osapempha chuma, akatundu, kapena ulemu, kapena moyo wa iwo akudana nawe, osapemphanso masiku ambiri; koma wadzipemphera nzeru ndi chidziwitso, kuti uweruze anthu anga amene ndakuika ukhale mfumu yao," 
2Chronicles1:12 nzeru ndi chidziwitso zipatsidwa kwa iwe, ndidzakupatsanso chuma, ndi akatundu, ndi ulemu, zotere zonga sanakhale nazo mafumu akale usanakhale iwe, ndi akudza pambuyo pako sadzakhala nazo zotero." 
2Chronicles1:13 Momwemo Solomoni anadza ku Yerusalemu kuchokera ku msanje uli ku Gibiyoni, ku khomo la chihema chokomanako; ndipo anachita ufumu pa Israele." 
2Chronicles1:14 Ndipo Solomoni anasonkhanitsa magaleta ndi apakavalo, nakhala nao magaleta chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana anai, ndi apakavalo zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri; nawaika m'midzi ya magaleta ndi kwa mfumu ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Ndipo mfumu inatero kuti siliva ndi golide zikhale m'Yerusalemu ngati miyala, ndi kuti mikungudza ichuluke ngati mikuyu yokhala kuchidikha." 
2Chronicles1:16 Ndi akavalo amene Solomoni anali nao anafuma ku Ejipito; amalonda a mfumu anawalandira magulumagulu, gulu lililonse mtengo wake." 
2Chronicles1:17 Ndipo anatenga natuluka nalo galeta ku Ejipito mtengo wake masekeli a siliva mazana asanu ndi limodzi, ndi kavalo mtengo wake zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu; momwemo anawatulutsira mafumu onse a Ahiti, ndi mafumu a Aramu, ndi dzanja lao." 
2Chronicles2:1 Ndipo Solomoni anati alimangire dzina la Yehova nyumba, ndiponso nyumba ya ufumu wake." 
2Chronicles2:2 Nawerenga Solomoni amuna zikwi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi osenza mirimo, ndi amuna zikwi makumi asanu ndi atatu otema mitengo m'mapiri, ndi zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi kuwayang'anira." 
2Chronicles2:3 Ndipo Solomoni anatumiza kwa Huramu mfumu ya Tiro, ndi kuti, Monga momwe munachitira Davide atate wanga, ndi kumtumizira mikungudza yommangira nyumba yokhalamo, mundichitire ine momwemo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Taonani, nditi ndilimangire dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanga nyumba, kumpatulira iyo, ndi kufukiza pamaso pake zonunkhira za fungo lokoma, ndiyo ya mkate woonekera wachikhalire, ndi ya nsembe zopsereza, m'mawa ndi madzulo, pamasabata, ndi pokhala mwezi, ndi pa zikondwerero zoikika za Yehova Mulungu wathu. Ndiwo machitidwe osatha m'Israele." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ndipo nyumba nditi ndimangeyi ndi yaikulu; pakuti Mulungu wathu ndiye wamkulu woposa milungu yonse. 
2Chronicles2:6 Koma ali nayo mphamvu ndani yakummangira Iye nyumba, popeza thambo lam'mwambamwamba silimfikira? Ndine yani ine tsono, kuti ndimmangire nyumba, koma kumfukizira chofukiza ndiko?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ndipo tsono munditumizire munthu waluso lakuchita ndi golide, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi chitsulo, ndi thonje lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi lamadzi, wakudziwa kuzokota zozokota zilizonse, akhale ndi amuna aluso okhala ndi ine m'Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu, amene Davide atate wanga anawakonzeratu." 
2Chronicles2:8 Munditumizirenso mitengo yamikungudza, ndi yamlombwa, ndi yambawa, ya ku Lebanoni; pakuti ndidziwa kuti anyamata anu adziwa kutema mitengo m'Lebanoni; ndipo taonani, anyamata anga adzakhala ndi anyamata anu," 
2Chronicles2:9 ndiko kundikonzera mitengo yambirimbiri; pakuti nyumbayi nditi ndiimange idzakhala yaikulu ndi yodabwitsa. 
2Chronicles2:10 Ndipo taonani, ndidzawapatsa anyamata anu otema akulikha mitengo miyeso ya tirigu wopuntha zikwi makumi awiri, ndi miyeso ya barele zikwi makumi awiri, ndi mitsuko yaikulu ya vinyo zikwi makumi awiri, ndi mitsuko yaikulu ya mafuta zikwi makumi awiri." 
2Chronicles2:11 Ndipo Huramu mfumu ya Tiro anayankha ndi kulembera, natumiza kalatayo kwa Solomoni, ndi kuti, Powakonda anthu ake Yehova anakulongani mfumu yao." 
2Chronicles2:12 Huramu anatinso, Alemekezedwe Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, amene analenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, nampatsa mfumu Davide mwana waluso, wodziwa nzeru ndi waluntha, ammangire Yehova nyumba, ndiponso nyumba ya ufumu wake." 
2Chronicles2:13 Ndipo tsono ndatumiza munthu waluso wokhala nalo luntha, Huramuabi," 
2Chronicles2:14 ndiye mwana wa munthu wamkazi wa ana akazi a Dani, ndipo atate wake ndiye munthu wa ku Tiro, wodziwa kuchita ndi golide, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi chitsulo, ndi mwala, ndi mitengo, ndi thonje lofiirira, ndi lamadzi, ndi bafuta la thonje losansitsa ndi lofiira, ndi kuzokota mazokotedwe ali onse, ndi kulingirira chopanga chilichonse; kuti ampatse pokhala pamodzi ndi aluso anu, ndi aluso a mbuye wanga Davide atate wanu." 
2Chronicles2:15 Ndipo tsono tirigu ndi barele, mafuta ndi vinyo, mbuye wanga wanenazi, azitumize kwa anyamata ake;" 
2Chronicles2:16 ndipo ife tidzatema mitengo ku Lebanoni monga mwa kusowa kwanu konse; ndipo tidzabwera nayo kwa inu yoyandamitsa paphaka kufikira ku Yopa; ndipo inu mudzakwera nayo ku Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles2:17 Ndipo Solomoni anawerenga alendo onse okhala m'dziko la Israele, monga mwa mawerengedwe aja atate wake Davide adawawerenga nao, nawapeza afikira zikwi zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza zitatu ndi mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ndipo anaika zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri za iwowa asenze mirimo, ndi zikwi makumi asanu ndi atatu ateme m'mapiri, ndi akapitao zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi agwiritse anthu ntchito." 
2Chronicles3:1 Pamenepo Solomoni anayamba kumanga nyumba ya Yehova ku Yerusalemu, m'phiri la Moriya, kumene Mulungu anaonekera kwa Davide atate wake pamalo pamene Davide anakonzeratu pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Nayamba kumanga tsiku lachiwiri la mwezi wachiwiri, chaka chachinai cha ufumu wake." 
2Chronicles3:3 Ndipo maziko adawaika Solomoni akumangapo nyumba ya Mulungu ndi awa: utali wake, kuyesa mikono monga mwa muyeso wakale, ndiwo mikono makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri." 
2Chronicles3:4 Ndi chipinda cholowera chinali kukhomo kwa nyumba, m'litali mwake monga mwa kupingasa kwa nyumba munali mikono makumi awiri, ndi msinkhu wake zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri; ndipo analikuta m'katimo ndi golide woona." 
2Chronicles3:5 M'nyumba yaikulu tsono anatchinga ndi mitengo yamlombwa, imene anaikuta ndi golide wabwino, nalembapo ngati migwalangwa ndi maunyolo." 
2Chronicles3:6 Ndipo anakuta nyumba ndi miyala ya mtengo wake; ndi golide wake ndiye golide wa Paravaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Anamamatizanso Kachisi, mitanda, ziundo, ndi makoma ake, ndi zitseko zake, ndi golide; nalemba akerubi pamakoma." 
2Chronicles3:8 Ndipo anamanga malo opatulika kwambiri, m'litali mwake monga mwa kupingasa kwa nyumba mikono makumi awiri, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri; naikuta ndi golide wabwino wakufikira matalente mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
2Chronicles3:9 Ndi kulemera kwake kwa misomali ndiko masekeli makumi asanu a golide. Ndipo anazikuta ndi golide zipinda zosanjikizana. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ndipo m'malo opatulika kwambiri anapanga akerubi awiri, anachita osema, nawakuta ndi golide." 
2Chronicles3:11 Ndi mapiko a akerubi m'litali mwake ndimo mikono makumi awiri; phiko la kerubi mmodzi mikono isanu, lojima khoma la nyumba; ndi phiko linzake mikono isanu, lokhudzana nalo phiko la kerubi wina." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ndi phiko la kerubi wina mikono isanu lojima khoma la nyumba, ndi phiko linzake mikono isanu lolumikizana ndi phiko la kerubi wina." 
2Chronicles3:13 Mapiko a akerubi awa anafunyululika mikono makumi awiri; ndipo anaima ndi mapazi ao, ndi nkhope zao zinaloza kukhomo." 
2Chronicles3:14 Ndipo anaomba nsalu yotchinga ya thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiira, ndi lofiirira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, naomberamo akerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Ndipo anapanga ku khomo la nyumba nsanamira ziwiri za mikono makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri; ndi mutu unakhala pamwamba pa iliyonse ndiwo mikono isanu. 
2Chronicles3:16 Napanga maunyolo a m'chipinda chamkati, nawamanga pa mitu ya nsanamirazi, napanga makangaza zana limodzi, nawamanga pamaunyolo." 
2Chronicles3:17 Ndipo anaimiritsa nsanamirazo pakhomo pa Kachisi; imodzi ku dzanja lamanja, ndi inzake ku dzanja lamanzere; nalitcha dzina la iyi ya ku dzanja lamanja Yakini, ndi dzina la iyi ya ku dzanja lamanzere Bowazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Anapanganso guwa la nsembe lamkuwa, m'litali mwake mikono makumi awiri, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri, ndi msinkhu wake mikono khumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Anayenganso thawale losungunula la mikono khumi kukamwa, lozunguniza, ndi msinkhu wake mikono isanu; ndi chingwe cha mikono makumi atatu chinalizunguniza." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ndi pansi pake panali mafaniziro a ng'ombe zakulizinga, khumi ku mkono umodzi, zakuzinga thawalelo pozungulira pake. Ng'ombe zinali m'mizere iwiri, zinayengeka poyengedwa thawalelo."
