2Chronicles4:4 Linasanjikika pa ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwiri, zitatu zinapenya kumpoto, ndi zitatu zinapenya kumadzulo, ndi zitatu zinapenya kumwera, ndi zitatu zinapenya kum'mawa; ndi thawale linasanjikika pamwamba pao, ndi nkholo zao zinayang'anana." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ndi kuchindikira kwake kunanga chikhato, ndi mlomo wake unasadamuka ngati mlomo wa chomwera, ngati luwa la kakombo; analowamo madzi a mitsuko yaikulu zikwi zitatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Anapanganso mbiya zaphwamphwa khumi, naika zisanu ku dzanja lamanja, ndi zisanu ku dzanja lamanzere, kutsukiramo; za nsembe yopsereza anazitsuka m'menemo; koma thawale ndi la ansembe kusambiramo." 
2Chronicles4:7 Ndipo anapanga zoikapo nyali khumi zagolide, monga mwa ziweruzo chake; naziika m'Kachisi, zisanu ku dzanja lamanja, ndi zisanu ku dzanja lamanzere." 
2Chronicles4:8 Anapanganso magome khumi, nawaika m'Kachisi, asanu ku dzanja lamanja, ndi asanu ku dzanja lamanzere. Napanga mbale zowazira zana limodzi zagolide." 
2Chronicles4:9 Anamanganso bwalo la ansembe, ndi bwalo lalikulu, ndi zitseko za kubwalo, nakuta zitseko zake ndi mkuwa." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ndipo anaika thawalelo ku dzanja lamanja la nyumba kum'mawa chakumwera. 
2Chronicles4:11 Ndipo Huramu anapanga miphika, ndi zoolera zake, ndi mbale zowazira zake. Natsiriza Huramu ntchito adaichitira mfumu Solomoni m'nyumba ya Mulungu:" 
2Chronicles4:12 nsanamira ziwiri, ndi zikhozo, ndi mitu iwiri inali pamwamba pa nsanamirazo, ndi maukonde awiri akukuta zikho ziwiri za mitu ili pamwamba pa nsanamirazo," 
2Chronicles4:13 ndi makangaza mazana anai a maukonde awiriwa; mizere iwiri ya makangaza ya ukonde uliwonse, akukuta zikho ziwiri za mitu, inali pa nsanamirazo." 
2Chronicles4:14 Anapanganso maphaka, napanga mbiya zaphwamphwa khumi pamwamba pa maphaka;" 
2Chronicles4:15 thawale limodzi ndi ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwiri pansi pake. 
2Chronicles4:16 Miphika yomwe, ndi zoolera, ndi mitungo, ndi zipangizo zake zonse, Huramuabi anazipangira mfumu Solomoni, kuzipangira nyumba ya Yehova, za mkuwa wonyezimira." 
2Chronicles4:17 Mfumuyi inaziyenga pa chidikha cha ku Yordani, m'dothi ladongo, pakati pa Sukoti ndi Zereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Ndipo Solomoni anazipanga zipangizo izi zonse zochulukadi, pakuti kulemera kwake kwa mkuwa sikunayeseka." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomoni anapanganso zipangizo zonse zinali m'nyumba ya Mulungu, guwa la nsembe lagolide lomwe, ndi magome oikapo mkate woonekera;" 
2Chronicles4:20 ndi zoikapo nyali ndi nyali zake za golide woona, zakuunikira monga mwa chilangizo chake chakuno cha chipinda chamkati;" 
2Chronicles4:21 ndi maluwa, ndi nyali, ndi mbano zagolide, ndiwo golide wangwiro;" 
2Chronicles4:22 ndi zozimira nyali, ndi mbale zowazira, ndi zipande, ndi mbale za zofukiza za golide woona; ndi kunena za polowera m'nyumba, zitseko zake za m'katimo za malo opatulika kwambiri, ndi zitseko za nyumbayi, ndiyo Kachisi, zinali zagolide." 
2Chronicles5:1 Momwemo zidatha ntchito zonse Solomoni adazichitira nyumba ya Yehova. Ndipo Solomoni anabwera nazo zopatulika zija za atate wake Davide; naziika siliva, ndi golide, ndi zipangizo zonse m'chuma cha nyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Chronicles5:2 Pamenepo Solomoni anasonkhanitsira akuluakulu a Israele, ndi akulu onse a mafuko, ndi akalonga a nyumba za makolo a ana a Israele, ku Yerusalemu, kukatenga likasa la chipangano cha Yehova kumudzi wa Davide ndiwo Ziyoni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Ndipo amuna onse a Israele anasonkhana kwa mfumu kumadyerero anachitikawo, m'mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri." 
2Chronicles5:4 Nadza akuluakulu onse a Israele, nanyamula likasalo Alevi." 
2Chronicles5:5 Ndipo anakwera nalo likasa, ndi chihema chokomanako, ndi zipangizo zonse zopatulika zinali m'chihemamo; izizo ansembe Alevi anakwera nazo." 
2Chronicles5:6 Ndi mfumu Solomoni ndi khamu lonse la Israele losonkhana kwa iye anali kulikasa, naphera nsembe, nkhosa ndi ng'ombe zosawerengeka kuchuluka kwake." 
2Chronicles5:7 Ndipo ansembe analowa nalo likasa la chipangano la Yehova kumalo kwake m'chipinda chamkati mwa Kachisi, m'malo opatulika kwambiri, pansi pa mapiko a akerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Pakuti akerubi anafunyulula mapiko ao pa malo a likasa, ndi akerubi anaphimba likasa ndi mphiko zake pamwamba pake." 
2Chronicles5:9 Ndipo zinatalikitsa mphikozo, kuti nsonga za mphiko zidaoneka kulikasa chakuno cha chipinda chamkati, koma sizinaoneka kubwalo; ndipo zili komweko mpaka lero lino." 
2Chronicles5:10 Munalibe kanthu kena m'likasa, koma magome awiri Mose anawaika m'mwemo ku Horebu, muja Yehova anachita chipangano ndi ana a Israele potuluka iwo m'Ejipito." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ndipo ansembe anatuluka m'malo opatulika, pakuti ansembe onse anali komwe adadzipatula, osasunga magawidwe ao;" 
2Chronicles5:12 Alevi omwe akuimba, onsewo ndiwo Asafu, Hemani, Yedutuni, ndi ana ao, ndi abale ao ovala bafuta, ali nazo nsanje, ndi zisakasa, ndi azeze, anaima kum'mawa kwa guwa la nsembe, ndi pamodzi nao ansembe zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri akuomba malipenga." 
2Chronicles5:13 Ndipo kunali, pakuchita limodzi amalipenga ndi oimba, kumveketsa mau amodzi akulemekeza ndi kuyamika Yehova, ndi pakukweza mau ao pamodzi ndi malipenga, ndi nsanje, ndi zoimbira zina, ndi kulemekeza Yehova, ndi kuti, Pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino, pakuti chifundo chake chikhala chikhalire; pamenepo mtambo unadzaza nyumbayi, ndiyo nyumba ya Yehova;" 
2Chronicles5:14 ndipo ansembe sanakhoze kuimirira kutumikira chifukwa cha mtambowo; pakuti ulemerero wa Yehova unadzaza nyumba ya Mulungu. 
2Chronicles6:1 Pamenepo Solomoni anati, Yehova anati kuti adzakhala mu mdima wandiweyani." 
2Chronicles6:2 Koma ndakumangirani nyumba yokhalamo, malo okhazikika okhalamo Inu nthawi yosatha." 
2Chronicles6:3 Ndipo mfumu inapotolokera nkhope yake, nidalitsa khamu lonse la Israele; ndi khamu lonse la Israele linaimirira." 
2Chronicles6:4 Nati iye, Alemekezedwe Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, wakunena m'kamwa mwake ndi Davide atate wanga, nakwaniritsa ndi manja ake, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles6:5 Kuyambira tsiku lakutulutsa Ine anthu anga m'dziko la Ejipito, sindinasankha mudzi uliwonse m'mafuko onse a Israele, kumangamo nyumba yokhalamo dzina langa, kapena kusankha munthu aliyense akhale kalonga wa anthu anga Israele;" 
2Chronicles6:6 Koma ndinasankha Yerusalemu, kuti dzina langa likhale komweko; ndinasankhanso Davide akhale mfumu ya anthu anga Israele." 
2Chronicles6:7 Ndipo Davide atate wanga anafuna mumtima mwake kumangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israele nyumba. 
2Chronicles6:8 Koma Yehova anati kwa Davide atate wanga, Popeza unafuna mumtima mwako kulimangira dzina langa nyumba, unachita bwino kuti unatero mumtima mwako;" 
2Chronicles6:9 koma sudzandimangira nyumba ndiwe, koma mwana wako wakudzatuluka m'chuuno mwako, iyeyo adzalimangira dzina langa nyumbayi." 
2Chronicles6:10 Ndipo Yehova wakhazikitsa mau ake adanenawo, pakuti ndinauka ine m'malo mwa Davide atate wanga, ndipo ndikhala pa mpando wachifumu wa Israele monga analonjeza Yehova, ndipo ndamangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israele nyumbayi." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ndipo ndalongamo likasa, muli chipangano cha Yehova, anachichita ndi ana a Israele." 
2Chronicles6:12 Ndipo Solomoni anaima ku guwa la nsembe la Yehova pamaso pa khamu lonse la Israele, natambasula manja ake." 
2Chronicles6:13 Ndipo Solomoni adapanga chiunda chamkuwa, m'litali mwake mikono isanu, ndi msinkhu wake mikono itatu, nachiika pakati pa bwalo; ndipo anaima pamenepo nagwada pa maondo ake pamaso pa khamu lonse la Israele, natambasulira manja ake kumwamba;" 
2Chronicles6:14 nati, Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, palibe Mulungu ngati Inu, m'mwamba, kapena pa dziko lapansi, wakusungira chipangano ndi chifundo akapolo anu akuyenda pamaso panu ndi mtima wao wonse;" 
2Chronicles6:15 inu amene mwasungira mtumiki wanu Davide atate wanga chija mudamlonjezachi: inde munanena ndi pakamwa panu, ndipo mwachita ndi dzanja lanu, monga momwe muli lero lino." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, msungireni mtumiki wanu Davide chija mudamlonjezacho, ndi kuti, Sadzakusowa munthu pamaso panga wakukhala pa mpando wachifumu wa Israele; pokhapo ngati ana ako asamalira njira yao, kuti ayende m'chilamulo changa, monga umo unayendera iwe pamaso panga." 
2Chronicles6:17 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, achitike mau anu amene munanena kwa Davide mtumiki wanu." 
2Chronicles6:18 Koma kodi nzoona kuti Mulungu akhala ndi anthu pa dziko lapansi? Taonani, thambo, inde m'mwambamwamba, sizifikira inu, koposa kotani nanga nyumba iyi ndaimanga?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Chinkana chitero, labadirani pemphero la kapolo wanu, ndi pembedzero lake, Yehova Mulungu wanga, kumvera kufuula ndi kupempha kwake, kumene kapolo wanu apempha pamaso panu;" 
2Chronicles6:20 kuti maso anu atsegukire nyumba iyi usana ndi usiku, malo amene munanenerako kuti mudzaikako dzina lanu, kuti mumvere pemphero limene kapolo wanu adzapempha kuloza konkuno." 
2Chronicles6:21 Ndipo mverani mapembedzero a kapolo wanu ndi a anthu anu Israele, popemphera iwo kuloza konkuno; ndipo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo, ndipo pakumva Inu, mukhululukire." 
2Chronicles6:22 Munthu akachimwira mnansi wake, ndipo akamuikira lumbiro lakumlumbiritsa, ndipo akadzalumbira ku guwa lanu la nsembe, m'nyumba yino;" 
2Chronicles6:23 pamenepo mumvere m'Mwamba, nimuchite ndi kuweruzira akapolo anu, kumtsutsa woipayo, ndi kumbwezera tchimo lake, ndi kulungamitsa wolungamayo, kumbwezera monga mwa chilungamo chake." 
2Chronicles6:24 Ndipo anthu anu Israele akawakantha mdani chifukwa cha kukuchimwirani, nakabwerera iwowa ndi kuvomereza dzina lanu, ndi kupemphera, ndi kupembedzera pamaso panu m'nyumba yino;" 
2Chronicles6:25 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba, nimukhululukire tchimo la anthu anu Israele, ndi kuwabwezera ku dziko limene munapatsa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles6:26 Mukatsekeka m'mwamba, mopanda mvula, chifukwa cha kukuchimwirani; akapemphera iwo kuloza kumalo kuno, ndi kuvomereza dzina lanu, ndi kutembenuka kwa zoipa zao, pamene muwasautsa;" 
2Chronicles6:27 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba, nimukhululukire tchimo la akapolo anu, ndi la anthu anu Israele, mutawalangiza njira yokoma ayenera kuyendamo, nimutumizire mvula dziko lanu limene munapatsa anthu anu likhale cholowa chao." 
2Chronicles6:28 Mukakhala njala m'dzikomo, mukakhala mliri, mukakhala chinsikwi, kapena chinoni, dzombe, kapena kapuche; akawamangira misasa adani ao, m'dziko la midzi yao; mukakhala mliri uliwonse, kapena nthenda iliyonse;" 
2Chronicles6:29 pemphero ndi pembedzero lililonse likachitika ndi munthu aliyense, kapena ndi anthu anu onse Aisraele, akadziwa yense chinthenda chake, ndi chisoni chake, nakatambasulira manja ake kuloza kunyumba iyi:" 
2Chronicles6:30 pamenepo mumvere m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo, nimukhululukire, ndi kubwezera aliyense monga mwa njira zake zonse, monga mudziwa mtima wake; pakuti Inu, Inu nokha, mudziwa mitima ya ana a anthu;" 
2Chronicles6:31 kuti aope Inu kuyenda m'njira zanu masiku onse akukhala iwo m'dziko limene munapatsa makolo athu. 
2Chronicles6:32 Ndiponso kunena za mlendo wosakhala wa anthu anu Israele, akafumira ku dziko lakutali chifukwa cha dzina lanu lalikulu, ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu, ndi mkono ndi kupemphera kuloza kunyumba iyi;" 
2Chronicles6:33 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo, nimumchitire mlendoyo monga mwa zonse akuitanirani; kuti mitundu yonse ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi adziwe dzina lanu, nakuopeni, monga amatero anthu anu Aisraele; ndi kuti adziwe kuti nyumba iyi ndamangayi itchedwa ndi dzina lanu." 
2Chronicles6:34 Akatulukira kunkhondo anthu anu kuyambana ndi adani ao, kutsata njira iliyonse muwatumiza; nakapemphera kwa Inu kuloza kumudzi uwu munausankha, ndi nyumba iyi ndaimangira dzina lanu;" 
2Chronicles6:35 pamenepo mumvere m'Mwamba pemphero lao ndi pembedzero lao, ndi kulimbitsa mlandu wao." 
2Chronicles6:36 Akachimwira Inu (pakuti palibe munthu wosachimwa), nimukakwiya nao, ndi kuwapereka kwa adani, kuti awatenge andende kunka nao ku dziko lakutali, kapena lapafupi;" 
2Chronicles6:37 koma akalingirira m'mtima mwao kudziko kumene anawatengera andende, nakatembenuka, nakapembedzera Inu m'dziko la undende wao, ndi kuti, Tachimwa, tachita mphulupulu, tachita choipa;" 
2Chronicles6:38 akabwerera kwa Inu ndi mtima wao wonse, ndi moyo wao wonse, m'dziko la undende wao, kumene adawatengera andende; nakapemphera kuloza ku dziko lao limene munapatsa makolo ao, ndi mudzi mudausankha, ndi kunyumba ndamangira dzina lanuyi;" 
2Chronicles6:39 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo pemphero lao ndi pembedzero lao, ndi kulimbitsa mlandu wao; nimukhululukire anthu anu amene anakuchimwirani." 
2Chronicles6:40 Tsopano Mulungu wanga, maso anu akhale chipenyere, ndi makutu anu chimvere, pemphero lochitika pamalo pano." 
2Chronicles6:41 Ndipo tsopano nyamukani, Yehova Mulungu, kudza kopumulira kwanu, Inu ndi likasa la mphamvu yanu; ansembe anu, Yehova Mulungu, avale chipulumutso; ndi okondedwa anu akondwere nazo zabwino." 
2Chronicles6:42 Yehova Mulungu, musabweza nkhope ya wodzozedwa wanu, mukumbukire zachifundo za Davide mtumiki wanu." 
2Chronicles7:1 Atatha tsono Solomoni kupemphera, moto unatsika kumwamba, nunyeketsa nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe zophera; ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unadzaza nyumbayi." 
2Chronicles7:2 Ndipo ansembe sanakhoze kulowa m'nyumba ya Yehova, popeza ulemerero wa Yehova unadzaza nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles7:3 Ndi ana onse a Israele anapenyerera potsika motowo, ndi pokhala ulemerero wa Yehova panyumbayi; nawerama nkhope zao pansi poyalidwa miyala, nalambira, nayamika Yehova, nati, Pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino, pakuti chifundo chake chikhala chikhalire." 
2Chronicles7:4 Pamenepo mfumu ndi anthu onse anapereka nsembe pamaso pa Yehova. 
2Chronicles7:5 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anapereka nsembe ya ng'ombe zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zikwi makumi awiri. Momwemo mfumu ndi anthu onse anapereka nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles7:6 Naimirira ansembe m'udikiro wao; ndi Alevi omwe ndi zoimbira za Yehova, adazipanga Davide mfumu kuyamika nazo Yehova, pakuti chifundo chake chikhala chikhalire, polemekeza Davide mwa utumiki wao; ndi ansembe anaomba malipenga pamaso pao, nakhala chilili Israele yense." 
2Chronicles7:7 Ndipo Solomoni anapatula pakati pake pa bwalo lili pakhomo pa nyumba ya Yehova; pakuti anapereka nsembe zopsereza, ndi mafuta a nsembe zoyamika pomwepo; popeza guwa la nsembe lamkuwa adalipanga Solomoni linachepa kulandira nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe yaufa, ndi mafuta." 
2Chronicles7:8 Nthawi yomweyo Solomoni anachita madyerero masiku asanu ndi awiri, ndi Aisraele onse pamodzi naye, khamu lalikulu ndithu, kuyambira polowera ku Hamati kufikira mtsinje wa ku Ejipito." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ndipo tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu anachita msonkhano woletsa; popeza anachita zakupereka guwa la nsembe masiku asanu ndi awiri, ndi madyerero masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ndipo tsiku la makumi awiri ndi chitatu la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri anawauza anthu apite ku mahema ao, akusekera ndi kukondwera m'mtima mwao chifukwa cha zokoma Yehova adawachitira Davide, ndi Solomoni, ndi Aisraele anthu ake." 
2Chronicles7:11 Momwemo Solomoni anatsiriza nyumba ya Yehova, ndi nyumba ya mfumu; ndipo zilizonse zidalowa mumtima mwake mwa Solomoni kuzichita m'nyumba ya Yehova, ndi m'nyumba yakeyake, anachita mosalakwitsa." 
2Chronicles7:12 Ndipo Yehova anaonekera kwa Solomoni usiku, nanena naye, Ndamva pemphero lako, ndadzisankhira malo ano akhale nyumba ya nsembe." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ndikatseka kumwamba kuti pasakhale mvula, kapena ndikalamulira dzombe lithe za padziko, kapena ndikatumiza mliri mwa anthu anga;" 
2Chronicles7:14 ndipo anthu anga otchedwa dzina langa akadzichepetsa, nakapemphera, nakafuna nkhope yanga, nakatembenuka kuleka njira zao zoipa; pamenepo ndidzamvera m'Mwamba, ndi kukhululukira choipa chao, ndi kuchiritsa dziko lao." 
2Chronicles7:15 Tsopano maso anga adzakhala otsegukira, ndi makutu anga otchera, pemphero la m'malo ano." 
2Chronicles7:16 Pakuti ndasankha ndi kuipatula nyumba iyi, kuti dzina langa likhaleko chikhalire; inde maso anga ndi mtima wanga zidzakhala komweko kosalekeza." 
2Chronicles7:17 Ndipo iwe ukadzayenda pamaso panga monga umo anayendera Davide atate wako, nukachita monga mwa zonse ndakulamulira iwe, nukasunga malemba anga ndi maweruzo anga;" 
2Chronicles7:18 pamenepo ndidzakhazikitsa mpando wachifumu wa ufumu wako, monga ndinapangana ndi Davide atate wako, ndi kuti, Sadzakusowa munthu wokhala mfumu m'Israele." 
2Chronicles7:19 Koma mukabwerera inu, ndi kusiya malemba anga, ndi malamulo anga, amene ndaika pamaso panu, ndi kumuka ndi kutumikira milungu ina ndi kuilambira;" 
2Chronicles7:20 pamenepo ndidzawazula m'dziko langa limene ndinawapatsa; ndi nyumba yino ndinaipatulira dzina langa ndidzaitaya, osaionanso, ndi kuiyesa mwambi ndi mnyozo mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
2Chronicles7:21 Ndi munthu yense wakupita pa nyumba iyi yaitali adzadabwa nayo, nadzati, Yehova anatero ndi dziko lino ndi nyumba yino chifukwa ninji?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Ndipo adzayankha, Popeza anasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao amene anawatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito, nagwira milungu ina, nailambira ndi kuitumikira; chifukwa chake anawagwetsera choipa ichi chonse." 
2Chronicles8:1 Ndipo kunali, zitatha zaka makumi awiri m'mene Solomoni anamanga nyumba ya Yehova, ndi nyumba yakeyake," 
2Chronicles8:2 Solomoni anamanga midzi imene Huramu adampatsa, nakhalitsamo ana a Israele." 
2Chronicles8:3 Ndipo Solomoni anamuka ku Hamatizoba, naugonjetsa." 
2Chronicles8:4 Ndipo anamanga Tadimori m'chipululu, ndi midzi yonse yosungiramo chuma, imene anaimanga m'Hamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Anamanganso Betehoroni wa kumtunda, ndi Betehoroni wa kunsi, midzi ya malinga yokhala nao malinga, zitseko, ndi mipiringidzo;" 
2Chronicles8:6 ndi Baalati, ndi midzi yonse yosungiramo chuma anali nayo Solomoni, ndi midzi yonse ya magaleta ake, ndi midzi ya apakavalo ake, ndi zonse anazifuna Solomoni kuzimanga zomkondweretsa m'Yerusalemu, ndi m'Lebanoni, ndi m'dziko lonse la ufumu wake." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ndipo anthu onse otsala mwa Ahiti, ndi Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi, osati Aisraele," 
2Chronicles8:8 mwa ana ao otsala m'dziko pambuyo pao, amene ana a Israele sanawathe, mwa iwowa Solomoni anawachititsa thangata mpaka lero lino." 
2Chronicles8:9 Koma mwa ana a Israele Solomoni sanawayese akapolo omgwirira ntchito; koma iwowa anali anthu a nkhondo, akazembe ake akulu, ndi akulu a magaleta ake, ndi apakavalo ake." 
2Chronicles8:10 Amenewa anali akulu a akapitao a mfumu Solomoni, ndiwo mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu akulamulira anthu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Ndipo Solomoni anamkweretsa mwana wamkazi wa Farao m'mudzi wa Davide, alowe m'nyumba imene adammangira; pakuti anati, Mkazi wanga asakhale m'nyumba ya Davide mfumu ya Israele; popeza mpopatulika pamene panafika likasa la Yehova." 
2Chronicles8:12 Pamenepo Solomoni anapereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova, limene adalimanga pakhomo pachipinda cholowera," 
2Chronicles8:13 monga momwe mudayenera, tsiku ndi tsiku; napereka monga momwe adauza Mose pamasabata, pokhala mwezi, ndi pa zikondwerero zoikika, katatu m'chaka, pa zikondwerero za Mkate wopanda chotupitsa, ndi pa zikondwerero za Masabata, ndi pa zikondwerero za Misasa." 
2Chronicles8:14 Ndipo anaika monga mwa chiweruzo cha Davide atate wake zigawo za ansembe ku utumiki wao, ndi Alevi ku udikiro wao, kulemekeza Mulungu, ndi kutumikira pamaso pa ansembe, monga munayenera tsiku ndi tsiku; odikira omwe monga mwa zigawo zao ku chipata chilichonse; pakuti momwemo Davide munthu wa Mulungu adamuuza." 
2Chronicles8:15 Ndipo sanapatuke pa lamulo la mfumu la kwa ansembe ndi Alevi, kunena za kanthu kalikonse, kapena za chumachi." 
2Chronicles8:16 Momwemo ntchito yonse ya Solomoni inakonzekeratu tsiku lakuika maziko a nyumba ya Yehova, mpaka anaitsiriza." 
2Chronicles8:17 Pamenepo Solomoni anamuka ku Eziyoni-Gebere, ndi ku Eloti m'mphepete mwa nyanja, m'dziko la Edomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Ndipo Huramu anamtumizira zombo, ndi amalinyero ake, ndi anyamata akudziwa za m'nyanja; ndipo anamuka pamodzi ndi anyamata a Solomoni ku Ofiri, natengako matalente mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu a golide, nabwera nao kwa Solomoni mfumu." 
2Chronicles9:1 Ndipo atamva mfumu yaikazi ya ku Sheba mbiri ya Solomoni, anadza kumuyesera Solomoni ndi miyambi yododometsa ku Yerusalemu, ndi ulendo waukulu, ndi ngamira zosenza zonunkhira, ndi golide wochuluka, ndi timiyala ta mtengo wake; ndipo atafika kwa Solomoni anakamba naye zonse za m'mtima mwake." 
2Chronicles9:2 Ndipo Solomoni anammasulira mau ake onse, panalibe kanthu kombisikira Solomoni, kamene sanammasulire." 
2Chronicles9:3 Ndipo mfumu yaikazi ya ku Sheba ataiona nzeru ya Solomoni, ndi nyumba adaimanga," 
2Chronicles9:4 ndi zakudya za pa gome lake, ndi makhalidwe a anyamata ake, ndi maimiriridwe a atumiki ake, ndi mavalidwe ao, ndi makweredwe ake pokwera iye kunka kunyumba ya Yehova, munalibenso moyo mwa iye." 
2Chronicles9:5 Ndipo anati kwa mfumu, Inali yoona mbiri ija ndidaimva m'dziko langa, ya machitidwe anu, ndi ya nzeru zanu." 
2Chronicles9:6 Koma sindinakhulupirira mau ao mpaka ndinadza, ndaona ndi maso anga; ndipo taonani anandifotokozera dera lina lokha la nzeru zanu zochuluka; mwaonjezatu pa mbiri ndidaimva." 
2Chronicles9:7 Odala anthu anu, ndi odala anyamata anu awa akuima chiimirire pamaso panu, ndi kumva nzeru zanu." 
2Chronicles9:8 Wolemekezeka Yehova Mulungu wanu, wakukondwera nanu, kukuikani pa mpando wachifumu wake, mukhalire Yehova Mulungu wanu mfumu pa anthu ake; popeza Mulungu wanu anakonda Aisraele kuwakhazika kosatha, anakulongani mfumu yao, kuchita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo." 
2Chronicles9:9 Ndipo mkaziyo anapatsa mfumu matalente a golide zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri, ndi zonunkhira zambiri ndithu, ndi timiyala ta mtengo wake; panalibe zonunkhira zina zonga zija mfumu yaikazi ya ku Sheba anapatsa mfumu Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:10 Ndiponso anyamata a Huramu, ndi anyamata a Solomoni otenga golide ku Ofiri, anatenga mitengo yambawa ndi timiyala ta mtengo wapatali." 
2Chronicles9:11 Ndipo mfumu inasema mitengo yambawa ikhale mizati ya nyumba ya Yehova, ndi nyumba ya mfumu, ndi azeze, ndi zisakasa za oimbira; sizinaoneka zotere ndi kale lonse m'dziko la Yuda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anampatsa mfumu yaikazi ya ku Sheba chifuniro chake chonse, chilichonse anachipempha, osawerengera zija adabwera nazo kwa mfumu. Momwemo anabwerera, namuka ku dziko lake, iyeyu ndi anyamata ake." 
2Chronicles9:13 Kulemera kwake tsono kwa golide anafika kwa Solomoni chaka chimodzi ndiko matalente mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi limodzi a golide; 
2Chronicles9:14 osawerenga uja anabwera naye amalonda oyendayenda, ndi amalonda ena; ndipo mafumu onse a Arabiya, ndi akazembe a dziko, anadza naye golide ndi siliva kwa Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:15 Ndipo mfumu Solomoni anapanga zikopa mazana awiri za golide wonsansantha, chikopa chimodzi chinathera golide wonsansantha masekeli mazana awiri." 
2Chronicles9:16 Napanganso malihawo mazana atatu a golide wonsansantha, chikopa chimodzi chinathera masekeli mazana atatu a golide; ndipo mfumu inazilonga m'nyumba yotchedwa Nkhalango ya Lebanoni." 
2Chronicles9:17 Mfumu inapanganso mpando wachifumu waukulu wa minyanga, naukuta ndi golide woona." 
2Chronicles9:18 Ndi mpando wachifumuwo unali nao makwerero asanu ndi limodzi, ndi chopondapo mapazi chagolide, omangika ku mpandowo; ndi ku mbali zonse ziwiri za pokhalirapo kunali manja; ndi mikango iwiri inaimirira m'mbali mwa manjawo." 
2Chronicles9:19 Ndi mikango khumi ndi iwiri inaimirirapo, mbali ina ndi ina, pa makwerero asanu ndi limodzi; sanapangidwe wotere m'ufumu uliwonse." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ndipo zikho zomwera zonse za mfumu Solomoni zinali zagolide, ndi zipangizo zonse za nyumba yotchedwa Nkhalango ya Lebanoni zinali za golide woona; siliva sanayesedwe kanthu m'masiku a Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:21 Pakuti zombo za mfumu zinayenda ku Tarisisi ndi anyamata a Huramu; zombo za ku Tarisisi zinadza kamodzi zitapita zaka zitatu, ndi kubwera nazo golide, ndi siliva, minyanga, ndi apusi, ndi mbalame za zitsukwa zazitali za mawangamawanga." 
2Chronicles9:22 Momwemo mfumu Solomoni inaposa mafumu onse a pa dziko lapansi, kunena za chuma ndi nzeru." 
2Chronicles9:23 Ndipo mafumu onse a pa dziko lapansi anafuna nkhope ya Solomoni, kudzamva nzeru zake Mulungu adazilonga m'mtima mwake." 
2Chronicles9:24 Nabwera nao munthu yense mtulo wake, zipangizo zasiliva, ndi zipangizo zagolide, zovala, ndi zida za nkhondo, ndi mure, akavalo ndi nyuru; momwemo chaka ndi chaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Ndipo Solomoni anali nazo zipinda zikwi zinai za akavalo ndi magaleta, ndi apakavalo zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri; nawaika m'midzi ya magaleta, ndi m'Yerusalemu kwa mfumu." 
2Chronicles9:26 Ndipo analamulira mafumu onse kuyambira ku Yufurate kufikira ku dziko la Afilisti, ndi ku malire a ku Ejipito." 
2Chronicles9:27 Ndipo mfumu inachulukitsa siliva m'Yerusalemu ngati miyala; ndi mikungudza anailinganiza ndi mikuyu ili kumadambo kuchuluka kwake. 
2Chronicles9:28 Ndipo anakamtengera Solomoni akavalo ku Ejipito, ndi ku maiko onse." 
2Chronicles9:29 Machitidwe ena tsono a Solomoni, oyamba ndi otsiriza, sanalembedwa kodi m'buku la mau a Natani mneneri ndi m'zonenera za Ahiya wa ku Silo, ndi m'masomphenya a Ido mlauli za Yerobowamu mwana wa Nebati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Ndipo Solomoni anakhala mfumu ya Israele yense m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi anai. 
2Chronicles9:31 Nagona Solomoni pamodzi ndi makolo ake, naikidwa m'mudzi wa Davide atate wake; ndipo Rehobowamu mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles10:1 Ndipo Rehobowamu anamuka ku Sekemu; pakuti Aisraele onse adadza ku Sekemu kumlonga ufumu. 
2Chronicles10:2 Ndipo kunali, atamva Yerobowamu mwana wa Nebati (popeza anali m'Ejipito kumene adathawira, kuthawa Solomoni mfumu), Yerobowamu anabwera kuchoka ku Ejipito." 
2Chronicles10:3 Ndipo anatuma munthu kukamuitana, nadza Yerobowamu ndi Aisraele onse, nalankhula ndi Rehobowamu, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles10:4 Atate wanu analemeretsa goli lathu; inu tsono pepuzaniko ntchito yolemetsa ya atate wanu, ndi goli lake lolemera anatisenzetsali, ndipo tidzakutumikirani." 
2Chronicles10:5 Ndipo ananena nao, Mubwerenso atapita masiku atatu. Nachoka anthu." 
2Chronicles10:6 Ndipo Rehobowamu mfumu anafunsana ndi akuluakulu, amene anaimirira pamaso pa Solomoni atate wake akali ndi moyo, nati, Mundipangire bwanji, kuti ndiwabwezere mau anthu awa?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ndipo ananena naye, kuti, Mukawachitira chokoma anthu awa, ndi kuwakonda, ndi kulankhula nao mau okoma, adzakhala anyamata anu kosatha." 
2Chronicles10:8 Koma analeka uphungu wa akulu akuluwa adampangirawo, nakafunsana ndi anyamata anakula naye pamodzi, oimirira pamaso pake." 
2Chronicles10:9 Nati nao, Mundipangire bwanji inu, kuti tibwezere mau anthu awa ananena nanewo, ndi kuti, Mupepuze goli limene atate wanu anatisenzetsa ife?" 
2Chronicles10:10 Ndipo anyamatawo adakula naye pamodzi ananena naye, ndi kuti, Muzitero nao anthu awa adalankhula nanu, ndi kuti, Atate wanu analemeretsa goli lathu, koma inu mutipepuzire ilo; muzitero nao, Kanense wanga adzaposa m'chuuno mwa atate wanga." 
2Chronicles10:11 Ndipo tsopano, popeza atate wanga anakusenzetsani goli lolemera, ine ndidzaonjezerapo pa goli lanu; atate wanga anakukwapulani ndi zikoti, koma ine ndidzakukwapulani ndi zinkhanira." 
2Chronicles10:12 Tsono Yerobowamu ndi anthu onse anabwera kwa Rehobowamu tsiku lachitatu, monga mfumu idanena, ndi kuti Bweraninso kwa ine tsiku lachitatu." 
2Chronicles10:13 Ndipo mfumu inawayankha mokalipa, popeza mfumu Rehobowamu analeka uphungu wa akuluakulu," 
2Chronicles10:14 nalankhula nao monga umo anampangira achinyamata, ndi kuti, Atate wanga analemeretsa goli lanu, koma ine ndidzaonjezerapo; atate wanga anakukwapulani ndi zikoti, koma ine ndidzakukwapulani ndi zinkhanira." 
2Chronicles10:15 Momwemo mfumu siinamvera anthuwo; pakuti kusinthaku kudafuma kwa Mulungu, kuti Yehova akhazikitse mau ake, amene ananenetsa Ahiya wa ku Silo kwa Yerobowamu mwana wa Nebati." 
2Chronicles10:16 Ndipo pakuona Aisraele onse kuti mfumu sinawamvera anthuwo, anamyankha mfumu, ndi kuti, Tili naye chiyani Davide? Inde tilibe cholowa m'mwana wa Yese; tiyeni kwathu, Aisraele inu; yang'anira nyumba yako tsopano, Davide. Momwemo Aisraele onse anamuka ku mahema ao." 
2Chronicles10:17 Koma za ana a Israele okhala m'midzi ya Yuda, Rehobowamu anakhalabe mfumu yao." 
2Chronicles10:18 Pamenepo Rehobowamu mfumu inatuma Hadoramu woyang'anira thangata; koma ana a Israele anamponya miyala, nafa. Ndipo Rehobowamu mfumu anafulumira kukwera pa galeta wake kuthawira ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Motero Israele anapandukana nayo nyumba ya Davide mpaka lero lino. 
2Chronicles11:1 Ndipo atafika ku Yerusalemu Rehobowamu, anamemeza a nyumba ya Yuda ndi Benjamini amuna osankhika zikwi zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu, ndiwo ankhondo, alimbane ndi Aisraele kubwezanso ufumu kwa Rehobowamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Koma mau a Yehova anadza kwa Semaya munthu wa Mulunguyo, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles11:3 Lankhula ndi Rehobowamu mwana wa Solomoni mfumu ya Yuda ndi Benjamini, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles11:4 Atero Yehova, Musamuka kukayambana ndi abale anu, bwererani yense kunyumba yake; pakuti chinthu ichi chifuma kwa Ine. Ndipo anamvera mau a Yehova, nabwerera osakayambana ndi Yerobowamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Ndipo Rehobowamu anakhala m'Yerusalemu, namanga midzi yolimbikiramo m'Yuda." 
2Chronicles11:6 Anamangadi Betelehemu, ndi Etamu, ndi Tekowa," 
2Chronicles11:7 ndi Betezuri, ndi Soko, ndi Adulamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 ndi Gati, ndi Maresa, ndi Zifi," 
2Chronicles11:9 ndi Adoraimu, ndi Lakisi, ndi Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 ndi Zora, ndi Ayaloni, ndi Hebroni; ndiyo midzi yamalinga ya m'Yuda ndi Benjamini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Ndipo analimbitsa malingawo, naikamo atsogoleri, ndi chakudya chosungikiratu, ndi mafuta, ndi vinyo." 
2Chronicles11:12 Ndi m'midzi iliyonse anaikamo zikopa ndi mikondo, nailimbitsa chilimbitsire. Ndipo Yuda ndi Benjamini anakhala ake." 
2Chronicles11:13 Ndipo ansembe ndi Alevi okhala m'Israele lonse anadziphatikiza kwa iye, ochokera m'malire ao onse." 
2Chronicles11:14 Pakuti Alevi anasiya podyetsa pao, ndi maiko aoao, nadza ku Yuda ndi ku Yerusalemu; popeza Yerobowamu ndi ana ake anawataya, kuti asachitire Yehova ntchito ya nsembe;" 
2Chronicles11:15 nadziikira ansembe a misanje, ndi a ziwanda, ndi a anaang'ombe adawapanga." 
2Chronicles11:16 Ndipo akuwatsata iwo anadza ku Yerusalemu, ochokera m'mafuko onse a Israele, iwo akupereka mitima yao kufuna Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, kudzaphera Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao nsembe." 
2Chronicles11:17 Momwemo analimbikitsa ufumu wa Yuda, nalimbikitsa Rehobowamu, mwana wa Solomoni zaka zitatu; pakuti anayenda m'njira ya Davide ndi Solomoni zaka zitatu." 
2Chronicles11:18 Ndipo Rehobowamu anadzitengera mkazi Mahalati, mwana wamkazi wa Yerimoti mwana wa Davide, ndi wa Abihaili mwana wamkazi wa Eliyabu mwana wa Yese;" 
2Chronicles11:19 ndipo anambalira ana, Yeusi, ndi Semariya, ndi Zahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ndi pambuyo pake anatenga Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Abisalomu; ndipo anambalira Abiya, ndi Atai, ndi Ziza, ndi Selomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Ndipo Rehobowamu anakonda Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Abisalomu koposa akazi ake onse, ndi akazi ake ang'ono (pakuti adatenga akazi khumi mphambu asanu ndi atatu, ndi akazi aang'ono makumi asanu ndi limodzi, nabala ana amuna makumi awiri mphambu asanu ndi atatu, ndi ana akazi makumi asanu ndi limodzi)." 
2Chronicles11:22 Ndipo Rehobowamu anaika Abiya mwana wa Maaka akhale wamkulu, kalonga mwa abale ake; ndiko kuti adzamlonga ufumu." 
2Chronicles11:23 Ndipo anachita mwanzeru, nabalalitsa ana ake amuna onse m'maiko onse a Yuda ndi Benjamini, kumidzi yonse yamalinga; nawapatsa chakudya chochuluka, nawafunira akazi ochuluka." 
2Chronicles12:1 Ndipo kunachitika, utakhazikika ufumu wa Rehobowamu, nalimbika iye, anasiya chilamulo cha Yehova, ndi Aisraele onse pamodzi naye." 
2Chronicles12:2 Ndipo Rehobowamu atakhala mfumu zaka zinai, Sisake mfumu ya ku Ejipito anakwerera Yerusalemu, popeza iwo adalakwira Yehova." 
2Chronicles12:3 Anakwera ndi magaleta chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri, ndi apakavalo zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ndi anthu adadza naye kutuluka m'Ejipito ngosawerengeka, Alibiya, Asuki, ndi Akusi." 
2Chronicles12:4 Ndipo analanda midzi yamalinga yokhala ya Yuda, nadza ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Pamenepo Semaya mneneri anadza kwa Rehobowamu, ndi kwa akalonga a Yuda, atasonkhana ku Yerusalemu chifukwa cha Sisake, nati nao, Atero Yehova, Inu mwandisiya Ine, chifukwa chake Inenso ndasiya inu m'dzanja la Sisake." 
2Chronicles12:6 Pamenepo akalonga a Israele ndi mfumu anadzichepetsa, nati, Yehova ali wolungama." 
2Chronicles12:7 Ndipo pamene Yehova anaona kuti anadzichepetsa, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Semaya, ndi kuti, Anadzichepetsa; sindidzawaononga; koma katsala kanthawi ndipo ndidzawapatsa chipulumutso, wosatsanulira mkwiyo wanga pa Yerusalemu ndi dzanja la Sisake." 
2Chronicles12:8 Koma adzakhala akapolo ake, kuti adziwe kunditumikira kwanga, ndi kuwatumikira kwa maufumu a maiko." 
2Chronicles12:9 Ndipo Sisake mfumu ya Aejipito anakwerera Yerusalemu, nachotsa chuma cha m'nyumba ya Yehova, ndi chuma cha m'nyumba ya mfumu; anazichotsa zonse; anachotsanso zikopa zagolide adazipanga Solomoni." 
2Chronicles12:10 Ndipo Rehobowamu mfumu anapanga m'malo mwa izi zikopa zamkuwa, nazipereka m'manja mwa kapitao wa olindirira akusunga pakhomo pa nyumba ya mfumu." 
2Chronicles12:11 Ndipo kunatero kuti pakulowa mfumu m'nyumba ya Yehova, anadza olindirira, nazinyamula, nazibwezanso ku chipinda cha olindirira." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ndipo pakudzichepetsa iye mkwiyo wa Yehova unamchokera, kuti usamuononge konse; ndiponso munatsalira zokoma m'Yuda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Nadzilimbitsa Rehobowamu mfumu m'Yerusalemu, nachita ufumu; pakuti Rehobowamu anali wa zaka makumi anai mphambu chimodzi polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri m'Yerusalemu, ndiwo mudzi Yehova adausankha m'mafuko onse a Israele, kuikapo dzina lake; ndipo dzina la make ndiye Naama Mwamoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Koma anachita choipa, popeza sanalunjikitse mtima wake kufuna Yehova." 
2Chronicles12:15 Machitidwe ake tsono a Rehobowamu, zoyamba ndi zotsiriza, sizinalembedwa kodi m'buku la machitidwe a Semaya mneneriyo, ndi la Ido mlauliyo, lakunena za zibadwidwe? Ndipo panali nkhondo pakati pa Rehobowamu ndi Yerobowamu masiku onse." 
2Chronicles12:16 Nagona Rehobowamu ndi makolo ake, naikidwa m'mudzi wa Davide; ndipo Abiya mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles13:1 Ndipo chaka chakhumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu cha Yerobowamu, Abiya analowa ufumu wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Anakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka zitatu; ndi dzina la make ndiye Mikaya mwana wamkazi wa Uriyele wa ku Gibea. Ndipo panali nkhondo pakati pa Abiya ndi Yerobowamu. 
2Chronicles13:3 Ndipo Abiya anayambana nkhondo ali ndi khamu la ngwazi za nkhondo, amuna osankhika zikwi mazana anai; Yerobowamu atandandalitsa nkhondo yake ilimbane naye ndi amuna osankhika zikwi mazana asanu ndi atatu, ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu." 
2Chronicles13:4 Ndipo Abiya anaimirira pa phiri la Zemaraimu, ndilo ku mapiri a Efuremu, nati, Mundimvere Yerobowamu ndi Aisraele onse;" 
2Chronicles13:5 simudziwa kodi kuti Yehova Mulungu wa Israele anapereka chiperekere ufumu wa Israele kwa Davide, kwa iye ndi ana ake, ndi pangano lamchere?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Koma Yerobowamu mwana wa Nebati mnyamata wa Solomoni mwana wa Davide anauka, napandukana ndi mbuye wake." 
2Chronicles13:7 Ndipo anamsonkhanira amuna achabe, anthu opanda pake, ndiwo anadzilimbikitsa kutsutsana naye Rehobowamu mwana wa Solomoni, muja Rehobowamu anali mnyamata ndi woolowa mtima, wosakhoza kuwalaka." 
2Chronicles13:8 Ndipo tsopano, mukuti mudzilimbikitse kutsutsana nao ufumu wa Yehova m'dzanja la ana a Davide; ndinu aunyinji ambiri, ndi pamodzi nanu anaang'ombe agolide adawapanga Yerobowamu akhale milungu yanu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Simunapirikitsa kodi ansembe a Yehova, ana a Aroni, ndi Alevi, ndi kudziikira ansembe monga amachita anthu a m'maiko ena? Kuti aliyense wakudza kudzipatulira ndi mwanawang'ombe, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri, yemweyo ndiye wansembe wa iyo yosati milungu." 
2Chronicles13:10 Koma ife, Yehova ndiye Mulungu wathu, sitinamsiya Iye; ndi ansembe tili nao akutumikira Yehova ana a Aroni, ndi Alevi, m'ntchito mwao," 
2Chronicles13:11 nafukizira Yehova nsembe zopsereza m'mawa ndi m'mawa, ndi madzulo onse, ndi zonunkhira za fungo lokoma, nakonza mkate woonekera pa gome lopatulika, ndi choikapo nyali chagolide ndi nyali zake, ziyake madzulo onse; pakuti tisunga chilangizo cha Yehova Mulungu wathu, koma inu mwamsiya Iye." 
2Chronicles13:12 Ndipo taonani, Mulungu ali nafe, wotitsogolera ndi ansembe ake, ndi malipenga oliza nao chokweza, kukulizirani inu chokweza. Ana a Israele inu, musalimbane naye Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu; pakuti simudzapindula nako." 
2Chronicles13:13 Koma Yerobowamu anazunguliritsa owalalira, awadzere kumbuyo; momwemo iwowa anali kumaso kwa Yuda, ndi owalalira anali kumbuyo kwao." 
2Chronicles13:14 Ndipo pocheuka Yuda, taonani, nkhondo inayambana nao kumaso ndi kumbuyo; nafuulira iwo kwa Yehova, ndi ansembe analiza malipenga." 
2Chronicles13:15 Pamenepo amuna a Yuda anafuula chokweza; ndipo pofuula amuna a Yuda, kunachitika kuti Mulungu anakantha Yerobowamu ndi Aisraele onse pamaso pa Abiya ndi Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Ndipo ana a Israele anathawa pamaso pa Yuda, nawapereka Mulungu m'dzanja lao." 
2Chronicles13:17 Ndipo Abiya ndi anthu ake anawakantha makanthidwe akulu; nagwa, nafa amuna osankhika zikwi mazana asanu a Israele." 
2Chronicles13:18 Momwemo anachepetsedwa ana a Israele nthawi ija, nalakika ana a Yuda; popeza anatama Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles13:19 Ndipo Abiya analondola Yerobowamu, namlanda midzi yake, Betele ndi milaga yake, ndi Yesana ndi milaga yake, ndi Efuroni ndi milaga yake." 
2Chronicles13:20 Ndi Yerobowamu sanaonenso mphamvu m'masiku a Abiya, namkantha Yehova, nafa iye." 
2Chronicles13:21 Koma Abiya anakula mphamvu, nadzitengera akazi khumi ndi anai, nabala ana amuna makumi awiri mphambu awiri, ndi ana akazi khumi mphamvu asanu ndi mmodzi." 
2Chronicles13:22 Machitidwe ena tsono a Abiya, ndi mayendedwe ake, ndi mau ake, alembedwa m'buku lomasulira la mneneri Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Momwemo Abiya anagona ndi makolo ake, ndipo anamuika m'mudzi wa Davide; ndi Asa mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake; m'masiku ake dziko linaona bata zaka khumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Ndipo Asa anachita chokoma ndi choyenera m'maso mwa Yehova Mulungu wake," 
2Chronicles14:3 nachotsa maguwa a nsembe achilendo, ndi misanje; naphwanya zoimiritsa zao, nalikha zifanizo zao," 
2Chronicles14:4 nauza Yuda afune Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, ndi kuchita chilamulo ndi chowauza Iye." 
2Chronicles14:5 Anachotsanso m'midzi yonse ya Yuda misanje, ndi zifanizo za dzuwa; ndi ufumuwo unachita bata pamaso pake." 
2Chronicles14:6 Ndipo anamanga midzi yamalinga m'Yuda; pakuti dziko linachita bata, analibe nkhondo iyeyu zaka zija, popeza Yehova anampumulitsa." 
2Chronicles14:7 Ndipo anati kwa Yuda, Timange midzi iyi ndi kuizingira malinga, ndi nsanja, zitseko, ndi mipiringidzo; dziko likali pamaso pathu, popeza tafuna Yehova Mulungu wathu; tamfuna Iye, natipatsa mpumulo pozungulira ponse. Momwemo anamanga mosavutika." 
2Chronicles14:8 Ndipo Asa anali nao ankhondo ogwira zikopa ndi mikondo, a m'Yuda zikwi mazana atatu; ndi a m'Benjamini ogwira malihawo ndi okoka mauta zikwi mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu; onsewo ngwazi zamphamvu." 
2Chronicles14:9 Ndipo anawatulukira Zera Mkusi ndi ankhondo zikwi chikwi chimodzi, ndi magaleta mazana atatu; nafika iye ku Maresa." 
2Chronicles14:10 Natuluka Asa pamaso pake, nanika nkhondoyi m'chigwa cha Zefati ku Maresa." 
2Chronicles14:11 Ndipo Asa anafuulira kwa Yehova Mulungu wake, nati, Yehova, palibe wina ngati Inu, kuthandiza pakati pa wamphamvu ndi iye wopanda mphamvu; tithandizeni Yehova Mulungu wathu, titama Inu, tatulukira aunyinji awa m'dzina lanu. Yehova, Inu ndinu Mulungu wathu, munthu asakukanikeni." 
2Chronicles14:12 Ndipo Yehova anakantha Akusi pamaso pa Asa ndi Yuda, nathawa Akusi." 
2Chronicles14:13 Ndi Asa ndi anthu anali naye anawalondola mpaka ku Gerari, nagwa Akusi ambiri osalimbikanso mphamvu iwowa; pakuti anathyoledwa pamaso pa Yehova ndi ankhondo ake; ndipo anatenga zofunkha zambiri." 
2Chronicles14:14 Ndipo anakantha midzi yonse pozungulira pake pa Gerari; pakuti mantha ochokera kwa Yehova anawagwera; ndipo anafunkha m'midzi monse, pakuti mudachuluka zofunkha m'menemo." 
2Chronicles14:15 Anakanthanso a m'mahema a ng'ombe, nalanda nkhosa zochuluka, ndi ngamira; nabwerera kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Pamenepo mzimu wa Mulungu unagwera Azariya mwana wa Odedi," 
2Chronicles15:2 ndipo anatuluka kukomana naye Asa, nanena naye, Mundimvere, Asa, ndi onse Ayuda ndi Abenjamini, Yehova ali nanu; mukakhala ndi Iye, mukamfuna Iye, mudzampeza; koma mukamsiya, adzakusiyani." 
2Chronicles15:3 Masiku ambiri tsono Israele anakhala wopanda Mulungu woonayo, ndi wopanda wansembe wakuphunzitsa, ndi wopanda chilamulo;" 
2Chronicles15:4 koma pamene anatembenukira kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israele m'kusautsidwa kwao, ndi kumfuna, anampeza." 
2Chronicles15:5 Ndipo nthawi zija panalibe mtendere kwa iye wakutuluka, kapena kwa iye wakulowa, koma mavuto aakulu anagwera onse okhala m'maikomo." 
2Chronicles15:6 Ndipo anapasulidwa, mtundu wa anthu kupasula unzake, ndi mudzi kupasula mudzi; pakuti Mulungu anawavuta ndi masautso ali onse." 
2Chronicles15:7 Koma limbikani inu, manja anu asalende; pakuti ku ntchito yanu kuli mphotho." 
2Chronicles15:8 Ndipo pakumva Asa mau awa, ndi chinenero cha Odedi mneneriyo, analimbika mtima, nachotsa zonyansazo m'dziko lonse la Yuda ndi Benjamini, ndi m'midzi adailanda ku mapiri a Efuremu; nakonza guwa la nsembe la Yehova lokhala pakhomo pachipinda cholowera cha nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles15:9 Namemeza onse a m'Yuda ndi m'Benjamini, ndi iwo akukhala nao ochokera ku Efuremu, ndi Manase, ndi Simeoni; pakuti anamdzera ochuluka ochokera ku Israele, pamene anaona kuti Yehova Mulungu wake anali naye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Ndipo anasonkhana ku Yerusalemu mwezi wachitatu, Asa atakhala mfumu zaka khumi ndi zinai." 
2Chronicles15:11 Naphera Yehova nsembe tsiku lija za zofunkha adabwera nazo, ng'ombe mazana asanu ndi awiri, ndi nkhosa zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
2Chronicles15:12 Nalowa chipangano chakufuna Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao ndi mtima wao wonse, ndi moyo wao wonse;" 
2Chronicles15:13 ndi kuti yense wosafuna Yehova Mulungu wa Israele aphedwe, ngakhale wamng'ono kapena wamkulu, wamwamuna kapena wamkazi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Ndipo analumbira kwa Yehova ndi mau akulu, ndi kufuula ndi mphalasa ndi malipenga." 
2Chronicles15:15 Ndipo Yuda yense anakondwera nalo lumbirolo; pakuti adalumbira ndi mtima wao wonse, namfunafuna ndi chifuno chao chonse; ndipo anampeza; ndi Yehova anawapumulitsa pozungulirapo." 
2Chronicles15:16 Maaka yemwe, mai wake wa Asa, mfumu, namchotsa uyu asakhalenso mai wa ufumu, popeza anapanga fanizo lolaula; ndipo Asa analikha fanizolo, naliphwanyaphwanya, nalitenthera ku mtsinje wa Kidroni." 
2Chronicles15:17 Chinkana misanje siinachotsedwa m'Israele, mtima wa Asa unali wangwiro masiku ake onse." 
2Chronicles15:18 Ndipo analowa nazo zopatulika za atate wake, ndi zopatulika zakezake, kunyumba ya Mulungu; ndizo siliva, ndi golide, ndi zipangizo." 
2Chronicles15:19 Ndipo panalibenso nkhondo mpaka Asa atakhala mfumu zaka makumi atatu mphambu zinai. 
2Chronicles16:1 Chaka cha makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi cha Asa, Baasa mfumu ya Israele anakwera kulimbana ndi Yuda, namangitsa Rama, kuwaletsa anthu asatuluke kapena kulowa kwa Asa mfumu ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Pamenepo Asa anatulutsa siliva ndi golide ku chuma cha nyumba ya Yehova, ndi cha nyumba ya mfumu; nazitumiza kwa Benihadadi mfumu ya Aramu, yokhala ku Damasiko, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles16:3 Pakhale pangano pakati pa ine ndi inu, monga pakati pa atate wanga ndi atate wanu; taonani, ndakutumizirani siliva ndi golide; mukani, pasulani pangano lanu ndi Baasa mfumu ya Israele, kuti andichokere." 
2Chronicles16:4 Ndipo Benihadadi anamvera mfumu Asa natumiza akazembe a magulu ake a nkhondo ayambane ndi midzi ya Israele, nakantha Iyoni, ndi Dani, ndi Abele-Maimu, ndi midzi yonse ya chuma ya Nafutali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Ndipo kunali, pakumva ichi Baasa, analeka kumangitsa Rama, naleketsa ntchito yake." 
2Chronicles16:6 Pamenepo Asa mfumu anatenga Ayuda onse, ndipo anatuta miyala ya ku Rama, ndi mitengo yake, imene Baasa adamanga nayo, namangira Geba ndi Mizipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Nthawi yomweyi Hanani mlauli anadza kwa Asa mfumu ya Yuda, nanena naye, Popeza mwatama mfumu ya Aramu, osatama Yehova Mulungu wanu, chifukwa chake khamu la nkhondo la mfumu ya Aramu lapulumuka m'dzanja lanu." 
2Chronicles16:8 Nanga Akusi ndi Alibiya, sanakhale khamu lalikulukulu, ndi magaleta ndi apakavalo ambirimbiri, koma muja munatama Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja mwanu?" 
2Chronicles16:9 Pakuti maso a Yehova ayang'ana uko ndi uko m'dziko lonse lapansi, kudzionetsera wamphamvu kwa iwo amene mtima wao uli wangwiro ndi Iye. Mwachita chopusa m'menemo; pakuti kuyambira tsopano mudzaona nkhondo." 
2Chronicles16:10 Koma Asa anakwiya naye mlauliyo, namuika m'kaidi; pakuti adapsa mtima naye chifukwa cha ichi. Nthawi yomweyi Asa anasautsa anthu ena." 
2Chronicles16:11 Ndipo taonani, zochita Asa, zoyamba ndi zotsiriza, zalembedwa m'buku la mafumu a Yuda ndi Israele." 
2Chronicles16:12 Ndipo Asa atakhala mfumu zaka makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu, anadwala nthenda ya mapazi, nikuladi nthendayi; koma podwala iye sanafune Yehova, koma asing'anga." 
2Chronicles16:13 Nagona Asa ndi makolo ake, namwalira atakhala mfumu zaka makumi anai." 
2Chronicles16:14 Ndipo anamuika m'manda ake adadzisemerawo m'mudzi wa Davide, namgoneka pa kama wodzala ndi zonunkhira za mitundumitundu, monga mwa makonzedwe a osanganiza; ndipo anampserezera zopsereza zambiri." 
2Chronicles17:1 Ndipo Yehosafati mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake, nadzilimbitsa kuyambana ndi Israele." 
2Chronicles17:2 Naika ankhondo m'midzi yonse yamalinga ya Yuda, naika aboma m'dziko la Yuda, ndi m'midzi ya Efuremu, imene adailanda Asa atate wake." 
2Chronicles17:3 Ndipo Yehova anali ndi Yehosafati, popeza anayenda m'njira zake zoyamba za kholo lake Davide, osafuna Abaala;" 
2Chronicles17:4 koma anafuna Mulungu wa kholo lake nayenda m'malamulo ake, osatsata machitidwe a Israele." 
2Chronicles17:5 Chifukwa chake Yehova anakhazikitsa ufumuwo m'dzanja lake, ndi onse Ayuda anabwera nayo mitulo kwa Yehosafati; ndipo zidamchulukira chuma ndi ulemu." 
2Chronicles17:6 Ndi mtima wake unakwezeka m'njira za Yehova; anachotsanso misanje ndi zifanizo m'Yuda. 
2Chronicles17:7 Chaka chachitatu cha ufumu wake anatuma akalonga ake, ndiwo Benihayili, ndi Obadiya, ndi Zekariya, ndi Netanele, ndi Mikaya, aphunzitse m'midzi ya Yuda;" 
2Chronicles17:8 ndi pamodzi nao Alevi, ndiwo Semaya, ndi Netaniya, ndi Zebadiya, ndi Asahele, ndi Semiramoti, ndi Yehonatani, ndi Adoniya, ndi Tobiya, ndi Tobadoniya, Alevi; ndi pamodzi nao Elisama ndi Yehoramu, ansembe." 
2Chronicles17:9 Ndipo anaphunzitsa m'Yuda ali nalo buku la chilamulo la Yehova, nayendayenda m'midzi yonse ya Yuda, naphunzitsa mwa anthu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Ndipo kuopsa kwa Yehova kunagwera maufumu a maiko ozungulira Yuda; momwemo sanayambane ndi Yehosafati. 
2Chronicles17:11 Ndipo Afilisti ena anabwera nazo kwa Yehosafati mitulo, ndi ndalama za msonkho; Aarabu omwe anabwera nazo kwa iye zoweta, nkhosa zamphongo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri ndi atonde zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri." 
2Chronicles17:12 Ndipo Yehosafati anakula chikulire, namanga m'Yuda nyumba zansanja, ndi midzi ya chuma." 
2Chronicles17:13 Nakhala nazo ntchito zambiri m'midzi ya Yuda, ndi anthu a nkhondo, ngwazi zamphamvu m'Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles17:14 Kuwerenga kwao monga mwa nyumba za atate ao ndiko: a Yuda, akulu a zikwi; Adina wamkulu, ndi pamodzi ndi iye ngwazi zamphamvu zikwi mazana atatu;" 
2Chronicles17:15 ndi wotsatana naye mkulu Yehohanani, ndi pamodzi ndi iye zikwi mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu;" 
2Chronicles17:16 ndi wotsatana naye Amasiya mwana wa Zikiri, wodzipereka kwa Yehova mwaufulu, ndi pamodzi ndi iye ngwazi zamphamvu zikwi mazana awiri;" 
2Chronicles17:17 ndi a Benjamini: Eliyada ngwazi yamphamvu, ndi pamodzi ndi iye zikwi mazana awiri ogwira mauta ndi zikopa;" 
2Chronicles17:18 wotsatana naye Yehozabadi, ndi pamodzi ndi iye okonzekeratu kunkhondo zikwi zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu." 
2Chronicles17:19 Ndiwo amene analindirira mfumu, osawerenga iwo aja mfumu adawaika m'midzi yamalinga m'Yuda monse." 
2Chronicles18:1 Yehosafati tsono anali nacho chuma ndi ulemu zomchulukira, nachita chibale ndi Ahabu." 
2Chronicles18:2 Ndipo zitatha zaka zina, anatsikira kwa Ahabu ku Samariya. Ndi Ahabu anamphera iye ndi anthu anali naye nkhosa, ndi ng'ombe zochuluka; namnyenga akwere naye pamodzi ku Ramoti Giliyadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Nati Ahabu mfumu ya Israele kwa Yehosafati mfumu ya Yuda, Mupita nane kodi ku Ramoti Giliyadi? Nayankha, nati, Monga inu momwemo ine; monga anthu anu momwemo anthu anga; tidzakhala nanu ku nkhondoyi." 
2Chronicles18:4 Ndipo Yehosafati anati kwa mfumu ya Israele, Funsiranitu mau a Yehova lero lino." 
2Chronicles18:5 Pamenepo mfumu ya Israele anamemeza aneneri amuna mazana anai, nanena nao, Kodi timuke kunkhondo ku Ramoti Giliyadi kapena ndileke? Ndipo anati, Kweraniko, pakuti Mulungu adzaupereka m'dzanja la mfumu." 
2Chronicles18:6 Koma Yehosafati anati, Kulibenso kuno mneneri wa Yehova, kuti tifunsire kwa iye?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Ndipo mfumu ya Israele inati kwa Yehosafati, Atsalanso munthu mmodzi, tifunsire Yehova kwa iye; koma ndimuda, pakuti sandinenera ine kanthu kokoma, koma zoipa nthawi zonse, ndiye Mikaya mwana wa Imila. Nati Yehosafati, Isatero mfumu." 
2Chronicles18:8 Pamenepo mfumu ya Israele inaitana mdindo, niti, Katenge msanga Mikaya mwana wa Imila." 
2Chronicles18:9 Mfumu ya Israele tsono ndi Yehosafati mfumu ya Yuda anakhala yense pa mpando wachifumu wake, ovala zovala zachifumu zao, nakhala pamalo popondera mphesa pakhomo pa chipata cha Samariya; ndi aneneri onse ananenera pamaso pao." 
2Chronicles18:10 Ndipo Zedekiya mwana wa Kenana anadzisulira nyanga zachitsulo, nati, Atero Yehova, Ndi izi udzagunda Aaramu mpaka adatha psiti." 
2Chronicles18:11 Ndi aneneri onse ananenera momwemo, ndi kuti, Kwerani ku Ramoti Giliyadi, mudzapindulako; pakuti Yehova adzaupereka m'dzanja la mfumu." 
2Chronicles18:12 Ndipo mthenga wakukaitana Mikaya ananena naye, ndi kuti, Taonani, mau a aneneri anenera mfumu chokoma ngati m'kamwa mmodzi; mau anu tsono akhaletu ngati amodzi a iwowa, nimunene chokoma." 
2Chronicles18:13 Nati Mikaya, Pali Yehova, chonena Mulungu wanga ndidzanena chomwechi." 
2Chronicles18:14 Pamene anafika kwa mfumu, mfumu inanena naye, Mikaya timuke ku Ramoti Giliyadi kunkhondo kodi, kapena ndileke? Nati iye, Kwerani, mudzachita mwai; ndipo adzaperekedwa m'dzanja lanu." 
2Chronicles18:15 Ndipo mfumu inati naye, Ndikulumbiritse kangati kuti unene nane choonadi chokhachokha m'dzina la Yehova?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Nati iye, Ndinaona Aisraele onse obalalika pamapiri ngati nkhosa zopanda mbusa; nati Yehova, Awa alibe mbuye wao, abwerere yense kunyumba yake mumtendere." 
2Chronicles18:17 Ndipo mfumu ya Israele inati kwa Yehosafati, Sindinakuuzani kuti sadzandinenera zabwino koma zoipa?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Nati iye, Chifukwa chake tamvani mau a Yehova, Ndinaona Yehova alikukhala pa mpando wake wachifumu, ndi khamu lonse lakumwamba lilikuima pa dzanja lake lamanja, ndi pa dzanja lake lamanzere." 
2Chronicles18:19 Nati Yehova, Adzamnyenga Ahabu mfumu ya Israele ndani, kuti akwereko, nagwe ku Ramoti Giliyadi? Nati wina mwakuti, wina mwakuti." 
2Chronicles18:20 Ndipo unatuluka mzimu, nuima pamaso pa Yehova, nuti, Ndidzamnyenga ndine. Ndipo Yehova, ananena nao, Ndi chiyani?" 
2Chronicles18:21 Nuti uwu, Ndidzatuluka ndi kukhala mzimu wonama m'kamwa mwa aneneri ake onse. Nati Iye, Udzamnyengadi, nudzakhoza; tuluka, ukatero kumene." 
2Chronicles18:22 Ndipo tsono taonani, Yehova analonga mzimu wabodza m'kamwa mwa aneneri anu awa, nakunenetserani choipa Yehova." 
2Chronicles18:23 Pamenepo Zedekiya mwana wa Kenana anayandikira, nampanda Mikaya patsaya, nati, Mzimu wa Yehova wandichokera bwanji kulankhula ndi iwe?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Nati Mikaya, Tapenya, udzaona tsiku lolowa iwe m'chipinda cham'kati kubisala." 
2Chronicles18:25 Ndipo mfumu ya Israele inati, Mumtenge Mikaya, mukambweze kwa Amoni kazembe wa mudzi, ndi kwa Yowasi mwana wa mfumu;" 
2Chronicles18:26 nimuziti, Itero mfumu, Mumuike uyu m'kaidi, ndi kumdyetsa chakudya chomsautsa, ndi kumwetsa madzi omsautsa, mpaka ndikabwera mumtendere." 
2Chronicles18:27 Nati Mikaya, Mukakabwera ndi mtendere konse, Yehova sananene mwa ine. Nati iye, Tamverani, anthu inu nonsenu." 
2Chronicles18:28 Momwemo mfumu ya Israele ndi Yehosafati mfumu ya Yuda anakwera kunka ku Ramoti Giliyadi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Ndi mfumu ya Israele inati kwa Yehosafati, Ndidzadzizimbaitsa ndi kulowa kunkhondo, koma inu valani zovala zanu. Nidzizimbaitsa mfumu ya Israele, namuka iwo kunkhondo." 
2Chronicles18:30 Mfumu ya Aramu tsono idauza akapitao a magaleta ake, ndi kuti, Musayambana ndi ang'ono kapena akulu, koma ndi mfumu ya Israele yekha." 
2Chronicles18:31 Ndipo kunali, pamene akapitao a magaleta anaona Yehosafati, anati, Ndiye mfumu ya Israele. Potero anamtembenukira kuyambana naye; koma Yehosafati anafuula, namthandiza Yehova; ndipo Mulungu anawapatukitsa amleke." 
2Chronicles18:32 Ndipo kunali, pamene akapitao a magaleta anaona kuti sanali mfumu ya Israele anabwerera osamtsatanso." 
2Chronicles18:33 Ndipo munthu anaponya muvi wake chiponyeponye, nalasa mfumu ya Israeleyo pakati pa maluma a malaya ake achitsulo. Potero anati kwa woyendetsa galetayo, Tembenuza dzanja lako, nundichotse kukhamu la nkhondo kuno, pakuti ndalasidwa." 
2Chronicles18:34 Ndipo nkhondo inakula tsiku lija; koma mfumu ya Israele inagwirizizika m'galeta wake popenyana ndi Aaramu mpaka madzulo, namwalira nthawi yakulowa dzuwa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Ndipo Yehosafati mfumu ya Yuda anabwerera kunyumba yake ku Yerusalemu mumtendere. 
2Chronicles19:2 Natuluka Yehu mwana wa Hanani mlauli kukomana naye, nati kwa mfumu Yehosafati, Muyenera kodi kuthandiza zoipa, ndi kukonda amene adana ndi Yehova? Chifukwa cha ichi ukugwerani mkwiyo wochokera kwa Yehova." 
2Chronicles19:3 Koma zapezeka zokoma mwa inu, popeza mwazichotsa zifanizo m'dzikomo, mwalunjikitsanso mtima wanu kufuna Mulungu." 
2Chronicles19:4 Ndipo Yehosafati anakhala ku Yerusalemu, natulukiranso mwa anthu kuyambira ku Beereseba kufikira ku mapiri a Efuremu; nawabweza atsatenso Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles19:5 Naika oweruza m'dziko, m'midzi yonse yamalinga ya m'Yuda, mudzi ndi mudzi;" 
2Chronicles19:6 nati kwa oweruza, Khalani maso umo muchitira; pakuti simuweruzira anthu koma Yehova; ndipo ali nanu Iyeyu pakuweruza mlandu." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ndipo tsono, kuopa Yehova kukhale pa inu, musamalire ndi kuchita; pakuti palibe chosalungama kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu, kapena kusamalira monga mwa nkhope ya munthu, kapena kulandira mphatso." 
2Chronicles19:8 Yehosafati anaikanso m'Yerusalemu Alevi, ndi ansembe ena, ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo m'Israele, aweruzire Yehova, nanena milandu. Ndipo anabwerera kudza ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles19:9 Ndipo anawalangiza, ndi kuti, Muzitero ndi kuopa Yehova mokhulupirika ndi mtima wangwiro." 
2Chronicles19:10 Ndipo ukakudzerani mlandu uliwonse wochokera kwa abale anu okhala m'midzi mwao, kusiyanitsa pakati pa mwazi ndi mwazi, pakati pa chilamulo ndi chiuzo, malemba ndi maweruzo, muwachenjeze kuti asapalamule kwa Yehova, angafikitsire inu nokha ndi abale anu mkwiyo; muzitero, ndipo simudzapalamula." 
2Chronicles19:11 Ndipo taonani, Amariya wansembe wamkulu, ndiye mkulu wanu m'milandu yonse ya Yehova; ndi Zebadiya mwana wa Ismaele, wolamulira nyumba ya Yuda, m'milandu yonse ya mfumu; ndi Alevi akhale akapitao pamaso panu. Chitani molimbika mtima, ndipo Yehova akhale ndi abwino." 
2Chronicles20:1 Ndipo zitatha izi, kunachitika kuti ana a Mowabu, ndi ana a Amoni, ndi ena pamodzi ndi Aamoni, anadza kuyambana nkhondo ndi Yehosafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Pamenepo anadza anthu akuuza Yehosafati, kuti, Ukudzerani unyinji waukulu wa anthu ochokera tsidya la nyanja ku Aramu; ndipo taonani, ali ku Hazazoni-Tamara, ndiwo Engedi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Ndipo Yehosafati anachita mantha, nalunjikitsa nkhope yake kufuna Yehova, nalalikira kusala mwa Ayuda onse." 
2Chronicles20:4 Namemezedwa Yuda afunsire kwa Yehova, inde anachokera kumidzi yonse ya Yuda kufuna Yehova." 
2Chronicles20:5 Ndipo Yehosafati anaima mu msonkhano wa Ayuda, ndi a ku Yerusalemu, kunyumba ya Yehova, pakati pa bwalo latsopano;" 
2Chronicles20:6 nati, Yehova Mulungu wa makolo athu, Inu sindinu Mulungu wa m'Mwamba kodi? Sindinu woweruza maufumu onse a amitundu kodi? Ndi m'dzanja mwanu muli mphamvu yolimba; palibe wina wakulimbana ndi Inu." 
2Chronicles20:7 Sindinu Mulungu wathu, amene munainga nzika za m'dziko muno pa maso pa ana anu Israele, ndi kulininkha kwa mbeu ya Abrahamu bwenzi lanu kosatha?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Nakhala m'mwemo iwowa, nakumangirani m'mwemo malo opatulika a dzina lanu, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles20:9 Chikatigwera choipa, lupanga, chiweruzo, kapena mliri, kapena njala, tidzakhala chilili pakhomo pa nyumba iyi, ndi pamaso panu, (pakuti m'nyumba muno muli dzina lanu), ndi kufuulira kwa Inu m'kusauka kwathu; ndipo mudzamvera ndi kulanditsa." 
2Chronicles20:10 Ndipo tsopano, taonani ana a Amoni, ndi Mowabu, ndi a kuphiri la Seiri, amene simunalola Israele awalowere, pakutuluka iwo m'dziko la Ejipito, koma anawapatukira osawaononga;" 
2Chronicles20:11 tapenyani, m'mene atibwezera, kudzatiinga m'cholowa chanu, chimene munatipatsa chikhale cholowa chathu." 
2Chronicles20:12 Mulungu wathu, simudzawaweruza? Pakuti mwa ife mulibe mphamvu yakulimbana nao aunyinji ambiri awa akutidzera; ndipo sitidziwa ngati tidzatani, koma maso athu ali kwa Inu." 
2Chronicles20:13 Ndipo Ayuda onse anakhala chilili pamaso pa Yehova, pamodzi ndi makanda ao, akazi ao, ndi ana ao." 
2Chronicles20:14 Pamenepo mzimu wa Yehova unagwera Yahaziele mwana wa Zekariya, mwana wa Benaya, mwana wa Yeiyele, mwana wa Mataniya, Mlevi, wa ana a Asafu, pakati pa msonkhano;" 
2Chronicles20:15 nati iye, Tamverani Ayuda inu nonse, ndi inu okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi inu mfumu Yehosafati, atero nanu Yehova, Musaope musatenge nkhawa chifukwa cha aunyinji ambiri awa; pakuti nkhondoyi si yanu, koma ya Mulungu." 
2Chronicles20:16 Mawa muwatsikire; taonani, akwera pokwerera pa Zizi, mudzakomana nao polekezera chigwa chakuno cha chipululu cha Yeruwele." 
2Chronicles20:17 Si kwanu kuchita nkhondo kuno ai; chilimikani, imani, nimupenye chipulumutso cha Yehova pa inu Yuda ndi Yerusalemu; musaope, kapena kutenga nkhawa; mawa muwatulukire, popeza Yehova ali ndi inu." 
2Chronicles20:18 Ndipo Yehosafati anawerama mutu wake, nkhope yake pansi; ndi Ayuda onse, ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu anagwa pansi pamaso pa Yehova, nalambira Yehova." 
2Chronicles20:19 Ndipo Alevi, a ana a Akohati, ndi a ana a Kora, anauka kulemekeza Yehova Mulungu wa Israele ndi mau omveketsa." 
2Chronicles20:20 Nalawira mamawa, natuluka kunka kuchipululu cha Tekowa; ndipo potuluka iwo, Yehosafati anakhala chilili, nati, Mundimvere ine, Ayuda inu, ndi inu okhala m'Yerusalemu, limbikani mwa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndipo mudzakhazikika; khulupirirani aneneri ake, ndipo mudzalemerera." 
2Chronicles20:21 Ndipo atafunsana ndi anthu, anaika oimbira Yehova, ndi kulemekeza chiyero chokometsetsa, pakutuluka iwo kutsogolera khamu la nkhondo, ndi kuti, Yamikani Yehova, pakuti chifundo chake chikhala chosatha." 
2Chronicles20:22 Ndipo poyamba iwo kuimba, ndi kulemekeza Yehova, anaika olalira alalire Aamoni, Amowabu, ndi a m'phiri la Seiri, akudzera Ayuda; ndipo anawakantha." 
2Chronicles20:23 Pakuti ana a Amoni, ndi a Mowabu, anaukira okhala m'phiri la Seiri, kuwapha ndi kuwaononga psiti; ndipo atatha okhala m'Seiri, anasandulikirana kuonongana." 
2Chronicles20:24 Ndipo pofika Ayuda ku dindiro la kuchipululu, anapenyera aunyinjiwo; taonani, mitembo ili ngundangunda, wosapulumuka ndi mmodzi yense." 
2Chronicles20:25 Ndipo pofika Yehosafati ndi anthu ake kutenga zofunkha zao, anapezako chuma chambiri, ndi mitembo yambiri ndi zipangizo zofunika, nadzifunkhira, osakhoza kuzisenza zonse; nalimkutenga zofunkhazo masiku atatu, popeza zinachuluka." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ndi tsiku lachinai anasonkhana m'chigwa cha Beraka; pakuti pamenepo analemekeza Yehova; chifukwa chake anatcha dzina lake la malowo, Chigwa cha Beraka, mpaka lero lino." 
2Chronicles20:27 Pamenepo anabwerera amuna onse a Yuda, ndi a ku Yerusalemu, nawatsogolera ndi Yehosafati, kubwerera kunka ku Yerusalemu ndi chimwemwe; pakuti Yehova anawakondweretsa pa adani ao." 
2Chronicles20:28 Ndipo anafika ku Yerusalemu ndi zisakasa, ndi azeze, ndi malipenga, kunyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles20:29 Ndipo kuopsa kwa Mulungu kunagwera maufumu onse a m'maiko, pamene anamva kuti Yehova adayambana ndi adani a Israele." 
2Chronicles20:30 Nuchita bata ufumu wa Yehosafati; pakuti Mulungu wake anampumulitsira pozungulirapo. 
2Chronicles20:31 Momwemo Yehosafati anakhala mfumu ya Yuda; anali wa zaka makumi atatu mphambu zisanu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi awiri; ndi dzina la make ndiye Azuba mwana wa Sili." 
2Chronicles20:32 Ndipo anayenda m'njira ya Asa atate wake osapatukamo, nachita zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova." 
2Chronicles20:33 Komatu misanje siinachotsedwa; popeza pamenepo anthu sadakonzere mitima yao kwa Mulungu wa makolo ao. 
2Chronicles20:34 Machitidwe ena tsono adazichita Yehosafati, zoyamba ndi zotsiriza, taonani, zilembedwa m'buku la mau a Yehu mwana wa Hanani, wotchulidwa m'buku la mafumu a Israele." 
2Chronicles20:35 Zitatha izi, Yehosafati mfumu ya Yuda anaphatikana ndi Ahaziya mfumu ya Israele, yemweyo anachita moipitsitsa;" 
2Chronicles20:36 naphatikana naye kupanga zombo zomuka ku Tarisisi, nazipanga zombozo m'Eziyoni-Gebere." 
2Chronicles20:37 Pamenepo Eliyezere mwana wa Dodavahu wa Maresa ananenera kumtsutsa Yehosafati, ndi kuti, Popeza waphatikana ndi Ahaziya Yehova wapasula ntchito zako. Ndipo zombo zinasweka zosakhoza kumuka ku Tarisisi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Ndipo Yehosafati anagona pamodzi ndi makolo ake, naikidwa pamodzi ndi makolo ake m'mudzi wa Davide; ndi Yehoramu mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles21:2 Ndipo anali nao abale ake, ana a Yehosafati, Azariya, ndi Yehiyele, ndi Zekariya, ndi Azariya, ndi Mikaele, ndi Sefatiya, onsewa ndiwo ana a Yehosafati mfumu ya Israele." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ndipo atate wao anawapatsa mphatso zazikulu, zasiliva, ndi zagolide, ndi za mtengo wake, pamodzi ndi midzi yamalinga m'Yuda; koma ufumu anauninkha kwa Yehoramu; pakuti ndiye mwana wake woyamba." 
2Chronicles21:4 Atauka tsono Yehoramu m'ufumu wa atate wake, nadzilimbitsa, anapha ndi lupanga abale ake onse, ndi akalonga ena omwe a Israele." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoramu anali wa zaka makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri polowa ufumu wake, nachita ufumu m'Yerusalemu zaka zisanu ndi zitatu." 
2Chronicles21:6 Nayenda m'njira ya mafumu a Israele, umo mwana wamkazi wa Ahabu anali mkazi wake; ndipo anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova." 
2Chronicles21:7 Koma Yehova sanafune kuononga nyumba ya Davide chifukwa cha pangano adalichita ndi Davide, ndi monga adalonjeza kumpatsa iye ndi ana ake nyali nthawi zonse." 
2Chronicles21:8 Masiku ake Aedomu anapanduka kuchoka m'dzanja la Yuda, nadziponyera okha mfumu." 
2Chronicles21:9 Ndipo Yehoramu anaoloka, ndi akazembe ake, ndi magaleta ake onse pamodzi naye, nauka usiku, nakantha Aedomu omzinga ndi akapitao a magaleta." 
2Chronicles21:10 Chinkana anatero, Aedomu anapanduka kupulumuka m'dzanja la Yuda mpaka lero lino; nthawi yomweyo anapanduka Alibina kupulumuka m'dzanja lake; chifukwa adasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ake." 
2Chronicles21:11 Anamanganso misanje m'mapiri a Yuda, nachititsa okhala m'Yerusalemu chigololo, nakankhirako Ayuda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Ndipo anamdzera kalata wofuma kwa Eliya mneneri, ndi kuti, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Davide atate wanu, Popeza simunayenda m'njira za Yehosafati atate wanu, kapena m'njira za Asa mfumu ya Yuda," 
2Chronicles21:13 koma mwayenda m'njira ya mafumu a Israele, ndi kuchititsa Yuda ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu chigololo, monga umo anachitira chigololo a nyumba ya Ahabu, mwaphanso abale anu a nyumba ya atate wanu, ndiwo abwino akuposa inu;" 
2Chronicles21:14 taonani, Yehova adzakantha anthu anu, ndi ana anu, ndi akazi anu, ndi chuma chanu chonse, makanthidwe akulu;" 
2Chronicles21:15 ndipo mudzadwala kwakukulu nthenda yamatumbo, mpaka matumbo anu adzatuluka chifukwa cha nthendayi tsiku ndi tsiku." 
2Chronicles21:16 Ndipo Yehova anautsira Yehoramu mzimu wa Afilisti, ndi wa Aarabu okhala pambali pa Akusi;" 
2Chronicles21:17 ndiwo anakwerera Yuda, nathyolamo, nalanda chuma chonse chinapezeka m'nyumba ya mfumu, ndi ana ake omwe, ndi akazi ake, osamsiyira mwana, koma Yehowahazi yekha mwana wake wamng'ono." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ndi pambuyo pake pa izi zonse Yehova anamdwalitsa m'matumbo ake ndi nthenda yosachira nayo. 
2Chronicles21:19 Ndipo kunali, itapita nthawi, pakutha pake pa zaka ziwiri, anatuluka matumbo ake mwa nthenda yake namwalira nazo nthenda zoipa. Ndipo anthu ake sanampserezere zonunkhira, monga umo anapserezera makolo ake." 
2Chronicles21:20 Anali wa zaka makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka zisanu ndi zitatu, namuka wopanda wina womlakalaka; ndipo anamuika m'mudzi wa Davide, koma si m'manda a mafumu ai." 
2Chronicles22:1 Ndipo okhala m'Yerusalemu anamlonga Ahaziya mwana wake wamng'ono akhale mfumu m'malo mwake; pakuti gulu la anthu, adadzawo pamodzi ndi Aarabu kuchigono, adapha ana oyamba onse. Momwemo Ahaziya mwana wa Yehoramu anakhala mfumu ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziya anali wa zaka makumi anai mphambu ziwiri polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu chaka chimodzi; ndi dzina la make ndiye Ataliya mwana wa Omuri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Iyenso anayenda m'njira za nyumba ya Ahabu; pakuti wompangira ndi make achite choipa. 
2Chronicles22:4 Ndipo anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo anachitira a nyumba ya Ahabu; pakuti ompangira ndi iwowa, atamwalira atate wake; ndi kuonongeka kwake nkumeneko." 
2Chronicles22:5 Anayendanso m'kupangira kwao, namuka pamodzi ndi Yehoramu mwana wa Ahabu mfumu ya Israele, kukayambana nkhondo ndi Hazaele mfumu ya Aramu ku Ramoti Giliyadi; ndipo Aaramu anamlasa Yehoramu." 
2Chronicles22:6 Nabwerera iye kuti amchize ku Yezireele, apole mabala amene adamkantha ku Rama, pamene anayambana ndi Hazaele mfumu ya Aramu. Ndipo Ahaziya mwana wa Yehoramu mfumu ya Yuda anatsikira kukaona Yehoramu mwana wa Ahabu m'Yezireele, popeza anadwala." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kuonongeka kwa Ahaziya tsono nkwa Mulungu, kuti amuke kwa Yehoramu; pakuti atafika anatulukira pamodzi ndi Yehoramu kukayambana ndi Yehu mwana wa Nimisi, amene Yehova anamdzoza alikhe nyumba ya Ahabu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Ndipo kunali, pakulanga Yehu nyumba ya Ahabu, anapeza akalonga a Yuda, ndi ana a abale a Ahaziya, akutumikira Ahaziya, nawapha." 
2Chronicles22:9 Atatero, anafunafuna Ahaziya, namgwira alikubisala m'Samariya, nabwera naye kwa Yehu, namupha; ndipo anamuika; pakuti anati, Ndiye mwana wa Yehosafati, wofuna Yehova ndi mtima wake wonse. Ndipo panalibe wina wa nyumba ya Ahaziya wa mphamvu yakusunga ufumuwo." 
2Chronicles22:10 Pamene Ataliya mai wake wa Ahaziya anaona kuti mwana wake adafa, anauka, naononga mbeu yonse yachifumu ya nyumba ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Koma Yehosabati mwana wamkazi wa mfumu anatenga Yowasi mwana wa Ahaziya, namuba pakati pa ana a mfumu ophedwa, namlonga iye ndi mlezi wake m'chipinda chogonamo. Momwemo Yehosabati mwana wamkazi wa mfumu Yehoramu, mkazi wa Yehoyada wansembe (popeza ndiye mlongo wake wa Ahaziya), anambisira Ataliya, angamuphe." 
2Chronicles22:12 Ndipo iye anali nao wobisika m'nyumba ya Mulungu zaka zisanu ndi chimodzi; nakhala Ataliya mfumu yaikazi ya dziko. 
2Chronicles23:1 Koma chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri Yehoyada anadzilimbitsa natenga atsogoleri a mazana, Azariya mwana wa Yerohamu, ndi Ismaele mwana wa Yehohanani, ndi Azariya mwana wa Obedi, ndi Maaseiya mwana wa Adaya, ndi Elisafati mwana wa Zikiri, apangane naye pamodzi." 
2Chronicles23:2 Ndipo iwo anayendayenda mwa Yuda, nasonkhanitsa Alevi m'midzi yonse ya Yuda, ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo m'Israele; nadza iwo ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles23:3 Ndipo msonkhano wonse unapangana pangano ndi mfumu m'nyumba ya Mulungu. Ndipo ananena nao, Taonani, mwana wa mfumu adzakhala mfumu monga Yehova ananena za ana a Davide." 
2Chronicles23:4 Chimene muzichita ndi ichi: limodzi la magawo atatu mwa inu olowera tsiku la Sabata, la ansembe ndi Alevi, akhale olindirira pakhomo;" 
2Chronicles23:5 ndi limodzi la magawo atatu likhale kunyumba ya mfumu; ndi limodzi la magawo atatu ku Chipata cha Maziko; ndi anthu onse akhale m'mabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova. 
2Chronicles23:6 Koma asalowe mmodzi m'nyumba ya Yehova, ansembe okha, ndi Alevi otumikira, alowe iwowa; pakuti ndiwo opatulika; koma anthu onse asunge udikiro wa Yehova." 
2Chronicles23:7 Ndipo Alevi amzinge mfumu pozungulirapo, yense ndi zida zake m'dzanja mwake; ndipo aliyense wolowa m'nyumba aphedwe; nimukhale inu pamodzi ndi mfumu pakulowa ndi pakutuluka iye." 
2Chronicles23:8 Momwemo Alevi ndi Ayuda onse anachita monga mwa zonse anawauza Yehoyada wansembe; natenga yense amuna ake alowe tsiku la Sabata pamodzi ndi otuluka tsiku la Sabata; pakuti Yehoyada wansembe sanamasule zigawo. 
2Chronicles23:9 Ndi Yehoyada wansembe anapereka kwa akazembe a mazana mikondo, ndi zikopa, ndi malaya achitsulo, zinali za mfumu Davide, zokhala m'nyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Chronicles23:10 Ndipo anaika anthu onse, yense ndi chida chake m'dzanja lake, amzinge mfumu, kuyambira mbali ya kudzanja lamanja la nyumba kufikira mbali ya kudzanja lamanzere la nyumba, kuloza kuguwa la nsembe ndi kunyumba." 
2Chronicles23:11 Pamenepo anatulutsa mwana wa mfumu, namveka korona, nampatsa mboni, namlonga ufumu; ndi Yehoyada ndi ana ake anamdzoza, nati, Ikhale ndi moyo mfumu." 
2Chronicles23:12 Ndipo pamene Ataliya anamva phokoso la anthu alikuthamanga ndi kulemekeza mfumu, anadza kwa anthu m'nyumba ya Yehova;" 
2Chronicles23:13 napenya, ndi kuona mfumu inaima pa nsanamira yake polowera; ndi atsogoleri, ndi malipenga, anali kwa mfumu; ndi anthu onse a m'dziko anakondwera, naomba amalipenga; oimbira omwe analiko ndi zoimbirazo, nalangiza poimbira cholemekeza. Pamenepo Ataliya anang'amba zovala zake, nati, Chiwembu, chiwembu." 
2Chronicles23:14 Koma Yehoyada wansembe anatuluka nao atsogoleri a mazana akuyang'anira khamu la nkhondo, nanena nao, Mtulutseni mkaziyo pakati pa mipambo; ndipo aliyense womtsata aphedwe ndi lupanga; pakuti wansembe adati, Msamphere m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles23:15 Ndipo anampisa malo; namuka iye kolowera ku Chipata cha Akavalo kunyumba ya mfumu; ndi pomwepo anamupha. 
2Chronicles23:16 Ndipo Yehoyada anachita pangano pakati pa iye, ndi anthu onse, ndi mfumu, kuti adzakhala anthu a Yehova." 
2Chronicles23:17 Ndi anthu onse anamuka kunyumba ya Baala, naipasula, naphwanya maguwa ake a nsembe, ndi mafano ake; namupha Matani wansembe wa Baala kumaguwa a nsembe." 
2Chronicles23:18 Ndipo Yehoyada anaika mayang'aniro a nyumba ya Yehova m'dzanja la ansembe Aleviwo, amene Davide anawagawa, ayang'anire nyumba ya Yehova; napereka nsembe zopsereza za Yehova monga mulembedwa m'chilamulo cha Mose, ndi kukondwera ndi kuimbira, monga mwa chilangizo cha Davide." 
2Chronicles23:19 Ndipo anaika odikira kumakomo a nyumba ya Yehova, kuti wodetsedwa nako kanthu kalikonse asalowemo." 
2Chronicles23:20 Natenga atsogoleri a mazana, ndi omveka, ndi akazembe a anthu, ndi anthu onse a m'dziko, natsika ndi mfumu kunyumba ya Yehova; nalowera pa chipata cha kumtunda m'nyumba ya mfumu, namkhalitsa mfumu pa mpando wa ufumu." 
2Chronicles23:21 Ndipo anthu onse a m'dziko anakondwera; ndi m'mudzi munali chete, atamupha Ataliya ndi lupanga." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yowasi anali wa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi anai; ndi dzina la make ndiye Zibiya wa ku Beereseba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Ndipo Yowasi anachita zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova masiku onse a Yehoyada wansembe. 
2Chronicles24:3 Ndipo Yehoyada anamtengera akazi awiri, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi." 
2Chronicles24:4 Ndipo pambuyo pake mumtima mwa Yowasi munali chofuna kukonzanso nyumba ya Yehova. 
2Chronicles24:5 Nasonkhanitsa ansembe ndi Alevi, nanena nao, Mutuluke kunka kumidzi ya Yuda, ndi kusonkhanitsa kwa Aisraele onse ndalama zakukonzetsa nyumba ya Mulungu wanu chaka ndi chaka; ndipo inu fulumirani nayo ntchitoyi. Koma Alevi sanafulumire nayo." 
2Chronicles24:6 Ndipo mfumu inaitana Yehoyada mkulu wao, niti naye, Unalekeranji kuuza Alevi abwere nao kuchokera m'Yuda ndi Yerusalemu msonkho wa Mose mtumiki wa Yehova, ndi wa msonkhano wa Israele, ukhale wa chihema cha umboni?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Pakuti ana a Ataliya mkazi woipa uja anathyola chitseko cha nyumba ya Mulungu, natenga zopatulidwa zonse za nyumba ya Yehova kuzipereka kwa Baala." 
2Chronicles24:8 Nilamulira mfumu, ndipo anapanga bokosi, naliika kunja kuchipata cha nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles24:9 Nalalikira mwa Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, abwere nao kwa Yehova msonkho umene Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu anauikira Aisraele m'chipululu." 
2Chronicles24:10 Ndipo akalonga onse ndi anthu onse anakondwera, nabwera nazo, naponya m'bokosi mpaka atatha." 
2Chronicles24:11 Ndipo kunali, pamene amabwera nalo bokosi alipenye mfumu, mwa manja a Alevi, nakapenya kuti ndalama zinachulukamo, amadza mlembi wa mfumu, ndi kapitao wa wansembe wamkulu, nakhuthula za m'bokosi, nalisenza ndi kubwera nalo kumalo kwake. Anatero tsiku ndi tsiku, nasonkhanitsa ndalama zochuluka." 
2Chronicles24:12 Ndipo mfumu ndi Yehoyada anazipereka kwa iwo akugwira ntchito ya utumiki ya nyumba ya Yehova, nalembera amisiri omanga ndi miyala, ndi osema mitengo, akonzenso nyumba ya Yehova; ndiponso akuchita ndi chitsulo ndi mkuwa alimbitse nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles24:13 Momwemo anachita ogwira ntchito, nikula ntchito mwa dzanja lao, nakhazikitsa iwo nyumba ya Mulungu monga mwa maonekedwe ake, nailimbitsa." 
2Chronicles24:14 Ndipo ataitsiriza, anabwera nazo ndalama zotsala kwa mfumu ndi Yehoyada, napanga nazo zipangizo za nyumba ya Yehova, zipangizo za kutumikira nazo, ndi kupereka nsembe nazo, ndi zipande, ndi zipangizo za golide ndi siliva. Ndipo anapereka kosalekeza nsembe zopsereza m'nyumba ya Yehova masiku onse a Yehoyada." 
2Chronicles24:15 Koma Yehoyada anakalamba, nachuluka masiku, namwalira iye; ndiye wa zaka zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu pamene anamwalira." 
2Chronicles24:16 Ndipo anamuika m'mudzi wa Davide, pakati pa mafumu; pakuti anachita zabwino m'Israele, ndi kwa Mulungu, ndi kunyumba yake." 
2Chronicles24:17 Atamwalira Yehoyada tsono, akalonga a Yuda anadza, nalambira mfumu. Ndipo mfumu inawamvera." 
2Chronicles24:18 Ndipo anasiya nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, natumikira zifanizo, ndi mafano; ndipo mkwiyo unawagwera Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, chifukwa cha kupalamula kwao kumene." 
2Chronicles24:19 Koma Iye anawatumira aneneri kuwabwezeranso kwa Yehova, ndiwo anawachitira umboni; koma sanawamvere." 
2Chronicles24:20 Ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unavala Zekariya mwana wa Yehoyada wansembe, naima iye kumtunda kwa anthu, nanena nao, Atero Mulungu, Mulakwiranji malamulo a Yehova kuli kosalemerera nako? Popeza mwasiya Yehova, Iye wasiyanso inu." 
2Chronicles24:21 Koma anampangira chiwembu, namponya miyala, mwa lamulo la mfumu m'bwalo la nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles24:22 Motero mfumu Yowasi sanakumbukire zokoma anamchitirazi Yehoyada atate wake, koma anapha mwana wake; ndiye pomwalira anati, Yehova achipenye, nachifunse." 
2Chronicles24:23 Ndipo kunachitika, podzanso nyengoyi khamu la nkhondo la Aaramu linamkwerera, nafika iwo ku Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, naononga mwa anthu akalonga onse a anthu, natumiza zofunkha zao zonse kwa mfumu ya ku Damasiko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Pakuti khamu la nkhondo la Aaramu linadza la anthu owerengeka; ndipo Yehova anapereka khamu lalikulu m'dzanja lao; popeza adasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao. Motero anachitira Yowasi zomlanga. 
2Chronicles24:25 Ndipo atamchokera (popeza anamsiya wodwala nthenda zazikulu), anyamata ake anamchitira chiwembu, chifukwa cha mwazi wa ana a Yehoyada wansembe, namupha pakama pake, namwalira iye; ndipo anamuika m'mudzi wa Davide, koma osamuika m'manda a mafumu." 
2Chronicles24:26 Omchitira chiwembu ndi awa: Zabadi, mwana wa Simeati wamkazi Mwamoni; ndi Yehozabadi, mwana wa Simiriti wamkazi Mmowabu." 
2Chronicles24:27 Za ana ake tsono, ndi katundu wamkulu anamsenza, ndi kumanganso kwa nyumba ya Mulungu, taonani, zilembedwa m'buku lomasulira la mafumu. Ndipo Amaziya mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziya anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zisanu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi zinai; ndi dzina la make ndiye Yehowadani wa ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles25:2 Ndipo anachita zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova, koma wosachita ndi mtima wangwiro." 
2Chronicles25:3 Kunachitika tsono, utamkhazikikira ufumu, anapha anyamata ake amene adapha mfumu atate wake." 
2Chronicles25:4 Koma sanaphe ana ao, koma anachita monga umo mulembedwa m'chilamulo, m'buku la Mose, monga Yehova analamulira, ndi kuti, Atate asafere ana, ndi ana asafere atate; koma yense afere tchimo lakelake." 
2Chronicles25:5 Ndipo Amaziya anamemeza Ayuda, nawaika monga mwa nyumba za atate ao, atsogoleri a zikwi, ndi atsogoleri a mazana, ndiwo onse a Yuda ndi Benjamini; nawawerenga a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, nawapeza amuna osankhika zikwi mazana atatu akutulukira kunkhondo, ogwira mkondo ndi chikopa." 
2Chronicles25:6 Analemberanso ngwazi zamphamvu za m'Israele zikwi zana limodzi, kuwalipira matalente a siliva zana limodzi." 
2Chronicles25:7 Koma anamdzera munthu wa Mulungu, kuti, Mfumu, khamu la nkhondo la Israele lisapite nanu; pakuti Yehova sakhala ndi Israele, sakhala ndi ana onse a Efuremu." 
2Chronicles25:8 Koma ngati mumuka, chitani, limbikani kunkhondo, Mulungu adzakugwetsani pamaso pa adani; pakuti Mulungu ali nayo mphamvu yakuthandiza ndi yakugwetsa." 
2Chronicles25:9 Ndipo Amaziya anati kwa munthu wa Mulungu, Koma nanga titani nao matalente zana limodzi ndinapatsa ankhondo a Israele? Nati munthu wa Mulungu, Yehova ali nazo zoposa izi kukupatsani." 
2Chronicles25:10 Pamenepo Amaziya anawapambutsa, ndiwo ankhondo anamdzera kuchokera ku Efuremu, amuke kwao; potero adapsa mtima kwambiri pa Yuda, nabwera kwao ndi kutentha mtima." 
2Chronicles25:11 Nalimbika mtima Amaziya. Natsogolera anthu ake, namuka ku Chigwa cha Mchere, nakantha ana a Seiri zikwi khumi." 
2Chronicles25:12 Ndi ana a Yuda anagwira zikwi khumi ena amoyo, nabwera nao pamwamba pa thanthwe, naphwanyika onsewo." 
2Chronicles25:13 Koma amuna a nkhondo amene Amaziya anawabwereretsa, kuti asamuke naye kunkhondo, anagwera midzi ya Yuda kuyambira Samariya kufikira Betehoroni, nakantha a iwowa zikwi zitatu, nalanda zofunkha zambiri." 
2Chronicles25:14 Ndipo kunali, atafika Amaziya atatha kuwapha Aedomu, ndi kubwera nayo milungu ya ana a Seiri, anaiika ikhale milungu yake, naigwadira, naifukizira." 
2Chronicles25:15 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Amaziya, ndipo anamtumira mneneri amene anati, Mwafuniranji milungu ya anthu imene siinalanditsa anthu ao m'dzanja lanu?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Ndipo kunali, pakulankhula naye mfumu, inanena naye, Takuika kodi ukhale wopangira mfumu? Leka, angakukanthe. Pamenepo mneneriyo analeka, nati, Ndidziwa kuti Mulungu watsimikiza mtima kukuonongani, popeza mwachita ichi ndi kusamvera kupangira kwanga." 
2Chronicles25:17 Pamenepo Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda anafunsana ndi ompangira, natumiza kwa Yowasi mwana wa Yehowahazi mwana wa Yehu mfumu ya Israele, ndi kuti, Idzani, tionane maso."
