2Chronicles25:18 Ndi Yowasi mfumu ya Israele anatumiza kwa Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda ndi kuti, Mtungwi wa ku Lebanoni unatumiza kwa mkungudza wa ku Lebanoni, ndi kuti, Mpatse mwana wanga wamwamuna mwana wako wamkazi akhale mkazi wake; koma nyama ya kuthengo ya ku Lebanoni inapitapo, nipondereza mtungwi." 
2Chronicles25:19 Mukuti, Taonani, ndakantha Aedomu, nukwezeka mtima wanu kudzikuza; khalani kwanu tsopano, mungadziutsire tsoka, mungagwe, inu, ndi Yuda pamodzi ndi inu." 
2Chronicles25:20 Koma wosamvera Amaziya, pakuti ncha Mulungu ichi kuti awapereke m'dzanja la adani ao; popeza anafuna milungu ya Edomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 Motero anakwera Yowasi mfumu ya Israele, ndipo iye ndi Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda anapenyana maso ku Betesemesi, ndiwo wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Nakanthidwa Yuda pamaso pa Israele, nathawa yense kuhema kwake." 
2Chronicles25:23 Ndipo Yowasi mfumu ya Israele anagwira Amaziya mfumu ya Yuda, mwana wa Yowasi mwana wa Yehowahazi, ku Betesemesi, nabwera naye ku Yerusalemu, nagamula linga la Yerusalemu kuyambira chipata cha Efuremu kufikira chipata cha kungodya, mikono mazana anai." 
2Chronicles25:24 Natenga golide ndi siliva zonse, ndi zipangizo zonse zopezeka m'nyumba ya Mulungu kwa Obededomu, ndi chuma cha nyumba ya mfumu, achikole omwe; nabwerera kunka ku Samariya." 
2Chronicles25:25 Ndipo Amaziya mwana wa Yowasi mfumu ya Yuda anakhala ndi moyo, atamwalira Yowasi mwana wa Yehowahazi mfumu ya Israele, zaka khumi ndi zisanu." 
2Chronicles25:26 Machitidwe ena tsono a Amaziya, oyamba ndi otsiriza, taonani, sanalembedwa kodi m'buku la mafumu a Yuda ndi Israele?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Ndipo chipatukire Amaziya kusatsata Yehova, namchitira chiwembu m'Yerusalemu, nathawira ku Lakisi iyeyu; koma anatuma omtsatira ku Lakisi, namupha komweko." 
2Chronicles25:28 Namnyamula pa akavalo, namuika pamodzi ndi makolo ake m'mudzi wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles26:1 Ndipo anthu onse Ayuda anatenga Uziya, ndiye wa zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi, namlonga ufumu m'malo mwa atate wake Amaziya." 
2Chronicles26:2 Iye anamanga Eloti, naubweza kwa Yuda, mfumuyo itagona ndi makolo ake." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya anali wa zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi asanu mphambu ziwiri; ndi dzina la make ndiye Yekoliya wa ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles26:4 Nachita iye zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonse adazichita atate wake Amaziya." 
2Chronicles26:5 Ndipo iye anali munthu wakufuna Mulungu masiku a Zekariya, ndiye wozindikira masomphenya a Mulungu; ndipo masiku akufunira Yehova iye, Mulungu anamlemereza;" 
2Chronicles26:6 popeza anatuluka, nayambana ndi Afilisti, nagamula linga la Gati, ndi linga la Yabine, ndi linga la Asidodi; namanga midzi m'dziko la Asidodi, ndi mwa Afilisti." 
2Chronicles26:7 Ndipo Mulungu anamthandiza poyambana ndi Afilisti, ndi Aarabu okhala m'Guribaala, ndi Ameuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Ndipo Aamoni anampatsa Uziya mitulo; ndi dzina lake linabuka mpaka polowera ku Ejipito; pakuti analimbika chilimbikire. 
2Chronicles26:9 Uziya anamanganso nsanja m'Yerusalemu pa chipata cha kungodya, ndi pa chipata cha kuchigwa, ndi popindika linga; nazilimbikitsa." 
2Chronicles26:10 Namanga nsanja m'chipululu, nakumba zitsime zambiri; popeza anali nazo zoweta zambiri; kumadambo, ndi kuzidikha; nakhala nao olima minda, ndi osunga mpesa kumapiri ndi kunthaka yopatsa bwino; pakuti anakonda kulima." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uziya anali nalonso khamu la anthu a nkhondo, otuluka kunkhondo magulu; nawawerenga monga mwa mawerengedwe ao ndi dzanja la mlembi Yeiyele, ndi kapitao Maaseiya, monga anawauza Hananiya kazembe wina wa mfumu." 
2Chronicles26:12 Chiwerengo chonse cha akulu a nyumba za makolo, ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu, ndicho zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
2Chronicles26:13 Ndipo m'dzanja mwao munali khamu la nkhondo zikwi mazana atatu mphambu zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ochita nkhondo ndi mphamvu yaikulu, kuthandiza mfumu alimbane ndi adani." 
2Chronicles26:14 Ndipo Uziya anawakonzeratu ankhondo onse zikopa, ndi mikondo, ndi zisoti zachitsulo, ndi malaya achitsulo, ndi mauta, ndi miyala yoponyera." 
2Chronicles26:15 Napanga m'Yerusalemu makina, opangidwa ndi eni luso, akhale pansanja ndi kungodya, aponye nao mivi ndi miyala yaikulu. Ndi dzina lake linamveka kutali; pakuti anathandizidwa modabwitsa, mpaka analimbikatu." 
2Chronicles26:16 Koma atakhala wamphamvu, mtima wake unakwezeka momuononga, nalakwira Yehova Mulungu wake; popeza analowa m'Kachisi wa Yehova kufukiza pa guwa la nsembe la chofukiza." 
2Chronicles26:17 Ndipo Azariya wansembe analowa pambuyo pake, ndi pamodzi naye ansembe a Yehova makumi asanu ndi atatu, ndiwo olimba mtima;" 
2Chronicles26:18 natsutsana ndi mfumu Uziya, nati kwa iye, Sikuyenera inu, Uziya, kufukizira Yehova koma ansembe, ana a Aroni opatulidwira kufukiza; tulukani m'malo opatulika; pakuti mwalakwa; Yehova Mulungu sakulemekezanipo." 
2Chronicles26:19 Koma Uziya anapsa mtima, mbale ya zofukiza ili m'dzanja lake kufukiza nayo; ndipo pakupsa mtima nao ansembe, khate linabuka pamphumi pake, pamaso pa ansembe m'nyumba ya Yehova, pambali pa guwa lofukizapo." 
2Chronicles26:20 Ndipo Azariya wansembe wamkulu, ndi ansembe onse, anampenya, ndi kuona kuti anali wakhate pamphumi pake namkankhira msanga kubwalo; nafulumiranso yekha kutulukako, pakuti Yehova adamkantha." 
2Chronicles26:21 Ndipo mfumu Uziya anali wakhate mpaka tsiku la imfa yake, nakhala m'nyumba ya padera, popeza ndiye wakhate; pakuti anadulidwa kunyumba ya Yehova; ndi Yotamu mwana wake anayang'anira nyumba ya mfumu naweruza anthu a m'dziko." 
2Chronicles26:22 Machitidwe ena tsono a Uziya, oyamba ndi otsiriza, anawalemba Yesaya mneneri mwana wa Amozi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Ndipo Uziya anagona ndi makolo ake, namuika ndi makolo ake kumanda kwa mafumu; pakuti anati, Ndiye wakhate; ndi Yotamu mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotamu anali wa zaka makumi awiri, mphambu zisanu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi chimodzi; ndi dzina la make ndiye Yerusa mwana wa Zadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Ndipo anachita zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo adachitira atate wake Uziya; pokhapo sanalowe m'Kachisi wa Yehova. Koma anthu anachitabe zovunda." 
2Chronicles27:3 Anamanga chipata cha kumtunda cha nyumba ya Yehova, ndi pa linga la Ofele anamanga kwakukulu." 
2Chronicles27:4 Namanga midzi m'mapiri a Yuda, ndi m'nkhalango anamanga nyumba zansanja, ndi nsanja zomwe." 
2Chronicles27:5 Anayambananso ndi mfumu ya ana a Amoni, namgonjetsa. Ndi ana a Amoni anamninkha chaka chomwechi matalente a siliva zana limodzi, ndi miyeso ya tirigu zikwi khumi, ndi ya barele zikwi khumi. Ana a Amoni anabwera nazo zomwezo kwa iye chaka chachiwiri ndi chachitatu chomwe." 
2Chronicles27:6 Momwemo Yotamu anakula mphamvu, popeza anakonza njira zake pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake." 
2Chronicles27:7 Machitidwe ena tsono a Yotamu, ndi nkhondo zake zonse, ndi njira zake, taonani, zalembedwa m'buku la mafumu a Israele ndi Yuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zisanu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi." 
2Chronicles27:9 Ndipo Yotamu anagona ndi makolo ake, namuika m'mudzi wa Davide; ndi Ahazi mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi anali wa zaka makumi awiri polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi chimodzi; koma sanachite zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova ngati Davide kholo lake," 
2Chronicles28:2 koma anayenda m'njira za mafumu a Israele, napangiranso Abaala mafano oyenga." 
2Chronicles28:3 Nafukizanso yekha m'chigwa cha mwana wa Hinomu, napsereza ana ake m'moto, monga mwa zonyansa za amitundu, amene Yehova anawainga pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
2Chronicles28:4 Naphera nsembe, nafukiza kumisanje, ndi kuzitunda, ndi patsinde pa mtengo uliwonse wogudira." 
2Chronicles28:5 Chifukwa chake Yehova Mulungu wake anampereka m'dzanja la mfumu ya Aramu; ndipo anamkantha, natenga ndende unyinji waukulu wa anthu ake, nafika nao ku Damasiko. Anaperekedwanso iye m'dzanja la mfumu ya Israele, amene anamkantha makanthidwe akulu." 
2Chronicles28:6 Pakuti Peka mwana wa Remaliya anapha ku Yuda tsiku limodzi zikwi zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri, ngwazi zonsezo; popeza adasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles28:7 Ndipo Zikiri munthu wamphamvu wa Efuremu anapha Maaseiya mwana wa mfumu, ndi Azirikamu woyang'anira nyumba, ndi Elikana wotsatana ndi mfumu." 
2Chronicles28:8 Ndipo ana a Israele anatenga ndende ena a abale ao zikwi mazana awiri, akazi, ana aamuna ndi aakazi, nalandanso kwa iwo zofunkha zambiri, nabwera nazo zofunkhazo ku Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:9 Koma panali mneneri wa Yehova pomwepo, dzina lake Odedi; natuluka iye kukomana nayo nkhondo ikudzayo ku Samariya, nanena nao, Taonani, popeza Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu anakwiya ndi Yuda, anawapereka m'dzanja lanu, nimunawapha ndi kupsa mtima kofikira kumwamba." 
2Chronicles28:10 Ndipo tsopano mukuti mugonjetse ana a Yuda ndi Yerusalemu akhale akapolo ndi adzakazi anu; palibe nanunso kodi milandu yopalamula kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu? 
2Chronicles28:11 Mundimvere tsono, bwezani andende a abale anu; pakuti mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova uli pa inu." 
2Chronicles28:12 Pamenepo akulu ena a ana a Efuremu, Azariya mwana wa Yohanani, Berekiya mwana wa Mesilemoti, ndi Yehizikiya mwana wa Salumu, ndi Amasa mwana wa Hadilai, anaukira aja ofuma kunkhondo," 
2Chronicles28:13 nanena nao, Musalowa nao andende kuno; pakuti inu mukuti mutipalamulitse kwa Yehova, kuonjezera pa machimo athu ndi zopalamula zathu; pakuti tapalamula kwakukulu, ndipo pali mkwiyo waukali pa Israele." 
2Chronicles28:14 Pamenepo eni zida anasiya andende ndi zofunkha pamaso pa akalonga msonkhano wonse. 
2Chronicles28:15 Nanyamuka amuna otchulidwa maina, natenga andende, naveka ausiwa onse mwa iwo ndi zofunkhazo, nawapatsa zovala, ndi nsapato, nawadyetsa ndi kuwamwetsa, nawadzoza, nasenza ofooka ao onse pa abulu, nafika nao ku Yeriko, mudzi wa migwalangwa, kwa abale ao; nabwerera iwo kunka ku Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:16 Nthawi yomweyo mfumu Ahazi anatumiza kwa mafumu a Asiriya amthandize. 
2Chronicles28:17 Pakuti Aedomu anadzanso, nakantha Yuda, natenga andende." 
2Chronicles28:18 Afilisti omwe adagwa m'midzi ya kuchidikha, ndi ya kumwera kwa Yuda, nalanda Betesemesi, ndi Ayaloni, ndi Gederoti, ndi Soko ndi milaga yake, ndi Timna ndi milaga yake, ndi Gimizo ndi milaga yake; nakhala iwo komweko." 
2Chronicles28:19 Pakuti Yehova anachepetsa Yuda chifukwa cha Ahazi mfumu ya Israele; popeza iye anachita chomasuka pakati pa Yuda, nalakwira Yehova kwambiri." 
2Chronicles28:20 Ndipo Tigilati-Pilesere mfumu ya Asiriya anadza kwa iye, namsautsa osamlimbikitsa." 
2Chronicles28:21 Pakuti Ahazi analandako za m'nyumba ya Yehova ndi za m'nyumba ya mfumu, ndi ya akalonga, nazipereka kwa mfumu ya Asiriya, osathandizidwa nazo." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ndipo nthawi ya nsautso yake anaonjeza kulakwira Yehova, mfumu Ahazi yemweyo." 
2Chronicles28:23 Popeza anaphera nsembe milungu ya Damasiko yomkantha, nati, Popeza milungu ya mafumu a Aramu iwathandiza, ndiiphere nsembe, indithandize inenso. Koma inamkhumudwitsa iye, ndi Aisraele onse." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ndipo Ahazi anasonkhanitsa zipangizo za m'nyumba ya Mulungu, naduladula zipangizo za m'nyumba ya Mulungu, natseka pa makomo a nyumba ya Yehova, nadzimangira maguwa a nsembe m'ngodya zilizonse za Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Ndi m'midzi iliyonse ya Yuda anamanga misanje ya kufukizira milungu ina, nautsa mkwiyo wa Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ake." 
2Chronicles28:26 Machitidwe ena tsono, ndi njira zake zonse, zoyamba ndi zotsiriza, taonani, zilembedwa m'buku la mafumu a Yuda ndi Israele." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ndi Ahazi anagona ndi makolo ake, namuika m'mudzi wa Yerusalemu; pakuti sanadze naye kumanda a mafumu a Israele; ndipo Hezekiya mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya analowa ufumu wake ali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zisanu, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi zinai; ndi dzina la make ndiye Abiya mwana wa Zekariya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Nachita iye zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo monse adachitira Davide kholo lake." 
2Chronicles29:3 Chaka choyamba cha ufumu wake, mwezi woyamba, anatsegula pa makomo a nyumba ya Yehova, napakonzanso." 
2Chronicles29:4 Nalowetsa ansembe ndi Alevi, nawasonkhanitsa pamaso poyera kum'mawa," 
2Chronicles29:5 nanena nao, Ndimvereni, Alevi inu, dzipatuleni, nimupatule nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu, ndi kuchotsa zoipsa m'malo opatulika." 
2Chronicles29:6 Pakuti analakwa makolo athu, nachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu, namsiya, natembenuza nkhope zao osapenya chokhalamo Yehova, namfulatira." 
2Chronicles29:7 Anatsekanso pa khomo chipinda cholowera, nazima nyalizo, osafukizanso zonunkhira kapena kupereka nsembe zopsereza m'malo opatulika kwa Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles29:8 Motero mkwiyo wa Yehova unali pa Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, nawapereka anjenjemere, nakhale chodabwitsa ndi chotsonyetsa, monga umo muonera m'maso mwanu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Pakuti taonani, makolo athu adagwa ndi lupanga, ndi ana athu aamuna ndi aakazi ndi akazi athu ali andende chifukwa cha ichi." 
2Chronicles29:10 Tsono mumtima mwanga nditi ndichite chipangano ndi Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, kuti mkwiyo wake waukali utembenuke kutichokera." 
2Chronicles29:11 Ana anga, musazengereza tsopano; popeza Yehova anakusankhani inu muime pamaso pake, kumtumikira Iye, ndi kuti mukhale atumiki ake ndi kufukiza zonunkhira." 
2Chronicles29:12 Pamenepo ananyamuka Alevi, Mahati mwana wa Amasai ndi Yowele mwana wa Azariya, a ana a Akohati; ndi a ana a Merari, Kisi mwana wa Abidi, ndi Azariya mwana wa Yehalelele; ndi a Ageresoni, Yowa mwana wa Zima, ndi Edeni mwana wa Yowa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 ndi a ana a Elizafani, Simiri ndi Yeuwele; ndi a ana a Asafu, Zekariya ndi Mataniya;" 
2Chronicles29:14 ndi a ana a Hemani, Yehuwele ndi Simei; ndi a ana a Yedutuni, Semaya ndi Uziyele." 
2Chronicles29:15 Ndipo anamemeza abale ao, nadzipatula, nalowa monga adawauza mfumu mwa mau a Yehova, kuyeretsa nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles29:16 Ndipo ansembe analowa m'kati mwake mwa nyumba ya Yehova kuiyeretsa, natulutsira kubwalo la nyumba ya Yehova zoipsa zonse anazipeza m'Kachisi wa Yehova. Nazilandira Alevi, kuzitulutsira kunja kumtsinje wa Kidroni." 
2Chronicles29:17 Anayamba tsono kuipatula tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba, nafikira kuchipinda cholowera cha nyumba ya Yehova tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu la mwezi, naipatula nyumba ya Yehova m'masiku asanu ndi atatu; natsiriza tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chimodzi." 
2Chronicles29:18 Pamenepo analowa m'katimo kwa mfumu Hezekiya, nati, Tayeretsa nyumba yonse ya Yehova, ndi guwa la nsembe yopsereza, ndi zipangizo zake zonse, ndi gome la mkate woonekera, ndi zipangizo zake zonse." 
2Chronicles29:19 Zipangizo zonse zomwe adazitaya mfumu Ahazi m'ufumu wake m'kulakwa kwake kuja, tazikonza, ndi kuzipatula; ndipo taonani, zili kuguwa la nsembe la Yehova." 
2Chronicles29:20 Pamenepo mfumu Hezekiya analawira mamawa, nasonkhanitsa akalonga a m'mudzi, nakwera kunka kunyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles29:21 Ndipo anabwera nazo ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi anaankhosa asanu ndi awiri, ndi atonde asanu ndi awiri, zikhale nsembe yauchimo ya ufumu, ndi ya malo opatulika, ndi ya Yuda. Ndipo anawauza ansembe ana a Aroni azipereke pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova." 
2Chronicles29:22 Momwemo anapha ng'ombezo, ndi ansembe analandira mwazi, nauwaza pa guwa la nsembe, napha nkhosa zamphongozo, nawaza mwazi pa guwa la nsembe; anaphanso anaankhosa aja, nawaza mwazi pa guwa la nsembe." 
2Chronicles29:23 Pamenepo anayandikiza nao atonde a nsembe yauchimo pamaso pa mfumu ndi msonkhano; ndipo iwo anawasanjika manja ao," 
2Chronicles29:24 ndi ansembewo anawapha, nachita nsembe yauchimo ndi mwazi wao pa guwa la nsembe, kuchita chotetezera Aisraele onse; pakuti mfumu idauza kuti nsembe yopsereza ndi nsembe yauchimo zikhale za Aisraele onse." 
2Chronicles29:25 Ndipo anaika Alevi m'nyumba ya Yehova ndi nsanje, ndi zisakasa, ndi azeze, monga umo adauzira Davide, ndi Gadi mlauli wa mfumu, ndi Natani mneneriyo; pakuti lamulo ili lidafuma kwa Yehova mwa aneneri ake." 
2Chronicles29:26 Alevi tsono anaimirira ndi zoimbira za Davide, ndi ansembe anakhala ndi malipenga." 
2Chronicles29:27 Nanena Hezekiya kuti apereke nsembe yopsereza pa guwa la nsembe. Ndipo pakuyamba nsembe yopsereza, inayambanso nyimbo ya Yehova ndi malipenga, pamodzi ndi zoimbira za Davideyo mfumu ya Israele." 
2Chronicles29:28 Ndi msonkhano wonse unalambira, ndi amalipenga anaomba; zonsezi mpaka adatsiriza nsembe yopsereza." 
2Chronicles29:29 Ndipo atatsiriza kuperekaku, mfumu ndi onse opezeka pamodzi naye anawerama, nalambira." 
2Chronicles29:30 Hezekiya mfumu ndi akalonga nauzanso Alevi aimbire Yehova zomlemekeza ndi mau a Davide ndi a Asafu mlauli. Ndipo anaimbira zomlemekeza mokondwera, nawerama mitu yao, nalambira." 
2Chronicles29:31 Pamenepo Hezekiya anayankha, nati, Tsopano mwadzipatulira kwa Yehova, senderani, bwerani nazo nsembe zophera ndi nsembe zoyamika kunyumba ya Yehova. Ndi msonkhano unabwera nazo nsembe zophera ndi nsembe zoyamika, ndi onse a mtima wofuna mwini anabwera nazo nsembe zopsereza." 
2Chronicles29:32 Ndi kuwerenga kwake kwa nsembe zopsereza unabwera nazo msonkhanowo ndiko ng'ombe makumi asanu ndi awiri, nkhosa zamphongo zana limodzi, ndi anaankhosa mazana awiri; zonsezi nza nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ndi zinthu zopatulika zinafikira ng'ombe mazana asanu ndi limodzi, ndi nkhosa zikwi zitatu." 
2Chronicles29:34 Koma ansembe anaperewera, osakhoza kusenda nsembe zonse zopsereza; m'mwemo abale ao Alevi anawathandiza, mpaka idatha ntchitoyi, mpaka ansembe adadzipatula; pakuti Alevi anaposa ansembe m'kuongoka mtima kwao kudzipatula." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ndiponso zidachuluka nsembe zopsereza, pamodzi ndi mafuta a nsembe zamtendere, ndi nsembe zothira za nsembe yopsereza iliyonse. Momwemo utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova unalongosoka." 
2Chronicles29:36 Nakondwera Hezekiya ndi anthu onse pa ichi Mulungu adakonzeratu; pakuti chinthuchi chidachitika modzidzimutsa. 
2Chronicles30:1 Ndipo Hezekiya anatumiza kwa Israele ndi Yuda onse, nalembanso akalata kwa Efuremu ndi Manase, kuti abwere kunyumba ya Yehova ku Yerusalemu, kuchitira Yehova Mulungu wa Israele Paska." 
2Chronicles30:2 Pakuti mfumu idapangana ndi akulu ake, ndi msonkhano wonse wa m'Yerusalemu, kuti achite Paska mwezi wachiwiri." 
2Chronicles30:3 Pakuti sanakhoze kumchita nthawi ija, popeza ansembe odzipatulira sanafikire, ndi anthu sadasonkhane ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Ndipo chinthuchi chinayenera m'maso mwa mfumu ndi msonkhano wonse. 
2Chronicles30:5 Motero anakhazikitsa mau kulalikira mwa Israele lonse, kuyambira Beereseba kufikira ku Dani, kuti abwere kuchitira Yehova Mulungu wa Israele Paska ku Yerusalemu; pakuti nthawi yaikulu sanachite monga mudalembedwa." 
2Chronicles30:6 Tsono amtokoma anamuka ndi akalata ofuma kwa mfumu ndi akulu ake mwa Israele ndi Yuda lonse, monga inauza mfumu ndi kuti, Inu ana a Israele, bwerani kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isaki, ndi Israele, kuti Iye abwere kwa otsala anu opulumuka m'dzanja la mafumu a Asiriya." 
2Chronicles30:7 Ndipo musamakhala ngati makolo anu ndi abale anu, amene analakwira Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, motero kuti anawapereka apasuke, monga mupenya." 
2Chronicles30:8 Musamakhala ouma khosi monga makolo anu; koma gwiranani dzanja ndi Yehova, nimulowe m'malo ake opatulika, amene anapatula kosatha, ndi kutumikira Yehova Mulungu wanu; kuti mkwiyo wake waukali utembenuke kwa inu." 
2Chronicles30:9 Pakuti mukabwera kwa Yehova, abale anu ndi ana anu adzapeza chifundo; sadzakuyang'anirani kumbali ngati mubwera kwa Iye." 
2Chronicles30:10 Ndipo amtokoma anapitira m'midzi yonse ya dziko la Efuremu ndi Manase, mpaka Zebuloni; koma anawaseka pwepwete nawanyodola." 
2Chronicles30:11 Komatu ena a Asere ndi Manase ndi a Zebuloni anadzichepetsa, nadza ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 Ku Yuda komwe kunali dzanja la Mulungu lakuwapatsa mtima umodzi, kuchita chowauza mfumu ndi akulu mwa mau a Yehova." 
2Chronicles30:13 Nasonkhana ku Yerusalemu anthu ambiri kuchita chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa mwezi wachiwiri, msonkhano waukulu ndithu." 
2Chronicles30:14 Ndipo anauka nachotsa maguwa a nsembe okhala m'Yerusalemu, nachotsa pofukizira zonunkhira, naziponya m'mtsinje wa Kidroni." 
2Chronicles30:15 Pamenepo anaphera Paska tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi wachiwiri, ndipo ansembe ndi Alevi anachita manyazi, nadzipatula, nabwera nazo nsembe zopsereza kunyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles30:16 Naima m'malo mwao mwa kulongosoka kwao, monga mwa chilamulo cha Mose munthu wa Mulunguyo; ansembe anawaza mwazi, ataulandira kudzanja la Alevi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Pakuti munali ambiri mumsonkhano sanadzipatule; potero Alevi anayang'anira kupha za Paska kwa aliyense wosakhala woyera, kuwapatulira Yehova." 
2Chronicles30:18 Pakuti, anthu aunyinji, ndiwo ambiri a Efuremu, ndi Manase, Isakara, ndi Zebuloni, sanadziyeretse, koma anadya Paska mosati monga munalembedwa. Koma Hezekiya anawapempherera, ndi kuti, Yehova wabwino akhululukire yense" 
2Chronicles30:19 wakuika mtima wake kufuna Mulungu Yehova, Mulungu wa makolo ake, chinkana sanayeretsedwe monga mwa mayeretsedwe a malo opatulika." 
2Chronicles30:20 Ndipo Yehova anamvera Hezekiya, nawachiritsa anthu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Ndipo ana a Israele opezeka m'Yerusalemu anachita chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa masiku asanu ndi awiri ndi chimwemwe chachikulu; ndi Alevi ndi ansembe analemekeza Yehova tsiku ndi tsiku ndi zoimbira zakuliritsa kwa Yehova. 
2Chronicles30:22 Ndipo Hezekiya ananena motonthoza mtima kwa Alevi onse akuzindikira bwino za utumiki wa Yehova. Ndipo anadya pamkomano masiku asanu ndi awiri, naphera nsembe zoyamika, ndi kulemekeza Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles30:23 Ndipo msonkhano wonse unapangana kuchita masiku asanu ndi awiri ena, nachita masiku asanu ndi ena ndi chimwemwe." 
2Chronicles30:24 Pakuti Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda anapatsa msonkhano ng'ombe chikwi chimodzi, ndi nkhosa zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri; ndi akulu anapatsa msonkhano ng'ombe chikwi chimodzi, ndi nkhosa zikwi khumi; ndipo ansembe ambiri adadzipatula." 
2Chronicles30:25 Ndi msonkhano wonse wa Yuda, pamodzi ndi ansembe ndi Alevi, ndi msonkhano wonse wochokera kwa Israele, ndi alendo ochokera kudziko la Israele, ndi okhala m'Yuda, anakondwera." 
2Chronicles30:26 Momwemo munali chimwemwe chachikulu m'Yerusalemu; pakuti kuyambira masiku a Solomoni mwana wa Davide mfumu ya Israele simunachitika chotero m'Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles30:27 Pamenepo ansembe Alevi anauka, nadalitsa anthu; ndi mau ao anamveka, ndi pemphero lao lidakwera pokhala pake popatulika Kumwamba." 
2Chronicles31:1 Chitatha ichi chonse tsono, Aisraele onse opezekako anatuluka kunka kumidzi ya Yuda, naphwanya zoimiritsa, nalikha zifanizo, nagamula misanje ndi maguwa a nsembe m'Yuda monse, ndi m'Benjamini, m'Efuremunso, ndi m'Manase, mpaka adaziononga zonse. Pamenepo ana onse a Israele anabwerera, yense kudziko lake ndi kumidzi yao." 
2Chronicles31:2 Ndipo Hezekiya anaika zigawo za ansembe ndi Alevi, monga mwa magawidwe ao, yense monga mwa utumiki wake, ndi ansembe ndi Alevi, achite nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zoyamika kutumikira, ndi kuyamika, ndi kulemekeza, kuzipata za chigono cha Ambuye." 
2Chronicles31:3 Naikanso gawo la mfumu lotapa pa chuma chake la nsembe zopsereza, ndilo la nsembe zopsereza za m'mawa ndi madzulo, ndi la nsembe zopsereza za masabata, ndi za pokhala mwezi, ndi za nyengo zoikika, monga mulembedwa m'chilamulo cha Yehova." 
2Chronicles31:4 Anauzanso anthu okhala m'Yerusalemu apereke gawo la ansembe ndi Alevi, kuti iwowa alimbike m'chilamulo cha Yehova." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ndipo pobuka mau aja, ana a Israele anapereka mochuluka, zobala zoyamba za tirigu, vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi uchi, ndi za zipatso zonse za m'minda, ndi limodzi la magawo khumi la zonse anabwera nazo mochuluka." 
2Chronicles31:6 Ndi ana a Israele ndi Yuda okhala m'midzi ya Yuda, iwonso anabwera nalo limodzi la magawo khumi la ng'ombe, ndi nkhosa, ndi limodzi la magawo khumi la zinthu zopatulika, zopatulikira Yehova Mulungu wao; naziunjika miyulumiyulu." 
2Chronicles31:7 Mwezi wachitatu anayamba kuika miyalo ya miyuluyi, naitsiriza mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri." 
2Chronicles31:8 Ndipo pamene Hezekiya ndi akulu ake anadza, naona miyuluyi, analemekeza Yehova, nadalitsa anthu ake Aisraele." 
2Chronicles31:9 Pamenepo Hezekiya anafunsana ndi ansembe ndi Alevi za miyuluyi. 
2Chronicles31:10 Ndipo Azariya wansembe wamkulu wa nyumba ya Zadoki anamyankha, nati, Chiyambire anthu anabwera nazo zopereka kunyumba ya Yehova, tadya, takhuta, ndipo zitatsalira zambiri; pakuti Yehova anadalitsa anthu ake; ndipo siuku kuchuluka kwa chotsala." 
2Chronicles31:11 Pamenepo Hezekiya anawauza akonze zipinda m'nyumba ya Yehova; nazikonza. 
2Chronicles31:12 Ndipo anabwera nazo nsembe zokweza, ndi amodzi a magawo khumi, ndi zinthu zopatulika, mokhulupirika; ndi mkulu woyang'anira izi ndiye Konaniya Mlevi, ndi Simei mng'ono wake ndiye wotsatana naye." 
2Chronicles31:13 Ndi Yehiyele, ndi Azaziya, ndi Nahati, ndi Asahele, ndi Yerimoti, ndi Yozabadi, ndi Eliyele, ndi Isimakiya, ndi Mahati, ndi Benaya, ndiwo akapitao omvera Konaniya ndi Simei mng'ono wake, oikidwa ndi Hezekiya mfumu ndi Azariya mkulu wa kunyumba ya Mulungu." 
2Chronicles31:14 Ndipo Kore mwana wa Imina Mlevi, wa kuchipata cha kum'mawa, anayang'anira zopereka zaufulu za Mulungu, kugawira nsembe zokweza za Yehova, ndi zopatulika kwambiri." 
2Chronicles31:15 Ndi omvera iye ndiwo Edeni, ndi Miniyamini, ndi Yesuwa, ndi Semaya, Amariya ndi Sekaniya, m'midzi ya ansembe, kugawira abale ao m'zigawo zao mokhulupirika, akulu monga ang'ono;" 
2Chronicles31:16 pamodzi ndi iwo oyesedwa mwa chibadwidwe cha amuna, kuyambira a zaka zitatu ndi mphambu, kwa aliyense amene adalowa m'nyumba ya Yehova, monga mwa ntchito yake pa tsiku lake, kukachita za utumiki wao m'udikiro wao monga mwa zigawo zao;" 
2Chronicles31:17 ndi iwo oyesedwa mwa chibadwidwe cha ansembe mwa nyumba za makolo ao, ndi Alevi, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu m'udikiro mwao, monga mwa zigawo zao;" 
2Chronicles31:18 ndi iwo oyesedwa mwa chibadwidwe cha ana ao ang'ono onse, akazi ao, ndi ana ao aamuna ndi aakazi, mwa msonkhano wonse; pakuti m'kukhulupirika kwao anadzipatula akhale opatulika;" 
2Chronicles31:19 panalinso amuna mwa ana a Aroni ansembe, okhala m'minda ya kubusa kwa midzi yao, m'mudzi uliwonse, otchulidwa maina ao, agawire amuna onse mwa ansembe, ndi onse mwa Alevi, oyesedwa mwa chibadwidwe magawo ao." 
2Chronicles31:20 Momwemo anachita Hezekiya mwa Yuda lonse nachita chokoma, ndi choyenera, ndi chokhulupirika, pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake." 
2Chronicles31:21 Ndipo m'ntchito iliyonse anaiyamba m'utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu, ndi m'chilamulo, ndi m'mauzo, kufuna Mulungu wake, anachita ndi mtima wake wonse, nalemerera nayo." 
2Chronicles32:1 Zitatha zinthu izi zokhulupirika, anadza Senakeribu mfumu ya Asiriya, nalowera Yuda, namangira midzi yamalinga misasa, nati adzigonjetsere iyi." 
2Chronicles32:2 Ndipo pakuona Hezekiya kuti wadza Senakeribu, ndi kuti nkhope yake inalunjikitsa kuyambana nkhondo ndi Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles32:3 anapangana ndi akulu ake ndi amphamvu ake, kutseka madzi a m'akasupe okhala kunja kwa mudzi; namthandiza iwo." 
2Chronicles32:4 Nasonkhana anthu ambiri, natseka akasupe onse, ndi mtsinje woyenda pakati pa dziko, ndi kuti, Angafike mafumu a Asiriya ndi kupeza madzi ambiri." 
2Chronicles32:5 Ndipo analimbika mtima, namangitsa linga lonse mopasuka, nalikweza mpaka pansanja, ndi linga lina kunja kwake, nalimbitsa Milo m'mudzi wa Davide, napanga zida ndi zikopa zochuluka." 
2Chronicles32:6 Naika akazembe a nkhondo alamulire anthu, nawasonkhanitsira kuli iye kubwalo la kuchipata cha mudzi, nanena nao motonthoza mtima wao ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles32:7 Limbani, mulimbike mtima, musaopa kapena kutenga nkhawa pankhope pa mfumu ya Asiriya ndi aunyinji okhala naye; pakuti okhala nafe achuluka koposa okhala naye;" 
2Chronicles32:8 pamodzi ndi iye pali dzanja la thupi lanyama; koma pamodzi ndi ife pali Yehova Mulungu wathu, kutithandiza ndi kutigwirira nkhondo. Ndipo anthu anachirikizika ndi mau a Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Pambuyo pake Senakeribu mfumu ya Asiriya, akali ku Lakisi ndi mphamvu yake yonse pamodzi naye, anatuma anyamata kwa Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda, ndi kwa Ayuda onse okhala ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles32:10 Atero Senakeribu mfumu ya Asiriya, Mutama chiyani kuti mukhala m'linga m'Yerusalemu?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Sakukopani Hezekiya, kuti akuperekeni mufe nayo njala ndi ludzu, ndi kuti, Yehova Mulungu wathu adzatilanditsa m'dzanja la mfumu ya Asiriya?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Sanaichotse misanje yake ndi maguwa ake a nsembe Hezekiya yemweyo, nauza Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Mugwadire kuguwa la nsembe limodzi ndi kufukiza zonunkhira pamenepo?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Simudziwa kodi chomwe ine ndi makolo anga tachitira anthu onse a m'maikomo? Kodi milungu ya mitundu ya anthu inakhoza konse kulanditsa dziko lao m'dzanja langa? 
2Chronicles32:14 Ndi uti mwa milungu yonse ya mitunduyi ya anthu, amene makolo anga anawaononga konse, unakhoza kulanditsa anthu ake m'dzanja mwanga?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Ndipo tsono, asakunyengeni Hezekiya, ndi kukukopani motero, musamkhulupirira; pakuti palibe Mulungu wa mtundu uliwonse wa anthu, kapena ufumu uliwonse, unakhoza kulanditsa anthu ake m'dzanja mwanga; ndipo kodi Mulungu wanu adzakulanditsani inu m'dzanja langa?" 
2Chronicles32:16 Ndipo anyamata ake anaonjeza kunena motsutsana ndi Yehova Mulungu, ndi mnyamata wake Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:17 Analemberanso akalata a kunyoza Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, ndi kunena motsutsana ndi Iye, ndi kuti, Monga milungu ya mitundu ya anthu a m'maiko, imene siinalanditsa anthu ao m'dzanja langa, momwemo Mulungu wa Hezekiya sadzalanditsa anthu ake m'dzanja mwanga." 
2Chronicles32:18 Ndipo anafuula ndi mau akulu m'chinenedwe cha Ayuda kwa anthu a m'Yerusalemu okhala palinga, kuwaopsa ndi kuwavuta, kuti alande mudziwu." 
2Chronicles32:19 Nanenera Mulungu wa Yerusalemu, monga umo amanenera milungu ya mitundu ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi, ndiyo ntchito ya manja a anthu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ndipo Hezekiya mfumu, ndi Yesaya mneneri mwana wa Amozi, anapemphera pa ichi, nafuulira Kumwamba." 
2Chronicles32:21 Ndipo Yehova anatuma wamthenga amene anaononga ngwazi zamphamvu zonse, ndi atsogoleri, ndi akazembe, kuchigono cha mfumu ya Asiriya. Nabwerera iye ndi nkhope yamanyazi kudziko lake. Ndipo atalowa m'nyumba ya mulungu wake, iwo otuluka m'matumbo mwake anamupha ndi lupanga pomwepo." 
2Chronicles32:22 Momwemo Yehova analanditsa Hezekiya ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu m'dzanja la Senakeribu mfumu ya Asiriya, ndi m'dzanja la onse ena, nawatsogolera monsemo." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ndipo ambiri anabwera nayo mitulo kwa Yehova ku Yerusalemu, ndi za mtengo wake, kwa Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda; nakwezeka iye pamaso pa amitundu onse kuyambira pomwepo." 
2Chronicles32:24 Masiku omwe aja Hezekiya anadwala pafupi imfa; ndipo anapemphera kwa Yehova; ndi Iye ananena naye, nampatsa chizindikiro chodabwitsa." 
2Chronicles32:25 Koma Hezekiya sanabwezere monga mwa chokoma anamchitira, pakuti mtima wake unakwezeka; chifukwa chake unamdzera mkwiyo iye, ndi Yuda, ndi Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Koma Hezekiya anadzichepetsa m'kudzikuza kwa mtima wake, iye ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu, momwemo mkwiyo wa Yehova sunawadzera masiku a Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Ndipo chuma ndi ulemu zinachulukira Hezekiya, nadzimangira iye zosungiramo siliva, ndi golide, ndi timiyala ta mtengo wake, ndi zonunkhira, ndi zikopa, ndi zipangizo zokoma zilizonse;" 
2Chronicles32:28 ndi nyumba zosungiramo zipatso za tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi zipinda za nyama iliyonse, ndi makola a zoweta." 
2Chronicles32:29 Nadzimangiranso midzi, nadzionera nkhosa ndi ng'ombe zochuluka; pakuti Mulungu adampatsa chuma chambirimbiri." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiya yemweyo anatseka kasupe wa kumtunda wa madzi a Gihoni, nawapambutsa atsikire kumadzulo kwa mudzi wa Davide. Ndipo Hezekiya analemerera nazo ntchito zake zonse." 
2Chronicles32:31 Koma pokhala naye akazembe a akalonga a ku Babiloni, amene anatumiza kwa iye kufunsira za chodabwitsa chija chidachitika m'dzikomo, Mulungu anamsiya, kumuyesa, kuti adziwe zonse za mumtima mwake." 
2Chronicles32:32 Machitidwe ena tsono a Hezekiya, ndi ntchito zake zokoma, taonani, zilembedwa m'masomphenya a Yesaya mneneri mwana wa Amozi, ndi m'buku la mafumu a Yuda ndi Israele." 
2Chronicles32:33 Ndipo Hezekiya anagona ndi makolo ake, namuika polowerera kumanda a ana a Davide; ndi Ayuda onse ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu anamchitira ulemu pa imfa yake. Ndipo Manase mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase anali wa zaka khumi ndi ziwiri polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi asanu mphambu zisanu." 
2Chronicles33:2 Nachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonyansa za amitundu, amene Yehova anawachotsa m'dziko mwao pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
2Chronicles33:3 Pakuti anamanganso misanje adaipasula Hezekiya atate wake, nautsira Abaala maguwa a nsembe, napanga zifanizo, nalambira khamu lonse la kuthambo, nalitumikira." 
2Chronicles33:4 Namanga maguwa a nsembe m'nyumba ya Yehova, imene Yehova adati, M'Yerusalemu mudzakhala dzina langa kunthawi zonse." 
2Chronicles33:5 Namangiranso khamu lonse la kuthambo maguwa a nsembe m'mabwalo awiri a nyumba ya Yehova. 
2Chronicles33:6 Anapititsanso ana ake pamoto m'chigwa cha ana a Hinomu, naombeza maula, nasamalira malodza, nachita zanyanga, naika obwebweta ndi openduza; anachita zoipa zambiri pamaso pa Yehova kuutsa mkwiyo wake." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ndipo anaika chifanizo chosema cha fanolo adachipanga m'nyumba ya Mulungu, imene Mulungu adati kwa Davide ndi Solomoni mwana wake, M'nyumba muno ndi m'Yerusalemu umene ndausankha m'mafuko onse a Israele ndidzaika dzina langa kunthawi zonse;" 
2Chronicles33:8 ndipo sindidzasunthanso phazi la Israele kudziko ndaliikira makolo anu; pokhapo asamalire kuchita zonse ndawalamulira, chilamulo chonse, ndi malemba, ndi maweruzo, mwa dzanja la Mose." 
2Chronicles33:9 Koma Manase analakwitsa Yuda ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu, kotero kuti anachita choipa koposa amitundu, amene Yehova anawaononga pamaso pa ana a Israele." 
2Chronicles33:10 Ndipo Yehova analankhula ndi Manase ndi anthu ake, koma sanasamalire." 
2Chronicles33:11 Motero Yehova anawafikitsira akazembe a khamu la nkhondo la mfumu ya Asiriya, namgwira Manase ndi zokowera, nammanga matangadza, namuka naye ku Babiloni." 
2Chronicles33:12 Ndipo popsinjika iye anapembedza Yehova Mulungu wake, nadzichepetsa kwambiri pamaso pa Mulungu wa makolo ake." 
2Chronicles33:13 Anampempha, ndipo anapembedzeka, namvera kupembedza kwake, nambwezera ku Yerusalemu m'ufumu wake. Pamenepo anadziwa Manase kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu." 
2Chronicles33:14 Chitatha ichi tsono iye anaumangira mudzi wa Davide linga lakunja, kumadzulo kwa Gihoni, m'chigwa, mpaka polowera pa chipata chansomba; nazinga Ofele, nalikweza kwambiri; anaikanso akazembe a nkhondo m'midzi yonse yamalinga ya m'Yuda." 
2Chronicles33:15 Ndipo anachotsa milungu yachilendo, ndi fanoli m'nyumba ya Yehova, ndi maguwa onse a nsembe anawamanga m'phiri la nyumba ya Yehova ndi m'Yerusalemu, nawataya kunja kwa mudzi." 
2Chronicles33:16 Namanga guwa la nsembe la Yehova, napherapo nsembe zamtendere ndi zoyamika, nalamulira Yuda atumikire Yehova Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles33:17 Koma anthu anapherabe nsembe pamisanje; koma anaziphera Yehova Mulungu wao. 
2Chronicles33:18 Machitidwe ena tsono a Manase, ndi pemphero lake kwa Mulungu wake, ndi mau a alauli akunena naye m'dzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, taonani, zalembedwa m'machitidwe a mafumu a Israele." 
2Chronicles33:19 Pemphero lake lomwe, ndi m'mene Mulungu anapembedzeka naye, ndi tchimo lake lonse, ndi kulakwa kwake, ndi apo anamanga misanje, naimika zifanizo ndi mafano osema asanadzichepetse, taonani, zalembedwa m'buku la mau a Hozai." 
2Chronicles33:20 Momwemo Manase anagona ndi makolo ake, namuika m'nyumba mwakemwake; ndi Amoni mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni ndiye wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka ziwiri." 
2Chronicles33:22 Ndipo anachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo anachitira Manase atate wake; pakuti Amoni anaphera nsembe mafano osema onse amene adawapanga Manase atate wake, nawatumikira." 
2Chronicles33:23 Koma sanadzichepetse pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo anadzichepetsera Manase atate wake; koma Amoni amene anachulukitsa kupalamula kwake." 
2Chronicles33:24 Ndipo anyamata ake anampangira chiwembu, namupha m'nyumba yakeyake." 
2Chronicles33:25 Koma anthu a m'dziko anapha onse adampangira chiwembu mfumu Amoni; ndi anthu a m'dziko analonga Yosiya mwana wake akhale mfumu m'malo mwake. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya ndiye wa zaka zisanu ndi zitatu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka makumi atatu mphambu chimodzi." 
2Chronicles34:2 Nachita zoongoka pamaso pa Yehova, nayenda m'njira za Davide kholo lake, osapatuka kudzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere." 
2Chronicles34:3 Pakuti atakhala mfumu zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri akali mnyamata, anayamba kufuna Mulungu wa Davide kholo lake; ndipo atakhala zaka khumi ndi chimodzi anayamba kuyeretsa Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, kuzichotsa misanje, ndi zifanizo, ndi mafano osema, ndi mafano oyenga." 
2Chronicles34:4 Ndipo anthu anagumula maguwa a nsembe a Abaala pamaso pake; nawalikha mafano a dzuwa anakwezeka pamwamba pao; naphwanya zifanizo, ndi mafano osema, ndi mafano oyenga; nazipera, naziwaza pamanda pa iwo amene adaziphera nsembe." 
2Chronicles34:5 Napsereza mafupa a ansembe pa maguwa a nsembe ao, nayeretsa Yuda ndi Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:6 Nateronso m'midzi ya Manase, ndi Efuremu, ndi Simeoni, mpaka Nafutali, m'mabwinja mwao mozungulira." 
2Chronicles34:7 Nagumula maguwa a nsembe, naperapera zifanizo ndi mafano osema, nalikha mafano a dzuwa onse m'dziko lonse la Israele, nabwerera kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Atakhala mfumu tsono zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri, atayeretsa dziko ndi nyumbayi, anatuma Safani mwana wa Azaliya, ndi Maaseiya kazembe wa mudzi, ndi Yowa mwana wa Yehowahazi wolemba mbiri, akonze nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wake." 
2Chronicles34:9 Ndipo anadza kwa Hilikiya mkulu wa ansembe, napereka ndalama adabwera nazo kunyumba ya Mulungu, zimene Alevi osunga pakhomo adasonkhanitsa kuzilandira kudzanja la Manase ndi Efuremu, ndi kwa otsala onse a Israele, ndi kwa Yuda yense, ndi Benjamini, ndi kwa okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ndipo anazipereka m'dzanja la antchito oikidwa ayang'anire nyumba ya Yehova; ndi iwo anazipereka kwa antchito akuchita m'nyumba ya Yehova kukonza ndi kulimbitsa nyumbayi; 
2Chronicles34:11 anazipereka kwa amisiri a mitengo ndi omanga nyumba, agule miyala yosema, ndi mitengo ya mitanda yam'mwamba ndi yammunsi ya nyumbazi, adaziononga mafumu a Yuda." 
2Chronicles34:12 Ndipo amunawo anachita ntchitoyi mokhulupirika; ndi oikidwa awayang'anire ndiwo Yahati ndi Obadiya, Alevi, a ana a Merari; ndi Zekariya ndi Mesulamu, a ana a Akohati, kuifulumiza; ndi Alevi ena aliyense waluso la zoimbira." 
2Chronicles34:13 Anayang'aniranso osenza akatundu, nafulumiza onse akugwira ntchito ya utumiki uliwonse; ndi mwa Alevi munali alembi, ndi akapitao, ndi odikira." 
2Chronicles34:14 Ndipo pakutulutsa ndalama zimene adalowa nazo kunyumba ya Yehova, Hilikiya wansembe anapeza buku la chilamulo la Yehova mwa dzanja la Mose." 
2Chronicles34:15 Ndipo Hilikiya anayankha nati kwa Safani mlembi, Ndapeza buku la chilamulo m'nyumba ya Yehova. Hilikiya napereka buku kwa Safani." 
2Chronicles34:16 Ndi Safani anamuka nalo buku kwa mfumu, nabwezeranso mau kwa mfumu, ndi kuti, Zonse mudazipereka kwa anyamata anu alikuzichita." 
2Chronicles34:17 Nakhuthula ndalama zinapezeka m'nyumba ya Yehova, nazipereka m'manja a akapitao ndi m'manja a antchito." 
2Chronicles34:18 Ndipo Safani mlembi anauza mfumu, ndi kuti, Hilikiya wansembe anandipatsa buku. Nawerengamo Safani pamaso pa mfumu." 
2Chronicles34:19 Ndipo kunali, atamva mfumu mau a chilamulo, anang'amba zovala zake." 
2Chronicles34:20 Mfumu niuza Hilikiya, ndi Ahikamu mwana wa Safani, ndi Abidoni mwana wa Mikaya, ndi Safani mlembi, ndi Asaya mnyamata wa mfumu, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles34:21 Mukani, mundifunsire kwa Yehova, ine ndi otsala m'Israele ndi Yuda, za mau a m'buku lopezekalo; pakuti ukali wa Yehova atitsanulirawu ndi waukulu; popeza makolo athu sanasunge mau a Yehova kuchita monga mwa zonse zolembedwa m'bukumu." 
2Chronicles34:22 Namuka Hilikiya ndi iwo aja adawauza mfumu kwa Hulida mneneri wamkazi, mkazi wa Salumu mwana wa Tokati, mwana wa Hasira wosunga zovala, amene anakhala m'Yerusalemu m'dera lachiwiri, nanena naye mwakuti." 
2Chronicles34:23 Ndipo iye ananena nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Muuze munthuyo anakutumizani kwa ine," 
2Chronicles34:24 Atero Yehova, Taonani, ndifikitsira malo ano ndi anthu okhala m'mwemo choipa, ndicho matemberero onse olembedwa m'buku adaliwerenga pamaso pa mfumu ya Yuda;" 
2Chronicles34:25 chifukwa anandisiya Ine, nafukizira milungu ina, kuti autse mkwiyo wanga ndi ntchito zonse za manja ao; chifukwa chake ukali wanga utsanulidwa pamalo pano wosazimika." 
2Chronicles34:26 Koma kwa mfumu ya Yuda amene anakutumizani kufunsira kwa Yehova, muzitero kwa iye, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Kunena za mau udawamva," 
2Chronicles34:27 popeza mtima wako unali woolowa, ndipo wadzichepetsa pamaso pa Mulungu, pakumva mau ake otsutsana nao malo ano, ndi okhala m'mwemo, ndi kudzichepetsa pamaso panga, ndi kung'amba zovala zako, ndi kulira pamaso panga; Inenso ndakumvera, ati Yehova." 
2Chronicles34:28 Taona, ndidzakusonkhanitsa kumakolo ako, nudzaikidwa kumanda kwako mumtendere, ndi maso ako sadzapenya zoipa zonse ndidzafikitsira malo ano ndi okhala m'mwemo. Ndipo anambwezera mfumu mau." 
2Chronicles34:29 Pamenepo mfumu inatumiza anthu, nisonkhanitsa akuluakulu onse a Yuda ndi Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:30 Nikwera mfumu kunyumba ya Yehova ndi amuna onse a m'Yuda, ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi ansembe ndi Alevi, ndi anthu onse akulu ndi ang'ono; nawerenga iye m'makutu mwao mau onse a buku la chipangano adalipeza m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles34:31 Ndipo mfumu inaimirira pokhala pake, nichita pangano pamaso pa Yehova, kuti adzayenda chotsata Yehova, ndi kusunga malamulo ake, ndi mboni zake, ndi malemba ake, ndi mtima wake wonse, ndi moyo wake wonse, kuchita mau a chipangano olembedwa m'bukumu." 
2Chronicles34:32 Naimiritsapo onse okhala m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Benjamini. Ndipo okhala m'Yerusalemu anachita monga mwa chipangano cha Mulungu, Mulungu wa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles34:33 Yosiya nachotsa zonyansa zonse m'maiko onse okhala a ana a Israele, natumikiritsa onse opezeka m'Israele, inde kutumikira Yehova Mulungu wao. Masiku ake onse iwo sanapatuke kusamtsata Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles35:1 Pamenepo Yosiya anachitira Yehova Paska m'Yerusalemu, naphera Paska tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi woyamba." 
2Chronicles35:2 Ndipo anaika ansembe pa udikiro wao, nawalimbikitsa achite utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Chronicles35:3 Nati kwa Alevi akuphunzitsa Aisraele onse, ndiwo opatulikira Yehova, Ikani likasa lopatulika m'nyumba imene Solomoni mwana wa Davide mfumu ya Israele anaimanga; silikhalanso katundu pa mapewa anu; tsopano mutumikire Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi anthu ake Israele." 
2Chronicles35:4 Ndipo mudzikonzere monga mwa nyumba za makolo anu, m'zigawo zanu, monga umo adalembera Davide mfumu ya Israele, ndi umo adalembera Solomoni mwana wake." 
2Chronicles35:5 Ndipo muimirire m'malo opatulika, monga mwa magawidwe a nyumba za makolo za abale anu ana a anthu, akhale nalo onse gawo la nyumba ya makolo ya Alevi." 
2Chronicles35:6 Ndipo muphere Paska, nimudzipatule ndi kukonzera abale anu, kuchita monga mwa mau a Yehova ndi dzanja la Mose." 
2Chronicles35:7 Ndipo Yosiya anapatsa ana a anthu zoweta, anaankhosa ndi a mbuzi zikhale zonsezo za nsembe za Paska kwa aliyense anali komweko; zinafikira zikwi makumi atatu, ndi ng'ombe zikwi zitatu, ndizo zotapa pa chuma cha mfumu." 
2Chronicles35:8 Ndi akulu ake anapatsa nsembe yaufulu kwa anthu, kwa ansembe, ndi kwa Alevi. Hilikiya ndi Zekariya ndi Yehiyele, atsogoleri a m'nyumba ya Mulungu, anapatsa ansembe zoweta zazing'ono zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi, ndi ng'ombe mazana atatu, zikhale nsembe za Paska." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniyanso, ndi Semaya, ndi Netanele, abale ake, ndi Hasabiya, ndi Yeiyele, ndi Yozabadi, akulu a Alevi, anapatsa Alevi zoweta zazing'ono zikwi zisanu, ndi ng'ombe mazana asanu, zikhale nsembe za Paska." 
2Chronicles35:10 Momwemo anakonzera kutumikiraku, naima ansembe pokhala pao, ndi Alevi m'zigawo zao, monga umo adawauzira mfumu." 
2Chronicles35:11 Pamenepo anaphera Paska; ndi ansembe anawaza mwazi adaulandira m'manja mwa Alevi amene anasenda nsembezo. 
2Chronicles35:12 Ndipo anachotsapo nsembe zopsereza, kuti azipereke kwa ana a anthu monga mwa magawidwe a nyumba za makolo; azipereke kwa Yehova monga mulembedwa m'buku la Mose. Natero momwemo ndi ng'ombezo." 
2Chronicles35:13 Ndipo anaotcha Paska pamoto, monga mwa chiweruzo; koma zopatulikazo anaziphika m'miphika, ndi m'mitsuko, ndi m'ziwaya; nazipereka msanga kwa ana onse a anthu." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ndi pambuyo pake anadzikonzera okha ndi ansembe; popeza ansembe, ana a Aroni, analikupereka nsembe zopsereza ndi mafuta mpaka usiku; chifukwa chake Alevi anadzikonzera okha ndi ansembe ana a Aroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Ndi oimbira, ana a Asafu, anali pokhala pao, monga adalamulira Davide, ndi Asafu, ndi Hemani, ndi Yedutuni mlauli wa mfumu; ndi olindirira anali pa zipata zonse, analibe kuleka utumiki wao; pakuti abale ao Alevi anawakonzera." 
2Chronicles35:16 Momwemo kutumikira konse kwa Yehova kunakonzeka tsiku lomwelo, kuchita Paska, ndi kupereka nsembe zopsereza pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova, monga analamulira mfumu Yosiya." 
2Chronicles35:17 Ndipo ana a Israele okhalako anachita Paska nthawi yomweyo, ndi chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
2Chronicles35:18 Panalibe Paska wochitika m'Israele wonga ameneyu, kuyambira masiku a Samuele mneneri; panalibenso wina wa mafumu a Israele anachita Paska wotere, ngati ameneyu anachita Yosiya, ndi ansembe, ndi Alevi, ndi Ayuda onse, ndi Aisraele opezekako, ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Yosiya atakhala mfumu zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri anachita Paska amene. 
2Chronicles35:20 Chitatha ichi chonse, Yosiya atakonza nyumbayi, Neko mfumu ya Aejipito anakwera kuyambana ku Karikemisi ku Yufurate; ndipo Yosiya anamtulukira kuyambana naye." 
2Chronicles35:21 Koma Neko anatuma mithenga kwa iye, ndi kuti, Ndili ndi chiyani ndi inu, mfumu ya Yuda? Sindinafika kuyambana ndi inu lero, koma ndi nyumba imene ndili nayo nkhondo; ndipo Mulungu anati ndifulumire; lekani kuvutana ndi Mulungu amene ali nane, Iye angakuonongeni." 
2Chronicles35:22 Koma Yosiya sanatembenuke nkhope yake kumleka, koma anadzizimbaitsa kuti ayambane naye, osamvera mau a Neko ochokera m'kamwa mwa Mulungu; nadza kuyambana naye m'chigwa cha Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Ndipo oponya anayang'anitsa mivi pa mfumu Yosiya, niti mfumu kwa anyamata ake, Ndichotseni ndalasidwa ndithu." 
2Chronicles35:24 Pamenepo anyamata ake anamtulutsa m'galeta, namuika m'galeta wachiwiri anali naye, nabwerera naye ku Yerusalemu; nafa iye naikidwa m'manda a makolo ake. Ayuda onse ndi Yerusalemu nalira Yosiya." 
2Chronicles35:25 Ndipo Yeremiya anamlembera Yosiya nyimbo yomlira; ndi oimbira onse, amuna ndi akazi, amanena za Yosiya nyimbo za maliro zao mpaka lero lino; naziika zikhale lemba m'Israele; taonani, zilembedwa m'Nyimbo za Maliro." 
2Chronicles35:26 Machitidwe ena tsono a Yosiya, ndi ntchito zake zokoma, monga mulembedwa m'chilamulo cha Yehova," 
2Chronicles35:27 ndi zochita iye, zoyamba ndi zotsiriza, taonani, zilembedwa m'buku la mafumu a Israele ndi Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Pamenepo anthu a m'dziko anatenga Yehowahazi mwana wa Yosiya, namlonga ufumu m'Yerusalemu, m'malo mwa atate wake." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehowahazi anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zitatu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu miyezi itatu." 
2Chronicles36:3 Ndipo mfumu ya Aejipito anamchotsera ufumu wake m'Yerusalemu, nasonkhetsa dziko matalente zana limodzi a siliva, ndi talente limodzi la golide." 
2Chronicles36:4 Ndi mfumu ya Aejipito anamlonga Eliyakimu mng'ono wake mfumu ya Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, nasintha dzina lake likhale Yehoyakimu. Koma Neko anatenga Yehowahazi mkulu wake, namuka naye ku Ejipito." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimu anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zisanu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi ndi chimodzi, nachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni anakwera kuyambana naye, nammanga ndi matangadza kumuka naye ku Babiloni." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinezara anatenganso ndi zipangizo za nyumba ya Yehova kunka nazo ku Babiloni, naziika m'Kachisi wake ku Babiloni." 
2Chronicles36:8 Machitidwe ena tsono a Yehoyakimu, ndi zonyansa zake anazichita, ndi zija zidapezeka zomtsutsa; taonani, zilembedwa m'buku la mafumu a Israele ndi Yuda; ndi Yehoyakini mwana wake anakhala mfumu m'malo mwake." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakini anali wa zaka zisanu ndi zitatu polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu miyezi itatu, ndi masiku khumi; nachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova." 
2Chronicles36:10 Ndipo pofikanso nyengo, mfumu Nebukadinezara anatumiza anthu abwere naye ku Babiloni, pamodzi ndi zipangizo zokoma za nyumba ya Yehova; nalonga Zedekiya mbale wake mfumu ya Yuda ndi Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu chimodzi polowa ufumu wake, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi ndi chimodzi," 
2Chronicles36:12 nachita choipa pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wake; sanadzichepetse kwa Yeremiya mneneri wakunena zochokera pakamwa pa Yehova. 
2Chronicles36:13 Ndiponso anapandukana naye mfumu Nebukadinezara, amene adamlumbiritsa pa Mulungu; koma anaumitsa khosi lake, nalimbitsa mtima wake kusatembenukira kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles36:14 Ndiponso ansembe aakulu onse ndi anthu anachulukitsa zolakwa zao, monga mwa zonyansa zonse za amitundu, nadetsa nyumba ya Yehova, imene anapatula m'Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao anatumiza kwa iwo ndi dzanja la mithenga yake, nalawirira mamawa kuituma, chifukwa anamvera chifundo anthu ake, ndi pokhala pake;" 
2Chronicles36:16 koma ananyodola mithenga ya Mulungu, napeputsa mau ake, naseka aneneri ake, mpaka ukali wa Yehova unaukira anthu ake, mpaka panalibe cholanditsa." 
2Chronicles36:17 Pakuti Iye anawakweretsera mfumu ya Ababiloni, ndiye anawaphera anyamata ao ndi lupanga, m'nyumba ya malo ao opatulika, osachitira chifundo mnyamata kapena namwali, mkulu kapena nkhalamba; Mulungu anawapereka onse m'dzanja lake." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ndi zipangizo zonse za nyumba ya Mulungu, zazikulu ndi zazing'ono, ndi chuma cha nyumba ya Yehova, ndi chuma cha mfumu, ndi cha akalonga ake, anabwera nazo zonsezi ku Babiloni." 
2Chronicles36:19 Ndipo anatentha nyumba ya Mulungu, nagumula linga la Yerusalemu, natentha nyumba zake zonse zachifumu ndi moto, naononga zipangizo zake zonse zokoma." 
2Chronicles36:20 Ndi iwo amene adapulumuka kulupanga anamuka nao ku Babiloni, nakhala iwo anyamata ake, ndi a ana ake, mpaka mfumu ya Persiya idachita ufumu;" 
2Chronicles36:21 kuti akwaniridwe mau a Yehova pakamwa pa Yeremiya, mpaka dziko linakondwera nao masabata ake; masiku onse a kupasuka kwake linasunga Sabata, kukwaniritsa zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
2Chronicles36:22 Chaka choyamba tsono cha Kirusi mfumu ya Persiya, kuti akwaniridwe mau a Yehova pakamwa pa Yeremiya, Yehova anautsa mzimu wa Kirusi mfumu ya Persiya, kuti abukitse mau m'ufumu wake wonse, nawalembenso, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles36:23 Atero Kirusi mfumu ya Persiya, Yehova Mulungu Wam'mwamba anandipatsa maufumu onse a pa dziko lapansi nandilangiza ndimmangire nyumba m'Yerusalemu, ndiwo ku Yuda. Aliyense mwa inu a anthu ake onse, Yehova Mulungu wake akhale naye, akwereko." 
Ezra1:1 Chaka choyamba tsono cha Kirusi mfumu ya ku Persiya, kuti akwaniridwe mau a Yehova m'kamwa mwa Yeremiya, Yehova anautsa mzimu wa Kirusi, kuti abukitse mau m'ufumu wake wonse, nawalembenso, ndi kuti," 
Ezra1:2 Atero Kirusi mfumu ya ku Persiya, Yehova Mulungu Wam'mwamba anandipatsa maufumu onse a pa dziko lapansi, nandilangiza ndimmangire nyumba m'Yerusalemu, ndiwo m'Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Aliyense mwa inu a anthu ake onse, Mulungu wake akhale naye, akwere kunka ku Yerusalemu, ndiwo m'Yuda, nakaimange nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wa Israele; Iye ndiye Mulungu wokhala m'Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:4 Ndipo aliyense wotsala pamalo paliponse agonerapo iye, anthu a kumalo kwake amthandize ndi siliva, ndi golide, ndi zoweta, ndi chuma, pamodzi ndi nsembe yaufulu ya kwa nyumba ya Mulungu ili ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:5 Pamenepo ananyamuka akulu a nyumba za makolo a Yuda ndi Benjamini, ndi ansembe, ndi Alevi, ndiwo onse amene Mulungu adawautsira mzimu wao akwere kukamanga nyumba ya Yehova ili ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:6 Ndipo onse akuwazinga analimbitsa manja ao ndi zipangizo za siliva, ndi golide, ndi chuma, ndi zoweta, ndi zinthu za mtengo wake, pamodzi ndi nsembe zaufulu." 
Ezra1:7 Kirusi mfumu anatulutsanso zipangizo za nyumba ya Yehova, zimene Nebukadinezara adazitulutsa m'Yerusalemu, ndi kuziika m'nyumba ya milungu yake;" 
Ezra1:8 zomwezi Kirusi mfumu ya ku Persiya anazitulutsa ndi dzanja la Mitiredati wosunga chumayo, naziwerengera Sezibazara kalonga wa Ayuda." 
Ezra1:9 Kuwerenga kwake ndiko: mbale zagolide makumi atatu, mbale zasiliva chikwi chimodzi, mipeni makumi awiri mphambu isanu ndi inai;" 
Ezra1:10 zikho zagolide makumi atatu, zikho zasiliva zina mazana anai ndi khumi, zipangizo zina chikwi chimodzi." 
Ezra1:11 Zipangizo zonse zagolide ndi zasiliva ndizo zikwi zisanu ndi mazana anai. Izi zonse Sezibazara anakwera nazo, pokwera andende aja kuchokera ku Babiloni kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra2:1 Ana a deralo, amene anakwera kutuluka m'ndende mwa andende aja Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni adawatenga ndende kunka nao ku Babiloni, nabwerera kunka ku Yerusalemu ndi Yuda, yense kumudzi wake, ndi awa:" 
Ezra2:2 ndiwo amene adadza ndi Zerubabele, Yesuwa, Nehemiya, Seraya, Reelaya, Mordekai, Bilisani, Misipara, Bigivai, Rehumu, Baana. Kuwerenga kwa amuna a anthu a Israele ndiko:" 
Ezra2:3 ana a Parosi, zikwi ziwiri ndi zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:4 Ana a Sefatiya, mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:5 Ana a Ara, mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza asanu." 
Ezra2:6 Ana a Pahatimowabu, a ana a Yesuwa ndi Yowabu, zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza khumi ndi awiri." 
Ezra2:7 Ana a Elamu, chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi anai." 
Ezra2:8 Ana a Zatu, mazana asanu ndi anai mphambu makumi anai kudza asanu." 
Ezra2:9 Ana a Zakai, mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi." 
Ezra2:10 Ana a Bani, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi anai kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:11 Ana a Bebai, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:12 Ana a Azigadi, chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri kudza makumi awiri ndi awiri." 
Ezra2:13 Ana a Adonikamu, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi mmodzi." 
Ezra2:14 Ana a Bigivai, zikwi ziwiri mphambu makumi asanu kudza asanu ndi mmodzi." 
Ezra2:15 Ana a Adini, mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu kudza anai." 
Ezra2:16 Ana a Atere, a Hezekiya, makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu asanu ndi atatu." 
Ezra2:17 Ana a Bezai, mazana atatu mphambu makumi awiri kudza atatu." 
Ezra2:18 Ana a Yora, zana limodzi mphambu khumi ndi awiri." 
Ezra2:19 Ana a Hasumu, mazana awiri mphambu makumi awiri kudza atatu." 
Ezra2:20 Ana a Gibara, makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu asanu." 
Ezra2:21 Ana a Betelehemu zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza atatu. 
Ezra2:22 Anthu a ku Netofa, makumi asanu mphambu asanu ndi mmodzi." 
Ezra2:23 Anthu a ku Anatoti, zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Ezra2:24 Ana a Azimaveti, makumi anai mphambu awiri." 
Ezra2:25 Ana a Kiriyati-Arimu, Kefira, ndi Beeroti, mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi anai kudza atatu." 
Ezra2:26 Ana a Rama ndi Geba, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza mmodzi." 
Ezra2:27 Anthu a Mikimasi, zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:28 Anthu a ku Betele ndi Ai, mazana awiri mphambu makumi awiri kudza atatu." 
Ezra2:29 Ana a Nebo, makumi asanu mphambu awiri." 
Ezra2:30 Ana a Magabisi, zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza asanu ndi mmodzi." 
Ezra2:31 Ana a Elamu wina, chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi anai." 
Ezra2:32 Ana a Harimu, mazana atatu mphambu makumi awiri." 
Ezra2:33 Ana a Lodi, Hadidi, ndi Ono, mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu." 
Ezra2:34 Ana a Yeriko, mazana atatu mphambu makumi anai kudza asanu." 
Ezra2:35 Ana a Senaa, zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza makumi atatu." 
Ezra2:36 Ansembe: ana a Yedaya, a nyumba ya Yesuwa, mazana asanu ndi anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza atatu." 
Ezra2:37 Ana a Imeri, chikwi chimodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:38 Ana a Pasuri, chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri kudza makumi anai ndi asanu ndi awiri." 
Ezra2:39 Ana a Harimu, chikwi chimodzi mphambu khumi limodzi kudza asanu ndi awiri." 
Ezra2:40 Alevi: ana a Yesuwa, ndi Kadimiyele, ndiwo a ana a Hodaviya, makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu anai." 
Ezra2:41 Oimba: ana a Asafu, zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Ezra2:42 Ana a odikira: ana a Salumu, ana a Atere, ana a Talimoni, ana a Akubu, ana a Hatita, ana a Sobai, onse pamodzi ndiwo zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu kudza asanu ndi anai." 
Ezra2:43 Anetini: ana a Ziha, ana a Hasufa, ana a Tabaoti," 
Ezra2:44 ana a Kerosi, ana a Siyaha, ana a Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 ana a Lebana, ana a Hagaba, ana a Akubu," 
Ezra2:46 ana a Hagabu, ana a Salimai, ana a Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 ana a Gidele, ana a Gahara, ana a Reaya," 
Ezra2:48 ana a Rezini, ana a Nekoda, ana a Gazamu," 
Ezra2:49 ana a Uza, ana a Paseya, ana a Besai," 
Ezra2:50 ana a Asina, ana a Meunimu, ana a Nefisimu," 
Ezra2:51 ana a Bakibuki, ana a Hakufa, ana a Harihuri," 
Ezra2:52 ana a Baziluti, ana a Mehida, ana a Harisa," 
Ezra2:53 ana a Barikosi, ana a Sisera, ana a Tema," 
Ezra2:54 ana a Neziya, ana a Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Ana a akapolo a Solomoni: ana a Sotai, ana a Sofereti, ana a Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 ana a Yaala, ana a Darikoni, ana a Gidele," 
Ezra2:57 ana a Sefatiya, ana a Hatili, ana a Pokereti-Hazebaimu, ana a Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Anetini onse, ndi ana a akapolo a Solomoni, ndiwo mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:59 Ndipo okwera kuchokera ku Telemela, Teleharisa, Kerubi, Adani, Imeri, ndi awa, koma sanakhoze kutchula nyumba za makolo ao ndi mbumba zao ngati ali Aisraele:" 
Ezra2:60 ana a Delaya, ana a Tobiya, ana a Nekoda, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza awiri." 
Ezra2:61 Ndi ana a ansembe: ana a Habaya, ana a Hakozi, ana a Barizilai, amene anadzitengera mkazi wa ana akazi a Barizilai Mgiliyadi, natchedwa dzina lao." 
Ezra2:62 Awa anafunafuna maina ao m'buku la iwo owerengedwa mwa chibadwidwe chao, koma osawapeza; potero anachotsedwa ku ntchito ya nsembe monga odetsedwa." 
Ezra2:63 Ndipo kazembe anawauza kuti asadyeko zopatulika kwambiri, mpaka adzabuka wansembe wokhala ndi Urimu ndi Tumimu." 
Ezra2:64 Msonkhano wonse pamodzi ndiwo wa zikwi makumi anai ndi awiri mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi," 
Ezra2:65 osawerenga akapolo ao aamuna ndi aakazi, ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana atatu ndi makumi atatu kudza asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anakhala nao aamuna ndi aakazi oimbira mazana awiri." 
Ezra2:66 Akavalo ao ndiwo mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi atatu kudza asanu ndi mmodzi; nyuru zao mazana awiri mphambu makumi anai kudza zisanu; 
Ezra2:67 ngamira zao mazana anai mphambu makumi atatu kudza asanu; abulu zikwi zisanu ndi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi awiri. 
Ezra2:68 Ndipo akulu ena a nyumba za makolo, pofika kunyumba ya Yehova ili ku Yerusalemu, anapereka chaufulu kwa nyumba ya Mulungu chakuiimika pakuzika pake." 
Ezra2:69 Monga momwe anakhoza anapereka kuchuma cha ntchitoyi madariki agolide zikwi zisanu ndi chimodzi, miyeso ya mina ya siliva zikwi zisanu, ndi malaya a ansembe zana limodzi." 
Ezra2:70 Ndipo ansembe, ndi Alevi, ndi anthu ena, ndi oimbira, ndi odikira, ndi Anetini, anakhala m'midzi mwao, ndi Aisraele onse m'midzi mwao." 
Ezra3:1 Utakhala tsono mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, ana a Israele ali m'midzimo, anthuwo anasonkhana ngati munthu mmodzi ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra3:2 Nanyamuka Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki, ndi abale ake ansembe, ndi Zerubabele mwana wa Sealatiele, ndi abale ake, namanga guwa la nsembe la Mulungu wa Israele, kuperekapo nsembe zopsereza, monga mulembedwa m'chilamulo cha Mose munthu wa Mulungu." 
Ezra3:3 Ndipo anakhazika guwa la nsembe patsinde pake chifukwa cha kuopa iwo anthu a m'maikomo; nakwezera Yehova nsembe zopsereza pamenepo, nsembe zopsereza zam'mawa ndi zamadzulo." 
Ezra3:4 Nachita chikondwerero cha Misasa monga kwalembedwa, napereka nsembe yopsereza tsiku ndi tsiku mawerengedwe ake, monga mwa lamulo lake la tsiku lake pa tsiku lake;" 
Ezra3:5 atatero anaperekanso nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi za pokhala mwezi, ndi za nyengo zoikika zonse za Yehova zopatulika, ndi za munthu yense wopereka nsembe yaufulu kwa Yehova mwaufulu." 
Ezra3:6 Chiyambire tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri anapereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova; koma sanamange maziko a Kachisi wa Yehova. 
Ezra3:7 Anaperekanso ndalama kwa amisiri a miyala, ndi a mitengo; ndi chakudya, ndi chakumwa, ndi mafuta, kwa a ku Sidoni, ndi a ku Tiro, kuti atenge mikungudza ku Lebanoni, kufika nayo ku nyanja ku Yopa, monga adawalola Kirusi mfumu ya Persiya." 
Ezra3:8 Chaka chachiwiri tsono chakufika iwo kunyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu, mwezi wachiwiri, Zerubabele mwana wa Sealatiele, ndi Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki, ndi abale ao otsala, ansembe ndi Alevi, ndi onse ochokera kundende kudza ku Yerusalemu, anayamba, naika Alevi a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, ayang'anire ntchito ya nyumba ya Yehova." 
Ezra3:9 Pamenepo anaimirira pamodzi Yesuwa ndi ana ake ndi abale ake, Kadimiyele ndi ana ake, ana a Yuda, kuyang'anira ogwira ntchito m'nyumba ya Yehova, ana a Henadadi ndi ana ao ndi abale ao Alevi." 
Ezra3:10 Ndipo pomanga maziko a Kachisi wa Yehova, amisiriwo anaimiritsa ansembe ovala zovala zao ndi mphalasa, ndi Alevi ana a Asafu ndi nsanje, kuti alemekeze Yehova, monga umo anaikiratu Davide mfumu ya Israele." 
Ezra3:11 Ndipo anathirirana mang'ombe, kulemekeza ndi kuyamika Yehova, ndi kuti, Pakuti ndiye wabwino, pakuti chifundo chake nchosalekeza pa Israele. Nafuula anthu onse ndi chimfuu chachikulu, pomlemekeza Yehova; popeza adamanga maziko a nyumba ya Yehova." 
Ezra3:12 Koma ansembe ambiri, ndi Alevi, ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo, okalamba amene adaona nyumba yoyamba ija, pomanga maziko a nyumba iyi pamaso pao, analira ndi mau akulu; koma ambiri anafuulitsa mokondwera." 
Ezra3:13 Potero anthu sanazindikire phokoso la kufuula mokondwera kulisiyanitsa ndi phokoso la kulira kwa anthu; pakuti anthu anafuulitsa kwakukulu, ndi phokoso lake lidamveka kutali." 
Ezra4:1 Atamva tsono adani a Yuda ndi Benjamini kuti ana aja a ndende analikumangira Yehova Mulungu wa Israele Kachisi," 
Ezra4:2 anayandikira kwa Zerubabele, ndi kwa akulu a nyumba za makolo, nanena nao, Timange pamodzi nanu; pakuti timfuna Mulungu wanu monga inu, ndipo timamphera nsembe chiyambire masiku a Esarahadoni mfumu ya Asiriya, amene anatikweretsa kuno." 
Ezra4:3 Koma Zerubabele, ndi Yesuwa, ndi akulu otsala a nyumba za makolo a Israele, anati kwa iwo, Sikuyenera ndi inu ndi ife kumangira Mulungu wathu nyumba, koma ife tokha pamodzi tidzamangira Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, monga mfumu Kirusi mfumu ya Persiya watilamulira." 
Ezra4:4 Pamenepo anthu a m'dziko anafoketsa manja a anthu Ayuda, nawavuta pomanga," 
Ezra4:5 nalembera opangira atsutsane nao, nafafanize uphungu wao, masiku onse a Kirusi mfumu ya Persiya, mpaka ufumu wa Dariusi mfumu ya Persiya." 
Ezra4:6 Ndipo pokhala mfumu Ahasuwero, poyambira ufumu wake, analembera chowaneneza okhala m'Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu." 
Ezra4:7 Ndipo masiku a Arita-kisereksesi Bisilamu, Mitiredati, Tabeele, ndi anzao otsala, analembera kwa Arita-kisereksesi mfumu ya Persiya; ndi chilembedwe chake cha kalatayo anamlemba m'Chiaramu, namsanduliza m'Chiaramu." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumu chiwinda cha malamulo, ndi Simisai mlembi, analemba kalata kwa mfumu Arita-kisereksesi, wakutsutsana naye Yerusalemu motere:" 
Ezra4:9 nalembera Rehumu chiwinda cha malamulo, ndi Simisai mlembi, ndi anzake otsala; Adinai, ndi Afarisatikai, Ataripilai, Afarisai, Aereke, Ababiloni, Asusani, Adehai, Aelamu," 
Ezra4:10 ndi amitundu otsala amene, Osinapara wamkulu ndi womveka adawatenga mikoli, nawakhalitsa m'mudzi wa Samariya, ndi m'dziko lotsala tsidya lino la mtsinje wa Yufurate." 
Ezra4:11 Zolembedwa m'kalatayo ndizo: Kwa Arita-kisereksesi mfumu, ife akapolo anu, anthu a tsidya lino la mtsinjewo, tikupatsani moni." 
Ezra4:12 Adziwe mfumu kuti, Ayuda adakwerawo ochokera kwanu atifikira ife ku Yerusalemu, alikumanga mudzi uja wopanduka ndi woipa, alikutsiriza malinga ake, nalumikiza maziko ake." 
Ezra4:13 Adziwe tsono mfumu, kuti akamanga mudzi uwu ndi kutsiriza malinga ake, sadzapereka msonkho, kapena thangata, kapena msonkho wa m'njira; ndipo potsiriza pake kudzasowetsa mafumu." 
Ezra4:14 Popeza tsono timadya mchere wa m'nyumba ya mfumu, sitiyenera kungopenyerera mpepulo wa pa mfumu; chifukwa chake tatumiza ndi kudziwitsa mfumu," 
Ezra4:15 kuti afunefune m'buku la chikumbutso la makolo anu; momwemo mudzapeza m'buku la chikumbutso, ndi kudziwa kuti mudzi uwu ndi mudzi wopanduka, ndi wosowetsa mafumu, ndi maiko; ndi kuti amadziyendera m'menemo kuyambira kale lomwe; ndicho chifukwa chakuti anapasula mudzi uwu." 
Ezra4:16 Tili kudziwitsa mfumu kuti ukamangidwa mudziwu, nakatsirizidwa malinga ake, simudzakhala nalo gawo tsidya lino la mtsinjewo." 
Ezra4:17 Mfumu nibweza mau kwa Rehumu chiwinda cha malamulo, ndi kwa Simisai mlembi, ndi kwa anzao otsala okhala m'Samariya, ndi otsala tsidya lino la mtsinjewo, Mtendere, ndi nthawi yakuti." 
Ezra4:18 Kalatayo mwatitumizira anandiwerengera momveka. 
Ezra4:19 Ndipo ndinalamulira anthu, nafunafuna, napeza kuti mudzi uwu unaukira mafumu kuyambira kale lomwe, ndi kuti akachitamo mpanduko ndi kudziyendera." 
Ezra4:20 Panalinso mafumu amphamvu m'Yerusalemu amene anachita ufumu tsidya lija lonse la mtsinje, ndipo anthu anawapatsa msonkho, thangata, ndi msonkho wa m'njira." 
Ezra4:21 Mulamulire tsono kuti anthu awa aleke, ndi kuti asamange mudzi uwu, mpaka ndidzalamulira ndine." 
Ezra4:22 Chenjerani mungadodomepo, chidzakuliranji chisauko cha kusowetsa mafumu?" 
Ezra4:23 Pamenepo atawerenga malemba a kalata wa mfumu Arita-kisereksesi kwa Rehumu, ndi Simisai mlembi, ndi anzao, anafulumira kupita ku Yerusalemu kwa Ayuda, nawaletsa ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Ezra4:24 Momwemo inalekeka ntchito ya nyumba ya Mulungu yokhala ku Yerusalemu; nilekeka mpaka chaka chachiwiri cha ufumu wa Dariusi mfumu ya Persiya. 
Ezra5:1 Ndipo aneneri, Hagai mneneriyo, ndi Zekariya mwana wa Ido, ananenera kwa Ayuda okhala m'Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu; m'dzina la Mulungu wa Israele ananenera kwa iwo." 
Ezra5:2 Pamenepo Zerubabele mwana wa Sealatiele, ndi Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki, ananyamuka, nayamba kumanga nyumba ya Mulungu ili ku Yerusalemu, anali pamodzi nao aneneri a Mulungu akuwathandiza." 
Ezra5:3 Nthawi yomweyi anawadzera Tatenai kazembe tsidya lino la mtsinjewo, ndi Setari-Bozenai, ndi anzao, nanena nao motere, Anakulamulirani inu ndani kumanga nyumba iyi, ndi kutsiriza khoma ili?" 
Ezra5:4 Nanena naonso motere, Maina ao a anthu omanga chimangidwe ichi ndiwo ayani?" 
Ezra5:5 Koma diso la Mulungu wao linali pa akulu a Ayuda, ndipo sanawaletse mpaka mlandu unamdzera Dariusi, nabweza mau a mlanduwo m'kalata." 
Ezra5:6 Zolembedwa m'kalata amene Tatenai kazembe wa tsidya lino la mtsinjewo, ndi Setari-Bozenai, ndi anzake Afarisikai, okhala tsidya lino la mtsinje, anatumiza kwa Dariusi mfumu," 
Ezra5:7 anatumiza kalata kwa iyeyo m'menemo munalembedwa motere, kwa Dariusi mfumu, mtendere wonse." 
Ezra5:8 Adziwe mfumu kuti ife tinamuka kudziko la Yuda, kunyumba ya Mulungu wamkulu, yomangidwa ndi miyala yaikulu, niikidwa mitengo pamakoma, nichitika mofulumira ntchitoyi, nikula m'dzanja mwao." 
Ezra5:9 Pamenepo tinafunsa akulu aja ndi kutere nao, Anakulamulirani ndani kumanga nyumba iyi, ndi kutsiriza khoma ili?" 
Ezra5:10 Tinawafunsanso maina ao, kukudziwitsani, kuti tilembere maina a anthu akuwatsogolera." 
Ezra5:11 Natiyankha mau motere, ndi kuti, Ife ndife akapolo a Mulungu wa Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, tilikumanga nyumba imene idamangika zapita zaka zambiri; inaimanga ndi kuitsiriza mfumu yaikulu ya Israele." 
Ezra5:12 Koma makolo athuwo atautsa mkwiyo wa Mulungu wa Kumwamba, Iye anawapereka m'dzanja la Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni Mkaldeya, amene anaononga nyumba yino, natenga anthu ndende kunka nao ku Babiloni." 
Ezra5:13 Koma chaka choyamba cha Kirusi mfumu ya Babiloni, Kirusi mfumuyo analamulira kuti azimanga nyumba iyi ya Mulungu." 
Ezra5:14 Ndiponso zipangizo za golide ndi siliva za nyumba ya Mulungu, anazitulutsa Nebukadinezara m'Kachisi anali ku Yerusalemu, ndi kubwera nazo ku Kachisi wa ku Babiloni, izizo Kirusi mfumu anazitulutsa m'Kachisi wa ku Babiloni, nazipereka kwa munthu dzina lake Sezibazara, amene anamuika akhale kazembe;" 
Ezra5:15 nati naye, Tenga zipangizo izi, kaziike m'Kachisi ali m'Yerusalemu, nimangidwe nyumba ya Mulungu pambuto pake." 
Ezra5:16 Pamenepo anadza Sezibazara yemweyo namanga maziko a nyumba ya Mulungu ili m'Yerusalemu; ndipo kuyambira pomwepo kufikira tsopano ilinkumangidwa, koma siinatsirizike." 
Ezra5:17 Ndipo tsono chikakomera mfumu, munthu asanthule m'nyumba ya chuma cha mfumu ili komwe ku Babiloni, ngati nkuterodi, kuti Kirusi mfumu analamulira kuti azimanga nyumba iyi ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu; ndipo mfumu ititumizire mau omkomera pa chinthuchi." 
Ezra6:1 Pamenepo analamulira Dariusi mfumu, ndipo anthu anafunafuna m'nyumba ya mabuku mosungira chuma m'Babiloni." 
Ezra6:2 Napeza ku Ekibatana m'nyumba ya mfumu m'dera la Mediya, mpukutu, ndi m'menemo munalembedwa motere, chikhale chikumbutso:" 
Ezra6:3 Chaka choyamba cha Kirusi mfumu, analamulira Kirusi mfumuyo, Kunena za nyumba ya Mulungu ku Yerusalemu, imangidwe nyumbayi pamalo pophera nsembe, namangidwe kolimba maziko ake, msinkhu wake mikono makumi asanu ndi limodzi, kupingasa kwake mikono makumi asanu ndi limodzi;" 
Ezra6:4 ndi mipambo itatu ya miyala yaikulu, ndi mpambo wa mitengo yatsopano; nalipidwe ndalama zochokera kunyumba ya mfumu." 
Ezra6:5 Ndi zipangizo za golide ndi siliva za nyumba ya Mulungu, zimene anazitulutsa Nebukadinezara m'Kachisi ali ku Yerusalemu, nazitenga kunka nazo ku Babiloni, azibwezere, nabwere nazo ku Kachisi ali ku Yerusalemu, chilichonse ku malo ake; naziike m'nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezra6:6 Tsono iwe, Tatenai, kazembe wa tsidya lija la mtsinjewo, Setari-Bozenai, ndi anzanu Afarisikai, okhala tsidya lija la mtsinje, muzikhala kutali;" 
Ezra6:7 lekani ntchito iyi ya Mulungu, osaivuta; kazembe wa Ayuda ndi akulu a Ayuda amange nyumba iyi ya Mulungu pambuto pake." 
Ezra6:8 Ndilamuliranso za ichi muzichitira akulu awa a Ayuda, kuti amange nyumba iyi ya Mulungu, ndiko kuti mutengeko chuma cha mfumu, ndicho msonkho wa tsidya la mtsinje, nimupereke zolipira kwa anthu awa msanga, angawachedwetse." 
Ezra6:9 Ndipo zosowa zao, anaang'ombe, ndi nkhosa zamphongo, ndi anaankhosa, zikhale nsembe zopsereza za Mulungu wa Kumwamba; tirigu, mchere, vinyo, mafuta, monga umo adzanena ansembe ali ku Yerusalemu, ziperekedwe kwa iwo tsiku ndi tsiku, zisasoweke;" 
Ezra6:10 kuti apereke nsembe zonunkhira bwino kwa Mulungu wa Kumwamba, napempherere moyo wa mfumu ndi wa ana ake." 
Ezra6:11 Ndalamuliranso kuti aliyense adzasintha mau awa, usololedwe mtanda kunyumba kwake, namkweze, nampachike pomwepo; niyesedwa dzala nyumba yake chifukwa cha ichi;" 
Ezra6:12 ndipo Mulungu wokhalitsa dzina lake komweko agwetse mafumu onse ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu, akutulutsa dzanja lao kusintha mau awa, kuononga nyumba ya Mulungu ili ku Yerusalemu. Ine Dariusi ndalamulira, chichitike msanga." 
Ezra6:13 Pamenepo Tatenai kazembe wa tsidya lino la mtsinjewo, Setari-Bozenai, ndi anzao, popeza mfumu Dariusi adatumiza mau, anachita momwemo chofulumira." 
Ezra6:14 Ndipo akulu a Ayuda anamanga opanda chosoweka, mwa kunenera kwa mneneri Hagai, ndi Zekariya mwana wa Ido. Naimanga, naitsiriza, monga mwa lamulo la Mulungu wa Israele, ndi monga mwa lamulo la Kirusi, ndi Dariusi, ndi Arita-kisereksesi mfumu ya Persiya." 
Ezra6:15 Nitsirizidwa nyumba iyi tsiku lachitatu la mwezi wa Adara, ndicho chaka chachisanu ndi chimodzi cha ufumu wa Dariusi mfumu." 
Ezra6:16 Ndipo ana a Israele, ansembe ndi Alevi, ndi ana otsala a ndende, anapereka nyumba iyi ya Mulungu mokondwera." 
Ezra6:17 Ndipo popatulira nyumba iyi ya Mulungu anapereka ng'ombe zana limodzi, nkhosa zamphongo mazana awiri, anaankhosa mazana anai, ndi za nsembe yazolakwa ya Aisraele onse atonde khumi ndi awiri, monga mwa kuwerenga kwake kwa mafuko a Israele." 
Ezra6:18 Naika ansembe m'magawo mwao, ndi Alevi m'magawidwe mwao, atumikire Mulungu wokhala ku Yerusalemu, monga mulembedwa m'buku la Mose." 
Ezra6:19 Ndipo ana a ndende anachita Paska tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi woyamba. 
Ezra6:20 Pakuti ansembe ndi Alevi anadziyeretsa pamodzi, anayera onsewo, naphera Paska chifukwa cha ana onse a ndende, ndi abale ao ansembe, ndi iwo okha." 
Ezra6:21 Ndipo ana a Israele obwera kundende, ndi yense wakudzipatulira kuchokera chonyansa cha amitundu, kutsata iwowa, kufuna Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, anadza," 
Ezra6:22 nasunga chikondwerero cha Mkate wopanda chotupitsa masiku asanu ndi awiri ndi chimwemwe; pakuti Yehova adawakondweretsa, nawatembenuzira mtima wa mfumu ya Asiriya, kulimbitsa manja ao mu ntchito ya nyumba ya Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israele." 
Ezra7:1 Zitatha izi tsono, pokhala mfumu Arita-kisereksesi mfumu ya Persiya, anadza Ezara mwana wa Seraya, mwana wa Azariya, mwana wa Hilikiya," 
Ezra7:2 mwana wa Salumu, mwana wa Zadoki, mwana wa Ahitubi," 
Ezra7:3 mwana wa Amariya, mwana wa Azariya, mwana wa Meraiyoti," 
Ezra7:4 mwana wa Zerahiya, mwana wa Uzi, mwana wa Buki," 
Ezra7:5 mwana wa Abisuwa mwana wa Finehasi, mwana wa Eleazara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe wamkulu." 
Ezra7:6 Ezara amene anakwera kuchokera ku Babiloni, ndiye mlembi waluntha m'chilamulo cha Mose, chimene Yehova Mulungu wa Israele adachipereka; ndipo mfumu inampatsa chopempha iye chonse, monga linamkhalira dzanja la Yehova Mulungu wake." 
Ezra7:7 Nakweranso kunka ku Yerusalemu ena a ana a Israele, ndi ansembe, ndi Alevi, ndi oimbira, ndi odikira, ndi Anetini, chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri cha Arita-kisereksesi mfumu." 
Ezra7:8 Ndipo iye anafika ku Yerusalemu mwezi wachisanu, ndicho chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri cha mfumu." 
Ezra7:9 Pakuti tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba, ndilo chiyambi cha ulendo wokwera kuchokera ku Babiloni, ndi tsiku lachimodzi la mwezi wachisanu anafika ku Yerusalemu, monga linamkhalira dzanja lokoma la Mulungu wake." 
Ezra7:10 Pakuti Ezara adaikiratu mtima wake kuchifuna chilamulo cha Yehova, ndi kuchichita, ndi kuphunzitsa m'Israele malemba ndi maweruzo." 
Ezra7:11 Malemba a kalatayo mfumu Arita-kisereksesi anampatsa Ezara wansembe mlembi, ndiye mlembi wa mau a malamulo a Yehova, ndi malemba ake kwa Israele, ndi awa:" 
Ezra7:12 Arita-kisereksesi mfumu ya mafumu kwa Ezara wansembe, mlembi wa lamulo la Mulungu wa Kumwamba, mtendere weniweni." 
Ezra7:13 Ndilamulira kuti onse a ana a Israele, ndi ansembe ao, ndi Alevi, m'ufumu wanga, ofuna eni ake kumuka ku Yerusalemu, apite nawe." 
Ezra7:14 Popeza utumidwa wochokera pamaso pa mfumu ndi aphungu ake asanu ndi awiri, kufunsira za Yuda ndi Yerusalemu monga mwa lamulo la Mulungu wako lili m'dzanja lako," 
Ezra7:15 ndi kumuka nazo siliva ndi golide, zimene mfumu ndi aphungu ake, anapereka mwaufulu kwa Mulungu wa Israele, mokhala mwake muli m'Yerusalemu," 
Ezra7:16 pamodzi ndi siliva ndi golide zilizonse ukazipeza m'dziko lonse la ku Babiloni, pamodzi ndi chopereka chaufulu cha anthu, ndi cha ansembe, akuperekera mwaufulu nyumba ya Mulungu wao ili ku Yerusalemu;" 
Ezra7:17 m'mwemo uzifulumira kugula ndi ndalama iyi ng'ombe, nkhosa zamphongo, anaankhosa, pamodzi ndi nsembe zao zaufa, ndi nsembe zao zothira; ndi kuzipereka pa guwa la nsembe la nyumba ya Mulungu wanu yokhala ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Ndipo chilichonse chidzakomera iwe ndi abale ako kuchita nazo siliva ndi golide zotsala, ichi muchite monga mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu wanu." 
Ezra7:19 Ndipo zipangizozo akupatsa za utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu wako, uzipereka pamaso pa Mulungu wa ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:20 Ndi zina zotsala zakusowa nyumba ya Mulungu wako, zikayenera uzipereke, uzipereke zochokera kunyumba ya chuma cha mfumu." 
Ezra7:21 Ndipo ine Arita-kisereksesi, mfumu ine, ndilamulira osunga chuma onse okhala tsidya lija la mtsinjewo, kuti chilichonse akupemphani Ezara wansembe, mlembi wa lamulo la Mulungu wa Kumwamba, chichitike mofulumira;" 
Ezra7:22 mpaka matalente a siliva zana limodzi, ndi miyeso ya tirigu zana limodzi, ndi mitsuko ya vinyo zana limodzi, ndi mitsuko ya mafuta zana limodzi, ndi mchere wosauwerenga." 
Ezra7:23 Chilichonse Mulungu wa Kumwamba achilamulire chichitikire mwachangu nyumba ya Mulungu wa Kumwamba; pakuti padzakhaliranji mkwiyo pa ufumu wa mfumu ndi ana ake? 
Ezra7:24 Tikudziwitsaninso kuti sikudzaloledwa kusonkhetsa aliyense wa ansembe, ndi Alevi, oimbira, odikira, Anetini, kapena antchito a nyumba iyi ya Mulungu msonkho, thangata, kapena msonkho wa panjira." 
Ezra7:25 Ndipo iwe Ezara monga mwa nzeru za Mulungu wako ili m'dzanja lako, uike nduna, ndi oweruza milandu, aweruze anthu onse ali tsidya lija la mtsinje, onse akudziwa malamulo a Mulungu wako; ndi wosawadziwayo umphunzitse." 
Ezra7:26 Ndipo aliyense wosachita lamulo la Mulungu wako, ndi lamulo la mfumu, mlandu umtsutse msanga, ngakhale kumupha, kapena kumpirikitsa m'dziko, kapena kumlanda chuma chake, kapena kummanga m'kaidi." 
Ezra7:27 Wodala Yehova Mulungu wa makolo athu, amene anaika chinthu chotere mu mtima wa mfumu, kukometsera nyumba ya Yehova ili ku Yerusalemu," 
Ezra7:28 nandifikitsira chifundo pamaso pa mfumu, ndi aphungu ake, ndi pamaso pa akalonga amphamvu onse a mfumu. Motero ndinalimbika mtima, monga umo dzanja la Yehova Mulungu wanga linakhala pa ine; ndipo ndinasonkhanitsa mwa Israele anthu omveka akwere nane limodzi." 
Ezra8:1 Ndipo akulu a nyumba za makolo ndi awa, ndi chibadwidwe cha iwo okwera nane limodzi kuchokera ku Babiloni, pokhala mfumu Arita-kisereksesi, ndi ichi:" 
Ezra8:2 wa ana a Finehasi, Geresomo; wa ana a Itamara, Daniele; wa ana a Davide, Hatusi." 
Ezra8:2 wa ana a Finehasi, Geresomo; wa ana a Itamara, Daniele; wa ana a Davide, Hatusi." 
Ezra8:3 Wa ana a Sekaniya, wa ana a Parosi, Zekariya; ndi pamodzi naye, powawerenga monga mwa chibadwidwe chao, amuna zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu." 
Ezra8:4 Wa ana a Pahatimowabu, Eliehoenai mwana wa Zerahiya; ndi pamodzi naye amuna mazana awiri." 
Ezra8:5 Wa ana a Sekaniya, mwana wa Yahaziele; ndi pamodzi naye amuna mazana atatu." 
Ezra8:6 Ndi wa ana a Adini, Ebedi mwana wa Yonatani; ndi pamodzi naye amuna makumi asanu." 
Ezra8:7 Ndi wa ana a Elamu, Yesaya mwana wa Ataliya; ndi pamodzi naye amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
Ezra8:8 Ndi wa ana a Sefatiya, Zebadiya mwana wa Mikaele; ndi pamodzi naye amuna makumi asanu ndi atatu." 
Ezra8:9 Wa ana a Yowabu, Obadiya mwana wa Yehiyele; ndi pamodzi naye amuna mazana awiri mphambu khumi kudza asanu ndi atatu."
