Ezra8:10 Ndi wa ana a Selomiti, mwana wa Yosofiya; ndi pamodzi naye amuna zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi." 
Ezra8:11 Ndi wa ana a Bebai, Zekariya mwana wa Bebai; ndi pamodzi naye amuna makumi awiri mphambu asanu ndi atatu." 
Ezra8:12 Ndi wa ana a Azigadi, Yohanani mwana wa Hakatani; ndi pamodzi naye amuna zana limodzi mphambu khumi limodzi." 
Ezra8:13 Ndi a ana otsiriza a Adonikamu, maina ao ndiwo Elifeleti, Yeiyele, ndi Semaya; ndi pamodzi nao amuna makumi asanu ndi limodzi." 
Ezra8:14 Ndi wa ana a Bigivai, Utai ndi Zakuri, ndi pamodzi nao amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
Ezra8:15 Ndipo ndinawasonkhanitsa ku mtsinje wopita ku Ahava, ndi komweko tinakhala m'misasa masiku atatu; ndipo ndinapenyerera anthu ndi ansembe, koma sindinapezapo wa ana a Levi." 
Ezra8:16 Pamenepo ndinatumiza munthu kuitana Eliyezere, Ariyele, Semaya, ndi Elinatani, ndi Yaribu, ndi Elinatani, ndi Natani, ndi Zekariya, ndi Mesulamu, ndiwo akulu; ndi Yoyaribu ndi Elinatani, ndiwo aphunzitsi." 
Ezra8:17 Ndipo ndinawatumiza kwa Ido mkulu, kumalo dzina lake Kasifiya; ndinalonganso m'kamwa mwao mau akunena kwa Ido, ndi kwa abale ake Anetini, pa malo paja Kasifiya, kuti azibwera nao kwa ife otumikira za nyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Ezra8:18 Ndipo monga munatikhalira dzanja lokoma la Mulungu wathu, anatitengera munthu wanzeru wa ana a Mali, mwana wa Levi, mwana wa Israele; ndi Serebiya, pamodzi ndi ana ake ndi abale ake khumi mphambu asanu ndi atatu;" 
Ezra8:19 ndi Hasabiya, ndi pamodzi naye Yesaya wa ana a Merari, abale ake ndi ana ao makumi awiri;" 
Ezra8:20 ndi a Anetini, amene Davide ndi akalonga adapereka atumikire Alevi, Anetini mazana awiri mphambu makumi awiri, onsewo otchulidwa maina." 
Ezra8:21 Pamenepo ndinalalikira chosala komweko kumtsinje wa Ahava, kuti tidzichepetse pamaso pa Mulungu wathu, kumfunsa ationetsere njira yolunjika ya kwa ife, ndi ang'ono athu, ndi chuma chathu chonse." 
Ezra8:22 Pakuti ndinachita manyazi kupempha kwa mfumu gulu la asilikali, ndi apakavalo, kutithandiza pa adani panjira; popeza tidalankhula ndi mfumu kuti, Dzanja la Mulungu wathu likhalira mokoma onse akumfuna; koma mphamvu yake ndi mkwiyo wake zitsutsana nao onse akumsiya." 
Ezra8:23 Momwemo tinasala ndi kupempha ichi kwa Mulungu wathu; nativomereza Iye. 
Ezra8:24 Pamenepo ndinapatula akulu a ansembe khumi ndi awiri, ndiwo Serebiya, Hasabiya, ndi abale ao khumi pamodzi nao," 
Ezra8:25 ndi kuwayesera siliva, ndi golide, ndi zipangizo, ndizo chopereka cha kwa nyumba ya Mulungu wathu, chimene mfumu, ndi aphungu ake, ndi akalonga ake, ndi Aisraele onse anali apawa, adapereka." 
Ezra8:26 Ndipo ndinawayesera m'dzanja mwao matalente a siliva mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu, ndi zipangizo zasiliva matalente zana limodzi," 
Ezra8:27 ndi zikho zagolide makumi awiri za madariki chikwi chimodzi, ndi zipangizo ziwiri za mkuwa wabwino wonyezimira wokhumbika ngati golide." 
Ezra8:28 Ndipo ndinanena nao, Inu ndinu opatulikira Yehova, ndi zipangizozo nzopatulikira, ndi siliva ndi golide, ndizo chopereka chaufulu cha kwa Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu." 
Ezra8:29 Mukhale maso ndi kuzisunga mpaka muziyesera pamaso pa ansembe aakulu ndi Alevi, ndi akulu a nyumba za makolo a Israele ku Yerusalemu, m'zipinda za nyumba ya Yehova." 
Ezra8:30 Potero ansembe ndi Alevi analandira kulemera kwake kwa siliva ndi golide ndi zipangizo, abwere nazo ku Yerusalemu kunyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Ezra8:31 Pamenepo tinachoka ku mtsinje wa Ahava tsiku lakhumi ndi chiwiri la mwezi woyamba, kunka ku Yerusalemu; ndipo dzanja la Mulungu wathu linakhala pa ife, ndi kutilanditsa m'dzanja la mdani ndi wolalira m'njira." 
Ezra8:32 Ndipo tinafika ku Yerusalemu ndi kukhalako masiku atatu. 
Ezra8:33 Ndipo pa tsiku lachinai siliva ndi golide ndi zipangizo zinayesedwa m'nyumba ya Mulungu wathu, m'dzanja la Meremoti mwana wa Uriya wansembe, ndi pamodzi naye Eleazara mwana wa Finehasi, ndi pamodzi nao Yozabadi mwana wa Yesuwa, ndi Nowadiya mwana wa Binuyi, Alevi;" 
Ezra8:34 zonsezi anaziwerenga ndi kuziyesa; ndi kulemera kwake konse kunalembedwa nthawi yomweyo. 
Ezra8:35 Otengedwa ndende, atatuluka m'ndende, anapereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Mulungu wa Israele, ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwiri za Aisraele onse, nkhosa zamphongo makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu zisanu ndi imodzi, anaankhosa makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu asanu ndi awiri, atonde khumi ndi awiri, akhale nsembe yazolakwa; zonsezi ndizo nsembe yopsereza ya kwa Yehova." 
Ezra8:36 Ndipo napereka malamulo a mfumu kwa akazembe a mfumu, ndi kwa ziwanga, tsidya lino la mtsinjewo; ndipo iwo anathandiza anthu ndi nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Ezra9:1 Zitatha izi tsono anandiyandikira akalonga, ndi kuti, Anthu a Israele, ndi nsembe, ndi Alevi, sanadzilekanitse ndi anthu a maikowa, kunena za zonyansa zao za Akanani, Ahiti, Aperizi, Ayebusi, Aamoni, Amowabu, Aejipito, ndi Aamori." 
Ezra9:2 Pakuti anadzitengera okha ndi ana amuna ao ana akazi ao; nisokonezeka mbeu yopatulika ndi mitundu ya maikowa; inde dzanja la akalonga ndi olamulira linayamba kulakwa kumene. 
Ezra9:3 Ndipo pakumva mau awa ndinang'amba chovala changa, ndi malaya anga, ndi kumwetula tsitsi la pamutu panga ndi ndevu zanga, ndi kukhala pansi m'kudabwa." 
Ezra9:4 Nandisonkhanira aliyense wakunjenjemera pa mau a Mulungu wa Israele, chifukwa cha kulakwa kwa iwo a ndende; ndipo ndinakhala m'kudabwa mpaka nsembe yamadzulo." 
Ezra9:5 Ndi pa nsembe yamadzulo ndinanyamuka m'kuzunzika kwanga, chovala changa ndi malaya anga zong'ambika; ndipo ndinagwada ndi maondo anga, ndi kutambasula manja anga kwa Yehova Mulungu wanga;" 
Ezra9:6 ndipo ndinati, Mulungu wanga, ndigwa nkhope, ndi kuchita manyazi kuweramutsa nkhope yanga kwa inu Mulungu wanga, popeza mphulupulu zathu zachuluka pamtu pathu, ndi kupalamula kwathu kwakula kufikira m'Mwamba." 
Ezra9:7 Chiyambire masiku a makolo athu tapalamula kwakukulu mpaka lero lino; ndi chifukwa cha mphulupulu zathu ife, mafumu athu, ndi ansembe athu, tinaperekedwa m'dzanja la mafumu a maikowo, kulupanga kundende, ndi kufunkhidwa, ndi kuchitidwa manyazi pankhope pathu, monga lero lino." 
Ezra9:8 Ndipo tsopano, kamphindi, Yehova Mulungu wathu wationetsa chisomo, kutisiyira chipulumutso, ndi kutipatsa chichiri m'malo mwake mopatulika; kuti Mulungu wathu atipenyetse m'maso mwathu, ndi kutitsitsimutsa pang'ono m'ukapolo wathu." 
Ezra9:9 Popeza ife ndife akapolo, koma Mulungu wathu sanatisiye m'ukapolo wathu, natifikitsira chifundo pamaso pa mafumu a Persiya, kuti atitsitsimutse kuimika nyumba ya Mulungu wathu, ndi kukonzanso muunda wake, ndi kutipatsa linga m'Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu." 
Ezra9:10 Ndipo tsopano, Mulungu wathu, tidzanenanji pambuyo pa ichi? Pakuti tasiya malamulo anu," 
Ezra9:11 amene munalamulira mwa atumiki anu aneneri ndi kuti, Dzikolo mumukako likhale cholowa chanu ndilo dziko lodetsedwa mwa chidetso cha anthu a m'maikomo, mwa zonyansa zao zimene zinalidzaza, kuyambira nsonga ina kufikira nsonga inzake ndi uchisi wao." 
Ezra9:12 Chifukwa chake tsono, musamapereka ana anu akazi kwa ana ao amuna, kapena kutengera ana anu amuna ana ao akazi, kapena kufuna mtendere wao ndi kukoma kwao nthawi yonse, kuti mukhale olimba, ndi kudya zokoma za m'dziko, ndi kulisiyira ana anu cholowa cha kunthawi yonse." 
Ezra9:13 Ndipo zitatigwera zonsezi chifukwa cha ntchito zathu zoipa ndi kupalamula kwathu kwakukulu; popeza inu Mulungu wathu mwatilanga motichepsera mphulupulu zathu, ndi kutipatsa chipulumutso chotere;" 
Ezra9:14 kodi tidzabwereza kuphwanya malamulo anu, ndi kukwatana nayo mitundu ya anthu ochita zonyansa izi? Simudzakwiya nafe kodi mpaka mwatitha, ndi kuti pasakhale otsala kapena akupulumuka?" 
Ezra9:15 Yehova Mulungu wa Israele, Inu ndinu wolungama, popeza tinatsala opulumuka monga lero lino; taonani, tili pamaso panu m'kupalamula kwathu; pakuti palibe wakuima pamaso panu chifukwa cha ichi." 
Ezra10:1 Pakupemphera Ezara tsono, ndi kuwulula ndi kulira misozi, ndi kudzigwetsa pansi pakhomo pa nyumba ya Mulungu, udamsonkhanira mwa Israele msonkhano waukulu ndithu wa amuna, ndi akazi, ndi ana; popeza anthu analira kulira kwakukulu." 
Ezra10:2 Pamenepo Sekaniya mwana wa Yehiyele, mwana wina wa Elamu, anambwezera Ezara mau, nati, Talakwira Mulungu wathu, tadzitengera akazi achilendo a mitundu ya dzikoli; koma tsopano chimtsalira Israele chiyembekezo kunena za chinthu ichi." 
Ezra10:3 Ndipo tsono tipangane ndi Mulungu wathu kuchotsa akazi onse, ndi obadwa mwa iwo, monga mwa uphungu wa mbuye wanga, ndi wa iwo akunjenjemera pa lamulo la Mulungu wathu; ndipo chichitike monga mwa chilamulo." 
Ezra10:4 Nyamukani, mlandu ndi wanu; ndipo ife tili nanu; limbikani, chitani." 
Ezra10:5 Nanyamuka Ezara, nalumbiritsa akulu a ansembe, ndi Alevi, ndi Aisraele onse, kuti adzachita monga mwa mau awa. Nalumbira iwo." 
Ezra10:6 Pamenepo Ezara ananyamuka pakhomo pa nyumba ya Mulungu, nalowa m'chipinda cha Yehohanani mwana wa Eliyasibu, ndipo atafikako sanadye mkate, sanamwe madzi; pakuti anachita maliro chifukwa cha kulakwa kwa iwo otengedwa ndende." 
Ezra10:7 Nabukitsa iwo mau mwa Yuda ndi Yerusalemu kwa ana onse otengedwa ndende, kuti azisonkhana ku Yerusalemu;" 
Ezra10:8 ndi kuti aliyense wosafikako atapita masiku atatu, monga mwa uphungu wa akalonga ndi akulu, chuma chake chonse chidzaonongeka konse, ndipo iye adzachotsedwa kumsonkhano wa iwo otengedwa ndende." 
Ezra10:9 Ndipo anasonkhana ku Yerusalemu amuna onse a Yuda ndi Benjamini asanapite masiku atatu, ndiwo mwezi wachisanu ndi chinai, tsiku la makumi awiri a mwezi; nakhala pansi anthu onse m'khwalala pakhomo pa nyumba ya Mulungu, alikunjenjemera chifukwa cha mlandu uwu, ndi chifukwa cha mvulayi." 
Ezra10:10 Pamenepo Ezara wansembe ananyamuka, nanena nao, Mwalakwa, mwadzitengera akazi achilendo, kuonjezera kupalamula kwa Israele." 
Ezra10:11 Chifukwa chake tsono, wululani kwa Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu, nimuchite chomkondweretsa; mudzilekanitse ndi mitundu ya anthu a m'dzikomo, ndi kwa akazi achilendo." 
Ezra10:12 Ndipo unayankha msonkhano wonse, ndi kunena ndi mau akulu, Monga mwa mau anu tiyenera kuchita." 
Ezra10:13 Koma anthu ndiwo ambiri, ndi nyengo yino nja mvula, tilibenso mphamvu yakuima pabwalo, ndi ntchitoyi sindiyo ya tsiku limodzi kapena awiri; pakuti tachulukitsa kulakwa kwathu pa chinthu ichi." 
Ezra10:14 Ayang'anire ichi tsono akalonga athu a msonkhano wonse, ndi onse a m'midzi mwathu amene anadzitengera akazi achilendo abwere pa nthawi zoikika, ndi pamodzi nao akulu a mudzi wao uliwonse, ndi oweruza ake, mpaka udzatichokera mkwiyo waukali wa Mulungu wathu chifukwa cha mlandu uwu." 
Ezra10:15 Yonatani mwana wa Asahele ndi Yazeya mwana wa Tikiva okha anatsutsana nacho, ndi Mesulamu ndi Sabetai Mlevi anawathandiza." 
Ezra10:16 Pamenepo anthu otengedwa ndende anachita chotero. Ndi Ezara wansembe, ndi anthu akulu a nyumba za makolo, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, iwo onse otchulidwa maina ao, anasankhidwa, nakhala pansi tsiku loyamba la mwezi wakhumi kufunsa za mlanduwu." 
Ezra10:17 Natsiriza nao amuna onse adadzitengera akazi achilendo tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba. 
Ezra10:18 Ndipo anapeza mwa ana a ansembe odzitengera akazi achilendo, ndiwo a ana a Yesuwa mwana wa Yozadaki, ndi abale ake Maaseiya, ndi Eliyezere, ndi Yaribu, ndi Gedaliya." 
Ezra10:19 Ndipo anaimika dzanja lao kuti adzachotsa akazi ao; ndipo popeza adapalamuladi, anapereka nsembe nkhosa yamphongo ya zoweta pa kupalamula kwao." 
Ezra10:20 Ndi a ana a Imeri: Hanani ndi Zebadiya. 
Ezra10:21 Ndi a ana a Harimu: Maaseiya, ndi Eliya, ndi Semaya, ndi Yehiyele, ndi Uziya." 
Ezra10:22 Ndi a ana a Pasuri: Eliyoenai, Maaseiya, Ismaele, Netanele, Yozabadi, ndi Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Ndi a Alevi: Yozabadi, ndi Simei, ndi Kelaya (ndiye Kelita), Petahiya, Yuda, ndi Eliyezere." 
Ezra10:24 Ndi a oimbira: Eliyasibu; ndi a odikira: Salumu, ndi Telemu, ndi Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Ndi Aisraele a ana a Parosi: Ramiya, ndi Iziya, ndi Matikiya, ndi Miyamini, ndi Eleazara, ndi Malikiya, ndi Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 Ndi a ana a Elamu: Mataniya, Zekariya, ndi Yehiyele, ndi Abidi, ndi Yeremoti, ndi Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Ndi a ana a Zatu: Eliyoenai, Eliyasibu, Mataniya, ndi Yeremoti, ndi Zabadi, ndi Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Ndi a ana a Bebai: Yehohanani, Hananiya, Zabai, Atilai." 
Ezra10:29 Ndi a ana a Bani: Mesulamu, Maluki, ndi Adaya, Yasubu, ndi Seyala, Yeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Ndi a ana a Pahatimowabu: Adina, ndi Kelali, Benaya, Maaseiya, Mataniya, Bezalele, ndi Binuyi, ndi Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Ndi a ana a Harimu: Eliyezere, Isiya, Malikiya, Semaya, Simeoni," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamini, Maluki, Semariya." 
Ezra10:33 A ana a Hasumu: Matenai, Matata. Zabadi, Elifeleti, Yeremai, Manase, Simei." 
Ezra10:34 A ana a Bani: Maadai, Amuramu, ndi Uwele," 
Ezra10:35 Benaya, Bedeiya, Keluhu," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniya, Meremoti, Eliyasibu," 
Ezra10:37 Mataniya, Matenai, ndi Yasu," 
Ezra10:38 ndi Bani, ndi Binuyi, Simei," 
Ezra10:39 ndi Selemiya, ndi Natani, ndi Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 Makinadebai, Sasai, Sarai," 
Ezra10:41 Azarele, ndi Selemiya, Semariya," 
Ezra10:42 Salumu, Amariya, Yosefe." 
Ezra10:43 A ana a Nebo: Yeiyele, Matitiya, Zabadi, Zebina, Yadai, ndi Yowele, Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Awa onse adatenga akazi achilendo, ndi ena a iwowa anali ndi akazi amene adawabalira ana." 
Nehemiah1:1 Mau a Nehemiya mwana wa Hakaliya. Kunali tsono mwezi wa Kisilevi, chaka cha makumi awiri, pokhala ine ku Susa kunyumba ya mfumu," 
Nehemiah1:2 anafika Hanani, mmodzi wa abale anga, iye ndi amuna ena a ku Yuda; ndipo ndinawafunsa za Ayuda adapulumukawo otsala andende, ndi za Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Nanena nane iwo, Otsalawo otsala andende uko kudzikoko akulukutika kwakukulu, nanyozedwa; ndi linga la Yerusalemu lapasuka, ndi zipata zake zatenthedwa ndi moto." 
Nehemiah1:4 Ndipo kunali, pakumva mau awa, ndinakhala pansi ndi kulira misozi, ndi kuchita maliro masiku ena, ndinasalanso, ndi kupemphera pamaso pa Mulungu wa Kumwamba," 
Nehemiah1:5 ndi kuti, Ndikupembedzani Yehova, Mulungu wa Kumwamba, Mulungu wamkulu ndi woopsa, wakusunga pangano ndi chifundo ndi iwo akumkonda ndi kusunga malamulo ake;" 
Nehemiah1:6 mutchere khutu, ndi maso anu atseguke kumvera pemphero la kapolo wanu, ndilipempha pamaso panu tsopano apa msana ndi usiku, kupempherera ana a Israele akapolo anu, ndi kuwulula zoipa za ana a Israele zimene tachimwira nazo Inu; inde tachimwa, ine ndi nyumba ya atate wanga." 
Nehemiah1:7 Tachita mwamphulupulu pa Inu, osasunga malamulo, kapena malemba, kapena maweruzo, amene mudalamulira mtumiki wanu Mose." 
Nehemiah1:8 Mukumbukire mau mudalamulira mtumiki wanu Mose, ndi kuti, Mukalakwa, ndidzakubalalitsani mwa mitundu ya anthu;" 
Nehemiah1:9 koma mukabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ndi kusunga malamulo anga, ndi kuwachita, angakhale otayika anu anali ku malekezero a thambo, ndidzawasonkhanitsa kuchokera komweko, ndi kubwera nao kumalo ndinawasankha kukhalitsako dzina langa." 
Nehemiah1:10 Ndipo awa ndi akapolo anu ndi anthu anu, amene munawaombola ndi mphamvu yanu yaikulu, ndi dzanja lanu lolimba." 
Nehemiah1:11 Yehova, mutcherere khutu pemphero la kapolo wanu, ndi pemphero la akapolo anu okondwera nako kuopa dzina lanu; ndipo mupambanitse kapolo wanu lero lino, ndi kumuonetsera chifundo pamaso pa munthu uyu. Koma ndinali ine wothirira mfumu chakumwa chake." 
Nehemiah2:1 Koma kunachitika mwezi wa Nisani, chaka cha makumi awiri cha Arita-kisereksesi mfumu pokhala vinyo pamaso pake, ndinatenga vinyoyo ndi kuipatsa mfumu. Koma sindidakhala wachisoni pamaso pake ndi kale lonse." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ninena nane mfumu, Nkhope yako nja chisoni chifukwa ninji popeza sudwala? Ichi si chinthu china koma chisoni cha mtima. Pamenepo ndinachita mantha akulu." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ndipo ndinati kwa mfumu, Mfumu ikhale ndi moyo kosatha; ilekerenji nkhope yanga kuchita chisoni, popeza pali bwinja kumudzi kuli manda a makolo anga, ndi zipata zake zopsereza ndi moto." 
Nehemiah2:4 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa ine, Ufunanji iwe? Pamenepo ndinapemphera Mulungu wa Kumwamba." 
Nehemiah2:5 Ndipo ndinati kwa mfumu, Chikakomera mfumu, ndi mtima wanu ukakomera kapolo wanu, munditumize ku Yuda kumudzi wa manda a makolo anga, kuti ndiumange." 
Nehemiah2:6 Ninena nane mfumu, ilikukhala pansi pamodzi ndi mkazi wake wamkulu, Ulendo wako ngwa nthawi yanji, udzabweranso liti? Ndipo kudakonda mfumu kunditumiza nditaitchula nthawi." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ndinanenanso kwa mfumu, Chikakomera mfumu, indipatse akalata kwa ziwanga za tsidya lija la mtsinje, andilole ndipitirire mpaka ndifikira ku Yuda;" 
Nehemiah2:8 ndi kalata kwa Asafu wosunga misitu ya mfumu, kuti andipatse mitengo ya mitanda ya kuzipata za linga lili ku Kachisi, ndi ya linga la mudzi, ndi ya nyumba imene ndidzalowamo ine. Ndipo mfumu inandipatsa monga mwa dzanja lokoma la Mulungu londikhalira." 
Nehemiah2:9 Ndinafika tsono kwa ziwanga za tsidya lino la mtsinje, ndipo ndinawapatsa akalata a mfumu. Koma mfumu idatumiza apite nane akazembe a nkhondo, ndi apakavalo." 
Nehemiah2:10 Atamva Sanibalati Muhoroni, ndi Tobiya kapoloyo Mwamoni, chidawaipira kwakukulu, kuti wadza munthu kuwafunira ana a Israele chokoma." 
Nehemiah2:11 Motero ndinafika ku Yerusalemu, ndi kukhalako masiku atatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Ndipo ndinauka usiku, ine ndi amuna owerengeka nane, osauza munthu yense ine choika Mulungu wanga m'mtima mwanga ndichitire Yerusalemu; panalibenso nyama ina nane, koma nyama imene ndinakhalapo." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ndipo ndinatuluka usiku pa Chipata cha ku Chigwa, kunka kuchitsime cha chinjoka, ndi ku Chipata cha Kudzala, ndi kuyang'ana malinga a Yerusalemu adapasukawo, ndi zipata zake zothedwa ndi moto." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ndipo ndinapitirira kunka ku Chipata cha Chitsime, ndi ku Dziwe la Mfumu; koma popita nyama ili pansi panga panaichepera." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ndipo ndinakwera usiku kumtsinje, ndi kuyang'ana lingali; ndinabwerera tsono ndi kulowa pa Chipata cha ku Chigwa, momwemo ndinabwereranso." 
Nehemiah2:16 Koma olamulira sanadziwe uko ndinamuka, kapena chochita ine; sindidauzenso kufikira pamenepo Ayuda, kapena ansembe, kapena aufulu, kapena olamulira, kapena otsala akuchita ntchitoyi." 
Nehemiah2:17 Pamenepo ndinanena nao, Muona choipa m'mene tilimo, kuti Yerusalemu ali bwinja, ndi zipata zake zotentha ndi moto; tiyeni timange linga la Yerusalemu, tisakhalenso chotonzedwa." 
Nehemiah2:18 Ndinawauzanso za dzanja la Mulungu wanga londikhalira mokoma, ndiponso za mau anandiuza mfumu. Nati iwo, Tinyamuke, timange. Chotero anandilimbitsira manja mokoma." 
Nehemiah2:19 Koma Sanibalati Muhoroni, ndi Tobiya kapolo Mwamoniyo, ndi Gesemu Mwarabu, anamva natiseka pwepwete, natipeputsa, nati, Chiyani ichi muchichita? Mulikupandukira mfumu kodi?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Koma ndinawabwezera mau, ndi kunena nao, Mulungu Wam'mwamba, Iye ndiye adzatilemeza; chifukwa chake ife akapolo ake tidzanyamuka ndi kumanga; koma inu mulibe gawo, kapena ulamuliro, kapena chikumbukiro, m'Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah3:1 Pamenepo Eliyasibu mkulu wa ansembe ananyamuka pamodzi ndi abale ake ansembe, namanga chipata chankhosa; anachipatula, naika zitseko zake, inde anachipatula mpaka Nsanja ya Zana, mpaka nsanja ya Hananele." 
Nehemiah3:2 Ndi pambali pake anamanga amuna a ku Yeriko. Ndi pambali pao anamanga Zakuri mwana wa Imuri. 
Nehemiah3:3 Ndi chipata chansomba anachimanga ana a Hasena; anamanga mitanda yake, ndi kuika zitseko zake, zokowera zake, ndi mipingiridzo yake." 
Nehemiah3:4 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Meremoti mwana wa Uriya, mwana wa Hakozi. Ndi pambali pao anakonza Mesulamu mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Mesezabele. Ndi pambali pao anakonza Zadoki mwana wa Baana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Atekowa; koma omveka ao sanapereke makosi ao kuntchito ya Mbuye wao. 
Nehemiah3:6 Ndi chipata chakale anachikonza Yoyada mwana wa Paseya; ndi Mesulamu mwana wa Besodeiya anamanga mitanda yake, ndi kuika zitseko zake, ndi zokowera zake, ndi mipingiridzo yake." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Melatiya Mgibeoni, ndi Yadoni Mmeronoti, ndi amuna a ku Gibiyoni, ndi a ku Mizipa, wa ulamuliro wa chiwanga tsidya lino la mtsinje." 
Nehemiah3:8 Pambali pake anakonza Uziyele mwana wa Haraya, wa iwo osula golide. Ndi padzanja pake anakonza Hananiya, wa iwo osanganiza zonunkhira; nalimbikitsa Yerusalemu mpaka linga lachitando." 
Nehemiah3:9 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Refaya mwana wa Huri, ndiye mkulu wa dera lina la dziko la Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah3:10 Ndi pambali pao anakonza Yedaya mwana wa Harumafa, pandunji pa nyumba yake. Ndi pambali pake anakonza Hatusi mwana wa Hasabineya." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya mwana wa Harimu, ndi Hasubu mwana wa Pahatimowabu, anakonza gawo lina, ndi Nsanja ya Ng'anjo." 
Nehemiah3:12 Ndi pambali pake anakonza Salumu mwana wa Halohesi, mkulu wa dera lina la dziko la Yerusalemu, iye ndi ana ake akazi." 
Nehemiah3:13 Chipata cha ku Chigwa anachikonza Hanuni; ndi okhala m'Zanowa anachimanga, naika zitseko zake, zokowera zake, ndi mipiringidzo yake; ndiponso mikono chikwi chimodzi cha lingalo mpaka ku Chipata cha Kudzala." 
Nehemiah3:14 Ndi Chipata cha Kudzala anachikonza Malikiya mwana wa Rekabu, mkulu wa dziko la Betehakeremu; anachimanga, naika zitseko zake, zokowera zake, ndi mipiringidzo yake." 
Nehemiah3:15 Ndi chipata cha kukasupe anachikonza Salumu mwana wa Kolihoze mkulu wa dziko la Mizipa anachimanga, nachikomaniza pamwamba pake, naika zitseko zake, zokowera zake, ndi mipiringidzo yake; ndiponso linga la dziwe la Sela pa munda wa mfumu, ndi kufikira kumakwerero otsikira kumudzi wa Davide." 
Nehemiah3:16 Potsatizana naye anakonza Nehemiya mwana wa Azibuki, mkulu wa dera lake lina la dziko la Betezuri, mpaka malo a pandunji pa manda a Davide, ndi ku dziwe adalikumba, ndi kunyumba ya amphamvu aja." 
Nehemiah3:17 Potsatizana naye anakonza Alevi, Rehumu mwana wa Bani. Pambali pake anakonza Hasabiya mkulu wa dera lina la dziko la Keila, kukonzera dziko lake." 
Nehemiah3:18 Potsatizana naye anakonza abale ao, Bavai mwana wa Henadadi, mkulu wa dera lina la dziko la Keila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ndi pa mbali pake Ezere mwana wa Yesuwa, mkulu wa Mizipa, anakonza gawo lina, pandunji pokwerera kunyumba yosungamo zida za nkhondo, popindirira linga." 
Nehemiah3:20 Potsatizana naye Baruki mwana wa Zabai anafulumira kukonza gawo lina kuyambira popindirira mpaka kukhomo la nyumba ya Eliyasibu mkulu wa ansembe. 
Nehemiah3:21 Potsatizana naye Meremoti mwana wa Uriya mwana wa Hakozi anakonza gawo lina, kuyambira kukhomo la nyumba ya Eliyasibu kufikira malekezero ake a nyumba ya Eliyasibu." 
Nehemiah3:22 Ndi potsatizana naye anakonza ansembe okhala kuchidikha. 
Nehemiah3:23 Potsatizana nao anakonza Benjamini ndi Hasubu pandunji pa nyumba pao. Potsatizana nao anakonza Azariya mwana wa Maaseiya mwana wa Ananiya pafupi pa nyumba yake. 
Nehemiah3:24 Potsatizana naye Binuyi mwana wa Henadadi anakonza gawo lina, kuyambira kunyumba ya Azariya kufikira popindirira kufikira kungodya." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palali mwana wa Uzai anakonza pandunji popindirira, ndi nsanja yosomphoka pa nyumba ya mfumu ya kumtunda, imene ili kubwalo la kaidi. Potsatizana naye anakonza Pedaya mwana wa Parosi." 
Nehemiah3:26 Koma Anetini okhala m'Ofele anakonza kufikira kumalo a pandunji pa Chipata cha Madzi kum'mawa, ndi nsanja yosomphokayo." 
Nehemiah3:27 Potsatizana nao Atekowa anakonza gawo lina, pandunji pa nsanja yaikulu yosomphoka ndi kulinga la Ofele." 
Nehemiah3:28 Kumtunda kwa chipata cha akavalo anakonza ansembe, yense pandunji pa nyumba yake." 
Nehemiah3:29 Potsatizana nao anakonza Zadoki mwana wa Imeri pandunji pa nyumba yake. Ndi potsatizana naye anakonza Semaya mwana wa Sekaniya, wosunga chipata cha kum'mawa." 
Nehemiah3:30 Potsatizana naye Hananiya mwana wa Selemiya, ndi Hanuni mwana wachisanu ndi chimodzi wa Zalafi, anakonza gawo lina. Potsatizana naye anakonza Mesulamu mwana wa Berekiya pandunji pa chipinda chake." 
Nehemiah3:31 Potsatizana naye anakonza Malikiya wina wa osula golide kufikira kunyumba ya Anetini, ndi ya ochita malonda, pandunji pa chipata cha Hamifikadi, ndi kuchipinda chosanja cha kungodya." 
Nehemiah3:32 Ndi pakati pa chipinda chosanja cha kungodya ndi chipata chankhosa anakonza osula golide ndi ochita malonda. 
Nehemiah4:1 Ndipo kunali, atamva Sanibalati kuti tinalikumanga lingali, kudamuipira, nakwiya kwakukulu, naseka Ayuda pwepwete." 
Nehemiah4:2 Nanena iye pamaso pa abale ake ndi ankhondo a ku Samariya, nati, Alikuchitanji Ayuda ofookawa? Adzimangire linga kodi? Adzapereka nsembe kodi? Adzatsiriza tsiku limodzi kodi? Adzakometsanso miyala ya ku miunda yotenthedwa?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Ndipo Tobiya Mwamoni anali naye, nati, Chinkana ichi achimanga, ikakwerako nkhandwe, idzagamula linga lao lamiyala." 
Nehemiah4:4 Imvani, Mulungu wathu, popeza tanyozeka ife; muwabwezere chitonzo chao pamtu pao, ndi kuwapereka akhale chofunkhidwa m'dziko la ndende;" 
Nehemiah4:5 ndipo musakwirira mphulupulu yao, ndi kulakwa kwao kusafafanizike pamaso panu; pakuti anautsa mkwiyo wanu pamaso pa omanga linga." 
Nehemiah4:6 Koma tinamanga lingali, ndi linga lonse linalumikizana kufikira pakatimpakati; popeza mitima ya anthu inalunjika kuntchito." 
Nehemiah4:7 Koma kunali, atamva Sanibalati, ndi Tobiya, ndi Aarabu, ndi Aamoni, ndi Aasidodi, kuti makonzedwe a malinga a Yerusalemu anakula, ndi kuti mopasuka mwake munayamba kutsekeka, chidawaipira kwambiri;" 
Nehemiah4:8 napangana chiwembu iwo onse pamodzi, kudzathira nkhondo ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuchita chisokonezo m'menemo." 
Nehemiah4:9 Koma tinapemphera kwa Mulungu wathu, ndi kuwaikira olindirira usana ndi usiku, chifukwa cha iwowa." 
Nehemiah4:10 Ndipo Ayuda anati, Mphamvu ya osenza akatundu yatha, ndi dothi lichuluka, motero sitidzakhoza kumanga lingali." 
Nehemiah4:11 Nati adani athu, Sadzadziwa kapena kuona mpaka talowa pakati pao, ndi kuwapha, ndi kuleketsa ntchitoyi." 
Nehemiah4:12 Ndipo kunali, atafika Ayuda okhala pafupi pao ochokera pamalo ponse, anatiuza ife kakhumi, Bwererani kwa ife." 
Nehemiah4:13 Chifukwa chake ndinawaika potera m'kati mwa linga, popenyeka; inde ndinaika anthu monga mwa mabanja ao, akhale nao malupanga ao, nthungo zao, ndi mauta ao." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ndipo ndinapenya, ndinanyamuka, ndinanena kwa aufulu, ndi olamulira, ndi anthu otsala, Musamawaopa iwo; kumbukirani Yehova wamkulu ndi woopsa, ndi kuponyera nkhondo abale anu, ana anu aamuna ndi aakazi, akazi anu, ndi nyumba zanu." 
Nehemiah4:15 Ndipo kunali, pakumva adani athu kuti chinadziwika nafe, ndi kuti Mulungu adapititsa pachabe uphungu wao, tinabwera tonse kunka kulinga, yense kuntchito yake." 
Nehemiah4:16 Ndipo kuyambira pamenepo gawo lina la anyamata anga anagwira ntchito, ndi gawo lina linagwira nthungo, zikopa, ndi mauta, ndi malaya achitsulo; ndi akulu anali m'mbuyo mwa nyumba yonse ya Yuda." 
Nehemiah4:17 Iwo omanga linga, ndi iwo osenza katundu, posenza, anachita aliyense ndi dzanja lake lina logwira ntchito, ndi lina logwira chida;" 
Nehemiah4:18 ndi omanga linga aliyense anamangirira lupanga lake m'chuuno mwake, nagwira ntchito motero. Ndipo woomba lipenga anali ndi ine." 
Nehemiah4:19 Ndipo ndinati kwa aufulu, ndi olamulira, ndi anthu otsala, Ntchito ndiyo yochuluka ndi yachitando, ndi ife tili palakepalake palingapo, yense atalikizana ndi mnzake;" 
Nehemiah4:20 paliponse mukumva mau a lipenga, musonkhanire komweko kwa ife; Mulungu wathu adzatigwirira nkhondo." 
Nehemiah4:21 Momwemo tinalikugwira ntchito; gawo lina la iwo linagwira nthungo kuyambira mbandakucha mpaka zatuluka nyenyezi. 
Nehemiah4:22 Ndinanenanso kwa anthu nthawi yomweyi, Aliyense agone m'Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi mnyamata wake, kuti atilindirire usiku, ndi kugwira ntchito usana." 
Nehemiah4:23 Ndipo ine, ndi abale anga, ndi anyamata anga, angakhale amuna olindirira onditsata ine, nnena mmodzi yense wa ife anavula zovala zake, yense anapita ndi chida chake kumadzi." 
Nehemiah5:1 Pamenepo panamveka kulira kwakukulu kwa anthu ndi akazi ao kudandaula pa abale ao Ayuda. 
Nehemiah5:2 Popeza panali ena akuti, Ife, ana athu aamuna ndi aakazi, ndife ambiri; talandira tirigu, kuti tidye tikhale ndi moyo." 
Nehemiah5:3 Panali enanso akuti, Tili kupereka chikole minda yathu, ndi minda yathu yampesa ndi nyumba zathu; kuti tilandire tirigu chifukwa cha njalayi." 
Nehemiah5:4 Panali enanso akuti, Takongola ndalama za msonkho wa mfumu; taperekapo chikole minda yathu, ndi minda yathu yampesa." 
Nehemiah5:5 Koma tsopano thupi lathu likunga thupi la abale athu, ana athu akunga ana ao; ndipo taonani, titengetsa ana athu aamuna ndi aakazi akhale akapolo, ndi ana athu akazi ena tawatengetsa kale; ndipo tilibe ife mphamvu ya kuchitapo kanthu; ndi minda yathu, ndi minda yathu yampesa, nja ena." 
Nehemiah5:6 Ndipo pakumva kulira kwao, ndi mau ao, kunandiipira kwambiri." 
Nehemiah5:7 Pamenepo mtima wanga unandipangira; ndipo ndinatsutsana nao aufulu ndi olamulira, ndi kunena nao, Mukongoletsa mwa phindu yense kwa mbale wake. Ndipo ndinasonkhanitsa msonkhano waukulu wakuwatsutsa." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ndipo ndinanena nao, Ife monga umo tinakhoza, tinaombola abale athu Ayuda ogulitsidwa kwa amitundu; ndipo kodi inu mukuti mugulitse abale anu, kapena tiwagule ndi ife? Pamenepo anakhala duu, nasowa ponena." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ndinatinso, Chinthu muchitachi si chokoma ai; simuyenera kodi kuyenda m'kuopa Mulungu wathu, chifukwa cha mnyozo wa amitundu, ndiwo adani athu?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Kodi ine, ndi abale anga, ndi anyamata anga, tiwakongoletsa ndalama ndi tirigu mwa phindu? Ndikupemphani, tileke phindu ili." 
Nehemiah5:11 Abwezereni lero lomwe minda yao, minda yao yampesa, minda yao ya azitona, ndi nyumba zao, ndi limodzi la magawo zana limodzi la ndalama, ndi tirigu, vinyo, ndi mafuta, limene muwalipitsa." 
Nehemiah5:12 Pamenepo anati, Tidzawabwezera osawalipitsa kanthu, tidzachita monga momwe mwanena. Pamenepo ndinaitana ansembe, ndi kuwalumbiritsa, kuti adzachita monga mwa mau awa." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ndinakutumulanso malaya anga, ndi kuti, Mulungu akutumule momwemo munthu yense wosasunga mau awa, kunyumba yake, ndi kuntchito yake; inde amkutumule momwemo, namtayire zake zonse. Ndi msonkhano wonse unati, Amen, nalemekeza Yehova. Ndipo anthu anachita monga mwa mau awa." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ndipo chiyambire tsiku lija anandiika ndikhale kazembe wao m'dziko la Yuda; kuyambira chaka cha makumi awiri kufikira chaka cha makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri cha Arita-kisereksesi mfumu, ndizo zaka khumi ndi ziwiri, ine ndi abale anga sitinadya chakudya cha kazembe." 
Nehemiah5:15 Koma akazembe akale ndisanakhale ine, analemetsa anthu, nadzitengera kwa iwo mkate, ndi vinyo, pamodzi ndi siliva masekeli makumi anai; angakhale anyamata ao anachita ufumu pa anthu; koma sindinatero ine, chifukwa cha kuopa Mulungu." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ndiponso ndinalimbikira ntchito ya linga ili, ngakhale dziko sitinaligula, ndi anyamata anga onse anasonkhanira ntchito komweko." 
Nehemiah5:17 Panalinso podyera ine Ayuda ndi olamulira amuna zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu, pamodzi ndi iwo akutidzera kuchokera kwa amitundu otizinga." 
Nehemiah5:18 Zokonzekeratu tsiku limodzi tsono ndizo ng'ombe imodzi, ndi nkhosa zonenepa zisanu ndi imodzi, anandikonzeratunso nkhuku, ndi kamodzi atapita masiku khumi vinyo wambiri wa mitundumitundu; chinkana chonsechi sindinafunsira chakudya cha kazembe, popeza ukapolo unalemerera anthuwo." 
Nehemiah5:19 Mundikumbukire Mulungu, zindikomere zonse ndinachitira anthu awa." 
Nehemiah6:1 Kunali tsono, atamva Sanibalati, ndi Tobiya, ndi Gesemu Mwarabu, ndi adani athu otsala, kuti ndidatha kumanga lingali, posatsalaponso popasuka; (ngakhale pajapo sindinaika zitseko pazipata);" 
Nehemiah6:2 anatumiza mau kwa ine Sanibalati ndi Gesemu, kuti, Tiyeni tikomane kumidzi ya ku Chigwa cha Ono; koma analingirira za kundichitira choipa." 
Nehemiah6:3 Ndipo ndinawatumizira mithenga, ndi kuti, Ndilikuchita ntchito yaikulu, sindikhoza kutsika; ndiidulirenji padera ntchito poileka ine, ndi kukutsikirani?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Nanditumizira ine mau otere kanai; ndinawabwezeranso mau momwemo. 
Nehemiah6:5 Pamenepo Sanibalati anatuma mnyamata wake kwa ine kachisanu, ndi kalata wosatseka m'dzanja mwake;" 
Nehemiah6:6 m'menemo mudalembedwa, Kwamveka mwa amitundu, ndi Gesemu achinena, kuti iwe ndi Ayuda mulikulingirira za kupanduka; chifukwa chake mulikumanga lingali; ndipo iwe udzakhala mfumu yao monga mwa mau awa." 
Nehemiah6:7 Ndiponso waika aneneri akubukitsa za iwe ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Ku Yuda kuli mfumu, ndipo zidzamveka kwa mfumu, kuti kuli zotere. Tiyeni tsono tipangane pamodzi." 
Nehemiah6:8 Koma ndinamtumizira mau, akuti, Palibe zinthu zotere zonga unenazi, koma uzilingirira mumtima mwako." 
Nehemiah6:9 Pakuti anafuna onse kutiopsa, ndi kuti, Manja ao adzaleka ntchito, ndipo siidzachitika. Koma Inu, Mulungu, mulimbitse manja anga tsopano." 
Nehemiah6:10 Pamenepo ndinalowa m'nyumba ya Semaya mwana wa Delaya, mwana wa Mehetabele, wobindikizidwayo, ndipo anati, Tikomane kunyumba ya Mulungu m'kati mwa Kachisi, titsekenso pa makomo a Kachisi; pakuti akudza kudzapha iwe, inde akudza usiku kudzapha iwe." 
Nehemiah6:11 Koma ndinati, Munthu ngati ine nkuthawa kodi? Ndani wonga ine adzalowa m'Kachisi kupulumutsa moyo wake? Sindidzalowamo." 
Nehemiah6:12 Ndipo ndinazindikira kuti sanamtume Mulungu; koma ananena choneneracho pa ine, popeza Tobiya ndi Sanibalati adamlembera." 
Nehemiah6:13 Anamlembera chifukwa cha ichi, kuti ine ndichite mantha, ndi kuchita chotero, ndi kuchimwa; ndi kuti anditolerepo mbiri yoipa ndi kundinyoza." 
Nehemiah6:14 Mukumbukire, Mulungu wanga, Tobiya ndi Sanibalati monga mwa ntchito zao izi, ndi Nowadiya mneneri wamkazi yemwe, ndi aneneri otsala, amene anafuna kundiopsa." 
Nehemiah6:15 Ndipo linga linatsirizika pa tsiku la makumi awiri ndi lachisanu la mwezi wa Eluli, titalimanga masiku makumi asanu mphambu awiri." 
Nehemiah6:16 Ndipo kunali atachimva adani athu onse, amitundu onse akutizinga anaopa, nagwadi nkhope; popeza anazindikira kuti ntchitoyi inachitika ndi Mulungu wathu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Masikuwo aufulu a Yuda analemberanso akalata ambiri kwa Tobiya; ndipo anawafikanso akalata ake a Tobiya. 
Nehemiah6:18 Pakuti ambiri m'Yuda analumbirirana naye chibwenzi; popeza ndiye mkamwini wake wa Sekaniya mwana wa Ara; ndi mwana wake Yehohanani adadzitengera mwana wamkazi wa Mesulamu mwana wa Berekiya. 
Nehemiah6:19 Anatchulanso ntchito zake zokoma pamaso panga namfotokozera iye mau anga. Ndipo Tobiya anatumiza akalata kuti andiopse ine. 
Nehemiah7:1 Ndipo atatha kumanga linga, ndinaika zitseko, nakhazika odikira, ndi oimbira, ndi Alevi;" 
Nehemiah7:2 ndipo ndinawapatsa mbale wanga Hanani, ndi Hananiya kazembe wa kuboma, ulamuliro wa pa Yerusalemu; popeza ndiye munthu wokhulupirika, naposa ambiri pakuopa Mulungu." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ndinanenanso nao, Asatsegule pa zipata za Yerusalemu lisanafunde dzuwa; ndi poimirira odikira atseke pazipata, nimuzipiringidze, nimuike alonda mwa iwo okhala m'Yerusalemu, yense polindirira pake, yense pandunji pa nyumba yake." 
Nehemiah7:4 Mudziwo tsono ndi wachitando, ndi waukulu; koma anthu anali m'mwemo ngowerengeka, nyumba zomwe sizinamangike." 
Nehemiah7:5 Ndipo Mulungu wanga anaika m'mtima mwanga kuti ndiwasonkhanitse aufulu, ndi olamulira, ndi anthu, kuti awerengedwe mwa chibadwidwe chao. Ndipo ndinapeza buku la chibadwidwe la iwo adakwerako poyamba paja; ndinapeza mudalembedwa m'mwemo." 
Nehemiah7:6 Ana a dziko amene anakwera kuchokera kundende a iwo adatengedwa ndende, amene Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni adawatenga, anabwera ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Yuda, yense kumudzi wake, ndi awa:" 
Nehemiah7:7 ndiwo amene anadza ndi Zerubabele: Yesuwa, Nehemiya, Azariya, Raamiya, Nahamani, Mordekai, Bilisani, Misipereti, Bigivai, Nehumu, Baana. Mawerengedwe a amuna a anthu Aisraele ndiwo:" 
Nehemiah7:8 ana a Parosi zikwi ziwiri mphambu zana limodzi kudza makumi asanu ndi awiri. 
Nehemiah7:9 Ana a Sefatiya, mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:10 Ana a Ara, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:11 Ana a Pahatimowabu, a ana a Yesuwa ndi Yowabu, zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza khumi limodzi ndi asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:12 Ana a Elamu, chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu kudza anai." 
Nehemiah7:13 Ana a Zatu, mazana asanu ndi atatu mphambu makumi anai kudza asanu." 
Nehemiah7:14 Ana a Zakai, mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi." 
Nehemiah7:15 Ana a Binuyi, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi anai kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:16 Ana a Bebai, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:17 Ana a Azigadi, zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi awiri ndi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:18 Ana a Adonikamu, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi, kudza asanu ndi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:19 Ana a Bigivai, zikwi ziwiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:20 Ana a Adini, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza asanu." 
Nehemiah7:21 Ana a Atere, a Hezekiya, makumi asanu ndi anai kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:22 Ana a Hasumu, mazana atatu mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:23 Ana a Bezai, mazana atatu mphambu makumi awiri kudza anai." 
Nehemiah7:24 Ana a Harifi, zana limodzi mphambu khumi ndi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:25 Ana a Gibiyoni, makumi asanu ndi anai kudza asanu." 
Nehemiah7:26 Amuna a ku Betelehemu ndi ku Netofa, zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:27 Amuna a ku Anatoti, zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:28 Amuna a ku Betazimaveti, makumi anai kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:29 Amuna a ku Kiriyati-Yearimu, Kefira, ndi Beeroti, mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi anai kudza atatu." 
Nehemiah7:30 Amuna a ku Rama ndi Geba, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza mmodzi." 
Nehemiah7:31 Amuna a ku Mikimasi, zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:32 Amuna a ku Betele ndi Ai, zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza atatu." 
Nehemiah7:33 Amuna a ku Nebo winayo, makumi asanu kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:34 Ana a Elamu winayo, chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu kudza anai." 
Nehemiah7:35 Ana a Harimu, mazana atatu mphambu makumi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:36 Ana a Yeriko, mazana atatu mphambu makumi anai kudza asanu." 
Nehemiah7:37 Ana a Lodi, Hadidi, ndi Ono, mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi awiri kudza mmodzi." 
Nehemiah7:38 Ana a Senaa, zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:39 Ansembe: ana a Yedaya, a nyumba ya Yesuwa, mazana asanu ndi anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza atatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Ana a Imeri, chikwi chimodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:41 Ana a Pasuri, chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri kudza makumi anai ndi asanu ndi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:42 Ana a Harimu, chikwi chimodzi mphambu khumi limodzi kudza asanu ndi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:43 A Levi: ana a Yesuwa, a Kadimiyele, a ana a Hodeva, makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza anai." 
Nehemiah7:44 Oimbira: ana a Asafu, zana limodzi mphambu makumi anai kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:45 Odikira: ana a Salumu, ana a Atere, ana a Talimoni, ana a Akubu, ana a Hatita, ana a Sobai, zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:46 Anetini: ana a Ziha, ana a Hasufa, ana a Tabaoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 ana a Kerosi, ana a Siya, ana a Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 ana a Lebana, ana a Hagaba, ana a Salimai," 
Nehemiah7:49 ana a Hanani, ana a Gidele, ana a Gahara," 
Nehemiah7:50 ana a Reaya, ana a Rezini, ana a Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 ana a Gazamu, ana a Uza, ana a Paseya," 
Nehemiah7:52 ana a Besai, ana a Meunimu, ana a Nefusesimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 ana a Bakibuki, ana a Hakufa, ana a Harihuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 ana a Baziliti, ana a Mehida, ana a Harisa," 
Nehemiah7:55 ana a Barikosi, ana a Sisera, ana a Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 ana a Neziya, ana a Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Ana a akapolo a Solomoni: ana a Sotai, ana a Sofereti, ana a Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 ana a Yaala, ana a Darikoni, ana a Gidele," 
Nehemiah7:59 ana a Sefatiya, ana a Hatili, ana a Pokereti-Hazebaimu, ana a Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Anetini onse, ndi ana a akapolo a Solomoni, ndiwo mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:61 Ndipo okwera kuchokera ku Telemela, Teleharisa, Kerubi, Adoni, ndi Imeri, ndi awa; koma sanakhoze kutchula nyumba za makolo ao, kapena mbumba zao, ngati ali a Israele;" 
Nehemiah7:62 ana a Delaya, ana a Tobiya, ana a Nekoda, mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi anai kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ndi a ansembe: ana a Hobaya, ana a Hakozi, ana a Barizilai, amene anadzitengera mkazi wa ana akazi a Barizilai Mgiliyadi, natchedwa ndi dzina lao." 
Nehemiah7:64 Awa anafunafuna maina ao m'buku la iwo owerengedwa mwa chibadwidwe, koma osawapeza; potero anawayesa odetsedwa, nawachotsa kuntchito ya nsembe." 
Nehemiah7:65 Ndipo kazembe anawauza kuti asadyeko zopatulika kwambiri, mpaka wauka wansembe wokhala ndi Urimu ndi Tumimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Msonkhano wonse pamodzi ndiwo zikwi makumi anai ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi," 
Nehemiah7:67 osawerenga akapolo ao aamuna ndi aakazi, ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana atatu ndi makumi atatu kudza asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anakhala nao aamuna ndi aakazi oimbira mazana awiri mphambu makumi anai kudza asanu ndi mmodzi." 
Nehemiah7:68 Akavalo ao ndiwo mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi atatu kudza asanu ndi mmodzi; nyuru zao mazana awiri mphambu makumi anai kudza zisanu; 
Nehemiah7:69 ngamira zao mazana anai mphambu makumi atatu kudza asanu; abulu ao zikwi zisanu ndi chimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi awiri. 
Nehemiah7:70 Ndipo ena a akulu a nyumba za makolo anapereka kuntchito. Kazembeyo anapereka kuchuma madariki agolide chikwi chimodzi, mbale zowazira makumi asanu, malaya a ansembe makumi atatu." 
Nehemiah7:71 Enanso a akulu a nyumba za makolo anapereka kuchuma cha ntchitoyi, madariki agolide zikwi makumi awiri, ndi miyeso ya mina ya siliva zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana awiri." 
Nehemiah7:72 Zopereka za anthu otsala ndizo madariki agolide zikwi makumi awiri, ndi miyeso ya mina ya siliva zikwi ziwiri, ndi malaya a ansembe makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu asanu ndi awiri." 
Nehemiah7:73 Nakhala m'midzi mwao ansembe, ndi Alevi, ndi odikira, ndi oimbira, ndi anthu ena, ndi Anetini, ndi Aisraele onse. Utakhala tsono mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri ana a Israele anakhala m'midzi mwao." 
Nehemiah8:1 Ndipo anthu onse anasonkhana ngati munthu mmodzi kukhwalala lili ku Chipata cha Madzi, namuuza Ezara mlembi atenge buku la chilamulo cha Mose, chimene Yehova adalamulira Israele." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ndipo Ezara wansembe anabwera nacho chilamulo pamaso pa msonkhano, ndiwo amuna ndi akazi, ndi yense wakumva ndi kuzindikira tsiku loyamba la mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri." 
Nehemiah8:3 Nawerenga m'menemo pa khwalala lili ku Chipata cha Madzi kuyambira mbandakucha kufikira msana, pamaso pa amuna ndi akazi, ndi iwo okhoza kuzindikira; ndi anthu onse anatcherera khutu buku la chilamulo." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ndipo Ezara mlembi anaima pa chiunda cha mitengo adachimangira msonkhanowo; ndi pambali pake padaima Matitiya, ndi Sema, ndi Anaya, ndi Uriya, ndi Hilikiya, ndi Maaseiya, kudzanja lamanja lake; ndi kudzanja lamanzere Pedaya, ndi Misaele, ndi Malikiya, ndi Hasumu, ndi Hasibadana, Zekariya, ndi Mesulamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ndipo Ezara anafunyulula bukulo pamaso pa anthu onse, popeza iye anasomphokera anthu onse; ndipo polifunyulula anthu onse ananyamuka." 
Nehemiah8:6 Pamenepo Ezara analemekeza Yehova Mulungu wamkulu. Navomereza anthu onse, ndi kuti, Amen, Amen; nakweza manja ao, nawerama, nalambira Yehova nkhope zao pansi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Ndi Yesuwa, ndi Bani, ndi Serebiya, Yamini, Akubu, Sabetai, Hodiya, Maaseiya, Kelita, Azariya, Yozabadi, Hanani, Pelaya, ndi Alevi, anadziwitsa anthu chilamulocho; ndi anthu anali chilili pamalo pao." 
Nehemiah8:8 Nawerenga iwo m'buku m'chilamulo cha Mulungu momveka, natanthauzira, nawazindikiritsa chowerengedwacho." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ndipo Nehemiya, ndiye kazembe, ndi Ezara wansembe mlembiyo, ndi Alevi ophunzitsa anthu, ananena ndi anthu onse, Lero ndilo lopatulikira Yehova Mulungu wanu, musamachita maliro, musamalira misozi. Popeza anthu onse analira misozi pakumva mau a chilamulo." 
Nehemiah8:10 Nanena naonso, Mukani, mukadye zonona, mukamwe zozuna, nimumtumizire gawo lake iye amene sanamkonzeretu kanthu; chifukwa lero ndilo lopatulikira Ambuye wathu; ndipo musamachita chisoni; pakuti chimwemwe cha Yehova ndicho mphamvu yanu." 
Nehemiah8:11 Ndipo Alevi anatontholetsa anthu onse, ndi kuti, Khalani muli chete; pakuti lero ndi lopatulika; musamachita chisoni." 
Nehemiah8:12 Napita anthu onse kudya ndi kumwa, ndi kutumiza magawo, ndi kusekerera kwakukulu; popeza anazindikira mau amene adawafotokozera." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ndipo m'mawa mwake akulu a nyumba za makolo a anthu onse, ansembe, ndi Alevi anasonkhana pamodzi kwa Ezara mlembi, kuti atole nzeru za mau a chilamulo." 
Nehemiah8:14 Napeza munalembedwa m'chilamulo kuti Yehova analamulira ndi Mose, kuti ana a Israele azikhala m'misasa pa chikondwerero cha mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri," 
Nehemiah8:15 ndi kuti azilalikira ndi kumveketsa m'midzi mwao monse ndi m'Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Muzitulukira kuphiri, ndi kutengako nthambi za azitona, ndi nthambi za mitengo yamafuta, ndi nthambi za mitengo yamchisu, ndi zinkhwamba za migwalangwa, ndi nthambi za mitengo zothonana, kumanga nazo misasa monga munalembedwa." 
Nehemiah8:16 Natuluka anthu, nakazitenga, nadzimangira misasa, yense pa tsindwi la nyumba yake, ndi m'mabwalo ao, ndi m'mabwalo a nyumba ya Mulungu, ndi pa khwalala la Chipata cha Madzi, ndi pa khwalala la chipata cha Efuremu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ndi msonkhano wonse wa iwo otuluka m'ndende anamanga misasa, nakhala m'misasamo; pakuti chiyambire masiku a Yoswa mwana wa Nuni kufikira tsiku lija ana a Israele sanatero. Ndipo panali chimwemwe chachikulu." 
Nehemiah8:18 Anawerenganso m'buku la chilamulo cha Mulungu tsiku ndi tsiku, kuyambira tsiku loyamba kufikira tsiku lotsiriza. Nachita chikondwerero masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndi tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu ndilo msonkhano woletsa, monga mwa malemba." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ndipo tsiku la makumi awiri mphambu anai la mwezi uno ana a Israele anasonkhana ndi kusala, ndi kuvala chiguduli, ndipo anali ndi fumbi." 
Nehemiah9:2 Nadzipatula a mbumba ya Israele kwa alendo onse, naimirira, nawulula zochimwa zao, ndi mphulupulu za makolo ao." 
Nehemiah9:3 Naimirira poima pao, nawerenga m'buku la chilamulo cha Yehova Mulungu wao limodzi la magawo anai a tsiku; ndi limodzi la magawo anai anawulula, napembedza Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Nehemiah9:4 Pamenepo anaimirira pa chiunda cha Alevi Yesuwa, ndi Bani, Kadimiyele, Sebaniya, Buni, Serebiya, Bani, ndi Kenani, nafuula ndi mau akulu kwa Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Nehemiah9:5 Nati Alevi, Yesuwa, ndi Kadimiyele, Bani, Hasabineya, Serebiya, Hodiya, Sebaniya, ndi Petahiya, Imirirani, lemekezani Yehova Mulungu wanu kunthawi za nthawi; ndipo lilemekezeke dzina lanu la ulemerero, lokuzika loposa chilemekezo ndi chiyamiko chonse." 
Nehemiah9:6 Inu ndinu Yehova, nokhanu; mwalenga thambo, kumwambamwamba, ndi khamu lao lonse, dziko lapansi, ndi zonse zili pomwepo, nyanja ndi zonse zili m'mwemo, ndi Inu muzisunga zamoyo zonsezi, ndi khamu lakumwamba lilambira Inu." 
Nehemiah9:7 Inu ndinu Yehova Mulungu amene munasankha Abramu ndi kumtulutsa m'Uri wa Ababiloni, ndi kumutcha dzina lake Abrahamu;" 
Nehemiah9:8 ndipo munampeza mtima wake wokhulupirika pamaso panu, nimunapangana naye kumpatsa dziko la Akanani, Ahiti, Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ayebusi, ndi Agirigasi, kulipereka kwa mbumba zake; ndipo mwakwaniritsa mau anu, popeza Inu ndinu wolungama." 
Nehemiah9:9 Ndipo munapenya msauko wa makolo athu m'Ejipito, nimunamva kufuula kwao ku Nyanja Yofiira," 
Nehemiah9:10 nimunachitira zizindikiro ndi zodabwitsa Farao ndi akapolo ake onse, ndi anthu onse a m'dziko lake; popeza munadziwa kuti anawachitira modzikuza; ndipo munadzibukitsira dzina monga lero lino." 
Nehemiah9:11 Ndipo munagawanitsa nyanja pamaso pao, napita iwo pakati pa nyanja pouma, ndipo munaponya mozama owalondola, ngati mwala m'madzi olimba." 
Nehemiah9:12 Munawatsogoleranso usana ndi mtambo woti njo, ndi moto tolo usiku, kuwaunikira m'njira akayendamo." 
Nehemiah9:13 Munatsikiranso pa phiri la Sinai, nimunalankhula nao mochokera m'Mwamba, ndipo munawapatsa maweruzo oyenera, ndi chilamulo choona, malemba, ndi malamulo okoma;" 
Nehemiah9:14 ndi Sabata lanu lopatulika munawadziwitsa, nimunawalamulira malamulo, ndi malemba, ndi chilamulo, mwa dzanja la Mose mtumiki wanu;" 
Nehemiah9:15 ndi mkate wochokera m'mwamba munawapatsa pa njala yao; ndi madzi otuluka m'thanthwe munawatulutsira pa ludzu lao, ndi kuwauza alowe, nalandire dziko limene mudakwezapo dzanja lanu kuwapatsa." 
Nehemiah9:16 Koma iwo ndi makolo athu anachita modzikuza, naumitsa khosi lao, osamvera malamulo anu," 
Nehemiah9:17 nakana kumvera, osakumbukiranso zodabwitsa zanu munazichita pakati pao; koma anaumitsa khosi lao, ndipo m'kupanduka kwao anaika mtsogoleri abwerere kunka ku ukapolo wao; koma Inu ndinu Mulungu wokhululukira, wachisomo, ndi wansoni, wolekereza, ndi wochuluka chifundo; ndipo simunawasiya." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ngakhale apa atadzipangira mwanawang'ombe woyenga, nati, Suyu Mulungu wako anakukweza kuchokera ku Ejipito, nachita zopeputsa zazikulu;" 
Nehemiah9:19 koma Inu mwa nsoni zanu zazikulu simunawasiya m'chipululu; mtambo woti njo sunawachokera usana kuwatsogolera m'njira, ngakhale moto wa tolo usiku kuwaunikira panjira anayenera kuyendamo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Munawapatsanso mzimu wanu wokoma kuwalangiza, ndipo simunawamana mana anu pakamwa pao; munawapatsanso madzi pa ludzu lao." 
Nehemiah9:21 Ndipo munawalera zaka makumi anai m'chipululu, osasowa kanthu iwo; zovala zao sizinatha, ndi mapazi ao sanatupe." 
Nehemiah9:22 Munawapatsanso maufumu, ndi mitundu ya anthu, nimunawagawa m'madera, motero analandira likhale laolao dziko la Sihoni, ndilo dziko la mfumu ya ku Hesiboni, ndi dziko la Ogi mfumu ya ku Basani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Ana aonso munawachulukitsa monga nyenyezi za m'mwamba, nimunawalowetsa m'dziko mudalinena kwa makolo ao, alowemo likhale laolao." 
Nehemiah9:24 Nalowa anawo, nalandira dzikoli likhale laolao, ndipo munagonjetsa pamaso pao okhala m'dziko, ndiwo Akanani, ndi kuwapereka m'dzanja mwao, pamodzi ndi mafumu ao, ndi mitundu ya anthu ya m'dziko, kuti achite nao chifuniro chao." 
Nehemiah9:25 Ndipo analanda midzi yamalinga, ndi dziko la zonona, nalandira zikhale zaozao nyumba zodzala ndi zokoma zilizonse, zitsime zokumbidwa, minda yampesa, ndi minda ya azitona, ndi mitengo yambiri yazipatso; nadya iwo, nakhuta, nanenepa, nakondwera nako kukoma kwanu kwakukulu." 
Nehemiah9:26 Koma anakhala osamvera, napandukira Inu, nataya chilamulo chanu m'mbuyo mwao napha aneneri anu akuwachitira umboni, kuwabwezera kwa Inu, nachita zopeputsa zazikulu." 
Nehemiah9:27 Chifukwa chake munawapereka m'dzanja la adani ao akuwasautsa; koma mu nthawi ya kusautsika kwao anafuula kwa Inu, ndipo munamva m'Mwamba, ndi monga mwa nsoni zanu zambiri munawapatsa apulumutsi akuwapulumutsa m'dzanja la adani ao." 
Nehemiah9:28 Koma atapumula, anabwereza kuchita choipa pamaso panu; chifukwa chake munawasiya m'dzanja la adani ao amene anachita ufumu pa iwo; koma pobwera iwo ndi kufuula kwa Inu, munamva m'Mwamba ndi kuwapulumutsa kawirikawiri, monga mwa chifundo chanu;" 
Nehemiah9:29 ndipo munawachitira umboni, kuti muwabwezerenso ku chilamulo chanu; koma anachita modzikuza, osamvera malamulo anu; koma anachimwira malamulo anu (amene munthu akawachita adzakhala nao ndi moyo); nakaniza phewa lao, naumitsa khosi lao, osamvera." 
Nehemiah9:30 Koma munawalekerera zaka zambiri, ndi kuwachitira umboni ndi mzimu wanu, mwa aneneri anu, koma sanamvere; chifukwa chake munawapereka m'dzanja la mitundu ya anthu a m'dziko." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ndipo mwa nsoni zanu zochuluka simunawatha, kapena kuwataya; popeza Inu ndinu Mulungu wa chisomo ndi chifundo." 
Nehemiah9:32 Ndipo tsono, Mulungu wathu, ndinu Mulungu wamkulu, ndi wamphamvu, ndi woopsa, wakusunga pangano ndi chifundo, asachepe pamaso panu mavuto athu onse amene anatigwera ife, ndi mafumu athu, akulu athu, ndi ansembe athu, ndi aneneri athu, ndi makolo athu, ndi anthu anu onse, kuyambira masiku a mafumu a Asiriya, mpaka lero lino." 
Nehemiah9:33 Koma Inu ndinu wolungama mwa zonse zatigwera; pakuti mwachita zoona, koma ife tachita choipa;" 
Nehemiah9:34 ndi mafumu athu, akulu athu, ansembe athu, ndi makolo athu, sanasunge chilamulo chanu, kapena kumvera malamulo anu, ndi mboni zanu, zimene munawachitira umboni nazo." 
Nehemiah9:35 Popeza sanatumikire Inu m'ufumu wao, ndi m'ubwino wanu wochuluka umene mudawapatsa, ndi m'dziko lalikulu ndi la zonona mudalipereka pamaso pao, ndipo sanabwerere kuleka ntchito zao zoipa." 
Nehemiah9:36 Tapenyani, ife lero ndife akapolo, ndi dzikoli mudalipereka kwa makolo athu kudya zipatso zake ndi zokoma zake, taonani, ife ndife akapolo m'menemo." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ndipo lichulukitsira mafumu zipatso zake, ndiwo amene munawaika atiweruze, chifukwa cha zoipa zathu; achitanso ufumu pa matupi athu, ndi pa zoweta zathu, monga umo akonda; ndipo ife tisauka kwakukulu." 
Nehemiah9:38 Ndipo mwa ichi chonse tichita pangano lokhazikika, ndi kulilemba, ndi akulu athu, Alevi athu, ndi ansembe athu, alikomera chizindikiro." 
Nehemiah10:1 Okomera chizindikiro tsono ndiwo Nehemiya, Tirisata mwana wa Hakaliya, ndi Zedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraya, Azariya, Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pasuri, Amariya, Malikiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatusi, Sebaniya, Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harimu, Meremoti, Obadiya," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniele, Ginetoni, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniele, Ginetoni, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulamu, Abiya, Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maaziya, Biligai, Semaya, ndiwo ansembe." 
Nehemiah10:9 Ndi Alevi ndiwo Yesuwa mwana wa Azaniya, Binuyi wa ana a Henadadi, Kadimiyele;" 
Nehemiah10:10 ndi abale ao: Sebaniya, Hodiya, Kelita, Pelaya, Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rehobu, Hasabiya," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakuri, Serebiya, Sebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodiya, Bani, Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Akulu a anthu: Parosi, Pahatimowabu, Elamu, Zatu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Azigadi, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Bigivai, Adini," 
Nehemiah10:17 Atere, Hezekiya, Azuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodiya, Hasumu, Bezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifi, Anatoti, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magapiyasi, Mesulamu, Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mesezabele, Zadoki, Yaduwa," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatiya, Hanani, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoseya, Hananiya, Hasubu," 
Nehemiah10:24 Halohesi, Piliha, Sobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehumu, Hasabuna, Maaseiya," 
Nehemiah10:26 ndi Ahiya, Hanani, Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluki, Harimu, Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Ndi anthu otsala, ansembe, Alevi, odikira, oimbira, Anetini, ndi onse anadzisiyanitsawo pa mitundu ya anthu a m'dziko kutsata chilamulo cha Mulungu, akazi ao, ana ao aamuna ndi aakazi, yense wodziwa ndi wozindikira," 
Nehemiah10:29 amenewa anaumirira abale ao, omveka ao, nalowa m'temberero ndi lumbiro, kuti adzayenda m'chilamulo cha Mulungu anachipereka Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu, ndi kuti adzasunga ndi kuchita zonse atilamulira Yehova Ambuye wathu, ndi maweruzo ake, ndi malemba ake;" 
Nehemiah10:30 ndi kuti sitidzapereka ana athu akazi kwa mitundu ya anthu a m'dziko, kapena kutengera ana athu amuna ana ao akazi;" 
Nehemiah10:31 ndipo mitundu ya anthu a m'dziko akabwera nao malonda, ngakhale tirigu, tsiku la Sabata, kutsata malonda, sitidzagulana nao tsiku la Sabata, kapena dzuwa lina lopatulika, ndi kuti tidzaleka chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri ndi mangawa ali onse." 
Nehemiah10:32 Tinadziikiranso malamulo, kuti tizipereka chaka ndi chaka limodzi la magawo atatu a sekeli kuntchito ya nyumba ya Mulungu wathu;" 
Nehemiah10:33 kulipereka mkate woonekera, ndi nsembe yaufa yosaleka, ndi nsembe yopsereza yosaleka, ya masabata, ya pokhala miyezi, kuliperekera nyengo zoikika ndi zopatulikira, ndi nsembe za zolakwa za kutetezera Israele zoipa, ndi ntchito zonse za nyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Ndipo tinalota maere, ansembe, Alevi, ndi anthu, a chopereka cha nkhuni, kubwera nazo kunyumba ya Mulungu wathu, monga mwa nyumba za makolo athu, pa nyengo zoikika chaka ndi chaka, kuzisonkha pa guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wathu, monga mulembedwa m'chilamulo;" 
Nehemiah10:35 ndi kubwera nazo zipatso zoyamba za nthaka, ndi zoyamba za zipatso zonse za mtengo uliwonse chaka ndi chaka, ku nyumba ya Yehova;" 
Nehemiah10:36 ndi ana athu oyamba kubadwa, ndi oyamba kubadwa a nyama zathu, monga mulembedwa m'chilamulo, ndi oyamba a ng'ombe zathu, ndi nkhosa zathu, kubwera nazo kunyumba ya Mulungu wathu kwa ansembe akutumikira m'nyumba ya Mulungu wathu;" 
Nehemiah10:37 ndi kuti tidzabwera nazo za mtanda wa mkate wathu woyamba, ndi nsembe zathu zokwera, ndi zipatso za mtengo uliwonse, vinyo, ndi mafuta, kwa ansembe, kuzipinda za nyumba ya Mulungu wathu; ndi limodzi la magawo khumi la nthaka yathu kwa Alevi; pakuti Alevi amene amalandira limodzilimodzi la magawo khumi m'midzi yonse yolima ife." 
Nehemiah10:38 Ndipo wansembe mwana wa Aroni azikhala ndi Alevi, polandira Alevi limodzilimodzi la magawo khumi; ndi Alevi azikwera nalo limodzi la magawo khumi mwa limodzilimodzi la magawo khumi kunyumba ya Mulungu wathu, kuzipinda, kunyumba ya chuma." 
Nehemiah10:39 Pakuti ana a Israele ndi ana a Levi, azibwera nayo nsembe yokweza yatirigu, ndi yavinyo ndi yamafuta, kuzipinda kuli zipangizo za malo opatulika, ndi ansembe akutumikira, ndi odikira, ndi oimbira; kuti tisasiye nyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Ndipo akulu a anthu anakhala m'Yerusalemu; anthu otsala omwe anachita maere, kuti libwere limodzi la magawo khumi likhale m'Yerusalemu, mudzi wopatulika, ndi asanu ndi anai akhumi m'midzi ina." 
Nehemiah11:2 Ndipo anthu anadalitsa amuna onse akudzinenera mwaufulu kuti adzakhala m'Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Awa tsono ndi akulu a dziko okhala m'Yerusalemu; koma m'midzi ya Yuda yense anakhala pa cholowa chake m'midzi mwao, ndiwo Israele, ansembe, ndi Alevi, ndi Anetini, ndi ana a akapolo a Solomoni." 
Nehemiah11:4 Ndipo m'Yerusalemu munakhala ena a ana a Yuda ndi ana a Benjamini. Mwa ana a Yuda: Ataya mwana wa Uziya, mwana wa Zekariya, mwana wa Amariya, mwana wa Sefatiya, mwana wa Mahalalele, wa ana a Perezi;" 
Nehemiah11:5 ndi Maaseiya mwana wa Baruki, mwana wa Kolihoze, mwana wa Hazaya, mwana wa Adaya, mwana wa Yoyaribu, mwana wa Zekariya, mwana wa Msiloni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Ana onse a Perezi okhala m'Yerusalemu ndiwo ngwazi mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi atatu. 
Nehemiah11:7 Ndi ana a Benjamini ndi awa: Salu mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Yoedi, mwana wa Pedaya, mwana wa Kolaya, mwana wa Maaseiya, mwana wa Itiyele, mwana wa Yesaya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Ndi wotsatana naye Gabai, Salai, mazana asanu ndi anai mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi atatu." 
Nehemiah11:9 Ndi Yowele mwana wa Zikiri ndiye woyang'anira wao, ndi Yuda mwana wa Hasenuwa ndiye wothandizana naye, poyang'anira mudzi." 
Nehemiah11:10 Mwa ansembe: Yedaya mwana wa Yoyaribu, Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya mwana wa Hilikiya, mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Zadoki, mwana wa Meraiyoti, mwana wa Ahitubi mtsogoleri wa m'nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
Nehemiah11:12 ndi abale ao ochita ntchito ya m'nyumbayi ndiwo mazana asanu ndi atatu mphambu makumi awiri kudza awiri; ndi Adaya mwana wa Yerohamu, mwana wa Pelaliya, mwana wa Amizi, mwana wa Zekariya, mwana wa Pasuri, mwana wa Malikiya;" 
Nehemiah11:13 ndi abale ake akulu a nyumba za makolo awiri mphambu makumi anai kudza awiri, ndi Amasisai mwana wa Azarele, mwana wa Ahazai, mwana wa Mesilemoti, mwana wa Imeri;" 
Nehemiah11:14 ndi abale ao, ngwazi zamphamvu, zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi atatu; ndi woyang'anira wao ndiye Zabidiele mwana wa Hagedolimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Ndi mwa Alevi: Semaya mwana wa Hasubu, mwana wa Azirikamu, mwana wa Hasabiya, mwana wa Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 ndi Sabetai, ndi Yozabadi, mwa akulu a Alevi, anayang'anira ntchito za pabwalo za nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
Nehemiah11:17 ndi Mataniya mwana wa Mika, mwana wa Zabidi, mwana wa Asafu, ndiye mkulu wakuyamba mayamiko, popemphera; ndi Bakibukiya wotsatana naye mwa abale ake, ndi Abida mwana wa Samuwa, mwana wa Galali, mwana wa Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Alevi onse m'mudzi wopatulikawo ndiwo mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza anai. 
Nehemiah11:19 Ndi odikira: Akubu, Talimoni, ndi abale ao akulindira pazipata, ndiwo zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza awiri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Ndi Aisraele otsala ndiwo ansembe ndi Alevi, anakhala m'midzi yonse ya Yuda, yense m'cholowa chake." 
Nehemiah11:21 Koma Anetini anakhala m'Ofele, ndi Ziha, ndi Gisipa anali oyang'anira Anetini." 
Nehemiah11:22 Ndipo woyang'anira wa Alevi m'Yerusalemu ndiye Uzi mwana wa Bani, mwana wa Hasabiya, mwana wa Mataniya, mwana wa Mika; mwa ana a Asafu oimbira ena anayang'anira ntchito ya m'nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Nehemiah11:23 Pakuti mfumu inalamulira za iwowa, naikira oimbira chowathandiza, yense chake pa tsiku lake." 
Nehemiah11:24 Ndi Petahiya mwana wa Mesezabele, wa ana a Zera, mwana wa Yuda, anatumikira mfumu pa milandu yonse ya anthuwo." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ndi ana ena a Yuda anakhala m'midzi ya kuminda yao, m'Kiriyati-Ariba ndi milaga yake, ndi m'Diboni ndi milaga yake, ndi m'Yekabizeele ndi midzi yake," 
Nehemiah11:26 ndi m'Yesuwa, ndi m'Molada, ndi Betepeleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 ndi m'Hazara-Suwala, ndi m'Beereseba ndi milaga yake," 
Nehemiah11:28 ndi m'Zikilagi, ndi m'Mekona ndi milaga yake," 
Nehemiah11:29 ndi m'Enirimoni, ndi m'Zora, ndi m'Yaramuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanowa, Adulamu ndi midzi yao, Lakisi ndi minda yake, Azeka ndi milaga yake. Ndipo anamanga misasa kuyambira ku Beereseba mpaka chigwa cha Hinomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ana a Benjamini omwe, kuyambira ku Geba pa Mikimasi, ndi Aya, ndi pa Betele ndi milaga yake," 
Nehemiah11:32 pa Anatoti, Nobi, Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazori, Rama, Gitaimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidi, Zeboimu, Nebalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lodi, ndi Ono, chigwa cha amisiri." 
Nehemiah11:36 Ndi magawo a Levi anakhala ena ku Yuda, ndi ena ku Benjamini." 
Nehemiah12:1 Ndipo ansembe ndi Alevi amene anakwera ndi Zerubabele mwana wa Sealatiele, ndi Yesuwa, ndi awa: Seraya, Yeremiya, Ezara," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amariya, Maluki, Hatusi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekaniya, Rehumu, Meremoti," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginetoyi, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamini, Maadiya, Biliga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaya, ndi Yoyaribu, Yedaya." 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoki, Hilikiya, Yedaya. Awa ndi akulu a ansembe ndi abale ao m'masiku a Yesuwa." 
Nehemiah12:8 Ndi Alevi ndiwo Yesuwa, Binuyi, Kadimiyele, Serebiya, Yuda, ndi Mataniya; iye ndi abale ake amatsogolera mayamiko." 
Nehemiah12:9 Ndi Bakibukiya ndi Uni, abale ao, anawayang'anira maulonda." 
Nehemiah12:10 Ndi Yesuwa anabala Yoyakimu, ndi Yoyakimu anabala Eliyasibu ndi Eliyasibu anabala Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 ndi Yoyada anabala Yonatani, ndi Yonatani, anabala Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Ndi m'masiku a Yoyakimu ansembe aakulu a nyumba za makolo ndiwo: wa Seraya, Meraya; wa Yeremiya, Hananiya;" 
Nehemiah12:13 wa Ezara, Mesulamu; wa Amariya, Yehohanani;" 
Nehemiah12:14 wa Maluki, Yonatani; wa Sebaniya, Yosefe;" 
Nehemiah12:15 wa Harimu, Adina; wa Meraiyoti, Helikai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 wa Ido, Zekariya; wa Ginetoni, Mesulamu;" 
Nehemiah12:17 wa Abiya, Zikiri; wa Miniyamini, wa Mowadiya, Pilitai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 wa Biliga, Samuwa; wa Semaya, Yehonatani;" 
Nehemiah12:19 ndi wa Yoyaribu, Matenai; wa Yedaya, Uzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 wa Salai, Kalai; wa Amoki, Eberi;" 
Nehemiah12:21 wa Hilikiya, Hasabiya; wa Yedaya, Netanele." 
Nehemiah12:22 M'masiku a Eliyasibu, Yoyada, Yohanani, ndi Yaduwa, Alevi analembedwa akulu a nyumba za makolo; ansembe omwe, mpaka ufumu wa Dariusi wa ku Persiya." 
Nehemiah12:23 Ana a Levi, akulu a nyumba za makolo, analembedwa m'buku la machitidwe, mpaka masiku a Yohanani mwana wa Eliyasibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Ndi akulu a Alevi: Hasabiya, Serebiya, ndi Yesuwa mwana wa Kadimiyele, ndi abale ao openyana nao, kulemekeza ndi kuyamika, monga mwa lamulo la Davide munthu wa Mulungu, alonda kupenyana alonda." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mataniya, ndi Bakibukiya, Obadiya, Mesulamu, Talimoni, Akubu, ndiwo odikira akulonda pa nyumba za chuma zili kuzipata." 
Nehemiah12:26 Awa anakhala m'masiku a Yoyakimu mwana wa Yesuwa, mwana wa Yozadaki, ndi m'masiku a Nehemiya kazembe, ndi a Ezara wansembe mlembiyo." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ndipo popereka linga la Yerusalemu anafunafuna Alevi m'malo mwao monse, kubwera nao ku Yerusalemu, kuti achite kuperekaku mokondwera, ndi mayamiko, ndi kuimbira, ndi nsanje, zisakasa, ndi azeze." 
Nehemiah12:28 Ana a oimbirawo anasonkhana ochokera ku dziko lozungulira Yerusalemu, ndi kumidzi ya Anetofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 ndi ku Betegiligala, ndi ku minda ya Geba ndi Azimaveti; popeza oimbirawo adadzimangira midzi pozungulira Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Ndipo ansembe ndi Alevi anadziyeretsa okha, nayeretsa anthu, ndi zipata, ndi linga." 
Nehemiah12:31 Pamenepo ndinakwera nao akulu a Yuda pa lingali, ndinaikanso oyamikira magulu awiri akulu oyenda molongosoka; lina loyenda ku dzanja lamanja palinga kunka ku Chipata cha Kudzala;" 
Nehemiah12:32 ndi pambuyo pao anayenda Hosaya, ndi limodzi la magawo awiri a akulu a Yuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 ndi Azariya, Ezara ndi Mesulamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, ndi Benjamini, ndi Semaya, ndi Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah12:35 ndi ana ena a ansembe ndi malipenga: Zekariya mwana wa Yonatani, mwana wa Semaya, mwana wa Mataniya, mwana wa Mikaya, mwana wa Zakuri, mwana wa Asafu," 
Nehemiah12:36 ndi abale ake: Semaya, ndi Azarele, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Netanele, ndi Yuda, Hanani, ndi zoimbira za Davide munthu wa Mulungu; ndi Ezara mlembiyo anawatsogolera;" 
Nehemiah12:37 ndi ku Chipata cha ku Chitsime, ndi kundunji kwao, anakwerera pa makwerero a mudzi wa Davide, potundumuka linga, popitirira pa nyumba ya Davide, mpaka ku Chipata cha Madzi kum'mawa." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ndi gulu lina la oyamikira linamuka mokomana nao, ndi ine ndinawatsata, pamodzi ndi limodzi la magawo awiri la anthu palinga, napitirira pa Nsanja ya Ng'anjo, mpaka kulinga lachitando;" 
Nehemiah12:39 ndi pamwamba pa Chipata cha Efuremu, ndi ku Chipata Chakale, ndi ku Chipata Chansomba, ndi Nsanja ya Hananele, ndi Nsanja ya Zana, mpaka kuchipata chankhosa; ndipo anaima ku Chipata cha Akaidi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Atatero, magulu awiriwo a iwo oyamikira anaima m'nyumba ya Mulungu, ndipo ine ndi limodzi la magawo awiri a olamulira pamodzi ndi ine;" 
Nehemiah12:41 ndi ansembe, Eliyakimu, Maaseiya, Miniyamini, Mikaya, Eliyoenai, Zekariya, ndi Hananiya, ali nao malipenga;" 
Nehemiah12:42 ndi Maaseiya, ndi Semaya, ndi Eleazara, ndi Uzi, ndi Yehohanani, ndi Malikiya, ndi Elamu, ndi Ezere. Ndipo oimbira anaimbitsa Yezeraya ndiye woyang'anira wao." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ndipo anaphera nsembe zambiri tsiku lija, nasekerera; pakuti Mulungu anawakondweretsa ndi chimwemwe chachikulu; ndi akazi omwe ndi ana anakondwera; ndi chikondwerero cha Yerusalemu chinamveka kutali." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ndipo tsiku lomwelo anaika anthu asunge zipinda za chuma, za nsembe zokweza, za zipatso zoyamba, ndi za limodzilimodzi la magawo khumi, kulonga m'mwemo, monga mwa minda ya midzi, magawo onenedwa ndi chilamulo, akhale a ansembe ndi Alevi; popeza Yuda anakondwera nao ansembe ndi Alevi akuimirirako." 
Nehemiah12:45 Ndipo iwo anasunga udikiro wa Mulungu wao, ndi udikiro wa mayeretsedwe; momwemonso oimbira ndi odikira, monga mwa lamulo la Davide ndi la Solomoni mwana wake." 
Nehemiah12:46 Pakuti m'masiku a Davide ndi Asafu kalelo kunali mkulu wa oimbira, ndi wa nyimbo zolemekeza ndi zoyamikira Mulungu." 
Nehemiah12:47 Ndi Aisraele onse m'masiku a Zerubabele, ndi m'masiku a Nehemiya, anapereka magawo a oimbira ndi odikira, monga mudafunika tsiku ndi tsiku; nawapatulira Alevi; ndi Alevi anawapatulira ana a Aroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Tsiku lomwelo anawerenga m'buku la Mose m'makutu a anthu, napeza m'menemo kuti Aamoni ndi Amowabu asalowe mu msonkhano wa Mulungu kunthawi yonse;" 
Nehemiah13:2 popeza sanawachingamire ana a Israele ndi chakudya ndi madzi, koma anawalemberera Balamu awatemberere; koma Mulungu wathu anasanduliza tembererolo likhale mdalitso." 
Nehemiah13:3 Ndipo kunali, atamva chilamulocho, anasiyanitsa pa Israele anthu osokonezeka onse." 
Nehemiah13:4 Chinkana ichi, Eliyasibu wansembe, woikidwa asunge zipinda za nyumba ya Mulungu wathu, anachita chibale ndi Tobiya," 
Nehemiah13:5 namkonzera chipinda chachikulu, kumene adasungira kale zopereka za ufa, lubani, ndi zipangizo, ndi limodzilimodzi la magawo khumi a tirigu, vinyo, ndi mafuta, zolamulidwira Alevi, ndi oimbira, ndi odikira, ndi nsembe zokweza za ansembe." 
Nehemiah13:6 Koma pochitika ichi chonse sindinakhala ku Yerusalemu; pakuti chaka cha makumi atatu ndi chachiwiri cha Arita-kisereksesi mfumu ya Babiloni ndinafika kwa mfumu, ndipo atapita masiku ena ndinapempha mfumu indilole;" 
Nehemiah13:7 ndipo ndinafika ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuzindikira choipa anachichita Eliyasibu, chifukwa cha Tobiya, ndi kumkonzera chipinda m'mabwalo a nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ndipo ndinaipidwa nacho kwambiri, motero ndinataya kubwalo akatundu onse a m'nyumba ya Tobiya, kuwachotsa m'chipindamo." 
Nehemiah13:9 Pamenepo ndinalamulira, ndipo anayeretsa zipindazo; ndipo ndinabwezeramonso zipangizo za nyumba ya Mulungu, pamodzi ndi zopereka za ufa ndi lubani." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ndinazindikiranso kuti sanapereke kwa Alevi magawo ao; m'mwemo Alevi ndi oimbira adathawira yense kumunda wake. 
Nehemiah13:11 Potero ndinatsutsana nao olamulira, ndinati, Yasiyidwiranji nyumba ya Mulungu? Ndipo ndinawasonkhanitsa, ndi kuwaika m'malo mwao." 
Nehemiah13:12 Ndi Ayuda onse anabwera nalo limodzilimodzi la magawo khumi a tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, kunyumba za chuma." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ndinaikanso osunga chuma: Selemiya wansembe, ndi Zadoki mlembi; ndi wa Alevi, Pedaya; ndi wakuwathandiza, Hanani mwana wa Zakuri, mwana wa Mataniya; popeza anayesedwa okhulupirika ndi udindo wao, ndiwo kugawira abale ao." 
Nehemiah13:14 Mundikumbukire Mulungu wanga mwa ichi, nimusafafanize zokoma zanga ndinazichitira nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, ndi maudikiro ake." 
Nehemiah13:15 Masiku awa ndinaona ku Yuda ena akuponda mphesa m'choponderamo tsiku la Sabata, ndi akubwera nayo mitolo ya tirigu, ndi kuisenzetsa pa abulu; momwemonso vinyo, mphesa, ndi nkhuyu, ndi zosenza zilizonse, zimene analowa nazo m'Yerusalemu tsiku la Sabata, ndipo ndinawachitira umboni wakuwatsutsa tsikuli anagulitsa zakudya." 
Nehemiah13:16 Anakhalanso m'menemo a ku Tiro, obwera nazo nsomba, ndi malonda ali onse, nagulitsa tsiku la Sabata kwa ana a Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah13:17 Pamenepo ndinatsutsana nao aufulu a Yuda, ndinanena nao, Chinthu chanji choipa ichi muchichita, ndi kuipsa nacho tsiku la Sabata?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Sanatero kodi makolo anu, ndipo Mulungu wathu anatifikitsira ife ndi mudzi uno choipa ichi chonse? Koma inu muonjezera Israele mkwiyo pakuipsa Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:19 Ndipo kunali, kukadayamba chizirezire pa zipata za Yerusalemu, losafika Sabata, ndinawauza atseke pamakomo; ndinawauzanso kuti asatsegulepo, koma litapita Sabata ndipo; ndipo ndinaimika anyamata anga ena pazipata, kuti pasalowe katundu tsiku la Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:20 Momwemo eni malonda ndi ogulitsa malonda ali onse, anagona kunja kwa Yerusalemu kamodzi kapena kawiri." 
Nehemiah13:21 Koma ndinawachitira umboni wakuwatsutsa, ndinanena nao, Mugoneranji pafupi pa linga? Mukateronso ndikuthirani manja. Kuyambira pomwepo sanafikenso pa Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ndipo ndinauza Alevi kuti adziyeretse, nabwere, nasunge pazipata kupatula tsiku la Sabata. Mundikumbukire ichinso, Mulungu wanga, ndi kundileka monga mwa chifundo chanu chachikulu." 
Nehemiah13:23 Masiku aja ndinaonanso Ayudawo anadzitengera akazi a Asidodi, Aamoni, ndi Amowabu," 
Nehemiah13:24 ndi ana ao analankhula mwina Chiasidodi, osadziwitsa kulankhula Chiyuda, koma monga umo amalankhula mtundu wao uliwonse." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ndipo ndinatsutsana nao, ndi kuwatemberera, ndi kukantha ena a iwo, ndi kumwetula tsitsi lao, ndi kuwalumbiritsa pa Mulungu ndi kuti, Musapereka ana anu akazi kwa ana ao amuna, kapena kutengera ana anu amuna, kapena a inu nokha, ana ao akazi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Nanga Solomoni mfumu ya Israele sanachimwe nazo zinthu izi? Chinkana mwa amitundu ambiri panalibe mfumu ngati iye, ndi Mulungu wake anamkonda, ndi Mulungu wake anamlonga mfumu ya Aisraele onse; koma ngakhale iye, akazi achilendo anamchimwitsa." 
Nehemiah13:27 Ndipo kodi tidzamvera inu, kuchita choipa ichi chachikulu chonse, kulakwira Mulungu wathu ndi kudzitengera akazi achilendo?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Koma wina wa ana a Yehoyada, mwana wa Eliyasibu mkulu wa ansembe, anali mkamwini wa Sanibalati Muhoroni; chifukwa chake ndinampirikitsa kumchotsa kwa ine." 
Nehemiah13:29 Muwakumbukire Mulungu wanga, popeza anadetsa unsembe, ndi pangano la unsembe, ndi la Alevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Momwemo ndinawayeretsa kuwachotsera achilendo onse, ndi kuikira udikiro ansembe ndi Alevi, yense kuntchito yake;" 
Nehemiah13:31 ndi chopereka cha nkhuni pa nthawi zoikika, ndi wa zipatso zoyamba. Mundikumbukire, Mulungu wanga, chindikomere." 
Esther1:1 Izi zinachitika masiku a Ahasuwero, ndiye Ahasuweroyo anachita ufumu kuyambira Indiya kufikira Kusi, pa maiko zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri." 
Esther1:2 Masiku ajawo, pokhala Ahasuwero pa mpando wa ufumu wake uli m'chinyumba cha ku Susa," 
Esther1:3 chaka chachitatu cha ufumu wake, anakonzera madyerero akalonga ake onse, ndi omtumikira; amphamvu a Persiya ndi Mediya, omveka ndi akalonga a maikowo anakhala pamaso pake," 
Esther1:4 pamene anaonetsa zolemera za ufumu wake waulemu, ndi ulemerero wa ukulu wake woposa, masiku ambiri, ndiwo masiku zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu." 
Esther1:5 Atatha masikuwa, mfumu inakonzera madyerero anthu onse okhala m'chinyumba cha ku Susa, akulu ndi ang'ono, masiku asanu ndi awiri, ku bwalo la munda wa maluwa wa ku chinyumba cha mfumu;" 
Esther1:6 panali nsalu zolenjeka zoyera, zabiriwiri, ndi zamadzi, zomangika ndi zingwe za thonje labafuta, ndi lofiirira, pa zigwinjiri zasiliva, ndi nsanamira zansangalabwi; makama anali a golide ndi siliva pa mayalidwe a miyala yofiira, ndi yoyera, ndi yoyezuka, ndi yakuda." 
Esther1:7 Nawapatsa chakumwa m'zomwera zagolide, zomwerazo nzosiyanasiyana, ndi vinyo wachifumu anachuluka, monga mwa ufulu wa mfumu." 
Esther1:8 Ndi mamwedwewo anali monga mwa lamulo; panalibe kukakamiza; pakuti mfumu idaikira akulu onse a nyumba yake motero, kuti achite monga momwe akhumba aliyense." 
Esther1:9 Vasiti yemwe, mkazi wamkulu, anakonzera akazi madyerero m'nyumba yachifumu ya mfumu Ahasuwero." 
Esther1:10 Tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri, pokondwera mtima wa mfumu ndi vinyo, iye anauza Mehumani, Bizita, Haribona, Bigita, ndi Abagita, Zetara, ndi Karikasi, adindo asanu ndi awiriwo akutumikira pamaso pa mfumu Ahasuwero," 
Esther1:11 abwere naye Vasiti mkazi wamkulu pamaso pa mfumu ndi korona wachifumu, kuonetsa anthu ndi akulu kukoma kwake; popeza anali wokongola maonekedwe ake." 
Esther1:12 Koma Vasiti mkazi wamkuluyo anakana kudza pa mau a mfumu adamuuza adindowo; potero mfumu idapsa mtima ndithu, ndi mkwiyo wake unatentha m'kati mwake." 
Esther1:13 Pamenepo mfumu inanena kwa eni nzeru, akudziwa za m'tsogolo, mfumu idafotero nao onse akudziwa malamulo ndi maweruzo," 
Esther1:14 a pafupi naye ndiwo Karisena, Setara, Adimata, Tarisisi, Meresi, Marisena, ndi Memukana, akalonga asanu ndi awiri a Persiya ndi Mediya, openya nkhope ya mfumu ndi kukhala oyamba m'ufumu." 
Esther1:15 Anati, Tidzachitanji naye mkazi wamkulu Vasiti monga mwa malamulo, popeza sanachite chomuuza mfumu Ahasuwero mwa adindo?" 
Esther1:16 Ndi Memukana anati, pamaso pa mfumu ndi akalonga, Vasiti mkazi wamkulu sanalakwire mfumu yekha, komanso akalonga onse, ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu okhala m'maiko onse a mfumu Ahasuwero." 
Esther1:17 Pakuti machitidwe awa a mkazi wamkuluyo adzabuka kufikira akazi onse, kupeputsa amuna ao pamaso pao; anthu akati, Mfumu Ahasuwero anati abwere naye Vasiti mkazi wamkulu pamaso pake, koma sanadze iye." 
Esther1:18 Inde tsiku lomwelo akazi akulu a Persiya ndi Mediya, atamva machitidwe a mkazi wamkuluyo, adzatero nao momwemo kwa akalonga onse a mfumu. Ndi chipeputso ndi mkwiyo zidzachuluka." 
Esther1:19 Chikakomera mfumu, atuluke mau achifumu pakamwa pake, nalembedwe m'malamulo a Apersiya ndi Amediya, angasinthike, kuti Vasiti asalowenso pamaso pa mfumu Ahasuwero; ndi mfumu aninkhe chifumu chake kwa mnzake womposa iye." 
Esther1:20 Ndipo mau amene adzaika mfumu akamveka m'ufumu wake wonse, (pakuti ndiwo waukulu), akazi onse adzachitira amuna ao ulemu, akulu ndi ang'ono." 
Esther1:21 Ndipo mauwo anakonda mfumu ndi akalonga; ndi mfumu inachita monga mwa mau a Memukana," 
Esther1:22 natumiza akalata kumaiko onse a mfumu, kudziko lililonse monga mwa chilembedwe chao, ndi kumtundu uliwonse monga mwa chinenedwe chao, kuti mwamuna aliyense akhale wamkulu m'nyumba yakeyake, nawabukitse monga mwa chinenedwe cha anthu a mtundu wake." 
Esther2:1 Zitatha izi, utaleka mkwiyo wa mfumu Ahasuwero, anakumbukira Vasiti, ndi chochita iye, ndi chomlamulidwira." 
Esther2:2 Pamenepo anyamata a mfumu omtumikira anati, Amfunire mfumu anamwali okongola;" 
Esther2:3 ndi mfumu aike oyang'anira m'maiko onse a ufumu wake, kuti asonkhanitse anamwali onse okongola m'chinyumba cha ku Susa, m'nyumba ya akazi; awasunge Hegai mdindo wa mfumu wosungira akazi, nawapatse zowayeretsa;" 
Esther2:4 ndi namwali womkonda mfumu akhale mkazi wamkulu m'malo mwa Vasiti. Ndipo chinthuchi chinamkonda mfumu, nachita chomwecho." 
Esther2:5 Panali Myuda m'chinyumba cha ku Susa, dzina lake ndiye Mordekai, mwana wa Yairi, mwana wa Simei, mwana wa Kisi Mbenjamini;" 
Esther2:6 uyu anatengedwa ndende ku Yerusalemu, pamodzi ndi andende anatengedwa pamodzi ndi Yekoniya mfumu ya Yuda, amene Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babiloni adamtenga ndende." 
Esther2:7 Ndipo iye adalera Hadasa, ndiye Estere, mwana wamkazi wa atate wake wamng'ono; popeza iye analibe atate kapena amai; ndi namwaliyo anali wa maonekedwe okoma, ndi wokongola; ndipo atamwalira atate wake ndi mai wake, Mordekai anamtenga akhale mwana wake." 
Esther2:8 Ndipo kunali, atamveka mau a mfumu ndi lamulo lake, ndipo atasonkhanidwa anamwali ambiri m'chinyumba cha ku Susa, awasunge Hegai, anamtenga Estere yemwe, alowe m'nyumba ya mfumu, amsunge Hegai wosunga akazi." 
Esther2:9 Ndipo namwaliyo anamkomera, namchitira chifundo; ndipo anafulumira kumpatsa zake zomyeretsa, ndi magawo ake, ndi anamwali asanu ndi awiri oyenera kumpatsa ochokera m'nyumba ya mfumu; ndipo anamsuntha iye ndi anamwali ake akhale m'malo okometsetsa m'nyumba ya akazi." 
Esther2:10 Estere sadawulula mtundu wake ndi chibale chake; pakuti Mordekai adamuuzitsa kuti asadziwulule. 
Esther2:11 Ndi Mordekai akayendayenda tsiku ndi tsiku kubwalo la nyumba ya akazi, kuti adziwe umo akhalira Estere, ndi chimene chidzamchitikira." 
Esther2:12 Kunafika tsono kulowa kwake kwa namwali aliyense, kuti alowe kwa mfumu Ahasuwero, atamchitira monga mwa lamulo la akazi, miyezi khumi ndi iwiri; pakuti ankakwaniritsa masiku a mayeretsedwe ao motero, miyezi isanu ndi umodzi ndi mafuta a mure, ndi miyezi isanu ndi umodzi ndi zonunkhira bwino, ndi zoyeretsa akazi." 
Esther2:13 Ndipo namwali aliyense analowa kwa mfumu motero, zilizonse anafuna anampatsa zochokera m'nyumba ya akazi, alowe nazo kunyumba ya mfumu." 
Esther2:14 Madzulo ake analowamo, nabwera m'mawa mwake kunka kunyumba yachiwiri ya akazi, amsunge Saasigazi mdindo wa mfumu, wosunga akazi aang'ono a mfumu; iyeyu sanalowenso kwa mfumu, koma akakondwera naye mfumu, ndi kumuitana kumtchula dzina lake, ndiko." 
Esther2:15 Pofika tsono kulowa kwake kwa Estere mwana wa Abihaili, atate wamng'ono wa Mordekai, amene adadzitengera akhale mwana wake, kuti alowe kwa mfumu, sanafune kanthu koma zonena Hegai mdindo wa mfumu wosunga akazi ndizo. Ndipo Estere anayamikizidwa pamaso pa onse ompenya." 
Esther2:16 Momwemo anatengedwa Estere kunka kwa mfumu Ahasuwero, kunyumba yake yachifumu, mwezi wakhumi, ndiwo mwezi wa Tebeti, chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri cha ufumu wake." 
Esther2:17 Ndipo mfumu inakonda Estere koposa akazi onse, nalandira iye kuyanja ndi chifundo pamaso pake, koposa anamwali onse; motero anaika korona wachifumu pamutu pake, namuyesa mkazi wamkulu m'malo mwa Vasiti." 
Esther2:18 Pamenepo mfumu inawakonzera madyerero akulu ake onse, ndi omtumikira, ndiwo madyerero a Estere; napumulitsa maiko, naninkha zaufulu monga mwa ufulu wa mfumu."
