Esther2:19 Ndipo posonkhanidwa anamwali nthawi yachiwiri Mordekai anali wa m'bwalo la mfumu. 
Esther2:20 Estere sadawulula chibale chake kapena mtundu wake, monga Mordekai adamuuza; popeza Estere anachita mau a Mordekai monga m'mene analeredwa naye." 
Esther2:21 Masiku awa pokhala Mordekai wa m'bwalo la mfumu, Bigitana ndi Teresi, adindo awiri a mfumu osunga pakhomo, anapsa mtima, nayesa kumthira manja mfumu Ahasuwero." 
Esther2:22 Koma chidadziwika ichi kwa Mordekai, ndiye anafotokozera Estere mkazi wamkulu; ndi Estere anamuuza mfumu, kumnenera Mordekai." 
Esther2:23 Ndipo atafunsira mlanduwo, anaupeza momwemo, napachikidwa onse awiri pamtengo; ndipo anachilemba m'buku la mbiri pamaso pa mfumu." 
Esther3:1 Zitatha izi, mfumu Ahasuwero anamkuza Hamani mwana wa Hamedata, wa ku Agagi, namkweza, naika mpando wake upose akalonga onse okhala naye." 
Esther3:2 Ndipo anyamata onse a mfumu okhala m'chipata cha mfumu anamweramira, namgwadira Hamani; pakuti mfumu idalamulira chotero za iye. Koma Mordekai sanamweramire kapena kumgwadira." 
Esther3:3 Ndipo anyamata a mfumu okhala m'chipata cha mfumu anati kwa Mordekai, Ulakwiranji pa lamulo la mfumu?" 
Esther3:4 Kunali tsono, pomalankhula naye tsiku ndi tsiku, osawamvera iye, anauza Hamani, kuona ngati mlandu wa Mordekai udzakoma; popeza iye adawauza kuti ali Myuda." 
Esther3:5 Ndipo Hamani, pakuona kuti Mordekai sanamweramire kapena kumgwadira, mtima wake unadzala mkwiyo." 
Esther3:6 Koma anachiyesa chopepuka kumthira manja Mordekai yekha; pakuti adamfotokozera mtundu wake wa Mordekai; potero Hamani anafuna kuononga Ayuda onse okhala m'ufumu wonse wa Ahasuwero, ndiwo a mtundu wa Mordekai." 
Esther3:7 Mwezi woyamba ndiwo mwezi wa Nisani, chaka chakhumi ndi chiwiri cha mfumu Ahasuwero, anaombeza Puri, ndiwo ula, pamaso pa Hamani tsiku ndi tsiku, mwezi ndi mwezi, mpaka mwezi wakhumi ndi chiwiri, ndiwo mwezi wa Adara." 
Esther3:8 Ndipo Hamani anati kwa mfumu Ahasuwero, Pali mtundu wina wa anthu obalalika ndi ogawanikana mwa mitundu ya anthu m'maiko onse a ufumu wanu, ndi malamulo ao asiyana nao a anthu onse, ndipo sasunga malamulo a mfumu; chifukwa chake mfumu siiyenera kuwaleka." 
Esther3:9 Chikakomera mfumu, chilembedwe kuti aonongeke iwo; ndipo ndidzapereka matalente a siliva zikwi khumi m'manja a iwo akusunga ntchito ya mfumu, abwere nao kuwaika m'nyumba za chuma cha mfumu." 
Esther3:10 Ndipo mfumu inavula mphete yake pa chala chake, naipereka kwa Hamani mwana wa Hamedata wa ku Agagi, mdani wa Ayuda." 
Esther3:11 Ndipo mfumu idati kwa Hamani, siliva akhale wako, ndi anthu omwe; uchite nao monga momwe chikukomera." 
Esther3:12 Pamenepo anaitana alembi a mfumu mwezi woyamba, tsiku lake lakhumi ndi chitatu, nalembera monga mwa zonse Hamani analamulira akazembe ndi ziwanga zoyang'anira maiko ali onse, ndi akalonga a mitundu iliyonse ya anthu, maiko ali onse monga mwa chilembedwe chao, ndi mitundu iliyonse ya anthu monga mwa chinenedwe chao; anazilemba m'dzina la mfumu Ahasuwero, nazisindikiza ndi mphete ya mfumu." 
Esther3:13 Ndipo anatumiza akalata ndi amtokoma kumaiko onse a mfumu, kuti aononge, aphe, napulule Ayuda onse, ndiwo ana, ndi okalamba, makanda, ndi akazi, tsiku limodzi, ndilo tsiku lakhumi ndi chitatu la mwezi wakhumi ndi chiwiri, ndiwo mwezi wa Adara; nalande zao mofunkha." 
Esther3:14 Mau a cholembedwacho, ndiwo kuti lichitike lamulo m'maiko onse, analalikidwa kwa anthu onse, kuti akonzekeretu tsiku lomwelo." 
Esther3:15 Amtokoma anatuluka ofulumizidwa ndi mau a mfumu, ndi lamulo linabukitsidwa m'chinyumba cha ku Susa; ndipo mfumu ndi Hamani anakhala pansi kumwa; koma mudzi wa Susa unadodoma." 
Esther4:1 Koma podziwa Mordekai zonse zidachitikazi, Mordekai anang'amba zovala zake, navala chiguduli ndi mapulusa, natuluka pakati pa mudzi, nafuula, nalira kulira kwakukulu ndi kowawa," 
Esther4:2 nafika popenyana ndi chipata cha mfumu; popeza sanathe munthu kulowa kuchipata cha mfumu wovala chiguduli. 
Esther4:3 Ndi m'maiko monse, paliponse anafikapo mau a mfumu ndi lamulo lake, panali maliro akulu mwa Ayuda, ndi kusala, ndi kulira misozi, ndi kubuma; nagona m'chiguduli ndi mapulusa ambiri." 
Esther4:4 Ndipo anamwali a Estere ndi adindo ake anadza, namuuza; ndi mkazi wamkulu anawawidwa mtima kwambiri, natumiza chovala aveke Mordekai, ndi kumchotsera chiguduli chake; koma sanachilandira." 
Esther4:5 Pamenepo Estere anaitana Hataki mdindo wina wa mfumu, amene idamuika amtumikire, namuuza amuke kwa Mordekai, kuti adziwe ichi nchiyani ndi chifukwa chake ninji." 
Esther4:6 Natuluka Hataki kunka kwa Mordekai kukhwalala la mudzi linali popenyana ndi chipata cha mfumu. 
Esther4:7 Ndipo Mordekai anamfotokozera zonse zidamgwera, ndi mtengo wake wa ndalama adati Hamani adzapereka m'nyumba ya chuma cha mfumu pa Ayuda, kuwaononga." 
Esther4:8 Anampatsanso chitsanzo cha lamulo lolembedwa adalibukitsa m'Susa, kuwaononga, achionetse kwa Estere, ndi kumfotokozera, ndi kumlangiza alowe kwa mfumu, kumpembedza, ndi kupempherera anthu ake kwa iye." 
Esther4:9 Nadza Hataki, namuuza Estere mau a Mordekai." 
Esther4:10 Pamenepo Estere ananena ndi Hataki, namtuma akauze Mordekai, ndi kuti," 
Esther4:11 Akapolo onse a mfumu ndi anthu a m'maiko a mfumu adziwa kuti aliyense, ngakhale wamwamuna kapena wamkazi, akalowa kwa mfumu kubwalo la m'katimo wosaitanidwa, lamulo la pa iye ndi limodzi, ndilo kuti amuphe, akapanda mfumu kumloza ndi ndodo yachifumu yagolide kuti akhale ndi moyo; koma ine sanandiitane ndilowe kwa mfumu masiku awa makumi atatu." 
Esther4:12 Ndipo anamuuza Mordekai mau a Estere. 
Esther4:13 Koma Mordekai anawauza ambwezere mau Estere, kuti, Usamayesa m'mtima mwako kuti udzapulumuka m'nyumba ya mfumu koposa Ayuda onse ena." 
Esther4:14 Pakuti ukakhala chete konse tsopano lino, chithandizo ndi chipulumutso kwa Ayuda zidzafuma kwina; koma iwe ndi nyumba ya atate wako mudzaonongeka; ndipo kaya, kapena walowera ufumu chifukwa cha nyengo yonga iyi." 
Esther4:15 Pamenepo Estere anati ambwezere mau Mordekai," 
Esther4:16 Muka, sonkhanitsa Ayuda onse opezeka m'Susa, nimundisalire, osadya osamwa masiku atatu, usiku ndi usana, ine ndemwe ndi anamwali anga tidzasala momwemo, ndipo motero ndidzalowa kwa mfumu, ndiko kosalingana ndi lamulo; ndikaonongeka tsono ndionongeke." 
Esther4:17 Napita Mordekai, nachita monga mwa zonse adamlamulira Estere." 
Esther5:1 Ndipo kunali tsiku lachitatu, Estere anavala zovala zake zachifumu, nakaimirira m'bwalo la m'kati la nyumba ya mfumu, popenyana pa nyumba ya mfumu; ndi mfumu inakhala pa mpando wake wachifumu m'nyumba yachifumu, pandunji polowera m'nyumba." 
Esther5:2 Ndipo kunali, pamene mfumu inaona Estere mkazi wamkuluyo alikuima m'bwalo, inamkomera mtima; ndi mfumu inamloza Estere ndi ndodo yachifumu yagolide inali m'dzanja lake. Nayandikira Estere, nakhudza nsonga ya ndodoyo." 
Esther5:3 Ninena naye mfumu, Mufunanji, Estere mkazi wamkulu? Pempho lanu nchiyani? Lidzaperekedwa kwa inu, kufikira limodzi la magawo awiri a ufumuwo." 
Esther5:4 Ndipo Estere anati, Chikakomera mfumu, adze mfumu ndi Hamani lero ku madyerero ndinawakonzera." 
Esther5:5 Niti mfumu, Mumfulumize Hamani, achitike mau a Estere. Nidza mfumu ndi Hamani ku madyerero adawakonzera Estere." 
Esther5:6 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa Estere pa madyerero a vinyo, Pempho lanu nchiyani? Lidzaperekedwa kwa inu; mufunanji? Chidzachitika, kufikira limodzi la magawo awiri a ufumuwo." 
Esther5:7 Nayankha Estere, nati, Pempho langa ndi kufuna kwanga ndiko," 
Esther5:8 ngati mfumu indikomera mtima, ngatinso chakomera mfumu kupereka pempho langa ndi kuchita chofuna ine, adze mfumu ndi Hamani ku madyerero ndidzawakonzera; ndipo mawa ndidzachita monga yanena mfumu." 
Esther5:9 Ndipo Hamani anatuluka tsiku lomwelo wosekerera ndi wokondwera mtima; koma pamene Hamani anapenya Mordekai kuchipata cha mfumu, osamnyamukira kapena kumfumukira, Hamani anadzazidwa ndi mkwiyo pa Mordekai." 
Esther5:10 Koma Hamani anadziletsa, namuka kwao, natumiza munthu kukatenga mabwenzi ake, ndi Zeresi mkazi wake." 
Esther5:11 Nawawerengera Hamani kulemera kwake kwakukulu, ndi ana ake ochuluka, ndi zonse mfumu idamkuza nazo, ndi umo adamkweza koposa akalonga ndi anyamata a mfumu." 
Esther5:12 Hamani anatinso, Ndiponso Estere mkazi wamkulu sanalole mmodzi yense alowe pamodzi ndi mfumu ku madyerero adakonzawo, koma ine ndekha; nandiitana mawanso pamodzi ndi mfumu." 
Esther5:13 Koma zonsezi sindipindula nazo kanthu konse, pokhala ndilikuona Mordekai Myudayo alikukhala kuchipata cha mfumu." 
Esther5:14 Pamenepo Zeresi mkazi wake, ndi mabwenzi ake onse ananena naye, Apange mtengo, msinkhu wake mikono makumi asanu, ndi mawa mukanene nayo mfumu kuti ampachike Mordekai pamenepo; nimulowe pamodzi ndi mfumu kumadyerero wokondwera. Ndipo ichi chidakomera Hamani, napangitsa anthu mtengowo." 
Esther6:1 Usiku uja tulo tidamwazikira mfumu, niti abwere nalo buku la mbiri, naliwerenga pamaso pa mfumu." 
Esther6:2 Napeza mudalembedwa kuti Mordekai adawulula za Bigitana ndi Teresi, awiri a adindo a mfumu osunga pakhomo, amene adayesa kumthira manja mfumu Ahasuwero." 
Esther6:3 Niti mfumu, Anamchitira Mordekai ulemu ndi ukulu wotani chifukwa cha ichi? Ndipo anyamata a mfumu akuitumikira ananena nayo, Sanamchitire kanthu." 
Esther6:4 Niti mfumu, Ali kubwalo ndani? Koma Hamani adalowa m'bwalo lakunja la nyumba ya mfumu kulankhula ndi mfumu za kupachika Mordekai pamtengo adaukonzeratu." 
Esther6:5 Ndipo anyamata a mfumu ananena nayo, Taonani, Hamani alikuima pabwalo. Niti mfumu, Alowe." 
Esther6:6 Nalowa Hamani. Ndipo mfumu inati kwa iye, Kodi amchitire chiyani munthu amene mfumu ikondwera kumchitira ulemu? Ndipo Hamani anati mumtima mwake, Ndaniyo mfumu ikondwera kumchitira ulemu koposa ine?" 
Esther6:7 Nati Hamani kwa mfumu, Munthu amene mfumu ikondwera kumchitira ulemu," 
Esther6:8 amtengere chovala chachifumu amachivala mfumu, ndi kavalo amakwerapo mfumu, naike korona wachifumu pamutu pake," 
Esther6:9 napereke chovala ndi kavalo m'dzanja la wina womveketsa wa akalonga a mfumu, naveke nacho munthu amene mfumu ikondwera kumchitira ulemu, namuyendetse pa kavaloyo m'khwalala la m'mudzi, nafuule pamaso pake, Azitero naye munthu amene mfumu ikondwera kumchitira ulemu." 
Esther6:10 Pamenepo mfumu inati kwa Hamani, Fulumira, tenga chovala ndi kavalo monga umo wanenera, nuchitire chotero Mordekai Myudayo, wokhala pa chipata cha mfumu; kasasowepo kanthu ka zonse wazinena." 
Esther6:11 Ndipo Hamani anatenga chovala ndi kavalo, naveka Mordekai, namuyendetsa pa kavalo m'khwalala la m'mudzi, nafuula pamaso pake, Azitero naye munthu amene mfumu ikondwera kumchitira ulemu." 
Esther6:12 Ndipo Mordekai anabweranso kuchipata cha mfumu. Koma Hamani anafulumira kunka kwao, wachisoni ndi wofunda mutu wake." 
Esther6:13 Ndipo Hamani anafotokozera Zeresi mkazi wake, ndi mabwenzi ake onse, zonse zidamgwera. Nanena naye anzeru ake, ndi Zeresi mkazi wake, Mordekai amene wayamba kutsika pamaso pake, akakhala wa mbumba ya Ayuda, sudzamlaka; koma udzagwada pamaso pake." 
Esther6:14 Akali chilankhulire naye, anafika adindo a mfumu, nafulumira kumtenga Hamani kunka naye kumadyerero adawakonzera Estere." 
Esther7:1 Motero inadza mfumu ndi Hamani kumwa naye mkazi wamkulu Estere. 
Esther7:2 Nitinso mfumu kwa Estere tsiku lachiwirili pa madyerero a vinyo, Pempho lanu nchiyani, mkazi wamkulu Estere? Lidzapatsidwa kwa inu; mufunanji? Chidzachitika, kufikira limodzi la magawo awiri a ufumu wanga." 
Esther7:3 Nayankha mkazi wamkulu Estere, nati, Ngati mwandikomera mtima, mfumu, ndipo chikakomera mfumu, andilekere moyo wanga pa kupempha kwanga, ndi wa anthu a mtundu wanga pa pempho langa;" 
Esther7:4 pakuti tagulitsidwa; ine ndi anthu a mtundu wanga, kuti ationonge, atiphe, natipulule. Koma tikadagulitsidwa tikhale akapolo ndi adzakazi, ndikadakhala chete; chinkana wosautsa sakadakhoza kubwezera kusowa kwa mfumu." 
Esther7:5 Pamenepo mfumu Ahasuwero inalankhula, niti kwa mkazi wamkulu Estere, Ndani uyu, ali kuti iyeyu wadzazidwa mtima wake kuti azitero?" 
Esther7:6 Nati Estere, Munthu wosautsa ndi mdani ndiye Hamani woipa uyu. Pamenepo Hamani anagwidwa mantha pamaso pa mfumu ndi mkazi wamkulu." 
Esther7:7 Ninyamuka mfumu mu mkwiyo wake ku madyerero a vinyo, nimka kumunda wa maluwa wa kuchinyumba; koma Hamani anatsalira kudzipempherera moyo kwa mkazi wamkulu Estere; popeza anapenya kuti mfumu inatsimikiza mtima kumchitira choipa." 
Esther7:8 Nibwera mfumu kumunda wa maluwa wa kuchinyumba kulowanso m'nyumba munali madyerero a vinyo, napeza Hamani atagwa pa kama wokhalapo Estere. Niti mfumu, Kodi aumiriza mkazi wamkulu pamaso panga m'nyumba? Potuluka mau pakamwa pa mfumu anamphimba Hamani nkhope." 
Esther7:9 Nati Haribona wina wa adindo okhala pamaso pa mfumu, Taonaninso, mtengowo msinkhu wake mikono makumi asanu, umene Hamani anaupangira Mordekai wonenera mfumu zokoma, uimiritsidwa m'nyumba ya Hamani. Niti mfumu, Mpachike pomwepo." 
Esther7:10 Nampachika Hamani pa mtengo adaukonzera Mordekai. Pamenepo mkwiyo wa mfumu unatsika. 
Esther8:1 Tsiku lomwelo mfumu Ahasuwero anampatsa mkazi wamkulu Estere nyumba ya Hamani mdani wa Ayuda. Nafika Mordekai pamaso pa mfumu; pakuti Estere adamuuza za chibale chake. 
Esther8:2 Ndipo mfumu inavula mphete yake adailanda kwa Hamani, naipereka kwa Mordekai. Ndi Estere anaika Mordekai akhale woyang'anira nyumba ya Hamani." 
Esther8:3 Nanenanso Estere pamaso pa mfumu, nagwa ku mapazi ake, nalira misozi, nampembedza kuti achotse choipacho cha Hamani wa ku Agagi, ndi chiwembu adachipangira Ayuda." 
Esther8:4 Ndipo mfumu inaloza Estere ndi ndodo yachifumu yagolide. Nanyamuka Estere, naima pamaso pa mfumu." 
Esther8:5 Nati, Chikakomera mfumu, ndipo ngati yandikomera mtima, nichiyenera kwa mfumu, ngatinso ndimchititsa kaso, alembere chosintha mau a akalata a chiwembu cha Hamani mwana wa Hamedata wa ku Agagi, amene adawalembera kuononga Ayuda okhala m'maiko onse a mfumu;" 
Esther8:6 pakuti ndidzapirira bwanji pakuchiona choipa chilikudzera a mtundu wanga, kapena ndidzapirira bwanji pakuchiona chionongeko cha fuko langa?" 
Esther8:7 Pamenepo mfumu Ahasuwero anati kwa mkazi wamkulu Estere, ndi kwa Mordekai Myuda, Taonani, ndampatsa Estere nyumba ya Hamani, ndi iyeyu anampachika pamtanda, chifukwa anatulutsa dzanja lake pa Ayuda." 
Esther8:8 Mulembere inunso kwa Ayuda monga mufuna, m'dzina la mfumu, nimusindikize ndi mphete ya mfumu; pakuti kalata wolembedwa m'dzina la mfumu, ndi kusindikizika ndi mphete ya mfumu, palibe munthu akhoza kumsintha." 
Esther8:9 Pamenepo anaitana alembi a mfumu nthawi yomweyo, mwezi wachitatu, ndiwo mwezi wa Sivani, tsiku lake la makumi awiri ndi chitatu, monga mwa zonse Mordekai analamulira; nalembera kwa Ayuda, ndi kwa akazembe, ndi ziwanga, ndi akalonga a kumaiko, oyambira ku Indiya, ofikira ku Kusi, maiko zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri, ku dziko lililonse monga mwa chilembedwe chao, ndi mtundu uliwonse monga mwa chinenedwe chao, ndi kwa Ayuda monga mwa chinenedwe chao." 
Esther8:10 Ndipo analembera m'dzina la mfumu Ahasuwero, nasindikiza ndi mphete ya mfumu, natumiza akalata ndi amtokoma pa akavalo, okwera pa akavalo aliwiro achifumu, obadwa mosankhika;" 
Esther8:11 m'menemo mfumu inalola Ayuda okhala m'midzi iliyonse asonkhane, ndi kulimbikira moyo wao, kuononga, kupha, ndi kupulula mphamvu yonse ya anthu ndi ya dziko yofuna kuwathira nkhondo, iwo, ana ang'ono ao, ndi akazi ao, ndi kulanda zofunkha zao," 
Esther8:12 tsiku lomwelo, m'maiko onse a mfumu Ahasuwero, tsiku lakhumi ndi chitatu la mwezi wakhumi ndi chiwiri, ndiwo mwezi wa Adara." 
Esther8:13 Chitsanzo chake, cha lemboli, chakuti abukitse lamulo m'maiko onse, chinalalikidwa kwa mitundu yonse ya anthu, kuti, Ayuda akonzekeretu tsiku lijalo, kubwezera chilango adani ao." 
Esther8:14 Natuluka amtokoma okwera pa akavalo aliwiro achifumu; pakuti mau a mfumu anawafulumiza ndi kuwaumiriza; ndipo lamulolo linabukitsidwa m'chinyumba cha ku Susa. 
Esther8:15 Ndipo Mordekai anatuluka pamaso pa mfumu wovala chovala chachifumu chamadzi ndi choyera, ndi korona wamkulu wagolide, ndi malaya abafuta ndi ofiirira; ndi mudzi wa Susa unafuula ndi kukondwera." 
Esther8:16 Ayuda anali nako kuunika, ndi kukondwera, ndi chimwemwe, ndi ulemu." 
Esther8:17 Ndi m'maiko monse, ndi m'midzi yonse, mudafika mau a mfumu ndi lamulo lake, Ayuda anali nako kukondwera ndi chimwemwe, madyerero ndi tsiku lokoma. Ndipo ambiri a mitundu ya anthu a m'dziko anasanduka Ayuda; pakuti kuopsa kwa Ayuda kudawagwera." 
Esther9:1 Mwezi wakhumi ndi chiwiri tsono, ndiwo mwezi wa Adara, tsiku lake lakhumi ndi chitatu, mau a mfumu ndi lamulo lake ali pafupi kuchitika, tsikuli adani a Ayuda anayesa kuwachitira ufumu, koma chinasinthika; popeza Ayuda anachitira ufumu iwo odana nao;" 
Esther9:2 pakuti Ayuda anasonkhana pamodzi m'midzi mwao, m'maiko onse a mfumu Ahasuwero, kuwathira manja ofuna kuwachitira choipa, ndipo palibe munthu analimbika pamaso pao; popeza kuopsa kwao kudawagwera mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
Esther9:3 Ndipo akalonga onse a maikowo, ndi akazembe, ndi ziwanga, ndi iwo ochita ntchito ya mfumu, anathandiza Ayuda; popeza kuopsa kwa Mordekai kudawagwera." 
Esther9:4 Pakuti Mordekai anali wamkulu m'nyumba ya mfumu, ndi mbiri yake idabuka m'maiko onse; pakuti munthuyu Mordekai anakulakulabe." 
Esther9:5 Ndipo Ayuda anakantha adani ao onse, kuwakantha ndi lupanga, ndi kuwapulula, nachitira odana nao monga anafuna." 
Esther9:6 Ndipo m'chinyumba cha ku Susa Ayuda anakantha, naononga amuna mazana asanu." 
Esther9:7 Napha Parasadata, ndi Dalifoni, ndi Asipata," 
Esther9:8 ndi Porata, ndi Adaliya, ndi Aridata," 
Esther9:9 ndi Parimasta, ndi Arisai, ndi Aridai, ndi Vaizata," 
Esther9:10 ana amuna khumi a Hamani mwana wa Hamedata, mdani wa Ayuda. Koma sanalande zofunkha." 
Esther9:11 Tsiku lomwelo anabwera nacho kwa mfumu chiwerengo cha iwo ophedwa m'chinyumba cha ku Susa. 
Esther9:12 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa mkazi wamkulu Estere, Ayuda adapha, naononga amuna mazana asanu m'chinyumba cha ku Susa, ndi ana amuna khumi a Hamani; nanga m'maiko ena a mfumu munachitikanji? Pempho lanu ndi chiyani tsono? Lidzachitikira inu; kapena mufunanjinso? Kudzachitika." 
Esther9:13 Nati Estere, Chikakomera mfumu, alole Ayuda okhala m'Susa achite ndi mawa lomwe monga mwa lamulo la lero; ndi ana amuna khumi a Hamani apachikidwe pamtengo." 
Esther9:14 Ndipo mfumu inati azichita motero, nalamulira m'Susa, napachikidwa ana amuna khumi a Hamani." 
Esther9:15 Ndipo Ayuda okhala m'Susa anasonkhana pamodzi, tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi wa Adara, napha amuna mazana atatu m'Susa; koma sanalande zofunkha." 
Esther9:16 Nasonkhana pamodzi Ayuda ena okhala m'maiko a mfumu, nalimbikira moyo wao, napumula pa adani ao, nawapha a iwo odana nao zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu zisanu; koma sanalande zofunkha." 
Esther9:17 Chinachitika ichi tsiku lakhumi ndi chitatu la mwezi wa Adara, ndi tsiku lake lakhumi ndi chinai anapumula, naliyesa tsiku lamadyerero ndi lakukondwera." 
Esther9:18 Koma Ayuda okhala m'Susa anasonkhana tsiku lakhumi ndi chitatu ndi lakhumi ndi chinai, ndi pa tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu anapumula, naliyesa tsiku lamadyerero ndi lakukondwera." 
Esther9:19 Chifukwa chake Ayuda a kumilaga, okhala m'midzi yopanda malinga, amaliyesa tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai la mwezi wa Adara tsiku la kukondwera ndi madyerero, ndi tsiku lokoma, ndi lakutumizirana magawo." 
Esther9:20 Ndipo Mordekai analembera izi, natumiza akalata kwa Ayuda onse okhala m'maiko onse a mfumu Ahasuwero, a kufupi ndi a kutali," 
Esther9:21 kuwalimbikitsira, asunge tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai, mwezi wa Adara, ndi tsiku lake lakhumi ndi chisanu lomwe, chaka ndi chaka," 
Esther9:22 ndiwo masiku amene Ayuda anapumula pa adani ao; ndi mwezi wachisoni unawasandulikira wakukondwera, ndi wamaliro ukhale tsiku lokoma, awayese masiku amadyerero ndi akukondwera, akutumizirana magawo, ndi akupatsa zaufulu kwa osauka." 
Esther9:23 Ndipo Ayuda anavomereza kuchita monga umo adayambira, ndi umo Mordekai adawalembera;" 
Esther9:24 popeza Hamani mwana wa Hamedata wa ku Agagi, mdani wa Ayuda onse, adapangira Ayuda chiwembu kuwaononga, naombeza Puri, ndiwo ula, kuwatha ndi kuwaononga;" 
Esther9:25 koma pofika mlanduwo kwa mfumu, anati mwa akalata kuti chiwembu chake choipa adachipangira Ayuda, chimbwerere mwini; ndi kuti iye ndi ana amuna ake apachikidwe pamtengo." 
Esther9:26 Chifukwa chake anatcha masikuwa Purimu, ndilo dzina la ulawo. Momwemo, chifukwa cha mau onse a kalatayo, ndi izi adaziona za mlanduwo, ndi ichi chidawadzera," 
Esther9:27 Ayuda anakhazikitsa ichi, nadzilonjezetsa okha, ndi mbeu yao, ndi onse akuphatikana nao, chingalekeke, kuti adzasunga masiku awa awiri monga mwalembedwa, ndi monga mwa nyengo yao yoikika, chaka ndi chaka;" 
Esther9:28 ndi kuti masikuwa adzakumbukika ndi kusungika mwa mibadwo yonse, banja lililonse, dziko lililonse, ndi mudzi uliwonse; ndi kuti masiku awa sadzalekeka mwa Ayuda, kapena kusiyidwa chikumbukiro chao mwa mbeu yao." 
Esther9:29 Pamenepo Estere mkazi wamkulu mwana wa Abihaili, ndi Mordekai Myuda, analembera molamulira, kukhazikitsa kalata uyu wachiwiri wa Purimu." 
Esther9:30 Natumiza iye akalata kwa Ayuda onse, kumaiko zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri a ufumu wa Ahasuwero, ndiwo mau a mtendere ndi choonadi;" 
Esther9:31 kukhazikitsa masiku awa a Purimu m'nyengo zao, m'mene Mordekai Myuda ndi mkazi wamkulu Estere adawakhazikitsira; ndi umo anadzikhazikitsira okha, ndi mbeu yao, kunena za kusala kwao, ndi kufuula kwao." 
Esther9:32 Ndipo kunena kwake kwa Estere kunakhazikitsa mau awa a Purimu; ndipo kunalembedwa m'buku. 
Esther10:1 Ndipo mfumu Ahasuwero inasonkhetsa dziko, ndi zisumbu za ku nyanja." 
Esther10:2 Ndi zochita zonse za mphamvu yake, ndi nyonga zake, ndi mafotokozedwe a ukulu wa Mordekai, umene mfumu inamkulitsa nao, sizinalembedwa kodi m'buku la machitidwe a mafumu a Mediya ndi Persiya?" 
Esther10:3 Pakuti Mordekai Myuda anatsatana naye mfumu Ahasuwero, nakhala wamkulu mwa Ayuda, navomerezeka mwa unyinji wa abale ake wakufunira a mtundu wake zokoma, ndi wakunena za mtendere kwa mbeu yake yonse." 
Job1:1 Panali munthu m'dziko la Uzi, dzina lake ndiye Yobu; ndipo munthuyu anali wangwiro ndi woongoka, wakuopa Mulungu ndi kupewa zoipa." 
Job1:2 Ndipo anabala ana amuna asanu ndi awiri, ndi ana akazi atatu." 
Job1:3 Zoweta zakenso zinali nkhosa zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi ngamira zikwi zitatu, ndi ng'ombe zamagoli mazana asanu, ndi abulu akazi mazana asanu, antchito ake omwe ndi ambiri; chotero munthuyu anaposa anthu onse a kum'mawa." 
Job1:4 Ndipo ana ake amuna anamuka kukachita madyerero m'nyumba ya yense pa tsiku lake; natumiza mthenga kuitana alongo ao atatu adzadye nadzamwe nao. 
Job1:5 Ndipo kunatero, atatha masiku a madyererowa Yobu anatumiza mau, nawapatula, nauka mamawa, nafukiza nsembe zopsereza, monga mwa kuwerenga kwa iwo onse; pakuti Yobu anati, Kapena anachimwa ana anga, nachitira Mulungu mwano m'mtima mwao, Anatero Yobu masiku onse." 
Job1:6 Ndipo panali tsiku lakuti ana a Mulungu anadza kudzionetsa kwa Yehova, nadzanso Satana pakati pao." 
Job1:7 Nati Yehova kwa Satana, Ufuma kuti? Nayankha Satana kwa Yehova, nati, Kupitapita m'dziko ndi kuyendayenda m'mwemo." 
Job1:8 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Satana, Kodi waonerera mtumiki wanga Yobu? Pakuti palibe wina wonga iye m'dzikomo, munthu wangwiro ndi woongoka, wakuopa Mulungu ndi kupewa zoipa." 
Job1:9 Nayankha Satana, nati kwa Yehova, Kodi Yobu aopa Mulungu pachabe?" 
Job1:10 Kodi simunamtchinga iye ndi nyumba yake, ndi zake zonse, pomzinga ponse? Ntchito ya manja ake mwaidalitsa, ndi zoweta zake zachuluka m'dziko." 
Job1:11 Koma mutambasule dzanja lanu ndi kumkhudzira zake zonse, ndipo adzakuchitirani mwano pamaso panu." 
Job1:12 Nati Yehova kwa Satana, Taona, zonse ali nazo zikhale m'dzanja mwako; pa iye pokha usatambasula dzanja lako. Natuluka Satana pamaso pa Yehova." 
Job1:13 Tsono panali tsiku loti ana ake aamuna ndi aakazi analinkudya ndi kumwa vinyo m'nyumba ya mkulu wao; 
Job1:14 nafika mthenga kwa Yobu, nati, Ng'ombe zinalikulima, ndi abulu akazi analikudya pambali pao;" 
Job1:15 koma anazigwera Aseba, nazitenga, nawapha anyamata ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndipo ndapulumuka ine ndekha kudzakuuzani." 
Job1:16 Akali chilankhulire uyu, anadza winanso, nati, Wagwa moto wa Mulungu wochokera kumwamba, wapsereza nkhosa ndi anyamata, nuzinyeketsa; ndipo ndapulumuka ine ndekha kudzakuuzani." 
Job1:17 Akali chilankhulire uyu, anadza winanso, nati, Ababiloni anadzigawa magulu atatu, nazigwera ngamira, nazitenga, nawapha anyamata ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndipo ndapulumuka ine ndekha kudzakuuzani." 
Job1:18 Akali chilankhulire, anadza winanso, nati, Ana anu aamuna ndi aakazi analinkudya ndi kumwa vinyo m'nyumba ya mkulu wao;" 
Job1:19 ndipo taonani, inadza mphepo yaikulu yochokera kuchipululu, niomba pangodya zonse zinai za nyumbayo, nigwa pa anyamatawo, nafa; ndipo ndapulumuka ine ndekha kudzakuuzani." 
Job1:20 Pamenepo Yobu ananyamuka, nang'amba malaya ake, nameta mutu wake, nagwa pansi, nalambira," 
Job1:21 nati, Ndinatuluka m'mimba ya mai wanga wamaliseche, wamaliseche ndidzamukanso; Yehova anapatsa, Yehova watenga, lidalitsike dzina la Yehova." 
Job1:22 Mwa ichi chonse Yobu sanachimwe, kapena kunenera Mulungu cholakwa." 
Job2:1 Panalinso tsiku lakuti anadza ana a Mulungu kudzionetsa kwa Yehova, nadza Satana yemwe pakati pao kudzionetsa kwa Yehova." 
Job2:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Satana, Ufuma kuti? Nayankha Satana, nati kwa Yehova, Kupitapita m'dziko, ndi kuyendayenda m'mwemo." 
Job2:3 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Satana, Kodi waonerera mtumiki wanga Yobu? Pakuti palibe wina wonga iye m'dzikomo, munthu wangwiro ndi woongoka, wakuopa Mulungu, ndi kupewa zoipa; naumirirabe kukhala wangwiro, chinkana undisonkhezera ndimuononge kopanda chifukwa." 
Job2:4 Nayankha Satana, nati kwa Yehova, Khungu kulipa khungu, inde munthu adzapereka zonse ali nazo kuombola moyo wake." 
Job2:5 Koma tambasulani dzanja lanu, ndi kukhudza fupa lake ndi mnofu wake, ndipo adzakuchitirani mwano pamaso panu." 
Job2:6 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Satana, Taona, akhale m'dzanja lako; moyo wake wokha uuleke." 
Job2:7 Natuluka Satana pamaso pa Yehova, nazunza Yobu ndi zilonda zowawa, kuyambira kuphazi lake kufikira pakati pamutu pake." 
Job2:8 Ndipo anadzitengera phale, kudzikanda nalo; nakhala pansi m'maphulusa." 
Job2:9 Pamenepo mkazi wake ananena naye, Kodi uumiriranso kukhala wangwiro? Chitira Mulungu mwano, ufe." 
Job2:10 Koma ananena naye, Ulankhula monga amalankhula akazi opusa. Ha! Tidzalandira zokoma kwa Mulungu kodi, osalandiranso zoipa? Pa ichi chonse Yobu sanachimwe ndi milomo yake." 
Job2:11 Atamva tsono mabwenzi atatu a Yobu za choipa ichi chonse chidamgwera, anadza, yense kuchokera kwao, Elifazi wa ku Temani, ndi Bilidadi Msuki, ndi Zofari wa ku Naama, napangana kudzafika kumlirira ndi kumsangalatsa." 
Job2:12 Ndipo pokweza maso ao ali kutali, sanamdziwe, nakweza mau ao, nalira; nang'amba yense malaya ake, nawaza fumbi kumwamba ligwe pamitu pao." 
Job2:13 Nakhala pansi pamodzi naye panthaka masiku asanu ndi awiri usana ndi usiku, palibe mmodzi ananena naye kanthu, popeza anaona kuti kuwawaku nkwakukulu ndithu." 
Job3:1 Atatero, Yobu anatsegula pakamwa pake, natemberera tsiku lake." 
Job3:2 Nalankhula Yobu nati," 
Job3:3 Litayike tsiku lobadwa ine, ndi usikuwo udati, Waima naye mwana wamwamuna." 
Job3:4 Tsiku lija likhale mdima; Mulungu asalifunse kumwamba, ndi kuunika kusaliwalire." 
Job3:5 Mdima ndi mthunzi wa imfa ziliyese laolao; mtambo ulikhalire; zonse zodetsa usana bii ziliopse. 
Job3:6 Usiku uja, mdima weniweni uugwere; usakondwerere mwa masiku a m'chaka; usalowe m'chiwerengedwe cha miyezi." 
Job3:7 Ha! Usiku uja ukhale chumba; kuimbira kokondwera kusalowe m'mwemo. 
Job3:8 Autemberere iwo akutemberera usana, Odziwa kuutsa Leviyatani." 
Job3:9 Nyenyezi za chizirezire zide; uyembekezere kuunika, koma kuusowe; usaone kephenyuka kwa mbandakucha;" 
Job3:10 popeza sunatseka pa makomo ake mimba ya mai wanga. Kapena kundibisira mavuto pamaso panga. 
Job3:11 Ndinalekeranji kufera m'mimba? Ndi kupereka mzimu wanga pobadwa ine. 
Job3:12 Anandilandiriranji maondo? Kapena mawere kuti ndiyamwe? 
Job3:13 Pakuti ndikadagona pansi pomwepo ndi kukhala chete; ndikanagona tulo; pamenepo ndikadaona popumula; 
Job3:14 pamodzi ndi mafumu ndi maphungu a padziko, akudzimangira m'mabwinja;" 
Job3:15 kapena pamodzi ndi akalonga eni ake a golide, odzaza nyumba zao ndi siliva;" 
Job3:16 Kapena ngati nsenye yobisika ndikadakhala kuli zii; ngati makanda osaona kuunika. 
Job3:17 Apo oipa aleka kumavuta; ndi apo ofooka mphamvu akhala m'kupumula. 
Job3:18 Apo a m'kaidi apumula pamodzi, osamva mau a wofulumiza wao." 
Job3:19 Ang'ono ndi akulu ali komwe; ndi kapolo amasuka kwa mbuyake. 
Job3:20 Amninkhiranji kuunika wovutika, ndi moyo kwa iye wakuwawa mtima," 
Job3:21 wakuyembekezera imfa, koma kuli zii, ndi kuikumba koposa chuma chobisika," 
Job3:22 wakusekerera ndi chimwemwe ndi kukondwera pakupeza manda? 
Job3:23 Amuonetseranji kuunika munthu wa njira yobisika, amene wamtsekera Mulungu?" 
Job3:24 Pakuti ndikati ndidye, kumadza kuusa moyo kwanga; ndi kudzuma kwanga kumathiridwa ngati madzi." 
Job3:25 Pakuti chimene ndinachiopa chandigwera, ndi chimene ndachita nacho mantha chandidzera." 
Job3:26 Wosakhazikika, ndi wosakhala chete, ndi wosapumula ine, koma mavuto anandidzera." 
Job4:1 Pamenepo Elifazi wa ku Temani anayankha, nati," 
Job4:2 Munthu akayesa kunena nawe mau, kodi udzamva nao chisoni? Koma akhoza ndani kudziletsa kunena?" 
Job4:3 Taona iwe walangiza aunyinji, walimbitsa manja a ofooka." 
Job4:4 Mau ako anachirikiza iye amene akadagwa, walimbitsanso maondo otewa." 
Job4:5 Koma tsopano chakufikira iwe, ndipo ukomoka; chikukhudza, ndipo uvutika." 
Job4:6 Kodi kulimbika mtima kwako si ndiko kuti uopa Mulungu, ndi chiyembekezo chako si ndiwo ungwiro wa njira zako?" 
Job4:7 Takumbukira tsopano, watayika ndani wosapalamula konse? Kapena oongoka mtima alikhidwa kuti?" 
Job4:8 Monga umo, ndaonera, olimira mphulupulu, nabzala vuto, akololapo zomwezo." 
Job4:9 Atayika ndi mpweya wa Mulungu, nathedwa ndi mpumo wa mkwiyo wake." 
Job4:10 Kubangula kwa mkango, ndi kulira kwa mkango waukali kwaletsedwa, ndi mano a misona ya mkango athyoledwa." 
Job4:11 Mkango wokalamba udzifera posowa mkoka, ndi misona ya mkango waukazi imwazika." 
Job4:12 Anditengera mau m'tseri, m'khutu mwanga ndinalandira kunong'oneza kwake." 
Job4:13 M'malingaliro a masomphenya a usiku, powagwira anthu tulo tatikulu" 
Job4:14 Anandidzera mantha ndi kunjenjemera, nanthunthumira nako mafupa anga onse." 
Job4:15 Pamenepo panapita mzimu pamaso panga; tsitsi la thupi langa lidati nyaunyau. 
Job4:16 Unaima chilili, koma sindinatha kuzindikira maonekedwe ake; panali mzukwa pamaso panga; kunali chete, ndipo ndidamva mau akuti," 
Job4:17 Kodi munthu adzakhala wolungama ndi kuposa Mulungu? Kodi munthu adzakhala woyera woposa Mlengi wake? 
Job4:18 Taona, sakhulupirira atumiki ake; nawanenera amithenga ake zopusa;" 
Job4:19 kopambana kotani nanga iwo akukhala m'nyumba zadothi, amene kuzika kwao kuli m'fumbi, angothudzulidwa ngati njenjete." 
Job4:20 Kuyambira m'mawa kufikira madzulo athudzuka; aonongeka kosatha, osasamalirako munthu." 
Job4:21 Kukometsetsa kwao sikumachotsedwa nao? Amafa koma opanda nzeru. 
Job5:1 Itana tsono; pali wina wakukuyankha kodi? Ndipo udzatembenukira kwa yani wa oyera mtimawo? 
Job5:2 Pakuti mkwiyo umapha wopusa, ndi nsanje imakantha wopanda pake." 
Job5:3 Ndinapenya wopusa woyala mizu; koma pomwepo ndinatemberera pokhala pake. 
Job5:4 Ana ake akhala otekeseka, napsinjika kuchipata, wopanda wina wakuwapulumutsa." 
Job5:5 Zokolola zao anjala azidya, azitenga ngakhale kuminga, ndi aludzu ameza chuma chao." 
Job5:6 Pakuti nsautso sutuluka m'fumbi, ndi mavuto saphuka m'nthaka." 
Job5:7 Koma munthu abadwira mavuto, monga mbaliwali zikwera ziuluzika." 
Job5:8 Koma ine ndikadafuna Mulungu, ndikadaikira mlandu wanga Mulungu;" 
Job5:9 amene achita zazikulu ndi zosalondoleka, zinthu zodabwitsa zosawerengeka." 
Job5:10 Amene avumbitsa mvula panthaka, natumiza madzi paminda;" 
Job5:11 kuika opeputsidwa pamalo ponyamuka, kuti iwo a maliro akwezedwe kosatekeseka." 
Job5:12 Apititsa pachabe ziwembu za ochenjera, kuti manja ao sakhoza kuchita chopangana chao." 
Job5:13 Akola eni nzeru m'kuchenjera kwao, ndi uphungu wa opotoka mtima usonthokera pachabe." 
Job5:14 Iwo akomana ndi mdima pali dzuwa, nayambasa dzuwa lili pakati pamtu monga usiku." 
Job5:15 Apulumutsa aumphawi kulupanga la kukamwa kwao, ndi kudzanja la wamphamvu." 
Job5:16 Potero aumphawi ali nacho chiyembekezo, ndi mphulupulu yatsekedwa pakamwa." 
Job5:17 Taona, wodala munthu amene Mulungu amdzudzula; chifukwa chake usapeputsa kulanga kwa Wamphamvuyonse." 
Job5:18 Pakuti apweteka, namanganso mabala; alasa, ndi manja ake omwe apoletsa." 
Job5:19 Adzakupulumutsa m'masautso asanu ndi limodzi; chinkana mwa asanu ndi awiri palibe choipa chidzakukhudza. 
Job5:20 Adzakuombola kuimfa m'njala, ndi kumphamvu ya lupanga m'nkhondo." 
Job5:21 Udzabisikira mkwapulo wa lilime, sudzachiopanso chikadza chipasuko." 
Job5:22 Chipasuko ndi njala udzaziseka; ngakhale zilombo za padziko osaziopa. 
Job5:23 Pakuti udzakhala ndi pangano ndi miyala ya kuthengo; ndi nyama za kuthengo zidzakhala nawe mumtendere. 
Job5:24 Ndipo udzapeza kuti pahema pako mpa mtendere; nudzazonda za m'banja mwako osasowapo kanthu. 
Job5:25 Udzapezanso kuti mbeu zako zidzachuluka, ndi obala iwe ngati zitsamba za padziko." 
Job5:26 Udzafika kumanda utakalamba, monga abwera nao mtolo wa tirigu m'nyengo yake." 
Job5:27 Taona, ichi tachifunafuna, chili chotero; uchimvere, nuchidziwire wekha." 
Job6:1 Koma Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job6:2 Mwenzi atayesa bwino chisoni changa, ndi kuika matsoka anga pamodzi pamuyeso!" 
Job6:3 Pakuti zikadalemera tsopano koposa mchenga wa kunyanja; chifukwa chake mau anga ndasonthokera kunena. 
Job6:4 Pakuti mivi ya Wamphamvuyonse yandilowa, mzimu wanga uwumwa ulembe wake; zoopsa za Mulungu zindindandira nkhondo." 
Job6:5 Kodi mbidzi ilira pokhala nao msipu? Ilira kodi ng'ombe pa chakudya chake? 
Job6:6 Kodi chinthu chosakolera chidyeka chopanda mchere? Choyera cha dzira chikolera kodi? 
Job6:7 Zimene moyo wanga ukana kuzikhudza zikunga chakudya chosakolera kwa ine. 
Job6:8 Ha! Ndikadakhala nacho chimene ndichipempha, Mulungu akadandipatsa chimene ndichilira!" 
Job6:9 Chimkomere Mulungu kundiphwanya, alole dzanja lake lindilikhe!" 
Job6:10 Pamenepo ndidzasangalala, ndidzakondwera nacho chowawa chosandileka; pakuti sindinawabisa mau a Woyerayo." 
Job6:11 Mphamvu yanga njotani kuti ndiyembekeze? Mathedwe anga ndi otani kuti ndipirire? 
Job6:12 Kodi mphamvu yanga ndiyo mphamvu ya miyala? Mnofu wanga ndi mkuwa kodi? 
Job6:13 Mulibe thandizo mwa ine ndekha; chipulumutso chandithawa. 
Job6:14 Iye amene akadakomoka, bwenzi lake ayenera kumchitira chifundo; angaleke kuopa Wamphamvuyonse." 
Job6:15 Abale anga anachita monyenga ngati kamtsinje, ngati madzi a timitsinje akupitirira." 
Job6:16 Amada chifukwa cha madzi oundana. M'menemo chipale chofewa chibisika; 
Job6:17 atafikira mafundi, mitsinje iuma; kukatentha, imwerera m'malo mwao." 
Job6:18 Aulendo akutsata njira yao apatukapo, akwerera poti see, natayika." 
Job6:19 Aulendo a ku Tema anapenyerera, makamu a ku Sheba anaiyembekezera." 
Job6:20 Anazimidwa popeza adaikhulupirira; anafikako, nathedwa nzeru." 
Job6:21 Pakuti tsopano mukhala momwemo; muona choopsa, muchitapo mantha." 
Job6:22 Ngati ndinati, Mundipatse? Kapena, Muperekeko kwa ine chuma chanu?" 
Job6:23 Kapena, Mundilanditse m'dzanja la mdani? Kapena, Mundiombole m'dzanja la oopsa?" 
Job6:24 Mundilangize, ndipo ndidzakhala chete ine; mundizindikiritse umo ndinalakwira." 
Job6:25 Mau oongoka si ndiwo amphamvu? Koma kudzudzula kwanu mudzudzula chiyani? 
Job6:26 Kodi muyesa kudzudzula mau? Popeza maneno a munthu wodololoka akunga mphepo. 
Job6:27 Indetu, mugwetsera wamasiye msampha, mumkumbira bwenzi lanu mbuna." 
Job6:28 Koma tsopano balindani, mundipenyerere; ndikanena bodza pamaso panu mudzalizindikira." 
Job6:29 Bwererani, ndikupemphani, musandiipsire mlandu; inde, bwereraninso mlandu wanga ngwolungama." 
Job6:30 Kodi pali chosalungama palilime panga? Ngati sindizindikira zopanda pake m'kamwa mwanga? 
Job7:1 Kodi munthu alibe nkhondo kunja kuno? Kodi masiku ake sakunga masiku a wolembedwa ntchito? 
Job7:2 Monga kapolo woliralira mthunzi, monga wolembedwa ntchito ayembekezera mphotho yake," 
Job7:3 momwemo anandilowetsa miyezi yopanda pake. Nandiikiratu zowawa usiku ndi usiku. 
Job7:4 Ndigona pansi, ndikuti, Ndidzauka liti? Koma usiku undikulira; ndipo ndimapalapata mpaka mbandakucha." 
Job7:5 Mnofu wanga wavala mphutsi ndi nkanambo zadothi; khungu langa lang'ambika, nilinyansa." 
Job7:6 Masiku anga afulumira koposa mphindo ya muomba, apitirira opanda chiyembekezo." 
Job7:7 Kumbukira kuti moyo wanga ndiwo mphepo, diso langa silidzaonanso chokoma." 
Job7:8 Diso la amene andiona silidzandionanso, maso ako adzandipenyetsetsa, koma ine palibe." 
Job7:9 Mtambo wapita watha, momwemo wakutsikira kumanda sadzakwerakonso." 
Job7:10 Sadzabweranso kunyumba yake, osamdziwanso malo ake." 
Job7:11 Potero sindidzaletsa pakamwa panga; ndidzalankhula popsinjika mu mzimu mwanga; ndidzadandaula pakuwawa mtima wanga. 
Job7:12 Ndine nyanja kodi, kapena chinjoka cha m'nyanja, kuti Inu mundiikira odikira?" 
Job7:13 Ndikati, Pakama panga mpondisangalatsa, pogona panga padzachepsa chondidandaulitsa;" 
Job7:14 pamenepo mundiopsa ndi maloto, nimundichititsa mantha ndi masomphenya;" 
Job7:15 potero moyo wanga usankha kupotedwa, ndi imfa, koposa mafupa anga awa." 
Job7:16 Ndinyansidwa nao moyo wanga; sindidzakhala ndi moyo chikhalire; mundileke; pakuti masiku anga ndi achabe. 
Job7:17 Munthu ndani kuti mumkuze, ndi kuti muike mtima wanu pa iye," 
Job7:18 ndi kuti mucheze naye m'mawa ndi m'mawa, ndi kumuyesa nthawi zonse?" 
Job7:19 Mukana kundichokera kufikira liti, kapena kundileka mpaka nditameza dovu?" 
Job7:20 Ngati ndachimwa, ndingachitire Inu chiyani, Inu wodikira anthu? Mwandiikiranji ndikhale chandamali chanu? Kuti ndikhale kwa ine ndekha katundu?" 
Job7:21 Mulekeranji kukhululukira kulakwa kwanga ndi kundichotsera mphulupulu yanga? Popeza tsopano ndidzagona kufumbi; mudzandifunafuna, koma ine palibe." 
Job8:1 Pamenepo anayankha Bilidadi Msuki, nati," 
Job8:2 Udzanena izi kufikira liti? Ndipo mau a pakamwa pako adzakhala ngati namondwe kufikira liti? 
Job8:3 Ngati Mulungu akhotetsa chiweruzo? Ngati Wamphamvuyonse akhotetsa mlandu? 
Job8:4 Chinkana ana ako anamchimwira Iye, ndipo anawapereka mwa kulakwa kwao;" 
Job8:5 koma ukafunitsitsa Mulungu, ndi kupembedza Wamphamvuyonse;" 
Job8:6 ukakhala woyera ndi woongoka mtima, zoonadi adzakugalamukira tsopano, ndi kupindulitsa pokhala pako polungama." 
Job8:7 Ndipo chinkana chiyambi chako chinali chaching'ono, chitsiriziro chako chidzachuluka kwambiri." 
Job8:8 Pakuti ufunsire tsono mbadwo wapitawo, nusamalire zimene makolo ao adazisanthula." 
Job8:9 Pakuti ife ndife adzulo, osadziwa kanthu, popeza masiku athu a pa dziko lapansi ndiwo ngati mthunzi;" 
Job8:10 amene aja sangakuphunzitse, ndi kukufotokozera, ndi kutulutsa mau a mumtima mwao?" 
Job8:11 Ngati gumbwa aphuka popanda chinyontho? Ngati manchedza amera popanda madzi? 
Job8:12 Akali auwisi, sanawacheke, auma, asanaume mathengo onse ena." 
Job8:13 Momwemo mayendedwe a onse oiwala Mulungu; ndi chiyembekezo cha onyoza Mulungu; chidzatayika. 
Job8:14 Kulimbika mtima kwake kudzathyoka, chikhulupiriro chake chikunga nyumba ya kangaude." 
Job8:15 Adzatsamira nyumba yake, koma yosamlimbira; adzaiumirira koma yosakhalitsa." 
Job8:16 Akhala wamuwisi pali dzuwa, ndi nthambi zake zitulukira pamunda pake." 
Job8:17 Mizu yake iyangayanga pa kasupe wamadzi, apenyerera pokhalapo miyala." 
Job8:18 Akamuononga kumchotsa pamalo pake, padzamkana, ndi kuti, Sindinakuona." 
Job8:19 Taona, ichi ndicho chomkondweretsa panjira pake, ndi panthaka padzamera ena." 
Job8:20 Taona, Mulungu sakana munthu wangwiro; kapena kugwiriziza ochita zoipa." 
Job8:21 Koma adzadzaza m'kamwa mwako ndi kuseka, ndi milomo yako kufuula." 
Job8:22 Iwo akudana nawe adzavala manyazi; ndi hema wa oipa adzakhala kuli zii. 
Job9:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job9:2 Zoona, ndidziwa kuti chili chotero. Koma munthu adzakhala wolungama bwanji kwa Mulungu?" 
Job9:3 Akafuna Iye kutsutsana naye, sadzambwezera Iye mau amodzi onse mwa chikwi." 
Job9:4 Ndiye wa mtima wanzeru, ndi wa mphamvu yaikulu; ndaniyo anadziumitsa mtima pa Iye, nakhala nao mtendere?" 
Job9:5 Ndiye amene asuntha mapiri, osachidziwa iwo, amene amagubuduza mu mkwiyo wake." 
Job9:6 Amene agwedeza dziko lapansi lichoke m'malo mwake, ndi mizati yake injenjemere." 
Job9:7 Amene alamulira dzuwa ndipo silituluka, nakomera nyenyezi chizindikiro chakuzitsekera." 
Job9:8 Woyala thambo yekha, naponda pa mafunde a panyanja." 
Job9:9 Wolenga Mlalang'amba, Akamwiniatsatana, ndi Nsangwe, ndi Kumpotosimpita." 
Job9:10 Wochita zazikulu zosasanthulika, ndi zodabwitsa zosawerengeka." 
Job9:11 Taona, Mulungu apita pali ine, koma sindimpenya; napitirira, koma osamzindikira ine." 
Job9:12 Taona, akwatula, adzambwezetsa ndani? Adzanena naye ndani, Mulikuchita chiyani?" 
Job9:13 Mulungu sadzabweza mkwiyo wake; athandizi odzikuza awerama pansi pa Iye. 
Job9:14 Nanga ine tsono ndidzamyankha bwanji, ndi kusankha mau anga akutsutsana ndi Iye?" 
Job9:15 Ameneyo, chinkana ndikadakhala wolungama, sindikadamyankha; ndikadangompembedza wondiweruza ine." 
Job9:16 Ndikadaitana, ndipo akadayankha Iye, koma sindikadakhulupirira kuti Iye wamvera mau anga." 
Job9:17 Pakuti andithyola ndi mkuntho, nachulukitsa mabala anga kopanda chifukwa." 
Job9:18 Sandilola kuti ndipume, koma andidzaza ndi zowawa." 
Job9:19 Tikanena za mphamvu, si ndiye wamphamvu? Tikanena za kuweruza, adzamuitana ndani?" 
Job9:20 Chinkana ndikhala wolungama, pakamwa panga padzanditsutsa; chinkana ndikhala wangwiro, padzanditsutsa wamphulupulu." 
Job9:21 Chinkana ndikhala wangwiro, sindidzisamalira mwini, ndipeputsa moyo wanga." 
Job9:22 Kuli chimodzimodzi monsemo, m'mwemo ndikuti Iye aononga wangwiro ndi woipa pamodzi." 
Job9:23 Mkwapulo ukapha modzidzimutsa, adzaseka tsoka la wosachimwa." 
Job9:24 Dziko lapansi laperekedwa m'dzanja la woipa; aphimba maso a oweruza ake. Ngati sindiye, pali yaninso?" 
Job9:25 Tsopano masiku anga afulumira kuposa wamtokoma; athawa osaona chokoma. 
Job9:26 Apitirira ngati zombo zaliwiro; ngati mphungu igudukira chakudya chake. 
Job9:27 Ndikati, Ndidzaiwala chondidandaulitsa, ndidzasintha nkhope yanga yachisoni, ndidzasekerera." 
Job9:28 Pamenepo ndiopa zisoni zanga zonse, ndidziwa kuti simudzandiyesa wosachimwa." 
Job9:29 Mlandu udzanditsutsa; potero ndigwire ntchito chabe chifukwa ninji? 
Job9:30 Ndikasamba madzi a chipale chofewa ndi kuyeretsa manja anga ndi sopo. 
Job9:31 Mudzandiviikanso muli zoola, ndi zovala zanga zidzanyansidwa nane." 
Job9:32 Pakuti sindiye munthu, monga ine, kuti ndimyankhe. Kuti tikomane mlandu." 
Job9:33 Palibe wakutiweruza, wakutisanjika ife tonse awiri manja ake." 
Job9:34 Andichotsere ndodo yake, choopsa chake chisandichititse mantha;" 
Job9:35 kuti ndinene, osamuopa, pakuti sinditero monga umo ndili." 
Job10:1 Mtima wanga ulema nao moyo wanga, ndidzadzilolera kudandaula kwanga, ndidzalankhula pakuwawa mtima wanga." 
Job10:2 Ndidzati kwa Mulungu, Musanditsutse; mundidziwitse chifukwa cha kutsutsana nane." 
Job10:3 Chikukomerani kodi kungosautsa, kuti mupeputsa ntchito yolemetsa manja anu, ndi kuti muwalira pa uphungu wa oipa?" 
Job10:4 Muli nao maso a thupi kodi? Mupenya kodi monga umo apenyera munthu? 
Job10:5 Masiku anu akunga masiku a munthu kodi, zaka zanu zikunga masiku a munthu;" 
Job10:6 kuti mufunsa mphulupulu yanga, ndi kulondola choipa changa;" 
Job10:7 chinkana mudziwa kuti sindili woipa, ndipo palibe wakupulumutsa m'dzanja lanu?" 
Job10:8 Manja anu anandiumba, nandiulunga monsemu, koma mufuna kundiononga." 
Job10:9 Mukumbukire kuti mwandiumba ngati dothi; ndipo kodi mudzandibwezera kufumbi? 
Job10:10 Simunanditsanula kodi ngati mkaka, ndi kundilimbitsa ngati mase?" 
Job10:11 Munandiveka khungu ndi mnofu, ndi kundilumikiza mafupa ndi mitsempha." 
Job10:12 Mwandipatsa moyo, ndi kundikomera mtima, ndi masamalidwe anu anasunga mzimu wanga." 
Job10:13 Koma izi munazibisa mumtima mwanu; ndidziwa kuti ichi muli nacho. 
Job10:14 Ndikachimwa mundipenya; ndipo simudzandimasula mphulupulu yanga. 
Job10:15 Ndikakhala woipa, tsoka ine; ndikakhala wolungama, sindidzakweza mutu wanga; ndadzazidwa ndi manyazi, koma penyani kuzunzika kwanga." 
Job10:16 Ndipo mutu wanga ukadzikweza, mundisaka ngati mkango; mubweranso ndi kudzionetsera modabwitsa kwa ine." 
Job10:17 Mundikonzeranso mboni zonditsutsa, ndi kundichulukitsira mkwiyo wanu; nkhondo yobwerezabwereza yandigwera." 
Job10:18 Potero munandibadwitsa chifukwa ninji? Mwenzi nditapereka moyo wanga, lisanandione diso." 
Job10:19 Ndikadakhala monga ngati sindikadakhala; akadanditenga pobadwapo kunka nane kumanda. 
Job10:20 Masiku anga satsala owerengeka nanga? Lindani. Bandilekani kuti nditsitsimuke pang'ono," 
Job10:21 ndisanachoke kunka kumene sindikabweranso, ku dziko la mdima ndi la mthunzi wa imfa." 
Job10:22 Dziko la mdima bii ngati mdima wandiweyani, dziko la mthunzi wa imfa losalongosoka, kumene kuunika kukunga mdima." 
Job11:1 Pamenepo anayankha Zofari wa ku Naama, nati," 
Job11:2 Kodi mau ochulukawa sayenera kuwayankha? Ndi munthu wa milomo ayenera kuyesedwa wolungama? 
Job11:3 Kodi zotamanda zako ziwatseke anthu pakamwa? Useka kodi, wopanda munthu wakukuchititsapo manyazi?" 
Job11:4 Pakuti unena, Chiphunzitso changa nchoona, ndipo ndili woyera pamaso pako." 
Job11:5 Koma, ha? Mwenzi atanena Mulungu, ndi kukutsegulira milomo yake motsutsa;" 
Job11:6 nakufotokozere zinsinsi za nzeru, popeza zipindikapindika machitidwe ao! Chifukwa chake dziwa kuti Mulungu akuiwalira mphulupulu zina." 
Job11:7 Kodi ukhoza kupeza Mulungu mwa mufunafuna? Ukhoza kupeza Wamphamvuyonse motsindika? 
Job11:8 Kumpeza kutalika ngati kumwamba, ungachitenji? Kuzama ngati kumanda, ungadziwenji?" 
Job11:9 Muyeso wake utalikira utali wake wa dziko lapansi, chitando chake chiposa cha nyanja." 
Job11:10 Akapita, nakatsekera, nakatulutsa bwalo la mlandu, adzamletsa ndani?" 
Job11:11 Pakuti adziwa anthu opanda pake, napenyanso mphulupulu, ngakhale saisamalira." 
Job11:12 Koma munthu wopanda pake asowa nzeru, ngakhale munthu abadwa ngati mwanawabulu." 
Job11:13 Ukakonzeratu mtima wako, ndi kumtambasulira Iye manja ako;" 
Job11:14 Mukakhala mphulupulu m'dzanja lako, uichotseretu kutali, ndi chisalungamo chisakhale m'mahema mwako." 
Job11:15 Popeza pamenepo udzakweza nkhope yako opanda banga; nudzalimbika osachita mantha; 
Job11:16 pakuti udzaiwala chisoni chako, udzachikumbukira ngati madzi opita." 
Job11:17 Ndipo moyo wako udzayera koposa usana; kungakhale kuli mdima kudzakhala ngati m'mawa. 
Job11:18 Ndipo udzalimbika mtima popeza pali chiyembekezo; nudzafunafuna, ndi kugona mosatekeseka." 
Job11:19 Inde udzagona pansi, wopanda wina wakukunjenjemeretsa, ndipo ambiri adzakupembedza." 
Job11:20 Koma maso a oipa adzagoma, ndi pothawirapo padzawasowa, ndipo chiyembekezo chao ndicho kupereka mzimu wao." 
Job12:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job12:2 Zoonadi inu ndinu anthu, ndi nzeru idzafa pamodzi ndi inu." 
Job12:3 Koma inenso ndili nayo nzeru monga inu. Sindingakuchepereni; ndani sadziwa zonga izi? 
Job12:4 Ndine ngati munthu wosekedwa ndi mnansi wake, ndinaitana kwa Mulungu, ndipo anandiyankha; munthu wolungama wangwiro asekedwa." 
Job12:5 Munthu wosatekeseka apeputsa tsoka mumtima mwake, limlindira woterereka mapazi ake." 
Job12:6 Mahema a achifwamba akhala mumtendere, ndi iwo oputa Mulungu alimbika mtima; amene Mulungu amadzazira dzanja lao." 
Job12:7 Tafunsira tsono kwa nyamazo, zidzakulangiza, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga, zidzakuuza." 
Job12:8 Kapena ulankhule ndi dziko lapansi, lidzakulangiza; ndi nsomba za kunyanja, zidzakufotokozera." 
Job12:9 Ndaniyo sadziwa nazo izi zonse; kuti dzanja la Yehova lichita ichi? 
Job12:10 M'dzanja mwake muli mpweya wa zamoyo zonse, ndi mzimu wa munthu aliyense." 
Job12:11 M'khutumu simuyesa mau, monga m'kamwa mulawa chakudya chake?" 
Job12:12 Kwa okalamba kuli nzeru, ndi kwa a masiku ochuluka luntha." 
Job12:13 Kwa Iye kuli nzeru ndi mphamvu; uphungu ndi luntha ali nazo. 
Job12:14 Taona, agamula, ndipo palibe kumanganso; amtsekera munthu, ndipo palibe kumtsegulira." 
Job12:15 Taona atsekera madzi, naphwa; awatsegulira, ndipo akokolola dziko lapansi." 
Job12:16 Kwa Iye kuli mphamvu ndi nzeru. Wonyengedwa ndi wonyenga yemwe ali ake. 
Job12:17 Apita nao maphungu atawafunkhira, napulukiritsa oweruza milandu." 
Job12:18 Amasula chomangira cha mafumu, nawamangira nsinga m'chuuno mwao." 
Job12:19 Apita nao, ansembe atawafunkhira, nagubuduza amphamvu." 
Job12:20 Amchotsera wokhulupirika kunena kwake. Nalanda luntha la akulu. 
Job12:21 Atsanulira mnyozo pa akalonga, nawansezera olimba lamba lao." 
Job12:22 Avumbulutsa zozama mumdima, natulutsa mthunzi wa imfa ukhale poyera;" 
Job12:23 achulukitsa amitundu, nawaononganso; abalalikitsa amitundu, nawabwezanso." 
Job12:24 Awachotsera akulu a anthu a padziko mtima wao, nawasokeretsa m'chipululu chopanda njira." 
Job12:25 Iwo ayambasa mumdima mopanda kuunika, ndipo awayendetsa dzandidzandi." 
Job13:1 Taonani, diso langa lachiona chonsechi; m'khutu mwanga ndachimva ndi kuchizindikira." 
Job13:2 Chimene muchidziwa inu, inenso ndichidziwa; sindikucheperani." 
Job13:3 Koma ine ndidzanena ndi Wamphamvuyonse, ndipo ndifuna kudzikanira kwa Mulungu." 
Job13:4 Koma inu ndinu opanga zabodza, asing'anga opanda pake inu nonse." 
Job13:5 Mwenzi mutakhala chete konse, ndiko kukadakhala nzeru zanu." 
Job13:6 Tamvani tsono kudzikanira kwanga, tamverani kudzinenera kwa milomo yanga." 
Job13:7 Kodi munenera Mulungu mosalungama, ndi kumnenera Iye monyenga?" 
Job13:8 Kodi mukhalira kumodzi ndi Iye? Mundilimbirana mwa Mulungu. 
Job13:9 Nchokoma kodi kuti Iye akusanthuleni? Kodi mudzamnyenga Iye monga munyenga munthu? 
Job13:10 Adzakudzudzulani ndithu, mukachita tsankho m'tseri." 
Job13:11 Ukulu wake sukuchititsani mantha, ndi kuopsa kwake sikukugwerani kodi?" 
Job13:12 Zikumbutso zanu ndizo miyambi ya mapulusa; zodzikanira zanu zikunga malinga adothi. 
Job13:13 Khalani chete, ndilekeni, kuti ndinene, chondifikira chifike." 
Job13:14 Ndilumirenji mnofu wanga pamano panga, ndi kupereka moyo wanga m'dzanja langa?" 
Job13:15 Angakhale andipha koma ndidzamlindira; komanso ndidzaumirira mayendedwe anga pamaso pake. 
Job13:16 Iye adzakhalanso chipulumutso changa, pakuti wonyoza Mulungu sadzafika pamaso pake." 
Job13:17 Mvetsetsani mau anga, ndi kunenetsa kwanga kumveke m'makutu mwanu." 
Job13:18 Taonani tsono, ndalongosola mlandu wanga; ndidziwa kuti adzandimasula ndili wolungama." 
Job13:19 Ndaniyo adzatsutsana nane? Ndikakhala chete, ndidzapereka mzimu wanga." 
Job13:20 Zinthu ziwiri zokha musandichitire, pamenepo sindidzabisalira nkhope yanu." 
Job13:21 Mundichotsere dzanja lanu kutali, ndi kuopsa kwanu kusandichititse mantha." 
Job13:22 Pamenepo muitane, ndipo ndidzayankha; kapena ndinene ndine, ndipo mundiyankhe ndinu." 
Job13:23 Mphulupulu zanga ndi zochimwa zanga ndi zingati? Mundidziwitse kulakwa kwanga ndi tchimo langa. 
Job13:24 Mubisiranji nkhope yanu, ndi kundiyesa mdani wanu?" 
Job13:25 Kodi mudzaopsa tsamba lakungouluka, ndi kulondola ziputu zouma?" 
Job13:26 Pakuti mundilembera zinthu zowawa, ndi kundipatsa ngati cholowa mphulupulu za ubwana wanga." 
Job13:27 Mulonganso mapazi anga m'zigologolo, ndi kupenyerera mayendedwe anga onse; mudzilembera malire mopanika mapazi anga." 
Job13:28 Momwemo munthu akutha ngati chinthu choola, ngati chovala chodyedwa ndi njenjete." 
Job14:1 Munthu wobadwa ndi mkazi ngwa masiku owerengeka, nakhuta mavuto." 
Job14:2 Atuluka ngati duwa, nafota; athawa ngati mthunzi, osakhalitsa." 
Job14:3 Ndipo kodi mumtsegulira maso anu wotereyo, ndi kunditenga kunena nane mlandu Inu?" 
Job14:4 Adzatulutsa choyera m'chinthu chodetsa ndani? Nnena mmodzi yense. 
Job14:5 Popeza masiku ake alembedwa, chiwerengo cha miyezi yake chikhala ndi Inu, ndipo mwamlembera malire ake kuti asapitirirepo iye;" 
Job14:6 mumleke osamthira maso, kuti apumule, kuti akondwere nalo tsiku lake monga wolembedwa ntchito." 
Job14:7 Pakuti akaulikha mtengo pali chiyembekezo kuti udzaphukanso, ndi kuti nthambi yake yanthete siidzasowa." 
Job14:8 Ngakhale muzu wake wakalamba m'nthaka, ndi tsinde lake likufa pansi." 
Job14:9 Koma pa mnunkho wa madzi udzaphuka, nudzaswa nthambi ngati womera." 
Job14:10 Koma munthu akufa atachita liondeonde inde, munthu apereka mzimu wake, ndipo ali kuti?" 
Job14:11 Madzi achoka m'nyanja, ndi mtsinje ukuphwa, nuuma;" 
Job14:12 momwemo munthu agona pansi, osaukanso; kufikira miyamba kulibe, sadzaukanso, kapena kuutsidwa pa tulo take." 
Job14:13 Ha? Mukadandibisa kumanda, mukadandisunga m'tseri, mpaka wapita mkwiyo wanu. Mukadandiikira nthawi, ndi kundikumbukira." 
Job14:14 Atafa munthu, adzakhalanso ndi moyo kodi? Ndikadayembekeza masiku onse a nkhondo yanga, mpaka kwafika kusandulika kwanga." 
Job14:15 Mukadaitana, ndipo ndikadakuyankhani; mukadakhumba ntchito ya manja anu." 
Job14:16 Koma tsopano muwerenga moponda mwanga; kodi simuyang'anitsa tchimo langa? 
Job14:17 Cholakwa changa chaikidwa m'thumba lokhomedwa chizindikiro; ndipo mumanga pamodzi mphulupulu zanga. 
Job14:18 Ndipo zoonadi, likagwa phiri, latha; ndi thanthwe lisunthika m'malo mwake." 
Job14:19 Madzi anyenya miyala; zosefukira zao zikokolola fumbi la nthaka; ndipo muononga chiyembekezo cha munthu. 
Job14:20 Mumlaka chilakire, napita iye; musintha nkhope yake, mumuuza achoke." 
Job14:21 Ana ake aona ulemu osadziwa iye; napeputsidwa, koma osazindikira za iwo." 
Job14:22 Koma thupi lake limuwawira yekha, ndi mtima wake umliritsa yekha." 
Job15:1 Pamenepo Elifazi wa ku Temani anayankha, nati," 
Job15:2 Kodi mwini nzeru ayankhe ndi kudziwa kouluzika, ndi kudzaza mimba yake ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa?" 
Job15:3 Kodi atsutsane ndi mnzake ndi mau akusathandiza? Kapena ndi maneno akusaphindulitsa? 
Job15:4 Zedi uyesa chabe mantha, nuchepsa chilingiriro pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Job15:5 Pakuti pakamwa pako paphunzitsa mphulupulu zako, nusankha lilime la ochenjerera." 
Job15:6 Pakamwa pako pakutsutsa, si ine ai. Inde milomo yako ikuchitira umboni wakukutsutsa." 
Job15:7 Kodi ndiwe munthu woyamba kubadwa? Kapena unayamba kulengedwa ndiwe, osati mapiri?" 
Job15:8 Kodi unamva uphungu wachinsinsi wa Mulungu? Ndipo unadzikokera nzeru kodi? 
Job15:9 Udziwa chiyani, osachidziwa ife? Uzindikira chiyani, chosakhala mwa ife?" 
Job15:10 Pakati pa ife pali aimvi, ndi okalambitsa, akuposa atate wako masiku ao." 
Job15:11 Masangalatso a Mulungu akuchepera kodi? Kapena uli nacho chinsinsi kodi? 
Job15:12 Mtima wako usonthokeranji nawe? Maso ako aphethiraphethira chifukwa ninji? 
Job15:13 Kuti utembenuza mzimu wako utsutsane ndi Mulungu, ndi kulola mau otere atuluke m'kamwa mwako." 
Job15:14 Munthu nchiyani kuti akhale woyera, wobadwa ndi mkazi kuti akhale wolungama?" 
Job15:15 Taona, Mulungu sakhulupirira opatulika ake; ngakhale m'mwamba simuyera pamaso pake." 
Job15:16 Koposa kotani nanga munthu wonyansa ndi wodetsa, wakumwa chosalungama ngati madzi." 
Job15:17 Ndidzakuonetsa, undimvere; chimene ndinachiona, ndidzakufotokozera;" 
Job15:18 chimene adachinena anzeru, adachilandira kwa makolo ao, osachibisa;" 
Job15:19 ndiwo amene analandira okha dzikoli, wosapita mlendo pakati pao." 
Job15:20 Munthu woipa adzipweteka masiku ake onse, ndi zaka zowerengeka zisingikira woopsa." 
Job15:21 M'makutu mwake mumveka zoopsetsa; pali mtendere amfikira wakumuononga. 
Job15:22 Sakhulupirira kuti adzatulukamo mumdima, koma kuti lupanga limlindira." 
Job15:23 Ayendayenda ndi kufuna chakudya, nati, Chilikuti? Adziwa kuti lamkonzekeratu pafupi tsiku lamdima." 
Job15:24 Nsautso ndi chipsinjo zimchititsa mantha, zimlaka ngati mfumu yokonzekeratu kunkhondo." 
Job15:25 Pakuti amtambasula dzanja lake moyambana ndi Mulungu, napikisana ndi Wamphamvuyonse." 
Job15:26 Amthamangira Iye mwaliuma, ndi zikopa zake zochindikira." 
Job15:27 Popeza anakuta nkhope yake ndi kunenepa kwake, nachita mafunyenye a mafuta m'zuuno zake;" 
Job15:28 adzakhala m'midzi yopasuka, m'nyumba zosakhalamo munthu, zoti zisandulika muunda." 
Job15:29 Sadzakhala wolemera, ndi chuma chake sichidzakhalitsa, ndi zipatso zake sizidzachuluka padziko." 
Job15:30 Sadzachoka mumdima; lawi la moto lidzaumitsa nthambi zake; ndipo adzachoka ndi mpumo wa m'kamwa mwake. 
Job15:31 Asatame zopanda pake, kudzinyenga nazo; pakuti zopanda pake zidzakhala chombwezera chake." 
Job15:32 Chidzachitika isanadze nthawi yake; pakuti nthambi yake siidzaphuka. 
Job15:33 Adzayoyoka zipatso zake zosapsa ngati mpesa, nadzathothoka maluwa ake ngati mtengo wa azitona." 
Job15:34 Pakuti msonkhano wa onyoza Mulungu udzakhala chumba, ndi moto udzapsereza mahema a olandira chokometsera mlandu." 
Job15:35 Aima ndi chovuta, nabala mphulupulu, ndi m'mimba mwao mukonzeratu chinyengo." 
Job16:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job16:2 Ndamva zambiri zotere; inu nonse ndinu otonthoza mtima mondilemetsa. 
Job16:3 Kodi adzatha mau ouluzika? Kapena chikuwindula nchiyani kuti uyankha zotere? 
Job16:4 Inenso ndikadanena monga inu, moyo wanu ukadakhala m'malo mwa moyo wanga, ndikadalumikizanitsa mau akutsutsana nanu, ndi kukupukusirani mutu wanga." 
Job16:5 Koma ndikadakulimbikitsani ndi m'kamwa mwanga, ndi chitonthozo cha milomo yanga chikadatsitsa chisoni chanu." 
Job16:6 Chinkana ndinena chisoni changa sichitsika; ndipo ndikaleka, chindichokera nchiyani?" 
Job16:7 Koma tsopano wandilemetsa Iye; mwapasula msonkhano wanga wonse. 
Job16:8 Kundigwira kwanu, ndiko umboni wonditsutsa, kuonda kwanga kundiukira, kuchita umboni pamaso panga." 
Job16:9 Iye ananding'amba m'kundida kwake, nakwiya nane, anandikukutira mano; mdani wanga ananditong'olera maso ake." 
Job16:10 Iwo anandiyasamira pakamwa pao; anandiomba pama ndi kunditonza; asonkhana pamodzi kunditsutsa. 
Job16:11 Mulungu andipereka kwa osulangama, nandiponya m'manja a oipa." 
Job16:12 Ndinali mkupuma, koma anandithyola; inde anandigwira pakhosi, nandiphwanya; nandiimika ndikhale chandamali." 
Job16:13 Eni mauta ake andizinga, ang'amba impso zanga, osazileka; natsanulira pansi ndulu yanga." 
Job16:14 Andipasulapasula; andithamangira ngati wamphamvu. 
Job16:15 Ndadzisokerera chiguduli kukhungu langa. Ndipo ndaipsa mphamvu yanga m'fumbi. 
Job16:16 Nkhope yanga njodetsedwa ndi kulira misozi, ndi pa zikope zanga pali mthunzi wa imfa;" 
Job16:17 pangakhale palibe chiwawa m'manja mwanga, ndi pemphero langa ndi loyera." 
Job16:18 Dziko iwe, usakwirire mwazi wanga, ndi kulira kwanga kusowe popumira." 
Job16:19 Tsopanonso, taona, mboni yanga ili kumwamba, ndi nkhoswe yanga ikhala m'mwamba." 
Job16:20 Mabwenzi anga andinyoza; koma diso langa lilirira misozi kwa Mulungu. 
Job16:21 Ha? Munthu akadapembedzera mnzake kwa Mulungu, monga munthu apembedzera mnansi wake!" 
Job16:22 Pakuti zitafika zaka zowerengeka, ndidzamuka kunjira imene sindibwererako." 
Job17:1 Mzimu wanga watha, masiku anga afafanizika, kumanda kwandikonzekeratu." 
Job17:2 Zoonadi, ali nane ondiseka; ndi diso langa lili chipenyere m'kundiwindula kwao." 
Job17:3 Mupatse chigwiriro tsono, mundikhalire chikole Inu nokha kwanu; ndani adzapangana nane kundilipirira?" 
Job17:4 Pakuti mwabisira mtima wao nzeru; chifukwa chake simudzawakuza. 
Job17:5 Iye wakupereka mabwenzi ake ku ukapolo, m'maso mwa ana ake mudzada." 
Job17:6 Anandiyesanso nthanthi za anthu; ndipo ndakhala ngati munthu womthira malovu pankhope pake. 
Job17:7 M'diso mwanga muchita chizirezire chifukwa cha chisoni, ndi ziwalo zanga zonse zilibe chithunzi." 
Job17:8 Anthu oongoka mtima adzadabwa nacho, ndi munthu wosalakwa adzadziutsa kumtsutsa wonyoza Mulunguyo." 
Job17:9 Koma wolungama asungitsa njira yake, ndi iye wa manja oyera adzakulabe mumphamvu." 
Job17:10 Koma bwerani inu nonse, idzani tsono; pakuti sindipeza mwa inu wanzeru." 
Job17:11 Masiku anga apitirira, zolingirira zanga zaduka, zakezake zomwe za mtima wanga." 
Job17:12 Zisanduliza usiku ukhale usana; kuunika kuyandikana ndi mdima. 
Job17:13 Ndikayembekezera kumanda kukhale nyumba yanga; ndikayala pogona panga mumdima. 
Job17:14 Ndikati kwa dzenje, Ndiwe atate wanga; kwa mphutsi, Ndiwe mai wanga ndi mlongo wanga;" 
Job17:15 chilikuti chiyembekezo changa? Inde, chiyembekezo changa adzachiona ndani?" 
Job17:16 Chidzatsikira kumipingiridzo ya kumanda, pamene tipumulira pamodzi kufumbi." 
Job18:1 Pamenepo Bilidadi wa ku Suki anayankha, nati," 
Job18:2 Musaka mau kufikira liti? Zindikirani, ndi pamenepo tidzanena." 
Job18:3 Tiyesedwa bwanji ngati nyama za kuthengo, ndi kukhala odetsedwa pamaso panu?" 
Job18:4 Iwe wodzing'amba mumkwiyo mwako, kodi dziko lapansi lisiyidwe chifukwa cha iwe? Kapena thanthwe lisunthike m'malo mwake?" 
Job18:5 Inde, kuunika kwa woipa kudzazima, ndi lawi la moto wake silidzawala." 
Job18:6 Kuunikaku kudzada m'hema mwake, ndi nyali yake ya pamwamba pake idzazima." 
Job18:7 Mapondedwe ake amphamvu adzasautsidwa, ndi uphungu wakewake udzamgwetsa." 
Job18:8 Pakuti aponyedwa m'ukonde ndi mapazi ake, namaponda pamatanda." 
Job18:9 Msampha udzamgwira kuchitende, ndi khwekhwe lidzamkola." 
Job18:10 Msampha woponda umbisikira pansi, ndi msampha wa chipeto panjira." 
Job18:11 Zoopetsa zidzamchititsa mantha monsemo, nadzampirikitsa kumbuyo kwake." 
Job18:12 Njala idzatha mphamvu yake, ndi tsoka lidzamkonzekeratu pambali pake." 
Job18:13 Zidzatha ziwalo za thupi lake, mwana woyamba wa imfa adzatha ziwalo zake." 
Job18:14 Adzazulidwa kuhema kwake kumene anakhulupirira; nadzatengedwa kunka naye kwa mfumu ya zoopsa. 
Job18:15 Adzakhala m'hema mwake iwo amene sali ake; miyala ya sulufure idzawazika pokhala pake. 
Job18:16 Mizu yake idzauma pansi, ndi nthambi yake idzafota m'mwamba." 
Job18:17 Chikumbukiro chake chidzatayika m'dziko, ndipo adzasowa dzina kukhwalala." 
Job18:18 Adzamkankha achoke kukuunika alowe kumdima; adzampirikitsa achoke m'dziko lokhalamo anthu. 
Job18:19 Sadzakhala naye mwana kapena chidzukulu mwa anthu a mtundu wake, kapena wina wotsalira kumene anakhalako." 
Job18:20 Akudza m'mbuyo adzadabwa nalo tsiku lake, monga aja omtsogolera anagwidwa mantha." 
Job18:21 Zoonadi, zokhalamo osalungama zitero, ndi malo a iye amene sadziwa Mulungu ndi awa." 
Job19:1 Koma Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job19:2 Mudzasautsa moyo wanga kufikira liti, ndi kundithyolathyola nao mau?" 
Job19:3 Kakhumi aka mwandichititsa manyazi; mulibe manyazi kuti mundiumira mtima. 
Job19:4 Ndipo ngati ndalakwa ndithu, kulakwa kwanga kuli ndi ine ndekha." 
Job19:5 Ngati inu mudzikuza ndithu pa ine, ndi kunditchulira mtonzo wanga kuti munditsutse nao." 
Job19:6 Dziwani tsopano kuti Mulungu wandikhotetsera mlandu wanga, nandizinga ndi ukonde wake." 
Job19:7 Taonani, ndifuula kuti, Chiwawa! Koma sandimvera; ndikuwa, koma palibe chiweruzo." 
Job19:8 Iye ananditsekera njira kuti ndisapitireko, naika mdima poyendapo ine." 
Job19:9 Anandivula ulemerero wanga, nandichotsera korona pamutu panga." 
Job19:10 Nandigamula ponsepo, ndipo ndamukatu; nachizula chiyembekezo changa ngati mtengo." 
Job19:11 Wandiyatsiranso mkwiyo wake, nandiyesera ngati wina wa adani ake." 
Job19:12 Ankhondo ake andidzera pamodzi, nandiundira njira yao, nandimangira misasa pozinga hema wanga." 
Job19:13 Iye anandichotsera abale anga kutali, ndi odziwana nane andiyesa mlendo konse." 
Job19:14 Anansi anga andisowa, ndi odziwana nane bwino andiiwala." 
Job19:15 Iwo a m'nyumba mwanga ndi adzakazi anga andiyesa mlendo; ndine wachilendo pamaso pao. 
Job19:16 Ndikaitana kapolo wanga, sandibwezera mau, chinkana ndimpembedza pakamwa panga." 
Job19:17 Mpweya wanga unyansira mkazi wanga, chinkana ndinampembedza ndi kutchula ana a thupi langa." 
Job19:18 Angakhale ana ang'ono andipeputsa, ndikanyamuka, andinena;" 
Job19:19 mabwenzi anga enieni onse anyansidwa nane; ndi onse ndakondana nao asandulika adani anga. 
Job19:20 Fupa langa laumirira pa khungu langa ndi mnofu wanga, ndipo ndapulumuka ndili nazo nkhama za mano anga." 
Job19:21 Ndichitireni chifundo, ndichitireni chifundo, mabwenzi anga inu; pakuti dzanja la Mulungu landikhudza." 
Job19:22 Mundilondola bwanji ngati Mulungu, losakukwanirani thupi langa?" 
Job19:23 Ha! Akadalembedwa mau anga! Ha! Akadalembedwa m'buku! 
Job19:24 Akadawazokota pathanthwe chikhalire, ndi chozokotera chachitsulo ndi kuthira ntovu!" 
Job19:25 Koma ndidziwa kuti Mombolo wanga ali ndi moyo, nadzauka potsiriza pafumbi." 
Job19:26 Ndipo khungu langa litaonongeka, pamenepo wopanda thupi langa, ndidzapenya Mulungu," 
Job19:27 amene ndidzampenya ndekha, ndi maso anga adzamuona, si wina ai. Imso zanga zatha m'kati mwanga." 
Job19:28 Mukati, Tiyeni timlondole! Popeza chifukwa cha mlandu chapezeka mwa ine;" 
Job19:29 muchite nalo mantha lupanga; pakuti mkwiyo utenga zolakwa za lupanga, kuti mudziwe pali chiweruzo." 
Job20:1 Pamenepo anayankha Zofari Mnaama, nati," 
Job20:2 M'mwemo zolingirira zanga zindiyankha, chifukwa chake ndifulumidwa m'kati mwanga." 
Job20:3 Ndamva kudzudzula kwakundichititsa manyazi, ndi mzimu wa nzeru yanga undiyankha." 
Job20:4 Kodi suchidziwa ichi chiyambire kale lomwe, nuyambira anaika munthu pa dziko lapansi," 
Job20:5 kuti kufuula kokondwera kwa woipa sikukhalira kutha, ndi chimwemwe cha wonyoza Mulungu chikhala kamphindi?" 
Job20:6 Chinkana ukulu wake ukwera kunka kuthambo, nugunda pamitambo mutu wake;" 
Job20:7 koma adzatayika kosatha ngati zonyansa zake; iwo amene adamuona adzati, Ali kuti iye?" 
Job20:8 Adzauluka ngati loto, osapezekanso; nadzaingidwa ngati masomphenya a usiku." 
Job20:9 Diso lidamuonalo silidzamuonanso; ndi malo ake sadzampenyanso. 
Job20:10 Ana ake adzapempha aumphawi awakomere mtima; ndi manja ake adzabweza chuma chake. 
Job20:11 Mafupa ake adzala nao unyamata wake, koma udzagona naye pansi m'fumbi." 
Job20:12 Chinkana choipa chizuna m'kamwa mwake, chinkana achibisa pansi pa lilime lake;" 
Job20:13 chinkana achisunga, osachileka, nachikhalitsa m'kamwa mwake;" 
Job20:14 koma chakudya chake chidzasandulika m'matumbo mwake, chidzakhala ndulu ya mphiri m'kati mwake." 
Job20:15 Anachimeza chuma koma adzachisanzanso; Mulungu adzachitulutsa m'mimba mwake. 
Job20:16 Adzayamwa ndulu ya mphiri; pakamwa pa njoka padzamupha. 
Job20:17 Sadzapenyerera timitsinje, toyenda nao uchi ndi mafuta." 
Job20:18 Chimene adagwiriracho ntchito, adzachibweza, osachimeza; sadzakondwera monga mwa zolemera zake adaziona." 
Job20:19 Pakuti anapsinja, nasiya aumphawi; analanda nyumba mwachiwawa, imene sanaimange." 
Job20:20 Popeza sanadziwe kupumula m'kati mwake, sadzalanditsa kanthu ka zofunika zake." 
Job20:21 Sikunatsalira kanthu kosadya iye, chifukwa chake zokoma zake sizidzakhalitsa." 
Job20:22 Pomkwanira kudzala kwake adzakhala m'kusauka; dzanja la yense wovutika lidzamgwera. 
Job20:23 Poti adzaze mimba yake, Mulungu adzamponyera mkwiyo wake waukali, nadzamvumbitsira uwu pakudya iye." 
Job20:24 Adzathawa chida chachitsulo, ndi muvi wa uta wamkuwa udzampyoza." 
Job20:25 Auzula, nutuluka m'thupi mwake; inde nsonga yonyezimira ituluka m'ndulu mwake; zamgwera zoopsa." 
Job20:26 Zamdima zonse zimsungikira zikhale chuma chake, moto wosaukoleza munthu udzampsereza; udzatha wotsalira m'hema mwake." 
Job20:27 M'mwamba mudzavumbulutsa mphulupulu yake, ndi dziko lapansi lidzamuukira." 
Job20:28 Phindu la m'nyumba mwake lidzachoka, akatundu ake adzamthawa tsiku la mkwiyo wake." 
Job20:29 Ili ndi gawo la munthu woipa, lochokera kwa Mulungu, ndi cholowa amuikiratu Mulungu." 
Job21:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job21:2 Mvetsetsani mau anga; ndi ichi chikhale chitonthozo chanu. 
Job21:3 Mundilole, ndinene nanenso; ndipo nditanena ine, sekani." 
Job21:4 Kodi ine, kudandaula kwanga, ndidandaulira munthu? Ndipo ndilekerenji kupsa mtima?" 
Job21:5 Ndiyang'anireni, nimusumwe, gwirani pakamwa panu." 
Job21:6 Ndikangokumbukira ndivutika mtima, ndi thupi langa lichita nyaunyau." 
Job21:7 Oipa akhaliranji ndi moyo, nakalamba, nalemera kwakukulu?" 
Job21:8 Mbeu zao zikhazikika pamodzi nao pankhope pao, ndi ana ao pamaso pao." 
Job21:9 Nyumba zao sizitekeseka ndi mantha, ngakhale ndodo ya Mulungu siiwakhalira." 
Job21:10 Ng'ombe yao yamphongo imakwera, yosakanika; ng'ombe yao yaikazi imaswa, yosapoloza." 
Job21:11 Atulutsa makanda ao ngati gulu, ndi ana ao amavinavina." 
Job21:12 Aimbira lingaka ndi zeze, nakondwera pomveka chitoliro." 
Job21:13 Atsekereza masiku ao ndi zokoma, natsikira m'kamphindi kumanda." 
Job21:14 Koma adati kwa Mulungu, Tichokereni; pakuti sitifuna kudziwa njira zanu." 
Job21:15 Wamphamvuyonse ndiye yani kuti timtumikire? Ndipo tidzapindulanji pakumpemphera Iye? 
Job21:16 Taonani, zokoma zao sizili m'dzanja lao; (koma uphungu wa oipa unditalikira.)" 
Job21:17 Ngati nyali za oipa zizimidwa kawirikawiri? Ngati tsoka lao liwagwera? Ngati Mulungu awagawira zowawa mu mkwiyo wake? 
Job21:18 Ngati akunga ziputu zomka ndi mphepo, ngati mungu wouluzika ndi nkuntho?" 
Job21:19 Mukuti, Mulungu asungira ana ake a munthu choipa chake, ambwezere munthuyo kuti achidziwe." 
Job21:20 Aone yekha chionongeko chake m'maso mwake, namwe mkwiyo wa Wamphamvuyonse." 
Job21:21 Pakuti chomsamalitsa nyumba yake nchiyani, atapita iye, chiwerengo cha miyezi yake chitadulidwa pakati?" 
Job21:22 Ngati pali munthu wakumphunzitsa Mulungu nzeru? Popeza Iye aweruza mlandu iwo okwezeka. 
Job21:23 Wina akufa, wabiriwiri, ali chikhalire ndi chipumulire." 
Job21:24 Mbale zake zidzala ndi mkaka; ndi wongo wa m'mafupa ake uli momwe. 
Job21:25 Koma mnzake akufa ali nao mtima wakuwawa, osalawa chokoma konse." 
Job21:26 Iwo agona chimodzimodzi kufumbi, ndi mphutsi ziwakuta." 
Job21:27 Taonani, ndidziwa maganizo anu, ndi chiwembu mundilingirira moipa." 
Job21:28 Pakuti munena, Ili kuti nyumba ya kalonga? Ndi hema wokhalamo woipa ali kuti?" 
Job21:29 Simunawafunsa kodi opita m'njira? Ndipo simusamalira zotsimikiza zao? 
Job21:30 Zakuti munthu woipa asungika tsiku la tsoka? Natulutsidwa tsiku la mkwiyo? 
Job21:31 Adzamfotokozera ndani njira yake pamaso pake? Nadzamlipitsa ndani pa ichi anachichita? 
Job21:32 Potsiriza pake adzapita naye kumanda, nadzadikira pamanda pake." 
Job21:33 Zibuma za kuchigwa zidzamkomera. Adzakoka anthu onse amtsate, monga anamtsogolera osawerengeka." 
Job21:34 Potero munditonthozeranji nazo zopanda pake, popeza m'mayankho mwanu mutsala mabodza okha?" 
Job22:1 Pamenepo Elifazi wa ku Temani anayankha, nati," 
Job22:2 Kodi munthu apindulira Mulungu? Koma wanzeru angodzipindulira yekha. 
Job22:3 Kodi Wamphamvuyonse akondwera nako kuti iwe ndiwe wolungama? Kapena kodi apindula nako kuti ukwaniritsa njira zako? 
Job22:4 Kodi akudzudzula, nadza nawe kumlandu, chifukwa cha kumuopa kwako?" 
Job22:5 Zoipa zako sizichuluka kodi? Ndi mphulupulu zako sizikhala zosawerengeka kodi? 
Job22:6 Pakuti wamtenga chikole kwa mbale wako wopanda chifukwa, ndi kuvula ausiwa zovala zao." 
Job22:7 Sunampatsa wolema madzi amwe, ndi wanjala unammana chakudya." 
Job22:8 Koma munthu mwini mphamvu, dziko ndi lake; ndi munthu wovomerezeka, anakhala momwemo." 
Job22:9 Unabweza akazi amasiye osawaninkha kanthu, ndi manja a ana amasiye anathyoledwa." 
Job22:10 Chifukwa chake misampha ikuzinga. Ndi mantha akuvuta modzidzimutsa," 
Job22:11 kapena mdima kuti ungaone, ndi madzi aunyinji akumiza." 
Job22:12 Kodi Mulungu sakhala m'mwamba m'tali? Ndipo penyani kutalika kwake kwa nyenyezi, zili m'talitali." 
Job22:13 Ndipo ukuti, Adziwa chiyani Mulungu? Aweruza kodi mwa mdima wa bii?" 
Job22:14 Mitambo ndiyo chomphimba, kuti angaone; ndipo amayenda pa thambo lakumwamba." 
Job22:15 Udzasunga kodi njira yakale, anaiponda anthu amphulupulu?" 
Job22:16 Amene anakwatulidwa isanafike nyengo yao, chigumula chinakokolola kuzika kwao;" 
Job22:17 amene anati kwa Mulungu, Tichokereni; ndipo, Angatichitire chiyani Wamphamvuyonse?" 
Job22:18 Angakhale Iye adadzaza nyumba zao ndi zabwino; koma uphungu wa oipa unditalikira. 
Job22:19 Olungama achiona nakondwera; ndi osalakwa awaseka pwepwete," 
Job22:20 ndi kuti, Zoonadi, otiukirawo alikhidwa, ndi zowatsalira, moto unazipsereza." 
Job22:21 Uzolowerane ndi Iye, nukhale ndi mtendere; ukatero zokoma zidzakudzera." 
Job22:22 Landira tsono chilamulo pakamwa pake, nuwasunge maneno ake mumtima mwako." 
Job22:23 Ukabweranso kwa Wamphamvuyonse, udzamanga bwino; ukachotsera chosalungama kutali kwa mahema ako." 
Job22:24 Ndipo utaye chuma chako kufumbi, ndi golide wa ku Ofiri ku miyala ya kumitsinje." 
Job22:25 Ndipo Wamphamvuyonse adzakhala chuma chako, ndi ndalama zako zofunika." 
Job22:26 Pakuti pamenepo udzakondwera naye Wamphamvuyonse, ndi kuweramutsa nkhope yako kwa Mulungu." 
Job22:27 Udzampemphera ndipo adzakumvera; nudzatsiriza zowinda zako. 
Job22:28 Ukatsimikiza mtima kakuti, kadzakhazikikira iwe; ndi kuunika kudzawala pa njira zako." 
Job22:29 Anthu akakugwetsa pansi, udzati, Adzandikweza; ndipo adzapulumutsa wodzichepetsayo." 
Job22:30 Adzamasula ngakhale wopalamula, inde adzamasuka mwa kuyera kwa manja ako." 
Job23:1 Koma Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job23:2 Lero lomwe kudandaula kwanga kumawawa; kulanga kwanga kuposa kubuula kwanga m'kulemera kwake. 
Job23:3 Ha! Ndikadadziwa kumene ndikampeza Mulungu, kuti ndifike kumpando wake!" 
Job23:4 Ndikadalongosola mlandu wanga pamaso pake, ndikadadzaza m'kamwa mwanga ndi matsutsano." 
Job23:5 Ndikadadziwa mau akadandiyankha ine, ndikadazindikira chimene akadanena nane." 
Job23:6 Akadatsutsana nane kodi mwa mphamvu yake yaikulu? Iai, koma akadanditcherera khutu." 
Job23:7 Apo woongoka mtima akadatsutsana naye; ndipo ndikadapulumuka chipulumukire kwa Woweruza wanga. 
Job23:8 Taonani, ndikamka m'tsogolo, kulibe Iye; kapena m'mbuyo sindimzindikira;" 
Job23:9 akachita Iye kulamanzere, sindimpenyerera; akabisala kulamanja, sindimuona." 
Job23:10 Koma adziwa njira ndilowayi; atandiyesa ndidzatuluka ngati golide. 
Job23:11 Phazi langa lagwiratu moponda Iye, ndasunga njira yake, wosapatukamo." 
Job23:12 Sindinabwerera kusiya malamulo a pa milomo yake; ndasungitsa mau a pakamwa pake koposa lamulo langalanga. 
Job23:13 Koma Iye ndiye wa mtima umodzi, adzambweza ndani? Ndi ichi chimene moyo wake uchifuna achichita." 
Job23:14 Pakuti adzachita chondiikidwiratu; ndipo zambiri zotere zili ndi Iye. 
Job23:15 Chifukwa chake ndiopsedwa pankhope pake; ndikalingirira, ndichita mantha ndi Iye." 
Job23:16 Pakuti Mulungu walefula mtima wanga, ndi Wamphamvuyonse wandiopsa." 
Job23:17 Popeza sindinalikhidwa usanafike mdimawo, ndipo sanandiphimbire nkhope yanga ndi mdima wa bii." 
Job24:1 Wamphamvuyonse alekeranji kuikiratu nyengo? Ndi iwo omdziwa alekeranji kudziwa masiku ake? 
Job24:2 Alipo akusendeza malire; alanda gulu la zoweta, nazidyetsa." 
Job24:3 Akankhizira kwao bulu wa amasiye, atenga ng'ombe ya mfedwa ikhale chikole." 
Job24:4 Apatukitsa aumphawi m'njira; osauka a padziko abisala pamodzi. 
Job24:5 Taonani, ngati mbidzi za m'chipululu atulukira kuntchito zao, nalawirira nkufuna chakudya; chipululu chiwaonetsera chakudya cha ana ao." 
Job24:6 Atema dzinthu zao m'munda; natola khunkha m'munda wampesa wa woipa. 
Job24:7 Agona amaliseche usiku wonse opanda chovala, alibe chofunda pachisanu." 
Job24:8 Avumbwa ndi mvula kumapiri, nafukata thanthwe posowa pousapo." 
Job24:9 Akwatula wamasiye kubere, natenga chikole chovala cha osauka;" 
Job24:10 momwemo ayenda amaliseche opanda chovala, nasenza mtolo wa dzinthu ali ndi njala." 
Job24:11 M'kati mwa malinga a iwo aja ayenga mafuta; aponda mphesa moponderamo, namva ludzu." 
Job24:12 M'mudzi waukulu anthu abuula alinkufa; ndi moyo wa iwo olasidwa ufuula; koma Mulungu sasamalira choipacho. 
Job24:13 Iwo ndiwo amene apikisana nako kuunika, sadziwa njira zake, Sasunga mayendedwe ake." 
Job24:14 Kukacha auka wambanda, napha wosauka ndi waumphawi; ndi usiku asanduka mbala." 
Job24:15 Ndipo diso la wachigololo liyembekezera chisisira, ndi kuti, Palibe diso lidzandiona; navala chophimba pankhope pake." 
Job24:16 Kuli mdima aboola nyumba, usana adzitsekera, osadziwa kuunika." 
Job24:17 Pakuti iwo onse auyesa m'mawa mthunzi wa imfa; pakuti adziwa zoopsa za mthunzi wa imfa. 
Job24:18 Atengedwa ngati choyandama pamadzi; gawo lao litembereredwa padziko; sadzalunjikanso njira ya minda yamphesa. 
Job24:19 Chilala ndi dzuwa zitha madzi a chipale chofewa, momwemo manda achita nao ochimwa." 
Job24:20 M'mimba mudzamuiwala; mphutsi zidzamudya mokondwera. Sadzamkumbukiranso; ndipo chosalungama chidzathyoledwa ngati mtengo. 
Job24:21 Alusira chumba wosabala, osamchitira wamasiye chokoma." 
Job24:22 Mulungu awakhalitsa amphamvu mwa mphamvu yake; iwo aukanso m'mene anayesa kuti sadzakhala ndi moyo. 
Job24:23 Awalola akhale osatekeseka, ndipo alimbikapo; koma maso ake ali pa njira zao." 
Job24:24 Akwezeka; m'kamphindi kuli zii; inde atsitsidwa, achotsedwa monga onse ena, adulidwa ngati tirigu ngala zake." 
Job24:25 Ndipo ngati si kutero, anditsutsa ndani kuti ndili wabodza, ndi kuyesa mau anga opanda pake?" 
Job25:1 Pamenepo Bilidadi wa ku Suki anayankha, nati," 
Job25:2 Kulamulira ndi kuopsa kuli ndi Iye; achita mtendere pa zam'mwamba zake. 
Job25:3 Ngati awerengedwa makamu ake? Ndipo ndaniyo, kuunika kwake sikumtulukira?" 
Job25:4 Potero munthu akhala bwanji wolungama kwa Mulungu? Kapena wobadwa ndi mkazi akhala woyera bwanji? 
Job25:5 Taonani, ngakhale mwezi ulibe kuwala; ndi nyenyezi siziyera pamaso pake;" 
Job25:6 kopambana kotani nanga munthu, ndiye mphutsi! Ndi wobadwa ndi munthu, ndiye nyongolotsi!" 
Job26:1 Koma Yobu anayankha, nati," 
Job26:2 Wamthandiza bwanji wopanda mphamvu. Kulipulumutsa dzanja losalimba! 
Job26:3 Wampangira bwanji wopanda nzeruyu! Ndi kudziwitsa nzeru zenizeni mochuluka! 
Job26:4 Wafotokozera yani mau? Ndi mzimu wa yani unatuluka mwa iwe? 
Job26:5 Adafawo anjenjemera pansi pa madzi ndi zokhalamo. 
Job26:6 Kumanda kuli padagu pamaso pake, ndi kuchionongeko kusowa chophimbako." 
Job26:7 Ayala kumpoto popanda kanthu, nalenjeka dziko pachabe." 
Job26:8 Amanga madzi m'mitambo yake yochindikira; ndi mtambo sung'ambika pansi pake. 
Job26:9 Atchingira pa mpando wake wachifumu, nayalapo mtambo wake." 
Job26:10 Analembera madziwo malire, mpaka polekeza kuunika ndi mdima." 
Job26:11 Mizati ya thambo injenjemera, ndi kudabwa pa kudzudzula kwake." 
Job26:12 Mwa mphamvu yake agwetsa nyanja bata; ndipo mwa luntha lake akantha kudzikuza kwake. 
Job26:13 Mwa mzimu wake anyezimiritsa thambo; dzanja lake linapyoza njoka yothawayo. 
Job26:14 Taonani, awa ndi malekezero a njira zake; ndi chimene tikumva za Iye ndi chinong'onezo chaching'ono; koma kugunda kwa mphamvu yake akudzindikiritsa ndani?" 
Job27:1 Ndipo Yobu anaonjezanso mwambi wake, nati," 
Job27:2 Pali Mulungu, amene anandichotsera zoyenera ine, ndi Wamphamvuyonse, amene anawawitsa moyo wanga," 
Job27:3 pakuti moyo wanga wonse ukali mwa ine, ndi mpweya wa Mulungu m'mphuno mwanga;" 
Job27:4 milomo yanga siilankhula chosalungama, ndi lilime langa silitchula zachinyengo." 
Job27:5 Sindivomereza konse kuti muli olungama; mpaka kufa ine sinditaya ungwiro wanga. 
Job27:6 Ndiumirira chilungamo changa, osachileka; chikhalire moyo ine, mtima wanga sunditonza." 
Job27:7 Mdani wanga akhale ngati woipa, ndi iye amene andiukira ngati wosalungama." 
Job27:8 Pakuti chiyembekezo cha wonyoza Mulungu nchiyani pomlikhatu Mulungu, pomchotsera moyo wake?" 
Job27:9 Kodi Mulungu adzamvera kufuula kwake, ikamdzera nsautso?" 
Job27:10 Kodi adzadzikondweretsa naye Wamphamvuyonse, ndi kuitana kwa Mulungu nthawi zonse?" 
Job27:11 Ndidzakulangizani za dzanja la Mulungu; chokhala ndi Wamphamvuyonse sindidzachibisa. 
Job27:12 Taonani, inu nonse munachiona; ndipo mugwidwa nazo zopanda pake chifukwa ninji?" 
Job27:13 Ili ndi gawo la munthu woipa kwa Mulungu, ndi cholowa cha akupsinja anzao achilandira kwa Wamphamvuyonse." 
Job27:14 Akachuluka ana ake, ndiko kuchulukira lupanga, ndi ana ake sadzakhuta chakudya." 
Job27:15 Akumtsalira iye adzaikidwa muimfa, ndi akazi ake amasiye sadzalira maliro." 
Job27:16 Chinkana akundika ndalama ngati fumbi, ndi kukonzeratu zovala ngati dothi;" 
Job27:17 azikonzeretu, koma wolungama adzazivala, ndi wosalakwa adzagawa ndalamazo." 
Job27:18 Amanga nyumba yake ngati kangaude, ndi ngati wolindira amanga dindiro." 
Job27:19 Agona pansi ali wachuma, koma saikidwa; potsegula maso ake, wafa chikomo." 
Job27:20 Zoopsa zimgwera ngati madzi; nkhuntho umtenga usiku.
