Job27:21 Mphepo ya kum'mawa imtenga, nachoka iye; nimkankha achoke m'malo mwake." 
Job27:22 Pakuti Mulungu adzamponyera zoopsa, osamleka; kuthawa akadathawa m'dzanja lake." 
Job27:23 Anthu adzamuombera manja, nadzamuimbira mluzu achoke m'malo mwake." 
Job28:1 Koma kuli mtapo wa siliva, ndi malo a golide amene amuyenga." 
Job28:2 Chitsulo achitenga m'nthaka, ndi mkuwa ausungunula kumwala." 
Job28:3 Munthu athawitsa mdima, nafunafuna mpaka malekezero onse, miyala ya mdima wa bii ndi ya mthunzi wa imfa." 
Job28:4 Aboola mgodi posiyana patali pokhala anthu; aiwalika ndi phazi lopitapo; apachikika kutali ndi anthu, nalendewalendewa." 
Job28:5 Kunena za nthaka, kuchokera momwemo mumatuluka chakudya, ndi m'munsi mwake musandulizika ngati ndi moto." 
Job28:6 Miyala yake ndiyo malo a safiro, ndipo ili nalo fumbi lagolide." 
Job28:7 Njira imeneyi palibe chiombankhanga chiidziwa; lingakhale diso la kabawi losapenyapo. 
Job28:8 Nyama zodzikuza sizinapondapo, ngakhale mkango waukali sunapitapo." 
Job28:9 Munthu atambasulira dzanja lake kumwala; agubuduza mapiri kuyambira kumizu. 
Job28:10 Asema njira pakati pa matanthwe, ndi diso lake liona chilichonse cha mtengo wake." 
Job28:11 Atseka mitsinje ingadonthe; natulutsira poyera chobisikachi. 
Job28:12 Koma nzeru, idzapezeka kuti? Ndi luntha, malo ake ali kuti?" 
Job28:13 Munthu sadziwa mtengo wake; ndipo silipezeka m'dziko la amoyo. 
Job28:14 Pozama pakuti, Mwa ine mulibe; ndi nyanja ikuti, Kwa ine kulibe." 
Job28:15 Silipezeka ndi golide, sayesapo siliva mtengo wake." 
Job28:16 Sailinganiza ndi golide wa Ofiri, ndi sohamu wa mtengo wake wapatali kapena safiro." 
Job28:17 Golide ndi krustalo sizilingana nayo; ndi kusinthana kwake, siisinthanika ndi zisambiro za golide woyengetsa." 
Job28:18 Korali kapena ngale sizikumbukikapo. Mtengo wake wa nzeru uposa wa korali wofiira. 
Job28:19 Topazi wa Kusi sufanana nayo, sailinganiza ndi golide wolongosoka." 
Job28:20 Koma nzeru ifuma kuti? Ndi luntha, pokhala pake pali kuti?" 
Job28:21 Popeza pabisikira maso a zamoyo zonse, pabisikiranso mbalame za m'mlengalenga." 
Job28:22 Chionongeko ndi Imfa zikuti, Tamva mbiri yake m'makutu mwathu." 
Job28:23 Mulungu ndiye azindikira njira yake, ndiye adziwa pokhala pake." 
Job28:24 Pakuti apenyerera malekezero a dziko lapansi, naona pansi pa thambo ponse;" 
Job28:25 pamene anaikira mphepo muyeso wake, nayesera madzi miyeso;" 
Job28:26 pakuchitira mvula lamulo, ndi njira yoyendamo mphezi ya bingu;" 
Job28:27 pamenepo anaiona nzeru, naifotokozera; anaikonza, naisanthula." 
Job28:28 Koma kwa munthu anati, Taonani, kuopa Ambuye ndiko nzeru; ndi kupatukana nacho choipa ndiko luntha." 
Job29:1 Ndipo Yobu anaonjezanso mwambi wake, nati," 
Job29:2 Ha! Ndikadakhala monga m'miyezi yapitayi, monga m'masiku akundisunga Mulungu;" 
Job29:3 muja nyali yake inawala pamutu panga, ndipo ndi kuunika kwake ndinayenda mumdima;" 
Job29:4 monga umo ndinakhala m'masiku anga olimba, muja uphungu wa Mulungu unakhala pahema panga." 
Job29:5 Muja Wamphamvuyonse akali nane pamodzi, ndi ana anga anandizinga;" 
Job29:6 muja popondera ine padakhatamira ndi mafuta amkaka, ndi thanthwe linanditsanulira mitsinje ya mafuta a azitona!" 
Job29:7 Muja ndinatuluka kunka kuchipata kumudzi, muja ndinakonza pokhala panga kukhwalala," 
Job29:8 anyamata anandiona nabisala, okalamba anandinyamukira, nakhala chilili." 
Job29:9 Akalonga anadziletsa kulankhula, ndi kugwira pakamwa pao;" 
Job29:10 mau a omveka anali zii, ndi lilime lao linamamatira kumalakalaka ao." 
Job29:11 Pakuti pondimva ine khutu, linandidalitsa; ndipo pondiona diso, linandichitira umboni." 
Job29:12 Pakuti ndinapulumutsa wozunzika wakufuula; mwana wamasiye yemwe wosowa mthandizi. 
Job29:13 Dalitso la iye akati atayike linandidzera, ndi mtima wa mkazi wamasiye ndinauimbitsa mokondwera." 
Job29:14 Ndinavala chilungamo, ndipo chinandivala ine; chiweruzo changa chinanga mwinjiro ndi nduwira." 
Job29:15 Ndinali maso a akhungu, ndi mapazi a otsimphina." 
Job29:16 Ndinali atate wa waumphawi; ndi mlandu wa iye amene sindinamdziwa ndinafunsitsa. 
Job29:17 Ndipo ndinathyola nsagwada ya wosalungama, ndi kukwatula chogwidwa kumano kwake." 
Job29:18 Pamenepo ndinati, Ndidzatsirizika m'chisa changa; ndipo ndidzachulukitsa masiku anga ngati mchenga." 
Job29:19 Muzu wanga watambalala kufikira kumadzi; ndi mame adzakhala pa nthambi yanga usiku wonse. 
Job29:20 Ulemu wanga udzakhala wosaguga mwa ine, ndi uta wanga udzakhala wosalifuka m'dzanja mwanga." 
Job29:21 Anthu anandimvera, nalindira, nakhala chete, kuti ndiwapangire." 
Job29:22 Nditanena mau anga sanalankhulenso, ndi kunena kwanga kunawakhera." 
Job29:23 Anandilindira ngati kulindira mvula, nayasama pakamwa pao ngati kulira mvula ya masika." 
Job29:24 Ndinawaseka akapanda kulimbika mtima; ndipo sanagwetse kusangalala kwa nkhope yanga. 
Job29:25 Ndinawasankhira njira yao ndi kukhala mkulu wao. Ndinakhala ngati mfumu mwa ankhondo ake, ngati wotonthoza ofedwa." 
Job30:1 Koma tsopano iwo osafikana msinkhu wanga andiseka, iwo amene atate ao ndikadawapeputsa, osawaika pamodzi ndi agalu olinda nkhosa zanga." 
Job30:2 Mphamvunso ya m'manja mwao ndikadapindulanji nayo? Ndiwo anthu amene unyamata wao udatha," 
Job30:3 atsala mafupa okhaokha ndi kusowa ndi njala; akungudza nthaka youma kuli mdima wa m'chipululu chopasuka. 
Job30:4 Atchera therere lokolera kuzitsamba, ndi chakudya chao ndicho mizu ya dinde." 
Job30:5 Anawapirikitsa pakati pa anthu, awafuulira ngati kutsata mbala." 
Job30:6 Azikhala m'zigwa za chizirezire, m'maenje a m'nthaka ndi m'mapanga." 
Job30:7 Pakati pa zitsamba alira ngati bulu, pansi pa khwisa asonkhana pamodzi." 
Job30:8 Ndiwo ana a opusa, inde ana a anthu opanda dzina; anawaingitsa kuwachotsa m'dziko." 
Job30:9 Koma tsopano ndasanduka nyimbo ya oterewo, nandiyesa nthanthi." 
Job30:10 Anyansidwa nane, akhala patali ndi ine, saleka kuthira malovu pankhope panga." 
Job30:11 Pakuti anamasula nsinga zao, nandizunza; anataya chomangira m'kamwa mwao pamaso panga." 
Job30:12 Kudzanja langa lamanja anauka oluluka, akankha mapazi anga, andiundira njira zao zakundiononga." 
Job30:13 Aipsa njira yanga, athandizana ndi tsoka langa; ndiwo anthu omwewo osowa mthandizi." 
Job30:14 Akudza ngati opitira pogamuka linga papakulu, pakati pa zopasuka adzigubuduza kundidzera ine." 
Job30:15 Anditembenuzira zondiopsa, auluza ulemu wanga ngati mphepo; ndi zosungika zanga zapita ngati mtambo." 
Job30:16 Ndipo tsopano moyo wanga udzitsanulira m'kati mwanga; masiku akuzunza andigwira. 
Job30:17 Nyengo ya usiku mafupa anga awaza mwa ine, ndi zowawa zondikungudza sizipuma." 
Job30:18 Mwa mphamvu yaikulu ya nthenda yanga chovala changa chinasandulika, chindithina ngati pakhosi pa malaya anga." 
Job30:19 Iye anandiponya m'matope, ndipo ndafanana ndi fumbi ndi phulusa." 
Job30:20 Ndifuula kwa Inu, koma simundiyankha; ndinyamuka, ndipo mungondipenyerera." 
Job30:21 Mwasandulika kundichitira nkharwe; ndi mphamvu ya dzanja lanu mundizunza. 
Job30:22 Mundikweza kumphepo, mundiyendetsa pomwepo; ndipo mundisungunula mumkuntho." 
Job30:23 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti mudzandifikitsa kuimfa, ndi kunyumba yokomanamo amoyo onse." 
Job30:24 Koma munthu akati agwe, satambasula dzanja lake kodi? Akati aonongeke, safuulako kodi?" 
Job30:25 Kodi sindinamlirira misozi wakulawa zowawa? Kodi moyo wanga sunachitira chisoni osowa? 
Job30:26 Muja ndinayembekeza chokoma chinadza choipa, ndipo polindira kuunika unadza mdima." 
Job30:27 M'kati mwanga mupweteka mosapuma, masiku a mazunzo andidzera." 
Job30:28 Ndiyenda ndili wothimbirira osati ndi dzuwa ai; ndinyamuka mumsonkhano ndi kufuula. 
Job30:29 Ndili mbale wao wa ankhandwe, ndi mnansi wao wa nthiwatiwa." 
Job30:30 Khungu langa lada, nilindifundukira; ndi mafupa anga awawa ndi kutentha kwao." 
Job30:31 Chifukwa chake zeze wanga wasandulika wa maliro, ndi chitoliro changa cha mau a olira misozi." 
Job31:1 Ndinapangana ndi maso anga, potero ndipenyerenji namwali?" 
Job31:2 Pakuti gawo la Mulungu lochokera kumwamba, ndi cholowa cha Wamphamvuyonse chochokera m'mwambamo nchiyani?" 
Job31:3 Si ndizo chionongeko cha wosalungama, ndi tsoka la ochita mphulupulu?" 
Job31:4 Nanga sapenya njira zanga, ndi kuwerenga moponda mwanga monse?" 
Job31:5 Ngati ndinayanjana nalo bodza, ndi phazi langa linathamangira chinyengo;" 
Job31:6 andiyese ndi muyeso wolingana, kuti Mulungu adziwe ungwiro wanga." 
Job31:7 Ngati phazi langa linapatuka m'njira, ndi mtima wanga unatsata maso anga? Ngati chilema chamamatira manja anga?" 
Job31:8 Ndibzale ine nadye wina, ndi zondimerera ine zizulidwe." 
Job31:9 Ngati mtima wanga wakopeka ndi mkazi, ngati ndalalira pa khomo la mnzanga," 
Job31:10 mkazi wanga aperere wina; wina namuike kumbuyo. 
Job31:11 Pakuti icho ndi choipitsitsa, ndicho mphulupulu yoyenera oweruza anene mlandu wake." 
Job31:12 Pakuti ndicho moto wakunyeka mpaka chionongeko, ndi chakuzula zipatso zanga zonse." 
Job31:13 Ngati ndapeputsa mlandu wa kapolo wanga, kapena wa mdzakazi wanga, potsutsana nane iwo," 
Job31:14 ndidzatani ponyamuka Mulungu? Ndipo pondizonda Iye ndidzamnyankha chiyani? 
Job31:15 Kodi Iye amene anandilenga ine m'mimba sanamlenge iyenso? Sindiye mmodzi anatiumba m'mimba? 
Job31:16 Ngati ndakaniza aumphawi chifuniro chao, kapena kutopetsa maso a amasiye," 
Job31:17 kapena kudya nthongo yanga ndekha, osadyako mwana wamasiye;" 
Job31:18 (pakuti kuyambira ubwana wanga analeredwa ndi ine monga ndi atate; ndipo ndinakhala nkhoswe ya wamasiye chibadwire ine.) 
Job31:19 Ngati ndinaona wina alinkutayika wopanda chovala, kapena kuti wosowa alibe chofunda;" 
Job31:20 ngati ziuno zake sizinandiyamika, ngati sanafunde ubweya wa nkhosa zanga;" 
Job31:21 ngati ndinasamulira ana amasiye dzanja langa, popeza ndinaona thandizo langa kuchipata;" 
Job31:22 libanthuke phewa langa paphalo, ndi dzanja langa liduke pagwangwa." 
Job31:23 Pakuti tsoka lochokera kwa Mulungu linandiopsa, ndi chifukwa cha ukulu wake sindinakhoza kanthu." 
Job31:24 Ngati ndayesa golide chiyembekezo changa, ndi kunena ndi golide woyengetsa, ndiwe chikhazikitso changa;" 
Job31:25 ngati ndinakondwera popeza chuma changa nchachikulu, ndi dzanja langa lapeza zochuluka;" 
Job31:26 ngati ndalambira dzuwa lilikuwala, kapena mwezi ulikuyenda monyezimira;" 
Job31:27 ndi mtima wanga wakopeka m'tseri, ndi pakamwa panga padapsompsona dzanja langa;" 
Job31:28 ichinso ndi mphulupulu yoyenera oweruza kunena mlandu wake; pakuti ndikadakana Mulungu ali m'mwamba. 
Job31:29 Ngati ndakondwera nalo tsoka la wondida, kapena kudzitukula pompeza choipa;" 
Job31:30 ndithu sindinalola m'kamwa mwanga muchimwe, kupempha motemberera moyo wake." 
Job31:31 Ngati amuna a m'hema mwanga sanati, ndani adzapeza munthu wosakhuta nyama yomgawira Yobu?" 
Job31:32 Mlendo sakagona pakhwalala, koma ndinatsegulira wam'njira pakhomo panga." 
Job31:33 Ngati ndakwirira zolakwa zanga monga Adamu, ndi kubisa mphulupulu yanga m'chifuwa mwanga;" 
Job31:34 popeza ndinaopa unyinji waukulu, ndi chipepulo cha mafuko chinandiopsetsa; potero ndinakhala chete osatuluka pakhomo panga." 
Job31:35 Ha! Ndikadakhala naye wina wakundimvera, chizindikiro changa sichi, Wamphamvuyonse andiyankhe; mwenzi ntakhala nao mau akundineneza analemberawo mdani wanga!" 
Job31:36 Ndithu ndikadawasenza paphewa panga, ndi kudzimangirira awa ngati korona." 
Job31:37 Ndikadamfotokozera chiwerengo cha mopondamo mwanga, ndikadamsenderera Iye ngati kalonga." 
Job31:38 Ngati minda yanga ifuula monditsutsa, ndi nthumbira zake zilira pamodzi;" 
Job31:39 ngati ndadya zipatso zake wopanda ndalama. Kapena kutayitsa eni ake moyo wao; 
Job31:40 imere minga m'malo mwa tirigu, ndi dawi m'malo mwa barele. Mau a Yobu atha." 
Job32:1 Pamenepo amuna atatuwa analeka kumyankha Yobu; pakuti anali wolungama pamaso pake pa iye mwini. 
Job32:2 Ndipo adapsa mtima Elihu mwana wa Barakele wa ku Buzi, wa chibale cha Ramu, adapsa mtima pa Yobu; pakuti anadziyesera yekha wolungama, wosati Mulungu." 
Job32:3 Adapsa mtima pa mabwenzi ake atatu omwe, pakuti anasowa pomyankha; koma anamtsutsa Yobu kuti ali woipa." 
Job32:4 Ndipo Elihu analindira kulankhula ndi Yobu, popeza akulu misinkhu ndi iwowa." 
Job32:5 Koma pakuona Elihu kuti anthu atatuwa anasowa poyankha pakamwa pao anapsa mtima. 
Job32:6 Ndipo Elihu mwana wa Barakele wa ku Buzi anayankha, nati, Ine ndine mnyamata, inu ndinu okalamba; chifukwa chake ndinadziletsa, ndi kuopa kukuonetsani monga umo ndayesera ine." 
Job32:7 Ndinati, Amisinkhu anene, ndi a zaka zochuluka alangize nzeru." 
Job32:8 Koma m'munthu muli mzimu, ndi mpweya wa Wamphamvuyonse wawazindikiritsa." 
Job32:9 Akulu sindiwo eni nzeru, ndi okalamba sindiwo ozindikira chiweruzo." 
Job32:10 Chifukwa chake ndinati, Ndimvereni ine, inenso ndidzaonetsa monga umo ndayesera ine." 
Job32:11 Taonani, ndinalindira mau anu, ndinatcherera khutu zifukwa zanu, pofunafuna inu ponena." 
Job32:12 Inde ndinasamalira inu; koma taonani, panalibe womtsutsa Yobu, kapena wakumbwezera mau pakati pa inu." 
Job32:13 Msamati, Tapeza nzeru ndife, Mulungu akhoza kumkhulula, si munthu ai;" 
Job32:14 popeza sanandiponyere ine mau, sindidzamyankha ndi maneno anu." 
Job32:15 Asumwa, sayankhanso, Anawathera mau." 
Job32:16 Kodi ndidzangolindira popeza sanena iwo, popeza akhala duu osayankhanso?" 
Job32:17 Ndidzayankha inenso mau anga, ndidzaonetsa inenso za m'mtima mwanga." 
Job32:18 Pakuti ndadzazidwa ndi mau, ndi mzimu wa m'kati mwanga undifulumiza." 
Job32:19 Taonani, m'chifuwa mwanga muli ngati vinyo wosowa popungulira, ngati matumba atsopano akuti aphulike." 
Job32:20 Ndidzanena kuti chifundo chitsike; ndidzatsegula milomo yanga ndi kuyankha. 
Job32:21 Ndisati ndisamalire nkhope ya munthu, kapena kumtchula munthu maina omdyola nao;" 
Job32:22 pakuti sindidziwa kutchula maina osyasyalika; ndikatero Mlengi wanga adzandichotsa msanga. 
Job33:1 Komatu, Yobu, mumvere maneno anga, mutcherere khutu mau anga." 
Job33:2 Taonani tsono, ndatsegula pakamwa panga, lilime langa lanena m'kamwa mwanga." 
Job33:3 Maneno anga awulula chiongoko cha mtima wanga, ndi monga umo idziwira milomo yanga idzanena zoona." 
Job33:4 Mzimu wa Mulungu unandilenga, ndi mpweya wa Wamphamvuyonse umandipatsa moyo." 
Job33:5 Ngati mukhoza, mundiyankhe; mulongosolere mau anu pamaso panga, mukonzeke." 
Job33:6 Taonani, ndikhala kwa Mulungu ngati inu; inenso ndinaumbidwa ndi dothi." 
Job33:7 Taonani, kuopsa kwanga simudzachita nako mantha; ndi ichi ndikusenzetsani sichidzakulemererani." 
Job33:8 Zedi mwanena m'makutu mwanga, ndinamvanso mau a kunena kwanu, akuti," 
Job33:9 Ndine woyera ine, wopanda kulakwa, ndine wosapalamula, ndilibe mphulupulu." 
Job33:10 Taonani, Iye apeza zifukwa zoti anditsutse nazo, andiyesa mdani wake;" 
Job33:11 amanga mapazi anga m'zigologolo, ayang'anira poyenda ine ponse." 
Job33:12 Taonani, ndidzakuyankhani m'mene muli mosalungama; pakuti Mulungu ndiye wamkulu woposa munthu." 
Job33:13 Mutsutsana ndi Iye chifukwa ninji? Popeza pa zake zonse sawulula chifukwa. 
Job33:14 Pakuti Mulungu alankhula kamodzi, kapena kawiri, koma anthu sasamalira." 
Job33:15 M'kulota, m'masomphenya a usiku, pakuwagwera anthu tulo tatikulu, pogona mwatcheru pakama," 
Job33:16 pamenepo atsegula makutu a anthu, nakomera chizindikiro chilangizo chao;" 
Job33:17 kuti achotse munthu ku chimene akadachita, ndi kubisira munthu kudzikuza kwake;" 
Job33:18 kuti amletse angaonongeke, ndi moyo wake ungatayike ndi lupanga." 
Job33:19 Alangidwanso ndi zowawa pakama pake, ndi kulimbana kowawa kosapuma m'mafupa ake." 
Job33:20 M'mwemo mtima wake uchita mseru ndi mkate, ndi moyo wake pa chakudya cholongosoka." 
Job33:21 Mnofu wake udatha, kuti sungapenyeke; ndi mafupa ake akusaoneka atuluka." 
Job33:22 Inde wasendera kufupi kumanda, ndi moyo wake kwa akuononga." 
Job33:23 Akakhala kwa iye mthenga, womasulira mau mmodzi mwa chikwi, kuonetsera munthu chomuyenera;" 
Job33:24 pamenepo Mulungu amchitira chifundo, nati, Mlanditse, angatsikire kumanda, Ndampezera dipo." 
Job33:25 Mnofu wake udzakhala see, woposa wa mwana; adzabwerera kumasiku a ubwana wake." 
Job33:26 Apembedza Mulungu, ndipo amkomera mtima; m'mwemo aona nkhope yake mokondwera; ndipo ambwezera munthu chilungamo chake." 
Job33:27 Apenyerera anthu, ndi kuti, ndinachimwa, ndaipsa choongokacho, ndipo sindinapindula nako." 
Job33:28 Koma anandiombola ndingatsikire kumanda, ndi moyo wanga udzaona kuunika." 
Job33:29 Taona, izi zonse azichita Mulungu kawiri katatu ndi munthu," 
Job33:30 kumbweza angalowe kumanda, kuti kuunika kwa moyo kumuwalire." 
Job33:31 Tcherani khutu, Yobu, mundimvere ine; mukhale chete, ndipo ndidzanena ine." 
Job33:32 Ngati muli nao mau mundiyankhe. Nenani, pakuti ndifuna kukulungamitsani." 
Job33:33 Ngati mulibe mau, tamverani ine; mukhale chete, ndipo ndidzakuphunzitsani nzeru." 
Job34:1 Ndipo Elihu anabwereza kunena, nati," 
Job34:2 Tamverani mau anga, inu anzeru; munditcherere khutu inu akudziwa." 
Job34:3 Pakuti khutu liyesa mau, monga m'kamwa mulawa chakudya." 
Job34:4 Tidzisankhire choyeneracho, tidziwe mwa tokha chokomacho." 
Job34:5 Pakuti Yobu wanena, Ine ndine wolungama, ndipo Mulungu wandichotsera choyenera ine" 
Job34:6 Kodi ndidzinamizire? Bala langa nlosapola, ngakhale sindinalakwa." 
Job34:7 Wakunga Yobu ndani, wakumwa mwano ngati madzi?" 
Job34:8 Wakutsagana nao ochita mphulupulu, nayendayenda nao anthu oipa." 
Job34:9 Pakuti anati, Munthu sapindula kanthu nako kuvomerezana naye Mulungu." 
Job34:10 Chifukwa chake mundimvere ine, eni nzeru inu, nkutali ndi Mulungu kuchita choipa, ndi Wamphamvuyonse kuchita chosalungama." 
Job34:11 Pakuti ambwezera munthu monga mwa ntchito yake, napezetsa munthu aliyense monga mwa mayendedwe ake." 
Job34:12 Ndithu zoonadi, Mulungu sangachite choipa, ndi Wamphamvuyonse sangaipse mlandu." 
Job34:13 Anamuikiza dziko lapansi ndani? Kapena anakonzeratu dziko lonse lokhalamo anthu ndani? 
Job34:14 Akadzikumbukira yekha mumtima mwake, akadzisonkhanitsira yekha mzimu wake ndi mpweya wake," 
Job34:15 zamoyo zonse zidzatsirizika pamodzi, ndi munthu adzabwerera kufumbi." 
Job34:16 Ngati tsono uli nako kuzindikira, tamvera ichi, Tcherera khutu kunena kwanga." 
Job34:17 Kodi munthu woipidwa nacho chiweruzo adzalamulira? Ndipo kodi utsutsa wolungama ndi wamphamvuyo kuti ngwoipa? 
Job34:18 Kodi kuyenera kunena kwa mfumu, Wopanda pake iwe, kapena kwa akalonga, Oipa inu?" 
Job34:19 Nanga kwa Iye wosasamalira nkhope za akalonga, wosasiyanitsa pakati pa wolemera ndi wosauka? Pakuti onsewo ndiwo ntchito ya manja ake." 
Job34:20 M'kamphindi akufa, ngakhale pakati pa usiku, anthu agwedezeka, napita, amphamvu achotsedwa opanda dzanja lakuwachotsa." 
Job34:21 Pakuti maso ake ali pa njira ya munthu aliyense, napenya moponda mwake monse." 
Job34:22 Palibe mdima kapena mthunzi wa imfa, kuti ochita zopanda pake abisaleko." 
Job34:23 Pakuti Mulungu alibe chifukwa cha kulingiriranso za munthu, kuti afike kwa Iye kudzaweruzidwa." 
Job34:24 Aphwanya eni mphamvu osatulutsa kubwalo mlandu wao, naika ena m'malo mwao." 
Job34:25 Pakuti asamalira ntchito zao, nawagubuduza usiku kuti aphwanyike." 
Job34:26 Awakantha ngati oipa, poyera pamaso pa anthu," 
Job34:27 popeza anapatuka, naleka kumtsata, osasamalira njira zake zilizonse." 
Job34:28 M'mwemo anafikitsa kwa Iye kufuula kwa osauka; ndipo anamva Iye kufuula kwa ozunzika. 
Job34:29 Iye akapatsa mpumulo adzamtsutsa ndani? Akabisa nkhope yake adzampenyerera ndani? Chikachitika pa mtundu wa anthu, kapena pa munthu, nchimodzimodzi;" 
Job34:30 kuti munthu wonyoza Mulungu asachite ufumu, ndi anthu asakodwe mumsampha." 
Job34:31 Pakuti pali wina kodi anati kwa Mulungu, ndasenza kulanga kwanu, ndingakhale sindinalakwa?" 
Job34:32 Chimene sindichiona mundilangize ndi Inu, ngati ndachita chosalungama sindidzabwerezanso." 
Job34:33 Kodi chilango cha Mulungu chikhale monga muchifuna inu, pakuti muchikana? Musankhe ndi inu, ine ai; m'mwemo monga mudziwa, nenani." 
Job34:34 Anthu ozindikira adzanena nane, inde anthu anzeru onse akundimva adzati," 
Job34:35 Yobu alankhula wopanda kudziwa, ndi mau ake alibe nzeru." 
Job34:36 Mwenzi nayesedwe Yobu kufikira kutha, chifukwa cha kuyankha kwake monga anthu amphulupulu." 
Job34:37 Pakuti pa kuchimwa kwake aonjeza kupikisana ndi Mulungu, asansa manja pakati pa ife, nachulukitsa maneno ake pa Mulungu." 
Job35:1 Ndipo Elihu anabwereza kunena, nati," 
Job35:2 Kodi muchiyesa choyenera, umo mukuti, Chilungamo changa chiposa cha Mulungu," 
Job35:3 pakuti munena, Upindulanji nacho? Posachimwa ndinapindula chiyani chimene sindikadapindula pochimwa?" 
Job35:4 Ndidzakuyankhani, ndi anzanu pamodzi ndi inu." 
Job35:5 Yang'anani kumwamba, nimuone, tapenyani mitambo yokwera yakuposa inu." 
Job35:6 Ngati mwachimwa, mumchitira Iye chiyani? Zikachuluka zolakwa zanu, mumchitira Iye chiyani?" 
Job35:7 Mukakhala wolungama, mumninkhapo chiyani? Kapena alandira chiyani pa dzanja lanu?" 
Job35:8 Choipa chanu chikhoza kuipira munthu wonga inu, ndi chilungamo chanu chikhoza kukomera wobadwa ndi munthu." 
Job35:9 Chifukwa cha kuchuluka masautso anthu anafuula, afuula chifukwa cha dzanja la amphamvu." 
Job35:10 Koma palibe anganene, Ali kuti Mulungu Mlengi wanga, wakupatsa nyimbo usiku;" 
Job35:11 wakutilangiza ife koposa nyama za padziko, wakutipatsa nzeru zoposa mbalame za m'mlengalenga?" 
Job35:12 Apo afuula, koma Iye sawayankha; chifukwa cha kudzikuza kwa anthu oipa." 
Job35:13 Zedi Mulungu samvera zachabe, ndi Wamphamvuyonse sazisamalira." 
Job35:14 Inde mungakhale munena, Sindimpenya, mlanduwo uli pamaso pake, ndipo mumlindira." 
Job35:15 Ndipo tsopano popeza analibe kumzonda m'kukwiya kwake, ndi kusamalitsa cholakwa," 
Job35:16 chifukwa chake Yobu anatsegula pakamwa pake mwachabe, nachulukitsa mau opanda nzeru." 
Job36:1 Elihu anabwereza, nati," 
Job36:2 Mundilole pang'ono, ndidzakuuzani, pakuti ndili naonso mau akunenera Mulungu." 
Job36:3 Ndidzatenga nzeru zanga kutali, ndidzavomereza kuti Mlengi wanga ndi wolungama." 
Job36:4 Pakuti zoonadi, mau anga sali abodza, wakudziwitsa mwangwiro ali nanu." 
Job36:5 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye mwini mphamvu, ndipo sapeputsa munthu; mphamvu ya nzeru zake ndi yaikulu." 
Job36:6 Sasunga woipa akhale ndi moyo, koma awaninkha ozunzika zowayenera iwo." 
Job36:7 Sawachotsera wolungama maso ake, koma pamodzi ndi mafumu pa mpando wao awakhazika chikhazikire, ndipo akwezeka." 
Job36:8 Ndipo akamangidwa m'nsinga, nakakodwa ndi zingwe za mazunzo," 
Job36:9 pamenepo awafotokozera ntchito zao, ndi zolakwa zao, kuti anachita modzikuza." 
Job36:10 Awatseguliranso m'khutu mwao kuti awalangize, nawauza abwerere kuleka mphulupulu." 
Job36:11 Akamvera ndi kumtumikira, adzatsiriza masiku ao modala, ndi zaka zao mokondwera." 
Job36:12 Koma akapanda kumvera adzatayika ndi lupanga, nadzatsirizika osadziwa kanthu." 
Job36:13 Koma iwo a mtima wakunyoza Mulungu, akundika mkwiyo, akawamanga Iye, safuulira." 
Job36:14 Iwowa akufa akali biriwiri, ndi moyo wao utayika ngati odetsedwa." 
Job36:15 Apulumutsa wozunzika mwa kuzunzika kwake, nawatsegulira m'khutu mwao mwa kupsinjika kwao." 
Job36:16 Inde akadakukopani muchoke posaukira, mulowe kuchitando kopanda chopsinja; ndipo zoikidwa pagome panu zikadakhala zonona ndithu." 
Job36:17 Koma mukadzazidwa nazo zolingirira oipa, zolingirirazo ndi chiweruzo zidzakugwiranibe." 
Job36:18 Pakuti muchenjere, mkwiyo ungakunyengeni muchite mnyozo; ndipo usakusokeretseni ukulu wa dipoli." 
Job36:19 Chuma chanu chidzafikira kodi, kuti simudzakhala wopsinjika, kapena mphamvu yanu yonse yolimba?" 
Job36:20 Musakhumbe usiku, umene anthu alikhidwe m'malo mwao." 
Job36:21 Chenjerani, musalunjike kumphulupulu; pakuti mwaisankha iyi mutazunzidwa." 
Job36:22 Taonani, Mulungu achita mokwezeka mu mphamvu yake, mphunzitsi wakunga Iye ndani?" 
Job36:23 Anamuikira njira yake ndani? Adzati ndani, Mwachita chosalungama?" 
Job36:24 Kumbukirani kuti mukuze ntchito zake zimene anaziimbira anthu. 
Job36:25 Anthu onse azipenyerera, anthu aziyang'anira kutali." 
Job36:26 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye wamkulu, ndipo sitimdziwa; chiwerengo cha zaka zake nchosasanthulika." 
Job36:27 Pakuti akweza madontho a mvula, akhetsa mvula ya m'nkhungu yake" 
Job36:28 Imene mitambo itsanulira, nivumbitsira anthu mochuluka." 
Job36:29 Pali munthu kodi wodziwitsa mayalidwe a mitambo, ndi kugunda kwa msasa wake?" 
Job36:30 Taonani, Iye ayala kuunika kwake pamenepo. Navundikira kunsi kwake kwa nyanja." 
Job36:31 Pakuti aweruza nazo mitundu ya anthu apatsa chakudya chochuluka. 
Job36:32 Akutidwa manja ake ndi mphezi, nailamulira igwere pofunapo Iye." 
Job36:33 Kugunda kwake kulalikira za Iye, zoweta zomwe zilota mtambo woyandikira." 
Job37:1 Pa ichinso mtima wanga unjenjemera, nusunthika m'malo mwake." 
Job37:2 Mvetsetsani chibumo cha mau ake, ndi kugunda kotuluka m'kamwa mwake." 
Job37:3 Akumveketsa pansi pa thambo ponse, nang'anipitsa mphezi yake ku malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Job37:4 Mau abuma kuitsata, agunda ndi mau a ukulu wake, ndipo sailetsa atamveka mau ake." 
Job37:5 Mulungu agunda modabwitsa ndi mau ake, achita zazikulu osazidziwa ife." 
Job37:6 Pakuti anena kwa chipale chofewa, Ugwe padziko, momwemonso kwa mvula, ndi kwa mvumbi waukulu." 
Job37:7 Atsekereza mokhomera chizindikiro dzanja la munthu aliyense, kuti anthu onse anawalenga adziwe." 
Job37:8 Pamenepo zilombo zilowa mobisalamo, nizikhala m'ngaka mwao." 
Job37:9 M'chipinda mwake mutuluka kamvulumvulu, ndi chisanu chifuma kumpoto." 
Job37:10 Mwa kupuma kwake Mulungu apereka chipale, ndi madzi achitando aundana." 
Job37:11 Asenzetsanso mtambo wakuda bii madzi, afunyulula mtambo wokhalamo mphezi yake;" 
Job37:12 ndipo utembenukatembenuka pakulangiza kwake, kuti uchite zilizonse aulamulira, pa nkhope ya dziko lokhalamo anthu;" 
Job37:13 ngati aufikitsira dziko lake kulidzudzula, kapena kulichitira chifundo." 
Job37:14 Tamverani ichi, Yobu. Taimani, mulingirire zodabwitsa za Mulungu." 
Job37:15 Kodi mudziwa umo Mulungu azilangizira zimenezi, nawalitsa mphezi ya m'mtambo mwake?" 
Job37:16 Kodi mudziwa madendekeredwe ake a mitambo, zodabwitsa za Iye wakudziwa mwangwiro?" 
Job37:17 Kodi mudziwa umo zovala zanu zifundira, pamene dziko lili thuu chifukwa cha mwera?" 
Job37:18 Kodi muyala thambo pamodzi ndi Iye, ndilo lolimba ngati kalirole woyengeka?" 
Job37:19 Mutilangize chimene tidzanena ndi Iye; sitidziwa kulongosola mau athu chifukwa cha mdima. 
Job37:20 Kodi munthu ayenera kumuuza kuti ndifuna kunena, kapena kodi munthu adzakhumba kumezedwa?" 
Job37:21 Ndipo tsopano anthu sakhoza kupenyerera kuunika pakunyezimira kuthambo, ndi mphepo yapita ndi kuuyeretsa." 
Job37:22 Kuchokera kumpoto kudzera kuwala konyezimira, Mulungu ali nao ukulu woopsa." 
Job37:23 Kunena za Wamphamvuyonse, sitingamsanthule; ndiye wa mphamvu yoposa; koma mwa chiweruzo ndi chilungamo chochuluka samasautsa." 
Job37:24 M'mwemo anthu amuopa, Iye sasamalira aliyense wanzeru mumtima." 
Job38:1 Pamenepo Yehova anayankha Yobu m'kamvulumvulu, nati," 
Job38:2 Ndani uyu adetsa uphungu, ndi mau opanda nzeru?" 
Job38:3 Udzimangire m'chuuno tsono ngati mwamuna; ndikufunsa, undidziwitse." 
Job38:4 Unali kuti muja ndinaika maziko a dziko lapansi? Fotokoza ngati udziwa kuzindikira. 
Job38:5 Analemba malire ake ndani, popeza udziwa? Anayesapo chingwe chake ndani?" 
Job38:6 Maziko ake anakumbidwa pa chiyani? Kapena anaika ndani mwala wake wa pangodya," 
Job38:7 muja nyenyezi za m'mawa zinaimba limodzi mokondwera, ndi ana onse a Mulungu anafuula ndi chimwemwe?" 
Job38:8 Kapena anatseka nyanja ndani ndi zitseko, muja idakamula ngati kutuluka m'mimba," 
Job38:9 muja ndinayesa mtambo chovala chake, ndi mdima wa bii nsalu yake yokulunga," 
Job38:10 ndi kuilembera malire anga, ndi kuika mipikizo ndi zitseko," 
Job38:11 ndi kuti, Ufike mpaka apa, osapitirirapo; apa adzaletseka mafunde ako odzikuza?" 
Job38:12 Kodi walamulira m'mawa chiyambire masiku ako, ndi kudziwitsa mbandakucha malo ake;" 
Job38:13 kuti agwire malekezero a dziko lapansi, nakutumule oipa achokeko?" 
Job38:14 Lisandulika ngati dothi lonyata pansi pa chosindikiza, ndi zonse zibuka ngati chovala;" 
Job38:15 ndi kuunika kwa oipa kuletsedwa kuti asakuone, ndi dzanja losamulidwa lithyoledwa." 
Job38:16 Kodi unalowa magwero a nyanja? Kodi unayendayenda pozama penipeni? 
Job38:17 Kodi zipata za imfa zinavumbulukira iwe? Kapena kodi unaona zipata za mthunzi wa imfa? 
Job38:18 Kodi unazindikira chitando cha dziko lapansi? Fotokozera, ngati uchidziwa chonse." 
Job38:19 Ili kuti njira yomukira pokhala kuunika? Ndi mdima, pokhala pake pali kuti," 
Job38:20 kuti upite nao kumalire ake, kuti uzindikire miseu ya kunyumba yake?" 
Job38:21 Udziwa, pakuti unabadwa pamenepo, ndi masiku ako achuluka kuwerenga kwao." 
Job38:22 Kodi unalowa m'zosungiramo chipale chofewa? Kapena unapenya zosungiramo matalala," 
Job38:23 amene ndiwasungira tsiku la nsautso, tsiku lakulimbana nkhondo?" 
Job38:24 Njira ili kuti yomukira pogawikana kuunika, kapena pomwazikira mphepo ya kum'mawa pa dziko lapansi?" 
Job38:25 Ndani anachikumbira mchera chimvula, kapena njira ya bingu la mphezi," 
Job38:26 kuvumbitsa mvula pa dziko lopanda anthu, kuchipululu kosakhala munthu," 
Job38:27 kukhutitsa thengo la kunkhwangwala, ndi kuphukitsa msipu?" 
Job38:28 Kodi mvula ili naye atate? Kapena wabala ndani madontho a mame? 
Job38:29 Chipale chinatuluka m'mimba ya yani? Ndi chisanu chochokera m'mwamba anachibala ndani? 
Job38:30 Madzi aundana ngati mwala, ndi pamwamba pa nyanja yozama mpogwirana madzi." 
Job38:31 Kodi ungamange gulu la Nsangwe? Kapena kumasula zomangira za Akamwiniatsatana? 
Job38:32 Ungatulutse kodi nyenyezi m'nyengo zao monga mwa malongosoledwe ao? Kapena kutsogolera Mlalang'amba ndi ana ake? 
Job38:33 Kodi udziwa malemba a kuthambo? Ukhoza kukhazikitsa ufumu wao pa dziko lapansi? 
Job38:34 Kodi udziwa kukwezera mau ako kumitambo, kuti madzi ochuluka akukute?" 
Job38:35 Kodi ukhoza kutumiza mphezi kuti zimuke, ndi kunena nawe, Tili pano?" 
Job38:36 Ndani analonga nzeru m'mitambomo? Ndani waninkha nyenyezi yotsotsoka luntha? 
Job38:37 Adziwa ndani kuwerenga mitambo mwanzeru, ndi kutsanulira michenje ya kuthambo ndani," 
Job38:38 pokandika fumbi, ndi kuundana zibuma pamodzi?" 
Job38:39 Kodi ukhoza kusakira mkango waukazi nyama? Ndi kukwaniritsa chakudya cha misona," 
Job38:40 pamene ibwatama m'ngaka mwao, nikhala mobisala kulaliramo?" 
Job38:41 Amkonzeratu khungubwi chakudya chake ndani, pamenepo ana ake afuulira kwa Mulungu, naulukauluka osowa chakudya?" 
Job39:1 Kodi udziwa nyengo yakuswana zinkhoma? Kodi wapenyerera pakuswa mbawala? 
Job39:2 Ukhoza kodi kuwerenga miyezi yakuzipitira, kapena udziwa nyengo yoti ziswane?" 
Job39:3 Zithuntha, ziswa, zitaya zowawa zao." 
Job39:4 Ana ao akhala ojincha, akulira kuthengo, achoka osabwerera kwa amao." 
Job39:5 Ndani walola mbidzi ituluke yaufulu? Anaimasulira mbidzi nsinga zake ndani," 
Job39:6 imene ndachiyesa chipululu nyumba yake, ndi dziko lakhulo pokhala pake?" 
Job39:7 Aseka phokoso la kumudzi, osamva kukuwa kwa wofulumiza nyama za m'goli." 
Job39:8 Poyenda ponse pamapiri mpa busa pake; ilondola chachiwisi chilichonse. 
Job39:9 Kodi njati idzavomera kukutumikira, idzakhala ku chodyetseramo chako kodi?" 
Job39:10 Kodi ukhoza kumanga njati ndi lamba lake ilime m'mchera? Kapena idzakutsata kodi kufafaniza nthumbira m'zigwa? 
Job39:11 Udzaikhulupirira kodi, popeza mphamvu yake njaikulu? Udzaisiyira ntchito yako kodi?" 
Job39:12 Kodi udzaitama kuti itute mbeu zako, ndi kuzisonkhanitsira kudwale?" 
Job39:13 Phiko la nthiwatiwa likondwera, koma mapiko ndi nthenga zake nzofatsa kodi?" 
Job39:14 Pakuti isiya mazira ake panthaka, nimafunditsa m'fumbi," 
Job39:15 niiwala kuti phazi lingawaphwanye, kapena chilombo chingawapondereze." 
Job39:16 Iumira mtima ana ake monga ngati sali ake; idzilemetsa ndi ntchito chabe, popeza ilibe mantha;" 
Job39:17 pakuti Mulungu anaimana nzeru, ndipo sanaigawire luntha." 
Job39:18 Ikafika nthawi yake, iweramuka, iseka kavalo ndi wa pamsana pake." 
Job39:19 Wampatsa kavalo mphamvu yake kodi? Wamveka pakhosi pake chenjerere chogwedezeka? 
Job39:20 Wamlumphitsa kodi ngati dzombe? Ulemerero wa kumina kwake ngwoopsa. 
Job39:21 Apalasa kuchigwa, nakondwera nayo mphamvu yake; atuluka kukomana nao eni zida." 
Job39:22 Aseka mantha osaopsedwa, osabwerera kuthawa lupanga." 
Job39:23 Phodo likuti kochokocho panthiti pake, mkondo wonyezimira ndi nthungo yomwe." 
Job39:24 Ndi kunjenjemera kwaukali aimeza nthaka, osaimitsika pomveka lipenga." 
Job39:25 Pomveka lipenga akuti, Hee! Anunkhiza nkhondo ilikudza kutali, kugunda kwa akazembe ndi kuhahaza." 
Job39:26 Kodi kabawi auluka mwa nzeru zako, natambasula mapiko ake kunka kumwera?" 
Job39:27 Kodi chiombankhanga chikwera m'mwamba pochilamulira iwe, nichimanga chisanja chake m'mwamba?" 
Job39:28 Kwao nku thanthwe, chigona komweko, pansonga pa thanthwe pokhazikikapo." 
Job39:29 Pokhala kumeneko chiyang'ana chakudya; maso ake achipenyetsetsa chili kutali. 
Job39:30 Ana ake akumwa mwazi, ndipo pomwe pali ophedwa, apo pali icho." 
Job40:1 Ndipo Yehova anabwereza kwa Yobu, nati," 
Job40:2 Kodi wodzudzulayo atsutsane ndi Wamphamvuyonse? Wochita makani ndi Mulungu ayankhe. 
Job40:3 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha Yehova nati," 
Job40:4 Taonani, ndakhululuka ine, ndidzakubwezerani mau otani? Ndigwira pakamwa." 
Job40:5 Ndalankhula kamodzi, koma sindidzayakha; inde kawiri, koma sindionjezanso." 
Job40:6 Ndipo Yehova anamyankha Yobu m'kamvulumvulu, nati," 
Job40:7 Dzimangire m'chuuno tsono ngati mwamuna; ndidzakufunsa, undidziwitse." 
Job40:8 Chingakhale chiweruzo changa udzachithyola kodi? Udzanditsutsa kuti ndili woipa kodi, kuti ukhale wolungama ndiwe?" 
Job40:9 Kodi uli nalo dzanja ngati Ine Mulungu? Kapena ukhoza kugunda ndi mau ngati Ine? 
Job40:10 Udzikometsere tsono ndi ukulu ndi kukuzika, nuvale ulemu ndi ulemerero." 
Job40:11 Tsanulira mkwiyo wako wosefuka, nupenyerere aliyense wodzikuza ndi kumchepetsa." 
Job40:12 Upenyerere aliyense wodzikuza, numtsitse, nupondereze oipa pomwe akhala." 
Job40:13 Uwakwirire pamodzi m'fumbi, uzimange nkhope zao pobisika." 
Job40:14 Pamenepo inenso ndidzakuvomereza, kuti dzanja lakolako lamanja likupulumutsa." 
Job40:15 Tapenya tsono mvuu ndinaipanga pamodzi ndi iwe, ikudya udzu ngati ng'ombe." 
Job40:16 Tapenya tsono, mphamvu yake ili m'chuuno mwake, ndi kulimbalimba kwake kuli m'mitsempha ya m'mimba yake." 
Job40:17 Igwedeza mchira wake ngati mkungudza; mitsempha ya ntchafu zake ipotana. 
Job40:18 Mafupa ake akunga misiwe yamkuwa; ziwalo zake zikunga zitsulo zamphumphu. 
Job40:19 Iyo ndiyo chiyambi cha machitidwe a Mulungu; wakuilenga anaininkha lupanga lake. 
Job40:20 Pakuti mapiri aiphukitsira chakudya, kumene zisewera nyama zonse za kuthengo." 
Job40:21 Igona pansi patsinde pa mitengo yamthunzi, pobisala pabango ndi pathawale." 
Job40:22 Mitengo yamthunzi iiphimba ndi mthunzi wao, misondodzi ya kumtsinje iizinga." 
Job40:23 Taona madzi a mumtsinje akakula, siinjenjemera; ilimbika mtima, ngakhale Yordani atupa mpaka pakamwa pake." 
Job40:24 Ikakhala maso, munthu adzaigwira kodi? Kapena kuboola m'mphuno mwake ili m'khwekhwe?" 
Job41:1 Kodi ukhoza kukoka Leviyatani ndi mbedza? Kapena kukanikiza kalandira wake ndi chingwe? 
Job41:2 Kodi ukhoza kumanga m'mphuno ndi mlulu? Kapena kuboola nsagwada wake ndi mbedza? 
Job41:3 Kodi idzachulukitsa mau akukupembedza? Kapena idzanena nawe mau ofatsa? 
Job41:4 Kodi idzapangana ndi iwe, kuti uitenge ikhale kapolo wako wachikhalire?" 
Job41:5 Kodi udzasewera nayo ngati mbalame? Kapena udzaimangira anamwali ako kuti aiwete? 
Job41:6 Kodi opangana malonda adzaitsatsa? Adzaigawana eni malonda? 
Job41:7 Kodi udzadzaza khungu lake ndi ntchetho, kapena mutu wake ndi miomba?" 
Job41:8 Isanjike dzanja lako; ukakumbukira nkhondoyi, sudzateronso." 
Job41:9 Taona, chiyembekezo chako cha pa iyo chipita pachabe. Kodi sadzatenga nkhawa munthu pakungoiona?" 
Job41:10 Palibe wolimba mtima kuti adzaiputa. Ndipo ndaniyo adzaima pamaso pa Ine? 
Job41:11 Ndaniyo anayamba kundipatsa Ine kuti ndimthokoze? Zilizonse pansi pa thambo ponse ndi zanga. 
Job41:12 Sindikhala chete osatchula ziwalo za ng'onayo, ndi mbiri ya mphamvu yake, ndi makonzedwe ake okoma." 
Job41:13 Ndani adzasenda chovala chake chakunja? Adzalowa ndani kumizere iwiri ya mano ake? 
Job41:14 Adzatsegula ndani zitseko za pakamwa pake? Mano ake aopsa pozungulira pao. 
Job41:15 Mamba ake olimba ndiwo kudzitama kwake; amangika pamodzi ngati okomeredwatu. 
Job41:16 Alumikizana lina ndi linzake, mphepo yosalowa pakati pao." 
Job41:17 Amamatirana lina ndi linzake, agwirana osagawanikana." 
Job41:18 Pakuyetsemula ing'anipitsa kuunika, ndi maso ake akunga zikope za m'mawa." 
Job41:19 M'kamwa mwake mutuluka miuni, mbaliwali za moto zibukamo." 
Job41:20 M'mphuno mwake mutuluka utsi, ngati nkhali yobwadamuka ndi moto wa zinyatsi" 
Job41:21 mpweya wake uyatsa makala, ndi m'kamwa mwake mutuluka lawi la moto." 
Job41:22 Kukhosi kwake kukhala mphamvu, ndi mantha avumbuluka patsogolo pake." 
Job41:23 Nyama yake yopsapsala igwirana ikwima pathupi pake yosagwedezeka. 
Job41:24 Mtima wake ulimba ngati mwala, inde ulimba ngati mwala wa mphero." 
Job41:25 Ikanyamuka, amphamvu achita mantha; chifukwa cha kuopsedwa azimidwa nzeru." 
Job41:26 Munthu akaiyamba ndi lupanga, ligoma; ngakhale nthungo, kapena muvi, kapena mkondo." 
Job41:27 Chitsulo ichiyesa phesi, ndi mkuwa ngati mtengo woola." 
Job41:28 Muvi suithawitsa, miyala ya pachoponyera iisandutsa chiputu." 
Job41:29 Zibonga ziyesedwa chiputu, iseka kuthikuza kwake kwa nthungo." 
Job41:30 Kumimba kwake ikunga mapale akuthwa, itasalala kuthope ngati chopunthira." 
Job41:31 Ichititsa nthubwinthubwi pozama ngati nkhali, isanduliza nyanja ikunge mafuta." 
Job41:32 Ichititsa mifunde yonyezimira pambuyo pake; munthu akadati pozama pali ndi imvi. 
Job41:33 Pa dziko lapansi palibe china cholingana nayo, cholengedwa chopanda mantha." 
Job41:34 Ipenya chilichonse chodzikuza, ndiyo mfumu ya zodzitama zonse." 
Job42:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha Yehova, nati," 
Job42:2 Ndidziwa kuti mukhoza kuchita zonse, ndi kuti palibe choletsa cholingirira chanu chilichonse." 
Job42:3 Ndani uyu abisa uphungu wosadziwa kanthu? Chifukwa chake ndinafotokozera zimene sindinazizindikira, zondidabwitsa, zosazidziwa ine." 
Job42:4 Tamveranitu, ndidzanena ine, ndidzakufunsani, mundidziwitse." 
Job42:5 Kumva ndidamva mbiri yanu, koma tsopano ndikupenyani maso;" 
Job42:6 chifukwa chake ndekha ndidzinyansa, ndi kulapa m'fumbi ndi mapulusa." 
Job42:7 Kunali tsono atanena Yehova mau awa kwa Yobu, Yehova anati kwa Elifazi wa ku Temani, Mkwiyo wanga wakuyakira iwe ndi mabwenzi ako awiri, pakuti simunandinenera choyenera monga ananena mtumiki wanga Yobu." 
Job42:8 Ndipo tsono, mudzitengere ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri, mumuke kwa mtumiki wanga Yobu, mudzifukizire nokha nsembe yopsereza; ndi mtumiki wanga Yobu adzapempherera inu, pakuti ndidzamvomereza iyeyu, kuti ndisachite nanu monga mwa kupusa kwanu; popeza simunandinenera choyenera monga ananena mtumiki Yobu." 
Job42:9 Namuka Elifazi wa ku Temani, ndi Bilidadi Msuki, ndi Zofari wa ku Naama, nachita monga Yehova adawauza; ndipo Yehova anavomereza Yobu." 
Job42:10 Ndipo Yehova anachotsa ukapolo wa Yobu, pamene anapempherera mabwenzi ake; Yehova nachulukitsa zake zonse za Yobu mpaka kuziwirikiza." 
Job42:11 Pamenepo anamdzera abale ake onse, ndi alongo ake onse, ndi onse odziwana naye kale, nadya naye mkate m'nyumba yake, nampukusira mitu, namtonthoza pa zoipa zonse Yehova anamfikitsirazi; nampatsanso yense ndalama ndi mphete yagolide." 
Job42:12 Ndipo Yehova anadalitsa chitsiriziro cha Yobu koposa chiyambi chake, ndipo anali nazo nkhosa zikwi khumi ndi zinai, ndi ngamira zikwi zisanu ndi chimodzi, ndi ng'ombe zamagoli chikwi chimodzi, ndi abulu akazi chikwi chimodzi." 
Job42:13 Anali naonso ana amuna asanu ndi awiri ndi ana akazi atatu. 
Job42:14 Ndipo anamutcha dzina la woyamba Yemima, ndi dzina la wachiwiri Keziya, ndi dzina la wachitatu Kerenihapuki." 
Job42:15 Ndipo m'dziko monse simunapezeka akazi okongola ngati ana akazi a Yobu, nawapatsa cholowa atate wao pamodzi ndi alongo ao." 
Job42:16 Ndipo zitatha izi, Yobu anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi mphambu makumi anai, naona ana ake ndi zidzukulu zake mibadwo inai." 
Job42:17 Namwalira Yobu, wokalamba ndi wa masiku ochuluka." 
Psalms1:1 Wodala munthuyo wosayenda mu uphungu wa oipa, kapena wosaimirira m'njira ya ochimwa, kapena wosakhala pansi pa bwalo la onyoza." 
Psalms1:2 Komatu m'chilamulo cha Yehova muli chikondwerero chake; ndipo m'chilamulo chake amalingirira usana ndi usiku. 
Psalms1:3 Ndiye akunga mtengo wooka pa mitsinje ya madzi; wakupatsa chipatso chake pa nyengo yake, tsamba lake lomwe losafota; ndipo zonse azichita apindula nazo." 
Psalms1:4 Oipa satero ai; koma akunga mungu wouluka ndi mphepo. 
Psalms1:5 Chifukwa chake oipa sadzaimirira pa mlanduwo, kapena ochimwa mu msonkhano wa olungama." 
Psalms1:6 Pakuti Yehova adziwa mayendedwe a olungama; koma mayendedwe a oipa adzatayika. 
Psalms2:1 Aphokoseranji amitundu, nalingiriranji anthu zopanda pake?" 
Psalms2:2 Adzikhazikitsa mafumu a dziko lapansi, nachita upo akulu pamodzi, Kutsutsana naye Yehova, ndi Wodzozedwa wake, ndi kuti," 
Psalms2:3 Tidule zomangira zao, titaye nsinga zao." 
Psalms2:4 Wokhala m'mwambayo adzaseka; Ambuye adzawanyoza. 
Psalms2:5 Pomwepo adzalankhula nao mu mkwiyo wake, nadzawaopsa m'ukali wake." 
Psalms2:6 Koma Ine ndadzoza mfumu yanga Pa Ziyoni, phiri langa loyera." 
Psalms2:7 Ndidzauza za chitsimikizo: Yehova ananena ndi Ine, Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga; Ine lero ndakubala." 
Psalms2:8 Undifunse, ndipo ndidzakupatsa amitundu akhale cholowa chako, ndi malekezero a dziko lapansi akhale akoako." 
Psalms2:9 Udzawathyola ndi ndodo yachitsulo; udzawaphwanya monga mbiya ya woumba. 
Psalms2:10 Tsono, mafumu inu, chitani mwanzeru; langikani, oweruza inu a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms2:11 Tumikirani Yehova ndi mantha, ndipo kondwerani ndi chinthenthe." 
Psalms2:12 Mpsompsoneni Mwanayo, kuti angakwiye, ndipo mungatayike m'njira ukayaka pang'ono pokha mkwiyo wake. Odala onse akumkhulupirira Iye." 
Psalms3:1 Salimo la Davide, muja anathawa Abisalomu mwana wake. Yehova! Ha! Achuluka nanga akundisautsa ine! Akundiukira ine ndi ambiri." 
Psalms3:2 Ambiri amati kwa moyo wanga, alibe chipulumutso mwa Mulungu." 
Psalms3:3 Ndipo Inu Yehova, ndinu chikopa changa; ulemerero wanga, ndi wondiweramutsa mutu wanga." 
Psalms3:4 Ndifuula kwa Yehova ndi mau anga, ndipo andiyankha m'phiri lake loyera." 
Psalms3:5 Ndinagona ine pansi, ndinagona tulo; ndinauka; pakuti Yehova anandichirikiza." 
Psalms3:6 Sindidzaopa unyinji wa anthu akundizinga ine. 
Psalms3:7 Ukani Yehova; ndipulumutseni, Mulungu wanga! Pakuti mwapanda adani anga onse patsaya; mwawathyola mano oipawo." 
Psalms3:8 Chipulumutso ncha Yehova; dalitso lanu likhale pa anthu anu. 
Psalms4:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Neginoto. Salimo la Davide. Pakufuula ine mundiyankhe, Mulungu wa chilungamo changa; pondichepera mwandikulitsira malo. Ndichitireni chifundo, imvani pemphero langa." 
Psalms4:2 Amuna inu, ulemu wanga udzakhala wamanyazi kufikira liti? Mudzakonda zachabe, ndi kufunafuna bodza kufikira liti?" 
Psalms4:3 Koma dziwani kuti Yehova anadzipatulira yekha womkondayo, adzamva Yehova m'mene ndimfuulira Iye." 
Psalms4:4 Chitani chinthenthe, ndipo musachimwe. Nenani mumtima mwanu pakama panu, ndipo mukhale chete." 
Psalms4:5 Iphani nsembe za chilungamo, ndipo mumkhulupirire Yehova." 
Psalms4:6 Ambiri amati, Adzationetsa chabwino ndani? Weramutsirani ife kuunika kwa nkhope yanu, Yehova." 
Psalms4:7 Mwapatsa chimwemwe mumtima mwanga, chakuposa chao m'nyengo yakuchuluka dzinthu zao ndi vinyo wao." 
Psalms4:8 Ndi mtendere ndidzagona pansi, pomwepo ndidzagona tulo; chifukwa Inu, Yehova, mundikhalitsa ine, ndikhale bwino." 
Psalms5:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; aimbire zitoliro. Salimo la Davide. Mverani mau anga, Yehova, Zindikirani kulingirira kwanga." 
Psalms5:2 Tamvetsani mau a kufuula kwanga, Mfumu yanga, ndi Mulungu wanga; pakuti kwa Inu ndimapemphera." 
Psalms5:3 M'mawa, Yehova, mudzamva mau anga; m'mawa, ndidzakukonzerani pemphero langa, ndipo ndidzadikira." 
Psalms5:4 Pakuti Inu sindinu Mulungu wakukondwera nacho choipa mphulupulu siikhala ndi Inu. 
Psalms5:5 Opusa sadzakhazikika pamaso panu, mudana nao onse akuchita zopanda pake." 
Psalms5:6 Mudzaononga iwo akunena bodza; munthu wokhetsa mwazi ndi wachinyengo, Yehova anyansidwa naye." 
Psalms5:7 Koma ine, mwa kuchuluka kwa chifundo chanu ndidzalowa m'nyumba yanu; ndidzagwada kuyang'ana Kachisi wanu woyera ndi kuopa Inu." 
Psalms5:8 Yehova, munditsogolere m'chilungamo chanu, chifukwa cha akundizondawo; mulungamitse njira yanu pamaso panga." 
Psalms5:9 Pakuti m'kamwa mwao mulibe mau okhazikika; m'kati mwao m'mosakaza; m'mero mwao ndi manda apululu; lilime lao asyasyalika nalo. 
Psalms5:10 Muwayese otsutsika Mulungu; agwe nao uphungu wao. M'kuchuluka kwa zolakwa zao muwapirikitse; pakuti anapikisana ndi Inu. 
Psalms5:11 Koma akondwere onse amene athawira kwa Inu, afuule mokondwera kosaleka, popeza muwafungatira; nasekere mwa Inu iwo akukonda dzina lanu." 
Psalms5:12 Pakuti Inu, Yehova, mudzadalitsa wolungamayo; mudzamtchinjiriza nacho chivomerezo ngati chikopa." 
Psalms6:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Neginoto, pa Seminiti. Salimo la Davide. Yehova, musandidzudzule mu mkwiyo wanu, ndipo musandilange m'kukali wanu." 
Psalms6:2 Mundichitire chifundo, Yehova; pakuti ndalefuka ine. Mundichize, Yehova; pakuti anthunthumira mafupa anga." 
Psalms6:3 Moyo wanganso wanthunthumira kwakukulu; ndipo Inu, Yehova, kufikira liti?" 
Psalms6:4 Bwererani Yehova, landitsani moyo wanga; ndipulumutseni chifukwa cha kukoma mtima kwanu." 
Psalms6:5 Pakuti muimfa m'mosakumbukira Inu; m'mandamo adzakuyamikani ndani? 
Psalms6:6 Ndalema nako kuusa moyo kwanga; ndiyandamitsa kama wanga usiku wonse; mphasa yanga ndiolobza ndi misozi yanga. 
Psalms6:7 Lapuwala diso langa chifukwa cha chisoni; lakalamba chifukwa cha onse akundisautsa. 
Psalms6:8 Chokani kwa ine, nonsenu akuchita zopanda pake; pakuti wamva Yehova mau a kulira kwanga." 
Psalms6:9 Wamva Yehova kupemba kwanga; Yehova adzalandira pemphero langa. 
Psalms6:10 Adzachita manyazi, nadzanthunthumira kwakukulu adani anga onse; adzabwerera, nadzachita manyazi modzidzimuka." 
Psalms7:1 Syigayoni wa Davide woimbira Yehova, chifukwa cha mau a Kusi Mbenjamini. Yehova Mulungu wanga, ndakhulupirira Inu; mundipulumutse kwa onse akundilonda, nimundilanditse;" 
Psalms7:2 kuti angamwetule moyo wanga ngati mkango, ndi kuukadzula, wopanda wina wondilanditsa." 
Psalms7:3 Yehova Mulungu wanga, ngati ndachita ichi; ngati m'manja anga muli chosalungama;" 
Psalms7:4 ngati ndambwezera choipa iye woyanjana ndine; (inde, ndamlanditsa wondisautsa kopanda chifukwa);" 
Psalms7:5 mdani alondole moyo wanga, naupeze; naupondereze pansi moyo wanga, naukhalitse ulemu wanga m'fumbi." 
Psalms7:6 Ukani Yehova mu mkwiyo wanu, nyamukani chifukwa cha ukali wa akundisautsa; ndipo mugalamukire ine; mwalamulira chiweruzo." 
Psalms7:7 Ndipo ukuzingeni msonkhano wa anthu; ndipo pamwamba pao mubwerere kunka kumwamba. 
Psalms7:8 Yehova aweruza anthu mlandu; mundiweruze, Yehova, monga mwa chilungamo changa, ndi ungwiro wanga uli mwa ine." 
Psalms7:9 Ithe mphulupulu ya anthu oipa, ndikupemphani, koma wolungamayo mumkhazikitse. Pakuti woyesa mitima ndi impso ndiye Mulungu wolungama." 
Psalms7:10 Chikopa changa chili ndi Mulungu, wopulumutsa oongoka mtima." 
Psalms7:11 Mulungu ndiye Woweruza wolungama, ndiye Mulungu wakukwiya masiku onse." 
Psalms7:12 Akapanda kutembenuka munthu, iye adzanola lupanga lake; wakoka uta wake, naupiringidza." 
Psalms7:13 Ndipo anamkonzera zida za imfa; mivi yake aipanga ikhale yansakali. 
Psalms7:14 Taonani, ali m'chikuta cha zopanda pake; anaima ndi chovuta, nabala bodza." 
Psalms7:15 Anachita dzenje, nalikumba, nagwa m'mbuna yomwe anaikumba." 
Psalms7:16 Chovuta chake chidzambwerera mwini, ndi chiwawa chake chidzamgwera pakati pamutu pake." 
Psalms7:17 Ndidzayamika Yehova monga mwa chilungamo chake; ndipo ndidzaimbira Yehova Wam'mwambamwamba. 
Psalms8:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Gititi. Salimo la Davide. Yehova, Ambuye wathu, dzina lanu liposadi nanga pa dziko lonse lapansi! Inu amene munaika ulemerero wanu pa thambo la kumwamba." 
Psalms8:2 M'kamwa mwa makanda ndi oyamwa munakhazikitsa mphamvu, chifukwa cha otsutsana ndi Inu, kuti muwaletse mdani ndi wobwezera chilango." 
Psalms8:3 Pakuona ine thambo la kumwamba lanu, ntchito ya zala zanu, mwezi ndi nyenyezi, zimene munazikhazika," 
Psalms8:4 munthu ndani kuti mumkumbukira? Ndi mwana wa munthu kuti mucheza naye? 
Psalms8:5 Pakuti munamchepsa pang'ono ndi Mulungu, munamveka iye korona wa ulemerero ndi ulemu." 
Psalms8:6 Munamchititsa ufumu pa ntchito za manja anu; mudagonjetsa zonse pansi pa mapazi ake; 
Psalms8:7 nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, zonsezo, ndi nyama za kuthengo zomwe;" 
Psalms8:8 mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi nsomba za m'nyanja. Zopita m'njira za m'nyanja." 
Psalms8:9 Yehova, Ambuye wathu, dzina lanu liposadi nanga pa dziko lonse lapansi!" 
Psalms9:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Muti-Labeni. Salimo la Davide. Ndidzayamika Yehova ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndidzawerengera zodabwitsa zanu zonse. 
Psalms9:2 Ndidzakondwerera ndi kusekera mwa Inu; ndidzaimbira dzina lanu, Wam'mwambamwamba Inu." 
Psalms9:3 Pobwerera m'mbuyo adani anga, akhumudwa naonongeka pankhope panu." 
Psalms9:4 Pakuti mwandiweruzira mlandu wanga; mwakhala pa mpando wachifumu, woweruza wolungama." 
Psalms9:5 Mwadzudzula amitundu, mwaononga woipayo, mwafafaniza dzina lao kunthawi yonka muyaya." 
Psalms9:6 Adaniwo atha psiti, apululuka nthawi zonse; ndipo midziyo mwaipasula, chikumbukiro chao pamodzi chatha." 
Psalms9:7 Koma Yehova akhala chikhalire, anakonzeratu mpando wachifumu wake kuti aweruze." 
Psalms9:8 Ndipo Iyeyu adzaweruza dziko lapansi m'chilungamo, nadzaweruza anthu molunjika." 
Psalms9:9 Ndipo Yehova adzakhala msanje kwa iye wokhalira mphanthi. Msanje m'nyengo za nsautso; 
Psalms9:10 ndipo iwo akudziwa dzina lanu adzakhulupirira Inu; pakuti, Inu Yehova, simunawasiya iwo akufuna Inu." 
Psalms9:11 Imbirani zoyamika Yehova, wokhala ku Ziyoni; lalikirani mwa anthu ntchito zake." 
Psalms9:12 Pakuti Iye wofuna chamwazi awakumbukira; saiwala kulira kwa ozunzika. 
Psalms9:13 Ndichitireni chifundo, Yehova; penyani kuzunzika kwanga kumene andichitira ondidawo, inu wondinyamula kundichotsa kuzipata za imfa." 
Psalms9:14 Kuti ndibukitse lemekezo lanu lonse; pa bwalo la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, ndidzakondwera nacho chipulumutso chanu." 
Psalms9:15 Amitundu anagwa m'mbuna imene anaikumba, lakodwa phazi lao muukonde anautcha." 
Psalms9:16 Anadziwika Yehova, anachita kuweruza, woipayo anakodwa ndi ntchito ya manja ake." 
Psalms9:17 Oipawo adzabwerera kumanda, inde amitundu onse akuiwala Mulungu." 
Psalms9:18 Pakuti sadzaiwalika nthawi zonse waumphawi, kapena chiyembekezo cha ozunzika sichidzaonongeka kosatha." 
Psalms9:19 Ukani, Yehova, asalimbike munthu; amitundu aweruzidwe pankhope panu." 
Psalms9:20 Muwachititse mantha, Yehova; adziwe amitundu kuti ali anthu." 
Psalms10:1 Muimiranji patali, Yehova? Mubisaliranji m'nyengo za nsautso?" 
Psalms10:2 Podzikuza woipa apsereza waumphawi; agwe m'chiwembu anapanganacho. 
Psalms10:3 Pakuti woipa adzitamira chifuniro cha moyo wake, adalitsa wosirira, koma anyoza Yehova." 
Psalms10:4 Woipa, monga mwa kudzikuza kwa nkhope yake, akuti, Sadzafunsira. Malingaliro ake onse akuti, Palibe Mulungu." 
Psalms10:5 Mayendedwe ake alimbika nthawi zonse; maweruzo anu ali pamwamba posaona iye; adani ake onse awanyodola. 
Psalms10:6 Ati mumtima mwake, Sindidzagwedezeka ine; ku mibadwomibadwo osagwa m'tsoka ine." 
Psalms10:7 M'kamwa mwake mwadzala kutemberera ndi manyengo ndi kuchenjerera; pansi pa lilime lake pali chivutitso chopanda pake. 
Psalms10:8 Akhala m'molalira midzi; mobisalamo akupha munthu wosachimwa. Ambisira waumphawi nkhope yake. 
Psalms10:9 Alalira monga mkango m'ngaka mwake; alalira kugwira wozunzika, agwira wozunzika, pakumkola m'ukonde mwake." 
Psalms10:10 Aunthama, nawerama, ndipo aumphawi agwa m'zala zake." 
Psalms10:11 Anena m'mtima mwake, Mulungu waiwala; wabisa nkhope yake; sapenya nthawi zonse." 
Psalms10:12 Ukani, Yehova; samulani dzanja lanu, Mulungu; musaiwale ozunzika." 
Psalms10:13 Woipa anyozeranji Mulungu, anena m'mtima mwake, Simudzafunsira?" 
Psalms10:14 Mwapenya; pakuti mumayang'anira chivutitso ndi chisoni kuti achipereke m'manja mwanu; waumphawi adzipereka kwa Inu; wamasiye mumakhala mthandizi wake. 
Psalms10:15 Thyolani mkono wa woipa; ndipo wochimwa, mutsate choipa chake kufikira simuchipezanso china." 
Psalms10:16 Yehova ndiye Mfumu kunthawi yamuyaya; aonongeka amitundu m'dziko lake. 
Psalms10:17 Yehova, mwamva chikhumbo cha ozunzika, mudzakhazikitsa mtima wao, mudzatchereza khutu lanu;" 
Psalms10:18 kuti muweruze mlandu wa amasiye ndi wokhalira mphanthi, kuti munthu wa pa dziko lapansi angaonjeze kuopsa." 
Psalms11:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Ndakhulupirira Yehova, mutani nkunena kwa moyo wanga, Thawirani kuphiri lanu ngati mbalame?" 
Psalms11:2 Pakuti, onani, oipa akoka uta, apiringidza muvi wao pansinga, kuwaponyera mumdima oongoka mtima." 
Psalms11:3 Akapasuka maziko, wolungama angachitenji?" 
Psalms11:4 Yehova ali m'Kachisi wake woyera, Yehova, mpando wachifumu wake uli m'Mwamba; apenyerera ndi maso ake, ayesa ana a anthu ndi zikope zake." 
Psalms11:5 Yehova ayesa wolungama mtima, koma moyo wake umuda woipa ndi iye wakukonda chiwawa." 
Psalms11:6 Adzagwetsa pwatapwata misampha pa oipa; moto ndi miyala ya sulufure, ndi mphepo yoopsa zidzawagawikira m'chikho chao." 
Psalms11:7 Pakuti Yehova ndiye wolungama; akonda zolungama; woongoka mtima adzapenya nkhope yake. 
Psalms12:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Seminiti. Salimo la Davide. Pulumutsani, Yehova; pakuti wofatsa wasowa; pakuti okhulupirika achepa mwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms12:2 Amanena za bodza munthu yense ndi mnansi wake, amanena ndi mlomo wothyasika, ndi mitima iwiri." 
Psalms12:3 Yehova adzadula milomo yonse yothyasika, lilime lakudzitamandira;" 
Psalms12:4 amene amati, Ndi lilime lathu tidzaposa; milomo yathu nja ife eni; mbuye wa pa ife ndani?" 
Psalms12:5 Chifukwa cha kupasuka kwa ozunzika, chifukwa cha kuusa moyo kwa aumphawi, ndiuka tsopano, ati Yehova; ndidzamlonga mosungika muja alakalakamo." 
Psalms12:6 Mau a Yehova ndi mau oona; ngati siliva woyenga m'ng'anjo yadothi, yoiyeretsa kasanu ndi kawiri." 
Psalms12:7 Mudzawasunga, Yehova, mudzawatchinjirizira mbadwo uno kunthawi zonse." 
Psalms12:8 Oipa amayenda mozungulirazungulira, potamanda iwo chonyansa mwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms13:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Mudzandiiwala chiiwalire, Yehova, kufikira liti? Mudzandibisira ine nkhope yanu kufikira liti?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndidzachita uphungu m'moyo mwanga kufikira liti, pokhala ndi chisoni m'mtima mwanga tsiku lonse? Adzandiukira ine mdani wanga kufikira liti?" 
Psalms13:3 Penyani, ndiyankheni, Yehova Mulungu wanga. Penyetsani maso anga, kuti ndingagone tulo ta imfa;" 
Psalms13:4 kuti anganene mdani wanga, Ndamlaka; ndipo angakondwere otsutsana nane posunthika ine." 
Psalms13:5 Koma ine ndakhulupirira pa chifundo chanu; mtima wanga udzakondwera nacho chipulumutso chanu. 
Psalms13:6 Ndidzaimbira Yehova, pakuti anandichitira zokoma." 
Psalms14:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Wauchitsiru amati mumtima mwake, Kulibe Mulungu. Achita zovunda, achita ntchito zonyansa; kulibe wakuchita bwino." 
Psalms14:2 Yehova m'Mwamba anaweramira pa ana a anthu, kuti aone ngati aliko wanzeru, wakufuna Mulungu." 
Psalms14:3 Anapatuka onse; pamodzi anavunda mtima; palibe wakuchita bwino ndi mmodzi yense. 
Psalms14:4 Kodi onse ochita zopanda pake sadziwa kanthu? Pakudya anthu anga monga akudya mkate, ndipo saitana pa Yehova." 
Psalms14:5 Pamenepa anaopaopatu, pakuti Mulungu ali mu mbadwo wa wolungama." 
Psalms14:6 Munyazitsa uphungu wa wozunzika, koma Yehova ndiye pothawira pake." 
Psalms14:7 Mwenzi chipulumutso cha Israele chitachokera ku Ziyoni! Pakubweretsa Yehova anthu ake a m'nsinga, pamenepo adzakondwera Yakobo, nadzasekera Israele." 
Psalms15:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova, ndani adzagonera m'chihema mwanu? Adzagonera ndani m'phiri lanu lopatulika?" 
Psalms15:2 Iye wakuyendayo mokwanira, nachita chilungamo, nanena zoonadi mumtima mwake." 
Psalms15:3 Amene sasinjirira ndi lilime lake, nachitira mnzake choipa, ndipo satola miseche pa mnansi wake." 
Psalms15:4 M'maso mwake munthu woonongeka anyozeka; koma awachitira ulemu akuopa Yehova. Atalumbira kwa tsoka lake, sasintha ai." 
Psalms15:5 Ndalama zake sakongoletsa mofuna phindu lalikulu, ndipo salandira chokometsera mlandu kutsutsa wosachimwa. Munthu wakuchita izi sadzagwedezeka kunthawi zonse." 
Psalms16:1 Mikitamu wa Davide. Ndisungeni ine, Mulungu: pakuti ndakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms16:2 Ndinati kwa Yehova, Inu ndinu Ambuye wanga, ndilibe chabwino china choposa Inu." 
Psalms16:3 Za oyera mtima okhala pa dziko lapansi, iwo ndiwo omveka mbiri, mwa iwowo muli chikondwero changa chonse." 
Psalms16:4 Zidzachuluka zisoni zao za iwo otsata Mulungu wina. Sindidzathira nsembe zao zamwazi, ndipo sindidzatchula maina ao pakamwa panga." 
Psalms16:5 Yehova ndiye gawo la cholowa changa ndi chikho changa, ndinu wondigwirira cholandira changa." 
Psalms16:6 Zingwe zandigwera mondikondweretsa; inde chosiyira chokoma ndili nacho. 
Psalms16:7 Ndidzadalitsa Yehova, amene anandichitira uphungu, usikunso impso zanga zindilangiza." 
Psalms16:8 Ndaika Yehova patsogolo panga nthawi zonse; popeza ali pa dzanja langa lamanja, sindidzagwedezeka." 
Psalms16:9 Chifukwa chake wasekera mtima wanga, nukondwera ulemu wanga; mnofu wanganso udzakhala mokhazikika." 
Psalms16:10 Pakuti simudzasiya moyo wanga kumanda; simudzalola wokondedwa wanu avunde. 
Psalms16:11 Mudzandidziwitsa njira ya moyo, pankhope panu pali chimwemwe chokwanira; m'dzanja lanu lamanja muli zokondweretsa zomka muyaya." 
Psalms17:1 Pemphero la Davide. Yehova, imvani chilungamo, mverani mfuu wanga; tcherani khutu ku pemphero langa losatuluka m'milomo ya chinyengo." 
Psalms17:2 Pankhope panu patuluke chiweruzo changa; maso anu apenyerere zolunjika. 
Psalms17:3 Mwayesera mtima wanga; mwandizonda usiku; mwandisuntha, simupeza kanthu; mwatsimikiza mtima kuti m'kamwa mwanga simudzalakwa." 
Psalms17:4 Za machitidwe a anthu, ndachenjera ndi mau a milomo yanu ndingalowe njira za woononga." 
Psalms17:5 M'mayendedwe anga ndasunga mabande anu, mapazi anga sanaterereke." 
Psalms17:6 Ine ndinakuitanani, pakuti mudzandiyankha, Mulungu; tcherani khutu lanu kwa ine, imvani mau anga." 
Psalms17:7 Onetsani chifundo chanu chodabwitsa, Inu wakupulumutsa okhulupirira Inu kwa iwo akuwaukira ndi dzanja lanu lamanja." 
Psalms17:8 Ndisungeni monga kamwana ka m'diso, ndifungatireni mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu," 
Psalms17:9 kundilanditsa kwa oipa amene andipasula, adani a pa moyo wanga amene andizinga." 
Psalms17:10 Mafuta ao awatsekereza; m'kamwa mwao alankhula modzikuza. 
Psalms17:11 Tsopano anatizinga m'mayendedwe athu, apenyetsetsa m'maso kuti atigwetse pansi." 
Psalms17:12 Afanana ndi mkango wofuna kumwetula, ndi msona wa mkango wakukhala mobisalamo." 
Psalms17:13 Ukani Yehova, Mumtsekereze, mumgwetse, landitsani moyo wanga kwa woipa ndi lupanga lanu;" 
Psalms17:14 kwa anthu, ndi dzanja lanu, Yehova, kwa anthu a dziko lapansi pano amene cholowa chao chili m'moyo uno, ndipo mimba yao muidzaza ndi chuma chanu chobisika; akhuta mtima ndi ana, nasiyira ana amakanda zochuluka zao." 
Psalms17:15 Koma ine ndidzapenyerera nkhope yanu m'chilungamo, ndidzakhuta mtima ndi maonekedwe anu, pamene ndidzauka." 
Psalms18:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide, mtumiki wa Yehova, amene ananena kwa Yehova mau a nyimbo iyi m'mene Yehova anamlanditsa m'dzanja la adani ake onse, ndi m'dzanja la Saulo: ndipo anati, Ndikukondani, Yehova, mphamvu yanga." 
Psalms18:2 Yehova ndiye thanthwe langa, ndi linga langa, ndi Mpulumutsi wanga; Mulungu wanga, ngaka yanga, ndidzakhulupirira Iye; chikopa changa, nyanga ya chipulumutso changa, msanje wanga." 
Psalms18:3 Ndidzaitanira Yehova, woyenera kutamandika, ndipo adzandipulumutsa ine kwa adani anga." 
Psalms18:4 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga, ndipo mitsinje ya zopanda pake inandiopsa." 
Psalms18:5 Zingwe za manda zindizinga, misampha ya imfa inandifikira ine." 
Psalms18:6 M'kusauka kwanga ndinaitana Yehova, ndipo ndinakuwira Mulungu wanga; mau anga anawamva m'Kachisi mwake, ndipo mkuwo wanga wa pankhope pake unalowa m'makutu mwake." 
Psalms18:7 Pamenepo linagwedezeka, ndi kutenthemera dziko lapansi, ndi maziko a mapiri ananjenjemera nagwedezeka, pakuti anakwiya Iyeyo." 
Psalms18:8 Unakwera utsi wotuluka m'mphuno mwake, ndi moto wa m'kamwa mwake unanyeka nuyakitsa makala." 
Psalms18:9 Ndipo Iye anaweramitsa thambo, natsika; ndipo pansi pa mapazi ake panali mdima bii." 
Psalms18:10 Ndipo anaberekeka pa kerubi, nauluka; nauluka msanga pa mapiko a mphepo." 
Psalms18:11 Anaika mdima pobisala pake, hema wake womzinga; mdima wa madzi, makongwa a kuthambo." 
Psalms18:12 Mwa kuchezemira kunali pamaso pake makongwa anakanganuka, matalala ndi makala amoto." 
Psalms18:13 Ndipo anagunda m'mwamba Yehova, ndipo Wam'mwambamwamba anamvetsa liu lake; matalala ndi makala amoto." 
Psalms18:14 Ndipo anatuma mivi yake nawabalalitsa; inde mphezi zaunyinji, nawamwaza." 
Psalms18:15 Ndipo zidaoneka zoyendamo madzi, nafukuka maziko a dziko lapansi, mwa kudzudzula kwanu, Yehova, mwa mpumo wa mpweya wa m'mphuno mwanu." 
Psalms18:16 Anatuma kuchokera m'mwamba, ananditenga; anandivuula m'madzi ambiri." 
Psalms18:17 Anandipulumutsa ine kwa mdani wanga wamphamvu, ndi kwa iwo ondida ine, pakuti anandiposa mphamvu." 
Psalms18:18 Anandipeza ine tsiku la tsoka langa; koma Yehova anali mchirikizo wanga. 
Psalms18:19 Ananditulutsanso andifikitse motakasuka; anandilanditsa, pakuti anakondwera ndi ine." 
Psalms18:20 Yehova anandibwezera monga mwa chilungamo changa; anandisudzula monga mwa kusisira kwa manja anga. 
Psalms18:21 Pakuti ndasunga njira za Yehova, ndipo sindinachitira choipa kusiyana ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms18:22 Pakuti maweruzo ake onse anali pamaso panga, ndipo malemba ake sindinawachotsa kwa ine." 
Psalms18:23 Ndipo ndinakhala wangwiro ndi Iye, ndipo ndinadzisunga wosachita choipa changa." 
Psalms18:24 Ndimo anandisudzulira Yehova monga mwa chilungamo changa, monga mwa kusisira kwa manja anga pamaso pake." 
Psalms18:25 Pa wachifundo mukhala wachifundo; pa munthu wangwiro mukhala wangwiro. 
Psalms18:26 Pa woyera mtima mukhala woyera mtima; pa wotsutsatsutsa mukhala wotsutsana naye. 
Psalms18:27 Pakuti Inu muwapulumutsa anthu aumphawi; koma maso okweza muwatsitsa. 
Psalms18:28 Pakuti Inu muyatsa nyali yanga; Yehova, Mulungu wanga, aunikira mdima wanga." 
Psalms18:29 Pakuti mwa Inu ndipyola khamu la anthu; ndipo mwa Mulungu wanga ndilumphira linga. 
Psalms18:30 Mulungu ndiye wangwiro m'njira zake; mau a Yehova ngoyengeka; ndiye chikopa cha onse okhulupirira Iye. 
Psalms18:31 Pakuti Mulungu ndani wosati Yehova? Ndipo thanthwe ndani wosati Mulungu wathu? 
Psalms18:32 Mulungu ndiye wondizingiza mphamvu m'chuuno, nakonza njira yanga ikhale yangwiro." 
Psalms18:33 Alinganiza mapazi anga ngati a mbawala, nandiimitsa pamsanje panga." 
Psalms18:34 Aphunzitsa manja anga agwire nkhondo; kuti walifuka uta wamkuwa ndi manja anga. 
Psalms18:35 Ndipo mwandipatsa chikopa cha chipulumutso chanu; ndipo dzanja lamanja lanu landigwiriziza, ndipo chifatso chanu chandikuza ine." 
Psalms18:36 Mwandipondetsa patalipatali, sanaterereka mapazi anga." 
Psalms18:37 Ndidzalondola adani anga, ndi kuwapeza, ndipo sindidzabwerera asanathe psiti." 
Psalms18:38 Ndidzawapyoza kuti sangakhoze kuuka, adzagwa pansi pa mapazi anga." 
Psalms18:39 Pakuti mwandizingiza mphamvu m'chuuno ku nkhondoyo; mwandigonjetsera amene andiukira. 
Psalms18:40 Ndipo adani anga mwawalozetsa m'mbuyo kwa ine, kuti ndipasule ondidawo." 
Psalms18:41 Anafuula, koma panalibe wopulumutsa; ngakhale kwa Yehova, koma sanawavomereze." 
Psalms18:42 Pamenepo ndinawapera ngati fumbi la kumphepo; ndinawakhuthula ngati matope a pabwalo. 
Psalms18:43 Mwandipulumutsa pa zolimbana nane za anthu; mwandiika mutu wa amitundu; mtundu wa anthu sindinaudziwa udzanditumikira. 
Psalms18:44 Pakumva m'khutu za ine adzandimvera, alendo adzandigonjera monyenga." 
Psalms18:45 Alendo adzafota, nadzatuluka monjenjemera m'ngaka mwao." 
Psalms18:46 Yehova ngwa moyo; ndipo lidalitsike thanthwe langa; nakwezeke Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa. 
Psalms18:47 Ndiye Mulungu amene andibwezerera chilango, nandigonjetsera mitundu ya anthu." 
Psalms18:48 Andipulumutsa kwa adani anga. Inde mundikweza pa iwo akundiukira ine, mundikwatula kwa munthu wachiwawa." 
Psalms18:49 Chifukwa chake Yehova ndidzakuyamikani mwa amitundu, ndipo dzina lanu ndidzaliimbira." 
Psalms18:50 Alanditsa mfumu yake ndi chipulumutso chachikulu; nachitira chifundo wodzozedwa wake, Davide, ndi mbumba yake, kunthawi zonse." 
Psalms19:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Zakumwamba zimalalikira ulemerero wa Mulungu; ndipo thambo lionetsa ntchito ya manja ake. 
Psalms19:2 Usana ndi usana uchulukitsa mau, ndipo usiku ndi usiku uonetsa nzeru." 
Psalms19:3 Palibe chilankhulidwe, palibe mau; liu lao silimveka." 
Psalms19:4 Muyeso wao wapitirira pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndipo mau ao ku malekezero a m'dziko muli anthu. Iye anaika hema la dzuwa m'menemo," 
Psalms19:5 ndipo lili ngati mkwati wakutuluka m'chipinda mwake, likondwera ngati chiphona kuthamanga m'njira." 
Psalms19:6 Kutuluka kwake lituluka kolekezera thambo, ndipo kuzungulira kwake lifikira ku malekezero ake; ndipo kulibe kanthu kobisalira kutentha kwake." 
Psalms19:7 Malamulo a Yehova ali angwiro, akubwezera moyo; mboni za Yehova zili zokhazikika, zakuwapatsa opusa nzeru." 
Psalms19:8 Malangizo a Yehova ali olungama, akukondweretsa mtima; malamulo a Yehova ali oyera, akupenyetsa maso." 
Psalms19:9 Kuopa Yehova kuli mbee, kwakukhalabe nthawi zonse; maweruzo a Yehova ali oona, alungama konsekonse." 
Psalms19:10 Ndizo zifunika koposa golide, inde, golide wambiri woyengetsa; zizuna koposa uchi ndi zakukha za zisa zake." 
Psalms19:11 Ndiponso kapolo wanu achenjezedwa nazo, m'kuzisunga izo muli mphotho yaikulu." 
Psalms19:12 Adziwitsa zolowereza zake ndani? Mundimasule kwa zolakwa zobisika. 
Psalms19:13 Ndiponso muletse kapolo wanu pa zodzitama; zisachite ufumu pa ine. Pamenepo ndidzakhala wangwiro, ndi wosachimwa cholakwa chachikulu." 
Psalms19:14 Mau a m'kamwa mwanga ndi maganizo a m'mtima wanga avomerezeke pamaso panu, Yehova, thanthwe langa, ndi Mombolo wanga." 
Psalms20:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Yehova akuvomereze tsiku la nsautso; dzina la Mulungu wa Yakobo likuike pamsanje; 
Psalms20:2 likutumizire thandizo lotuluka m'malo oyera, ndipo likugwirizize kuchokera m'Ziyoni;" 
Psalms20:3 likumbukire zopereka zako zonse, lilandire nsembe yako yopsereza;" 
Psalms20:4 likupatse cha mtima wako, ndipo likwaniritse upo wako wonse." 
Psalms20:5 Tidzafuula mokondwera mwa chipulumutso chanu, ndipo m'dzina la Mulungu wathu tidzakweza mbendera; Yehova akwaniritse mapempho ako onse." 
Psalms20:6 Tsopano ndidziwa kuti Yehova apulumutsa wodzozedwa wake; adzamvomereza m'Mwamba mwake moyera ndi mphamvu ya chipulumutso cha dzanja lake lamanja. 
Psalms20:7 Ena atama magaleta, ndi ena akavalo; koma ife tidzatchula dzina la Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms20:8 Iwowa anagonjeka, nagwa; koma ife tauka, ndipo takhala chilili." 
Psalms20:9 Yehova, pulumutsani, mfumuyo ativomereze tsiku lakuitana ife." 
Psalms21:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Yehova, adzasekera mfumu mu mphamvu yanu; adzakondwera kwakukulu m'chipulumutso chanu!" 
Psalms21:2 Mwampatsa iye chikhumbo cha mtima wake, ndipo simunakana pempho la milomo yake." 
Psalms21:3 Pakuti mufika kwa iye ndi madalitso okoma; muika korona wa golide woyengetsa pamutu pake. 
Psalms21:4 Anakupemphani moyo, mwampatsa iye; mwamtalikitsira masiku kunthawi za nthawi." 
Psalms21:5 Ulemerero wake ngwaukulu mwa chipulumutso chanu; mumchitira iye ulemu ndi ukulu. 
Psalms21:6 Pakuti mumuikira madalitso kunthawi zonse; mumkondweretsa ndi chimwemwe pankhope panu. 
Psalms21:7 Pakuti mfumu akhulupirira Yehova, ndipo mwa chifundo cha Wam'mwambamwamba sadzagwedezeka iye." 
Psalms21:8 Dzanja lanu lidzapeza adani anu onse, dzanja lanu lamanja lidzapeza iwo akuda Inu." 
Psalms21:9 Mudzawaika ngati ng'anjo yamoto pa nyengo ya mkwiyo wanu. Yehova adzawatha m'kukwiya kwake, ndipo moto udzawanyeketsa." 
Psalms21:10 Mudzaziononga zobala zao kuzichotsa pa dziko lapansi, ndi mbeu zao mwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms21:11 Pakuti anakupangirani choipa, anapangana chiwembu, osakhoza kuchichita." 
Psalms21:12 Pakuti mudzawabweza m'mbuyo, popiringidza m'nsinga zanu pankhope pao." 
Psalms21:13 Kwezekani, Yehova, mu mphamvu yanu; potero tidzaimba ndi kulemekeza chilimbiko chanu." 
Psalms22:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Ajelet Hasakara. Salimo la Davide. Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji ine? Mukhaliranji kutali kwa chipulumutso changa, ndi kwa mau a kubuula kwanga?" 
Psalms22:2 Mulungu wanga, ndiitana usana, koma simuvomereza; ndipo usiku, sindikhala chete." 
Psalms22:3 Koma Inu ndinu woyera, wakukhala m'malemekezo a Israele." 
Psalms22:4 Makolo athu anakhulupirira Inu; anakhulupirira, ndipo munawalanditsa." 
Psalms22:5 Anafuula kwa Inu, napulumutsidwa; anakhulupirira Inu, ndipo sanachite manyazi." 
Psalms22:6 Koma ine ndine nyongolotsi, si munthu ai, chotonza cha anthu, ndi wonyozedwa ndi anthu." 
Psalms22:7 Onse akundipenya andiseka; akwenzula, apukusa mutu, nati," 
Psalms22:8 Adadzitengera kwa Yehova; kuti adzampulumutsa, amlanditse tsopano popeza akondwera naye." 
Psalms22:9 Pakuti Inu ndinu wondibadwitsa; wondikhulupiritsa pokhala ine pa bere la mai wanga. 
Psalms22:10 Chibadwire ine anandisiyira Inu, kuyambira kwa mai wanga Mulungu wanga ndinu." 
Psalms22:11 Musandikhalire kutali; pakuti nsautso ili pafupi, pakuti palibe mthandizi." 
Psalms22:12 Ng'ombe zamphongo zambiri zandizinga; mphongo zolimba za ku Basani zandizungulira. 
Psalms22:13 Andiyasamira m'kamwa mwao, ngati mkango wozomola ndi wobangula." 
Psalms22:14 Ndathiridwa pansi monga madzi, ndipo mafupa anga onse anaguluka. Mtima wanga ukunga sera; wasungunuka m'kati mwa matumbo anga." 
Psalms22:15 Mphamvu yanga yauma ngati phale; ndi lilime langa likangamira kunsaya zanga; ndipo mwandifikitsa kufumbi la imfa. 
Psalms22:16 Pakuti andizinga agalu, msonkhano wa oipa wanditsekereza; andiboola m'manja anga ndi m'mapazi anga." 
Psalms22:17 Ndikhoza kuwerenga mafupa anga onse; iwo ayang'ana nandipenyetsetsa ine. 
Psalms22:18 Agawana zovala zanga, nachita maere pa malaya anga." 
Psalms22:19 Koma Inu, Yehova, musakhale kutali; mphamvu yanga Inu, mufulumire kundithandiza." 
Psalms22:20 Landitsani moyo wanga kulupanga; wokondedwa wanga kumphamvu ya galu," 
Psalms22:21 ndipulumutseni m'kamwa mwa mkango; inde mwandiyankha ine ndili pa nyanga za njati. 
Psalms22:22 Ndidzalalikira dzina lanu kwa abale anga, pakati pa msonkhano ndidzakulemekezani." 
Psalms22:23 Inu akuopa Yehova, mumlemekeze; inu nonse mbumba ya Yakobo, mumchitire ulemu; ndipo muchite mantha ndi Iye, inu nonse mbumba ya Israele." 
Psalms22:24 Pakuti sanapeputsa ndipo sananyansidwe ndi zunzo la wozunzika; ndipo sanambisire nkhope yake; koma pomfuulira Iye, anamva." 
Psalms22:25 Lemekezo langa lidzakhala la Inu mu msonkhano waukulu, zowinda zanga ndidzazichita pamaso pa iwo akumuopa Iye." 
Psalms22:26 Ozunzika adzadya nadzakhuta, adzayamika Yehova iwo amene amfuna, ukhale moyo mtima wako nthawi zonse." 
Psalms22:27 Malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzakumbukira nadzatembenukira kwa Yehova, ndipo mafuko onse a amitundu adzagwadira pamaso panu." 
Psalms22:28 Pakuti ufumuwo ngwa Yehova; Iye achita ufumu mwa amitundu. 
Psalms22:29 Onenepa onse a pa dziko lapansi adzadya nadzagwadira; onse akutsikira kufumbi adzawerama pamaso pake, ndi iye amene sadziwa kusunga moyo wake." 
Psalms22:30 Mbumba ya anthu idzamtumikira; kudzanenedwa za Ambuye ku mibadwo yakudza. 
Psalms22:31 Iwo adzadza nadzafotokozera chilungamo chake kwa anthu akadzabadwa, kuti Iye anachichita." 
Psalms23:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova ndiye mbusa wanga; sindidzasowa. 
Psalms23:2 Andigonetsa kubusa lamsipu, anditsogolera kumadzi odikha." 
Psalms23:3 Atsitsimutsa moyo wanga; anditsogolera m'mabande a chilungamo, chifukwa cha dzina lake." 
Psalms23:4 Inde, ndingakhale ndiyenda m'chigwa cha mthunzi wa imfa, sindidzaopa choipa; pakuti Inu muli ndi ine; chibonga chanu ndi ndodo yanu, izi zindisangalatsa ine." 
Psalms23:5 Mundiyalikira gome pamaso panga m'kuona kwa adani anga; mwandidzoza mutu wanga mafuta; chikho changa chisefuka. 
Psalms23:6 Inde ukoma ndi chifundo zidzanditsata masiku onse a moyo wanga, ndipo ndidzakhala m'nyumba ya Yehova masiku onse." 
Psalms24:1 Salimo la Davide. Dziko lapansi nla Yehova ndi zodzala zake zomwe, dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi iwo okhala m'mwemo." 
Psalms24:2 Pakuti Iye analimanga pazinyanja, nalikhazika pamadzi." 
Psalms24:3 Adzakwera ndani m'phiri la Yehova? Nadzaima m'malo ake oyera ndani? 
Psalms24:4 Woyera m'manja, ndi woona m'mtima, ndiye; iye amene sanakweze moyo wake kutsata zachabe, ndipo salumbira monyenga." 
Psalms24:5 Iye adzalandira dalitso kwa Yehova, ndi chilungamo kwa Mulungu wa chipulumutso chake." 
Psalms24:6 Uwu ndi mbadwo wa iwo akufuna Iye, iwo akufuna nkhope yanu, Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Weramutsani mitu yanu, zipata inu; ndipo kwezekani inu, zitseko zosatha, kuti Mfumu ya ulemerero ilowe." 
Psalms24:8 Mfumu imene ya ulemerero ndani? Yehova wamphamvu ndi wolimba, Yehova wolimba kunkhondo." 
Psalms24:9 Weramutsani mitu yanu, zipata inu; inde weramutsani, zitseko zosatha inu, kuti Mfumu ya ulemerero ilowe." 
Psalms24:10 Mfumu imene ya ulemerero ndani? Yehova wa makamumakamu, ndiye Mfumu ya ulemerero." 
Psalms25:1 Salimo la Davide. Ndikweza moyo wanga kwa Inu, Yehova." 
Psalms25:2 Mulungu wanga, ndakhulupirira Inu, ndisachite manyazi; adani anga asandiseke ine." 
Psalms25:3 Inde, onse akuyembekezera Inu sadzachita manyazi; adzachita manyazi iwo amene achita monyenga kopanda chifukwa." 
Psalms25:4 Mundidziwitse njira zanu, Yehova; Mundiphunzitse mayendedwe anu." 
Psalms25:5 Munditsogolere m'choonadi chanu, ndipo mundiphunzitse; pakuti Inu ndinu Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa; Inu ndikuyembekezerani tsiku lonseli." 
Psalms25:6 Kumbukirani, Yehova, nsoni zanu ndi chifundo chanu; pakuti izi nza kale lonse." 
Psalms25:7 Musakumbukire zolakwa za ubwana wanga kapena zopikisana nanu. Mundikumbukire monga mwa chifundo chanu, chifukwa cha ubwino wanu, Yehova." 
Psalms25:8 Yehova ndiye wabwino ndi wolunjika mtima, chifukwa chake adzaphunzitsa olakwa za njira." 
Psalms25:9 Adzawatsogolera ofatsa m'chiweruzo; ndipo adzaphunzitsa ofatsa njira yake. 
Psalms25:10 Mayendedwe onse a Yehova ndiwo chifundo ndi choonadi, kwa iwo akusunga pangano lake ndi mboni zake." 
Psalms25:11 Chifukwa cha dzina lanu, Yehova, ndikhululukireni kusakaza kwanga, pakuti ndiko kwakukulu." 
Psalms25:12 Munthuyo wakuopa Yehova ndani? Adzamlangiza iye njira adzasankheyo. 
Psalms25:13 Moyo wake udzakhala mokoma; ndi mbumba zake zidzalandira dziko lapansi. 
Psalms25:14 Chinsinsi cha Yehova chili kwa iwo akumuopa Iye; ndipo adzawadziwitsa pangano lake. 
Psalms25:15 Maso anga alinga kwa Yehova kosaleka; pakuti Iye adzaonjola mapazi anga m'ukonde. 
Psalms25:16 Cheukirani ine ndipo ndichitireni chifundo; pakuti ndili wounguluma ndi wozunzika. 
Psalms25:17 Masautso a mtima wanga akula, munditulutse m'zondipsinja." 
Psalms25:18 Penyani mazunzo anga ndi zovuta zanga; ndipo khululukirani zolakwa zanga zonse. 
Psalms25:19 Penyani adani anga, popeza achuluka; ndipo andida ndi udani wachiwawa." 
Psalms25:20 Sungani moyo wanga, ndilanditseni, ndisakhale nao manyazi, pakuti ndakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms25:21 Ungwiro ndi kuongoka mtima zindisunge, pakuti ndayembekezera Inu." 
Psalms25:22 Ombolani Israele, Mulungu, m'masautso ake onse." 
Psalms26:1 Salimo la Davide. Mundiweruze, Yehova, pakuti ndayenda m'ungwiro wanga, ndipo ndakhulupirira Yehova, sindadzaterereka." 
Psalms26:2 Mundiyesere, Yehova, ndipo mundisunthe; yeretsani impso zanga ndi mtima wanga." 
Psalms26:3 Pakuti chifundo chanu chili pamaso panga; ndipo ndayenda m'choona chanu. 
Psalms26:4 Sindinakhala pansi ndi anthu achabe; kapena kutsagana nao anthu othyasika. 
Psalms26:5 Ndidana nao msonkhano wa ochimwa, ndipo sindidzakhala nao pansi ochita zoipa." 
Psalms26:6 Ndidzasamba manja anga mosalakwa; kuti ndizungulire guwa la nsembe lanu, Yehova;" 
Psalms26:7 kuti ndimveketse mau a chiyamiko, ndi kulalikira ntchito zanu zonse zozizwa." 
Psalms26:8 Yehova, ndikonda chikhalidwe cha nyumba yanu, ndi malo akukhalamo ulemerero wanu." 
Psalms26:9 Musandichotsere mzimu wanga pamodzi ndi olakwa, kapena moyo wanga pamodzi ndi anthu okhetsa mwazi;" 
Psalms26:10 amene m'manja mwao muli mphulupulu, ndi dzanja lao lamanja ladzala ndi zokometsera mlandu." 
Psalms26:11 Koma ine, ndidzayenda m'ungwiro wanga; mundiombole, ndipo ndichitireni chifundo." 
Psalms26:12 Phazi langa liponda pachidikha, m'masonkhano ndidzalemekeza Yehova." 
Psalms27:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova ndiye kuunika kwanga ndi chipulumutso changa; ndidzaopa yani? Yehova ndiye mphamvu ya moyo wanga; ndidzachita mantha ndi yani? 
Psalms27:2 Pondifika ine ochita zoipa kudzadya mnofu wanga, inde akundisautsa ndi adani anga, anakhumudwa iwo nagwa." 
Psalms27:3 Lingakhale gulu la ankhondo limanga misasa kuti andithyole, mtima wanga sungachite mantha; ingakhale nkhondo ikandiukira, inde pomweponso ndidzakhulupirira." 
Psalms27:4 Chinthu chimodzi ndinachipempha kwa Yehova, ndidzachilondola ichi, Kuti ndikhalitse m'nyumba ya Yehova masiku onse a moyo wanga, kupenya kukongola kwake kwa Yehova ndi kufunsitsa m'Kachisi wake." 
Psalms27:5 Chifukwa kuti pa tsiku la tsoka Iye adzandibisa mumsasa mwake, adzandibisa m'tsenjezi mwa chihema chake; pathanthwe adzandikweza." 
Psalms27:6 Ndipo tsopano mutu wanga udzakwezeka pamwamba pa adani anga akundizinga; ndipo ndidzapereka m'chihema mwake nsembe za kufuula mokondwera; ndidzaimba, inde, ndidzaimbira Yehova zomlemekeza." 
Psalms27:7 Imvani, Yehova, liu langa pofuula ine; mundichitirenso chifundo ndipo mundivomereze." 
Psalms27:8 Pamene munati, Funani nkhope yanga; mtima wanga unati kwa Inu. Nkhope yanu, Yehova, ndidzaifuna." 
Psalms27:9 Musandibisire ine nkhope yanu; musachotse kapolo wanu ndi kukwiya. Inu munakhala thandizo langa; musanditaye, ndipo musandisiye Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa." 
Psalms27:10 Pakuti wandisiya atate wanga ndi amai wanga, koma Yehova anditola." 
Psalms27:11 Mundiphunzitse njira yanu, Yehova, munditsogolere pa njira yachidikha, chifukwa cha adani anga." 
Psalms27:12 Musandipereke ku chifuniro cha akundisautsa, chifukwa zinandiukira mboni zonama ndi iwo akupumira zachiwawa." 
Psalms27:13 Ndikadapanda kukhulupirira kuti ndikaone ubwino wa Yehova m'dziko la amoyo, ndikadatani!" 
Psalms27:14 Yembekeza Yehova, limbika, ndipo Iye adzalimbitsa mtima wako; inde, yembekeza Yehova." 
Psalms28:1 Salimo la Davide. Kwa Inu, Yehova, ndidzafuulira; thanthwe langa, musandikhalire ngati wosamva; pakuti ngati munditontholera ine, ndidzafanana nao iwo akutsikira kumanda." 
Psalms28:2 Mverani mau a kupemba kwanga, pamene ndilirira Inu, pamene ndikweza manja anga kuloza ponenera panu poyera." 
Psalms28:3 Musandikoke kundichotsa pamodzi ndi oipa, ndi ochita zopanda pake; amene alankhula zamtendere ndi anansi ao, koma mumtima mwao muli choipa." 
Psalms28:4 Muwapatse monga mwa ntchito zao, ndi monga mwa choipa chochita iwo; muwapatse monga mwa machitidwe a manja ao; muwabwezere zoyenera iwo." 
Psalms28:5 Pakuti sasamala ntchito za Yehova, kapena machitidwe a manja ake, adzawapasula, osawamanganso." 
Psalms28:6 Wodalitsika Yehova, Pakuti adamva mau a kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms28:7 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga, ndi chikopa changa; mtima wanga wakhulupirira Iye, ndipo anandithandiza, chifukwa chake mtima wanga ukondwera kwakukulu; ndipo ndidzamyamika nayo nyimbo yanga." 
Psalms28:8 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yao, inde mphamvu ya chipulumutso cha wodzozedwa wake." 
Psalms28:9 Pulumutsani anthu anu, ndi kudalitsa cholandira chanu; muwawetenso, ndi kuwanyamula nthawi zonse." 
Psalms29:1 Salimo la Davide. Perekani kwa Yehova, inu ana a amphamvu, perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero ndi mphamvu." 
Psalms29:2 Perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lake, gwadirani Yehova moyera ndi mokometsetsa." 
Psalms29:3 Liu la Yehova lili pamadzi; Mulungu wa ulemerero agunda, ndiye Yehova pa madzi ambiri."
