Psalms29:4 Liu la Yehova ndi lamphamvu; liu la Yehova ndi lalikulukulu. 
Psalms29:5 Liu la Yehova lithyola mitengo yamkungudza; inde Yehova athyola mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni. 
Psalms29:6 Aitumphitsa monga mwanawang'ombe; Lebanoni ndi Sirioni monga msona wa njati. 
Psalms29:7 Liu la Yehova ligawa malawi a moto. 
Psalms29:8 Liu la Yehova ligwedeza chipululu; Yehova agwedeza chipululu cha Kadesi. 
Psalms29:9 Liu la Yehova liswetsa nyama zazikazi, ndipo lipulula nkhalango; ndipo m'Kachisi mwake zonse zili m'mwemo zimati, Ulemerero." 
Psalms29:10 Yehova anakhala pa chigumula, inde Yehova akhala mfumu kunthawi yonka muyaya." 
Psalms29:11 Yehova adzapatsa anthu ake mphamvu, Yehova adzadalitsa anthu ake ndi mtendere." 
Psalms30:1 Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo yakuperekera nyumba kwa Mulungu. Ndidzakukwezani, Yehova; pakuti mwandinyamutsa, ndipo simunandikondwetsera adani anga." 
Psalms30:2 Yehova, Mulungu wanga, ndinafuulira kwa Inu, ndipo munandichiritsa." 
Psalms30:3 Yehova munabweza moyo wanga kumanda, munandisunga ndi moyo, kuti ndingatsikire kudzenje." 
Psalms30:4 Imbirani Yehova, inu okondedwa ake, ndipo yamikani pokumbukira chiyero chake." 
Psalms30:5 Pakuti mkwiyo wake ukhala kanthawi kokha; koma kuyanja kwake moyo wonse. Kulira kuchezera, koma mamawa kuli kufuula kokondwera." 
Psalms30:6 Ndipo ine, ndinanena m'phindu langa, sindidzagwedezeka nthawi zonse." 
Psalms30:7 Inu, Yehova, munakhazikitsa phiri langa ndi kuyanja kwanu; munabisa nkhope yanu; ndinaopa." 
Psalms30:8 Ndinafuulira kwa Inu, Yehova; kwa Yehova ndinapemba," 
Psalms30:9 M'mwazi mwanga muli phindu lanji, potsikira ine kudzenje? Ngati fumbi lidzayamika Inu? Ngati lidzalalikira choonadi chanu?" 
Psalms30:10 Mverani, Yehova, ndipo ndichitireni chifundo, Yehova, mundithandize ndi Inu." 
Psalms30:11 Munasanduliza kulira kwanga kukhale kusekera; munandivula chiguduli changa, ndipo munandiveka chikondwero," 
Psalms30:12 kuti ulemu wanga uimbire Inu, wosakhala chete. Yehova Mulungu wanga, ndidzakuyamikani nthawi zonse." 
Psalms31:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Ndakhulupirira Inu, Yehova, ndikhale wopanda manyazi nthawi zonse, mwa chilungamo chanu ndipulumutseni ine." 
Psalms31:2 Munditcherere khutu lanu; ndipulumutseni msanga. Mundikhalire ine thanthwe lolimba, nyumba yamalinga yakundisunga." 
Psalms31:3 Pakuti Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa; ndipo chifukwa cha dzina lanu ndiyendetseni bwino, ndipo nditsogolereni." 
Psalms31:4 Mundionjole m'ukonde umene ananditchera mobisika. Pakuti Inu ndinu mphamvu yanga. 
Psalms31:5 Ndipereka mzimu wanga m'dzanja lanu; mwandiombola, Inu Yehova, Mulungu wa choonadi." 
Psalms31:6 Ndikwiya nao iwo akusamala zachabe zonama, koma ndikhulupirira Yehova." 
Psalms31:7 Ndidzakondwera ndi kusangalala m'chifundo chanu, pakuti mudapenya zunzo langa; ndipo mudadziwa mzimu wanga mu nsautso yanga." 
Psalms31:8 Ndipo simunandipereka m'dzanja la mdani; munapondetsa mapazi anga pali malo. 
Psalms31:9 Mundichitire chifundo, Yehova, pakuti ndasautsika ine. Diso langa, mzimu wanga, ndi mimba yanga, zapuwala ndi mavuto." 
Psalms31:10 Pakuti moyo wanga watha ndi chisoni, ndi zaka zanga zatha ndi kuusa moyo. Mphamvu yanga yafooka chifukwa cha kusakaza kwanga, ndi mafupa anga apuwala." 
Psalms31:11 Ndakhala chotonza chifukwa cha akundisautsa onse, inde, koposa kwa anansi anga; ndipo anzanga andiyesa choopsa; iwo akundipenya pabwalo anandithawa." 
Psalms31:12 Ndaiwalika m'mtima monga wakufa, ndikhala monga chotengera chosweka." 
Psalms31:13 Pakuti ndamva ugogodi wa ambiri, mantha andizinga. Pondipangira chiwembu, anatsimikiza mtima kulanda moyo wanga." 
Psalms31:14 Koma ine ndakhulupirira Inu, Yehova, ndinati, Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms31:15 Nyengo zanga zili m'manja mwanu, mundilanditse m'manja a adani anga, ndi kwa iwo akundilondola ine." 
Psalms31:16 Walitsani nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu, mundipulumutse ndi chifundo chanu." 
Psalms31:17 Yehova, musandichititse manyazi; pakuti ndafuulira kwa Inu, oipa achite manyazi, atonthole m'manda." 
Psalms31:18 Ikhale yosalankhula milomo ya mabodza, imene imalankhula mwachipongwe pa olungama mtima, ndi kudzikuza ndi kunyoza." 
Psalms31:19 Ha! Kukoma kwanu ndiko kwakukulu nanga, kumene munasungira iwo akuopa Inu, kumene munachitira iwo akukhulupirira Inu, pamaso pa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms31:20 Pobisalira pamaso panu mudzawabisa kwa chiwembu cha munthu, mudzawabisa iwo mumsasa kuti muwalanditse pa kutetana kwa malilime." 
Psalms31:21 Wolemekezeka Yehova, pakuti anandichitira chifundo chake chodabwitsa m'mudzi walinga." 
Psalms31:22 Ndipo ine, pakutenga nkhawa, ndinati, Ndadulidwa kundichotsa pamaso panu. Komatu munamva mau a kupemba kwanga pamene ndinafuulira kwa Inu." 
Psalms31:23 Kondani Yehova, Inu nonse okondedwa ake, Yehova asunga okhulupirika, ndipo abwezera zochuluka iye wakuchita zodzitama." 
Psalms31:24 Limbikani ndipo Iye adzalimbitsa mtima wanu, inu nonse akuyembekeza Yehova." 
Psalms32:1 Salimo la Davide. Chilangizo. Wodala munthuyo wokhululukidwa tchimo lake; wokwiriridwa choipa chake. 
Psalms32:2 Wodala munthuyu Yehova samwerengera mphulupulu zake; ndimo mumzimu mwake mulibe chinyengo. 
Psalms32:3 Pamene ndinakhala chete mafupa anga anakalamba ndi kubuula kwanga tsiku lonse. 
Psalms32:4 Chifukwa usana ndi usiku dzanja lanu linandilemera ine; uwisi wanga unasandulika kuuma kwa malimwe. 
Psalms32:5 Ndinavomera choipa changa kwa Inu; ndipo mphulupulu yanga sindinaibisa. Ndinati, Ndidzaululira Yehova machimo anga; ndipo munakhululukira choipa cha kulakwa kwanga." 
Psalms32:6 Chifukwa chake oyera mtima onse apemphere kwa Inu, pa nthawi ya kupeza Inu; indetu pakusefuka madzi aakulu sadzamfikira iye." 
Psalms32:7 Inu ndinu mobisalira mwanga; m'nsautso mudzandisunga; mudzandizinga ndi nyimbo za chipulumutso. 
Psalms32:8 Ine ndidzakulangiza ndi kuphunzitsa iwe za njira ukayendayo; ndidzakupangira ndi diso langa lakuyang'ana iwe. 
Psalms32:9 Musakhale monga kavalo, kapena ngati bulu, wopanda nzeru; zomangira zao ndizo cham'kamwa ndi chapamutu zakuwakokera, pakuti ukapanda kutero sadzakuyandikiza." 
Psalms32:10 Zisoni zambiri zigwera woipa; koma chifundo chidzamzinga iye wakukhulupirira Yehova. 
Psalms32:11 Sekerani mwa Yehova, ndimo kondwerani inu olungama mtima; ndipo fuulani mokondwera nonsenu oongoka mtima." 
Psalms33:1 Fuulani mokondwera mwa Yehova, inu olungama mtima, oongoka mtima ayenera kulemekeza." 
Psalms33:2 Yamikani Yehova ndi zeze; muimbireni ndi chisakasa cha zingwe khumi. 
Psalms33:3 Mumuimbire Iye nyimbo yatsopano; muimbe mwaluso kumveketsa mau. 
Psalms33:4 Pakuti mau a Yehova ali olunjika; ndi ntchito zake zonse zikhulupirika. 
Psalms33:5 Iye ndiye wakukonda chilungamo ndi chiweruzo, dziko lapansi ladzala ndi chifundo cha Yehova." 
Psalms33:6 Zakumwamba zinalengedwa ndi mau a Yehova; ndipo ndi mpweya wa m'kamwa mwake khamu lao lonse. 
Psalms33:7 Amaunjika madzi a m'nyanja monga mulu, amakundika zakuya mosungiramo." 
Psalms33:8 Dziko lonse lapansi liope Yehova, ponse pali anthu achite mantha chifukwa cha Iye." 
Psalms33:9 Pakuti ananena, ndipo chinachitidwa; analamulira, ndipo chinakhazikika." 
Psalms33:10 Yehova aphwanya upo wa amitundu, asandutsa chabe zolingirira za mitundu ya anthu." 
Psalms33:11 Chiweruzo cha Yehova chikhazikika chikhazikikire, zolingirira za m'mtima mwake ku mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms33:12 Wodalitsika mtundu wa anthu umene Yehova ndiye Mulungu wao; mtundu womwe anausankha ukhale cholandira cha Iye yekha. 
Psalms33:13 Yehova apenyerera m'mwamba; aona ana onse a anthu. 
Psalms33:14 M'malo akhalamo Iye, amapenya pansi pa onse akukhala m'dziko lapansi." 
Psalms33:15 Iye amene akonza mitima ya iwo onse, amene azindikira zochita zao zonse." 
Psalms33:16 Palibe mfumu yoti gulu lalikulu limpulumutsa, mphamvu yaikulu siichilanditsa chiphona." 
Psalms33:17 Kavalo safikana kupulumuka naye, chinkana mphamvu yake njaikulu sapulumutsa." 
Psalms33:18 Taonani, diso la Yehova lili pa iwo akumuopa Iye, pa iwo akuyembekeza chifundo chake." 
Psalms33:19 Kupulumutsa moyo wao kwa imfa, ndi kuwasunga ndi moyo m'nyengo ya njala." 
Psalms33:20 Moyo wathu walindira Yehova; Iye ndiye thandizo lathu ndi chikopa chathu. 
Psalms33:21 Pakuti mtima wathu udzakondwera mwa Iye, chifukwa takhulupirira dzina lake loyera." 
Psalms33:22 Yehova, chifundo chanu chikhale pa ife, monga takuyembekezani Inu." 
Psalms34:1 Salimo la Davide. Muja anasintha makhalidwe ake pamaso pa Abimeleki, amene anampirikitsa, ndipo anachoka. Ndidzalemekeza Yehova nyengo zonse; kumlemekeza kwake kudzakhala m'kamwa mwanga kosalekeza." 
Psalms34:2 Moyo wanga udzatamanda Yehova; ofatsa adzakumva nadzakondwera. 
Psalms34:3 Bukitsani pamodzi ndine ukulu wa Yehova, ndipo tikweze dzina lake pamodzi." 
Psalms34:4 Ndinafuna Yehova ndipo anandivomera, nandilanditsa m'mantha anga onse." 
Psalms34:5 Iwo anayang'ana Iye nasanguluka; ndipo pankhope pao sipadzachita manyazi. 
Psalms34:6 Munthu uyu wozunzika anafuula, ndipo Yehova anamumva, nampulumutsa m'masautso ake onse." 
Psalms34:7 Mngelo wa Yehova azinga kuwatchinjiriza iwo akuopa Iye, nawalanditsa iwo." 
Psalms34:8 Talawani, ndipo onani kuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; wodala munthuyo wakukhulupirira Iye." 
Psalms34:9 Opani Yehova, inu oyera mtima ake; chifukwa iwo akumuopa Iye sasowa." 
Psalms34:10 Misona ya mkango isowa nimva njala, koma iwo akufuna Yehova sadzasowa kanthu kabwino." 
Psalms34:11 Idzani ananu ndimvereni ine, ndidzakulangizani zakumuopa Yehova." 
Psalms34:12 Munthu wokhumba moyo ndani, wokonda masiku, kuti aone zabwino?" 
Psalms34:13 Uletse lilime lako lisatchule zoipa, ndipo milomo yako isalankhule chinyengo." 
Psalms34:14 Futuka pazoipa, nuchite zabwino, funa mtendere ndi kuulondola." 
Psalms34:15 Maso a Yehova ali pa olungama mtima, ndipo makutu ake atchereza kulira kwao." 
Psalms34:16 Nkhope ya Yehova itsutsana nao akuchita zoipa, kudula chikumbukiro chao pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms34:17 Iwowo anaitana, ndipo Yehova anawamva, nawalanditsa kumasautso ao onse." 
Psalms34:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi iwo a mtima wosweka, apulumutsa iwo a mzimu wolapadi." 
Psalms34:19 Masautso a wolungama mtima achuluka, koma Yehova amlanditsa mwa onsewa." 
Psalms34:20 Iye asunga mafupa ake onse; silinathyoka limodzi lonse. 
Psalms34:21 Mphulupulu idzamupha woipa; ndipo adzawatsutsa kumlandu iwo akudana naye wolungama. 
Psalms34:22 Yehova aombola moyo wa anyamata ake, ndipo sadzawatsutsa kumlandu onse akukhulupirira Iye." 
Psalms35:1 Salimo la Davide. Tsutsanani nao iwo akutsutsana nane, Yehova; limbanani nao iwo akulimbana nane." 
Psalms35:2 Gwirani chikopa chotchinjiriza, ukani kundithandiza." 
Psalms35:3 Sololani nthungo, ndipo muwatsekerezere kunjira akundilondola. Nenani ndi moyo wanga, Chipulumutso chako ndine." 
Psalms35:4 Athe nzeru nachite manyazi iwo akufuna moyo wanga; abwezedwe m'mbuyo nasokonezeke iwo akundipangira chiwembu. 
Psalms35:5 Akhale monga mungu kumphepo, ndipo mngelo wa Yehova awapirikitse." 
Psalms35:6 Njira yao ikhale ya mdima ndi yoterera, ndipo mngelo wa Yehova awalondole." 
Psalms35:7 Pakuti ananditchera ukonde wao m'mbunamo kopanda chifukwa, anakumbira moyo wanga dzenje kopanda chifukwa." 
Psalms35:8 Chimgwere modzidzimutsa chionongeko; ndipo ukonde wake umene anautcha umkole yekha mwini, agwemo, naonongeke m'mwemo." 
Psalms35:9 Ndipo moyo wanga udzakondwera mwa Yehova; udzasekera mwa chipulumutso chake. 
Psalms35:10 Mafupa anga onse adzanena, Yehova, afanana ndi Inu ndani, wakulanditsa wozunzika kwa iye amene amposa mphamvu, ndi wozunzika ndi waumphawi kwa iye amfunkhira?" 
Psalms35:11 Mboni za chiwawa ziuka, zindifunsa zosadziwa ine." 
Psalms35:12 Andibwezera choipa m'malo mwa chokoma, inde, asaukitsa moyo wanga." 
Psalms35:13 Koma ine, pakudwala iwowa, chovala changa ndi chiguduli. Ndinazunza moyo wanga ndi kusala; ndipo pemphero langa linabwera kuchifuwa changa." 
Psalms35:14 Ndakhala ine monga ngati iye anali bwenzi langa, kapena mbale wanga; polira ndinaweramira pansi, monga munthu wakulira maliro amai wake." 
Psalms35:15 Ndipo pakutsimphina ine anakondwera, nasonkhana pamodzi; akundipanda anandisonkhanira; ndipo sindinachidziwa, ananding'amba osaleka." 
Psalms35:16 Pakati pa onyodola pamadyerero, anandikukutira mano." 
Psalms35:17 Ambuye, mudzapenyererabe nthawi yanji? Bwezani moyo wanga kwa zakundiononga zao, wanga wa wokha kwa misona ya mkango." 
Psalms35:18 Ndidzakuyamikani mu msonkhano waukulu; m'chikhamu cha anthu ndidzakulemekezani. 
Psalms35:19 Adani anga asandikondwerere ine monyenga; okwiya nane kopanda chifukwa asanditsinzinire. 
Psalms35:20 Pakuti salankhula zamtendere, koma apangira chiwembu odekha m'dziko." 
Psalms35:21 Ndipo andiyasamira m'kamwa mwao; nati, Hede, Hede, diso lathu lidachipenya." 
Psalms35:22 Yehova, mudazipenya; musakhale chete, Ambuye, musakhale kutali ndi ine." 
Psalms35:23 Galamukani, ndipo khalani maso kundiweruzira mlandu wanga, Mulungu wanga ndi Ambuye wanga." 
Psalms35:24 Mundiweruze monga mwa chilungamo chanu, Yehova Mulungu wanga; ndipo asandisekerere ine." 
Psalms35:25 Asanene mumtima mwao, Hede, momwemo! Asanene, Tammeza iye." 
Psalms35:26 Achite manyazi, nadodome iwo akukondwera chifukwa cha choipa chidandigwera. Avekeke ndi manyazi ndi kupunzika iwo akudzikuza pa ine." 
Psalms35:27 Afuule mokondwera nasangalale iwo akukondwera nacho chilungamo changa, ndipo anene kosalekeza, Abuke Yehova, amene akondwera ndi mtendere wa mtumiki wake." 
Psalms35:28 Ndipo lilime langa lilalikire chilungamo chanu, ndi lemekezo lanu tsiku lonse." 
Psalms36:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide, mtumiki wa Yehova. Cholakwa cha woipayo chimati m'kati mwa mtima wanga, palibe kuopa Mulungu pamaso pake." 
Psalms36:2 Pakuti adzidyoletsa yekha m'kuona kwake, kuti anthu sadzachipeza choipa chake ndi kukwiya nacho." 
Psalms36:3 Mau a pakamwa pake ndiwo opanda pake ndi onyenga, waleka kuzindikira ndi kuchita bwino." 
Psalms36:4 Alingirira zopanda pake pakama pake; adziika panjira posati pabwino; choipa saipidwa nacho. 
Psalms36:5 Yehova, m'mwamba muli chifundo chanu; choonadi chanu chifikira kuthambo." 
Psalms36:6 Chilungamo chanu chikunga mapiri a Mulungu; maweruzo anu akunga chozama chachikulu, Yehova, musunga munthu ndi nyama." 
Psalms36:7 Ha! Chifundo chanu, Mulungu, nchokondedwadi! Ndipo ana a anthu athawira kumthunzi wa mapiko anu." 
Psalms36:8 Adzakhuta kwambiri ndi zonona za m'nyumba mwanu, ndipo mudzawamwetsa mu mtsinje wa zokondweretsa zanu." 
Psalms36:9 Pakuti chitsime cha moyo chili ndi Inu, M'kuunika kwanu tidzaona kuunika." 
Psalms36:10 Tanimphitsani chifundo chanu pa iwo akudziwa Inu; ndi chilungamo chanu pa oongoka mtima. 
Psalms36:11 Phazi la akudzikuza lisandifikire ine, ndi dzanja la oipa lisandichotse." 
Psalms36:12 Pomwepo padagwera ochita zopanda pake. Anawalikha, ndipo sadzatha kuukanso." 
Psalms37:1 Salimo la Davide. Usavutike mtima chifukwa cha ochita zoipa, usachite nsanje chifukwa cha ochita chosalungama." 
Psalms37:2 Pakuti adzawamweta msanga monga udzu, ndipo adzafota monga msipu wauwisi." 
Psalms37:3 Khulupirira Yehova, ndipo chita chokoma; khala m'dziko, ndipo tsata choonadi." 
Psalms37:4 Udzikondweretsenso mwa Yehova; ndipo Iye adzakupatsa zokhumba mtima wako. 
Psalms37:5 Pereka njira yako kwa Yehova; khulupiriranso Iye, adzachichita." 
Psalms37:6 Ndipo adzaonetsa chilungamo chako monga kuunika, ndi kuweruza kwako monga usana." 
Psalms37:7 Khala chete mwa Yehova, numlindirire Iye; usavutike mtima chifukwa cha iye wolemerera m'njira yake, chifukwa cha munthu wakuchita chiwembu." 
Psalms37:8 Leka kupsa mtima, nutaye mkwiyo; usavutike mtima ungachite choipa." 
Psalms37:9 Pakuti ochita zoipa adzadulidwa; koma iwo akuyembekeza Yehova, iwowa adzalandira dziko lapansi." 
Psalms37:10 Katsala kanthawi ndipo woipa adzatha psiti; inde, udzayang'anira mbuto yake, nudzapeza palibe." 
Psalms37:11 Koma ofatsa adzalandira dziko lapansi; nadzakondwera nao mtendere wochuluka. 
Psalms37:12 Woipa apangira chiwembu wolungama, namkukutira mano." 
Psalms37:13 Ambuye adzamseka, popeza apenya kuti tsiku lake likudza." 
Psalms37:14 Oipa anasolola lupanga, nakoka uta wao; alikhe ozunzika ndi aumphawi, aphe amene ali oongoka m'njira." 
Psalms37:15 Lupanga lao lidzalowa m'mtima mwao momwe, ndipo mauta ao adzathyoledwa." 
Psalms37:16 Zochepa zake za wolungama zikoma koposa kuchuluka kwao kwa oipa ambiri. 
Psalms37:17 Pakuti manja a oipa adzathyoledwa, koma Yehova achirikiza olungama." 
Psalms37:18 Yehova adziwa masiku a anthu angwiro; ndipo chosiyira chao chidzakhala chosatha. 
Psalms37:19 Sadzachita manyazi m'nyengo yoipa, ndipo m'masiku a njala adzakhuta." 
Psalms37:20 Pakuti oipa adzatayika, ndipo adani ake a Yehova adzanga mafuta a anaankhosa; adzanyeka, monga utsi adzakanganuka." 
Psalms37:21 Woipa akongola, wosabweza, koma wolungama achitira chifundo, napereka." 
Psalms37:22 Pakuti iwo amene awadalitsa adzalandira dziko lapansi; koma iwo amene awatemberera adzadulidwa. 
Psalms37:23 Yehova akhazikitsa mayendedwe a munthu; ndipo akondwera nayo njira yake. 
Psalms37:24 Angakhale akagwa, satayikiratu, pakuti Yehova agwira dzanja lake." 
Psalms37:25 Ndinali mwana ndipo ndakalamba; ndipo sindinapenya wolungama wasiyidwa, kapena mbumba zake zilinkupempha chakudya." 
Psalms37:26 Tsiku lonse achitira chifundo, nakongoletsa; ndipo mbumba zake zidalitsidwa." 
Psalms37:27 Siyana nacho choipa, nuchite chokoma, nukhale nthawi zonse." 
Psalms37:28 Pakuti Yehova akonda chiweruzo, ndipo sataya okondedwa ake. Asungika kosatha, koma adzadula mbumba za oipa." 
Psalms37:29 Olungama adzalandira dziko lapansi, nadzakhala momwemo kosatha." 
Psalms37:30 Pakamwa pa wolungama palankhula zanzeru, ndi lilime lake linena chiweruzo." 
Psalms37:31 Malamulo a Mulungu wake ali mumtima mwake; pakuyenda pake sadzaterereka. 
Psalms37:32 Woipa aunguza wolungama, nafuna kumupha." 
Psalms37:33 Yehova sadzamsiya m'dzanja lake; ndipo sadzamtsutsa poweruzidwa iye. 
Psalms37:34 Yembekeza Yehova, nusunge njira yake, ndipo Iye adzakukweza kuti ulandire dziko. Pakudulidwa oipa udzapenya." 
Psalms37:35 Ndapenya woipa, alikuopsa, natasa monga mtengo wauwisi wanzika." 
Psalms37:36 Koma anapita ndipo taona, kwati zii; ndipo ndinampwaira osampeza." 
Psalms37:37 Tapenya wangwiro, ndipo taona woongoka mtima! Pakuti ku matsiriziro ake a munthuyo kuli mtendere." 
Psalms37:38 Koma olakwa adzaonongeka pamodzi; matsiriziro a oipa adzadulidwa. 
Psalms37:39 Koma chipulumutso cha olungama chidzera kwa Yehova, Iye ndiye mphamvu yao m'nyengo ya nsautso." 
Psalms37:40 Ndipo Yehova awathandiza, nawalanditsa; awalanditsa kwa oipa nawapulumutsa, chifukwa kuti anamkhulupirira Iye." 
Psalms38:1 Salimo la Davide, lakukumbutsa. Yehova, musandidzudzule ndi mkwiyo wanu, ndipo musandilange moopsa m'mtima mwanu." 
Psalms38:2 Pakuti mivi yanu yandilowa, ndi dzanja lanu landigwera." 
Psalms38:3 Mumnofu mwanga mulibe chamoyo chifukwa cha ukali wanu; ndipo m'mafupa anga simuzizira, chifukwa cha cholakwa changa." 
Psalms38:4 Pakuti mphulupulu zanga zapitirira pamutu panga; ndathodwa nazo monga ndi katundu wolemera. 
Psalms38:5 Mabala anga anunkha, adaola, chifukwa cha kupusa kwanga." 
Psalms38:6 Ndapindika, ndawerama kwakukulu; ndimayenda woliralira tsiku lonse." 
Psalms38:7 Pakuti m'chuuno mwanga mutentha kwambiri; palibe pamoyo m'mnofu mwanga. 
Psalms38:8 Ndafooka ine, ndipo ndachinjizidwa, ndabangula chifukwa cha kumyuka mtima wanga." 
Psalms38:9 Ambuye, chikhumbo changa chonse chili pamaso panu; ndipo kubuula kwanga sikubisika kwa Inu." 
Psalms38:10 Mtima wanga ugundagunda, mphamvu yanga yachoka, ndipo kuunika kwa maso anga, ndi iko komwe kwandichokera." 
Psalms38:11 Ondikonda ndi anzanga apewa mliri wanga; ndipo anansi anga aima patali. 
Psalms38:12 Ndipo anditchera misampha iwo akufuna moyo wanga; ndipo iwo akuyesa kundichitira choipa alankhula zoononga, nalingirira zonyenga tsiku lonse." 
Psalms38:13 Koma ine, monga gonthi, sindimva; ndipo monga munthu wosalankhula, sinditsegula pakamwa panga." 
Psalms38:14 Inde ndikunga munthu wosamva, ndipo m'kamwa mwanga mulibe makani." 
Psalms38:15 Pakuti ndikuyembekezani Inu, Yehova; Inu mudzayankha, Ambuye Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms38:16 Pakuti ndinati, Asakondwerere ine; pakuterereka phazi langa, asadzikuze pa ine." 
Psalms38:17 Ndafikana potsimphina, ndipo chisoni changa chili pamaso panga chikhalire." 
Psalms38:18 Pakuti ndidzafotokozera mphulupulu yanga; nditenga nkhawa chifukwa cha tchimo langa. 
Psalms38:19 Koma adani anga ali ndi moyo, nakhala ndi mphamvu, ndipo akundida kopanda chifukwa achuluka." 
Psalms38:20 Ndipo iwo akubwezera choipa pa chabwino atsutsana nane, popeza nditsata chabwino." 
Psalms38:21 Musanditaye, Yehova, Mulungu wanga, musakhale kutali ndi ine." 
Psalms38:22 Fulumirani kundithandiza, Ambuye, chipulumutso changa." 
Psalms39:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo, kwa Yedutuni. Salimo la Davide. Ndinati, Ndidzasunga njira zanga, kuti ndingachimwe ndi lilime langa. Ndidzasunga pakamwa panga ndi cham'kamwa, pokhala woipa ali pamaso panga." 
Psalms39:2 Ndinatonthola osanena mau, ndinakhala chete osalawa chokoma; ndipo chisoni changa chinabuka." 
Psalms39:3 Mtima wanga unatentha m'kati mwa ine; unayaka moto pakulingirira ine. Pamenepo ndinalankhula ndi lilime langa," 
Psalms39:4 Yehova, mundidziwitse chimaliziro changa, ndi mawerengedwe a masiku anga ndi angati; ndidziwe malekezero anga." 
Psalms39:5 Onani, munaika masiku anga akhale monga kuyesa dzanja; ndipo zaka zanga zili ngati chabe pamaso panu, Indedi munthu aliyense angakhale wokhazikika, ali chabe konse." 
Psalms39:6 Indedi munthu ayenda ngati mthunzi; Indedi avutika chabe: Asonkhanitsa chuma, ndipo sadziwa adzachilandira ndani?" 
Psalms39:7 Ndipo tsopano, Ambuye, ndilindira chiyani? Chiyembekezo changa chili pa Inu." 
Psalms39:8 Ndipulumutseni kwa zolakwa zanga zonse, musandiike ndikhale chotonza cha wopusa." 
Psalms39:9 Ndinakhala duu, sindinatsegula pakamwa panga; chifukwa inu mudachichita." 
Psalms39:10 Mundichotsere chovutitsa chanu; pandithera ine chifukwa cha kulanga kwa dzanja lanu. 
Psalms39:11 Pamene mulanga munthu ndi zomdzudzula chifukwa cha mphulupulu, mukanganula kukongola kwake monga mumachita ndi njenjete. Indedi, munthu aliyense ali chabe." 
Psalms39:12 Imvani pemphero langa, Yehova, ndipo tcherani khutu kulira kwanga; musakhale chete pa misozi yanga; Pakuti ine ndine mlendo ndi Inu, wosakhazikika, monga makolo anga onse." 
Psalms39:13 Ndiloleni, kuti nditsitsimuke, ndisanamuke ndi kukhala kuli zii." 
Psalms40:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Kuyembekeza ndayembekeza Yehova; ndipo anandilola, namva kufuula kwanga." 
Psalms40:2 Ndipo anandikweza kunditulutsa m'dzenje la chitayiko, ndi m'thope la pachithaphwi; nandipondetsa pathanthwe, nakhazika mayendedwe anga." 
Psalms40:3 Ndipo anapatsa nyimbo yatsopano m'kamwa mwanga, chilemekezo cha kwa Mulungu wanga; ambiri adzachiona, nadzaopa, ndipo adzakhulupirira Yehova." 
Psalms40:4 Wodala munthuyo wakuyesa Yehova wokhulupirika; wosasamala odzikuza, ndi opatukira kubodza." 
Psalms40:5 Inu, Yehova, Mulungu wanga, zodabwitsa zanu mudazichita nzambiri, ndipo zolingirira zanu za pa ife; palibe wina wozifotokozera Inu; ndikazisimba ndi kuzitchula, zindichulukira kuziwerenga." 
Psalms40:6 Nsembe ndi chopereka simukondwera nazo; mwanditsegula makutu. Nsembe yopsereza ndi yamachimo simunapempha. 
Psalms40:7 Pamenepo ndinati, Taonani, ndadza; m'buku mwalembedwa za Ine," 
Psalms40:8 kuchita chikondwero chanu kundikonda, Mulungu wanga; ndipo malamulo anu ali m'kati mwamtima mwanga." 
Psalms40:9 Ndalalikira chilungamo mu msonkhano waukulu; onani, sindidzaletsa milomo yanga, mudziwa ndinu Yehova." 
Psalms40:10 Chilungamo chanu sindinachibisa m'kati mwamtima mwanga; chikhulupiriko chanu ndi chipulumutso chanu ndinachinena; chifundo chanu ndi choonadi chanu sindinachibisira msonkhano waukulu. 
Psalms40:11 Inu Yehova, simudzandikaniza nsoni zanu, chifundo chanu ndi choonadi chanu zindisunge chisungire." 
Psalms40:12 Pakuti zoipa zosawerengeka zandizinga, zochimwa zanga zandipeza kotero kuti sindikhoza kupenya; ziposa tsitsi la mutu wanga, ndipo wandichokera mtima." 
Psalms40:13 Ndikupemphani, Yehova, ndilanditseni; fulumirani kudzandithandiza, Yehova." 
Psalms40:14 Achite manyazi nadodome iwo akulondola moyo wanga kuti auononge. Abwerere m'mbuyo, nachite manyazi iwo okondwera kundichitira choipa." 
Psalms40:15 Apululuke, mobwezera manyazi ao amene anena nane, Hede, hede." 
Psalms40:16 Asekerere nakondwerere mwa Inu onse akufuna Inu; iwo akukonda chipulumutso chanu asaleke kunena, Abuke Yehova." 
Psalms40:17 Ndipo ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi; koma Ambuye andikumbukira ine. Inu ndinu mthandizi wanga, ndi Mpulumutsi wanga, musamachedwa, Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms41:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Wodala iye amene asamalira wosauka! Tsiku la tsoka Yehova adzampulumutsa. 
Psalms41:2 Yehova adzamsunga, nadzamsunga ndi moyo, ndipo adzadalitsika pa dziko lapansi, ndipo musampereke ku chifuniro cha adani ake." 
Psalms41:3 Yehova adzamgwiriziza pa kama wodwalira; podwala iye mukonza pogona pake. 
Psalms41:4 Ndinati ine, Mundichitire chifundo, Yehova; Chiritsani mtima wanga; pakuti ndachimwira Inu." 
Psalms41:5 Adani anga andinenera choipa, ndi kuti, adzafa liti, ndi kutayika dzina lake?" 
Psalms41:6 Ndipo akadza kundiona wina angonena bodza; mumtima mwake adzisonkhera zopanda pake, akanka nayenda namakanena." 
Psalms41:7 Onse akudana nane andinong'onezerana; apangana chondiipsa ine. 
Psalms41:8 Chamgwera chinthu choopsa, ati; popeza ali gonire sadzaukanso." 
Psalms41:9 Ngakhale bwenzi langa lenileni, amene ndamkhulupirira, ndiye amene adadyako mkate wanga, anandikwezera chidendene chake." 
Psalms41:10 Koma Inu, Yehova, mundichitire chifundo, ndipo mundiutse, kuti ndiwabwezere." 
Psalms41:11 Umo ndidziwa kuti mukondwera ndi ine, popeza mdani wanga sandiseka." 
Psalms41:12 Ndipo ine, mundigwirizize m'ungwiro wanga, ndipo mundiike pankhope panu kunthawi yamuyaya." 
Psalms41:13 Wodalitsika Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele, kuchokera nthawi yosayamba kufikira nthawi yosatha. Amen, ndi Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Chilangizo cha kwa ana a Kora. Monga nswala ipuma wefuwefu kukhumba mitsinje; motero moyo wanga upuma wefuwefu kukhumba Inu, Mulungu." 
Psalms42:2 Moyo wanga uli ndi ludzu la kwa Mulungu, la kwa Mulungu wamoyo. Ndikadze liti kuoneka pamaso pa Mulungu?" 
Psalms42:3 Misozi yanga yakhala ngati chakudya changa, usana ndi usiku; pakunena iwo kwa ine dzuwa lonse, Mulungu wako ali kuti?" 
Psalms42:4 Ndidzikumbukira izi ndipo nditsanulira moyo wanga m'kati mwa ine, pakuti ndidafopita ndi unyinji wa anthu, ndinawatsogolera kunyumba ya Mulungu, ndi mau akuimbitsa ndi kuyamika, ndi unyinji wakusunga dzuwa lokondwera." 
Psalms42:5 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu, pakuti ndidzamyamikanso chifukwa cha chipulumutso cha nkhope yake." 
Psalms42:6 Mulungu wanga, moyo wanga udziweramira m'kati mwanga; chifukwa chake ndikumbukira Inu m'dziko la Yordani, ndi mu Aheremoni, m'kaphiri ka Mizara." 
Psalms42:7 Madzi akuya aitanizana ndi madzi akuya, pa mkokomo wa matiti anu; mafunde onse a nyondonyondo anandimiza ine." 
Psalms42:8 Koma usana Yehova adzalamulira chifundo chake, ndipo usiku nyimbo yake idzakhala ndi ine. Inde pemphero la kwa Yehova wa moyo wanga." 
Psalms42:9 Ndidzati kwa Mulungu, thanthwe langa, mwandiiwala chifukwa ninji? Ndimayenderanji wakulira chifukwa cha kundipsinja mdaniyo?" 
Psalms42:10 Adani anga andinyoza ndi kundithyola mafupa anga; pakunena ndine dzuwa lonse, Mulungu wako ali kuti?" 
Psalms42:11 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu; pakuti ndidzamlemekeza tsopanonso, ndiye chipulumutso cha nkhope yanga ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms43:1 Mundiweruzire, Mulungu, ndipo mundinenere mlandu kwa anthu opanda chifundo. Mundilanditse kwa munthu wonyenga ndi wosalungama." 
Psalms43:2 Pakuti Inu ndinu Mulungu wa mphamvu yanga; mwanditayiranji? Ndimayenderanji woliralira chifukwa cha kundipsinja mdani? 
Psalms43:3 Tumizirani kuunika kwanu ndi choonadi chanu zinditsogolere; zindifikitse kuphiri lanu loyera, kumene mukhala Inuko." 
Psalms43:4 Kuti ndipite kufikira guwa la nsembe la Mulungu, kufikira Mulungu wa chimwemwe changa chenicheni, ndi kuti ndikuyamikeni ndi zeze, Mulungu, Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms43:5 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu: pakuti ndidzamyamikanso, ndiye chipulumutso cha nkhope yanga, ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms44:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Chilangizo cha kwa ana a Kora. Mulungu, tidamva m'makutu mwathu, makolo athu anatisimbira, za ntchitoyo mudaichita masiku ao, masiku akale." 
Psalms44:2 Inu munapirikitsa amitundu ndi dzanja lanu, koma iwowa munawaoka; munasautsa mitundu ya anthu, ndipo munawaingitsa." 
Psalms44:3 Pakuti sanalande dziko ndi lupanga lao, ndipo mkono wao sunawapulumutse. Koma dzanja lanu lamanja, ndi mkono wanu, ndi kuunika kwa nkhope yanu. Popeza munakondwera nao," 
Psalms44:4 Inu ndinu mfumu yanga, Mulungu; lamulirani chipulumutso cha Yakobo." 
Psalms44:5 Mwa Inu tidzakankhira pansi otsutsana nafe, m'dzina lanu tidzapondereza akutiukira ife." 
Psalms44:6 Pakuti sinditama uta wanga, ndipo lupanga langa silingandipulumutse." 
Psalms44:7 Koma Inu munatipulumutsa kwa iwo akutsutsana nafe, ndipo akudana nafe, mudawachititsa manyazi." 
Psalms44:8 Mwa Mulungu tidzitamanda tsiku lonse, ndipo dzina lanu tidzaliyamika kosatha." 
Psalms44:9 Koma mwatitaya, ndi kutinyazitsa; ndipo simutuluka nao makamu a nkhondo athu." 
Psalms44:10 Mutibwereretsa kuthawa otisautsa, ndipo akudana nafe adzifunkhira okha." 
Psalms44:11 Mwatipereka ngati nkhosa zoyenera kuzidya; ndipo mwatibalalitsa mwa amitundu. 
Psalms44:12 Mugulitsa anthu anu kwachabe, ndipo mtengo wake simupindula nao." 
Psalms44:13 Mutisandutsa chotonza kwa anzathu, ndi choseketsa ndi cholalatitsa iwo akutizinga." 
Psalms44:14 Mutiika tikhale onyozeka mwa amitundu, ndi kuti anthu atipukusire mitu." 
Psalms44:15 Tsiku lonse chimpepulo changa chikhala pamaso panga, ndipo manyazi a pankhope panga andikuta." 
Psalms44:16 Chifukwa cha mau a wotonza wochitira mwano; chifukwa cha mdani ndi wobwezera chilango. 
Psalms44:17 Zonsezi zatigwera; koma sitinakuiwalani, ndipo sitinachita monyenga m'pangano lanu." 
Psalms44:18 Mtima wathu sunabwerera m'mbuyo, ndipo m'mayendedwe athu sitinapatuka m'njira yanu;" 
Psalms44:19 mungakhale munatithyola mokhala zilombo, ndi kutiphimba nao mthunzi wa imfa." 
Psalms44:20 Tikadaiwala dzina la Mulungu wathu, ndi kutambasulira manja athu kwa mulungu wachilendo;" 
Psalms44:21 Mulungu sakadasanthula ichi kodi? Pakuti adziwa zinsinsi za mtima. 
Psalms44:22 Koma, chifukwa cha Inu, tiphedwa tsiku lonse; tiyesedwa ngati nkhosa zakuzipha." 
Psalms44:23 Galamukani, mugoneranji, Ambuye? Ukani, musatitaye chitayire." 
Psalms44:24 Mubisiranji nkhope yanu, ndi kuiwala kuzunzika ndi kupsinjika kwathu?" 
Psalms44:25 Pakuti moyo wathu waweramira kufumbi, pamimba pathu pakangamira dziko lapansi." 
Psalms44:26 Ukani, tithandizeni, tiomboleni mwa chifundo chanu." 
Psalms45:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo, pa Syosyanimu. Chilangizo cha kwa ana a Kora. Nyimbo ya chikondi. Mtima wanga usefukira nacho chinthu chokoma. Ndinena zopeka ine za mfumu, lilime langa ndilo peni yofulumiza kulemba." 
Psalms45:2 Inu ndinu wokongola ndithu koposa ana a anthu; anakutsanulirani chisomo pa milomo yanu, chifukwa chake Mulungu anakudalitsani kosatha." 
Psalms45:3 Dzimangireni lupanga lanu m'chuuno mwanu, wamphamvu inu, ndi ulemerero wanu ndi ukulu wanu." 
Psalms45:4 Ndipo pindulani, m'ukulu wanu yendani, kaamba ka choonadi ndi chifatso ndi chilungamo; ndipo dzanja lanu lidzakuphunzitsani zoopsa." 
Psalms45:5 Mivi yanu njakuthwa; mitundu ya anthu igwa pansi pa inu; iwalasa mumtima adani a mfumu. 
Psalms45:6 Mpando wachifumu wanu, Mulungu, ukhala nthawi zonse zomka muyaya. Ndodo yachifumu ya ufumu wanu ndiyo ndodo yolunjika." 
Psalms45:7 Mukonda chilungamo, ndipo mudana nacho choipa, chifukwa chake Mulungu, ndiye Mulungu wanu, wadzoza inu ndi mafuta a chikondwerero koposa anzanu." 
Psalms45:8 Zovala zanu zonse nza mure, ndi khonje, ndi kasiya; m'zinyumba za mfumu zomanga ndi minyanga ya njovu mwatuluka zoimba za zingwe zokukondweretsani." 
Psalms45:9 Mwa omveka anu muli ana akazi a mafumu; ku dzanja lanu lamanja aima mkazi wa mfumu wovala golide wa ku Ofiri. 
Psalms45:10 Tamvera, mwana wamkaziwe, taona, tatchera khutu lako; uiwalenso mtundu wako ndi nyumba ya atate wako;" 
Psalms45:11 potero mfumuyo adzakhumba kukoma kwako, pakuti ndiye mbuye wako; ndipo iwe umgwadire iye." 
Psalms45:12 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Tiro adzafika nayo mphatso; achuma a mwa anthu adzapempha kudziwika nanu. 
Psalms45:13 Mwana wamkazi wa mfumu ngwa ulemerero wonse m'kati mwa nyumba, zovala zake nza malukidwe agolide." 
Psalms45:14 Adzamtsogolera kwa mfumu wovala zamawangamawanga, anamwali anzake omtsata adzafika nao kwa inu." 
Psalms45:15 Adzawatsogolera ndi chimwemwe ndi kusekerera, adzalowa m'nyumba ya mfumu." 
Psalms45:16 M'malo mwa makolo ako mudzakhala ana ako, udzawaika akhale mafumu m'dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms45:17 Ndidzawakumbutsa dzina lanu m'mibadwomibadwo; chifukwa chake mitundu ya anthu idzayamika Inu kunthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms46:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Chilangizo cha kwa ana a Kora. Pa Alamot. Nyimbo. Mulungu ndiye pothawirapo pathu ndi mphamvu yathu, thandizo lopezekeratu m'masautso." 
Psalms46:2 Chifukwa chake sitidzachita mantha, lingakhale lisandulika dziko lapansi, angakhale mapiri asunthika, nakhala m'kati mwa nyanja." 
Psalms46:3 Chinkana madzi ake akokoma, nachita thovu, nagwedezeka mapiri ndi kudzala kwake." 
Psalms46:4 Pali mtsinje, ngalande zake zidzakondweretsa mudzi wa Mulungu. Malo oyera okhalamo Wam'mwambamwamba." 
Psalms46:5 Mulungu ali m'kati mwake, sudzasunthika, Mulungu adzauthandiza mbandakucha." 
Psalms46:6 Amitundu anapokosera, maufumu anagwedezeka, ananena mau, dziko lapansi linasungunuka." 
Psalms46:7 Yehova wa makamu ali ndi ife; Mulungu wa Yakobo ndiye pamsanje pathu. 
Psalms46:8 Idzani, penyani ntchito za Yehova, amene achita zopululutsa pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms46:9 Aletsa nkhondo ku malekezero a dziko lapansi; athyola uta, nadula nthungo; atentha magaleta ndi moto." 
Psalms46:10 Khalani chete, ndipo dziwani kuti Ine ndine Mulungu, Ndidzabuka mwa amitundu, ndidzabuka pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms46:11 Yehova wa makamu ali ndi ife, Mulungu wa Yakobo ndiye pamsanje pathu." 
Psalms47:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la ana a Kora. Ombani m'manja, mitundu yonse ya anthu; fuulirani kwa Mulungu ndi liu la kuimbitsa." 
Psalms47:2 Pakuti Yehova Wam'mwambamwamba ndiye woopsa; ndiye mfumu yaikulu pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Psalms47:3 Atigonjetsera anthu, naika amitundu pansi pa mapazi athu." 
Psalms47:4 Atisankhira cholowa chathu, chokometsetsa cha Yakobo amene anamkonda." 
Psalms47:5 Mulungu wakwera ndi mfuu, Yehova ndi liu la lipenga." 
Psalms47:6 Imbirani Mulungu, imbirani; imbirani mfumu yathu, imbirani." 
Psalms47:7 Pakuti Mulungu ndiye mfumu ya dziko lonse lapansi; imbirani ndi chilangizo. 
Psalms47:8 Mulungu ndiye mfumu ya amitundu, Mulungu akhala pa mpando wachifumu wake woyera." 
Psalms47:9 Akulu a anthu asonkhana akhale anthu a Mulungu wa Abrahamu, pakuti zikopa za dziko lapansi nza Mulungu; akwezeka kwakukulu Iyeyo." 
Psalms48:1 Nyimbo; Salimo la ana a Kora. Yehova ndiye wamkulu, ayenera kulemekezekadi, m'mudzi wa Mulungu wathu, m'phiri lake loyera." 
Psalms48:2 Phiri la Ziyoni, chikhalidwe chake nchokoma kumbali zake za kumpoto, ndilo chimwemwe cha dziko lonse lapansi, mudzi wa mfumu yaikulu." 
Psalms48:3 Mulungu adziwika m'zinyumba zake ngati msanje. 
Psalms48:4 Pakuti, taonani, mafumuwo anasonkhana, anapitira pamodzi." 
Psalms48:5 Anapenya mudziwo, ndipo pamenepo anadabwa; anaopsedwa, nathawako." 
Psalms48:6 Pomwepo anagwidwa nako kunthunthumira; anamva chowawa, ngati wam'chikuta." 
Psalms48:7 Muswa zombo za ku Tarisisi ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa. 
Psalms48:8 Monga tidamva, momwemo tidapenya m'mudzi wa Yehova wa makamu, m'mudzi wa Mulungu wathu, Mulungu adzaukhazikitsa kunthawi yamuyaya." 
Psalms48:9 Tidalingalira zachifundo chanu, Mulungu, m'kati mwa Kachisi wanu." 
Psalms48:10 Monga dzina lanu, Mulungu, momwemo lemekezo lanu ku malekezero a dziko lapansi; m'dzanja lamanja lanu mudzala chilungamo." 
Psalms48:11 Likondwere phiri la Ziyoni, asekere ana akazi a Yuda, chifukwa cha maweruzo anu." 
Psalms48:12 Zungulirani Ziyoni, ndipo muuzinge, werengani nsanja zake." 
Psalms48:13 Penyetsetsani malinga ake, yesetsani zinyumba zake; kuti mukaziwerengere mibadwo ikudza m'mbuyo." 
Psalms48:14 Pakuti Mulungu ameneyo ndiye Mulungu wathu kunthawi za nthawi, adzatitsogolera kufikira imfa." 
Psalms49:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la ana a Kora. Dzamveni kuno, anthu inu nonse; tcherani khutu, inu nonse amakono," 
Psalms49:2 awamba ndi omveka omwe, achuma ndi aumphawi omwe." 
Psalms49:3 Pakamwa panga padzanena zanzeru; ndipo chilingiriro cha mtima wanga chidzakhala cha chidziwitso. 
Psalms49:4 Ndidzatchera khutu kufanizo, ndidzafotokozera chophiphiritsa changa poimbira." 
Psalms49:5 Ndidzaoperanji masiku oipa, pondizinga amphulupulu onditsata kuchidendene?" 
Psalms49:6 Iwo akutama kulemera kwao; nadzitamandira pa kuchuluka kwa chuma chao; 
Psalms49:7 kuombola mbale sangadzamuombole, kapena kumperekera dipo kwa Mulungu." 
Psalms49:8 Popeza chiombolo cha moyo wao ncha mtengo wake wapatali, ndipo chilekeke nthawi zonse." 
Psalms49:9 Kuti akhale ndi moyo osafa, osaona chivundi." 
Psalms49:10 Pakuti aona anzeru amafa, monga aonongekera wopusa, wodyerera momwemo, nasiyira ena chuma chao." 
Psalms49:11 Mumtima mwao ayesa kuti nyumba zao zikhala chikhalire, ndi mokhala iwo ku mibadwomibadwo; atchapo dzina lao padziko pao." 
Psalms49:12 Koma munthu wa ulemu wake sakhalitsa, afanana ndi nyama za kuthengo, afanana nazo." 
Psalms49:13 Njira yao yino ndiyo kupusa kwao, koma akudza m'mbuyo avomereza mau ao." 
Psalms49:14 Aikidwa m'manda ngati nkhosa; mbusa wao ndi imfa. Ndipo m'mawa mwake oongoka mtima adzakhala mafumu ao; ndipo maonekedwe ao adzanyekera kumanda, kuti pokhala pake padzasowa." 
Psalms49:15 Koma Mulungu adzaombola moyo wanga kumphamvu ya manda. Pakuti adzandilandira ine. 
Psalms49:16 Usaope polemezedwa munthu, pochuluka ulemu wa nyumba yake;" 
Psalms49:17 pakuti pomwalira iye sadzamuka nako kanthu kalikonse; ulemu wake sutsika naye kumtsata m'mbuyo. 
Psalms49:18 Angakhale anadalitsa moyo wake pokhala ndi moyo, ndipo anthu akulemekeza iwe, podzichitira wekha zokoma." 
Psalms49:19 Adzamuka kumbadwo wa makolo ake; sadzaona kuunika nthawi zonse. 
Psalms49:20 Munthu waulemu, koma wosadziwitsa, afanana ndi nyama za kuthengo, afanana nazo." 
Psalms50:1 Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu wa milungu, Yehova, wanena, aitana dziko lapansi kuyambira kutuluka kwa dzuwa kufikira kulowa kwake." 
Psalms50:2 Mulungu awalira m'Ziyoni, mokongola mwangwiro." 
Psalms50:3 Adzafika Mulungu wathu, ndipo sadzakhala chete. Moto udzanyeka pankhope pake, ndipo pozungulira pake padzasokosera kwakukulu." 
Psalms50:4 Kumwamba adzaitana zakumwamba, ndi dziko lapansi, kuti aweruze anthu ake." 
Psalms50:5 Mundisonkhanitsire okondedwa anga; amene anapangana ndi Ine ndi nsembe. 
Psalms50:6 Ndipo zakumwamba zionetsera chilungamo chake; pakuti Mulungu mwini wake ndiye woweruza. 
Psalms50:7 Imvani, anthu anga, ndipo ndidzanena; Israele, ndipo ndidzachita mboni pa iwe, Ine Mulungu, ndine Mulungu wako." 
Psalms50:8 Sindikudzudzula iwe chifukwa cha nsembe zako; popeza nsembe zako zopsereza zili pamaso panga chikhalire. 
Psalms50:9 Sindidzatenga ng'ombe m'nyumba mwako, kapena mbuzi m'makola mwako." 
Psalms50:10 Pakuti zamoyo zonse za kuthengo ndi zanga, ndi ng'ombe za pa mapiri zikwi." 
Psalms50:11 Ndidziwa mbalame zonse za m'mapiri, ndipo nyama za kuthengo zili ndi Ine." 
Psalms50:12 Ndikamva njala, sindidzakuuza, pakuti dziko lonse ndi langa, ndi kudzala kwake komwe." 
Psalms50:13 Kodi ndidzadya nyama ya ng'ombe, kapena kumwa mwazi wa mbuzi?" 
Psalms50:14 Pereka kwa Mulungu nsembe yachiyamiko; numchitire Wam'mwambamwamba chowinda chako. 
Psalms50:15 Ndipo undiitane tsiku la chisautso, ndidzakulanditsa, ndipo iwe udzandilemekeza." 
Psalms50:16 Koma kwa woipa Mulungu anena, Uli nao chiyani malemba anga kulalikira, ndi kutchula pangano langa pakamwa pako?" 
Psalms50:17 Popeza udana nacho chilangizo, nufulatira mau anga." 
Psalms50:18 Pakuona mbala, uvomerezana nayo, nuchita nao achigololo." 
Psalms50:19 Pakamwa pako mpochita zochimwa, ndipo lilime lako likonza chinyengo." 
Psalms50:20 Ukhala, nuneneza mbale wako; usinjirira mwana wa mai wako." 
Psalms50:21 Izi unazichita iwe, ndipo ndinakhala chete Ine; unayesa kuti ndifanana nawe, ndidzakudzudzula, ndi kuchilongosola pamaso pako." 
Psalms50:22 Dziwitsani ichi inu oiwala Mulungu, kuti ndingakumwetuleni, ndipo mungasowepo mpulumutsi." 
Psalms50:23 Wopereka nsembe yachiyamiko andilemekeza Ine; ndipo kwa iye wosunga mayendedwe ake ndidzamuonetsa chipulumutso cha Mulungu. 
Psalms51:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide; m'mene anamdzera Natani mneneriyo atalowa iye kwa Bateseba. Mundichitire ine chifundo, Mulungu, monga mwa kukoma mtima kwanu; monga mwa unyinji wa nsoni zokoma zanu mufafanize machimo anga." 
Psalms51:2 Mubwereze kunditsuka mphulupulu yanga, ndipo mundiyeretse kundichotsera choipa changa." 
Psalms51:3 Chifukwa ndazindikira machimo anga; ndipo choipa changa chili pamaso panga chikhalire. 
Psalms51:4 Pa Inu, Inu nokha, ndinachimwa, ndipo ndinachichita choipacho pamaso panu; kuti mukhale wolungama pakulankhula Inu, mukhalenso woyera pa kuweruza kwanu." 
Psalms51:5 Onani, ndinabadwa m'mphulupulu, ndipo mai wanga anandilandira m'zoipa." 
Psalms51:6 Onani, Inu mukondwera ndi zoonadi m'malo a m'katimo; ndipo m'malo a m'tseri mudzandidziwitsa nzeru." 
Psalms51:7 Mundiyeretse ndi hisope ndipo ndidzayera; munditsuke ndipo ndidzakhala wa mbu woposa matalala. 
Psalms51:8 Mundimvetse chimwemwe ndi kusekera, kuti mafupawo munawathyola akondwere." 
Psalms51:9 Muzibisire nkhope yanu zolakwa zanga, ndipo mufafanize mphulupulu zanga zonse." 
Psalms51:10 Mundilengere mtima woyera, Mulungu; mukonze mzimu wokhazikika m'kati mwanga." 
Psalms51:11 Musanditaye kundichotsa pamaso panu; musandichotsere Mzimu wanu Woyera. 
Psalms51:12 Mundibwezere chimwemwe cha chipulumutso chanu; ndipo mzimu wakulola undigwirizize. 
Psalms51:13 Pomwepo ndidzalangiza ochimwa njira zanu; ndipo olakwa adzabwera kwa Inu. 
Psalms51:14 Mundilanditse kumlandu wa mwazi, Mulungu, ndinu Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa; lilime langa lidzakweza nyimbo ya chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms51:15 Ambuye, tsegulani pa milomo yanga; ndipo pakamwa panga padzalalikira ulemekezo wanu." 
Psalms51:16 Pakuti simukondwera ndi nsembe, mwenzi nditapereka; nsembe yopsereza simuikonda." 
Psalms51:17 Nsembe za Mulungu ndizo mzimu wosweka; Inu, Mulungu, simudzaupeputsa mtima wosweka ndi wolapa." 
Psalms51:18 Chitirani Ziyoni chokoma monga mwa kukondwera kwanu; mumange malinga a miyala a Yerusalemu. 
Psalms51:19 Pamenepo mudzakondwera nazo nsembe zachilungamo, ndi nsembe yopsereza ndi yopsereza yathunthu; pamenepo adzapereka ng'ombe pa guwa lanu la nsembe." 
Psalms52:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Chilangizo cha Davide. Muja analowa Doegi Mwedomu nauza Saulo nati kwa iye, Davide walowa m'nyumba ya Ahimeleki. Udzitamandiranji ndi choipa, chiphona iwe? Chifundo cha Mulungu chikhala tsiku lonse." 
Psalms52:2 Lilime lako likupanga zoipa; likunga lumo lakuthwa, lakuchita monyenga." 
Psalms52:3 Ukonda choipa koposa chokoma; ndi bodza koposa kunena chilungamo," 
Psalms52:4 ukonda mau onse akuononga, lilime lachinyengo, iwe." 
Psalms52:5 Potero Mulungu adzakupasula kunthawi zonse, adzakuchotsa nadzakukwatula m'hema mwako, nadzakuzula, kukuchotsa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Psalms52:6 Ndipo olungama adzachiona, nadzaopa, nadzamseka, ndi kuti," 
Psalms52:7 Tapenyani, suyu munthuyu amene sanamuyese Mulungu mphamvu yake; amene anatama kuchuluka kwa chuma chake, nadzilimbitsa m'kuipsa kwake." 
Psalms52:8 Koma ine ndine ngati mtengo wauwisi wa azitona m'nyumba ya Mulungu. Ndikhulupirira chifundo cha Mulungu kunthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms52:9 Ndidzakuyamikani kosatha, popeza Inu munachichita ichi, ndipo ndidzayembekeza dzina lanu, pakuti ichi nchokoma, pamaso pa okondedwa anu." 
Psalms53:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Mahalati. Chilangizo cha Davide. Chitsiru chimati mumtima mwake, Kulibe Mulungu. Achita zovunda, achita chosalungama chonyansa; kulibe wakuchita bwino." 
Psalms53:2 Mulungu m'mwamba anaweramira pa ana a anthu, kuti aone ngati aliko wanzeru, wakufuna Mulungu." 
Psalms53:3 Onse anabwerera; anavunda mtima pamodzi; palibe mmodzi wakuchita bwino, nnena mmodzi." 
Psalms53:4 Kodi ochita zopanda pake sadziwa? Pomadya anthu anga monga akudya mkate; ndipo saitana Mulungu. 
Psalms53:5 Pamenepo anaopa kwakukulu, popanda chifukwa cha kuopa, pakuti Mulungu anamwaza mafupa a iwo akuzinga iwe; unawachititsa manyazi, pakuti Mulungu anawakaniza." 
Psalms53:6 Ha, chipulumutso cha Israele chichokere m'Ziyoni! Pakubweretsa Mulungu anthu ake a m'ndende, Yakobo adzakondwera, Israele adzasekera." 
Psalms54:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Neginoto. Chilangizo cha Davide. Muja Azifi anamuka nauza Saulo, kuti, Kodi Davide sabisala kwathu nanga? Ndipulumutseni, Mulungu, mwa dzina lanu, ndipo mundiweruze ndi mphamvu yanu." 
Psalms54:2 Imvani pemphero langa, Mulungu; tcherani khutu mau a pakamwa panga." 
Psalms54:3 Pakuti alendo andiukira, ndipo oopsa afunafuna moyo wanga; sadziikira Mulungu pamaso pao." 
Psalms54:4 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye mthandizi wanga, Ambuye ndiye wachirikiza moyo wanga." 
Psalms54:5 Adzabwezera choipa adani anga, aduleni m'choonadi chanu." 
Psalms54:6 Ine mwini ndidzapereka nsembe yaufulu kwa Inu, ndidzayamika dzina lanu, Yehova, pakuti nlokoma." 
Psalms54:7 Pakuti anandilanditsa m'nsautso yonse; ndipo ndapenya ndi diso langa icho ndakhumbira pa adani anga. 
Psalms55:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Zirumbu. Chilangizo cha Davide. Tcherani khutu pemphero langa, Mulungu; ndipo musadzibisa pa kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms55:2 Mverani, ndipo mundiyankhe, ndiliralira m'kudandaula kwanga ndi kubuula;" 
Psalms55:3 chifukwa cha mau a mdani, chifukwa cha kundipsinja woipa; pakuti andisenza zopanda pake, ndipo adana nane mumkwiyo." 
Psalms55:4 Mtima wanga uwawa m'kati mwanga; ndipo zoopsa za imfa zandigwera. 
Psalms55:5 Mantha ndi kunjenjemera zandidzera, ndipo zoopsetsa zandikuta." 
Psalms55:6 Ndipo ndinati, Ha, wina akadandipatsa mapiko onga a njiwa! Mwenzi nditauluka, ndi kukhaliratu." 
Psalms55:7 Onani, ndikadathawira kutali, ndikadagona m'chipululu." 
Psalms55:8 Ndikadafulumira ndipulumuke kumphepo yolimba ndi namondwe. 
Psalms55:9 Aonongeni, Ambuye, gawani lilime lao, pakuti ndaona chiwawa ndi ndeu m'mudzimo." 
Psalms55:10 Izizo ziuzungulira pa malinga ake usana ndi usiku; ndipo m'kati mwake muli zopanda pake ndi chovuta. 
Psalms55:11 M'kati mwake muli kusakaza, chiwawa ndi chinyengo sizichoka m'makwalala ake." 
Psalms55:12 Pakuti si mdani amene ananditonzayo; pakadatero ndikadachilola, amene anadzikuza pa ine sindiye munthu wondida; pakadatero ndikadambisalira:" 
Psalms55:13 Koma ameneyo ndiwe, munthu woyenerana nane, tsamwali wanga, wodziwana nane." 
Psalms55:14 Tinapangirana upo wokoma, tinaperekeza khamu la anthu popita kunyumba ya Mulungu." 
Psalms55:15 Imfa iwagwere modzidzimutsa, atsikire kumanda ali amoyo, pakuti m'mokhala mwao muli zoipa pakati pao." 
Psalms55:16 Koma ine ndidzafuulira kwa Mulungu; ndipo Yehova adzandipulumutsa. 
Psalms55:17 Madzulo, m'mawa, ndi msana ndidzadandaula, ndi kubuula, ndipo adzamva mau anga." 
Psalms55:18 Anaombola moyo wanga kunkhondo yondilaka, ndikhale mumtendere, pakuti ndiwo ambiri okangana nane." 
Psalms55:19 Mulungu adzamva, nadzawasautsa, ndiye wokhalabe chiyambire kale lomwe. Popeza iwowa sasinthika konse, ndipo saopa Mulungu." 
Psalms55:20 Anatulutsa manja ake awagwire iwo akuyanjana naye, anaipsa pangano lake." 
Psalms55:21 Pakamwa pake mposalala ngati mafuta amkaka, koma mumtima mwake munali nkhondo, mau ake ngofewa ngati mafuta oyenga, koma anali malupanga osololasolola." 
Psalms55:22 Umsenze Yehova nkhawa zako, ndipo Iye adzakugwiriziza, nthawi zonse sadzalola wolungama agwedezeke." 
Psalms55:23 Koma Inu, Mulungu, mudzawatsitsira kudzenje la chionongeko. Anthu okhetsa mwazi ndi achinyengo masiku ao sadzafikira nusu; koma ine ndidzakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms56:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Yonat-Elem-Rekokimu. Mikitamu wa Davide, muja Afilisti anamgwira m'Gati. Mundichitire chifundo, Mulungu, pakuti anthu afuna kundimeza. Andipsinja pondithira nkhondo tsiku lonse." 
Psalms56:2 Adani anga afuna kundimeza tsiku lonse, pakuti ambiri andithira nkhondo modzikuza." 
Psalms56:3 Tsiku lakuopa ine, ndidzakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms56:4 Mwa Mulungu ndidzalemekeza mau ake, ndakhulupirira Mulungu, sindidzaopa; anthu adzandichitanji?" 
Psalms56:5 Tsiku lonse atenderuza mau anga, zolingirira zao zonse zili pa ine kundichitira choipa." 
Psalms56:6 Amemezana, alalira, atchereza mapazi anga, popeza alindira moyo wanga." 
Psalms56:7 Kodi adzapulumuka ndi zopanda pake? Gwetsani anthu mumkwiyo, Mulungu." 
Psalms56:8 Muwerenga kuthawathawa kwanga, sungani misozi yanga m'nsupa yanu; kodi siikhala m'buku mwanu?" 
Psalms56:9 Pamenepo adani anga adzabwerera m'mbuyo tsiku lakuitana ine. Ichi ndidziwa, kuti Mulungu avomerezana nane." 
Psalms56:10 Mwa Mulungu ndidzalemekeza mau ake, mwa Yehova ndidzalemekeza mau ake." 
Psalms56:11 Pa Mulungu ndakhulupirira, sindidzaopa; munthu adzandichitanji?" 
Psalms56:12 Zowindira Inu Mulungu, zili pa ine, ndidzakuchitirani zoyamika." 
Psalms56:13 Pakuti mwalanditsa moyo wanga kuimfa, simunatero nao mapazi anga kuti ndingagwe? Kuti ndiyende pamaso pa Mulungu m'kuunika kwa amoyo." 
Psalms57:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Altasheti; Mikitamu wa Davide: muja anathawa Saulo, ali m'phanga. Mundichitire chifundo, Mulungu, mundichitire chifundo; pakuti moyo wanga ukhulupirira Inu, ndipo ndithawira kumthunzi wa mapiko anu, kufikira zosakazazo zidzapita." 
Psalms57:2 Ndidzafuulira kwa Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba; ndiye Mulungu wonditsirizira zonse. 
Psalms57:3 Adzanditumizira m'mwamba, nadzandipulumutsa ponditonza wofuna kundimeza; Mulungu adzatumiza chifundo chake ndi choonadi chake." 
Psalms57:4 Moyo wanga uli pakati pa mikango; ndigona pakati pa oyaka moto, ndiwo ana a anthu amene mano ao ali nthungo ndi mivi, ndipo lilime lao ndilo lupanga lakuthawa." 
Psalms57:5 Mukwezeke m'mwambamwamba, Mulungu; ulemerero wanu ukhale pamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms57:6 Ananditchera ukonde apo ndiyenda; moyo wanga wawerama. Anandikumbira mbuna patsogolo panga; anagwa m'kati mwake iwo okha. 
Psalms57:7 Mtima wanga wakhazikika, Mulungu, ndakhazika mtima; ndidzaimba, inde, ndidzaimba zolemekeza." 
Psalms57:8 Galamuka, ulemu wanga; galamukani chisakasa ndi zeze! Ndidzauka ndekha mamawa." 
Psalms57:9 Ndidzakuyamikirani mwa anthu, Ambuye, ndidzakuimbirani mwa mitundu." 
Psalms57:10 Pakuti chifundo chanu nchachikulu kufikira m'mwamba, ndi choonadi chanu kufikira mitambo." 
Psalms57:11 Kwezekani m'mwambamwamba, Mulungu; ulemerero wanu ukhale pamwamba m'dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms58:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Altasyeti; Mikitamu wa Davide. Kodi muli chete ndithu poyenera inu kunena zolungama? Muweruza ana anthu molunjika kodi? 
Psalms58:2 Inde, mumtima muchita zosalungama; pa dziko lapansi mugawira anthu chiwawa cha m'manja mwanu." 
Psalms58:3 Oipa achita chilendo chibadwire, asokera kuyambira kubadwa kwao, nanena bodza." 
Psalms58:4 Ululu wao ukunga wa njoka; akunga mphiri yogontha m'khutu, itseka m'khutu mwake." 
Psalms58:5 Imene siimvera liu la oitana, akuchita matsenga mochenjeratu." 
Psalms58:6 Thyolani mano ao m'kamwa mwao, Mulungu, zulani zitsakano za misona ya mkango, Yehova." 
Psalms58:7 Apitetu ngati madzi oyenda; popiringidza mivi yake ikhale yodukaduka. 
Psalms58:8 Apite ngati nkhono yosungunuka; asaone dzuwa monga mtayo. 
Psalms58:9 Miphika yanu isanagwire moto waminga, adzaiuluza, yaiwisi ndi yoyaka." 
Psalms58:10 Wolungama adzakondwera pakuona kubwezera chilango, adzasamba mapazi ake m'mwazi wa woipa." 
Psalms58:11 Ndipo anthu adzati, Indedi, pali mphotho kwa wolungama. Indedi, pali Mulungu wakuweruza pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms59:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Altasheti. Mikitamu wa Davide. Muja Saulo anatuma anthu adikire nyumba yake, kuti amuphe. Ndilanditseni kwa adani anga, Mulungu wanga, ndiikeni pamsanje kwa iwo akundiukira." 
Psalms59:2 Mundilanditse kwa ochita zopanda pake, ndipo ndipulumutseni kwa anthu olira mwazi." 
Psalms59:3 Pakuti onani, alalira moyo wanga; amphamvu andipangira chiwembu, osachimwa, osalakwa ine, Yehova," 
Psalms59:4 osawapatsa chifukwa ine, athamanga nadzikonza. Galamukani kukomana nane, ndipo penyani." 
Psalms59:5 Ndinu Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israele. Ukani kukazonda amitundu onse, musachitire chifundo mmodzi yense wakuchita zopanda pake monyenga." 
Psalms59:6 Abwera madzulo, auwa ngati galu, nazungulira mudzi." 
Psalms59:7 Onani abwetuka pakamwa pao; m'milomo mwao muli lupanga, pakuti amati, Amva ndani?" 
Psalms59:8 Koma Inu, Yehova, mudzawaseka; mudzalalatira amitundu onse." 
Psalms59:9 Inu, mphamvu yanga, ndidzakulindirani; pakuti Mulungu ndiye msanje wanga." 
Psalms59:10 Mulungu wa chifundo changa adzandichingamira, adzandionetsa tsoka la adani anga." 
Psalms59:11 Musawapheretu, angaiwale anthu anga, muwabalalitse mwa mphamvu yanu, ndipo muwagwetse, Ambuye, ndinu chikopa chathu." 
Psalms59:12 Pakamwa pao achimwa ndi mau onse a pa milomo yao, potero akodwe m'kudzitamandira kwao, ndiponso chifukwa cha kutemberera ndi bodza azilankhula." 
Psalms59:13 Muwathe mumkwiyo, muwagulule psiti. Ndipo adziwe kuti Mulungu ndiye woweruza m'Yakobo, kufikira malekezero a dziko la pansi." 
Psalms59:14 Ndipo abwere madzulo, auwe ngati galu, nazungulire mudzi." 
Psalms59:15 Ayendeyende ndi kufuna chakudya, nachezere osakhuta." 
Psalms59:16 Koma ine, ndidzaimbira mphamvu yanu; inde ndidzaimbitsa chifundo chanu mamawa, pakuti Inu mwakhala msanje wanga, ndi pothawirapo ine tsiku la nsautso yanga." 
Psalms59:17 Ndidzaimbira zakukulemekezani Inu, mphamvu yanga; pakuti Mulungu ndiye msanje wanga, Mulungu wa chifundo changa." 
Psalms60:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Susan-Eduti. Mikitamu wa Davide; lakulangiza; muja analimbana nao Aramu Naharaimu ndi Aramu Zoba, nabwera Yowabu anapha a Edomu kuchigwa cha Mchere zikwi khumi mphambu ziwiri. Mwatitaya Mulungu, mwatipasula; mwakwiya; tibwezereni." 
Psalms60:2 Mwagwedeza dziko, mwaling'amba. Konzani ming'alu yake; pakuti ligwedezeka." 
Psalms60:3 Mwaonetsa anthu anu zowawa, mwatimwetsa vinyo wotinjenjemeretsa." 
Psalms60:4 Koma mwapatsa mbendera akuopa Inu, aikweze chifukwa cha choonadi." 
Psalms60:5 Kuti okondedwa anu alanditsidwe, pulumutsani ndi dzanja lanu lamanja, ndipo mutivomereze." 
Psalms60:6 Mulungu walankhula m'chiyero chake; ndidzakondwerera, ndidzagawa Sekemu, ndidzayesa muyeso chigwa cha Sukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Giliyadi ndi wanga, Manasenso ndi wanga; ndipo Efuremu ndi mphamvu ya mutu wanga; Yuda ndiye wolamulira wanga." 
Psalms60:8 Mowabu ndiye mkhate wanga; pa Edomu ndidzaponya nsapato yanga. Filistiya, fuulatu chifukwa cha ine." 
Psalms60:9 Adzandifikitsa ndani m'mudzi wa m'linga? Adzanditsogolera ndani ku Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Si ndinu, Mulungu, amene mwatitaya? Osatuluka nao makamu athu, Mulungu." 
Psalms60:11 Tithandizeni kunsautso; kuti chipulumutso cha munthu ndi chabe. 
Psalms60:12 Mwa Mulungu tidzachita molimbika mtima, ndipo Iye adzapondereza otisautsa." 
Psalms61:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Neginoto. Salimo la Davide. Imvani mfuu wanga, Mulungu; mverani pemphero langa." 
Psalms61:2 Ku malekezero a dziko lapansi ndidzafuulira kwa Inu, pomizika mtima wanga. Nditsogolereni kuthanthwe londiposa ine m'kutalika kwake." 
Psalms61:3 Pakuti munakhala pothawirapo panga; nsanja yolimba pothawa mdani ine. 
Psalms61:4 Ndidzagoneragonerabe m'chihema mwanu; ndidzathawira mobisalamo m'mapiko anu. 
Psalms61:5 Pakuti Inu, Mulungu, mudamva zowinda zanga; munandipatsa cholowa cha iwo akuopa dzina lanu." 
Psalms61:6 Mudzatalikitsa moyo wa mfumu. Zaka zake zidzafikira mibadwomibadwo. 
Psalms61:7 Adzakhala nthawi zonse pamaso pa Mulungu; mumpatse chifundo ndi choonadi zimsunge. 
Psalms61:8 Potero ndidzaimba zolemekeza dzina lanu kunthawi zonse, kuti ndichite zowinda zanga tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Psalms62:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo, pa Yedutuni, Salimo la Davide. Moyo wanga ukhalira chete Mulungu yekha; chipulumutso changa chifuma kwa Iye." 
Psalms62:2 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi chipulumutso changa; msanje wanga, sindidzagwedezeka kwakukulu." 
Psalms62:3 Mudzamvumvulukira munthu mpaka liti, kumupha iye, nonsenu, monga khoma lopendekeka, ndi mpanda woweyeseka?" 
Psalms62:4 Komatu amkhalira upo kuti amkankhire pansi ulemu wake; akondwera nao mabodza; adalitsa ndi m'kamwa mwao, koma atemberera mumtima." 
Psalms62:5 Moyo wanga, ukhalire chete Mulungu yekha; pakuti chiyembekezo changa chifuma kwa Iye." 
Psalms62:6 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi chipulumutso changa, msanje wanga, sindidzagwedezeka." 
Psalms62:7 Pa Mulungu pali chipulumutso changa ndi ulemerero wanga. Thanthwe la mphamvu yanga ndi pothawirapo panga mpa Mulungu. 
Psalms62:8 Khulupirirani pa Iye nyengo zonse, anthu inu, tsanulirani mitima yanu pamaso pake. Mulungu ndiye pothawirapo ife." 
Psalms62:9 Indetu, anthu achabe ndi mpweya, ndipo anthu akulu ndi bodza, pakuwayesa apepuka; onse pamodzi apepuka koposa mpweya." 
Psalms62:10 Musakhulupirire kusautsa, ndipo musatama chifwamba; chikachuluka chuma musakhazikepo mitima yanu." 
Psalms62:11 Mulungu ananena kamodzi, ndinachimva kawiri, kuti mphamvu ndi yake ya Mulungu." 
Psalms62:12 Chifundonso ndi chanu, Ambuye, Chifukwa Inu mubwezera munthu aliyense monga mwa ntchito yake." 
Psalms63:1 Salimo la Davide; muja anakhala m'chipululu cha Yuda Inu Mulungu, ndinu Mulungu wanga; ndidzakufunani m'matanda kucha. Moyo wanga ukumva ludzu la kwa Inu, thupi langa lilirira Inu, m'dziko louma ndi lotopetsa, lopanda madzi." 
Psalms63:2 Kuti ndione mphamvu yanu ndi ulemerero wanu, monga ndinakuonani m'malo oyera." 
Psalms63:3 Pakuti chifundo chanu chiposa moyo makomedwe ake; milomo yanga idzakulemekezani. 
Psalms63:4 Potero ndidzakuyamikani m'moyo mwanga; ndidzakweza manja anga m'dzina lanu. 
Psalms63:5 Mudzakhutitsa moyo wanga ngati ndi mafuta ndi chonona; ndipo pakamwa panga ndidzakulemekezani ndi milomo yakufuula mokondwera. 
Psalms63:6 Pokumbukira Inu pa kama wanga, ndi kulingalira za Inu maulonda a usiku." 
Psalms63:7 Pakuti munakhala mthandizi wanga; ndipo ndidzafuula mokondwera mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu. 
Psalms63:8 Moyo wanga uumirira Inu. Dzanja lamanja lanu lindigwiriziza. 
Psalms63:9 Koma iwo amene afuna moyo wanga kuti auononge, adzalowa m'munsi mwake mwa dziko." 
Psalms63:10 Adzawapereka kumphamvu ya lupanga; iwo adzakhala gawo la ankhandwe. 
Psalms63:11 Koma mfumu idzakondwera mwa Mulungu; yense wakulumbirira iye adzatamandira; pakuti pakamwa pa iwo onena bodza padzatsekedwa. 
Psalms64:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Imvani Yehova, mau anga, m'kudandaula kwanga; sungani moyo wanga angandiopse mdani." 
Psalms64:2 Ndibiseni pa upo wachinsinsi wa ochita zoipa; pa phokoso la ochita zopanda pake. 
Psalms64:3 Amene anola lilime lao ngati lupanga, napiringidza mivi yao, ndiyo mau akuwawitsa;" 
Psalms64:4 kuponyera wangwiro mobisika: Amponyera modzidzimutsa, osaopa." 
Psalms64:5 Alimbikitsana m'chinthu choipa; apangana za kutchera misampha mobisika; akuti, Adzaiona ndani?" 
Psalms64:6 Afunafuna zosalungama; kusanthula, asanthuladi mpaka kutha; chingakhale cha m'kati mwake mwa munthu, ndi mtima wozama." 
Psalms64:7 Koma Mulungu adzawaponyera muvi; adzalaswa modzidzimutsa. 
Psalms64:8 Adzawakhumudwitsa, lilime lao lidzawatsutsa; onse akuwaona adzawathawa." 
Psalms64:9 Ndipo anthu onse adzachita mantha; nadzabukitsa chochita Mulungu, nadzasamalira ntchito yake." 
Psalms64:10 Wolungama adzakondwera mwa Yehova, nadzakhulupirira Iye; ndipo oongoka mtima onse adzalemekeza." 
Psalms65:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo. M'Ziyoni akulemekezani Inu mwachete, Mulungu, adzakuchitirani Inu chowindachi." 
Psalms65:2 Wakumva pemphero Inu, zamoyo zonse zidzadza kwa Inu." 
Psalms65:3 Mphulupulu zinandilaka; koma mudzafafaniza zolakwa zathu. 
Psalms65:4 Wodala munthuyo mumsankha, ndi kumyandikizitsa, akhale m'mabwalo anu. Tidzakhuta nazo zokoma za m'nyumba yanu, za m'malo oyera a Kachisi wanu." 
Psalms65:5 Mudzatiyankha nazo zoopsa m'chilungamo, Mulungu wa chipulumutso chathu; ndinu chikhulupiriko cha malekezero onse a dziko lapansi, ndi cha iwo okhala kutali kunyanja." 
Psalms65:6 Ndinu amene mukhazikitsa mapiri ndi mphamvu yanu; pozingidwa nacho chilimbiko. 
Psalms65:7 Amene atontholetsa kukuntha kwa nyanja, kukuntha kwa mafunde ake, ndi phokoso la mitundu ya anthu." 
Psalms65:8 Ndipo iwo akukhala kumalekezero adzachita mantha chifukwa cha zizindikiro zanu; mukondweretsa apo patulukira dzuwa, ndi apo lilowera." 
Psalms65:9 Mucheza nalo dziko lapansi, mulithirira, mulilemeza kwambiri; mtsinje wa Mulungu udzala nao madzi, muwameretsera tirigu m'mene munakonzera nthaka." 
Psalms65:10 Mukhutitsa nthaka yake yolima; mufafaniza nthumbira zake; muiolowetsa ndi mvumbi; mudalitsa mmera wake. 
Psalms65:11 Muveka chakachi ndi ukoma wanu; ndipo mabande anu akukha zakucha. 
Psalms65:12 Akukha pa mabusa a m'chipululu; ndipo mapiri azingika nacho chimwemwe. 
Psalms65:13 Podyetsa mpodzaza ndi zoweta; ndipo zigwa zakutidwa ndi tirigu; zifuula mokondwera, inde ziimbira." 
Psalms66:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Nyimbo, Salimo. Fuulirani kwa Mulungu, dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms66:2 Imbirani ulemerero wa dzina lake; pomlemekeza mumchitire ulemerero. 
Psalms66:3 Nenani kwa Mulungu, Ha, ntchito zanu nzoopsa nanga! Chifukwa cha mphamvu yanu yaikulu adani anu adzagonjera Inu." 
Psalms66:4 Dziko lonse lapansi lidzakugwadirani, ndipo lidzakuimbirani; ndzaimbira dzina lanu." 
Psalms66:5 Idzani, muone ntchito za Mulungu; zochitira Iye ana a anthu nzoopsa." 
Psalms66:6 Anasanduliza nyanja ikhale mtunda. Anaoloka mtsinje choponda pansi, apo tinakondwera mwa Iye." 
Psalms66:7 Achita ufumu mwa mphamvu yake kosatha; maso ake ayang'anira amitundu; opikisana ndi Iye asadzikuze. 
Psalms66:8 Lemekezani Mulungu wathu, mitundu ya anthu inu, ndipo mumveketse liu la chilemekezo chake." 
Psalms66:9 Iye amene asunga moyo wathu tingafe, osalola phazi lathu literereke." 
Psalms66:10 Pakuti munatiyesera, Mulungu, munatiyenga monga ayenga siliva." 
Psalms66:11 Munapita nafe kuukonde; munatisenza chothodwetsa pamsana pathu. 
Psalms66:12 Munapititsa anthu oberekeka pamwamba pamitu pathu; tinapyola moto ndi madzi; koma munatifikitsa potitsitsimutsa. 
Psalms66:13 Ndidzalowa m'nyumba yanu ndi nsembe zopsereza, ndidzakuchitirani zowinda zanga," 
Psalms66:14 zimene inazitchula milomo yanga, ndinazinena pakamwa panga posautsika ine." 
Psalms66:15 Ndidzakufukizirani nsembe zopsereza zonona, pamodzi ndi chofukiza cha mphongo za nkhosa; ndidzakonza ng'ombe pamodzi ndi mbuzi." 
Psalms66:16 Idzani, imvani, inu nonse akuopa Mulungu, ndipo ndidzafotokozera zonse anazichitira moyo wanga." 
Psalms66:17 Ndinamfuulira Iye pakamwa panga, ndipo ndinamkuza ndi lilime langa." 
Psalms66:18 Ndikadasekera zopanda pake m'mtima mwanga, Ambuye sakadamvera." 
Psalms66:19 Koma Mulungu anamvadi; anamvera mau a pemphero langa. 
Psalms66:20 Wolemekezeka Mulungu, amene sanandipatutsire ine pemphero langa, kapena chifundo chake." 
Psalms67:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo, pa Neginoto. Salimo, Nyimbo. Atichitire chifundo Mulungu, ndi kutidalitsa, atiwalitsire nkhope yake;" 
Psalms67:2 kuti njira yanu idziwike pa dziko lapansi, chipulumutso chanu mwa amitundu onse." 
Psalms67:3 Anthu akuyamikeni, Mulungu; anthu onse akuyamikeni." 
Psalms67:4 Anthu akondwere, nafuule mokondwera; pakuti mudzaweruza anthu molunjika, ndipo mudzalangiza anthu pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms67:5 Anthu akuyamikeni, Mulungu; anthu onse akuyamikeni." 
Psalms67:6 Dziko lapansi lapereka zipatso zake, Mulungu, Mulungu wathu adzatidalitsa." 
Psalms67:7 Mulungu adzatidalitsa; ndipo malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzamuopa Iye. 
Psalms68:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Nyimbo. Auke Mulungu, abalalike adani ake; iwonso akumuda athawe pamaso pake." 
Psalms68:2 Muwachotse monga utsi uchotseka; monga phula lisungunuka pamoto, aonongeke oipa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Psalms68:3 Koma olungama akondwere; atumphe ndi chimwemwe pamaso pa Mulungu; ndipo asekere nacho chikondwerero. 
Psalms68:4 Imbirani Yehova, liimbireni nyimbo dzina lake; undirani mseu Iye woberekekayo kuchidikha; dzina lake ndiye Yehova; ndipo tumphani ndi chimwemwe pamaso pake." 
Psalms68:5 Mulungu, mokhala mwake moyera, ndiye Atate wa ana amasiye, ndi woweruza wa akazi amasiye." 
Psalms68:6 Mulungu amangitsira banja anthu a pa okha; atulutsa am'ndende alemerere; koma opikisana naye akhala m'dziko lopanda madzi. 
Psalms68:7 Pakutuluka paja, Inu Mulungu, ndi kutsogolera anthu anu, pakuyenda paja Inu m'chipululu." 
Psalms68:8 Dziko lapansi linagwedezeka, inde thambo linakha pamaso pa Mulungu; Sinai lomwe linagwedezeka pamaso pa Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israele." 
Psalms68:9 Inu, Mulungu, munavumbitsa chimvula, munatsitsimutsa cholowa chanu pamene chidathodwa." 
Psalms68:10 Gulu lanu linakhala m'dziko muja. Mwa ukoma wanu munalikonzera ozunzika, Mulungu." 
Psalms68:11 Ambuye anapatsa mau, akazi akulalikira uthengawo ndiwo khamu lalikulu." 
Psalms68:12 Mafumu a magulu a ankhondo athawathawa, ndipo mkazi amene akhala kwao agawa zofunkha." 
Psalms68:13 Pogona inu m'makola a zoweta, mukhala ngati mapiko a njiwa okulira ndi siliva, ndi nthenga zake zokulira ndi golide woyenga wonyezimira." 
Psalms68:14 Pamene Wamphamvuyonse anabalalitsa mafumu m'dzikomo, munayera ngati matalala m'Zalimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Phiri la Basani ndilo phiri la Mulungu; Phiri la Basani ndilo phiri la mitumitu. 
Psalms68:16 Muchitiranji nsanje mapiri inu a mitumitu, ndi phirilo Mulungu analikhumba, akhaleko? Inde, Yehova adzakhalabe komweko kosatha." 
Psalms68:17 Magaleta a Mulungu ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri, inde zikwi zowirikizawirikiza, Ambuye ali pakati pao, monga m'Sinai, m'malo opatulika." 
Psalms68:18 Munakwera kunka kumwamba, munapita nao undende kuuyesa ndende; munalandira zaufulu mwa anthu, ngakhale mwa opikisana nanu, kuti Yehova Mulungu akakhale nao." 
Psalms68:19 Wolemekeza Ambuye, tsiku ndi tsiku atisenzera katundu, ndiye Mulungu wa chipulumutso chathu." 
Psalms68:20 Mulungu akhala kwa ife Mulungu wa chipulumutso; ndipo Yehova Ambuye ali nazo zopulumutsira kuimfa. 
Psalms68:21 Indedi Mulungu adzaphwanya mutu wa adani ake, pakati pa mutu pa iye woyendabe m'kutsutsika kwake." 
Psalms68:22 Ambuye anati, Ndidzawatenganso ku Basani, ndidzawatenganso kozama kwa nyanja," 
Psalms68:23 kuti uviike phazi lako m'mwazi, kuti malilime a agalu ako alaweko adani ako." 
Psalms68:24 Anapenya mayendedwe anu, Mulungu, mayendedwe a Mulungu wanga, mfumu yanga, m'malo oyera." 
Psalms68:25 Oimbira anatsogolera, oimba zoimba anatsata m'mbuyo, pakatipo anamwali oimba mangaka." 
Psalms68:26 Lemekezani Mulungu m'masonkhano, ndiye Ambuye, inu a gwero la Israele." 
Psalms68:27 Apo pali Benjamini wamng'ono, wakuwachita ufumu, akulu a Yuda, ndi a upo wao, akulu a Zebuloni, akulu a Nafutali." 
Psalms68:28 Mulungu wako analamulira mphamvu yako, Limbitsani, Mulungu, chimene munatichitira." 
Psalms68:29 Chifukwa cha Kachisi wanu wa m'Yerusalemu mafumu adzabwera nacho chaufulu kukupatsani. 
Psalms68:30 Dzudzulani chilombo cha m'bango, khamu la mphongo ndi ng'ombe za anthu, yense wakudzigonjera ndi ndalama za siliva; anabalalitsa mitundu ya anthu ya kukondwera nayo nkhondo." 
Psalms68:31 Akulu adzafumira ku Ejipito; Kusi adzafulumira kutambalitsa manja ake kwa Mulungu. 
Psalms68:32 Imbirani Mulungu, maufumu a dziko lapansi inu; imbirani Ambuye zomlemekeza." 
Psalms68:33 Kwa Iye wakuberekeka pamwambamwamba, oyambira kale lomwe; taonani; amveketsa liu lake, ndilo liu lamphamvu." 
Psalms68:34 Vomerezani kuti mphamvu nja Mulungu; ukulu wake uli pa Israele, ndi mphamvu yake m'mitambo." 
Psalms68:35 Inu Mulungu, ndinu woopsa m'malo oyera anu; Mulungu wa Israele ndiye amene apatsa anthu ake mphamvu ndi chilimbiko. Alemekezeke Mulungu." 
Psalms69:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo. Pa Syosyanimu. Salimo la Davide. Ndipulumutseni Mulungu; pakuti madzi afikira moyo wanga. 
Psalms69:2 Ndamira m'thope lozama, lopanda poponderapo; ndalowa m'madzi ozama, ndipo chigumula chandimiza." 
Psalms69:3 Ndalema ndi kufuula kwanga; kum'mero kwauma gwa! M'maso mwanga mwada poyembekeza Mulungu wanga. 
Psalms69:4 Ondida kopanda chifukwa achuluka koposa tsitsi la pamutu panga; ofuna kunditha, ndiwo adani anga monama, ali ndi mphamvu. Pamenepo andibwezetsa chosafunkha ine." 
Psalms69:5 Mulungu, mudziwa kupusa kwanga; ndipo kutsutsika kwanga sikubisikira Inu." 
Psalms69:6 Iwo akuyembekeza Inu, Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, asachite manyazi chifukwa cha ine, iwo ofuna Inu, Mulungu wa Israele, asapepulidwe chifukwa cha ine." 
Psalms69:7 Pakuti ndalola chotonza chifukwa cha Inu, chimpepulo chakuta nkhope yanga." 
Psalms69:8 Abale anga andiyesa mlendo, ndi ana a mai wanga andiyesa wa mtundu wina." 
Psalms69:9 Pakuti changu cha pa nyumba yanu chandidya; ndi zotonza za iwo otonza Inu zandigwera ine. 
Psalms69:10 Ndipo ndinalira pa kusala kwa moyo wanga, koma uku kunandikhalira chotonza." 
Psalms69:11 Ndipo chovala changa ndinayesa chiguduli, koma amandiphera mwambi." 
Psalms69:12 Okhala pachipata akamba za ine; ndipo oledzera andiimba. 
Psalms69:13 Koma ine, pemphero langa lili kwa Inu, Yehova, m'nyengo yolandirika; Mulungu, mwa chifundo chanu chachikulu, mundivomereze ndi choonadi cha chipulumutso chanu." 
Psalms69:14 Mundilanditse kuthope, ndisamiremo, ndilanditseni kwa iwo akundida, ndi kwa madzi ozama." 
Psalms69:15 Chigumula chisandifotsere, ndipo chakuya chisandimize; ndipo asanditsekere pakamwa pake pa dzenje." 
Psalms69:16 Mundiyankhe Yehova; pakuti chifundo chanu nchokoma; munditembenukire monga mwa unyinji wa nsoni zokoma zanu. 
Psalms69:17 Ndipo musabisire nkhope yanu mtumiki wanu; pakuti ndisautsika ine; mundiyankhe msanga. 
Psalms69:18 Yandikizani moyo wanga, ndi kuuombola; ndipulumutseni chifukwa cha adani anga." 
Psalms69:19 Mudziwa chotonza changa, ndi manyazi anga, ndi chimpepulo changa. Akundisautsa ali pamaso panu." 
Psalms69:20 Chotonza chandiswera mtima, ndipo ndidwala ine; ndipo ndinayembekeza wina wondichitira chifundo, koma palibe; ndinayembekeza onditonthoza mtima, osawapeza." 
Psalms69:21 Ndipo anandipatsa ndulu ikhale chakudya changa; nandimwetsa vinyo wosasa pomva ludzu ine. 
Psalms69:22 Gome lao likhale msampha pamaso pao; pokhala ndi mtendere iwo, likhale khwekhwe." 
Psalms69:23 M'maso mwao mude, kuti asapenye; ndipo munjenjemeretse m'chuuno mwao kosalekeza." 
Psalms69:24 Muwatsanulire mkwiyo wanu, ndipo moto wa ukali wanu uwagwere." 
Psalms69:25 Pokhala pao pakhale bwinja; m'mahema mwao musakhale munthu. 
Psalms69:26 Pakuti alondola amene Inu munampanda; ndipo akambirana za zowawa zao za iwo amene munawalasa. 
Psalms69:27 Onjezani mphulupulu pa mphulupulu zao; ndipo asafikire chilungamo chanu. 
Psalms69:28 Afafanizidwe m'buku lamoyo, ndipo asalembedwe pamodzi ndi olungama." 
Psalms69:29 Koma ine ndine wozunzika ndi womva zowawa; chipulumutso chanu, Mulungu, chindikweze pamsanje." 
Psalms69:30 Ndidzalemekeza dzina la Mulungu ndi kuliimbira, ndipo ndidzambukitsa ndi kumyamika." 
Psalms69:31 Ndipo chidzakomera Yehova koposa ng'ombe, inde mphongo za nyanga ndi ziboda." 
Psalms69:32 Ofatsa anachiona, nakondwera, ndipo inu, ofuna Mulungu, mtima wanu ukhale ndi moyo." 
Psalms69:33 Pakuti Yehova amvera aumphawi, ndipo sapeputsa am'ndende ake." 
Psalms69:34 Zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zimlemekeze, nyanja ndi zonse zoyenda m'mwemo." 
Psalms69:35 Pakuti Mulungu adzapulumutsa Ziyoni, nadzamanga midzi ya Yuda; ndipo iwo adzakhala komweko, likhale laolao." 
Psalms69:36 Ndipo mbumba ya atumiki ake idzalilandira; ndipo iwo akukonda dzina lake adzakhala m'mwemo. 
Psalms70:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide, la chikumbutso. Fulumirani kundipulumutsa, Mulungu! Fulumirani kundithandiza, Yehova." 
Psalms70:2 Achite manyazi, nadodome amene afuna moyo wanga. Abwezedwe m'mbuyo, napepulidwe amene akonda kundichitira choipa." 
Psalms70:3 Abwerere, kukhale mphotho ya manyazi ao amene akuti, Hede, hede." 
Psalms70:4 Asekerere nakondwerere mwa Inu onse akufuna Inu; nanene kosalekeza iwo akukonda chipulumutso chanu, abuke Mulungu." 
Psalms70:5 Koma ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi; mundifulumirire, Mulungu. Inu ndinu mthandizi wanga ndi Mpulumutsi wanga; musachedwe, Yehova." 
Psalms71:1 Ndikhulupirira Inu, Yehova. Ndisachite manyazi nthawi zonse." 
Psalms71:2 Ndikwatuleni m'chilungamo chanu, ndi kundilanditsa, nditcherereni khutu lanu ndi kundipulumutsa." 
Psalms71:3 Mundikhalire thanthwe lokhalamo, lopitako kosaleka; mwalamulira kundipulumutsa; popeza Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa." 
Psalms71:4 Ndilanditseni, Mulungu wanga, m'dzanja la woipa, m'dzanja la munthu wosalungama ndi wachiwawa." 
Psalms71:5 Pakuti Inu ndinu chiyembekezo changa, Ambuye Yehova; mwandikhalira wokhulupirika kuyambira ubwana wanga." 
Psalms71:6 Inu munandigwiriziza kuyambira ndisanabadwe, kuyambira pa thupi la mai wanga wondichitira zokoma ndinu; ndidzakulemekezani kosalekeza." 
Psalms71:7 Ndikhala chodabwitsa kwa ambiri; koma Inu ndinu pothawira panga polimba. 
Psalms71:8 M'kamwa mwanga mudzadzala lemekezo lanu, ndi ulemu wanu tsiku lonse." 
Psalms71:9 Musanditaye mu ukalamba wanga; musandisiye, pakutha mphamvu yanga." 
Psalms71:10 Pakuti adani anga alankhula za ine; ndipo iwo akulalira moyo wanga apangana upo," 
Psalms71:11 ndi kuti, Wamsiya Mulungu. Mlondoleni, mgwireni; popeza palibe wompulumutsa." 
Psalms71:12 Musandikhalire kutali, Mulungu; fulumirani kundithandiza, Mulungu." 
Psalms71:13 Adani a moyo wanga achite manyazi, nathawe; chotonza ndi chimpepulo zikute ondifunira choipa." 
Psalms71:14 Koma ine ndidzayembekeza kosaleka, ndipo ndidzaonjeza kukulemekezani." 
Psalms71:15 Pakamwa panga padzafotokozera chilungamo chanu, ndi chipulumutso chanu tsiku lonse; pakuti sindidziwa mawerengedwe ake." 
Psalms71:16 Ndidzamuka mu mphamvu ya Ambuye Yehova; ndidzatchula chilungamo chanu, inde chanu chokha." 
Psalms71:17 Mulungu, mwandiphunzitsa kuyambira ubwana wanga; ndipo kufikira lero ndilalikira zodabwitsa zanu." 
Psalms71:18 Poteronso pokalamba ine ndi kukhala nazo imvi musandisiye, Mulungu; kufikira nditalalikira mbadwo uwu za dzanja lanu, mphamvu yanu kwa onse akudza m'mbuyo." 
Psalms71:19 Chilungamo chanunso, Mulungu, chifikira kuthambo; Inu amene munachita zachikulu, akunga Inu ndani, Mulungu?" 
Psalms71:20 Inu, amene munationetsa nsautso zambiri ndi zoipa, mudzatipatsanso moyo, ndi kutitenganso munsi mwa dziko." 
Psalms71:21 Mundionjezere ukulu wanga, ndipo munditembenukire kundisangalatsa." 
Psalms71:22 Ndiponso ndidzakuyamikani ndi chisakasa, kubukitsa choonadi chanu, Mulungu wanga; ndidzakuimbirani nyimbo ndi zeze, ndinu Woyerayo wa Israele." 
Psalms71:23 Milomo yanga idzafuula mokondwera poimbira Inu nyimbo; inde, moyo wanga umene munaombola." 
Psalms71:24 Lilime langa lomwe lidzalankhula za chilungamo chanu tsiku lonse, pakuti ofuna kundichitira choipa achita manyazi, nadodoma." 
Psalms72:1 Salimo la kwa Solomoni. Patsani mfumu maweruzo anu, Mulungu, ndi mwana wa mfumu chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms72:2 Potero adzanenera anthu anu mlandu ndi m'chilungamo, ndi ozunzika anu ndi m'chiweruzo." 
Psalms72:3 Mapiri adzatengera anthu mtendere, timapiri tomwe, m'chilungamo." 
Psalms72:4 Adzaweruza ozunzika a mwa anthu, adzapulumutsa ana aumphawi, nadzaphwanya wosautsa." 
Psalms72:5 Adzakuopani momwe likhalira dzuwa ndi mwezi, kufikira mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms72:6 Adzanga mvula yakugwa pa udzu wosenga, monga mvula yothirira dziko." 
Psalms72:7 Masiku ake wolungama adzakhazikika; ndi mtendere wochuluka, kufikira sipadzakhala mwezi." 
Psalms72:8 Ndipo adzachita ufumu kuchokera kunyanja kufikira kunyanja, ndi kuchokera ku Mtsinje kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms72:9 Okhala m'chipululu adzagwadira pamaso pake; ndi adani ake adzaluma nthaka. 
Psalms72:10 Mafumu a ku Tarisisi ndi ku Zisumbuzo adzabwera nacho chopereka; mafumu a ku Sheba ndi Seba adzadza nazo mphatso. 
Psalms72:11 Inde mafumu onse adzamgwadira iye, amitundu onse adzamtumikira." 
Psalms72:12 Pakuti adzapulumutsa waumphawi wofuulayo; ndi wozunzika amene alibe mthandizi. 
Psalms72:13 Adzachitira nsoni wosauka ndi waumphawi, nadzapulumutsa moyo wa aumphawi." 
Psalms72:14 Adzaombola moyo wao ku chinyengo ndi chiwawa; ndipo mwazi wao udzakhala wa mtengo pamaso pake. 
Psalms72:15 Ndipo iye adzakhala ndi moyo; ndipo adzampatsa golide wa ku Sheba; nadzampempherera kosalekeza; adzamlemekeza tsiku lonse. 
Psalms72:16 M'dzikomo mudzakhala dzinthu dzochuluka pamwamba pa mapiri; zipatso zake zidzati waa, ngati za ku Lebanoni, ndipo iwo a m'mudzi adzaphuka ngati msipu wapansi." 
Psalms72:17 Dzina lake lidzakhala kosatha, momwe likhalira dzuwa dzina lake lidzamvekera zidzukulu. Ndipo anthu adzadalitsidwa mwa Iye; amitundu onse adzamutcha wodala." 
Psalms72:18 Wolemekezeka Yehova Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israele, amene achita zodabwitsa yekhayo." 
Psalms72:19 Ndipo dzina lake la ulemerero lidalitsike kosatha; ndipo dziko lonse lapansi lidzale nao ulemerero wake. Amen, ndi Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Mapemphero a Davide mwana wa Yese atha. 
Psalms73:1 Salimo la Asafu. Indedi Mulungu achitira Israele zabwino, iwo a mtima wa mbee." 
Psalms73:2 Koma ine, ndikadagwa; mapazi anga akadaterereka." 
Psalms73:3 Pakuti ndinachitira nsanje odzitamandira, pakuona mtendere wa oipa." 
Psalms73:4 Pakuti palibe zomangira pakufa iwo, ndi mphamvu yao njolimba." 
Psalms73:5 Savutika monga anthu ena; sasautsika monga anthu ena. 
Psalms73:6 Chifukwa chake kudzikuza kunga unyolo pakhosi pao; achivala chiwawa ngati malaya. 
Psalms73:7 Kunenepa kwao kutuzulitsa maso ao, malingaliro a mitima yao asefukira." 
Psalms73:8 Achita zaphwete nalankhula moipa za kusautsa, alankhula modzitama." 
Psalms73:9 Pakamwa pao anena zam'mwamba, ndipo lilime lao liyendayenda m'dziko lapansi." 
Psalms73:10 Chifukwa chake anthu ake amabwera kudza kuno, ndipo chikho chodzala ndi madzi achigugudiza." 
Psalms73:11 Namati, Akachidziwa bwanji Mulungu? Kodi Wam'mwambamwamba ali nayo nzeru?" 
Psalms73:12 Tapenyani, oipa ndi awa; ndipo pokhazikika chikhazikikire aonjezerapo pa chuma chao." 
Psalms73:13 Indedi, ndinayeretsa mtima wanga kwachabe, ndipo ndinasamba m'manja mosalakwa." 
Psalms73:14 Popeza andisautsa tsiku lonse, nandilanga mamawa monse," 
Psalms73:15 ndikadati, Ndidzafotokozera chotere, taonani, ndikadachita chosakhulupirika ndi mbadwo wa ana ako." 
Psalms73:16 Pamene ndinayesa kudziwitsa ichi, ndinavutika nacho;" 
Psalms73:17 mpaka ndinalowa m'zoyera za Mulungu, ndi kulingalira chitsiriziro chao." 
Psalms73:18 Indedi muwaika poterera, muwagwetsa kuti muwaononge." 
Psalms73:19 Ha? M'kamphindi ayesedwa bwinja; athedwa konse ndi zoopsa. 
Psalms73:20 Monga anthu atauka, apepula loto; momwemo, Inu Ambuye, pakuuka mudzapeputsa chithunzithunzi chao." 
Psalms73:21 Pakuti mtima wanga udawawa, ndipo ndinalaswa m'impso zanga;" 
Psalms73:22 ndinali wam'thengo, wosadziwa kanthu; ndinali ngati nyama pamaso panu." 
Psalms73:23 Koma ndikhala ndi Inu chikhalire, mwandigwira dzanja langa la manja." 
Psalms73:24 Mudzanditsogolera ndi uphungu wanu, ndipo mutatero, mudzandilandira m'ulemerero." 
Psalms73:25 Ndili ndi yani Kumwamba, koma Inu? Ndipo pa dziko lapansi palibe wina wondikonda koma Inu." 
Psalms73:26 Likatha thupi langa ndi mtima wanga, Mulungu ndiye thanthwe la mtima wanga, ndi cholandira changa chosatha." 
Psalms73:27 Pakuti, taonani, iwo okhala patali ndi Inu adzaonongeka; muononga onse akupembedza kwina, kosiyana ndi Inu." 
Psalms73:28 Koma ine, kundikomera kuyandikiza kwa Mulungu. Ndimuyesa Ambuye Yehova pothawirapo ine, kuti ndifotokozere ntchito zanu zonse." 
Psalms74:1 Chilangizo cha Asafu. Mulungu, munatitayiranji chitayire? Mkwiyo wanu ufukiranji pa nkhosa za kubusa kwanu?" 
Psalms74:2 Kumbukirani msonkhano wanu, umene munaugula kale, umene munauombola ukhale fuko la cholandira chanu; Phiri la Ziyoni limene mukhalamo." 
Psalms74:3 Nyamulani mapazi anu kukapenya mapasukidwe osatha, zoipa zonse adazichita mdani m'malo opatulika."
