Psalms74:4 Otsutsana ndi Inu abangula pakati pa msonkhano wanu; aika mbendera zao zikhale zizindikiro. 
Psalms74:5 Anaoneka ngati osamula nkhwangwa kunkhalango. 
Psalms74:6 Ndipo tsopano aphwanya zosemeka zake zonse ndi nkhwangwa ndi nyundo. 
Psalms74:7 Anatentha malo anu opatulika; anaipsa ndi kugwetsa pansi mokhalamo dzina lanu. 
Psalms74:8 Ananena mumtima mwao, Tiwapasule pamodzi; anatentha zosonkhaniramo za Mulungu zonse, m'dzikomo." 
Psalms74:9 Sitiziona zizindikiro zathu; palibenso mneneri; ndipo mwa ife palibe wina wakudziwa mpaka liti. 
Psalms74:10 Wotsutsanayo adzatonza kufikira liti, Mulungu? Kodi mdani adzanyoza dzina lanu nthawi yonse?" 
Psalms74:11 Mubwezeranji dzanja lanu, ndilo dzanja lamanja lanu? Mulitulutse kuchifuwa chanu ndipo muwatheretu." 
Psalms74:12 Koma Mulungu ndiye mfumu yanga kuyambira kale, wochita zakupulumutsa pakati pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms74:13 Mudagawa nyanja ndi mphamvu yanu; mudaswa mitu ya zoopsa za m'madzi. 
Psalms74:14 Mudaphwanya mitu ya Leviyatani; mudampereka akhale chakudya cha zilombo za m'chipululu. 
Psalms74:15 Mudagawa kasupe ndi mtsinje; mudaphwetsa mitsinje yaikulu. 
Psalms74:16 Usana ndi wanu, usikunso ndi wanu, munakonza kuunika ndi dzuwa." 
Psalms74:17 Munaika malekezero onse a dziko lapansi; munalenga dzinja ndi malimwe. 
Psalms74:18 Mukumbukire ichi, Yehova, mdaniyo anatonza, ndipo anthu opusa ananyoza dzina lanu." 
Psalms74:19 Musapereke moyo wa njiwa yanu kwa chilombo; musamaiwala moyo wa ozunzika anu nthawi yonse. 
Psalms74:20 Samalirani chipanganocho; pakuti malo a mdima a m'dziko adzala ndi zokhalamo chiwawa. 
Psalms74:21 Okhalira mphanthi asabwere nao manyazi; wozunzika ndi waumphawi alemekeze dzina lanu. 
Psalms74:22 Nyamukani, Mulungu, mudzinenere mlandu nokha; kumbukirani momwe akutonzani wopusa tsiku lonse." 
Psalms74:23 Musaiwale mau a iwo otsutsana ndi Inu; kusokosera kwa iwo akuukirani Inu kumakwera kosaleka. 
Psalms75:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Altasyeti; Salimo la Asafu. Nyimbo. Tikuyamikani Inu, Mulungu; tiyamika, pakuti dzina lanu lili pafupi; afotokozera zodabwitsa zanu." 
Psalms75:2 Pakuona nyengo yake ndidzaweruza molunjika. 
Psalms75:3 Lasungunuka dziko lapansi, ndi onse okhalamo; ndinachirika mizati yake." 
Psalms75:4 Ndinati kwa odzitamandira, musamachita zodzitamandira; ndi kwa oipa, Musamakweza nyanga;" 
Psalms75:5 musamakwezetsa nyanga yanu; musamalankhula ndi khosi louma. 
Psalms75:6 Pakuti kukuzaku sikuchokera kum'mawa, kapena kumadzulo, kapena kuchipululu." 
Psalms75:7 Pakuti Mulungu ndiye woweruza; achepsa wina, nakuza wina." 
Psalms75:8 Pakuti m'dzanja la Yehova muli chikho; ndi vinyo wake achita thovu; chidzala ndi zosanganizira, ndipo atsanulako. Indedi, oipa onse a pa dziko lapansi adzamwa nadzagugudiza nsenga zake." 
Psalms75:9 Koma ine ndidzalalikira kosalekeza, ndidzaimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Ndipo ndidzatseteka nyanga zonse za oipa; koma nyanga za wolungama zidzakwezeka. 
Psalms76:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Neginoto. Salimo la Asafu. Nyimbo. Mulungu adziwika mwa Yuda, dzina lake limveka mwa Israele." 
Psalms76:2 Msasa wake unali m'Salemu, ndipo pokhala Iye m'Ziyoni." 
Psalms76:3 Pomwepo anathyola mivi ya pauta; chikopa, ndi lupanga, ndi nkhondo." 
Psalms76:4 Inu ndinu wakuunikira, ndi womveka wakuposa mapiri muli achifwamba." 
Psalms76:5 Olimba mtima chifunkhidwa chuma chao, agona tulo tao; amuna onse amphamvu asowa manja ao." 
Psalms76:6 Pa kudzudzula kwanu, Mulungu wa Yakobo, galeta ndi kavalo yemwe anagwa m'tulo." 
Psalms76:7 Inu ndinu woopsa; ndipo utauka mkwiyo wanu adzakhala chilili ndani pamaso panu? 
Psalms76:8 Mudamveketsa chiweruzo chochokera Kumwamba; dziko lapansi linachita mantha, nilinakhala chete," 
Psalms76:9 pakuuka Mulungu kuti aweruze, kuti apulumutse ofatsa onse a pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms76:10 Indedi, kuzaza kwake kwa munthu kudzakulemekezani; chotsalira cha kuzazaku mudzachiletsa." 
Psalms76:11 Windani ndipo chitirani Yehova Mulungu wanu zowindazo; onse akumzinga abwere nacho chopereka cha kwa Iye amene ayenera kumuopa. 
Psalms76:12 Iye adzadula mzimu wa akulu; akhala woopsa kwa mafumu a pa dziko lapansi. 
Psalms77:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Yedutuni; Salimo la Asafu. Ndidzafuulira kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga; kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga, ndipo adzanditcherezera khutu." 
Psalms77:2 Tsiku la nsautso yanga ndinafuna Ambuye. Dzanja langa linatambalika usiku, losaleka; mtima wanga unakana kutonthozedwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ndikumbukira Mulungu ndipo ndivutika; ndilingalira ndipo mzimu wanga ukomoka. 
Psalms77:4 Mundikhalitsa maso; ndigwidwa mtima wosanena kanthu. 
Psalms77:5 Ndinaganizira masiku akale, zaka zakalekale." 
Psalms77:6 Ndikumbukira nyimbo yanga usiku; ndilingalira mumtima mwanga; mzimu wanga unasanthula. 
Psalms77:7 Kodi Ambuye adzataya nthawi yonse? Osabwerezanso kukondwera nafe. 
Psalms77:8 Chifundo chake chalekeka konsekonse kodi? Lonjezano lake lidatha kodi ku mibadwo yonse? 
Psalms77:9 Kodi Mulungu waiwala kuchita chifundo? Watsekereza kodi nsoni zokoma zake mumkwiyo? 
Psalms77:10 Ndipo ndinati, Chindilaka ichi; koma ndikumbukira zaka za dzanja lamanja la Wam'mwambamwamba." 
Psalms77:11 Ndidzakumbukira zimene adazichita Yehova; inde, ndidzakumbukira zodabwitsa zanu zoyambira kale." 
Psalms77:12 Ndipo ndidzalingalira ntchito yanu yonse, ndi kulingalirabe zimene munazichita Inu." 
Psalms77:13 Mulungu, m'malo opatulika muli njira yanu; Mulungu wamkulu ndani monga Mulungu?" 
Psalms77:14 Inu ndinu Mulungu wakuchita chodabwitsa; munazindikiritsa mphamvu yanu mwa mitundu ya anthu. 
Psalms77:15 Munaombola anthu anu ndi mkono wanu, ndiwo ana a Yakobo, ndi a Yosefe." 
Psalms77:16 Madziwo anakuonani Mulungu; anakuonani madziwo; anachita mantha, zozama zomwe zinanjenjemera." 
Psalms77:17 Makongwa anatsanula madzi; thambo lidamvetsa liu lake; mivi yanu yomwe inatulukira. 
Psalms77:18 Liu la bingu lanu linatengezanatengezana; mphezi zinaunikira ponse pali anthu; dziko lapansi linanjenjemera ndi kugwedezeka. 
Psalms77:19 Njira yanu inali m'nyanja, koyenda Inu nku madzi aakulu, ndipo mapazi anu sanadziwike." 
Psalms77:20 Munatsogolera anthu anu ngati gulu la nkhosa, ndi dzanja la Mose ndi Aroni." 
Psalms78:1 Chilangizo cha Asafu. Tamverani, anthu anga, chilamulo changa; tcherezani khutu lanu mau a pakamwa panga." 
Psalms78:2 Ndidzatsegula pakamwa panga mofanizira; ndidzatchula zinsinsi zoyambira kale. 
Psalms78:3 Zimene tinazimva, ndi kuzidziwa, ndipo makolo athu anatifotokozera." 
Psalms78:4 Sitidzazibisira ana ao, koma kufotokozera mbadwo ukudzawo zolemekeza za Yehova, ndi mphamvu yake, ndi zodabwitsa zake zimene anazichita." 
Psalms78:5 Anakhazika mboni mwa Yakobo, naika chilamulo mwa Israele, ndizo analamulira atate athu, akazidziwitse ana ao;" 
Psalms78:6 kuti mbadwo ukudzawo udziwe, ndiwo ana amene akadzabadwa; amene adzaimirira nadzafotokozera ana ao." 
Psalms78:7 Ndi kuti chiyembekezo chao chikhale kwa Mulungu, osaiwala zochita Mulungu, koma kusunga malamulo ake ndiko." 
Psalms78:8 Ndi kuti asange makolo ao, ndiwo mbadwo woukirana ndi wopikisana ndi Mulungu; mbadwo wosakonza mtima wao, ndi mzimu wao sunakhazikika ndi Mulungu." 
Psalms78:9 Ana a Efuremu okhala nazo zida, oponya nao mauta, anabwerera m'mbuyo tsiku la nkhondo." 
Psalms78:10 Sanasunga chipangano cha Mulungu, nakana kuyenda m'chilamulo chake." 
Psalms78:11 Ndipo anaiwala zochita Iye, ndi zodabwitsa zake zimene anawaonetsa." 
Psalms78:12 Anachita chodabwitsa pamaso pa makolo ao, m'dziko la Ejipito kuchidikha cha Zowani." 
Psalms78:13 Anagawa nyanja nawapititsapo; naimitsa madziwo ngati khoma. 
Psalms78:14 Ndipo msana anawatsogolera ndi mtambo ndi usiku wonse ndi kuunika kwa moto. 
Psalms78:15 Anang'alula thanthwe m'chipululu, ndipo anawamwetsa kochuluka monga m'madzi ozama." 
Psalms78:16 Anatulukitsa mitsinje m'thanthwe, inde anatsikitsa madzi ngati mitsinje." 
Psalms78:17 Koma anaonjeza kumchimwira Iye, kupikisana ndi Wam'mwambamwamba m'chipululu." 
Psalms78:18 Ndipo anayesa Mulungu mumtima mwao ndi kupempha chakudya monga mwa kulakalaka kwao. 
Psalms78:19 Ndipo analankhula motsutsana ndi Mulungu; anati, Kodi Mulungu akhoza kutikonzera podyera m'chipululu?" 
Psalms78:20 Taonani, anapanda thanthwe, ndi madzi anayendako ndi mitsinje inasefuka; kodi adzakhozanso kupatsa mkate? Kodi adzafunira anthu ake nyama?" 
Psalms78:21 Chifukwa chake Yehova anamva, nakwiya; ndipo anayatsa moto pa Yakobo, ndiponso mkwiyo unakwera pa Israele." 
Psalms78:22 Popeza sanakhulupirire Mulungu, osatama chipulumutso chake." 
Psalms78:23 Koma analamulira mitambo ili m'mwamba, natsegula m'makomo a kumwamba." 
Psalms78:24 Ndipo anawavumbitsira mana, adye, nawapatsa tirigu wa kumwamba." 
Psalms78:25 Yense anadya mkate wa angelo, anawatumizira chakudya chofikira." 
Psalms78:26 Anaombetsa m'mwamba mphepo ya kum'mawa, natsogoza mwera ndi mphamvu yake." 
Psalms78:27 Ndipo anawavumbitsira nyama ngati fumbi, ndi mbalame zouluka ngati mchenga wa kunyanja." 
Psalms78:28 Ndipo anazigwetsa pakati pa misasa yao, pozungulira pokhala iwo." 
Psalms78:29 Potero anadya nakhuta kwambiri; ndipo anawapatsa chokhumba iwo. 
Psalms78:30 Asanathe nacho chokhumba chao, chakudya chao chili m'kamwa mwao," 
Psalms78:31 pamenepo mkwiyo wa Mulungu unawaukira, ndipo anapha mwa onenepa ao, nagwetsa osankhika a Israele." 
Psalms78:32 Chingakhale ichi chonse anachimwanso, osavomereza zodabwitsa zake." 
Psalms78:33 Potero anathera masiku ao ndi zopanda pake, ndi zaka zao mwa mantha." 
Psalms78:34 Pamene anawapha ndipo anamfuna Iye; nabwerera, nafunitsitsa Mulungu." 
Psalms78:35 Ndipo anakumbukira kuti Mulungu ndiye thanthwe lao, ndi Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba Mombolo wao." 
Psalms78:36 Koma anamsyasyalika pakamwa pao, namnamiza ndi lilime lao." 
Psalms78:37 Popeza mtima wao sunakonzekera Iye, ndipo sanakhazikike m'chipangano chake." 
Psalms78:38 Koma Iye pokhala ngwa chifundo, anakhululukira choipa, osawaononga; nabweza mkwiyo wake kawirikawiri, sanautse ukali wake wonse." 
Psalms78:39 Ndipo anakumbukira kuti iwo ndiwo anthu; mphepo yopita yosabweranso. 
Psalms78:40 Kawirikawiri nanga anapikisana ndi Iye kuchigwako, nammvetsa chisoni m'chipululu." 
Psalms78:41 Pakuti anabwerera m'mbuyo, nayesa Mulungu, nachepsa Woyerayo wa Israele." 
Psalms78:42 Sanakumbukire dzanja lake, tsikuli anawaombola kwa msautsi." 
Psalms78:43 Amene anaika zizindikiro zake m'Ejipito, ndi zodabwitsa zake kuchidikha cha Zowani." 
Psalms78:44 Nasanduliza nyanja yao mwazi, ndi mitsinje yao, kuti sangakhoze kumwa." 
Psalms78:45 Anawatumizira pakati pao mitambo ya ntchentche zakuwatha; ndi achule akuwaononga. 
Psalms78:46 Ndipo anapatsa mphuchi dzinthu dzao, ndi dzombe ntchito yao." 
Psalms78:47 Anapha mphesa zao ndi matalala, ndi mikuyu yao ndi chisanu." 
Psalms78:48 Naperekanso zoweta zao kwa matalala, ndi ng'ombe zao kwa mphezi." 
Psalms78:49 Anawatumizira mkwiyo wake wotentha, kuzaza, ndi kupsa mtima, ndi nsautso, ndizo gulu la amithenga ochita zoipa." 
Psalms78:50 Analambulira mkwiyo wake njira; sanalekerere moyo wao usafe, koma anapereka moyo wao kumliri." 
Psalms78:51 Ndipo anapha ana oyamba onse a mu Ejipito, ndiwo oyamba a mphamvu yao m'mahema a Hamu." 
Psalms78:52 Koma anatulutsa anthu ake ngati nkhosa, nawatsogoza ngati gulu la zoweta m'chipululu." 
Psalms78:53 Ndipo anawatsogolera mokhulupirika, kotero kuti sanaope; koma nyanja inamiza adani ao." 
Psalms78:54 Ndipo anawafikitsa kumalire a malo ake oyera, kuphiri ili, dzanja lamanja lake lidaligula." 
Psalms78:55 Ndipo anapirikitsa amitundu pamaso pao, nawagawira cholowa chao, ndi muyeso, nakhalitsa mafuko a Israele m'mahema mwao." 
Psalms78:56 Koma anamuyesa napikisana ndi Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba, osasunga mboni zake;" 
Psalms78:57 koma anabwerera m'mbuyo, nachita zosakhulupirika monga makolo ao, anapatuka ngati uta wolenda." 
Psalms78:58 Ndipo anautsa mtima wake ndi malo amsanje ao, namchititsa nsanje ndi mafano osema." 
Psalms78:59 Pakumva ichi Mulungu, anakwiya, nanyozatu Israele;" 
Psalms78:60 ndipo anachokera chokhalamo cha ku Silo, chihemacho adachimanga mwa anthu;" 
Psalms78:61 napereka mphamvu yake m'ukapolo, ndi ulemerero wake m'dzanja la msautsi." 
Psalms78:62 Naperekanso anthu ake kwa lupanga; nakwiya nacho cholandira chake. 
Psalms78:63 Moto unapsereza anyamata ao; ndi anamwali ao sanalemekezeke. 
Psalms78:64 Ansembe ao anagwa ndi lupanga; ndipo amasiye ao sanachite maliro. 
Psalms78:65 Pamenepo Ambuye anauka ngati wam'tulo; ngati chiphona chakuchita nthungululu ndi vinyo. 
Psalms78:66 Ndipo anapanda otsutsana naye kumbuyo; nawapereka akhale otonzeka kosatha. 
Psalms78:67 Tero anakana hema wa Yosefe; ndipo sanasankhe fuko la Efuremu; 
Psalms78:68 koma anasankha fuko la Yuda, Phiri la Ziyoni limene analikonda." 
Psalms78:69 Ndipo anamanga malo oyera ake ngati kaphiri, monga dziko lapansi limene analikhazikitsa kosatha." 
Psalms78:70 Ndipo anasankha Davide mtumiki wake, namtenga kumakola a nkhosa." 
Psalms78:71 Anamtenga kuja anatsata zoyamwitsa, awete Yakobo, anthu ake, ndi Israele, cholandira chake." 
Psalms78:72 Potero anawaweta monga mwa mtima wake wangwiro; nawatsogolera ndi luso la manja ake. 
Psalms79:1 Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu, akunja alowa m'cholandira chanu; anaipsa Kachisi wanu woyera; anachititsa Yerusalemu bwinja." 
Psalms79:2 Anapereka mitembo ya atumiki anu ikhale chakudya cha mbalame za mlengalenga, nyama ya okondedwa anu anaipereka kwa zilombo za m'dziko." 
Psalms79:3 Anakhetsa mwazi wao ngati madzi pozungulira Yerusalemu; ndipo panalibe wakuwaika. 
Psalms79:4 Takhala chotonza cha anansi athu, ndi choseketsa ndi cholalatitsa iwo akutizinga." 
Psalms79:5 Yehova, mudzakwiya nthawi zonse kufikira liti? Nidzatentha nsanje yanu ngati moto?" 
Psalms79:6 Thirirani mkwiyo wanu pa akunja osadziwa Inu, ndi pa maufumu osaitana pa dzina lanu." 
Psalms79:7 Pakuti anathera Yakobo, napasula pokhalira iye." 
Psalms79:8 Musakumbukire motitsutsa mphulupulu za makolo athu; nsoni zokoma zanu zitipeze msanga, pakuti tafooka kwambiri." 
Psalms79:9 Tithandizeni Mulungu wa chipulumutso chathu, chifukwa cha ulemerero wa dzina lanu; ndipo tilanditseni, ndi kutifafanizira zoipa zathu, chifukwa cha dzina lanu." 
Psalms79:10 Anenerenji amitundu, Ali kuti Mulungu wao? Kubwezera chilango cha mwazi wa atumiki anu umene anaukhetsa kudziwike pakati pa amitundu pamaso pathu." 
Psalms79:11 Kubuula kwa wandende kufike kuli Inu; monga mwa mphamvu yanu yaikulu lolani ana a imfa atsale. 
Psalms79:12 Ndipo anansi athu amene anatonza Inu muwabwezere chotonza chao, kasanu ndi kawiri kumtima kwao, Ambuye." 
Psalms79:13 Potero ife anthu anu ndi nkhosa zapabusa panu tidzakuyamikani kosatha; tidzafotokozera chilemekezo chanu ku mibadwomibadwo. 
Psalms80:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Syosyanimu; lochita mboni; Salimo la Asafu. Mbusa wa Israele, tcherani khutu; inu wakutsogolera Yosefe ngati nkhosa; inu wokhala pa akerubi, walitsani." 
Psalms80:2 Utsani chamuna chanu pamaso pa Efuremu ndi Benjamini ndi Manase, ndipo mutidzere kutipulumutsa." 
Psalms80:3 Mutibweze, Mulungu; nimuwalitse nkhope yanu, ndipo tidzapulumuka." 
Psalms80:4 Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, mudzakwiyira pemphero la anthu anu kufikira liti?" 
Psalms80:5 Munawadyetsa mkate wa misozi, ndipo munawamwetsa misozi yambiri." 
Psalms80:6 Mutiika kuti atilimbirane anzathu; ndipo adani athu atiseka mwa iwo okha. 
Psalms80:7 Mulungu wa makamu, mutibweze; nimuwalitse nkhope yanu, ndipo tidzapulumuka." 
Psalms80:8 Mudatenga mpesa kuchokera ku Ejipito, munapirikitsa amitundu ndi kuuoka uwu." 
Psalms80:9 Mudasoseratu pookapo, idagwiritsa mizu yake, ndipo unadzaza dziko." 
Psalms80:10 Mthunzi wake unaphimba mapiri, ndi nthambi zake zikunga mikungudza ya Mulungu." 
Psalms80:11 Unatambalitsa mphanda zake mpaka kunyanja, ndi mitsitsi yake kufikira ku Mtsinje." 
Psalms80:12 Munapasuliranji maphambo ake, kotero kuti onse akupita m'njira atcherako?" 
Psalms80:13 Nguluwe zochokera kuthengo ziukumba, ndi nyama za kuchidikha ziudya." 
Psalms80:14 Bwererani, tikupemphani, Mulungu wa makamu; suzumirani muli m'mwamba, nimupenye, ndi kuzonda mpesa uwu," 
Psalms80:15 ndi tsinde limene dzanja lanu lamanja linaoka, ndi mphanda munadzilimbikitsira." 
Psalms80:16 Unapserera ndi moto, unadulidwa; aonongeka pa kudzudzula kwa nkhope yanu." 
Psalms80:17 Dzanja lanu likhale pa munthu wa pa dzanja lamanja lanu; pa mwana wa munthu amene munadzilimbikitsira. 
Psalms80:18 Potero sitidzabwerera m'mbuyo kukusiyani; titsitsimutseni, ndipo tidzaitanira dzina lanu." 
Psalms80:19 Mutibweze, Yehova Mulungu wa makamu; nimuwalitse nkhope yanu, ndipo tidzapulumuka." 
Psalms81:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo, pa Gititi. Salimo la Asafu. Imbitsirani Mulungu ndiye mphamvu yathu; fuulirani kwa Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:2 Utsani salimo, bwera nakoni kalingaka, zeze wokondwetsa pamodzi ndi chisakasa." 
Psalms81:3 Ombani lipenga, pokhala mwezi, utakula mwezi, tsiku la phwando lathu." 
Psalms81:4 Pakuti ichi ndi cholemba cha kwa Israele, chiweruzo cha Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Anachiika chikhale mboni kwa Yosefe, pakutuluka iye kudziko la Ejipito. Komwe ndinamva chinenedwe chosadziwa ine." 
Psalms81:6 Ndinamchotsera katundu paphewa pake, manja ake anamasuka ku chotengera." 
Psalms81:7 Unaitana posautsika, ndipo ndinakulanditsa; ndinakuvomereza mobisalika m'bingu; ndinakuyesa kumadzi a Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Tamvani, anthu anga, ndidzakuchitirani mboni; Israele, ukadzandimvera!" 
Psalms81:9 Kwanu kusakhale mulungu wofuma kwina; nusagwadire mulungu wachilendo. 
Psalms81:10 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako amene ndinakukweza kukuchotsa kudziko la Ejipito; yasamitsa pakamwa pako ndipo ndidzalidzaza. 
Psalms81:11 Koma anthu anga sanamvere mau anga; ndipo Israele sanandivomere. 
Psalms81:12 Potero ndinawaperekera kuuma mtima kwao, ayende monga mwa uphungu waowao." 
Psalms81:13 Ha! Akadandimvera anthu anga, akadayenda m'njira zanga Israele!" 
Psalms81:14 Ndikadagonjetsa adani ao msanga, ndikadabweza dzanja langa pa owasautsa." 
Psalms81:15 Akumuda Yehova akadamgonjera mungakhale monyenga, koma nyengo yao ikadakhala yosatha." 
Psalms81:16 Akadawadyetsa naye tirigu wokometsetsa, ndikadakukhutitsanso ndi uchi wa m'thanthwe." 
Psalms82:1 Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu aima mu msonkhano wa Mulungu, aweruza pakati pa milungu." 
Psalms82:2 Mudzaweruza mosalunjika kufikira liti, ndi kusamalira nkhope ya oipa?" 
Psalms82:3 Weruzani osauka ndi amasiye; weruzani molungama ozunzika ndi osowa. 
Psalms82:4 Pulumutsani osauka ndi aumphawi; alanditseni m'dzanja la oipa. 
Psalms82:5 Sadziwa, ndipo sazindikira; amayendayenda mumdima; maziko onse a dziko lapansi agwedezeka." 
Psalms82:6 Ndinati Ine, Inu ndinu milungu, ndi ana a Wam'mwambamwamba nonsenu." 
Psalms82:7 Komatu mudzafa monga anthu, ndipo mudzagwa monga wina wa akulu." 
Psalms82:8 Ukani, Mulungu, weruzani dziko lapansi; pakuti Inu mudzalandira amitundu onse." 
Psalms83:1 Nyimbo. Salimo la Asafu. Mulungu musakhale chete; musakhale duu, osanena kanthu, Mulungu." 
Psalms83:2 Pakuti taonani, adani anu aphokosera, ndipo okwiyira Inu aweramutsa mutu." 
Psalms83:3 Apangana mochenjerera pa anthu anu, nakhalira upo pa obisika anu." 
Psalms83:4 Amati, Tiyeni tiwaononge asakhalenso mtundu wa anthu; ndipo dzina la Israele lisakumbukikenso." 
Psalms83:5 Pakuti anakhalira upo ndi mtima umodzi; anachita chipangano cha pa Inu. 
Psalms83:6 Mahema a Edomu ndi a Aismaele; Mowabu ndi Ahagiri; 
Psalms83:7 Gebala ndi Amoni ndi Amaleke; Filistiya, pamodzi ndi iwo okhala m'Tiro." 
Psalms83:8 Asiriya anaphatikana nao; anakhala dzanja la ana a Loti. 
Psalms83:9 Muwachitire monga munachitira Midiyani; ndi Sisera, ndi Yabini kumtsinje wa Kisoni," 
Psalms83:10 amene anaonongeka ku Endori; anakhala ngati ndowe ya kumunda. 
Psalms83:11 Muwaike akulu ao ngati Orebu ndi Zeebu; mafumu ao ngati Zeba ndi Zalimuna," 
Psalms83:12 amene anati, Tilande malo okhalamo Mulungu, akhale athu." 
Psalms83:13 Mulungu wanga, muwaike akhale ngati mungu; ngati ziputu zomka ndi mphepo." 
Psalms83:14 Monga moto upsereza nkhalango, ndi monga lawi liyatsa mapiri." 
Psalms83:15 Momwemo muwatsate ndi namondwe, nimuwaopse ndi kamvulumvulu wanu." 
Psalms83:16 Achititseni manyazi pankhope pao; kuti afune dzina lanu, Yehova." 
Psalms83:17 Achite manyazi, naopsedwe kosatha; ndipo asokonezeke, naonongeke." 
Psalms83:18 Kuti adziwe kuti inu nokha, dzina lanu ndinu Yehova, ndinu Wam'mwambamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms84:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; pa Gititi; Salimo la ana a Kora. Pokhala Inu mpotikonda ndithu, Yehova wa makamu!" 
Psalms84:2 Moyo wanga ulakalaka, inde ukomokanso ndi kufuna mabwalo a Yehova; mtima wanga ndi thupi langa zifuulira kwa Mulungu wamoyo." 
Psalms84:3 Mbawanso inapeza nyumba, ndi namzeze chisa chake choikamo ana ake, pa maguwa a nsembe anu, Yehova wa makamu, mfumu yanga ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms84:4 Odala iwo akugonera m'nyumba mwanu; akulemekezani chilemekezere. 
Psalms84:5 Wodala munthu amene mphamvu yake ili mwa Inu; mumtima mwake muli makwalala a ku Ziyoni. 
Psalms84:6 Popyola chigwa cha kulira misozi achiyesa cha akasupe; inde mvula ya chizimalupsa ichidzaza ndi madalitso. 
Psalms84:7 Apita mwamphamvu naonjezapo mphamvu, aoneka pamaso pa Mulungu m'Ziyoni." 
Psalms84:8 Yehova Mulungu wa makamu, imvani pemphero langa. Tcherani khutu, Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Onani, Mulungu, ndinu chikopa chathu; ndipo penyani pa nkhope ya Wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms84:10 Pakuti tsiku limodzi m'mabwalo anu likoma koposa masiku ambirimbiri akukhala pena. Kukhala ine wapakhomo m'nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, kundikonda ine koposa kugonera m'mahema a choipa." 
Psalms84:11 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu ndiye dzuwa ndi chikopa; Yehova adzapatsa chifundo ndi ulemerero; sadzakaniza chokoma iwo akuyenda angwiro. 
Psalms84:12 Yehova wa makamu, wodala munthu wakukhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms85:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la ana a Kora. Munachita zovomereza dziko lanu, Yehova; munabweza ukapolo wa Yakobo." 
Psalms85:2 Munachotsa mphulupulu ya anthu anu, munafotsera zolakwa zao zonse." 
Psalms85:3 Munabweza kuzaza kwanu konse; munabwerera kumkwiyo wanu wotentha. 
Psalms85:4 Mutibweze, Mulungu wa chipulumutso chathu, nimuletse udani wanu wa pa ife." 
Psalms85:5 Kodi mudzatikwiyira nthawi zonse? Kodi mudzakhala chikwiyire mibadwomibadwo? 
Psalms85:6 Kodi simudzatipatsanso moyo, kuti anthu anu akondwerere ndi Inu?" 
Psalms85:7 Tionetseni chifundo chanu, Yehova, tipatseni chipulumutso chanu." 
Psalms85:8 Ndidzamva cholankhula Mulungu Yehova; pakuti adzalankhula zamtendere ndi anthu ake, ndi okondedwa ake; koma asabwererenso kuchita zopusa." 
Psalms85:9 Indedi chipulumutso chake chili pafupi ndi iwo akumuopa Iye; kuti m'dziko mwathu mukhale ulemu. 
Psalms85:10 Chifundo ndi choonadi zakomanizana; chilungamo ndi mtendere zapsompsonana. 
Psalms85:11 Choonadi chiphukira m'dziko; ndi chilungamo chasuzumira chili m'mwamba. 
Psalms85:12 Inde Yehova adzapereka zokoma; ndipo dziko lathu lidzapereka zipatso zake. 
Psalms85:13 Chilungamo chidzamtsogolera; nichidzamkonzera mapazi ake njira. 
Psalms86:1 Pemphero la Davide Tcherani khutu lanu Yehova, mundiyankhe; pakuti ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi." 
Psalms86:2 Sungani moyo wanga pakuti ine ndine wokondedwa wanu; Inu Mulungu wanga, pulumutsani mtumiki wanu wokhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms86:3 Mundichitire chifundo, Ambuye; pakuti tsiku lonse ndiitana Inu." 
Psalms86:4 Kondwetsani moyo wa mtumiki wanu; pakuti ndikwezera moyo wanga kwa Inu, Ambuye." 
Psalms86:5 Pakuti Inu, Ambuye, ndinu wabwino, ndi wokhululukira, ndi wa chifundo chochulukira onse akuitana Inu." 
Psalms86:6 Tcherani khutu pemphero langa, Yehova; nimumvere mau a kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms86:7 Tsiku la msauko wanga ndidzaitana Inu; popeza mudzandivomereza. 
Psalms86:8 Pakati pa milungu palibe wina wonga Inu, Ambuye; ndipo palibe ntchito zonga zanu." 
Psalms86:9 Amitundu onse mudawalenga adzadza nadzagwada pamaso panu, Ambuye; nadzalemekeza dzina lanu." 
Psalms86:10 Pakuti Inu ndinu wamkulu, ndi wakuchita zodabwitsa; Inu ndinu Mulungu, nokhanu." 
Psalms86:11 Mundionetse njira yanu, Yehova; ndidzayenda m'choonadi chanu, muumbe mtima wanga ukhale umodzi kuti uliope dzina lanu." 
Psalms86:12 Ndidzakuyamikani, Ambuye, Mulungu wanga, ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndipo ndidzalemekeza dzina lanu nthawi zonse." 
Psalms86:13 Pakuti chifundo chanu cha pa ine nchachikulu; ndipo munalanditsa moyo wanga kunsi kwa manda. 
Psalms86:14 Mulungu, odzikuza andiukira, ndi msonkhano wa anthu oopsa afuna moyo wanga, ndipo sanaike Inu pamaso pao." 
Psalms86:15 Koma Inu, Ambuye, ndinu Mulungu wansoni ndi wachisomo, wopatsa mtima msanga, ndi wochulukira chifundo ndi choonadi." 
Psalms86:16 Mundibwerere ine, ndi kundichitira chifundo; mpatseni mtumiki wanu mphamvu yanu, ndipo pulumutsani mwana wa mdzakazi wanu." 
Psalms86:17 Mundichitire chizindikiro choti chabwino; kuti ondida achione, nachite manyazi, popeza Inu, Yehova, munandithandiza ndi kundisangalatsa." 
Psalms87:1 Salimo la ana a Kora. Nyimbo. Maziko ake ali m'mapiri oyera. 
Psalms87:2 Yehova akonda zipata za Ziyoni koposa zokhalamo zonse za Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Mudzi wa Mulungu, inu, akunenerani zakukulemekezani." 
Psalms87:4 Ndidzatchula Rahabu ndi Babiloni kwa iwo ondidziwa Ine; taonani, Filistiya ndi Tiro pamodzi ndi Kusi; uyu anabadwa komweko." 
Psalms87:5 Ndipo adzanena za Ziyoni, uyu ndi uyo anabadwa m'mwemo; ndipo Wam'mwambamwamba ndiye adzaukhazikitsa." 
Psalms87:6 Yehova adzawerenga, polembera mitundu ya anthu, uyu anabadwa komweko." 
Psalms87:7 Ndipo oimba ndi oomba omwe adzati, akasupe anga onse ali mwa inu." 
Psalms88:1 Nyimbo, Salimo la ana a Kora. Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo, pa Mahalati Leanoti. Chilangizo cha Hemani Mwezara. Yehova, Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa, ndinafuula pamaso panu usana ndi usiku." 
Psalms88:2 Pemphero langa lidze pamaso panu; munditcherere khutu kukuwa kwanga. 
Psalms88:3 Pakuti mzimu wanga wadzala nao mavuto, ndi moyo wanga wayandikira kumanda." 
Psalms88:4 Anandiwerenga pamodzi nao otsikira kudzenje; ndakhala ngati munthu wopanda mphamvu. 
Psalms88:5 Wotayika pakati pa akufa, ngati ophedwa akugona m'manda, amene simuwakumbukiranso; ndipo anawadula kusiyana ndi dzanja lanu." 
Psalms88:6 Munandiika kunsi kwa dzenje, kuli mdima, kozama." 
Psalms88:7 Mkwiyo wanu utsamira pa ine, ndipo munandizunza ine ndi mafunde anu onse." 
Psalms88:8 Munandisiyanitsira wodziwana nane kutali; munandiika ndiwakhalire chonyansa. Ananditsekereza, osakhoza kutuluka ine." 
Psalms88:9 Diso langa lapuwala chifukwa cha kuzunzika kwanga: Ndimaitana Inu, Yehova, tsiku lonse; nditambalitsira manja anga kwa Inu." 
Psalms88:10 Kodi mudzachitira akufa zodabwitsa? Kodi adzaukanso otisiyawo, ndi kukulemekezani?" 
Psalms88:11 Adzafotokozera chifundo chanu kumanda kodi, chikhulupiriko chanu kumalo a chionongeko?" 
Psalms88:12 Zodabwitsa zanu zidadziwika mumdima kodi, ndi chilungamo chanu m'dziko la chiiwaliko?" 
Psalms88:13 Koma ndinafuulira kwa Inu, Yehova, ndipo pemphero langa lifika kwa Inu mamawa." 
Psalms88:14 Yehova mutayiranji moyo wanga? Ndi kundibisira nkhope yanu? 
Psalms88:15 Wozunzika ine ndi wofuna kufa kuyambira ubwana wanga; posenza zoopsa zanu, ndithedwa nzeru." 
Psalms88:16 Kuzaza kwanu kwandimiza; zoopsa zanu zinandiononga. 
Psalms88:17 Zinandizungulira ngati madzi tsiku lonse; zinandizinga pamodzi. 
Psalms88:18 Munandichotsera kutali wondikonda ndi bwenzi langa, odziwana nane akhala kumdima." 
Psalms89:1 Chilangizo cha Etani Mwezara. Ndidzaimbira zachifundo za Yehova nthawi yonse, pakamwa panga ndidzadziwitsira chikhulupiriko chanu ku mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms89:2 Pakuti ndinati, Chifundo adzachimanga kosaleka; mudzakhazika chikhulupiriko chanu m'Mwamba mwenimweni." 
Psalms89:3 Ndinachita chipangano ndi wosankhika wanga, ndinalumbirira Davide mtumiki wanga." 
Psalms89:4 Ndidzakhazika mbeu yako kunthawi yonse, ndipo ndidzamanga mpando wachifumu wako ku mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms89:5 Ndipo kumwamba kudzalemekeza zodabwitsa zanu, Yehova; chikhulupiriko chanunso mu msonkhano wa oyera mtima." 
Psalms89:6 Pakuti kuli yani kuthambo timlinganize ndi Yehova? Afanana ndi Yehova ndani mwa ana a amphamvu? 
Psalms89:7 Ndiye Mulungu, ayenera kumuopa kwambiri m'upo wa oyera mtima, ndiye wochititsa mantha koposa onse akumzinga." 
Psalms89:8 Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, wamphamvu ndani wonga Inu, Yehova? Ndipo chikhulupiriko chanu chikuzingani." 
Psalms89:9 Inu ndinu wakuchita ufumu pa kudzikuza kwa nyanja; pakuuka mafunde ake muwachititsa bata. 
Psalms89:10 Mudathyola Rahabu, monga munthu wophedwa; munabalalitsa adani anu ndi mkono wa mphamvu yanu." 
Psalms89:11 Kumwamba ndi kwanu, dziko lapansi lomwe ndi lanu; munakhazika dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi kudzala kwake." 
Psalms89:12 Munalenga kumpoto ndi kumwera; Tabori ndi Heremoni afuula mokondwera m'dzina lanu. 
Psalms89:13 Muli nao mkono wanu wolimba; m'dzanja mwanu muli mphamvu, dzanja lamanja lanu nlokwezeka." 
Psalms89:14 Chilungamo ndi chiweruzo ndiwo maziko a mpando wachifumu wanu; chifundo ndi choonadi zitsogolera pankhope panu. 
Psalms89:15 Odala anthu odziwa liu la lipenga; ayenda m'kuunika kwa nkhope yanu, Yehova." 
Psalms89:16 Akondwera m'dzina lanu tsiku lonse; ndipo akwezeka m'chilungamo chanu. 
Psalms89:17 Popeza Inu ndinu ulemerero wa mphamvu yao; ndipo potivomereza Inu nyanga yathu idzakwezeka. 
Psalms89:18 Pakuti chikopa chathu chifuma kwa Yehova; ndi mfumu yathu kwa Woyera wa Israele. 
Psalms89:19 Pamenepo munalankhula m'masomphenya ndi okondedwa anu, ndipo mudati, Ndasenza thandizo pa chiphona; ndakweza wina wosankhika mwa anthu." 
Psalms89:20 Ndapeza Davide mtumiki wanga; ndamdzoza mafuta anga oyera. 
Psalms89:21 Amene dzanja langa lidzakhazikika naye; inde mkono wanga udzalimbitsa. 
Psalms89:22 Mdani sadzamuumira mtima; ndi mwana wa chisalungamo sadzamzunza. 
Psalms89:23 Ndipo ndidzaphwanya omsautsa pamaso pake; ndidzapandanso odana naye. 
Psalms89:24 Koma chikhulupiriko changa ndi chifundo changa zidzakhala naye; ndipo nyanga yake idzakwezeka m'dzina langa. 
Psalms89:25 Ndipo ndidzaika dzanja lake panyanja, ndi dzanja lamanja lake pamitsinje." 
Psalms89:26 Iye adzanditchula, ndi kuti, Inu ndinu Atate wanga, Mulungu wanga, ndi thanthwe la chipulumutso changa." 
Psalms89:27 Inde ndidzamuyesa mwana wanga woyamba, womveka wa mafumu a pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndidzamsungira chifundo changa kunthawi yonse, ndipo chipangano changa chidzalimbika pa iye." 
Psalms89:29 Ndidzakhalitsanso mbeu yake chikhalire, ndi mpando wachifumu wake ngati masiku a m'mwamba." 
Psalms89:30 Ana ake akataya chilamulo changa, osayenda m'maweruzo anga," 
Psalms89:31 nakaipsa malembo anga; osasunga malamulo anga. 
Psalms89:32 Pamenepo ndidzazonda zolakwa zao ndi ndodo, ndi mphulupulu zao ndi mikwingwirima." 
Psalms89:33 Koma sindidzamchotsera chifundo changa chonse, ndi chikhulupiriko changa sichidzamsowa." 
Psalms89:34 Sindidzaipsa chipangano changa, kapena kusintha mau otuluka m'milomo yanga." 
Psalms89:35 Ndinalumbira kamodzi m'chiyero changa; sindidzanamizira Davide. 
Psalms89:36 Mbeu yake idzakhala kunthawi yonse, ndi mpando wachifumu wake ngati dzuwa pamaso panga." 
Psalms89:37 Udzakhazikika ngati mwezi kunthawi yonse, ndi ngati mboni yokhulupirika kuthambo." 
Psalms89:38 Koma Inu munamtaya, nimunamkaniza, munakwiya naye wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms89:39 Munakaniza chipangano cha mtumiki wanu; munaipsa korona wake ndi kumponya pansi. 
Psalms89:40 Munapasula makoma ake onse; munagumula malinga ake. 
Psalms89:41 Onse opita panjirapa amfunkhira, akhala chotonza cha anansi ake." 
Psalms89:42 Munakweza dzanja lamanja la iwo omsautsa; munakondweretsa adani ake onse. 
Psalms89:43 Munapinditsa kukamwa kwake kwa lupanga lake, osamuimika kunkhondo." 
Psalms89:44 Munaleketsa kuwala kwake, ndipo munagwetsa pansi mpando wachifumu wake." 
Psalms89:45 Munafupikitsa masiku a mnyamata wake; munamkuta nao manyazi. 
Psalms89:46 Mudzabisala kosatha kufikira liti, Yehova; ndi kuzaza kwanu kudzatentha ngati moto kufikira liti?" 
Psalms89:47 Kumbukirani kuti nthawi yanga njapafupi; munalengeranji ana onse a anthu kwachabe? 
Psalms89:48 Munthu ndani amene adzakhalabe ndi moyo, osaona imfa? Amene adzapulumutsa moyo wake kumphamvu ya manda?" 
Psalms89:49 Chilikuti chifundo chanu chakale, Ambuye, munachilumbirira Davide pa chikhulupiriko chanu?" 
Psalms89:50 Kumbukirani, Ambuye, chotonzera atumiki anu; ndichisenza m'chifuwa mwanga chochokera kumitundu yonse yaikulu ya anthu." 
Psalms89:51 Chimene adani anu, Yehova, atonza nacho; chimene atonzera nacho mayendedwe a wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms89:52 Wodalitsika Yehova kunthawi yonse. Amen ndi Amen. 
Psalms90:1 Pemphero la Mose munthu wa Mulungu. Ambuye, Inu munatikhalira mokhalamo m'mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms90:2 Asanabadwe mapiri, kapena musanalenge dziko lapansi, ndi lokhalamo anthu, inde, kuyambira nthawi yosayamba kufikira nthawi yosatha, Inu ndinu Mulungu." 
Psalms90:3 Mubweza munthu akhale fumbi; nimuti, Bwererani inu, ana a anthu." 
Psalms90:4 Pakuti pamaso panu zaka zikwi zikhala ngati dzulo, litapita, ndi monga ulonda wa usiku." 
Psalms90:5 Muwatenga ngati ndi madzi aakulu, akhala ngati tulo; mamawa akhala ngati msipu wophuka." 
Psalms90:6 Mamawa uphuka bwino; madzulo ausenga, nuuma." 
Psalms90:7 Pakuti tionongeka mu mkwiyo wanu; ndipo m'kuzaza kwanu tiopsedwa. 
Psalms90:8 Munaika mphulupulu zathu pamaso panu, ndi zoipa zathu zobisika pounikira nkhope yanu." 
Psalms90:9 Pakuti masiku athu onse apitirira m'ukali wanu; titsiriza moyo wathu ngati lingaliro. 
Psalms90:10 Masiku a zaka zathu ndiwo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, kapena tikakhala nayo mphamvudi zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu; koma teronso kukula kwao kumati chivuto ndi chopanda pake; pakuti kumapitako msanga ndipo tithawa ife tomwe." 
Psalms90:11 Adziwa mphamvu ya mkwiyo wanu ndani, ndi ukali wanu monga ayenera kukuopani?" 
Psalms90:12 Mutidziwitse kuwerenga masiku athu motero, kuti tikhale nao mtima wanzeru." 
Psalms90:13 Bwerani, Yehova; kufikira liti? Ndipo alekeni atumiki anu." 
Psalms90:14 Mutikhutitse nacho chifundo chanu m'mawa; ndipo tidzafuula mokondwera ndi kukondwera masiku athu onse. 
Psalms90:15 Tikondweretseni monga mwa masiku mudatizunzawa, ndi zaka tidaona choipa." 
Psalms90:16 Chochita Inu chioneke kwa atumiki anu, ndi ulemerero wanu pa ana ao." 
Psalms90:17 Ndipo chisomo chake cha Yehova Mulungu wathu chikhalire pa ife; ndipo mutikhazikitsire ife ntchito ya manja athu; inde, ntchito ya manja athu muikhazikitse." 
Psalms91:1 Iye amene akhala pansi m'ngaka yake ya Wam'mwambamwamba adzagonera mu mthunzi wa Wamphamvuyonse. 
Psalms91:2 Ndidzati kwa Yehova, Pothawirapo panga ndi linga langa; Mulungu wanga, amene ndimkhulupirira." 
Psalms91:3 Pakuti adzakuonjola kumsampha wa msodzi, kumliri wosakaza." 
Psalms91:4 Adzakufungatira ndi nthenga zake, ndipo udzathawira kunsi kwa mapiko ake; choonadi chake ndicho chikopa chotchinjiriza." 
Psalms91:5 Sudzaopa choopsa cha usiku, kapena muvi wopita usana;" 
Psalms91:6 kapena mliri woyenda mumdima, kapena chionongeko chakuthera usana." 
Psalms91:7 Pambali pako padzagwa chikwi, ndi zikwi khumi pa dzanja lamanja lako; sichidzakuyandikiza iwe." 
Psalms91:8 Koma udzapenya ndi maso ako, nudzaona kubwezera chilango oipa." 
Psalms91:9 Popeza udati, Inu Yehova, ndinu pothawirapo panga! Udaika Wam'mwambamwamba chokhalamo chako;" 
Psalms91:10 palibe choipa chidzakugwera, ndipo cholanga sichidzayandikiza hema wako." 
Psalms91:11 Pakuti adzalamulira angelo ake za iwe, akusunge m'njira zako zonse." 
Psalms91:12 Adzakunyamula pa manja ao, ungagunde phazi lako pamwala." 
Psalms91:13 Udzaponda mkango ndi mphiri; udzapondereza msona wa mkango ndi chinjoka. 
Psalms91:14 Popeza andikondadi ndidzampulumutsa; ndidzamkweza m'mwamba, popeza adziwa dzina langa." 
Psalms91:15 Adzandifuulira Ine ndipo ndidzamyankha; kunsautso ndidzakhala naye pamodzi; ndidzamlanditsa, ndi kumchitira ulemu." 
Psalms91:16 Ndidzamkhutitsa ndi masiku ambiri, ndi kumuonetsera chipulumutso changa." 
Psalms92:1 Salimo, Nyimbo ya pa Sabata. Nkokoma kuyamika Yehova, ndi kuimbira nyimbo dzina lanu, Wam'mwambamwamba Inu." 
Psalms92:2 Kuonetsera chifundo chanu mamawa, ndi chikhulupiriko chanu usiku uliwonse." 
Psalms92:3 Pa choimbira cha zingwe khumi ndi pachisakasa; pazeze ndi kulira kwake. 
Psalms92:4 Popeza Inu, Yehova, munandikondweretsa ndi kuchita kwanu, ndidzafuula mokondwera pa ntchito ya manja anu." 
Psalms92:5 Ha! Ntchito zanu nzazikulu, Yehova, zolingalira zanu nzozama ndithu." 
Psalms92:6 Munthu wopulukira sachidziwa; ndi munthu wopusa sachizindikira ichi; 
Psalms92:7 chakuti pophuka oipa ngati msipu, ndi popindula ochita zopanda pake; chitero kuti adzaonongeke kosatha." 
Psalms92:8 Koma Inu, Yehova, muli m'mwamba kunthawi yonse." 
Psalms92:9 Pakuti, taonani, adani anu, Yehova, pakuti, taonani, adani anu adzatayika; ochita zopanda pake onse adzamwazika." 
Psalms92:10 Koma munakweza nyanga yanga ngati ya njati; anandidzoza mafuta atsopano. 
Psalms92:11 Diso langa lapenya chokhumba ine pa iwo ondilalira, m'makutu mwanga ndamva chokhumba ine pa iwo akuchita zoipa akundiukira." 
Psalms92:12 Wolungama adzaphuka ngati mgwalangwa; adzakula ngati mkungudza wa ku Lebanoni. 
Psalms92:13 Iwo ookedwa m'nyumba ya Yehova, adzaphuka m'mabwalo a Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms92:14 Atakalamba adzapatsanso zipatso; adzadzazidwa ndi madzi nadzakhala abiriwiri," 
Psalms92:15 kulalikira kuti Yehova ngwolunjika; Iye ndiye thanthwe langa, ndipo mwa Iye mulibe chosalungama." 
Psalms93:1 Yehova achita ufumu; wadziveka ndi ukulu; wadziveka Yehova, wadzimangirira mphamvu m'chuuno; dziko lomwe lokhalamo anthu likhakizika, silidzagwedezeka." 
Psalms93:2 Mpando wachifumu wanu ukhazikika kuyambira kale lija; Inu ndinu wosayambira ndi kale lomwe. 
Psalms93:3 Mitsinje ikweza, Yehova, mitsinje ikweza mkokomo wao; mitsinje ikweza mafunde ao." 
Psalms93:4 Yehova Wam'mwamba ndiye wamphamvu, wakuposa mkokomo wa madzi ambiri, ndi mafunde olimba a nyanja." 
Psalms93:5 Mboni zanu zivomerezeka ndithu; chiyero chiyenera nyumba yanu, Yehova, kunthawi za muyaya." 
Psalms94:1 Mulungu wakubwezera chilango, Yehova, Mulungu wakubwezera chilango, muoneke wowala." 
Psalms94:2 Nyamukani, Inu woweruza wa dziko lapansi: Bwezerani odzikuza choyenera iwo." 
Psalms94:3 Oipa adzatumpha ndi chimwemwe kufikira liti, Yehova? Oipa adzatero kufikira liti?" 
Psalms94:4 Anena mau, alankhula zowawa; adzitamandira onse ochita zopanda pake." 
Psalms94:5 Aphwanya anthu anu, Yehova, nazunza cholandira chanu." 
Psalms94:6 Amapha wamasiye ndi mlendo, nawapha ana amasiye." 
Psalms94:7 Ndipo amati, Yehova sachipenya, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo sachisamalira." 
Psalms94:8 Zindikirani, opulukira inu mwa anthu; ndipo opusa inu, mudzachita mwanzeru liti?" 
Psalms94:9 Kodi Iye wakupanga khutu ngwosamva? Kodi Iye wakuumba diso ngwosapenya? 
Psalms94:10 Kodi Iye wakulangiza mitundu ya anthu, ndiye wosadzudzula? Si ndiye amene aphunzitsa munthu nzeru?" 
Psalms94:11 Yehova adziwa zolingalira za munthu, kuti zili zachabe." 
Psalms94:12 Wodala munthu amene mumlanga, Yehova; ndi kumphunzitsa m'chilamulo chanu;" 
Psalms94:13 kuti mumpumitse masiku oipa; kufikira atakumbira woipa mbuna. 
Psalms94:14 Pakuti Yehova sadzasiya anthu ake, ndipo sadzataya cholandira chake." 
Psalms94:15 Pakuti chiweruzo chidzabwera kunka kuchilungamo, ndipo oongoka mtima onse adzachitsata." 
Psalms94:16 Adzandiukira ndani kutsutsana nao ochita zoipa? Adzandilimbikira ndani kutsutsana nao ochita zopanda pake? 
Psalms94:17 Akadapanda kukhala thandizo langa Yehova, moyo wanga ukadakhala kuli chete." 
Psalms94:18 Pamene ndinati, Litereka phazi langa, chifundo chanu, Yehova, chinandichirikiza." 
Psalms94:19 Pondichulukira zolingalira zanga m'kati mwanga, zotonthoza zanu zikondweretsa moyo wanga." 
Psalms94:20 Kodi uyenera kuyanjana ndi Inu mpando wachifumu wa kusakaza, wakupanga chovuta chikhale lamulo?" 
Psalms94:21 Asonkhana pamodzi pa moyo wa wolungama, namtsutsa wa mwazi wosachimwa." 
Psalms94:22 Koma Yehova wakhala msanje wanga; ndi Mulungu wanga thanthwe lothawirapo ine. 
Psalms94:23 Ndipo anawabwezera zopanda pake zao, nadzawaononga m'choipa chao; Yehova Mulungu wathu adzawaononga." 
Psalms95:1 Tiyeni tiimbire Yehova mokondwera; tifuule kwa thanthwe la chipulumutso chathu. 
Psalms95:2 Tidze nacho chiyamiko pamaso pake, timfuulire Iye mokondwera ndi nyimbo." 
Psalms95:3 Pakuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wamkulu; ndi mfumu yaikulu yoposa milungu yonse. 
Psalms95:4 Malo ozama a dziko lapansi ali m'dzanja lake; chuma cha m'mapiri chomwe ndi chake. 
Psalms95:5 Nyanja ndi yake, anailenga; ndipo manja ake anaumba dziko louma." 
Psalms95:6 Tiyeni, tipembedze tiwerame; tigwade pamaso pa Yehova, amene anatilenga." 
Psalms95:7 Pakuti Iye ndiye Mulungu wathu, ndipo ife ndife anthu a pabusa pake, ndi nkhosa za m'dzanja mwake. Lero, mukamva mau ake!" 
Psalms95:8 Musaumitse mitima yanu, ngati ku Meriba, ngati tsiku la ku Masa m'chipululu." 
Psalms95:9 Pamene makolo anu anandisuntha, anandiyesa, anapenyanso chochita Ine." 
Psalms95:10 Zaka makumi anai mbadwo uwu unandimvetsa chisoni, ndipo ndinati, Iwo ndiwo anthu osokerera mtima, ndipo sadziwa njira zanga." 
Psalms95:11 Chifukwa chake ndinalumbira mu mkwiyo wanga, ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga." 
Psalms96:1 Muimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano; muimbireni Yehova, inu, dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms96:2 Muimbireni Yehova, lemekezani dzina lake; lalikirani chipulumutso chake tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Psalms96:3 Fotokozerani ulemerero wake mwa amitundu; zodabwitsa zake mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu. 
Psalms96:4 Pakuti Yehova ndi wamkulu, nayenera kulemekezedwa kwakukulu; ayenera amuope koposa milungu yonse." 
Psalms96:5 Pakuti milungu yonse ya mitundu ya anthu ndiyo mafano, koma Yehova analenga zakumwamba." 
Psalms96:6 Pamaso pake pali ulemu ndi ukulu. M'malo opatulika mwake muli mphamvu ndi zochititsa kaso. 
Psalms96:7 Mpatseni Yehova, inu, mafuko a mitundu ya anthu, mpatseni Yehova ulemerero ndi mphamvu." 
Psalms96:8 Mpatseni Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lake; bwerani nacho chopereka, ndipo fikani kumabwalo ake." 
Psalms96:9 Gwadirani Yehova moyera ndi mokometsetsa, njenjemerani pamaso pake, inu dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms96:10 Nenani mwa amitundu, Yehova achita ufumu; dziko lokhalamo anthu lomwe likhazikika kuti silingagwedezeke; adzaweruza mitundu ya anthu molunjika." 
Psalms96:11 Kumwamba kukondwere nilisekerere dziko lapansi; nyanja ibume mwa kudzala kwake. 
Psalms96:12 Munda ukondwerere ndi zonse zili m'mwemo; pamenepo mitengo yonse ya kunkhalango idzafuula mokondwera. 
Psalms96:13 Pamaso pa Yehova, pakuti akudza; pakuti akudza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi Adzaweruza dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi chilungamo, ndi mitundu ya anthu ndi choonadi." 
Psalms97:1 Yehova achita ufumu; dziko lapansi likondwere; zisumbu zambiri zikondwerere. 
Psalms97:2 Pomzinga pali mitambo ndi mdima; chilungamo ndi chiweruzo ndizo zolimbitsa mpando wachifumu wake. 
Psalms97:3 Moto umtsogolera, nupsereza otsutsana naye pozungulirapo." 
Psalms97:4 Mphezi zake zinaunikira dziko lokhalamo anthu; dziko lapansi linaona nilinagwedezeka. 
Psalms97:5 Mapiri anasungunuka ngati sera pamaso pa Yehova, pamaso pa Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms97:6 Kumwamba kulalikira chilungamo chake, ndipo mitundu yonse ya anthu ipenya ulemerero wake." 
Psalms97:7 Onse akutumikira fano losema, akudzitamandira nao mafano, achite manyazi: Mgwadireni Iye, milungu yonse inu." 
Psalms97:8 Ziyoni anamva nakondwera, nasekerera ana akazi a Yuda; chifukwa cha maweruzo anu, Yehova." 
Psalms97:9 Pakuti Inu, Yehova, ndinu Wam'mwambamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndinu wokwezeka kwakukulu pamwamba pa milungu yonse ina." 
Psalms97:10 Inu okonda Yehova, danani nacho choipa: Iye asunga moyo wa okondedwa ake; awalanditsa m'manja mwa oipa." 
Psalms97:11 Kuunika kufesekera wolungama, ndi chikondwerero oongoka mtima." 
Psalms97:12 Kondwerani mwa Yehova, olungama inu; ndipo yamikani pokumbukira chiyero chake." 
Psalms98:1 Salimo. Muimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano; popeza anachita zodabwitsa: Dzanja lake lamanja, mkono wake woyera, zinamchitira chipulumutso." 
Psalms98:2 Yehova anawadziwitsira chipulumutso chake; anaonetsera chilungamo chake pamaso pa amitundu. 
Psalms98:3 Anakumbukira chifundo chake ndi chikhulupiriko chake kunyumba ya Israele; malekezero onse a dziko lapansi anaona chipulumutso cha Mulungu wathu. 
Psalms98:4 Fuulirani kwa Yehova, inu, dziko lonse lapansi; kuwitsani ndi kufuulira mokondwera; inde, imbirani zomlemekeza." 
Psalms98:5 Muimbireni Yehova zomlemekeza ndi zeze; ndi zeze ndi mau a salimo. 
Psalms98:6 Fuulani pamaso pa Mfumu Yehova, ndi mbetete ndi liu la lipenga." 
Psalms98:7 Nyanja ifuule ndi kudzala kwake; dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi iwo okhalamo; 
Psalms98:8 mitsinje iombe manja; mapiri afuule pamodzi mokondwera. 
Psalms98:9 Pamaso pa Yehova, popeza akudza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi; adzaweruza dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi chilungamo, ndipo mitundu ya anthu molunjika." 
Psalms99:1 Yehova ndiye mfumu; mitundu ya anthu injenjemere; Iye akhala pakati pa akerubi; dziko lapansi ligwedezeke. 
Psalms99:2 Yehova ndiye wamkulu m'Ziyoni; ndipo akwezeka pamwamba pa mitundu yonse ya anthu. 
Psalms99:3 Alemekeze dzina lanu lalikulu ndi loopsa. Ili ndilo loyera. 
Psalms99:4 Ndipo mphamvu ya mfumu ikonda chiweruzo; Inu mukhazikitsa zolunjika, muchita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo m'Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndipo gwadirani poponderapo mapazi ake: Iye ndiye Woyera." 
Psalms99:6 Mwa ansembe ake muli Mose ndi Aroni, ndi Samuele mwa iwo akuitanira dzina lake; anaitana kwa Yehova, ndipo Iye anawayankha." 
Psalms99:7 Iye analankhula nao mu mtambo woti njo: Iwo anasunga mboni zake ndi malembawa anawapatsa. 
Psalms99:8 Munawayankha, Yehova Mulungu wathu: munawakhalira Mulungu wakuwakhululukira, mungakhale munabwezera chilango pa zochita zao." 
Psalms99:9 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndipo gwadirani pa phiri lake loyera; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ndiye woyera." 
Psalms100:1 Salimo la Chiyamiko. Fuulirani kwa Yehova, inu, dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms100:2 Tumikirani Yehova ndi chikondwerero: Idzani pamaso pake ndi kumuimbira mokondwera. 
Psalms100:3 Dziwani kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu; Iyeyu anatilenga, ndipo ife ndife ake; ndife anthu ake ndi nkhosa zapabusa pake." 
Psalms100:4 Lowani kuzipata zake ndi chiyamiko, ndi kumabwalo ake ndi chilemekezo: Myamikeni; lilemekezeni dzina lake." 
Psalms100:5 Pakuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; chifundo chake chimanka muyaya; ndi chikhulupiriko chake ku mibadwomibadwo. 
Psalms101:1 Salimo la Davide. Ndidzaimba zachifundo ndi chiweruzo; ndidzaimba zakukulemekezani Inu, Yehova." 
Psalms101:2 Ndidzachita mwanzeru m'njira yangwiro; mudzandidzera liti? Ndidzayenda m'nyumba mwanu ndi mtima wangwiro. 
Psalms101:3 Sindidzaika chinthu choipa pamaso panga; chochita iwo akupatuka padera chindiipira; sichidzandimamatira. 
Psalms101:4 Mtima wopulukira udzandichokera; sindidzadziwana naye woipa. 
Psalms101:5 Wakuneneza mnzake m'tseri ndidzamdula; wa maso odzikuza ndi mtima wodzitama sindidzamlola. 
Psalms101:6 Maso anga ayang'ana okhulupirika m'dziko, kuti akhale ndi Ine; iye amene ayenda m'njira yangwiro, iyeyu adzanditumikira Ine." 
Psalms101:7 Wakuchita chinyengo sadzakhala m'kati mwa nyumba yanga; wakunena mabodza sadzakhazikika pamaso panga. 
Psalms101:8 Mamawa onse ndidzadula oipa onse a m'dziko; kuduliratu onse akuchita zopanda pake kumudzi wa Yehova. 
Psalms102:1 Pemphero la Wozunzika, m'mene anakomoka natsanulira cholingalira chake pamaso pa Yehova. Yehova, imvani pemphero langa, ndipo mfuu wanga ufikire Inu." 
Psalms102:2 Musandibisire nkhope yanu tsiku la nsautso yanga; munditchereze khutu lanu; tsiku limene ndiitana ine mundiyankhe msanga. 
Psalms102:3 Popeza masiku anga akanganuka ngati utsi, ndi mafupa anga anyeka ngati nkhuni." 
Psalms102:4 Mtima wanga ukunga udzu womweta, nufota; popeza ndiiwala kudya mkate wanga." 
Psalms102:5 Chifukwa cha liu la kubuula kwanga mnofu wanga umamatika kumafupa anga. 
Psalms102:6 Ndikunga vuwo m'chipululu; ndikhala ngati kadzidzi wa kumabwinja. 
Psalms102:7 Ndidikira, ndikhala ngati mbalame ili yokha pamwamba pa tsindwi." 
Psalms102:8 Adani anga anditonza tsiku lonse; akundiyalukirawo alumbirira ine. 
Psalms102:9 Pakuti ndadya mapulusa ngati mkate, ndi kusanganiza chomwera changa ndi misozi," 
Psalms102:10 chifukwa cha ukali wanu ndi kuzaza kwanu; popeza munandinyamula ndipo munandigwetsa. 
Psalms102:11 Masiku anga akunga mthunzi womka m'tali; ndipo ine ndauma ngati udzu. 
Psalms102:12 Koma Inu, Yehova, mukhalabe kunthawi yonse; ndi chikumbukiro chanu ku mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms102:13 Inu mudzauka, ndi kuchitira nsoni Ziyoni; popeza yafika nyengo yakumchitira chifundo, nyengo yoikika." 
Psalms102:14 Pakuti atumiki anu akondwera nayo miyala yake, nachitira chifundo fumbi lake." 
Psalms102:15 Pamenepo amitundu adzaopa dzina la Yehova, ndi mafumu onse a dziko lapansi ulemerero wanu." 
Psalms102:16 Pakuti Yehova anamanga Ziyoni, anaoneka m'ulemerero wake;" 
Psalms102:17 anasamalira pemphero la iwo akusowa konse, osapepula pemphero lao." 
Psalms102:18 Ichi adzachilembera mbadwo ukudza; ndi mtundu wa anthu umene udalengedwa udzamlemekeza Yehova. 
Psalms102:19 Pakuti anapenya pansi ali kumwamba kuli malo ake opatulika; Yehova pokhala kumwamba anapenya dziko lapansi; 
Psalms102:20 kuti amve kubuula kwa wandende; namasule ana a imfa. 
Psalms102:21 Kuti anthu alalikire dzina la Yehova m'Ziyoni, ndi chilemekezo chake m'Yerusalemu;" 
Psalms102:22 Posonkhana pamodzi mitundu ya anthu, ndi maufumu kuti atumikire Yehova." 
Psalms102:23 Iye analanda mphamvu yanga panjira; anachepsa masiku anga. 
Psalms102:24 Ndinati, Mulungu wanga, musandichotse pakati pa masiku anga: Zaka zanu zikhalira m'mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms102:25 Munakhazika dziko lapansi kalelo; ndipo zakumwamba ndizo ntchito ya manja anu. 
Psalms102:26 Zidzatha izi, koma Inu mukhala: Inde, zidzatha zonse ngati chovala; mudzazisintha ngati malaya, ndipo zidzasinthika:" 
Psalms102:27 Koma Inu ndinu yemweyo, ndi zaka zanu sizifikira kutha." 
Psalms102:28 Ana a atumiki anu adzakhalitsa, ndi mbeu zao zidzakhazikika pamaso panu." 
Psalms103:1 Salimo la Davide. Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga; ndi zonse za m'kati mwanga zilemekeze dzina lake loyera." 
Psalms103:2 Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga, ndi kusaiwala zokoma zake zonse atichitirazi:" 
Psalms103:3 Amene akhululukira mphulupulu zako zonse; nachiritsa nthenda zako zonse; 
Psalms103:4 amene aombola moyo wako ungaonongeke; nakuveka korona wa chifundo ndi nsoni zokoma: 
Psalms103:5 Amene akhutitsa m'kamwa mwako ndi zabwino; nabweza ubwana wako unge mphungu. 
Psalms103:6 Yehova achitira onse osautsidwa chilungamo ndi chiweruzo. 
Psalms103:7 Analangiza Mose njira zake, ndi ana a Israele machitidwe ake." 
Psalms103:8 Yehova ndiye wa nsoni zokoma ndi wachisomo, wosakwiya msanga, ndi wa chifundo chochuluka." 
Psalms103:9 Sadzatsutsana nao nthawi zonse; ndipo sadzasunga mkwiyo wake kosatha. 
Psalms103:10 Sanatichitira monga mwa zolakwa zathu, kapena kutibwezera monga mwa mphulupulu zathu." 
Psalms103:11 Pakuti monga m'mwamba mutalikira ndi dziko lapansi, motero chifundo chake chikulira iwo akumuopa Iye." 
Psalms103:12 Monga kum'mawa kutanimpha ndi kumadzulo, momwemo anatisiyanitsira kutali zolakwa zathu." 
Psalms103:13 Monga atate achitira ana ake chifundo, Yehova achitira chifundo iwo akumuopa Iye." 
Psalms103:14 Popeza adziwa mapangidwe athu; akumbukira kuti ife ndife fumbi. 
Psalms103:15 Koma munthu, masiku ake akunga udzu; aphuka monga duwa la kuthengo." 
Psalms103:16 Pakuti mphepo ikapitapo pakhala palibe: Ndi malo ake salidziwanso. 
Psalms103:17 Koma chifundo cha Yehova ndicho choyambira nthawi yosayamba kufikira nthawi yosatha kwa iwo akumuopa Iye, ndi chilungamo chake kufikira kwa ana a ana;" 
Psalms103:18 kwa iwo akusunga chipangano chake, ndi kwa iwo akukumbukira malangizo ake kuwachita." 
Psalms103:19 Yehova anakhazika mpando wachifumu wake Kumwamba; ndi ufumu wake uchita mphamvu ponsepo. 
Psalms103:20 Lemekezani Yehova, inu angelo ake; a mphamvu zolimba, akuchita mau ake, akumvera liu la mau ake." 
Psalms103:21 Lemekezani Yehova, inu makamu ake onse; inu atumiki ake akuchita chomkondweretsa Iye." 
Psalms103:22 Lemekezani Yehova, inu, ntchito zake zonse, ponseponse pali ufumu wake: Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga iwe." 
Psalms104:1 Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga; Yehova, Mulungu wanga, Inu ndinu wamkulukulu;" 
Psalms104:2 muvala ulemu ndi chifumu. Amene mudzikuta nako kuunika monga ndi chovala; ndi kuyala thambo ngati nsalu yotchinga. 
Psalms104:3 Amene alumikiza mitanda ya zipinda zake m'madzi; naika makongwa akhale agaleta ake; nayenda pa mapiko a mphepo. 
Psalms104:4 Amene ayesa mphepo amithenga ake; lawi la moto atumiki ake; 
Psalms104:5 anakhazika dziko lapansi pa maziko ake, silidzagwedezeka kunthawi yonse." 
Psalms104:6 Mudalikuta ndi nyanja ngati ndi chovala; madzi anafikira pamwamba pa mapiri. 
Psalms104:7 Pa kudzudzula kwanu anathawa; anathawa msanga liu la bingu lanu; 
Psalms104:8 anakwera m'mapiri, anatsikira m'zigwa, kufikira malo mudawakonzeratu." 
Psalms104:9 Munaika malire kuti asapitirireko; kuti asabwererenso kuphimba dziko lapansi. 
Psalms104:10 Atumiza akasupe alowe m'makwawa; ayenda pakati pa mapiri: 
Psalms104:11 Zimamwamo nyama zonse za kuthengo; mbidzi zipherako ludzu lao. 
Psalms104:12 Mbalame za mlengalenga zifatsa pamenepo, zimaimba pakati pa mitawi." 
Psalms104:13 Iye amwetsa mapiri mochokera m'zipinda zake: Dziko lakhuta zipatso za ntchito zanu. 
Psalms104:14 Ameretsa msipu ziudye ng'ombe, ndi zitsamba achite nazo munthu; natulutse chakudya chochokera m'nthaka;" 
Psalms104:15 ndi vinyo wokondweretsa mtima wa munthu, ndi mafuta akunyezimiritsa nkhope yake, ndi mkate wakulimbitsa mtima wa munthu." 
Psalms104:16 Mitengo ya Yehova yadzala ndi madzi; mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni imene anaioka; 
Psalms104:17 m'mwemo mbalame zimanga zisa zao; pokhala chumba mpa mitengo ya mikungudza. 
Psalms104:18 Mapiri atali ndiwo ayenera zinkhoma; pamatanthwe mpothawirapo mbira. 
Psalms104:19 Anaika mwezi nyengo zake; dzuwa lidziwa polowera pake. 
Psalms104:20 Muika mdima ndipo pali usiku; pamenepo zituluka zilombo zonse za m'thengo. 
Psalms104:21 Misona ya mkango ibangula potsata nyama yao, nifuna chakudya chao kwa Mulungu." 
Psalms104:22 Potuluka dzuwa, zithawa, zigona pansi m'ngaka mwao." 
Psalms104:23 Pamenepo munthu atulukira kuntchito yake, nagwiritsa kufikira madzulo." 
Psalms104:24 Ntchito zanu zichulukadi, Yehova! Munazichita zonse mwanzeru; dziko lapansi lidzala nacho chuma chanu." 
Psalms104:25 Nyanja siyo, yaikulu ndi yachitando, m'mwemo muli zokwawa zosawerengeka; zamoyo zazing'ono ndi zazikulu." 
Psalms104:26 M'mwemo muyenda zombo; ndi Leviyatani amene munamlenga aseweremo. 
Psalms104:27 Izi zonse zikulindirirani, muzipatse chakudya chao pa nyengo yake." 
Psalms104:28 Chimene muzipatsa zigwira; mufumbatula dzanja lanu, zikhuta zabwino." 
Psalms104:29 Mukabisa nkhope yanu, ziopsedwa; mukalanda mpweya wao, zikufa, nizibwerera kufumbi kwao." 
Psalms104:30 Potumizira mzimu wanu, zilengedwa; ndipo mukonzanso nkhope ya dziko lapansi." 
Psalms104:31 Ulemerero wa Yehova ukhale kosatha; Yehova akondwere mu ntchito zake; 
Psalms104:32 amene apenyerera pa dziko lapansi, ndipo linjenjemera; akhudza mapiri, ndipo afuka." 
Psalms104:33 Ndidzaimbira Yehova m'moyo mwanga: ndidzaimbira Mulungu wanga zomlemekeza pokhala ndilipo. 
Psalms104:34 Pomlingirira Iye pandikonde; ndidzakondwera mwa Yehova. 
Psalms104:35 Ochimwa athedwe kudziko lapansi, ndi oipa asakhalenso. Yamika Yehova, moyo wanga. Aleluya." 
Psalms105:1 Yamikani Yehova, itanirani pa dzina lake; bukitsani mwa mitundu ya anthu zochita Iye." 
Psalms105:2 Muimbireni, muimbireni zomlemekeza; fotokozerani zodabwitsa zake zonse." 
Psalms105:3 Mudzitamandire ndi dzina lake loyera: mitima yao ya iwo ofunsira Yehova ikondwere. 
Psalms105:4 Funani Yehova, ndi mphamvu yake; funsirani nkhope yake nthawi zonse." 
Psalms105:5 Kumbukirani zodabwitsa zake adazichita; zizindikiro zake ndi maweruzo a pakamwa pake; 
Psalms105:6 inu mbeu za Abrahamu, mtumiki wake, inu ana a Yakobo, osankhika ake." 
Psalms105:7 Iye ndiye Yehova, Mulungu wathu; maweruzo ake akhala pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms105:8 Akumbukira chipangano chake kosatha, mauwo anawalamulira mibadwo zikwi;" 
Psalms105:9 chipanganocho anapangana ndi Abrahamu, ndi lumbiro lake ndi Isaki;" 
Psalms105:10 ndipo anachiimikira Yakobo, chikhale malemba, chikhale chipangano chosatha kwa Israele." 
Psalms105:11 Ndi kunena kuti, Ndidzakupatsa iwe dziko la Kanani, gawo la cholandira chako;" 
Psalms105:12 pokhala iwo anthu owerengeka, inde, anthu pang'ono, ndi alendo m'mwemo;" 
Psalms105:13 nayendayenda kuchokera mtundu wina kufikira mtundu wina, kuchokera ufumu wina kufikira anthu ena." 
Psalms105:14 Sanalola munthu awasautse; ndipo anadzudzula mafumu chifukwa cha iwowa. 
Psalms105:15 Ndi kuti, Musamakhudza odzozedwa anga, musamachitira choipa aneneri anga." 
Psalms105:16 Ndipo anaitana njala igwere dziko; anathyola mchirikizo wonse wa mkate. 
Psalms105:17 Anawatsogozeratu munthu; anamgulitsa Yosefe akhale kapolo: 
Psalms105:18 Anapweteka miyendo yake ndi matangadza; anamgoneka m'unyolo; 
Psalms105:19 kufikira nyengo yakuchitika maneno ake; mau a Yehova anamuyesa. 
Psalms105:20 Mfumuyo anatuma munthu nammasula; woweruza mitundu ya anthu anamtsegulira. 
Psalms105:21 Anamuika akhale woyang'anira nyumba yake, ndi woweruza wa pa zake zonse:" 
Psalms105:22 Amange nduna zake iye mwini, alangize akulu ake adziwe nzeru." 
Psalms105:23 Pamenepo Israele analowa m'Ejipito; ndi Yakobo anakhala mlendo m'dziko la Hamu. 
Psalms105:24 Ndipo anachulukitsatu mtundu wa anthu ake, nawapatsa mphamvu yoposa owasautsa." 
Psalms105:25 Anasanduliza mitima yao, kuti adane nao anthu ake, kuti achite monyenga ndi atumiki ake." 
Psalms105:26 Anatuma Mose mtumiki wake, ndi Aroni amene adamsankha." 
Psalms105:27 Anaika pakati pao zizindikiro zake, ndi zodabwitsa m'dziko la Hamu." 
Psalms105:28 Anatumiza mdima ndipo kunada; ndipo sanapikisane nao mau ake. 
Psalms105:29 Anasanduliza madzi ao akhale mwazi, naphanso nsomba zao." 
Psalms105:30 Dziko lao linachuluka achule, m'zipinda zomwe za mafumu ao." 
Psalms105:31 Ananena, ndipo inadza mitambo ya ntchentche, ndi nsabwe kufikira m'malire ao onse." 
Psalms105:32 Anawapatsa mvula yamatalala, lawi la moto m'dziko lao." 
Psalms105:33 Ndipo anapanda mipesa yao, ndi mikuyu yao; nathyola mitengo kufikira m'malire ao onse." 
Psalms105:34 Ananena, ndipo linadza dzombe ndi mphuchi, ndizo zosawerengeka," 
Psalms105:35 ndipo zinadya zitsamba zonse za m'dziko mwao, zinadyanso zipatso za m'nthaka mwao." 
Psalms105:36 Ndipo Iye anapha achisamba onse m'dziko mwao, choyambira cha mphamvu yao yonse." 
Psalms105:37 Ndipo anawatulutsa pamodzi ndi siliva ndi golide: ndi mwa mafuko ao munalibe mmodzi wokhumudwa. 
Psalms105:38 Ejipito anakondwera pakuchoka iwo; popeza kuopsa kwao kudawagwera. 
Psalms105:39 Anayala mtambo uwaphimbe; ndi moto uunikire usiku. 
Psalms105:40 Anafunsa ndipo Iye anadzetsa zinziri, nawakhutitsa mkate wakumwamba." 
Psalms105:41 Anatsegula pathanthwe, anatulukamo madzi; nayenda pouma ngati mtsinje." 
Psalms105:42 Popeza anakumbukira mau ake oyera, ndi Abrahamu mtumiki wake." 
Psalms105:43 Potero anatulutsa anthu ake ndi kusekerera, osankhika ake ndi kufuula mokondwera." 
Psalms105:44 Ndipo anawapatsa maiko a amitundu; iwo ndipo analanda zipatso za ntchito ya anthu: 
Psalms105:45 Kuti asamalire malemba ake, nasunge malamulo ake. Aleluya." 
Psalms106:1 Aleluya. Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino: Pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms106:2 Adzafotokoza ndani ntchito zamphamvu za Yehova, adzamveketsa ndani chilemekezo chake chonse?" 
Psalms106:3 Odala iwo amene asunga chiweruzo, iye amene achita chilungamo nthawi zonse." 
Psalms106:4 Mundikumbukire, Yehova, monga momwe muvomerezana ndi anthu anu; mundionetsa chipulumutso chanu:" 
Psalms106:5 Kuti ndione chokomacho cha osankhika anu, kuti ndikondwere nacho chikondwerero cha anthu anu, kuti ndidzitamandire pamodzi ndi cholowa chanu." 
Psalms106:6 Talakwa pamodzi ndi makolo athu; tachita mphulupulu, tachita choipa." 
Psalms106:7 Makolo athu sanadziwitse zodabwitsa zanu m'Ejipito; sanakumbukire zachifundo zanu zaunyinji; koma anapikisana ndi Inu kunyanja, ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Psalms106:8 Koma anawapulumutsa chifukwa cha dzina lake, kuti adziwitse chimphamvu chake." 
Psalms106:9 Ndipo anadzudzula Nyanja Yofiira, niiphwa: Potero anawayendetsa mozama ngati m'chipululu." 
Psalms106:10 Ndipo anawapulumutsa m'dzanja la iye amene anawada, nawaombola kudzanja la mdani." 
Psalms106:11 Ndipo madziwo anamiza owasautsa; sanatsale mmodzi yense. 
Psalms106:12 Pamenepo anavomereza mau ake; anaimbira chomlemekeza. 
Psalms106:13 Koma anaiwala ntchito zake msanga; sanalindire uphungu wake: 
Psalms106:14 Popeza analakalakatu kuchidikhako, nayesa Mulungu m'chipululu." 
Psalms106:15 Ndipo anawapatsa chopempha iwo; koma anaondetsa mitima yao. 
Psalms106:16 Ndipo kumisasa anachita nao nsanje Mose ndi Aroni woyerayo wa Yehova. 
Psalms106:17 Dziko lidayasama nilidameza Datani, ndipo linafotsera gulu la Abiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Ndipo m'gulu mwao mudayaka moto; lawi lake lidapsereza oipawo. 
Psalms106:19 Anapanga mwanawang'ombe ku Horebu, nagwadira fano loyenga." 
Psalms106:20 M'mwemo anasintha ulemerero wao ndi fanizo la ng'ombe yakudya msipu. 
Psalms106:21 Anaiwala Mulungu Mpulumutsi wao, amene anachita zazikulu m'Ejipito;" 
Psalms106:22 zodabwitsa m'dziko la Hamu, zoopsa ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Psalms106:23 Potero Iye adati awaononge, pakadapanda Mose wosankhika wake, kuima pamaso pake pogamukapo, kubweza ukali wake ungawaononge." 
Psalms106:24 Anapeputsanso dziko lofunika, osavomereza mau ake;" 
Psalms106:25 koma anadandaula m'mahema mwao, osamvera mau a Yehova." 
Psalms106:26 Potero anawasamulira dzanja lake, kuti awagwetse m'chipululu:" 
Psalms106:27 Kugwetsanso mbeu zao mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko maiko." 
Psalms106:28 Ndipo anadziphatikiza ndi Baala-Peori, nadyanso nsembe za akufa." 
Psalms106:29 Ndipo anamkwiyitsa nazo zochita zao; kotero kuti mliri unawagwera. 
Psalms106:30 Pamenepo panauka Finehasi, nachita chilango: Ndi mliriwo unaletseka." 
Psalms106:31 Ndipo adamuyesa iye wachilungamo, ku mibadwomibadwo kunthawi zonse." 
Psalms106:32 Anautsanso mkwiyo wake kumadzi a Meriba, ndipo kudaipira Mose chifukwa cha iwowa:" 
Psalms106:33 Pakuti anawawitsa mzimu wake, ndipo analankhula zosayenera ndi milomo yake." 
Psalms106:34 Sanaononga mitunduyo ya anthu, imene Yehova adawauza;" 
Psalms106:35 koma anasokonekerana nao amitundu, naphunzira ntchito zao:" 
Psalms106:36 Ndipo anatumikira mafano ao, amene anawakhalira msampha:" 
Psalms106:37 Ndipo anapereka ana ao aamuna ndi aakazi nsembe ya kwa ziwanda," 
Psalms106:38 nakhetsa mwazi wosachimwa, ndiwo mwazi wa ana ao aamuna ndi aakazi, amene anawaperekera nsembe mafano a Kanani; m'mwemo analidetsa dziko ndi mwaziwo." 
Psalms106:39 Ndipo anadziipsa nazo ntchito zao, nachita chigololo nao machitidwe ao." 
Psalms106:40 Potero udayaka mkwiyo wa Yehova pa anthu ake, nanyansidwa Iye ndi cholowa chake." 
Psalms106:41 Ndipo anawapereka m'manja a amitundu; ndipo odana nao anachita ufumu pa iwo. 
Psalms106:42 Adani ao anawasautsanso, nawagonjetsa agwire mwendo wao." 
Psalms106:43 Iye anawalanditsa kawirikawiri; koma anapikisana ndi Iye mwa uphungu wao, ndi mphulupulu zao zinawafoketsa." 
Psalms106:44 Koma anapenya nsautso yao, pakumva kufuula kwao:" 
Psalms106:45 Ndipo anawakumbukira chipangano chake, naleza monga mwa kuchuluka kwa chifundo chake." 
Psalms106:46 Ndipo anawachitira kuti apeze nsoni pamaso pa onse amene adawamanga ndende. 
Psalms106:47 Tipulumutseni, Yehova, Mulungu wathu, ndi kutisokolotsa kwa amitundu, kuti tiyamike dzina lanu loyera, ndi kudzitamandira nacho chilemekezo chanu." 
Psalms106:48 Wodala Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele, kuyambira kosayamba kufikira kosatha. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen. Aleluya." 
Psalms107:1 Yamikani Yehova pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms107:2 Atere oomboledwa a Yehova, amene anawaombola m'dzanja la wosautsa;" 
Psalms107:3 nawasokolotsa kumaiko, kuchokera kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo, kumpoto ndi kunyanja." 
Psalms107:4 Anasokera m'chipululu, m'njira yopanda anthu; osapeza mudzi wokhalamo." 
Psalms107:5 Anamva njala ndi ludzu, moyo wao unakomoka m'kati mwao." 
Psalms107:6 Pamenepo anafuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao, ndipo anawalanditsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:7 Ndipo anawatsogolera pa njira yolunjika, kuti amuke kumudzi wokhalamo." 
Psalms107:8 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake, ndi zodabwitsa zake za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:9 Pakuti akhutitsa mtima wolakalaka, nadzaza mtima wanjala ndi zabwino." 
Psalms107:10 Iwo akukhala mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa, omangika ndi kuzunzika ndi chitsulo;" 
Psalms107:11 popeza anapikisana nao mau a Mulungu, napeputsa uphungu wa Wam'mwambamwamba;" 
Psalms107:12 kotero kuti anagonjetsa mtima wao ndi chovuta; iwowa anakhumudwa koma panalibe mthandizi. 
Psalms107:13 Pamenepo anafuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao, ndipo anawapulumutsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:14 Anawatulutsa mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa, nadula zomangira zao." 
Psalms107:15 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake, ndi zodabwitsa zake za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:16 Popeza adaswa zitseko zamkuwa, nathyola mipiringidzo yachitsulo." 
Psalms107:17 Anthu opusa azunzika chifukwa cha zolakwa zao, ndi chifukwa cha mphulupulu zao." 
Psalms107:18 Mtima wao unyansidwa nacho chakudya chilichonse; ndipo ayandikira zipata za imfa. 
Psalms107:19 Pamenepo afuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao, ndipo awapulumutsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:20 Atumiza mau ake nawachiritsa, nawapulumutsa ku chionongeko chao." 
Psalms107:21 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake, ndi zodabwitsa zake za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:22 Ndipo apereke nsembe zachiyamiko, nafotokozere ntchito zake ndi kufuula mokondwera." 
Psalms107:23 Iwo akutsikira kunyanja nalowa m'zombo, akuchita ntchito zao pa madzi aakulu." 
Psalms107:24 Iwowa apenya ntchito za Yehova, ndi zodabwitsa zake m'madzi ozama." 
Psalms107:25 Popeza anena, nautsa namondwe, amene autsa mafunde ake." 
Psalms107:26 Akwera kuthambo, atsikira kozama; mtima wao usungunuka nacho choipacho." 
Psalms107:27 Adzandira napambanitsa miyendo ngati munthu woledzera, nathedwa nzeru konse." 
Psalms107:28 Pamenepo afuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao, ndipo awatulutsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:29 Asanduliza namondwe akhale bata, kotero kuti mafunde ake atonthole." 
Psalms107:30 Pamenepo akondwera, popeza pagwa bata; ndipo Iye awatsogolera kudooko afunako." 
Psalms107:31 Ayamike Yehova chifukwa cha chifundo chake, ndi zodabwitsa zake za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:32 Amkwezenso mu msonkhano wa anthu, namlemekeze pokhala akulu." 
Psalms107:33 Asanduliza mitsinje ikhale chipululu, ndi akasupe a madzi akhale nthaka youma." 
Psalms107:34 Dziko la zipatso, likhale lakhulo, chifukwa cha choipa cha iwo okhalamo." 
Psalms107:35 Asanduliza chipululu chikhale thawale, ndi dziko louma likhale akasupe a madzi." 
Psalms107:36 Ndi apo akhalitsa anjala, kuti amangeko mudzi wokhalamo anthu;" 
Psalms107:37 nafese m'minda, naoke mipesa, ndiyo yakubala zipatso zolemeza." 
Psalms107:38 Ndipo awadalitsa, kotero kuti achuluka kwambiri; osachepsanso zoweta zao." 
Psalms107:39 Koma achepanso, nawerama, chifukwa cha chisautso, choipa ndi chisoni." 
Psalms107:40 Atsanulira chimpepulo pa akulu, nawasokeretsa m'chipululu mopanda njira." 
Psalms107:41 Koma aika waumphawi pamsanje posazunzika, nampatsa mabanja ngati gulu la nkhosa." 
Psalms107:42 Oongoka mtima adzachiona nadzasekera; koma chosalungama chonse chitseka pakamwa pake. 
Psalms107:43 Wokhala nazo nzeru asamalire izi, ndipo azindikire zachifundo za Yehova." 
Psalms108:1 Nyimbo. Salimo la Davide. Wakhazikika mtima wanga, Mulungu; ndidzaimba, inde ndidzaimba zolemekeza, ndiko ulemerero wanga." 
Psalms108:2 Galamukani, chisakasa ndi zeze; ndidzauka ndekha mamawa." 
Psalms108:3 Ndidzakuyamikani mwa mitundu ya anthu, Yehova: ndipo ndidzaimba zakukulemekezani mwa anthu." 
Psalms108:4 Pakuti chifundo chanu nchachikulu kupitirira kumwamba, ndi choonadi chanu kufikira mitambo." 
Psalms108:5 Kwezekani pamwamba pa thambo, Mulungu; ndi ulemerero wanu pamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi," 
Psalms108:6 kuti okondedwa anu alanditsidwe, pulumutsani ndi dzanja lanu lamanja ndipo mutivomereze." 
Psalms108:7 Mulungu analankhula m'chiyero chake; ndidzakondwerera: ndidzagawa Sekemu; ndidzayesa muyeso chigwa cha Sukoti. 
Psalms108:8 Giliyadi ndi wanga, Manase ndi wanga; ndi Efuremu ndiye mphamvu ya mutu wanga; Yuda ndiye wolamulira wanga." 
Psalms108:9 Mowabu ndiye mkhate wanga; pa Edomu ndidzaponya nsapato yanga; ndidzafuulira Filistiya. 
Psalms108:10 Adzandifikitsa ndani m'mudzi wa m'linga? Adzanditsogolera ndani ku Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Si ndinu Mulungu, amene mwatitaya osatuluka nao magulu athu?" 
Psalms108:12 Tithandizeni mumsauko; pakuti chipulumutso cha munthu ndi chabe. 
Psalms108:13 Mwa Mulungu tidzachita molimbika mtima: Ndipo Iye adzapondereza otisautsa. 
Psalms109:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Mulungu wa chilemekezo changa, musakhale chete;" 
Psalms109:2 pakuti pakamwa pa woipa ndi pakamwa pa chinyengo pananditsegukira; anandilankhulira ndi m'kamwa mwa bodza. 
Psalms109:3 Ndipo anandizinga ndi mau a udani, nalimbana nane kopanda chifukwa." 
Psalms109:4 M'malo mwa chikondi changa andibwezera udani; koma ine, kupemphera ndiko." 
Psalms109:5 Ndipo anandisenza choipa m'malo mwa chokoma, ndi udani m'malo mwa chikondi changa." 
Psalms109:6 Muike munthu woipa akhale mkulu wake; ndi mdani aime pa dzanja lamanja lake. 
Psalms109:7 Ponenedwa mlandu wake atuluke wotsutsika; ndi pemphero lake likhale ngati kuchimwa. 
Psalms109:8 Masiku ake akhale owerengeka; wina alandire udindo wake. 
Psalms109:9 Ana ake akhale amasiye, ndi mkazi wake wamasiye." 
Psalms109:10 Ana ake akhale amchirakuyenda ndi opemphapempha; afunefune zosowa zao kuchokera m'mabwinja mwao. 
Psalms109:11 Wokongoletsa agwire zonse ali nazo; ndi alendo alande za ntchito yake. 
Psalms109:12 Pasakhale munthu wakumchitira chifundo; kapena kuchitira chokoma ana ake amasiye. 
Psalms109:13 Zidzukulu zake zidulidwe; dzina lao lifafanizidwe mu mbadwo ukudza. 
Psalms109:14 Mphulupulu za makolo ake zikumbukike ndi Yehova; ndi tchimo la mai wake lisafafanizidwe. 
Psalms109:15 Zikhale pamaso pa Yehova chikhalire, kuti adule chikumbukiro chao kuchichotsera kudziko lapansi." 
Psalms109:16 Chifukwa kuti sanakumbukire kuchita chifundo, koma analondola wozunzika ndi waumphawi, ndi wosweka mtima, kuti awaphe." 
Psalms109:17 Inde, anakonda kutemberera, ndipo kudamdzera mwini; sanakondwere nako kudalitsa, ndipo kudamkhalira kutali." 
Psalms109:18 Anavalanso temberero ngati malaya, ndipo lidamlowa m'kati mwake ngati madzi, ndi ngati mafuta m'mafupa ake." 
Psalms109:19 Limkhalire ngati chovala adzikuta nacho, ndi lamba limene adzimangirira nalo m'chuuno chimangirire." 
Psalms109:20 Ichi chikhale mphotho ya otsutsana nane yowapatsa Yehova, ndi ya iwo akunenera choipa moyo wanga." 
Psalms109:21 Koma Inu, Yehova Ambuye, muchite nane chifukwa cha dzina lanu; ndilanditseni popeza chifundo chanu ndi chabwino." 
Psalms109:22 Pakuti ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi, ndi mtima wanga walaswa m'kati mwanga." 
Psalms109:23 Ndamuka ngati mthunzi womka m'tali; ndiingidwa kwina ndi kwina ngati dzombe. 
Psalms109:24 Mabondo anga agwedezeka chifukwa cha kusala; ndi mnofu wanga waonda posowa mafuta. 
Psalms109:25 Ndiwakhaliranso chotonza; pakundiona apukusa mutu. 
Psalms109:26 Ndithandizeni Yehova, Mulungu wanga: Ndipulumutseni monga mwa chifundo chanu;" 
Psalms109:27 kuti adziwe kuti ichi ndi dzanja lanu; kuti Inu Yehova munachichita. 
Psalms109:28 Atemberere iwowa, koma mudalitse ndinu; pakuuka iwowa adzachita manyazi, koma mtumiki wanu adzakondwera." 
Psalms109:29 Otsutsana nane avale manyazi, nadzikute nacho chisokonezo chao ngati ndi chofunda." 
Psalms109:30 Ndidzayamika Yehova kwakukulu pakamwa panga; ndi pakati pa anthu aunyinji ndidzamlemekeza. 
Psalms109:31 Popeza adzaima pa dzanja lamanja la waumphawi, kumpulumutsa kwa iwo akuweruza koipa moyo wake." 
Psalms110:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova ananena kwa Ambuye wanga, Khalani pa dzanja lamanja langa, kufikira nditaika adani anu chopondapo mapazi anu." 
Psalms110:2 Yehova adzatumiza ndodo ya mphamvu yanu kuchokera ku Ziyoni; chitani ufumu pakati pa adani anu. 
Psalms110:3 Anthu anu adzadzipereka eni ake tsiku la chamuna chanu: M'moyera mokometsetsa, mobadwira matanda kucha, muli nao mame a ubwana wanu." 
Psalms110:4 Yehova walumbira, ndipo sadzasintha, Inu ndinu wansembe kosatha monga mwa chilongosoko cha Melkizedeki." 
Psalms110:5 Yehova pa dzanja lamanja lako adzaphwanya mafumu tsiku la mkwiyo wake. 
Psalms110:6 Adzaweruza mwa amitundu, adzadzaza dziko ndi mitembo; adzaphwanya mitu m'maiko ambiri." 
Psalms110:7 Adzamwa kumtsinje wa panjira; chifukwa chake adzaweramutsa mutu wake. 
Psalms111:1 Aleluya. Ndidzayamika Yehova ndi mtima wonse, mu upo wa oongoka mtima, ndi mumsonkhano." 
Psalms111:2 Ntchito za Yehova nzazikulu, zofunika ndi onse akukondwera nazo." 
Psalms111:3 Chochita Iye ncha ulemu, ndi ukulu: Ndi chilungamo chake chikhalitsa kosatha." 
Psalms111:4 Anachita chokumbukitsa zodabwitsa zake; Yehova ndiye wachisomo ndi nsoni zokoma. 
Psalms111:5 Anapatsa akumuopa Iye chakudya; adzakumbukira chipangano chake kosatha. 
Psalms111:6 Anaonetsera anthu ake mphamvu ya ntchito zake, pakuwapatsa cholowa cha amitundu." 
Psalms111:7 Ntchito za manja ake ndizo choonadi ndi chiweruzo; malangizo ake onse ndiwo okhulupirika. 
Psalms111:8 Achirikizika kunthawi za nthawi, achitika m'choonadi ndi chilunjiko." 
Psalms111:9 Anatumizira anthu ake chipulumutso; analamulira chipangano chake kosatha; dzina lake ndilo loyera ndi loopedwa. 
Psalms111:10 Kumuopa Yehova ndiko chiyambi cha nzeru; onse akuchita chotero ali nacho chidziwitso chokoma; chilemekezo chake chikhalitsa kosatha. 
Psalms112:1 Aleluya. Wodala munthu wakuopa Yehova, wakukondwera kwambiri ndi malamulo ake." 
Psalms112:2 Mbeu yake idzakhala yamphamvu pa dziko lapansi; mbadwo wa oongoka mtima udzadalitsidwa. 
Psalms112:3 M'nyumba mwake mudzakhala akatundu ndi chuma: Ndi chilungamo chake chikhala chikhalire. 
Psalms112:4 Kuunika kutulukira oongoka mtima mumdima; Iye ndiye wachisomo, ndi wansoni ndi wolungama." 
Psalms112:5 Wodala munthu wakuchitira chifundo, nakongoletsa; adzalimbika nao mlandu wake poweruzidwa." 
Psalms112:6 Popeza sadzagwedezeka nthawi zonse; wolungama adzakumbukika ku nthawi yosatha. 
Psalms112:7 Sadzaopa mbiri yoipa; mtima wake ngwokhazika, wokhulupirira Yehova." 
Psalms112:8 Mtima wake ngwochirikizika, sadzachita mantha, kufikira ataona chofuna iye pa iwo omsautsa." 
Psalms112:9 Anagawagawa, anapatsa aumphawi; chilungamo chake chikhalitsa kosatha; nyanga yake idzakwezeka ndi ulemu." 
Psalms112:10 Woipa adzaziona, nadzapsa mtima; adzakukuta mano, nadzasungunuka; chokhumba oipa chidzatayika." 
Psalms113:1 Aleluya; Lemekezani, inu atumiki a Yehova; lemekezani dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms113:2 Lodala dzina la Yehova Kuyambira tsopano kufikira kosatha. 
Psalms113:3 Chitulukire dzuwa kufikira kulowa kwake lilemekezedwe dzina la Yehova. 
Psalms113:4 Yehova akwezeka pamwamba pa amitundu onse, ulemerero wake pamwambamwamba." 
Psalms113:5 Akunga Yehova Mulungu wathu ndani? Amene akhala pamwamba patali," 
Psalms113:6 nadzichepetsa apenye zam'mwamba ndi za pa dziko lapansi. 
Psalms113:7 Amene autsa wosauka kumchotsa kufumbi, nakweza waumphawi kumchotsa kudzala." 
Psalms113:8 Kuti amkhalitse pamodzi ndi akulu, pamodzi ndi akulu a anthu ake." 
Psalms113:9 Asungitsa nyumba mkazi wosaona mwana, akhale mai wokondwera ndi ana. Aleluya." 
Psalms114:1 M'mene Israele anatuluka ku Ejipito, nyumba ya Yakobo kwa anthu a chinenedwe chachilendo;" 
Psalms114:2 Yuda anakhala malo ake oyera, Israele ufumu wake." 
Psalms114:3 Nyanjayo inaona, nithawa; Yordani anabwerera m'mbuyo." 
Psalms114:4 Mapiri anatumphatumpha ngati nkhosa zamphongo, timapiri ngati anaankhosa." 
Psalms114:5 Unathawanji nawe, nyanja iwe? Unabwereranji m'mbuyo, Yordani iwe?" 
Psalms114:6 Munatumphatumphiranji ngati nkhosa zamphongo, mapiri inu? Ngati anaankhosa, zitunda inu?" 
Psalms114:7 Unjenjemere, dziko lapansi iwe, pamaso pa Ambuye, pamaso pa Mulungu wa Yakobo;" 
Psalms114:8 amene anasanduliza thanthwe likhale thawale lamadzi, nsangalabwi ikhale kasupe wamadzi." 
Psalms115:1 Kwa ife ai, Yehova, kwa ife ai, koma kwa dzina lanu patsani ulemerero, chifukwa cha chifundo chanu, ndi choonadi chanu." 
Psalms115:2 Aneneranji amitundu, Ali kuti Mulungu wao?" 
Psalms115:3 Koma Mulungu wathu ndiye ali m'mwamba; achita chilichonse chimkonda. 
Psalms115:4 Mafano ao ndiwo a siliva ndi golide, ntchito za manja a anthu." 
Psalms115:5 Pakamwa ali napo, koma osalankhula; maso ali nao, koma osapenya;" 
Psalms115:6 makutu ali nao, koma osamva; mphuno ali nazo, koma osanunkhiza;" 
Psalms115:7 manja ali nao, koma osagwira; mapazi ali nao, koma osayenda; kapena sanena pammero pao." 
Psalms115:8 Adzafanana nao iwo akuwapanga; ndi onse akuwakhulupirira. 
Psalms115:9 Israele, khulupirira Yehova: Ndiye mthandizi wao ndi chikopa chao." 
Psalms115:10 Nyumba ya Aroni, khulupirira Yehova: Ndiye mthandizi wao, ndi chikopa chao." 
Psalms115:11 Inu akuopa Yehova, khulupirirani Yehova; ndiye mthandizi wao ndi chikopa chao." 
Psalms115:12 Yehova watikumbukira; adzatidalitsa: adzadalitsa nyumba ya Israele; adzadalitsa nyumba ya Aroni. 
Psalms115:13 Adzadalitsa iwo akuopa Yehova, aang'ono ndi aakulu." 
Psalms115:14 Yehova akuonjezereni dalitso, inu ndi ana anu." 
Psalms115:15 Odalitsika inu a kwa Yehova, wakulenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms115:16 Kunena za kumwamba, kumwamba ndiko kwa Yehova; koma dziko lapansi analipereka kwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms115:17 Akufa salemekeza Yehova, kapena aliyense wakutsikira kuli chete:" 
Psalms115:18 Koma ife tidzalemekeza Yehova kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi yonse. Aleluya. 
Psalms116:1 Ndimkonda, popeza Yehova amamva mau anga ndi kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms116:2 Popeza amanditcherera khutu lake, chifukwa chake ndidzaitanira Iye masiku anga onse." 
Psalms116:3 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga, ndi zowawa za manda zinandigwira: ndinapeza nsautso ndi chisoni." 
Psalms116:4 Pamenepo ndinaitana dzina la Yehova; ndikuti, Yehova ndikupemphani landitsani moyo wanga." 
Psalms116:5 Yehova ngwa chifundo ndi wolungama; ndi Mulungu wathu ngwa nsoni. 
Psalms116:6 Yehova asunga opusa; ndidafooka ine, koma anandipulumutsa." 
Psalms116:7 Ubwere moyo wanga ku mpumulo wako; pakuti Yehova anakuchitira chokoma. 
Psalms116:8 Pakuti munalanditsa moyo wanga kuimfa, maso anga kumisozi, mapazi anga, ndingagwe." 
Psalms116:9 Ndidzayenda pamaso pa Yehova m'dziko la amoyo. 
Psalms116:10 Ndinakhulupirira, chifukwa chake ndinalankhula; ndinazunzika kwambiri." 
Psalms116:11 Pofulumizidwa mtima ndinati ine, anthu onse nga mabodza." 
Psalms116:12 Ndidzabwezera Yehova chiyani chifukwa cha zokoma zake zonse anandichitira? 
Psalms116:13 Ndidzanyamula chikho cha chipulumutso, ndipo ndidzaitanira dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms116:14 Ndidzachita zowinda zanga za kwa Yehova, tsopano, pamaso pa anthu ake onse." 
Psalms116:15 Imfa ya okondedwa ake nja mtengo wake pamaso pa Yehova. 
Psalms116:16 Ndiloleni, Yehova, indetu ndine mtumiki wanu; ndine mtumiki wanu, mwana wa mdzakazi wanu; mwandimasulira zondimanga." 
Psalms116:17 Ndidzapereka kwa Inu nsembe yachiyamiko, ndipo ndidzaitanira dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms116:18 Ndidzachita zowinda zanga za kwa Yehova, tsopano, pamaso pa anthu ake onse." 
Psalms116:19 M'mabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova, pakati pa inu, Yerusalemu. Aleluya." 
Psalms117:1 Lemekezani Yehova, amitundu onse; muimbireni, anthu onse." 
Psalms117:2 Pakuti chifundo chake cha pa ife ndi chachikulu; ndi choonadi cha Yehova nchosatha. Aleluya. 
Psalms118:1 Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms118:2 Anene tsono Israele, kuti chifundo chake nchosatha." 
Psalms118:3 Anene tsono nyumba ya Aroni, kuti chifundo chake nchosatha." 
Psalms118:4 Anene tsono iwo akuopa Yehova, kuti chifundo chake nchosatha." 
Psalms118:5 M'mene ndinasautsika ndinaitanira pa Yehova; anandiyankha nandiika motakasuka Yehova. 
Psalms118:6 Yehova ndi wanga; sindidzaopa; adzandichitanji munthu? 
Psalms118:7 Yehova ndi wanga, mwa iwo akundithandiza; m'mwemo ndidzaona chofuna ine pa iwo akundida."
