Psalms118:8 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma koposa kukhulupirira munthu. 
Psalms118:9 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma koposa kukhulupirira akulu. 
Psalms118:10 Amitundu onse adandizinga, zedi, m'dzina la Yehova ndidzawaduladula." 
Psalms118:11 Adandizinga, inde, adandizinga: Indedi, m'dzina la Yehova ndidzawaduladula." 
Psalms118:12 Adandizinga ngati njuchi; anazima ngati moto waminga; indedi, m'dzina la Yehova ndidzawaduladula." 
Psalms118:13 Kundikankha anandikankha ndikadagwa; koma Yehova anandithandiza. 
Psalms118:14 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga; ndipo anakhala chipulumutso changa. 
Psalms118:15 M'mahema a olungama muli liu lakufuula mokondwera Dzanja lamanja la Yehova ndi la chipulumutso: 
Psalms118:16 Dzanja lamanja la Yehova likwezeka, Dzanja lamanja la Yehova lichita mwamphamvu." 
Psalms118:17 Sindidzafa koma ndidzakhala ndi moyo, ndipo ndidzafotokozera ntchito za Yehova." 
Psalms118:18 Kulanga anandilangadi Yehova: koma sanandipereke kuimfa ai. 
Psalms118:19 Nditsegulireni zipata za chilungamo; ndidzalowamo, ndidzayamika Yehova." 
Psalms118:20 Chipata cha Yehova ndi ichi; olungama adzalowamo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndidzakuyamikani, popeza munandiyankha, ndipo munakhala chipulumutso changa." 
Psalms118:22 Mwala umene omangawo anaukana wakhala mutu wa pangodya. 
Psalms118:23 Ichi chidzera kwa Yehova; nchodabwitsa ichi pamaso pathu. 
Psalms118:24 Tsiku ili ndilo adaliika Yehova; tidzasekera ndi kukondwera m'mwemo. 
Psalms118:25 Tikupemphani, Yehova, tipulumutseni tsopano; tikupemphani, Yehova, tipindulitseni tsopano." 
Psalms118:26 Wodala wakudzayo m'dzina la Yehova; takudalitsani kochokera m'nyumba ya Yehova. 
Psalms118:27 Yehova ndiye Mulungu, amene anatiunikira; mangani nsembe ndi zingwe, kunyanga za guwa la nsembe." 
Psalms118:28 Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndipo ndidzakuyamikani; ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndidzakukwezani." 
Psalms118:29 Yamikani Yehova, pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino, pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha." 
Psalms119:1 Odala angwiro m'mayendedwe ao, akuyenda m'chilamulo cha Yehova." 
Psalms119:2 Odala iwo akusunga mboni zake, akumfuna ndi mtima wonse;" 
Psalms119:3 inde, sachita chosalungama; ayenda m'njira zake." 
Psalms119:4 Inu munatilamulira, tisamalire malangizo anu ndi changu." 
Psalms119:5 Ha? Mwenzi zitakhazikika njira zanga kuti ndisamalire malemba anu. 
Psalms119:6 Pamenepo sindidzachita manyazi, pakupenyerera malamulo anu onse." 
Psalms119:7 Ndidzakuyamikani ndi mtima woongoka, pakuphunzira maweruzo anu olungama." 
Psalms119:8 Ndidzasamalira malemba anu: Musandisiye ndithu. 
Psalms119:9 Mnyamata adzayeretsa mayendedwe ake bwanji? Akawasamalira monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:10 Ndinakufunani ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndisasokere kusiyana nao malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:11 Ndinawabisa mau anu mumtima mwanga, kuti ndisalakwire Inu." 
Psalms119:12 Inu ndinu wodala Yehova; ndiphunzitseni malemba anu. 
Psalms119:13 Ndinafotokozera ndi milomo yanga maweruzo onse a pakamwa panu. 
Psalms119:14 Ndinakondwera m'njira ya mboni zanu, koposa ndi chuma chonse." 
Psalms119:15 Ndidzalingirira pa malangizo anu, ndi kupenyerera mayendedwe anu." 
Psalms119:16 Ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malemba anu; sindidzaiwala mau anu. 
Psalms119:17 Muchitire chokoma mtumiki wanu kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; ndipo ndidzasamalira mau anu. 
Psalms119:18 Munditsegulire maso, kuti ndipenye zodabwitsa za m'chilamulo chanu." 
Psalms119:19 Ine ndine mlendo pa dziko lapansi; musandibisire malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:20 Mtima wanga wasweka ndi kukhumba maweruzo anu nyengo zonse. 
Psalms119:21 Munadzudzula odzikuza otembereredwa, iwo akusokera kusiyana nao malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:22 Mundichotsere chotonza, ndi chimpepulo; pakuti ndinasunga mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:23 Nduna zomwe zinakhala zondineneza; koma mtumiki wanu analingirira malemba anu. 
Psalms119:24 Mboni zanu zomwe ndizo zondikondwetsa, ndizo zondipangira nzeru." 
Psalms119:25 Moyo wanga umamatika ndi fumbi; mundipatse moyo monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:26 Ndinafotokozera njira zanga, ndipo munandiyankha: Mundiphunzitse malemba anu." 
Psalms119:27 Mundizindikiritse njira ya malangizo anu; kuti ndilingalire zodabwitsa zanu. 
Psalms119:28 Moyo wanga wasungunuka ndi chisoni: Mundilimbitse monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:29 Mundichotsere njira ya chinyengo; nimundipatse mwachifundo chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:30 Ndinasankha njira yokhulupirika; ndinaika maweruzo anu pamaso panga. 
Psalms119:31 Ndimamatika nazo mboni zanu; musandichititse manyazi, Yehova." 
Psalms119:32 Ndidzathamangira njira ya malamulo anu, mutakulitsa mtima wanga." 
Psalms119:33 Mundiphunzitse, Yehova, njira ya malemba anu; ndidzaisunga kufikira kutha kwake." 
Psalms119:34 Mundizindikiritse, ndipo ndidzasunga malamulo anu; ndidzawasamalira ndi mtima wanga wonse." 
Psalms119:35 Mundiyendetse mopita malamulo anu; pakuti ndikondwera m'menemo. 
Psalms119:36 Lingitsani mtima wanga kumboni zanu, si ku chisiriro ai." 
Psalms119:37 Muchititse mlubza maso anga ndisapenye zachabe, mundipatse moyo mu njira yanu." 
Psalms119:38 Limbitsirani mtumiki wanu mau anu, ndiye wodzipereka kukuopani." 
Psalms119:39 Mundipatutsire chotonza changa ndichiopacho; popeza maweruzo anu ndi okoma. 
Psalms119:40 Taonani, ndinalira malangizo anu; mundipatse moyo mwa chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms119:41 Ndipo chifundo chanu chindidzere, Yehova, ndi chipulumutso chanu, monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:42 Kuti ndikhale nao mau akuyankha wonditonza; popeza ndikhulupirira mau anu. 
Psalms119:43 Ndipo musandichotsere ndithu mau a choonadi pakamwa panga; pakuti ndinayembekeza maweruzo anu. 
Psalms119:44 Potero ndidzasamalira malamulo anu chisamalire kunthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms119:45 Ndipo ndidzayenda mwaufulu; popeza ndinafuna malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:46 Ndidzalankhulanso za umboni wanu pamaso pa mafumu, osachitapo manyazi." 
Psalms119:47 Ndipo ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malamulo anu, amene ndiwakonda." 
Psalms119:48 Ndidzakwezanso manja anga ku malamulo anu, amene ndiwakonda; ndipo ndidzalingalira pa malemba anu." 
Psalms119:49 Kumbukirani mau a kwa mtumiki wanu, amene munandiyembekezetsa nao." 
Psalms119:50 Chitonthozo changa m'kuzunzika kwanga ndi ichi; pakuti mau anu anandipatsa moyo. 
Psalms119:51 Odzikuza anandinyoza kwambiri: koma sindinapatukanso nacho chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:52 Ndinakumbukira maweruzo anu kuyambira kale, Yehova, ndipo ndinadzitonthoza." 
Psalms119:53 Ndinasumwa kwakukulu, chifukwa cha oipa akusiya chilamulo chanu." 
Psalms119:54 Malemba anu anakhala nyimbo zanga m'nyumba ya ulendo wanga. 
Psalms119:55 Usiku ndinakumbukira dzina lanu, Yehova, ndipo ndinasamalira chilamulo chanu." 
Psalms119:56 Ichi ndinali nacho, popeza ndinasunga malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:57 Yehova ndiye gawo langa: Ndinati ndidzasunga mau anu. 
Psalms119:58 Ndinapemba pankhope panu ndi mtima wanga wonse: Mundichitire chifundo monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:59 Ndinaganizira njira zanga, ndipo ndinabweza mapazi anga atsate mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:60 Ndinafulumira, osachedwa, kusamalira malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:61 Anandikulunga nazo zingwe za oipa; koma sindinaiwala chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:62 Pakati pa usiku ndidzauka kukuyamikani chifukwa cha maweruzo anu olungama. 
Psalms119:63 Ine ndine wakuyanjana nao onse akukuopani, ndi iwo akusamalira malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:64 Dziko lapansi lidzala nacho chifundo chanu, Yehova; mundiphunzitse malemba anu." 
Psalms119:65 Munachitira mtumiki wanu chokoma, Yehova, monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:66 Mundiphunzitse chisiyanitso ndi nzeru; pakuti ndinakhulupirira malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:67 Ndisanazunzidwe ndinasokera; koma tsopano ndisamalira mau anu. 
Psalms119:68 Inu ndinu wabwino, ndi wakuchita zabwino; mundiphunzitse malemba anu." 
Psalms119:69 Odzikuza anandipangira bodza: Ndidzasunga malangizo anu ndi mtima wanga wonse. 
Psalms119:70 Mtima wao unona ngati mafuta; koma ine ndikondwera nacho chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:71 Kundikomera kuti ndinazunzidwa; kuti ndiphunzire malemba anu. 
Psalms119:72 Chilamulo cha pakamwa panu chindikomera koposa golide ndi siliva zikwizikwi. 
Psalms119:73 Manja anu anandilenga nandiumba; mundizindikiritse, kuti ndiphunzire malemba anu." 
Psalms119:74 Iwo amene akuopani adzandiona ine nadzakondwera; popeza ndayembekezera mau anu. 
Psalms119:75 Ndidziwa kuti maweruzo anu ndiwo olungama, Yehova, ndi kuti munandizunza ine mokhulupirika." 
Psalms119:76 Chifundo chanu chikhaletu chakunditonthoza, ndikupemphani, monga mwa mau anu kwa mtumiki wanu." 
Psalms119:77 Nsoni zokoma zanu zindidzere, kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; popeza chilamulo chanu chindikondweretsa." 
Psalms119:78 Odzikuza achite manyazi, popeza anandichitira monyenga ndi bodza: Koma ine ndidzalingalira malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:79 Iwo akuopa Inu abwere kwa ine, ndipo adzadziwa mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:80 Mtima wanga ukhale wangwiro m'malemba anu; kuti ndisachite manyazi. 
Psalms119:81 Moyo wanga unakomoka ndi kukhumba chipulumutso chanu: Ndinayembekezera mau anu. 
Psalms119:82 Maso anga anatha mphamvu ndi kukhumba mau anu, ndikuti, Mudzanditonthoza liti?" 
Psalms119:83 Popeza ndakhala ngati thumba lofukirira; koma sindiiwala malemba anu. 
Psalms119:84 Masiku a mtumiki wanu ndiwo angati? Mudzaweruza liti iwo akundilondola koipa? 
Psalms119:85 Odzikuza anandikumbira mbuna, ndiwo osasamalira chilamulo chanu." 
Psalms119:86 Malamulo anu onse ngokhulupirika; andilondola nalo bodza; ndithandizeni. 
Psalms119:87 Akadandithera pa dziko lapansi; koma ine sindinasiya malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:88 Mundipatse moyo monga mwa chifundo chanu; ndipo ndidzasamalira mboni ya pakamwa panu. 
Psalms119:89 Mau anu aikika kumwamba, kosatha, Yehova." 
Psalms119:90 Chikhulupiriko chanu chifikira mibadwomibadwo; munakhazikitsa dziko lapansi, ndipo likhalitsa." 
Psalms119:91 Kunena za maweruzo anu alimbikira kufikira lero; pakuti onsewa ndiwo atumiki anu. 
Psalms119:92 Chilamulo chanu chikadapanda kukhala chikondweretso changa, ndikadatayika m'kuzunzika kwanga." 
Psalms119:93 Sindidzaiwala malangizo anu nthawi zonse; popeza munandipatsa nao moyo. 
Psalms119:94 Ine ndine wanu, ndipulumutseni pakuti ndinafuna malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:95 Oipa anandilalira kundiononga; koma ndizindikira mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:96 Ndinapenya malekezero ake a ungwiro wonse; koma lamulo lanu ndi lotakasuka ndithu. 
Psalms119:97 Ha! Ndikondadi chilamulo chanu; ndilingiriramo ine tsiku lonse. 
Psalms119:98 Malamulo anu andipatsa nzeru yakuposa adani anga; pakuti akhala nane chikhalire. 
Psalms119:99 Ndili nayo nzeru yakuposa aphunzitsi anga onse; pakuti ndilingalira mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:100 Ndizindikira koposa okalamba popeza ndinasunga malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:101 Ndinaletsa mapazi anga njira iliyonse yaoipa, kuti ndisamalire mau anu." 
Psalms119:102 Sindinapatukana nao maweruzo anu; pakuti Inu munandiphunzitsa. 
Psalms119:103 Mau anu azunadi powalawa ine! Koposa uchi m'kamwa mwanga. 
Psalms119:104 Malangizo anu andizindikiritsa; chifukwa chake ndidana nao mayendedwe onse achinyengo. 
Psalms119:105 Mau anu ndiwo nyali ya ku mapazi anga, ndi kuunika kwa panjira panga." 
Psalms119:106 Ndinalumbira, ndipo ndinatsimikiza mtima, kuti ndidzasamalira maweruzo anu olungama." 
Psalms119:107 Ndazunzika kwambiri: Ndipatseni moyo, Yehova, monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:108 Landirani, Yehova, zopereka zaufulu za pakamwa panga, ndipo ndiphunzitseni maweruzo anu." 
Psalms119:109 Moyo wanga ukhala m'dzanja langa chikhalire; koma sindiiwala chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:110 Oipa ananditchera msampha; koma sindinasokera m'malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:111 Ndinalandira mboni zanu zikhale cholandira chosatha; pakuti ndizo zokondweretsa mtima wanga. 
Psalms119:112 Ndinalingitsa mtima wanga uchite malemba anu, kosatha, kufikira chimaliziro." 
Psalms119:113 Ndidana nao a mitima iwiri; koma ndikonda chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:114 Inu ndinu pobisalapo panga, ndi chikopa changa; ndiyembekezera mau anu." 
Psalms119:115 Mundichokere ochita zoipa inu; kuti ndisunge malamulo a Mulungu wanga. 
Psalms119:116 Mundichirikize monga mwa mau anu, kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; ndipo ndisachite manyazi pa chiyembekezo changa." 
Psalms119:117 Mundigwirizize ndipo ndidzapulumutsidwa, ndipo ndidzasamalira malemba anu chisamalire." 
Psalms119:118 Mupepula onse akusokera m'malemba anu; popeza chinyengo chao ndi bodza. 
Psalms119:119 Muchotsa oipa onse a pa dziko lapansi ngati mphala: Chifukwa chake ndikonda mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:120 Thupi langa linjenjemera ndi kuopa Inu; ndipo ndichita mantha nao maweruzo anu. 
Psalms119:121 Ndinachita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo; musandisiyira akundisautsa. 
Psalms119:122 Mumkhalire chikole mtumiki wanu chimkomere; odzikuza asandisautse. 
Psalms119:123 Maso anga anatha mphamvu pofuna chipulumutso chanu, ndi mau a chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms119:124 Muchitire mtumiki wanu monga mwa chifundo chanu, ndipo ndiphunzitseni malemba anu." 
Psalms119:125 Ine ndine mtumiki wanu, ndizindikiritseni; kuti ndidziwe mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:126 Yafika nyengo yakuti Yehova achite kanthu; pakuti anaswa chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:127 Chifukwa chake ndikonda malamulo anu koposa golide, inde golide woyengeka." 
Psalms119:128 Chifukwa chake ndiyesa ngolunjika malangizo anu onse akunena zonse; koma ndidana nazo njira zonse zonyenga. 
Psalms119:129 Mboni zanu nzodabwitsa; chifukwa chake moyo wanga uzisunga. 
Psalms119:130 Potsegulira mau anu paunikira; kuzindikiritsa opusa. 
Psalms119:131 Ndinatsegula pakamwa panga, ndi kupuma wefuwefu; popeza ndinakhumba malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:132 Munditembenukire, ndi kundichitira chifundo, monga mumatero nao akukonda dzina lanu." 
Psalms119:133 Khazikitsani mapazi anga m'mau anu; ndipo zisandigonjetse zopanda pake zilizonse. 
Psalms119:134 Mundiombole kunsautso ya munthu: Ndipo ndidzasamalira malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:135 Muwalitse nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu; ndipo mundiphunzitse malemba anu. 
Psalms119:136 Maso anga atsitsa mitsinje ya madzi, popeza sasamalira chilamulo chanu." 
Psalms119:137 Inu ndinu wolungama, Yehova, ndipo maweruzo anu ndiwo olunjika." 
Psalms119:138 Mboni zanuzo mudazilamulira zili zolungama ndi zokhulupirika ndithu. 
Psalms119:139 Changu changa chinandithera, popeza akundisautsa anaiwala mau anu." 
Psalms119:140 Mau anu ngoyera ndithu; ndi mtumiki wanu awakonda. 
Psalms119:141 Wamng'ono ine, ndi wopepulidwa; koma sindiiwala malemba anu." 
Psalms119:142 Chilungamo chanu ndicho chilungamo chosatha; ndi chilamulo chanu ndicho choonadi. 
Psalms119:143 Kusautsika ndi kupsinjika kwandigwera; koma malamulo anu ndiwo ondikondweretsa ine. 
Psalms119:144 Mboni zanu ndizo zolungama kosatha; mundizindikiritse izi, ndipo ndidzakhala ndi moyo." 
Psalms119:145 Ndinaitana ndi mtima wanga wonse; mundiyankhe, Yehova; ndidzasunga malemba anu." 
Psalms119:146 Ndinaitanira Inu; ndipulumutseni, ndipo ndidzasamalira mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:147 Ndinafuula kusanake: ndinayembekezera mau anu. 
Psalms119:148 Maso anga anakumana ndi maulonda a usiku, kuti ndilingirire mau anu." 
Psalms119:149 Imvani liu langa monga mwa chifundo chanu; mundipatse moyo monga mwa kuweruza kwanu, Yehova." 
Psalms119:150 Otsata zachiwembu andiyandikira; akhala kutali ndi chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:151 Inu muli pafupi, Yehova; ndipo malamulo anu onse ndiwo choonadi." 
Psalms119:152 Kuyambira kale ndinadziwa mu mboni zanu, kuti munazikhazika kosatha," 
Psalms119:153 Penyani kuzunzika kwanga, nimundilanditse; pakuti sindiiwala chilamulo chanu." 
Psalms119:154 Mundinenere mlandu wanga, nimundiombole; mundipatse moyo monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:155 Chipulumutso chitalikira oipa; popeza safuna malemba anu. 
Psalms119:156 Zachifundo zanu ndi zazikulu, Yehova; mundipatse moyo monga mwa maweruzo anu." 
Psalms119:157 Ondilondola ndi ondisautsa ndiwo ambiri; koma sindinapatukana nazo mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:158 Ndinapenya ochita monyenga, ndipo ndinanyansidwa nao; popeza sasamalira mau anu." 
Psalms119:159 Penyani kuti ndikonda malangizo anu; mundipatse moyo, Yehova, monga mwa chifundo chanu." 
Psalms119:160 Chiwerengero cha mau anu ndicho choonadi; ndi maweruzo anu olungama onse akhala kosatha. 
Psalms119:161 Nduna zinandilondola kopanda chifukwa; koma mtima wanga uchita mantha nao mau anu. 
Psalms119:162 Ndikondwera nao mau anu, ngati munthu wakupeza zofunkha zambiri." 
Psalms119:163 Ndidana nalo bodza ndi kunyansidwa nalo; koma ndikonda chilamulo chanu. 
Psalms119:164 Ndikulemekezani kasanu ndi kawiri, tsiku limodzi, chifukwa cha maweruzo anu alungama." 
Psalms119:165 Akukonda chilamulo chanu ali nao mtendere wambiri; ndipo alibe chokhumudwitsa. 
Psalms119:166 Ndinayembekeza chipulumutso chanu, Yehova, ndipo ndinachita malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:167 Moyo wanga unasamalira mboni zanu; ndipo ndizikonda kwambiri. 
Psalms119:168 Ndinasamalira malangizo anu ndi mboni zanu; popeza njira zanga zonse zili pamaso panu. 
Psalms119:169 Kufuula kwanga kuyandikire pamaso panu, Yehova; mundizindikiritse monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:170 Kupemba kwanga kudze pamaso panu; mundilanditse monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:171 Milomo yanga itulutse chilemekezo; popeza mundiphunzitsa malemba anu. 
Psalms119:172 Lilime langa liimbire mau anu; pakuti malamulo anu onse ndiwo olungama. 
Psalms119:173 Dzanja lanu likhale lakundithandiza; popeza ndinasankha malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:174 Ndinakhumba chipulumutso chanu, Yehova; ndipo chilamulo chanu ndicho chondikondweretsa." 
Psalms119:175 Mzimu wanga ukhale ndi moyo, ndipo udzakulemekezani; ndipo maweruzo anu andithandize." 
Psalms119:176 Ndinasochera ngati nkhosa yotayika; funani mtumiki wanu; pakuti sindiiwala malamulo anu. 
Psalms120:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Ndinafuulira kwa Yehova mu msauko wanga, ndipo anandivomereza." 
Psalms120:2 Yehova, landitsani moyo wanga kumilomo ya mabodza, ndi kulilime lonyenga." 
Psalms120:3 Adzakuninkhanji, adzakuonjezeranji, lilime lonyenga iwe?" 
Psalms120:4 Mivi yakuthwa ya chiphona, ndi makala tsanya." 
Psalms120:5 Tsoka ine, kuti ndili mlendo m'Meseki, kuti ndigonera m'mahema a Kedara!" 
Psalms120:6 Moyo wanga unakhalitsa nthawi pamodzi ndi iye wakudana nao mtendere. 
Psalms120:7 Ine ndikuti, Mtendere; koma polankhula ine, iwowa akuti, Nkhondo." 
Psalms121:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Ndikweza maso anga kumapiri: Thandizo langa lidzera kuti? 
Psalms121:2 Thandizo langa lidzera kwa Yehova, wakulenga zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms121:3 Sadzalola phazi lako literereke: Iye amene akusunga sadzaodzera. 
Psalms121:4 Taonani, wakusunga Israele sadzaodzera kapena kugona." 
Psalms121:5 Yehova ndiye wakukusunga; Yehova ndiye mthunzi wako wa kudzanja lako lamanja. 
Psalms121:6 Dzuwa silidzawamba usana, mwezi sudzakupanda usiku." 
Psalms121:7 Yehova adzakusunga kukuchotsera zoipa zilizonse; adzasunga moyo wako. 
Psalms121:8 Yehova adzasungira kutuluka kwako ndi kulowa kwako, kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi zonse." 
Psalms122:1 Nyimbo yokwerera; ya Davide. Ndinakondwera m'mene ananena nane, Tiyeni kunyumba ya Yehova." 
Psalms122:2 Mapazi athu alinkuima m'zipata zanu, Yerusalemu" 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalemu anamangidwa ngati mudzi woundana bwino: 
Psalms122:4 Kumene akwerako mafuko, ndiwo mafuko a Yehova; akhale mboni ya kwa Israele, Ayamike dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms122:5 Pakuti pamenepo anaika mipando ya chiweruzo, mipando ya nyumba ya Davide." 
Psalms122:6 Mupempherere mtendere wa Yerusalemu; akukonda inu adzaona phindu. 
Psalms122:7 M'linga mwako mukhale mtendere, m'nyumba za mafumu mukhale phindu." 
Psalms122:8 Chifukwa cha abale anga ndi mabwenzi anga, ndidzanena tsopano, Mukhale mtendere mwa inu." 
Psalms122:9 Chifukwa cha nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wathu ndidzakufunira zokoma. 
Psalms123:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Ndikweza maso anga kwa Inu, kwa Inu wakukhala kumwamba." 
Psalms123:2 Taonani, monga maso a anyamata ayang'anira dzanja la mbuye wao, monga maso a adzakazi ayang'anira dzanja la mbuye wao wamkazi: Momwemo maso athu ayang'anira Yehova Mulungu wathu, kufikira atichitira chifundo." 
Psalms123:3 Mutichitire chifundo, Yehova, mutichitire chifundo; pakuti takhuta kwambiri ndi mnyozo." 
Psalms123:4 Moyo wathu wakhuta ndithu ndi kuseka kwa iwo osasowa kanthu, ndi mnyozo wa odzikuza." 
Psalms124:1 Nyimbo yokwerera; ya Davide. Akadapanda kukhala nafe Yehova, anene tsono Israele;" 
Psalms124:2 Akadapanda kukhala nafe Yehova, pakutiukira anthu:" 
Psalms124:3 Akadatimeza amoyo, potipsera mtima wao." 
Psalms124:4 Akadatimiza madziwo, mtsinje ukadapita pa moyo wathu;" 
Psalms124:5 madzi odzikuza akadapita pa moyo wathu. 
Psalms124:6 Alemekezedwe Yehova, amene sanatipereke kumano kwao tikhale chakudya chao." 
Psalms124:7 Moyo wathu unaonjoka ngati mbalame mu msampha wa msodzi; msampha unathyoka ndi ife tinaonjoka. 
Psalms124:8 Thandizo lathu lili m'dzina la Yehova, wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms125:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Iwo akukhulupirira Yehova akunga phiri la Ziyoni, losasunthika, likhazikika kosatha." 
Psalms125:2 Monga mapiri azinga Yerusalemu, momwemo Yehova azinga anthu ake, kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi zonse." 
Psalms125:3 Pakuti ndodo yachifumu ya choipa siidzapumula pa gawo la olungama; kuti olungama asatulutse dzanja lao kuchita chosalungama. 
Psalms125:4 Chitirani chokoma, Yehova, iwo okhala okoma; iwo okhala oongoka mumtima mwao." 
Psalms125:5 Koma iwo akupatula kutsata njira zao zokhotakhota, Yehova adzawachotsa pamodzi ndi ochita zopanda pake. Mtendere ukhale pa Israele." 
Psalms126:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Pobweza Yehova ukapolo wa Ziyoni, tinakhala ngati anthu akulota." 
Psalms126:2 Pamenepo pakamwa pathu panadzala ndi kuseka, ndi lilime lathu linafuula mokondwera; pamenepo anati mwa amitundu, Yehova anawachitira iwo zazikulu." 
Psalms126:3 Yehova anatichitira ife zazikulu; potero tikhala okondwera. 
Psalms126:4 Bwezani ukapolo wathu, Yehova, ngati mitsinje ya kumwera." 
Psalms126:5 Akubzala ndi misozi adzatuta ndi kufuula mokondwera. 
Psalms126:6 Iye amene ayendayenda nalira, ponyamula mbeu yakufesa; adzabweranso ndithu ndi kufuula mokondwera, alikunyamula mitolo yake." 
Psalms127:1 Nyimbo yokwerera; ya Solomoni. Akapanda kumanga nyumba Yehova, akuimanga agwiritsa ntchito chabe; akapanda kusunga mudzi Yehova, mlonda adikira chabe." 
Psalms127:2 Kuli chabe kwa inu kulawirira mamawa ndi kusagonerapo madzulo, kudya mkate wosautsa kuupeza; kuli tero kuti izi apatsa okondedwa ake ngati m'tulo." 
Psalms127:3 Taonani, ana ndiwo cholandira cha kwa Yehova; chipatso cha m'mimba ndicho mphotho yake." 
Psalms127:4 Ana a ubwana wake wa munthu akunga mivi m'dzanja lake la chiphona. 
Psalms127:5 Wodala munthu amene anadzaza nayo phodo lake: sadzachita manyazi iwo, pakulankhula nao adani kuchipata." 
Psalms128:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Wodala yense wakuopa Yehova, wakuyenda m'njira zake." 
Psalms128:2 Pakuti udzadya za ntchito ya manja ako; wodala iwe, ndipo kudzakukomera." 
Psalms128:3 Mkazi wako adzanga mpesa wopatsa m'mbali za nyumba yako; ana ako adzanga timitengo ta azitona pozinga podyera pako. 
Psalms128:4 Taonani, m'mwemo adzadalitsika munthu wakuopa Yehova." 
Psalms128:5 Yehova adzakudalitsa ali m'Ziyoni; ndipo udzaona zokoma za Yerusalemu masiku onse a moyo wako. 
Psalms128:6 Inde, udzaona zidzukulu zako. Mtendere ukhala ndi Israele." 
Psalms129:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Anandisautsa kawirikawiri kuyambira ubwana wanga, anene tsono Israele;" 
Psalms129:2 Anandisautsa kawirikawiri kuyambira ubwana wanga; koma sanandilake. 
Psalms129:3 Olima analima pamsana panga; anatalikitsa mipere yao. 
Psalms129:4 Yehova ndiye wolungama; anadulatu zingwe za oipa. 
Psalms129:5 Achite manyazi nabwerere m'mbuyo. Onse akudana naye Ziyoni. 
Psalms129:6 Akhale ngati udzu womera patsindwi, wakufota asanauzule;" 
Psalms129:7 umene womweta sadzaza nao dzanja lake, kapena womanga mitolo sakupatira manja." 
Psalms129:8 Angakhale opitirirapo sanena, Dalitso la Mulungu likhale pa inu; tikudalitsani m'dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms130:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. M'mozamamo ndinakufuulirani, Yehova." 
Psalms130:2 Ambuye, imvani liu langa; makutu anu akhale chimverere mau a kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms130:3 Mukasunga mphulupulu, Yehova, adzakhala chilili ndani, Ambuye?" 
Psalms130:4 Koma kwa Inu kuli chikhululukiro, kuti akuopeni." 
Psalms130:5 Ndilindira Yehova, moyo wanga ulindira, ndiyembekeza mau ake." 
Psalms130:6 Moyo wanga uyang'anira Ambuye, koposa alonda matanda kucha; inde koposa alonda matanda kucha." 
Psalms130:7 Israele, uyembekezere Yehova; chifukwa kwa Yehova kuli chifundo, kwaonso kuchulukira chiombolo." 
Psalms130:8 Ndipo adzaombola Israele ku mphulupulu zake zonse. 
Psalms131:1 Nyimbo yokwerera, ya Davide. Yehova, mtima wanga sunadzikuze ndi maso anga sanakwezeke; ndipo sindinatsate zazikulu, kapena zodabwitsa zondiposa." 
Psalms131:2 Indedi, ndinalinganiza ndi kutontholetsa moyo wanga; ngati mwana womletsa kuyamwa amake, moyo wanga ndili nao ngati mwana womletsa kuyamwa." 
Psalms131:3 Israele, uyembekezere Yehova, kuyambira tsopano kufikira kosatha." 
Psalms132:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Yehova, kumbukirani Davide kuzunzika kwake konse." 
Psalms132:2 Kuti analumbira Yehova, nawindira Wamphamvuyo wa Yakobo, ndi kuti," 
Psalms132:3 Ngati ndidzalowa pakhomo pa nyumba yanga, ngati ndidzakwera pa kama logonapo;" 
Psalms132:4 ngati ndidzalola maso anga agone, kapena zikope zanga ziodzere;" 
Psalms132:5 kufikira nditapezera Yehova malo, chokhalamo Wamphamvuyo wa Yakobo?" 
Psalms132:6 Taonani, tinachimva m'Efurata; tinachipeza kuchidikha cha kunkhalango." 
Psalms132:7 Tidzalowa mokhalamo Iye; tidzagwadira kumpando wa mapazi ake. 
Psalms132:8 Ukani, Yehova, lowani ku mpumulo wanu; Inu ndi hema wa mphamvu yanu." 
Psalms132:9 Ansembe anu avale chilungamo; ndi okondedwa anu afuule mokondwera. 
Psalms132:10 Chifukwa cha Davide mtumiki wanu musabweze nkhope ya wodzozedwa wanu. 
Psalms132:11 Yehova analumbira Davide zoona; sadzalibweza; ndi kuti, Wa iwo okhala zipatso za thupi lako ndidzaika pa mpando wachifumu wako." 
Psalms132:12 Ana ako akasunga chipangano changa ndi mboni yanga imene ndidzawaphunzitsa, ana aonso adzakhala pa mpando wanu kunthawi zonse," 
Psalms132:13 pakuti Yehova anasankha Ziyoni; analikhumba likhale pokhala pake; ndi kuti," 
Psalms132:14 Pampumulo panga mpano posatha, Pano ndidzakhala; pakuti ndakhumbapo." 
Psalms132:15 Ndidzadalitsatu chakudya chake; aumphawi ake ndidzawakhutitsa ndi mkate. 
Psalms132:16 Ndipo ansembe ake ndidzawaveka ndi chipulumutso: Ndi okondedwa ake adzafuulitsa mokondwera. 
Psalms132:17 Apo ndidzaphukitsira Davide nyanga; ndakonzeratu wodzozedwa wanga nyali. 
Psalms132:18 Ndidzawaveka adani ake ndi manyazi; koma pa iyeyu korona wake adzamveka. 
Psalms133:1 Nyimbo yokwerera; ya Davide. Onani, nkokoma ndi kokondweretsa ndithu kuti abale akhale pamodzi!" 
Psalms133:2 Ndiko ngati mafuta a mtengo wake pamutu, akutsikira kundevu, inde kundevu za Aroni; akutsikira kumkawo wa zovala zake." 
Psalms133:3 Ngati mame a ku Heremoni, akutsikira pa mapiri a Ziyoni. Pakuti pamenepo Yehova analamulira dalitsolo, ndilo moyo womka muyaya." 
Psalms134:1 Nyimbo yokwerera. Taonani, lemekezani Yehova, atumiki a Yehova inu nonse, akuimirira m'nyumba ya Yehova usiku." 
Psalms134:2 Kwezani manja anu kumalo oyera, nimulemekeze Yehova." 
Psalms134:3 Yehova, ali m'Ziyoni, akudalitseni; ndiye amene analenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms135:1 Aleluya; Lemekezani dzina la Yehova! Lemekezani inu atumiki a Yehova. 
Psalms135:2 Inu akuimirira m'nyumba ya Yehova, m'mabwalo a nyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms135:3 Lemekezani Yehova; pakuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; muimbire zolemekeza dzina lake; pakuti nkokondweretsa kutero. 
Psalms135:4 Pakuti Yehova anadzisankhira Yakobo, Israele, akhale chuma chake chenicheni." 
Psalms135:5 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti Yehova ndi wamkulu, ndi Ambuye wathu aposa milungu yonse." 
Psalms135:6 Chilichonse chimkonda Yehova achichita, kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi, m'nyanja ndi mozama monse." 
Psalms135:7 Akweza mitambo ichokere ku malekezero a dziko lapansi; ang'animitsa mphezi zidzetse mvula; atulutsa mphepo mosungira mwake. 
Psalms135:8 Anapanda oyamba a Ejipito, kuyambira munthu kufikira zoweta." 
Psalms135:9 Anatumiza zizindikiro ndi zodabwitsa pakati pako, Ejipito iwe, pa Farao ndi pa omtumikira onse." 
Psalms135:10 Ndiye amene anapanda amitundu ambiri, napha mafumu amphamvu;" 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, ndi Ogi mfumu ya Basani, ndi maufumu onse a Kanani:" 
Psalms135:12 Ndipo anapereka dziko lao likhale chosiyira, chosiyira cha kwa Israele anthu ake." 
Psalms135:13 Dzina lanu, Yehova, likhala kosatha; chikumbukiro chanu, Yehova, kufikira mibadwomibadwo." 
Psalms135:14 Pakuti Yehova adzaweruza anthu ake, koma adzaleka atumiki ake." 
Psalms135:15 Mafano a amitundu ndiwo siliva ndi golide, ntchito ya manja a anthu." 
Psalms135:16 Pakamwa ali napo koma osalankhula; maso ali nao, koma osapenya;" 
Psalms135:17 makutu ali nao, koma osamva; inde, pakamwa pao palibe mpweya." 
Psalms135:18 Akuwapanga adzafanana nao; inde, onse akuwakhulupirira." 
Psalms135:19 A nyumba ya Israele inu, lemekezani Yehova: A nyumba ya Aroni inu, lemekezani Yehova:" 
Psalms135:20 A nyumba ya Levi inu, lemekezani Yehova: Inu akuopa Yehova, lemekezani Yehova." 
Psalms135:21 Alemekezedwe Yehova kuchokera m'Ziyoni, amene akhala m'Yerusalemu. Aleluya." 
Psalms136:1 Yamikani Yehova pakuti ndiye wabwino; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:2 Yamikani Mulungu wa milungu; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:3 Yamikani Mbuye wa ambuye; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:4 Amene yekha achita zodabwitsa zazikulu; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:5 Amene analenga zakumwamba mwanzeru; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:6 Amene anayala dziko lapansi pamwamba pa madzi; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:7 Amene analenga miuni yaikulu; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:8 Dzuwa liweruze usana; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:9 Mwezi ndi nyenyezi ziweruze usiku; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:10 Iye amene anapandira Aejipito ana ao oyamba; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:11 Natulutsa Israele pakati pao; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:12 Ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha." 
Psalms136:13 Amene anagawa magawo Nyanja Yofiira; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:14 Napititsa Israele pakati pake; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:15 Nakhuthula Farao ndi khamu lake m'Nyanja Yofiira: pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:16 Amene anatsogolera anthu ake m'chipululu; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:17 Amene anapanda mafumu akulu; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:18 Ndipo anawapha mafumu omveka; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:20 Ndi Ogi mfumu ya Basani; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:21 Ndipo anapereka dziko lao likhale chosiyira; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:22 Chosiyira cha kwa Israele mtumiki wake; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:23 Amene anatikumbukira popepuka ife; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:24 Natikwatula kwa otisautsa; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:25 Ndiye wakupatsa nyama zonse chakudya; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms136:26 Yamikani Mulungu wa kumwamba; pakuti chifundo chake nchosatha. 
Psalms137:1 Ku mitsinje ya ku Babiloni, kumeneko tinakhala pansi, inde tinalira, pokumbukira Ziyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Pa msondodzi uli m'mwemo tinapachika mazeze athu. 
Psalms137:3 Popeza pamenepo akutigwirawo anatifunsa nyimbo ndipo akutizunza anafuna tisekere, ndi kuti, Mutiimbire nyimbo imodzi ya ku Ziyoni." 
Psalms137:4 Tidati, Tidzaimba bwanji nyimbo ya Yehova m'dziko lachilendo?" 
Psalms137:5 Ndikakuiwalani, Yerusalemu, dzanja lamanja langa liiwale luso lake." 
Psalms137:6 Lilime langa limamatike kunsaya zanga, ndikapanda kukumbukira inu; ndikapanda kusankha Yerusalemu koposa chimwemwe changa chopambana." 
Psalms137:7 Yehova, kumbukirani ana a Edomu tsiku la Yerusalemu; amene adati, Gamulani, gamulani, kufikira maziko ake." 
Psalms137:8 Mwana wamkazi wa ku Babiloni, iwe amene udzapasulidwa; wodala iye amene adzakubwezera chilango monga umo unatichitira ife." 
Psalms137:9 Wodala iye amene adzagwira makanda ako, ndi kuwaphwanya pathanthwe." 
Psalms138:1 Salimo la Davide. Ndidzakuyamikani ndi mtima wanga wonse; ndidzaimba zakukulemekezani patsogolo pa milungu. 
Psalms138:2 Ndidzagwadira kuloza ku Kachisi wanu woyera, ndi kuyamika dzina lanu, chifukwa cha chifundo chanu ndi choonadi chanu; popeza munakuzitsa mau anu koposa dzina lanu lonse." 
Psalms138:3 Tsiku loitana ine, munandiyankha, munandilimbitsa ndi mphamvu m'moyo mwanga." 
Psalms138:4 Mafumu onse a pa dziko lapansi adzakuyamikani, Yehova, popeza adamva mau a pakamwa panu." 
Psalms138:5 Ndipo adzaimbira njira za Yehova; pakuti ulemerero wa Yehova ndi waukulu. 
Psalms138:6 Angakhale Yehova ngwokwezeka, apenyanso wopepukayo; koma wodzikuza amdziwira kutali." 
Psalms138:7 Ndingakhale ndiyenda pakati pa nsautso, mudzandipatsa moyo; mudzatambasula dzanja lanu pa mkwiyo wa adani anu, ndipo dzanja lanu lamanja lidzandipulumutsa." 
Psalms138:8 Yehova adzanditsirizira za kwa ine: Chifundo chanu, Yehova, chifikira kunthawi zonse: Musasiye ntchito za manja anu." 
Psalms139:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Munandisanthula, Yehova, nimundidziwa." 
Psalms139:2 Inu mudziwa kukhala kwanga ndi kuuka kwanga, muzindikira lingaliro langa muli kutali." 
Psalms139:3 Muyesa popita ine ndi pogona ine, ndi njira zanga zonse muzolowerana nazo." 
Psalms139:4 Pakuti asanafike mau pa lilime langa, taonani, Yehova, muwadziwa onse." 
Psalms139:5 Munandizinga kumbuyo ndi kumaso, nimunaika dzanja lanu pa ine." 
Psalms139:6 Kudziwa ichi kundilaka ndi kundidabwitsa: Kundikhalira patali, sindifikirako." 
Psalms139:7 Ndidzapita kuti kuzembera mzimu wanu? Kapena ndidzathawira kuti kuzembera nkhope yanu? 
Psalms139:8 Ndikakwera kunka kumwamba, muli komweko; kapena ndikadziyalira ku Gehena, taonani, muli komweko." 
Psalms139:9 Ndikadzitengera mapiko a mbandakucha, ndi kukhala ku malekezero a nyanja;" 
Psalms139:10 kungakhale komweko dzanja lanu lidzanditsogolera, nilidzandigwira dzanja lanu lamanja." 
Psalms139:11 Ndipo ndikati, Koma mdima undiphimbe, ndi kuunika kondizinga kukhale usiku." 
Psalms139:12 Ungakhale mdima sudetsa pamaso panu, koma usiku uwala ngati usana; mdima ukunga kuunika." 
Psalms139:13 Pakuti Inu munalenga impso zanga; munandiumba ndisanabadwe ine. 
Psalms139:14 Ndikuyamikani chifukwa kuti chipangidwe changa nchoopsa ndi chodabwitsa; ntchito zanu nzodabwitsa; moyo wanga uchidziwa ichi bwino ndithu. 
Psalms139:15 Thupi langa silinabisikira Inu popangidwa ine mobisika, poombedwa ine monga m'munsi mwake mwa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms139:16 Ndisanaumbidwe ine maso anu anandipenya, ziwalo zanga zonse zinalembedwa m'buku mwanu, masiku akuti ziumbidwe, pakalibe chimodzi cha izo." 
Psalms139:17 Potero, Mulungu, ndiziyesa zolingalira zanu za mtengo wake ndithu! Mawerengedwe ake ndi ambirimbiri!" 
Psalms139:18 Ndikaziwerenga zichuluka koposa mchenga: Ndikauka ndikhalanso nanu. 
Psalms139:19 Indedi, mudzaomba woipa, Mulungu: Ndipo amuna inu okhumba mwazi, chokani kwa ine." 
Psalms139:20 Popeza anena za Inu moipa, ndi adani anu atchula dzina lanu mwachabe." 
Psalms139:21 Kodi sindidana nao iwo akudana ndi Inu, Yehova? Ndipo kodi sindimva nao chisoni iwo akuukira Inu?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndidana nao ndi udani weniweni, ndiwayesa adani." 
Psalms139:23 Mundisanthule, Mulungu, nimudziwe mtima wanga; mundiyese nimudziwe zolingalira zanga." 
Psalms139:24 Ndipo mupenye ngati ndili nao mayendedwe oipa, nimunditsogolere pa njira yosatha." 
Psalms140:1 Kwa Mkulu wa Nyimbo; Salimo la Davide. Ndilanditseni, Yehova, kwa munthu woipa; ndisungeni kwa munthu wachiwawa;" 
Psalms140:2 amene adzipanga zoipa mumtima mwao; masiku onse amemeza nkhondo. 
Psalms140:3 Anola lilime lao ngati njoka; pansi pa milomo yao pali ululu wa mphiri. 
Psalms140:4 Ndilindireni Yehova, ndisalowe m'manja mwa woipa; ndisungeni kwa munthu wachiwawa; kwa iwo akuti akankhe mapazi anga." 
Psalms140:5 Odzikuza ananditchera msampha, nandibisira zingwe; anatcha ukonde m'mphepete mwa njira; ananditchera makwekwe." 
Psalms140:6 Ndinati kwa Yehova, Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga; munditcherere khutu mau a kupemba kwanga, Yehova." 
Psalms140:7 Yehova Ambuye, ndinu mphamvu ya chipulumutso changa, munandiphimba mutu wanga tsiku lakulimbana nkhondo." 
Psalms140:8 Yehova, musampatse woipa zokhumba iye; musamthandize zodzipanga zake; angadzikuze." 
Psalms140:9 Kunena za mutu wao wa iwo akundizinga, choipa cha milomo yao chiwaphimbe." 
Psalms140:10 Makala amoto awagwere; aponyedwe kumoto; m'maenje ozama, kuti asaukenso." 
Psalms140:11 Munthu wamlomo sadzakhazikika pa dziko lapansi; choipa chidzamsaka munthu wachiwawa kuti chimgwetse. 
Psalms140:12 Ndidziwa kuti Yehova adzanenera wozunzika mlandu, ndi kuweruzira aumphawi." 
Psalms140:13 Indedi, olungama adzayamika dzina lanu; oongoka mtima adzakhala pamaso panu." 
Psalms141:1 Salimo la Davide. Yehova, ndaitana kwa Inu; ndifulumireni ine; munditcherere khutu, pamene ndiitana kwa Inu." 
Psalms141:2 Pemphero langa liikike ngati chofukiza pamaso panu; kukweza manja anga kuikike ngati nsembe ya madzulo. 
Psalms141:3 Muike mdindo pakamwa panga, Yehova; sungani pakhomo pa milomo yanga." 
Psalms141:4 Mtima wanga usalinge kuchinthu choipa, kuchita ntchito zoipa ndi anthu akuchita zopanda pake; ndipo ndisadye zankhuli zao." 
Psalms141:5 Akandipanda munthu wolungama ndidzati nchifundo: akandidzudzula, ndidzakuyesa mafuta a pamutu; mutu wanga usakane: Pakuti pangakhale posautsidwa iwo ndidzawapempherera." 
Psalms141:6 Oweruza ao anagwetseka pambali pa thanthwe; nadzamva mau anga kuti ndiwo okondweretsa. 
Psalms141:7 Mafupa athu amwazika pakamwa pa manda, monga ngati akumba nanyimphula nthaka yapansi." 
Psalms141:8 Pakuti maso anga apenya kwanu, Yehova Ambuye; ndithawira kwa Inu; musataye moyo wanga." 
Psalms141:9 Mundisunge ndisagwe mumsampha ananditcherawo, ndisakodwe m'makwekwe a iwo ochita zopanda pake." 
Psalms141:10 Oipa agwe pamodzi m'maukonde ao, kufikira nditapitirira ine." 
Psalms142:1 Chilangizo cha Davide, muja anakhala m'phanga; Pemphero. Ndifuula nalo liu langa kwa Yehova; ndi mau anga ndipemba kwa Yehova." 
Psalms142:2 Nditsanulira kudandaula kwanga pamaso pake; ndionetsa msauko wanga pamaso pake. 
Psalms142:3 Pamene mzimu wanga unakomoka m'kati mwanga, munadziwa njira yanga. M'njira ndiyendamo ananditchera msampha." 
Psalms142:4 Penyani kudzanja lamanja ndipo muone; palibe wondidziwa; pothawirapo pandisowa; palibe mmodzi wosamalira moyo wanga. 
Psalms142:5 Ndinafuulira kwa inu, Yehova; ndinati, Inu ndinu pothawirapo panga, gawo langa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Psalms142:6 Tamverani kufuula kwanga; popeza ndisauka kwambiri; ndilanditseni kwa iwo akundilondola; popeza andilaka. 
Psalms142:7 Tulutsani moyo wanga m'ndende, kuti ndiyamike dzina lanu; olungama adzandizinga; pakuti mudzandichitira zokoma." 
Psalms143:1 Salimo la Davide. Imvani pemphero langa, Yehova; nditcherere khutu kupemba kwanga; ndiyankheni mwa chikhulupiriko chanu, mwa chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms143:2 Ndipo musaitane mlandu wa mtumiki wanu; pakuti pamaso panu sipadzakhala wolungama wamoyo mmodzi yense. 
Psalms143:3 Pakuti mdani alondola moyo wanga; apondereza pansi moyo wanga; andikhalitsa mumdima monga iwo adafa kale lomwe. 
Psalms143:4 Potero mzimu wanga wakomoka mwa ine; mtima wanga utenga nkhawa m'kati mwanga. 
Psalms143:5 Ndikumbukira masiku a kale lomwe; zija mudazichita ndilingirirapo; ndikamba pandekha za ntchito ya manja anu. 
Psalms143:6 Nditambalitsira manja anga kwa Inu: Moyo wanga ulira Inu monga dziko lolira mvula. 
Psalms143:7 Fulumirani ndiyankheni, Yehova; mzimu wanga ukutha. Musandibisire nkhope yanu; ndingafanane nao akutsikira kudzenje." 
Psalms143:8 Mundimvetse chifundo chanu mamawa; popeza ndikhulupirira Inu: Mundidziwitse njira ndiyendemo; popeza ndikweza moyo wanga kwa Inu. 
Psalms143:9 Mundilanditse kwa adani anga, Yehova; ndibisala mwa Inu." 
Psalms143:10 Mundiphunzitse chokonda Inu; popeza Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga; Mzimu wanu ndi wokoma; munditsogolere kuchidikha. 
Psalms143:11 Mundipatse moyo, Yehova, chifukwa cha dzina lanu; mwa chilungamo chanu mutulutse moyo wanga m'sautso." 
Psalms143:12 Ndipo mwa chifundo chanu mundidulire adani anga, ndipo muononge onse akusautsa moyo wanga; pakuti ine ndine mtumiki wanu." 
Psalms144:1 Salimo la Davide. Wolemekezeka Yehova thanthwe langa, wakuphunzitsa manja anga achite nkhondo, zala zanga zigwirane nao:" 
Psalms144:2 Ndiye chifundo changa, ndi linga langa, msanje wanga, ndi Mpulumutsi wanga; chikopa changa, ndi Iye amene ndimtama; amene andigonjetsera anthu anga." 
Psalms144:3 Yehova, munthu ndani kuti mumdziwa? Mwana wa munthu kuti mumsamalira?" 
Psalms144:4 Munthu akunga mpweya; masiku ake akunga mthunzi wopitirira. 
Psalms144:5 Weramutsani thambo lanu, Yehova, nimutsike: Khudzani mapiri ndipo adzafuka." 
Psalms144:6 Ng'animitsani mphezi, ndi kuwabalalitsa; tumizani mivi yanu, ndi kuwapirikitsa." 
Psalms144:7 Tulutsani manja anu kuchokera m'mwamba; ndikwatuleni ndi kundilanditsa kumadzi aakulu, kudzanja la alendo;" 
Psalms144:8 amene pakamwa pao alankhula zachabe, ndi dzanja lao lamanja ndilo dzanja lachinyengo." 
Psalms144:9 Ndidzakuimbirani nyimbo yatsopano, Mulungu; pa chisakasa cha zingwe khumi ndidzaimbira zakukulemekezani." 
Psalms144:10 Ndiye amene apatsa mafumu chipulumutso: Amene alanditsa Davide mtumiki wake kulupanga loipa. 
Psalms144:11 Ndilanditseni ndi kundipulumutsa kudzanja la alendo, amene pakamwa pao alankhula zachabe, ndi dzanja lao lamanja ndilo dzanja lachinyengo." 
Psalms144:12 Kuti ana athu amuna akhale ngati mmera udakula usanakhwime; ana athu akazi ngati nsanamira za kungodya, zosema zikometsere nyumba ya mfumu." 
Psalms144:13 Kuti nkhokwe zathu zidzale, kutipatsa za mitundumitundu; ndi kuti nkhosa zathu ziswane zikwizikwi, inde zikwi khumi kubusako." 
Psalms144:14 Kuti ng'ombe zathu zikhale zosenza katundu; ndi kuti pasakhale kupasula linga kapena kutulukamo, pasakhalenso kufuula m'makwalala athu." 
Psalms144:15 Odala anthu akuona zotere; odala anthu amene Mulungu wao ndi Yehova. 
Psalms145:1 Salimo lolemekeza; la Davide. Ndidzakukwezani Mulungu wanga, Mfumu; ndipo ndidzalemekeza dzina lanu kunthawi za nthawi." 
Psalms145:2 Masiku onse ndidzakuyamikani; ndi kulemekeza dzina lanu kunthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms145:3 Yehova ndi wamkulu, nayenera kulemekezedwa kwakukulu; ndi ukulu wake ngwosasanthulika." 
Psalms145:4 Mbadwo wina udzalemekezera ntchito zanu mbadwo unzake, ndipo udzalalikira zamphamvu zanu." 
Psalms145:5 Ndidzalingalira ulemerero waukulu wa ulemu wanu, ndi ntchito zanu zodabwitsa." 
Psalms145:6 Ndipo adzanenera mphamvu za ntchito zanu zoopsa; ndi ukulu wanu ndidzaufotokozera. 
Psalms145:7 Adzabukitsa chikumbukiro cha ubwino wanu waukulu, nadzaimbira chilungamo chanu." 
Psalms145:8 Yehova ndiye wachisomo, ndi wachifundo; osakwiya msanga, ndi wa chifundo chachikulu." 
Psalms145:9 Yehova achitira chokoma onse; ndi nsoni zokoma zake zigwera ntchito zake zonse. 
Psalms145:10 Ntchito zanu zonse zidzakuyamikani, Yehova; ndi okondedwa anu adzakulemekezani." 
Psalms145:11 Adzanenera ulemerero wa ufumu wanu, adzalankhulira mphamvu yanu." 
Psalms145:12 Kudziwitsa ana a anthu zamphamvu zake, ndi ulemerero waukulu wa ufumu wake." 
Psalms145:13 Ufumu wanu ndiwo ufumu womka muyaya, ndi kuweruza kwanu kufikira mibadwo yonseyonse." 
Psalms145:14 Yehova agwiriziza onse akugwa, naongoletsa onse owerama." 
Psalms145:15 Maso a onse ayembekeza Inu; ndipo muwapatsa chakudya chao m'nyengo zao. 
Psalms145:16 Muolowetsa dzanja lanu, nimukwaniritsira zamoyo zonse chokhumba chao." 
Psalms145:17 Yehova ali wolungama m'njira zake zonse, ndi wachifundo m'ntchito zake zonse." 
Psalms145:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi onse akuitanira kwa Iye, onse akuitanira kwa Iye m'choonadi." 
Psalms145:19 Adzachita chokhumba iwo akumuopa; nadzamva kufuula kwao, nadzawapulumutsa." 
Psalms145:20 Yehova asunga onse akukondana naye; koma oipa onse adzawaononga. 
Psalms145:21 Pakamwa panga padzanena chilemekezo cha Yehova; ndi zinthu zonse zilemekeze dzina lake loyera kunthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms146:1 Aleluya; Ulemekeze Yehova, moyo wanga." 
Psalms146:2 Ndidzalemekeza Yehova m'moyo mwanga; ndidzaimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wanga pokhala ndi moyo ine. 
Psalms146:3 Musamakhulupirira zinduna, kapena mwana wa munthu, amene mulibe chipulumutso mwa iye." 
Psalms146:4 Mpweya wake uchoka, abwerera kunka kunthaka yake; tsiku lomwelo zotsimikiza mtima zake zitayika." 
Psalms146:5 Wodala munthu amene akhala naye Mulungu wa Yakobo kuti amthandize, chiyembekezo chake chili pa Yehova, Mulungu wake." 
Psalms146:6 Amene analenga zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, nyanja ndi zonse zili m'mwemo. Ndiye wakusunga choonadi kosatha," 
Psalms146:7 ndiye wakuchitira chiweruzo osautsika; ndiye wakupatsa anjala chakudya; Yehova amasula akaidi. 
Psalms146:8 Yehova apenyetsa osaona; Yehova aongoletsa onse owerama; Yehova akonda olungama. 
Psalms146:9 Yehova asunga alendo; agwiriziza mwana wamasiye ndi mkazi wamasiye; koma akhotetsa njira ya oipa. 
Psalms146:10 Yehova adzachita ufumu kosatha, Mulungu wako, Ziyoni, ku mibadwomibadwo. Aleluya." 
Psalms147:1 Aleluya; Pakuti kuimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wathu nkokoma; pakuti chikondwetsa ichi, chilemekezo chiyenera." 
Psalms147:2 Yehova amanga Yerusalemu; asokolotsa otayika a Israele. 
Psalms147:3 Achiritsa osweka mtima, namanga mabala ao." 
Psalms147:4 Awerenga nyenyezi momwe zili; azitcha maina zonsezi. 
Psalms147:5 Ambuye wathu ndi wamkulu ndi wa mphamvu zambiri; nzeru yake njosatha. 
Psalms147:6 Yehova agwiriziza ofatsa; atsitsira oipa pansi. 
Psalms147:7 Yamikani Yehova ndi kuthira mang'ombe; muimbireni Mulungu wathu zomlemekeza pazeze: 
Psalms147:8 Amene aphimba thambo ndi mitambo, amene akonzera mvula nthaka, amene aphukitsa msipu pamapiri." 
Psalms147:9 Amene apatsa zoweta chakudya chao, ana a khungubwi alikulira." 
Psalms147:10 Mphamvu ya kavalo siimkonda: Sakondwera nayo miyendo ya munthu. 
Psalms147:11 Yehova akondwera nao akumuopa Iye, iwo akuyembekeza chifundo chake." 
Psalms147:12 Yerusalemu, lemekezani Yehova; Ziyoni, lemekezani Mulungu wanu." 
Psalms147:13 Popeza analimbitsa mipiringidzo ya zitseko zanu: Anadalitsa ana anu m'kati mwanu. 
Psalms147:14 Ndiye amene akhalitsa malire anu mumtendere; akukhutitsani ndi tirigu wakucha bwino. 
Psalms147:15 Atumiza lamulo lake kudziko lapansi; mau ake athamanga liwiro. 
Psalms147:16 Apatsa chipale chofewa ngati ubweya; awaza chisanu ngati phulusa. 
Psalms147:17 Aponya matalala ake ngati zidutsu: Adzaima ndani pa kuzizira kwake? 
Psalms147:18 Atumiza mau ake nazisungunula; aombetsa mphepo yake, ayenda madzi ake." 
Psalms147:19 Aonetsa mau ake kwa Yakobo; malemba ake, ndi maweruzo ake kwa Israele." 
Psalms147:20 Sanatero nao anthu a mtundu wina; ndipo za maweruzo ake, sanawadziwe. Aleluya." 
Psalms148:1 Aleluya. Lemekezani Yehova kochokera kumwamba; mlemekezeni m'misanje. 
Psalms148:2 Mlemekezeni, angelo ake onse; mlemekezeni, makamu ake onse." 
Psalms148:3 Mlemekezeni, dzuwa ndi mwezi; mlemekezeni, nyenyezi zonse zounikira." 
Psalms148:4 Mlemekezeni, m'mwambamwamba, ndi madzi inu, a pamwamba pa thambo." 
Psalms148:5 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; popeza analamulira, ndipo zinalengedwa." 
Psalms148:6 Anazikhazikanso kunthawi za nthawi; anazipatsa chilamulo chosatumphika. 
Psalms148:7 Lemekezani Yehova kochokera ku dziko lapansi, zinsomba inu, ndi malo ozama onse;" 
Psalms148:8 moto ndi matalala, chipale chofewa ndi nkhungu; mphepo ya namondwe, yakuchita mau ake;" 
Psalms148:9 mapiri ndi zitunda zonse; mitengo yazipatso ndi yamikungudza yonse: 
Psalms148:10 Nyama za kuthengo ndi zoweta zonse; zokwawa, ndi mbalame zakuuluka." 
Psalms148:11 Mafumu a padziko ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu; zinduna ndi oweruza onse a padziko. 
Psalms148:12 Anyamata ndiponso anamwali; okalamba pamodzi ndi ana. 
Psalms148:13 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; pakuti dzina lake lokha ndi lokwezeka; ulemerero wake uli pamwamba pa dziko lapansi ndi thambo. 
Psalms148:14 Ndipo anakweza nyanga ya anthu ake, chilemekezo cha okondedwa ake onse; ndiwo ana a Israele, anthu a pafupi pa Iye. Aleluya." 
Psalms149:1 Aleluya, Muimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano, ndi chilemekezo chake mu msonkhano wa okondedwa ake." 
Psalms149:2 Akondwere Israele mwa Iye amene anamlenga; ana a Ziyoni asekere mwa mfumu yao. 
Psalms149:3 Alemekeze dzina lake ndi kuthira mang'ombe; amuimbire zomlemekeza ndi lingaka ndi zeze. 
Psalms149:4 Popeza Yehova akondwera nao anthu ake; adzakometsa ofatsa ndi chipulumutso. 
Psalms149:5 Okondedwa ake atumphe mokondwera m'ulemu: Afuule mokondwera pamakama pao. 
Psalms149:6 Nyimbo zakukweza Mulungu zikhale pakamwa pao, ndi lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse m'dzanja lao;" 
Psalms149:7 kubwezera chilango akunja, ndi kulanga mitundu ya anthu;" 
Psalms149:8 kumanga mafumu ao ndi maunyolo, ndi omveka ao ndi majerejede achitsulo," 
Psalms149:9 kuwachitira chiweruzo cholembedwacho. Ulemu wa okondedwa ake onse ndi uwu. Aleluya. 
Psalms150:1 Aleluya. Lemekezani Mulungu m'malo ake oyera; mlemekezeni m'thambo la mphamvu yake. 
Psalms150:2 Mlemekezeni chifukwa cha ntchito zake zolimba; mlemekezeni monga mwa ukulu wake waunjinji. 
Psalms150:3 Mlemekezeni ndi kulira kwa lipenga; mlemekezeni ndi chisakasa ndi zeze. 
Psalms150:4 Mlemekezeni ndi lingaka ndi kuthira mang'ombe: Mlemekezeni ndi zoimbira za zingwe ndi chitoliro. 
Psalms150:5 Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zomveka: Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zoliritsa. 
Psalms150:6 Zonse zakupuma zilemekeze Yehova. Aleluya. 
Proverbs1:1 Miyambo ya Solomoni mwana wa Davide, mfumu ya Israele." 
Proverbs1:2 Kudziwa nzeru ndi mwambo; kuzindikira mau ozindikiritsa; 
Proverbs1:3 kulandira mwambo wakusamalira machitidwe, chilungamo, chiweruzo ndi zolunjika;" 
Proverbs1:4 kuchenjeza achibwana, kuphunzitsa mnyamata kudziwa ndi kulingalira;" 
Proverbs1:5 kuti wanzeru amve, naonjezere kuphunzira; ndi kuti wozindikira afikire kuuphungu;" 
Proverbs1:6 kuzindikira mwambi ndi tanthauzo lake, mau a anzeru, ndi zophiphiritsa zao." 
Proverbs1:7 Kuopa Yehova ndiko chiyambi cha kudziwa; opusa anyoza nzeru ndi mwambo. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwananga, tamva mwambo wa atate wako, ndi kusasiya chilangizo cha amai ako;" 
Proverbs1:9 pakuti izi ndi korona wa chisomo pamtu pako, ndi mkanda pakhosi pako." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwananga, akakukopa ochimwa usalole." 
Proverbs1:11 Akanena, Idza nafe, tibisalire mwazi, tilalire osachimwa opanda chifukwa;" 
Proverbs1:12 tiwameze ali ndi moyo ngati manda, ali amphumphu, ngati akutsikira kudzenje;" 
Proverbs1:13 tidzapeza chuma chonse cha mtengo wake, tidzadzaza nyumba zathu ndi zofunkha;" 
Proverbs1:14 udzachita nafe maere, tonse tidzakhala ndi chotengeramo chimodzi." 
Proverbs1:15 Mwananga, usayende nao m'njira; letsa phazi lako ku mayendedwe ao;" 
Proverbs1:16 pakuti mapazi ao athamangira zoipa, afulumira kukhetsa mwazi." 
Proverbs1:17 Pakuti kutchera msampha pamaso pa mbalame ndi chabe; 
Proverbs1:18 ndipo awa abisalira mwazi waowao, alalira miyoyo yaoyao." 
Proverbs1:19 Mayendedwe a yense wopindula chuma monyenga ngotere; chilanda moyo wa eni ake. 
Proverbs1:20 Nzeru ifuula panja; imveketsa mau ake pabwalo; 
Proverbs1:21 iitana posonkhana anthu polowera pachipata; m'mudzi inena mau ake," 
Proverbs1:22 Kodi mudzakonda zazibwana kufikira liti, achibwana inu? Onyoza ndi kukonda kunyoza, opusa ndi kuda nzeru?" 
Proverbs1:23 Tembenukani pamene ndikudzudzulani; taonani, nditsanulira pa inu mzimu wanga, ndikudziwitsani mau anga." 
Proverbs1:24 Chifukwa ndaitana, ndipo munakana; ndatambasula dzanja langa, ndipo panalibe analabadira;" 
Proverbs1:25 koma munapeputsa uphungu wanga wonse, ndi kukana kudzudzula kwanga." 
Proverbs1:26 Inetu ndidzachitira chiphwete tsoka lanu, ndidzatonyola pakudza mantha anu;" 
Proverbs1:27 pakudza mantha anu ngati mphepo yopasula, ndi pofika tsoka lanu ngati kamvulumvulu; pakudza kwa inu vuto ndi nsautso." 
Proverbs1:28 Pamenepo adzandiitana, koma sindidzavomera; adzandifunatu, osandipeza ai;" 
Proverbs1:29 chifukwa anada nzeru, sanafune kuopa Yehova;" 
Proverbs1:30 anakana uphungu wanga, nanyoza kudzudzula kwanga konse;" 
Proverbs1:31 momwemo adzadya zipatso za mayendedwe ao, nadzakhuta zolingalira zao." 
Proverbs1:32 Pakuti kubwerera m'mbuyo kwa achibwana kudzawapha; ndipo mphwai za opusa zidzawaononga. 
Proverbs1:33 Koma wondimvera ine adzakhala osatekeseka, nadzakhala phee osaopa zoipa." 
Proverbs2:1 Mwananga, ukalandira mau anga, ndi kusunga malamulo anga;" 
Proverbs2:2 kutcherera makutu ako kunzeru, kulozetsa mtima wako kukuzindikira;" 
Proverbs2:3 ukaitananso luntha, ndi kufuulira kuti ukazindikire;" 
Proverbs2:4 ukaifunafuna ngati siliva, ndi kuipwaira ngati chuma chobisika;" 
Proverbs2:5 pompo udzazindikira kuopa Yehova ndi kumdziwadi Mulungu. 
Proverbs2:6 Pakuti Yehova apatsa nzeru; kudziwa ndi kuzindikira kutuluka m'kamwa mwake. 
Proverbs2:7 Iye asungira oongoka mtima nzeru yeniyeni; ndiye chikopa cha oyenda molunjika; 
Proverbs2:8 kuti atchinjirize njira za chiweruzo, nadikire khwalala la opatulidwa ake." 
Proverbs2:9 Pamenepo udzazindikira chilungamo ndi chiweruzo, zolunjika ndi mayendedwe onse abwino." 
Proverbs2:10 Pakuti nzeru idzalowa m'mtima mwako, moyo wako udzakondwera ndi kudziwa," 
Proverbs2:11 kulingalira kudzakudikira, kuzindikira kudzakutchinjiriza;" 
Proverbs2:12 kukupulumutsa kunjira yoipa, kwa anthu onena zokhota;" 
Proverbs2:13 akusiya mayendedwe olungama, akayende m'njira za mdima;" 
Proverbs2:14 omwe asangalala pochita zoipa, nakondwera ndi zokhota zoipa;" 
Proverbs2:15 amene apotoza njira zao, nakhotetsa mayendedwe ao." 
Proverbs2:16 Nzeru idzakupulumutsa kwa mkazi wachiwerewere, kwa mkazi wachilendo wosyasyalika ndi mau ake;" 
Proverbs2:17 wosiya bwenzi la ubwana wake, naiwala chipangano cha Mulungu wake." 
Proverbs2:18 Nyumba yake itsikira kuimfa, ndi mayendedwe ake kwa akufa;" 
Proverbs2:19 onse akunka kwa iye sabweranso, safika kunjira za moyo;" 
Proverbs2:20 nzeru idzakuyendetsa m'njira ya anthu abwino, kuti usunge mayendedwe a olungama." 
Proverbs2:21 Pakuti oongoka mtima adzakhala m'dziko, angwiro nadzatsalamo." 
Proverbs2:22 Koma oipa adzalikhidwa m'dziko, achiwembu adzazulidwamo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwananga, usaiwale malamulo anga, mtima wako usunge malangizo anga;" 
Proverbs3:2 pakuti adzakuonjezera masiku ambiri, ndi zaka za moyo ndi mtendere." 
Proverbs3:3 Chifundo ndi choonadi zisakusiye; uzimange pakhosi pako; uzilembe pamtima pako; 
Proverbs3:4 motero udzapeza chisomo ndi nzeru yabwino, pamaso pa Mulungu ndi anthu." 
Proverbs3:5 Khulupirira Yehova ndi mtima wako wonse, osachirikizika pa luntha lako;" 
Proverbs3:6 umlemekeze m'njira zako zonse, ndipo Iye adzaongola mayendedwe ako." 
Proverbs3:7 Usadziyese wekha wanzeru; opa Yehova, nupatuke pazoipa;" 
Proverbs3:8 mitsempha yako idzalandirapo moyo, ndi mafupa ako uwisi." 
Proverbs3:9 Lemekeza Yehova ndi chuma chako, ndi zinthu zako zonse zoyambirira kucha;" 
Proverbs3:10 motero nkhokwe zako zidzangoti thee, mbiya zako zidzasefuka vinyo." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwananga, usapeputse mwambo wa Yehova, ngakhale kutopa ndi kudzudzula kwake;" 
Proverbs3:12 pakuti Yehova adzudzula omwe awakonda; monga atate mwana amene akondwera naye. 
Proverbs3:13 Wodala ndi wopeza nzeru, ndi woona luntha;" 
Proverbs3:14 pakuti malonda a nzeru aposa malonda a siliva, phindu lake liposa golide woyengeka." 
Proverbs3:15 Mtengo wake uposa ngale; ndipo zonse zikukondweretsa sizilingana naye. 
Proverbs3:16 Masiku ambiri ali m'dzanja lamanja lake; chuma ndi ulemu m'dzanja lake lamanzere. 
Proverbs3:17 Njira zake zili zokondweretsa, mayendedwe ake onse ndiwo mtendere." 
Proverbs3:18 Ndiyo mtengo wa moyo wa akuigwira; wakuiumirira ngwodala. 
Proverbs3:19 Yehova anakhazika dziko ndi nzeru; naika zamwamba ndi luntha. 
Proverbs3:20 Zakuya zinang'ambika ndi kudziwa kwake; thambo ligwetsa mame. 
Proverbs3:21 Mwananga, zisachokere kumaso ako; sunga nzeru yeniyeni ndi kulingalira;" 
Proverbs3:22 ndipo mtima wako udzatengapo moyo, ndi khosi lako chisomo." 
Proverbs3:23 Pompo udzayenda m'njira yako osaopa, osaphunthwa phazi lako." 
Proverbs3:24 Ukagona, sudzachita mantha; udzagona tulo tokondweretsa." 
Proverbs3:25 Usaope zoopsa zodzidzimutsa, ngakhale zikadza zopasula oipa;" 
Proverbs3:26 pakuti Yehova adzalimbitsa mtima wako, nadzasunga phazi lako lingakodwe." 
Proverbs3:27 Oyenera kulandira zabwino usawamane; pokhoza dzanja lako kuwachitira zabwino. 
Proverbs3:28 Usanene kwa mnzako, Ukabwerenso, ndipo mawa ndidzakupatsa; pokhala uli nako kanthu." 
Proverbs3:29 Usapangire mnzako chiwembu; popeza akhala nawe pafupi osatekeseka. 
Proverbs3:30 Usakangane ndi munthu chabe, ngati sanakuchitire choipa." 
Proverbs3:31 Usachitire nsanje munthu wachiwawa; usasankhe njira yake iliyonse. 
Proverbs3:32 Pakuti wamphulupulu anyansa Yehova; koma chinsinsi chake chili ndi oongoka. 
Proverbs3:33 Yehova atemberera za m'nyumba ya woipa; koma adalitsa mokhalamo olungama. 
Proverbs3:34 Anyozadi akunyoza, koma apatsa akufatsa chisomo." 
Proverbs3:35 Anzeru adzalandira ulemu cholowa chao; koma opusa adzakweza manyazi. 
Proverbs4:1 Ananu, mverani mwambo wa atate, nimutchere makutu mukadziwe luntha;" 
Proverbs4:2 pakuti ndikuphunzitsani zabwino; musasiye chilangizo changa. 
Proverbs4:3 Pakuti ndinali mwana kwa atate wanga, wokondedwa ndi mai, ndine ndekha, sanabale wina." 
Proverbs4:4 Atate nandiphunzitsa, nati kwa ine, mtima wako uumirire mau anga; sunga malamulo anga, nukhale ndi moyo." 
Proverbs4:5 Tenga nzeru, tenga luntha; usaiwale, usapatuke pa mau a m'kamwa mwanga;" 
Proverbs4:6 usasiye nzeru, ndipo idzakusunga; uikonde, idzakutchinjiriza." 
Proverbs4:7 Nzeru ipambana, tatenga nzeru; m'kutenga kwako konseko utenge luntha." 
Proverbs4:8 Uilemekeze, ndipo idzakukweza; idzakutengera ulemu pamene uifungatira." 
Proverbs4:9 Idzaika chisada cha chisomo pamtu pako; idzakupatsa korona wokongola. 
Proverbs4:10 Tamvera mwananga, nulandire mau anga; ndipo zaka za moyo wako zidzachuluka." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndakuphunzitsa m'njira ya nzeru, ndakuyendetsa m'mayendedwe olungama." 
Proverbs4:12 Mapazi ako sadzaombana ulikuyenda; ukathamanga, sudzaphunthwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Gwira mwambo, osauleka; uusunge; pakuti ndiwo moyo wako." 
Proverbs4:14 Usalowe m'mayendedwe ochimwa, usayende m'njira ya oipa." 
Proverbs4:15 Pewapo, osapitamo; patukapo, nupitirire." 
Proverbs4:16 Pakuti akapanda kuchita zoipa, samagona; ndipo akapanda kukhumudwitsa wina, tulo tao tiwachokera." 
Proverbs4:17 Pakuti amadya chakudya cha uchimo, namwa vinyo wa chifwamba." 
Proverbs4:18 Koma mayendedwe a olungama akunga kuunika kwa mbandakucha, kunkabe kuwala kufikira usana woti mbee." 
Proverbs4:19 Njira ya oipa ikunga mdima; sadziwa chimene chiwaphunthwitsa. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwananga, tamvera mau anga; tcherera makutu ku zonena zanga." 
Proverbs4:21 Asachoke kumaso ako; uwasunge m'kati mwa mtima wako. 
Proverbs4:22 Pakuti ali moyo kwa omwe awapeza, nalamitsa thupi lao lonse." 
Proverbs4:23 Chinjiriza mtima wako koposa zonse uzisunga; pakuti magwero a moyo atulukamo. 
Proverbs4:24 Tasiya m'kamwa mokhota, uike patali milomo yopotoka." 
Proverbs4:25 Maso ako ayang'ane m'tsogolo, zikope zako zipenye moongoka." 
Proverbs4:26 Sinkasinkha bwino mayendedwe a mapazi ako; njira zako zonse zikonzeke. 
Proverbs4:27 Usapatuke kudzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere; suntha phazi lako kusiya zoipa. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwananga, mvera nzeru yanga; tcherera makutu ku luntha langa;" 
Proverbs5:2 ukasunge zolingalira, milomo yako ilabadire zomwe udziwa." 
Proverbs5:3 Pakuti milomo ya mkazi wachiwerewere ikukha uchi; m'kamwa mwake muti see koposa mafuta. 
Proverbs5:4 Chimaliziro chake nchowawa ngati chivumulo, ndi chakuthwa ngati lupanga lakuthawa konsekonse." 
Proverbs5:5 Mayendedwe ake atsikira kuimfa; mapazi ake aumirira kumanda; 
Proverbs5:6 sasinkhasinkha bwino za njira ya moyo; mayendedwe ake adzandira dzandidzandi osadziwa iye. 
Proverbs5:7 Ndipo tsopano ana, mundimvere, musapatuke ku mau a m'kamwa mwanga." 
Proverbs5:8 Siyanitsa njira yako kutali kwa iyeyo, osayandikira ku khomo la nyumba yake;" 
Proverbs5:9 kuti ungapereke ulemu wako kwa ena, ndi zaka zako kwa ankhanza;" 
Proverbs5:10 kuti mphamvu yako isakhutitse alendo, ndi kuti usagwire ntchito m'nyumba ya wachilendo;" 
Proverbs5:11 ungalire pa chimaliziro chako, pothera nyama yako ndi thupi lako;" 
Proverbs5:12 ndi kuti, Bwanji ndinada mwambo, mtima wanga ndi kunyoza chidzudzulo;" 
Proverbs5:13 ndipo sindinamvera mau a aphunzitsi anga; ngakhale kutcherera makutu kwa akundilanga mwambo! 
Proverbs5:14 Ndikadakhala m'zoipa zonse, m'kati mwa msonkhano ndi khamu la anthu." 
Proverbs5:15 Imwa madzi a m'chitsime mwako, ndi madzi oyenda a m'kasupe mwako." 
Proverbs5:16 Kodi magwero ako ayenera kumwazika kunja, ndi mitsinje ya madzi m'makwalala?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ikhale ya iwe wekha, si ya alendo okhala nawe ai." 
Proverbs5:18 Adalitsike kasupe wako; ukondwere ndi mkazi wokula nayo. 
Proverbs5:19 Ngati mbawala yokonda ndi chinkhoma chachisomo, maere ake akukwanire nthawi zonse; ukodwe ndi chikondi chake osaleka." 
Proverbs5:20 Pakuti ukondwerenji, mwananga, ndi mkazi wachiwerewere, ndi kufungatira chifuwa cha mkazi wachilendo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Pakuti njira za munthu zili pamaso pa Yehova, asinkhasinkha za mayendedwe ake onse." 
Proverbs5:22 Zoipa zakezake zidzagwira woipa; adzamangidwa ndi zingwe za uchimo wake. 
Proverbs5:23 Adzafa posowa mwambo; adzasochera popusa kwambiri. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwananga, ngati waperekera mnzako chikole, ngati wapangana kulipirira mlendo," 
Proverbs6:2 wakodwa ndi mau a m'kamwa mwako, wagwidwa ndi mau a m'kamwa mwako." 
Proverbs6:3 Chita ichi tsono; mwananga, nudzipulumutse; popeza walowa m'dzanja la mnzako, pita nudzichepetse, numdandaulire mnzako." 
Proverbs6:4 Usaone tulo m'maso mwako, ngakhale kuodzera zikope zako." 
Proverbs6:5 Dzipulumutse wekha ngati mphoyo kudzanja la msaki, ndi mbalame kudzanja la msodzi." 
Proverbs6:6 Pita kunyerere, waulesi iwe, penya njira zao nuchenjere;" 
Proverbs6:7 zilibe mfumu, ngakhale kapitao, ngakhale mkulu;" 
Proverbs6:8 koma zitengeratu zakudya zao m'malimwe; nizituta dzinthu zao m'masika. 
Proverbs6:9 Udzagona mpaka liti, waulesi iwe? Udzauka kutulo tako liti?" 
Proverbs6:10 Tulo ta pang'ono, kuodzera pang'ono, kungomanga manja pang'ono, ndi kugona;" 
Proverbs6:11 ndipo umphawi wako udzafika ngati mbala, ndi kusauka kwako ngati munthu wachikopa." 
Proverbs6:12 Munthu wopanda pake, mwamuna wamphulupulu; amayenda ndi m'kamwa mokhota." 
Proverbs6:13 Amatsinzinira ndi maso ake, napalasira ndi mapazi ake, amalankhula ndi zala zake;" 
Proverbs6:14 zopotoka zili m'mtima mwake, amaganizira zoipa osaleka; amapikisanitsa anthu." 
Proverbs6:15 Chifukwa chake tsoka lake lidzadza modzidzimuka; adzasweka msangamsanga, palibe chompulumutsa." 
Proverbs6:16 Zilipo zinthu zisanu ndi chimodzi Yehova azida; ngakhale zisanu ndi ziwiri zimnyansa: 
Proverbs6:17 Maso akunyada, lilime lonama, ndi manja akupha anthu osachimwa;" 
Proverbs6:18 mtima woganizira ziwembu zoipa, mapazi akuthamangira mphulupulu m'mangum'mangu;" 
Proverbs6:19 mboni yonama yonong'ona mabodza, ndi wopikisanitsa abale." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwananga, sunga malangizo a atate wako, usasiye malamulo a mai ako;" 
Proverbs6:21 uwamange pamtima pako osaleka; uwalunze pakhosi pako. 
Proverbs6:22 Adzakutsogolera ulikuyenda, ndi kukudikira uli m'tulo, ndi kulankhula nawe utauka." 
Proverbs6:23 Pakuti malangizo ndi nyali, malamulo ndi kuunika; ndi zidzudzulo za mwambo ndizo njira ya moyo." 
Proverbs6:24 Zikutchinjiriza kwa mkazi woipa, ndi kulilime losyasyalika la mkazi wachiwerewere." 
Proverbs6:25 Asakuchititse kaso m'mtima mwako, asakukole ndi zikope zake." 
Proverbs6:26 Pakuti ukayamba ndi mkazi wadama, udzamaliza ndi nyenyeswa; ndipo mkazi wa mwini amasaka moyo wa mtengo wapatali." 
Proverbs6:27 Kodi mwamuna angatenge moto pa chifuwa chake, osatentha zovala zake?" 
Proverbs6:28 Pena kodi mwamuna angayende pa makala oyaka, osapsa mapazi ake?" 
Proverbs6:29 Chomwecho wolowa kwa mkazi wa mnzake; womkhudzayo sadzapulumuka chilango. 
Proverbs6:30 Anthu sanyoza mbala ikaba, kuti ikhutitse mtima wake pomva njala;" 
Proverbs6:31 koma ikapezedwa idzabwezera kasanu ndi kawiri; idzapereka chuma chonse cha m'nyumba yake. 
Proverbs6:32 Wochita chigololo ndi mkazi alibe nzeru; wofuna kuononga moyo wakewake ndiye amatero. 
Proverbs6:33 Adzalasidwa nanyozedwa; chitonzo chake sichidzafafanizidwa. 
Proverbs6:34 Pakuti nsanje ndiyo ukali wa mwamuna, ndipo sadzachitira chifundo tsiku lobwezera chilango." 
Proverbs6:35 Sadzalabadira chiombolo chilichonse, sadzapembedzeka ngakhale uchulukitsa malipo." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwananga, sunga mau anga, ukundike malangizo anga," 
Proverbs7:2 Sunga malangizo anga, nukhale ndi moyo; ndi malamulo anga ngati mwana wa diso lako." 
Proverbs7:3 Uwamange pa zala zako, uwalembe pamtima pako." 
Proverbs7:4 Nena kwa nzeru, Ndiwe mlongo wanga; nutche luntha mbale wako." 
Proverbs7:5 Kuti zikutchinjirizire kwa mkazi wachiwerewere, kwa mlendo wamkazi wosyasyalika ndi mau ake." 
Proverbs7:6 Pakuti pa zenera la nyumba yanga ndinapenyera pamwamba pake; ndinaona pakati pa achibwana," 
Proverbs7:7 ndinazindikira pakati pa ang'ono mnyamata wopanda nzeru," 
Proverbs7:8 alikupita pakhwalala pafupi ndi mphambano ya pa mkaziyo, ndi kuyenda pa njira ya kunyumba yake;" 
Proverbs7:9 pa madzulo kuli sisiro, pakati pa usiku pali mdima." 
Proverbs7:10 Ndipo taona, mkaziyo anamchingamira, atavala zadama wochenjera mtima," 
Proverbs7:11 ali wolongolola ndi wosaweruzika, mapazi ake samakhala m'nyumba mwake." 
Proverbs7:12 Mwina ali kumakwalala, mwina ali kumabwalo, nabisalira pa mphambano zonse." 
Proverbs7:13 Ndipo anagwira mnyamatayo, nampsompsona; nati kwa iye ndi nkhope yachipongwe," 
Proverbs7:14 nsembe zamtendere zili nane; lero ndachita zowinda zanga. 
Proverbs7:15 Chifukwa chake ndatuluka kudzakuchingamira, kudzafunitsa nkhope yako, ndipo ndakupeza." 
Proverbs7:16 Ndayala zofunda pakama panga, nsalu zamawangamawanga za thonje la ku Ejipito," 
Proverbs7:17 ndakapiza pamphasa panga mankhwala onunkhira a mure ndi chisiyo ndi sinamoni. 
Proverbs7:18 Tiye tikondwere ndi chikondano mpaka mamawa; tidzisangalatse ndi chiyanjano. 
Proverbs7:19 Pakuti mwamuna kulibe kwathu, wapita ulendo wa kutali;" 
Proverbs7:20 watenga thumba la ndalama m'dzanja lake, tsiku lowala mwezi adzabwera kwathu." 
Proverbs7:21 Amkakamiza ndi kukoka kwa mau ake, ampatutsa ndi kusyasyalika kwa milomo yake." 
Proverbs7:22 Mnyamatayo amtsata posachedwa, monga ng'ombe ipita kukaphedwa; ndi monga unyolo umadza kulanga chitsiru;" 
Proverbs7:23 mpaka muvi ukapyoza mphafa yake; amtsata monga mbalame yothamangira msampha; osadziwa kuti adzaononga moyo wake. 
Proverbs7:24 Ndipo tsopano, ananga, mundimvere ine, labadirani mau a m'kamwa mwanga." 
Proverbs7:25 Mtima wako usapatukire kunjira ya mkaziyo, usasochere m'mayendedwe ake." 
Proverbs7:26 Pakuti amagwetsa ambiri, atawalasa; ndipo ophedwa ndi iye achulukadi." 
Proverbs7:27 Nyumba yake ndiyo njira ya kumanda, yotsikira kuzipinda za imfa." 
Proverbs8:1 Kodi nzeru siitana, luntha ndi kukweza mau ake?" 
Proverbs8:2 Iima pamwamba pa mtunda, pa mphambano za makwalala;" 
Proverbs8:3 pambali pa chipata polowera m'mudzi, polowa anthu pa makomo ifuula:" 
Proverbs8:4 Ndinu ndikuitanani, amuna, mau anga ndilankhula kwa ana a anthu." 
Proverbs8:5 Achibwana inu, chenjerani, opusa inu, khalani ndi mtima wozindikira;" 
Proverbs8:6 imvani, pakuti ndikanena zoposa, ndi zolungama potsegula pakamwa panga." 
Proverbs8:7 Pakuti m'kamwa mwanga mudzalankhula ntheradi, zoipa zinyansa milomo yanga." 
Proverbs8:8 Mau onse a m'kamwa mwanga alungama; mwa iwo mulibe zokhota ndi zopotoka. 
Proverbs8:9 Onsewo amveka ndi iye amene azindikira; alungama kwa akupeza nzeru. 
Proverbs8:10 Landirani mwambo wanga, si siliva ai; ndi nzeru kopambana ndi golide wosankhika." 
Proverbs8:11 Pakuti nzeru iposa ngale, ndi zonse tizifunitsa sizilingana nayo." 
Proverbs8:12 Ine Nzeru ndikhala m'kuchenjera, ngati m'nyumba yanga; ndimapeza kudziwa ndi zolingalira." 
Proverbs8:13 Kuopa Yehova ndiko kuda zoipa; kunyada, ndi kudzikuza, ndi njira yoipa, ndi m'kamwa mokhota, ndizida." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndine mwini uphungu ndi kudziwitsa; ndine luntha; ndili ndi mphamvu. 
Proverbs8:15 Mwa ine mafumu alamulira; akazembe naweruza molungama. 
Proverbs8:16 Mwa ine akalonga ayang'anira, ndi akulu, ngakhale oweruza onse a m'dziko." 
Proverbs8:17 Akundikonda ndiwakonda; akundifunafuna adzandipeza. 
Proverbs8:18 Katundu ndi ulemu zili ndi ine, chuma chosatha ndi chilungamo." 
Proverbs8:19 Chipatso changa chiposa golide, ngakhale golide woyengeka; phindu langa liposa siliva wosankhika." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndimayenda m'njira ya chilungamo, pakati pa mayendedwe a chiweruzo," 
Proverbs8:21 kuti ndionetse chuma akundikonda, chikhale cholowa chao, ndi kudzaza mosungira mwao." 
Proverbs8:22 Yehova anali nane poyamba njira yake, asanalenge zake zakale." 
Proverbs8:23 Anandiimika chikhalire chiyambire, dziko lisanalengedwe." 
Proverbs8:24 Pamene panalibe zozama ndinabadwa ine, pamene panalibe akasupe odzala madzi." 
Proverbs8:25 Mapiri asanakhazikike, zitunda zisanapangidwe, ndinabadwa." 
Proverbs8:26 Asanalenge dziko, ndi thengo, ngakhale chiyambi cha fumbi la dziko." 
Proverbs8:27 Pamene anakhazika mlengalenga ndinali pompo; pamene analemba pazozama kwetekwete; 
Proverbs8:28 polimbitsa Iye thambo la kumwamba, pokula akasupe a zozama." 
Proverbs8:29 Poikira nyanja malire ake, kuti madzi asapitirire pa lamulo lake; polemba maziko a dziko." 
Proverbs8:30 Ndinali pa mbali pake ngati mmisiri; ndinamsekeretsa tsiku ndi tsiku, ndi kukondwera pamaso pake nthawi zonse;" 
Proverbs8:31 ndi kukondwera ndi dziko lake lokhalamo anthu, ndi kusekerera ndi ana a anthu." 
Proverbs8:32 Ndipo tsopano, ananga, mundimvere ine, ngodala akusunga njira zanga." 
Proverbs8:33 Imvani mwambo, mukhale anzeru osaukana." 
Proverbs8:34 Ngwodala amene andimvera, nadikira pa zitseko zanga tsiku ndi tsiku, ndi kulinda pa mphuthu za makoma anga;" 
Proverbs8:35 pakuti wondipeza ine apeza moyo; Yehova adzamkomera mtima. 
Proverbs8:36 Koma wondichimwira apweteka moyo wake; onse akundida ine akonda imfa. 
Proverbs9:1 Nzeru yamanga nyumba yake, yasema zoimiritsa zake zisanu ndi ziwiri;" 
Proverbs9:2 yaphera nyama yake, nisanganiza vinyo wake, nilongosolanso pa gome lake." 
Proverbs9:3 Yatuma anamwali ake, iitana pa misanje ya m'mudzi." 
Proverbs9:4 Wazibwana yense apatukire kuno; iti kwa yense wosowa nzeru," 
Proverbs9:5 Tiyeni, idyani chakudya changa; nimumwe vinyo wanga ndamsanganiza." 
Proverbs9:6 Lekani, achibwana inu, nimukhale ndi moyo; nimuyende m'njira ya nzeru." 
Proverbs9:7 Woweruza munthu wonyoza adzichititsa yekha manyazi; yemwe adzudzula wochimwa angodetsa mbiri yakeyake. 
Proverbs9:8 Usadzudzule wonyoza kuti angakude; dzudzula wanzeru adzakukonda. 
Proverbs9:9 Ukachenjeza wanzeru adzakulitsa nzeru yake; ukaphunzitsa wolungama adzaonjezera kuphunzira. 
Proverbs9:10 Chiyambi cha nzeru ndicho kuopa Yehova; kudziwa Woyerayo ndiko luntha. 
Proverbs9:11 Pakuti mwa ine masiku ako adzachuluka, zaka za moyo wako zidzaonjezedwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Ukakhala wanzeru, si yakoyako nzeruyo? Ndipo ukanyoza udzasauka wekha." 
Proverbs9:13 Utsiru umalongolola, ngwa chibwana osadziwa kanthu." 
Proverbs9:14 Ukhala pa khomo la nyumba yake, pampando pa misanje ya m'mudzi," 
Proverbs9:15 kuti uitane akupita panjira, amene angonkabe m'kuyenda kwao," 
Proverbs9:16 wachibwana ndani? Apatukire kuno. Ati kwa yense wopanda nzeru," 
Proverbs9:17 madzi akuba atsekemera, ndi chakudya chobisika chikoma." 
Proverbs9:18 Ndipo mwamunayo sadziwa kuti akufa ali konko; omwe achezetsa utsiru ali m'manda akuya. 
Proverbs10:1 Miyambo ya Solomoni: Mwana wanzeru akondweretsa atate; koma mwana wopusa amvetsa amake chisoni. 
Proverbs10:2 Chuma cha uchimo sichithangata; koma chilungamo chipulumutsa kuimfa. 
Proverbs10:3 Yehova samvetsa njala moyo wa wolungama; koma amainga chifuniro cha wochimwa. 
Proverbs10:4 Wochita ndi dzanja laulesi amasauka; koma dzanja la akhama lilemeretsa. 
Proverbs10:5 Wokolola m'malimwe ndi mwana wanzeru; koma wogona pakutula ndi mwana wochititsa manyazi. 
Proverbs10:6 Madalitso ali pamtu pa wolungama; koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa chiwawa. 
Proverbs10:7 Amayesa wolungama wodala pomkumbukira; koma dzina la oipa lidzavunda. 
Proverbs10:8 Mwini mtima wanzeru amalandira malamulo; koma chitsiru cholongolola chidzagwa. 
Proverbs10:9 Woyenda moongoka amayenda osatekeseka; koma wokhotetsa njira zake adzadziwika. 
Proverbs10:10 Wotsinzinira achititsa chisoni; koma wodzudzula momveka achita mtendere. 
Proverbs10:11 M'kamwa mwa wolungama ndi kasupe wa moyo; koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa chiwawa. 
Proverbs10:12 Udani upikisanitsa; koma chikondi chikwirira zolakwa zonse. 
Proverbs10:13 Nzeru ipezedwa m'milomo ya wozindikira; koma wopusa pamsana pake nthyole. 
Proverbs10:14 Anzeru akundika zomwe adziwa; koma m'kamwa mwa chitsiru muononga tsopano lino. 
Proverbs10:15 Chuma cha wolemera ndi mudzi wake wolimba; koma umphawi wao uononga osauka. 
Proverbs10:16 Ntchito za wolungama zipatsa moyo; koma phindu la oipa lichimwitsa. 
Proverbs10:17 Wosunga mwambo ali m'njira ya moyo; koma wosiya chidzudzulo asochera. 
Proverbs10:18 Wobisa udani ali ndi milomo yonama; wonena ugogodi ndiye chitsiru. 
Proverbs10:19 Pochuluka mau zolakwa sizisoweka; koma wokhala chete achita mwanzeru. 
Proverbs10:20 Lilime la wolungama likunga siliva wosankhika; koma mtima wa oipa uli wachabe. 
Proverbs10:21 Milomo ya wolungama imadyetsa ambiri; koma zitsiru zimafa posowa nzeru. 
Proverbs10:22 Madalitso a Yehova alemeretsa, saonjezerapo chisoni." 
Proverbs10:23 Masewero a chitsiru ndiwo kuchita zoipa; koma masewero a wozindikira ndiwo nzeru. 
Proverbs10:24 Chomwe woipa achiopa chidzamfikira; koma chomwe olungama achifuna chidzapatsidwa. 
Proverbs10:25 Monga kavumbulu angopita, momwemo woipa kuli zii; koma olungama ndiwo maziko osatha." 
Proverbs10:26 Ngati vinyo wowawa m'mano, ndi utsi m'maso, momwemo waulesi kwa iwo amene amtuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Kuopa Yehova kutanimphitsa masiku; koma zaka za oipa zidzafinimpha. 
Proverbs10:28 Chiyembekezo cha olungama ndicho chimwemwe; koma chidikiro cha oipa chidzaonongeka. 
Proverbs10:29 Njira ya Yehova ndi linga kwa woongoka mtima; koma akuchita zoipa adzaonongeka. 
Proverbs10:30 Wolungama sadzachotsedwa konse; koma oipa sadzakhalabe m'dziko. 
Proverbs10:31 M'kamwa mwa wolungama mulankhula nzeru; koma lilime lokhota lidzadulidwa. 
Proverbs10:32 Milomo ya wolungama idziwa zokondweretsa; koma m'kamwa mwa oipa munena zokhota. 
Proverbs11:1 Muyeso wonyenga unyansa Yehova; koma mulingo wamphumphu umsekeretsa. 
Proverbs11:2 Pakudza kudzikuza padzanso manyazi; koma nzeru ili ndi odzichepetsa. 
Proverbs11:3 Kuongoka mtima kwa olungama kuwatsogolera; koma kukhota kwa achiwembu kudzawaononga. 
Proverbs11:4 Chuma sichithandiza tsiku la mkwiyo; koma chilungamo chipulumutsa kuimfa. 
Proverbs11:5 Chilungamo cha wangwiro chimaongola njira yake; koma woipa adzagwa ndi zoipa zake. 
Proverbs11:6 Chilungamo cha oongoka mtima chidzawapulumutsa; koma achiwembu adzagwidwa ndi mphulupulu yao. 
Proverbs11:7 Pomwalira woipa chidikiro chake chionongeka; chiyembekezo cha uchimo chionongeka. 
Proverbs11:8 Wolungama apulumuka kuvuto; woipa nalowa m'malo mwake. 
Proverbs11:9 Wonyoza Mulungu aononga mnzake ndi m'kamwa mwake; koma olungama adzapulumuka pakudziwa. 
Proverbs11:10 Olungama akapeza bwino, mudzi usekera; nufuula pakuonongeka oipa." 
Proverbs11:11 Madalitso a olungama akuza mudzi; koma m'kamwa mwa oipa muupasula. 
Proverbs11:12 Wopeputsa mnzake asowa nzeru; koma wozindikira amatonthola. 
Proverbs11:13 Kazitape woyendayenda amawanditsa zinsinsi; koma wokhulupirika mtima abisa mau. 
Proverbs11:14 Popanda upo wanzeru anthu amagwa; koma pochuluka aphungu pali chipulumutso. 
Proverbs11:15 Woperekera mlendo chikole adzaphwetekwapo; koma wakuda chikole akhala ndi mtendere. 
Proverbs11:16 Mkazi wodekha agwiritsa ulemu; aukali nagwiritsa chuma. 
Proverbs11:17 Wachifundo achitira moyo wake zokoma; koma wankhanza avuta nyama yake. 
Proverbs11:18 Woipa alandira malipiro onyenga; koma wofesa chilungamo aonadi mphotho. 
Proverbs11:19 Wolimbikira chilungamo alandira moyo; koma wolondola zoipa adzipha yekha. 
Proverbs11:20 Okhota mtima anyansa Yehova; koma angwiro m'njira zao amsekeretsa. 
Proverbs11:21 Zoonadi, wochimwa sadzapulumuka chilango; koma mbeu ya olungama idzalanditsidwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Monga chipini chagolide m'mphuno ya nkhumba, momwemo mkazi wokongola wosasinkhasinkha bwino." 
Proverbs11:23 Chifuniro cha olungama chifikitsa zabwino zokha; koma chiyembekezo cha oipa mkwiyo. 
Proverbs11:24 Alipo wogawira, nangolemerabe; aliponso womana chomwe ayenera kupatsa nangosauka." 
Proverbs11:25 Mtima wa mataya udzalemera; wothirira madzi nayenso adzathiriridwa. 
Proverbs11:26 Womana tirigu anthu amtemberera; koma madalitso adzakhala pamtu pa wogulitsa. 
Proverbs11:27 Wopwaira ubwino afunitsa chikondwerero; koma zoipa zidzamfikira wozilondola. 
Proverbs11:28 Wokhulupirira chuma chake adzagwa; koma olungama adzaphuka ngati tsamba. 
Proverbs11:29 Wovuta banja lake adzalowa m'zomsautsa; wopusa adzatumikira wanzeru. 
Proverbs11:30 Chipatso cha wolungama ndi mtengo wa moyo; ndipo wokola mtima ali wanzeru. 
Proverbs11:31 Taonani, wolungama adzalandira mphotho kunja kuno; koposa kotani woipa ndi wochimwa?" 
Proverbs12:1 Wokonda mwambo akonda kudziwa; koma wakuda chidzudzulo apulukira. 
Proverbs12:2 Yehova akomera mtima munthu wabwino; koma munthu wa ziwembu amtsutsa. 
Proverbs12:3 Munthu sadzakhazikika ndi udyo, muzu wa olungama sudzasunthidwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Mkazi wodekha ndiye korona wa mwamuna wake; koma wochititsa manyazi akunga chovunditsa mafupa a mwamunayo. 
Proverbs12:5 Maganizo a olungama ndi chiweruzo; koma uphungu wa oipa unyenga. 
Proverbs12:6 Mau a oipa abisalira mwazi; koma m'kamwa mwa olungama muwalanditsa. 
Proverbs12:7 Oipa amagwa kuli zii; koma banja la olungama limaimabe. 
Proverbs12:8 Munthu amatamandidwa monga mwa nzeru yake; koma wokhota mtima adzanyozedwa. 
Proverbs12:9 Wonyozedwa, amene ali ndi kapolo, aposa wodzikuza, amene asowa zakudya." 
Proverbs12:10 Wolungama asamalira moyo wa choweta chake; koma chifundo cha oipa ndi nkhanza. 
Proverbs12:11 Zakudya zikwanira wolima minda yake; koma wotsata anthu opanda pake asowa nzeru. 
Proverbs12:12 Woipa akhumba chokodwa ndi amphulupulu; koma muzu wa olungama umabala zipatso. 
Proverbs12:13 M'kulakwa kwa milomo muli msampha woipa; koma wolungama amatuluka m'mavuto. 
Proverbs12:14 Munthu amakhuta zabwino ndi zipatso za m'kamwa mwake; zochita za manja ake zidzabwezedwa kwa iye. 
Proverbs12:15 Njira ya chitsiru njolungama pamaso pakepake; koma wanzeru amamvera uphungu. 
Proverbs12:16 Mkwiyo wa chitsiru udziwika posachedwa; koma wanzeru amabisa manyazi. 
Proverbs12:17 Wolankhula ntheradi aonetsa chilungamo; koma mboni yonama imanyenga. 
Proverbs12:18 Alipo wonena mwansontho ngati kupyoza kwa lupanga; koma lilime la anzeru lilamitsa. 
Proverbs12:19 Mlomo wa ntheradi ukhazikika nthawi zonse; koma lilime lonama likhala kamphindi. 
Proverbs12:20 Chinyengo chili m'mitima ya oganizira zoipa; koma aphungu a mtendere amakondwa. 
Proverbs12:21 Palibe vuto lidzagwera wolungama; koma amphulupulu adzadzazidwa ndi zoipa. 
Proverbs12:22 Milomo yonama inyansa Yehova; koma ochita ntheradi amsekeretsa. 
Proverbs12:23 Munthu wanzeru abisa zomwe adziwa; koma mtima wa opusa ulalikira utsiru. 
Proverbs12:24 Dzanja la akhama lidzalamulira; koma waulesi adzakhala ngati kapolo. 
Proverbs12:25 Nkhawa iweramitsa mtima wa munthu; koma mau abwino aukondweretsa. 
Proverbs12:26 Wolungama atsogolera mnzake; koma njira ya oipa iwasokeretsa. 
Proverbs12:27 Waulesi samaotcha nyama yake anaigwira; koma wolungama amalandira chuma chopambana cha anthu. 
Proverbs12:28 M'khwalala la chilungamo muli moyo; m'njira ya mayendedwe ake mulibe imfa. 
Proverbs13:1 Mwana wanzeru amamvera mwambo wa atate; koma wonyoza samvera chidzudzulo. 
Proverbs13:2 Munthu adzadya zabwino ndi zipatso za m'kamwa mwake; koma moyo wa achiwembu udzadya chiwawa. 
Proverbs13:3 Wogwira pakamwa pake asunga moyo wake; koma woyasamula milomo yake adzaonongeka. 
Proverbs13:4 Moyo wa waulesi ukhumba osalandira kanthu; koma moyo wa akhama udzalemera. 
Proverbs13:5 Wolungama ada mau onama; koma woipa anyansa, nadzichititsa manyazi."
