Proverbs13:6 Chilungamo chitchinjiriza woongoka m'njira; koma udyo ugwetsa wochimwa. 
Proverbs13:7 Alipo wodziyesa wolemera, koma alibe kanthu; alipo wodziyesa wosauka, koma ali ndi chuma chambiri." 
Proverbs13:8 Chiombolo cha moyo wa munthu ndicho chuma chake; koma wosauka samva chidzudzulo. 
Proverbs13:9 Kuunika kwa olungama kukondwa; koma nyali ya oipa idzazima. 
Proverbs13:10 Kudzikuza kupikisanitsa; koma omwe anauzidwa uphungu ali ndi nzeru. 
Proverbs13:11 Chuma cholandiridwa mokangaza chidzachepa; koma wokundika ndi dzanja adzaona zochuluka. 
Proverbs13:12 Chiyembekezo chozengereza chidwalitsa mtima; koma pakufika chifunirocho ndicho mtengo wa moyo. 
Proverbs13:13 Wonyoza mau adziononga yekha; koma woopa malangizo adzalandira mphotho. 
Proverbs13:14 Malamulo a wanzeru ndiwo kasupe wa moyo, apatutsa kumisampha ya imfa." 
Proverbs13:15 Nzeru yabwino ipatsa chisomo; koma njira ya achiwembu ili makolokoto. 
Proverbs13:16 Yense wochenjera amachita mwanzeru; koma wopusa aonetsa utsiru. 
Proverbs13:17 Mthenga wolakwa umagwa m'zoipa; koma mtumiki wokhulupirika alamitsa. 
Proverbs13:18 Wokana mwambo adzasauka nanyozedwa; koma wolabadira chidzudzulo adzalemekezedwa. 
Proverbs13:19 Chifuniro chikondweretsa moyo chitachitidwa; koma kusiya zoipa kunyansa opusa. 
Proverbs13:20 Ukayenda ndi anzeru udzakhala wanzeru: koma mnzao wa opusa adzaphwetekedwa. 
Proverbs13:21 Zoipa zilondola ochimwa; koma olungama adzalandira mphotho yabwino. 
Proverbs13:22 Wabwino asiyira zidzukulu zake cholowa chabwino; koma wochimwa angosungira wolungama chuma chake. 
Proverbs13:23 M'kulima kwa osauka muli zakudya zambiri; koma zinazo zimaonongeka posowa chiweruzo. 
Proverbs13:24 Wolekerera mwanake osammenya amuda; koma womkonda amyambize kumlanga. 
Proverbs13:25 Wolungama adya nakhutitsa moyo wake; koma mimba ya oipa idzasowa. 
Proverbs14:1 Mkazi yense wanzeru amanga banja lake; koma wopusa alipasula ndi manja ake. 
Proverbs14:2 Woyenda moongoka mtima aopa Yehova; koma wokhota m'njira yake amnyoza. 
Proverbs14:3 M'kamwa mwa chitsiru muli nthyole ya kudzikuza; koma milomo ya anzeru idzawasunga. 
Proverbs14:4 Popanda zoweta modyera muti see; koma mphamvu ya ng'ombe ichulukitsa phindu. 
Proverbs14:5 Mboni yokhulupirika sidzanama; koma mboni yonyenga imalankhula zonama. 
Proverbs14:6 Wonyoza afunafuna nzeru osaipeza; koma wozindikira saona vuto m'kuphunzira. 
Proverbs14:7 Pita pamaso pa munthu wopusa, sudzazindikira milomo yakudziwa." 
Proverbs14:8 Nzeru ya wochenjera ndiyo yakuti azindikire njira yake; koma utsiru wa opusa ndiwo chinyengo. 
Proverbs14:9 Zitsiru zinyoza kupalamula; koma mwa oongoka mtima muli chiyanjano. 
Proverbs14:10 Mtima udziwa kuwawa kwakekwake; mlendo sadudukira ndi chimwemwe chake. 
Proverbs14:11 Nyumba ya oipa idzapasuka; koma hema wa oongoka mtima adzakula. 
Proverbs14:12 Ilipo njira yooneka kwa mwamuna ngati yoongoka; koma matsiriziro ake ndi njira za imfa. 
Proverbs14:13 Ngakhale m'kuseka mtima uwawa; ndipo matsiriziro a chiphwete ndi chisoni. 
Proverbs14:14 Wobwerera m'mbuyo m'mtima adzakhuta njira yake; koma munthu wabwino adzakhuta za mwa iye yekha. 
Proverbs14:15 Wachibwana akhulupirira mau onse; koma wochenjera asamalira mayendedwe ake. 
Proverbs14:16 Wanzeru amaopa nasiya zoipa; koma wopusa amanyada osatekeseka. 
Proverbs14:17 Wokangaza kukwiya adzachita utsiru; ndipo munthu wa ziwembu adzadedwa. 
Proverbs14:18 Achibwana amalandira cholowa cha utsiru; koma ochenjera amavala nzeru ngati korona. 
Proverbs14:19 Oipa amagwadira abwino, ndi ochimwa pa makomo a olungama." 
Proverbs14:20 Waumphawi adedwa ndi anzake omwe; koma akukonda wolemera achuluka. 
Proverbs14:21 Wonyoza anzake achimwa; koma wochitira osauka chifundo adala. 
Proverbs14:22 Kodi oganizira zoipa sasochera? Koma akuganizira zabwino adzalandira chifundo ndi ntheradi. 
Proverbs14:23 M'ntchito zonse muli phindu; koma kulankhulalankhula kungopatsa umphawi. 
Proverbs14:24 Korona wa anzeru ndi chuma chao; utsiru wa opusa ndiwo utsiru. 
Proverbs14:25 Mboni yoona imalanditsa miyoyo; koma wolankhula zonama angonyenga. 
Proverbs14:26 Wakuopa Yehova akhulupirira kolimba; ndipo ana ake adzakhala ndi pothawirapo. 
Proverbs14:27 Kuopa Yehova ndiko kasupe wa moyo, kupatutsa kumisampha ya imfa." 
Proverbs14:28 Mu unyinji wa anthu muli ulemu wa mfumu; koma popanda anthu kalonga aonongeka. 
Proverbs14:29 Wosakwiya msanga apambana kumvetsa; koma wansontho akuza utsiru. 
Proverbs14:30 Mtima wabwino ndi moyo wa thupi; koma nsanje ivunditsa mafupa. 
Proverbs14:31 Wotsendereza aumphawi atonza Mlengi wake; koma wochitira wosauka chifundo amlemekeza. 
Proverbs14:32 Wochimwa adzakankhidwa m'kuipa kwake; koma wolungama akhulupirirabe pomwalira. 
Proverbs14:33 Nzeru ikhalabe m'mtima wa wozindikira, nidziwika pakati pa opusa." 
Proverbs14:34 Chilungamo chikuza mtundu wa anthu; koma tchimo lichititsa fuko manyazi. 
Proverbs14:35 Mfumu ikomera mtima kapolo wochita mwanzeru; koma idzakwiyira wochititsa manyazi. 
Proverbs15:1 Mayankhidwe ofatsa abweza mkwiyo; koma mau owawitsa aputa msunamo. 
Proverbs15:2 Lilime la anzeru linena bwino zomwe adziwa; koma m'kamwa mwa opusa mutsanulira utsiru. 
Proverbs15:3 Maso a Yehova ali ponseponse, nayang'anira oipa ndi abwino." 
Proverbs15:4 Kuchiza lilime ndiko mtengo wa moyo; koma likakhota liswa moyo. 
Proverbs15:5 Chitsiru chipeputsa mwambo wa atate wake; koma wosamalira chidzudzulo amachenjera. 
Proverbs15:6 M'nyumba ya wolungama muli katundu wambiri; koma m'phindu la woipa muli vuto. 
Proverbs15:7 Milomo ya anzeru iwanditsa nzeru, koma mtima wa opusa suli wolungama." 
Proverbs15:8 Nsembe ya oipa inyansa Yehova; koma pemphero la oongoka mtima limkondweretsa. 
Proverbs15:9 Njira ya oipa inyansa Yehova; koma akonda wolondola chilungamo. 
Proverbs15:10 Wosiya njira adzalangidwa mowawa; wakuda chidzudzulo adzafa. 
Proverbs15:11 Kumanda ndi kuchionongeko kuli pamaso pa Yehova; koposa kotani nanga mitima ya ana a anthu? 
Proverbs15:12 Wonyoza sakonda kudzudzulidwa, samapita kwa anzeru." 
Proverbs15:13 Mtima wokondwa usekeretsa nkhope; koma moyo umasweka ndi zowawa za m'mtima. 
Proverbs15:14 Mtima wa wozindikira ufunitsa kudziwa; koma m'kamwa mwa opusa mudya utsiru. 
Proverbs15:15 Masiku onse a wosauka ali oipa; koma wokondwera mtima ali ndi phwando losatha. 
Proverbs15:16 Zapang'ono, ulikuopa Yehova, zipambana ndi katundu wambiri pokhala phokoso." 
Proverbs15:17 Kudya masamba, pali chikondano, kuposa ng'ombe yonenepa pali udani." 
Proverbs15:18 Munthu wozaza aputa makani; koma wosakwiya msanga atonthoza makangano. 
Proverbs15:19 Mayendedwe a waulesi akunga linga laminga, koma njira ya oongoka mtima iundidwa ngati mseu." 
Proverbs15:20 Mwana wanzeru akondweretsa atate wake; koma munthu wopusa apeputsa amake. 
Proverbs15:21 Wosowa nzeru akondwera ndi utsiru; koma munthu wozindikira aongola mayendedwe ake. 
Proverbs15:22 Zolingalira zizimidwa popanda upo; koma pochuluka aphungu zikhazikika. 
Proverbs15:23 Munthu akondwera ndi mayankhidwe a m'kamwa mwake; ndi mau a pa nthawi yake kodi sali abwino? 
Proverbs15:24 Anzeru ayesa njira yamoyo yokwerakwera, kuti apatuke kusiya kunsi kwa manda." 
Proverbs15:25 Yehova adzapasula nyumba ya wonyada; koma adzalembera mkazi wamasiye malire ake. 
Proverbs15:26 Ziwembu zoipa zinyansa Yehova; koma oyera mtima alankhula mau okondweretsa. 
Proverbs15:27 Wopindula monyenga avuta nyumba yake; koma wakuda mitulo adzakhala ndi moyo. 
Proverbs15:28 Mtima wa wolungama uganizira za mayankhidwe; koma m'kamwa mwa ochimwa mutsanulira zoipa. 
Proverbs15:29 Yehova atalikira oipa; koma pemphero la olungama alimvera. 
Proverbs15:30 Kuunika kwa maso kukondweretsa mtima; ndipo pomveka zabwino mafupa amatenga uwisi. 
Proverbs15:31 Khutu lomvera chidzudzulo cha moyo lidzakhalabe mwa anzeru. 
Proverbs15:32 Wokana mwambo apeputsa moyo wake; koma wosamalira chidzudzulo amatenga nzeru. 
Proverbs15:33 Kuopa Yehova ndiko mwambo wanzeru; ndipo chifatso chitsogolera ulemu. 
Proverbs16:1 Malongosoledwe a mtima nga munthu; koma mayankhidwe a lilime achokera kwa Yehova. 
Proverbs16:2 Njira zonse za munthu ziyera pamaso pake; koma Yehova ayesa mizimu. 
Proverbs16:3 Pereka zochita zako kwa Yehova, ndipo zolingalira zako zidzakhazikika." 
Proverbs16:4 Zonse Yehova anazipanga zili ndi zifukwa zao; ngakhale amphulupulu kuti aone tsiku loipa. 
Proverbs16:5 Yense wonyada mtima anyansa Yehova; zoonadi sadzapulumuka chilango. 
Proverbs16:6 Mphulupulu iomboledwa ndi chifundo ndi ntheradi; apatuka pa zoipa poopa Yehova. 
Proverbs16:7 Njira za munthu zikakonda Yehova ayanjanitsana naye ngakhale adani ake. 
Proverbs16:8 Zapang'ono, pokhala chilungamo, ziposa phindu lalikulu lopanda chiweruzo." 
Proverbs16:9 Mtima wa munthu ulingalira njira yake; koma Yehova ayendetsa mapazi ake. 
Proverbs16:10 Mau a mlauli ali m'milomo ya mfumu; m'kamwa mwake simudzachita chetera poweruza. 
Proverbs16:11 Mwini muyeso ndi mulingo wolungama ndiye Yehova; ndiyenso anapanga miyala yonse yoyesera ya m'thumba. 
Proverbs16:12 Kuchita mphulupulu kunyansa mafumu; pakuti mpando wao wakhazikika ndi chilungamo. 
Proverbs16:13 Milomo yolungama ikondweretsa mafumu; wonena zoongoka amkonda. 
Proverbs16:14 Mkwiyo wa mfumu ndi mithenga ya imfa; wanzeru adzaukhulula. 
Proverbs16:15 M'kuunika kwa nkhope ya mfumu muli moyo; kukoma mtima kwake kunga mtambo wa mvula ya masika. 
Proverbs16:16 Kodi kulandira nzeru sikupambana ndi golide, kulandira luntha ndi kusankhika koposa siliva?" 
Proverbs16:17 Khwalala la oongoka mtima ndilo lakuti asiye zoipa; wosunga njira yake atchinjiriza moyo wake. 
Proverbs16:18 Kunyada kutsogolera kuonongeka; mtima wodzikuza ndi kutsogolera kuphunthwa. 
Proverbs16:19 Kufatsa mtima ndi osauka kuposa kugawana zofunkha ndi onyada. 
Proverbs16:20 Wolabadira mau adzapeza bwino; ndipo wokhulupirira Yehova adala. 
Proverbs16:21 Wanzeru mtima adzatchedwa wochenjera; ndipo kukoma kwa milomo kuonjezera kuphunzira. 
Proverbs16:22 Nzeru ndi kasupe wa moyo kwa mwini wake; koma mwambo wa zitsiru ndi utsiru. 
Proverbs16:23 Mtima wa wanzeru uchenjeza m'kamwa mwake, nuphunzitsanso milomo yake." 
Proverbs16:24 Mau okoma ndiwo chisa cha uchi, otsekemera m'moyo ndi olamitsa mafupa." 
Proverbs16:25 Ilipo njira yooneka kwa mwamuna ngati yoongoka, koma matsiriziro ake ndi njira za imfa." 
Proverbs16:26 Wantchito adzigwirira yekha ntchito; pakuti m'kamwa mwake mumfulumiza. 
Proverbs16:27 Munthu wopanda pake akonzeratu zoipa; ndipo m'milomo mwake muli moto wopsereza. 
Proverbs16:28 Munthu wokhota amautsa makani; kazitape afetsa ubwenzi. 
Proverbs16:29 Munthu wa chiwawa akopa mnzake, namuyendetsa m'njira yosakhala bwino." 
Proverbs16:30 Wotsinzina ndiye aganizira zokhota; wosunama afikitsa zoipa. 
Proverbs16:31 Imvi ndiyo korona wa ulemu, idzapezedwa m'njira ya chilungamo." 
Proverbs16:32 Wosakwiya msanga aposa wamphamvu; wolamulira mtima wake naposa wolanda mudzi. 
Proverbs16:33 Maere aponyedwa pamfunga; koma ndiye Yehova alongosola zonse. 
Proverbs17:1 Nyenyeswa youma, pokhala mtendere, iposa nyumba yodzala nyama yansembe, pali makangano." 
Proverbs17:2 Kapolo wochita mwanzeru adzalamulira mwana wochititsa manyazi, nadzagawana nao abale cholowa." 
Proverbs17:3 Siliva ali ndi mbiya yosungunulira, golide ali ndi ng'anjo; koma Yehova ayesa mitima." 
Proverbs17:4 Wochimwa amasamalira milomo yolakwa; wonama amvera lilime losakaza. 
Proverbs17:5 Wochitira chiphwete aumphawi atonza Mlengi; wokondwera ndi tsoka sadzapulumuka chilango. 
Proverbs17:6 Zidzukulu ndizo korona wa okalamba; ndipo ulemerero wa ana ndiwo atate ao. 
Proverbs17:7 Mlomo wangwiro suyenera chitsiru; ngakhale mlomo wonama suyenera kalonga ndi pang'ono ponse. 
Proverbs17:8 Wolandira chokometsera mlandu achiyesa ngale; paliponse popita iye achenjera. 
Proverbs17:9 Wobisa cholakwa afunitsa chikondano; koma wobwerezabwereza mau afetsa ubwenzi. 
Proverbs17:10 Chidzudzulo chilowa m'kati mwa wozindikira, kopambana ndi kukwapula wopusa kwambiri." 
Proverbs17:11 Woipa amafuna kupanduka kokha; koma adzamtumizira mthenga wankhanza. 
Proverbs17:12 Kukomana ndi chitsiru m'kupusa kwake kuopsa koposa chilombo chochichotsera anake. 
Proverbs17:13 Wobwezera zabwino zoipa, zoipa sizidzamchokera kwao." 
Proverbs17:14 Chiyambi cha ndeu chifanana ndi kutsegulira madzi; tsono kupikisana kusanayambe tasiya makani. 
Proverbs17:15 Wokometsa mlandu wa wamphulupulu, ndi wotsutsa wolungama, onse awiriwa amnyansa Yehova." 
Proverbs17:16 Kodi bwanji mtengo wogulira nzeru uli m'dzanja la chitsiru, popeza wopusa alibe mtima?" 
Proverbs17:17 Bwenzi limakonda nthawi zonse; ndipo mbale anabadwira kuti akuthandize pooneka tsoka. 
Proverbs17:18 Munthu wosowa nzeru apangana kulipirira wina, napereka chikole pamaso pa mnzake." 
Proverbs17:19 Wokonda ndeu akonda kulakwa; ndipo wotalikitsa khomo lake afunafuna kuonongeka. 
Proverbs17:20 Wokhota mtima sadzapeza bwino; ndipo mwini lilime lokhota adzagwa m'zoipa. 
Proverbs17:21 Wobala chitsiru adzichititsa chisoni; ndipo atate wa wopusa sakondwa. 
Proverbs17:22 Mtima wosekerera uchiritsa bwino; koma mzimu wosweka uphwetsa mafupa. 
Proverbs17:23 Munthu woipa alandira chokometsera mlandu chotulutsa m'mfunga, kuti apatukitse mayendedwe a chiweruzo." 
Proverbs17:24 Nzeru ili pamaso pa wozindikira; koma maso a wopusa ali m'malekezero a dziko. 
Proverbs17:25 Mwana wopusa achititsa atate wake chisoni, namvetsa zowawa amake wombala." 
Proverbs17:26 Kulipiritsa wolungama sikuli kwabwino, ngakhale kukwapula akulu chifukwa aongoka mtima." 
Proverbs17:27 Wopanda chikamwakamwa apambana kudziwa; ndipo wofatsa mtima ali wanzeru. 
Proverbs17:28 Ngakhale chitsiru chikatonthola achiyesa chanzeru; posunama ali wochenjera. 
Proverbs18:1 Wopanduka afunafuna chifuniro chake, nakangana ndi nzeru yonse yeniyeni." 
Proverbs18:2 Wopusa sakondwera ndi kuzindikira; koma kungovumbulutsa za m'mtima mwake. 
Proverbs18:3 Pakudza wamphulupulu padzanso kunyoza; manyazi natsagana ndi chitonzo. 
Proverbs18:4 Mau a m'kamwa mwa munthu ndiwo madzi akuya; kasupe wa nzeru ndiye mtsinje wodzala. 
Proverbs18:5 Kukometsa mlandu wa wamphulupulu mwatsankho sikuli kwabwino, ngakhale kuchitira chetera wolungama." 
Proverbs18:6 Milomo ya wopusa ifikitsa makangano; ndipo m'kamwa mwake muputa kukwapulidwa. 
Proverbs18:7 M'kamwa mwa wopusa mumuononga, milomo yake ikhala msampha wa moyo wake." 
Proverbs18:8 Mau akazitape akunga zakudya zolongosoka, zotsikira m'kati mwa mimba." 
Proverbs18:9 Wogwira ntchito mwaulesi ndiye mbale wake wa wosakaza. 
Proverbs18:10 Dzina la Yehova ndilo nsanja yolimba; wolungama athamangiramo napulumuka. 
Proverbs18:11 Chuma cha wolemera ndicho mudzi wake wolimba; alingalira kuti ndicho khoma lalitali. 
Proverbs18:12 Mtima wa munthu unyada asanaonongeke; koma chifatso chitsogolera ulemu. 
Proverbs18:13 Wobwezera mau asanamvetse apusa, nadzichititsa manyazi." 
Proverbs18:14 Mtima wa munthu umlimbitsa alikudwala; koma ndani angatukule mtima wosweka? 
Proverbs18:15 Mtima wa wozindikira umaphunzira; khutu la anzeru lifunitsa kudziwa. 
Proverbs18:16 Mtulo wa munthu umtsegulira njira, numfikitsa pamaso pa akulu." 
Proverbs18:17 Woyamba kudzinenera ayang'anika wolungama; koma mnzake afika namuululitsa zake zonse. 
Proverbs18:18 Maere aletsa makangano, nulekanitsa amphamvu." 
Proverbs18:19 Kupembedza mbale utamchimwira nkovuta, kulanda mudzi wolimba nkosavuta; makangano akunga mipiringidzo ya linga." 
Proverbs18:20 Mimba ya munthu idzakhuta zipatso za m'kamwa mwake; iye nadzakhuta phindu la milomo yake. 
Proverbs18:21 Lilime lili ndi mphamvu pa imfa ndi moyo; wolikonda adzadya zipatso zake. 
Proverbs18:22 Wopeza mkazi apeza chinthu chabwino; Yehova amkomera mtima. 
Proverbs18:23 Wosauka amadandaulira; koma wolemera ayankha mwaukali. 
Proverbs18:24 Woyanjana ndi ambiri angodziononga; koma lilipo bwenzi lipambana ndi mbale kuumirira. 
Proverbs19:1 Wosauka woyenda mwangwiro aposa wokhetsa milomo ndi wopusa. 
Proverbs19:2 Kukhumba kosadziwa sikuli kwabwino; ndipo wofulumira ndi mapazi ake amachimwa. 
Proverbs19:3 Utsiru wa munthu ukhotetsa njira yake; mtima wake udandaula pa Yehova. 
Proverbs19:4 Chuma chionjezetsa mabwenzi ambiri; koma mnzake wa waumphawi amleka. 
Proverbs19:5 Mboni yonama sidzakhala yosalangidwa; wolankhula mabodza sadzapulumuka. 
Proverbs19:6 Ambiri adzapembedza waufulu; ndipo yense ndi bwenzi la munthu wopatsa. 
Proverbs19:7 Abale onse a wosauka amuda; nanga mabwenzi ake kodi satanimphirana naye? Awatsata ndi mau, koma kuli zii." 
Proverbs19:8 Wolandira nzeru akonda moyo wake; wosunga luntha adzapeza zabwino. 
Proverbs19:9 Mboni yonama sidzapulumuka chilango; wolankhula mabodza adzaonongeka. 
Proverbs19:10 Wopusa sayenera kukhala ndi zinthu zolongosoka; nanga kapolo ayenera kulamulira akalonga kodi? 
Proverbs19:11 Kulingalira kwa munthu kuchedwetsa mkwiyo; ulemerero wake uli wakuti akhululukire cholakwa. 
Proverbs19:12 Mkwiyo wa mfumu ukunga kubangula kwa mkango; koma kukoma mtima kwake kunga mame pamsipu. 
Proverbs19:13 Mwana wopusa ndiye tsoka la atate wake; ndipo makangano a mkazi ndiwo kudonthadonthabe. 
Proverbs19:14 Nyumba ndi chuma ndizo cholowa cha atate; koma mkazi wanzeru achokera kwa Yehova. 
Proverbs19:15 Ulesi ugonetsa tulo tofa nato; ndipo moyo wamkhongono udzamva njala. 
Proverbs19:16 Wosunga lamulo asunga moyo wake; wonyalanyaza mayendedwe ake adzafa. 
Proverbs19:17 Wochitira waumphawi chifundo abwereka Yehova; adzambwezera chokoma chakecho. 
Proverbs19:18 Menya mwanako, chiyembekezero chilipo, osafunitsa kumuononga." 
Proverbs19:19 Munthu waukali alipire mwini; pakuti ukampulumutsa udzateronso. 
Proverbs19:20 Tamvera uphungu, nulandire mwambo, kuti ukhale wanzeru pa chimaliziro chako." 
Proverbs19:21 Muli zolingalira zambiri m'mtima mwa munthu; koma uphungu wa Yehova ndiwo udzaimika. 
Proverbs19:22 Chotikondetsa munthu ndicho kukoma mtima kwake; ndipo wosauka apambana munthu wonama. 
Proverbs19:23 Kuopa Yehova kupatsa moyo; wokhala nako adzakhala wokhuta; zoipa sizidzamgwera. 
Proverbs19:24 Waulesi alonga dzanja lake m'mbale, osalibwezanso kukamwa kwake." 
Proverbs19:25 Menya wonyoza, ndipo achibwana adzachenjera; nudzudzule wozindikira adzazindikira nzeru." 
Proverbs19:26 Wolanda za atate, ndi wopirikitsa amai, ndiye mwana wochititsa manyazi ndi wogwetsa nkhope." 
Proverbs19:27 Ukangofuna, mwananga, kusochera kusiya mau akudziwitsa, leka kumva mwambo." 
Proverbs19:28 Mboni yopanda pake inyoza chiweruzo; m'kamwa mwa amphulupulu mumeza zoipa. 
Proverbs19:29 Akonzera onyoza chiweruzo, ndi mikwingwirima pamsana pa opusa." 
Proverbs20:1 Vinyo achita chiphwete, chakumwa chaukali chisokosa; wosochera nazo alibe nzeru." 
Proverbs20:2 Kuopsa kwa mfumu ndiko kubangula kwa mkango; womputa achimwira moyo wakewake. 
Proverbs20:3 Kuli ulemu kwa mwamuna kupewa ndeu; koma zitsiru zonse zimangokangana. 
Proverbs20:4 Waulesi salima chifukwa cha chisanu; adzapemphapempha m'masika osalandira kanthu. 
Proverbs20:5 Uphungu wa m'mtima mwa munthu ndiwo madzi akuya; koma munthu wozindikira adzatungapo. 
Proverbs20:6 Anthu ambiri abukitsa yense kukoma mtima kwake; koma ndani angapeze munthu wokhulupirika? 
Proverbs20:7 Wolungama woyenda mwangwiro, anake adala pambuyo pake." 
Proverbs20:8 Mfumu yokhala pa mpando woweruzira ipirikitsa zoipa zonse ndi maso ake. 
Proverbs20:9 Ndani anganene, Ndasambitsa mtima wanga, ndayera opanda tchimo?" 
Proverbs20:10 Miyeso yosiyana, ndi malichero osiyana, zonse ziwirizi zinyansa Yehova." 
Proverbs20:11 Ngakhale mwana adziwika ndi ntchito zake; ngati ntchito yake ili yoyera ngakhale yolungama. 
Proverbs20:12 Khutu lakumva, ndi diso lopenya, Yehova anapanga onse awiriwo." 
Proverbs20:13 Usakonde tulo ungasauke; phenyula maso, udzakhuta zakudya." 
Proverbs20:14 Wogula ati, Chachabe chimenecho, koma atachoka adzitama." 
Proverbs20:15 Alipo golide ndi ngale zambiri; koma milomo yodziwa ndiyo chokometsera cha mtengo wapatali. 
Proverbs20:16 Tenga malaya a woperekera mlendo chikole; woperekera mkazi wachilendo chikole umgwire mwini. 
Proverbs20:17 Zakudya za chinyengo zikondweretsa munthu; koma pambuyo pake m'kamwa mwake mudzadzala tinsangalabwi. 
Proverbs20:18 Uphungu utsimikiza zolingalira, ponya nkhondo utapanga upo." 
Proverbs20:19 Kazitape woyendayenda awanditsa zinsinsi; usadudukire woyasama milomo yake. 
Proverbs20:20 Wotemberera atate wake ndi amake, nyali yake idzazima mu mdima woti bii." 
Proverbs20:21 Cholowa chingalandiridwe msangamsanga poyamba pake; koma chitsiriziro chake sichidzadala. 
Proverbs20:22 Usanene, Ndidzabwezera zoipa; yembekeza Yehova, adzakupulumutsa." 
Proverbs20:23 Miyeso yosiyana inyansa Yehova, ndi mulingo wonyenga suli wabwino." 
Proverbs20:24 Yehova alongosola mayendedwe a mwamuna; munthu tsono angazindikire bwanji njira yake? 
Proverbs20:25 Kunena mwansontho, Ichi nchopatulika, kuli msampha kwa munthu, ndi kusinkhasinkha pambuyo pake atawinda." 
Proverbs20:26 Mfumu yanzeru ipeta amphulupulu, niyendetsapo njinga ya galeta." 
Proverbs20:27 Mzimu wa munthu ndiwo nyali ya Yehova; usanthula m'kati monse mwa mimba. 
Proverbs20:28 Chifundo ndi ntheradi zisunga mfumu; chifundo chichirikiza mpando wake. 
Proverbs20:29 Ulemerero wa anyamata ndiwo mphamvu yao; kukongola kwa nkhalamba ndi imvi. 
Proverbs20:30 Mikwingwirima yopweteka ichotsa zoipa; ndi mikwapulo ilowa m'kati mwa mimba. 
Proverbs21:1 Mtima wa mfumu uli m'dzanja la Yehova ngati mitsinje ya madzi; aulozetsa komwe afuna. 
Proverbs21:2 Njira zonse za munthu zilungama pamaso pake; koma Yehova ayesa mitima. 
Proverbs21:3 Kuchita chilungamo ndi chiweruzo kupambana ndi nsembe kumkonda Yehova. 
Proverbs21:4 Maso akunyada, ndi mtima wodzikuza, ndi nyali ya oipa, zili tchimo." 
Proverbs21:5 Zoganizira za wakhama zichulukitsadi katundu; koma yense wansontho angopeza umphawi. 
Proverbs21:6 Kupata chuma ndi lilime lonama ndiko nkhungu yoyendayenda, ngakhale misampha ya imfa." 
Proverbs21:7 Chiwawa cha amphulupulu chidzawakokolola; chifukwa akana kuchita chiweruzo. 
Proverbs21:8 Wosenza tchimo njira yake ikhotakhota; koma ntchito ya woyera mtima ilungama. 
Proverbs21:9 Kukhala pangodya ya tsindwi kufunika kuposa kukhala m'nyumba ndi mkazi wolongolola. 
Proverbs21:10 Wamphulupulu mtima wake umkhumba zoipa; sakomera mtima mnzake. 
Proverbs21:11 Polangidwa wonyoza, wachibwana alandira nzeru, naphunzira pakuyang'ana pa wanzeru." 
Proverbs21:12 Wolungama aganizira za nyumba ya wamphulupulu, kuti amphulupulu amagwetsedwa, naona zoipa." 
Proverbs21:13 Wotseka makutu ake polira waumphawi, nayenso adzalira koma osamvedwa." 
Proverbs21:14 Mphatso ya m'tseri ipembedza mkwiyo, ndi mtulo wa pamfunga ukali wolimba." 
Proverbs21:15 Kuchita chiweruzo kukondweretsa wolungama; koma kuwaononga akuchita mphulupulu. 
Proverbs21:16 Munthu wosochera pa njira ya nzeru adzakhala m'msonkhano wa akufa. 
Proverbs21:17 Wokonda zoseketsa adzasauka; wokonda vinyo ndi mafuta sadzalemera. 
Proverbs21:18 Wochimwa ndiye chiombolo cha wolungama; ndipo wachiwembu adzalowa m'malo mwa oongoka mtima. 
Proverbs21:19 Kukhala m'chipululu kufunika kuposa kukhala ndi mkazi wolongolola ndi wong'ung'udza. 
Proverbs21:20 Mokhala wanzeru muli katundu wofunika ndi mafuta; koma wopusa angozimeza. 
Proverbs21:21 Wolondola chilungamo ndi chifundo apeza moyo, ndi chilungamo, ndi ulemu." 
Proverbs21:22 Wanzeru akwera pa mudzi wa olimba, nagwetsa mphamvu yake imene anaikhulupirira." 
Proverbs21:23 Wosunga m'kamwa mwake ndi lilime lake asunga moyo wake kumavuto. 
Proverbs21:24 Wonyada wodzikuza dzina lake ndiye wonyoza; achita mwaukali modzitama. 
Proverbs21:25 Chifuniro cha waulesi chimupha; chifukwa manja ake akana kugwira ntchito. 
Proverbs21:26 Ena asirira modukidwa tsiku lonse; koma wolungama amapatsa osamana. 
Proverbs21:27 Nsembe ya oipa inyansa; makamaka pakudza nayo iwo mwachiwembu. 
Proverbs21:28 Mboni yonama idzafa; koma mwamuna wakumvetsa adzanena mosakayika. 
Proverbs21:29 Munthu woipa aumitsa nkhope yake; koma woongoka mtima akonza njira zake. 
Proverbs21:30 Kulibe nzeru ngakhale luntha ngakhale uphungu wotsutsana ndi Yehova. 
Proverbs21:31 Kavalo amakonzedweratu chifukwa cha tsiku la nkhondo; koma wopulumutsa ndiye Yehova. 
Proverbs22:1 Mbiri yabwino ifunika kopambana chuma chambiri; kukukomera mtima anzako kuposa siliva ndi golide. 
Proverbs22:2 Wolemera ndi wosauka akumana, wolenga onsewo ndiye Yehova." 
Proverbs22:3 Wochenjera aona zoipa, nabisala; koma achibwana angopitirira, nalipitsidwa." 
Proverbs22:4 Mphotho ya chifatso ndi kuopa Yehova ndiye chuma, ndi ulemu, ndi moyo." 
Proverbs22:5 Minga ndi misampha ili m'njira ya wokhota; koma wosunga moyo wake adzatalikira imeneyo. 
Proverbs22:6 Phunzitsa mwana poyamba njira yake; ndipo angakhale atakalamba sadzachokamo. 
Proverbs22:7 Wolemera alamulira osauka; ndipo wokongola ndiye kapolo wa womkongoletsa. 
Proverbs22:8 Wofesa zosalungama adzakolola tsoka; ndipo nthyole ya mkwiyo wake idzalephera. 
Proverbs22:9 Mwini diso lamataya adzadala; pakuti apatsa osauka zakudya zake. 
Proverbs22:10 Ukainga wonyoza, makangano adzatuluka; makani ndi manyazi adzalekeka." 
Proverbs22:11 Wokonda kuyera mtima, mfumu idzakhala bwenzi lake chifukwa cha chisomo cha milomo yake." 
Proverbs22:12 Maso a Yehova atchinjiriza wodziwa; koma agwetsa mau a munthu wa ziwembu. 
Proverbs22:13 Waulesi ati, Pali mkango panjapo, ndidzaphedwa pamakwalalapo." 
Proverbs22:14 M'kamwa mwa mkazi wachiwerewere muli dzenje lakuya; yemwe Yehova amkwiyira adzagwamo. 
Proverbs22:15 Utsiru umangidwa mumtima mwa mwana; koma nthyole yomlangira idzauingitsira kutali. 
Proverbs22:16 Wotsendereza waumphawi kuti achulukitse chuma chake, ndi wopatsa wolemera kanthu, angosauka." 
Proverbs22:17 Tchera makutu ako, numvere mau a anzeru, nulozetse mtima wako kukadziwa zanga." 
Proverbs22:18 Pakuti mauwo akondweretsa ngati uwasunga m'kati mwako, ngati akhazikika pamodzi pa milomo yako." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndakudziwitsa amenewo lero, ngakhale iwedi, kuti ukhulupirire Yehova." 
Proverbs22:20 Kodi sindinakulembera zoposa za uphungu ndi nzeru; 
Proverbs22:21 kuti ukadziwitse ntheradi yake ya mau oona, nukabwere ndi mau oona kwa iwo amene anakutumiza?" 
Proverbs22:22 Usalande za waumphawi chifukwa ali waumphawi, ngakhale kutsendereza wosauka kubwalo." 
Proverbs22:23 Pakuti Yehova adzanenera mlandu wao; omwe akwatula zao Iye adzakwatula moyo wao. 
Proverbs22:24 Usayanjane ndi munthu wokwiya msanga; ngakhale kupita ndi mwamuna waukali; 
Proverbs22:25 kuti ungaphunzire mayendedwe ake, ndi kutengera moyo wako msampha." 
Proverbs22:26 Usakhale wodulirana mpherere, ngakhale kumperekera chikole cha ngongole zake." 
Proverbs22:27 Ngati ulibe chobwezera kodi achotserenji kama lako pansi pako? 
Proverbs22:28 Usasunthe chidziwitso chakale cha m'malire, chimene makolo ako anachiimika." 
Proverbs22:29 Kodi upenya munthu wofulumiza ntchito zake? Adzaima pamaso pa mafumu, osaima pamaso pa anthu achabe." 
Proverbs23:1 Pamene ukhala ulinkudya ndi mkulu, zikumbukira ameneyo ali pamaso pako;" 
Proverbs23:2 nuike mpeni pakhosi pako, ngati uli wadyera." 
Proverbs23:3 Usakhumbe zolongosoka zake; pokhala zakudya zonyenga. 
Proverbs23:4 Usadzitopetse kuti ulemere; leka nzeru yakoyako. 
Proverbs23:5 Kodi upenyeranji chimene kulibe? Pakuti chuma chimera mapiko, ngati mphungu youluka mumlengalenga." 
Proverbs23:6 Usadye zakudya zake za wa maso ankhwenzule, ngakhale kukhumba zolongosoka zake." 
Proverbs23:7 Pakuti monga asinkha m'kati mwake, ali wotere; ati kwa iwe, Idya numwe; koma mtima wake suli pa iwe." 
Proverbs23:8 Pakuti nthongo imene unaidya udzaisanza, ndi kutaya mau ako okondweretsa." 
Proverbs23:9 Usalankhule m'makutu a wopusa; pakuti adzapeputsa nzeru ya mau ako. 
Proverbs23:10 Usasunthe chidziwitso chakale cha m'malire; ngakhale kulowa m'minda ya amasiye; 
Proverbs23:11 pakuti Mombolo wao walimba; adzawanenera mlandu wao pa iwe. 
Proverbs23:12 Lozetsa mtima wako kumwambo, ndi makutu ako ku mau anzeru." 
Proverbs23:13 Usamane mwana chilango; pakuti ukammenya ndi nthyole safa ai. 
Proverbs23:14 Udzammenya ndi nthyole, nudzapulumutsa moyo wake kunsi kwa manda." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwananga, mtima wako ukakhala wanzeru, mtima wanga wa inedi udzakondwa." 
Proverbs23:16 Imso zanga zidzasangalala, polankhula milomo yako zoongoka." 
Proverbs23:17 Mtima wako usachitire nsanje akuchimwawo; koma opabe Yehova tsiku lonse. 
Proverbs23:18 Pakutitu padzakhala mphotho; ndipo chiyembekezo chako sichidzalephereka. 
Proverbs23:19 Tamvera tsopano, mwananga, utenge nzeru, ulunjikitse mtima wako m'njiramo." 
Proverbs23:20 Usakhale mwa akumwaimwa vinyo, ndi ankhuli osusuka." 
Proverbs23:21 Pakuti wakumwaimwa ndi wosusukayo adzasauka; ndipo kusinza kudzaveka munthu nsanza. 
Proverbs23:22 Tamvera atate wako anakubala, usapeputse amai ako atakalamba." 
Proverbs23:23 Gula ntheradi, osaigulitsa; nzeru, ndi mwambo, ndi luntha." 
Proverbs23:24 Atate wa wolungama adzasekeradi; wobala mwana wanzeru adzakondwera naye. 
Proverbs23:25 Atate wako ndi amai ako akondwere, amai ako akukubala asekere." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwananga, undipatse mtima wako, maso ako akondwere ndi njira zanga." 
Proverbs23:27 Pakuti mkazi wadama ndiye dzenje lakuya; ndipo mkazi wachiwerewere ndiye mbuna yopapatiza. 
Proverbs23:28 Pakuti abisalira ngati wachifwamba, nachulukitsa anthu a chiwembu." 
Proverbs23:29 Ndani ali ndi chisoni? Ndani asauka? Ndani ali ndi makangano? Ndani ang'ung'udza? Ndani alasidwa chabe? Ndani afiira maso? 
Proverbs23:30 Ngamene achedwa pali vinyo, napita kukafunafuna vinyo wosanganizidwa." 
Proverbs23:31 Usayang'ane pavinyo alikufiira, alikung'azimira m'chikho, namweka mosalala." 
Proverbs23:32 Pa chitsiriziro chake aluma ngati njoka, najompha ngati mamba." 
Proverbs23:33 Maso ako adzaona zachilendo, mtima wako udzalankhula zokhota." 
Proverbs23:34 Udzafanana ndi wina wogona pakati pa nyanja, pena wogona pa nsonga ya mlongoti wa ngalawa." 
Proverbs23:35 Udzati, Anandimenya, osaphwetekedwa ine; anandikwapula, osamva ine; ndidzauka nthawi yanji? Ndidzafunafunanso vinyoyo." 
Proverbs24:1 Usachitire nsanje anthu oipa, ngakhale kufuna kukhala nao;" 
Proverbs24:2 pakuti mtima wao ulingalira za chionongeko; milomo yao ilankhula za mphulupulu. 
Proverbs24:3 Nzeru imangitsa nyumba; luntha liikhazikitsa. 
Proverbs24:4 Kudziwa kudzaza zipinda zake ndi chuma chonse chofunika cha mtengo wake. 
Proverbs24:5 Mwamuna wanzeru ngwamphamvu; munthu wodziwa ankabe nalimba. 
Proverbs24:6 Pakuti udzaponya nkhondo yako ndi upo, ndi kupulumuka pochuluka aphungu." 
Proverbs24:7 Nzeru italikira chitsiru; satsegula pakamwa kubwalo. 
Proverbs24:8 Wolingalira zakuchita zoipa anthu adzamtcha wachiwembu. 
Proverbs24:9 Maganizo opusa ndiwo tchimo; wonyoza anyansa anthu. 
Proverbs24:10 Ukalefuka tsiku la tsoka mphamvu yako ichepa. 
Proverbs24:11 Omwe atengedwa kuti akafe, uwapulumutse; omwe ati aphedwe, usaleke kuwalanditsa." 
Proverbs24:12 Ukanena, Taonani, sitinadziwa chimenechi; kodi woyesa mitima sachizindikira ichi? Ndi wosunga moyo wako kodi sachidziwa? Ndipo kodi sabwezera munthu yense monga mwa machitidwe ake?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwananga, idya uchi pakuti ngwabwino, ndi chisa chake chitsekemera m'kamwa mwako." 
Proverbs24:14 Potero udzadziwa kuti nzeru ili yotero m'moyo wako; ngati waipeza padzakhala mphotho, ndipo chiyembekezo chako sichidzalephereka." 
Proverbs24:15 Usabisalire, woipa iwe, pomanga wolungama; usapasule popuma iyepo." 
Proverbs24:16 Pakuti wolungama amagwa kasanu ndi kawiri, nanyamukanso; koma oipa akhumudwa pomfikira tsoka." 
Proverbs24:17 Usakondwere pakugwa mdani wako; mtima wako usasekere pokhumudwa iye; 
Proverbs24:18 kuti Yehova angaone kukondwa kwako, ndi kukuyesa koipa, ndi kuleka kumkwiyira." 
Proverbs24:19 Usavutike mtima chifukwa cha ochita zoipa; ngakhale kuchitira nsanje amphulupulu. 
Proverbs24:20 Pakuti woipayo sadzalandira mphotho; nyali ya amphulupulu idzazima. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwananga, opa Yehova ndi mfumu yomwe, osadudukira anthu osinthasintha." 
Proverbs24:22 Pakuti tsoka lao lidzaoneka modzidzimuka; ndipo ndani adziwa chionongeko cha zaka zao? 
Proverbs24:23 Izinso zili za anzeru, poweruza chetera silili labwino." 
Proverbs24:24 Wonena kwa woipa, Wolungama iwe; magulu a anthu adzamtemberera, mitundu ya anthu idzamkwiyira." 
Proverbs24:25 Omwe amdzudzula adzasekera, nadzadalitsika ndithu." 
Proverbs24:26 Wobwezera mau oongoka apsompsona milomo. 
Proverbs24:27 Longosola ntchito yako panjapo, nuikonzeretu kumunda; pambuyo pake ndi kumanga nyumba yako." 
Proverbs24:28 Usachitire mnzako umboni womtsutsa opanda chifukwa; kodi udzanyenga ndi milomo yako? 
Proverbs24:29 Usanene, Ndidzamchitira zomwezo anandichitira ine ndidzabwereza munthuyo monga mwa machitidwe ake." 
Proverbs24:30 Ndinapita pa munda wa waulesi, polima mphesa munthu wosowa nzeru." 
Proverbs24:31 Taonani, ponsepo panamera minga, ndi kuwirirapo khwisa; tchinga lake lamiyala ndi kupasuka." 
Proverbs24:32 Pamenepo ndinayang'ana ndi kuganizira, ndinaona ndi kulandira mwambo." 
Proverbs24:33 Tulo tapang'ono, kungoodzera pang'ono, kungomanga manja pang'ono m'kugona," 
Proverbs24:34 ndipo umphawi wako udzafika ngati mbala; ndi kusauka kwako ngati munthu wachikopa. 
Proverbs25:1 Iyinso ndiyo miyambo ya Solomoni imene anthu a Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda anailemba. 
Proverbs25:2 Kubisa kanthu ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu; koma ulemerero wa mafumu ndi kusanthula kanthu. 
Proverbs25:3 Pamlengalenga patalika, ndi padziko pakuya, koma mitima ya mafumu singasanthulike." 
Proverbs25:4 Chotsera siliva mphala yake, mmisiri wa ng'anjo atulutsamo mbale." 
Proverbs25:5 Chotsera woipa pamaso pa mfumu, mpando wake udzakhazikika m'chilungamo." 
Proverbs25:6 Usadzitame pamaso pa mfumu, ngakhale kuima m'malo mwa akulu." 
Proverbs25:7 Pakuti kunena kwa iwe, Takwera kuno, kupambana ndi kuti utsitsidwe pamaso pa kalonga, amene maso ako anamuona." 
Proverbs25:8 Usatuluke mwansontho kukalimbana, ungalephere pa kutha kwake, atakuchititsa mnzako manyazi." 
Proverbs25:9 Nena mlandu wako ndi mnzako, osawulula zinsinsi za mwini;" 
Proverbs25:10 kuti wakumva angakutonze, mbiri yako yoipa ndi kusachoka." 
Proverbs25:11 Mau oyenera a pa nthawi yake akunga zipatso zagolide m'nsengwa zasiliva. 
Proverbs25:12 Monga mphete yagolide ndi chipini chagolide woyengeka, momwemo wanzeru wodzudzula pa khutu lomvera." 
Proverbs25:13 Monga chisanu cha chipale chofewa pa nthawi ya masika, momwemo mthenga wokhulupirika kwa amene anamtuma; atsitsimutsa moyo wa ambuyake." 
Proverbs25:14 Monga mitambo ndi mphepo popanda mvula, momwemo ndiye wodzikweza ndi zipatso zake monyenga." 
Proverbs25:15 Chipiriro chipembedza mkulu; lilime lofatsa lithyola fupa. 
Proverbs25:16 Wapeza uchi kodi? Idyapo wokwanira, kuti ungakukole, nusanze." 
Proverbs25:17 Phazi lako lilowe m'nyumba ya mnzako kamodzikamodzi; kuti angatope nawe ndi kukuda. 
Proverbs25:18 Wochitira mnzake umboni wonama ndiye chibonga, ndi lupanga, ndi muvi wakuthwa." 
Proverbs25:19 Kukhulupirira munthu wa chiwembu tsiku latsoka kunga dzino lothyoka ndi phazi loguluka. 
Proverbs25:20 Monga wovula malaya tsiku lamphepo, ngakhale kuthira vinyo wosasa m'soda, momwemo woimbira nyimbo munthu wachisoni." 
Proverbs25:21 Mdani wako akamva njala umdyetse, akamva ludzu ummwetse madzi." 
Proverbs25:22 Pakuti udzaunjika makala amoto pamtu pake; ndipo Yehova adzakupatsa mphotho. 
Proverbs25:23 Mphepo ya kumpoto ifikitsa mvula; chomwecho lilime losinjirira likwiyitsa nkhope. 
Proverbs25:24 Kukhala pangodya ya tsindwi kufunika kuposa kukhala m'nyumba ndi mkazi wolongolola. 
Proverbs25:25 Monga madzi ozizira kwa munthu wotopa, momwemo mau abwino akuchokera kudziko lakutali." 
Proverbs25:26 Monga kasupe wopondedwa, ndi chitsime choonongeka, momwemo wolungama ngati agonjera woipa." 
Proverbs25:27 Kudya uchi wambiri sikuli kwabwino; chomwecho kufunafuna ulemu wakowako sikuli ulemu. 
Proverbs25:28 Wosalamulira mtima wake akunga mudzi wopasuka wopanda linga. 
Proverbs26:1 Monga chipale chofewa m'malimwe, ndi mvula m'masika, momwemo ulemu suyenera chitsiru." 
Proverbs26:2 Monga mpheta ilikuzungulira, ndi namzeze alikuuluka, momwemo temberero la pachabe silifikira." 
Proverbs26:3 Chikoti chiyenera kavalo, ndi cham'kamwa chiyenera bulu, ndi nthyole iyenera pamsana pa zitsiru." 
Proverbs26:4 Usayankhe chitsiru monga mwa utsiru wake, kuti ungafanane nacho iwe wekha." 
Proverbs26:5 Yankha chitsiru monga mwa utsiru wake, kuti asadziyese wanzeru." 
Proverbs26:6 Wotumiza mau ndi dzanja la chitsiru adula mapazi ake, namwa zompweteka." 
Proverbs26:7 Miyendo ya wopunduka ili yolobodoka, momwemo mwambi m'kamwa mwa zitsiru." 
Proverbs26:8 Monga thumba la ngale m'mulu wa miyala, momwemo wochitira chitsiru ulemu." 
Proverbs26:9 Monga munga wolasa dzanja la woledzera, momwemo mwambi m'kamwa mwa zitsiru." 
Proverbs26:10 Monga woponya mivi ndi kulasa onse, momwemo wolembera chitsiru, ndi wolembera omwe alikupita panjira." 
Proverbs26:11 Monga galu abweranso kumasanzi ake, momwemo chitsiru chichitanso zopusa zake." 
Proverbs26:12 Kodi uona munthu wodziyesa wanzeru? Ngakhale chitsiru chidzachenjera koma ameneyo ai. 
Proverbs26:13 Waulesi ati, Mkango uli panjira, wobangulawo uli m'makwalala." 
Proverbs26:14 Monga chitseko chikankhikira pa zitsulo za pamphuthu, momwemo waulesi agubuduka pakama pake." 
Proverbs26:15 Waulesi alonga dzanja lake m'mbale; kumtopetsa kulibweza kukamwa kwake. 
Proverbs26:16 Waulesi adziyesa wanzeru koposa anthu asanu ndi awiri akuyankha mozindikira. 
Proverbs26:17 Wakungopita ndi kuvutika ndi ndeu yosakhala yake akunga wogwira makutu a galu. 
Proverbs26:18 Monga woyaluka woponya nsakali, mivi, ndi imfa," 
Proverbs26:19 momwemo wonyenga mnzake ndi kuti, ndi kusewera kumeneku." 
Proverbs26:20 Posowa nkhuni moto ungozima; ndi popanda kazitape makangano angoleka. 
Proverbs26:21 Monga makala ozizira pa makala akunyeka, ndi nkhuni pamoto; momwemo munthu wamakangano autsa ndeu." 
Proverbs26:22 Mau a kazitape ndi zakudya zolongosoka zitsikira m'kati mwa mimba. 
Proverbs26:23 Milomo yofunitsitsa ndi mtima woipa ikunga mbale yadothi anaimata ndi mphala yasiliva. 
Proverbs26:24 Wakuda mnzake amanyenga ndi milomo yake; koma akundika chinyengo m'kati mwake. 
Proverbs26:25 Pamene akometsa mau ake usamkhulupirire; pakuti m'mtima mwake muli zonyansa zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Proverbs26:26 Angakhale abisa udani wake pochenjera, koma udyo wake udzavumbulutsidwa posonkhana anthu." 
Proverbs26:27 Wokumba dzenje adzagwamo, wogubuduza mwala, udzabweranso pa iye mwini." 
Proverbs26:28 Lilime lonama lida omwewo linawasautsa; ndipo m'kamwa mosyasyalika mungoononga. 
Proverbs27:1 Usanyadire zamawa, popeza sudziwa tsiku lina lidzabala chiyani?" 
Proverbs27:2 Wina akutume, si m'kamwa mwako ai; mlendo, si milomo ya iwe wekha." 
Proverbs27:3 Mwala ulemera, mchenga ndiwo katundu; koma mkwiyo wa chitsiru upambana kulemera kwake." 
Proverbs27:4 Kupweteka mtima nkwa nkhanza, mkwiyo usefuka; koma ndani angalakike ndi nsanje?" 
Proverbs27:5 Chidzudzulo chomveka chiposa chikondi chobisika. 
Proverbs27:6 Kulasa kwa bwenzi kuli kokhulupirika; koma mdani apsompsona kawirikawiri. 
Proverbs27:7 Mtima wokhuta upondereza chisa cha uchi; koma wakumva njala ayesa zowawa zonse zotsekemera. 
Proverbs27:8 Monga mbalame yosochera kuchisa chake, momwemo munthu wosochera kumalo ake." 
Proverbs27:9 Mafuta ndi zonunkhira zikondweretsa mtima, ndi ubwino wa bwenzi uteronso pakupangira uphungu." 
Proverbs27:10 Mnzako, ndi mnzake wa atate wako, usawasiye; usanke kunyumba ya mbale wako tsiku la tsoka lako; mnansi wapafupi aposa mbale wakutali." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwananga, khala wanzeru, nukondweretse mtima wanga; kuti ndimuyankhe yemwe anditonza." 
Proverbs27:12 Wochenjera aona zoipa, nabisala; koma achibwana angopitirira, nalipitsidwa." 
Proverbs27:13 Tenga malaya a woperekera mlendo chikole; woperekera mkazi wachiwerewere chikole umgwire mwini. 
Proverbs27:14 Yemwe adalitsa mnzake ndi mau akulu pouka mamawa, anthu adzachiyesa chimenecho temberero." 
Proverbs27:15 Kudonthadontha tsiku lamvula, ndi mkazi wolongolola ali amodzimodzi." 
Proverbs27:16 Wofuna kumletsayo afuna kuletsa mphepo; dzanja lake lamanja lingogwira mafuta. 
Proverbs27:17 Chitsulo chinola chitsulo; chomwecho munthu anola nkhope ya mnzake. 
Proverbs27:18 Wosunga mkuyu adzadya zipatso zake; wosamalira ambuyake adzalemekezedwa. 
Proverbs27:19 Monga m'madzi nkhope zionana, momwemo mitima ya anthu idziwana." 
Proverbs27:20 Kunsi kwa manda ndi kuchionongeko sikukhuta; ngakhale maso a munthu sakhutai. 
Proverbs27:21 Siliva asungunuka m'mbiya, ndi golide m'ng'anjo, motero chomwe munthu achitama adziwika nacho." 
Proverbs27:22 Ungakhale ukonola chitsiru m'mtondo ndi munsi, pamodzi ndi mphale, koma utsiru wake sudzamchoka." 
Proverbs27:23 Udziwitsitse zoweta zako zili bwanji, samalira magulu ako;" 
Proverbs27:24 pakuti chuma sichili chosatha; kodi korona alipobe mpaka mibadwomibadwo. 
Proverbs27:25 Amatuta udzu, msipu uoneka, atchera masamba a kumapiri." 
Proverbs27:26 Anaankhosa akuveka, atonde aombolera munda;" 
Proverbs27:27 mkaka wa mbuzi udzakukwanira kudya; ndi a pa banja lako ndi adzakazi ako. 
Proverbs28:1 Woipa athawa palibe momthamangitsa; koma olungama alimba mtima ngati mkango. 
Proverbs28:2 Pochimwa dziko akalonga ake achuluka; koma anthu ozindikira ndi odziwa alikhazikikitsa nthawi yaikulu. 
Proverbs28:3 Munthu waumphawi wotsendereza osauka akunga mvula yamadzi yokokolola dzinthu. 
Proverbs28:4 Omwe asiya chilamulo atama oipa; koma omwe asunga chilamulo akangana nao. 
Proverbs28:5 Oipa samvetsetsa chiweruzo; koma omwe afuna Yehova amvetsetsa zonse. 
Proverbs28:6 Waumphawi woyenda mwangwiro apambana ndi yemwe akhotetsa njira zake, angakhale alemera." 
Proverbs28:7 Wosunga chilamulo ndiye mwana wozindikira; koma mnzao wa adyera achititsa atate wake manyazi. 
Proverbs28:8 Wochulukitsa chuma chake, pokongoletsa ndi phindu, angokundikira yemwe achitira osauka chisoni." 
Proverbs28:9 Wopewetsa khutu lake kuti asamve chilamulo, ngakhale pemphero lake linyansa." 
Proverbs28:10 Wosocheretsa oongoka mtima alowe m'njira yoipa, adzagwa mwini m'dzenje lake; koma angwiro adzalandira cholowa chabwino." 
Proverbs28:11 Wolemera adziyesa wanzeru; koma wosauka wozindikira aululitsa zake. 
Proverbs28:12 Posekera olungama pali ulemerero wambiri; koma pouka oipa anthu amabisala. 
Proverbs28:13 Wobisa machimo ake sadzaona mwai; koma wakuwavomereza, nawasiya adzachitidwa chifundo." 
Proverbs28:14 Wodala munthu wakuopa kosalekeza; koma woumitsa mtima wake adzagwa m'zoipa. 
Proverbs28:15 Monga mkango wobangula ndi chilombo choyendayenda, momwemo mfumu yoipa ya anthu osauka." 
Proverbs28:16 Kalonga wosowa nzeru apambana kusautsa; koma yemwe ada chisiriro adzatanimphitsa moyo wake. 
Proverbs28:17 Wopalamula mlandu wakupha munthu adzathawira kudzenje; asamuletse. 
Proverbs28:18 Woyenda mwangwiro adzapulumuka; koma wokhota m'mayendedwe ake adzagwa posachedwa. 
Proverbs28:19 Wolima munda wake zakudya zidzamkwanira; koma wotsata anthu opanda pake umphawi udzamkwanira. 
Proverbs28:20 Munthu wokhulupirika ali ndi madalitso ambiri; koma wokangaza kulemera sadzapulumuka chilango. 
Proverbs28:21 Chetera silili labwino, ngakhale kulakwa kuti ukadye kanthu." 
Proverbs28:22 Mwini diso lankhwenzule akangaza kulemera, osadziwa kuti umphawi udzamfikira." 
Proverbs28:23 Adzamkomera mtima wodzudzula m'tsogolo mwake, koposa wosyasyalika ndi lilime lake." 
Proverbs28:24 Wobera atate wake, pena amake, nati, Palibe kulakwa; ndiye mnzake wa munthu wopasula." 
Proverbs28:25 Wodukidwa mtima aputa makangano; koma wokhulupirira Yehova adzakula. 
Proverbs28:26 Wokhulupirira mtima wakewake ali wopusa; koma woyenda mwanzeru adzapulumuka. 
Proverbs28:27 Wogawira aumphawi sadzasowa; koma wophimba maso ake adzatembereredwa kwambiri. 
Proverbs28:28 Pouka oipa anthu amabisala; koma pakufa amenewo olungama achuluka. 
Proverbs29:1 Yemwe aumitsa khosi atadzudzulidwa kwambiri, adzasweka modzidzimuka, palibe chomchiritsa." 
Proverbs29:2 Pochuluka olungama anthu akondwa; koma polamulira woipa anthu ausa moyo. 
Proverbs29:3 Mwamuna wokonda nzeru akondweretsa atate wake; koma wotsagana ndi akazi adama amwaza chuma. 
Proverbs29:4 Mfumu akhazikitsa dziko ndi chiweruzo; koma wosonkhetsa anthu mphatso alipululutsa. 
Proverbs29:5 Wosyasyalika mnzake atcherera mapazi ake ukonde. 
Proverbs29:6 M'kulakwa kwa woipa muli msampha; koma wolungama aimba, nakondwera." 
Proverbs29:7 Wolungama asamalira mlandu wa osauka; koma woipa alibe nzeru yakuudziwa. 
Proverbs29:8 Anthu onyoza atentha mudzi; koma anzeru alezetsa mkwiyo. 
Proverbs29:9 Munthu wanzeru akatsutsana ndi munthu wopusa, ngakhale akwiya, ngakhale aseka, palibe mtendere." 
Proverbs29:10 Anthu ankhanza ada wangwiro; koma oongoka mtima asamalira moyo wake. 
Proverbs29:11 Chitsiru chivumbulutsa mkwiyo wake wonse; koma wanzeru auletsa nautontholetsa. 
Proverbs29:12 Mkulu akamvera chinyengo, atumiki ake onse ali oipa." 
Proverbs29:13 Waumphawi ndi wotsendereza akumana; Yehova apenyetsa maso a onse awiriwo. 
Proverbs29:14 Mfumu yolamulira osauka mwantheradi, mpando wake udzakhazikika kufikira nthawi zonse." 
Proverbs29:15 Nthyole ndi chidzudzulo zipatsa nzeru; koma mwana womlekerera achititsa amake manyazi. 
Proverbs29:16 Pochuluka oipa zolakwa zichuluka; koma olungama adzaona kugwa kwao. 
Proverbs29:17 Langiza mwana wako, ndipo adzakupumitsa; nadzasangalatsa moyo wako." 
Proverbs29:18 Popanda chivumbulutso anthu amasauka; koma wosunga chilamulo adalitsika. 
Proverbs29:19 Kapolo sangalangizidwe ndi mau, pakuti azindikira koma osavomera." 
Proverbs29:20 Kodi uona munthu wansontho m'mau ake? Ngakhale chitsiru chidzachenjera, koma ameneyo ai." 
Proverbs29:21 Yemwe alera kapolo wake mwa ufulu kuyambira ubwana wake, pambuyo pake adzadziyesa mwana wobala." 
Proverbs29:22 Mwamuna wamkwiyo aputa makangano; waukali achuluka zolakwa. 
Proverbs29:23 Kudzikuza kwa munthu kudzamchepetsa; koma wokhala ndi mtima wodzichepetsa adzalemekezedwa. 
Proverbs29:24 Woyenda ndi mbala ada moyo wakewake; amva kulumbira, koma osawulula kanthu." 
Proverbs29:25 Kuopa anthu kutchera msampha; koma wokhulupirira Yehova adzapulumuka. 
Proverbs29:26 Ambiri afunafuna chiyanjano cha mkulu; koma chiweruzo cha munthu chichokera kwa Yehova. 
Proverbs29:27 Munthu woipa anyansa olungama; ndipo woongoka m'njira anyansa wochimwa. 
Proverbs30:1 Mau a Aguri mwana wa Yake; uthenga. Munthuyo anati, Ndadzitopetsa, Mulungu; ndadzitopetsa, Mulungu, ndathedwa;" 
Proverbs30:2 pakuti ndipambana anthu onse kupulukira, ndilibe luntha la munthu." 
Proverbs30:3 Sindinaphunzira nzeru ngakhale kudziwa Woyerayo. 
Proverbs30:4 Ndani anakwera kumwamba natsikanso? Ndani wakundika nafumbata mphepo? Ndani wamanga madzi m'malaya ake? Ndani wakhazikitsa matsiriziro onse a dziko? Dzina lake ndani? Dzina la mwanake ndani? Kapena udziwa. 
Proverbs30:5 Mau onse a Mulungu ali oyengeka; ndiye chikopa cha iwo amene amkhulupirira. 
Proverbs30:6 Usaonjezere kanthu pa mau ake, angakudzudzule, nungatsutsidwe kuti ulikunama." 
Proverbs30:7 Zinthu ziwiri ndakupemphani, musandimane izo ndisanamwalire:" 
Proverbs30:8 Mundichotsere kutali zachabe ndi mabodza; musandipatse umphawi, ngakhale chuma, mundidyetse zakudya zondiyenera;" 
Proverbs30:9 ndingakhute ndi kukukanani, ndi kuti, Yehova ndani? Kapena ndingasauke ndi kuba, ndi kutchula dzina la Mulungu wanga pachabe." 
Proverbs30:10 Usanamizire kapolo kwa mbuyake, kuti angakutemberere nawe ndi kutsutsidwa." 
Proverbs30:11 Pali mbadwo wotemberera atate ao, osadalitsa amai ao." 
Proverbs30:12 Pali mbadwo wodziyesa oyera, koma osasamba litsiro lao." 
Proverbs30:13 Pali mbadwo wokwezatu maso ao, zikope zao ndi kutukula." 
Proverbs30:14 Pali mbadwo mano ao akunga malupanga, zibwano zao zikunga mipeni; kuti adye osauka kuwachotsa kudziko, ndi aumphawi kuwachotsa mwa anthu." 
Proverbs30:15 Msundu uli ndi ana akazi awiri ati, Patsa, patsa. Pali zinthu zitatu sizikhuta konse, ngakhale zinai sizinena, Kwatha:" 
Proverbs30:16 Manda, ndi chumba, dziko losakhuta madzi, ndi moto wosanena, Kwatha." 
Proverbs30:17 Diso lochitira atate wake chiphwete, ndi kunyoza kumvera amake, makungubwi a kumtsinje adzalikolowola, ana a mphungu adzalidya." 
Proverbs30:18 Zinthu zitatu zindithetsa nzeru, ngakhale zinai, sindizidziwa:" 
Proverbs30:19 Njira ya mphungu m'mlengalenga, njira ya njoka pamwala, njira ya ngalawa pakati pa nyanja, njira ya mwamuna ndi namwali." 
Proverbs30:20 Chomwecho njira ya mkazi wachigololo; adya, napukuta pakamwa, nati, Sindinachita zoipa." 
Proverbs30:21 Chifukwa cha zinthu zitatu dziko linthunthumira; ngakhale chifukwa cha zinai silingathe kupirira nazo; 
Proverbs30:22 chifukwa cha kapolo pamene ali mfumu; ndi chitsiru chitakhuta zakudya; 
Proverbs30:23 chifukwa cha mkazi wodedwa wokwatidwa; ndi mdzakazi amene adzalandira cholowa cha mbuyake. 
Proverbs30:24 Zilipo zinai zili zazing'ono padziko; koma zipambana kukhala zanzeru: 
Proverbs30:25 Nyerere ndi mtundu wosalimba, koma zitengeratu zakudya zao m'malimwe." 
Proverbs30:26 Mbira ndi mtundu wopanda mphamvu, koma ziika nyumba zao m'matanthwe." 
Proverbs30:27 Dzombe lilibe mfumu, koma lituluka lonse mabwalomabwalo." 
Proverbs30:28 Buluzi ungamgwire m'manja, koma ali m'nyumba za mafumu." 
Proverbs30:29 Pali zinthu zitatu ziyenda chinyachinya; ngakhale zinai ziyenda mwaufulu: 
Proverbs30:30 Mkango umene uposa zilombo kulimba, supatukira chinthu chilichonse;" 
Proverbs30:31 tambala wolimba m'chuuno, ndi tonde, ndi mfumu yokhala ndi ankhondo ake." 
Proverbs30:32 Ngati wapusa podzikweza, ngakhale kuganizira zoipa, tagwira pakamwa." 
Proverbs30:33 Pakuti potakasa mkaka, mafuta ayengekapo; ndi popsinja mfuno, mwazi utulukamo, ndi polimbikira mkwiyo ndeu ionekamo." 
Proverbs31:1 Mau a Lemuwele mfumu, uthenga umene amake anamphunzitsa." 
Proverbs31:2 Chiyani mwananga, Chiyani mwana wa mimba yanga? Chiyani mwana wa zowinda zanga?" 
Proverbs31:3 Musapereke mphamvu yako kwa akazi, ngakhale kuyenda m'njira yoononga mafumu." 
Proverbs31:4 Mafumu, Lemuwele, mafumu sayenera kumwa vinyo; akalonga sayenera kunena, Chakumwa chaukali chili kuti?" 
Proverbs31:5 Kuti angamwe, naiwale malamulo, naweruze mokhota anthu onse osautsidwa." 
Proverbs31:6 Wofuna kufa umpatse chakumwa chaukali, ndi vinyo kwa owawa mtima;" 
Proverbs31:7 amwe, naiwale umphawi wake, osakumbukiranso vuto lake." 
Proverbs31:8 Tsegula pakamwa pako, ukanenere wosalankhula, ndi mlandu wa amasiye onse." 
Proverbs31:9 Tsegula pakamwa pako nuweruze molungama, nunenere osauka ndi aumphawi." 
Proverbs31:10 Mkazi wangwiro ndani angampeze? Pakuti mtengo wake uposa ngale. 
Proverbs31:11 Mtima wa mwamuna wake umkhulupirira, sadzasowa phindu." 
Proverbs31:12 Mkaziyo amchitira zabwino, si zoipa, masiku onse a moyo wake." 
Proverbs31:13 Afuna ubweya ndi thonje, nachita mofunitsa ndi manja ake." 
Proverbs31:14 Akunga zombo za malonda; nakatenga zakudya zake kutali. 
Proverbs31:15 Aukanso kusanake, napatsa banja lake zakudya, nagawira adzakazi ake ntchito." 
Proverbs31:16 Asinkhasinkha za munda, naugula; naoka mipesa ndi zipatso za manja ake." 
Proverbs31:17 Amanga m'chuuno mwake ndi mphamvu, nalimbitsa mikono yake." 
Proverbs31:18 Azindikira kuti malonda ake ampindulira; nyali yake sizima usiku. 
Proverbs31:19 Agwira njinga ya thonje ndi dzanja lake, nafumbata mtengo wake." 
Proverbs31:20 Aolowera chikhato chake osauka; natambasulira aumphawi manja ake. 
Proverbs31:21 Saopera banja lake chipale chofewa; pakuti banja lake lonse livala mlangali. 
Proverbs31:22 Adzipangira zimbwi zamawangamawanga; navala bafuta ndi guta wofiirira. 
Proverbs31:23 Mwamuna wake adziwika kubwalo, pokhala pakati pa akulu a dziko." 
Proverbs31:24 Asoka malaya abafuta, nawagulitsa; napereka mipango kwa ogulitsa malonda." 
Proverbs31:25 Avala mphamvu ndi ulemu; nangoseka nthawi ya m'tsogolo. 
Proverbs31:26 Atsegula pakamwa pake ndi nzeru, ndipo chilangizo cha chifundo chili pa lilime lake." 
Proverbs31:27 Ayang'anira mayendedwe a banja lake, sadya zakudya za ulesi." 
Proverbs31:28 Anake adzanyamuka, nadzamutcha wodala; mwamuna wake namtama, nati," 
Proverbs31:29 Ana akazi ambiri anachita mwangwiro, koma iwe uposa onsewo." 
Proverbs31:30 Kukongola kungonyenga, maonekedwe okoma ndi chabe; koma mkazi woopa Yehova adzatamandidwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mumpatse zipatso za manja ake; ndi ntchito zake zimtame kubwalo. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mau a Mlaliki, mwana wa Davide, mfumu ya m'Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Zachabechabe, ati Mlaliki; zachabechabe zonse ndi chabe." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kodi ntchito zake zonse munthu asauka nazo zimpindulira chiyani? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mbadwo wina upita, mbadwo wina nufika; koma dziko lingokhalabe masiku onse." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Inde dzuwa lituluka, nililowa, nilifulumira komwe linatulukako." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Kulowa kumwera ndi kuzungulira kumpoto zungulirezungulire imaomba mphepo; ibweranso monga mwa mazunguliridwe ake. 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Mitsinje yonse ithira m'nyanja, koma nyanja yosadzala; komwe imukira mitsinjeyo, komweko ibweranso." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zinthu zonse zilemetsa; munthu sakhoza kuzifotokoza; maso sakhuta m'kuona, ndi makutu sakhuta m'kumva." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Chomwe chinaoneka chidzaonekanso; ndi chomwe chinachitidwa chidzachitidwanso; ndipo palibe kanthu katsopano pansi pano. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kodi pali kanthu unganene kuti, Taona katsopano aka? Kanalipo kale, kale lomwe tisanabadwe ife." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Zoyamba zija sizikumbukiridwa; ngakhale zomwe zilinkudzazo, omwe adzakhalabe m'tsogolomo, sadzazikumbukirai." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ine Mlaliki ndinali mfumu ya Israele m'Yerusalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndipo ndinapereka mtima kufunafuna ndi nzeru, ndi kulondetsa zonse zimachitidwa pansi pa thambo; ntchito yovuta imeneyi Mulungu apatsa ana a anthu akasauke nayo." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndaona ntchito zonse zipangidwa kunja kuno; ndipo zonsezo ndi chabe ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Chokhotakhota sichingaongokenso; ndipo choperewera sichingawerengedwe. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndinalankhula ndi mtima wanga, ndi kuti, Taona, ndakuza ndi kudzienjezera nzeru koposa onse anakhala m'Yerusalemu ndisanabadwe ine; inde mtima wanga wapenyera kwambiri nzeru ndi chidziwitso." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndipo ndinapereka mtima kudziwa nzeru ndi kudziwa misala ndi utsiru; ndinazindikira kuti ichinso chingosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pakuti m'nzeru yambiri muli chisoni chambiri; ndi yemwe aenjezera chidziwitso aenjezera zowawa. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndinati mumtima mwanga, Tiyetu, ndikuyese ndi chimwemwe; tapenya tsono zabwino; ndipo taona, ichinso ndi chabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndinati, Kuseka ndi masala; ndi chimwemwe kodi chichita chiyani?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndinafuna mumtima mwanga kusangalatsa thupi langa ndi vinyo, mtima wanga ulikunditsogolera mwanzeru, ndi kugwira utsiru, kuti ndizindikire chabwinocho cha ana a anthu nchiyani chimene azichichita pansi pa thambo masiku onse a moyo wao." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndinadzipangira zazikulu; ndinadzimangira nyumba; ndi kuoka mipesa; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ndinakonza mphanje ndi minda yanga, ndi kuokamo mitengo ya zipatso za mitundumitundu;" 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ndinadzipangira ndekha matamanda a madzi akuthirira madzi m'nkhalango momeramo mitengo; 
Ecclesiastes2:7 ndinadzitengera akapolo ndi adzakazi, ndinali ndi akapolo anabadwa kwanga; ndinalemeranso pokhala nazo zoweta zazikulu ndi zazing'ono kupambana onse anakhala m'Yerusalemu ndisanabadwe ine;" 
Ecclesiastes2:8 ndinakundikanso siliva ndi golide ndi chuma cha mafumu ndi madera a dziko; ndinaitanitsa amuna ndi akazi akuimba ndi zokondweretsazo za ana a anthu, ndizo zoimbira za mitundumitundu." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ndinakula chikulire kupambana onse anali m'Yerusalemu ndisanabadwe ine; ndipo nzeru yanganso inakhala nanebe. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ndipo chilichonse maso anga anachifuna sindinawamana; sindinakaniza mtima wanga chimwemwe chilichonse pakuti mtima wanga unakondwera ndi ntchito zanga zonse; gawo langa la m'ntchito zanga zonse ndi limeneli. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Pamenepo ndinayang'ana zonse manja anga anazipanga, ndi ntchito zonse ndinasauka pozigwira; ndipo taona, zonse zinali zachabechabe ndi kungosautsa mtima, ndipo kunalibe phindu kunja kuno." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndipo ndinatembenuka kukayang'ana nzeru ndi misala ndi utsiru; pakuti yemwe angotsata mfumu angachite chiyani? Si chomwe chinachitidwa kale. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Pamenepo ndinazindikira kuti nzeru ipambana utsiru kwambiri, monga kuunika kupambana mdima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Wanzeru maso ake ali m'mutu wake, koma chitsiru chiyenda mumdima; ndipo nanenso ndinazindikira kuti chomwe chiwagwera onsewo ndi chimodzi." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Pamenepo ndinati mumtima mwanga, Chomwe chigwera chitsiru nanenso chindigwera; nanga bwanji ndinapambana kukhala wanzeru? Pamenepo ndinati mumtima mwanga kuti ichinso ndi chabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Pakuti wanzeru saposa chitsiru kukumbukidwa nthawi zonse; pakuti zonse zooneka kale zidzaiwalika m'tsogolomo. Ndipo wanzeru amwalira bwanji ngati chitsirutu. 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Chifukwa chake ndinada moyo; pakuti ntchito azipanga kunja kuno zindisautsa; pakuti zonse ndi chabe ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ndipo ndinada ntchito zanga zonse ndinasauka nazo kunja kuno; pakuti ndidzamsiyira izo munthu wina amene adzanditsata. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ndipo ndani adziwa ngati adzakhala wanzeru pena chitsiru? Koma adzalamulira ntchito zanga zonse ndinasauka nazo, ndi kuzigwira mwanzeru kunja kuno. Ichinso ndi chabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ndipo ndinatembenuka ndi kukhululuka za ntchito zanga zonse ndasauka nazo kunja kuno. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Pakuti pali munthu wina agwira ntchito mwanzeru ndi modziwa nadzipinduliramo; koma adzapereka gawo lake kwa munthu amene sanagwirepo ntchito. Ichinso ndi chabe ndi choipa chachikulu. 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Pakuti munthu ali ndi chiyani m'ntchito zake zonse, ndi m'kusauka kwa mtima wake amasauka nazozo kunja kuno?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Pakuti masiku ake onse ndi zisoni, vuto lake ndi kumliritsa; ngakhale usiku mtima wake supuma. Ichinso ndi chabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kodi si chabwino kuti munthu adye namwe, naonetse moyo wake zabwino m'ntchito yake? Ichinso ndinachizindikira kuti chichokera kudzanja la Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Pakuti ndani angadye ndi kufulumirako, koposa ine." 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Pakuti yemwe Mulungu amuyesa wabwino ampatsa nzeru ndi chidziwitso ndi chimwemwe; koma wochimwa amlawitsa vuto la kusonkhanitsa ndi kukundika, kuti aperekere yemwe Mulungu amuyesa wabwino. Ichinso ndi chabe ndi kungosautsa mtima." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Kanthu kalikonse kali ndi nthawi yake ndi chofuna chilichonse cha pansi pa thambo chili ndi mphindi yake; 
Ecclesiastes3:2 mphindi yakubadwa ndi mphindi yakumwalira; mphindi yakubzala ndi mphindi yakuzula zobzalazo; 
Ecclesiastes3:3 mphindi yakupha ndi mphindi yakuchiza; mphindi yakupasula ndi mphindi yakumanga; 
Ecclesiastes3:4 mphindi yakugwa misozi ndi mphindi yakuseka; mphindi yakulira ndi mphindi yakuvina; 
Ecclesiastes3:5 mphindi yakutaya miyala ndi mphindi yakukundika miyala; mphindi yakufungatirana ndi mphindi yakuleka kufungatirana; 
Ecclesiastes3:6 mphindi yakufunafuna ndi mphindi yakumwazika; mphindi yakusunga ndi mphindi yakutaya; 
Ecclesiastes3:7 mphindi yakung'amba ndi mphindi yakusoka; mphindi yakutonthola ndi mphindi yakulankhula; 
Ecclesiastes3:8 mphindi yakukonda ndi mphindi yakudana; mphindi ya nkhondo ndi mphindi ya mtendere. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Wogwira Ntchito aona phindu lanji m'chomsautsacho? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndaona vuto limene Mulungu wapatsa ana a anthu kuti avutidwe nalo. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Chinthu chilichonse anachikongoletsa pa mphindi yake; ndipo waika zamuyaya m'mitima yao ndipo palibe munthu angalondetse ntchito Mulungu wazipanga chiyambire mpaka chitsiriziro. 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndidziwa kuti iwo alibe ubwino, koma kukondwa ndi kuchita zabwino pokhala ndi moyo." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ndiponso kuti munthu yense adye namwe naone zabwino m'ntchito zake zonse; ndiwo mtulo wa Mulungu. 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndidziwa kuti zonse Mulungu azichita zidzakhala kufikira nthawi zonse; sungaonjezepo kanthu, ngakhale kuchotsapo; Mulungu nazichita kuti anthu akaope pamaso pake." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Chomwe chinaoneka, chilikuonekabe; ndi chomwe chidzaoneka chinachitidwa kale; Mulungu anasanthula zochitidwa kale." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ndiponso ndinaona kunja kuno malo akuweruza, komweko kuli zoipa; ndi malo a chilungamo, komweko kuli zoipa." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndinati mumtima wanga, Mulungu adzaweruza wolungama ndi woipa; pakuti pamenepo pali mphindi ya zofuna zonse ndi ntchito zonse." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndinati mumtima mwanga, kuti izi zichitika ndi ana a anthu, kuti Mulungu awayese ndi kuti akazindikire eni ake kuti ndiwo nyama za kuthengo." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Pakuti chomwe chigwera ana a anthu chigweranso nyamazo; ngakhale chowagwera nchimodzimodzi; monga winayo angofa momwemo zinazo zifanso; inde onsewo ali ndi mpweya umodzi; ndipo munthu sapambana nyama pakuti zonse ndi chabe. 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Onse apita kumalo amodzi; onse achokera m'fumbi ndi onse abweranso kufumbi. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndani adziwa mzimu wa ana a anthu wokwera kumwamba, ndi mzimu wa nyama wotsikira kunsi dziko?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 M'mwemo ndinazindikira kuti kulibe kanthu kabwino kopambana aka, kuti munthu akondwere ndi ntchito zake; pakuti gawo lake ndi limeneli; pakuti ndani adzamfikitsa kuona chomwe chidzachitidwa atafa iyeyo?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ndinabweranso tsono ndi kupenyera nsautso zonse zimachitidwa kunja kuno; ndipo taona, misozi ya otsenderezedwa, koma analibe wakuwatonthoza; ndipo akuwatsendereza anali ndi mphamvu koma iwowa analibe wakuwatonthoza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ndipo ndinatama akufa atatha kufa kupambana amoyo omwe alipobe; 
Ecclesiastes4:3 inde yemwe sanabadwe konse aposa onse awiriwo popeza sanaone ntchito yoipa yochitidwa kunja kuno. 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ndiponso ndinapenyera mavuto onse ndi ntchito zonse zompindulira bwino, kuti chifukwa cha zimenezi anansi ake achitira munthu nsanje. Ichinso ndi chabe ndi kungosautsa mtima." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Chitsiru chimanga manja ake, nichidya nyama yakeyake." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Dzanja limodzi lodzala pali mtendere liposa manja awiri oti thoo pali vuto ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Pamenepo ndinabwera ndi kupenyera zachabe kunja kuno. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Pali mmodzi palibe wachiwiri; inde, alibe mwana ngakhale mbale; koma ntchito yake yonse ilibe chitsiriziro, ngakhale diso lake silikhuta chuma. Samati, Ndigwira ntchito ndi kumana moyo wanga zabwino chifukwa cha yani? Ichinso ndi chabe, inde, vuto lalikulu." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Awiri aposa mmodzi; pakuti ali ndi mphotho yabwino m'ntchito zao. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Pakuti akagwa, wina adzautsa mnzake; koma tsoka wakugwa wopanda womnyamutsa." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ndiponso awiri akagona limodzi afunditsana; koma mmodzi pa yekha kodi adzafunditsidwa bwanji? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ndipo wina akamlaka mmodziyo, awiri adzachilimika; ndipo chingwe cha m'khosi zitatu sichiduka msanga." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mnyamata wosauka ndi wanzeru apambana mfumu yokalamba ndi yopusa, imene sifunanso kulangidwa mwambo." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Pakuti atuluka m'nyumba yandende kulowa ufumu; komanso yemwe abadwa m'dziko lake asauka. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndinapenyera anthu onse amoyo akuyenda kunja kuno, kuti anali ndi mwana, wachiwiri, amene adzalowa m'malo mwake." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Anthu onse sawerengeka, ngakhale onsewo anawalamulira; koma amene akudza m'mbuyo sadzakondwera naye. Ichinso ndi chabe nichisautsa mtima." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Samalira phazi lako popita kunyumba ya Mulungu; pakuti kuyandikira kumvera kupambana kupereka nsembe za zitsiru; pakuti sizizindikira kuti zilikuchimwa. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Usalankhule mwanthuku mtima wako, usafulumire kunena kanthu pamaso pa Mulungu; pakuti Mulungu ali kumwamba, iwe uli pansi; chifukwa chake mau ako akhale owerengeka." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Pakuti loto lafika mwakuchuluka ntchito; ndipo mau a chitsiru mwakuchuluka maneno. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Utawinda chiwindo kwa Mulungu, usachedwe kuchichita; pakuti sakondwera ndi zitsiru; chita chomwe unachiwindacho." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kusawinda kupambana kuwinda osachita. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Usalole m'kamwa mwako muchimwitse thupi lako; usanene pamaso pa mthenga kuti, Ndinaphophonya; Mulungu akwiyire mau ako chifukwa ninji, naononge ntchito ya manja ako?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Pakuti monga mu unyinji wa maloto muli zachabe motero mochuluka mau; koma dziopa Mulungu. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ukaona anthu alikutsendereza aumphawi, ndi kuchotsa chilungamo ndi chiweruzo mwachiwawa pa dera lina la dziko, usazizwepo; pakuti mkulu wopambana asamalira; ndipo alipo akulu ena oposa amenewo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Phindutu la dziko lipindulira onse; ngakhale mfumu munda umthandiza; 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Wokonda siliva sadzakhuta siliva; ngakhale wokonda chuma sadzakhuta phindu; ichinso ndi chabe. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Pochuluka katundu, akudyapo achulukanso; nanga apindulira eni ake chiyani, koma kungopenyera ndi maso ao?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Tulo ta munthu wogwira ntchito ntabwino, ngakhale adya pang'ono ngakhale zambiri; koma kukhuta kwa wolemera sikumgonetsa tulo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Pali choipa chovuta ndachiona kunja kuno, ndicho, chuma chilikupweteka eni ake pochikundika;" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 koma chumacho chionongeka pomgwera tsoka; ndipo akabala mwana, m'dzanja lake mulibe kanthu." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Monga anatuluka m'mimba ya amake, adzabweranso kupita wamaliseche, monga anadza osatenga kanthu pa ntchito zake, kakunyamula m'dzanja lake." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ichinso ndi choipa chowawa, chakuti adzangopita monse monga anadza; ndipo wodzisautsa chabe adzaona phindu lanji?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Inde masiku ake onse amadya mumdima, nizimchulukira chisoni ndi nthenda ndi mkwiyo." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Taonani, chomwe ine ndapenyera kukoma ndi kuyenera munthu ndiko kudya, ndi kumwa, ndi kukondwera ndi ntchito zake zonse asauka nazo kunja kuno, masiku onse a moyo wake umene Mulungu ampatsa; pokhala gawo lake limeneli." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Inde yemwe Mulungu wamlemeretsa nampatsa chuma, namninkhanso mphamvu ya kudyapo, ndi kulandira gawo lake ndi kukondwera ndi ntchito zake; umenewu ndiwo mtulo wa Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pakuti sadzakumbukira masiku a moyo wake kwambiri; chifukwa Mulungu amvomereza m'chimwemwe cha mtima wake. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Pali choipa ndachiona kunja kuno chifalikira mwa anthu," 
Ecclesiastes6:2 munthu amene Mulungu wamlemeretsa nampatsa chuma ndi ulemu, mtima wake susowa kanthu kena ka zonse azifuna, koma Mulungu osampatsa mphamvu ya kudyapo, koma mlendo adyazo; ichi ndi chabe ndi nthenda yoipa." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Chinkana munthu akabala ana makumi khumi, nakhala ndi moyo zaka zambiri, masiku a zaka zake ndi kuchuluka, koma mtima wake osakhuta zabwino, ndiponso alibe maliro; nditi, Nsenye iposa ameneyo;" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 pakuti ikudza mwachabe, nichoka mumdima, mdima nukwirira dzina lake." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Ngakhale dzuwa siliona ngakhale kulidziwa, imeneyi ipambana winayo kupuma;" 
Ecclesiastes6:6 akakhala ndi moyo zaka zikwi ziwiri, koma osakondwera; kodi onse sapita kumalo amodzi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Ntchito zake zonse munthu angogwirira m'kamwa mwake, koma mtima wake sukhuta." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Pakuti wanzeru ali ndi chiyani choposa chitsiru? Waumphawi wodziwa kuyenda pamaso pa amoyo ali ndi chiyani? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kupenya kwa maso kuposa kukhumba kwa mtima; ichinso ndi chabe ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Chomwe chinalipo chatchedwa dzina lake kale, chidziwika kuti ndiye munthu; sakhoza kulimbana ndi womposa mphamvu." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Pokhala zinthu zambiri zingochulukitsa zachabe, kodi anthu aona phindu lanji?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Pakuti ndani adziwa chomwe chili chabwino kwa munthu ali ndi moyo masiku onse a moyo wake wachabe umene autsiriza ngati mthunzi? Pakuti ndani adzauza munthu chimene chidzaoneka m'tsogolo mwake kunja kuno? 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yabwino iposa zonunkhira zabwino; ndi tsiku lakumwalira liposa tsiku lakubadwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kunka kunyumba ya maliro kupambana kunka kunyumba ya madyerero; pakuti kujako ndi matsiriziro a anthu onse; ndipo omwe ali ndi moyo adzakumbukirapo. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Chisoni chiposa kuseka; pakuti nkhope yakugwa ikonza mtima. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mtima wa anzeru uli m'nyumba ya maliro; koma mtima wa zitsiru uli m'nyumba ya kuseka. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kumva chidzudzulo cha anzeru kupambana kumva nyimbo ya zitsiru. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Pakuti kuseka kwa chitsiru kunga minga ilikuthetheka pansi pa mphika; ichinso ndi chabe. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Indetu nsautso uyalutsa wanzeru; ndi mtulo uipitsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Chitsiriziro cha kanthu chiposa chiyambi chake; wofatsa mtima apambana wodzikuza mtima. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakangaze mumtima mwako kukwiya; pakuti mkwiyo ugona m'chifuwa cha zitsiru. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usanene, Kodi bwanji masiku akale anapambana ano? Pakuti sulikufunsa mwanzeru pamenepo." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Nzeru ili yabwino pamodzi ndi cholowa; akuona dzuwa apindula nayo. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Pakuti nzeru itchinjiriza monga ndalama zitchinjiriza; koma kudziwa kupambana, chifukwa nzeru isunga moyo wa eni ake." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tapenya ntchito ya Mulungu; pakuti ndani akhoza kulungamitsa chomwe iye anachikhotetsa? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Tsiku la mwai kondwera, koma tsiku la tsoka lingirira; Mulungu waika ichi pambali pa chinzake, kuti anthu asapeze kanthu ka m'tsogolo mwao." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ndaona zonsezi masiku anga achabe; pali wolungama angofa m'chilungamo chake, ndipo pali woipa angokhalabe ndi moyo m'kuipa kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usapambanitse kukhala wolungama; usakhale wanzeru koposa; bwanji ufuna kudziononga wekha? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usapambanitse kuipa, ngakhale kupusa; uferenji nthawi yako isanafike?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kuli kwabwino kugwira ichi; indetu, usachotsepo dzanja lako pakuti yemwe aopa Mulungu adzatuluka monsemo." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Nzeru ilimbitsa wanzeru koposa akulu khumi akulamulira m'mudzi. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Pakuti kulibe wolungama pansi pano amene achita zabwino osachimwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mau onsetu onenedwa usawalabadire; kuti usamve kapolo wako alikukutemberera; 
Ecclesiastes7:22 pakuti kawirikawiritu mtima wako udziwa kuti nawenso unatemberera ena. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ndayesa zonsezi ndi nzeru; ndinati, Ndidzakhala wanzeru; koma inanditalikira." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Chakutali ndi chakuyadi, adzachipeza ndani?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndinapotoka ndi mtima wanga womwe kudziwa ndi kusanthula ndi kufunafuna nzeru ndi malongosoledwe a zinthu, ndi kudziwa kuti udyo ndiwo utsiru, ndi kuti kupusa ndi misala;" 
Ecclesiastes7:26 ndipo ndinapeza kanthu kowawa koposa imfa, ndiko mkazi amene ndiye msampha, mtima wake ukunga maukonde, manja ake ndiwo matangadza; yemwe Mulungu amuyesa wabwino adzapulumuka kwa iye; koma wochimwa adzagwidwa naye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Taonani, ichi ndachipeza, ati Mlalikiyo, m'kuphatikiza chinthu china ndi chinzake, ndikazindikire malongosoledwe ao;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 chomwe moyo wanga uchifuna chifunire, koma osachipezai ndi ichi, mwamuna mmodzi mwa chikwi ndinampezadi, koma mkazitu mwa onsewo sindinampeza." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Taonani, ichi chokha ndachipeza kuti Mulungu analenga anthu oongoka mtima; koma iwowo afunafuna malongosoledwe a mitundumitundu." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndani akunga wanzeru? Ndani adziwa tanthauzo la mau? Nzeru ya munthu iwalitsa nkhope yake, kuduwa kwa nkhope yake ndi kusanduka." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nditi, Sunga mau a mfumu, makamaka m'kulumbira Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usakangaze kumchokera; usaumirire kanthu koipa; pakuti iyeyo amachita chomwe chimkonda. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Pakuti mau a mfumu ali ndi mphamvu; ndipo ndani anganene kwa iye, Kodi uchita chiyani?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Wosunga chilamulo sadzadziwa kanthu koipa; ndipo mtima wa munthu wanzeru udziwa nyengo ndi maweruzo; 
Ecclesiastes8:6 pakuti kanthu kalikonse kali ndi nthawi yake ndi chiweruzo chake; popeza zoipa za munthu zimchulukira; 
Ecclesiastes8:7 pakuti sadziwa chimene chidzakhala; pakuti ndani angamuuze nthawi yakuti chidzachitidwa? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kulibe munthu ali ndi mphamvu yolamulira mzimu ndi yakutsekereza mzimu; ngakhale mphamvu tsiku la imfa; munkhondo umo mulibe kumasuka; udyo sudzapulumutsa akuzolowerana nao. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zonsezi ndaziona ndi kuyang'anitsa mtima wanga ntchito zonse zichitidwa pansi pano; nthawi yakuti wina apweteka mnzake pomlamulira. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ndipo ndinaona oipa alikuikidwa m'manda ndi kupita; ndipo omwe anachita zolungama anachokera kumalo opatulika akumudzi nawaiwala; ichinso ndi chabe. 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Popeza sambwezera choipa chake posachedwa atamtsutsa munthu, ana a anthu atsimikizadi mitima yao kuchita zoipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Angakhale wochimwa achita zoipa zambirimbiri, masiku ake ndi kuchuluka, koma ndidziwitsadi kuti omwe aopa Mulungu naopa pamaso pake adzapeza bwino;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 koma woipa sadzapeza bwino ngakhale kutanimphitsa masiku ake ngati mthunzi; chifukwa saopa pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Pali chinthu chachabe chimachitidwa pansi pano; chakuti alipo olungama amene aona zomwe ziyenera ntchito za oipa, ndipo alipo oipa amene aona zomwe ziyenera ntchito za olungama. Ndinati, Ichinso ndi chabe." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Pompo ndinatama kusekaseka, pakuti munthu alibe kanthu kabwino pansi pano, koma kudya ndi kumwa, ndi kusekera; ndi kuti zimenezi zikhalebe naye m'vuto lake masiku onse a moyo wake umene Mulungu wampatsa pansi pano." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pompo ndinapereka mtima wanga kudziwa nzeru, ndi kupenya ntchito zichitidwa pansi pano; kuti anthu saona tulo konse ndi maso ao ngakhale usana ngakhale usiku;" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 pamenepo ndinaona ntchito zonse za Mulungu kuti anthu sangalondole ntchito zichitidwa pansi pano; pakuti angakhale munthu ayesetsa kuzifunafuna koma sadzazipeza; indetu ngakhalenso wanzeru akati, ndidziwa, koma adzalephera kuzilondola." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Pakuti zonsezi ndinazisunga mumtima ndikalondoletu zonsezi; kuti olungama ndi anzeru ndi ntchito zao ali m'manja a Mulungu; ngakhale kukonda ngakhale kudana anthu sadziwa; zonse zili m'tsogolo mwao. 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Zonse zigwera onse chimodzimodzi; kanthu kamodzi kangogwera wolungama ndi woipa; ngakhale wabwino ndi woyera ndi wodetsedwa; ngakhale wopereka nsembe ndi wosapereka konse; wabwino alingana ndi wochimwa; wolumbira ndi woopa lumbira. 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ichi ndi choipa m'zonse zichitidwa pansi pano, chakuti kanthu kamodzi kagwera onse; indetu, mtimanso wa ana a anthu wadzala udyo, ndipo misala ili m'mtima wao akali ndi moyo, ndi pamenepo apita kwa akufa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Pakuti woyang'ana ndi amoyo onse ali nacho chiyembekezo; pakuti galu wamoyo aposa mkango wakufa. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pakuti amoyo adziwa kuti tidzafa; koma akufa sadziwa kanthu bii, sadzalandira mphotho; pakuti angoiwalika." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Chikondi chao ndi mdano wao ndi dumbo lao lomwe zatha tsopano; ndipo nthawi yamuyaya sagawa konse kanthu kalikonse kachitidwe pansi pano. 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Tiye, idya zakudya zako mokondwa, numwe vinyo wako mosekera mtima; pakuti Mulungu wavomerezeratu zochita zako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Zovala zako zikhale zoyera masiku onse; mutu wako usasowe mafuta. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Khalani mokondwa ndi mkazi umkonda masiku onse a moyo wako wachabe, umene Mulungu wakupatsa pansi pano masiku ako onse achabe; pakuti ilo ndi gawo lako la m'moyo ndi m'ntchito zimene uvutika nazo pansi pano." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Chilichonse dzanja lako lichipeza kuchichita, uchichite ndi mphamvu yako; pakuti mulibe ntchito ngakhale kulingirira ngakhale kudziwa, ngakhale nzeru, kumanda ulikupitako." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndinabweranso ndi kuzindikira pansi pano kuti omwe atamanga msanga sapambana m'liwiro, ngakhale olimba sapambana m'nkhondo, ngakhale anzeru sapeza zakudya, ngakhale ozindikira bwino salemera, ngakhale odziwitsa sawakomera mtima; koma yense angoona zomgwera m'nthawi mwake." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Pakuti munthu sadziwatu mphindi yake; monga nsomba zigwidwa m'ukonde woipa, ndi mbalame zikodwa mumsampha, momwemo ana a anthu amagwidwa ndi nthawi ya tsoka, ngati msampha umene uwagwera modzidzimuka." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndaonanso nzeru pansi pano motero, ndipo inandionekera yaikulu;" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 panali mudzi waung'ono muli anthu owerengeka; ndipo inadzako mfumu yaikulu, niizinga ndi nkhondo, nimangapo malinga akulu;" 
Ecclesiastes9:15 koma anapezedwamo mwamuna wanzeru wosauka, yemweyo napulumutsa mudziwo ndi nzeru yake; koma panalibe anthu anakumbukira wosauka ameneyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Pamenepo ndinati, Nzeru ipambana mphamvu; koma anyoza nzeru ya wosauka, osamvera mau ake." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mau a anzeru achete amveka koposa kufuula kwa wolamulira mwa zitsiru. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Nzeru ipambana zida za nkhondo; koma wochimwa mmodzi aononga zabwino zambiri. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ntchentche zakufa zinunkhitsa moipa nizioletsa mafuta onunkhira a sing'anga; chomwecho kupusa kwapang'ono kuipitsa iye amene atchuka chifukwa cha nzeru ndi ulemu. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Wanzeru, mtima wake uli kudzanja lake lamanja; koma chitsiru, mtima wake kulamanzere." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Inde, poyendanso chitsiru panjira, nzeru yake imthera ndipo angoti kwa onse kuti, Ndine chitsiru." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngati mkulu akukwiyira, usasiye malo ako; chifukwa chifatso chipembedza utachimwa kwambiri." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Pali choipa ndachiona pansi pano, ngati kulakwa koyambira ndi mkulu;" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 utsiru ukhazikika pamwamba penipeni, ndipo olemera angokhala mwamanyazi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndaona akapolo atakwera pa akavalo, ndi mafumu, alikuyenda pansi ngati akopolo." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Wokumba mbuna adzagwamo; ndipo woboola mpanda njoka idzamluma. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Wosendeza miyala adzaphwetekedwa nayo; wowaza nkhuni nadzitema. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Chitsulo chikakhala chosathwa, ndipo ukaleka kunola, uzipambana kulimbikira; koma nzeru ipindulira pochenjeza." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Njoka ikaluma isanalodzedwe, watsenga saona mphotho." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mau a m'kamwa mwa munthu wanzeru nga chisomo; koma milomo ya chitsiru idzachimeza. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Chiyambi cha mau a m'kamwa mwake ndi utsiru; ndipo chimaliziro cha m'kamwa mwake ndi misala yoipa. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Chitsiru chichulukitsanso mau; koma munthu sadziwa chimene chidzaoneka; ndipo ndani angamuuze chomwe chidzakhala m'tsogolo mwake? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Ntchito ya zitsiru izitopetsa zonsezo, pakuti sichidziwa kunka kumudzi." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Tsoka kwa dzikowe, pamene mfumu yako ndiye mwana, ndipo akalonga ako adyera mamawa!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Mwai kwa dzikowe, pamene mfumu yako ndiye mwana wa aufulu, ndipo akalonga ako adya pa nthawi yoyenera akalimbe osati akaledzere ai." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Tsindwi litewa ndi mphwai za eni ake; nyumba nidontha ndi ulesi wa manja. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Amaphikira zakudya kuti asekere, vinyo nakondweretsa moyo; ndipo ndalama zivomera zonse." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usatemberere mfumu ngakhale poganizira; usatemberere wolemera m'chipinda chogona iwemo; pakuti mbalame ya mlengalenga idzanyamula mauwo, ndipo chouluka ndi mapiko chidzamveketsa zonenazo." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ponya zakudya zako pamadzi; udzazipeza popita masiku ambiri. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Gawira asanu ndi awiri ngakhale asanu ndi atatu; pakuti sudziwa choipa chanji chidzaoneka pansi pano. 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Mitambo ikadzala mvula, itsanulira pansi; mtengo ukagwa kumwera pena kumpoto, pomwe unagwa mtengowo udzakhala pomwepo." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Woyang'ana mphepo sadzafesa; ndi wopenya mitambo sadzakolola. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Monga sudziwa njira ya mphepo, ngakhale makulidwe a mafupa m'mimba ya mkazi ali ndi pakati; momwemo sudziwa ntchito za Mulungu amene achita zonse." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Mamawa fesa mbeu zako, madzulonso osapumitsa dzanja lako; pakuti sudziwa ziti zidzalola bwino ngakhale izizi, ngakhale izozo, kaya zonse ziwiri zidzakhala bwino." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Indetu kuunika nkokoma, maso napeza bwino m'kuona dzuwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Inde, munthu akakhala ndi moyo zaka zambiri, akondwere ndi zonsezo; koma akumbukire masiku amdima kuti adzachuluka. Zonse zilinkudza zili zachabe." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Kondwera ndi unyamata wako, mnyamata iwe; mtima wako nukasangalale masiku a unyamata wako, nuyende m'njira za mtima wako, ndi monga maso ako aona; koma dziwitsa kuti Mulungu adzanena nawe mlandu wa zonsezi." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Chifukwa chake chotsani zopweteka m'mtima mwako, nulekanitse zoipa ndi thupi lako; pakuti ubwana ndi unyamata ngwa chabe." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Ukumbukirenso Mlengi wako masiku a unyamata wako, asanadze masiku oipa, ngakhale zisanayandikire zakazo zakuti udzati, Sindikondwera nazo;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 ngakhale lisanade dzuwa, ndi kuunika, ndi mwezi, ndi nyenyezi, mitambo ndi kubweranso italeka mvula;"
