Ecclesiastes12:3 tsikulo omwe asunga nyumba adzanthunthumira, amuna olimba nadzawerama, akupera nadzaleka poperewera, omwe ayang'ana pamazenera nadzadetsedwa;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 pa khomo lakunja padzatsekeka; potsika mau akupera, wina nanyamuka polira mbalame, ndipo akazi onse akuimba sadzamveka bwino;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 inde, adzaopa za pamwamba, panjira padzakhala zoopsa; katungurume adzaphuka, dzombe ndi kukoka miyendo, zilakolako ndi kutha; pakuti munthu apita kwao kwamuyaya, akulira maliro nayendayenda panja;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 chingwe chasiliva chisanaduke, ngakhale mbale yagolide isanasweke, ngakhale mtsuko usanaphwanyike kukasupe, ngakhale njinga yotungira madzi isanathyoke kuchitsime;" 
Ecclesiastes12:7 fumbi ndi kubwera pansi pomwe linali kale, mzimu ndi kubwera kwa Mulungu amene anaupereka." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Chabe zachabetu, ati Mlalikiyo; zonse ndi chabe." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ndiponso pokhala wanzeru Mlalikiyo anaphunzitsabe anthu nzeru; inde, anatchera makutu nafunafuna nalongosola miyambi yambiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Mlalikiyo anasanthula akapeze mau okondweretsa, ndi zolemba zoongoka ngakhale mau oona." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mau a anzeru akunga zisonga, omwe akundika mau amene mbusa mmodzi awapatsa mau ao akunga misomali yokhomedwa zolimba." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Pamodzi ndi izi, mwananga, tachenjezedwa; pakuti saleka kulemba mabuku ambiri; ndipo kuphunzira kwambiri kutopetsa thupi." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Mau atha; zonse zamveka zatha; opa Mulungu, musunge malamulo ake; pakuti choyenera anthu onse ndi ichi." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Pakuti Mulungu adzanena mlandu wa zochita zonse, ndi zobisika zonse, ngakhale zabwino ngakhale zoipa." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Nyimbo yoposa, ndiyo ya Solomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Mnyamatayo andipsompsonetse ndi m'kamwa mwake; pakuti chikondi chako chiposa vinyo. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Mafuta ako anunkhira bwino; dzina lako likunga mafuta onunkhira otsanulidwa; chifukwa chake anamwali akukonda. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Undikoke; tikuthamangire; mfumu yandilowetsa m'zipinda zake: Tidzasangalala ndi kukondwera ndi iwe. Tidzatchula chikondi chako koposa vinyo: Akukonda molungama. 
SongOfSongs1:5 Wakuda ine, koma wokongola, ana akazinu a ku Yerusalemu, ngati mahema a Kedara, ngati nsalu zotchinga za Solomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Musayang'ane pa ine, pakuti ndada, pakuti dzuwa landidetsa. Ana amuna a amai anandikwiyira, anandisungitsa minda yamipesa; koma munda wangawanga wamipesa sindinausunga." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndiuze, iwe amene moyo wanga ukukonda, umaweta kuti gulu lako? Umaligonetsa kuti pakati pa usana? Pakuti ndikhalirenji ngati wosochera pambali pa magulu a anzako?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ngati sudziwa, mkaziwe woposa kukongola, dzituluka kukalondola bande la gululo, nukawete anaambuzi zako pambali pa mahema a abusa." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ndakulinganiza, wokondedwa wanga mnyamatawe, ngati akavalo a magaleta a Farao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Masaya ako akongola ndi nkhata zatsitsi, ndi khosi lako ndi zinganga za mkanda wonyezimira." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tidzakupangira nkhata zagolide ndi njumu zasiliva. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Pokhala mfumu podyera pake, narido wanga ananunkhira." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Wokondedwa wanga mnyamatayo ali kwa ine ngati thumba la mure, logona pakati pa mawere anga." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Wokondedwa wanga ali kwa ine ngati chipukutu cha maluwa ofiira m'minda yamipesa ya ku Engedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Taona, wakongolatu, bwenzi langa; namwaliwe taona, wakongola, maso ako akunga a nkhunda." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Taona, wakongolatu, bwenzi langa, mnyamatawe, inde, wakongoletsa; pogona pathu mpa msipu." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Mitanda ya nyumba zathu nja mikungudza, ndi mapaso athu nga mlombwa." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndine duwa lofiira la ku Saroni, ngakhale kakombo wa kuzigwa." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ngati kakombo pakati pa minga momwemo wokondedwa wanga pakati pa ana akazi. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ngati maula pakati pa mitengo ya m'nkhalango, momwemo wokondedwa wanga pakati pa ana amuna. Ndinakondwa pakukhala pa mthunzi wake, zipatso zake zinatsekemera m'kamwa mwanga." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Anandifikitsa kunyumba ya vinyo, mbendera yake yondizolimira inali chikondi." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mundilimbikitse ndi mphesa zouma, munditonthoze mtima ndi maula, pakuti ndadwala ndi chikondi." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Dzanja lake lamanzere anditsamiritse kumutu, dzanja lake lamanja ndi kundifungatira." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, pali mphoyo, ndi mbawala za kuthengo, kuti musautse, ngakhale kugalamutsa chikondi, mpaka chikafuna mwini." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Mau a wokondedwa wanga mnyamatayo! Taona, adza, alikulumpha pamapiri, alikujidimuka pazitunda." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Wokondedwa wanga akunga mphoyo, pena mwana wa mbawala: Taona, aima patseri pakhoma lathu. Apenyera pazenera, nasuzumira pamade." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Wokondedwa wanga analankhula, nati kwa ine, tauka, bwenzi langa, wokongola wanga, tiye." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Pakuti, taona, chisanu chatha, mvula yapita yaleka;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 maluwa aoneka pansi; nthawi yoimba mbalame yafika, mau a njiwa namveka m'dziko lathu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Mkuyu utchetsa nkhuyu zake zosakhwima, mipesa niphuka, inunkhira bwino. Tauka, bwenzi langa, wokongola wangawe, tiyetu." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Nkhunda yangawe, yokhala m'ming'alu ya thanthwe, mobisika motsetsereka, ndipenye nkhope yako, ndimve mau ako; pakuti mau ako ngokoma, nkhope yako ndi kukongola." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mutigwirire ankhandwe, ngakhale ang'ono, amene akuononga minda yamipesa; pakuti m'minda yathu yamipesa muphuka biriwiri." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Wokondedwa wanga ndi wa ine, ine ndine wake: aweta zake pakati akakombo." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Mpaka dzuwa litapepa, mithunzi ndi kutanimpha, bwera, bwenzi langawe, nukhale ngati mphoyo pena mwana wa mbawala pa mapiri a mipata." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Usiku pamphasa panga ndinamfunafuna amene moyo wanga umkonda: Ndinamfunafuna, koma osampeza." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndinati, Ndiuketu, ndiyendeyende m'mudzi, m'makwalala ndi m'mabwalo ake, ndimfunefune amene moyo wanga umkonda: Ndimfunafuna, koma osampeza." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Alonda akuyendayenda m'mudzi anandipeza: Ndinati, Kodi munamuona amene moyo wanga umkonda?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Nditawapitirira pang'ono, ndinampeza amene moyo wanga umkonda: Ndinamgwiriziza, osamfumbatula, mpaka nditamlowetsa m'nyumba ya amai, ngakhale m'chipinda cha wondibala." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, pali mphoyo, ndi mbawala ya kuthengo, kuti musautse, ngakhale kugalamutsa chikondi, mpaka chikafuna mwini." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ndaniyu akwera kutuluka m'chipululu ngati utsi wa tolo, wonunkhira ndi mure ndi lubani, ndi zonunkhiritsa zonse za wogulitsa?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Taonani, ndi machila a Solomoni; pazingapo amuna amphamvu makumi asanu ndi limodzi, a mwa ngwazi za Israele." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Onsewo agwira lupanga, nazolowera nkhondo: Yense ali ndi lupanga lake pantchafu pake, chifukwa cha upandu wa usiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Solomoni mfumu anadzipangira machila okhalamo tsonga ndi matabwa a ku Lebanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Anapanga timilongoti take ndi siliva, cha pansi pake ndi golide, mpando wake ndi nsalu yofiirira, pakati pake panayalidwa za chikondi cha ana akazi a ku Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Tulukani, ana akazi inu a Ziyoni, mupenye Solomoni mfumu, ndi korona amake amamveka naye tsiku la ukwati wake, ngakhale tsiku lakukondwera mtima wake." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Taona, wakongola, bwenzi langa, namwaliwe, taona, wakongola; maso ako akunga a nkhunda patseri pa chophimba chako. Tsitsi lako likunga gulu la mbuzi, zooneka pa phiri la Giliyadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Mano ako akunga gulu la nkhosa zosengasenga, zokwera kuchokera kosamba; yonse ili ndi ana awiri, palibe imodzi yopoloza." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Milomo yako ikunga mbota yofiira, m'kamwa mwako ndi kukoma: Palitsipa pako pakunga phande la khangaza paseli pa chophimba chako." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Khosi lako likunga nsanja ya Davide anaimangira zida, apachikapo zikopa zikwi, ngakhale zikopa zonse za amuna amphamvu." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mawere ako awiri akunga ana awiri a nswala obadwa limodzi, akudya pakati pa akakombo." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Mpaka dzuwa litapepa, mithunzi ndi kutanimpha, ndikamuka kuphiri la mure, ndi kuchitunda cha lubani." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Wakongola monsemonse, wokondedwa wanga, namwaliwe, mulibe chilema mwa iwe." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Idza nane kuchokera ku Lebanoni, mkwatibwi, kuchokera nane ku Lebanoni: Unguza pamwamba pa Amana, pa nsonga ya Seniri ndi Heremoni, pa ngaka za mikango, pa mapiri a anyalugwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Walanda mtima wanga, mlongo wanga, mkwatibwi; walanda mtima wanga ndi diso lako limodzi, ndi chinganga chimodzi cha pakhosi pako." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Ha, chikondi chako nchokongola, mlongo wanga, mkwatibwi! Kodi chikondi chako sichiposa vinyo? Kununkhira kwa mphoka yako ndi kuposa zonunkhiritsa za mitundumitundu!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 M'milomo yako, mkwatibwi, mukukha uchi, uchi ndi mkaka zili pansi pa lilime lako; kununkhira kwa zovala zako ndi kunga kununkhira kwa Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mlongo wanga, mkwatibwi ndiye munda wotsekedwa; ngati kasupe wotsekedwa, ndi chitsime chopikiza." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Mphukira zako ndi munda wamakangaza, ndi zipatso zofunika, bonongwe ndi narido." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Narido ndi chikasu, nzimbe ndi sinamoni, ndi mitengo yonse ya lubani; mure ndi khonje, ndi zonunkhiritsa zonse zomveka." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ndiwe kasupe wa m'minda, chitsime cha madzi amoyo, ndi mitsinje yoyenda yochokera ku Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Galamuka, mphepo ya kumpoto iwe, nudze, mphepo iwe ya kumwera; nuombe pamunda panga, kuti zonunkhiritsa zake zitulukemo. Bwenzi langa mnyamatayo, alowe m'munda mwake, nadye zipatso zake zofunika." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndalowa m'munda mwanga, mlongo wanga, mkwatibwi: Ndatchera mure wanga ndi zonunkhiritsa zanga; ndadya uchi wanga ndi chisa chake; ndamwa vinyo wanga ndi mkaka wanga. Idyani, atsamwalinu, imwani, mwetsani chikondi." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndinagona tulo, koma mtima wanga unali maso: Ndi mau a bwenzi langa mnyamatayo agogoda, nati, nditsegulire, mlongo wanga, wokondedwa wanga, nkhunda yanga, wangwiro wanga: Pakuti pamtu panga padzala mame, patsitsi panga pali madontho a usiku." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndinayankha kuti, Ndavula malaya anga, ndiwavalenso bwanji? Ndasuka mapazi anga; ndiwadetserenji?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Bwenzi langa analonga dzanja lake pazenera, mtima wanga ndi kuguguda chifukwa cha iye." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndinauka ndikatsegulire bwenzi langa; pamanja panga panakha mure. Ndi pa zala zanga madzi a mure, pa zogwirira za mpikizo." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndinamtsegulira bwenzi langalo; koma ndinampeza, bwenzi langa atachoka. Moyo wanga unalefuka polankhula iye: Ndinamfunafuna, osampeza; ndinamuitana, koma sanandivomere." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Alonda akuyenda m'mudzi anandipeza, nandikantha, nanditema; osunga makoma nandichotsera chophimba changa." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, mukapeza bwenzi langa, mudzamuuza chiyani? Kuti ndadwala ndi chikondi." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Bwenzi lako aposa abwenzi ena bwanji, mkaziwe woposa kukongola? Bwenzi lako aposa abwenzi ena bwanji, kuti utilumbirira motero?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Wokondedwa wanga ali woyera ndi wofiira, womveka mwa zikwi khumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Mutu wake ukunga golide, woyengetsa, tsitsi lake lopotana, ndi lakuda ngati khungubwi." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Ana a maso ake akunga nkhunda pambali pa mitsinje ya madzi; otsukidwa ndi mkaka, okhala pa mitsinje yodzala." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Masaya ake akunga chitipula chobzalamo ndiwo, ngati mitumbira yoyangapo masamba onunkhira: Milomo yake ikunga akakombo, pakukhapo madzi a mure." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Manja ake akunga zing'anda zagolide zoikamo zonyezimira zoti biriwiri. Thupi lake likunga chopanga cha minyanga cholemberapo masafiro. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Miyendo yake ikunga zoimiritsa za mwala wonyezimira, zogwirika m'kamwa mwa golide: Maonekedwe ake akunga Lebanoni, okometsetsa ngati mikungudza." 
SongOfSongs5:16 M'kamwa mwake muli mokoma; inde, ndiye wokondweretsa ndithu. Ameneyu ndi wokondedwa wanga, ameneyu ndi bwenzi langa, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Bwenzi lako wapita kuti, mkaziwe woposa kukongola? Bwenzi lako wapatukira kuti, tikamfunefune pamodzi nawe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Bwenzi langa watsikira kumunda kwake, kuzitipula za mphoka, kukadya kumunda kwake, ndi kutchera akakombo." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ndine wake wa wokondedwa wanga, wokondedwa wanganso ndiye wa ine; aweta zake pakati pa akakombo." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Wakongola, bwenzi langa, namwaliwe ngati Tiriza, wokoma ngati Yerusalemu, woopsa ngati nkhondo ndi mbendera." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Undipambutsire maso ako, pakuti andiopetsa. Tsitsi lako likunga gulu la mbuzi, zigona pambali pa Giliyadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Mano ako akunga gulu la nkhosa zazikazi, zikwera kuchokera kosamba; yonse ili ndi ana awiri, palibe imodzi yopoloza." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Palitsipa pako pakunga phande la khangaza paseli pa chophimba chako. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Alipo akazi akulu a mfumu makumi asanu ndi limodzi, kudza akazi aang'ono makumi asanu ndi atatu, ndi anamwali osawerengeka." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Nkhunda yanga, wangwiro wangayu, ndiye mmodzi; ndiye wobadwa yekha wa amake; ndiye wosankhika wa wombala. Ana akazi anamuona, namutcha wodala; ngakhale akazi akulu a mfumu, ndi akazi aang'ono namtamanda." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Nati, Ndaniyo atuluka ngati mbandakucha, wokongola ngati mwezi, woyera ngati dzuwa, woopsa ngati nkhondo ndi mbendera?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndinatsikira kumunda wa mtedza, kukapenya msipu wa m'chigwa, kukapenya ngati pamipesa paphuka, ngati pamakangaza patuwa maluwa." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndisanazindikire, moyo wanga unandiimika pakati pa magaleta a anthu anga aufulu." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Anati, Bwera, bwera, Msulamiwe; bwera, bwera, tiyang'ane pa iwe. Muyang'aniranji pa Msulami, ngati pa masewero akuguba?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Ha, mapazi ako akongola m'zikwakwata, mwana wamkaziwe wa mfumu! Pozinga m'chuuno mwako pakunga zonyezimira, ntchito ya manja a mmisiri waluso." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Pamchombo pako pakunga chikho choulungika, chosasowamo vinyo wosanganika: Pamimba pako pakunga mulu wa tirigu wozingidwa ndi akakombo." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mawere ako akunga ana awiri a nswala anabadwa limodzi. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Khosi lako likunga nsanja yaminyanga; maso ako akunga matawale a ku Hesiboni, a pa chipata cha Batirabimu; mphuno yako ikunga nsanja ya ku Lebanoni imene iloza ku Damasiko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Mutu wako ukunga Karimele, ndi tsitsi la pamtu pako likunga nsalu yofiirira; mfumu yamangidwa ndi nkhata zake ngati wam'nsinga." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Ha, ndiwe wokongola ndi wofunika, bwenziwe, m'zokondweretsa!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Msinkhu wakowu ukunga mgwalangwa, mawere ako akunga matsango amphesa." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndinati, Ndikakwera pa mgwalangwapo, ndikagwira nthambi zake: Mawere ako ange ngati matsango amphesa, ndi kununkhira kwa mpweya wako ngati maula." 
SongOfSongs7:9 M'kamwa mwako munge ngati vinyo woposa, womeza tseketseke bwenzi langa, wolankhulitsa milomo ya ogona tulo." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ndine wa wokondedwa wanga mnyamatayo, ndine amene andifunayo." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Tiye, bwenzi langa, tinke kuminda; titsotse m'milaga." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tilawire kunka kuminda yamipesa; tiyang'ane ngati mpesa waphuka, kunje ndi kuonetsa zipatso, makangaza ndi kutuwa maluwa ake; pompo ndidzakupatsa chikondi changa." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Mankhwala a chikondi anunkhira, ndi pamakomo pathu zipatso zabwino, za mitundumitundu, zakale ndi zatsopano, zimene ndakukundikira iwe, wokondedwa wanga." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Mwenzi utakhala ngati mlongo wanga, woyamwa pa bere la amai! Ndikadakupeza panja, ndikadakupsompsona; osandinyoza munthu." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ndikadakutsogolera, kukulowetsa m'nyumba ya amai, kuti andilange mwambo; ndikadakumwetsa vinyo wokoleretsa, ndi madzi a makangaza anga." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Dzanja lamanzere lake akadanditsamiritsa kumutu, lamanja lake ndi kundifungatira." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, muutsiranji, mugalamutsiranji chikondi, chisanafune mwini." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ndaniyu achokera kuchipululu, alikutsamira bwenzi lake? Pa tsinde la muula ndinakugalamutsa mnyamatawe: Pomwepo amai ako anali mkusauka nawe, pomwepo wakukubala anali m'pakati pa iwe." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Undilembe pamtima pako, mokhoma chizindikiro, nundikhomenso chizindikiro pamkono pako; pakuti chikondi chilimba ngati imfa; njiru imangouma ngati manda: Kung'anima kwake ndi kung'anima kwa moto, ngati mphezi ya Yehova." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Madzi ambiri sangazimitse chikondi, ngakhale mitsinje yodzala kuchikokolola: Mwamuna akapereka katundu yense wa m'nyumba yake ngati sintho la chikondi, akanyozedwa ndithu." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tili ndi mlongwathu wamng'ono, alibe mawere; timchitirenji mlongo wathu tsiku lokhoma unkhoswe wake?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ngati ndiye khoma, tidzamanga pa iye nsanja yasiliva: Ngati ndiye chitseko tidzamtsekereza ndi matabwa amikungudza." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndine khoma, mawere anga akunga nsanja zake: Pamaso pa mnyamatayo ndinafanana ngati wopeza mtendere." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomoni anali ndi munda wamipesa ku Baala-Hamoni; nabwereka alimi mundawo; yense ambwezere ndalama chikwi chifukwa cha zipatso zake. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Koma munda wanga wamipesa, uli pamaso panga ndiwo wangatu; nacho chikwicho, Solomoni iwe, koma olima zipatso zake azilandira mazana awiri." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Namwaliwe wokhala m'minda, anzako amvera mau ako: Nanenanso undimvetse." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Dzifulumira, mnyamatawe wokondedwa wanga, dzifanane ngati mphoyo pena mwana wa mbawala pa mapiri a mphoka." 
Isaiah1:1 Masomphenya a Yesaya mwana wa Amozi, amene iye anaona, onena za Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, masiku a Uziya, Yotamu, Ahazi, ndi Hezekiya, mafumu a Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Imvani, miyamba inu, tchera makutu, iwe dziko lapansi, chifukwa Yehova wanena, Ndakulitsa ndipo ndalera ana, ndipo iwo anandipandukira Ine." 
Isaiah1:3 Ng'ombe idziwa mwini wake, ndi bulu adziwa pomtsekereza: koma Israele sadziwa, anthu anga sazindikira." 
Isaiah1:4 Mtundu wochimwa inu, anthu olemedwa ndi mphulupulu, mbeu yakuchita zoipa, ana amene achita moononga, iwo amsiya Yehova, iwo amnyoza Woyera wa Israele, iwo adana naye nabwerera m'mbuyo." 
Isaiah1:5 Nanga bwanji mukali chimenyedwere kuti inu mulikupandukirabe? Mutu wonse ulikudwala, ndi mtima wonse walefuka." 
Isaiah1:6 Kuchokera pansi pa phazi kufikira kumutu m'menemo mulibe changwiro; koma mabala, ndi mikwingwirima, ndi zilonda; sizinapole, ngakhale kumangidwa, ngakhale kupakidwa mafuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Dziko lanu lili bwinja; midzi yanu yatenthedwa ndi moto; dziko lanu alendo alimkudya pamaso panu; ndipo lili labwinja monga lagubuduzidwa ndi alendo. 
Isaiah1:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni wasiyidwa ngati chitando cha m'munda wamphesa, chilindo cha m'munda waminkhaka, ngati mudzi wozingidwa ndi nkhondo." 
Isaiah1:9 Akadapanda Yehova wa makamu kutisiyira otsala ang'onong'ono ndithu, ife tikanakhala ngati Sodomu, ife tikadanga Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Imvani mau a Yehova inu olamulira a Sodomu, tcherani makutu ku chilamulo cha Mulungu wathu, inu anthu a Gomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Nditani nazo nsembe zanu zochulukazo? Ati Yehova; ndakhuta nazo nsembe zopsereza za nkhosa zamphongo ndi mafuta a nyama zonenepa; sindisekera ndi mwazi wa ng'ombe zamphongo, ngakhale wa anaankhosa, ngakhale wa atonde." 
Isaiah1:12 Pakudzaonekera inu pamaso pa Ine, ndani wafuna chimenechi m'dzanja lanu, kupondaponda m'mabwalo mwanga?" 
Isaiah1:13 Musadze nazonso, nsembe zachabechabe; nsembe zofukiza zindinyansa; tsiku lokhala mwezi ndi Sabata, kumema masonkhano, sindingalole mphulupulu ndi masonkhano." 
Isaiah1:14 Masiku anu okhala mwezi ndi nthawi ya zikondwerero zanu mtima wanga uzida; zindivuta Ine; ndalema ndi kupirira nazo. 
Isaiah1:15 Ndipo pamene mutambasula manja anu, ndidzakubisirani inu maso anga; inde pochulukitsa mapemphero anu Ine sindidzamva; manja anu adzala mwazi." 
Isaiah1:16 Sambani, dziyeretseni; chotsani machitidwe anu oipa pamaso panga; lekani kuchita zoipa;" 
Isaiah1:17 phunzirani kuchita zabwino; funani chiweruzo; thandizani osautsidwa, weruzirani ana amasiye, munenere akazi amasiye." 
Isaiah1:18 Tiyeni, tsono, tiweruzane, ati Yehova; ngakhale zoipa zanu zili zofiira, zidzayera ngati matalala; ngakhale zili zofiira ngati kapezi, zidzakhala ngati ubweya wa nkhosa, woti mbu." 
Isaiah1:19 Ngati inu muli ofuna ndi omvera, mudzadya zabwino za dziko," 
Isaiah1:20 koma ngati mukana ndi kupanduka, mudzathedwa ndi lupanga; chifukwa m'kamwa mwa Yehova mwatero." 
Isaiah1:21 Mudzi wokhulupirika wasanduka wadama! Wodzala chiweruzowo! Chilungamo chinakhalamo koma tsopano ambanda. 
Isaiah1:22 Siliva wako wasanduka mphala, vinyo wako wasanganizidwa ndi madzi." 
Isaiah1:23 Akulu ako apanduka, ali anzao a mbala; onse akonda mitulo, natsata zokometsera milandu; iwo saweruzira amasiye; ngakhale mlandu wa mkazi wamasiye suwafika." 
Isaiah1:24 Chifukwa chake Yehova ati, Yehova wa makamu wamphamvu wa Israele, Ha! Ndidzatonthoza mtima wanga pochotsa ondivuta, ndi kubwezera chilango adani anga;" 
Isaiah1:25 ndipo ndidzaikanso dzanja langa pa iwe, ndi kukusungunula kukusiyanitsa iwe ndi mphala yako, ndipo ndidzachotsa seta wako wonse:" 
Isaiah1:26 ndidzabweza oweruza ako monga poyamba, ndi aphungu ako monga pachiyambi; pambuyo pake udzatchedwa Mudzi wolungama, mudzi wokhulupirika." 
Isaiah1:27 Ziyoni adzaomboledwa ndi chiweruzo, ndi otembenuka mtima ake ndi chilungamo." 
Isaiah1:28 Koma kupasula kwa olakwa ndi kwa ochimwa kudzakhala kumodzi, ndi iwo amene asiya Yehova adzathedwa." 
Isaiah1:29 Chifukwa adzakhala ndi manyazi, chifukwa cha mitengo yathundu munaikhumba, ndipo inu mudzagwa nkhope, chifukwa cha minda imene mwaisankha." 
Isaiah1:30 Chifukwa mudzakhala ngati mtengo wathundu, umene tsamba lake linyala, ngatinso munda wopanda madzi." 
Isaiah1:31 Ndimo wamphamvu adzakhala ngati chingwe chathonje, ndi ntchito yake ngati nthethe; ndipo zonse zidzayaka moto pamodzi, opanda wozimitsa." 
Isaiah2:1 Mau amene Yesaya mwana wa Amozi anaona, onena za Yuda ndi Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah2:2 Ndipo padzakhala masiku otsiriza, kuti phiri la nyumba ya Yehova lidzakhazikika pa nsonga ya mapiri, ndipo lidzakwezedwa pamwamba pa zitunda; mitundu yonse idzasonkhana kumeneko." 
Isaiah2:3 Ndipo anthu ambiri adzanka, nati, Tiyeni tikwere kunka kuphiri la Yehova, kunyumba ya Mulungu wa Yakobo; ndipo Iye adzatiphunzitsa za njira zake, ndipo tidzayenda m'mayendedwe ake; chifukwa m'Ziyoni mudzatuluka chilamulo, ndi mau a Yehova kuchokera m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah2:4 Iye adzaweruza pakati pa akunja, adzadzudzula mitundu yambiri ya anthu; ndipo iwo adzasula malupanga ao akhale zolimira, ndi nthungo zao zikhale makasu; mtundu sudzanyamula lupanga kumenyana ndi mtundu wina, ndipo sadzaphunziranso nkhondo." 
Isaiah2:5 Inu a nyumba ya Yakobo, tiyeni, tiyende m'kuwala kwa Yehova." 
Isaiah2:6 Chifukwa inu mwasiya anthu anu a nyumba ya Yakobo, chifukwa kuti iwo adzazidwa ndi miyambo ya kum'mawa, ndipo ali olaula ngati Afilisti, naomba m'manja ndi ana a achilendo." 
Isaiah2:7 Dziko lao ladzala siliva ndi golide, ngakhale chuma chao nchosawerengeka; dziko lao lidzalanso akavalo, ngakhale magaleta ao ngosawerengeka." 
Isaiah2:8 Dziko lao ladzalanso mafano; iwo apembedza ntchito ya manja aoao, imene zala zaozao zinaipanga." 
Isaiah2:9 Munthu wachabe agwada pansi, ndi munthu wamkulu adzichepetsa, koma musawakhululukire." 
Isaiah2:10 Lowa m'phanga, bisala m'fumbi, kuchokera pa kuopsa kwa Yehova, ndi pa ulemerero wachifumu wake." 
Isaiah2:11 Maso a munthu akuyang'anira kumwamba adzatsitsidwa, ndi kudzikweza kwa anthu kudzaweramitsidwa pansi; ndipo Yehova yekha adzakwezedwa tsiku limenelo." 
Isaiah2:12 Chifukwa padzakhala tsiku la Yehova wa makamu pa zonse zonyada ndi zakudzikuza, ndi pa zonse zotukulidwa; ndipo zidzatsitsidwa;" 
Isaiah2:13 ndi pa mitengo yonse yamkungudza ya Lebanoni, yaitali ndi yotukulidwa, ndi pa mitengo yonse yathundu ya Basani;" 
Isaiah2:14 ndi pa mapiri onse atali, ndi pa zitunda zonse zotukulidwa;" 
Isaiah2:15 ndi pa nsanja zazitali zonse, ndi pa machemba onse;" 
Isaiah2:16 ndi pa ngalawa zonse za Tarisisi, ndi pa zithunzithunzi zonse zokondweretsa." 
Isaiah2:17 Ndipo kudzikweza kwa munthu kudzaweramitsidwa pansi, kudzikuza kwa munthu kudzatsitsidwa; ndipo Yehova yekha adzakwezedwa tsiku limenelo." 
Isaiah2:18 Ndimo mafano adzapita psiti. 
Isaiah2:19 Anthu adzalowa m'mapanga a m'matanthwe, ndi m'maenje apansi, kuthawa kuopsa kwa Yehova, ndi ulemerero wachifumu wake, podzuka Iye kugwedeza dziko ndi mphamvu." 
Isaiah2:20 Tsiku limenelo munthu adzataya kumfuko ndi kumileme mafano ake asiliva ndi agolide amene anthu anampangira iye awapembedze; 
Isaiah2:21 kuti akalowe m'mapanga a m'matanthwe, ndi m'mindala a m'miyala, kuthawa kuopsa kwa Yehova, ndi ulemerero wachifumu wake, podzuka Iye kugwedeza dziko ndi mphamvu." 
Isaiah2:22 Siyani munthu, amene mpweya wake uli m'mphuno mwake; chifukwa m'mene awerengedwamo ndi muti?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ndipo onani, Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, wachotsa ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Yuda mchirikizo wochirikiza chakudya chonse ndi madzi onse, zimene zinali mchirikizo;" 
Isaiah3:2 munthu wamphamvu, ndi munthu wankhondo; woweruza ndi mneneri, ndi waula, ndi nkhalamba;" 
Isaiah3:3 kapitao wa makumi asanu, ndi munthu wolemekezeka, ndi mphungu, ndi mmisiri waluso, ndi wodziwa matsenga." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndipo ndidzapereka ana, kuti akhale akulu ao, mwachibwana adzawalamulira." 
Isaiah3:5 Ndi anthu adzavutidwa, yense ndi wina, yense ndi mnansi wake; mwana adzadzinyaditsa yekha pa akulu, ndi onyozeka pa olemekezedwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Pamene mwamuna adzamgwira mbale wake m'nyumba ya atate wake, nadzati, Iwe uli ndi chovala, khala wolamulira wathu, ndi kupasula kumeneku kukhale m'dzanja lako;" 
Isaiah3:7 tsiku limenelo adzakweza mau ake, kuti, Sindine wochiritsa, chifukwa kuti m'nyumba mwanga mulibe chakudya kapena chovala; inu simudzandiyesa ine wolamulira anthu." 
Isaiah3:8 Chifukwa kuti Yerusalemu wapasulidwa, ndi Yuda wagwa; chifukwa kuti lilime lao ndi machitidwe ao akana Yehova, kuti autse mkwiyo wa m'maso a ulemerero wake." 
Isaiah3:9 Maonekedwe a nkhope zao awachitira iwo mboni; ndipo amaonetsa uchimo wao monga Sodomu, saubisa. Tsoka kwa moyo wao! Chifukwa iwo anadzichitira zoipa iwo okha." 
Isaiah3:10 Nenani za wolungama, kuti kudzamkomera iye; chifukwa oterowo adzadya zipatso za machitidwe ao." 
Isaiah3:11 Tsoka kwa woipa! Kudzamuipira; chifukwa kuti mphotho ya manja ake idzapatsidwa kwa iye. 
Isaiah3:12 Anthu anga awavuta ndi ana, awalamulira ndi akazi. Anthu anga inu, iwo amene akutsogolerani, ndiwo akuchimwitsani, naononga njira zanu zoyendamo." 
Isaiah3:13 Yehova aimirira kuti atsutsane, naimiriranso kuti aweruze mitundu ya anthu." 
Isaiah3:14 Yehova adzalowa m'bwalo la milandu ndi okalamba a anthu ake, ndi akulu ake: Ndinu amene mwadya munda wamphesa, zofunkha za waumphawi zili m'nyumba zanu;" 
Isaiah3:15 muti bwanji inu, amene mupsinja anthu anga, ndi kupera nkhope ya wosauka? Ati Ambuye Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah3:16 Komanso Yehova ati, Chifukwa kuti ana akazi a Ziyoni angodzikuza atakweza makosi ao, ndi maso ao adama nayenda nanyang'ama poyenda pao naliza zigwinjiri za mapazi ao;" 
Isaiah3:17 chifukwa chake Ambuye adzachita nkanambo pa liwombo la ana akazi a Ziyoni, ndipo Yehova adzavundukula m'chuuno mwao." 
Isaiah3:18 Tsiku limenelo Ambuye adzachotsa zigwinjiri zao zokoma, ndi zitunga, ndi mphande;" 
Isaiah3:19 mbera, ndi makoza, ndi nsalu za pankhope;" 
Isaiah3:20 ndi zisada, ndi maunyolo a kumwendo, ndi mipango, ndi nsupa zonunkhira, ndi mphinjiri;" 
Isaiah3:21 mphete, ndi zipini;" 
Isaiah3:22 malaya a paphwando, ndi zofunda, ndi zimbwi, ndi timatumba;" 
Isaiah3:23 akalirole, ndi nsalu zabafuta, ndi nduwira, ndi zophimba." 
Isaiah3:24 Ndipo padzakhala m'malo mwa zonunkhiritsa mudzakhala zovunda; ndi m'malo mwa lamba chingwe; ndipo m'malo mwa tsitsi labwino dazi; m'malo mwa chovala chapachifuwa mpango wachiguduli; zipsera m'malo mwa ukoma. 
Isaiah3:25 Amuna ako adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi wamphamvu wako m'nkhondo." 
Isaiah3:26 Ndipo zipata zake zidzalira maliro; ndipo iye adzakhala bwinja, nadzakhala pansi." 
Isaiah4:1 Ndipo akazi asanu ndi awiri adzagwira mwamuna mmodzi tsiku limenelo, nati, Ife tidzadya chakudya chathuchathu ndi kuvala zovala zathuzathu; koma titchedwe dzina lako; chotsa chitonzo chathu." 
Isaiah4:2 Tsiku limenelo mphukira ya Yehova idzakhala yokongola ndi ya ulemerero, chipatso cha nthaka chidzakhala chokometsetsa ndi chokongola, kwa iwo amene adzapulumuka a Israele." 
Isaiah4:3 Ndipo padzakhala, kuti iye amene asiyidwa m'Ziyoni, ndi iye amene atsala m'Yerusalemu adzatchedwa woyera; ngakhale yense amene walembedwa mwa amoyo m'Yerusalemu;" 
Isaiah4:4 pamene Ambuye adzasambitsa litsiro la ana akazi a Ziyoni, nadzatsuka mwazi wa Yerusalemu, kuchokera pakatipo, ndi mzimu wa chiweruziro, ndi mzimu wakutentha." 
Isaiah4:5 Ndipo Yehova adzalenga pokhala ponse pa phiri la Ziyoni, ndi pa masonkhano ake, mtambo ndi utsi usana, ndi kung'azimira kwa malawi a moto usiku; chifukwa kuti pa ulemerero wonse padzayalidwa chophimba." 
Isaiah4:6 Ndipo padzakhala chihema cha mthunzi, nthawi ya usana yopewera kutentha, pothawira ndi pousa mvula ndi mphepo." 
Isaiah5:1 Ndiimbire wokondedwa wanga nyimbo ya wokondedwa wanga ya munda wake wamphesa. Wokondedwa wanga anali ndi munda wamphesa m'chitunda cha zipatso zambiri; 
Isaiah5:2 ndipo iye anakumba mcherenje kuzungulira kwete, natolatola miyala pamenepo naokapo mpesa wosankhika, namangapo pakati pake nsanja, nasema mopondera mphesa, nayembekeza kuti udzabala mphesa, koma unangobala mphesa zosadya." 
Isaiah5:3 Ndipo tsopano, inu okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi anthu a Yuda, weruzanitu mlandu wa ine ndi munda wanga wamphesa." 
Isaiah5:4 Ndikanachitanso chiyani ndi munda wanga wamphesa, chimene sindinachite m'menemo; muja ndinayembekeza kuti udzabala mphesa, wabaliranji mphesa zosadya?" 
Isaiah5:5 Ndipo tsopano ndidzakuuzani chimene nditi ndichite ndi munda wanga wamphesa; ndidzachotsapo tchinga lake, ndipo zidzadyedwa; ndidzagumula linga lake ndipo zidzapondedwa pansi;" 
Isaiah5:6 ndipo ndidzaupasula; sudzadzomboleredwa kapena kulimidwa; koma padzamera lunguzi ndi minga; ndidzalamuliranso mitambo kuti isavumbwepo mvula. 
Isaiah5:7 Chifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa Yehova wa makamu ndiwo banja la Israele, ndi anthu a Yuda, mtengo wake womkondweretsa; Iye nayembekeza chiweruziro, koma onani kuphana; nayembekeza chilungamo, koma onani kufuula." 
Isaiah5:8 Tsoka kwa iwo amene aphatikiza nyumba ndi nyumba, amene alumikiza munda ndi munda, kufikira padzapanda malo, ndipo inu mudzasiyidwa nokha pakati pa dziko!" 
Isaiah5:9 M'makutu anga, ati Yehova wa makamu, Zoonadi nyumba zambiri zidzakhala bwinja, ngakhale zazikulu ndi zokoma zopanda wokhalamo." 
Isaiah5:10 Chifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa madera khumi udzangobala bati imodzi ya vinyo, ndi mbeu za maefa khumi zidzangobala efa imodzi." 
Isaiah5:11 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adzuka m'mamawa kuti atsate zakumwa zaukali; amene achezera usiku kufikira vinyo awaledzeretsa! 
Isaiah5:12 Ndipo zeze ndi mngoli, ndi lingaka ndi chitoliro, ndi vinyo, zili m'maphwando ao; koma iwo sapenyetsa ntchito ya Yehova; ngakhale kuyang'ana pa machitidwe a manja ake." 
Isaiah5:13 Chifukwa chake anthu anga amuka m'nsinga, chifukwa cha kusowa nzeru; ndi amuna ao olemekezeka ali ndi njala, ndi khamu lao lauma kukhosi." 
Isaiah5:14 Ndipo manda akuza chilakolako chake, natsegula kukamwa kwake kosayeseka; ndi ulemerero wao, ndi unyinji wao, ndi phokoso lao, ndi iye amene akondwerera mwa iwo atsikira mommo." 
Isaiah5:15 Munthu wonyozeka waweramitsidwa, ndi munthu wotchuka watsitsidwa, ndi maso a wodzikweza atsitsidwa;" 
Isaiah5:16 koma Yehova wa makamu wakwezedwa m'chiweruziro, ndipo Mulungu Woyera wayeretsedwa m'chilungamo." 
Isaiah5:17 Pamenepo anaankhosa adzadyapo ngati m'busa mwao, ndi malo a bwinja a zonenepa zachilendo zidzadyapo." 
Isaiah5:18 Tsoka kwa iwo amene akoka mphulupulu ndi zingwe zachabe, ndi tchimo ngati ndi chingwe cha galeta;" 
Isaiah5:19 amene ati, Mlekeni iye akangaze, mlekeni iye afulumize ntchito yake kuti ife tione; ndipo lekani uphungu wa Woyera wa Israele uyandikire, udze kuti tiudziwe!" 
Isaiah5:20 Tsoka kwa iwo amene ayesa zoipa zabwino, ndi zabwino zoipa; amene aika mdima m'malo mwa kuyera, ndi kuyera m'malo mwa mdima; amene aika zowawa m'malo mwa zotsekemera, ndi zotsekemera m'malo mwa zowawa!" 
Isaiah5:21 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adziyesera anzeru ndi ochenjera! 
Isaiah5:22 Tsoka kwa iwo amene ali a mphamvu yakumwa vinyo, ndi anthu olimba akusanganiza zakumwa zaukali;" 
Isaiah5:23 amene alungamitsa woipa pa chokometsera mlandu, nachotsera wolungama chilungamo chake!" 
Isaiah5:24 Chifukwa chake monga ngati lilime la moto likutha chiputu, ndi monga udzu wouma ugwa pansi m'malawi, momwemo muzu wao udzakhala monga wovunda, maluwa ao adzauluka m'mwamba ngati fumbi; chifukwa kuti iwo akana chilamulo cha Yehova wa makamu, nanyoza mau a Woyera wa Israele." 
Isaiah5:25 Chifukwa chake mkwiyo wa Yehova wayaka pa anthu ake, ndipo Iye watambasulira iwo dzanja lake, nawakantha, ndipo zitunda zinanthunthumira, ndi mitembo yao inali ngati zinyatsi pakati pa makwalala. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wake sunachoke, koma dzanja lake lili chitambasulire." 
Isaiah5:26 Ndipo Iye adzakwezera a mitundu yakutali mbendera, nadzawaimbira mluzu, achokere ku malekezero a dziko; ndipo taonani, iwo adzadza ndi liwiro msangamsanga;" 
Isaiah5:27 palibe amene adzalema, kapena adzaphunthwa mwa iwo, palibe amene adzaodzera kapena kugona tulo; ngakhale lamba la m'chuuno mwao silidzamasuka, kapena chomangira cha nsapato zao sichidzaduka;" 
Isaiah5:28 amene mivi yao ili yakuthwa, ndi mauta ao onse athifuka; ziboda za akavalo ao zidzayesedwa ngati mwala, ndi njinga zao ngati kamvulumvulu;" 
Isaiah5:29 kubangula kwao kudzafanana ndi mkango, iwo adzabangula ngati ana a mikango, inde iwo adzabangula, nadzagwira nyama, naichotsa bwino opanda wakupulumutsa." 
Isaiah5:30 Ndipo iwo adzawabangulira tsiku limenelo ngati kukokoma kwa nyanja; ndipo wina ayang'ana padziko, taonani mdima ndi nsautso, kuyera kwadetsedwanso m'mitambo yake." 
Isaiah6:1 Chaka chimene mfumu Uziya anafa, ndinaona Ambuye atakhala pa mpando wachifumu wautali, ndi wotukulidwa, ndi zovala zake zinadzala m'Kachisi." 
Isaiah6:2 Pamwamba pa Iye panaima aserafi; yense anali ndi mapiko asanu ndi limodzi; awiri anaphimba nao nkhope yake, awiri naphimba nao mapazi ake, awiri nauluka nao." 
Isaiah6:3 Ndipo wina anafuula kwa mnzake, nati, Woyera, Woyera, Woyera, Yehova wa makamu; dziko lonse lapansi ladzala ulemerero wake." 
Isaiah6:4 Ndipo maziko a ziundo anasunthika ndi mau amene anafuula, ndipo nyumba inadzazidwa ndi utsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Ndipo ine ndinati, Tsoka kwa ine! Chifukwa ndathedwa; chifukwa ndili munthu wa milomo yonyansa, ndikhala pakati pa anthu a milomo yonyansa; chifukwa kuti maso anga aona Mfumu, Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah6:6 Pompo anaulukira kwa ine mmodzi wa aserafi, ali nalo khala lamoto m'dzanja mwake, limene analichotsa ndi mbaniro pa guwa la nsembe;" 
Isaiah6:7 nakhudza nalo kukamwa kwanga nati, Taona ichi chakhudza milomo yako; ndipo mphulupulu zako zachotsedwa, zochimwa zako zaomboledwa." 
Isaiah6:8 Ndipo ndinamva mau a Ambuye akuti, Ndidzatumiza yani, ndipo ndani adzatimukira ife? Ndipo ine ndinati, Ndine pano; munditumize ine." 
Isaiah6:9 Ndipo Iye anati, Kauze anthu awa, Imvani inu ndithu, koma osazindikira; yang'anani inu ndithu, koma osadziwitsa." 
Isaiah6:10 Nenepetsa mtima wa anthu awa, lemeretsa makutu ao, nutseke maso ao; angaone ndi maso ao, angamve ndi makutu ao, angazindikire ndi mtima wao, nakabwerenso, nachiritsidwe." 
Isaiah6:11 Pompo ndinati ine, Ambuye mpaka liti? Ndipo anayankha, Mpaka midzi ikhala bwinja, yopanda wokhalamo, ndi nyumba zopanda munthu, ndi dziko likhala bwinja ndithu," 
Isaiah6:12 ndipo Yehova wasunthira anthu kutali, ndi mabwinja adzachuluka pakati pa dziko." 
Isaiah6:13 Ndipo likatsala limodzi la magawo khumi m'menemo, lidzadyedwanso; monga kachere, ndi monganso thundu, imene tsinde lake likhalabe ataigwetsa; chotero mbeu yopatulika ndiyo tsinde lake." 
Isaiah7:1 Ndipo panali masiku a Ahazi, mwana wa Yotamu, mwana wa Uziya, mfumu ya Yuda, kuti Rezini, mfumu ya Aramu, ndi Peka, mwana wa Remaliya, mfumu ya Israele, anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu, kumenyana nao; koma sanathe kuupambana." 
Isaiah7:2 Ndipo anauza a nyumba ya Davide, kuti Aramu wapangana ndi Efuremu. Ndipo mtima wake unagwedezeka, ndi mtima wa anthu ake, monga mitengo ya m'nkhalango igwedezeka ndi mphepo." 
Isaiah7:3 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yesaya, Tuluka tsopano kukachingamira Ahazi, iwe ndi Seari-Yasubu, mwana wamwamuna wako, pa mamaliziro a mcherenje wa thamanda la pamtunda, kukhwalala la pa mwaniko wa wotsuka nsalu;" 
Isaiah7:4 nukati kwa iye, Chenjera, khala ulipo; usaope, mtima wako usalefuke, chifukwa cha zidutswa ziwirizi za miuni yofuka, chifukwa cha mkwiyo waukali wa Rezini ndi Aramu, ndi wa mwana wa Remaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Chifukwa Aramu ndi Efuremu, ndi mwana wa Remaliya anapangana kukuchitira zoipa, nati," 
Isaiah7:6 Tiyeni, tikwere, timenyane ndi Yuda, timvute; tiyeni, tidzigumulire mpata, pamenepo tikhazike mfumu pakati pake, ngakhale mwana wamwamuna wa Tabeele;" 
Isaiah7:7 atero Ambuye Yehova, Upo wao sudzaimai, sudzachitidwa." 
Isaiah7:8 Pakuti mutu wa Aramu ndi Damasiko, ndi mutu wa Damasiko ndi Rezini, zisadapite zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zisanu Efuremu adzathyokathyoka, sadzakhalanso mtundu wa anthu;" 
Isaiah7:9 ndipo mutu wa Efuremu ndi Samariya, ndi mutu wa Samariya ndi mwana wa Remaliya, mukapanda kukhulupirira ndithu simudzakhazikika." 
Isaiah7:10 Ndipo Yehova ananenanso kwa Ahazi nati," 
Isaiah7:11 Udzipemphere wekha chizindikiro cha kwa Yehova Mulungu wako; pempha cham'mwakuya, kapena cham'mwamba." 
Isaiah7:12 Koma Ahazi anati, Sindipemphai ngakhale kumyesa Yehova." 
Isaiah7:13 Ndipo iye anati, Mverani inu tsopano, inu a nyumba ya Davide; kodi ndi kanthu kakang'ono kwa inu kutopetsa anthu, kuti inu mutopetsa Mulungu wanga?" 
Isaiah7:14 Chifukwa chake Ambuye mwini yekha adzakupatsani inu chizindikiro; taonani namwali adzaima, nadzabala mwana wamwamuna, nadzamutcha dzina lake Imanuele." 
Isaiah7:15 Iye adzadya mafuta ndi uchi, pamene adziwa kukana choipa ndi kusankha chabwino." 
Isaiah7:16 Popeza kuti asanadziwe mwanayo kukana choipa ndi kusankha chabwino, dziko limene mafumu ake awiri udana nao lidzasiyidwa." 
Isaiah7:17 Yehova adzatengera pa iwe, ndi pa anthu ako, ndi pa nyumba ya atate wako, masiku, akuti sanadze oterewa kuyambira tsiku limene Efuremu analekana ndi Yuda; kunena mfumu ya Asiriya." 
Isaiah7:18 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo kuti Yehova adzaimbira mluzu ntchentche ili m'mbali ya kumtunda kwa nyanja za Ejipito, ndi njuchi ili m'dziko la Asiriya." 
Isaiah7:19 Ndipo zidzafika nizitera zonse m'zigwa zabwinja, ndi m'maenje a matanthwe, ndi paminga ponse, ndi pamabusa ponse." 
Isaiah7:20 Tsiku limenelo Ambuye adzameta mutu, ndi ubweya wa m'mapazi, ndi lumo lobwereka lili tsidya lija la nyanja, kunena mfumu ya Asiriya; ndilo lidzamalizanso ndevu." 
Isaiah7:21 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti munthu adzaweta ng'ombe yaikazi yaing'ono, ndi nkhosa ziwiri;" 
Isaiah7:22 ndipo padzakhala, chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa mkaka umene zidzapatsa, iye adzadya mafuta; pakuti mafuta ndi uchi adzadya yense wosiyidwa pakati pa dziko." 
Isaiah7:23 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti paliponse panali mipesa chikwi chimodzi ya mtengo wake wa sekeli chikwi chimodzi, padzakhala lunguzi ndi minga." 
Isaiah7:24 Munthu adzafikako ndi mivi ndi uta; pakuti dziko lonse lidzakhala la lunguzi ndi minga. 
Isaiah7:25 Ndipo zitunda zonse zinalimidwa ndi khasu, iwe sudzafikako chifukwa cha kuopa lunguzi ndi minga, koma pomwepo padzakhala potumizira ng'ombe ndi popondaponda nkhosa." 
Isaiah8:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Tenga iwe polembapo papakulu, nulembe pamenepo ndi malembedwe odziwika, Kangazakufunkha Fulumirakusakaza." 
Isaiah8:2 Ndipo ndidzadzitengera ine mboni zokhulupirika, Uriya wansembe, ndi Zekariya mwana wa Yeberekiya." 
Isaiah8:3 Ndipo ndinanka kwa mneneri wamkazi; ndipo iye anatenga pakati nabala mwana wamwamuna. Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Utche dzina lake, Kangazakufunkha Fulumirakusakaza." 
Isaiah8:4 Chifukwa kuti mwana asakhale ndi nzeru yakufuula, Atate wanga, ndi Amai wanga, chuma cha Damasiko ndi chofunkha cha Samariya chidzalandidwa pamaso pa mfumu ya Asiriya." 
Isaiah8:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa ine kachiwirinso, nati," 
Isaiah8:6 Popeza anthu awa akana madzi a Siloamu, amene ayenda pang'onopang'ono, nakondwerera mwa Rezini ndi mwa mwana wa Remaliya;" 
Isaiah8:7 chifukwa chake, taonani, Ambuye atengera pa iwo madzi a mtsinje wa Yufurate, olimba ndi ambiri, kunena mfumu ya Asiriya ndi ulemerero wake wonse; ndipo iye adzadzala mphaluka zake zonse, nadzasefukira pamtunda ponse." 
Isaiah8:8 Ndipo iye adzapitapita kulowa m'Yuda; adzasefukira, napitirira; adzafikira m'khosi; ndi kutambasula kwa mapiko ake, kudzakwanira dziko lanu m'chitando mwake, inu Imanuele." 
Isaiah8:9 Chitani phokoso, anthu inu, koma mudzathyokathyoka; tcherani khutu, inu nonse a maiko akutali; kwindani nokha, koma mudzathyokathyoka; kwindani nokha, koma mudzathyokathyoka." 
Isaiah8:10 Panganani upo, koma udzakhala chabe; nenani mau, koma sadzachitika; pakuti Mulungu ali pamodzi ndi ife." 
Isaiah8:11 Pakuti Yehova watero kwa ine ndi dzanja lolimba, nandilangiza ine kuti ndisayende m'njira ya anthu awa, nati," 
Isaiah8:12 Musachinene, Chiwembu; chilichonse chimene anthu awa adzachinena, Chiwembu; musaope monga kuopa kwao kapena musachite mantha." 
Isaiah8:13 Yehova wa makamu, Iye mudzamyeretsa; muope Iye, akuchititseni mantha Iye." 
Isaiah8:14 Ndipo Iye adzakhala malo opatulika; koma mwala wophunthwitsa, ndi thanthwe lolakwitsa la nyumba zonse ziwiri za Israele, khwekhwe ndi msampha wa okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah8:15 Ndipo ambiri adzaphunthwapo, nagwa, nathyoka, nakodwa, natengedwa." 
Isaiah8:16 Manga umboni, mata chizindikiro pachilamulo mwa aphunzi anga." 
Isaiah8:17 Ndipo ndidzalindira Yehova, amene wabisira a nyumba ya Yakobo nkhope yake, ndipo ndidzamyembekeza Iye." 
Isaiah8:18 Taonani, ine ndi ana amene Yehova wandipatsa ine, tili zizindikiro ndi zodabwitsa mwa Israele, kuchokera kwa Yehova wa makamu, amene akhala m'phiri la Ziyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Ndipo pamene iwo adzati kwa iwe, Funa kwa olaula, ndi obwebweta, amene alira pyepye, nang'ung'udza; kodi anthu sadzafuna kwa Mulungu wao? Chifukwa cha amoyo, kodi adzafuna kwa akufa?" 
Isaiah8:20 Kuchilamulo ndi kuumboni! Ngati iwo sanena malinga ndi mau awa, ndithu sadzaona mbandakucha." 
Isaiah8:21 Ndipo iwo adzapitirira ovutidwa ndi anjala, ndipo padzakhala kuti pokhala ndi njala iwo adzadziputa okha, ndi kutemberera mfumu yao, ndi Mulungu wao; ndi kugadamira nkhope zao kumwamba;" 
Isaiah8:22 nadzayang'ana padziko, koma taonani, nkhawa ndi mdima, kuziya kwa nsautso; ndi mdima woti bii udzaingitsidwa." 
Isaiah9:1 Koma kumene kunali nsautso sikudzakhala kuziya. Poyamba paja Mulungu ananyozetsa dziko la Zebuloni, ndi dziko la Nafutali, koma potsiriza pake Iye analichitira ulemu, pa khwalala la kunyanja, patsidya pa Yordani, Galileya wa amitundu." 
Isaiah9:2 Anthu amene anayenda mumdima, aona kuwala kwakukulu; iwo amene anakhala m'dziko la mthunzi wa imfa, kuwala kwatulukira kwa iwo." 
Isaiah9:3 Inu mwachulukitsa mtundu, inu mwaenjezera kukondwa kwao; iwo akondwa pamaso panu monga akondwera m'masika, monga anthu akondwa pogawana zofunkha." 
Isaiah9:4 Pakuti goli la katundu wake, ndi mkunkhu wa paphewa pake, ndodo ya womsautsa, inu mwazithyola monga tsiku la Midiyani." 
Isaiah9:5 Pakuti zida zonse za mwamuna wovala zida za nkhondo m'phokosomo, ndi zovala zovimvinika m'mwazi, zidzakhala zonyeka ngati nkhuni." 
Isaiah9:6 Pakuti kwa ife mwana wakhanda wabadwa, kwa ife mwana wamwamuna wapatsidwa; ndipo ulamuliro udzakhala pa phewa lake, ndipo adzamutcha dzina lake Wodabwitsa, Wauphungu, Mulungu wamphamvu, Atate Wosatha, Kalonga wa mtendere." 
Isaiah9:7 Za kuenjezera ulamuliro wake, ndi za mtendere sizidzatha pa mpando wachifumu wa Davide, ndi pa ufumu wake, kuukhazikitsa, ndi kuuchirikiza ndi chiweruziro ndi chilungamo kuyambira tsopano ndi kunkabe nthawi zonse. Changu cha Yehova wa makamu chidzachita zimenezi." 
Isaiah9:8 Ambuye anatumiza mau kwa Yakobo, ndipo anatsikira pa Israele." 
Isaiah9:9 Ndipo anthu onse adzadziwa, ngakhale Efuremu ndi okhala m'Samariya, amene anena m'kunyada ndi m'kukula kwa mtima," 
Isaiah9:10 Njerwa zagwa, koma ife tidzamanga ndi miyala yosema; mikuyu yagwetsedwa, koma tidzaisinthanitsa ndi mikungudza." 
Isaiah9:11 Chifukwa chake Yehova adzamkwezera Rezini olimbana naye, nautsa adani ake;" 
Isaiah9:12 Aramu patsogolo ndi Afilisti pambuyo; ndipo iwo adzadya Israele ndi kukamwa koyasama. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wake sunachoke, koma dzanja lake lili chitambasulire." 
Isaiah9:13 Koma anthu sanatembenukire kwa Iye amene anawamenya, ngakhale kufuna Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah9:14 Chifukwa chake Yehova adzadula mutu wa Israele ndi mchira wake; nthambi ya kanjedza ndi mlulu, tsiku limodzi." 
Isaiah9:15 Nkhalamba ndi wolemekezeka ndiye mutu, ndi mneneri wophunzitsa zonama ndiye mchira." 
Isaiah9:16 Pakuti iwo amene atsogolera anthuwa, ndiwo awasokeretsa; ndipo iwo amene atsogoleredwa nao aonongeka." 
Isaiah9:17 Chifukwa chake Ambuye sadzakondwera ndi anyamata ao, ngakhale kuwachitira chifundo amasiye ao ana ndi akazi; popeza yense ali wodetsa ndi wochimwa, m'kamwa monse mulankhula zopusa. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wake sunachoke, koma dzanja lake lili chitambasulire." 
Isaiah9:18 Pakuti kuchimwa kwayaka ngati moto kumaliza lunguzi ndi minga, inde kuyaka m'nkhalango ya m'thengo, ndipo zifuka chapamwamba, m'mitambo yautsi yochindikira." 
Isaiah9:19 M'kukwiya kwa Yehova wa makamu, dziko latenthedwa ndithu, anthunso ali ngati nkhuni; palibe munthu wochitira mbale wake chisoni." 
Isaiah9:20 Ndipo wina adzakwatula ndi dzanja lamanja, nakhala ndi njala; ndipo adzadya ndi dzanja lamanzere, osakhutai; iwo adzadya munthu yense nyama ya mkono wake wa iye mwini." 
Isaiah9:21 Manase adzadya Efuremu; ndi Efuremu adzadya Manase, ndipo iwo pamodzi adzadyana ndi Yuda. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wake sunachoke, koma dzanja lake lili chitambasulire." 
Isaiah10:1 Tsoka kwa iwo amene alamulira malamulo osalungama, ndi kwa alembi olemba mphulupulu;" 
Isaiah10:2 kuwapatulira osowa kuchiweruziro, ndi kuchotsera anthu anga aumphawi zoyenera zao, kuti alande za akazi amasiye, nafunkhire ana amasiye!" 
Isaiah10:3 Ndipo mudzachita chiyani tsiku lakudza woyang'anira, ndi chipasuko chochokera kutali? Mudzathawira kwa yani kufuna kuthangatidwa? Mudzasiya kuti ulemerero wanu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Adzangoweramira pansi pa andende, ndipo adzagwa pansi pa ophedwa. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wake sunachoke, koma dzanja lake lili chitambasulire." 
Isaiah10:5 Iwe Asiriya chibonga cha mkwiyo wanga, ndodo m'dzanja lake muli ukali wanga!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ine ndidzamtumiza kumenyana ndi mtundu wosalemekeza, ndi pa anthu a mkwiyo wanga ndidzamlangiza, kuti afunkhe, agwire zolanda, awapondereze pansi, monga dothi la pamakwalala." 
Isaiah10:7 Koma iye safuna chotero, ndipo mtima wake suganizira chotero, koma mtima wake ulikufuna kusakaza, ndi kuduladula amitundu osawerengeka." 
Isaiah10:8 Popeza ati, Akalonga anga kodi sali onse mafumu?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kodi Kalino sali wonga ngati Karikemisi? Kodi Hamati sali ngati Aripadi? Kodi Samariya sali ngati Damasiko? 
Isaiah10:10 Popeza dzanja langa lapeza maufumu a mafano, mafano ao osema anapambana ndi iwo a ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Samariya;" 
Isaiah10:11 monga ndachitira Samariya ndi mafano ake, momwemo kodi sindidzachitira Yerusalemu ndi mafano ake?" 
Isaiah10:12 Chifukwa chake padzaoneka, kuti pamene Ambuye atatha ntchito yake yonse pa phiri la Ziyoni ndi pa Yerusalemu, ndidzalanga zipatso za mtima wolimba wa mfumu ya Asiriya, ndi ulemerero wa maso ake okwezedwa." 
Isaiah10:13 Popeza anati, Mwa mphamvu ya dzanja langa ndachita ichi, ndi mwa nzeru yanga; pakuti ine ndili wochenjera; ndachotsa malekezero a anthu, ndalanda chuma chao, ndagwetsa monga munthu wolimba mtima iwo okhala pa mipando yachifumu;" 
Isaiah10:14 dzanja langa lapeza monga chisa, chuma cha mitundu ya anthu, ndipo monga munthu asonkhanitsa dziko lonse lapansi, ndipo panalibe chogwedeza phiko, kapena chotsegula pakamwa, kapena cholira pyepye." 
Isaiah10:15 Kodi nkhwangwa idzadzikweza yokha, pa iye amene adula nayo? Kodi chochekera chidzadzikweza chokha pa iye amene achigwedeza, ngati chibonga ingamgwedeze iye amene ainyamula, ngati ndodo inganyamule kanthu popeza ili mtengo." 
Isaiah10:16 Chifukwa chake Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, adzatumiza kuonda mwa onenepa ake; ndipo pansi pa ulemerero wake padzayaka kutentha, konga ngati kutentha kwa moto." 
Isaiah10:17 Ndipo kuwala kwa Israele kudzakhala moto, ndi Woyera wake adzakhala lawi; ndipo lidzatentha ndi kuthetsa minga yake ndi lunguzi wake tsiku limodzi." 
Isaiah10:18 Ndipo adzanyeketsa ulemerero wa m'nkhalango yake, ndi wa m'munda wake wopatsa bwino, moyo ndi thupi; ndipo padzakhala monga ngati pokomoka wonyamula mbendera." 
Isaiah10:19 Ndipo mitengo yotsala ya m'nkhalango yake idzakhala yowerengeka, kuti mwana ailembera." 
Isaiah10:20 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti otsala a Israele, ndi iwo amene anapulumuka a nyumba ya Yakobo, sadzatsamiranso iye amene anawamenya; koma adzatsamira Yehova Woyera wa Israele, ntheradi." 
Isaiah10:21 Otsala adzabwera, otsala a Yakobo, kwa Mulungu wamphamvu." 
Isaiah10:22 Popeza ngakhale anthu anu Israele akunga mchenga wa kunyanja, otsala ao okhaokha adzabwera; chionongeko chatsimikizidwa chilungamo chake chisefukira." 
Isaiah10:23 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova wa makamu adzachita chionongeko chotsimikizidwa pakati pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Isaiah10:24 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, Inu anthu anga okhala m'Ziyoni, musaope Asiriya; ngakhale amenya inu ndi chibonga, kapena kukusamulira iwe ndodo yake, monga amachitira Ejipito." 
Isaiah10:25 Pakuti patsala kamphindi, ndipo ukali udzathedwa ndi mkwiyo wanga wakuwaononga." 
Isaiah10:26 Ndipo Yehova wa makamu adzamuutsira chikoti, monga m'kuphedwa kwa Midiyani pa thanthwe la Orebu; ndipo chibonga chake chidzakhala pamwamba pa nyanja, ndipo adzaisamula monga anachitira Ejipito," 
Isaiah10:27 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti katundu wake adzachoka pa phewa lako, ndi goli lake pakhosi pako; ndipo goli lidzathedwa chifukwa cha kudzoza mafuta." 
Isaiah10:28 Wafika ku Ayati, wapitirira kunka ku Migironi; pa Mikimasi asunga akatundu ake;" 
Isaiah10:29 wapita pampata; wagona pa Geba, Rama anthunthumira; Gibea wa Saulo wathawa." 
Isaiah10:30 Fuula ndi mau ako iwe mwana wamkazi wa Galimu! Tamva, iwe Laisa! Iwe Anatoti wosauka!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madimena ali wothawathawa; okhala m'Gebimu asonkhana kuti athawe. 
Isaiah10:32 Lero lomwe adzaima pa Nobu; agwedezera dzanja lake pa phiri la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, phiri la Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Taonani, Ambuye Yehova wa makamu adzasadza nthambi moopsa; ndipo zazitali msinkhu zidzadulidwa, ndipo zazitali zidzagwetsedwa." 
Isaiah10:34 Ndipo adzadula nkhalango za m'thengo ndi chitsulo, ndipo Lebanoni adzagwa ndi wamphamvu." 
Isaiah11:1 Ndipo padzatuluka mphukira pa tsinde la Yese, ndi nthambi yotuluka m'mizu yake idzabala zipatso;" 
Isaiah11:2 Ndipo mzimu wa Yehova udzambalira iye mzimu wanzeru ndi wakuzindikira, mzimu wa uphungu ndi mphamvu, mzimu wakudziwa ndi wakuopa Yehova;" 
Isaiah11:3 ndipo adzakondwera nako kumuopa Yehova, ndipo sadzaweruza monga apenya maso, sadzadzudzula mwamphekesera:" 
Isaiah11:4 koma ndi chilungamo adzaweruza aumphawi, nadzadzudzulira ofatsa a m'dziko moongoka; ndipo adzamenya dziko lapansi ndi chibonga cha kukamwa kwake, nadzapha oipa ndi mpweya wa milomo yake." 
Isaiah11:5 Ndipo chilungamo chidzakhala mpango wa m'chuuno mwake, ndi chikhulupiriko chidzakhala mpango wa pa zimpso zake." 
Isaiah11:6 Mmbulu udzakhala pamodzi ndi mwanawankhosa, ndipo nyalugwe adzagona pansi ndi mwanawambuzi; ndipo mwanawang'ombe ndi mwana wa mkango ndi choweta chonenepa pamodzi; ndipo mwana wamng'ono adzazitsogolera." 
Isaiah11:7 Ndipo ng'ombe yaikazi ndi chilombo zidzadya pamodzi; ndipo ana ao ang'ono adzagona pansi; ndipo mkango udzadya udzu ngati ng'ombe. 
Isaiah11:8 Ndipo mwana wakuyamwa adzasewera pa una wa mamba, ndi mwana woleka kuyamwa adzaika dzanja lake m'funkha la mphiri." 
Isaiah11:9 Sizidzaipitsa, sizidzasakaza m'phiri langa lonse loyera, chifukwa kuti dziko lapansi lidzadzaza ndi odziwa Yehova, monga mdazi adzaza nyanja." 
Isaiah11:10 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti muzu wa Yese umene uima ngati mbendera ya mitundu ya anthu, amitundu adzafunafuna uwu; ndipo popuma pake padzakhala ulemerero." 
Isaiah11:11 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti Ambuye adzabweza kachiwiri ndi dzanja lake anthu ake otsala ochokera ku Asiriya, ndi ku Ejipito, ndi ku Patirosi, ndi ku Kusi, ndi ku Elamu, ndi ku Sinara, ndi ku Hamati, ndi ku zisumbu za m'nyanja." 
Isaiah11:12 Ndipo Iye adzaimika mbendera ya amitundu, ndipo adzasonkhanitsa oingitsidwa a Israele, namema obalalika a Yuda, kuchokera kumadera anai a dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah11:13 Ndipo nsanje ya Efuremu idzachoka, ndi iwo amene avuta Yuda adzadulidwa; Efuremu sachitira nsanje Yuda, ndi Yuda sachitira nsanje Efuremu." 
Isaiah11:14 Ndipo adzagudukira mapewa a Afilisti kumadzulo; pamodzi adzafunkha ana a kum'mawa; adzatambasula dzanja lao pa Edomu ndi pa Mowabu; ndipo ana a Amoni adzawamvera. 
Isaiah11:15 Ndipo Yehova adzaononga ndithu bondo la nyanja ya Ejipito; ndipo ndi mphepo yake yopsereza adzagwedeza dzanja lake pa Mtsinje, ndipo adzaimenya ikhale mphaluka zisanu ndi ziwiri, nadzaolotsa anthu pansi pouma." 
Isaiah11:16 Ndipo padzakhala khwalala la anthu ake otsala ochokera ku Asiriya; monga lija la Israele tsiku lokwera iwo kutuluka m'dziko la Ejipito. 
Isaiah12:1 Tsiku lomwelo udzati, Ndikuyamikani inu Yehova; pakuti ngakhale munandikwiyira, mkwiyo wanu wachoka, ndipo mutonthoza mtima wanga." 
Isaiah12:2 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye chipulumutso changa; ndidzakhulupirira, sindidzaopa; pakuti Yehova Mwini ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga, Iye ndiye chipulumutso changa." 
Isaiah12:3 Chifukwa chake mudzakondwera pakutunga madzi m'zitsime za chipulumutso. 
Isaiah12:4 Tsiku lomwelo mudzati, Muyamikire Yehova, bukitsani dzina lake, mulalikire machitidwe ake mwa mitundu ya anthu, munene kuti dzina lake lakwezedwa." 
Isaiah12:5 Muimbire Yehova; pakuti wachita zaulemerero; chidziwike ichi m'dziko lonse. 
Isaiah12:6 Tafuula, takuwa iwe, wokhala m'Ziyoni, chifukwa Woyera wa Israele wa m'kati mwako ali wamkulu." 
Isaiah13:1 Katundu wa Babiloni, imene anaiona Yesaya mwana wa Amozi." 
Isaiah13:2 Kwezani mbendera pa phiri loti see, kwezani mau kwa iwo, kodolani kuti alowe m'zipata za akulu." 
Isaiah13:3 Ine ndalamulira opatulidwa anga, inde, ndaitana amphamvu anga, achite mkwiyo wanga, okondwerera ndi ukulu wanga." 
Isaiah13:4 Mau a khamu m'mapiri, akunga a mtundu waukulu wa anthu, mau a phokoso la maufumu a mitundu yosonkhanidwa! Yehova wa makamu asonkhanitsa khamu kunkhondo." 
Isaiah13:5 Achokera m'dziko lakutali, kumalekezero a thambo, ngakhale Yehova, ndi zida za mkwiyo wake, kuti aononge dziko lonse." 
Isaiah13:6 Kuwani inu; pakuti tsiku la Yehova lili pafupi; lidzafika monga chionongeko chochokera kwa Wamphamvuyonse. 
Isaiah13:7 Chifukwa chake manja onse adzafooka, ndi mitima yonse ya anthu idzasungunuka;" 
Isaiah13:8 ndipo adzaopa; zowawa ndi masauko zidzawagwira; ndipo adzamva zowawa, ngati mkazi wakubala; adzazizwa wina ndi wina; nkhope zao zidzanga malawi a moto." 
Isaiah13:9 Taonani tsiku la Yehova lidza, lankhanza, ndi mkwiyo ndi kukalipira kwaukali; kupasula dziko, ndi kudzaonongamo akuchimwa psiti." 
Isaiah13:10 Chifukwa nyenyezi za kumwamba ndi makamu ao sizidzawala; dzuwa lidzada m'kutuluka kwake, ndipo mwezi sudzaonetsa kuwala kwake." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndipo ndidzalanga dziko lapansi, chifukwa cha kuipa kwao, ndi oipa chifukwa cha mphulupulu zao; ndipo ndidzaletsa kudzikuza kwa onyada, ndidzagwetsa kudzikweza kwa oopsa." 
Isaiah13:12 Ndipo ndidzachepsa anthu koposa golide, ngakhale anthu koposa golide weniweni wa ku Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Chifukwa chake ndidzanthunthumiritsa miyamba, ndipo dziko lapansi lidzagwedezeka kuchokera m'malo ake, m'mkwiyo wa Yehova wa makamu, tsiku la mkwiyo wake waukali." 
Isaiah13:14 Ndipo padzakhala kuti monga mbawala yothamangitsidwa, ndi monga nkhosa zosazisonkhanitsa anthu, adzatembenukira yense kwa anthu ake, nathawira yense kudziko lake." 
Isaiah13:15 Onse opezedwa adzapyozedwa, ndi onse ogwidwa adzagwa ndi lupanga." 
Isaiah13:16 Makanda ao adzatswanyidwe pamaso pao; m'nyumba mwao mudzafunkhidwa, ndi akazi ao adzakakamizidwa." 
Isaiah13:17 Taonani, ndidzawautsira Amedi, amene sadzasamalira siliva, ngakhale golide sadzakondwera naye." 
Isaiah13:18 Mauta ao adzatha anyamata; ndipo sadzachitira chisoni chipatso cha mimba; diso lao silidzaleka ana. 
Isaiah13:19 Ndipo Babiloni, ulemerero wa maufumu, mudzi wokongolawo Ababiloni anaunyadira, adzakhala monga momwe Mulungu anapasula Sodomu ndi Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Anthu sadzakhalamo konse, sadzakhalamo mbadwo ndi mbadwo; Mwarabu sadzamanga hema wake pamenepo; abusa sadzagonetsa makamu ao kumeneko." 
Isaiah13:21 Koma zilombo za m'chipululu zidzagona pamenepo; nyumba zao zidzadzala ndi zakukuwa; ndipo nthiwatiwa zidzakhala pamenepo, ndipo atonde adzajidimuka pamenepo." 
Isaiah13:22 Ndipo mimbulu idzalira m'maboma ao, ndi ankhandwe m'manyumba ao abwino; ndi nthawi yake iyandikira, ndi masiku ake sadzachuluka." 
Isaiah14:1 Pakuti Ambuye adzamchitira chifundo Yakobo, ndipo adzasankhanso Israele, ndi kuwakhazikitsa m'dziko la kwao; ndipo achilendo adzadziphatika okha kwa iwo, nadzadzigumikiza kunyumba ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Ndipo mitundu ya anthu idzawatenga, ndi kuwafikitsa kumalo a kwao; ndipo a nyumba ya Israele adzakhala nao amitunduwo m'dziko la Yehova, ndi kuwayesa atumiki ndi adzakazi, ndipo amitunduwo adzatengedwa ndende, ndi amenewo anali ndende zao; ndipo Aisraele adzalamulira owavuta." 
Isaiah14:3 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku loti Yehova adzakupumitsa chisoni chako, ndi nsautso yako, ndi ntchito yako yovuta, imene anakugwiritsa," 
Isaiah14:4 pamenepo udzaimbira mfumu ya ku Babiloni nyimbo iyi yanchinchi, ndi kuti, Wovuta wathadi? Mudzi wagolide wathadi!" 
Isaiah14:5 Yehova wathyola mkunkhu wa woipa, ndodo yachifumu ya wolamulira." 
Isaiah14:6 Wokantha anthu mwaukali kuwakantha chikanthire, wolamulira amitundu mokwiya, angosautsidwa wopanda womlanditsa." 
Isaiah14:7 Dziko lonse lapuma, lili duu; iwo ayamba kuimba nyimbo." 
Isaiah14:8 Inde, milombwa ikondwera ndi iwe, ndi mikungudza ya Lebanoni, ndi kunena, Chigwetsere iwe pansi, palibe wokwera kudzatidula ife." 
Isaiah14:9 Kunsi kwa manda kugwedezeka, chifukwa cha iwe, kukuchingamira podza pako; kukuutsira iwe mizimu, ngakhale onse akuluakulu a dziko lapansi; kukweza kuchokera m'mipando yao mafumu onse a amitundu." 
Isaiah14:10 Onse adzavomera, nadzati kwa iwe, Kodi iwe wakhalanso wopanda mphamvu ngati ife? Kodi iwe wafanana nafe?" 
Isaiah14:11 Chifumu chako chatsitsidwa kunsi kumanda, ndi phokoso la mingoli yako; mphutsi zayalidwa pansi pa iwe, ndi mphukutu zakukuta." 
Isaiah14:12 Wagwadi kuchokera kumwamba, iwe nthanda, mwana wa mbandakucha! Wagwetsedwa pansi, iwe wolefula amitundu!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ndipo iwe unati mumtima mwako, Ndidzakwera kumwamba, ndidzakweza mpando wanga wachifumu pamwamba pa nyenyezi za Mulungu; ndidzakhala pamwamba pa phiri la khamu, m'malekezero a kumpoto;" 
Isaiah14:14 ndidzakwera pamwamba pa mitambo, ndidzafanana ndi Wam'mwambamwamba." 
Isaiah14:15 Koma udzatsitsidwa kunsi kumanda, ku malekezero a dzenje." 
Isaiah14:16 Iwo amene akuona iwe adzayang'anitsitsa iwe, nadzalingalira za iwe, ndi kuti, Kodi uyu ndi munthu amene ananthunthumiritsa dziko lapansi, amene anagwedeza maufumu;" 
Isaiah14:17 amene anapululutsa dziko, napasula midzi yake, amene sanamasule ndende zake, zinke kwao?" 
Isaiah14:18 Mafumu onse a mitundu, onsewo agona m'ulemerero yense kunyumba kwake." 
Isaiah14:19 Koma iwe watayidwa kunja kwa manda ako, ngati nthambi yonyansa, ngati chovala cha ophedwa, opyozedwa ndi lupanga, otsikira kumiyala ya dzenje, monga ngati mtembo wopondedwa ndi phazi." 
Isaiah14:20 Iwe sudzaphatikizidwa pamodzi nao poikidwa, pakuti iwe waononga dziko lako, wapha anthu ako; mbeu ya ochita zoipa sidzatchulidwa konse." 
Isaiah14:21 Konzani inu popherapo ana ake, chifukwa cha kuipa kwa atate ao; kuti iwo asadzuka ndi kukhala nalo dziko, ndi kudzaza dziko lapansi ndi midzi." 
Isaiah14:22 Ndipo Ine ndidzawaukira, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndi kuononga ku Babiloni dzina ndi otsala, ndi mwana wamwamuna, ndi chidzukulu chachimuna, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndidzayesapo pokhala nungu, ndi maiwe a madzi; ndipo ndidzasesapo ndi tsache la chionongeko, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah14:24 Yehova wa makamu walumbira, nati, Ndithu monga ndaganiza, chotero chidzachitidwa; ndipo monga ndapanga uphungu, chotero chidzakhala;" 
Isaiah14:25 kuti Ine ndidzathyola Asiriya m'dziko langa, ndi pamwamba pa mapiri anga ndidzawapondereza; pomwepo goli lake lidzachoka pa iwo, ndi katundu wake adzachoka paphuzi pao." 
Isaiah14:26 Umenewu ndi uphungu wopangira dziko lonse; ndipo ili ndi dzanja lotambasulidwa pa amitundu onse. 
Isaiah14:27 Pakuti Yehova wa makamu wapanga uphungu, ndani adzauleketsa? Ndi dzanja lake latambasulidwa, ndani adzalibweza?" 
Isaiah14:28 Chaka chimene mfumu Ahazi anamwalira katundu amene analipo. 
Isaiah14:29 Usakondwere, iwe Filistiya, wonsewe, pothyoka ndodo inakumenya; pakuti m'muzu wa njoka mudzatuluka mphiri, ndimo chipatso chake chidzakhala njoka yamoto youluka." 
Isaiah14:30 Ndi oyamba kubadwa a osauka adzadya, aumphawi nadzagona pansi osatekeseka; ndipo ndidzapha muzu wako ndi njala, ndi otsala ako adzaphedwa." 
Isaiah14:31 Lira, chipata iwe; fuula, mudzi iwe; wasungunuka, Filistiya wonsewe, pakuti utsi uchokera kumpoto, ndipo palibe wosokera m'mizere yake." 
Isaiah14:32 Ndipo adzayankhanji amithenga a amitundu? Kuti Yehova wakhazikitsa Ziyoni, ndipo m'menemo anthu ake ovutidwa adzaona pobisalira." 
Isaiah15:1 Katundu wa Mowabu. Pakuti usiku umodzi Ari wa ku Mowabu wapasuka, nakhala chabe; usiku umodzi Kiri wa Mowabu wapasuka, nakhala chabe." 
Isaiah15:2 Akwera ku Kachisi, ndi ku Diboni, kumisanje, kukalira; pa Nebo ndi pa Medeba a Mowabu pali kulira; pamitu pao ponse pali dazi, ndevu zonse zametedwa." 
Isaiah15:3 M'makwalala mwao adzimangira chiguduli m'chuuno, pamwamba pa nyumba zao, ndi m'malo a mabwalo ao, yense akuwa, naliritsa kwambiri." 
Isaiah15:4 Ndi Hesiboni afuula zolimba, ndi Eleyale; mau ao amveka, ngakhale ku Yahazi; chifukwa chake amuna ankhondo a Mowabu afuula zolimba; moyo wake wanthunthumira m'kati mwake." 
Isaiah15:5 Mtima wanga ufuula chifukwa cha Mowabu: akulu ake athawira ku Zowari, ku Egilati-Selisiya; pakuti pa chikweza cha Luhiti akwera alikulira, pakuti m'njira ya Horonaimu akweza mfuu wa chionongeko." 
Isaiah15:6 Pakuti pa madzi a Nimurimu padzakhala mabwinja; popeza udzu wafota, msipu watha." 
Isaiah15:7 Chifukwa chake zochuluka adazipeza, ndi zosungidwa zao adzazitenga kunka nazo kumtsinje wa mabango." 
Isaiah15:8 Pakuti kulira kwamveka kuzungulira malire a Mowabu; kukuwa kwake kwafikira ku Egilaimu, ndi kukuwa kwake kwafikira ku Beerelimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Pakuti madzi a Diboni adzala mwazi; pakuti ndidzatengera zina pa Diboni, mkango pa iye amene anapulumuka ku Mowabu, ndi pa otsala a m'dziko." 
Isaiah16:1 Tumizani inu anaankhosa kwa wolamulira wa dziko kuchokera ku Sela kunka kuchipululu, mpaka kuphiri la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Pakuti ana akazi a Mowabu adzakhala pa madooko a Arinoni, ngati mbalame zoyendayenda, ngati chisa chofwanchuka." 
Isaiah16:3 Chitani uphungu, weruzani chiweruziro; yesa mthunzi wako monga usiku pakati pa usana; bisa opirikitsidwa, osawulula woyendayenda." 
Isaiah16:4 Opirikitsidwa a Mowabu akhale ndi iwe, khala iwe chomphimba pamaso pa wofunkha; pakuti kumpambapamba kwalekeka, kufunkha kwatha, opondereza atsirizika m'dziko." 
Isaiah16:5 Ndipo mpando wachifumu udzakhazikika m'chifundo, ndimo wina adzakhala pamenepo m'zoona, m'chihema cha Davide, nadzaweruza, nadzafunitsa chiweruziro, nadzafulumira kuchita chilungamo." 
Isaiah16:6 Ife tinamva kunyada kwa Mowabu, kuti iye ali wonyada ndithu; ngakhale kudzitama kwake, ndi kunyada kwake ndi mkwiyo wake; matukutuku ake ali achabe." 
Isaiah16:7 Chifukwa chake Mowabu adzakuwa chifukwa cha Mowabu, onse adzakuwa; chifukwa cha maziko a Kiri-Haresefi mudzalira maliro, osautsidwa ndithu." 
Isaiah16:8 Pakuti minda ya ku Hesiboni yalefuka, ndi mpesa wa ku Sibima; ambuye a mitundu athyolathyola mitengo yosankhika yake; iwo anafikira ngakhale ku Yazere, nayendayenda m'chipululu; nthambi zake zinatasa, zinapitirira panyanja." 
Isaiah16:9 Chifukwa chake ndidzalira ndi kulira kwa Yazere, chifukwa cha mpesa wa Sibima, ndidzakukhathamiza ndi misozi yanga, iwe Hesiboni ndi Eleyale; chifukwa kuti pa zipatso zako za malimwe, ndi pa masika ako, mfuu wankhondo wagwera." 
Isaiah16:10 Ndipo chikondwero ndi msangalalo zachotsedwa m'munda wopatsa zipatso; ndi m'minda ya mipesa simudzakhala kuimba, ngakhale phokoso losangalala; palibe woponda adzaponda vinyo m'moponderamo; ndaleketsa mfuu wa masika amphesa." 
Isaiah16:11 Chifukwa chake m'mimba mwanga mulirira Mowabu, ngati mngoli, ndi za m'mtima mwanga zilirira Kiriheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Ndipo padzakhala kuti pamene Mowabu adzadzionetsa yekha, ndi kudzitopetsa pamsanje, ndipo kufika kumalo ake oyera kudzapemphera, sadzapindulapo kanthu." 
Isaiah16:13 Awa ndi mau amene Yehova adanena za Mowabu nthawi zapitazo. 
Isaiah16:14 Koma tsopano Yehova wanena, nati, Zisanapite zaka zitatu monga zaka za wolembedwa ntchito, ulemerero wa Mowabu udzakhala wonyozeka, ndi khamu lalikulu lake, ndi otsala adzakhala ang'onong'ono ndi achabe." 
Isaiah17:1 Katundu wa Damasiko. Taonani, Damasiko wachotsedwa usakhalenso mudzi, ndimo udzangokhala muunda wopasudwa." 
Isaiah17:2 Midzi ya Aroere yasiyidwa; idzakhala ya zoweta zogona pansi, opanda woziopsa." 
Isaiah17:3 Ku Efuremu sikudzakhalanso linga, ngakhale ufumu ku Damasiko, ngakhale otsala kwa Aramu; iwo adzakhala ngati ulemerero wa ana a Israele, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah17:4 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti ulemerero wa Yakobo udzakhala wopyapyala, ndi kunenepa kwa thupi lake kudzaonda." 
Isaiah17:5 Ndipo padzakhala ngati wamasika alikumweta tirigu wosacheka, ndi dzanja lake lilikudula ngala; inde padzakhala ngati pamene wina akunkha ngala m'chigwa cha Refaimu." 
Isaiah17:6 Koma mudzasiyidwa m'menemo khunkha, monga ngati kugwedeza kwake kwa mtengo wa azitona, zipatso ziwiri pena zitatu m'nsonga ya nthambi yosomphoka, zinai pena zisanu m'nthambi za kunthemba, za mtengo wobalitsa, ati Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele." 
Isaiah17:7 Tsiku limenelo munthu adzayang'ana kwa Mlengi wake, ndipo maso ake adzalemekeza Woyera wa Israele." 
Isaiah17:8 Ndipo iye sadzayang'ana pa maguwa a nsembe, ntchito ya manja ake, ngakhale kulemekeza chimene anachipanga ndi zala zake, ngakhale zifanizo pena mafano a dzuwa." 
Isaiah17:9 Tsiku limenelo midzi yake yolimba idzakhala ngati mabwinja a m'nkhalango, ndi a pansonga pa phiri, osiyidwa pamaso pa ana a Israele; ndipo padzakhala bwinja." 
Isaiah17:10 Chifukwa iwe waiwala Mulungu wa chipulumutso chako, sunakumbukira thanthwe la mphamvu zako; chifukwa chake iwe waoka mitengo yokondweretsa, waokapo zipinjiri zachilendo;" 
Isaiah17:11 tsiku lako looka uzingapo mpanda, nuphukitsa mbeu zako m'mawa mwake; mulu wa masika udzaoneka tsiku lakulira ndi la chisoni chothetsa nzeru." 
Isaiah17:12 Ha, phokoso la mitundu yambiri ya anthu ambiri, amene afuula ngati kukukuma kwa nyanja; ndi kuthamanga kwa amitundu, akuthamanga ngati kuthamanga kwa madzi amphamvu!" 
Isaiah17:13 Mitundu ya anthu idzathamanga ngati kuthamanga kwa madzi ambirimbiri; koma Iye adzawadzudzula, ndipo iwo adzathawira patali, nadzapirikitsidwa monga mankhusu a pamapiri patsogolo pa mphepo, ndi monga fumbi lokwetera patsogolo pa mkuntho wa mphepo." 
Isaiah17:14 Pa nthawi ya madzulo, taonani kuopsa; kusanake, iwo palibe. Ili ndi gawo la iwo amene atifunkha ndi ichi chiwagwera omwe alanda zathu." 
Isaiah18:1 Ha, dziko lakukupuza mapiko, lili tsidya lija la nyanja za Etiopiya;" 
Isaiah18:2 limene litumiza mithenga panyanja m'ngalawa zamagumbwa zoyenda m'madzi, ndi kuti, Mukani, inu mithenga yoyenda msangamsanga kumtundu wa anthu aatali ndi osalala, kwa mtundu woopsa chikhalire chao, mtundu umene uyesa dziko ndi kupondereza pansi, umene dziko lake nyanja ziligawa!" 
Isaiah18:3 Inu nonse akukhala m'dziko lapansi, ndi inu akukhazikika pa dziko lapansi, potukulidwa chizindikiro pamwamba pa mapiri, mudzaona, ndi polizidwa lipenga mudzamva." 
Isaiah18:4 Pakuti Yehova watero kwa ine, Ine ndidzakhala chete, ndipo ndidzayang'ana mokhala chete, ndipo ndidzayang'ana mokhalamo Ine, monga kuwala kotentha kwa dzuwa, monga mtambo wa mame m'kutentha kwa masika." 
Isaiah18:5 Pakuti masika asanafike, kutatha kuphuka ndi posanduka duwa mphesa yofuna kutcha, iye adzadzombolera tinthambi ndi chikwakwa, ndi nthambi zotasa adzazichotsa ndi kuzisadza." 
Isaiah18:6 Adzasiyira mbalame zakulusa za m'mapiri ndi zilombo za dziko nthambizo, ndipo mbalame zakulusa zidzakhalapo m'dzinja, ndi zilombo zonse za dziko zidzakhalapo m'malimwe." 
Isaiah18:7 Nthawi imeneyo mphatso idzaperekedwa kwa Yehova wa makamu, mtundu wa anthu aatali ndi osalala, yochokera kwa mtundu woopsa chikhalire chao; mtundu umene uyesa dziko ndi kupondereza pansi, umene dziko lake nyanja ziligawa, kumalo a dzina la Yehova wa makamu, phiri la Ziyoni." 
Isaiah19:1 Katundu wa Ejipito. Taonani, Yehova wakwera pamwamba pa mtambo wothamanga, nadza ku Ejipito; ndi mafano a Ejipito adzagwedezeka pakufika kwake, ndi mtima wa Ejipito udzasungunuka pakati pake." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndipo ndidzapikisanitsa Aejipito; ndipo adzamenyana wina ndi mbale wake, ndi wina ndi mnansi wake; mudzi kumenyana ndi mudzi, ndi ufumu kumenyana ndi ufumu." 
Isaiah19:3 Ndipo mzimu wa Ejipito adzakhala wachabe pakati pake; ndipo Ine ndidzaononga uphungu wake; ndimo iwo adzafunafuna mafano ndi anyanga, ndi alauli, ndi obwebweta." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndipo ndidzapereka Ejipito m'manja mwa mbuye wankharwe; ndi mfumu yaukali idzawalamulira, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah19:5 Ndipo madzi adzaphwa m'nyanja yaikulu, ndipo nyanja yoyendamo madzi idzaphwa, niuma." 
Isaiah19:6 Ndipo nyanja zidzanunkha; mitsinje ya Ejipito idzachepa, nuima; bango ndi mlulu zidzafota." 
Isaiah19:7 Madambo oyandikana ndi Nailo, pafupi ndi gombe la Nailo, ndi zonse zobzala pa Nailo zidzauma, nizichotsedwa, zosakhalanso konse." 
Isaiah19:8 Asodzinso adzalira, ndi onse oponya mbedza m'Nailo adzaliralira, ndi onse oponya makoka m'madzi, adzalefuka." 
Isaiah19:9 Komanso iwo amene agwira ntchito yakupala thonje, ndi iwo amene aomba nsalu yoyera, adzakhala ndi manyazi." 
Isaiah19:10 Ndipo maziko ake adzasweka, onse amene agwira ntchito yolipidwa adzavutidwa mtima." 
Isaiah19:11 Akalonga a Zowani apusa ndithu; uphungu wa aphungu anzeru a Farao wasanduka wopulukira; bwanji iwe unena kwa Farao, Ine ndine mwana wa anzeru, mwana wa mafumu akale?" 
Isaiah19:12 Nanga tsopano anzeru ali kuti? Akuuze iwe tsopano; adziwe chimene Yehova wa makamu watsimikiza mtima kuchitira Ejipito. 
Isaiah19:13 Akalonga a Zowani apusa, akalonga a Nofi anyengedwa; iwo asocheretsa Ejipito, amene ali mwala wa pangodya wa mafuko ake." 
Isaiah19:14 Yehova wasanganiza mzimu wa kusaweruzika pakati pake; ndipo iwo asocheretsa Ejipito m'ntchito zake zonse, monga mwamuna woledzera ayenda punzipunzi posanza pake." 
Isaiah19:15 Ejipito sadzakhala ndi ntchito, imene mutu pena mchira, pena nthambi ya kanjedza, pena mlulu zidzaigwira." 
Isaiah19:16 Tsiku limenelo Ejipito adzanga akazi; ndipo adzanthunthumira ndi kuopa, chifukwa cha kugwedeza kwa dzanja la Yehova wa makamu, limene Iye agwedeza pamwamba pake." 
Isaiah19:17 Ndipo dziko la Yuda lidzaopsa Ejipito, yense wakulitchula adzamtembenukira mwamantha, chifukwa cha uphungu wa Yehova wa makamu, aupanga pa dzikolo." 
Isaiah19:18 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala midzi isanu m'dziko la Ejipito yolankhula chinenero cha Kanani, ndi yolumbira, Pali Yehova wa makamu; wina udzatchedwa, Mudzi wa chionongeko." 
Isaiah19:19 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala guwa la nsembe la Yehova pakati pa dziko la Ejipito, ndi choimiritsa cha Yehova m'malire ake." 
Isaiah19:20 Ndipo chidzakhala chizindikiro ndi mboni ya Yehova wa makamu m'dziko la Ejipito; pakuti iwo adzalirira kwa Yehova, chifukwa cha osautsa, ndipo Iye adzawatumizira mpulumutsi, ndi wamphamvu, nadzawapulumutsa." 
Isaiah19:21 Ndipo Yehova adzadziwika kwa Ejipito, ndipo Aejipito adzadziwa Yehova tsiku limenelo; inde iwo adzapembedzera ndi nsembe ndi zopereka, nadzawindira Yehova ndi kuchitadi." 
Isaiah19:22 Ndipo Yehova adzakantha Ejipito kukantha ndi kuchiritsa; ndipo iwo adzabwerera kwa Yehova, ndipo Iye adzapembedzedwa ndi iwo, nadzawachiritsa." 
Isaiah19:23 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala khwalala lochokera m'Ejipito kunka ku Asiriya, ndipo Mwasuri adzafika ku Ejipito, ndi Mwejipito adzafika ku Asiriya, ndipo Aejipito adzapembedzera pamodzi ndi Aasiriya." 
Isaiah19:24 Tsiku limenelo Israele ndi Ejipito ndi Asiriya atatuwa, adzakhala mdalitso pakati pa dziko lapansi;" 
Isaiah19:25 pakuti Yehova wa makamu wadalitsa iwo, ndi kuti, Odalitsika Ejipito anthu anga, ndi Asiriya ntchito ya manja anga, ndi Israele cholowa changa." 
Isaiah20:1 Chaka chimene kazembe wa ku Asiriya anafika ku Asidodi, muja Sarigoni mfumu ya Asiriya anamtumiza iye, ndipo iye anamenyana ndi Asidodi, naugonjetsa." 
Isaiah20:2 Nthawi imeneyo Yehova ananena ndi Yesaya, mwana wa Amozi, nati, Muka numasule chiguduli m'chuuno mwako, nuchichotse, nuvule nsapato yako kuphazi lako. Ndipo iye anatero, nayenda maliseche, ndi wopanda nsapato." 
Isaiah20:3 Ndipo Yehova anati, Monga mtumiki wanga Yesaya wayenda maliseche ndi wopanda nsapato zaka zitatu, akhale chizindikiro ndi chodabwitsa kwa Ejipito ndi kwa Etiopiya;" 
Isaiah20:4 momwemo mfumu ya Asiriya idzatsogolera kwina am'nsinga a Ejipito, ndi opirikitsidwa a Etiopiya, ana ndi okalamba, amaliseche ndi opanda nsapato, ndi matako osavala, kuti achititse manyazi Ejipito." 
Isaiah20:5 Ndipo iwo adzakhala ndi mantha ndi manyazi, chifukwa cha Kusi, amene anawatama, ndi Ejipito, amene anawanyadira." 
Isaiah20:6 Ndipo wokhala m'mphepete mwa nyanja muno adzati tsiku limenelo, Taonani, kuyembekeza kwathu kuli kotero, kumene ife tinathawira atithangate kupulumutsidwa kwa mfumu ya Asiriya, ndipo ife tidzapulumuka bwanji?" 
Isaiah21:1 Katundu wa chipululu cha kunyanja. Monga akamvulumvulu a kumwera apitirira, kufumira kuchipululu kudziko loopsa." 
Isaiah21:2 Masomphenya ovuta aonetsedwa kwa ine; wogula malonda wonyenga amangonyenga, ndi wofunkha amangofunkha. Kwera Elamu iwe; zunguniza Mediya iwe; kuusa moyo kwake konse ndakutonthoza." 
Isaiah21:3 Chifukwa chake m'chuuno mwanga mwadzazidwa ndi zopota; zopweteka zandigwira ine monga zopweteka za mkazi pobala mwana; zowawa zindiweramitsa, makutu anga sangathe kumva; ndichita mantha sindingathe kuona." 
Isaiah21:4 Mtima wanga uguguda, mantha andiopsetsa ine; chizirezire chimene ndinachikhumba chandisandukira kunthunthumira." 
Isaiah21:5 Iwo akonza pa gome lodyera, aika alonda, adya, namwa; ukani, akalonga inu, dzozani mafuta chikopa." 
Isaiah21:6 Pakuti Ambuye atero kwa ine, Muka, ika mlonda anene chimene achiona;" 
Isaiah21:7 ndipo pamene iye anaona khamu, amuna apakavalo awiriawiri, khamu la abulu, khamu la ngamira, iye adzamvetsera ndi khama mosamalitsa." 
Isaiah21:8 Ndipo iye anafuulitsa ngati mkango, Ambuye inu, ine ndiimabe pamwamba pa nsanja nthawi ya usana, ndipo ndiikidwa mu ulonda wanga usiku wonse;" 
Isaiah21:9 ndipo taonani, kuno kulinkudza khamu la amuna, apakavalo awiriawiri. Ndipo iye anayankha nati, Babiloni wagwa, wagwa; ndi mafano onse osema a milungu yake asweka, nagwa pansi." 
Isaiah21:10 Kuomba kwanga nanga, ndi za pa dwale langa: chimene ine ndinachimva kwa Yehova wa makamu Mulungu wa Israele, ndanena kwa inu." 
Isaiah21:11 Katundu wa Duma. Wina aitana kwa ine kuchokera ku Seiri, Mlonda, nthawi yanji ya usiku? Mlonda, nthawi yanji ya usiku?" 
Isaiah21:12 Mlonda anati, Kuli kucha, koma kukali usiku; mukafuna kufunsa, funsani, bwerani, idzani." 
Isaiah21:13 Katundu wa pa Arabiya. M'nkhalango ya m'Arabiya mudzagona, inu makamu oyendayenda a Dedani." 
Isaiah21:14 Muchingamire akumva ludzu ndi madzi; okhala m'dziko la Tema ananka kukomana ndi othawa ndi chakudya chao. 
Isaiah21:15 Pakuti iwo anathawa malupanga, malupanga osololedwa, ndi mauta olifuka ndi nkhondo yovuta." 
Isaiah21:16 Pakuti Ambuye anatero kwa ine, Chisanapite chaka malinga ndi zaka za wolembedwa ntchito, ulemerero wonse wa Kedara udzagoma;" 
Isaiah21:17 ndi otsala amauta, ngwazi za ana a Kedara zidzachepa, pakuti Yehova Mulungu wa Israele wanena." 
Isaiah22:1 Katundu wa chigwa cha masomphenya. Mwatani kuti mwakwera nonsenu pamachindwi? 
Isaiah22:2 Iwe amene wadzala ndi zimfuu, mudzi waphokoso, mudzi wokondwa; ophedwa ako sanaphedwe ndi lupanga, sanafe m'nkhondo." 
Isaiah22:3 Olamulira ako onse athawa pamodzi, anamangidwa ndi amauta; opezedwa ako onse anamangidwa pamodzi, nathawira patali." 
Isaiah22:4 Chomwecho ndinati, Usandiyang'ane ine, ndilira ndi kuwawa mtima; usafulumire kunditonthoza ine, chifukwa cha kufunkhidwa kwa mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga." 
Isaiah22:5 Pakuti nditsiku laphokoso, ndi lopondereza pansi, ndi lothetsa nzeru, lochokera kwa Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, m'chigwa cha masomphenya, kugumuka kwa malinga, ndi kufuulira kumapiri." 
Isaiah22:6 Ndipo Elamu anatenga phodo, ndi magaleta a anthu ndi apakavalo; ndipo Kiri anaonetsa zikopa." 
Isaiah22:7 Ndipo panali kuti zigwa zako zosankhika zinadzala magaleta, ndi apakavalo anadzinika okha pachipata." 
Isaiah22:8 Ndipo Iye anachotsa chophimba cha Yuda; ndipo iwe unayang'ana tsiku limenelo pa zida za m'nyumba ya nkhalango. 
Isaiah22:9 Ndipo inu munaona kuti pa mudzi wa Davide panagumuka mipata yambiri; ndipo munasonkhanitsa pamodzi madzi a m'thamanda lakunsi. 
Isaiah22:10 Ndipo inu munawerenga nyumba za Yerusalemu, ndipo munagwetsa nyumba, kuti mumangire linga." 
Isaiah22:11 Inu munapanganso chosungamo madzi a thamanda lakale, pakati pa malinga awiri; koma inu simunamuyang'ane iye amene anachichita icho, ngakhale kusamalira iye amene analipanga kale." 
Isaiah22:12 Ndipo tsiku limenelo Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, anaitana kulira, ndi kugwa misozi, ndi kumeta, ndi kuvala chiguduli m'chuuno;" 
Isaiah22:13 koma taonani, kukondwa, ndi kusekerera, ndi kupha ng'ombe, ndi kupha nkhosa, ndi kudya nyama, ndi kumwa vinyo; tiyeni tidye ndi kumwa, chifukwa mawa tidzafa." 
Isaiah22:14 Ndipo Yehova wa makamu wadzivumbulutsa yekha m'makutu mwanga, Ndithu choipa chimenechi sichidzachotsedwa pa inu kufikira inu mudzafa, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah22:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, Muka, pita iwe kwa kapitao uyu, kwa Sebina woyang'anira nyumba, ndi kuti," 
Isaiah22:16 Uchitanji iwe kuno, ndimo ndani ali nawe kuno, kuti iwe wagoba manda kuno, ndi kudzigobera manda pamwamba, ndi kudzisemera mogonamo m'thanthwe." 
Isaiah22:17 Taona Yehova adzakuponya iwe zolimba, monga mwamuna wamphamvu, inde adzakufumbata zolimba." 
Isaiah22:18 Iye ndithu adzakuzunguza, ndi kukuponyaponya ngati mpira m'dziko lalikulu; kumeneko iwe udzafa, ndipo kumeneko kudzakhala magaleta a ulemerero wako, iwe wochititsa manyazi banja la mbuye wako." 
Isaiah22:19 Ndipo Ine ndidzakutulutsa iwe mu ntchito yako, ndi kukutsitsa iwe pokhala pako." 
Isaiah22:20 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti Ine ndidzaitana mtumiki wanga, Eliyakimu mwana wa Hilikiya:" 
Isaiah22:21 ndipo ndidzamveka iye chovala chako, ndi kumlimbikitsa ndi lamba lako, ndipo ndidzapereka ulamuliro wako m'dzanja lake; ndipo iye adzakhala atate wa okhala m'Yerusalemu ndi a nyumba ya Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndipo ndidzaika mfungulo wa nyumba ya Davide paphewa pake, ndipo iye adzatsegula, ndipo palibe wina adzatseka, iye adzatseka ndipo palibe wina adzatsegula." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndipo ndidzamkhomera iye ngati chikhomo cholimba; ndipo iye adzakhala mpando wa ulemerero wa banja la atate wake. 
Isaiah22:24 Ndipo iwo adzapachika pa iye ulemerero wonse wa banja la atate wake, obadwa ndi ana, mbiya zonse zazing'ono, ngakhale zikho ndi aguda omwe."
