Isaiah22:25 Tsiku limenelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, chikhomo chokhomeredwa polimba udzasukusika; nudzaguluka, ndi kugwa, ndi katundu wopachikidwapo adzadulidwa; pakuti Yehova wanena." 
Isaiah23:1 Katundu wa Tiro. Kuwani, inu ngalawa za Tarisisi; chifukwa wapasudwa, kulibenso nyumba, kulibe polowera; kuchokera kudziko la Kitimu kwavumbulutsidwa kwa iwo." 
Isaiah23:2 Khalani chete, inu okhala m'chisumbu; iwe amene anakudzazanso amalonda a ku Sidoni, opita m'nyanja." 
Isaiah23:3 Ndi pa nyanja zazikulu anapindula ndi mbeu za ku Sihori ndizo dzinthu za ku Nailo; ndi kumeneko kunali msika wa amitundu. 
Isaiah23:4 Khala ndi manyazi, iwe Sidoni; chifukwa nyanja yanena, linga la kunyanja, ndi kuti, Ine sindinamve zowawa, kapena kubala, kapena kulera anyamata, kapena kulera anamwali." 
Isaiah23:5 Pofika mbiriyo ku Ejipito, iwo adzamva kuwawa kwambiri pa mbiri ya Tiro." 
Isaiah23:6 Olokani inu, kunka ku Tarisisi, kuwani, inu okhala m'chisumbu." 
Isaiah23:7 Kodi umene ndi mudzi wanu wokondwa, wachikhalire kale lomwe, umene mapazi ake anaunyamula kunka nao kutali kukhalako?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ndani wapanga uphungu uno pa Tiro, mudzi umene upereka akorona, amalonda ake ali akalonga, ogulitsa ake ali olemekezeka pa dziko lapansi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Yehova wa makamu wapanga uphungu uwu, kuipitsa kunyada kwa ulemerero wonse, kupepula onse olemekezeka a m'dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah23:10 Pita pakati pa dziko lako monga Nailo, iwe mwana wamkazi wa Tarisisi; palibenso lamba." 
Isaiah23:11 Iye watambasula dzanja lake panyanja, wagwedeza maufumu; Yehova walamulira Kanani za amalonda, kupasula malinga ake." 
Isaiah23:12 Ndipo Iye anati, Iwe sudzakondwanso konse, iwe namwali wovutidwa, mwanawamkazi wa Sidoni; uka, oloka kunka ku Kitimu; ngakhale kumeneko iwe sudzapumai." 
Isaiah23:13 Taonani, dziko la Ababiloni; anthu awa sakhalanso; Asiriya analiika ilo likhale la zilombo zokhala m'chipululu; iwo amanga nsanja zao, nagumula nyumba za mafumu ake; nalipasula." 
Isaiah23:14 Kuwani, inu ngalawa za Tarisisi; pakuti linga lanu lapasulidwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti Tiro adzaiwalika zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, malinga ndi masiku a mfumu imodzi; zitapita zaka makumi asanu ndi ziwirizo, chidzakhala kwa Tiro monga m'nyimbo ya mkazi wadama." 
Isaiah23:16 Tenga mngoli, yendayenda m'mudzi, iwe mkazi wadama, amene unaiwalika; imba zokoma, chulukitsa nyimbo, kuti ukumbukiridwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Ndipo padzali, zitapita zaka makumi asanu ndi awirizo, kuti Yehova adzazonda Tiro, ndipo iye adzabwerera kumphotho yake, nadzachita dama ndi maufumu onse a dziko lapansi, okhala kunja kuno." 
Isaiah23:18 Malonda ake ndi mphotho yake zidzakhala zopatulikira Yehova; sizidzasungidwa kapena kuikidwa; chifukwa malonda ake adzakhala kwa iwo, amene akhala pamaso pa Yehova, kuti adye mokwana, navale chaulemu." 
Isaiah24:1 Taonani, Yehova apululutsa dziko, nalipasula, nalitembenuza dodolido, nabalalitsa okhalamo ake." 
Isaiah24:2 Ndipo padzakhala monga ndi anthu, moteronso ndi ansembe; monga ndi mtumiki, moteronso ndi mbuyake; monga ndi mdzakazi, moteronso ndi mbuyake wamkazi; monga ndi wogula, moteronso ndi wogulitsa; monga ndi wobwereka, moteronso ndi wombwereka; monga ndi wotenga phindu, moteronso ndi wombwezera phindu kwa iye." 
Isaiah24:3 Dziko lidzapululuka konse, ndi kupasulidwa ndithu; pakuti Yehova anenana mau amenewa." 
Isaiah24:4 Dziko lirira nilifota, dziko lilefuka nilifota, anthu omveka a padziko alefuka." 
Isaiah24:5 Dzikonso laipitsidwa ndi okhalamo ake omwe, chifukwa iwo alakwa pamalamulo nasinthanitsa malemba, nathyola chipangano cha nthawi zonse." 
Isaiah24:6 Chifukwa chake chitemberero chadya dziko, ndi amene akhala m'menemo apezedwa ochimwa, chifukwa chake okhalamo a padziko atenthedwa, ndipo anthu owerengeka atsala." 
Isaiah24:7 Vinyo watsopano alira, mpesa ulefuka, mitima yonse yokondwa iusa moyo." 
Isaiah24:8 Kusangalala kwa mangaka kwalekeka, phokoso la iwo amene asekera litha, kukondwa kwa mngoli kwalekeka." 
Isaiah24:9 Iwo sadzamwa vinyo ndi kuimba nyimbo; chakumwa chaukali chidzawawa kwa iwo amene achimwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Mudzi wosokonezeka wagwetsedwa pansi; nyumba zonse zatsekedwa, kuti asalowemo munthu." 
Isaiah24:11 Muli mfuu m'makwalala chifukwa cha vinyo; kukondwa konse kwadetsedwa, kusangalala kwa dziko kwatha." 
Isaiah24:12 M'mudzi mwatsala bwinja, ndi chipata chamenyedwa ndi chipasuko." 
Isaiah24:13 Chifukwa chake padzakhala chotero pakati pa dziko mwa anthu, ngati kugwedeza kwa mtengo wa azitona, ngati khunkha la mphesa, pakutha masika ake." 
Isaiah24:14 Amenewa adzakweza mau ao, nadzafuula; chifukwa cha chifumu cha Yehova, iwo adzafuula zolimba panyanja." 
Isaiah24:15 Chifukwa chake lemekezani inu Yehova kum'mawa, ngakhale dzina la Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele, m'zisumbu za m'nyanja." 
Isaiah24:16 Kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko ife tamva nyimbo zolemekeza wolungama. Koma ine ndinati, Ndaonda ine, ndaonda ine, tsoka kwa Ine! Amalonda onyenga amangonyenga; inde ogulitsa onyenga apambana kunyenga." 
Isaiah24:17 Mantha ndi dzenje ndi msampha zili pa iwe, wokhala m'dziko." 
Isaiah24:18 Ndipo padzali, kuti iye amene athawa mbiri yoopsa, adzagwa m'dzenje; ndi iye amene atuluka m'kati mwa dzenje, adzakodwa mumsampha, pakuti mazenera a kuthambo atsegudwa, ndi maziko a dziko agwedezeka." 
Isaiah24:19 Dziko lapansi lasweka ndithu, dziko lapansi lasungunukadi, dziko lapansi lili kugwedezeka kopambana." 
Isaiah24:20 Dziko lapansi lidzachita dzandidzandi, ngati munthu woledzera, ndi kunjenjemera, ngati chilindo; ndi kulakwa kwake kudzalilemera, ndipo lidzagwa losaukanso." 
Isaiah24:21 Ndipo padzali tsiku limenelo, kuti Yehova adzazonda kumwamba khamu lakumwamba, ndi mafumu a dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah24:22 Ndipo iwo adzasonkhanitsidwa pamodzi, monga ndende zimasonkhanitsidwa m'dzenje, ndi kutsekeredwa m'kaidi, ndipo atapita masiku ambiri adzawazonda." 
Isaiah24:23 Pompo mwezi udzanyazitsidwa, ndi dzuwa lidzakhala ndi manyazi, pakuti Yehova wa makamu adzalamulira chaulemerero m'phiri la Ziyoni, ndi m'Yerusalemu, ndi pamaso pa akuluakulu ake." 
Isaiah25:1 Yehova, Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndidzakukuzani Inu, ndidzatamanda dzina lanu, chifukwa mwachita zinthu zodabwitsa, ngakhale zauphungu zakale, mokhulupirika ndi m'zoonadi." 
Isaiah25:2 Chifukwa Inu mwasandutsa mudzi muunda; mudzi walinga bwinja; nyumba ya alendo kuti isakhale mudzi; sudzamangidwa konse. 
Isaiah25:3 Chifukwa chake anthu amphamvu adzakulemekezani Inu, mudzi wa mitundu yakuopsa udzakuopani Inu." 
Isaiah25:4 Chifukwa Inu mwakhala linga la aumphawi, linga la osowa m'kuvutidwa kwake, pobisalira chimphepo, mthunzi wa pa dzuwa, pamene kuomba kwa akuopsa kufanana ndi chimphepo chakuomba tchemba." 
Isaiah25:5 Monga kutentha m'malo ouma, Inu mudzaletsa phokoso la alendo; nyimbo ya akuopsa idzaletseka, monga mthunzi uletsa dzuwa." 
Isaiah25:6 Ndipo m'phiri limeneli Yehova wa makamu adzakonzera anthu ake onse phwando la zinthu zonona, phwando la vinyo wa pamitsokwe, la zinthu zonona za mafuta okhaokha, la vinyo wansenga wokuntha bwino." 
Isaiah25:7 Ndipo Iye adzaononga m'phiri limeneli chophimba nkhope chovundikira mitundu yonse ya anthu, ndi nsalu yokuta amitundu onse." 
Isaiah25:8 Iye wameza imfa kunthawi yonse; ndipo Ambuye Mulungu adzapukuta misozi pa nkhope zonse; ndipo chitonzo cha anthu ake adzachichotsa pa dziko lonse lapansi; chifukwa Yehova wanena. 
Isaiah25:9 Ndipo adzanena tsiku limenelo, Taonani, uyu ndiye Mulungu wathu; tamlindirira Iye, adzatipulumutsa; uyu ndiye Yehova, tamlindirira Iye, tidzakondwa ndi kusekerera m'chipulumutso chake." 
Isaiah25:10 Chifukwa m'phiri limeneli dzanja la Yehova lidzakhalamo, ndipo Mowabu adzaponderezedwa pansi m'malo ake, monga udzu aponderezedwa padzala." 
Isaiah25:11 Ndipo iye adzatambasula manja ake pakati pamenepo, monga wosambira atambasula manja ake posambira; koma Iye adzagwetsa pansi kunyada kwake, pamodzi ndi kunyenga kwa manja ake." 
Isaiah25:12 Ndipo linga la pamsanje la machemba ako Iye waligwetsa, naligonetsa pansi, nalifikitsa padothi, ngakhale pafumbi." 
Isaiah26:1 Tsiku limenelo adzaimba nyimbo imeneyi m'dziko la Yuda, Ife tili ndi mudzi wolimba; Iye adzaika chipulumutso chikhale machemba ndi malinga." 
Isaiah26:2 Tsegulani pazipata, kuti mtundu wolungama, umene uchita zoonadi, ulowemo." 
Isaiah26:3 Inu mudzasunga mtima wokhazikika mu mtendere weniweni, chifukwa ukukhulupirirani Inu." 
Isaiah26:4 Khulupirirani Yehova nthawi yamuyaya, pakuti mwa Ambuye Yehova muli thanthwe lachikhalire." 
Isaiah26:5 Chifukwa Iye watsitsira pansi iwo amene anakhala pamwamba, mudzi wa pamsanje; Iye wautsitsa, wautsitsira pansi; waugwetsa pansi pa fumbi." 
Isaiah26:6 Phazi lidzaupondereza pansi; ngakhale mapazi a aumphawi, ndi mapondedwe a osowa." 
Isaiah26:7 Njira ya wolungama ili njira yoongoka; Inu amene muli woongoka, mukonza njira ya wolungama." 
Isaiah26:8 Inde m'njira ya maweruziro anu, Yehova, ife talindira Inu; moyo wathu ukhumba dzina lanu, ndi chikumbukiro chanu." 
Isaiah26:9 Ndi moyo wanga ndinakhumba Inu usiku; inde ndi mzimu wanga wa mwa ine ndidzafuna Inu mwakhama; pakuti pamene maweruziro anu ali pa dziko lapansi, okhala m'dziko lapansi adzaphunzira chilungamo." 
Isaiah26:10 Ungayanje woipa, koma sadzaphunzira chilungamo; m'dziko la machitidwe oongoka, iye adzangochimwa, sadzaona chifumu cha Yehova." 
Isaiah26:11 Yehova, dzanja lanu litukulidwa, koma iwo saona; koma iwo adzaona changu chanu cha kwa anthu, nadzakhala ndi manyazi; inde moto udzamaliza adani anu." 
Isaiah26:12 Yehova, mudzatikhazikitsira mtendere; pakuti mwatigwirira ntchito zathu zonse." 
Isaiah26:13 Yehova Mulungu wathu, pamodzi ndi Inu Ambuye ena adatilamulira ife; koma mwa Inu nokha tidzatchula dzina lanu." 
Isaiah26:14 Iwo afa, atha, sadzakhalanso ndi moyo; ali mizimu, sadzauka; chifukwa chake Inu munawazonda, ndi kuwaononga, mwathetsa chikumbukiro chao chonse." 
Isaiah26:15 Mwachulukitsa mtundu, Yehova, mwachulukitsa mtundu; Inu mwalemekezeka, mwakuza malire onse a dziko." 
Isaiah26:16 Yehova, iwo adza kwa Inu movutika, iwo anathira pemphero, muja munalikuwalanga." 
Isaiah26:17 Monga ngati mkazi wokhala ndi pakati, amene nthawi yake yakubala yayandikira, amva zopweteka, ndi kufuula m'zowawa zake; momwemo takhala ife pamaso panu, Yehova." 
Isaiah26:18 Ife tinali ndi pakati, ife tinamva zopweteka, tafanana ngati tabala mphepo; sitinachite chipulumutso chilichonse pa dziko lapansi; ngakhale okhala m'dziko lapansi sanagwe." 
Isaiah26:19 Akufa anu adzakhala ndi moyo; mitembo yao idzauka. Ukani muimbe, inu amene mukhala m'fumbi; chifukwa mame ako akunga mame a pamasamba, ndipo dziko lapansi lidzatulutsa mizimu." 
Isaiah26:20 Idzani, anthu anga, lowani m'zipinda mwanu, nimutseke pamakomo panu; nimubisale kanthawi kufikira mkwiyo utapita." 
Isaiah26:21 Pakuti taonani, Yehova adza kuchokera kumalo ake kudzazonda okhala pa dziko lapansi, chifukwa cha kuipa kwao; dziko lidzavumbulutsa mwazi wake, ndipo silidzavundikiranso ophedwa ake." 
Isaiah27:1 Tsiku limenelo Yehova ndi lupanga lake lolimba ndi lalikulu ndi lamphamvu adzalanga Leviyatani njoka yothamanga, ndi Leviyatani njoka yopindikapindika; nadzapha ching'ona chimene chili m'nyanja." 
Isaiah27:2 Tsiku limenelo: munda wa mphesa wavinyo, imbani inu za uwo." 
Isaiah27:3 Ine Yehova ndiusunga uwo; ndidzauthirira madzi nthawi zonse; ndidzausunga usiku ndi usana, kuti angauipse." 
Isaiah27:4 Ndilibe ukali; ndani adzalimbanitsa lunguzi ndi minga ndi Ine kunkhondo? Ndiziponde ndizitenthe pamodzi. 
Isaiah27:5 Kapena mlekeni, agwire mphamvu zanga, nachite nane mtendere; inde, achite nane mtendere." 
Isaiah27:6 M'mibadwo ikudzayo Yakobo adzamera mizu; Israele adzaphuka ndi kuchita mphundu; ndipo iwo adzadzaza ndi zipatso pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Isaiah27:7 Kodi Mulungu wakantha Yakobo, monga umo anawakanthira akumkanthawo? Kapena kodi iye waphedwa malinga ndi kuphedwa kwa iwo amene anaphedwa ndi iye?" 
Isaiah27:8 Munalimbana naye pang'ono, pamene munamchotsa; wamchotsa iye kuomba kwake kolimba tsiku la mphepo yamlumbanyanja." 
Isaiah27:9 Chifukwa chake, mwa ichi choipa cha Yakobo chidzafafanizidwa, ndipo ichi ndi chipatso chonse chakuchotsa tchimo lake; pamene iye adzayesa miyala yonse ya guwa la nsembe, ngati miyala yanjeresa yoswekasweka, zifanizo ndi mafano a dzuwa sizidzaukanso konse." 
Isaiah27:10 Pakuti mudzi wochingidwa uli pa wokha, mokhalamo mwa bwinja, ndi mosiyidwa ngati chipululu; mwanawang'ombe adzadya kumeneko, nadzagonako pansi, nadzamaliza nthambi zake." 
Isaiah27:11 Ponyala nthambi zake zidzathyoledwa; akazi adzafika, nazitentha ndi moto, pakuti ali anthu opanda nzeru; chifukwa chake Iye amene anawalenga sadzawachitira chisoni, ndi Iye amene anawaumba sadzawakomera mtima." 
Isaiah27:12 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti Yehova adzaomba tirigu wake, kuchokera madzi a nyanja, kufikira kumtsinje wa Ejipito, ndipo mudzakunkhidwa mmodzi, inu ana a Israele." 
Isaiah27:13 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, lipenga lalikulu lidzaombedwa; ndipo adzafika omwe akadatayika m'dziko la Asiriya, ndi opirikitsidwa a m'dziko la Ejipito; ndipo adzapembedza Yehova m'phiri lopatulika la pa Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Tsoka kwa korona wakunyada wa oledzera a Efuremu, ndi kwa duwa lakufota la ulemerero wake wokongola, limene lili pamutu paiwo, amene agwidwa ndi vinyo, m'chigwa cha nthaka yabwino." 
Isaiah28:2 Taonani, Ambuye ali ndi wina wamphamvu wolimba; ngati chimphepo cha matalala, mkuntho wakuononga, ngati namondwe wa madzi amphamvu osefukira, adzagwetsa pansi ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Isaiah28:3 Korona wakunyada wa oledzera a Efuremu adzaponderezedwa; 
Isaiah28:4 ndi duwa lakufota la ulemerero wake wokongola, limene lili pamutu pa chigwa cha nthaka yabwino, lidzakhala ngati nkhuyu yoyamba kucha malimwe asanafike; poiona wakupenya imeneyo, amaidya ili m'dzanja lake." 
Isaiah28:5 Tsiku limenelo Yehova wa makamu adzakhala korona wa ulemerero, ndi korona wokongola kwa anthu ake otsala:" 
Isaiah28:6 ndipo adzakhala mzimu wa chiweruziro kwa oweruza milandu, ndi mphamvu kwa iwo amene abweza nkhondo pachipata." 
Isaiah28:7 Koma iwonso adzandima ndi vinyo, nasochera ndi chakumwa chaukali, wansembe ndi mneneri adzandima ndi chakumwa chaukali, iwo amezedwa ndi vinyo, nasochera ndi chakumwa chaukali, adzandima popenya, naphunthwa poweruza." 
Isaiah28:8 Pakuti magome onse adzazidwa ndi masanzi ndi udyo, palibe malo okonzeka." 
Isaiah28:9 Kodi Mulungu adzaphunzitsa yani nzeru? Kodi Iye adzamvetsa yani uthengawo? Iwo amene aletsedwa kuyamwa, nachotsedwa pamawere?" 
Isaiah28:10 Pakuti pali langizo ndi langizo, langizo ndi langizo; lamulo ndi lamulo, lamulo ndi lamulo; kuno pang'ono, uko pang'ono." 
Isaiah28:11 Iai, koma ndi anthu a milomo yachilendo, ndi a lilime lina, Iye adzalankhula kwa anthu awa;" 
Isaiah28:12 amene ananena nao, Uku ndi kupuma, mupumitsa wolema, ndi apa ndi potsitsimutsa, koma iwo anakana kumva." 
Isaiah28:13 Chifukwa chake mau a Yehova adzakhala kwa iwo langizo ndi langizo, langizo ndi langizo; lamulo ndi lamulo, lamulo ndi lamulo; kuno pang'ono, uko pang'ono; kuti ayende ndi kugwa chambuyo, ndi kuthyoka, ndi kukodwa mumsampha, ndi kugwidwa." 
Isaiah28:14 Chifukwa chake imvani mau a Yehova, inu amuna amnyozo, olamulira anthu awa a m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:15 Chifukwa inu munati, Ife tapangana pangano ndi imfa, tavomerezana ndi kunsi kwa manda; pakuti mliri wosefukira sudzatifikira ife; pakuti tayesa mabodza pothawirapo pathu, ndi kubisala m'zonyenga;" 
Isaiah28:16 chifukwa chake Ambuye Yehova atero, Taonani, ndiika m'Ziyoni mwala wa maziko, mwala woyesedwa mwala wa pangodya, wa mtengo wake wokhazikika ndithu; wokhulupirira sadzafulumira." 
Isaiah28:17 Ndipo ndidzayesa chiweruziro chingwe choongolera, ndi chilungamo chingwe cholungamitsira chilili; ndipo matalala adzachotsa pothawirapo mabodza, ndi madzi adzasefukira mobisalamo." 
Isaiah28:18 Ndipo pangano lanu ndi imfa lidzathedwa, ndi kuvomerezana kwanu ndi kunsi kwa manda kudzalephereka; popita mliri woopsa udzakuponderezani pansi." 
Isaiah28:19 Nthawi zonse umapita, udzakutengani; chifukwa m'mawa ndi m'mawa udzapita, usana ndi usiku; ndipo kudzakhala kuopsa kokha, kumva mbiri yake." 
Isaiah28:20 Pakuti kama wafupika, munthu sangatambalale pamenepo; ndi chofunda chachepa, sichingamfikire." 
Isaiah28:21 Pakuti Yehova adzauka monga m'phiri la Perazimu, nadzakwiya monga m'chigwa cha Gibiyoni; kuti agwire ntchito yake, ntchito yake yachilendo, ndi kuti achite chochita chake, chochita chake chachilendo." 
Isaiah28:22 Tsono musakhale amnyozo, kuti nsinga zanu zingalimbe; pakuti Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, wandimvetsa za chionongeko chotsimikizidwa pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Isaiah28:23 Tcherani inu makutu, imvani mau anga; mverani, imvani kulankhula kwanga." 
Isaiah28:24 Kodi mlimi amalimabe kuti abzale? Kodi amachocholabe, ndi kuswa zibuma za nthaka?" 
Isaiah28:25 Atakonza thyathyathya pamwamba pake, kodi safesa ponse mawere, ndi kumwazamwaza chitowe, nafesa tirigu m'mizere ndi barele m'malo ake osankhika, ndi mchewere m'maliremo?" 
Isaiah28:26 Pakuti Mulungu wake amlangiza bwino namphunzitsa. 
Isaiah28:27 Pakuti sapuntha mawere ndi chopunthira chakuthwa, ngakhale kuzunguniza njinga ya galeta pachitowe; koma amakulunga mawere ndi munsi, naomba chitowe ndi chibonga." 
Isaiah28:28 Tirigu wa mkate aperedwa; pakuti samampuntha osaleka; ngakhale kuyendetsapo njinga ya galeta wake, ngakhale kumphwanya ndi ziboda za akavalo ake sapera." 
Isaiah28:29 Ichinso chifumira kwa Yehova wa makamu, uphungu wake uzizwitsa ndi nzeru yake impambana." 
Isaiah29:1 Eya Ariyele, Ariyele, mudzi umene Davide anamangapo zithando! Onjezerani chaka ndi chaka; maphwando afikenso;" 
Isaiah29:2 pamenepo ndidzasautsa Ariyele, ndipo padzakhala maliro ndi kulira; koma iye adzakhala kwa Ine monga Ariyele." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndipo ndidzamanga zithando kuzungulira iwe ponse, ndipo ndidzamanga linga ndi kuunjika miulu yakumenyanirana ndi iwe." 
Isaiah29:4 Ndipo iwe udzagwetsedwa pansi, nudzanena uli pansi, ndi kulankhula kwako kudzakhala pansi kotuluka m'fumbi; ndi mau ako adzakhala ngati a wina amene ali ndi mzimu wobwebweta, kuchokera pansi, ndi kulankhula kwako kudzakhala konong'ona kochokera m'fumbi." 
Isaiah29:5 Koma khamu la achilendo ako lidzafanana ndi fumbi losalala, ndi khamu la oopsa lidzakhala monga mungu wochokachoka; inde kudzaoneka modzidzimuka dzidzidzi." 
Isaiah29:6 Ndipo Yehova wa makamu adzamzonda ndi bingu, ndi chivomezi, ndi mkokomo waukulu, kamvulumvulu, ndi mkuntho, ndi lawi la moto wonyambita." 
Isaiah29:7 Ndipo khamu la mitundu yonse yomenyana ndi Ariyele, ngakhale yonse yomenyana naye ndi linga lake, ndi kumsautsa idzafanana ndi loto, masomphenya a usiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Ndipo kudzafanana ndi munthu wanjala, pamene alota, ndipo, taonani, akudya; koma auka, ndipo m'kati mwake muli zii; kapena monga munthu waludzu pamene alota, ndipo taonani, akumwa; koma auka ndipo taonani walefuka, ndipo m'kati mwake muli gwa; momwemo lidzakhala khamu la mitundu yonse yomenyana ndi phiri la Ziyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Khalani ndi kudabwa; sangalalani ndi kukhala akhungu; iwo aledzera, koma si ndi vinyo, ali dzandidzandi; koma si ndi chakumwa chaukali." 
Isaiah29:10 Pakuti Yehova watsanulira pa inu mzimu wa tulo togonetsa, natseka maso anu, ndiwo aneneri; naphimba mitu yanu, ndiwo alauli." 
Isaiah29:11 Ndipo masomphenya onse akusandukirani mau a m'buku limatidwa ndi phula, limene anthu amapereka kwa wina wodziwa kuwerenga, nati, Werengani umu; koma ati, Sindingathe, chifukwa lamatidwa ndi phula;" 
Isaiah29:12 ndipo buku laperekedwa kwa wosadziwa kuwerenga, ndi kuti, Werengani umu; koma ati, Ine sindinaphunzira." 
Isaiah29:13 Ndipo Ambuye anati, Popeza anthu awa ayandikira ndi Ine ndi m'kamwa mwao, nandilemekeza ndi milomo yao, koma mtima wao uli kutali ndi Ine, ndi mantha ao akundiopa Ine, ndi lamulo la anthu analiphunzira;" 
Isaiah29:14 chifukwa chake, taonani, ndidzachitanso mwa anthu awa ntchito yodabwitsa, ngakhale ntchito yodabwitsa ndi yozizwitsa; ndipo nzeru ya anthu ao anzeru idzatha, ndi luntha la anthu ao ozindikira lidzabisika." 
Isaiah29:15 Tsoka kwa iwo amene afunitsa kubisira Yehova uphungu wao, ndi ntchito zao zili mumdima, ndipo amati ndani ationa ife? Ndani atidziwa ife?" 
Isaiah29:16 Ozolitsa inu! Kodi woumba adzayesedwa ngati dothi; kodi chinthu chopangidwa chinganene za iye amene anachipanga, Iye sanandipange ine konse; kapena kodi chinthu choumbidwa chinganene za iye amene anachiumba, Iye alibe nzeru?" 
Isaiah29:17 Kodi sikatsala kamphindi kakang'ono, ndipo Lebanoni adzasanduka munda wobalitsa, ndi munda wobalitsa udzayesedwa nkhalango?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ndipo tsiku limenelo gonthi adzamva mau a m'buku, ndi maso akhungu adzaona potuluka m'zoziya ndi mumdima." 
Isaiah29:19 Ofatsanso kukondwa kwao kudzachuluka mwa Yehova, ndi aumphawi a mwa anthu adzakondwerera mwa Woyera wa Israele." 
Isaiah29:20 Pakuti woopsa wagoma, ndi wonyoza watha, ndi onse odikira zolakwa alikhidwa;" 
Isaiah29:21 amene apalamulitsa munthu mlandu, namtchera msampha iye amene adzudzula pachipata, nambweza wolungama ndi chinthu chachabe." 
Isaiah29:22 Chifukwa chake Yehova amene anaombola Abrahamu, atero za banja la Yakobo: Yakobo sadzakhala ndi manyazi tsopano, ngakhale nkhope yake tsopano sidzagwa." 
Isaiah29:23 Koma pamene iye aona ana ake, ntchito ya manja anga, pakati pa iye, iwo adzayeretsa dzina langa; inde, iwo adzayeretsa Woyera wa Yakobo, nadzaopa Mulungu wa Israele." 
Isaiah29:24 Iwonso osochera mumzimu adzadziwa luntha, ndi iwo amene ang'ung'udza adzaphunzitsidwa." 
Isaiah30:1 Tsoka kwa ana opanduka, ati Yehova, amene atenga uphungu koma si pa Ine; napangana pangano opanda mzimu wanga, kuti aonjezere tchimo ndi tchimo;" 
Isaiah30:2 amene ayenda kutsikira ku Ejipito, osafunsa kukamwa kwanga, kudzilimbitsa iwo okha ndi mphamvu za Farao, ndi kukhulupirira mthunzi wa Ejipito!" 
Isaiah30:3 Chifukwa chake mphamvu za Farao zidzakhala kwa inu manyazi, ndi kukhulupirira mthunzi wa Ejipito kudzakhala chisokonezo chanu." 
Isaiah30:4 Pakuti akalonga ake ali pa Zowani, ndi mithenga yake yafika ku Hanesi." 
Isaiah30:5 Iwo onse adzakhala ndi manyazi, ndi anthu amene sangapindule nao kanthu, amene sakhala kwa iwo thangata, pena phindu, koma manyazi ndi chitonzo." 
Isaiah30:6 Katundu wa zilombo za kumwera. M'dziko lovuta ndi lopweteka, kumeneko kuchokera mkango waukazi, ndi wamphongo, mphiri, ndi njoka youluka yamoto, iwo anyamula chuma chao pamsana pa abulu, ndi ang'ono zolemera zao pa malinundu a ngamira, kunka kwa anthu amene sadzapindula nao." 
Isaiah30:7 Pakuti thangata la Ejipito lili lachabe, lopanda pake; chifukwa chake ndamutcha Wonyada, wokhala chabe." 
Isaiah30:8 Tsopano pita, ukalembe mauwa pamaso pao pathabwa, nuwalembe m'buku, kuti akakhalebe kunthawi yam'tsogolo, mboni ya masiku onse." 
Isaiah30:9 Pakuti ali anthu opanduka, ana onama, ana osafuna kumva chilamulo cha Yehova;" 
Isaiah30:10 amene amati kwa alauli, Mtima wanu usapenye; ndi kwa aneneri, Musanenere kwa ife zinthu zoona, munene kwa ife zinthu zamyadi, munenere zonyenga;" 
Isaiah30:11 chokani inu munjira, patukani m'bande, tiletsereni Woyera wa Israele pamaso pathu." 
Isaiah30:12 Chifukwa chake atero Woyera wa Israele, Popeza inu mwanyoza mau awa, nimukhulupirira nsautso ndi mphulupulu, ndi kukhala m'menemo;" 
Isaiah30:13 chifukwa chake kuipa kumeneku kudzakhala kwa inu monga pogumuka pofuna kugwa, monga potukuka m'khoma lalitali, kugumuka kwake kufika modzidzimutsa dzidzidzi." 
Isaiah30:14 Ndipo Iye adzagumulapo, monga mbiya ya woumba isweka, ndi kuiswaiswa osaileka; ndipo sipadzapezedwa m'zigamphu zake phale lopalira moto pachoso, ngakhale lotungira madzi padziwe." 
Isaiah30:15 Pakuti atero Ambuye, Yehova Woyera wa Israele, M'kubwera ndi m'kupuma inu mudzapulumutsidwa; m'kukhala chete ndi m'kukhulupirira mudzakhala mphamvu yanu; ndipo simunafuna." 
Isaiah30:16 Koma munati, Iai, pakuti tidzathawa pa akavalo; chifukwa chake inu mudzathawadi; ndipo ife tidzakwera pa akavalo aliwiro; chifukwa chake iwo amene akuthamangitsani, adzakhala aliwiro." 
Isaiah30:17 Chikwi chimodzi chidzathawa pakuwadzudzula mmodzi; pakukudzudzulani anthu asanu mudzathawa; kufikira inu mudzasiyidwa ngati mlongoti pamwamba pa phiri, ndi ngati mbendera pamwamba pa chitunda." 
Isaiah30:18 Chifukwa chake Yehova adzadikira, kuti akukomereni mtima, ndipo chifukwa chake Iye adzakuzidwa, kuti akuchitireni inu chifundo; pakuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wa chiweruziro; odala ali onse amene amdikira Iye." 
Isaiah30:19 Pakuti anthu adzakhala m'Ziyoni pa Yerusalemu; iwe sudzaliranso, Iye ndithu adzakukomera mtima pakumveka kufuula kwako; pakumva Iye adzayankha." 
Isaiah30:20 Ndipo ngakhale Ambuye adzakupatsani inu chakudya cha nsautso, ndi madzi a chipsinjo, koma aphunzitsi ako sadzabisikanso, koma maso ako adzaona aphunzitsi ako;" 
Isaiah30:21 ndipo makutu ako adzamva mau kumbuyo kwa iwe akuti, Njira ndi iyi, yendani inu m'menemo: potembenukira inu kulamanja, ndi potembenukira kulamanzere." 
Isaiah30:22 Ndipo mudzaipitsa chokuta cha mafano ako, osema asiliva, ndi chomata cha mafano ako osungunula agolide; udzawataya ngati kanthu konyansa, udzati kwa iwo, Chokani." 
Isaiah30:23 Ndipo Mulungu adzapatsa mvula ya mbeu yako, ukaibzale m'nthaka; ndi mkate ndiwo phindu la nthaka, ndipo tirigu wake adzacha bwino ndi kuchuluka; tsiku limenelo ng'ombe zako zidzadya m'madambo akulu." 
Isaiah30:24 Momwemonso ng'ombe ndi ana a bulu olima nthaka adzadya chakudya chochezera, chimene chapetedwa ndi chokokolera ndi mkupizo." 
Isaiah30:25 Ndipo pamwamba pa mapiri akulu onse, ndi pa zitunda zonse zazitalitali padzakhala mitsinje ndi micherenje ya madzi, tsiku lophana lalikulu, pamene nsanja zidzagwa." 
Isaiah30:26 Komanso kuwala kwake kwa mwezi kudzakhala ngati kuwala kwa dzuwa, ndi kuwala kwa dzuwa kudzakula monga madzuwa asanu ndi awiri, monga kuwala kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri, tsiku limenelo Yehova adzamanga bala la anthu ake, nadzapoletsa khana limene anawakantha ena." 
Isaiah30:27 Taonani, dzina la Yehova lichokera kutali, mkwiyo wake uyaka, malawi ake ndi akulu; milomo yake ili yodzala ndi ukali, ndi lilime lake lili ngati moto wonyambita;" 
Isaiah30:28 ndi mpweya wake uli ngati mtsinje wosefukira, umene ufikira m'khosi, kupeta mitundu ya anthu ndi chopetera cha chionongeko; ndi chapakamwa chalakwitsa, chidzakhala m'nsagwada za anthu." 
Isaiah30:29 Inu mudzakhala ndi nyimbo, monga usiku, podya phwando lopatulika; ndi mtima wokondwa, monga pomuka wina ndi chitoliro, kufikira kuphiri la Yehova, kuthanthwe la Israele." 
Isaiah30:30 Ndipo Yehova adzamveketsa mau ake a ulemerero, ndipo adzaonetsa kumenya kwa dzanja lake, ndi mkwiyo wake waukali, ndi lawi la moto wonyambita, ndi kuomba kwa mphepo, ndi mkuntho ndi matalala." 
Isaiah30:31 Pakuti ndi mau a Yehova Asiriya adzathyokathyoka, ndi ndodo yake adzammenya." 
Isaiah30:32 Ndipo nthawi zonse Yehova adzawakantha ndi ndodo yosankhikayo, padzamveka mangaka ndi zeze; ndi m'nkhondo zothunyanathunyana, Iye adzamenyana nao." 
Isaiah30:33 Pakuti Tofeti wakonzedwa kale, inde chifukwa cha mfumu wakonzedweratu; Iye wazamitsapo, nakuzapo; mulu wakewo ndi moto ndi nkhuni zambiri; mpweya wa Yehova uuyatsa ngati mtsinje wa sulufure." 
Isaiah31:1 Tsoka kwa iwo amene atsikira kunka ku Ejipito kukathandizidwa, natama akavalo; nakhulupirira magaleta, pakuti ali ambiri, ndi okwera pa akavalo, pakuti ali a mphamvu zambiri; koma sayang'ana Woyera wa Israele, ngakhale kumfuna Yehova!" 
Isaiah31:2 Koma Iyenso ndi wanzeru, nadzatengera choipa, ndipo sadzabwezanso mau ake, koma adzaukira banja la ochita zoipa, ndi amene athandiza iwo akugwira ntchito yoipa." 
Isaiah31:3 Koma Aejipito ndiwo anthu, si Mulungu; ndi akavalo ao ali nyama, si mzimu; ndipo pamene Yehova adzatambasula dzanja lake, wothandiza adzaphunthwa, ndi wothandizidwa adzagwa, ndipo iwo onse awiri pamodzi adzalephera." 
Isaiah31:4 Pakuti Yehova atero kwa ine, Monga mkango, ndi mwana wa mkango wobangula pa nyama yake, sudzaopa mau a khamu la abusa oitanidwa kuupirikitsa, ngakhale kudzichepetsa wokha, chifukwa cha phokoso lao; motero Yehova wa makamu adzatsikira kumenyana nkhondo kuphiri la Ziyoni, ndi kuchitunda kwake komwe." 
Isaiah31:5 Monga mbalame ziuluka, motero Yehova wa makamu adzatchinjiriza Yerusalemu; Iye adzatchinjirikiza ndi kuupulumutsa, adzapitirapo ndi kuusunga." 
Isaiah31:6 Bwerani kwa Iye amene mwampandukira kolimba, ana a Israele inu." 
Isaiah31:7 Pakuti tsiku limenelo iwo adzataya munthu yense mafano ake asiliva, ndi mafano ake agolide amene manja anuanu anawapanga akuchimwitseni inu." 
Isaiah31:8 Pamenepo Asiriya adzagwa ndi lupanga losati la munthu; ndi lupanga losati la anthu lidzammaliza iye; ndipo iye adzathawa lupanga, ndi anyamata ake adzalamba." 
Isaiah31:9 Ndipo mwala wake udzachoka, chifukwa cha mantha, ndi akalonga ake adzaopa mbendera, ati Yehova, amene moto wake uli m'Ziyoni, ndi ng'anjo yake m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah32:1 Taonani mfumu idzalamulira m'chilungamo, ndi akalonga adzalamulira m'chiweruzo." 
Isaiah32:2 Ndipo munthu adzakhala monga pobisalira mphepo, ndi pousira chimphepo; monga mitsinje yamadzi m'malo ouma, monga mthunzi wa thanthwe lalikulu m'dziko lotopetsa." 
Isaiah32:3 Ndipo maso a iwo amene aona sadzatsinzina, ndi makutu a iwo amene amva adzamvera." 
Isaiah32:4 Mtimanso wansontho udzadziwa nzeru, ndi lilime la achibwibwi lidzalankhula zomveka msanga." 
Isaiah32:5 Wopusa sadzayesedwanso woolowa manja, ngakhale wouma manja sadzayesedwa mfulu." 
Isaiah32:6 Pakuti wopusa adzanena zopusa, ndi mtima wake udzachita mphulupulu, kuchita zoipitsa, ndi kunena za Yehova molakwira, kusowetsa konse mtima wanjala, ndi kulepheretsa chakumwa cha waludzu." 
Isaiah32:7 Zipangizonso za womana zili zoipa; iye apangira ziwembu zakuononga waumphawi ndi mau onama, ngakhale pamene wosowa alankhula zoona." 
Isaiah32:8 Koma mfulu aganizira zaufulu, nakhazikika m'zaufulu zomwe." 
Isaiah32:9 Ukani, akazi inu, amene mulinkukhala phee, mumve mau anga; inu ana akazi osasamalira, tcherani makutu pa kulankhula kwanga." 
Isaiah32:10 Pakutha chaka, kudza masiku ena inu mudzavutidwa, inu akazi osasamalira; pakuti masika a mphesa adzasoweka, sadzatuta konse." 
Isaiah32:11 Nthunthumirani, inu akazi, amene mulinkukhalaphe; vutidwani, inu osasamalira, vulani mukhale maliseche, nimumange chiguduli m'chuuno mwanu." 
Isaiah32:12 Iwo adzadzimenya pazifuwa chifukwa cha minda yabwino, chifukwa cha mpesa wobalitsa." 
Isaiah32:13 Pa dziko la anthu anga padzafika minga ndi lunguzi; inde pa nyumba zonse zokondwa, m'mudzi wokondwerera;" 
Isaiah32:14 pakuti nyumba ya mfumu idzasiyidwa; mudzi wa anthu ambiri udzakhala bwinja; chitunda ndi nsanja zidzakhala nkhwimba kunthawi zonse, pokondwera mbidzi podyera zoweta;" 
Isaiah32:15 kufikira mzimu udzathiridwa pa ife kuchokera kumwamba, ndi chipululu chidzasanduka munda wobalitsa, ndi munda wobalitsa udzayesedwa nkhalango." 
Isaiah32:16 Pamenepo chiweruzo chidzakhala m'chipululu, ndi chilungamo chidzakhala m'munda wobalitsa." 
Isaiah32:17 Ndi ntchito ya chilungamo idzakhala mtendere; ndi zotsata chilungamo zidzakhala mtendere, ndi kukhulupirika kunthawi zonse." 
Isaiah32:18 Ndipo anthu anga adzakhala m'malo a mtendere, ndi mokhala mokhulupirika ndi mopuma mwa phee." 
Isaiah32:19 Koma kudzagwa matalala m'kugwa kwake kwa nkhalango; ndipo mudzi udzagwetsedwa ndithu. 
Isaiah32:20 Odala muli inu, amene mubzala m'mbali mwa madzi monse, amene muyendetsa mapazi a ng'ombe ndi bulu." 
Isaiah33:1 Tsoka kwa iwe amene usakaza, chinkana sunasakazidwa; nupangira chiwembu, chinkana sanakupangire iwe chiwembu! Utatha kusakaza, iwe udzasakazidwa; ndipo utatha kupangira chiwembu, iwo adzakupangira iwe chiwembu." 
Isaiah33:2 Inu Yehova, mutikomere ife mtima; ife talindira Inu; mukhale dzanja lathu m'mawa ndi m'mawa, chipulumutso chathunso m'nthawi ya mavuto." 
Isaiah33:3 Pa mau a phokoso mitundu ya anthu yathawa; ponyamuka iwe amitundu abalalika. 
Isaiah33:4 Ndipo zofunkha zanu zidzasonkhanitsidwa, monga ziwala zisonkhana; monga dzombe atumpha, iwo adzatumpha pa izo." 
Isaiah33:5 Yehova wakwezedwa; pakuti akhala kumwamba; Iye wadzaza Ziyoni ndi chiweruzo ndi chilungamo. 
Isaiah33:6 Ndipo kudzakhala chilimbiko m'nthawi zako, chipulumutso chambiri, nzeru ndi kudziwa; kuopa kwa Yehova ndiko chuma chake." 
Isaiah33:7 Taonani, olimba mtima ao angofuula kunja, mithenga ya mtendere ilira kowawa." 
Isaiah33:8 Njira zamakwalala zikufa, kulibe woyendamo; Asiriya wathyola chipangano, wanyoza midzi, sasamalira anthu." 
Isaiah33:9 Dziko lirira maliro ndi kulefuka; Lebanoni ali ndi manyazi, nafota; Saroni afanana ndi chipululu; pa Basani ndi Karimele papukutika." 
Isaiah33:10 Tsopano ndidzauka, ati Yehova; tsopano ndidzanyamuka, tsopano ndidzakwezedwa." 
Isaiah33:11 Inu mudzatenga pakati ndi mungu, mudzabala ziputu; mpweya wanu ndi moto umene udzakumalizani inu." 
Isaiah33:12 Ndipo mitundu ya anthu idzanga potentha miyala yanjeresa; monga minga yodulidwa, nitenthedwa ndi moto." 
Isaiah33:13 Imvani inu amene muli kutali, chimene ndachita ndi inu; amene muli pafupi, vomerezani mphamvu zanga." 
Isaiah33:14 Ochimwa a m'Ziyoni ali ndi mantha, kunthunthumira kwadzidzimutsa anthu opanda Mulungu. Ndani mwa ife adzakhala ndi moto wakunyeketsa? Ndani mwa ife adzakhala ndi zotentha zachikhalire?" 
Isaiah33:15 Iye amene ayenda molungama, nanena molunjika; iye amene anyoza phindu lonyenga, nasansa manja ake kusalandira zokometsera milandu, amene atseka makutu ake kusamva za mwazi, natsinzina maso ake kusayang'ana choipa;" 
Isaiah33:16 iye adzakhala pamsanje; malo ake ochinjikiza adzakhala malinga amiyala; chakudya chake chidzapatsidwa kwa iye; madzi ake adzakhala chikhalire. 
Isaiah33:17 Maso ako adzaona mfumu m'kukongola kwake; iwo adzaona dziko lakutali. 
Isaiah33:18 Mtima wako udzaganizira zoopsa; mlembi ali kuti? Ali kuti iye amene anayesa msonkho? Ali kuti iye amene anawerenga nsanja? 
Isaiah33:19 Iwe sudzaona anthu aukali, anthu a mau anthulu, amene iwe sungazindikire; a lilime lachibwibwi, limene iwe sungalimve." 
Isaiah33:20 Tayang'ana pa Ziyoni, mudzi wa zikondwerero zathu; maso ako adzaona, Yerusalemu malo a phee, chihema chimene sichidzasunthidwa, zichiri zake sizidzazulidwa konse, zingwe zake sizidzadulidwa." 
Isaiah33:21 Koma pamenepo Yehova adzakhala ndi ife m'ulemerero, malo a nyanja zachitando ndi mitsinje; m'menemo ngalawa sizidzayenda ndi ngombo, ngakhale zombo zazikulu sizidzapita pamenepo." 
Isaiah33:22 Pakuti Yehova ndiye woweruza wathu, Yehova ndiye wotipatsa malamulo, Yehova ndiye mfumu yathu; Iye adzatipulumutsa." 
Isaiah33:23 Zingwe zako za ngalawa zamasulidwa; sizinathe kulimbitsa patsinde pa mlongoti wake, sizinathe kufutukula matanga; pamenepo ndipo cholanda chachikulu, chofunkha chinagawanidwa; wopunduka nafumfula." 
Isaiah33:24 Ndipo wokhalamo sadzanena, Ine ndidwala; anthu okhala m'menemo, adzakhululukidwa mphulupulu zao." 
Isaiah34:1 Idzani pafupi, amitundu inu, kuti mumve; mverani anthu inu, dziko ndi zinthu zonse zotulukamo." 
Isaiah34:2 Pakuti Yehova akwiyira amitundu onse, nachitira ukali khamu lao lonse; Iye wawaononga psiti, wawapereka kukaphedwa." 
Isaiah34:3 Ophedwa aonso adzatayidwa kunja, ndipo kununkha kwa mitembo yao kudzamveka, ndipo mapiri adzasungunuka ndi mwazi wao." 
Isaiah34:4 Ndipo makamu onse a kumwamba adzasungunuka, ndi miyamba idzapindika pamodzi ngati mpukutu; makamu ao onse adzafota monga tsamba limafota pampesa ndi kugwa, ndi monga tsamba lifota pamkuyu." 
Isaiah34:5 Pakuti lupanga langa lakhuta kumwamba; taonani, lidzatsikira pa Edomu, ndi pa anthu amene ndawatemberera, kuti aweruzidwe." 
Isaiah34:6 Lupanga la Yehova lakhuta ndi mwazi, lanona ndi mafuta ndi mwazi wa anaankhosa, ndi mbuzi, ndi mafuta a impso ya nkhosa zamphongo; pakuti Yehova ali ndi nsembe m'Bozira, ndi ophedwa ambiri m'dziko la Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Ndipo njati zidzatsika ndi iwo, ndi ng'ombe zofula ndi zamphongo; ndi dziko laolao lidzanona ndi mafuta." 
Isaiah34:8 Pakuti lili tsiku la kubwezera la Yehova, chaka chakubwezera chilango, mlandu wa Ziyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Ndipo mitsinjeyo idzasanduka matope akuda, ndi fumbilo lidzasanduka sulufure, ndi dziko lakelo lidzasanduka matope oyaka moto." 
Isaiah34:10 Sadzazimikai usiku, ngakhale usana; utsi wake udzakwera nthawi zonse; m'mibadwomibadwo lidzakhala labwinja, palibe amene adzapitapo nthawi za nthawi." 
Isaiah34:11 Koma vuwo ndi nungu zidzakhalamo, ndipo kadzidzi ndi khungubwi adzakhala m'menemo, ndipo Mulungu adzatambalika pamenepo chingwe choongolera cha chisokonezo, ndi chingwe cholungamitsa chilili chosatha kuchita kanthu." 
Isaiah34:12 Iwo adzaitana mfulu zake zilowe m'ufumu, koma sizidzaonekako; ndi akalonga ake onse adzakhala chabe." 
Isaiah34:13 Ndipo minga idzamera m'nyumba zake zazikulu, khwisa ndi mitungwi m'malinga mwake; ndipo adzakhala malo a ankhandwe, ndi bwalo la nthiwatiwa." 
Isaiah34:14 Ndipo zilombo za m'chipululu zidzakomana ndi mimbulu, tonde adzaitana mnzake; inde manchichi adzatera kumeneko, nadzapeza popumira." 
Isaiah34:15 Kumeneko kadzidzi adzapanga chisa chake, naikira, naumatira, naswa mumthunzi mwake; inde kumeneko miimba idzasonkhana wonse ndi unzake." 
Isaiah34:16 Funani inu m'buku la Yehova, nimuwerenge; palibe umodzi wa iye udzasowa, palibe umodzi udzasowa unzake; pakuti pakamwa pa Yehova panena, ndipo mzimu wake wasonkhanitsa iwo." 
Isaiah34:17 Ndipo Iye wachita maere, chifukwa cha zilombozi, ndipo dzanja lake lazigawira dzikolo ndi chingwe, zidzakhala nalo nthawi zonse ku mibadwomibadwo, zidzakhala m'menemo." 
Isaiah35:1 Chipululu ndi malo ouma adzakondwa; ndipo dziko loti see lidzasangalala ndi kuphuka ngati duwa. 
Isaiah35:2 Lidzaphuka mochuluka ndi kusangalala, ngakhale kukondwa ndi kuimba; lidzapatsidwa ulemerero wa Lebanoni, ndi ukulu wa Karimele ndi Saroni; anthuwo adzaona ulemerero wa Yehova, ukulu wake wa Mulungu wathu." 
Isaiah35:3 Limbitsani manja opanda mphamvu, ndi kulimbitsa maondo a gwedegwede." 
Isaiah35:4 Nenani kwa a mitima ya chinthenthe, Limbani, musaope; taonani, Mulungu wanu adza ndi kubwezera chilango, ndi mphotho ya Mulungu; Iye adzafika ndi kukupulumutsani." 
Isaiah35:5 Pamenepo maso a akhungu adzatsegudwa, ndi makutu a ogontha adzatsegulidwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Pamenepo wopunduka adzatumpha ngati nswala, ndi lilime la wosalankhula lidzaimba; pakuti m'chipululu madzi adzatuluka, ndi mitsinje m'dziko loti see." 
Isaiah35:7 Ndipo mchenga wong'azimira udzasanduka thamanda, ndi nthaka yopanda madzi idzasanduka zitsime zamadzi; m'malo a ankhandwe m'mene iwo anagona, mudzakhala udzu ndi mabango ndi milulu." 
Isaiah35:8 Ndipo kudzakhala khwalala kumeneko, ndi njira, ndipo idzatchedwa njira yopatulika; odetsedwa sadzapita m'menemo; koma Iye adzakhala nao oyenda m'njira, ngakhale opusa, sadzasochera m'menemo." 
Isaiah35:9 Sikudzakhala mkango kumeneko, ngakhale chilombo cholusa sichidzapondapo, pena kupezedwa pamenepo; koma akuomboledwa adzayenda m'menemo;" 
Isaiah35:10 ndipo oomboledwa a Yehova adzabwera, nadzafika ku Ziyoni alikuimba; kukondwa kosatha kudzakhala pa mitu yao; iwo adzakhala ndi kusekerera ndi kukondwa, ndipo chisoni ndi kuusa moyo kudzachoka." 
Isaiah36:1 Koma panali chaka chakhumi ndi chinai cha mfumu Hezekiya, Senakeribu, mfumu ya Asiriya anadza, nathira nkhondo pa midzi ya malinga yonse ya Yuda, nailanda." 
Isaiah36:2 Ndipo mfumu ya Asiriya inatumiza kazembe kuchokera pa Lakisi, kunka ku Yerusalemu, kwa mfumu Hezekiya, ndi nkhondo yambiri. Ndipo iye anaima chifupi ndi mcherenje wa thamanda la kumtunda, m'khwalala la pa mwaniko wa wotsuka nsalu." 
Isaiah36:3 Ndipo anamtulukira Eliyakimu, mwana wa Hilikiya, amene anali wapanyumba, ndi Sebina, mlembi, ndi Yowa, mwana wa Asafu, mkumbutsi." 
Isaiah36:4 Ndipo kazembeyo anati kwa iwo, Nenani inu tsopano kwa Hezekiya, Itero mfumu yaikulu, mfumu ya Asiriya, Kodi chikhulupiriro ichi nchotani, uchikhulupirira iwe?" 
Isaiah36:5 Ine nditi, Uphungu wako, ndi mphamvu zako za kunkhondo, zingokhala mau achabe; tsopano ukhulupirira yani, kuti wandipandukira ine?" 
Isaiah36:6 Taona, ukhulupirira ndodo yabango iyi yophwanyika, kunena Ejipito; imene munthu akaitsamira, idzalowa m'dzanja mwake, ndi kulipyoza; momwemo Farao, mfumu ya Aejipito, kwa onse amene amkhulupirira iye." 
Isaiah36:7 Koma ukanena kwa ine, Ife tikhulupirira Yehova Mulungu wathu; kodi si ndiye amene Hezekiya wachotsa misanje yake ndi maguwa ake a nsembe, nati kwa Yuda, ndi kwa Yerusalemu, Inu mudzapembedzera patsogolo pa guwa la nsembe ili?" 
Isaiah36:8 Chifukwa chake upereketu zikole kwa mbuyanga, mfumu ya Asiriya, ndipo ine ndidzakupatsa iwe akavalo zikwi ziwiri, ngati iwe udzaona okwerapo." 
Isaiah36:9 Bwanji tsono iwe ungathe kubweza nkhope ya nduna mmodzi wamng'ono wa atumiki a mbuyanga, ndi kukhulupirira Ejipito, kuti adzakupatsa magaleta ndi apakavalo?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ndipo ine tsopano, kodi ndafika opanda Yehova kudzamenyana ndi dziko ili, kudzalipasula? Yehova anati kwa ine, Kwera, ndi kumenyana ndi dziko ili, ndi kulipasula." 
Isaiah36:11 Ndipo Eliyakimu, ndi Sebina, ndi Yowa, anati kwa kazembeyo, Nenanitu kwa atumiki anu m'chinenero cha Aramu; pakuti ife tichimva; ndipo musanene kwa ife m'Chiyuda, m'makutu a anthu amene ali palinga." 
Isaiah36:12 Koma kazembeyo anati, Kodi mbuyanga ananditumiza ine kwa mbuyako ndi kwa iwe kunena mau amenewa? Kodi iye sananditumize adye ndowe zaozao, ndi kumwa madzi aoao ndi inu?" 
Isaiah36:13 Pamenepo kazembeyo anaima, nafuula ndi mau akulu m'Chiyuda, nati, Imvani, inu, mau a mfumu yaikulu, mfumu ya Asiriya." 
Isaiah36:14 Mfumu itere, Musaleke Hezekiya anyenge inu; pakuti iye sadzathai kukupulumutsani:" 
Isaiah36:15 ngakhale musaleke Hezekiya akhulupiritse inu kwa Yehova, ndi kunena, Yehova adzatipulumutsa ndithu; mudzi uwu sudzaperekedwa m'manja mwa mfumu ya Asiriya." 
Isaiah36:16 Musamvere Hezekiya, pakuti mfumu ya ku Asiriya itere, Mupangane nane, tulukirani kwa ine; ndipo yense adye mphesa zake, ndi nkhuyu zake, namwe yense madzi a pa chitsime chake;" 
Isaiah36:17 Kufikira ine ndidzadza, ndi kunka nanu kudziko lofanana ndi lanu, dziko la tirigu ndi vinyo, dziko la chakudya ndi minda yamphesa." 
Isaiah36:18 Chenjerani angakukopeni inu Hezekiya, ndi kuti, Yehova adzatipulumutsa ife. Kodi milungu iliyonse ya amitundu inapulumutsa dziko lao m'manja mwa mfumu ya ku Asiriya?" 
Isaiah36:19 Ili kuti milungu ya Hamati, ndi Aripadi? Ili kuti milungu ya Sefaravaimu? Kodi inapulumutsa Samariya m'manja mwanga?" 
Isaiah36:20 Mwa milungu yonse ya maiko awa, inapulumutsa dziko lao m'manja mwanga ndi iti, kuti Yehova adzapulumutsa Yerusalemu m'manja mwanga?" 
Isaiah36:21 Koma iwo anakhala chete, osamuyankha mau, pakuti mfumu inawalamulira kuti, Musamuyankhe." 
Isaiah36:22 Ndipo anafika Eliyakimu, mwana wa Hilikiya, amene anali wapanyumba, ndi Sebina, mlembi, ndi Yowa, mwana wa Asafu, mkumbutsi, kwa Hezekiya ndi zovala zao zong'ambika, namuuza iye mau a kazembeyo." 
Isaiah37:1 Ndipo panali pamene mfumu Hezekiya anamva, anang'amba zovala zake, navala chiguduli, nalowa m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
Isaiah37:2 Ndipo anatumiza Eliyakimu, wapanyumba, ndi Sebina, mlembi, ndi akulu a nsembe, atafunda chiguduli, kwa Yesaya, mneneri, mwana wa Amozi." 
Isaiah37:3 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Hezekiya atere, Tsiku lalero ndilo tsiku la vuto, ndi lakudzudzula ndi chitonzo; pakuti nthawi yake yakubala ana yafika, ndipo palibe mphamvu yobalira." 
Isaiah37:4 Kapena Yehova Mulungu wako adzamva mau a kazembeyo, amene mfumu ya Asiriya mbuyake inamtuma kukatonza Mulungu wamoyo, nadzadzudzula mau amene Yehova Mulungu wako adawamva; chifukwa chake, kweza pemphero lako chifukwa cha otsala osiyidwa." 
Isaiah37:5 Ndipo atumiki a mfumu Hezekiya anadza kwa Yesaya. 
Isaiah37:6 Ndipo Yesaya anati kwa iwo, Mukati kwa mbuyanu, Atero Yehova, musaope mau amene wawamva iwe, amene atumiki a mfumu ya Asiriya andilalatira Ine." 
Isaiah37:7 Taonani, ndidzaika mzimu mwa iye, ndipo iye adzamva mbiri, nadzabwerera kunka kudziko la kwao; ndipo ndidzamgwetsa ndi lupanga m'dziko la kwao." 
Isaiah37:8 Ndipo kazembeyo anabwerera, napeza mfumu ya Asiriya ilikuponyana nkhondo ndi Libina; pakuti anamva kuti inachoka ku Lakisi." 
Isaiah37:9 Ndipo anamva anthu alinkunena za Tirihaka, mfumu ya Kusi, Iye watuluka kudzamenyana ndi iwe. Ndipo pamene anamva, iye anatumiza mithenga kwa Hezekiya ndi kuti," 
Isaiah37:10 Mukati kwa Hezekiya, mfumu ya Yuda, Asakunyenge Mulungu wako, amene iwe umkhulupirira, ndi kuti, Yerusalemu sadzaperekedwa m'manja mwa mfumu ya Asiriya." 
Isaiah37:11 Taona, iwe wamva chimene mafumu a Asiriya anachitira maiko onse, ndi kuwapasula konse; ndipo kodi iwe udzapulumutsidwa?" 
Isaiah37:12 Kodi milungu ya amitundu yaipulumutsa iyo, imene atate anga anaipasula? Gozani ndi Harani ndi Rezefe ndi ana a Edeni amene anali m'Telasara." 
Isaiah37:13 Ili kuti mfumu ya ku Hamati, ndi mfumu ya ku Aripadi, ndi mfumu yamudzi wa ku Sefaravaimu, ya ku Hena, ndi Iva?" 
Isaiah37:14 Ndipo Hezekiya analandira kalatayo m'manja mwa mithengayo, namuwerenga; ndipo Hezekiya anakwera kunka kunyumba ya Yehova, namfunyulula pamaso pa Yehova." 
Isaiah37:15 Ndipo Hezekiya anapemphera kwa Yehova, nati," 
Isaiah37:16 Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israele, amene mukhala pa akerubi, Inu ndinu Mulungu, Inu nokha, wa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi, Inu munalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah37:17 Tcherani makutu anu, Yehova, nimumve; tsegulani maso anu, Yehova, nimuone; ndi kumva mau onse a Senakeribu, amene watumiza kumtonza Mulungu wamoyo." 
Isaiah37:18 Zoonadi, Yehova, mafumu a Asiriya anaononga maiko onse, ndi pokhala pao." 
Isaiah37:19 Ndipo anaponya milungu yao pamoto; pakuti iyo sinali milungu, koma ntchito yopangidwa ndi manja a anthu, mtengo ndi mwala; chifukwa chake iwo anaiononga." 
Isaiah37:20 Chifukwa chake, Yehova, Mulungu wathu, mutipulumutse ife m'manja mwake, kuti maufumu onse a dziko adziwe, kuti Inu ndinu Yehova, Inu nokha." 
Isaiah37:21 Ndipo Yesaya, mwana wa Amozi, anatumiza kwa Hezekiya, ndi kuti, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Israele, Popeza wandipemphera za Senakeribu mfumu ya Asiriya," 
Isaiah37:22 awa ndiwo mau amene Yehova wanena za iye, Namwali, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, wakunyoza iwe ndi kuseka iwe ndi chiphwete; mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu wapukusa mutu wake pambuyo pako." 
Isaiah37:23 Ndani amene, iwe wamtonza ndi kumlalatira? Ndani amene iwe wakwezera mau ako ndi kutukulira maso ako kumwamba? Ndiye Woyera wa Israele." 
Isaiah37:24 Wamtonza Ambuye ndi atumiki ako, ndipo wati, Ndi khamu la magaleta anga ine ndafika kunsonga za mapiri, kumbali za Lebanoni; ndipo ndidzagwetsapo mikungudza yaitali, ndi milombwa yosankhika; ndipo ine ndidzafika pamutu pake penipeni, kunkhalango ya munda wake wobalitsa." 
Isaiah37:25 Ine ndakumba ndi kumwa madzi, ndidzaumitsa nyanja zonse za Ejipito ndi kuphazi kwanga." 
Isaiah37:26 Kodi iwe sunamve, kuti ndinachita ichi kale, ndi kuchikonza nthawi zakale? Tsopano Ine ndachikwaniritsa, kuti iwe ukapasule midzi yamalinga, isanduke miunda." 
Isaiah37:27 Chifukwa chake okhalamo analefuka, naopsedwa, nathedwa nzeru; ananga udzu wa m'munda, ndi masamba awisi, ndi udzu wa pamachindwi, ndi munda wa tirigu asanakule." 
Isaiah37:28 Koma ndidziwa pokhala pansi pako, ndi kutuluka kwako, ndi kulowa kwako, ndi kundikwiyira kwako." 
Isaiah37:29 Chifukwa cha kundikwiyira Ine kwako, ndi popeza kudzikweza kwako kwafika m'makutu mwanga. Ine ndidzaika mbedza yanga m'mphuno mwako, ndi chapakamwa changa m'milomo yako, ndipo ndidzakubweza iwe m'njira yomwe unadzerayo." 
Isaiah37:30 Ndipo ichi chidzakhala chizindikiro kwa iwe: chaka chino mudzadya zimene zili zomera zokha, ndipo chaka chachiwiri mankhokwe ake; ndipo chaka chachitatu bzalani ndi kudula ndi kulima minda yamphesa ndi kudya chipatso chake." 
Isaiah37:31 Ndipo otsala amene opulumuka a nyumba ya Yuda adzaphukanso mizu pansi, nadzabala chipatso pamwamba." 
Isaiah37:32 Pakuti mudzaoneka m'Yerusalemu, otsala ndi opulumuka m'phiri la Ziyoni; changu cha Yehova wa makamu chidzachita ichi." 
Isaiah37:33 Chifukwa chake atero Yehova za mfumu ya Asiriya, Iye sadzafika pa mudzi uno, ngakhale kuponyapo muvi, ngakhale kufika patsogolo pake ndi chikopa, ngakhale kuunjikirapo mulu." 
Isaiah37:34 Pa njira yomwe anadzerayo, abwerera yomweyo, ndipo sadzafika pa mudzi uno, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah37:35 Pakuti ndidzatchinjiriza mudzi uno, kuupulumutsa, chifukwa cha Ine mwini, ndi mtumiki wanga Davide." 
Isaiah37:36 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anatuluka, naphaipha m'zithando za Asiriya, zikwi zana ndi makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi zisanu, ndipo pamene anthu anauka mamawa, taonani, onse ndiwo mitembo." 
Isaiah37:37 Ndipo Senakeribu, mfumu ya Asiriya, anachoka, namuka, nabwerera, nakhala pa Ninive." 
Isaiah37:38 Ndipo panali, pamene iye analikupembedzera m'nyumba ya Nisiroki, mulungu wake, Adrameleki ndi Sarezere, ana ake anamupha iye ndi lupanga; ndipo iwo anapulumuka, nathawira ku dziko la ku Ararati. Ndipo Esarahadoni, mwana wake, analamulira m'malo mwake." 
Isaiah38:1 Masiku amenewo Hezekiya anadwala, nafuna kufa. Ndipo Yesaya mneneri, mwana wa Amozi, anadza kwa iye, nati kwa iye, Atero Yehova, Konza nyumba yako, pakuti iwe udzafa, sudzakhala ndi moyo." 
Isaiah38:2 Ndipo Hezekiya analoza nkhope yake kukhoma, napemphera kwa Yehova, nati," 
Isaiah38:3 Kumbukiranitu tsopano, Yehova, kuti ndayenda pamaso panu m'zoonadi ndi mtima wangwiro, ndipo ndachita zabwino pamaso panu. Ndipo Hezekiya analira kolimba." 
Isaiah38:4 Ndipo anafika mau a Yehova kwa Yesaya, ndi kuti," 
Isaiah38:5 Ukanene kwa Hezekiya, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Davide, kholo lako, Ndamva kupemphera kwako, ndaona misozi yako; taona, ndidzaonjezera pa masiku ako zaka khumi ndi zisanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndipo ndidzakupulumutsa iwe ndi mudzi uno m'manja mwa mfumu ya Asiriya, ndipo ndidzatchinjiriza mudzi uno." 
Isaiah38:7 Ndipo ichi chidzakhala chizindikiro kwa iwe chochokera kwa Yehova, kuti Yehova adzachita ichi wanenachi;" 
Isaiah38:8 taona, ndidzabweza mthunzi wa pamakwerero, umene watsika pa makwerero a Ahazi ndi dzuwa, ubwerere makwerero khumi. Ndipo dzuwa linabwerera makwerero khumi pamakwerero, pamene udatsika mthunziwo." 
Isaiah38:9 Malemba a Hezekiya mfumu ya Ayuda muja anadwala, atachira nthenda yake." 
Isaiah38:10 Ine ndinati, Pakati pa masiku anga ndidzalowa m'zipata za kunsi kwa manda; Ndazimidwa zaka zanga zotsala." 
Isaiah38:11 Ndinati, Sindidzaona Yehova m'dziko la amoyo; sindidzaonanso munthu pamodzi ndi okhala kunja kuno;" 
Isaiah38:12 Pokhala panga pachotsedwa, pandisunthikira monga hema wa mbusa; Ndapindapinda moyo wanga ngati muomba; Iye adzandidula ine poomberapo; Kuyambira usana kufikira usiku mudzanditsiriza ine." 
Isaiah38:13 Ndinadzitonthoza kufikira mamawa; monga mkango, momwemo Iye anathyolathyola mafupa anga onse; Kuyambira usana kufikira usiku mudzanditsiriza ine." 
Isaiah38:14 Ndinalankhulalankhula ngati namzeze, pena chumba; Ndinalira maliro ngati nkhunda; maso anga analephera pogadamira kumwamba. Yehova ndasautsidwa, mundiperekere chikoli." 
Isaiah38:15 Kodi ndidzanena chiyani? Iye wanena kwa ine, ndiponso Iye mwini wachita ichi; Ine ndidzayenda chete zaka zanga zonse, chifukwa cha zowawa za moyo wanga." 
Isaiah38:16 Ambuye ndi zinthu izi anthu akhala ndi moyo. Ndipo m'menemo monse muli moyo wa mzimu wanga; Chifukwa chake mundichiritse ine, ndi kundikhalitsa ndi moyo." 
Isaiah38:17 Taonani, ndinali ndi zowawa zazikulu, chifukwa cha mtendere wanga; Koma Inu mokonda moyo wanga, munaupulumutsa m'dzanja la chivundi, Pakuti mwaponya m'mbuyo mwanu machimo anga onse." 
Isaiah38:18 Pakuti kunsi kwa manda sikungakuyamikeni Inu; imfa singakulemekezeni; Otsikira kudzenje sangaziyembekeze zoona zanu. 
Isaiah38:19 Wamoyo, wamoyo, iye adzakuyamikani inu, monga ine lero; Atate adzadziwitsa ana ake zoona zanu." 
Isaiah38:20 Yehova ndiye wondipulumutsa ine; Chifukwa chake tidzaimba nyimbo zanga, ndi zoimba zazingwe Masiku onse a moyo wathu m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
Isaiah38:21 Ndipo Yesaya adati, Atenge m'bulu wankhuyu, auike pafundo, ndipo iye adzachira." 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiya anatinso, Chizindikiro nchiyani, kuti ndidzakwera kunka kunyumba ya Yehova?" 
Isaiah39:1 Nthawi imeneyo Merodaki-Baladani, mwana wa Baladani, mfumu ya ku Babiloni, anatumiza akalata ndi mphatso kwa Hezekiya; pakuti anamva kuti iye anadwala, nachira." 
Isaiah39:2 Ndipo Hezekiya anakondwera nao, nawaonetsa nyumba yake ya chuma, siliva, ndi golide, ndi zonunkhira, ndi mafuta okometsera, ndi nyumba yonse ya zida zake, ndi zonse zopezedwa m'zosungira zake; munalibe kanthu m'nyumba mwake, kapena m'dziko lake lonse, kamene Hezekiya sanawaonetse." 
Isaiah39:3 Ndipo anadza Yesaya mneneri kwa mfumu Hezekiya, nati kwa iye, Kodi anthu awa ananena bwanji, ndipo iwo achokera kuti, kudza kwa inu? Ndipo Hezekiya anati, Iwo achokera ku dziko lakutali, kudza kwa ine, kunena ku Babiloni." 
Isaiah39:4 Ndipo iye anati, Kodi iwo anaona chiyani m'nyumba mwanu? Ndipo Hezekiya anayankha, Zonse za m'nyumba mwanga iwo anaziona; palibe kanthu ka mwa chuma changa, kamene ine sindinawaonetse." 
Isaiah39:5 Ndipo Yesaya anati kwa Hezekiya, Imvani mau a Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah39:6 Taona, masiku afika, kuti zonse za m'nyumba mwako, ndi zimene atate wako anazikundika kufikira lero lino, zidzatengedwa kunka ku Babiloni; sipadzatsala kanthu, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah39:7 Ndipo ana ako amene adzabadwa ndi iwe, amene udzabala, iwo adzawatenga, ndipo adzakhala adindo m'chinyumba chake cha mfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Isaiah39:8 Ndipo Hezekiya anati kwa Yesaya, Mau a Yehova, amene iwe wanena, ali abwino. Iye anatinso, Pakuti padzakhala mtendere ndi zoonadi masiku anga." 
Isaiah40:1 Mutonthoze, mutonthoze mtima wa anthu anga, ati Mulungu wanu." 
Isaiah40:2 Munene inu zotonthoza mtima kwa Yerusalemu, nimufuulire kwa iye, kuti nkhondo yake yatha, kuti kuipa kwake kwakhululukidwa; kuti iye walandira mowirikiza m'dzanja la Yehova, chifukwa cha machimo ake onse." 
Isaiah40:3 Mau a wofuula m'chipululu, Konzani njira ya Yehova, lungamitsani m'dziko loti see khwalala la Mulungu wathu." 
Isaiah40:4 Chigwa chilichonse chidzadzazidwa, ndipo phiri lililonse ndi chitunda chilichonse zidzachepetsedwa, ndipo zokhota zidzaongoledwa, ndipo zamakolokoto zidzasalala;" 
Isaiah40:5 ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova udzavumbulutsidwa, ndipo anthu onse adzauona pamodzi, pakuti pakamwa pa Yehova panena chomwecho." 
Isaiah40:6 Mau a wina ati, Fuula. Ndipo ndinati, Kodi ndifuule chiyani? Anthu onse ndi udzu, ndi kukoma kwao konse kunga duwa la m'thengo;" 
Isaiah40:7 udzu unyala, duwa lifota; chifukwa mpweya wa Yehova waombapo; zoonadi anthu ndi udzu." 
Isaiah40:8 Udzu unyala, duwa lifota, koma mau a Mulungu wathu adzakhala nthawi zachikhalire." 
Isaiah40:9 Iwe amene utengera mau abwino ku Ziyoni, kwera iwe pamwamba pa phiri lalitali; iwe amene utengera mau abwino ku Yerusalemu, kweza mau ako ndi mphamvu, kwezetsa usaope, nena kumidzi ya Yuda, Taonani, Mulungu wanu!" 
Isaiah40:10 Taonani, Ambuye Yehova adzadza ngati wamphamvu, ndipo mkono wake udzalamulira; taonani, mphotho yake ili ndi Iye, ndipo chobwezera chake chili patsogolo pa Iye." 
Isaiah40:11 Iye adzadyetsa zoweta chake ngati mbusa, nadzasonkhanitsa anaankhosa pachepa pake, nadzawatengera pa chifuwa chake, ndipo adzatsogolera bwinobwino zimene ziyamwitsa." 
Isaiah40:12 Ndani wayesa madzi m'dzanja lake, nayesa thambo ndi chikhato, ndi kudzaza fumbi la nthaka m'nsengwa, ndi kuyesa mapiri m'mbale zoyesera, ndi zitunda m'mulingo?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ndani anapangira mzimu wa Yehova, kapena kukhala phungu lake, ndi kumphunzitsa Iye?" 
Isaiah40:14 Iye anakhala upo ndi yani, ndipo ndani analangiza Iye ndi kumphunzitsa m'njira ya chiweruzo, ndi kumphunzitsa nzeru ndi kumuonetsa njira ya luntha?" 
Isaiah40:15 Taonani, amitundu akunga dontho la m'mtsuko, nawerengedwa ngati fumbi losalala la m'muyeso; taonani atukula zisumbu ngati kanthu kakang'ono." 
Isaiah40:16 Ndipo Lebanoni sakwanira kutentha, ngakhale nyama zake sizikwanira nsembe yopsereza." 
Isaiah40:17 Amitundu onse ali chabe pamaso pa Iye; awayesa ngati chinthu chachabe, ndi chopanda pake." 
Isaiah40:18 Mudzafanizira Mulungu ndi yani tsopano, kapena kumyerekeza ndi chithunzithunzi chotani?" 
Isaiah40:19 Fano losema mmisiri analisungunula, ndipo wosula golide analikuta ndi golide, naliyengera maunyolo asiliva." 
Isaiah40:20 Wosowa nsembe yoteroyo asankha mtengo umene sungavunde, iye adzisankhira yekha munthu mmisiri waluso, akonze fano losema, limene silisunthika." 
Isaiah40:21 Kodi inu simunadziwe? Kodi inu simunamve? Kodi sanakuuzeni inu chiyambire? Kodi inu simunadziwitse chiyambire mayambiro a dziko lapansi? 
Isaiah40:22 Ndi Iye amene akhala pamwamba pa malekezero a dziko lapansi, ndipo okhalamo akunga ziwala; amene afutukula thambo ngati chinsalu, naliyala monga hema wakukhalamo;" 
Isaiah40:23 amene asandutsa akalonga kuti akhale achabe, nasandutsa oweruza a dziko lapansi akhale opanda pake." 
Isaiah40:24 Inde sanaokedwe, inde sanafesedwe; inde, muzu wao sunazike pansi; koma Iye anawaombetsera mphepo, ndipo afota, ndipo kamvulumvulu awachotsa monga chiputu." 
Isaiah40:25 Mudzandifanizira Ine ndi yani tsono, kuti ndilingane naye, ati Woyerayo." 
Isaiah40:26 Kwezani maso anu kumwamba, muone amene analenga izo, amene atulutsa khamu lao ndi kuziwerenga; azitcha zonse maina ao, ndi mphamvu zake zazikulu, ndi popeza ali wolimba mphamvu, palibe imodzi isoweka." 
Isaiah40:27 Bwanji iwe, Yakobo, umati, ndi bwanji umanena iwe, Israele, Njira yanga yabisika kwa Yehova; ndipo chiweruzo cha Mulungu wanga chandipitirira?" 
Isaiah40:28 Kodi iwe sunadziwe? Kodi sunamve? Mulungu wachikhalire, Yehova, Mlengi wa malekezero a dziko lapansi, salefuka konse, salema; nzeru zake sizisanthulika." 
Isaiah40:29 Iye alimbitsa olefuka, naonjezera mphamvu iye ameme alibe mphamvu." 
Isaiah40:30 Ngakhale anyamata adzalefuka ndi kulema ndi amisinkhu adzagwa ndithu: 
Isaiah40:31 koma iwo amene alindira Yehova adzatenganso mphamvu; adzauluka pamwamba ndi mapiko monga ziombankhanga; adzathamanga koma osalema; adzayenda koma osalefuka. 
Isaiah41:1 Khalani chete pamaso pa Ine, zisumbu inu, anthu atengenso mphamvu; ayandikire; pamenepo alankhule; tiyeni tiyandikire pamodzi kuchiweruziro." 
Isaiah41:2 Ndani anautsa wina wochokera kum'mawa, amene amuitana m'chilungamo, afike pa phazi lake? Iye apereka amitundu patsogolo pake, namlamuliritsa mafumu; nawapereka monga fumbi kulupanga lake, monga chiputu chouluzidwa ku uta wake." 
Isaiah41:3 Iye awathamangitsa, napitirira mwamtendere; pa njira imene asanapitemo ndi mapazi ake." 
Isaiah41:4 Ndani wachipanga, nachimaliza icho, kutchula mibadwo chiyambire? Ine Yehova, ndine ndemwe." 
Isaiah41:5 Zisumbu zinaona niziopa; malekezero a dziko lapansi ananthunthumira; anayandikira, nafika." 
Isaiah41:6 Iwo anathangata yense mnansi wake, ndi yense anati kwa mbale wake, Khala wolimba mtima." 
Isaiah41:7 Chotero mmisiri wa mitengo analimbikitsa wosula golide, ndi iye amene asalaza ndi nyundo anamlimbikitsa iye amene amenya posulira, nanena za kulumikiza ndi ntovu, Kuli kwabwino; ndipo iye akhomera fanolo misomali kuti lisasunthike." 
Isaiah41:8 Koma iwe, Israele, mtumiki wanga, Yakobo, amene ndinakusankha, mbeu ya Abrahamu bwenzi langa;" 
Isaiah41:9 iwe amene ndinakuwira iwe zolimba kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, ndi kukuitana iwe kuchokera m'ngodya zake, ndipo ndinati kwa iwe, Ndiwe mtumiki wanga ndakusankha, sindinakutaya kunja;" 
Isaiah41:10 usaope, pakuti Ine ndili pamodzi ndi iwe; usaopsedwe, pakuti Ine ndine Mulungu wako; ndidzakulimbitsa; inde, ndidzakuthangata; inde, ndidzakuchirikiza ndi dzanja langa lamanja la chilungamo." 
Isaiah41:11 Taona, onse amene akukwiyira iwe adzakhala ndi manyazi, nasokonezedwa; iwo amene akangana ndi iwe adzakhala ngati chabe, nadzaonongeka." 
Isaiah41:12 Iwe udzawafuna osawapeza, ngakhale iwo amene akangana ndi iwe; ochita nkhondo ndi iwe, adzakhala ngati chabe, ndi monga kanthu kopanda pake." 
Isaiah41:13 Pakuti Ine Yehova Mulungu wako ndidzagwira dzanja lako lamanja, ndi kunena kwa iwe, Usaope ndidzakuthandiza iwe." 
Isaiah41:14 Usaope, Yakobo, nyongolotsi iwe, ndi anthu inu a Israele; ndidzakuthangata iwe, ati Yehova, ndiye Mombolo wako, Woyera wa Israele." 
Isaiah41:15 Taona, ndidzakuyesa iwe choombera tirigu chatsopano chakuthwa chokhala ndi mano; iwe udzaomba mapiri ndi kuwapera asalale, ndi kusandutsa zitunda mungu." 
Isaiah41:16 Iwe udzawapeta, ndi mphepo idzawauluza; ndipo kamvulumvulu adzawamwaza; ndipo iwe udzasangalala mwa Yehova, udzadzikuza mwa Woyera wa Israele." 
Isaiah41:17 Wosauka ndi wosowa afuna madzi, ndipo palibe, ndi lilime lao lilephera, chifukwa cha ludzu; Ine Yehova ndidzawayankha, Ine Mulungu wa Israele sindidzawasiya." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndidzagwetsa mitsinje pazitunda zoti see, ndi akasupe pakati pa zigwa; ndidzasandutsa chipululu, chikhale thamanda lamadzi, ndi mtunda wouma ukhale magwero a madzi." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndidzabzala m'chipululu mkungudza, ndi msangu, ndi kasiya, ndi mtengo wa azitona; ndidzaika m'chipululu pamodzi mlombwa, ndi mkuyu, ndi naphini;" 
Isaiah41:20 kuti iwo aone ndi kudziwa, ndi kulingalira, ndi kumvetsa pamodzi, kuti dzanja la Yehova lachita ichi, ndipo Woyera wa Israele wachilenga ichi." 
Isaiah41:21 Onetsani mlandu wanu, ati Yehova; tulutsani zifukwa zanu zolimba, ati mfumu ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah41:22 Azitulutse, atitchulire ife, chimene chidzaoneka; tchulani inu zinthu zakale, zinali zotani, kuti ife tiganizire pamenepo, ndi kudziwa mamaliziro ao; kapena tionetseni ife zinthu zimene zilinkudza." 
Isaiah41:23 Tchulani zinthu zimene zilinkudza m'tsogolo, kuti ife tidziwe kuti inu ndinu milungu; inde, chitani zabwino, kapena chitani zoipa, kuti ife tiopsedwe, ndi kuona pamodzi." 
Isaiah41:24 Taonani, inu muli achabe, ndi ntchito yanu yachabe; wonyansa ali iye amene asankha inu." 
Isaiah41:25 Ndautsa wina wakuchokera kumpoto; ndipo iye wafika wakuchokera potuluka dzuwa, amene atchula dzina langa; ndipo iye adzafika pa olamulira, monga matope, ndi monga muumbi aponda dothi la mbiya." 
Isaiah41:26 Ndani watchula icho chiyambire, kuti ife tichidziwe? Ndi nthawi zakale, kuti ife tinene, Iye ali wolungama? Inde, palibe wina amene atchula, inde, palibe wina amene asonyeza, inde palibe wina amene amvetsa mau anu." 
Isaiah41:27 Poyamba Ine ndidzati kwa Ziyoni, Taona, taona iwo; ndipo ndidzapereka kwa Yerusalemu wina, amene adza ndi mau abwino." 
Isaiah41:28 Ndipo pamene ndayang'ana, palibe munthu; ngakhale mwa iwo, palibe phungu, amene angathe kuyankha mau, pamene ndiwafunsa." 
Isaiah41:29 Taona, iwo onse, ntchito zao zikhala zopanda pake ndi zachabe; mafano ao osungunula ndiwo mphepo ndi masokonezo." 
Isaiah42:1 Taona Mtumiki wanga, amene ndimgwiriziza; Wosankhika wanga, amene moyo wanga ukondwera naye; ndaika mzimu wanga pa Iye; Iye adzatulutsira amitundu chiweruziro." 
Isaiah42:2 Iye sadzafuula, ngakhale kukuwa, pena kumvetsa mau ake m'khwalala." 
Isaiah42:3 Bango lophwanyika sadzalithyola, ndi lawi lozilala sadzalizima; adzatulutsa chiweruzo m'zoona." 
Isaiah42:4 Iye sadzalephera kapena kudololoka, kufikira atakhazikitsa chiweruzo m'dziko lapansi; ndipo zisumbu zidzalindira chilamulo chake." 
Isaiah42:5 Atero Mulungu Yehova, Iye amene analenga thambo, nalifutukula, nayala ponse dziko lapansi, ndi chimene chituluka m'menemo, Iye amene amapatsa anthu a m'menemo mpweya, ndi mzimu kwa iwo amene ayenda m'menemo;" 
Isaiah42:6 Ine Yehova ndakuitana Iwe m'chilungamo, ndipo ndidzagwira dzanja lako ndi kusunga Iwe, ndi kupatsa Iwe ukhale pangano la anthu, ndi kuunika kwa amitundu;" 
Isaiah42:7 kuti utsegule maso akhungu, utulutse am'nsinga m'ndende, ndi iwo amene akhala mumdima, atuluke m'nyumba ya kaidi." 
Isaiah42:8 Ine ndine Yehova; dzina langa ndi lomweli; ndipo ulemerero wanga Ine sindidzapereka kwa wina, ngakhale kunditamanda kwa mafano osemedwa." 
Isaiah42:9 Taona, zinthu zakale zaoneka, ndipo zatsopano Ine ndizitchula; zisanabuke ndidzakumvetsani." 
Isaiah42:10 Imbirani Yehova nyimbo yatsopano, ndi matamando ake kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi; inu amene mutsikira kunyanja, ndi zonse zili m'menemo, zisumbu ndi okhala mommo." 
Isaiah42:11 Chipululu ndi midzi yake ikweze mau ao, midzi imene Kedara akhalamo; okhala m'Sela aimbe, akuwe kuchokera pamwamba pa mapiri." 
Isaiah42:12 Apereke ulemerero kwa Yehova, anene matamando ake m'zisumbu." 
Isaiah42:13 Yehova adzatuluka ngati munthu wamphamvu; adzautsa nsanje ngati munthu wa nkhondo; Iye adzafuula, inde adzakuwa zolimba; adzachita zamphamvu pa adani ake." 
Isaiah42:14 Ndakhala nthawi yambiri wosalankhula ndakhala chete kudzithungata ndekha; tsopano ndidzafuula ngati mkazi wobala; ndidzapuma modukizadukiza ndi wefuwefu pamodzi. 
Isaiah42:15 Ndidzapasula mapiri ndi zitunda, ndi kuumitsa zitsamba zao zonse; ndi kusandutsa nyanja zisumbu, ndi kuumitsa matamanda." 
Isaiah42:16 Ndipo ndidzayendetsa akhungu m'khwalala, limene iwo salidziwa, m'njira zimene iwo sazidziwa ndidzawatsogolera; ndidzawalitsa mdima m'tsogolo mwao, ndi kulungamitsa malo okhota. Zinthu izi Ine ndidzachita, ndipo sindidzawasiya." 
Isaiah42:17 Iwo adzabwezedwa m'mbuyo, adzakhala ndi manyazi ambiri amene akhulupirira mafano osemedwa, nati kwa mafano oyengeka, Inu ndinu milungu yathu." 
Isaiah42:18 Imvani, agonthi inu; yang'anani, akhungu inu, kuti muone." 
Isaiah42:19 Ndani ali wakhungu, koma mtumiki wanga? Pena wagonthi, monga mthenga wanga, amene ndimtumiza? Ndani ali wakhungu monga bwenzi langa, ndi wakhungu monga mtumiki wa Yehova?" 
Isaiah42:20 Iwe waona zinthu zambiri, koma susamalira konse; makutu ako ali otseguka, koma sumva konse." 
Isaiah42:21 Chinakondweretsa Yehova chifukwa cha chilungamo chake kukuza chilamulo, ndi kuchilemekeza." 
Isaiah42:22 Koma awa ndiwo anthu olandidwa zao ndi kufunkhidwa; iwo onse agwa m'mauna, nabisidwa m'nyumba za akaidi; alandidwa zao, palibe wowapulumutsa; afunkhidwa ndipo palibe woti, Bwezerani." 
Isaiah42:23 Ndani mwa inu adzatchera khutu lake pamenepo? Amene adzamvera ndi kumva nthawi yakudza? 
Isaiah42:24 Ndani anapereka Yakobo, kuti afunkhidwe, ndi Israele, kuti awawanyidwe? Kodi si Yehova? Iye amene tamchimwira, ndi amene iwo anakonda kuyenda m'njira zake, ngakhale kumvera chiphunzitso chake." 
Isaiah42:25 Chifukwa chake anatsanulira pa iye mkwiyo wake waukali, ndi mphamvu za nkhondo; ndipo unamyatsira moto kuzungulira kwake, koma iye sanadziwe; ndipo unamtentha, koma iye sanachisunge m'mtima." 
Isaiah43:1 Koma tsopano atero Yehova, amene anakulenga iwe Yakobo, ndi Iye amene anakupanga iwe Israele, Usaope, chifukwa ndakuombola iwe, ndakutchula dzina lako, iwe uli wanga." 
Isaiah43:2 Pamene udulitsa pamadzi ndili pamodzi ndi iwe; ndi pooloka mitsinje sidzakukokolola; pakupyola pamoto sudzapsa; ngakhale lawi silidzakutentha. 
Isaiah43:3 Chifukwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako, Woyera wa Israele, Mpulumutsi wako; ndapatsa Ejipito dombolo lako, Etiopiya ndi Seba m'malo mwako." 
Isaiah43:4 Pokhala iwe wa mtengo wapatali pamaso panga, ndi wolemekezeka, ndipo ndakukonda iwe; Ine ndidzakuombola ndi anthu, ndi kupereka anthu m'malo mwa moyo wako." 
Isaiah43:5 Usaope; pakuti Ine ndili ndi iwe; ndidzatenga mbeu zako kuchokera kum'mawa, ndi kusonkhanitsa iwe kuchokera kumadzulo." 
Isaiah43:6 Ine ndidzati ndi kumpoto, Pereka; ndi kumwera, Usaletse; bwera nao ana anga amuna kuchokera kutali, ndi ana anga akazi kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi;" 
Isaiah43:7 yense wotchedwa dzina langa, amene ndinamlenga chifukwa cha ulemerero wanga; ndinamuumba iye; inde, ndinampanga iye." 
Isaiah43:8 Tulutsani anthu akhungu, amene ali ndi maso, ndi agonthi, amene ali ndi makutu." 
Isaiah43:9 Amitundu onse asonkhane pamodzi, ndi anthu aunjikane; ndani mwa iwo anganene ichi ndi kuonetsa ife zinthu zakale? Atenge mboni zao, kuti avomerezeke ndi olungama; pena amve, nanene zoonadi." 
Isaiah43:10 Inu ndinu mboni zanga, ati Yehova, ndi mtumiki wanga, amene ndakusankha; kuti mundidziwe, ndi kundikhulupirira Ine, ndi kuzindikira, kuti Ine ndine; ndisanakhale Ine, panalibe Mulungu wolengedwa, ngakhale pambuyo panga sipadzakhala wina." 
Isaiah43:11 Ine, Inetu ndine Yehova; ndipo palibe Mpulumutsi, koma Ine ndekha." 
Isaiah43:12 Ine ndalalikira, ndipo ndikupulumutsa ndi kumvetsa, ndipo panalibe Mulungu wachilendo pakati pa inu; chifukwa chake inu ndinu mboni zanga, ati Yehova, ndipo Ine ndine Mulungu." 
Isaiah43:13 Inde chiyambire nthawi Ine ndine, ndipo palibe wina wopulumutsa m'dzanja langa; ndidzagwira ntchito, ndipo ndani adzaletsa?" 
Isaiah43:14 Atero Yehova, Mombolo wanu, Woyera wa Israele: Chifukwa cha inu ndatumiza ku Babiloni, ndipo ndidzatsitsira iwo onse monga othawa, ngakhale Ababiloni m'ngalawa za kukondwa kwao." 
Isaiah43:15 Ine ndine Yehova Woyera wanu, Mlengi wa Israele, Mfumu yanu." 
Isaiah43:16 Atero Yehova, amene akonza njira panyanja, ndi popita m'madzi amphamvu;" 
Isaiah43:17 amene atulutsa galeta ndi kavalo, nkhondo ndi mphamvu; iwo agona pansi pamodzi sadzaukai; iwo atha, azimidwa ngati lawi." 
Isaiah43:18 Musakumbukire zidapitazo, ngakhale kulingalira zinthu zakale." 
Isaiah43:19 Taonani, Ine ndidzachita chinthu chatsopano; tsopano chidzaoneka; kodi simudzachidziwa? Ndidzakonzadi njira m'chipululu, ndi mitsinje m'zidalala." 
Isaiah43:20 Nyama za m'thengo zidzandilimekeza, ankhandwe ndi nthiwatiwa; chifukwa ndipatsa madzi m'chipululu, ndi mitsinje m'mkhwangwala, ndimwetse anthu anga osankhika;" 
Isaiah43:21 anthu amene ndinadzilengera ndekha, kuti aonetse matamando anga." 
Isaiah43:22 Komabe iwe sunandiitane Ine, Yakobo; koma iwe walema ndi Ine, Israele." 
Isaiah43:23 Iwe sunanditengere Ine zoweta zazing'ono za nsembe zopsereza zako; kapena kundilemekeza ndi nsembe zako. Sindinakutumikiritsa ndi nsembe zaufa, kapena kukutopetsa ndi lubani." 
Isaiah43:24 Iwe sunandigulire Ine nzimbe ndi ndalama, pena kundikhutitsa ndi mafuta a nsembe zako. Koma iwe wanditumikiritsa ndi machimo ako, wanditopetsa ndi mphulupulu zako." 
Isaiah43:25 Ine, Inedi, ndine amene ndifafaniza zolakwa zako, chifukwa cha Ine mwini; ndipo Ine sindidzakumbukira machimo ako." 
Isaiah43:26 Undikumbutse Ine; tiyeni, tinenane pamodzi; fotokoza mlandu wako, kuti ukalungamitsidwe." 
Isaiah43:27 Atate wako woyamba anachimwa, ndi otanthauzira ako andilakwira Ine." 
Isaiah43:28 Chifukwa chake ndidzaipitsa akulu a Kachisi, ndipo ndidzasanduliza Yakobo akhale temberero, ndi Israele akhale chitonzo." 
Isaiah44:1 Koma tsopano, imva Yakobo, mtumiki wanga, ndi Israele, amene ndakusankha;" 
Isaiah44:2 atero Yehova, amene anakutenga iwe, nakuumba kuchokera m'mimba, amene adzathangata iwe. Usaope Yakobo, mtumiki wanga ndi iwe, Yesuruni, amene ndakusankha iwe." 
Isaiah44:3 Pakuti ndidzathira madzi pa dziko limene lilibe madzi, ndi mitsinje pa nthaka youma; ndidzathira mzimu wanga pa mbeu yako, ndi mdalitso wanga pa obadwa ako;" 
Isaiah44:4 ndipo iwo adzaphuka pakati pa udzu, ngati msondodzi m'mphepete mwa madzi." 
Isaiah44:5 Wina adzati, Ine ndili wa Yehova; ndi wina adzadzitcha yekha ndi dzina la Yakobo, ndipo wina adzalemba ndi dzanja lake, Ndine wa Yehova, ndi kudzitcha yekha ndi mfunda wa Israele." 
Isaiah44:6 Atero Yehova, mfumu ya Israele ndi Mombolo wake, Yehova wa makamu, Ine ndili woyamba ndi womaliza, ndi popanda Ine palibenso Mulungu." 
Isaiah44:7 Ndipo ndani adzaitana monga Ine, ndi kulalikira ichi ndi kundilongosolera ichi, chikhazikitsire Ine anthu akale? Milunguyo iwadziwitse zomwe zilinkudza, ndi za m'tsogolo." 
Isaiah44:8 Musaope inu, musakhale ndi mantha; kodi ndinanena kwa iwe zakale, ndi kuzionetsa zimenezo, ndipo inu ndinu mboni zanga. Kodi popanda Ine aliponso Mulungu? Iai, palibe thanthwe; sindidziwa lililonse." 
Isaiah44:9 Omwe apanga fano losema onsewo asokonezeka; ndipo zokondweretsa zao sadzapindula nazo kanthu; ndipo mboni zao siziona, kapena kudziwa; kuti akhale ndi manyazi." 
Isaiah44:10 Ndani wapanga mulungu, kapena kusungunula fano losema losapindula kanthu?" 
Isaiah44:11 Taonani anzake onse adzakhala ndi manyazi, ndi amisiri ake ndi anthu; asonkhane onse pamodzi, aimirire; adzaopa, iwo onse adzakhala ndi manyazi." 
Isaiah44:12 Wachipala achita zake ndi nsompho, nagwira ntchito ndi makala, nafanizira fanolo ndi nyundo, nagwira ntchito yake ndi mkono wake wamphamvu; inde, ali ndi njala, ndipo mphamvu zake zilephera; iye samwa madzi, nalefuka." 
Isaiah44:13 Mmisiri wa mitengo atambalitsa chingwe; nalilemba ndi cholembera, nalikonza ndi ncherero, nalilemba ndi zolinganizira, nalifanizira monga maonekedwe a munthu, monga munthu wokongola, kuti likhale m'nyumba." 
Isaiah44:14 Iye adzidulira yekha mikungudza, natenga mtengo wambawa, ndi wathundu, ndi kudzisankhira yekha wina wa mitengo ya nkhalango; naoka mtengo wamlombwa, mvula niukulitsa." 
Isaiah44:15 Ndipo udzakhala kuti munthu autenthe; iye natengako, nauotha moto; inde auyatsa, naocha mkate; inde, apanga mulungu, naulambira, naupanga fano losema, naligwadira." 
Isaiah44:16 Iye atenthako mbali ina pamoto; ndi mbali yinayo adya nyama; akazinga zokazinga nakhuta, inde, aotha moto, nati, Ha, ndakongonoka, ndauona moto." 
Isaiah44:17 Ndipo chotsalacho apanga mulungu, ngakhale fano lake losema; iye aligwadira, nalipembedza, nalipemphera nati, Ndipulumutse ine, chifukwa kuti ndinu mulungu wanga." 
Isaiah44:18 Iwo sadziwa, kapena kuzindikira, chifukwa pamaso mwao papakidwa thope, kuti sangaone, ndi m'mitima mwako kuti sangadziwitse." 
Isaiah44:19 Palibe wina wokumbukira, kapena kudziwa, kapena kuzindikira, ndi kuti, Ndatentha mbali ina pamoto, inde ndaochanso mkate pamakala pake, ndakazinga nyama ndi kuidya; kodi ndichipange chotsala chake, chikhale chonyansa? Ndidzagwadira kodi tsinde la mtengo?" 
Isaiah44:20 Iye adya phulusa; mtima wodzinyenga wampambutsa, kuti iye sangapulumutse moyo wake, pena kunena, Kodi simuli kunama m'dzanja langa lamanja?" 
Isaiah44:21 Kumbukirani zinthu izi, Yakobo; ndi Israele, pakuti iwe ndiwe mtumiki wanga; ndakuumba, iwe ndiwe mtumiki wanga, Israele, sindidzakuiwala." 
Isaiah44:22 Ine ndafafaniza monga mtambo wochindikira zolakwa zako, ndi monga mtambo machimo ako; bwerera kwa Ine, pakuti ndakuombola." 
Isaiah44:23 Imbani m'mwamba inu, pakuti Yehova wachichita icho; kuwani inu, mbali za pansi pa dziko; imbani mapiri inu; nkhalango iwe, ndi mitengo yonse m'menemo; chifukwa kuti Yehova wapulumutsa Yakobo, ndipo adzadzilemekezetsa yekha mwa Israele." 
Isaiah44:24 Atero Yehova, Mombolo wako, ndi Iye amene anakuumba iwe m'mimba, Ine ndine Yehova, amene ndipanga zinthu zonse, ndi kufunyulula ndekha zakumwamba, ndi kuyala dziko lapansi; ndani ali ndi Ine?" 
Isaiah44:25 Ndine amene nditsutsa zizindikiro za matukutuku, ndi kuchititsa misala oombeza ula; ndi kubwezera m'mbuyo anthu anzeru, ndi kupusitsa nzeru zao:" 
Isaiah44:26 Ndine amene ndilimbitsa mau a mtumiki wanga, kuchita uphungu wa amithenga anga; ndi kunena za Yerusalemu, Adzakhalamo anthu; ndi za midzi ya Yuda; Idzamangidwa; ndipo ndidzautsa malo abwinja ake." 
Isaiah44:27 Ndine amene nditi kwa nyanja yakuya, Iphwa, ndipo ndidzaumitsa nyanja zako;" 
Isaiah44:28 ndi kunena za Kirusi, Iye ndiye mbusa wanga, ndipo adzachita zofuna zanga zonse; ndi kunena za Yerusalemu, Adzamangidwa; ndi kwa Kachisi, Maziko ako adzaikidwa." 
Isaiah45:1 Atero Yehova kwa wodzozedwa wake kwa Kirusi, amene dzanja lake lamanja ndaligwiritsa, kuti agonjetse mitundu ya anthu pamaso pake, ndipo ndidzamasula m'chuuno mwa mafumu; atsegule zitseko pamaso pake, ndi zipata sizidzatsekedwa:" 
Isaiah45:2 Ndidzakutsogolera ndi kusalaza pokakala; ndidzathyolathyola zitseko zamkuwa, ndi kudula pakati akapichi achitsulo;" 
Isaiah45:3 ndipo ndidzakupatsa iwe chuma cha mumdima, ndi zolemera zobisika za m'malo am'tseri, kuti iwe udziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova, amene ndikuitana iwe dzina lako, ndine Mulungu wa Israele." 
Isaiah45:4 Ndakuitana iwe dzina lako, chifukwa cha Yakobo mtumiki wanga ndi Israele wosankhidwa wanga; ndakuonjezera dzina, ngakhale iwe sunandidziwa Ine." 
Isaiah45:5 Ine ndili Yehova, ndipo palibe winanso; popanda Ine palibe Mulungu; ndidzakumanga m'chuuno, ngakhale sunandidziwa;" 
Isaiah45:6 kuti anthu akadziwe kuchokera kumatulukiro a dzuwa ndi kumadzulo, kuti palibe wina popanda Ine; Ine ndine Yehova, palibe winanso." 
Isaiah45:7 Ine ndilenga kuyera ndi mdima, Ine ndilenga mtendere ndi choipa, Ine ndine Yehova wochita zinthu zonse zimenezi." 
Isaiah45:8 Igwani pansi, inu m'mwamba, kuchokera kumwamba, thambo litsanulire pansi chilungamo; dziko lapansi litseguke, kuti libalitse chipulumutso, nilimeretse chilungamo chimere pamodzi; Ine Yehova ndinachilenga chimenecho." 
Isaiah45:9 Tsoka kwa iye amene akangana ndi Mlengi wake! Phale mwa mapale a dziko lapansi! Kodi dongo linganene kwa iye amene aliumba, Kodi upanga chiyani? Pena ntchito yako, Iye alibe manja?" 
Isaiah45:10 Tsoka kwa iye amene ati kwa atate wake, Kodi iwe ubalanji? Pena kwa mkazi, Ulikusauka ninji iwe?" 
Isaiah45:11 Atero Yehova Woyera wa Israele ndi Mlengi wake, Ndifunse Ine za zinthu zimene zilinkudza; za ana anga amuna, ndi za ntchito ya manja anga, ndilamulireni Ine." 
Isaiah45:12 Ine ndalenga dziko lapansi, ndalengamo munthu; Ine, ngakhale manja anga, ndafunyula kumwamba, ndi zonse za m'menemo, ndinazilamulira ndine." 
Isaiah45:13 Ine ndautsa Kirusi m'chilungamo, ndipo ndidzalungamitsa njira zake zonse; iye adzamanga mudzi wanga, nadzaleka andende anga anke mwaufulu, wosati ndi mtengo pena mphotho, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah45:14 Atero Yehova, Ntchito ya Ejipito, ndi malonda a Kusi, ndi a Seba, amuna amsinkhu adzakugonjera, nadzakhala ako; nadzakutsata pambuyo m'maunyolo; adzakugonjera, nadzakugwira; adzakupembedza ndi kunena, Zoona Mulungu ali mwa iwe; ndipo palibenso wina, palibe Mulungu." 
Isaiah45:15 Ndithu Inu ndinu Mulungu, amene mudzibisa nokha, Mulungu wa Israele, Mpulumutsi." 
Isaiah45:16 Iwo adzakhala ndi manyazi, inde, adzathedwa nzeru onsewo; adzalowa m'masokonezo pamodzi, amene apanga mafano." 
Isaiah45:17 Koma Israele adzapulumutsidwa ndi Yehova ndi chipulumutso chosatha; inu simudzakhala ndi manyazi, pena kuthedwa nzeru kunthawi zosatha." 
Isaiah45:18 Pakuti atero Yehova amene analenga kumwamba, Iye ndiye Mulungu amene anaumba dziko lapansi, nalipanga; Iye analikhazikitsa, sanalilenge mwachabe; Iye analiumba akhalemo anthu; Ine ndine Yehova; ndipo palibenso wina." 
Isaiah45:19 Ine sindinanena m'tseri m'malo a dziko la mdima; Ine sindinati kwa mbeu ya Yakobo, Mundifune Ine mwachabe; Ine Yehova ndinena chilungamo, ndinena zimene zili zoona." 
Isaiah45:20 Sonkhanani nokha, mudze; yandikirani chifupi pamodzi, inu amene mwapulumuka amitundu; iwo alibe nzeru, amene anyamula mtengo wa fano lao losema, ndi kupemphera mulungu wosakhoza kupulumutsa." 
Isaiah45:21 Nenani inu, tulutsani mlandu wanu; inde, achite uphungu pamodzi; ndani waonetsa ichi chiyambire nthawi yakale? Ndani wanena ichi kale? Kodi si ndine Yehova? Ndipo palibenso Mulungu wina popanda Ine; Mulungu wolungama, ndi Mpulumutsi; palibenso wina popanda Ine." 
Isaiah45:22 Yang'anani kwa Ine, mupulumutsidwe, inu malekezero onse a dziko; pakuti Ine ndine Mulungu, palibe wina." 
Isaiah45:23 Ndadzilumbira ndekha, mau achokera m'kamwa mwanga m'chilungamo, ndipo sadzabwerera, kuti mabondo onse adzandigwadira Ine, malilime onse nadzalumbira Ine." 
Isaiah45:24 Koma mwa Yehova yekha, wina adzati kwa Ine, muli chilungamo ndi mphamvu; ngakhale kwa Iyeyo anthu adzafika, ndi onse amene anamkwiyira, adzakhala ndi manyazi." 
Isaiah45:25 Mwa Yehova mbeu yonse ya Israele idzalungamitsidwa ndi kudzikuza. 
Isaiah46:1 Beli agwada pansi, Nebo awerama; mafano ao ali pa zoweta, ndi pa ng'ombe; zinthu zimene inu munanyamula ponseponse ziyesedwa mtolo, katundu wakulemetsa nyama." 
Isaiah46:2 Milunguyo iwerama, igwada pansi pamodzi; singapulumutse katundu, koma iyo yeni yalowa m'ndende." 
Isaiah46:3 Mverani Ine, banja la Yakobo, ndi otsala onse a banja la Israele, amene ndakunyamulani kuyambira m'mimba, ndi kukusenzani chibadwire;" 
Isaiah46:4 ngakhale mpaka mudzakalamba Ine ndine, ndipo ngakhale mpaka tsitsi laimvi, Ine ndidzakusenzani inu; ndalenga, ndipo ndidzanyamula; inde, ndidzasenza, ndipo ndidzapulumutsa." 
Isaiah46:5 Kodi mudzandifanizira ndi yani, ndi kundilinganiza ndi kundiyerekeza, kuti ife tifanane?" 
Isaiah46:6 Amene ataya golide, namtulutsa m'thumba, ndi kuyesa siliva ndi muyeso, iwo alemba wosula golide; iye napanga nazo mulungu; iwo agwada pansi, inde alambira." 
Isaiah46:7 Iwo amanyamula mlunguwu paphewa, nausenza, naukhazika m'malo mwake, nukhala chilili; pamalo pakepo sudzasunthika; inde, wina adzaufuulira, koma sungathe kuyankha, kapena kumpulumutsa m'zovuta zake." 
Isaiah46:8 Kumbukirani ichi, nimuchilimike, mudzikumbutsenso, olakwa inu."
