Jeremiah46:2 Za Ejipito: kunena za nkhondo ya Farao Neko mfumu ya Aejipito, imene inali pa mtsinje wa Yufurate m'Karikemisi, imene anaikantha Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni chaka chachinai cha Yehoyakimu mwana wake wa Yosiya, mfumu ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah46:3 Konzani chikopa ndi lihawo, nimuyandikire kunkhondo." 
Jeremiah46:4 Mangani akavalo, bwerani, inu apakavalo, imani ndi zisoti zazitsulo; tuulani nthungo zanu, valani malaya achitsulo." 
Jeremiah46:5 Chifukwa chanji ndachiona? Aopa, abwerera; amphamvu ao agwetsedwa, athawadi, osacheukira m'mbuyo; mantha ali ponseponse, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah46:6 Waliwiro asathawe, wamphamvu asapulumuke; kumpoto pambali pa mtsinje wa Yufurate waphunthwa nagwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ndani uyu amene auka ngati Nailo, madzi ake ogavira monga nyanja?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ejipito auka ngati Nailo, madzi ake agavira ngati nyanja; ndipo ati, Ndidzauka, ndidzamiza dziko lapansi; ndidzaononga mudzi ndi okhalamo ake." 
Jeremiah46:9 Kwerani, inu akavalo; chitani misala, inu magaleta, atuluke amphamvu; Akusi ndi Aputi, ogwira chikopa; ndi Aludi, amene agwira ndi kukoka uta." 
Jeremiah46:10 Pakuti tsikulo ndi la Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, tsiku lakubweza chilango, kuti abwezere chilango adani ake; ndipo lupanga lidzadya, lidzakhuta, nilidzamwetsa mwazi wao; pakuti Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, ali ndi nsembe m'dziko la kumpoto pa mtsinje wa Yufurate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Kwera ku Giliyadi, tenga vunguti, namwali iwe mwana wa Ejipito; wachulukitsa mankhwala chabe; palibe kuchira kwako." 
Jeremiah46:12 Amitundu amva manyazi anu, dziko lapansi ladzala ndi kufuula kwanu; pakuti amphamvu akhumudwitsana, agwa onse awiri pamodzi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Mau amene Yehova ananena kwa Yeremiya mneneri, kuti Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni adzafika adzakantha dziko la Ejipito." 
Jeremiah46:14 Nenani m'Ejipito, lalikirani m'Migidoli, lalikirani m'Nofi ndi Tapanesi; nimuti, Udziimike, nudzikonzere wekha; pakuti lupanga ladya pozungulira pako." 
Jeremiah46:15 Akulimba ako akokoledwa bwanji? Sanaime, chifukwa Yehova anawathamangitsa." 
Jeremiah46:16 Anaphunthwitsa ambiri, inde, anagwa wina pa mnzake, ndipo anati, Ukani, tinkenso kwa anthu athu, kudziko la kubadwa kwathu, kuchokera kulupanga lovutitsa." 
Jeremiah46:17 Ndipo anafuula kumeneko, Farao mfumu ya Aejipito ndiye phokoso lokha; wapititsa nthawi yopangira." 
Jeremiah46:18 Pali Ine, ati Mfumu, dzina lake ndi Yehova wa makamu, ndithu monga Tabori mwa mapiri, monga Karimele pambali pa nyanja, momwemo adzafika." 
Jeremiah46:19 Mwana wamkazi iwe wokhala m'Ejipito, dzikonzere kunka kundende; pakuti Nofi adzakhala bwinja, nadzapsa, mulibenso wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah46:20 Ejipito ndi ng'ombe yaikazi yosalala; chionongeko chituluka kumpoto chafika, chafika." 
Jeremiah46:21 Ndiponso olipidwa ake ali pakati pake onga ngati anaang'ombe a m'khola; pakuti iwonso abwerera, athawa pamodzi, sanaime; pakuti tsiku la tsoka lao linawafikira, ndi nthawi ya kuweruzidwa kwao." 
Jeremiah46:22 Mkokomo wake udzanga wa njoka yothawa; pakuti adzayenda ndi nkhondo, adzafika kumenyana naye ndi nkhwangwa, monga akutema mitengo." 
Jeremiah46:23 Adzatema nkhalango yake, ati Yehova, pokhala yosapitika; pakuti achuluka koposa dzombe, ali osawerengeka." 
Jeremiah46:24 Mwana wake wamkazi wa Ejipito adzachitidwa manyazi, adzaperekedwa m'manja a anthu a kumpoto." 
Jeremiah46:25 Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israele, ati: Taonani, ndidzalanga Amoni wa No, ndi Farao, ndi Ejipito, pamodzi ndi milungu yake, ndi mafumu ake; ngakhale Farao, ndi iwo akumkhulupirira iye;" 
Jeremiah46:26 ndipo ndidzawapereka m'manja a iwo amene afuna moyo wao, ndi m'dzanja la Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni, ndi m'manja a atumiki ake; pambuyo pake adzakhalamo anthu, monga masiku akale, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah46:27 Koma usaope iwe, mtumiki wanga Yakobo, usachite mantha, iwe Israele: pakuti, taona, ndidzakupulumutsa iwe kuchokera kutali, ndi mbeu yako kudziko la undende wao, ndipo Yakobo adzabwera, nadzapumula m'mtendere, ndipo palibe amene adzamuopetsa iye." 
Jeremiah46:28 Usaope, iwe Yakobo mtumiki wanga, ati Yehova; pakuti Ine ndili ndi iwe; pakuti Ine ndidzathetsa mitundu yonse kumene ndinakuingitsirako iwe, koma sindidzakuthetsa iwe; koma ndidzakulangiza ndi chiweruziro, ndipo sindidzakusiya konse wosalangidwa." 
Jeremiah47:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Yeremiya mneneri onena za Afilisti, Farao asanakanthe Gaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Yehova atero: Taonani, madzi adzakwera kutuluka kumpoto, nadzakhala mtsinje wosefuka, nadzasefukira padziko ndi pa zonse zili m'mwemo, pamudzi ndi pa onse okhalamo; ndipo amuna adzalira, ndi onse okhala m'dziko adzakuwa." 
Jeremiah47:3 Pomveka migugu ya ziboda za olimba ake, pogumukira magaleta ake, ndi pophokosera njinga zake, atate sadzacheukira ana ao chifukwa cha kulefuka kwa manja ao;" 
Jeremiah47:4 chifukwa cha tsiku lakudzafunkha Afilisti onse, kuphera Tiro ndi Sidoni othangata onse akutsala; pakuti Yehova adzafunkha Afilisti, otsala a chisumbu cha Kafitori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Dazi lafikira a Gaza; Asikeloni wathedwa, otsala m'chidikha chao; udzadzicheka masiku angati?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Iwe lupanga la Yehova, atsala masiku angati osakhala chete iwe? Dzilonge wekha m'chimake; puma, nukhale chete." 
Jeremiah47:7 Udzakhala chete bwanji, popeza Yehova anakulangiza? Za Asikeloni, ndi za m'mphepete mwa nyanja, pamenepo analiika." 
Jeremiah48:1 Za Mowabu. Atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israele: Tsoka Nebo! Pakuti wapasuka; Kiriyataimu wachitidwa manyazi, wagwidwa; linga la pamtunda lachitidwa manyazi lapasudwa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Palibenso kutamanda Mowabu; m'Hesiboni anamlingiririra zoipa, ndi kuti, Tiyeni, tiwathe asakhalenso mtundu wa anthu. Iwenso, Madimeni, udzatontholetsedwa, lupanga lidzakulondola iwe." 
Jeremiah48:3 Mau amveka kuchokera ku Horonaimu, kufunkha ndi kuononga kwakukulu!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Mowabu waonongedwa; ang'ono ake amveketsa kulira. 
Jeremiah48:5 Pakuti adzakwera pa chikweza cha Luhiti ndi kulira kosaleka; pakuti pa chitsiko cha Horonaimu amva kulira kowawa kwa chionongeko. 
Jeremiah48:6 Thawani, pulumutsani miyoyo yanu, mukhale amaliseche m'chipululu." 
Jeremiah48:7 Pakuti, chifukwa wakhulupirira ntchito zanu ndi chuma chanu, iwenso udzagwidwa; ndipo Kemosi adza kundende, ansembe ake ndi akulu ake pamodzi." 
Jeremiah48:8 Ndipo wakufunkha adzafikira pa midzi yonse, sudzapulumuka mudzi uliwonse; chigwa chomwe chidzasakazidwa, ndipo chidikha chidzaonongedwa; monga wanena Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:9 Patsani Mowabu mapiko, kuti athawe apulumuke; midzi yake ikhale bwinja, lopanda wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah48:10 Atembereredwe iye amene agwira ntchito ya Yehova monyenga, atembereredwe iye amene abweza lupanga lake kumwazi." 
Jeremiah48:11 Mowabu wakhala m'mtendere kuyambira ubwana wake, wakhala pansenga, osatetekulidwa, sananke kundende; chifukwa chake makoleredwe ake alimobe mwa iye, fungo lake silinasinthika." 
Jeremiah48:12 Chifukwa chake, taonani, masiku adza, ati Yehova, amene ndidzatuma kwa iye otsanula, amene adzamtsanula iye; adzataya za mbiya zake, nadzaswa zipanda zao." 
Jeremiah48:13 Ndipo Mowabu adzachita manyazi chifukwa cha Kemosi, monga nyumba ya Israele inachita manyazi chifukwa cha Betele amene anamkhulupirira." 
Jeremiah48:14 Muti bwanji, Tili amphamvu, olimba mtima ankhondo?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Mowabu wapasuka, akwera kulowa m'midzi yake, ndi anyamata ake osankhika atsikira kukaphedwa, ati Mfumu, dzina lake ndiye Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah48:16 Tsoka la Mowabu layandikira kudza, nsautso yake ifulumiratu." 
Jeremiah48:17 Inu nonse akumzungulira, mumchitire iye chisoni, inu nonse akudziwa dzina lake; muti, Chibonga cholimba chathyokatu, ndodo yokoma!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Iwe mwana wamkazi wokhala m'Diboni, utsike pa ulemerero wako, nukhale ndi ludzu; pakuti wakufunkha Mowabu wakukwerera, iwe waononga malinga ako." 
Jeremiah48:19 Iwe wokhala m'Aroere, ima panjira, nusuzumire umfunse iye amene athawa, ndi mkazi amene apulumuka; nuti, Chachitidwa chiyani?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Mowabu wachitidwa manyazi, pakuti wathyoka; kuwa nulire, nunene m'Arinoni, kuti Mowabu wapasuka." 
Jeremiah48:21 Chiweruzo chafika pa dziko lachidikha; pa Holoni, ndi pa Yahazi, ndi pa Mefaati;" 
Jeremiah48:22 ndi pa Diboni, ndi pa Nebo, ndi pa Betedibilataimu;" 
Jeremiah48:23 ndi pa Kiriyataimu, ndi pa Betegamuli, ndi pa Betemeoni;" 
Jeremiah48:24 ndi pa Keriyoti, ndi pa Bozira, ndi pa midzi yonse ya dziko la Mowabu, yakutali kapena yakufupi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Nyanga ya Mowabu yaduka, ndipo wathyoka mkono wake, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:26 Umledzeretse iye; pakuti anadzikuza pokana Yehova; Mowabu yemwe adzavimvinika m'kusanza kwake, ndipo iye adzasekedwanso." 
Jeremiah48:27 Kodi sunaseka Israele? Kodi iye anapezedwa mwa mbala? Pakuti nthawi zonse unena za iye, upukusa mutu." 
Jeremiah48:28 Inu okhala m'Mowabu, siyani midzi, khalani m'thanthwe; nimukhale monga njiwa imene isanja chisanja chake pambali pakamwa pa dzenje." 
Jeremiah48:29 Ife tamva kudzikuza kwa Mowabu, wadzikuza ndithu, kunyang'wa kwake, ndi kunyada kwake, ndi kudzitama kwake, ndi kudzikuza kwa mtima wake." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ine ndidziwa mkwiyo wake, ati Yehova, kuti uli chabe; zonyenga zake sizinachita kanthu." 
Jeremiah48:31 Chifukwa chake ndidzakuwira Mowabu; inde, ndidzafuulira Mowabu yense, adzalirira anthu a ku Kiriheresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Iwe mpesa wa Sibima; ndidzakulirira iwe ndi kulira kopambana kulira kwa Yazere, nthambi zako zinapitirira nyanja, zinafikira kunyanja ya Yazere; wakufunkha wagwera zipatso zako za mpakasa ndi mphesa zako." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ndipo kusekera ndi kukondwa kwachotsedwa, kumunda wobala ndi kudziko la Mowabu; ndipo ndaletsa vinyo pa zoponderamo; sadzaponda ndi kufuula; kufuula sikudzakhala kufuula." 
Jeremiah48:34 Kuyambira kufuula kwa Hesiboni mpaka ku Eleyale, mpaka ku Yahazi anakweza mau, kuyambira pa Zowari mpaka ku Horonaimu, ku Egilati-Selisiya; pakuti pa madzi a ku Nimurimu komwe padzakhala mabwinja." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ndiponso ndidzaletsa m'Mowabu, ati Yehova, iye amene apereka nsembe pamsanje, ndi iye amene afukizira milungu yake." 
Jeremiah48:36 Chifukwa chake mtima wanga umlirira Mowabu monga zitoliro, ndipo mtima wanga uwalirira anthu a Kiriheresi monga zitoliro, chifukwa chake zakuchuluka zake adadzionera zatayika." 
Jeremiah48:37 Pakuti mitu yonse ili yadazi, ndipo ndevu zili zosengedwa; pa manja onse pali pochekedwachekedwa, ndi pachiuno chiguduli." 
Jeremiah48:38 Pamwamba pa machindwi a Mowabu ndi m'miseu mwake muli kulira monsemonse; pakuti ndaswa Mowabu monga mbiya m'mene mulibe chikondwero, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:39 Yasweka bwanji! Akuwa bwanji Mowabu! Wapotoloka bwanji ndi manyazi! Chomwecho Mowabu adzakhala choseketsa ndi choopsera onse omzungilira iye. 
Jeremiah48:40 Pakuti Yehova atero: Taonani, adzauluka ngati chiombankhanga, adzamtambasulira Mowabu mapiko ake." 
Jeremiah48:41 Keriyoti walandidwa, ndi malinga agwidwa, ndipo tsiku lomwelo mtima wa anthu amphamvu a Mowabu adzakhala ngati mtima wa mkazi alinkudwala." 
Jeremiah48:42 Ndipo Mowabu adzaonongeka asakhalenso mtundu wa anthu, chifukwa anadzikuzira yekha pa Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:43 Mantha, ndi dzenje, ndi khwekhwe, zili pa iwe, wokhala m'Mowabu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ndipo iye wakuthawa chifukwa cha mantha adzagwa m'dzenje; ndi iye amene atuluka m'dzenje adzagwidwa m'khwekhwe; pakuti ndidzatengera pa iye, pa Mowabu, chaka cha kulangidwa kwao, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:45 Iwo amene anathawa aima opanda mphamvu pansi pamthunzi wa Hesiboni; pakuti moto watuluka m'Hesiboni, ndi malawi a moto m'kati mwa Sihoni, nadya ngodya ya Mowabu, ndi pakati pamtu pa ana a phokoso." 
Jeremiah48:46 Tsoka iwe, Mowabu! Anthu a Kemosi athedwa; pakuti ana ako amuna atengedwa ndende, ndi ana ako akazi atengedwa ndende." 
Jeremiah48:47 Koma ndidzabwezanso undende wa Mowabu masiku akumaliza, ati Yehova. Ziweruzo za Mowabu ndi zomwezi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Za ana a Amoni. Yehova atero: Kodi Israele alibe ana amuna? Alibe wolowa dzina? M'mwemo mfumu yao yalowa pa Gadi chifukwa chanji, ndi anthu ake akhala m'midzi mwake?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Chifukwa chake, taonani, masiku afika, ati Yehova, Ine ndidzamveketsa mfuu ya nkhondo yomenyana ndi Raba wa ana a Amoni; ndipo adzasanduka muunda wabwinja, ndipo ana ake akazi adzatenthedwa ndi moto; pamenepo Israele adzalanda iwo amene adamlanda, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:3 Kuwa, iwe Hesiboni, pakuti Ai wapasuka; lirani, inu ana akazi a Raba, muvale chiguduli; chitani maliro, thamangani kwina ndi kwina pamipanda; pakuti mfumu yao idzalowa m'ndende, ansembe ake ndi akulu ake pamodzi." 
Jeremiah49:4 Chifukwa chanji udzitamandira ndi zigwa, chigwa chako choyendamo madzi, iwe mwana wamkazi wobwerera m'mbuyo, amene anakhulupirira chuma chake, nati, Adza kwa ine ndani?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Taona ndidzakutengera mantha, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, akuchokera kwa onse amene akuzungulira iwe; ndipo mudzaingitsidwa yense kulozera maso ake, ndipo palibe amene adzasonkhanitsa osochera." 
Jeremiah49:6 Koma pambuyo pake ndidzabwezanso undende wa ana a Amoni, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:7 Za Edomu. Yehova wa makamu atero: Kodi m'Temani mulibenso nzeru? Kodi uphungu wawathera akuchenjera? Kodi nseru zao zatha psiti? 
Jeremiah49:8 Thawani inu, bwerani, khalani mwakuya, inu okhala m'Dedani; pakuti ndidzatengera pa iye tsoka la Esau, nthawi yoti ndidzamlanga iye." 
Jeremiah49:9 Akafika kwa inu akutchera mphesa, sadzasiya mphesa zokunkha? Akafika usiku akuba, adzaononga mpaka kutha?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Pakuti ndamvula Esau, ndamvundukula, sadzatha kubisala; mbeu zake zaonongeka, ndi abale ake, ndi anansi ake, ndipo palibe iye." 
Jeremiah49:11 Siya ana ako amasiye, Ine ndidzawasunga; akazi ako amasiye andikhulupirire Ine." 
Jeremiah49:12 Pakuti Yehova atero: Taonani, iwo amene sanaweruzidwe kuti amwe chikho adzamwadi; kodi iwe ndiye amene adzakhala wosalangidwa konse? Sudzakhala wosalangidwa, koma udzamwadi." 
Jeremiah49:13 Pakuti ndalumbira, Pali Ine ati Yehova, kuti Bozira adzakhala chizizwitso, chitonzo, chopasuka, ndi chitemberero; ndipo midzi yake yonse idzakhala yopasuka chipasukire." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndamva mthenga wa kwa Yehova, ndipo mthenga watumidwa mwa amitundu, wakuti, Sonkhanani, mumdzere, nimuukire nkhondo." 
Jeremiah49:15 Pakuti, taona, ndakuyesa iwe wamng'ono mwa amitundu, ndi wonyozedwa mwa anthu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Koma za kuopsa kwako, kunyada kwa mtima wako kunakunyenga iwe, wokhala m'mapanga a thanthwe, woumirira msanje wa chitunda, ngakhale usanja chisanja chako pamwamba penipeni ngati chiombankhanga, ndidzakutsitsa iwe kumeneko, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:17 Ndipo Edomu adzakhala chizizwitso; ndipo yense wakupitapo adzazizwa, ndipo adzatsonyera zovuta zake zonse." 
Jeremiah49:18 Monga m'kupasuka kwa Sodomu ndi Gomora ndi midzi inzake, ati Yehova, munthu aliyense sadzakhala m'menemo, mwana wa munthu aliyense sadzagona m'menemo." 
Jeremiah49:19 Taona, wina adzakwerera mudzi wolimba ngati mkango wochokera ku Yordani wosefuka; koma dzidzidzi ndidzamthamangitsa amchokere; ndipo aliyense amene asankhidwa, ndidzamuika woyang'anira wake, pakuti wakunga Ine ndani? Adzandiikira nthawi ndani? Ndipo mbusa adzaima pamaso panga ndani?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Chifukwa chake tamvani uphungu wa Yehova, umene waupangira pa Edomu; ndi zimene walingalirira okhala m'Temani, ndithu adzawakoka, ana ang'ono a zoweta; ndithu adzayesa busa lao bwinja pamodzi nao." 
Jeremiah49:21 Dziko lapansi linthunthumira ndi phokoso la kugwa kwao; pali mfuu, phokoso lake limveka pa Nyanja Yofiira." 
Jeremiah49:22 Taonani, adzafika nadzauluka ngati chiombankhanga, adzatambasulira Bozira mapiko ake, ndipo tsiku lomwemo mtima wa anthu amphamvu a Edomu adzakhala ngati mtima wa mkazi alinkudwala." 
Jeremiah49:23 Za Damasiko. Hamati ndi Aripadi ali ndi manyazi, chifukwa anamva malodza, asungunuka kunyanja, adera nkhawa osatha kukhala chete." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasiko walefuka, atembenukira kuti athawe, kunthunthumira kwamgwira; zovuta ndi kulira zamgwira iye, ngati mkazi alimkudwala." 
Jeremiah49:25 Alekeranji kusiya mudzi wa chilemekezo, mudzi wa chikondwero changa?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Chifukwa chake anyamata ake adzagwa m'miseu yake, ndipo anthu onse a nkhondo adzatontholetsedwa tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ndipo Ine ndidzayatsa moto m'khoma la Damasiko, udzathetsa zinyumba za Benihadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Za Kedara, ndi za maufumu a Hazori, amene anawakantha Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni. Yehova atero: Ukani, kwerani ku Kedara, funkhani ana a ku m'mawa." 
Jeremiah49:29 Mahema ao ndi zoweta zao adzazilanda, adzadzitengera nsalu zochingira zao, ndi katundu wao yense, ndi ngamira zao; ndipo adzafuulira iwo, Mantha ponseponse." 
Jeremiah49:30 Thawani inu, yendani kutali, khalani mwakuya, Inu okhala m'Hazori, ati Yehova; pakuti Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni anapangira uphungu pa inu, nakulingalirirani." 
Jeremiah49:31 Nyamukani, kwererani mtundu wokhala ndi mtendere, wokhala osadera nkhawa, ati Yehova, amene alibe zitseko ndi mapiringidzo, okhala pa okha." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ndipo ngamira zao zidzakhala zofunkha, ndi unyinji wa ng'ombe zao udzakhala wolanda; ndipo ndidzabalalitsira kumphepo zonse iwo amene ameta m'mbali mwa tsitsi lao; ndipo ndidzatenga tsoka lao kumbali zao zonse, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:33 Ndipo Hazori adzakhala mokhalamo ankhandwe, bwinja lachikhalire; simudzakhalamo munthu, simudzagonamo mwana wa munthu." 
Jeremiah49:34 Mau a Yehova amene anafika kwa Yeremiya mneneri, onena za Elamu poyamba kulamulira Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda, kuti," 
Jeremiah49:35 Yehova wa makamu atero: Taonani, ndidzathyola uta wa Elamu, ndiwo mtima wa mphamvu yao." 
Jeremiah49:36 Pa Elamu ndidzatengera mphepo zinai kumbali zinai za mlengalenga, ndidzamwaza iwo kumphepo zonsezo; ndipo sikudzakhala mtundu kumene opirikitsidwa a Elamu sadzafikako." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndipo ndidzachititsa Elamu mantha pamaso pa amaliwongo ao, ndi pamaso pa iwo ofuna moyo wao; ndipo ndidzatengera choipa pa iwo, mkwiyo wanga waukali, ati Yehova; ndipo ndidzatumiza lupanga liwalondole, mpaka nditawatha;" 
Jeremiah49:38 ndipo ndidzaika mpando wachifumu wanga m'Elamu, ndipo ndidzaononga pamenepo mfumu ndi akulu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:39 Koma padzaoneka masiku akutsiriza, kuti ndidzabwezanso undende wa Elamu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:1 Mau amene ananena Yehova za Babiloni, za dziko la Ababiloni, mwa Yeremiya mneneri." 
Jeremiah50:2 Lalikirani mwa amitundu, falikitsani, kwezani mbendera; falikitsani, musabise; munene, Babiloni wagwidwa, Beli wachitidwa manyazi, Merodaki wathyokathyoka, zosema zake zachitidwa manyazi, mafano ake athyokathyoka." 
Jeremiah50:3 Pakuti mtundu wa anthu udzatuluka kumpoto kudzamenyana naye, udzachititsa dziko lake bwinja, losakhalamo anthu; athawa, apita, anthu ndi nyama." 
Jeremiah50:4 Masiku omwewo, nthawi yomweyo, ati Yehova, ana a Israele adzadza, iwo ndi ana a Yuda; pamodzi adzayenda m'njira mwao alinkulira, nadzafuna Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Jeremiah50:5 Adzafunsira Ziyoni nkhope zao zilikuyang'ana kumeneko, ndi kuti, Tiyeni inu, dzilumikizeni kwa Yehova m'chipangano cha muyaya chimene sichidzaiwalika." 
Jeremiah50:6 Anthu anga anakhala nkhosa zotayika; abusa ao anazisokeretsa pa mapiri onyenga; achoka kuphiri kunka kuchitunda; aiwala malo ao akupuma. 
Jeremiah50:7 Onse amene anazipeza anazidya; adani ao anati, Sitipalamula mlandu, chifukwa iwo anachimwira Yehova, ndiye mokhalamo zolungama, Yehova, chiyembekezo cha atate ao." 
Jeremiah50:8 Thawani pakati pa Babiloni, tulukani m'dziko la Ababiloni, mukhale monga atonde patsogolo pa zoweta." 
Jeremiah50:9 Pakuti, taonani, ndidzabukitsa ndidzafikitsa kudzamenyana ndi Babiloni msonkhano wa mitundu yaikulu kuchokera kudziko la kumpoto; ndipo adzaguba pomenyana ndi iye; kumeneko Babiloni adzachotsedwa; mivi yao idzakhala ngati ya munthu wamaluli wamphamvu; yosabwera chabe." 
Jeremiah50:10 Ndipo Kasidi adzakhala chofunkha; onse amene amfunkhitsa iye adzakhuta, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:11 Chifukwa mukondwa, chifukwa musekerera, inu amene mulanda cholowa changa, chifukwa muli onenepa monga ng'ombe yaikazi yoponda tirigu, ndi kulira ngati akavalo olimba;" 
Jeremiah50:12 amai anu adzakhala ndi manyazi ambiri; amene anakubalani adzathedwa nzeru; taonani, adzakhala wapambuyo wa amitundu, chipululu, dziko louma, bwinja." 
Jeremiah50:13 Chifukwa cha mkwiyo wa Yehova sadzakhalamo anthu, koma padzakhala bwinja; onse akupita pa Babiloni adzadabwa, adzatsonyera pa zovuta zake zonse." 
Jeremiah50:14 Gubani ndi kuzungulira Babiloni kumenyana naye, inu nonse okoka uta; mumponyere iye, osaderera mivi; pakuti wachimwira Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:15 Mumfuulire iye pomzungulira iye; pakuti wagwira mwendo; malinga ake agwa; makoma ake agwetsedwa; pakuti ndi kubwezera chilango kwa Yehova; mumbwezere chilango; monga iye wachita mumchitire iye momwemo. 
Jeremiah50:16 Muwathe ofesa ku Babiloni, ndi iwo amene agwira chisenga nyengo ya masika; chifukwa cha lupanga losautsa adzatembenukira yense kwa anthu ake, nadzathawira yense ku dziko lake." 
Jeremiah50:17 Israele ndiye nkhosa yolowerera, mikango yampirikitsa, poyamba inamudya mfumu ya Asiriya; ndipo pomaliza Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni wathyola mafupa ake." 
Jeremiah50:18 Chifukwa chake atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israele: Taonani, ndidzalanga mfumu ya ku Babiloni ndi dziko lake, monga ndinalanga mfumu ya Asiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndipo ndidzabwezeranso Israele kubusa lake, ndipo adzadya pa Karimele ndi pa Basani, moyo wake nudzakhuta pa mapiri a Efuremu ndi m'Giliyadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Masiku omwewo, nthawi yomweyo, ati Yehova, zoipa za Israele zidzafunidwa, koma zidzasoweka; ndi zochimwa za Yuda, koma sizidzapezeka; pakuti ndidzakhululukira iwo amene ndidzawasiya ngati chotsala." 
Jeremiah50:21 Kwera kukamenyana ndi dziko la Merataimu, ndi okhala m'Pekodi, ipha nuononge konse pambuyo pao, ati Yehova, chita monga mwa zonse ndinakuuza iwe." 
Jeremiah50:22 Phokoso la nkhondo lili m'dziko lino, ndi lakuononga kwakukulu." 
Jeremiah50:23 Nyundo ya dziko lonse yaduka ndi kuthyoka! Babiloni wasanduka bwinja pakati pa amitundu! 
Jeremiah50:24 Ndakutchera iwe msampha, ndi iwenso wagwidwa, iwe Babiloni, ndipo sunadziwa, wapezeka, ndiponso wagwidwa, chifukwa walimbana ndi Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:25 Yehova watsegula pa nyumba ya zida zake, ndipo watulutsa zida za mkwiyo wake; pakuti Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, ali ndi ntchito m'dziko la Ababiloni." 
Jeremiah50:26 Tadzani kudzamenyana ndi iye kuchokera ku malekezero ake, tsegulani pa nkhokwe zake; unjikani zake monga miyulu, mumuononge konse; pasatsale kanthu ka pa iye." 
Jeremiah50:27 Iphani ng'ombe zamphongo zake zonse; zitsikire kukaphedwa; tsoka iwo! Pakuti tsiku lao lafika, tsiku la kulanga kwao." 
Jeremiah50:28 Mau a iwo akuthawa akupulumuka m'dziko la Babiloni, kuti alalikire m'Ziyoni kubwezera chilango kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu, kubwezera chilango chifukwa cha Kachisi wake." 
Jeremiah50:29 Memezani amauta amenyane ndi Babiloni, onse amene akoka uta; mummangire iye zithando pomzungulira iye, asapulumuke mmodzi wake yense; mumbwezere iye monga mwa ntchito yake; monga mwa zonse wazichita, mumchitire iye; pakuti anamnyadira Yehova, Woyera wa Israele." 
Jeremiah50:30 Chifukwa chake anyamata ake adzagwa m'miseu yake, ndi anthu ankhondo ake onse adzatontholetsedwa tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:31 Taonani, nditsutsana nawe, wonyada iwe, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu; pakuti tsiku lako lafika, nthawi imene ndidzakulanga iwe." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ndipo wonyadayo adzakhumudwa nadzagwa, ndipo palibe amene adzamuutsa iye; ndipo Ine ndidzayatsa moto m'midzi yake, ndipo udzatentha onse akumzungulira iye." 
Jeremiah50:33 Yehova wa makamu atero. Ana a Israele ndi ana a Yuda asautsidwa pamodzi; ndipo onse amene anawagwira ndende awagwiritsitsa; akana kuwamasula. 
Jeremiah50:34 Mombolo wao ngwa mphamvu; dzina lake Yehova wa makamu: adzawanenera mlandu wao ndithu; kuti apumutse dziko lapansi, nadzidzimutse okhala m'Babiloni." 
Jeremiah50:35 Lupanga lili pa Ababiloni, ati Yehova, pa okhala m'Babiloni, pa akulu ake, ndi pa anzeru ake." 
Jeremiah50:36 Lupanga lili pa amatukutuku, ndipo adzapusa; lupanga lili pa anthu olimba ake, ndipo adzaopa." 
Jeremiah50:37 Lupanga lili pa akavalo ao, ndi pa magaleta ao, ndi pa anthu onse osanganizidwa amene ali pakati pake, ndipo adzakhala ngati akazi; lupanga lili pa chuma chake, ndipo chidzalandidwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Chilala chili pa madzi ake, ndipo adzaphwa; pakuti ndi dziko la mafano osema, ndipo ayaluka ndi kufuna zoopsa." 
Jeremiah50:39 Chifukwa chake zilombo za kuchipululu ndi mimbulu zidzakhalamo, ndi nthiwatiwa zidzakhala m'menemo; ndipo sadzakhalamo anthu konse; ndipo sadzakhalamo m'mibadwomibadwo." 
Jeremiah50:40 Monga muja Yehova anagwetsa Sodomu ndi Gomora ndi midzi inzake, ati Yehova; anthu sadzakhalamo, mwana wa munthu sadzagonamo." 
Jeremiah50:41 Taonani, anthu achokera kumpoto; ndiwo mtundu waukulu, ndipo maufumu ambiri adzaukitsidwa kuchokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Jeremiah50:42 Agwira uta ndi nthungo; ali ankharwe, alibe chifundo; mau ao apokosera ngati nyanja, ndipo akwera akavalo, yense aguba monga munthu wa kunkhondo, kukamenyana ndi iwe, mwana wamkazi wa Babiloni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Mfumu ya ku Babiloni yamva mbiri yao, ndipo manja ake alefuka; wagwidwa ndi nkhawa, ndi zowawa zonga za mkazi alimkudwala." 
Jeremiah50:44 Taonani, mtundu uja adzakwerera mudzi wolimba ngati mkango wochokera ku Yordani wosefuka; koma dzidzidzi ndidzauthamangitsa umchokere, ndipo aliyense amene asankhidwa, ndidzamuika woyang'anira wake; pakuti wakunga Ine ndani? Adzandiikira nthawi ndani? Ndipo mbusa adzaima pamaso panga ndani?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Chifukwa chake tamvani uphungu wa Yehova, umene waupangira pa Babiloni; ndi zimene walingirira dziko la Ababiloni; ndithu adzawakoka, ana ang'ono a zoweta; ndithu adzayesa busa lao bwinja pamodzi nao." 
Jeremiah50:46 Dziko lapansi linthunthumira, pa phokoso la kugwidwa kwa Babiloni, ndipo mfuu wamveka mwa amitundu." 
Jeremiah51:1 Yehova atero: Taonani, ndidzaukitsira Babiloni, ndi iwo okhala m'Lebi-kamai, mphepo yoononga." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndipo ndidzatuma ku Babiloni alendo, amene adzampeta iye, amene adzataya zonse m'dziko lake, pakuti tsiku la chisauko adzamenyana ndi iye pomzungulira pake." 
Jeremiah51:3 Wauta asakoke uta wake, asadzikweze m'malaya ake achitsulo; musasiye anyamata ake; muononge ndithu khamu lake lonse." 
Jeremiah51:4 Ndipo adzagwa ophedwa m'dziko la Ababiloni, opyozedwa m'miseu yake." 
Jeremiah51:5 Pakuti Israele ndi Yuda sasiyidwa ndi Mulungu wao, ndiye Yehova wa makamu: ngakhale dziko lao ladzala ndi uchimo kuchimwira Woyera wa Israele." 
Jeremiah51:6 Thawani pakati pa Babiloni, yense apulumuke moyo wake; musathedwe m'choipa chake; pakuti ndi nthawi ya kubwezera chilango; Yehova adzambwezera iye mphotho yake." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni wakhala chikho chagolide m'dzanja la Yehova, amene analedzeretsa dziko lonse lapansi; amitundu amwa vinyo wake; chifukwa chake amitundu ali ndi misala." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babiloni wagwa dzidzidzi naonongedwa; mumkuwire iye; mutengere zowawa zake vunguti, kapena angachire." 
Jeremiah51:9 Tikadachiritsa Babiloni koma sanachire; mumsiye iye, tipite tonse yense kudziko lake; pakuti chiweruziro chake chifikira kumwamba, chinyamulidwa mpaka kuthambo." 
Jeremiah51:10 Yehova watulutsa chilungamo chathu; tiyeni tilalikire m'Ziyoni ntchito ya Yehova Mulungu wathu. 
Jeremiah51:11 Nolani mivi; gwirani zolimba zikopa; Yehova waukitsa mtima wa mafumu a Amedi; chifukwa alingalirira Babiloni kuti amuononge; pakuti ndi kubwezera chilango kwa Yehova; kubwezera chilango chifukwa cha Kachisi wake. 
Jeremiah51:12 Muwakwezere mbendera makoma a Babiloni, mulimbikitse ulonda, muike alonda, mupangiretu olalira, pakuti Yehova waganiziratu ndi kuchita chomwe ananena za okhala m'Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Iwe wokhala pa madzi ambiri, wochuluka chuma, chimaliziro chako chafika, chilekezero cha kusirira kwako." 
Jeremiah51:14 Yehova wa makamu walumbira pa Iye mwini, kuti, Ndithu ndidzakudzaza iwe ndi anthu, monga ndi madzombe; ndipo adzakukwezera iwe mfuu." 
Jeremiah51:15 Iye analenga dziko lapansi ndi mphamvu yake, wakhazika dziko lapansi ndi nzeru yake, ndi luso anayala thambo;" 
Jeremiah51:16 pamene Iye anena mau, pali unyinji wa madzi m'mwamba, ndipo akweretsa nkhungu ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, ayesa mphezi ya mvula, atulutsa mphepo ya m'nyumba za chuma zake." 
Jeremiah51:17 Anthu onse ali opulukira ndi opanda nzeru; wakusula golide achitidwa manyazi ndi fanizo lake losema; pakuti fanizo lake loyenga lili bodza, mulibe mpweya m'menemo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Ngwachabe, chiphamaso; nthawi ya kulangidwa kwao adzatayika." 
Jeremiah51:19 Gawo la Yakobo silifanafana ndi izo; pakuti Iye ndiye analenga zonse; Israele ndi mtundu wa cholowa chake, dzina lake ndi Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah51:20 Iwe ndiwe chibonga changa ndi zida zanga za nkhondo; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola amitundu, ndi iwe ndidzaononga maufumu;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola kavalo ndi wokwera wake; 
Jeremiah51:22 ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola galeta ndi iye wokweramo; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola mwamuna ndi mkazi; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola wokalamba ndi mnyamata; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola mnyamata ndi namwali; 
Jeremiah51:23 ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola mbusa ndi zoweta zake; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola wakulima ndi goli la ng'ombe lake; ndi iwe ndidzathyolathyola akazembe ndi ziwanga. 
Jeremiah51:24 Ndipo ndidzabwezera Babiloni ndi okhala m'Kasidi zoipa zao zonse anazichita m'Ziyoni pamaso panu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:25 Taona, ndimenyana ndi iwe, iwe phiri lakuononga, ati Yehova, limene liononga dziko lonse; ndipo ndidzakutambasulira iwe dzanja langa, ndipo ndidzakugubuduza iwe kumatanthwe, ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe phiri lotenthedwa." 
Jeremiah51:26 Ndipo sadzachotsa pa iwe mwala wa pangodya, kapena mwala wa pamaziko; koma udzakhala bwinja nthawi zonse, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:27 Kwezani mbendera m'dziko, ombani lipenga mwa amitundu, konzerani amitundu amenyane naye, mummemezere maufumu a Ararati, Mini, ndi Asikenazi; muike nduna; amenyane naye; mukweretse akavalo ngati dzombe." 
Jeremiah51:28 Konzerani amitundu amenyane ndi iye, mafumu a Amedi, akazembe ake, ndi ziwanga zake zonse, ndi dziko lonse la ufumu wake." 
Jeremiah51:29 Dziko linthunthumira ndi kuphwetekedwa, pakuti zimene Yehova analingalirira Babiloni zilipobe, zoti ayese dziko la Babiloni bwinja lopanda wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah51:30 Olimba a ku Babiloni akana kumenyana, akhala m'malinga ao; mphamvu yao yalephera; akhala ngati akazi; nyumba zake zapsa ndi moto; akapichi ake athyoka." 
Jeremiah51:31 Wamtokoma mmodzi adzathamanga kukakomana ndi mnzake, ndi mthenga mmodzi kukomana ndi mnzake, kukauza mfumu ya ku Babiloni kuti mudzi wake wagwidwa ponsepo;" 
Jeremiah51:32 pamadooko patsekedwa, pamatamanda a mabango patenthedwa ndi moto, ndi anthu a nkhondo aopa." 
Jeremiah51:33 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israele: Mwana wamkazi wa Babiloni akunga dwale pamene aliunda; patsala kanthawi kakang'ono, ndipo nthawi yamasika idzamfikira iye." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni wandidya ine, wandiphwanya ine, wandiyesa ine ngati mbiya yopanda kanthu, wandimeza ngati ng'ona, wadzaza m'kamwa mwake ndi zotsekemera zanga, wanditaya ine." 
Jeremiah51:35 Wokhala m'Ziyoni adzati, Chiwawa anandichitira ine ndi thupi langa chikhale pa Babiloni; nadzati Yerusalemu, Mwazi wanga ukhale pa okhala m'Kasidi." 
Jeremiah51:36 Chifukwa chake Yehova atero: Taona, ndidzanenera iwe mlandu wako, ndidzawabwezera chilango chifukwa cha iwe; ndidzaphwetsa nyanja yake, ndidzaphwetsa chitsime chake." 
Jeremiah51:37 Ndipo Babiloni adzasanduka miunda, mokhala ankhandwe, chizizwitso, chotsonyetsa, wopanda okhalamo." 
Jeremiah51:38 Adzabangula pamodzi ngati misona ya mikango; adzachita nthulu ngati ana a mikango. 
Jeremiah51:39 Pamene atentha, ndidzakonza madyerero ao, ndidzawaledzeretsa, kuti asangalale, agone chigonere, asanyamuke, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndidzawagwetsa kuti aphedwe monga anaankhosa amphongo, ndi atonde." 
Jeremiah51:41 Sesaki wagwidwatu! Chimene dziko lonse lapansi linachitamanda chalandidwa dzidzidzi! Babiloni wakhalatu bwinja pakati pa amitundu! 
Jeremiah51:42 Nyanja yakwera kufikira ku Babiloni; wamira ndi mafunde ake aunyinji. 
Jeremiah51:43 Midzi yake yakhala bwinja, dziko louma, chipululu mosakhalamo anthu, mosapita mwana wa munthu aliyense." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndipo Ine ndiweruza Beli m'Babiloni, ndipo ndidzatulutsa m'kamwa mwake chomwe wachimeza; ndipo amitundu sadzasonkhaniranso konse kwa iye; inde, khoma la Babiloni lidzagwa." 
Jeremiah51:45 Anthu anga, tulukani pakati pake, mudzipulumutse munthu yense ku mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:46 Mtima wanu usalefuke, musaope chifukwa cha mbiri imene idzamveka m'dzikomu; pakuti mbiri idzafika chaka china, pambuyo pake chaka china mbiri ina, ndi chiwawa m'dziko, wolamulira kumenyana ndi wolamulira." 
Jeremiah51:47 Chifukwa chake, taonani, masiku alinkudza, amene ndidzaweruza mafano osemasema a Babiloni, ndipo dziko lake lonse lidzakhala ndi manyazi; ndipo ophedwa ake onse adzagwa pakati pake." 
Jeremiah51:48 Pamenepo kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, ndi zonse zili m'menemo, zidzaimba mokondwerera Babiloni; pakuti akufunkha adzafika kwa iye kuchokera kumpoto, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:49 Monga Babiloni wagwetsa ophedwa a Israele, momwemo pa Babiloni padzagwa ophedwa a dziko lonse." 
Jeremiah51:50 Inu amene mwapulumuka kulupanga, pitani inu musaime chiimire; mukumbukire Yehova kutali, Yerusalemu alowe m'mtima mwanu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Tili ndi manyazi, chifukwa tamva mnyozo; manyazi aphimba nkhope zathu; pakuti alendo alowa m'malo opatulika a nyumba ya Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:52 Chifukwa chake, taona, masiku alinkudza, ati Yehova, amene ndidzaweruza mafano ake; ndipo pa dziko lake lonse olasidwa adzabuula." 
Jeremiah51:53 Ngakhale Babiloni adzakwera kumwamba, ngakhale adzalimbitsa msanje wa mphamvu yake, koma kuchokera kwa Ine akufunkha adzafika kwa iye, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:54 Mau akufuula ochokera ku Babiloni, ndi a chionongeko chachikulu ku dziko la Ababiloni!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Pakuti Yehova afunkha Babiloni, aononga m'menemo mau akulu; ndipo mafunde ake adzakokoma ngati madzi ambiri, mau ao aphokosera;" 
Jeremiah51:56 pakuti wakufunkha wafika kwa iye, kwa Babiloni, ndi anthu ake olimba agwidwa, mauta ao athyokathyoka, pakuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wakubwezera, adzabwezera ndithu." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndipo ndidzaledzeretsa akulu ake ndi anzeru ake, akazembe ake ndi ziwanga zake, ndi anthu ake olimba; ndipo adzagona chigonere, sadzanyamuka, ati Mfumu, dzina lake ndi Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah51:58 Yehova wa makamu atero: Makoma otakata a Babiloni adzagwetsedwa ndithu, ndi zitseko zake zazitali zidzatenthedwa ndi moto; anthu adzagwirira ntchito chabe, ndi mitundu ya anthu idzagwirira moto, nidzatopa." 
Jeremiah51:59 Mau amene Yeremiya mneneri anauza Seraya mwana wa Neriya, mwana wa Maseiya, pamene iye ananka ndi Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda ku Babiloni chaka chachinai cha ufumu wake. Ndipo Seraya anali kapitao wa chigono chake." 
Jeremiah51:60 Ndipo Yeremiya analemba m'buku choipa chonse chimene chidzafika pa Babiloni, mau onse awa olembedwa za Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:61 Ndipo Yeremiya anati kwa Seraya, Pamene ufika ku Babiloni, samalira kuti uwerenge mau awa onse," 
Jeremiah51:62 nuti, Inu Yehova, mwanena za malo ano, kuti mudzawatha, kuti asakhalemo, ngakhale anthu ngakhale nyama, koma akhale bwinja nthawi za nthawi." 
Jeremiah51:63 Ndipo padzakhala, utatha kuwerenga buku ili, ulimange ndi mwala, nuliponye pakati pa Yufurate;" 
Jeremiah51:64 nuti, Chomwecho adzamira Babiloni, sadzaukanso chifukwa cha choipa chimene ndidzamtengera iye; ndipo adzatopa. Mau a Yeremiya ndi omwewo." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri kudza chimodzi pamene analowa ufumu wake; ndipo analamulira m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi kudza chimodzi; dzina la amake ndi Hamutala mwana wamkazi wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina. 
Jeremiah52:2 Ndipo iye anachita zoipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonse anazichita Yehoyakimu." 
Jeremiah52:3 Pakuti zonse zinachitika m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda chifukwa cha mkwiyo wa Yehova, mpaka anawachotsa pamaso pake; ndipo Zedekiya anampandukira mfumu ya Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Ndipo panaoneka chaka chachisanu ndi chinai cha ufumu wake mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni anafika, iye ndi nkhondo yake, kuti amenyane ndi Yerusalemu, ndipo anammangira zithando; ndipo anammangira malinga pozungulira pake." 
Jeremiah52:5 Ndipo mudzi unazingidwa mpaka chaka cha khumi ndi chimodzi cha mfumu Zedekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Mwezi wachinai, tsiku lachisanu ndi chinai la mwezi, njala inavuta m'mudzi, ndipo anthu a m'dziko analibe zakudya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Pamenepo anaboola mudzi, ndipo anathawa amuna onse a nkhondo, natuluka m'mudzi usiku pa njira ya kuchipata cha pakati pa makoma awiri, imene inali pa munda wa mfumu; Ababiloni alikumenyana ndi mudzi pozungulira pake, ndipo anapita njira ya kuchidikha." 
Jeremiah52:8 Koma nkhondo ya Ababiloni inamtsata mfumu, nimpeza Zedekiya m'zidikha za ku Yeriko; ndipo nkhondo yake yonse inambalalikira iye." 
Jeremiah52:9 Ndipo anamgwira iye, namtengera kwa mfumu ya ku Babiloni ku Ribula m'dziko la Hamati; ndipo iye anamweruza." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babiloni inapha ana a Zedekiya pamaso pake; niphanso akulu onse a Yuda m'Ribula. 
Jeremiah52:11 Ndipo anakolowola maso a Zedekiya, ndipo mfumu ya ku Babiloni inammanga m'zigologolo, nimtengera ku Babiloni, nimuika m'ndende mpaka tsiku la kufa kwake." 
Jeremiah52:12 Mwezi wachisanu, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, ndicho chaka chakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chinai cha Nebukadinezara, mfumu ya ku Babiloni, analowa m'Yerusalemu Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda, amene anaimirira pamaso pa mfumu ya ku Babiloni:" 
Jeremiah52:13 ndipo anatentha nyumba ya Yehova ndi nyumba ya mfumu, ndi nyumba zonse za m'Yerusalemu, ngakhale zinyumba zazikulu zonse, anazitentha ndi moto." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ndipo nkhondo yonse ya Ababiloni, imene inali ndi kapitao wa alonda, inagumula makoma onse a Yerusalemu pomzungulira pake." 
Jeremiah52:15 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende anthu aumphawi, ndi anthu otsala amene anatsala m'mudzi, ndi amene anapandukira, kutsata mfumu ya ku Babiloni, ndi otsala a unyinjiwo." 
Jeremiah52:16 Koma Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anasiya aumphawi a padziko akhale akulima mphesa ndi akulima m'minda. 
Jeremiah52:17 Ndi mizati yamkuwa imene inali m'nyumba ya Yehova, ndi zoikapo ndi thawale lamkuwa zimene zinali m'nyumba ya Yehova, Ababiloni anazithyolathyola, nanka nao mkuwa wake wonse ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ndiponso miphika, ndi zoolera, ndi mbano zao, ndi mbale, ndi zipande, ndi zipangizo zonse zamkuwa zimene anatumikira nazo, anazichotsa." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ndi zikho, ndi zopalira moto, ndi mbale, ndi miphika, ndi zoikapo nyali, ndi zipande, ndi mitsuko; ndi golide, wa zija zagolide, ndi siliva, wa zija zasiliva, kapitao wa alonda anazichotsa." 
Jeremiah52:20 Nsanamira ziwirizo, thawale limodzilo, ndi ng'ombe zamkuwa zinali pansi pa zoikapo, zimene mfumu Solomoni anazipangira nyumba ya Yehova; mkuwa wa zipangizo zonsezi sanathe kuyesa kulemera kwake." 
Jeremiah52:21 Koma nsanamirazo, utali wake wa nsanamira ina unafikira mikono khumi mphambu isanu ndi itatu; ndi chingwe cha mikono khumi ndi iwiri chinaizinga; kuchindikira kwake kunali zala zinai; inali yagweregwere." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ndipo korona wamkuwa anali pamwamba pake; utali wake wa korona mmodzi unali wa mikono isanu, ndi sefa ndi makangaza pakorona pozungulira pake, onse amkuwa: nsanamira inzake yomwe inali nazo zonga zomwezi, ndi makangaza." 
Jeremiah52:23 Ndipo pambali pake panali makangaza makumi asanu ndi anai kudza asanu ndi limodzi; ndipo makangaza onse anali zana limodzi pamade pozungulira pake. 
Jeremiah52:24 Ndipo kapitao wa alonda anatenga Seraya wansembe wamkulu, ndi Zefaniya wansembe wachiwiri, ndi akudikira pakhomo atatu;" 
Jeremiah52:25 ndipo m'mudzi anatenga kazembe amene anali woyang'anira anthu a nkhondo ndi amuna asanu ndi awiri a iwo akuona nkhope ya mfumu, amene anapezedwa m'mudzi; ndi mlembi wa kazembe wa nkhondo, amene akamemeza anthu a m'dziko; ndi amuna makamu asanu ndi limodzi a anthu a m'dziko, amene anapezedwa pakati pa mudzi." 
Jeremiah52:26 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga iwo, nadza nao kwa mfumu ya ku Babiloni ku Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:27 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babiloni anawakantha, nawapha pa Ribula m'dziko la Hamati. Chomwecho Yuda anatengedwa ndende kutuluka m'dziko lake." 
Jeremiah52:28 Amenewa ndi anthu amene Nebukadinezara anatenga ndende: chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri, Ayuda zikwi zitatu kudza makumi awiri ndi atatu;" 
Jeremiah52:29 chaka chakhumi ndi chisanu ndi chitatu cha Nebukadinezara iye anatenga ndende kuchokera m'Yerusalemu anthu mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi atatu ndi awiri; 
Jeremiah52:30 chaka cha makumi awiri ndi zitatu cha Nebukadinezara Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende Ayuda mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi anai ndi asanu; anthu onse anali zikwi zinai kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi. 
Jeremiah52:31 Ndipo panali chaka cha makumi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri cha undende wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda, mwezi wakhumi ndi iwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri ndi asanu la mwezi, Evili-Merodaki mfumu ya ku Babiloni anaweramutsa mutu wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda, namtulutsa iye m'ndende;" 
Jeremiah52:32 nanena naye bwino, naika mpando wake upose mipando ya mafumu amene anali naye m'Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ndipo anapindula zovala zake za m'ndende, ndipo sanaleke kudya pamaso pake masiku onse a moyo wake." 
Jeremiah52:34 Koma phoso lake mfumu ya ku Babiloni sanaleke kumpatsa, phoso tsiku ndi tsiku gawo lake, mpaka tsiku la kufa kwake, masiku onse a moyo wake." 
Lamentations1:1 Ha! Mudziwo unadzala anthu, ukhalatu pa wokha! Ukunga mkazi wamasiye! Waukuluwo mwa amitundu, kalonga wamkazi m'madera a dziko wasanduka wolamba!" 
Lamentations1:2 Uliralira usiku; misozi yake ili pa masaya ake; mwa onse amene anaukonda mulibe mmodzi wakuutonthoza: Mabwenzi ake onse auchitira ziwembu, asanduka adani ake." 
Lamentations1:3 Yuda watengedwa ndende chifukwa cha msauko ndi ukapolo waukulu; akhala mwa amitundu, sapeza popuma; onse akumlondola anampeza pakati popsinjikiza." 
Lamentations1:4 M'njira za Ziyoni mulira posoweka akudzera msonkhano; pa zipata zake zonse papasuka; ansembe ake onse ausa moyo; anamwali ake asautsidwa; iye mwini namva zowawa. 
Lamentations1:5 Amaliwongo ake asanduka akulu ake, adani ake napindula; pakuti Yehova wamsautsa pochuluka zolakwa zake; ana ake ang'ono alowa m'ndende pamaso pa adani ake." 
Lamentations1:6 Ulemu wake wonse wamchokera mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; akalonga ake asanduka nswala zosapeza busa, anayenda opanda mphamvu pamaso pa wompirikitsa." 
Lamentations1:7 M'masiku a msauko wake ndi kusochera kwake Yerusalemu ukumbukira zokondweretsa zake zonse zachikhalire; pogwidwa anthu ake ndi mdaniyo popanda wakuupulumutsa, mdaniwo anamuona naseka mwachipongwe mabwinja ake." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu wachimwa kwambiri; chifukwa chake wasanduka chinthu chonyansa; onse akuulemekeza aupeputsa, pakuti auona wamaliseche; inde, uusa moyo, nubwerera m'mbuyo." 
Lamentations1:9 Udyo wake unali m'nsalu zake; sunakumbukira chitsiriziro chake; chifukwa chake watsika mozizwitsa; ulibe wakuutonthoza; taonani, Yehova, msauko wanga, pakuti mdaniyo wadzikuza yekha." 
Lamentations1:10 Amaliwongo atambasulira manja ao pa zokondweretsa zake zonse; pakuti waona amitundu atalowa m'malo ake opatulika, amene munalamulira kuti asalowe mumsonkhano mwanu." 
Lamentations1:11 Anthu ake onse ausa moyo nafunafuna mkate; ndi zokondweretsa zao agula zakudya kuti atsitsimutse moyo wao; taonani, Yehova, nimupenye; pakuti ndasanduka wonyansa." 
Lamentations1:12 Kodi muyesa chimenechi chabe, nonsenu opita panjira? Penyani nimuone, kodi chilipo chisoni china ngati changachi amandimvetsa ine, chimene Yehova wandisautsa nacho tsiku la mkwiyo wake waukali?" 
Lamentations1:13 Anatumiza moto wochokera kumwamba kulowa m'mafupa anga, unawagonjetsa; watchera mapazi anga ukonde, wandibwezera m'mbuyo; wandipululutsa ndi kundilefula tsiku lonse." 
Lamentations1:14 Goli la zolakwa zanga lamangidwa ndi dzanja lake; zalukidwa, zakwera pakhosi panga; iye wakhumudwitsa mphamvu yanga; Ambuye wandipereka m'manja mwao, sindithai kuwalaka." 
Lamentations1:15 Ambuye wapepula ngwazi zanga zonse pakati panga; waitanira msonkhano pa ine kuti uphwanye anyamata anga, Ambuye wapondereza namwaliyo, mwana wamkazi wa Yuda, monga mopondera mphesa." 
Lamentations1:16 Chifukwa cha zimenezi ndilira; diso langa, diso langatu likudza madzi: Pakuti wonditonthoza, wotsitsimutsa moyo wanga, anditalikira; ana anga asungulumwa, pakuti adaniwo apambana." 
Lamentations1:17 Ziyoni atambasula manja ake, palibe wakumtonthoza; Yehova walamulira kuti omzungulira Yakobo akhale adani ake; Yerusalemu wasanduka chinthu chonyansa pakati pao." 
Lamentations1:18 Yehova ali wolungama; pakuti ndapikisana ndi m'kamwa mwake; mumvetu, mitundu ya anthu nonsenu, nimuone chisoni changa; anamwali ndi anyamata anga atha kulowa m'ndende." 
Lamentations1:19 Ndinaitana akundikondawo koma anandinyenga; ansembe ndi akulu anga anamwalira m'mudzimu, alikufunafuna zakudya zotsitsimutsa miyoyo yao." 
Lamentations1:20 Onani, Yehova; pakuti ndavutika, m'kati mwanga mugwedezeka; mtima wanga wasanduka mwa ine; pakuti ndapikisana nanu ndithu; kunjako lupanga limangopha ana; m'nyumba muli imfa." 
Lamentations1:21 Iwo anamva kuti ndiusa moyo, palibe wonditonthoza; adani anga onse atha kumva msauko wanga, nakondwera kuti mwatero ndinu; mudzafikitsa tsiku lija mwalitchula, ndipo iwowo adzanga ine." 
Lamentations1:22 Zoipa zao zonse zidze pamaso panu, muwachitire monga mwandichitira ine chifukwa cha zolakwa zanga zonse, pakuti ndiusa moyo kwambiri, ndi kulefuka mtima wanga." 
Lamentations2:1 Ambuye waphimbatu ndi mtambo mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, pomkwiyira! Wagwetsa pansi kuchokera kumwamba kukoma kwake kwa Israele; osakumbukira poponda mapazi ake tsiku la mkwiyo wake." 
Lamentations2:2 Yehova wameza nyumba zonse za Yakobo osazichitira chisoni; wagumula malinga a mwana wamkazi wa Yuda mwa ukali wake; wawagwetsera pansi, waipitsa ufumuwo ndi akalonga ake." 
Lamentations2:3 Pokwiya moopsa walikha nyanga zonse za Israele; wabweza m'mbuyo dzanja lake lamanja pamaso pa adaniwo, natentha Yakobo ngati moto wamalawi wonyambita mozungulira." 
Lamentations2:4 Wathifula uta wake ngati mdani, waima ndi dzanja lake lamanja ngati mmaliwongo; wapha onse okondweretsa maso; watsanulira ukali wake ngati moto pa hema wa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni." 
Lamentations2:5 Yehova wasanduka mdani, wameza Israele; wameza zinyumba zake zonse, wapasula malinga ake; nachulukitsira mwana wamkazi wa Yuda maliro ndi chibumo." 
Lamentations2:6 Wachotsa mwamphamvu dindiro lake ngati la m'munda; waononga mosonkhanira mwake; Yehova waiwalitsa anthu msonkhano ndi Sabata m'Ziyoni; wanyoza mfumu ndi wansembe mokwiya mwaukali. 
Lamentations2:7 Ambuye wataya guwa lake la nsembe, malo ake opatulika amnyansira; wapereka m'manja a adani ake makoma a zinyumba zake; iwo anaphokosera m'nyumba ya Yehova ngati tsiku la msonkhano." 
Lamentations2:8 Yehova watsimikiza mtima kupasula linga la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; watambalika chingwe, osabweza dzanja lake kuti lisaonongepo; waliritsa tchemba ndi linga; zilefuka pamodzi." 
Lamentations2:9 Zipata zake zalowa pansi; waononga ndi kuthyola mipiringidzo yake; mfumu yake ndi akalonga ake ali pakati pa amitundu akusowa chilamulo; inde, aneneri ake samalandira masomphenya kwa Yehova." 
Lamentations2:10 Akulu a mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni akhala pansi natonthola; aponya fumbi pa mitu yao, anamangirira chiguduli m'chuuno mwao: Anamwali a ku Yerusalemu aweramitsa pansi mitu yao." 
Lamentations2:11 Maso anga alefuka ndi misozi, m'kati mwanga mugwedezeka; chiwindi changa chagwa pansi chifukwa cha kupasula kwa mwana wamkazi wa anthu a mtundu wanga; chifukwa tiana ndi oyamwa akomoka m'makwalala a mudziwu." 
Lamentations2:12 Amati kwa amao, Tirigu ndi vinyo ali kuti? Pokomoka iwo ngati olasidwa m'makwalala a mudziwu, potsanulidwa miyoyo yao pa zifuwa za amao." 
Lamentations2:13 Ndikuchitire umboni wotani? Ndikuyerekeze ndi chiyani, mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu? Ndikulinganize ndi chiyani kuti ndikutonthoze, namwaliwe, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni? Popeza akula ngati nyanja; ndani angakuchize?" 
Lamentations2:14 Aneneri ako anakuonera masomphenya achabe ndi opusa; osawulula mphulupulu yako kuti abweze undende wako, koma anakuonera manenero achabe ndi opambutsa." 
Lamentations2:15 Onse opita panjira akuombera manja: Atsonya, napukusira mitu yao pa mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu, nati, kodi uwu ndi mudzi wotchedwa wokongola, wangwiro, wokondweretsa dziko lonse?" 
Lamentations2:16 Adani ako onse ayasamira pa iwe, atsonya nakukuta mano, nati, Taumeza; ndithu ili ndi tsiku tinaliyembekezalo, talipeza, taliona." 
Lamentations2:17 Yehova wachita chomwe analingalira; watsiriza mau ake, amene analamulira nthawi yakale; wagwetsa osachitira chisoni; wakondweretsa adani pa iwe, wakweza nyanga ya amaliwongo ako." 
Lamentations2:18 Mtima wao unafuula kwa Ambuye, linga iwe la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, igwe misozi ngati mtsinje usana ndi usiku; usapume kanthawi, asaleke mwana wa diso lako." 
Lamentations2:19 Tauka, tafuula usiku, poyamba kulonda; tsanulira mtima wako ngati madzi pamaso pa Ambuye; takwezera maso ako kwa Iye, chifukwa cha moyo wa tiana tako, timene tilefuka ndi njala pa malekezero a makwalala onse." 
Lamentations2:20 Onani Yehova, nimupenye, mwachitira ayani ichi? Kodi akazi adzadya zipatso zao, kunena ana amene anawalera wokha? Kodi wansembe ndi mneneri adzaphedwa m'malo opatulika a Ambuye?" 
Lamentations2:21 Wamng'ono ndi nkhalamba agona pansi m'makwalala; anamwali ndi anyamata anga agwa ndi lupanga; munawapha tsiku la mkwiyo wanu, munawagwaza osachitira chisoni." 
Lamentations2:22 Mwaitana zondiopsa mozungulira ngati tsiku la msonkhano; panalibe wopulumuka ndi wotsala tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova; omwe ndinawaseweza ndi kuwalera, adaniwo anawatsiriza." 
Lamentations3:1 Ine ndine munthuyu wakuona msauko ndi ndodo ya ukali wake. 
Lamentations3:2 Wanditsogolera, nandiyendetsa mumdima, si m'kuunika ai." 
Lamentations3:3 Zoonadi amandibwezerabwezera dzanja lake monditsutsa tsiku lonse. 
Lamentations3:4 Wagugitsa thupi langa ndi khungu langa, nathyola mafupa anga." 
Lamentations3:5 Wandimangira zithando za nkhondo, wandizinga ndi ulembe ndi mavuto." 
Lamentations3:6 Wandikhalitsa mumdima ngati akufa kale. 
Lamentations3:7 Wanditsekereza ndi guta, sindingatuluke; walemeretsa unyolo wanga." 
Lamentations3:8 Inde, pofuula ine ndi kuitana andithandize amakaniza pemphero langa." 
Lamentations3:9 Watsekereza njira zanga ndi miyala yosema, nakhotetsa mayendedwe anga." 
Lamentations3:10 Andikhalira chilombo cholalira kapena mkango mobisalira. 
Lamentations3:11 Wapambutsa njira zanga, nanding'amba; nandipululutsa." 
Lamentations3:12 Wathifula uta wake, nandiyesa polozetsa muvi." 
Lamentations3:13 Walasa impso zanga ndi mivi ya m'phodo mwake. 
Lamentations3:14 Ndasanduka wondiseka mtundu wanga wonse, ndi nyimbo yao tsiku lonse." 
Lamentations3:15 Wandidzaza ndi zowawa, wandikhutitsa chivumulo." 
Lamentations3:16 Wathyolanso mano anga ndi tinsangalabwi, wandikuta ndi phulusa." 
Lamentations3:17 Watalikitsanso moyo wanga ndi mtendere; ndinaiwala zabwino. 
Lamentations3:18 Ndipo ndinati, Mphamvu yanga yatha, osayembekezanso kanthu kwa Yehova." 
Lamentations3:19 Kumbukirani msauko wanga ndi kusochera kwanga, ndizo chivumulo ndi ndulu." 
Lamentations3:20 Moyo wanga uzikumbukirabe nuwerama mwa ine. 
Lamentations3:21 Ndili nacho chiyembekezo popeza ndilingalira ichi ndiyembekeza kanthu. 
Lamentations3:22 Chifukwa chakusathedwa ife ndicho chifundo cha Yehova, pakuti chisoni chake sichileka," 
Lamentations3:23 chioneka chatsopano m'mawa ndi m'mawa; mukhulupirika ndithu. 
Lamentations3:24 Moyo wanga uti, Gawo langa ndiye Yehova; chifukwa chake ndidzakhulupirira." 
Lamentations3:25 Yehova akhalira wabwino omlindirira, ndi moyo womfunafuna." 
Lamentations3:26 Nkokoma kuti munthu ayembekeze ndi kulindirira modekha chipulumutso cha Yehova. 
Lamentations3:27 Nkokoma kuti munthu asenze goli ali wamng'ono. 
Lamentations3:28 Akhale pa yekha, natonthole, pakuti Mulungu wamsenzetsa ilo." 
Lamentations3:29 Aike kamwa lake m'fumbi; kapena chilipo chiyembekezo. 
Lamentations3:30 Atembenuzire wompanda tsaya lake, adzazidwe ndi chitonzo." 
Lamentations3:31 Pakuti Yehova sadzataya kufikira nthawi zonse. 
Lamentations3:32 Angakhale aliritsa, koma adzachitira chisoni monga mwa kuchuluka kwa zifundo zake." 
Lamentations3:33 Pakuti samasautsa dala, ngakhale kumvetsa ana a anthu chisoni." 
Lamentations3:34 Kupondereza andende onse a m'dziko," 
Lamentations3:35 kupambutsa chiweruzo cha munthu pamaso pa Wam'mwambamwamba; 
Lamentations3:36 kukhotetsa mlandu wa munthu, zonsezi Ambuye sazikonda." 
Lamentations3:37 Ndani anganene, chonena chake ndi kuchitikadi, ngati Ambuye salamulira?" 
Lamentations3:38 Kodi m'kamwa mwa Wam'mwambamwamba simutuluka zovuta ndi zabwino? 
Lamentations3:39 Kodi munthu wamoyo adandauliranji pokhala m'zochimwa zake? 
Lamentations3:40 Tisanthule ntiyese njira zathu ntibwerenso kwa Yehova. 
Lamentations3:41 Titukulire mitima yathu ndi manja athu omwe kwa Mulungu ali kumwamba. 
Lamentations3:42 Ife tilakwa ndi kupikisana nanu, ndipo Inu simunatikhululukira." 
Lamentations3:43 Mwadzikuta ndi mkwiyo ndi kutilondola, mwatipha osachitira chisoni." 
Lamentations3:44 Mwadzikuta ndi mtambo kuti pemphero lathu lisapyolemo. 
Lamentations3:45 Mwatiika pakati pa amitundu ngati zinyalala ndi za kudzala. 
Lamentations3:46 Adani athu onse anatiyasamira. 
Lamentations3:47 Mantha ndi dzenje zitifikira, ndi phokoso ndi chionongeko." 
Lamentations3:48 M'diso mwanga mutsika mitsinje ya madzi chifukwa cha mwana wamkazi wa anthu a mtundu wanga woonongedwa. 
Lamentations3:49 Diso langa lingotsanulira osaleka, osapumula," 
Lamentations3:50 kufikira Yehova adzazolika kumwamba ndi kuona. 
Lamentations3:51 Diso langa limvetsa moyo wanga zowawa chifukwa cha ana akazi onse a m'mudzi mwanga. 
Lamentations3:52 Ondida opanda chifukwa anandiinga ngati mbalame; 
Lamentations3:53 anaononga moyo wanga m'dzenje, naponya mwala pamwamba pa ine;" 
Lamentations3:54 madzi anayenda pamwamba pa mutu panga, ndinati, Ndalikhidwa." 
Lamentations3:55 Ndinaitana dzina lanu, Yehova, ndili m'dzenje lapansi;" 
Lamentations3:56 munamva mau anga; musabise khutu lanu popuma ndi pofuula ine. 
Lamentations3:57 Munayandikira tsiku la kukuitanani ine; munati, Usaope." 
Lamentations3:58 Ambuye munanenera moyo wanga milandu yake; munaombola moyo wanga. 
Lamentations3:59 Yehova, mwaona choipa anandichitiracho, mundiweruzire." 
Lamentations3:60 Mwaona kubwezera kwao konse ndi zopangira zao zonse za pa ine. 
Lamentations3:61 Mwamva chitonzo chao, Yehova, ndi zopangira zao zonse za pa ine," 
Lamentations3:62 milomo ya akutsutsana nane ndi zolingalira zao za pa ine tsiku lonse. 
Lamentations3:63 Taonani kukhala ndi kunyamuka kwao; ndine nyimbo yao. 
Lamentations3:64 Mudzawabwezera chilango, Yehova, monga mwa machitidwe a manja ao." 
Lamentations3:65 Muphimbe mtima wao ndi kuwatemberera; 
Lamentations3:66 mudzawalondola mokwiya ndi kuwaononga pansi pa thambo la Yehova. 
Lamentations4:1 Ha! Golide wagugadi; golide woona woposa wasandulika; miyala ya malo opatulika yakhuthulidwa pa malekezero a makwalala onse. 
Lamentations4:2 Ana a Ziyoni a mtengo wapatali, olingana ndi golide woyengetsa, angoyesedwa ngati mbiya zadothi zozipanga manja a woumba." 
Lamentations4:3 Angakhale ankhandwe amapatsa bere, nayamwitsa ana ao; koma mwana wamkazi wa anthu a mtundu wanga wasanduka wankhanza, ngati nthiwatiwa za m'chipululu." 
Lamentations4:4 Lilime la mwana woyamwa limamatira kumalakalaka kwake ndi ludzu; ana ang'ono apempha mkate koma palibe wakuwanyemera. 
Lamentations4:5 Omwe anadya zolongosoka angosiyidwa m'makwalala; omwe analeredwa navekedwa mlangali afungatira madzala. 
Lamentations4:6 Pakuti mphulupulu ya mwana wamkazi wa anthu a mtundu wanga, ikula koposa tchimo la Sodomu, umene unapasuka m'kamphindi, anthu osauchitira kanthu." 
Lamentations4:7 Omveka ake anakonzeka koposa chipale chofewa, nayera koposa mkaka, matupi ao anafiira koposa timiyala toti psu; maonekedwe ao ananga a safiro wa mtengo wapatali." 
Lamentations4:8 Maonekedwe ao ada koposa makala, sazindikirika m'makwalala; khungu lao limamatira pa mafupa ao, lakhwinyata, lasanduka ngati ndodo." 
Lamentations4:9 Ophedwa ndi lupanga amva bwino kupambana ophedwa ndi njala; pakuti amenewa angokwalika napyozedwa, posowa zipatso za m'munda." 
Lamentations4:10 Manja a akazi achisoni anaphika ana aoao; anali chakudya chao poonongeka mwana wamkazi wa anthu a mtundu wanga. 
Lamentations4:11 Yehova wakwaniritsa kuzaza kwake, watsanulira ukali wake; anayatsa moto m'Ziyoni, unanyambita maziko ake." 
Lamentations4:12 Mafumu a dziko lapansi sanakhulupirire, ngakhale onse okhala kunja kuno, kuti adani ndi amaliwongo adzalowadi m'zipata za Yerusalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Ndicho chifukwa cha machimo a aneneri ndi mphulupulu za ansembe ake, amene anakhetsa mwazi wa olungama pakati pake." 
Lamentations4:14 Asochera m'makwalala ngati akhungu, aipsidwa ndi mwazi; anthu sangakhudze zovala zao." 
Lamentations4:15 Amafuula kwa iwo, Chokani, osakonzeka inu, chokani, chokani, musakhudze kanthu. Pothawa iwo ndi kusochera, anthu anati mwa amitundu, sadzagoneranso kuno." 
Lamentations4:16 Mkwiyo wa Yehova unawalekanitsa, sadzawasamaliranso; iwo sanalemekeze ansembe, sanakomere mtima akulu." 
Lamentations4:17 Maso athu athedwa, tikali ndi moyo, poyembekeza thandizo chabe; kudikira tinadikira mtundu wosatha kupulumutsa." 
Lamentations4:18 Amalondola mapazi athu, sitingayende m'makwalala athu; chitsiriziro chathu chayandikira, masiku athu akwaniridwa; pakuti chitsiriziro chathu chafikadi." 
Lamentations4:19 Otilondola anaposa ziombankhanga za m'mlengalenga m'liwiro lao, anatithamangitsa pamapiri natilalira m'chipululu." 
Lamentations4:20 Wodzozedwa wa Yehova, ndiye mpweya wa m'mphuno mwathu, anagwidwa m'maenje ao; amene tinanena kuti, Tidzakhala m'mthunzi mwake pakati pa amitundu," 
Lamentations4:21 kondwera nusangalale, mwana wamkazi wa Edomu, wokhala m'dziko la Uzi; chikho chidzapita ngakhale mwa iwenso; udzaledzera ndi kuvula zako." 
Lamentations4:22 Mphulupulu yako yatha, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, Yehova sadzakutenganso ndende; koma adzazonda mphulupulu yako, mwana wa mkazi wa Edomu, nadzavumbulutsa zochimwa zako." 
Lamentations5:1 Yehova, kumbukirani chotigwerachi, penyani nimuone chitonzo chathu." 
Lamentations5:2 Cholowa chathu chasanduka cha alendo, ndi nyumba zathu za achilendo." 
Lamentations5:3 Ndife amasiye opanda atate, amai athu akunga akazi amasiye." 
Lamentations5:4 Tinamwa madzi athu ndi ndalama, tiona nkhuni zathu pozigula." 
Lamentations5:5 Otilondola atigwira pakhosi pathu, tatopa osaona popumira." 
Lamentations5:6 Tinagwira mwendo Ejipito ndi Asiriya kuti tikhute zakudya. 
Lamentations5:7 Atate athu anachimwa, kulibe iwo; ndipo tanyamula mphulupulu zao." 
Lamentations5:8 Akapolo atilamulira; palibe wotipulumutsa m'dzanja lao. 
Lamentations5:9 Timalowa m'zoopsa potenga zakudya zathu, chifukwa cha lupanga la m'chipululu." 
Lamentations5:10 Khungu lathu lapserera ngati pamoto chifukwa cha kuwawa kwa njala. 
Lamentations5:11 Anaipitsa akazi m'Ziyoni, ndi anamwali m'midzi ya Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Anawapachika akalonga manja ao; sanalemekeze nkhope za akulu. 
Lamentations5:13 Anyamata ananyamula mphero, ana nakhumudwa posenza nkhuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Akulu adatha kuzipata, anyamata naleka nyimbo zao." 
Lamentations5:15 Chimwemwe cha mtima wathu chalekeka, masewera athu asanduka maliro." 
Lamentations5:16 Korona wagwa pamutu pathu; kalanga ife! Pakuti tinachimwa. 
Lamentations5:17 Chifukwa cha ichi mtima wathu ufooka, chifukwa cha izi maso athu achita chimbuuzi;" 
Lamentations5:18 pa phiri la Ziyoni lopasukalo ankhandwe ayendapo. 
Lamentations5:19 Inu, Yehova, mukhala chikhalire, ndi mpando wanu wachifumu ku mibadwomibadwo." 
Lamentations5:20 Bwanji mutiiwala chiiwalire, ndi kutisiya masiku ambirimbiri." 
Lamentations5:21 Mutitembenuzire kwa Inu, Yehova, ndipo tidzatembenuzidwadi, mukonzenso masiku athu ngati kale lija." 
Lamentations5:22 Koma mwatikaniza konse, mwatikwiyira kopambana." 
Ezekiel1:1 Ndipo kunali chaka cha makumi atatu, mwezi wachinai, tsiku lachisanu la mwezi, pokhala ine pakati pa andende kumtsinje Kebara, kunatseguka kumwamba, ndipo ndinaona masomphenya a Mulungu." 
Ezekiel1:2 Tsiku lachisanu la mwezi, ndicho chaka chachisanu cha kutengedwa ndende mfumu Yehoyakini," 
Ezekiel1:3 anadzadi mau a Yehova kwa Ezekiele wansembe, mwana wa Buzi, m'dziko la Ababiloni kumtsinje Kebara; ndi pomwepo dzanja la Yehova lidamkhalira." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, mkuntho wa mphepo wochokera kumpoto, mtambo waukulu ndi moto wofukusika m'mwemo, ndi pozungulira pake padachita cheza, ndi m'kati mwake mudaoneka ngati chitsulo chakupsa m'kati mwa moto." 
Ezekiel1:5 Ndi m'kati mwake mudaoneka mafaniziro a zamoyo zinai. Ndipo maonekedwe ao ndiwo anafanana ndi munthu," 
Ezekiel1:6 ndi yense anali nazo nkhope zinai, ndi yense wa iwo anali nao mapiko anai." 
Ezekiel1:7 Ndi mapazi ao anali mapazi oongoka, ndi kumapazi ao kunanga kuphazi kwa mwanawang'ombe; ndipo ananyezimira ngati mawalidwe a mkuwa wowalitsidwa." 
Ezekiel1:8 Zinali naonso manja a munthu pansi pa mapiko ao pa mbali zao zinai; ndipo zinaizi zinali nazo nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao. 
Ezekiel1:9 Mapiko ao analumikizana; sizinatembenuka poyenda; chilichonse chinayenda ndi kulunjika kutsogoloko. 
Ezekiel1:10 Mafaniziro a nkhope zao zinali nayo nkhope ya munthu; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya mkango pa mbali ya kudzanja lamanja; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya ng'ombe pa mbali ya kudzanja lamanzere; izi zinai zinali nayonso nkhope ya chiombankhanga. 
Ezekiel1:11 Ndi nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao zinagawikana kumutu; chilichonse chinali nao mapiko awiri olumikizana, ndi awiri anaphimba thupi." 
Ezekiel1:12 Ndipo zinayenda, chilichonse chinalunjika kutsogolo kwake uko mzimu unafuna kumukako zinamuka, sizinatembenuka poyenda." 
Ezekiel1:13 Kunena za mafaniziro a zamoyozo, maonekedwe ao ananga makala amoto, monga maonekedwe a miyuni; motowo unayendayenda pakati pa zamoyozo, ndi motowo unachita cheza, ndi m'motomo mudatuluka mphezi." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ndipo zamoyozo zinathamanga ndi kubwerera, ngati maonekedwe a mphezi yong'anima." 
Ezekiel1:15 Ndipo pakupenyerera ine zamoyozo, taonani, njinga imodziimodzi yoponda pansi pafupi ndi zamoyozo pa nkhope zao zinai." 
Ezekiel1:16 Maonekedwe a njingazi ndi mapangidwe ao ananga mawalidwe a berulo; ndi izi zinai zinafanana mafaniziro ao; ndi maonekedwe ao ndi mapangidwe ao anali ngati njinga ziwiri zopingasitsana. 
Ezekiel1:17 Poyenda zinayenda kumbali zao zinai, zosatembenuka poyenda." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ndi mikombero yake inali yokuzika ndi yoopsa; ndi izi zinai zinali ndi mikombero yao yodzala ndi maso pozungulira pao. 
Ezekiel1:19 Ndipo poyenda zamoyozo, njingazi zinayenda pambali pao; ndipo ponyamuka pansi zamoyozo, njinga zinanyamuka." 
Ezekiel1:20 Kuli konse mzimu ukuti umuke, zinamuka komwe mzimu ukuti umuke; ndi njingazi zinanyamuka pambali pa izi; pakuti mzimu wa zamoyozo unali m'njingazo." 
Ezekiel1:21 Poyenda zija zinayenda izi, poima zija zinaima izo; ndipo ponyamuka pansi zija njingazi zinanyamuka pambali pa izi; pakuti mzimu wa zamoyozo unali mu njingazi." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ndi pa mitu ya zamoyozi panali chifaniziro cha thambo, monga mawalidwe a krustalo woopsa, loyalika pamwamba pamitu pao." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ndi pansi pa thambolo mapiko ao analunjikana, lina kulunjika kulinzake; chilichonse chinali nao mapiko awiri akuphimba matupi ao, chakuno ndi chauko." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ndipo pakuyenda izi ndinamva mkokomo wa mapiko ao, ngati mkokomo wa madzi aakulu, ngati mau a Wamphamvuyonse, phokoso lakusokosera ngati phokoso la ankhondo; pakuima zinagwetsa mapiko ao." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ndipo panamveka mau pamwamba pa thambolo linali pamwamba pa mitu yao; pakuima izi zinagwetsa mapiko ao. 
Ezekiel1:26 Ndi pamwamba pa thambolo linali pamitu pao panali chifaniziro cha mpando wachifumu, maonekedwe ake ngati mwala wa safiro; ndipo pa chifaniziro cha mpando wachifumu panali chifaniziro ngati maonekedwe ake a munthu wokhala pamwamba pake." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ndipo ndinapenya ngati chitsulo chakupsa, ngati maonekedwe ake a moto m'kati mwake pozungulira pake, kuyambira maonekedwe a m'chuuno mwake ndi kumwamba kwake; ndipo kuyambira maonekedwe a m'chuuno mwake ndi kunsi kwake ndinaona ngati maonekedwe ake a moto; ndi kunyezimira kudamzinga." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ngati maonekedwe a utawaleza uli m'mtambo tsiku la mvula, momwemo maonekedwe a kunyezimira kwake pozungulira pake. Ndiwo maonekedwe a chifaniziro cha ulemerero wa Yehova. Ndipo pakuchipenya ndinagwa nkhope pansi, ndipo ndinamva mau a wina wakunena." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, khala chilili, ndipo ndidzanena nawe." 
Ezekiel2:2 Ndipo unandilowa mzimu pamene ananena nane, ndi kundiimika ndikhale chilili; ndipo ndinamumva Iye wakunena nane." 
Ezekiel2:3 Nati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ndikutumizira kwa ana a Israele, kwa mitundu ya anthu opanduka, amene anapandukana nane; iwo ndi makolo ao anandilakwira mpaka lero lomwe." 
Ezekiel2:4 Ndipo anawa, ndiwo achipongwe ndi ouma mtima, ndikutumiza kwa iwo; ndipo ukanene nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel2:5 Ndipo iwowa, ngakhale akamva kapena akaleka kumva, (pakuti ndiwo nyumba yopanduka,) koma adzadziwa kuti panali mneneri pakati pao." 
Ezekiel2:6 Ndipo iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, usawaopa, kapena kuopa mau ao; ingakhale mitungwi ndi minga ikhala ndi iwe, nukhala pakati pa zinkhanira, usaopa mau ao kapena kuopsedwa ndi nkhope zao; pakuti ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ndipo ukanene nao mau anga, ngakhale akamva kapena akaleka kumva; pakuti iwo ndiwo opanduka." 
Ezekiel2:8 Koma iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu, tamvera ichi ndilikunena nawe; usakhale iwe wopanduka, ngati nyumba ija yopanduka; tsegula pakamwa pako, nudye chomwe ndikupatsa." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ndipo pakupenya ine ndinaona dzanja londitulutsira, ndipo taonani, mpukutu wa buku m'mwemo;" 
Ezekiel2:10 naufunyulula pamaso panga; ndipo unalembedwa m'kati ndi kubwalo; munalembedwa m'mwemo nyimbo za maliro, ndi chisoni, ndi tsoka." 
Ezekiel3:1 Ndipo ananena nane, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Idya chimene wachipeza; idya mpukutu uwu, numuke ndi kunena ndi nyumba ya Israele." 
Ezekiel3:2 Pamenepo ndinatsegula pakamwa panga ndipo anandidyetsa mpukutuwo. 
Ezekiel3:3 Nati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, dyetsa m'mimba mwako, nudzaze matumbo ako ndi mpukutu uwu ndakupatsawu. M'mwemo ndinaudya, ndi m'kamwa mwanga munazuna ngati uchi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Muka, nufike kwa nyumba ya Israele, nunene nao mau anga." 
Ezekiel3:5 Pakuti sutumizidwa kwa anthu a chinenedwe chosamveka ndi chovuta, koma kwa nyumba ya Israele;" 
Ezekiel3:6 si kwa mitundu yambiri ya anthu a chinenedwe chosamveka ndi chovuta, amene sukhoza kudziwitsa chinenedwe chao. Zedi ndikakutumiza kwa iwowa adzamvera iwe." 
Ezekiel3:7 Koma nyumba ya Israele siidzakumvera, pakuti siifuna kundimvera Ine; pakuti nyumba yonse ya Israele ndiyo yolimba mutu ndi youma mtima." 
Ezekiel3:8 Taona ndakhwimitsa nkhope yako itsutsane nazo nkhope zao; ndalimbitsanso mutu wako utsutsane nayo mitu yao. 
Ezekiel3:9 Ndalimbitsa mutu wako woposa mwala wolimbitsitsa, usawaopa kapena kutenga nkhawa pamaso pao; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel3:10 Ananenanso nane, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, mau anga onse ndidzawanena ndi iwe uwalandire m'mtima mwako, utawamva m'makutu mwako." 
Ezekiel3:11 Numuke, nufike kwa andende kwa ana a anthu a mtundu wako, nunene nao ndi kuwauza, Atero Yehova Mulungu, ngakhale akamva kapena akaleka kumva." 
Ezekiel3:12 Pamenepo mzimu unandinyamula, ndipo ndinamva kumbuyo kwanga mau a mkokomo waukulu, ndi kuti, Wodala ulemerero wa Yehova m'malo mwake." 
Ezekiel3:13 Ndipo ndinamva mkokomo wa mapiko a zamoyozo pakukhudzana, ndi mlikiti wa njingazo m'mbali mwa izo, ndilo phokoso la mkokomo waukulu." 
Ezekiel3:14 M'mwemo mzimu unandinyamula ndi kuchoka nane; ndipo ndinamuka wowawidwa, womyuka mtima; koma dzanja la Yehova linandigwirizitsa." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ndipo ndinafika kwa andende ku Telabibu, okhala kumtsinje Kebara, ndiko kwao; ndipo ndinakhalako wodabwa pakati pao masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ndipo kunali atatha masiku asanu ndi awiri, mau a Yehova anandidzera, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel3:17 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ndakuika ukhale mlonda wa nyumba ya Israele, m'mwemo mvera mau otuluka m'kamwa mwanga, nundichenjezere iwo." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ndikanena kwa woipa, Udzafa ndithu, koma iwe osamchenjeza, wosanena kumchenjeza woipayo aleke njira yake yoipa, kumsunga ndi moyo, woipa yemweyo adzafa mu mphulupulu yake; koma mwazi wake ndidzaufuna pa dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Koma ukachenjeza woipa, osabwerera iye kuleka choipa chake kapena njira yake yoipa, adzafa mu mphulupulu yake; koma iwe walanditsa moyo wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 Momwemonso akabwerera wolungama kuleka chilungamo chake, ndi kuchita chosalungama, ndipo ndikamuikira chomkhumudwitsa, adzafa; popeza sunamchenjeza, adzafa m'tchimo lake, ndi zolungama zake adazichita sizidzakumbukika; koma mwazi wake ndidzaufuna pa dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel3:21 Koma ukamchenjeza wolungamayo, kuti asachimwe wolungamayo, ndipo sachimwa, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, popeza anachenjezedwa; ndipo iwe walanditsa moyo wako." 
Ezekiel3:22 Ndipo dzanja la Yehova linandikhalira komweko, nati kwa ine, Nyamuka, tuluka kunka kuchidikha, ndipo pomwepo ndidzalankhula ndi iwe." 
Ezekiel3:23 Ndipo ndinauka ndi kutuluka kunka kuchidikha, ndipo taonani, ulemerero wa Yehova unaimako monga ulemerero uja ndinauona kumtsinje Kebara, ndipo ndinagwa nkhope pansi." 
Ezekiel3:24 Pamenepo unandilowa mzimu ndi kundiimika ndikhale chilili; ndipo analankhula ndi ine, nanena nane, Muka, katsekedwe m'nyumba mwako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Koma iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, taona, adzakuikira iwe zingwe zolimba, nadzakumanga nazo, ndipo sudzatuluka pakati pao;" 
Ezekiel3:26 ndipo ndidzamamatiritsa lilime lako kumalakalaka ako, kuti ukhale wosanena, wosawakhalira wakuwadzudzula; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel3:27 Koma pamene ndilankhula nawe ndidzatsegula pakamwa pako, nudzanena nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu. Wakumvera amvere, wosafuna kumvera akhale; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel4:1 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, dzitengere njerwa, nuiike pamaso pako, nulembepo mudzi, ndiwo Yerusalemu;" 
Ezekiel4:2 nuuzinge, nuumangire nsanja zouzinga, nuundire nthumbira, ndi kuumangira misasa, nuuikire zogumulira pozungulira pake." 
Ezekiel4:3 Nudzitengere chiwaya chachitsulo, ndi kuchiika ngati khoma lachitsulo pakati pa iwe ndi mudziwo; nuulozetsere nkhope yako kuti umangidwire misasa, ndipo udzamangira misasa. Ichi chikhale chizindikiro cha nyumba ya Israele." 
Ezekiel4:4 Ndipo iwe ugonere pansi mbali yako ya kumanzere, nuikepo mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Israele; monga mwa kuwerenga kwa masiku amene udzagonapo udzasenza mphulupulu yao." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ndipo Ine ndakuikira zaka za mphulupulu yao ngati masiku, ndiwo masiku mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai, kuti usenze mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Israele." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ndipo utatsiriza awa, ugonerenso mbali yako ya kumanja, ndi kusenza mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Yuda; ndakuikira masiku makumi anai, kuliyesa tsiku limodzi ngati chaka chimodzi." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ndipo ulozetse nkhope yako kuzingidwa kwake kwa Yerusalemu, ndi dzanja lako losafundika, nuunenere." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ndipo taona ndidzakumanga ndi zingwe zolimba kuti usakunkhulire, mpaka watsiriza masiku a kuzingidwa kwako." 
Ezekiel4:9 Udzitengerenso tirigu, ndi barele, ndi nyemba, ndi mphodza, ndi mapira, ndi mawere, nuziike m'mbale imodzi, ndi kudzipangira mkate nazo; uzidyako monga mwa kuwerenga kwa masiku udzagonawo pambali pako, ndiwo masiku mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai," 
Ezekiel4:10 Ndipo chakudya chako uzichidya chiyesedwe masekeli makumi awiri tsiku limodzi; uzidyako tsiku ndi tsiku pa nthawi yake. 
Ezekiel4:11 Uzimwanso madzi monga mwa muyeso, limodzi la magawo asanu ndi limodzi la hini; uzimwako tsiku ndi tsiku pa nthawi yake." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ndipo uzichidya ngati timikate ta barele, ndi kutiocha pamaso pao ndi zonyansa za munthu." 
Ezekiel4:13 Ndipo Yehova anati, Motero ana a Israele adzadya chakudya chao chodetsedwa, mwa amitundu kumene ndidzawaingitsirako." 
Ezekiel4:14 Pamenepo ndinati, Ha, Ambuye Yehova! Taonani, moyo wanga sunadetsedwa, pakuti chiyambire ubwana wanga mpaka tsopano sindinadye chinthu chakufa chokha, kapena chogwidwa ndi chilombo; simunalowanso m'kamwa mwanga nyama yonyansa." 
Ezekiel4:15 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Taona ndakuninkha ndowe ya ng'ombe m'malo mwa zonyansa za munthu, uotche mkate wako pamenepo." 
Ezekiel4:16 Nanenanso nane, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, taona, ndidzathyola mchirikizo, ndiwo chakudya, m'Yerusalemu; ndipo adzadya chakudyacho monga mwa muyeso, ndi mosamalira, nadzamwa madzi monga mwa muyeso, ndi kudabwa;" 
Ezekiel4:17 kuti asowe chakudya ndi madzi, nasumwesumwe, naondetse mu mphulupulu zao." 
Ezekiel5:1 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, udzitengere mpeni wakuthwa, ndiwo lumo la wometa, udzitengere ndi kulipititsa pamutu pako ndi pa ndevu zako; nudzitengere muyeso kuyesa nao, ndi kugawa tsitsilo." 
Ezekiel5:2 Limodzi la magawo ake atatu utenthe ndi moto pakati pa mudzi pakutha masiku a kuzingidwa mudzi, nutenge gawo lina ndi kukwapulakwapula ndi lupanga pozungulira pake, nuwaze kumphepo gawo lotsala; pakuti ndidzasolola lupanga lakuwatsata." 
Ezekiel5:3 Utengekonso owerengeka ndi kuwamanga m'mkawo wa malaya ako. 
Ezekiel5:4 Nutengekonso pa amenewa ndi kuwaponya pakati pa moto, ndi kuwatentha m'moto; kuchokera kumeneko udzatuluka moto pa nyumba yonse ya Israele." 
Ezekiel5:5 Atero Yehova Mulungu, Uwu ndi Yerusalemu ndinauika pakati pa amitundu, ndi pozungulira pake pali maiko." 
Ezekiel5:6 Koma anakaniza maweruzo anga ndi kuchita zoipa zoposa amitundu, nakaniza malemba anga koposa maiko akuzungulira; pakuti anataya maweruzo anga, ndi malemba anga, sanayendemo." 
Ezekiel5:7 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza kupokosera kwanu kwaposa kwa amitundu akukuzingani, ndipo simunayenda m'malemba anga, kapena kuchita maweruzo anga, ngakhale maweruzo a amitundu akukuzingani simunawachita;" 
Ezekiel5:8 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzatsutsana nawe Inedi, ndi kuchita maweruzo pakati pako pamaso pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ndipo ndidzachita mwa iwe chimene sindinachichita ndi kale lonse, ndi kusadzachitanso momwemo, chifukwa cha zonyansa zako zonse." 
Ezekiel5:10 Chifukwa chake atate adzadya ana pakati pako, ndi ana adzadya atate ao; ndipo ndidzachita maweruzo mwa iwe, ndi akutsala onse ndidzawabalalitsa kumphepo zonse." 
Ezekiel5:11 M'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, popeza wadetsa malo anga opatulika ndi zonyansa zako zonse ndi zoipsa zako zonse, ndidzakuchepsa; diso langa silidzalekerera, ndi Inenso sindidzachita chifundo." 
Ezekiel5:12 Limodzi la magawo atatu la iwe lidzafa ndi mliri, nilidzatha ndi njala pakati pa iwe; ndi limodzi lidzagwa ndi lupanga pozinga pako; ndi limodzi ndidzalibalalikitsa kumphepo zonse, ndi kuwasololera lupanga lakuwatsata." 
Ezekiel5:13 Motero mkwiyo wanga udzakwaniridwa, ndipo ndidzakhutitsa ukali wanga pa iwo, ndi kudzitonthoza; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndinanena m'changu changa, pokwaniridwa nao ukali wanga." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ndidzakuikanso ukhale bwinja ndi chotonza pakati pa amitundu akukuzinga, pamaso pa onse akupitirirapo." 
Ezekiel5:15 Momwemo chidzakhala chotonza ndi mnyozo, chilangizo ndi chodabwitsa kwa amitundu akukuzinga, pamene ndikuchitira maweruzo mu mkwiyo ndi ukali ndi madzudzulo aukali; Ine Yehova ndanena." 
Ezekiel5:16 Pakuwatumizira Ine mivi yoipa ya njala yakuononga, imene ndidzatumiza kukuonongani, pamenepo ndidzakukuzirani njala, ndi kukuthyolerani mchirikizo, ndiwo chakudya." 
Ezekiel5:17 Inde ndidzakutumizirani njala ndi zilombo, ndipo zidzakusowetsa ana ako; ndi mliri ndi mwazi zidzakugwera; ndidzakufikitsiranso lupanga; Ine Yehova ndachinena." 
Ezekiel6:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, kuti," 
Ezekiel6:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako kumapiri a Israele, uwanenere," 
Ezekiel6:3 nunene, Mapiri a Israele inu, tamverani mau a Yehova Mulungu: Atero Yehova Mulungu kwa mapiri ndi zitunda, kwa mitsinje ndi zigwa, Taonani, Ine ndikufikitsirani lupanga, ndipo ndidzaononga misanje yanu." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ndi maguwa anu a nsembe adzakhala opasuka, ndi zoimiritsa zanu zadzuwa zidzasweka; ndipo ndidzagwetsa ophedwa anu pamaso pa mafano anu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndipo ndidzaika mitembo ya ana a Israele pamaso pa mafano anu, ndi kumwaza mafupa anu mozungulira maguwa anu a nsembe." 
Ezekiel6:6 Pokhala inu ponse midzi idzapasuka, ndi misanje idzakhala yabwinja; kuti maguwa anu a nsembe akhale opasuka ndi mabwinja, ndi mafano anu asweke nalekeke, ndi zoimiritsa zanu zadzuwa zilikhidwe, ndi ntchito zanu zifafanizidwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Ndi ophedwa adzagwa pakati panu, motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel6:8 Koma ndidzasiyapo otsala, popeza mudzakhala nao ena akupulumuka lupanga mwa amitundu pobalalitsidwa inu m'maiko maiko." 
Ezekiel6:9 Pamenepo akupulumuka anu adzandikumbukira Ine kwa amitundu kumene anatengedwa ndende, kuti ndasweka ndi mtima wao wachigololo wolekana ndi Ine, ndi maso ao achigololo akutsata mafano ao; ndipo iwo adzakhala onyansa pamaso pao pa iwo eni, chifukwa cha zoipa anazichita m'zonyansa zao zonse." 
Ezekiel6:10 Ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, sindinanena chabe kuti ndidzawachitira choipa ichi." 
Ezekiel6:11 Atero Yehova Mulungu, Omba manja ako, ponda ndi phazi lako, nuti, Kalanga ine, chifukwa cha zonyansa zoipa zonse za nyumba ya Israele; pakuti adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi njala, ndi mliri." 
Ezekiel6:12 Wokhala kutali adzafa ndi mliri, wokhala pafupi adzagwa ndi lupanga; koma wotsala ndi kuzingidwa adzafa ndi njala; momwemo ndidzawakwaniritsira ukali wanga." 
Ezekiel6:13 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pokhala ophedwa ao pakati pa mafano ao, pozinga maguwa ao a nsembe, pa zitunda zonse zazitali, pamwamba pa mapiri onse, ndi patsinde pa mitengo yogudira yonse, ndi patsinde pa thundu aliyense wagudugudu, pomwe adapereka zonunkhira zokoma kwa mafano ao onse." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndipo ndidzawatambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kulisandutsa dziko bwinja ndi lopasuka, koposa chipululu cha ku Ribula mokhalamo iwo monse; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel7:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel7:2 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, atero Ambuye Yehova kwa dziko la Israele, Kwatha; kwafika kutha kwake pangodya zinai za dziko." 
Ezekiel7:3 Tsopano kwakudzera kutha kwako, ndipo ndidzakutumizira mkwiyo wanga, ndi kukuweruza monga mwa njira zako, ndipo ndidzakubwezera zonyansa zako zonse." 
Ezekiel7:4 Ndipo diso langa silidzakulekerera, sindidzachita chifundo, koma ndidzakubwezera njira zako, ndi zonyansa zako zidzakhala pakati pako; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel7:5 Atero Yehova Mulungu, Choipa, choipa cha pa chokha, taona chilinkudza." 
Ezekiel7:6 Kutha kwafika, kwafika kutha. Kwakugalamukira, taona kwafika." 
Ezekiel7:7 Tsoka lako lakufikira, nzika iwe, yafika nthawi, tsiku lili pafupi, ndilo laphokoso, si lakufuula mokondwera kumapiri." 
Ezekiel7:8 Katsala kamphindi, ndipo ndidzakutsanulira ukali wanga, ndi kukukwaniritsira mkwiyo wanga, ndi kukuweruza monga mwa njira zako, ndipo ndidzakubwezera zonyansa zako zonse." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ndipo diso langa silidzalekerera, wosachita chifundo Ine, ndidzakubwezera monga mwa njira zako, ndi zonyansa zako zidzakhala pakati pako; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova wakukantha." 
Ezekiel7:10 Taona, tsikuli, taona, lafika; tsoka lako latuluka, ndodo yaphuka mphundu za maluwa, kudzitama kwaphuka." 
Ezekiel7:11 Chiwawa chauka chikhale ndodo ya choipa; sadzawatsalira ndi mmodzi yense, kapena wa unyinji wao, kapena wa chuma chao; sipadzakhalanso kuwalira maliro." 
Ezekiel7:12 Yafika nthawi, layandikira tsikulo, wogula asakondwere, ndi wogulitsa asamve chisoni; pakuti mkwiyo ukhalira unyinji wao wonse."
