Ezekiel7:13 Pakuti wogulitsa sadzabwera ku chogulitsacho, chinkana akali ndi moyo, popeza masomphenyawo akunena unyinji wake wonse sadzapita pachabe, ndipo palibe mmodzi adzalimbitsa moyo wake m'mphulupulu yake." 
Ezekiel7:14 Aomba lipenga, nakonzeratu zonse, koma palibe womuka kunkhondo; pakuti mkwiyo wanga ukhalira unyinji wake wonse." 
Ezekiel7:15 Kunja kuli lupanga, ndi m'katimo muli mliri ndi njala; wokhala kuthengo adzafa ndi lupanga, ndi wokhala m'mudziyo njala ndi mliri zidzamutha." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ndipo akupulumuka mwa iwo adzapulumuka, koma adzakhala kumapiri ngati njiwa za kuzigwa, onse akubuula, aliyense m'mphulupulu zake." 
Ezekiel7:17 Manja onse adzalenda, ndi maondo onse adzaweyeseka ngati madzi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Ndipo adzadzimangira m'chuuno ndi ziguduli, ndi zoopsetsa zidzawaphimba, ndi nkhope zonse zidzachita manyazi, ndi mitu yao yonse idzachita dazi." 
Ezekiel7:19 Adzataya siliva wao kumakwalala, nadzayesa golide wao chinthu chodetsedwa; siliva wao ndi golide wao sadzakhoza kuwalanditsa tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova, sadzakwaniritsa moyo wao, kapena kudzaza matumbo ao; pakuti izi ndi chokhumudwitsa cha mphulupulu zao." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ndipo chokometsera chake chokongola anachiyesa chodzikuza nacho, napangira mafanizo olaula, ndi zonyansa zao zina; chifukwa chake ndinapatsa ichi chikhale chowadetsa." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ndipo ndidzachipereka m'dzanja la alendo chikhale cholandika, ndi kwa oipa a m'dziko chikhale chofunkha; ndipo adzachiipsa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndipo nkhope yanga idzawayang'anira kumbali, ndipo iwo adzadetsa pobisika panga, nadzalowamo achifwamba, nadzamudetsa." 
Ezekiel7:23 Sula unyolo, popeza dziko ladzala ndi milandu yamwazi, ndi mudzi wadzala ndi chiwawa." 
Ezekiel7:24 Chifukwa chake ndidzabwera nao amitundu oipitsitsa, ndipo iwo adzalandira nyumba zao ngati cholowa, ndidzaleketsanso kudzikuza kwa amphamvu, kuti adetsedwe malo ao opatulika." 
Ezekiel7:25 Chionongeko chilinkudza, adzafunafuna mtendere, koma palibe." 
Ezekiel7:26 Lidzafika tsoka lotsatanatsatana, kudzakhalanso mbiri yotsatanatsatana, ndipo adzafunafuna masomphenya a mneneri, koma malamulo adzatayikira wansembe, uphungu ndi kutayikira akulu." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mfumu idzalira maliro, ndi kalonga adzavala chipasuko, ndi manja a anthu a m'dziko adzanjenjemera. Ndidzawachitira monga mwa njira zao, ndi kuwaweruza monga mwa maweruzo ao; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel8:1 Ndipo kunali chaka chachisanu ndi chimodzi, mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi, tsiku lachisanu la mweziwo, pokhala ine m'nyumba mwanga, akulu a Yuda omwe analikukhala pamaso panga, dzanja la Yehova Mulungu linandigwera komweko." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ndipo ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, chifaniziro cha maonekedwe a moto; kuyambira maonekedwe a m'chuuno mwake ndi kunsi kwake, moto; ndi kuyambira m'chuuno mwake ndi kumwamba kwake, monga maonekedwe a cheza, ngati chitsulo chakupsa." 
Ezekiel8:3 Ndipo anatambasula chonga dzanja, nandigwira tsitsi la pamutu panga; ndipo mzimu unandilengetsa pakati pa dziko ndi thambo, numuka nane m'masomphenya a Mulungu ku Yerusalemu, ku chitseko cha chipata cha bwalo la m'katimo loloza kumpoto, kumene kunali mpando wa fano la nsanje lochititsa nsanje." 
Ezekiel8:4 Ndipo taonani, pomwepo panali ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israele, monga mwa maonekedwe ndinawaona kuchidikha chija." 
Ezekiel8:5 Pamenepo ananena ndi ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kweza maso ako kunjira yoloza kumpoto. Ndipo ndinakweza maso anga kunjira yoloza kumpoto, ndipo taonani, kumpoto kwa chipata cha guwa la nsembe fano ili la nsanje polowera pake." 
Ezekiel8:6 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, uona kodi izi alikuzichita? Zonyansa zazikulu nyumba ya Israele ilikuzichita kuno, kuti ndichoke kutali kwa malo anga opatulika? Koma udzaonanso zonyansa zina zoposa." 
Ezekiel8:7 Ndipo anadza nane kuchipata cha kubwalo, ndipo popenya ine, taonani, pobooka palinga." 
Ezekiel8:8 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, booletsa kulinga; ndipo nditabooletsa palinga, ndinaona khomo." 
Ezekiel8:9 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Lowa, kapenye zonyansa zoipa alikuzichita komweko." 
Ezekiel8:10 M'mwemo ndinalowa ndi kupenya, ndipo taonani, maonekedwe ali onse a zokwawa, ndi zilombo zonyansa, ndi mafano onse a nyumba ya Israele, zolembedwa pakhoma pozungulira ponse." 
Ezekiel8:11 Ndipo pamaso pao panaima amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri a akulu a nyumba ya Israele, ndi pakati pao panaima Yazaniya mwana wa Safani, munthu aliyense ndi mbale yake ya zofukiza m'dzanja lake; ndi fungo lake la mtambo wa zonunkhira linakwera." 
Ezekiel8:12 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, wapenya kodi chochita akulu a nyumba ya Israele mumdima, aliyense m'chipinda chake cha zifanizo? Pakuti ati, Yehova satipenya, Yehova wataya dziko." 
Ezekiel8:13 Anatinso kwa ine, Udzaonanso zonyansa zazikulu zina azichita." 
Ezekiel8:14 Pamenepo anadza nane kuchitseko cha chipata cha nyumba ya Yehova choloza kumpoto; ndipo taonani, apo panakhala akazi akulirira Tamuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wachiona ichi, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe? Udzaonanso zonyansa zazikulu zoposa izi." 
Ezekiel8:16 Ndipo anadza nane ku bwalo lam'kati la nyumba ya Yehova, ndipo taonani, pa khomo la Kachisi wa Yehova, pakati pa khonde lake ndi guwa la nsembe, panali amuna ngati makumi awiri mphambu asanu akufulatira, ku Kachisi wa Yehova, ndi kuyang'ana kum'mawa, napembedza dzuwa kum'mawa." 
Ezekiel8:17 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wachiona ichi, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe? Chinthu chopepuka ichi kodi ndi nyumba ya Yuda, kuti achite zonyansa azichita kunozi? Pakuti anadzaza dziko ndi chiwawa, nabwereranso kuutsa mkwiyo wanga, ndipo taonani, aika nthambi kumphuno kwao." 
Ezekiel8:18 Chifukwa chake Inenso ndidzachita mwaukali; diso langa silidzalekerera, osawachitira chifundo Ine; ndipo chinkana afuula m'makutu mwanga ndi mau akulu, koma sindidzawamvera Ine." 
Ezekiel9:1 Pamenepo Iye anafuula m'makutu mwanga ndi mau akulu, ndi kuti, Asendere oyang'anira mudzi, aliyense ndi chida chake choonongera m'dzanja lake." 
Ezekiel9:2 Ndipo taonani, anadza amuna asanu ndi mmodzi, odzera njira ya chipata cha kumtunda choloza kumpoto, aliyense ndi chida chake chophera m'dzanja lake; ndi munthu mmodzi pakati pao wovala bafuta, ndi zolembera nazo m'chuuno mwake. Ndipo analowa, naima m'mphepete mwa guwa la nsembe lamkuwa." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ndipo ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israele unakwera kuchoka pa kerubi, pamene unakhalira kunka kuchiundo cha nyumba, naitana munthu wovala bafutayo wokhala ndi zolembera nazo m'chuuno mwake." 
Ezekiel9:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Pita pakati pa mudzi, pakati pa Yerusalemu, nulembe chizindikiro pa mphumi zao za anthu akuusa moyo ndi kulira chifukwa cha zonyansa zonse zichitidwa pakati pake." 
Ezekiel9:5 Nati kwa enawo, ndilikumva ine, Pitani pakati pa mudzi kumtsata iye, ndi kukantha; maso anu asalekerere, musachite chifundo;" 
Ezekiel9:6 iphanitu nkhalamba, mnyamata ndi namwali, makanda, ndi akazi; koma musayandikira munthu aliyense ali nacho chizindikiro, ndipo muyambe pa malo anga opatulika. Pamenepo anayamba ndi akuluwo anali pakhomo pa nyumba." 
Ezekiel9:7 Nati kwa iwo, Muipse nyumbayi ndi kudzaza mabwalo ndi ophedwa, mukani. Ndipo anatuluka, nakantha m'mudzimo." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ndipo kunali, alimkukantha iwo, nditatsala ine, ndinagwa nkhope yanga pansi, ndi kufuula, ndi kuti, Kalanga ine, Ambuye Mulungu! Kodi mudzaononga otsala onse a Israele pakutsanulira ukali wanu pa Yerusalemu?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Pamenepo ananena nane, Mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Israele ndi Yuda ndi yaikulukulu ndithu, ndi dziko ladzala ndi mwazi, ndi mudziwo wadzala ndi kukhotetsa milandu; pakuti ati, Yehova wataya dziko, Yehova sapenya." 
Ezekiel9:10 Ndipo Inenso diso langa silidzalekerera, wosachita chifundo Ine, koma ndidzawabwezera njira yao pamtu pao." 
Ezekiel9:11 Ndipo taonani, munthu wovala bafutayo, wokhala ndi zolembera nazo m'chuuno mwake, anabweza mau, ndi kuti, Ndachita monga munandilamulira ine." 
Ezekiel10:1 Ndipo ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, kuthambo lokhala pamwamba pa mitu ya akerubi kudaoneka ngati mwala wasafiro, ngati maonekedwe a chifaniziro cha mpando wachifumu pamwamba pao." 
Ezekiel10:2 Ndipo Yehova analankhula ndi munthu wovala bafuta, nati, Lowa pakati pa njingazi pansi pa kerubi, nudzaze manja ako makala a moto ochokera pakati pa akerubi, nuwamwaze pamwamba pa mudzi. Nalowa, ndili chipenyere ine." 
Ezekiel10:3 Tsono akerubi anaima kudzanja lamanja la nyumba polowa munthuyo, ndi mtambo unadzaza bwalo la m'kati." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unakwera kuchokera kukerubi kunka kuchiundo cha nyumba; ndi nyumba inadzala nao mtambo, ndi bwalo linadzala ndi cheza cha ulemerero wa Yehova." 
Ezekiel10:5 Ndipo mkokomo wa mapiko a akerubi unamveka mpaka bwalo lakunja, ngati mau a Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse, pakunena Iye." 
Ezekiel10:6 Ndipo kunali pomlamulira munthu wovala bafutayo, ndi kuti, Para moto pakati pa njingazi ndi pakati pa akerubi; iye analowa, naima m'mbali mwa njinga." 
Ezekiel10:7 Pamenepo kerubi wina anatambasula dzanja lake pakati pa akerubi kumoto uli pakati pa akerubi, napalako, nauika m'manja mwa iye wovala bafuta, ndiye naulandira, natuluka." 
Ezekiel10:8 Ndipo panaoneka pa akerubi chonga dzanja la munthu pansi pa mapiko ao. 
Ezekiel10:9 Pamenepo ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, njinga zinai m'mbali mwa akerubi, njinga imodzi m'mbali mwa kerubi mmodzi, ndi njinga ina m'mbali mwa kerubi wina, ndi maonekedwe a njingazi ananga mawalidwe a berulo." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ndipo maonekedwe ake, zonse zinai zinafanana, ngati njinga ziwiri zopingasitsana." 
Ezekiel10:11 Pakuyenda akerubi anayenda kumbali zao zinai, sanatembenuke poyenda; koma komwe udalozako mutu anatsatako, sanatembenuke poyenda." 
Ezekiel10:12 Ndipo thupi lao lonse, ndi misana yao, ndi manja ao, ndi mapiko ao, ndi njinga zomwe, zinadzala ndi maso pozungulira pao, zingakhale njingazi anai aja anali nazo." 
Ezekiel10:13 Kunena za njingazi, wina anazifuulira, ndili chimvere ine, Kunkhulirani." 
Ezekiel10:14 Ndipo aliyense anali nazo nkhope zinai, nkhope yoyamba ndiyo nkhope ya kerubi, ndi nkhope yachiwiri ndiyo nkhope ya munthu, ndi yachitatu ndiyo nkhope ya mkango, ndi yachinai ndiyo nkhope ya chiombankhanga." 
Ezekiel10:15 Pamenepo akerubi anakwera, ndizo zamoyo zija ndinaziona kumtsinje Kebara." 
Ezekiel10:16 Ndipo pakuyenda akerubi, njinga zinayenda pambali pao, ndi pakutambasula mapiko ao akerubiwo kuuluka padziko, njingazi sizinatembenuka pambali pao." 
Ezekiel10:17 Pakuima iwo zinaima izi, ndi pakukwera iwo izi zinakwera pamodzi nao; pakuti mzimu wa zamoyozo unali mwa izo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unachoka pa chiundo cha nyumba, nuima pamwamba pa akerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Ndipo akerubi anatambasula mapiko ao, nauluka padziko, ndili chipenyere, pakuchoka iwo ndi njingazi pa mbali pao; ndipo anaima pa chitseko cha chipata cha kum'mawa cha nyumba ya Yehova, ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israele unali pamwamba pao." 
Ezekiel10:20 Awa ndi zamoyozo ndinaziona pansi pa Mulungu wa Israele kumtsinje Kebara, ndipo ndinadziwa kuti ndiwo akerubi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Yense anali nazo nkhope zinai, ndi yense mapiko anai, ndi chifaniziro cha manja a munthu pansi pa mapiko ao." 
Ezekiel10:22 Ndi chifaniziro cha nkhope zao ndicho nkhope zomwezo ndinaziona kumtsinje Kebara, maonekedwe ao ndi iwo eni; aliyense anayenda, nalunjika m'tsogolo." 
Ezekiel11:1 Pamenepo unandikweza mzimu, nudza nane kuchipata cha kum'mawa cha nyumba ya Yehova choloza kum'mawa; ndipo taonani, pa chitseko cha chipata amuna makumi awiri mphambu asanu; ndipo ndinaona pakati pao Yazaniya mwana wa Azuri ndi Pelatiya mwana wa Benaya, akalonga a anthu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, awa ndi anthu olingirira za mphulupulu, ndi kupangira uphungu woipa m'mudzi muno;" 
Ezekiel11:3 ndiwo akuti, siinafike nyengo yakumanga nyumba; mudzi uwu ndi mphika, ife ndife nyama." 
Ezekiel11:4 Chifukwa chake uwanenere, neneratu, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe." 
Ezekiel11:5 Pamenepo mzimu wa Yehova unandigwera, ndipo anati kwa ine, Nena, Atero Yehova, Mwatero nyumba ya Israele, pakuti ndidziwa zimene zimalowa m'mtima mwanu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Mwachulukitsa ophedwa anu m'mudzi muno, mwadzazanso makwalala ake ndi ophedwawo." 
Ezekiel11:7 Chifukwa chake atero Yehova Mulungu, Ophedwa anu munawaika m'kati mwake, iwo ndiwo nyama imene, ndi mudzi uwu ndiwo mphika; koma inu mudzatulutsidwa m'kati mwake." 
Ezekiel11:8 Mwaopa lupanga, tsono ndidzakufikitsirani lupanga, ati Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndipo ndidzakutulutsani m'kati mwake, ndi kukuperekani m'manja a alendo, ndi kuchita maweruzo pakati panu." 
Ezekiel11:10 Mudzagwa ndi lupanga, ndidzakuweruzirani kumalire a Israele; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel11:11 Mudzi uno sudzakhala mphika wanu, ndi inu simudzakhala nyama m'kati mwake, ndidzakuweruzirani kumalire a Israele;" 
Ezekiel11:12 ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuti simunayenda m'malemba anga, kapena kuchita maweruzo anga, koma mwachita monga mwa maweruzo a amitundu okhala pozungulira panu." 
Ezekiel11:13 Ndipo kunali, pakunenera ine, anamwalira Pelatiya mwana wa Benaya. Pamenepo ndinagwa nkhope yanga pansi, ndi kufuula ndi mau akulu, ndi kuti, Kalanga ine, Yehova Mulungu? Mudzatsiriza kodi otsala a Israele?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera kuti," 
Ezekiel11:15 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, abale ako, inde abale ako amuna a chibale chako, ndi nyumba yonse ya Israele, yonseyi ndiwo amene okhala m'Yerusalemu ananena nao, Muzikhala kutali kwa Yehova; dziko ili lapatsidwa kwa ife, likhale cholowa chathu;" 
Ezekiel11:16 chifukwa chake uziti, Atero Yehova Mulungu, Ngakhale ndawachotsa kutali mwa amitundu, ngakhalenso ndawabalalikitsa m'maiko, koma ndidzawakhalira malo opatulika kanthawi kumaiko adafikako." 
Ezekiel11:17 Chifukwa chake uziti, Atero Yehova Mulungu, Ndidzakumemezani kumitundu ya anthu, ndi kukusonkhanitsani muchoke m'maiko m'mene munabalalikiramo, ndipo ndidzakuninkhani dziko la Israele." 
Ezekiel11:18 Ndipo adzafikako, nadzachotsako zonyansa zake zonse, ndi zake zonse zakuipitsamo." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndipo ndidzawapatsa mtima umodzi, ndi kuika mzimu watsopano m'kati mwao; ndipo ndidzawachotsera mtima wamwala m'thupi mwao, ndi kuwapatsa mtima wamnofu;" 
Ezekiel11:20 kuti ayende m'malemba anga, ndi kusunga maweruzo anga, ndi kuwachita; ndipo adzakhala anthu anga, ndi Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wao." 
Ezekiel11:21 Koma iwo amene mtima wao unatsata mtima wa zonyansa zao, ndi zoipitsitsa zao, ndidzawabwezera njira yao pamtu pao, ati Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel11:22 Pamenepo akerubi anatambasula mapiko ao, ndi njinga zinali pa mbali pao; ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israele unali pamwamba pao." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unakwera kuchoka pakati pa mudzi, nuima pa phiri la kum'mawa kwa mudzi." 
Ezekiel11:24 Ndipo mzimu unandikweza, nufika nane m'masomphenya mwa mzimu wa Mulungu kudziko la Ababiloni, kwa andendewo. M'mwemo masomphenya ndidawaona anandichokera, nakwera." 
Ezekiel11:25 Pamenepo ndinanena ndi andendewo zonse zija adandionetsa Yehova. 
Ezekiel12:1 Mau a Yehova anandidzeranso, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel12:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ukhala pakati pa nyumba yampanduko, yokhala nao maso akuonera, koma osaona; ndi makutu akumvera, koma osamva; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yampanduko." 
Ezekiel12:3 Potero wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, udzikonzeretu akatundu a pa ulendo wa kundende, nuchoke usana pamaso pao, uchoke pokhala iwepo kunka malo ena pamaso pao; kapena adzachizindikira, angakhale ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel12:4 Uzitulutsa akatundu ako usana pamaso pao, ngati a pa ulendo wa kundende; ndipo madzulo uzituluka wekha pamaso pao, monga amatuluka olowa kundende." 
Ezekiel12:5 Udziboolere khoma pamaso pao, nuwatulutsire akatundu pamenepo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Pamaso pao uwasenze paphewa pako, ndi kuwatulutsa kuli mdima, nuphimbe nkhope yako kuti usapenye dziko; popeza ndakuika chizindikiro cha nyumba ya Israele." 
Ezekiel12:7 Ndipo ndinachita monga momwe anandilamulira, ndinatulutsa akatundu anga usana, ngati a pa ulendo wa kundende, ndi madzulo ndinaboola pakhoma ndi dzanja langa, ndinawatulutsa pali mdima, ndi kuwasenza paphewa panga pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ndipo m'mawa mau a Yehova anandidzera, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel12:9 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kodi nyumba ya Israele, nyumba yampanduko, siinati kwa iwe, Uchitanji?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Unene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Katundu uyu anena za kalonga wa m'Yerusalemu, ndi nyumba yonse ya Israele yokhala pakati pao." 
Ezekiel12:11 Uziti, Ine ndine chizindikiro chanu, monga ndachita ine momwemo kudzachitidwa nao; adzachotsedwa kunka kundende." 
Ezekiel12:12 Kalongayo ali pakati pao adzasenza paphewa pake mumdima, nadzatuluka; adzaboola palinga, nadzatulutsapo; adzaphimba nkhope yake kuti asapenye dziko ndi maso ake." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndidzamphimba ndi ukonde wanga, nadzakodwa iye mu msampha wanga; ndipo ndidzafika naye ku Babiloni, ku dziko la Ababiloni; sadzaliona, chinkana adzafako." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ndipo onse omzinga kumthandiza, ndi magulu ake onse, ndidzawamwaza kumphepo zonse, ndidzawasololeranso lupanga lakuwatsata." 
Ezekiel12:15 Motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuwamwaza Ine mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko." 
Ezekiel12:16 Koma ndidzawasiya owerengeka apulumuke lupanga, ndi njala, ndi mliri, kuti afotokoze zonyansa zao kwa amitundu kumene afikako; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel12:17 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel12:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, udye mkate wako ndi kunthunthumira, ndi kumwa madzi ako ndi kunjenjemera, ndi kutenga nkhawa;" 
Ezekiel12:19 nunene kwa anthu a m'dziko, Atero Yehova Mulungu za iwo okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi za dziko la Israele, Adzadya mkate wao ndi nkhawa, ndi kumwa madzi ao ndi kusumwa; pakuti dziko lao lidzakhala lachipululu, kuleka kudzala kwake chifukwa cha chiwawa cha onse okhalamo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ndi midzi yokhalamo anthu idzapasuka, ndi dziko lidzakhala labwinja; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel12:21 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel12:22 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ngwotani mwambi umene muli nao m'dziko la Israele, wakuti, Masiku achuluka, ndi masomphenya ali onse apita pachabe?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Chifukwa chake unene nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu, Ndidzaleketsa mwambi uwu, ndipo sadzautchulanso mwambi m'Israele; koma unene nao, Masiku ayandikira, nadzachitika masomphenya ali onse." 
Ezekiel12:24 Pakuti sikudzakhalanso masomphenya achabe, kapena ula wosyasyalika m'nyumba ya Israele." 
Ezekiel12:25 Pakuti Ine ndine Yehova, ndidzanena, ndi mau ndidzanenawo adzachitika, osazengerezekanso; pakuti m'masiku anu, nyumba yopanduka inu, ndidzanena mau ndi kuwachita, ati Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel12:26 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel12:27 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, taona, iwo a nyumba ya Israele akuti, masomphenya awaona ndiwo a masiku ambiri; ndipo anenera za nthawi zili kutali." 
Ezekiel12:28 Chifukwa chake uziti nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Palibe amodzi a mau anga adzazengerezekanso; koma mau ndidzanenawo adzachitika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera ine, akuti," 
Ezekiel13:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Unenere za aneneri a Israele onenerawo, nuziti nao onenera za m'mtima mwaomwao, Tamverani mau a Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:3 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka aneneri opusawo akutsata mzimu waowao, chinkana sanaone kanthu." 
Ezekiel13:4 Aneneri ako, Israele, akhala ngati nkhandwe m'mapululu." 
Ezekiel13:5 Simunakwera kuima mopasuka, kapena kumanganso linga la nyumba ya Israele, kuima kunkhondo tsiku la Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:6 Iwo aona zopanda pake, ndi phenda labodza amene anena, Atero Yehova; koma Yehova sanawatume, nayembekezetsa anthu kuti mauwo adzakhazikika." 
Ezekiel13:7 Simunaona masomphenya opanda pake kodi? Simunanena ula wabodza kodi? Pakunena inu, Atero Yehova; chinkana sindinanena?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mwanena zopanda pake, ndi kuona mabodza, chifukwa chake taonani, ndikhala Ine wotsutsana nanu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ndi dzanja langa lidzakhala lotsutsana nao aneneri akuona zopanda pake, ndi kupenda za bodza; sadzakhala mu msonkhano wa anthu anga, kapena kulembedwa m'buku lolembedwamo nyumba ya Israele; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:10 Popeza, inde popeza asokeretsa anthu anga, ndi kuti, Mtendere, pokhala palibe mtendere; ndipo anthu akamanga linga, aneneriwo alimata ndi dothi losapondeka;" 
Ezekiel13:11 uziti nao olimata ndi dothi losapondeka, kuti lidzagwa, lidzavumbidwa ndi mvula yaikulu; ndi inu, matalala akulu, mudzagwa; ndi mkuntho udzalithithimula." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ndipo taonani, litagwa linga, sadzanena nanu kodi, Lili kuti dothi munalimata nalo?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzalithithimula ndi mkuntho m'ukali wanga; ndipo lidzavumbidwa ndi mvula yaikulu mu mkwiyo wanga, ndi matalala akulu adzalitha m'ukali wanga." 
Ezekiel13:14 M'mwemo ndidzagumula linga munalimata ndi dothi losapondeka, ndi kuligwetsa pansi; kuti maziko ake agadabuke, ndipo lidzagwa; ndi inu mudzathedwa pakati pake; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:15 M'mwemo ndidzakwaniritsa ukali wanga pa lingalo, ndi pa iwo analimata ndi dothi losapondeka, ndipo ndidzati kwa inu, Lingalo palibe, ndi olimata palibe," 
Ezekiel13:16 ndiwo aneneri a Israele akunenera za Yerusalemu, nauonera masomphenya a mtendere, pamene palibe mtendere, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:17 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, uziika nkhope yako itsutsane nao ana akazi a anthu ako, akunenera za m'mtima mwao, nunenere chowatsutsa," 
Ezekiel13:18 nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka akazi osoka zophimbira mfundo zonse za dzanja, ndi iwo okonza zokuta mitu za misinkhu iliyonse, kuti asake miyoyo! Kodi musaka miyoyo ya anthu anga ndi kudzisungira miyoyo yanu?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Ndipo mundidetsa mwa anthu anga kulandirapo barele wodzala manja, ndi zidutsu za mkate, kuipha miyoyo yosayenera kufa, ndi kusunga miyoyo yosayenera kukhala ndi moyo, ndi kunena mabodza kwa anthu anga omvera bodza." 
Ezekiel13:20 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, nditsutsana nazo zophimbira zanu, zimene musaka nazo miyoyo komweko, kuiuluza; ndipo ndidzazikwatula m'manja mwanu, ndi kuimasula, ndiyo miyoyo muisaka kuiuluza." 
Ezekiel13:21 Zokuta mitu zanu zomwe ndidzazing'amba, ndi kulanditsa anthu anga m'manja mwanu; ndipo sadzakhalanso m'mphamvu mwanu kusakidwa; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:22 Popeza mwamvetsa chisoni ndi mabodza mtima wa wolungama, amene sindinamvetsa chisoni Ine, ndi kumlimbitsa manja woipa, kuti asabwerere kuleka njira yake yoipa, ndi kusungidwa wamoyo;" 
Ezekiel13:23 chifukwa chake simudzaonanso zopanda pake, kapena kupenda; koma ndidzalanditsa anthu anga m'manja mwanu; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:1 Pamenepo anafika kwa ine akulu ena a Israele nakhala pansi pamaso panga. 
Ezekiel14:2 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel14:3 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, anthu awa anautsa mafano ao mumtima mwao, naimika chokhumudwitsa cha mphulupulu yao pamaso pao; ndifunsidwe nao konse kodi?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Chifukwa chake ulankhule nao, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Aliyense wa nyumba ya Israele wakuutsa mafano ake mumtima mwake, naimika chokhumudwitsa cha mphulupulu yake pamaso pake, nadza kwa mneneri, Ine Yehova ndidzamyankhapo monga mwa mafano ake aunyinji;" 
Ezekiel14:5 kuti ndigwire nyumba ya Israele mumtima mwao; popeza onsewo asanduka alendo ndi Ine mwa mafano ao. 
Ezekiel14:6 Chifukwa chake uziti kwa nyumba ya Israele, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Bwerani, lekani mafano anu, tembenuzani nkhope zanu kuzisiya zonyansa zanu zonse." 
Ezekiel14:7 Pakuti aliyense wa nyumba ya Israele, kapena wa alendo ogonera m'Israele, wodzisiyanitsa kusatsata Ine, nautsa mafano ake m'mtima mwake, naimika chokhumudwitsa cha mphulupulu yake pamaso pake, nadzera mneneri kudzifunsira kwa Ine, Ine Yehova ndidzamyankha ndekha;" 
Ezekiel14:8 ndipo ndidzaikira munthu uyu nkhope yanga imtsutse, ndi kumuyesa chodabwitsa, ndi chizindikiro, ndi mwambi, ndi kumsadza pakati pa anthu anga; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:9 Ndipo akacheteka mneneriyo, nakanena mau, Ine Yehova ndamcheta mneneri uja; ndipo ndidzamtambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kumuononga pakati pa anthu anga Israele." 
Ezekiel14:10 Ndipo adzasenza mphulupulu yao, mphulupulu ya mneneri idzanga mphulupulu ya uja wamfunsira;" 
Ezekiel14:11 kuti nyumba ya Israele isasocherenso kusatsata Ine, kapena kudzidetsanso ndi zolakwa zao zonse; koma kuti akhale anthu anga, ndipo ndikhale Ine Mulungu wao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:12 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova akuti," 
Ezekiel14:13 Likandichimwira dziko ndi kuchita monyenga, ndipo ndikalitambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kulithyolera mchirikizo wake, ndiwo mkate, ndi kulitumizira njala, ndi kulidulira munthu ndi nyama," 
Ezekiel14:14 chinkana akadakhala m'mwemo anthu awa atatu, Nowa, Daniele, ndi Yobu, akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha mwa chilungamo chao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:14 chinkana akadakhala m'mwemo anthu awa atatu, Nowa, Daniele, ndi Yobu, akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha mwa chilungamo chao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ndikapititsa zilombo zoipa pakati pa dziko, nizipulula ana, kuti likhale lachipululu losapitako munthu chifukwa cha zilombo," 
Ezekiel14:16 chinkana anthu omwewo atatu akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; iwo akadapulumuka okha; koma dziko likadakhala lachipululu." 
Ezekiel14:17 Kapena ndikadza pa dziko ndi lupanga, ndi kuti, Lupanga lipite pakati pa dziko, kuti ndilidulire munthu ndi nyama;" 
Ezekiel14:18 chinkana anthu atatuwo akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; koma iwo akadapulumuka okha." 
Ezekiel14:19 Kapena ndikatumizira dzikolo mliri, ndi kulitsanulira ukali wanga ndi mwazi, kulidulira munthu ndi nyama;" 
Ezekiel14:20 chinkana Nowa, Daniele, ndi Yobu, akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha ndi chilungamo chao." 
Ezekiel14:20 chinkana Nowa, Daniele, ndi Yobu, akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha ndi chilungamo chao." 
Ezekiel14:21 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Kopambana kotani nanga ndikatumizira Yerusalemu maweruzo anga anai owawa, lupanga, njala, zilombo zoipa, ndi mliri, kuudulira anthu ndi nyama?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Koma onani mudzatsala opulumuka m'mwemo amene adzatulutsidwa, ndiwo ana aamuna ndi aakazi; taonani, adzatuluka kudza kwa inu; ndipo mudzaona njira zao, ndi zochita zao; mudzatonthozedwanso pa zoipa ndazitengera pa Yerusalemu, inde pa zonse ndazitengerapo." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ndipo adzakusangalatsani pamene muona njira yao, ndi zochita zao; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti sindinazichita kopanda chifukwa zonse ndinazichita momwemo, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel15:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel15:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, mtengo wampesa uposeranji mtengo uliwonse wina, nthambi ya mpesa yokhalayo mwa mitengo ya kunkhalango?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Kodi atengako mtengo kupanga nao ntchito? Atengako chichiri kodi kupachikapo chipangizo chilichonse? 
Ezekiel15:4 Taona, auponya kumoto kuuyesa nkhuni, moto unyeketsa nsonga zake zonse ziwiri, nupserera pakati pake, kodi ukomera ntchito iliyonse?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Taonani, pokhala wamphumphu sunayenera ntchito iliyonse, nanga utanyeketsa moto nupserera udzayeneranso ntchito iliyonse?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Ngati mtengo wampesa pakati pa mitengo ya kunkhalango ndauponya kumoto ukhale nkhuni, momwemo ndidzapereka okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndipo ndidzaika nkhope yanga iwatsutse; adzatuluka kumoto, mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuika Ine nkhope yanga iwatsutse." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa dziko chipululu; popeza anachita cholakwa, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel16:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Dziwitsa Yerusalemu zonyansa zake, nuziti," 
Ezekiel16:3 Atero Ambuye Yehova kwa Yerusalemu, Chiyambi chako ndi kubadwa kwako ndiko kudziko la Akanani; atate wako anali Mwamori, ndi mai wako Muhiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ndipo za kubadwa kwako, tsiku lobadwa iwe sanadule nchofu yako, sanakuyeretse ndi kukusambitsa ndi madzi, sanakuthire mchere konse, kapena kukukulunga m'nsalu ai." 
Ezekiel16:5 Panalibe diso linakuchitira chifundo, kukuchitira chimodzi chonse cha izi, kuchitira iwe nsoni; koma unatayidwa kuyere; pakuti ananyansidwa nao moyo wako tsiku la kubadwa kwako." 
Ezekiel16:6 Ndipo popita Ine panali iwepo, ndinakuona ulikuvimvinizika m'mwazi mwako. Pamenepo ndinanena ndi iwe m'mwazi wako. Khala ndi moyo, inde ndinati kwa iwe m'mwazi mwako, Khala ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel16:7 Ndinakuchulukitsa ngati mphundu za kumunda; ndipo unathululuka ndi kukula kufikira wakongola nkhope, mawere ako anamera, ndi tsitsi lako linamera; koma unali wamaliseche ndi wausiwa." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ndipo popita Ine panali iwepo ndi kukupenya, taona nyengo yako ndiyo nyengo yakukondana; pamenepo ndinakufunda chofunda changa, ndi kuphimba umaliseche wako; inde ndinakulumbirira ndi kupangana nawe, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndipo unakhala wanga." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ndipo ndinakusambitsa ndi madzi, inde ndinakutsuka kukuchotsera mwazi wako, ndi kukudzoza mafuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndinakuvekanso ndi nsalu zopikapika, ndi kukuveka nsapato za chikopa cha katumbu; ndinakuzenenga nsalu yabafuta, ndi kukuphimba ndi nsalu yasilika." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndinakukometseranso ndi zokometsera, ndi kuika zigwinjiri m'manja mwako, ndi unyolo m'khosi mwako." 
Ezekiel16:12 Momwemo ndinaika chipini m'mphuno mwako, ndi maperere m'makutu mwako, ndi korona wokongola pamutu pako." 
Ezekiel16:13 Ndipo unadzikometsera ndi golide, ndi siliva, ndi chovala chako ndi bafuta ndi silika ndi yopikapika; unadya ufa wosalala, ndi uchi, ndi mafuta; ndipo unali wokongola woposa ndithu, ndipo unapindulapindula kufikira unasanduka ufumu." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ndi mbiri yako inabuka mwa amitundu chifukwa cha kukongola kwako; pakuti ndiko kwangwiro, mwa ulemerero wanga ndinauika pa iwe, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:15 Koma unatama kukongola kwako, ndi kuchita zachigololo potama mbiri yako, ndi kutsanulira zigololo zako pa munthu aliyense wopitapo; unali wake." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ndipo unatengako zovala zako, ndi kudzimangira misanje ya mawangamawanga, ndi kuchitapo chigololo; zotere sizinayenera kufika kapena kuchitika." 
Ezekiel16:17 Unatenganso zokometsera zako zokoma za golide wanga ndi siliva wanga, zimene ndinakupatsa, ndi kudzipangira mafano a amuna, ndi kuchita nao chigololo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Unatenganso zovala zako za nsalu yopikapika, ndi kuwaveka nazo, unaikanso mafuta anga ndi chofukiza changa pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ndi mkate wanga ndinakupatsawo, ufa wosalala, ndi mafuta, ndi uchi, ndinakudyetsazo, unawaikira izi pamaso pao, zichite fungo lokoma; kunatero, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:20 Unatenganso ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi amene unandibalirawo, ndi kuwapereka nsembe awathe. Zigololo zako zidachepa kodi," 
Ezekiel16:21 kuti unawapha ana anga ndi kuwapereka, pakuwapititsa pamoto?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Ndipo pa zonyansa zako zonse ndi zigololo zako sunakumbukira masiku a ubwana wako, muja unakhala wamaliseche ndi wausiwa, wovimvinizika m'mwazi wako." 
Ezekiel16:23 Ndipo kudachitika utatha zoipa zako zonse, (tsoka iwe, tsoka, ati Ambuye Yehova)" 
Ezekiel16:24 unadzimangira nyumba yachimphuli, unadzimangiranso chiunda m'makwalala ali onse." 
Ezekiel16:25 Unamanga chiunda chako pa mphambano zilizonse, ndipo unanyansitsa kukongola kwako, ndi kutukula mapazi ako kwa yense wopitako, ndi kuchulukitsa chigololo chako." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wachitanso chigololo ndi Ejipito oyandikizana nawe, akulu thupi, ndi kuchulukitsa chigololo chako kuutsa mkwiyo wanga." 
Ezekiel16:27 Taona tsono, ndakutambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kuchepsa gawo lako la chakudya, ndi kukupereka ku chifuniro cha iwo akudana nawe, kwa ana akazi a Afilisti akuchita manyazi ndi njira yako yoipa." 
Ezekiel16:28 Unachitanso chigololo ndi Aasiriya, pakuti unakhala wosakoledwa, inde unachita chigololo nao, koma sunakoledwa." 
Ezekiel16:29 Unachulukitsanso chigololo chako m'dziko la Kanani, mpaka dziko la Ababiloni, koma sunakoledwa nachonso." 
Ezekiel16:30 Ha? Mtima wako ngwofooka, ati Ambuye Yehova, pakuchita iwe izi zonse, ndizo ntchito za mkazi wachigololo wouma m'maso." 
Ezekiel16:31 Pakumanga nyumba yako yachimphuli pa mphambano zilizonse, ndi pomanga chiunda chako m'makwalala ali onse, sunakhala ngati mkazi wadama waphindu, popeza unapeputsa mphotho." 
Ezekiel16:32 Ndiwe mkazi wokwatibwa wochita chigololo, wolandira alendo m'malo mwa mwamuna wake." 
Ezekiel16:33 Anthu amaninkha akazi onse achigololo mphatso, koma iwe umaninkha mabwenzi ako onse mphatso zako ndi kuwalipira, kuti akudzere kuchokera kumbali zonse, kuti achite nawe chigololo." 
Ezekiel16:34 M'mwemo usiyana konse ndi akazi ena m'chigololo chako; pakuti palibe wokutsata kuchita nawe chigololo; popezanso uwalipira, koma sakupatsa iwe mphotho; potero usiyana nao konse ena." 
Ezekiel16:35 Chifukwa chake, wachigololo iwe, tamvera mau a Yehova:" 
Ezekiel16:36 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza ndalama zako zamwazika, nuvundukuka umaliseche wako mwa chigololo chako ndi mabwenzi ako, ndi chifukwa cha mafano onse a zonyansa zako, ndi mwazi wa ana ako umene unawapatsa;" 
Ezekiel16:37 chifukwa chake taona, ndidzasonkhanitsa mabwenzi ako onse amene wakondwera nao, ndi onse unawakonda, pamodzi ndi onse unawada; inde ndidzawasonkhanitsira iwe pozungulira ponse, ndi kuwavundukulira umaliseche wako, kuti aone umaliseche wako wonse." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndipo ndidzaweruza mlandu wako, monga aweruza akazi achigololo ndi okhetsa mwazi; ndipo ndidzakutengera mwazi wa ukali ndi wa nsanje." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndidzakuperekanso m'dzanja lao, ndipo adzagwetsa nyumba yako yachimphuli, ndi kugumula ziunda zako, nadzakuvula zovala zako, ndi kulanda zokometsera zako zokongola, nadzakusiya wamaliseche ndi wausiwa." 
Ezekiel16:40 Ndipo adzamemezera iwe msonkhano, nadzakuponya miyala, ndi kukupyoza ndi malupanga ao." 
Ezekiel16:41 Ndipo adzatentha nyumba zako ndi moto, nadzakuweruza pamaso pa akazi ambiri; ndipo ndidzakuleketsa kuchita chigololo, ndipo sudzalipiranso mphotho yachigololo." 
Ezekiel16:42 M'mwemo ukali wanga udzakhuta nawe, ndi nsanje yanga idzakuchokera, ndipo ndidzakhala chete wosakwiyanso." 
Ezekiel16:43 Popeza sunakumbukira masiku a ubwana wako, koma wandivuta nazo zonsezi, chifukwa chake taona, Inenso ndidzakubwezera njira yako pamutu pako, ati Ambuye Yehova; ndipo sudzachita choipa ichi choonjezerapo pa zonyansa zako zonse." 
Ezekiel16:44 Taona, aliyense wonena miyambi adzakunenera mwambi uwu, wakuti, Monga make momwemo mwana wake." 
Ezekiel16:45 Iwe ndiwe mwana wa mai ako wonyansidwa naye mwamuna wake ndi ana ake, ndipo iwe ndiwe mng'ono wao wa akulu ako akunyansidwa ndi amuna ao ndi ana ao; mai wako ndiye Muhiti, ndi atate wako ndiye Mwamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Ndi mkulu wako ndiye Samariya, wokhala kudzanja lako lamanzere, iye ndi ana ake akazi; ndi mng'ono wako wokhala kudzanja lako lamanja ndiye Sodomu ndi ana ake akazi." 
Ezekiel16:47 Koma sunayenda m'njira zao, kapena kuchita monga mwa zonyansa zao pang'ono pokha; unawaposa iwo m'kuvunda kwako, m'njira zako zonse." 
Ezekiel16:48 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, Sodomu mng'ono wako sanachita, iye kapena ana ake akazi, monga umo unachitira iwe ndi ana ako akazi." 
Ezekiel16:49 Taona, mphulupulu ya mng'ono wako Sodomu ndi iye, kudzikuza, kuchuluka kwa chakudya, ndi kupumula kwa mtambasali, anali nako iye ndi ana ake; ndipo sanalimbitse dzanja la wosauka ndi wosowa." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ndipo anadzikuza, nachita chonyansa pamaso panga; chifukwa chake ndinawachotsa pakuchiona." 
Ezekiel16:51 Ngakhale Samariya sanachite theka la zochimwa zako, koma unachulukitsa zonyansa zako, kuwaposa iwowa, ndi kuika abale ako olungama ndi zonyansa zako zonse unazichita." 
Ezekiel16:52 Usenzenso manyazi ako, iwe wakuweruza abale ako mwa zochimwa zako unazichita monyansa koposa iwowa; iwo akuposa iwe m'chilungamo chao, nawenso uchite manyazi nusenze manyazi ako, popeza waika abale ako olungama." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ndipo ndidzabweza undende wao, undende wa Sodomu ndi ana ake, ndi undende wa Samariya ndi ana ake, ndi undende wa andende ako pakati pao;" 
Ezekiel16:54 kuti usenze manyazi ako, ndi kuti uchite manyazi chifukwa cha zonse unazichita pakuwatonthoza." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ndipo abale ako Sodomu ndi ana ake adzabwerera umo unakhalira kale, ndipo Samariya ndi ana ake adzabwerera umo anakhalira kale; ndi iwe ndi ana ako mudzabwerera umo munakhalira kale." 
Ezekiel16:56 Ndipo sunakamba za mbale wako Sodomu pakamwa pako tsiku la kudzikuza kwako; 
Ezekiel16:57 chisanavundukuke choipa chako monga nthawi ya chitonzo cha ana akazi a Aramu, ndi onse akumzungulira iye, ana akazi a Afilisti akupeputsa pozungulira ponse." 
Ezekiel16:58 Wasenza choipa chako ndi zonyansa zako, ati Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:59 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzachita ndi iwe monga umo unachitira; popeza wapepula lumbiro ndi kuthyola pangano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Koma ndidzakumbukira Ine pangano langa ndi iwe m'masiku a ubwana wako, ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa pangano losatha nawe." 
Ezekiel16:61 Pamenepo udzakumbukira njira zako ndi kuchita manyazi, pakulandira abale ako akulu ndi ang'ono; ndipo ndidzakupatsa awa akhale ana ako akazi, angakhale sali a pangano lako." 
Ezekiel16:62 Pakuti ndidzakhazikitsa pangano langa ndi iwe, ndipo udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova;" 
Ezekiel16:63 kuti uzikumbukira ndi kuchita manyazi ndi kusatsegulanso pakamwa pako konse, chifukwa chamanyazi ako, pamene ndikufafanizira zonse unazichita, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel17:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel17:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ipha mwambi, nunene fanizo kwa nyumba ya Israele," 
Ezekiel17:3 nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Chiombankhanga chachikulu ndi mapiko akulu, ndi maphiphi atali, odzala nthenga cha mathothomathotho, chinafika ku Lebanoni, nichitenga nsonga ya mkungudza," 
Ezekiel17:4 chinabudula nsonga yosomphoka ya nthambi zake zanthete, ndi kumuka nayo kudziko la malonda, chinaiika m'mudzi wa amalonda." 
Ezekiel17:5 Chinatengakonso mbeu ya m'dziko, ndi kuibzala m'nthaka yokoma, chinaiika panali madzi ambiri, chinaioka ngati mtengo wamsondodzi." 
Ezekiel17:6 Ndipo inaphuka, nikhala mpesa wotambalala waufupi msinkhu, nthambi zake zinapindikira momwe, ndi mizu yake pansi pake, nikhala mpesa, nuonetsa nthambi ndi kuphuka mphukira." 
Ezekiel17:7 Panalinso chiombankhanga china chachikulu, ndi mapiko akulu, ndi nthenga zambiri; ndipo taona, mpesa uwu unachipindira mizu yake, nuchilunjikitsira nthambi zake, kuchokera pookedwa pake, kuti chiuthirire madzi." 
Ezekiel17:8 Unaokedwa mu nthaka yabwino kuli madzi ambiri, kuti uphuke nthambi, nubale zipatso, nukhale mpesa wabwino." 
Ezekiel17:9 Uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Udzakondwa kodi? Sadzausula ndi kudula zipatso zake, kuti uume, kuti masamba ake onse ophuka aume, ngakhale palibe mphamvu yaikulu, kapena anthu ambiri akuuzula?" 
Ezekiel17:10 Inde ungakhale waokedwa udzakondwa kodi? Sudzauma chiumire kodi pakuuomba mphepo ya kum'mawa? Udzauma pookedwa apo udaphuka. 
Ezekiel17:11 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti." 
Ezekiel17:12 Uziti, tsono kwa nyumba ya mpandukoyi, Simudziwa kodi izi nchiyani? Uziti, Taonani mfumu ya ku Babiloni inadza ku Yerusalemu, nitenga mfumu yake ndi akalonga ake, nibwera nao kuli iye ku Babiloni;" 
Ezekiel17:13 nitenga wa mbumba yachifumu, nichita naye pangano, nimlumbiritsa, nichotsa amphamvu a m'dziko;" 
Ezekiel17:14 kuti ufumuwo ukhale wopepuka, kuti usadzikweze, koma kuti pakusunga pangano lake ukhale." 
Ezekiel17:15 Koma anapandukira ndi kutuma mithenga yake ku Ejipito, kuti ampatse akavalo ndi anthu ambiri. Adzapindula kodi? Adzapulumuka wakuchita izi? Athyole pangano ndi kupulumuka kodi?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, pamalo pokhala mfumu, imene idamchititsa ufumu, imene anapeputsa lumbiro lake, imene anathyola pangano lake, adzafa pamodzi ndi iye pakati pa Babiloni." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ndipo Farao ndi nkhondo yake yaikulu, ndi khamu lake launyinji, sadzachita pamodzi naye kunkhondo, pakuunda mtumbira, ndi kumanga malinga, kulikha anthu ambiri." 
Ezekiel17:18 Pakuti anapepula lumbiro, ndi kuthyola pangano, angakhale anapereka dzanja lake; popeza anachita izi zonse sadzapulumuka." 
Ezekiel17:19 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Pali Ine, lumbiro langa, analipepula, ndi pangano langa analithyola, ndidzawabweza pamutu pake." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndidzamphimbanso ndi ukonde wanga, nadzakodwa iye mu msampha wanga; ndipo ndidzadza naye ku Babiloni, ndi kunena naye komweko mlandu wa kulakwa kwake anandilakwira nako." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ndipo othawa ake onse m'magulu ake onse adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi otsala adzabalalitsidwa kumphepo zonse; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndanena." 
Ezekiel17:22 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzatenganso nsonga ya mkungudza wautali ndi kuiika; ndidzabudula nsonga yosomphoka ya nthambi zake zanthete, ndi kuioka pa phiri lalitali lothuvuka;" 
Ezekiel17:23 pa phiri lothuvuka la Israele ndidzaioka, ndipo idzaphuka nthambi ndi kubala zipatso, nidzakhala mkungudza wokoma, ndi m'munsi mwake mudzakhala mbalame zilizonse za mapiko ali onse; mu mthunzi wa nthambi zake zidzabindikira." 
Ezekiel17:24 Ndipo mitengo yonse ya kuthengo idzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndatsitsa mtengo wosomphoka, ndakuza mtengo waung'ono, ndaumitsa mtengo wauwisi, ndi kuphukitsa mtengo wouma; Ine Yehova ndanena ndi kuchichita." 
Ezekiel18:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel18:2 Mutani inu ndi kunena mwambi uwu za dziko la Israele, wakuti, Atate adadya mphesa zosacha, ndi mano a ana ayayamira." 
Ezekiel18:3 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, simudzaonanso chifukwa cha kunena mwambiwu m'Israele." 
Ezekiel18:4 Taonani, miyoyo yonse ndi yanga, monga moyo wa atate momwemonso moyo wa mwana, ndiyo yanga; moyo wochimwawo ndiwo udzafa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Koma munthu akakhala wolungama, nakachita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo," 
Ezekiel18:6 wosadya pamapiripo, wosakweza maso ake kumafano a nyumba ya Israele, wosaipsa mkazi wa mnansi wake, kapena kuyandikira mkazi ataoloka," 
Ezekiel18:7 wosasautsa munthu aliyense, koma wambwezera wangongole chigwiriro chake, wosatenga zofunkha, anampatsa wanjala chakudya chake, naveka wamaliseche ndi chovala," 
Ezekiel18:8 wosapereka molira phindu, wosatenga choonjezerapo wobweza dzanja lake lisachite chosalungama, woweruza zoona pakati pa munthu ndi mnzake," 
Ezekiel18:9 amayenda m'malemba anga, nasunga maweruzo anga kuchita chokhulupirika; iye ndiye wolungama, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, anena Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel18:10 Akabala mwana ndiye mkhungu, wokhetsa mwazi, wochita chimodzi cha izi," 
Ezekiel18:11 wosachita zabwino zonse zija, koma anadyanso pamapiri, naipsa mkazi wa mnansi wake," 
Ezekiel18:12 nasautsa osauka ndi osowa, natenga zofunkha, wosabwezera chigwiriro, nakweza maso ake kumafano, nachita chonyansa," 
Ezekiel18:13 napereka molira phindu, nalandira choonjezerapo; adzakhala ndi moyo uyu kodi? Sadzakhala ndi moyo, anachita zonyansa izi zonse; kufa adzafadi, mwazi wake umkhalira." 
Ezekiel18:14 Taona tsono, yemweyo akabala mwana uyu, naona zochimwa zonse adazichita atate wake, naopa wosachita zoterezo," 
Ezekiel18:15 wosadya pamapiri, kapena kukweza maso ake kumafano a nyumba ya Israele, wosaipsa mkazi wa mnansi wake," 
Ezekiel18:16 kapena kusautsa wina aliyense, wosatenga chigwiriro, wosatenga zofunkha; koma anapatsa wanjala chakudya chake, naveka wamaliseche ndi chovala," 
Ezekiel18:17 naletsa dzanja lake pa wozunzika, wosalandira phindu kapena choonjezerapo, wochita maweruzo anga, nayenda m'malemba anga; uyu sadzafera mphulupulu ya atate wake, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu." 
Ezekiel18:18 Atate wake, popeza anazunza chizunzire, nafunkha za mbale wake, nachita chimene sichili chabwino pakati pa anthu ake, taona, adzafa mu mphulupulu yake." 
Ezekiel18:19 Koma inu mukuti, Alekeranji mwana kusenza mphulupulu za atate wake? Mwanayo akachita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo, nakasunga malemba anga onse, ndi kuwachita, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu." 
Ezekiel18:20 Moyo wochimwawo ndiwo udzafa; mwana sadzasenza mphulupulu za atate wake, ndi atate sadzasenza mphulupulu za mwana; chilungamo cha wolungama chidzamkhalira, ndi choipa cha woipa chidzamkhalira," 
Ezekiel18:21 Koma woipayo akabwerera kusiya machimo ake onse adawachita nakasunga malemba anga onse, ndi kuchita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, sadzafa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Nnena chimodzi chonse cha zolakwa zake zonse adazichita chidzakumbukika chimtsutse; m'chilungamo chake adachichita adakhala ndi moyo. 
Ezekiel18:23 Ngati ndikondwera nayo imfa ya woipa? Ati Ambuye Yehova, si ndiko kuti abwerere kuleka njira yake, ndi kukhala ndi moyo?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Koma wolungamayo akabwerera kuleka chilungamo chake, nakachita mphulupulu, ndi kuchita monga mwa zonyansa zonse azichita woipa, adzakhala ndi moyo kodi? Nnena chimodzi cha zolungama zake zonse adzazichita chidzakumbukika m'kulakwa kwake analakwa nako, ndi m'kuchimwa kwake anachimwa nako; momwemo adzafa." 
Ezekiel18:25 Koma mukuti, Njira ya Ambuye njosayenera. Tamvera tsono nyumba ya Israele, Kodi njira yanga njosayenera? Njira zanu si ndizo zosayenera?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Wolungamayo akatembenukira kuleka chilungamo chake, nakachita mphulupulu, adzafa momwemo; m'mphulupulu yake adaichita adzafa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Ndipo woipayo akatembenukira kuleka choipa chake adachichita, nakachita chiweruzo ndi chilungamo, adzapulumutsa moyo wake." 
Ezekiel18:28 Popeza anasamalira, natembenukira kuleka zolakwa zake zonse adazichita, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, sadzafa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Koma nyumba ya Israele imanena, Njira ya Ambuye njosayenera. Inu, nyumba ya Israele, kodi njira zanga nzosayenera? Njira zanu si ndizo zosayenera?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Chifukwa chake ndidzakuweruzani inu, nyumba ya Israele, yense monga mwa njira zake, ati Ambuye Yehova. Bwererani, nimutembenukire kuleka zolakwa zanu zonse, ndipo simudzakhumudwa nazo, ndi kuonongeka nayo mphulupulu." 
Ezekiel18:31 Tayani, ndi kudzichotsera zolakwa zanu zonse zimene munalakwa nazo, ndi kudzifunira mtima watsopano, ndi mzimu watsopano; pakuti mudzaferanji inu, nyumba ya Israele?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Pakuti sindikondwera nayo imfa ya wakufayo, ati Ambuye Yehova; chifukwa chake bwererani, nimukhale ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel19:1 Ndipo iwe, takwezera akalonga a Israele nyimbo ya maliro," 
Ezekiel19:2 uziti, Mai wako ndi chiyani? Mkango waukazi unabwanthama mwa mikango, unalera ana ake pakati pa misona." 
Ezekiel19:3 Ndipo unalera mmodzi wa ana ake, iye nasanduka msona, unaphunzira kugwira nyama, unalusira anthu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Mitundu ya anthu idamva mbiri yake, unagwidwa m'mbuna mwao; ndipo anadza nao ndi zokowera kudziko la Ejipito." 
Ezekiel19:5 Pakuona tsono waukaziwo, kuti unalindirira, ndi kuti chiyembekezo chake chidatha, unatenga wina wa ana ake, numsandutsa msona." 
Ezekiel19:6 Ndipo unayendayenda pakati pa mikango, nukhala msona, nuphunzira kugwira nyama, nulusira anthu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ndipo unadziwa amasiye ao, nupasula midzi yao, ndipo dziko ndi kudzala kwake linasanduka labwinja, chifukwa cha phokoso la kubangula kwake." 
Ezekiel19:8 Pamenepo mitundu ya anthu inadzipereka kuukola kuchokera kumaiko a kumbali zonse, niuphimba ndi ukonde wao, nugwidwa uwu m'mbuna mwao." 
Ezekiel19:9 Nauika m'chitatanga ndi zokowera, nadza nao kwa mfumu ya ku Babiloni; anaulonga m'malinga, kuti mau ake asamvekenso pa mapiri a Israele." 
Ezekiel19:10 Mai wako ananga mpesa wookedwa kumadzi; muja anakhala mumtendere unabala zipatso, wodzala ndi nthambi, chifukwa cha madzi ambiri." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ndipo unali nazo ndodo zolimba zikhale ndodo zachifumu, za ochita ufumu, ndi msinkhu wao unakula kufikira kumitambo, nizinaoneka m'kusomphoka kwao pakati pa nthambi zake zambiri." 
Ezekiel19:12 Koma unazulidwa mwaukali, unaponyedwa pansi ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, inaumitsa zipatso zake, ndodo zake zolimba zinathyoka ndi kuuma, moto unazitha." 
Ezekiel19:13 Ndipo tsopano waokedwa m'chipululu m'dziko louma ndi la ludzu. 
Ezekiel19:14 Unatulukanso moto kundodo za kunthambi zake, unatha zipatso zake; m'mwemo ulibe ndodo yolimba ikhale ndodo yachifumu ya kuchita ufumu. Iyi ndi nyimbo idzakhala nyimbo ya maliro." 
Ezekiel20:1 Ndipo kunali chaka chachisanu ndi chiwiri, mwezi wachisanu, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, anadza akulu ena a Israele kufunsira kwa Yehova, nakhala pansi iwowa pamaso panga." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel20:3 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe lankhula ndi akulu a Israele, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mwadza kodi kufunsira kwa Ine? Pali Ine, sindidzafunsidwa ndi inu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:4 Udzawaweruza kodi, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe? Udzawaweruza? Uwadziwitse zonyansa za makolo ao," 
Ezekiel20:5 nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsiku lija ndinamsankha Israele, ndi kukwezera mbeu ya nyumba ya Yakobo dzanja langa, ndi kudzidziwitsa kwa iwo m'dziko la Ejipito, pakuwakwezera dzanja langa, ndi kuti, Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu;" 
Ezekiel20:6 tsiku lomwelo ndinawakwezera dzanja langa kuwatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito, kunka nao kudziko ndinawazondera, moyenda mkaka ndi uchi, ndilo lokometsetsa mwa maiko onse;" 
Ezekiel20:7 ndipo ndinanena nao, Aliyense ataye zonyansa za pamaso pake, nimusadzidetsa ndi mafano a Ejipito; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Koma anapandukira Ine, osafuna kundimvera Ine, sanataye yense zonyansa pamaso pake, sanaleke mafano a Ejipito; pamenepo ndidati ndiwatsanulire ukali wanga, kuwakwaniritsira mkwiyo wanga m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Ezekiel20:9 Koma ndinachichita chifukwa cha dzina langa, kuti lisadetsedwe pamaso pa amitundu amene anakhala pakati pao, amene pamaso pao ndinadzidziwitsa kwa iwo, pakuwatulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Ezekiel20:10 Momwemo ndinatuluka nao m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kulowa nao kuchipululu." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndinawapatsanso malemba anga, ndi kuwadziwitsa maweruzo anga, ndiwo munthu akawachita adzakhala nao ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ndipo ndinawapatsanso masabata anga akhale chizindikiro pakati pa Ine ndi iwo, kuti adziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova wakuwapatula." 
Ezekiel20:13 Koma nyumba ya Israele inapandukira Ine m'chipululu, sanayende m'malemba anga, nanyoza maweruzo anga, amene munthu akawachita adzakhala nao ndi moyo; ndi masabata anga anawaipsa kwambiri; pamenepo ndidati ndiwatsanulire ukali wanga m'chipululu kuwatha." 
Ezekiel20:14 Koma ndinachichita chifukwa cha dzina langa, kuti lisaipsidwe pamaso pa amitundu amene ndinawatulutsa pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ndipo ndinawakwezeranso dzanja langa m'chipululu, kusawalowetsa m'dzikolo ndidawapatsa, moyenda mkaka ndi uchi, ndilo lokometsetsa mwa maiko onse;" 
Ezekiel20:16 popeza ananyoza maweruzo anga, osayenda m'malemba anga, naipsa masabata anga; pakuti mitima yao inatsata mafano ao." 
Ezekiel20:17 Koma diso langa lidawaleka osawaononga, sindinawatha onse m'chipululu." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndipo ndinati kwa ana ao m'chipululu, Musamayenda m'malemba a atate anu, musawasunga maweruzo ao, kapena kudzidetsa ndi mafano ao;" 
Ezekiel20:19 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, muziyenda m'malemba anga, ndi kusunga maweruzo anga, ndi kuwachita;" 
Ezekiel20:20 muzipatulanso masabata anga, ndipo adzakhala chizindikiro pakati pa Ine ndi inu, kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Koma anawo anapandukira Ine, sanayende m'malemba anga, kapena kusunga maweruzo anga kuwachita, amene munthu akawachita adzakhala nao ndi moyo; anaipsa masabata anga; pamenepo ndinati ndidzawatsanulira ukali wanga, kuwakwaniritsira mkwiyo wanga m'chipululu." 
Ezekiel20:22 Koma ndinabweza dzanja langa ndi kuchichita, chifukwa cha dzina langa; kuti lisaipsidwe pamaso pa amitundu, amene ndinawatulutsa pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ndinawakwezeranso dzanja langa m'chipululu, kuti ndidzawabalalitsa mwa amitundu, ndi kuwamwaza m'maiko;" 
Ezekiel20:24 popeza sanachite maweruzo anga, koma ananyoza malemba anga, naipsa masabata anga, ndi maso ao anatsata mafano a atate ao." 
Ezekiel20:25 Momwemonso ndinawapatsa malemba amene sanali abwino, ndi maweruzo osakhala nao ndi moyo;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ndinawadetsanso m'zopereka zao; pakuti anapititsa pamoto onse oyamba kubadwa kuti ndiwapasule; kuti adziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel20:27 Chifukwa chake wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lankhula ndi nyumba ya Israele, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mwa ichinso atate anu anandichitira mwano pakundilakwira Ine." 
Ezekiel20:28 Nditafika nao m'dzikolo ndinawakwezera dzanja langa kuwapatsa ilo, anapenya chitunda chilichonse chachitali, ndi mtengo uliwonse wagudugudu, naphera pomwepo nsembe zao, naperekapo nsembe zao zondiputa, aponso anachita fungo lao lokoma, nathiraponso nsembe zao zothira." 
Ezekiel20:29 Pamenepo ndinanena nao, Msanje wotani uwu mumapitako? Momwemo dzina lake litchedwa Msanje, mpaka lero lino." 
Ezekiel20:30 Chifukwa chake uziti kwa nyumba ya Israele, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mudzidetsa kodi monga umo anachitira makolo anu? Muchita chigololo kodi kutsata zonyansa zao?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ndipo popereka zopereka zanu popititsa ana anu pamoto, mudzidetsa kodi ndi mafano anu onse mpaka lero lino? Ndipo kodi ndidzafunsidwa ndi inu, nyumba ya Israele? Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sindidzafunsidwa ndi inu;" 
Ezekiel20:32 ndi ichi chimauka mumtima mwanu sichidzachitika, umo mukuti, Tidzakhala ngati amitundu, ngati mabanja a m'maiko, kutumikira mtengo ndi mwala." 
Ezekiel20:33 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, zedi ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, ndi ukali wotsanulidwa, ndidzakhala mfumu yanu." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndipo ndidzakutulutsani mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndi kukusonkhanitsani m'maiko munabalalikamo ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, ndi ukali wotsanulidwa." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndipo ndidzalowa nanu m'chipululu cha mitundu ya anthu, ndi kukuweruzani komweko popenyana maso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Monga ndinaweruza makolo anu m'chipululu cha dziko la Ejipito, momwemo ndidzaweruza inu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndipo ndidzakupititsani pansi pa ndodo ya mbusa ndi kukulowetsani m'chimango cha chipangano; 
Ezekiel20:38 ndipo ndidzasankhula mwa inu opanduka ndi ondilakwira, ndidzawatulutsa m'dziko logoneramo iwo; koma sadzalowa m'dziko la Israele; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:39 Ndipo inu, nyumba ya Israele, atero Ambuye Yehova, mukani, tumikirani yense mafano ake, ndi m'tsogolo momwe, popeza simundimvera Ine; koma musaipsanso dzina langa lopatulika ndi zopereka zanu ndi mafano anu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Pakuti pa phiri langa lopatulika, pa phiri lothuvuka la Israele, ati Ambuye Yehova, pomwepo onse a nyumba ya Israele, onsewo adzanditumikira Ine m'dzikomo; pomwepo ndidzawalandira, ndi pomwepo ndidzafuna nsembe zanu zokweza, ndi zoyamba za msonkho wanu, pamodzi ndi zopatulika zanu zonse." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ngati fungo lokoma ndidzakulandirani pakukutulutsani mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndipo ndidzakusonkhanitsani kukuchotsani m'maiko munabalalikiramo, ndipo ndidzazindikirika Woyera mwa inu pamaso pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakukulowetsani Ine m'dziko la Israele, m'dzikoli ndinalikwezera dzanja langa kulipereka kwa makolo anu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Ndi pomwepo mudzakumbukira njira zanu, ndi zonse mudazichita ndi kudzidetsa nazo, ndipo mudzakhala onyansa pamaso pa inu nokha, chifukwa cha zoipa zanu zonse mudazichita." 
Ezekiel20:44 M'mwemo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova nditachita nanu chifukwa cha dzina langa, si monga mwa njira zanu zoipa, kapena monga mwa machitidwe anu ovunda, nyumba ya Israele inu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:45 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel20:46 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako njira ya kumwera, nubenthulire mau kumwera, nunenere nkhalango ya kuthengo la kumwera kwa Yuda;" 
Ezekiel20:47 nuziti kwa nkhalango ya kumwera kwa Yuda, Tamvera mau a Yehova, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzayatsa moto mwa iwe, udzanyeketsa mtengo uliwonse wauwisi mwa iwe, ndi mtengo uliwonse wouma; malawi amoto sadzazimika, ndi nkhope zonse kuyambira kumwera kufikira kumpoto zidzapsa nao." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ndi anthu onse adzaona kuti Ine Yehova ndinauyatsa, sudzazimika." 
Ezekiel20:49 Pamenepo ndinati, Ha, Ambuye Yehova! Anandinena, Wonena mafanizo uyu." 
Ezekiel21:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel21:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako ku Yerusalemu, nuwabenthulire mau malo opatulikawa, nunenere dziko la Israele kulitsutsa;" 
Ezekiel21:3 nuziti kwa dziko la Israele, Atero Yehova, Taona Ine ndine wotsutsana nawe, ndidzasolola lupanga langa m'chimake, ndi kukulikhira olungama ndi oipa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Popeza ndidzakulikhira olungama ndi oipa, chifukwa chake lupanga langa lidzasololokera anthu onse, kuyambira kumwera kufikira kumpoto;" 
Ezekiel21:5 ndi anthu onse adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndasolola lupanga langa m'chimake, silidzabwereranso." 
Ezekiel21:6 Koma wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, usa moyo, ndi kuduka msana, ndi kuwawa mtima, uuse moyo pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel21:7 Ndipo kudzakhala akanena ndi iwe, Uusa moyo chifukwa ninji? Uzikati, Chifukwa cha mbiri; pakuti ikudza, ndi mtima uliwonse udzasungunuka, ndi manja onse adzalenda, ndi mzimu uliwonse udzakomoka, ndi maondo onse adzaweyeseka ngati madzi; taona ilinkudza, inde idzachitika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel21:8 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel21:9 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nenera ndi kuti, Atero Yehova, Nena, Lupanga, lupanga lanoledwa, latuulidwanso;" 
Ezekiel21:10 lanoledwa kuti liphetu, lituulidwa kuti linge mphezi; tisekererepo kodi? Ndilo ndodo yachifumu ya mwana wanga, yopeputsa mtengo uliwonse." 
Ezekiel21:11 Ndipo analipereka alituule, kuti achite nalo lupangali analinola, inde analituula kulipereka m'dzanja la wakupha." 
Ezekiel21:12 Fuula ndi kulira, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, pakuti likhalira pa anthu anga, likhalira pa akalonga onse a Israele, laperekedwa kulupanga pamodzi ndi anthu anga; chifukwa chake panda pantchafu pako." 
Ezekiel21:13 Pakuti pali kuyesedwa; ndipo nanga ndodo yachifumu yopeputsa ikapanda kukhalanso? Ati Ambuye Yehova. 
Ezekiel21:14 Ndipo wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nenera, nuombe manja, lupanga lipitilize katatu, lupanga la wolasidwa ndilo lupanga la wolasidwa wamkuluyo, limene liwazinga." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ndalozetsa nsonga ya lupanga kuzipata zao zonse, kuti mtima wao usungunuke, ndi kukhumudwa kwao kuchuluke; ha! Analituula linyezimire, analisongoza liphe." 
Ezekiel21:16 Udzisonkhanitsire pamodzi, muka kudzanja lamanja; undandalitsa nkhondo kumuka kulamanzere; kulikonse ilozako nkhope yako." 
Ezekiel21:17 Inenso ndidzaomba manja anga, ndipo ndidzakukwaniritsa ukali wanga; Ine Yehova ndanena." 
Ezekiel21:18 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel21:19 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, udziikire njira ziwiri zodzera lupanga la mfumu ya ku Babiloni; zonse ziwiri zichokere dziko lomwelo; nulembe chizindikiro cholozera, uchilembe pa mphambano ya njira ya kumudzi." 
Ezekiel21:20 Uiike njira yodzera lupanga kunka ku Raba wa ana a Amoni, ndi ya ku Yuda ku Yerusalemu, mudzi walinga." 
Ezekiel21:21 Pakuti mfumu ya ku Babiloni aima pa mphambano ya njira, polekana njira ziwirizo, kuti aombeze maula; agwedeza mivi, afunsira kwa aterafi, apenda ndi chiwindi." 
Ezekiel21:22 M'dzanja lake lamanja muli ula wa ku Yerusalemu, kuika zogundira, kutsegula pakamwa pa kupha, kukweza mau ndi kufuula, kuikira zitseko zogundira, kuundira mtumbira, kumanga malinga." 
Ezekiel21:23 Ndipo kudzakhala ngati kuombeza konyenga pamaso pa iwo amene anawalumbirira malumbiro; koma akumbutsa mphulupulu kuti akodwe. 
Ezekiel21:24 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mwakumbutsa mphulupulu yanu povumbuluka zolakwa zanu, kotero kuti machimo anu aoneka m'zonse muzichita, popeza mukumbukika, mudzagwidwa ndi dzanja." 
Ezekiel21:25 Ndipo iwe wolasidwa woipa, kalonga wa Israele, amene lafika tsiku lako, nthawi ya mphulupulu yotsiriza;" 
Ezekiel21:26 atero Ambuye Yehova, Chotsa chilemba, vula korona, ufumu sudzakhalanso momwemo, kweza chopepuka, chepsa chokwezeka." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ndidzagubuduzagubuduza ufumu uno, sudzakhalanso kufikira akadza Iye mwini chiweruzo; ndipo ndidzaupereka kwa Iye." 
Ezekiel21:28 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, nenera, nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova za ana a Amoni, ndi za chitonzo chao; nuziti, Lupanga, lupanga lasololedwa, latuulidwa, kuti likaphe, kuti liononge, likhale lonyezimira." 
Ezekiel21:29 Akuonera zopanda pake, akuombezera mabodza, lupanga likugoneka pa makosi a oipa olasidwa, amene lafika tsiku lao nthawi ya mphulupulu yotsiriza." 
Ezekiel21:30 Ulibwezere m'chimake. Pamalo unalengedwapo m'dziko la kubadwa kwako ndidzakuweruza. 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndipo ndidzakutsanulira mkwiyo wanga, ndidzakuuzira ndi moto wa kuzaza kwanga, ndidzakuperekanso m'manja mwa anthu ankharwe odziwa kuononga." 
Ezekiel21:32 Udzakhala ngati nkhuni ya pamoto, mwazi wako udzakhala pakati pa dziko, sudzakumbukikanso; pakuti Ine ndine Yehova ndachinena." 
Ezekiel22:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel22:2 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, udzaweruza, udzauweruza mudziwo wa mwazi kodi? Uudziwitse tsono zonyansa zake zonse." 
Ezekiel22:3 Nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndiwo mudzi wokhetsa mwazi pakati pake kuti nthawi yake ifike, nudzipangire mafano udzidetsa nao." 
Ezekiel22:4 Wapalamula nao mwazi wako, waukhetsa, nudetsedwa nao mafano ako udawapanga, nuyandikizitsa masiku ako, wafikiranso zakozako; chifukwa chake ndakuika ukhale chitonzo cha amitundu ndi choseketsa cha maiko onse." 
Ezekiel22:5 Okhala pafupi ndi okhala patali adzakuseka pwepwete, wodetsedwa dzina iwe, wodzala ndi kusokosera." 
Ezekiel22:6 Taona akalonga a Israele, yense monga mwa mphamvu yake, akhala mwa iwe, kuti akhetse mwazi." 
Ezekiel22:7 Mwa iwe anapepula atate ndi mai, pakati pa iwe anamchitira mlendo momzunza, mwa iwe anazunza ana amasiye, ndi mkazi wamasiye." 
Ezekiel22:8 Wanyoza zopatulika zanga, waipsa masabata anga." 
Ezekiel22:9 Anthu oneneza anali mwa iwe, kuti akhetse mwazi; ndipo anadya pamapiri mwa iwe, pakati pa iwe anachita zamanyazi." 
Ezekiel22:10 Anavula umaliseche wa atate ao mwa iwe, mwa iwe anachepsa wodetsedwa ndi kooloka kwake." 
Ezekiel22:11 Ndipo wina anachita chonyansa ndi mkazi wa mnansi wake, winanso wadetsa mpongozi wake mwamanyazi, ndi wina mwa iwe anaipitsa mlongo wake mwana wamkazi wa atate wake." 
Ezekiel22:12 Analandira mphotho mwa iwe kukhetsa mwazi, walandira phindu loonjezerapo, wanyengerera anansi ako ndi kuwazunza, ndipo wandiiwala Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel22:13 Taona, ndaomba manja pa phindu lako lonyenga waliona, ndi pa mwazi wokhala pakati pako." 
Ezekiel22:14 Mtima wako udzaimika kodi, manja ako adzalimbikira masikuwo ndidzachita nawe? Ine Yehova ndanena, ndidzachichita." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndipo ndidzakumwaza mwa amitundu, ndi kukubalalitsa m'maiko, ndi kukuthera zodetsa zako zikuchokere." 
Ezekiel22:16 Ndipo udzaipsidwa mwa iwe wekha pamaso pa amitundu; motero udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel22:17 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel22:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nyumba ya Israele yandikhalira mphala; onsewo ndiwo mkuwa, ndi seta, ndi chitsulo, ndi ntovu, m'kati mwa ng'anjo; ndiwo mphala zasiliva." 
Ezekiel22:19 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mwasanduka mphala nonsenu, chifukwa chake taonani, ndidzakusonkhanitsani m'kati mwa Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Monga asonkhanitsa mtapo wa siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi chitsulo, ndi ntovu, ndi seta, m'kati mwa ng'anjo, kuzivukutira moto, kuzisungunula momwemo, ndidzakusonkhanitsani mu mkwiyo wanga ndi ukali wanga, ndi kukuikani komweko, ndi kukusungunulani." 
Ezekiel22:21 Inde ndidzakusonkhanitsani, ndi kukuvukutirani ndi moto wa kuzaza kwanga, ndipo mudzasungunuka pakati pake." 
Ezekiel22:22 Monga siliva asungunuka m'kati mwa ng'anjo, momwemo inu mudzasungunuka m'kati mwake; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndakutsanulirani ukali wanga." 
Ezekiel22:23 Nandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel22:24 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nena ndi Yuda, Iwe ndiwe dziko losayeretsedwa, losavumbwa mvula tsiku la ukalilo." 
Ezekiel22:25 Pali chiwembu cha aneneri ake pakati pake, ngati mkango wobangula womwetula nyama, analusira miyoyo, alanda chuma ndi za mtengo wake, achulukitsa amasiye pakati pake." 
Ezekiel22:26 Ansembe ake achitira choipa chilamulo changa, nadetsa zopatulika zanga, sasiyanitsa pakati pa zopatulika ndi zinthu wamba, ndipo sazindikiritsa anthu pakati pa zodetsa ndi zoyera, nabisira masabata anga maso ao; ndipo Ine ndidetsedwa pakati pao." 
Ezekiel22:27 Akalonga ake m'kati mwake akunga mimbulu yakumwetula nyama, kukhetsa mwazi, kuononga miyoyo, kuti aone phindu lonyenga." 
Ezekiel22:28 Ndipo aneneri ao anawamatira ndi dothi losapondeka, ndi kuonera zopanda pake, ndi kuwaombezera mabodza, ndi kuti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, posanena Yehova." 
Ezekiel22:29 Anthu a m'dziko anazunzazunza, nalandalanda mwachiwawa, napsinja ozunzika ndi aumphawi, nazunza mlendo wopanda chifukwa." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ndipo ndinafunafuna munthu pakati pao wakumanganso linga, ndi kuimira dziko popasukira pamaso panga, kuti ndisaliononge; koma ndinapeza palibe." 
Ezekiel22:31 Chifukwa chake ndinawatsanulira ukali wanga, ndawatha ndi moto wa kuzaza kwanga, njira yaoyao ndinaibweza pa mutu pao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel23:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel23:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, panali akazi awiri, mai wao ndi mmodzi;" 
Ezekiel23:3 ndipo anachita chigololo iwo m'Ejipito, anachita chigololo m'ubwana wao; pomwepo anthu anasindikiza mawere ao, pomweponso anakhudza nsonga za mawere za unamwali wao." 
Ezekiel23:4 Ndipo maina ao ndiwo Ohola wamkulu, ndi Oholiba mng'ono wake; nakhala anga, nabala ana aamuna ndi aakazi. Ndipo maina ao, Samariya ndiye Ohola, ndi Yerusalemu ndiye Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:5 Koma Ohola anachita chigololo pamene anali wanga, anaumirira mabwenzi ake Aasiriya oyandikizana naye;" 
Ezekiel23:6 ovala chibakuwa, ziwanga, ndi akazembe, onsewo anyamata ofunika, anthu oyenda pa akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ndipo anachita nao zigololo zake, ndiwo anthu osankhika a ku Asiriya onsewo, ndipo ali onse anawaumirira anadziipsa nao mafano ao." 
Ezekiel23:8 Sanalekenso zigololo zake zochokera ku Ejipito, pakuti anagona naye m'unamwali wake, nakhudza mawere a unamwali wake, namtsanulira chigololo chao." 
Ezekiel23:9 Chifukwa chake ndampereka m'dzanja la mabwenzi ake, m'dzanja la Aasiriya amene anawaumirira." 
Ezekiel23:10 Iwowa anavula umaliseche wake, anatenga ana ake aamuna ndi aakazi, namupha iyeyu ndi lupanga; ndi dzina lake linamveka mwa akazi atamchitira maweruzo." 
Ezekiel23:11 Pamene mng'ono wake Oholiba anachiona, anavunda ndi kuumirira kwake koposa iyeyo; ndi zigololo zake zidaposa zigololo za mkulu wake." 
Ezekiel23:12 Anaumirira Aasiriya, ziwanga, ndi akazembe oyandikizana naye, ovala zangwiro, anthu oyenda pa akavalo, onsewo anyamata ofunika." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ndipo ndinamuona kuti anadetsedwa, onse awiri adatenga njira yomweyi." 
Ezekiel23:14 Ndipo anaonjeza zigololo zake, naona amuna olembedwa pakhoma, zithunzithunzi za Ababiloni olembedwa ndi kundwe;" 
Ezekiel23:15 omangira malamba m'chuuno mwao, ndi nduwira zazikulu zonika pamitu pao, maonekedwe ao ngati akalonga onsewo, akunga a ku Babiloni, dziko la kubadwa kwao ndi Kasidi." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ndipo pakuwaona anawalakalaka, nawatumira mithenga kudziko la Ababiloni." 
Ezekiel23:17 Namdzera a ku Babiloni ku kama wa chikondi, namdetsa ndi chigololo chao, iyenso anadetsedwa nao; atatero moyo wake unafukidwa nao." 
Ezekiel23:18 M'mwemo iye anawulula chigololo chake, navula umaliseche wake; pamenepo moyo wanga unaipidwa naye, monga umo moyo unaipidwira mkulu wake." 
Ezekiel23:19 Koma anachulukitsa zigololo zake, nakumbukira masiku a ubwana wake, muja anachita chigololo m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ndipo anaumirira amuna ao amene nyama yao ikunga ya abulu, ndi kutentha kwao ngati kutentha kwa akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:21 Momwemo wautsanso choipa cha ubwana wako, pakukhudza Aejipito nsonga za mawere ako, chifukwa cha mawere a ubwana wako." 
Ezekiel23:22 Chifukwa chake, Oholiba, atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzakuutsira mabwenzi ako amene moyo wako wakufidwa nao, ndi kukufikitsira iwowa pozungulira ponse atsutsane nawe," 
Ezekiel23:23 a ku Babiloni, ndi Ababiloni, Pekodi, ndi Sowa, ndi Kowa, ndi Aasiriya onse pamodzi nao, anyamata ofunika, ziwanga ndi akazembe onsewo, akalonga ndi mandoda onsewo, oyenda ndi akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:24 Ndipo adzakudzera ndi zida, magaleta a nkhondo, ndi magaleta ena, pamodzi ndi msonkhano wa mitundu ya anthu; adzadziikira pozungulira pako ndi zikopa zotchinjiriza ndi zisoti; ndipo ndidzawaika aweruze, nadzakuweruza monga mwa maweruzo ao." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndipo ndidzakuikira nsanje yanga, nadzakuchitira mwaukali, iwowa adzakudula mphuno ndi makutu; ndi otsiriza ako adzagwa ndi lupanga, adzakuchotsera ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi, ndi otsirizira ako adzatha ndi moto." 
Ezekiel23:26 Adzakuvulanso zovala zako, ndi kukuchotsera zokometsera zako zokongola." 
Ezekiel23:27 Motero ndidzakuleketsera choipa chako, ndi chigololo chako chochokera m'dziko la Ejipito; ndipo sudzazikwezeranso maso ako, kapena kukumbukiranso Ejipito." 
Ezekiel23:28 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzakupereka m'dzanja la iwo amene uwada, m'dzanja la iwo amene moyo wako ufukidwa nao;" 
Ezekiel23:29 ndipo adzachita nawe mwaudani, nadzalanda zonse udazigwirira ntchito, nadzakusiya wamaliseche ndi wausiwa; ndi umaliseche wa zigololo zako udzavulidwa, dama lako ndi zigololo zako zomwe." 
Ezekiel23:30 Izi adzakuchitira chifukwa watsata amitundu, ndi kuchita nao chigololo, popezanso wadetsedwa ndi mafano ao." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wayenda m'njira ya mkulu wako, chifukwa chake ndidzapereka chikho chake m'dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel23:32 Atero Ambuye Yehova, M'chikho cha mkulu wako udzamweramo ndicho chachikulu ngati mchenje; adzakuseka pwepwete, nadzakunyoza muli zambiri m'menemo." 
Ezekiel23:33 Udzadzala ndi kuledzera ndi chisoni, ndi chikho chodabwitsa ndi cha chipasuko, ndi chikho cha mkulu wako Samariya." 
Ezekiel23:34 Udzamwa ichi ndi kugugudiza, ndi kuchechetachecheta zibade zake, ndi kung'amba mawere ako; pakuti ndachinena, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel23:35 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza wandiiwala Ine, ndi kunditaya pambuyo pako, uzisenza iwenso choipa chako ndi zigololo zako." 
Ezekiel23:36 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kodi udzaweruza Ohola ndi Oholiba? Uwafotokozere tsono zonyansa zao." 
Ezekiel23:37 Pakuti anachita chigololo, ndi m'manja mwao muli mwazi, ndipo anachita chigololo ndi mafano ao, nawapititsiranso pamoto ana ao amuna amene anandibalira, kuti athedwe." 
Ezekiel23:38 Anandichitiranso ichi, anadetsa malo anga opatulika tsiku lomwelo, naipsa masabata anga;" 
Ezekiel23:39 pakuti ataphera mafano ao, ana ao analowa tsiku lomwelo m'malo anga opatulika kuwadetsa; ndipo taona, anatero m'kati mwa nyumba yanga." 
Ezekiel23:40 Ndiponso munatuma kuitana anthu ochokera kutali, ndiwo munawatumira mthenga; ndipo taona, anadza amenewo unasamba, chifukwa cha iwo unapaka maso ako mankhwala, ndi kuvala zokometsera;" 
Ezekiel23:41 ndipo unakhala pa kama waulemu, pali gome lokonzekeratu patsogolo pake; pamenepo unaika chofukiza chonga ndi mafuta anga." 
Ezekiel23:42 Ndipo phokoso lalikulu lidaleka pomwepo, ndipo pamodzi ndi anthu wamba anabwera nao olodzera ochokera kuchipululu, naika makoza m'manja mwa awiriwo, ndi akorona okongola pamitu pao." 
Ezekiel23:43 Pamenepo ndinati za uyu anakalamba nazo zigololo, Tsopano iwo adzachita zigololo naye, ndi iyenso nao." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ndipo analowa kwa iye monga umo amalowera kwa mkazi wachigololo, motero analowa kwa Ohola ndi Oholiba akazi oipawo." 
Ezekiel23:45 Ndipo anthu olungama adzawaweruza monga mwa maweruzo a achigololo, ndi maweruzo akazi okhetsa mwazi; pakuti ndiwo achigololo, ndi m'manja mwao muli mwazi." 
Ezekiel23:46 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzawakweretsera msonkhano wa anthu, ndi kuwapereka awazunze, ndi kulanda chuma chao." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ndi msonkhanowo udzawaponya miyala, ndi kuwatha ndi malupanga ao, adzawapha ana ao aamuna ndi aakazi, ndi kutentha nyumba zao ndi moto." 
Ezekiel23:48 Momwemo ndidzaleketsa dama m'dzikomo, kuti alangizidwe akazi onse kusachita monga mwa dama lanu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Ndipo adzakubwezerani dama lanu, nimudzasenza machimo a mafano anu; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel24:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova chaka chachisanu ndi chinai, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel24:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Udzilembere dzina la tsiku lomwe lino, mfumu ya ku Babiloni wayandikira Yerusalemu tsiku lomwe lino." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ndipo uphere nyumba yopandukayo fanizo, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tereka mphika; uutereke, nuthire madzi m'menemo." 
Ezekiel24:4 Longamo pamodzi ziwalo zake, ziwalo zonse zokoma, mwendo wathako ndi wamwamba; uudzaze ndi mafupa osankhika." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tengako choweta chosankhika, nuikire mafupa mulu wa nkhuni pansi; ubwadamuke, ndi mafupa ake omwe uwaphike m'mwemo." 
Ezekiel24:6 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka mudzi wokhetsa mwazi, mphika m'mene muli dzimbiri, losauchokera dzimbiri lake; uchotsemo chiwalochiwalo; sanaugwere maere." 
Ezekiel24:7 Pakuti mwazi wake uli m'kati mwake anauika pathanthwe poyera, sanautsanulire panthaka kuukwirira ndi fumbi." 
Ezekiel24:8 Pofuna kuutsa ukali, ndi kubwezera chilango, ndaika mwazi wake pathanthwe poyera, kuti usakwiririke." 
Ezekiel24:9 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka mudzi wokhetsa mwazi, ndidzakulitsa mulu wa nkhuni." 
Ezekiel24:10 Zichuluke nkhuni, koleza moto, nyama ipse, uwiritse msuzi wake, ubwadamuke, ndi mafupa ake atibuke." 
Ezekiel24:11 Pamenepo uukhazike pa makala ake opanda kanthu m'menemo, kuti utenthe, nuyake mkuwa wake; ndi kuti chodetsa chake chisungunuke m'mwemo, kuti dzimbiri lake lithe." 
Ezekiel24:12 Ntchito ya mphika ndi yolemetsa, koma dzimbiri lake lalikulu siliuchokera, dzimbiri lake liyenera kumoto." 
Ezekiel24:13 M'chodetsa chako muli dama, popeza ndinakuyeretsa; koma sunayeretsedwa, sudzayeretsedwanso kukuchotsera chodetsa chako, mpaka nditakwaniritsa ukali wanga pa iwe." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ine Yehova ndachinena, chidzachitika; ndipo ndidzachichita, sindidzamasula, kapena kulekerera, kapena kuwaleka, monga mwa njira zako, ndi monga umo unachitira adzakuweruza iwe, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel24:15 Mau a Yehova anandidzeranso, akuti," 
Ezekiel24:16 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, taona, ndikuchotsera chokonda maso ako ndi chikomo, koma usamve chisoni, kapena kulira, kapena kudza misozi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Usa moyo mosamveka, usalira wakufayo, dzimangire chilemba, nuvale nsapato kumapazi ako, usaphimbe milomo yako. Kapena kudya mkate wa anthu." 
Ezekiel24:18 Ndipo nditalankhula ndi anthu m'mawa, madzulo ake mkazi wanga anamwalira; ndi m'mawa mwake ndinachita monga anandilamulira." 
Ezekiel24:19 Nanena nane anthu, Simudzatiuza kodi zitani nafe izi muzichita?" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ndipo ndinanena nao, Anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel24:21 Nena ndi nyumba ya Israele, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndidzadetsa malo anga opatulika, ulemerero wa mphamvu yanu, chokonda m'maso mwanu, chimene moyo wanu ali nacho chifundo; ndipo ana anu aamuna ndi aakazi otsalira inu adzagwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ndipo mudzachita monga umo ndachitira ine, osaphimba milomo yanu, kapena kudya mkate wa anthu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ndi zilemba zanu zidzakhala pamitu panu, ndi nsapato zanu kumapazi anu, simudzachita chisoni kapena kulira, koma mudzaonda ndi mphulupulu zanu, ndi kubulirana wina ndi mnzake." 
Ezekiel24:24 Momwemo Ezekiele adzakhala kwa inu chizindikiro; umo monse anachitira iye mudzachita ndinu; chikadza ichi mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova. 
Ezekiel24:25 Ndipo wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, sikudzakhala kodi tsiku loti ndiwachotsera mphamvu yao, chimwemwe chao chopambana, chowakonda m'maso mwao, ndi chokhumbitsa mtima wao, ana ao aamuna ndi aakazi," 
Ezekiel24:26 kuti tsiku lomwelo wopulumukayo adzakudzera, kukumvetsa m'makutu mwako?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Tsiku lomwelo pakamwa pako padzatsegukira wopulumukayo; mudzalankhula osakhalanso chete, momwemo udzawakhalira chizindikiro; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel25:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Lozetsa nkhope yako kwa ana a Amoni, nuwanenere;" 
Ezekiel25:3 nunene kwa ana a Amoni, Tamverani mau a Ambuye Yehova, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza unati, Onyo, kunena malo anga opatulika; muja anadetsedwa ndi kunena dziko la Israele; muja linapasuka ndi kunena nyumba ya Yuda; muja adalowa kundende;" 
Ezekiel25:4 chifukwa chake taona, ndidzakupereka kwa ana a kum'mawa ukhale waowao, kuti amange misasa yao mwa iwe, namange pokhala pao mwa iwe, iwo adzadya zipatso zako ndi kumwa mkaka wako." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ndipo ndidzayesa Raba khola la ngamira, ndi ana a Amoni popumula zoweta zazing'ono; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:6 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Waomba manja, ndi kuvina, ndi kukondwera ndi chipeputso chonse cha moyo wako, kupeputsa dziko la Israele," 
Ezekiel25:7 chifukwa chake taona, ndakutambasulira dzanja langa, ndipo ndidzakupereka ukhale chofunkha cha amitundu, ndi kukudula mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndi kukutayikitsa m'maiko, ndidzakuononga; motero udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:8 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza Mowabu ndi Seiri akuti, Taona nyumba ya Yuda ikunga amitundu onse;" 
Ezekiel25:9 chifukwa chake taona ndidzatsegula pambali pake pa Mowabu kuyambira kumidzi, kumidzi yake yokhala mphepete, yokometsetsa ya m'dziko, Beteyesimoti, Baala-Meoni, ndi Kiriyataimu," 
Ezekiel25:10 kuwapereka kwa ana a kum'mawa pamodzi ndi ana a Amoni; ndipo ndidzawapereka akhale aoao, kuti ana a Amoni asakumbukikenso mwa amitundu;" 
Ezekiel25:11 ndipo ndidzakwaniritsa maweruzo m'Mowabu; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel25:12 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza Edomu anachita mobwezera chilango pa nyumba ya Yuda, napalamula kwakukulu pakuibwezera chilango," 
Ezekiel25:13 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzatambasulira Edomu dzanja langa, ndi kulilikhira munthu ndi nyama, ndi kulisandutsa labwinja; kuyambira ku Temani mpaka Dedani adzagwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndipo ndidzalibwezera Edomu chilango mwa dzanja la anthu anga Israele; ndipo adzachita m'Edomu monga mwa mkwiyo wanga, ndi ukali wanga; motero adzadziwa kubwezera chilango kwanga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza Afilisti anachita mobwezera chilango nabwezera chilango ndi mtima wopeputsa kuononga, ndi udani wosatha," 
Ezekiel25:16 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzatambasulira Afilisti dzanja langa, ndi kulikha Akereti, ndi kuononga otsalira mphepete mwa nyanja." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndipo ndidzawabwezera chilango chachikulu, ndi malango ankharwe; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuwabwezera chilango Ine." 
Ezekiel26:1 Ndipo kunali chaka chakhumi ndi chimodzi, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel26:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, popeza Tiro ananyodola Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Onyo, wathyoka uwu udali chipata cha mitundu ya anthu; wanditembenukira ine; ndidzakhuta ine, wapasuka uwu;" 
Ezekiel26:3 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndikutsutsa iwe, Tiro, ndidzakukweretsera amitundu, monga nyanja iutsa mafunde ake." 
Ezekiel26:4 Ndipo adzagumula malinga a Tiro, ndi kugwetsa nsanja zake; inde ndidzausesa fumbi lake, ndi kuuyesa pathanthwe poyera." 
Ezekiel26:5 Udzakhala poyanika khoka pakati pa nyanja, pakuti Ine ndachinena, ati Ambuye Yehova; ndipo udzakhala chofunkha cha amitundu." 
Ezekiel26:6 Ndi ana ake akazi okhala kumunda adzaphedwa ndi lupanga; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel26:7 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzafikitsira Tiro Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni, mfumu ya mafumu, yochokera kumpoto ndi akavalo, ndi magaleta, ndi apakavalo, ndi msonkhano wa anthu ambiri." 
Ezekiel26:8 Ana ako akazi adzawapha kumunda ndi lupanga; ndipo adzakumangira nsanja, ndi kukuundira mtumbira, ndi kukuimikira chikopa." 
Ezekiel26:9 Nadzaikira malinga ako zogumulira, nadzagwetsa nsanja zako ndi zida zake."
