Ezekiel26:10 Popeza achuluka akavalo ake, fumbi lao lidzakukuta; malinga ako adzagwedezeka ndi phokoso la apakavalo, ndi njinga za magaleta, polowa iye pa zipata zako, monga umo amalowera m'mudzi popasukira linga lake." 
Ezekiel26:11 Ndi ziboda za akavalo ake iye adzapondaponda m'makwalala ako onse; adzapha anthu ako ndi lupanga; ndi zoimiritsa za mphamvu yako zidzagwa pansi. 
Ezekiel26:12 Ndipo adzalanda chuma chako ndi kufunkha malonda ako, nadzagwetsa malinga ako ndi kupasula nyumba zako zofunika, nadzaponya miyala yako, ndi mitengo yako, ndi fumbi lako, m'madzi." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndipo ndidzaleketsa phokoso la nyimbo zako, ndi kulira kwa mazeze ako sikudzamvekanso." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndipo ndidzakuyesa pathanthwe poyera; udzakhala poyanika khoka, sadzakumanganso; pakuti Ine Yehova ndachinena, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel26:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova kwa Tiro, Zisumbu sizidzagwedezeka nanga pomveka kugwa kwako, pobuula olasidwa, pakuchitika kuphako pakati pako?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Pamenepo akalonga onse a kunyanja adzatsika ku mipando yachifumu yao, nadzavula zovala zao zopikapika, nadzavala kunjenjemera, nadzakhala panthaka pansi, nadzanjenjemera mphindi zonse ndi kudabwa nawe." 
Ezekiel26:17 Ndipo adzakukwezera nyimbo ya maliro, ndi kunena nawe, Watayika bwanji, ndiwe pokhala pa anthu a panyanja, mudzi womveka, unalimbika panyanja, uwo ndi okhalamo, amene anakhalitsa kuopsa kwao pa onse okhala momwemo!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Pamenepo zisumbu zidzanjenjemera tsiku la kugwa kwako, inde zisumbu za kunyanja zidzatenga nkhawa pa kuchokera kwako." 
Ezekiel26:19 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Pamene ndikusandutsa mudzi wopasuka, ngati midzi yosakhalamo anthu, ndi kukukweretsera nyanja, nadzakumiza madzi aakulu;" 
Ezekiel26:20 pamenepo ndidzakutsitsa nao otsikira kumanda, kwa anthu a kale lomwe, ndi kukukhalitsa kumalo a kunsi kwa dziko, kopasukira kale lomwe, pamodzi nao otsikira kumanda, kuti mwa iwe musakhale anthu; ndipo ndidzaika ulemerero m'dziko la amoyo," 
Ezekiel26:21 ndidzakuika woopsa; ndipo sudzaonekanso, chinkana akufunafuna sudzapezekanso konse, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel27:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel27:2 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, Takwezera Tiro nyimbo ya maliro;" 
Ezekiel27:3 nuti kwa Tiro, Iwe wakukhala polowera m'nyanja, wakuchita malonda ndi mitundu ya anthu m'zisumbu zambiri, atero Ambuye Yehova, Iwe, Tiro, wati, Ine ndine wokongola wangwiro." 
Ezekiel27:4 M'mphepete mwako muli m'kati mwa nyanja, iwo anakumanga iwe anakonza kukongola kwako kukhale kwangwiro." 
Ezekiel27:5 Anacheka matabwa ako onse amlombwa wa ku Seniri, anatenga mikungudza ya ku Lebanoni kukupangira milongoti." 
Ezekiel27:6 Anasema nkhafi zako za thundu wa ku Basani, anapanga mipando yako yamnyanga, woika mu mtengo wanaphini wochokera ku zisumbu za Kitimu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Thanga lako ndi labafuta wopikapika wa ku Ejipito, likhale ngati mbendera yako; chophimba chako ndicho nsalu yamadzi ndi yofiirira zochokera ku zisumbu za Elisa." 
Ezekiel27:8 Okhala m'Sidoni ndi Arivadi ndiwo opalasa ako; anzeru ako, Tiro, okhala mwa iwe, ndiwo oongolera ako." 
Ezekiel27:9 Akulu a ku Gebala ndi eni luso ake anali mwa iwe kukonza ziboo zako; zombo zonse za kunyanja pamodzi ndi amalinyero ao anali mwa iwe kusinthana nawe malonda. 
Ezekiel27:10 Apersiya, Aludi, Aputi, anali m'khamu lako; anthu ako a nkhondo anapachika chikopa ndi chisoti mwa iwe, anamveketsa kukoma kwako." 
Ezekiel27:11 Anthu a Arivadi pamodzi ndi ankhondo ako anali pa malinga ako pozungulira, ndi Agamadi anali mu nsanja zako; anapachika zikopa zao pa makoma ako pozungulira, anakwaniritsa kukoma kwako." 
Ezekiel27:12 Tarisisi anagulana nawe malonda m'kuchuluka kwa chuma chilichonse; anagula malonda ako ndi siliva ndi chitsulo, seta ndi ntovu." 
Ezekiel27:13 Yavani, Tubala, Meseki, anagulana nawe malonda; ndi anthu amoyo ndi zotengera zamkuwa anagulana nawe malonda." 
Ezekiel27:14 Iwo a nyumba ya Togarima anagula malonda ako ndi akavalo, ndi akavalo a nkhondo, ndi nyuru." 
Ezekiel27:15 Anthu a ku Dedani anakutsatsa malonda, zisumbu zambiri zinazolowerana nawe malonda ako, anabwera nazo minyanga ndi phingo kugulana nawe malonda." 
Ezekiel27:16 Aramu anachita nawe malonda chifukwa cha zambirizo udazipanga, anagula malonda ako ndi smaragido, nsalu yofiirira, ndi yopikapika, ndi bafuta, ndi korale, ndi ngale." 
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda ndi dziko la Israele anagulana nawe malonda, anagula malonda ako ndi tirigu wa ku Miniti, ndi zozuna, ndi uchi, ndi mafuta, ndi mafuta amankhwala." 
Ezekiel27:18 Damasiko anagulana nawe malonda chifukwa cha zambirizo udazipanga, chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa chuma chilichonse, ndi vinyo wa ku Heliboni, ndi ubweya wa nkhosa woyera." 
Ezekiel27:19 Vedani ndi Yavani anagula malonda ako ndi thonje, unagulana nao chitsulo chosalala, ngaho, ndi nzimbe." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedani anagulana nawe malonda ndi nsalu za mtengo wake zoyenda nazo pa kavalo. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabiya ndi akalonga onse a ku Kedara anazolowerana nao malonda ako; anaankhosa, nkhosa zamphongo, ndi mbuzi, izi anagulana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:22 Amalonda a ku Sheba ndi a ku Raama anagulana nawe malonda; anagula malonda ako ndi zonunkhira zoposa zilizonse, ndi miyala iliyonse ya mtengo wake, ndi golide." 
Ezekiel27:23 Harani ndi Kane ndi Edeni, amalonda a ku Sheba Asiriya ndi Kilimadi, anagulana nawe malonda." 
Ezekiel27:24 Awa anagulana nawe malonda ndi zovala zosankhika, ndi mitumba ya nsalu zofiirira ndi zopikapika, ndi chuma cha thonje lopotapota, ndi zingwe zopota zolimba za malonda ako." 
Ezekiel27:25 Zombo za ku Tarisisi ndizo amtengatenga a malonda ako; ndipo unadzadzidwa ndi chuma ndi ulemu waukulu pakati pa nyanja. 
Ezekiel27:26 Opalasa ako anakufikitsa kumadzi aakulu; mphepo ya kum'mawa inakuthyola m'kati mwa nyanja. 
Ezekiel27:27 Chuma chako, zako zogulana nazo malonda ako, amalinyero ako, ndi oongolera ako, amisiri ako, ndi ogulitsa malonda ako, ndi ankhondo ako onse okhala mwa iwe, pamodzi ndi msonkhano wonse uli pakati pa iwe, adzagwa m'kati mwa nyanja tsiku la kugwa kwako." 
Ezekiel27:28 Pakumveka mfuu wa oongolera ako mabwalo ako adzagwedezeka. 
Ezekiel27:29 Ndi onse ogwira nkhafi, amalinyero, ndi oongolera onse a kunyanja, adzatsika kuzombo zao, nadzaima pamtunda," 
Ezekiel27:30 nadzamveketsa mau ao pa iwe, nadzalira mowawa mtima, nadzathira fumbi pamitu pao, nadzakunkhulira m'maphulusa," 
Ezekiel27:31 nadzameta mpala chifukwa cha iwe, nadzadzimangira ziguduli m'chuuno, nadzakulirira ndi mtima wowawa maliro owawa." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ndipo pakulira adzakukwezera nyimbo ya maliro, ndi kukulirira, ndi kuti, Wakunga Tiro ndani, wakunga uyu waonongeka pakati pa nyanja?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Pakutuluka malonda ako m'nyanja unadzaza mitundu yambiri ya anthu, unalemeretsa mafumu a pa dziko lapansi ndi chuma chako chochuluka ndi malonda ako." 
Ezekiel27:34 Muja unathyoka ndi nyanja m'madzi akuya malonda ako ndi msonkhano wako wonse adagwa pakati pako. 
Ezekiel27:35 Onse okhala pa zisumbu adagwa nawe, ndi mafumu ao aopsedwa kwambiri, zikhululuka nkhope zao." 
Ezekiel27:36 Amalonda mwa mitundu ya anthu akunyodola, wakhala choopsetsa iwe, ndipo sudzakhalanso konse." 
Ezekiel28:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel28:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, uziti kwa kalonga wa Tiro, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mtima wako wadzikweza, nuti, Ine ndine Mulungu, ndikhala pa mpando wa Mulungu pakati pa nyanja, ungakhale uli munthu, wosati Mulungu, ungakhale waika mtima wako ngati mtima wa Mulungu," 
Ezekiel28:3 taona, ndiwe wanzeru woposa Daniele, palibe chinsinsi angakubisire;" 
Ezekiel28:3 taona, ndiwe wanzeru woposa Daniele, palibe chinsinsi angakubisire;" 
Ezekiel28:4 mwa nzeru zako ndi luntha lako wadzionerera chuma, wadzionereranso golide ndi siliva mwa chuma chako;" 
Ezekiel28:5 mwa nzeru zako zazikulu ndi kugulana malonda kwako wachulukitsa chuma chako, ndi mtima wako wadzikuza chifukwa cha chuma chako;" 
Ezekiel28:6 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza waika mtima wako ngati mtima wa Mulungu;" 
Ezekiel28:7 chifukwa chake taona ndidzakufikitsira alendo oopsa a mitundu ya anthu, iwo adzasololera malupanga ao nzeru zako zokongola, nadzaipsa kunyezimira kwako." 
Ezekiel28:8 Adzakutsitsira kumanda, nudzafa mafedwe a ophedwa m'kati mwa nyanja." 
Ezekiel28:9 Kodi udzanena ndithu pamaso pa iye wakupha iwe, Ine ndine Mulungu, pokhala uli munthu, wosati Mulungu, m'dzanja la iye wakupha iwe." 
Ezekiel28:10 Udzafa mafedwe a osadulidwa ndi dzanja la alendo, pakuti ndachinena, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel28:11 Nandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel28:12 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kweza nyimbo ya maliro yolirira mfumu ya Tiro, nuziti kwa iye, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Wakomera muyeso ndi chizindikiro, wodzala ndi nzeru wokongola wangwiro." 
Ezekiel28:13 Unali m'Edeni, munda wa Mulungu, mwala uliwonse wa mtengo wake unali chofunda chako, sardiyo, topazi, diamondi, berulo, sohamu, ndi yaspi, safiro, nofeki, bareketi, ndi golide; malingaka ako ndi akazi ako anakutumikira tsiku lolengedwa iwe zinakonzekeratu." 
Ezekiel28:14 Unali kerubi wodzozedwa wakuphimba, ndipo ndinakuika unali pa phiri lopatulika la Mulungu, anayendayenda pakati pa miyala yamoto." 
Ezekiel28:15 Unali wangwiro m'njira zako chilengedwere iwe, mpaka chinapezeka mwa iwe chosalungama." 
Ezekiel28:16 Mwa kuchuluka kwa malonda ako anakudzaza m'kati mwako ndi chiwawa, ndipo unachimwa; chifukwa chake ndinakukankha kukuchotsa pa phiri la Mulungu; ndipo ndinakuononga, kerubi wakuphimba iwe, kukuchotsa pakati pa miyala yamoto." 
Ezekiel28:17 Unadzikuza mtima chifukwa cha kukongola kwako, waipsa nzeru zako; chifukwa cha kuwala kwako ndakugwetsa pansi, ndakuika pamaso pa mafumu, kuti akupenye." 
Ezekiel28:18 Mwa mphulupulu zako zochuluka ndi malonda ako osalungama waipsa malo ako opatulika; chifukwa chake ndatulutsa moto m'kati mwako wakunyeketsa iwe; ndipo ndakusandutsa mapulusa panthaka pamaso pa onse akuona. 
Ezekiel28:19 Onse akudziwa iwe mwa mitundu ya anthu adzadabwa nawe; wasanduka choopsa, ndipo sudzakhalanso konse." 
Ezekiel28:20 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel28:21 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako ku Sidoni, nuunenere;" 
Ezekiel28:22 uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, nditsutsana nawe Sidoni, ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa pakati pako; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova pakuchita Ine maweruzo mwa uwu, ndi kuzindikiridwa Woyera mwa uwu." 
Ezekiel28:23 Pakuti ndidzatumiza mliri ndi mwazi ilowe m'makwalala ake, ndi olasidwa adzagwa m'kati mwake ndi lupanga lougwera pozungulira ponse; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel28:24 Ndipo nyumba ya Israele siidzakhalanso nayo mitungwi yolasa, kapena minga yaululu ya aliyense wakuizinga ndi kuipeputsa; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel28:25 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Pakusonkhanitsa nyumba ya Israele mwa mitundu ya anthu anabalalikamo, ndidzazindikirika Woyera mwaiwowa, pamaso pa amitundu; ndipo adzakhala m'dziko mwaomwao ndinalipereka kwa Yakobo mtumiki wanga." 
Ezekiel28:26 Nadzakhalamo osatekeseka, nadzamanga nyumba, ndi kuoka mpesa m'mindamo, nadzakhalamo mosatekeseka, ndikatha kukwaniritsira maweruzo pa onse akuwapeputsa pozungulira pao; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Ezekiel29:1 Chaka chakhumi, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi ndi chiwiri la mweziwo, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel29:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako itsutsane naye Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, nunenere motsutsana ndi iye, ndi Ejipito lonse;" 
Ezekiel29:3 nena, uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona nditsutsana nawe, Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, ng'ona yaikulu yakugona m'kati mwa mitsinje yake, imene ikuti, Mtsinje wanga ndi wangatu, ndadzipangira ndekha uwu." 
Ezekiel29:4 Koma ndidzaika mbedza m'kamwa mwako, ndi kumamatiritsa nsomba za m'mitsinje mwako kumamba ako; ndipo ndidzakukweza kukutulutsa m'kati mwa mitsinje yako, pamodzi ndi nsomba zonse za m'mitsinje mwako zomamatira pa mamba ako." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndipo ndidzakutaya kuchipululu, iwe ndi nsomba zonse za m'mitsinje mwako; udzagwa kuthengo koyera, sudzaunjikidwa, kapena kuoledwa; ndakupereka ukhale chakudya cha zilombo za padziko, ndi mbalame za kumlengalenga." 
Ezekiel29:6 Ndi onse okhala m'Ejipito adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, popeza anakhalira nyumba ya Israele mchirikizo wabango." 
Ezekiel29:7 Muja anakugwira ndi dzanja unathyoka, ndi kulasa mapewa ao onse; ndi muja anakutsamira unathyoka, ndi kuwagwedeza ziuno zao zonse." 
Ezekiel29:8 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndikudzera ndi lupanga, ndi kukulikhira munthu ndi nyama." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ndi dziko la Ejipito lidzakhala lopasuka ndi labwinja; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, popeza anati, Mtsinjewo ndi wanga, ndinaulenga ndine." 
Ezekiel29:10 Chifukwa chake taona, nditsutsana ndi iwe ndi mitsinje yako, ndipo ndidzasandutsa dziko la Ejipito likhale lopasuka konse, ndi labwinja, kuyambira ku Migidoli mpaka ku nsanja ya Siyene kufikira malire a Kusi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Silidzapitamo phazi la munthu, kapena phazi la nyama losapitamo, losakhalamo anthu zaka makumi anai." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa dziko la Ejipito labwinja pakati pa maiko a mabwinja; ndi midzi yake pakati pa midzi yopasuka idzakhala yabwinja zaka makumi anai; ndipo ndidzamwaza Aejipito mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko." 
Ezekiel29:13 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Zitatha zaka makumi anai ndidzasonkhanitsa Aejipito kumitundu ya anthu kumene anamwazikirako;" 
Ezekiel29:14 ndipo ndidzabweza undende wa Ejipito, ndi kuwabwezera kudziko la Patirosi, kudziko la kubadwa kwao, ndi komweko adzakhala ufumu wopepuka." 
Ezekiel29:15 Udzakhala wopepuka wa maufumu onse, sudzadzikwezanso pa amitundu; ndipo ndidzawachepsa, kuti asachitenso ufumu pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel29:16 Ndipo sudzakhalanso chotama cha nyumba ya Israele, kukumbutsa mphulupulu, pakuwatembenukira kuwatsata; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel29:17 Ndipo kunali chaka cha makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri mwezi woyamba, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel29:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni anachititsa ankhondo ake ntchito yaikulu yoponyana ndi Tiro; mitu yonse inachita dazi, ndi mapewa onse ananyuka; koma analibe kulandira mphotho ya ku Tiro, iye kapena ankhondo ake, pa ntchito anagwirayo;" 
Ezekiel29:19 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndidzapereka dziko la Ejipito kwa Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni; ndipo adzachoka nao aunyinji ake, nadzafunkha ndi kulanda zake, ndizo mphotho ya khamu lake." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndamninkha dziko la Ejipito chombwezera ntchito yake, popeza anandigwirira ntchito, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel29:21 Tsiku ilo ndidzameretsera nyumba ya Israele nyanga; ndipo ndidzakutsegulira pakamwa pakati pao; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel30:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel30:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nenera, uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Liritsani, Ha, tsikulo!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Pakuti layandikira tsiku, layandikira tsiku la Yehova, tsiku lamitambo, ndiyo nyengo ya amitundu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ndi lupanga lidzadzera Ejipito, ndi m'Kusi mudzakhala kuwawa kwakukulu, pakugwa ophedwa m'Ejipito; ndipo adzachotsa aunyinji ake, ndi maziko ake adzagadamuka." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kusi, ndi Puti, ndi Ludi, ndi osokonezeka onse, ndi Libiya, ndi anthu a dziko lopangana nao, adzagwa pamodzi nao ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel30:6 Atero Yehova, Iwonso ochirikiza Ejipito adzagwa, ndi mphamvu yake yodzikuza idzatsika, kuyambira ku Migidoli mpaka ku nsanja ya Siyene adzagwa m'kati mwake ndi lupanga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ndipo adzakhala opasuka pakati pa maiko opasuka, ndi midzi yake idzakhala pakati pa midzi yopasuka." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, nditaika moto m'Ejipito, naonongeka onse akumthandiza." 
Ezekiel30:9 Tsiku ilo mithenga idzatuluka pamaso panga m'zombo kuopsa Akusi osalabadira; ndipo kudzakhala kuwawa kwakukulu pakati pao, monga tsiku la Ejipito, pakuti taona, likudza." 
Ezekiel30:10 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzaleketsa kusokosera kwa Ejipito ndi dzanja la Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Ezekiel30:11 Iye ndi anthu ake pamodzi naye, woopsa amitundu, adzatengedwa aliononge dzikolo, nadzasololera Ejipito malupanga ao, ndi kudzaza dziko ndi ophedwa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndipo ndidzaphwetsa mitsinje, ndi kugulira dziko m'dzanja la anthu oipa, ndipo ndidzalisandutsa likhale dziko lopasuka, ndi zonse zili m'mwemo mwa dzanja la alendo; Ine Yehova ndachinena." 
Ezekiel30:13 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzaononganso mafano, ndi kuleketsa milungu yopanda pake ku Nofu; ndipo sadzaonekanso kalonga wochokera ku Ejipito, ndipo ndidzaopsa dziko la Ejipito." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa Patirosi labwinja, ndi kuika moto m'Zowani, ndi kukwaniritsa maweruzo m'No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndipo ndidzatsanulira ukali wanga pa Sini, polimbika penipeni pa Ejipito, ndi kulikha aunyinji a No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndipo ndidzaika moto m'Ejipito; Sini adzamva kuwawa kwakukulu, ndi No adzagawika pakati, ndi Nofu adzaona adani usana." 
Ezekiel30:17 Anyamata a Oni ndi Pibeseti adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi midziyi idzalowa undende." 
Ezekiel30:18 Ndi ku Tehafinehesi kudzada usana, pakuthyola Ine magoli a Ejipito komweko; ndi mphamvu yake yodzikuza idzalekeka m'menemo; kunena za ilo mtambo udzaliphimba, ndi ana ake akazi adzalowa undende." 
Ezekiel30:19 Motero ndidzakwaniritsa maweruzo m'Ejipito, ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel30:20 Ndipo kunali chaka chakhumi ndi chimodzi, mwezi woyamba, tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel30:21 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ndathyola dzanja la Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, ndipo taona, silinamangidwa kuti lipole, kulikulunga ndi nsalu, kulilimbitsa ligwire lupanga." 
Ezekiel30:22 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, Ine ndilimbana naye Farao mfumu ya Aejipito, ndidzathyola manja ake, lolimba ndi lothyokalo, ndi kutayitsa lupanga m'dzanja lake." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndipo ndidzamwaza Aejipito mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa manja a mfumu ya ku Babiloni, ndi kuika lupanga langa m'dzanja lake; koma ndidzathyola manja a Farao, ndipo adzabuula pamaso pake mabuulo a munthu wopyozedwa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa manja a mfumu ya ku Babiloni, koma manja a Farao adzagwa; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova pakuika Ine lupanga langa m'dzanja la mfumu ya ku Babiloni, nalitambasula iye pa dziko la Ejipito." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndipo ndidzamwaza Aejipito mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa mwa amitundu; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel31:1 Ndipo kunali chaka chakhumi ndi chimodzi, mwezi wachitatu, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel31:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nena kwa Farao mfumu ya Aejipito ndi aunyinji ake, Ufanana ndi yani m'ukulu wako?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Taona, Asiriya anali mkungudza wa ku Lebanoni ndi nthambi zokoma zovalira, wautali msinkhu, kunsonga kwake ndi kumitambo." 
Ezekiel31:4 Madzi anaumeretsa, chigumula chinaukulitsa, mitsinje yake inayenda, nizungulira munda wake, nipititsa michera yake kumitengo yonse ya kuthengoko." 
Ezekiel31:5 Chifukwa chake msinkhu wake unaposa mitengo yonse ya kuthengo, ndi nthambi zake zinachuluka, ndi nthawi zake zinatalika, chifukwa cha madzi ambiri pophuka uwu." 
Ezekiel31:6 Mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga zinamanga zisa zao pa nthambi zake, ndi pansi pa nthawi zake zinaswana nyama zonse za kuthengo, ndi pa mthunzi wake inakhala mitundu yonse yaikulu ya anthu." 
Ezekiel31:7 M'mwemo unakoma m'ukulu wake, m'kutalika kwa nthawi zake, popeza muzu wake unakhala kumadzi ambiri." 
Ezekiel31:8 Mikungudza ya m'munda wa Mulungu siinathe kuubisa, milombwa siinanga nthambi zake, mifula siinanga nthawi zake; m'munda wa Mulungu munalibe mtengo wofanana nao kukoma kwake." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndinaupanga wokoma ndi nthawi zake zochuluka; ndi mitengo yonse ya m'Edeni inali m'munda wa Mulungu inachita nao nsanje. 
Ezekiel31:10 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mtengowo unakuza msinkhu wake, nufikitsa nsonga yake kumitambo, nukwezeka mtima wake m'kukula kwake," 
Ezekiel31:11 ndidzaupereka m'dzanja la wamphamvu wa amitundu; iye adzachita naotu, Ine ndautaya mwa choipa chake." 
Ezekiel31:12 Ndipo alendo oopsawo a amitundu anaulikhatu, nausiya; nthawi zake zidagwa pamapiri ndi m'zigwa zonse, ndi nthambi zake zinathyokera ku timitsinje tonse ta m'dziko; ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi inatsika kumthunzi wake, niusiya." 
Ezekiel31:13 Pogwera pake padzakhala mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi nyama zonse za kuthengo zidzakhala pa nthambi zake;" 
Ezekiel31:14 kuti mitengo iliyonse ya kumadzi isadzikuze chifukwa cha msinkhu wao, kapena kufikitsa nsonga zao pakati pa mitambo, ndi kuti amphamvu ao asaime m'kukula kwao, ndiwo onse akumwa madzi; pakuti onsewo aperekedwa kuimfa munsi mwake mwa dziko, pakati pa ana a anthu, pamodzi ndi iwo otsikira kumanda." 
Ezekiel31:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsiku lija anatsikira kumanda ndinachititsa maliro, ndinamphimbira nyanja, ndinachepsa mitsinje yake, ndi madzi aakulu analetseka; ndipo ndinamdetsera Lebanoni, ndi mitengo yonse ya kuthengo inafota chifukwa cha uwo." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndinagwedeza amitundu ndi phokoso la kugwa kwake, muja ndinagwetsera kumanda, pamodzi ndi iwo otsikira kumanda; ndi mitengo yonse ya ku Edeni yosankhika, ndi yokometsetsa ya ku Lebanoni, yonse yakumwa madzi, inasangalala munsi mwake mwa dziko lapansi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Iwonso anatsika naye kumanda kwa iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, ndiwo amene adakhala dzanja lake okhala mumthunzi mwake pakati pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel31:18 Momwemo ufanana ndi yani m'ulemerero ndi ukulu pakati pa mitengo ya Edeni? Koma udzatsitsidwa pamodzi ndi mitengo ya Edeni munsi mwake mwa dziko lapansi, udzagona pakati pa osadulidwa, pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga. Uwu ndi Farao ndi aunyinji ake onse, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:1 Ndipo kunali chaka chakhumi ndi chiwiri, mwezi wakhumi ndi chiwiri, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel32:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, takwezera Farao mfumu ya Aejipito nyimbo yamaliro; uziti naye, Unafanana nao msona wa mkango wa amitundu, unanga ng'ona ya m'nyanja, unabuka m'mitsinje mwako, nuvundulira madzi ndi mapazi ako, ndi kudetsa mitsinje yao." 
Ezekiel32:3 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzakuponyera khoka langa mwa msonkhano wa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, nadzakuvuulira m'khoka mwanga." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndipo ndidzakusiya pamtunda, ndidzakuponya kuthengo koyera, ndi kuteretsa pa iwe mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi kukhutitsa zilombo za dziko lonse lapansi ndi iwe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndipo ndidzaika nyama yako pamapiri, ndi kudzaza zigwa ndi msinkhu wako." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndipo ndidzamwetsa dziko losambiramo iwe ndi mwazi wako, kufikira kumapiri; ndi mitsinje idzadzala nawe." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ndipo pakukuzima iwe ndidzaphimba thambo, ndi kudetsa nyenyezi zake; ndidzaphimba dzuwa ndi mtambo, ndi mwezi sudzaonetsa kuwala kwake." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ndidzakudetsera miyuni yonse yakuunikira kuthambo, ndi kuchititsa mdima pa dziko lako, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:9 Ndidzavutanso mitima ya mitundu yambiri ya anthu, pakufikitsa Ine chionongeko chako mwa amitundu, m'maiko amene sunawadziwa." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndipo ndidzasumwitsa nawe mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ndi mafumu ao adzachita malunga chifukwa cha iwe, pakung'animitsa Ine lupanga langa pamaso pao; ndipo adzanjenjemera mphindi zonse, yense chifukwa cha moyo wake tsiku lakugwa iwe." 
Ezekiel32:11 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Lupanga la mfumu ya ku Babiloni lidzakudzera." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndidzagwetsa aunyinji ako ndi malupanga a eni mphamvu, ndiwo onse oopsetsa a amitundu; ndipo adzaipsa kudzikuza kwa Ejipito, ndi aunyinji ake onse adzaonongeka." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndidzaononganso nyama zake zonse za kumadzi ambiri; ndi phazi la munthu silidzavundulira, ndi ziboda za nyama zosawavundulira." 
Ezekiel32:14 Pamenepo ndidzadikhitsa madzi ake, ndi kuyendetsa madzi a m'mitsinje mwao ngati mafuta, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:15 Pakusanduliza Ine dziko la Ejipito likhale lopasuka ndi labwinja, dziko losowa zodzaza zake, pakukantha Ine onse okhala m'mwemo, pamenepo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:16 Iyi ndi nyimbo ya maliro adzalira nayo, ana akazi a amitundu adzachita nayo maliro; adzalirira nayo Ejipito ndi aunyinji ake onse, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:17 Kunalinso chaka chakhumi ndi chiwiri, tsiku lakhumi ndi chisanu la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel32:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lirira aunyinji a Ejipito, nuwagwetsere iye ndi ana akazi a amitundu omveka kunsi kwa dziko, pamodzi ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:19 Uposa yani m'kukoma kwako? Tsika, nuikidwe ndi osadulidwa." 
Ezekiel32:20 Adzagwa pakati pa iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, operekedwa kwa lupanga, mkokereko ndi aunyinji ake onse." 
Ezekiel32:21 Amphamvu oposa ali m'kati mwa manda adzanena naye, pamodzi ndi othandiza ake, Anatsikira, agonako osadulidwawo, ophedwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel32:22 Asiriya ali komwe ndi msonkhano wake wonse, manda ake amzinga; ophedwa onsewo, adagwa ndi lupanga;" 
Ezekiel32:23 manda ao aikidwa ku malekezero a dzenje, ndi gulu lake lizinga manda ake; ophedwa onsewo adagwa ndi lupanga, amene anopsetsa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:24 Elamu ali komwe ndi gulu lake lonse lozinga manda ake; ophedwa onsewo, adagwa ndi lupanga; amene anatsikira osadulidwa kunsi kwake kwa dziko, amene anaopsetsa m'dziko la amoyo, nasenza manyazi ao, pamodzi ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:25 Pakati pa ophedwa anamuikira kama, iye ndi aunyinji ake onse, manda ake amzinga, onsewo osadulidwa, ophedwa ndi lupanga, pakuti anaopsetsa la amoyo, nasenza manyazi ao, pamodzi ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje, aikidwa pakati pa ophedwa." 
Ezekiel32:26 Meseki, Tubala, ndi aunyinji ake onse ali komweko, manda ake amzinga; onsewo osadulidwa, ophedwa ndi lupanga; pakuti anaopsetsa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Koma sagona pamodzi ndi amphamvu osadulidwa adagwawo amene anatsikira kumanda ndi zida zao za nkhondo, amene anawatsamiritsa malupanga ao; ndi mphulupulu zao zili pa mafupa ao; pakuti anaopsetsa amphamvu m'dziko la amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:28 Ndipo udzathyoledwa pakati pa osadulidwa, nudzagona pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel32:29 Edomu ali komwe, mafumu ake ndi akalonga ake onse, amene anaikidwa mu mphamvu yao, pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga; agona pamodzi ndi osadulidwa, ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:30 Akalonga a kumpoto ali komwe onsewo, ndi Asidoni onse, amene anatsikira pamodzi ndi ophedwa, nachita manyazi chifukwa cha kuopsetsa anachititsaku ndi mphamvu yao, nagona osadulidwa pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, nasenza manyazi ao pamodzi ndi iwo otsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:31 Farao adzawaona, nadzasangalala nao aunyinji ake onse, Farao ndi ankhondo ake onse ophedwa ndi lupanga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:32 Pakuti ndinaika kuopsa kwake m'dziko la amoyo; ndipo adzaikidwa pakati pa osadulidwa, pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, ndiye Farao ndi aunyinji ake onse, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel33:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel33:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Nena ndi ana a anthu a mtundu wako, uziti nao, Ndikafikitsira dziko lililonse lupanga, nakatenga eni dziko munthu wa pakati pao, nakamuika awadikirire," 
Ezekiel33:3 nakaona iye lupanga lilikudzera dziko, nakaomba lipenga ndi kuchenjeza anthu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 ndipo wina, kumva adamva mau a lipenga, koma osalabadira, likadza lupanga, nilimchotsa, wadziphetsa ndi mtima wake." 
Ezekiel33:5 Anamva mau a lipenga, osawalabadira, wadziphetsa ndi mtima wake; akadalabadira, akadalanditsa moyo wake." 
Ezekiel33:6 Koma mlonda akaona lupanga likudza, osaomba lipenga, osachenjeza anthu, nilidza lupanga, nilichotsa mwa iwo; munthu atengedwadi m'mphulupulu zake, koma mwazi wake ndidzaufunsa pa dzanja la mlonda." 
Ezekiel33:7 Iwe tsono, wobadwa ndi munthu, ndakuika mlonda wa nyumba ya Israele, m'mwemo imva mau a pakamwa panga, nundichenjezere iwo." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ndikati Ine kwa woipa, Woipawe, udzafa ndithu, osanena iwe kumchenjeza woipayo aleke njira yake, woipa uyo adzafa m'mphulupulu yake, koma mwazi wake ndidzaufunsa pa dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel33:9 Koma ukachenjeza woipa za njira yake, aileke; koma iye osaileka njira yake, adzafa m'mphulupulu mwake iye, koma iwe walanditsa moyo wako." 
Ezekiel33:10 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, nena kwa nyumba ya Israele, Mumatero inu ndi kuti, Zolakwa zathu ndi zochimwa zathu zitikhalira, ndipo tichita nazo liwondewonde, tidzakhala ndi moyo bwanji?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Uziti nao, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sindikondwera nayo imfa ya woipa, koma kuti woipa aleke njira yake, nakhale ndi moyo; bwererani, bwererani, kuleka njira zanu zoipa, muferenji inu nyumba ya Israele?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, unene ndi ana a anthu a mtundu wako, Cholungama cha wolungama sichidzamlanditsa tsiku la kulakwa kwake, ndi kunena za choipa cha woipa, sadzagwa nacho tsiku lakubwerera iye kuleka choipa chake; ndi munthu wolungama sadzakhoza kukhala ndi moyo ndi chilungamo chake tsiku lakuchimwa iye." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ndikanena kwa wolungama kuti adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, akatama chilungamo chake, akachita chosalungama, sizikumbukika zolungama zake zilizonse; koma m'chosalungama chake anachichita momwemo adzafa." 
Ezekiel33:14 Ndipo ndikanena kwa woipa, Udzafa ndithu: koma akabwerera iye kuleka tchimo lake, nakachita choyenera ndi cholungama;" 
Ezekiel33:15 woipayo akabweza chikole, nakabweza icho anachilanda mwachifwamba, nakayenda m'malemba a moyo wosachita chosalungama, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, sadzafa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Zoipa zake zilizonse anazichita sizidzakumbukika zimtsutse, anachita choyenera ndi cholungama, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu." 
Ezekiel33:17 Koma ana a anthu a mtundu wako akuti, Njira ya Ambuye siiyenera; koma iwowa njira yao siiyenera." 
Ezekiel33:18 Akabwerera wolungama kuleka chilungamo chake, nakachita chosalungama, adzafa m'mwemo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ndipo woipa akabwerera kuleka choipa chake, nakachita choyenera ndi cholungama, adzakhala ndi moyo nazo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Koma munati, Njira ya Ambuye siiyenera. Nyumba ya Israele inu, ndidzakuweruzani, yense monga mwa njira zake." 
Ezekiel33:21 Ndipo kunali chaka chakhumi ndi chiwiri cha undende wathu, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lachisanu la mweziwo, anandidzera wina wopulumuka ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Wakanthidwa mudzi." 
Ezekiel33:22 Koma dzanja la Yehova linandikhalira madzulo, asanandifike wopulumukayo; ndipo ananditsegula pakamwa mpaka anandifika m'mawa, m'mwemo panatseguka pakamwa panga, wosakhalanso wosalankhula." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel33:24 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, iwo okhala kumabwinja a dziko la Israele anena, ndi kuti, Abrahamu anali yekha, nakhala nalo dziko cholowa chake; koma ife ndife ambiri, dzikoli lipatsidwa kwa ife cholowa chathu." 
Ezekiel33:25 Chifukwa chake unene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mumadyera kumodzi ndi mwazi, mumakwezera maso anu kumafano anu, ndi kukhetsa mwazi; ndipo kodi mudzakhala nalo dziko cholowa chanu?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Mumatama lupanga lanu, mumachita chonyansa, mumaipsa yense mkazi wa mnansi wake; ndipo kodi mudzakhala nalo dziko cholowa chanu?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Uzitero nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Pali Ine, iwo okhala kumabwinja adzagwadi ndi lupanga, ndi iye ali kuthengo koyera ndidzampereka kwa zilombo, adyedwe nazo; ndi iwo okhala m'malinga ndi m'mapanga adzafa ndi mliri." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ndipo ndidzasanduliza dziko likhale lachipululu ndi lodabwitsa, ndi mphamvu yake yodzikuza idzatha, ndi mapiri a Israele adzakhala achipululu, osapitako munthu." 
Ezekiel33:29 Pamenepo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, posanduliza Ine dziko likhale lachipululu ndi lodabwitsa, chifukwa cha zonyansa zao zonse anazichita." 
Ezekiel33:30 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, ana a anthu a mtundu wako anena za iwe kumakoma ndi kumakomo a nyumba zao, nanenana yense ndi mbale wake, ndi kuti, Tiyeni tikamve mau ofuma kwa Yehova." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ndipo akudzera monga amadzera anthu, nakhala pansi pamaso pako ngati anthu anga, namva mau ako, koma osawachita; pakuti pakamwa pao anena mwachikondi, koma mtima wao utsata phindu lao." 
Ezekiel33:32 Ndipo taona, akuyesa iwe ngati nyimbo yachikondi ya woimba bwino, woimba limba bwino; pakuti akumva mau ako, koma osawachita." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ndipo pakuchitika ichi, pakuti chifikadi, pamenepo adzadziwa kuti panali mneneri pakati pao." 
Ezekiel34:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel34:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Nenera motsutsa abusa a Israele; nenera, nuti nao abusawo, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka abusa a Israele odzidyetsa okha; kodi abusa sayenera kudyetsa nkhosa?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Mukudya mafuta, muvala ubweya, mukupha zonenepa; koma simudyetsa nkhosa." 
Ezekiel34:4 Zofooka simunazilimbitsa; yodwala simunaichiritsa, yothyoka simunailukira chika, yopirikitsidwa simunaibweza, yotayika simunaifuna; koma munazilamulira mwamphamvu ndi moopsa." 
Ezekiel34:5 M'mwemo zinamwazika posowa mbusa, nizinakhala chakudya cha zilombo zilizonse za kuthengo, popeza zinamwazika." 
Ezekiel34:6 Nkhosa zanga zinasokera kumapiri ali onse, ndi pa chitunda chilichonse chachitali; inde nkhosa zanga zinabalalika pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndipo panalibe wakuzipwaira kapena kuzifunafuna." 
Ezekiel34:7 Chifukwa chake abusa inu, imvani mau a Yehova:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, zedi, popeza nkhosa zanga zinakhala nyama, ndi nkhosa zanga zinakhala chakudya cha zilombo zonse za kuthengo, chifukwa kunalibe mbusa, ndi abusa anga sanafunafune nkhosa zanga, koma abusawo anadzidyetsa okha, osadyetsa nkhosa zanga;" 
Ezekiel34:9 chifukwa chake, abusa inu, imvani mau a Yehova:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, Ine ndiipidwa nao abusa, ndidzafunsa nkhosa zanga pa dzanja lao, ndi kuwaletsa asadyetsenso nkhosazo, ngakhale kudzidyetsa okha sadzachitanso; ndipo ndidzalanditsa nkhosa zanga pakamwa pao, zisakhale chakudya chao." 
Ezekiel34:11 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, Ine, Inedi ndidzapwaira nkhosa zanga ndi kuzifunafuna." 
Ezekiel34:12 Monga mbusa afunafuna nkhosa zake tsiku lokhala iye pakati pa nkhosa zake zobalalika, momwemo ndidzafunafuna nkhosa zanga; ndipo ndidzawalanditsa m'malo monse anabalalikamo tsiku la mitambo ndi la mdima." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndipo ndidzazitulutsa mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndi kuzisonkhanitsa m'maiko, ndi kulowa nazo m'dziko lao; ndipo ndidzazidyetsa pa mapiri a Israele, patimitsinje, ndi ponse pokhala anthu m'dziko." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndidzazidyetsa podyetsa pabwino; ndi pa mapiri atali a Israele padzakhala kholo lao, apo adzagona m'khola mwabwino, nadzadya podyetsa pokometsera pa mapiri a Israele." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ine ndekha ndidzadyetsa nkhosa zanga, ndi kuzigonetsa, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndidzafuna yotayika, ndi kubweza yopirikitsidwa, ndi kulukira chika yothyoka mwendo, ndikulimbitsa yodwalayo; koma yonenepa ndi yolimba ndidzaziononga, ndidzazidyetsa ndi chiweruzo." 
Ezekiel34:17 Ndipo inu, gulu langa, atero Ambuye Yehova, ndiweruza pakati pa zoweta ndi zoweta, nkhosa zamphongo ndi atonde." 
Ezekiel34:18 Kodi chikucheperani, kuti mwadya podyetsa pabwino? Muyenera kodi kupondereza ndi mapazi anu podyera panu potsala? Muyenera kumwa madzi odikha, ndi kuvundulira otsalawo ndi mapazi anu?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ndi nkhosa zanga zidye kodi zoponderezeka ndi mapazi anu, ndi kumwa zovunduliridwa ndi mapazi anu?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Chifukwa chake atero nao Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, Ine, Inedi ndidzaweruza pakati pa zoweta zonenepa, ndi zoweta zoonda." 
Ezekiel34:21 Popeza mukankha ndi nthiti ndi phewa, nimugunda zodwala zonse ndi nyanga zanu, mpaka mwazibalalitsa kubwalo," 
Ezekiel34:22 chifukwa chake ndidzapulumutsa gulu langa lisakhalenso chakudya; ndipo ndidzaweruza pakati pa zoweta ndi zoweta. 
Ezekiel34:23 Ndipo ndidzaziutsira mbusa mmodzi; iye adzazidyetsa, ndiye mtumiki wanga Davide, iye adzazidyetsa, nadzakhala mbusa wao." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ndipo Ine Yehova ndidzakhala Mulungu wao, ndi mtumiki wanga Davide kalonga pakati pao; Ine Yehova ndanena." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndipo ndidzapangana nazo pangano la mtendere, ndi kuleketsa zilombo zoipa m'dzikomo; ndipo zidzakhala mosatekeseka m'chipululu, ndi kugona kunkhalango." 
Ezekiel34:26 Pakuti ndidzaika izi ndi milaga yozungulira chitunda changa, zikhale mdalitso; ndipo ndidzavumbitsa mivumbi m'nyengo yake, padzakhala mivumbi ya madalitso." 
Ezekiel34:27 Ndi mitengo ya kuthengo idzapereka zobala zao, ndi nthaka idzapereka zipatso zake, ndipo adzakhazikika m'dziko mwao; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, nditadula zomangira goli lao, ndi kuwalanditsa m'manja mwa iwo akuwatumikiritsa." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ndipo sadzakhalanso chakudya cha amitundu, ndi chilombo cha kuthengo sichidzawadyanso; koma adzakhala osatekeseka, opanda wina wakuwaopsa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndipo ndidzawautsira mbeu yomveka, ndipo sadzachotsedwanso ndi njala m'dzikomo, kapena kusenzanso manyazi a amitundu." 
Ezekiel34:30 Ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova Mulungu wao ndili nao, ndi kuti iwo, nyumba ya Israele, ndiwo anthu anga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel34:31 Ndipo inu nkhosa zanga, nkhosa zapabusa panga, ndinu anthu, ndi Ine ndine Mulungu wanu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel35:1 Nandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel35:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Lozetsa nkhope yako kuphiri la Seiri, nulinenere molitsutsa;" 
Ezekiel35:3 nuti nalo, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndiipidwa nawe phiri la Seiri, ndipo ndidzakutambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kukusanduliza lachipululu ndi lodabwitsa." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ndidzapasula midzi yako, nudzakhala lachipululu; ndipo udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel35:5 Popeza uli nao udani wosatha, waperekanso ana a Israele kumphamvu ya lupanga m'nthawi ya tsoka lao, mu nthawi ya mphulupulu yotsiriza;" 
Ezekiel35:6 chifukwa chake, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndikukonzeratu uphedwe, ndi mwazi udzakulondola; popeza sunadana nao mwazi, mwazi udzakulondola." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndipo ndidzaika phiri la Seiri lodabwitsa ndi lachipululu, ndi kuononga pomwepo wopitapo ndi wobwerapo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ndipo ndidzadzaza mapiri ake ndi ophedwa ake pa zitunda zako, ndi m'zigwa zako, ndi m'mitsinje mwako monse; adzagwa ophedwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndidzakusandutsa mabwinja osatha; ndi m'midzi mwako simudzakhalanso anthu; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel35:10 Popeza wanena, Mitundu iwiri iyi ya anthu ndi maiko awiri awa adzakhala anga, tidzakhala nao ngati cholowa chathu, angakhale Yehova anali komweko;" 
Ezekiel35:11 chifukwa chake, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndidzachita monga mwa mkwiyo wako, ndi monga mwa nsanje yako unachita nayo pa kukwiya nao iwe; ndipo ndidzadziwika nao pamene ndikuweruza." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ndipo udzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndidamva zamwano zako zonse udazinena pa mapiri a Israele, ndi kuti, Apasuka, apatsidwa kwa ife tiwadye." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ndipo pakamwa panu mwadzikuza pa Ine, ndi kundichulukitsira mau anu ndawamva Ine." 
Ezekiel35:14 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Pokondwerera dziko lonse ndidzakusanduliza lachipululu." 
Ezekiel35:15 Monga momwe unakondwerera cholowa cha nyumba ya Israele, popeza chidapasuka, momwemo ndidzakuchitira iwe; udzakhala wopasuka, phiri la Seiri iwe, ndi Edomu lonse lonseli; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:1 Ndipo iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu, unenere kwa mapiri a Israele, uziti, Mapiri a Israele inu, imvani mau a Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:2 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mdani ananena za inu, Onyo, ingakhale misanje yakale ili yathu, cholowa chathu;" 
Ezekiel36:3 chifukwa chake unenere, nuti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Chifukwa, inde chifukwa kuti anakupasulani, nakumemezani pozungulira ponse, kuti mukhale cholowa cha amitundu otsala, ndipo mwafika pa milomo ya akazitape, ndi pa mbiri yoipa ya anthu;" 
Ezekiel36:4 chifukwa chake, mapiri inu a Israele, imvani mau a Ambuye Yehova. Atero Ambuye Yehova kunena ndi mapiri, ndi zitunda, ndi mitsinje, ndi zigwa, ndi zipululu zopasuka, ndi midzi yamabwinja, imene yakhala chakudya ndi choseketsa amitundu otsala akuzungulira;" 
Ezekiel36:5 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Zoonadi pa nsanje yanga yodya nayo moto ndinanena motsutsana nao amitundu otsala, ndi Edomu lonse, amene anadzipatsira dziko langa likhale cholowa chao ndi chimwemwe cha mtima wonse, ndi mtima wopeputsa, kuti alande zake zonse zikhale zofunkha." 
Ezekiel36:6 Chifukwa chake unenere za dziko la Israele, nuti kwa mapiri ndi kwa zitunda, kwa mitsinje ndi kwa zigwa, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, ndalankhula mu nsanje yanga ndi ukali wanga, popeza mwasenza manyazi a amitundu;" 
Ezekiel36:7 chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndakweza dzanja langa Ine, ndi kuti, Zedi amitundu akuzungulira inu adzasenza manyazi ao." 
Ezekiel36:8 Koma inu, mapiri a Israele, mudzaphukitsa nthambi zanu, ndi kubalira anthu anga Israele zipatso zanu, pakuti ayandikira kufika." 
Ezekiel36:9 Pakuti taonani, Ine ndikhalira nanu kumodzi, ndipo ndidzakutembenukirani; ndipo mudzabzalidwa ndi kupaliridwa," 
Ezekiel36:10 ndipo ndidzakuchulukitsani anthu nyumba yonse ya Israele, yonseyi, ndi m'midzimo mudzakhala anthu, ndi kumabwinja kudzamangidwa midzi." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ndipo ndidzakuchulukitsirani anthu ndi nyama; ndipo adzachuluka, nadzabalana; ndipo ndidzakhalitsa anthu pa inu, monga umo anakhalira kale, ndipo ndidzachitira inu zabwino koposa poyamba paja; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ndipo ndidzayendetsa anthu pa inu, ndiwo anthu anga Israele; adzakhala nawe dziko laolao, ndipo udzakhala cholowa chao osafetsanso ana ao." 
Ezekiel36:13 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza akuti nawe, Dzikowe ukudya anthu, nuyesa anthu ako afedwa;" 
Ezekiel36:14 chifukwa chake sudzadyanso anthu, kapena kuyesanso a mtundu wako afedwa, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:15 Ndipo sindidzakumvetsanso za manyazi a amitundu, ndipo sudzasenzanso mtonzo wa mitundu ya anthu, kapena kukhumudwitsanso anthu ako, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:16 Mau a Yehova anandidzeranso, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel36:17 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, muja a nyumba ya Israele anakhala m'dziko mwao, analidetsa ndi njira yao, ndi machitidwe ao; njira yao pamaso panga inanga chidetso cha mkazi wooloka." 
Ezekiel36:18 M'mwemo ndinawatsanulira ukali wanga, chifukwa cha mwazi anautsanulira padziko, ndi chifukwa cha mafano analidetsa dziko nao;" 
Ezekiel36:19 ndipo ndinawabalalitsa mwa amitundu, namwazika m'maiko monga mwa njira yao; ndi monga mwa machitidwe ao ndinawaweruza." 
Ezekiel36:20 Ndipo pofika iwo kwa amitundu kumene anamukako, anadetsa dzina langa loyera; popeza anthu ananena za iwowa, Awa ndi anthu a Yehova, natuluka m'dziko mwake." 
Ezekiel36:21 Koma ndinawaleka chifukwa cha dzina langa loyera, limene a nyumba ya Israele adalidetsa pakati pa amitundu, kumene adamkako." 
Ezekiel36:22 Chifukwa chake nena kwa nyumba ya Israele, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Sindichichita ichi chifukwa cha inu, nyumba ya Israele, koma chifukwa cha dzina langa loyera munaliipsalo pakati pa amitundu, kumene mudamukako." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndipo ndidzazindikiritsa dzina langa lalikulu kuti lili loyera, limene laipitsidwa mwa amitundu, limene inu munaliipsa pakati pao; ndipo amitundu adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, ati Ambuye Yehova, pozindikiridwa Ine woyera mwa inu pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel36:24 Pakuti ndidzakutengani kukutulutsani kwa amitundu, ndi kukusokolotsani m'maiko onse, ndi kubwera nanu m'dziko lanu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndipo ndidzakuwazani madzi oyera, ndipo mudzakhala oyera; ndidzakuyeretsani kukuchotserani zodetsa zanu zonse, ndi mafano anu nonse." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ndipo ndidzakupatsani mtima watsopano, ndi kulonga m'kati mwanu mzimu watsopano; ndipo ndidzachotsa mtima wamwala m'thupi, ndi kukupatsani mtima wamnofu." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ndipo ndidzaika mzimu wanga m'kati mwanu, ndi kukuyendetsani m'malemba anga; ndipo mudzasunga maweruzo anga ndi kuwachita." 
Ezekiel36:28 Ndipo mudzakhala m'dziko ndinapatsa makolo anulo, ndipo mudzakhala anthu anga, ndi Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndipo ndidzakupulumutsani kwa zodetsa zanu zonse, ndidzaitananso tirigu ndi kumchulukitsa, osaikiranso inu njala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndipo ndidzachulukitsa zobala za mitengo, ndi zipatso za m'munda, kuti musalandirenso chitonzo cha njala mwa amitundu." 
Ezekiel36:31 Pamenepo mudzakumbukira njira zanu zoipa, ndi zochita inu zimene sizinali zabwino; ndipo mudzanyansidwa nokha pamaso panu, chifukwa cha mphulupulu zanu ndi zonyansa zanu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Dziwani kuti sindichita ichi chifukwa cha inu, ati Ambuye Yehova; chitani manyazi, dodomani, chifukwa cha njira zanu, nyumba ya Israele inu." 
Ezekiel36:33 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsiku loti ndikuyeretsani kukuchotserani mphulupulu zanu zonse, ndidzakhalitsa anthu m'midzimo; ndi pamabwinja padzamangidwa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ndi dziko lachipululu lidzalimidwa, chinkana linali lachipululu pamaso pa onse opitako." 
Ezekiel36:35 Ndipo adzati, Dziko ili lachipululu lasanduka ngati munda wa Edeni ndi midzi yamabwinja, ndi yachipululu, ndi yopasuka, yamangidwa malinga, muli anthu m'mwemo." 
Ezekiel36:36 Pamenepo amitundu otsala pozungulira panu adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndamanga malo opasuka, ndi kubzala pamene panali chipululu; Ine Yehova ndanena ndidzachita." 
Ezekiel36:37 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ichi chomwe adzandipempha a nyumba ya Israele ndiwachitire ichi, ndidzawachulukitsira anthu ngati nkhosa." 
Ezekiel36:38 Ngati nkhosa za nsembe, ngati nkhosa za ku Yerusalemu pa zikondwerero zake zoikika, momwemo midzi yamabwinja idzadzala nao magulu a anthu; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel37:1 Dzanja la Yehova linandikhalira, ndipo anatuluka nane mu mzimu wa Yehova, nandiika m'kati mwa chigwa, ndicho chodzala ndi mafupa;" 
Ezekiel37:2 ndipo anandipititsa pamenepo pozungulira ponse, ndipo taonani, anali aunyinji pachigwa pansi, ndipo anaumitsitsa." 
Ezekiel37:3 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, mafupa awa nkukhala ndi moyo kodi? Ndipo ndinati, Ambuye Yehova, mudziwa ndinu." 
Ezekiel37:4 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Nenera kwa mafupa awa, nuti nao, Mafupa ouma inu, imvani mau a Yehova." 
Ezekiel37:5 Atero Ambuye Yehova kwa mafupa awa, Taonani, ndidzalonga mpweya mwa inu, ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndipo ndidzakuikirani mtsempha, ndi kufikitsira inu mnofu, ndi kukuta inu ndi khungu, ndi kulonga mpweya mwa inu; ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel37:7 M'mwemo ndinanenera monga anandiuza, ndipo ponenera ine panali phokoso; ndipo taonani, panali gobedegobede, ndi mafupa anasendererana, fupa kutsata fupa linzake." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ndipo ndinapenya, taonani, panali mitsempha pa iwo, panadzaponso mnofu, ndi khungu linawakuta pamwamba pake; koma munalibe mpweya mwa iwo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Nenera kwa mpweya, nenera, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nuti kwa mpweya, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Idza, mpweya iwe, kuchokera kumphepo zinai, nuuzire ophedwa awa, kuti akhale ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel37:10 M'mwemo ndinanenera monga anandiuza, ndi mpweya unawalowa, ndipo anakhala ndi moyo, naimirira chilili, gulu la nkhondo lalikulukulu ndithu." 
Ezekiel37:11 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Mafupa awa ndiwo nyumba yonse ya Israele; taonani, akuti, Mafupa athu auma, chiyembekezo chathu chatayika, talikhidwa." 
Ezekiel37:12 Chifukwa chake, nenera, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani anthu anga, ndidzatsegula kumanda kwanu, ndi kukweza inu mutuluke m'manda mwanu, ndipo ndidzakulowetsani m'dziko la Israele." 
Ezekiel37:13 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova potsegula Ine kumanda kwanu, ndi kukweza inu kukutulutsani m'manda mwanu, anthu anga inu." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ndipo ndidzalonga mzimu wanga mwa inu, nimudzakhala ndi moyo; ndipo ndidzakukhazikani m'dziko mwanu; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndanena ndi kuchichita, ati Yehova." 
Ezekiel37:15 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel37:16 Tsono, iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, Tenga mtengo umodzi, nulembepo, Wa Yuda ndi wa ana a Israele anzake; nutenge mtengo wina, nulembepo, Wa Yosefe, mtengo wa Efuremu, ndi wa nyumba yonse ya Israele anzake;" 
Ezekiel37:17 nuiphatikize wina ndi unzake ikhale mtengo umodzi m'dzanja lako. 
Ezekiel37:18 Ndipo ana a anthu a mtundu wako akanena ndi iwe, ndi kuti, Sutifotokozera nanga zitani izi?" 
Ezekiel37:19 Unene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, ndidzatenga mtengo wa Yosefe uli m'dzanja la Efuremu, ndi wa mafuko a Israele anzake, ndi kuwaika pamodzi ndi mtengo wa Yuda, ndi kuiyesa mtengo umodzi; ndipo idzakhala umodzi m'dzanja langa." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ndipo mitengo imene ulembapo idzakhala m'dzanja mwako pamaso pao. 
Ezekiel37:21 Nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, ndidzatenga ana a Israele pakati pa amitundu kumene adamkako, ndi kuwasokolotsa kumbali zonse, ndi kulowa nao m'dziko mwao;" 
Ezekiel37:22 ndipo ndidzawayesa mtundu umodzi m'dzikomo, pa mapiri a Israele; ndipo mfumu imodzi idzakhala mfumu ya iwo onse, sadzakhalanso mitundu iwiri, kapena kugawanikanso maufumu awiri konse ai." 
Ezekiel37:23 Ndipo sadzadzidetsanso ndi mafano ao, kapena ndi zonyansa zao, kapena ndi zolakwa zao zilizonse; koma ndidzawapulumutsa mokhala mwao monse m'mene anachimwamo, ndi kuwayeretsa; m'mwemo adzakhala anthu anga, ndi Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wao." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ndi mtumiki wanga Davide adzakhala mfumu yao, ndipo iwo onse adzakhala ndi mbusa mmodzi, adzayendanso m'maweruzo anga, nadzasunga malemba anga ndi kuwachita." 
Ezekiel37:25 Ndipo adzakhala m'dziko ndinalipereka kwa Yakobo mtumiki wanga, limene anakhalamo makolo anu, ndipo adzakhala m'mwemo iwo, ndi ana ao, ndi zidzukulu zao kosatha; ndi Davide mtumiki wanga adzakhala mtsogoleri wao kosatha." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ndipo ndidzapangana nao pangano la mtendere, lidzakhala pangano losatha nao, ndipo ndidzawakhazika, ndi kuwachulukitsa, ndi kuika malo anga opatulika pakati pao kosatha." 
Ezekiel37:27 Kachisi wanganso adzakhala nao, ndipo Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wao, ndi iwo adzakhala anthu anga." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ndipo amitundu adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova wakupatula Israele, pokhala pakati pao malo anga opatulika kosatha." 
Ezekiel38:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel38:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako kwa Gogi, wa kudziko la Magogi, ndiye mfumu yaikulu ya Meseki ndi Tubala; nunenere motsutsana naye," 
Ezekiel38:3 uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, nditsutsana nawe, Gogi iwe, mfumu yaikulu ya Meseki ndi Tubala;" 
Ezekiel38:4 ndipo ndidzakutembenuza ndi kukowa m'chibwano mwako ndi zokowera, ndi kukutulutsa ndi nkhondo yako yonse, akavalo ndi apakavalo ovala mokwanira onsewo, msonkhano waukulu ndi zikopa zotchinjiriza, onsewo ogwira bwino malupanga;" 
Ezekiel38:5 Persiya, Kusi, ndi Puti pamodzi nao, onsewo ndi chikopa ndi chisoti chachitsulo;" 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeri ndi magulu ake onse, nyumba ya Togarima, ku malekezero a kumpoto, ndi magulu ake onse, mitundu yambiri pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Ukonzekeretu, inde udzikonzeretu, iwe ndi msonkhano wako wonse unakusonkhanira, nukhale iwe mtsogoleri wao." 
Ezekiel38:8 Atapita masiku ambiri udzakumbukirika; zaka zotsiriza udzalowa m'dziko lobwezedwa lopulumuka lupanga, losonkhanidwa lituluke m'mitundu yambiri ya anthu, pa mapiri a Israele, amene adakhala achipululu chikhalire; koma litulutsidwa m'mitundu ya anthu, ndipo adzakhala mosatekeseka onsewo." 
Ezekiel38:9 Ndipo udzakwera udzadza ngati mkuntho, udzanga mtambo kuphimba dziko, iwe ndi magulu ako onse, ndi mitundu yambiri ya anthu pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Ezekiel38:10 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Kudzachitika tsiku ilo kuti m'mtima mwako mudzalowa zinthu, nudzalingirira chiwembu choipa," 
Ezekiel38:11 nudzati, Ndidzakwera kunka kudziko la midzi yopanda malinga, ndidzamka kwa iwo amtendere okhala mosatekeseka, onsewo akukhala opanda malinga, opanda mapiringidzo, kapena zitseko;" 
Ezekiel38:12 kulanda ndi kufunkha zao, kubweza dzanja lako liononge mopasuka muli anthu tsopano, liononge mtundu wa anthu osonkhanidwa mwa amitundu, odzionera zoweta ndi chuma, okhala pakati pa dziko." 
Ezekiel38:13 Sheba, ndi Dedani, ndi amalonda a Tarisisi, ndi misona yake yonse ya mikango adzati kwa iwe, Wadza kodi kudzafunkha? Wasonkhanitsa kodi msonkhano wako kulanda, kuchoka nazo siliva ndi golide, kuchoka nazo zoweta ndi chuma, kulanda zankhondo zambiri?" 
Ezekiel38:14 Chifukwa chake nenera, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, uziti kwa Gogi, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsiku ilo, pokhala mosatekeseka anthu anga Israele, sudzachidziwa kodi?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Ndipo udzatuluka m'malo mwako m'malekezero a kumpoto, iwe ndi mitundu yambiri ya anthu pamodzi ndi iwe, onsewo apakavalo, msonkhano waukulu ndi nkhondo yaikulu;" 
Ezekiel38:16 ndipo udzakwerera anthu anga Israele ngati mtambo wakuphimba dziko; kudzachitika masiku otsiriza ndidzabwera nawe ulimbane nalo dziko langa, kuti amitundu andidziwe, pozindikiridwa Ine woyera mwa iwe, Gogi, pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel38:17 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Kodi iwe ndiwe iye amene ndinanena za iye masiku akale mwa atumiki anga aneneri a Israele, akunenera masiku aja za zaka za m'tsogolo, kuti ndidzabwera nawe kulimbana nao?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku ilo, tsiku loti Gogi adzadza kulimbana ndi dziko la Israele, ati Ambuye Yehova, ukali wanga udzakwera m'mphuno mwanga." 
Ezekiel38:19 Pakuti ndanena mu nsanje yanga, ndi m'moto wa kuzaza kwanga, Zoonadi tsiku ilo kudzakhala kugwedezeka kwakukulu m'dziko la Israele;" 
Ezekiel38:20 motero kuti nsomba za m'nyanja, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi nyama za kuthengo, ndi zokwawa zonse zakukwawa pansi, ndi anthu onse akukhala padziko, zidzanjenjemera pamaso panga; ndi mapiri adzagwetsedwa, ndi potsetsereka padzagumuka, ndi makoma onse adzagwa pansi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndipo ndidzamuitanira lupanga kumapiri anga onse, ati Ambuye Yehova, munthu aliyense lupanga lake lidzaombana nalo la mbale wake." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndipo ndidzalimbana naye ndi mliri ndi mwazi; ndipo ndidzamvumbitsira iye, ndi magulu ake, ndi mitundu yambiri ya anthu okhala naye mvumbi waukulu, ndi matalala akulu, moto ndi sulufure." 
Ezekiel38:23 Momwemo ndidzadzikuzitsa, ndi kudzizindikiritsa woyera, ndipo ndidzadziwika pamaso pa amitundu ambiri; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel39:1 Ndipo iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu, nenera motsutsana naye Gogi, uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, nditsutsana nawe Gogi, iwe mfumu yaikulu ya Meseki ndi Tubala;" 
Ezekiel39:2 ndipo ndidzakutembenuza, ndi kukutsogolera, ndi kukweza iwe uchoke ku malekezero a kumpoto; ndipo ndidzadza nawe kumapiri a Israele;" 
Ezekiel39:3 ndipo ndidzakantha uta wako kuuchotsa m'dzanja lako lamanzere, ndi kutayitsa mivi yako kudzanja lako lamanja." 
Ezekiel39:4 Udzagwa pa mapiri a Israele, iwe ndi magulu ako onse, ndi mitundu ya anthu okhala ndi iwe; ndidzakupereka kwa mbalame zolusa za mitundu yonse, ndi kwa zilombo za kuthengo, akuyese chakudya." 
Ezekiel39:5 Udzagwa kuthengo, koyera, pakuti ndanena ndine, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ndipo ndidzatumizira moto Magogi, ndi iwo okhala mosatekeseka m'zisumbu; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ndipo ndidzadziwikitsa dzina langa loyera pakati pa anthu anga Israele, osalola dzina langa loyera aliipsenso; ndipo amitundu adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Woyerayo wa Israele." 
Ezekiel39:8 Taonani, chikudza, chidzachitika, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndilo tsiku ndanenalo." 
Ezekiel39:9 Ndipo iwo okhala m'midzi ya Israele adzatuluka, nadzasonkha moto, nadzatentha zida za nkhondo, ndi zikopa zotchinjiriza, mauta, ndi mivi, ndi ndodo, ndi mikondo; ndipo adzasonkha moto nazo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri;" 
Ezekiel39:10 osatenga nkhuni kuthengo, kapena kuzitema kunkhalango; popeza adzasonkha moto ndi zidazo; nadzafunkha iwo amene anawafunkha, ndi kulanda zao za iwo adalanda zaozo, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel39:11 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku ilo, ndidzapatsa Gogi manda m'Israele, chigwa cha opitawo kum'mawa kwa nyanja; ndipo lidzaletsa opitawo, ndipo adzaika komweko Gogi ndi unyinji wake wonse, nadzachitcha, Chigwa cha unyinji wa Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ndi a nyumba ya Israele adzapititsa miyezi isanu ndi iwiri alikuwaika, kuti ayeretse dziko." 
Ezekiel39:13 Inde anthu onse a m'dziko adzawaika, nadzamveka nako tsiku lakulemekezedwa Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel39:14 Ndipo adzasankha anthu akupitapitabe m'dziko, ndi pamodzi ndi opitapitawo anthu akuika mafupa otsala pamtunda, kuliyeretsa; pakutha miyezi isanu ndi iwiri adzapwaira." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ndipo opitapitawo adzapitapita m'dziko, ndipo wina akaona fupa la munthu aikepo chizindikiro, mpaka oikawo aliika m'chigwa cha unyinji wa Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Ndipo dzina la mudzi lidzakhala Hamona. Momwemo adzayeretsa dziko. 
Ezekiel39:17 Ndipo iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu, atero Ambuye Yehova, Nena kwa mbalame za mitundu yonse, ndi kwa nyama zonse za kuthengo, Memezanani, idzani, sonkhanani kumbali zonse, kudza kunsembe yanga imene ndikupherani, ndiyo nsembe yaikulu pa mapiri a Israele, kuti mudzadye nyama ndi kumwa mwazi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Mudzadya nyama ya amphamvu, ndi kumwa mwazi wa akalonga a padziko, wa nkhosa zamphongo, wa anaankhosa, ndi wa mbuzi, ndi wa ng'ombe, zonsezi zonenepa za ku Basani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ndipo mudzadya zonona mpaka mudzakhuta, ndi kumwa mwazi mpaka mudzaledzera za nsembe yanga ndakupherani." 
Ezekiel39:20 Ndipo podyera panga mudzakhuta akavalo, ndi magaleta, ndi anthu amphamvu, ndi anthu onse a nkhondo, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel39:21 Ndipo ndidzaika ulemerero wanga mwa amitundu; ndi amitundu onse adzaona chiweruzo changa ndachichita, ndi dzanja langa limene ndinawaikira." 
Ezekiel39:22 Ndipo nyumba ya Israele idzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao, kuyambira tsiku ilo ndi m'tsogolomo." 
Ezekiel39:23 Ndipo amitundu adzadziwa kuti nyumba ya Israele idalowa undende chifukwa cha mphulupulu zao, popeza anandilakwira Ine; ndipo ndinawabisira nkhope yanga; m'mwemo ndinawapereka m'dzanja la adani ao, nagwa iwo onse ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ndinachita nao monga mwa kudetsedwa kwao, ndi monga mwa kulakwa kwao, ndipo ndinawabisira nkhope yanga." 
Ezekiel39:25 Chifukwa chake atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsopano ndidzabweza undende wa Yakobo, ndi kuchitira chifundo nyumba yonse ya Israele, ndipo ndidzachitira dzina langa loyera nsanje." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ndipo adzasenza manyazi ao, ndi zolakwa zao zonse, zimene anandilakwira nazo, pokhala mosatekeseka iwo m'dziko lao, opanda wina wakuwaopsa;" 
Ezekiel39:27 nditabwera nao kuchoka kwa mitundu ya anthu, nditawasokolotsa m'maiko a adani ao, ndi kuzindikiridwa Woyera mwa iwo pamaso pa amitundu ambiri." 
Ezekiel39:28 Ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao, popeza ndinalola atengedwe ndende kunka kwa amitundu, koma ndinawasonkhanitsanso akhale m'dziko lao, osasiyakonso mmodzi yense wa iwowa." 
Ezekiel39:29 Ndipo sindidzawabisiranso nkhope yanga, popeza ndatsanulira mzimu wanga pa nyumba ya Israele, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel40:1 Chaka cha makumi awiri ndi zisanu cha undende wathu, poyamba chaka, tsiku lakhumi lamwezi, chaka chakhumi ndi zinai atakantha mudziwo, tsiku lomwelo, dzanja la Yehova linandikhalira; ndipo anamuka nane komweko." 
Ezekiel40:2 M'masomphenya a Mulungu Iye anabwera nane m'dziko la Israele, nandikhalitsa pa phiri lalitali ndithu; pamenepo panali ngati mamangidwe a mudzi kumwera." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ndipo anamuka nane komweko, ndipo taona, panali munthu, maonekedwe ake ngati amkuwa, ndi chingwe chathonje m'dzanja lake, ndi bango loyesa nalo, naima kuchipata iye." 
Ezekiel40:4 Ndipo munthuyu anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, penya ndi maso ako, imva m'makutu mwako, nuike mtima wako pa zonse ndidzakuonetsa iwe; pakuti unatengedwa kudza kuno, kuti ndikuonetse izi; fotokozera nyumba ya Israele zonse uziona." 
Ezekiel40:5 Ndipo taonani, panali linga kunja kwake kwa nyumba ya Kachisi poizinga, ndi m'dzanja lake la munthuyo bango loyesa nalo la mikono isanu ndi umodzi, mkono uliwonse mkono kudza chikhato; ndipo anayesa chimangidwecho kuchindikira kwake bango limodzi, ndi msinkhu wake bango limodzi." 
Ezekiel40:6 Pamenepo anafika kuchipata choloza kum'mawa, nakwera pa makwerero ake; ndipo anayesa chiundo cha chipata, bango limodzi kuchindikira kwake; ndicho chiundo choyamba, bango limodzi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ndi chipinda cha alonda, chonse ncha bango limodzi m'litali mwake, ndi bango limodzi kupingasa kwake, ndi pakati pa zipinda za alonda mikono isanu, ndi chiundo cha chipata kumbali ya kukhonde la kuchipata m'katimo, bango limodzi." 
Ezekiel40:8 Anayesanso khonde la kuchipata kumbali ya ku Kachisi, bango limodzi. Pamenepo anayesa khonde la kuchipata mikono isanu ndi itatu," 
Ezekiel40:9 ndi mphuthu zake mikono iwiri; ndi khonde la kuchipata linaloza ku Kachisi. 
Ezekiel40:10 Ndi zipinda za alonda za kuchipata cha kum'mawa ndizo zitatu chakuno, ndi zitatu chauko, zitatuzi nza muyeso umodzimodzi, ndi mphuthuzo nza muyeso umodzimodzi, chakuno ndi chauko." 
Ezekiel40:11 Ndipo anayesa kupingasa kwa chipata pakhoma pake mikono khumi, ndi utali wake wa chipata mikono khumi ndi itatu;" 
Ezekiel40:12 ndi pakhomo pa zipinda za alonda panali kakhoma ka mkono umodzi chakuno, ndi kakhoma ka mkono umodzi chauko; ndi zipinda za alonda mikono isanu ndi umodzi chakuno, ndi mikono isanu ndi umodzi chauko." 
Ezekiel40:13 Ndipo anayesa chipata kuyambira kutsindwi la chipinda cha alonda chimodzi, kufikira kutsindwi la chinzake, kupingasa kwake ndiko mikono makumi awiri ndi isanu; makomo napenyana." 
Ezekiel40:14 Anamanganso nsanamira za mikono makumi asanu ndi limodzi; ndi bwalo la pakati pa chipata lidafikira kunsanamira. 
Ezekiel40:15 Ndipo kuyambira pa khomo lolowera la chipata kufikira khomo la khonde la chipata m'katimo ndiko mikono makumi asanu. 
Ezekiel40:16 Ndipo panali mazenera amkati okhazikika pazipinda ndi m'makhoma a pakati pao, m'kati mwa chipata pozungulira ponse; momwemonso pazidundumwa; ndipo panali mazenera pozungulira ponse m'katimo, ndi pa nsanamirazo panali akanjedza." 
Ezekiel40:17 Pamenepo analowa nane kubwalo lakunja, ndipo taonani, panali zipinda, ndi moyalidwa miyala mokonzekera bwalo pozungulira ponse; moyalidwa miyalamo munali zipinda makumi atatu." 
Ezekiel40:18 Ndipo moyalidwamo munali pa mbali ya zipata molingana ndi utali wake wa zipata, ndimo moyalidwa mwamunsi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Pamenepo anayesa kupingasa kwake kuyambira pakhomo pake pachipata chakunsi, kufikira kumaso kwake kwa bwalo la m'kati kunja kwake, mikono zana kum'mawa, ndi kumpoto." 
Ezekiel40:20 Ndi chipata cha bwalo lakunja choloza kumpoto anachiyesa m'litali mwake, ndi kupingasa kwake zonse mikono zana." 
Ezekiel40:21 Ndi zipinda zake ndizo zitatu chakuno, ndi zitatu chauko, ndi makhoma a pakati pake; ndi zidundumwa zake zinali monga mwa muyeso wa chipata choyambacho, m'litali mwake mikono makumi asanu, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri mphambu isanu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ndi mazenera ake, ndi zidundumwa zake, ndi akanjedza ake, anali monga mwa muyeso wa chipata choloza kum'mawa; ndipo anakwerako ndi makwerero asanu ndi awiri, ndi zidundumwa zake zinali pakhomo." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ndipo panali chipata cha bwalo lam'kati, chopenyana ndi chipata chinzake chakunja kumpoto, ndi cha kum'mawa; ndipo anayesa kuyambira kuchipata kufikira kuchipata mikono zana." 
Ezekiel40:24 Ndipo ananditsogolera kunka kumwera, ndipo taonani, panali chipata kumwera, nayesa makhoma a pakati pake, ndi zidundumwa zake, monga mwa miyeso yomweyi." 
Ezekiel40:25 Ndimo munali mazenera m'menemo, ndi m'zidundumwa zake pozungulirapo, monga mazenera ena aja, m'litali mwake mikono makumi asanu, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri mphambu isanu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Ndipo panali makwerero asanu ndi awiri okwererapo, ndi zidundumwa zake kumaso kwake; ndi pa nsanamira zake chakuno ndi chauko panali akanjedza." 
Ezekiel40:27 Ndipo panali chipata cha bwalo lam'kati chakuloza kumwera, nayesa kuyambira kuchipata kufikira kuchipata kumwera mikono zana." 
Ezekiel40:28 Pamenepo analowa nane pa chipata cha kumwera m'bwalo lam'kati, nayesa chipata cha kumwera, monga mwa miyeso yomweyi;" 
Ezekiel40:29 ndi zipinda zake, ndi makhoma a pakati pake, ndi zidundumwa zake, monga mwa miyeso yomweyi; ndimo munali mazenera m'menemo, ndi m'zidundumwa zake pozungulirapo; m'litali mwake mikono makumi asanu, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri mphambu isanu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Ndipo panali zidundumwa pozungulirapo, m'litali mwake mikono makumi awiri mphambu isanu, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono isanu." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ndi zidundumwa zake zinaloza kubwalo lakunja, ndi pa nsanamira zake panali akanjedza, ndi pokwererapo panali makwerero asanu ndi atatu." 
Ezekiel40:32 Ndipo analowa ndine m'bwalo lam'kati kuloza kum'mawa, nayesa chipata cha kum'mawa monga mwa miyeso yomweyi;" 
Ezekiel40:33 ndi zipinda zake, ndi makhoma a pakati pake, ndi zikundumwa zake, monga mwa miyeso yomweyi; ndimo munali mazenera m'menemo, ndi m'zidundumwa zake pozungulirapo, m'litali mwake mikono makumi asanu, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri mphambu isanu." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ndi zidundumwa zake zinaloza kubwalo lakunja; ndi pa nsanamira zake panali akanjedza chakuno ndi chauko; ndipo pokwerera pake panali makwerero asanu ndi atatu. 
Ezekiel40:35 Pamenepo anabwera nane kuchipata cha kumpoto, nachiyesa monga mwa miyeso yomweyi;" 
Ezekiel40:36 zipinda zake, makhoma a pakati pake, ndi zidundumwa zake; ndimo munali mazenera m'menemo pozungulirapo, m'litali mwake mikono makumi asanu, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri mphambu isanu." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ndi nsanamira zake zinaloza kubwalo lakunja; ndi pa nsanamira zake panali akanjedza chakuno ndi chauko; ndipo pokwerera pake panali makwerero asanu ndi atatu. 
Ezekiel40:38 Ndipo pa nsanamira za pazipata panali kanyumba ndi chitseko chake; pamenepo anatsuka nsembe yopsereza. 
Ezekiel40:39 Ndipo m'khonde la pachipata munali magome awiri chakuno, ndi magome awiri chauko, kuti apherepo nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe yauchimo, ndi nsembe yopalamula." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ndi kumbali ina ya khonde kunja, pakukwerera polowera pa chipata cha kumpoto, kunali magome awiri, ndi kumbali inzake ya kuchipata kunali magome awiri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Magome anai chakuno, ndi magome anai chauko, kumbali ya chipata; magome asanu ndi atatu, amene anapherapo nsembe." 
Ezekiel40:42 Ndipo panali magome anai a nsembe yopsereza a miyala yosema, m'litali mwake mkono ndi nusu, kupingasa kwake mkono ndi nusu, msinkhu wake mkono umodzi; pamenepo ankaika zipangizo zimene anaphera nazo nsembe yopsereza ndi nsembe yophera." 
Ezekiel40:43 Ndi zichiri zangowe, chikhato m'litali mwake, zinamangika m'katimo pozungulirapo; ndi pamagome panali nyama ya nsembe." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ndi kunja kwa chipata cha m'kati kunali tinyumba ta oimba m'bwalo lam'kati, kumbali ya chipata cha kumpoto; ndipo tinaloza kumwera, kena kumbali ya chipata cha kum'mawa kanaloza kumpoto." 
Ezekiel40:45 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Kanyumba aka koloza kumwera nka ansembe odikira Kachisi." 
Ezekiel40:46 Ndi kanyumba koloza kumpoto nka ansembe odikira guwa la nsembe, ndiwo ana a Zadoki amene ayandikira kwa Yehova mwa ana a Levi, kumtumikira Iye." 
Ezekiel40:47 Ndipo anayesa bwalolo mikono zana m'litali mwake, ndi mikono zana kupingasa kwake, laphwamphwa; ndi guwa la nsembe linali kukhomo kwa nyumba." 
Ezekiel40:48 Pamenepo anadza nane kukhonde la Kachisi, nayesa mphuthu za khonde, mikono isanu chakuno, ndi mikono isanu chauko; ndi kupingasa kwa chipata, mikono itatu chakuno, ndi mikono itatu chauko." 
Ezekiel40:49 M'litali mwake mwa khonde mikono makumi awiri, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono khumi ndi umodzi; ndipo panali makwerero khumi okwerera kumeneko; ndipo panali zoimiritsa pa nsanamirazo, imodzi chakuno, ndi imodzi chauko." 
Ezekiel41:1 Ndipo anadza nane ku Kachisi, nayesa nsanamira zake, kupingasa kwake mikono isanu ndi umodzi chakuno, ndi mikono isanu ndi umodzi chauko, ndiko kupingasa kwa chihema chija." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ndi kupingasa kwa khomo mikono khumi; ndi mbali za khomo mikono isanu chakuno, ndi mikono isanu chauko; nayesa malo opatulika, m'litali mwake mikono makumi anai, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri." 
Ezekiel41:3 Nalowa m'katimo, nayesa mphuthu za pakhomo mikono iwiri, ndi msinkhu wa khomo mikono isanu ndi umodzi, ndi kupingasa kwa khomo mikono isanu ndi iwiri." 
Ezekiel41:4 Anayesanso m'kati mwa Kachisi m'tsogolomo, m'litali mwake mikono makumi awiri, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi awiri; ndipo anati kwa ine, Umo m'mopatulika kwambiri." 
Ezekiel41:5 Pamenepo anayesa khoma la nyumba, kuchindikira kwake mikono isanu ndi umodzi, ndi kupingasa kwake kwa zipinda za m'mphepete mikono inai, pozungulira pake ponse pa Kachisi." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ndipo zipinda za m'mphepete zinasanjikizana china pa chinzake; zinatero makumi atatu mizere yonse itatu, nizinalowa kukhoma lochirikiza zipinda za m'mphepete pozungulirapo, zisanjikike pamenepo; pakuti sizinagwiridwa ndi khoma la nyumba." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ndipo zipinda za m'mphepete zinakula m'kupingasa kwao, pozinga nyumba m'kukwera kwao; pakuti nyumba inazingika mokwerakwera pozungulira pake pa nyumba; motero kupingasa kwake kwa nyumba kunakula kumwamba kwake, momwemonso anakwera kuyambira chipinda chakunsi, kupita chapakati, kufikira cham'mwamba." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ndinaonanso kuti kunyumba kunali chiunda pozungulira pake; maziko a zipinda za m'mphepete anafikira muyeso wa bango la mikono isanu ndi umodzi yaikulu. 
Ezekiel41:9 Kuchindikira kwa khoma la kuzipinda za m'mphepete kunja kwake kunali mikono isanu; ndipo mpata wake unali malo olowera m'zipinda za m'mphepete za Kachisi. 
Ezekiel41:10 Ndi pakati pa zipinda panali kupingasa kwa mikono makumi awiri, pozungulira pake ponse pa nyumba." 
Ezekiel41:11 Ndi makomo a zipinda za m'mphepete analoza kumpatawo, khomo lina kumpoto, ndi lina kumwera; ndi malo a pa mpatawo anayesa mikono isanu kupingasa kwake pozungulira pake." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ndipo nyumba inali kutsogolo kwa mpata wa mbali ya kumadzulo inali ya mikono makumi asanu ndi awiri kupingasa kwake; ndi khoma la nyumbayo pozungulira pake linali la mikono isanu kuchindikira kwake; ndi m'litali mwake mikono makumi asanu ndi anai. 
Ezekiel41:13 Momwemo anayesa Kachisi m'litali mwake mikono zana limodzi; ndi mpatawo, ndi nyumbayo, ndi makoma ake, mikono zana limodzi;" 
Ezekiel41:14 kupingasa kwake komwe kwa kukhomo kwa nyumba, ndi kumpatawo kum'mawa, mikono zana limodzi." 
Ezekiel41:15 Momwemo anayesa m'litali mwake nyumbayo inali kutsogolo kwake kwa mpata wokhala chakuno chake, ndi makonde ake am'mwamba, chakuno ndi chauko, mikono zana limodzi, ndi Kachisi wa m'katimo, ndi makonde a kubwalo;" 
Ezekiel41:16 ziundo, ndi mazenera amkati okhazikika, ndi makonde am'mwamba akuzinga zipinda zosanjikizana zao zitatu, pandunji pa chiundo, otchinga ndi matabwa pozungulira pake, kuyambira pansi kufikira kumazenera; koma mazenera anaphimbika;" 
Ezekiel41:17 kufikira kumwamba pa khomo, mpaka nyumba ya m'katimo, ndi kunja kwake, ndi khoma lonse kwete m'kati ndi kunja, monga mwa miyeso." 
Ezekiel41:18 Ndipo panalembedwapo ndi akerubi ndi akanjedza, kanjedza pakati pa akerubi; ndi kerubi aliyense anali ndi nkhope zake ziwiri;" 
Ezekiel41:19 nkhope ya munthu kuloza kukanjedza chakuno, ndi nkhope ya mwanawamkango kuloza kukanjedza chauko, momwemo m'nyumba monse pozungulira pake." 
Ezekiel41:20 Kuyambira pansi kufikira pamwamba pa khomo panalembedwa akerubi ndi akanjedza; linatero khoma la Kachisi. 
Ezekiel41:21 Mphuthu za Kachisi zinali zaphwamphwa, ndi maonekedwe a pakhomo pa malo opatulika ananga maonekedwe a Kachisi." 
Ezekiel41:22 Guwa la nsembe linali lamtengo, msinkhu wake mikono itatu, ndi m'litali mwake mikono iwiri, ndi ngodya zake, ndi tsinde lake, ndi thupi, nza mtengo; ndipo ananena ndi ine, Ili ndiko gome lili pamaso pa Yehova." 
Ezekiel41:23 Ndipo Kachisi ndi malo opatulika kwambiri anali nazo zitseko ziwiri. 
Ezekiel41:24 Ndipo pamakomopo panali zitseko zopatukana zotembenuzika, china chopatukana pa khomo lina china pa linzake." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ndipo panalembedwa pamenepo pa zitseko za Kachisi akerubi ndi akanjedza, akunga aja adalembedwa pamakoma; ndipo panali matabwa ochindikira pakhomo pakhonde panja." 
Ezekiel41:26 Ndipo panali mazenera amkati okhazikika, ndi akanjedza chakuno ndi chauko, kumbali zake za khonde; momwemonso pa zipinda za m'mphepete mwa nyumba, ndi pa matabwa ochindikira." 
Ezekiel42:1 Pamenepo anatuluka nane kunka kubwalo la kunja, njira ya kumpoto; nalowa nane kunyumba yazipinda idali pandunji pa mpatawo, ndi pandunji pa nyumbayo inaloza kumpoto." 
Ezekiel42:2 Chakuno cha m'litali mwake mwa mikono zana limodzi kunali khomo la kumpoto, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono makumi asanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Pandunji pa mikono makumi awiri a bwalo lam'kati, ndi pandunji pa moyalamo mwa miyala, mwa bwalo lakunja, panali khonde lam'mwamba, lokomana ndi khonde linzake losanjikika pachiwiri." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ndi kukhomo kwa zipinda anakonza poyendapo, kupingasa kwake mikono khumi m'kati mwake, njira ya mikono zana limodzi, ndi makomo ao analoza kumpoto." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ndipo zipinda zapamwamba zinachepa, pakuti makonde am'mwamba analanda pamenepo, chifukwa chake zinachepa koposa zapansi ndi zapakati m'nyumba yazipinda." 
Ezekiel42:6 Pakuti zinasanjikizana pawiri, ndipo zinalibe nsanamira ngati nsanamira za kumabwalo; chifukwa chake zam'mwambazo zinachepa koposa zakunsi ndi pakati kuyambira pansi." 
Ezekiel42:7 Ndipo linga linali kunjalo, lolingana ndi nyumba yazipinda, kuloza kubwalo lakunja, popenyana ndi nyumba yazipinda, m'litali mwake munali mikono makumi asanu." 
Ezekiel42:8 Pakuti kupingasa kwake kwa nyumba yazipinda inali m'bwalo lakunja, kunali mikono makumi asanu; ndipo taonani, kuloza kukhomo la Kachisi inali mikono zana limodzi." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ndipo pansi pa zipinda izi panali polowera mbali ya kum'mawa, poloweramo kuchoka kubwalo lakunja." 
Ezekiel42:10 M'kuchindikira kwa linga la bwalo, kuloza kumwera, chakuno cha mpatawo, chakuno cha nyumba, panali nyumba yazipinda." 
Ezekiel42:11 Ndipo njira ya pakhomo pao inanga maonekedwe njira ya kunyumba yazipinda yoloza kumpoto, inalingana nayo m'litali mwake, momwemonso kupingasa kwake; ndi m'matulukiro mwake monse munali monga mwa machitidwe a inzake, ndi monga mwa makomo a inzake." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ndi monga mwa makomo a zipinda za kumwera panali khomo polekeza njira, ndiyo njira yokhudzana ndi linga la kum'mawa polowamo." 
Ezekiel42:13 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Zipinda za kumpoto, ndi zipinda za kumwera, zili chakuno cha mpatawo, ndizo zipinda zopatulika, kumene ansembe okhala pafupi pa Yehova azidyera zinthu zopatulika kwambiri; kumeneko aziika zopatulika kwambiri, ndi nsembe yaufa, ndi nsembe yauchimo, ndi nsembe yopalamula; pakuti malowo ndi opatulika." 
Ezekiel42:14 Atalowa ansembe asatulukenso m'malo opatulika kunka kubwalo lakunja, koma komweko aziika zovala zao zimene atumikira nazo; pakuti zili zopatulika; ndipo avale zovala zina, nayandikire zinthu wamba za anthu." 
Ezekiel42:15 Atatha tsono kuyesa nyumba ya m'katimo, anatuluka nane njira ya chipata choloza kum'mawa nayesa bwalo pozungulira pake." 
Ezekiel42:16 Anayesa mbali ya kum'mawa, ndi bango loyesera, mikono mazana asanu, kuyesa ndi bango loyesera." 
Ezekiel42:17 Anayesa mbali ya kumpoto mikono mazana asanu, kuyesa ndi bango loyesera." 
Ezekiel42:18 Anayesa mbali ya kumwera mikono mazana asanu, kuyesa ndi bango loyesera." 
Ezekiel42:19 Anatembenukira kumbali ya kumadzulo, nayesa mikono mazana asanu ndi bango loyesera." 
Ezekiel42:20 Analiyesa mbali zake zinai, linali nalo linga pozungulira pake, utali wake mikono mazana asanu, chitando chake mikono mazana asanu, kusiyanitsa pakati pa zopatulika ndi zinthu wamba." 
Ezekiel43:1 Pamenepo anamuka nane kuchipata choloza kum'mawa," 
Ezekiel43:2 ndipo taonani, ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israele unadzera njira ya kum'mawa, ndi mau ake ananga mkokomo wa madzi ambiri, ndi dziko linanyezimira ndi ulemerero wake." 
Ezekiel43:3 Ndipo maonekedwe a masomphenya ndinawaona anali monga masomphenya aja ndinawaona pakudza ine kupasula mudzi; ndi masomphenyawa anali ngati masomphenya aja ndinawaona kumtsinje wa Kebara; ndipo ndinagwa nkhope pansi. 
Ezekiel43:4 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unalowa m'Kachisi kudzera njira ya chipata choloza kum'mawa. 
Ezekiel43:5 Ndipo mzimu unandinyamula numuka nane kubwalo la m'kati; ndipo taonani, ulemerero wa Yehova unadzaza Kachisi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ndipo ndinamva wina alikulankhula nane ali m'Kachisi, naima nane munthu." 
Ezekiel43:7 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, pano mpokhala mpando wachifumu wanga, mpoponda kumapazi anga, pomwe ndidzakhala pakati pa ana a Israele kosatha; ndi nyumba ya Israele siidzadetsanso dzina langa loyera, ngakhale iwo kapena mafumu ao, mwa chigololo chao, ndi mitembo ya mafumu ao pa misanje yao," 
Ezekiel43:8 ndi kuika chiundo chao pafupi pa chiundo changa, ndi mphuthu yao pa mbali ya mphuthu yanga, ndipo panali khoma lokha pakati pa iwo ndi Ine, nadetsa dzina langa loyera ndi zonyansa zao anazichita; chifukwa chake ndinawatha mu mkwiyo wanga." 
Ezekiel43:9 Ataye tsono chigololo chao ndi mitembo ya mafumu ao kutali kwa Ine, ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pao kosatha." 
Ezekiel43:10 Wabadwa ndi munthu iwe, onetsa nyumba ya Israele Kachisiyu, kuti achite manyazi ndi mphulupulu zao; ndipo ayese muyeso wake." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ndipo ngati akachita manyazi nazo zonse anazichita, uwadziwitse maonekedwe a Kachisiyu, ndi muyeso wake, ndi potulukira pake, ndi polowera pake, ndi malongosoledwe ake onse, ndi malemba ake onse, ngakhale maonekedwe ake onse, ndi malamulo ake onse; nuwalembere pamaso pao, kuti asunge maonekedwe ake onse, ndi malemba ake onse, nawachite." 
Ezekiel43:12 Lamulo la Kachisi ndi ili: pamwamba pa phiri malire ake onse pozungulira pake azikhala opatulika kwambiri. Taonani, limeneli ndi lamulo la Kachisi." 
Ezekiel43:13 Ndipo miyeso ya guwa la nsembe, kuyesa mikono ndi iyi: (mkonowo ndiwo mkono ndi chikhato), tsinde lake likhale mkono, ndi kupingasa kwake dzanja limodzi, ndi mkuzi wake m'mphepete mwake pozungulira pake kuyesa zala; ili ndi tsinde la guwali." 
Ezekiel43:14 Ndi kuyambira kunsi kwake kunthaka, kufikira phaka lamunsi, mikono iwiri; ndi kupingasa kwake mkono umodzi; ndi kuyambira phaka laling'ono kufikira phaka lalikulu mikono inai; ndi kupingasa kwake mkono." 
Ezekiel43:15 Ndi guwa lapamwamba mikono inai; ndi pamoto pa guwa padzatuluka nyanga zinai. 
Ezekiel43:16 Ndi pamoto pa guwa, m'litali mwake mikono khumi ndi iwiri, ndi kupingasa kwake khumi ndi iwiri, laphwamphwa mbali zake zinai." 
Ezekiel43:17 Ndi phaka, m'litali mwake mikono khumi ndi inai, ndi kupingasa kwake mikono khumi ndi inai kumbali zake zinai; ndi mkuzi wake pozungulira pake mkono wa nusu, ndi tsinde lake mkono pozungulira pake, ndi makwerero ake aloza kum'mawa." 
Ezekiel43:18 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, atero Ambuye Yehova, Malemba a guwa la nsembe, tsiku lakulimanga, kuperekapo nsembe zopsereza, ndi kuwazapo mwazi, ndi awa;" 
Ezekiel43:19 Upatse ansembe Alevi, a mbeu za Zadoki, okhala pafupi ndi Ine, kunditumikira Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, mwanawang'ombe, akhale wa nsembe yauchimo." 
Ezekiel43:20 Nutengeko mwazi wake, ndi kupaka pa nyanga zinai za guwa, ndi pangodya zinai za phaka, ndi pa mkuzi wake pozungulira; motero uliyeretse ndi kulichitira chotetezera." 
Ezekiel43:21 Utengenso ng'ombe ya nsembe yauchimo, aipsereze pa malo oikika a Kachisi kunja kwa malo opatulika." 
Ezekiel43:22 Ndipo tsiku lachiwiri upereke tonde wopanda chilema, akhale nsembe yauchimo; ndipo ayeretse guwa la nsembe monga umo analiyeretsera ndi ng'ombeyo." 
Ezekiel43:23 Utatha kuliyeretsa upereke mwanawang'ombe wopanda chilema, ndi nkhosa yamphongo ya zoweta yopanda chilema." 
Ezekiel43:24 Ndipo ubwere nazo kwa Yehova, ndi ansembe athirepo mchere, ndi kuzipereka nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova." 
Ezekiel43:25 Masiku asanu ndi awiri uzikonzera mbuzi tsiku ndi tsiku, ikhale nsembe yauchimo; akonzerenso mwanawang'ombe, ndi nkhosa yamphongo ya zoweta zopanda chilema." 
Ezekiel43:26 Masiku asanu ndi awiri achite chotetezera guwali ndi kuliyeretsa, momwemo alipatule." 
Ezekiel43:27 Ndipo atatsiriza masiku, kudzachitika tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu ndi m'tsogolo, ansembe azichita nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi nsembe zanu zoyamika pa guwalo; ndipo ndidzakulandirani, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel44:1 Pamenepo anandibweza njira ya kuchipata chakunja cha malo opatulika choloza kum'mawa, koma chinatsekedwa." 
Ezekiel44:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Chipata ichi chitsekeke, chisatseguke, osalowako munthu; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wa Israele walowerapo; chifukwa chake chitsekeke."
