Daniel11:16 Koma iye amene amdzera kulimbana naye adzachita chifuniro chake cha iye mwini; palibe wakulimbika pamaso pake; ndipo adzaima m'dziko lokometsetsalo, ndi m'dzanja mwake mudzakhala chionongeko." 
Daniel11:17 Ndipo adzalimbitsa nkhope yake, kudza ndi mphamvu ya ufumu wake wonse, ndi oongoka mtima pamodzi naye; ndipo adzachita chifuniro chake, nadzampatsa mwana wamkazi wa akazi kumuipitsa; koma mkaziyo sadzalimbika, kapena kuvomerezana naye." 
Daniel11:18 Pambuyo pake adzatembenuzira nkhope yake kuzisumbu, nadzalanda zambiri; koma kalonga wina adzaleketsa kunyoza kwake adanyoza nako; inde adzambwezera yekha kunyoza kwake." 
Daniel11:19 Pamenepo adzatembenuzira nkhope yake kumalinga a dziko lakelake; koma adzakhumudwa, nadzagwa osapezedwanso." 
Daniel11:20 Ndipo m'malo mwake adzauka wina wakupititsa wamsonkho pa ulemerero wa ufumuwo; koma atatha masiku owerengeka adzathyoledwa iye, si mwamkwiyo, kapena kunkhondo ai." 
Daniel11:21 Ndi m'malo mwake adzauka munthu woluluka, amene anthu sanampatse ulemu wa ufumu, koma adzafika kachetechete, nadzalanda ufumu ndi mau osyasyalika." 
Daniel11:22 Ndipo mwa mayendedwe ake a chigumula adzakokololedwa pamaso pake, nadzathyoledwa, ngakhale kalonga yemwe wa chipangano." 
Daniel11:23 Ndipo atapangana naye adzachita monyenga; pakuti adzakwera, nadzasanduka wamphamvu ndi anthu owerengeka." 
Daniel11:24 Adzafika kachetechete kuminda yokometsetsa ya derali, nadzachita chosachita atate ake, kapena makolo ake; adzawawazira zofunkha, ndi zankhondo, ndi chuma, nadzalingiririra malinga ziwembu zake; adzatero nthawi." 
Daniel11:25 Nadzautsa mphamvu yake ndi mtima wake ayambane ndi mfumu ya kumwera ndi khamu lalikulu la nkhondo; ndi mfumu ya kumwera idzachita nkhondo ndi khamu lalikulu ndi lamphamvu ndithu; koma sadzaimika, popeza adzamlingiririra ziwembu." 
Daniel11:26 Inde iwo akudyako chakudya chake adzamuononga; ndi ankhondo ake adzasefukira, nadzagwa ambiri ophedwa." 
Daniel11:27 Ndipo mafumu awa onse awiri mitima yao idzakumbuka kuchita zoipa, nadzanena bodza ali pa gome limodzi; koma osapindula nalo; pakuti kutha kwake kudzakhala pa nthawi yoikika." 
Daniel11:28 Ndipo adzabwerera kudziko lake ndi chuma chambiri; ndi mtima wake udzatsutsana ndi chipangano chopatulika, nadzachita chifuniro chake, ndi kubwerera kudziko lake." 
Daniel11:29 Pa nthawi yoikika adzabwera, nadzalowa kumwera; koma sikudzakhala monga nthawi yoyamba ija, kapena yotsirizayi." 
Daniel11:30 Pakuti zombo za ku Kitimu zidzafika kuyambana naye; chifukwa chake adzatenga nkhawa, nadzabwerera, nadzaipidwa mtima ndi chipangano chopatulika, nadzachita chifuniro chake; adzabweranso, nadzasamalira otaya chipangano chopatulika." 
Daniel11:31 Ndipo ankhondo adzamuimirira, nadzadetsa malo opatulika ndi linga lake; nadzachotsa nsembe yosalekezayo, nadzaimitsa chonyansa chopululutsacho." 
Daniel11:32 Ndipo akuchitira choipa chipanganocho iye adzawaipsa, ndi kuwasyasyalika; koma anthu akudziwa Mulungu wao adzalimbika mtima, nadzachita mwamphamvu." 
Daniel11:33 Ndipo aphunzitsi a anthu adzalangiza ambiri, koma adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi lawi lamoto, ndi undende, ndi kufunkhidwa masiku ambiri." 
Daniel11:34 Ndipo pakugwa iwo adzathandizidwa ndi thandizo laling'ono; koma ambiri adzaphatikizana nao ndi mau osyasyalika. 
Daniel11:35 Nadzagwa aphunzitsi ena kuwayesa ndi moto, ndi kuwatsutsa, ndi kuwayeretsa, mpaka nthawi ya chitsiriziro; pakuti kukaliko kufikira nthawi yoikika." 
Daniel11:36 Ndipo mfumu idzachita monga mwa chifuniro chake, nidzadzikweza, ndi kudzikuza koposa milungu iliyonse nidzanena zodabwitsa pa Mulungu wa milungu, nidzapindula, mpaka udzachitidwa ukaliwo; pakuti chotsimikizika m'mtimacho chidzachitika." 
Daniel11:37 Ndipo sidzasamalira milungu ya makolo ake, kapena choikhumba akazi, kapena kusamalira milungu iliyonse; pakuti idzadzikuza koposa onse." 
Daniel11:38 Koma kumalo kwake idzachitira ulemu mulungu wa malinga; ndi mulungu amene makolo ake sanaudziwe, adzaulemekeza ndi golide, ndi siliva, ndi miyala ya mtengo wake, ndi zinthu zofunika." 
Daniel11:39 Ndipo adzachita molimbana ndi malinga olimba koposa, pomthandiza mulungu wachilendo; aliyense womvomereza adzamchulukitsira ulemu, nadzawachititsa ufumu pa ambiri, nadzagawa dziko mwa mtengo wake." 
Daniel11:40 Ndipo nthawi yotsiriza mfumu ya kumwera idzalimbana naye, ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzamdzera ngati kamvulumvulu, ndi magaleta, ndi apakavalo, ndi zombo zambiri; nadzalowa m'maiko, nadzasefukira ndi kupitirira." 
Daniel11:41 Adzalowanso m'dziko lokometsetsalo ndi maiko ambiri adzapasuka; koma opulumuka dzanja lake ndi awa: Edomu, ndi Mowabu, ndi oyamba a ana a Amoni." 
Daniel11:42 Adzatambalitsiranso dzanja lake kumaiko; dziko la Ejipito lomwe silidzapulumuka. 
Daniel11:43 Ndipo adzachita mwamphamvu ndi chuma cha golide, ndi siliva, ndi zinthu zofunika zonse za Ejipito; Libiya ndi Akusi adzatsata mapazi ake." 
Daniel11:44 Koma mbiri yochokera kum'mawa ndi kumpoto idzamvuta; nadzatuluka iye ndi ukali waukulu kupha ndi kuononga konse ambiri. 
Daniel11:45 Ndipo adzamanga mahema a nyumba yachifumu yake pakati pa nyanja ndi phiri lopatulika lofunika; koma adzafikira chimaliziro chake wopanda wina wakumthandiza. 
Daniel12:1 Ndipo nthawi yomweyi adzauka Mikaele kalonga wamkulu wakutumikira ana a anthu a mtundu wako; ndipo padzakhala nthawi ya masautso, siinakhala yotere kuyambira mtundu wa anthu kufikira nthawi yomwe ija; ndipo nthawi yomweyo anthu ako adzapulumutsidwa, yense amene ampeza wolembedwa m'buku." 
Daniel12:2 Ndipo ambiri a iwo ogona m'fumbi lapansi adzauka, ena kunka kumoyo wosatha, ndi ena kumanyazi ndi mnyozo wosatha." 
Daniel12:3 Ndipo aphunzitsi adzawala ngati kunyezimira kwa thambo; ndi iwo otembenuza ambiri atsate chilungamo ngati nyenyezi kunthawi za nthawi. 
Daniel12:4 Koma iwe Daniele, tsekera mau awa, nukomere chizindikiro buku, mpaka nthawi ya chimaliziro; ambiri adzathamanga chauko ndi chauko, ndi chidziwitso chidzachuluka." 
Daniel12:5 Pamenepo ine Daniele ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, anaimapo awiri ena, wina m'mphepete mwa mtsinje tsidya lino, ndi mnzake m'mphepete mwa mtsinje tsidya lija." 
Daniel12:6 Ndipo wina anati kwa munthu wovala bafuta, wokhala pamwamba pa madzi a mumtsinje, Chimaliziro cha zodabwitsa izi chidzafika liti?" 
Daniel12:7 Ndipo ndinamva munthuyo wovala bafuta wokhala pamwamba pa madzi a mumtsinje, nakweza dzanja lake lamanja ndi lamanzere kumwamba, nalumbira pali Iye wokhala ndi moyo kosatha, kuti zidzachitika nthawi, ndi nthawi zina, ndi nusu; ndipo atatha kumwaza mphamvu ya anthu opatulikawo zidzatha izi zonse." 
Daniel12:8 Ndinachimva ichi, koma osachizindikira; pamenepo ndinati Mbuye wanga, chitsiriziro cha izi nchiyani?" 
Daniel12:9 Ndipo anati, Pita Daniele; pakuti mauwo atsekedwa, nakomeredwa chizindikiro mpaka nthawi ya chitsiriziro." 
Daniel12:10 Ambiri adzadzitsuka ndi kudziyeretsa, nadzayesedwa ndi moto; koma oipa adzachita moipa; ndipo palibe mmodzi wa oipa adzazindikira; koma aphunzitsi ndiwo adzazindikira." 
Daniel12:11 Ndipo kuyambira nthawi yoti idzachotsedwa nsembe yachikhalire, nichidzaimika chonyansa chakupululutsa, adzakhalanso masiku chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi anai." 
Daniel12:12 Wodala iye amene ayembekeza, nafikira kumasiku chikwi chimodzi mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi atatu ndi asanu." 
Daniel12:13 Koma iwe, muka mpaka chimaliziro; pakuti udzapumula, nudzaima m'gawo lako masiku otsiriza." 
Hosea1:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Hoseya mwana wa Beeri masiku a Uziya, Yotamu, Ahazi, ndi Hezekiya, mafumu a Yuda, ndi masiku a Yerobowamu mwana wa Yowasi mfumu ya Israele." 
Hosea1:2 Chiyambi cha kunena kwa Yehova mwa Hoseya. Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Hoseya, Muka, udzitengere mkazi wachigololo ndi ana achigololo; pakuti dziko latsata chigololo chokhachokha kuleka kutsata Yehova." 
Hosea1:3 Ndipo anamuka natenga Gomeri mwana wamkazi wa Dibulaimu; iye naima, nambalira mwana wamwamuna." 
Hosea1:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Umutche dzina lake Yezireele; pakuti katsala kanthawi, ndipo ndidzabwezera chilango mwazi wa Yezireele pa nyumba ya Yehu, ndi kuleketsa ufumu wa nyumba ya Israele." 
Hosea1:5 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo, ndidzathyola uta wa Israele m'chigwa cha Yezireele." 
Hosea1:6 Ndipo anaimanso, nabala mwana wamkazi. Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Umutche dzina lake Wosachitidwa-chifundo; pakuti sindidzachitiranso chifundo nyumba ya Israele, kuti ndiwakhululukire konse." 
Hosea1:7 Koma ndidzachitira chifundo nyumba ya Yuda, ndi kuwapulumutsa mwa Ine Yehova Mulungu wao, osawapulumutsa ndi uta, kapena lupanga, kapena nkhondo ndi akavalo, kapena apakavalo." 
Hosea1:8 Ataleka tsono kuyamwitsa Wosachitidwa-chifundo, anaima, nabala mwana wamwamuna." 
Hosea1:9 Ndipo Yehova anati, Umutche dzina lake Si-anthu-anga; pakuti inu sindinu anthu anga, ndipo Ine sindine wanu." 
Hosea1:10 Angakhale anatero, kuwerenga kwake kwa ana a Israele kudzanga mchenga wa kunyanja, wosayeseka kapena kuwerengeka; ndipo kudzatero kuti m'mene adawanena, Simuli anthu anga, adzanena nao, Muli ana a Mulungu wamoyo." 
Hosea1:11 Ndipo ana a Yuda ndi ana a Israele adzasonkhanidwa pamodzi, nadzadziikira mkulu mmodzi, nadzakwera kuchoka m'dziko; pakuti tsiku la Yezireele ndi lalikulu." 
Hosea2:1 Nenani kwa abale anu, Anthu anga, ndi kwa alongo anu, Wochitidwa-chifundo." 
Hosea2:2 Mutsutsane naye mai wanu, mutsutsane naye; pakuti sali mkazi wanga, ndi Ine sindili mwamuna wake; ndipo achotse zadama zake pankhope pake, ndi zigololo zake pakati pa mawere ake;" 
Hosea2:3 ndingamvule wamaliseche, ndi kumuika ngati tsiku lija anabadwalo, ndi kumsanduliza ngati chipululu, ndi kumuika ngati dziko louma, ndi kumupha nalo ludzu;" 
Hosea2:4 ndipo ana ake sindidzawachitira chifundo; pakuti iwo ndiwo ana achigololo. 
Hosea2:5 Pakuti mai wao anachita chigololo; iye amene anali ndi pakati pa iwo anachita chamanyazi; pakuti anati, Ndidzatsata ondikondawo, akundipatsa ine chakudya changa, ndi madzi anga, ubweya wanga, ndi thonje langa, mafuta anga, ndi chakumwa changa." 
Hosea2:6 Chifukwa chake taonani, ndidzatchinga njira yako ndi minga, ndipo ndidzammangira mpanda, kuti asapeze mabande ake." 
Hosea2:7 Ndipo adzatsata omkonda koma osawagwira, adzawafunafuna koma osawapeza; pamenepo adzati, Ndidzamuka ndi kubwererana ndi mwamuna wanga woyamba, popeza pamenepo panandikomera koposa tsopano." 
Hosea2:8 Pakuti sanadziwa kuti ndine ndinampatsa tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi kumchulukitsira siliva ndi golide, zimene anapanga nazo Baala." 
Hosea2:9 Chifukwa chake ndidzabwera ndi kuchotsa tirigu wanga m'nyengo yake, ndi vinyo wanga m'nthawi yake yoikika, ndi kukwatula ubweya wanga ndi thonje langa, zimene zikadafunda umaliseche wake." 
Hosea2:10 Ndipo tsopano ndidzaonetsa manyazi ake pamaso pa omkonda, popandanso wakumlanditsa m'dzanja langa." 
Hosea2:11 Ndidzaleketsanso kusekerera kwake konse, zikondwerero zake, pokhala mwezi pake, ndi masabata ake, ndi masonkhano ake onse oikika." 
Hosea2:12 Ndipo ndidzapasula mipesa yake ndi mikuyu yake, imene adanena, Iyi ndi mphotho yanga anandipatsa ondikondawo; ndipo ndidzaisandutsa thengo, ndi nyama za kuthengo zidzaidya." 
Hosea2:13 Ndipo ndidzamlanga chifukwa cha masiku a Abaala amene anawafukizira, navala mphete za m'mphuno, ndi zokometsera zake, natsata omkonda, nandiiwala Ine, ati Yehova." 
Hosea2:14 Chifukwa chake taonani, ndidzamkopa ndi kunka naye kuchipululu, ndi kulankhula naye momkonda mtima." 
Hosea2:15 Ndipo ndidzampatsa minda yake yamphesa kuyambira pomwepo, ndi chigwa cha Akori chikhale khomo la chiyembekezo; ndipo adzavomereza pomwepo monga masiku a ubwana wake, ndi monga tsiku lokwera iye kutuluka m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Hosea2:16 Ndipo kudzakhala tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova, udzanditcha Mwamuna wanga, osanditchanso Baala wanga." 
Hosea2:17 Pakuti ndidzachotsa maina a Abaala m'kamwa mwake; ndipo silidzakumbukikanso dzina lao. 
Hosea2:18 Ndipo tsiku lomwelo ndidzawachitira pangano ndi nyama za kuthengo, ndi mbalame za mlengalenga, ndi zokwawa pansi; ndipo ndidzathyola uta, ndi lupanga, ndi nkhondo, zichoke m'dziko, ndi kuwagonetsa pansi mosatekeseka." 
Hosea2:19 Ndipo ndidzakutomera ukhale wanga kosatha, inde ndidzakutomera ukhale wanga m'chilungamo, ndi m'chiweruzo, ndi m'ukoma mtima, ndi m'chifundo." 
Hosea2:20 Ndidzakutomeranso ukhale wanga mokhulupirika, ndipo udzadziwa Yehova." 
Hosea2:21 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo, ndidzavomereza, ati Yehova, ndidzavomereza thambo, ndi ilo lidzavomereza dziko lapansi;" 
Hosea2:22 ndi dziko lapansi lidzavomereza tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta; ndi izi zidzavomereza Yezireele." 
Hosea2:23 Ndipo ndidzadzibzalira iye m'nthaka, ndipo ndidzachitira chifundo Wosachitidwa-chifundo; ndipo ndidzati kwa Si-anthu-anga, Muli anthu anga; ndipo iwo adzati, Ndinu Mulungu wathu." 
Hosea3:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Mukanso, konda mkazi wokondedwa ndi bwenzi lake, koma wakuchita chigololo, monga Yehova akonda ana a Israele, angakhale atembenukira kumilungu ina, nakonda nchinchi za mphesa zouma." 
Hosea3:2 M'mwemo ndinadzigulira iye ndi masekeli khumi ndi asanu a siliva, ndi homeri ndi leteki wa barele;" 
Hosea3:3 ndipo ndinati kwa iye, Uzikhala ndi ine masiku ambiri, usachita chigololo, usakhala mkazi wa mwamuna aliyense; momwemo inenso nawe." 
Hosea3:4 Pakuti ana a Israele adzakhala masiku ambiri opanda mfumu, ndi opanda kalonga, ndi opanda nsembe, ndi opanda choimiritsa, ndi opanda efodi kapena aterafi;" 
Hosea3:5 atatero ana a Israele adzabwera, nadzafuna Yehova Mulungu wao, ndi Davide mfumu yao, nadzafika ndi mantha kwa Yehova, ndi ku ukoma wake masiku otsiriza." 
Hosea4:1 Imvani mau a Yehova, inu ana a Israele; pakuti Yehova ali ndi mlandu ndi okhala m'dziko, popeza palibe choonadi, kapena chifundo, kapena kudziwa Mulungu m'dziko." 
Hosea4:2 Koma kulumbira, ndi kunama, ndi kupha, ndi kuba, ndi kuchita chigololo; aboola, ndi mwazi ukhudzana nao mwazi." 
Hosea4:3 Chifukwa chake dziko lidzachita chisoni, ndi aliyense wokhalamo adzalefuka, pamodzi ndi nyama za kuthengo, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga; ndi nsomba za m'nyanja zomwe zidzachotsedwa." 
Hosea4:4 Koma munthu asatsutsane ndi mnzake, kapena kudzudzula mnzake; popeza anthu ako ndiwo akunga otsutsana ndi wansembe." 
Hosea4:5 Ndipo udzakhumudwa usana, ndi mneneri yemwe adzakhumudwa pamodzi ndi iwe usiku; ndipo ndidzaononga mai wako." 
Hosea4:6 Anthu anga aonongeka chifukwa cha kusadziwa; popeza unakana kudziwa, Inenso ndikukaniza, kuti usakhale wansembe wanga; popeza waiwala chilamulo cha Mulungu wako, Inenso ndidzaiwala ana ako." 
Hosea4:7 Monga anachuluka, momwemo anandichimwira; ndidzasanduliza ulemerero wao ukhale manyazi." 
Hosea4:8 Adyerera tchimo la anthu anga, nakhumbira chosalungama chao, yense ndi mtima wake." 
Hosea4:9 Ndipo kudzakhala monga anthu, momwemo wansembe; ndipo ndidzawalanga chifukwa chanjira zao, ndi kuwabwezera machitidwe ao." 
Hosea4:10 Ndipo adzadya, koma osakhuta; adzachita chigololo, koma osachuluka; pakuti waleka kusamalira Yehova." 
Hosea4:11 Chigololo, ndi vinyo, ndi vinyo watsopano, zichotsa mtima." 
Hosea4:12 Anthu anga afunsira kumtengo wao, ndi ndodo yao iwafotokozera; pakuti mzimu wachigololo wawalakwitsa, ndipo achita chigololo kuchokera Mulungu wao." 
Hosea4:13 Pamwamba pa mapiri aphera nsembe, nafukiza pazitunda, patsinde pa thundu, ndi minjali, ndi mkundi; popeza mthunzi wake ndi wabwino, chifukwa chake ana anu akazi achita uhule, ndi apongozi anu achita chigololo." 
Hosea4:14 Sindidzalanga ana anu akazi pochita iwo uhule, kapena apongozi anu pochita chigololo iwo; pakuti iwo okha apatukira padera ndi akazi achiwerewere, naphera nsembe pamodzi ndi akazi operekedwa ku uhule; ndi anthu osazindikirawo adzagwetsedwa chamutu." 
Hosea4:15 Chinkana iwe, Israele, uchita uhule, koma asapalamule Yuda; ndipo musafika inu ku Giligala, kapena kukwera ku Betaveni, kapena kulumbira, Pali Yehova." 
Hosea4:16 Pakuti Israele wachita kuuma khosi ngati ng'ombe yaikazi yaing'ono youma khosi; tsopano Yehova adzawadyetsa ngati mwanawankhosa kuthengo lalikulu. 
Hosea4:17 Efuremu waphatikana ndi mafano, mlekeni." 
Hosea4:18 Chakumwa chao chasasa, achita uhule kosalekeza; akulu ao akonda manyazi kwambiri." 
Hosea4:19 Mphepo yamkulunga m'mapiko ake, ndipo adzachita manyazi chifukwa cha nsembe zao." 
Hosea5:1 Imvani ichi, ansembe inu; mverani, inu nyumba ya Israele; tcherani khutu, inu nyumba ya mfumu; pakuti chiweruzochi chinena inu; pakuti munakhala msampha ku Mizipa, ndi ukonde woyalidwa pa Tabori." 
Hosea5:2 Ndipo opandukawo analowadi m'zovunda; koma Ine ndine wakuwadzudzula onsewo. 
Hosea5:3 Ndimdzaiwa Efuremu, ndi Israele sandibisikira; pakuti Efuremu iwe, wachita uhule tsopano, Israele wadetsedwa." 
Hosea5:4 Machitidwe ao sawalola kubwerera kwa Mulungu wao; pakuti mzimu wa uhule uli m'kati mwao, ndipo sadziwa Yehova." 
Hosea5:5 Ndipo kudzikuza kwa Israele kudzamchitira umboni pamaso pake; chifukwa chake Israele ndi Efuremu adzakhumudwa m'mphulupulu mwao; Yudanso adzakhumudwa pamodzi nao. 
Hosea5:6 Adzamuka ndi zoweta zao zazing'ono ndi zazikulu kufunafuna Yehova: koma sadzampeza; Iye wadzibweza kuwachokera. 
Hosea5:7 Anachita mosakhulupirika pa Yehova, pakuti anabala ana achilendo; mwezi wokhala udzawatha tsopano, pamodzi ndi maiko ao." 
Hosea5:8 Ombani mphalasa m'Gibea, ndi lipenga m'Rama; fuulani ku Betaveni; pambuyo pako, Benjamini." 
Hosea5:9 Efuremu adzasanduka bwinja tsiku lakudzudzula; mwa mafuko a Israele ndadziwitsa chodzachitikadi. 
Hosea5:10 Akalonga a Yuda akunga anthu osuntha malire; ndidzawatsanulira mkwiyo wanga ngati madzi. 
Hosea5:11 Efuremu azunzika, apsinjika pa mlanduwo; pakuti anafuna mwini wake kutsata lamulolo." 
Hosea5:12 Ndipo ndikhala kwa Efuremu ngati njenjete, ndi kwa nyumba ya Yuda ngati chivundi." 
Hosea5:13 Pamene Efuremu anaona nthenda yake, ndi Yuda bala lake, Efuremu anamuka kwa Asiriya, natumiza kwa mfumu Yarebu; koma iye sakhoza kukuchiritsani, kapena kupoletsa bala lanu." 
Hosea5:14 Pakuti ndidzakhala kwa Efuremu ngati mkango, ndi kwa nyumba ya Yuda ngati msona wa mkango; ndidzamwetula Ine ndi kuchoka; ndidzanyamula, ndipo palibe wakulanditsa." 
Hosea5:15 Ndidzamuka ndi kubwerera kunka kumalo kwanga, mpaka adzavomereza kupalamula kwao, nafunafuna nkhope yanga; m'msauko mwao adzandifunafuna mwachangu." 
Hosea6:1 Tiyeni, tibwerere kunka kwa Yehova; pakuti wang'amba, nadzatipoletsera; wakantha, nadzatimanga." 
Hosea6:2 Atapita masiku awiri adzatitsitsimutsa, tsiku lachitatu adzatiutsa; ndipo tidzakhala ndi moyo pamaso pake." 
Hosea6:3 Tidziwe tsono, tilondole kudziwa Yehova; kutuluka kwake kwakonzekeratu ngati matanda kucha; ndipo adzatidzera ngati mvula, ngati mvula ya masika yakuthirira dziko." 
Hosea6:4 Efuremu iwe, ndidzakuchitira chiyani? Yuda iwe, ndikuchitire chiyani? Pakuti kukoma mtima kwako kukunga mtambo wam'mawa ndi ngati mame akuphawa mamawa." 
Hosea6:5 Chifukwa chake ndawalikha mwa aneneri; ndawapha ndi mau a pakamwa panga; ndi maweruzo anga atuluka ngati kuunika. 
Hosea6:6 Pakuti ndikondwera nacho chifundo, si nsembe ai; ndi kumdziwa Mulungu kuposa nsembe zopsereza." 
Hosea6:7 Koma iwo analakwira chipangano ngati Adamu, m'mene anandichitira monyenga." 
Hosea6:8 Giliyadi ndiwo mudzi wa ochita zoipa, wa mapazi a mwazi." 
Hosea6:9 Ndipo monga magulu a mbala alalira munthu, momwemo msonkhano wa ansembe amapha pa njira ya ku Sekemu; indedi achita choipitsitsa." 
Hosea6:10 M'nyumba ya Israele ndinaona chinthu choopsetsa; pamenepo pali uhule wa Efuremu; Israele wadetsedwa. 
Hosea6:11 Akuikidwiratunso nyengo yakukolola, Yuda iwe, pamene ndikabwezanso undende wa anthu anga." 
Hosea7:1 M'mene ndichiritsa Israele, mphulupulu ya Efuremu ivumbuluka, ndi zoipa za Samariya; pakuti achita bodza, ndipo mkhungu alowa m'nyumba, ndi gulu la mbala lilanda kubwalo." 
Hosea7:2 Ndipo sanena m'mtima mwao kuti Ine ndikumbukira zoipa zao zonse; tsopano machitidwe ao awazinga; ali pamaso panga. 
Hosea7:3 Akondweretsa mfumu ndi zoipa zao, ndi akalonga ndi mabodza ao." 
Hosea7:4 Achigololo onsewo; akunga ng'anjo anaitenthetsa woocha mkate; aleka kusonkha moto, poyambira kukanda mtanda kufikira watupa mtandawo." 
Hosea7:5 Tsiku la mfumu yathu akalonga adzidwalitsa ndi kutentha kwa vinyo; iye anatambasula dzanja lake pamodzi ndi oseka. 
Hosea7:6 Pakuti asendera nao mtima wao wakunga ng'anjo ya mkate, pokhala alikulalira; woocha mkate wao agona usiku wonse, m'mawa iyaka ngati moto wa malawi." 
Hosea7:7 Onsewo atentha ngati ng'anjo, natha oweruza ao, agwa mafumu ao onse; palibe mmodzi mwa iwo wakuitana Ine." 
Hosea7:8 Efuremu asokonezana nayo mitundu ya anthu; Efuremu ndiye kamtanda ka mkate kosatembenuzidwa. 
Hosea7:9 Alendo anatha mphamvu yake osachidziwa iye; imvi zomwe zampakiza osachidziwa iye. 
Hosea7:10 Ndipo kudzikuza kwa Israele kumchitira umboni pamaso pake; koma sanabwerere kunka kwa Yehova Mulungu wao, kapena kumfunafuna mwa ichi chonse." 
Hosea7:11 Ndipo Efuremu ali ngati nkhunda yopusa yopanda nzeru; aitanira kwa Ejipito, amuka kwa Asiriya." 
Hosea7:12 Pamene amuka ndidzawayalira ukonde wanga, ndidzawagwetsa ngati mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndidzawalanga monga udamva msonkhano wao." 
Hosea7:13 Tsoka kwa iwowa! Pakuti anandizembera; chionongeko kwa iwowa! Pakuti anandilakwira; ndikadawalanditsa Ine, koma anandinenera zabodza." 
Hosea7:14 Ndipo sanafuulire kwa Ine ndi mtima wao, koma alira pakama pao, asonkhanira tirigu ndi vinyo, apikisana ndi Ine." 
Hosea7:15 Chinkana ndawalangiza ndi lulimbitsa manja ao, andilingiririra choipa." 
Hosea7:16 Abwerera, koma si kwa Wam'mwambayo; akunga uta wosakhulupirika; akalonga ao adzagwa ndi lupanga mwa chipongwe cha lilime lao; ichi ndicho adzawasekera m'dziko la Ejipito." 
Hosea8:1 Lipenga kukamwa kwako. Akudza ngati chiombankhanga, kulimbana ndi nyumba ya Yehova; chifukwa analakwira chipangano changa, napikisana nacho chilamulo changa." 
Hosea8:2 Adzafuulira kwa Ine, Mulungu wanga, ife Aisraele tikudziwani." 
Hosea8:3 Israele wachitaya chokoma, mdani adzamlondola." 
Hosea8:4 Analonga mafumu, koma sikunachokera kwa Ine; anaika akalonga, koma sindinadziwa; anadzipangira mafano a siliva wao ndi golide wao, kuti akalikhidwe." 
Hosea8:5 Mwanawang'ombe wako wakutaya, Samariya iwe; mkwiyo wanga wayakira iwo; adzalephera kuyera mtima mpaka liti?" 
Hosea8:6 Pakuti ichi chomwe chafumira kwa Israele; mmisiri wampanga, koma sali Mulungu; inde mwanawang'ombe wa Samariya adzaphwanyikaphwanyika." 
Hosea8:7 Pakuti abzala mphepo, nadzakolola kamvulumvulu; alibe tirigu wosasenga; ngala siidzatulutsa ufa; chinkana iutulutsa, alendo adzaumeza." 
Hosea8:8 Israele wamezedwa; tsopano ali mwa amitundu ngati chotengera choti munthu sakondwera nacho. 
Hosea8:9 Pakuti anakwera kunka ku Asiriya, ngati mbidzi ya pa yokha mwini wake; Efuremu walembera omkonda ngati antchito." 
Hosea8:10 Inde angakhale alembera mwa amitundu ndidzawasonkhanitsa tsopano; ndipo ayamba kuchepa chifukwa cha katundu wa mfumu ya akalonga. 
Hosea8:11 Popeza Efuremu anachulukitsa maguwa a nsembe akuchimwako, maguwa a nsembe omwewo anamchimwitsa." 
Hosea8:12 Ndinamlembera zinthu zambirimbirizo za chilamulo changa, koma zinayesedwa ngati chinthu chachilendo." 
Hosea8:13 Kunena za nsembe za zopereka zanga, aphera nsembe yanyama, naidya; koma Yehova sazilandira; tsopano adzakumbukira mphulupulu yao, nadzalanga zochimwa zao; adzabwerera kunka ku Ejipito." 
Hosea8:14 Pakuti Israele waiwala Mlengi wake, namanga akachisi; ndipo Yuda wachulukitsa midzi yamalinga; koma ndidzatumizira midzi yake moto, nudzatha nyumba zake zazikulu." 
Hosea9:1 Usakondwera, Israele, ndi kusekerera, ngati mitundu ya anthu; pakuti wachita chigololo kuleka Mulungu wako, wakonda mphotho ya chigololo pa dwale la tirigu lililonse." 
Hosea9:2 Dwale ndi choponderamo mphesa sizidzawadyetsa, vinyo watsopano adzamsowa." 
Hosea9:3 Sadzakhala m'dziko la Yehova; koma Efuremu adzabwerera kunka ku Ejipito; ndipo adzadya chakudya chodetsa m'Asiriya. 
Hosea9:4 Sadzatsanulira Yehova nsembe zavinyo; sizidzamkomera Iye nsembe zao; zidzakhala kwa iwo ngati mkate wa achisoni; onse akudyako adzadetsedwa; pakuti mkate wao udzakhala wa njala yao, uwu sudzalowa m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
Hosea9:5 Mudzachitanji tsiku la masonkhano oikika, ndi tsiku la chikondwerero cha Yehova." 
Hosea9:6 Pakuti taonani, anachokera chionongeko, koma Ejipito adzawasonkhanitsa, Mofi adzawaika m'manda; khwisa adzalanda zofunika zao zasiliva; minga idzakhala m'mahema mwao." 
Hosea9:7 Masiku a kulanga afika, masiku a kubwezera afika; Israele adzadziwa; mneneri ali wopusa, munthu wamzimu ali wamisala, chifukwa cha kuchuluka mphulupulu yako, ndi popeza udani ndi waukulu." 
Hosea9:8 Efuremu ndiye wozonda kwa Mulungu wanga; kunena za mneneri, msampha wa msodzi uli m'njira zake zonse, ndi udani m'nyumba ya Mulungu wake." 
Hosea9:9 Anadzivunditsa kwambiri, monga masiku a Gibea; adzakumbukira mphulupulu yao, adzalanga zochimwa zao." 
Hosea9:10 Ndinapeza Israele ngati mphesa m'chipululu, ndinaona makolo anu ngati chipatso choyamba cha mkuyu nyengo yake yoyamba; koma anadza kwa Baala-Peori, nadzipatulira chonyansacho, nasandulika onyansa, chonga chija anachikonda." 
Hosea9:11 Kunena za Efuremu, ulemerero wao udzauluka ndi kuchoka ngati mbalame; sipadzakhala kubala, ndi kukhala ndi pakati, ndi kuima." 
Hosea9:12 Angakhale alera ana ao, koma ndidzawasowetsa, wosatsala munthu; ndithunso tsoka iwowa, pamene ndiwachokera." 
Hosea9:13 Efuremu, monga ndaona, akunga Tiro, wookedwa pokoma; koma Efuremu adzatulutsira ana ake wakuwaphera." 
Hosea9:14 Apatseni, Yehova; mudzapatsa chiyani? Muwapatse mimba yotayataya, ndi mawere ouma." 
Hosea9:15 Choipa chao chonse chili m'Giligala; pakuti pamenepo ndinawada, chifukwa cha kuipa kwa machitidwe ao ndidzawainga kuwachotsa m'nyumba mwanga; sindidzawakondanso; akalonga ao onse ndiwo opanduka." 
Hosea9:16 Efuremu wakanthidwa, muzu wao wauma, iwo sadzabala zipatso; inde ngakhale abala, koma ndidzapha zipatso zofunika za mimba yao." 
Hosea9:17 Mulungu wanga adzawataya, pakuti sanammvere Iye; ndipo adzakhala othawathawa mwa amitundu." 
Hosea10:1 Israele ndi mpesa wotambalala, wodzibalira wokha zipatso; monga umo zinachulukira zipatso zake, momwemo anachulukitsa maguwa a nsembe ake; monga mwa kukoma kwake kwa dziko lake anapanga zoimiritsa zokoma." 
Hosea10:2 Mtima wao wagawikana, tsopano adzapezeka opalamula, adzapasula maguwa ao a nsembe, nadzaononga zoimiritsa zao." 
Hosea10:3 Pakuti tsopano adzati, Tilibe mfumu, popeza sitiopa Yehova; ndi mfumu idzatichitira chiyani?" 
Hosea10:4 Anena mau akulumbira monama, pakuchita mapangano momwemo; chiweruzo chiphuka ngati zitsamba zowawa m'michera ya munda." 
Hosea10:5 Okhala m'Samariya adzaopera chifanizo cha anaang'ombe a ku Betaveni; pakuti anthu ake adzamva nacho chisoni, ndi ansembe ake amene anakondwera nacho, chifukwa cha ulemerero wake, popeza unachichokera." 
Hosea10:6 Adzachitengeranso ku Asiriya chikhale mphatso ya kwa mfumu Yarebu; Efuremu adzatenga manyazi, ndi Israele adzachita manyazi ndi uphungu wake." 
Hosea10:7 Ndipo Samariya, mfumu yake yamwelera ngati thovu pamadzi." 
Hosea10:8 Ndipo misanje ya Aveni, ndiyo tchimo la Israele, idzaonongeka; minga ndi mitungwi idzamera pa maguwa ao a nsembe; ndipo adzati kwa mapiri, Tiphimbeni; ndi kwa zitunda, Tigwereni." 
Hosea10:9 Israele, wachimwa kuyambira masiku a Gibea; pomwepo anaimabe; nkhondo ya ana a chosalungama siinawapeza ku Gibea." 
Hosea10:10 Pamene ndifuna ndidzawalanga, ndi mitundu ya anthu idzawasonkhanira pomangidwa iwo pa zolakwa zao ziwiri." 
Hosea10:11 Ndipo Efuremu ndiye ng'ombe yaikazi yaing'ono, yozereweredwa, yokonda kupuntha tirigu; koma ndapita pa khosi lake lokoma; ndidzamsenzetsa Efuremu goli; Yuda adzalima, Yakobo adzaphwanya chibuluma chake." 
Hosea10:12 Mudzibzalire m'chilungamo mukolole monga mwa chifundo; limani masala anu, pakuti yafika nthawi ya kufuna Yehova, mpaka afika Iye, navumbitsira inu chilungamo." 
Hosea10:13 Mwalima choipa, mwakolola chosalungama, mwadya zipatso za mabodza; pakuti watama njira yako ndi kuchuluka kwa anthu ako amphamvu." 
Hosea10:14 Momwemo phokoso lidzaukira anthu ako, ndi malinga ako onse adzapasuka, monga Salimani anapasula Betaribele; tsiku la nkhondo amai anaphwanyika pamodzi ndi ana ake." 
Hosea10:15 Momwemo adzakuchitirani Betele, chifukwa cha choipa chanu chachikulu; mbandakucha mfumu ya Israele idzalikhika konse." 
Hosea11:1 Pamene Israele anali mwana, ndinamkonda, ndinaitana mwana wanga ali m'Ejipito." 
Hosea11:2 Monga anawaitana, momwemo anawachokera; anaphera nsembe Abaala, nafukizira mafano osema." 
Hosea11:3 Koma Ine ndinaphunzitsa Efuremu kuyenda, ndinawafungata m'manja mwanga; koma sanadziwe kuti ndinawachiritsa." 
Hosea11:4 Ndinawakoka ndi zingwe za munthu, ndi zomangira za chikondi; ndinakhala nao ngati iwo akukweza goli pampuno pao, ndipo ndinawaikira chakudya." 
Hosea11:5 Iye sadzabwerera kunka kudziko la Ejipito, koma Asiriya adzakhala mfumu yake, popeza anakana kubwera." 
Hosea11:6 Ndi lupanga lidzagwera midzi yake, lidzatha mipiringidzo yake, ndi kuononga chifukwa cha uphungu wao." 
Hosea11:7 Ndipo anthu anga alimbika kubwerera m'mbuyo kundileka Ine; chinkana akawaitana atsate Iye ali m'mwamba, sadzakweza ndi mmodzi yense." 
Hosea11:8 Ndidzakusiya bwanji, Efuremu? Ndidzakupereka bwanji, Israele? Ndidzakuyesa bwanji ngati Adima? Ndidzakuika bwanji ngati Zeboimu? Mtima wanga watembenuka m'kati mwanga, zachifundo zanga zilira zonse pamodzi." 
Hosea11:9 Sindidzachita mkwiyo wanga waukali, sindidzabwerera kuononga Efuremu; pakuti Ine ndine Mulungu, si munthu ai; Woyera wa pakati pako; ndipo sindidzalowa m'mudzi." 
Hosea11:10 Adzatsata Yehova, Iye adzabangula ngati mkango; pamene abangula, ana adzafika ndi kunjenjemera kuchokera kumadzulo." 
Hosea11:11 Adzafika ndi kunjenjemera ngati mbalame ya ku Ejipito, ndi ngati nkhunda m'dziko la Asiriya; ndipo ndidzawakhalitsa m'nyumba zao, ati Yehova" 
Hosea11:12 Efuremu andizinga ndi bodza, ndi nyumba ya Israele ndi chinyengo, ndi Yuda apikisana ndi Mulungu, ndiye Woyera wokhulupirika." 
Hosea12:1 Efuremu akudya mphepo, natsata mphepo ya kum'mawa; tsiku lonse achulukitsa mabodza ndi chipasuko, ndipo achita pangano ndi Asiriya, natenga mafuta kunka nao ku Ejipito." 
Hosea12:2 Ndipo Yehova ali ndi mlandu ndi Yuda, nadzalanga Yakobo monga mwa njira zake, adzambwezera monga mwa machitidwe ake." 
Hosea12:3 M'mimba anagwira kuchitende cha mkulu wake, ndipo atakula mphamvu analimbana ndi Mulungu;" 
Hosea12:4 inde, analimbana ndi wamthenga nampambana; analira, nampembedza Iye; anampeza Iye ku Betele, ndi kumeneko Iye analankhula ndi ife;" 
Hosea12:5 ndiye Yehova Mulungu wa makamu, chikumbukiro chake ndi Yehova." 
Hosea12:6 M'mwemo utembenukire kwa Mulungu wako, sunga chifundo ndi chiweruzo, nuyembekezere Mulungu wako kosalekeza." 
Hosea12:7 Ndiye Mkanani, m'dzanja lake muli miyeso yonyenga, akonda kusautsa." 
Hosea12:8 Ndipo Efuremu anati, Zedi ndasanduka wolemera, ndadzionera chuma m'ntchito zonse ndinazigwira; sadzapeza mwa ine mphulupulu yokhala tchimo." 
Hosea12:9 Koma Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako chichokere dziko la Ejipito, ndidzakukhalitsanso m'mahema, monga masiku a zikondwerero zoikika." 
Hosea12:10 Ndalankhulanso ndi aneneri, ndipo Ine ndachulukitsa masomphenya; ndi pa dzanja la aneneri ndinanena ndi mafanizo." 
Hosea12:11 Kodi Giliyadi ndiye wopanda pake? Akhala achabe konse; m'Giligala aphera nsembe ya ng'ombe; inde maguwa ao a nsembe akunga miulu yamiyala m'michera ya munda. 
Hosea12:12 Ndipo Yakobo anathawira kuthengo la Aramu, ndi Israele anagwira ntchito chifukwa cha mkazi, ndi chifukwa cha mkazi anaweta nkhosa." 
Hosea12:13 Ndipo mwa mneneri Yehova anakweretsa Israele kuchokera m'Ejipito, ndi mwa mneneri anasungika." 
Hosea12:14 Efuremu wautsa mkwiyo wowawa, m'mwemo Iye adzamsiyira mwazi wake, ndi Ambuye wake adzambwezera chomtonza chake." 
Hosea13:1 Pamene Efuremu analankhula panali kunjenjemera; anadzikweza m'Israele; koma pamene anapalamula mwa Baala, anafa." 
Hosea13:2 Ndipo tsopano aonjeza kuchimwa, nadzipangira mafano oyenga a siliva wao, mafano monga mwa nzeru zao, onsewo ntchito ya amisiri; anena za iwo, Anthu ophera nsembe apsompsone anaang'ombe." 
Hosea13:3 Chifukwa chake adzakhala ngati mtambo wa m'mawa, ndi ngati mame asansuka mamawa, ngati mungu umene mphepo iuuluza kudwale, ndi ngati utsi wotuluka kukafwambira." 
Hosea13:4 Koma Ine ndiye Yehova Mulungu wako chichokere m'dziko la Ejipito, ndipo suyenera kudziwa mulungu wina koma Ine; ndi popanda Ine palibe mpulumutsi." 
Hosea13:5 Ndinakudziwa m'chipululu, m'dziko lotentha kwambiri." 
Hosea13:6 Monga mwa podyetsa pao, momwemo anakhuta; anakhuta, ndi mtima wao unakwezeka; chifukwa chake anandiiwala Ine." 
Hosea13:7 Chifukwa chake ndikhala nao ngati mkango; ngati nyalugwe ndidzalalira kunjira. 
Hosea13:8 Ndidzakomana nao ngati chimbalangondo chochilanda ana ake, ndi kung'amba chokuta mtima wao; ndi pomwepo ndidzawalusira ngati mkango; chilombo chidzawamwetula." 
Hosea13:9 Israele, chikuononga ndi ichi, chakuti utsutsana ndi Ine, chithandizo chako." 
Hosea13:10 Ili kuti mfumu yako tsopano, kuti ikupulumutse m'midzi yako yonse? Ndi oweruza ako amene unanena za iwo, Ndipatseni mfumu ndi akalonga?" 
Hosea13:11 Ndinakupatsa mfumu mu mkwiyo wanga; ndinamchotsanso m'ukali wanga. 
Hosea13:12 Mphulupulu ya Efuremu yamangika, tchimo lake lisungika." 
Hosea13:13 Zowawa zonga za mkazi wobala zidzamgwera, ndiye mwana wopanda nzeru; pakuti pali nyengo yakuti asachedwe mobalira ana." 
Hosea13:14 Ndidzawaombola kumphamvu ya kumanda, ndidzawaombola kuimfa; imfa, miliri yako ili kuti? Kulekerera kudzabisika pamaso panga." 
Hosea13:15 Chinkana abala mwa abale ake, mphepo ya kum'mawa idzafika, mphepo ya Yehova yokwera kuchokera kuchipululu; ndi gwero lake lidzaphwa, ndi kasupe wake adzauma, adzafunkha chuma cha akatundu onse ofunika." 
Hosea13:16 Samariya adzasanduka wabwinja, pakuti anapandukana ndi Mulungu wake; iwo adzagwa ndi lupanga, ana ao amakanda adzaphwanyika, ndi akazi ao okhala ndi pakati adzatumbulidwa." 
Hosea14:1 Israele, bwerera kunka kwa Yehova Mulungu wako; pakuti wagwa mwa mphulupulu yako." 
Hosea14:2 Mukani nao mau, nimubwerere kwa Yehova; nenani kwa Iye, Chotsani mphulupulu zonse, nimulandire chokoma; ndipo tidzapereka mau milomo yathu ngati ng'ombe." 
Hosea14:3 Asiriya sadzatipulumutsa; sitidzayenda pa akavalo, ndipo sitidzanenanso kwa ntchito ya manja athu, Inu ndinu milungu yathu; pakuti mwa Inu ana amasiye apeza chifundo." 
Hosea14:4 Ndidzachiritsa kubwerera kwao, ndidzawakonda mwaufulu; pakuti mkwiyo wanga wamchokera." 
Hosea14:5 Ndidzakhala kwa Israele ngati mame; adzachita maluwa ngati kakombo, ndi kutambalalitsa mizu yake ngati Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:6 Nthambi zake zidzatambalala, ndi kukoma kwake kudzanga kwa mtengo wa azitona, ndi fungo lake ngati Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Iwo okhala pansi pa mthunzi wake adzabwera, nadzatsitsimuka ngati tirigu, nadzaphuka ngati mpesa, chikumbukiro chake chidzanga vinyo wa Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Efuremu adzati, Ndili ndi chiyaninso ndi mafano? Ndayankha, ndidzampenyerera; ndili ngati mtengo wamlombwa wabiriwiri; zipatso zako zipezeka zochokera kwa Ine." 
Hosea14:9 Wanzeru ndani, kuti azindikire izi? Waluntha, kuti adziwe izi? Pakuti njira za Yehova zili zoongoka; ndipo olungama adzayendamo, koma olakwa adzagwamo." 
Joel1:1 Mau a Yehova a kwa Yowele mwana wa Petuwele. 
Joel1:2 Imvani ichi, akuluakulu inu, nimutchere khutu, inu nonse okhala m'dziko. Chachitika ichi masiku anu kodi, kapena masiku a makolo anu?" 
Joel1:3 Mufotokozere ana anu ichi, ndi ana anu afotokozere ana ao, ndi ana ao afotokozere mbadwo wina." 
Joel1:4 Chosiya chimbalanga, dzombe lidachidya; ndi chosiya dzombe, chirimamine adachidya; ndi chosiya chirimamine, anoni adachidya." 
Joel1:5 Galamukani, oledzera inu, nimulire; bumani, nonse akumwa vinyo, chifukwa cha vinyo watsopano; pakuti waletsedwa pakamwa panu." 
Joel1:6 Pakuti mtundu wadza, wakwerera dziko langa, wamphamvu wosawerengeka, mano ake akunga mano a mkango, nukhala nao mano achibwano a mkango waukulu." 
Joel1:7 Unaonongadi mpesa wanga, nunyenya mkuyu wanga, nukungudza konse, nuutaya; nthambi zake zasanduka zotumbuluka." 
Joel1:8 Lirani ngati namwali wodzimangira m'chuuno chiguduli, chifukwa cha mwamuna wa unamwali wake." 
Joel1:9 Nsembe yaufa ndi nsembe yothira zalekeka kunyumba ya Yehova; ansembe, atumiki a Yehova, achita maliro." 
Joel1:10 M'munda mwaonongeka, nthaka ilira; pakuti tirigu waonongeka, vinyo watsopano wamwelera, mafuta akudza pang'onong'ono." 
Joel1:11 Gomani, akulima m'minda inu; lirani, akulima mpesa; chifukwa cha tirigu ndi barele; pakuti dzinthu za m'minda zatayika." 
Joel1:12 Mpesa wauma, mkuyu wafota, mtengo wa mkangaza ndi kanjedza ndi muula, inde mitengo yonse ya kuthengo yafota; pakuti chimwemwe chathera ana a anthu." 
Joel1:13 Mudzimangire chiguduli m'chuuno mwanu, nimulire, ansembe inu; bumani otumikira kuguwa la nsembe inu; lowani, gonani usiku wonse m'chiguduli, inu otumikira Mulungu wanga; pakuti nsembe yaufa ndi nsembe yothira zaletsedwera nyumba ya Mulungu wanu." 
Joel1:14 Patulani tsiku losala, lalikirani masonkhano oletsa, sonkhanitsani akuluakulu, ndi onse okhala m'dziko, kunyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wanu; nimufuulire kwa Yehova." 
Joel1:15 Kalanga ine, tsikuli! Pakuti layandikira tsiku la Yehova, lidzafika ngati chionongeko chochokera kwa Wamphamvuyonse." 
Joel1:16 Chakudya sichichotsedwa kodi pamaso pathu? Chimwemwe ndi chikondwerero pa nyumba ya Mulungu wathu? 
Joel1:17 Mbeu zaola pansi pa zibuluma zao; zosungiramo zaonongeka, nkhokwe zapasuka; pakuti tirigu wakwinyata." 
Joel1:18 Ha! Nyama ziusa moyo, magulu a ng'ombe azimidwa; pakuti zisowa podyera; magulu a nkhosa omwe atha." 
Joel1:19 Ndifuulira kwa Inu Yehova, pakuti moto wapsereza mabusa a m'chipululu, ndi malawi a moto anatentha mitengo yonse ya kuthengo." 
Joel1:20 Inde nyama zakuthengo zilira kwa Inu; pakuti mitsinje yamadzi yaphwa, ndi moto wapsereza mabusa a m'chipululu." 
Joel2:1 Muombe lipenga m'Ziyoni, nimufuulitse m'phiri langa lopatulika; onse okhala m'dziko anjenjemere; pakuti tsiku la Yehova lilinkudza, pakuti liyandikira;" 
Joel2:2 tsiku la mdima, la mdima wandiweyani, tsiku la mitambo, mitambo yochindikira, ngati m'mbandakucha moyalika pamapiri; mtundu waukulu ndi wamphamvu, panalibe wotere ndi kale lonse, sipadzakhalanso wotere utapita uwu, kufikira zaka za mibadwo yambiri." 
Joel2:3 Moto unyambita pamaso pao, ndi m'mbuyo mwao litentha lawi la moto; kumaso kwao dziko likunga munda wa Edeni, koma m'mbuyo mwao likunga chipululu chopanda kanthu; palibenso wakuwapulumuka." 
Joel2:4 Maonekedwe ao aoneka ngati akavalo, nathamanga ngati akavalo a nkhondo." 
Joel2:5 Atumphako ngati mkokomo wa magaleta pamwamba pa mapiri, ngati kulilima kwa malawi a moto akupsereza ziputu, ngati mtundu wamphamvu wa anthu ondandalikira nkhondo." 
Joel2:6 Pamaso pao mitundu ya anthu ikumva zowawa, nkhope yonse zitumbuluka." 
Joel2:7 Athamanga ngati amphamvu; akwera linga ngati anthu a nkhondo; niliyenda lililonse njira yake, osasokonezeka m'mabande ao." 
Joel2:8 Sakankhana, ayenda lililonse m'mopita mwake; akagwa m'zida, siithyoka nkhondo yao." 
Joel2:9 Alumphira mudzi, athamanga palinga, akwerera nyumba, alowera pamazenera ngati khungu." 
Joel2:10 Dziko lapansi linjenjemera pamaso pao, thambo ligwedezeka, dzuwa ndi mwezi zada, ndi nyenyezi zibweza kuwala kwao;" 
Joel2:11 ndipo Yehova amveketsa mau ake pamaso pa khamu lake la nkhondo; pakuti a m'chigono mwake ndi ambirimbiri; pakuti Iye wakuchita mau ake ndiye wamphamvu ndithu; pakuti tsiku la Yehova ndi lalikulu ndi loopsa ndithu; akhoza kupirira nalo ndani? 
Joel2:12 Koma ngakhale tsopano, ati Yehova, munditembenukire Ine ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi kusala, ndi kulira, ndi kuchita maliro;" 
Joel2:13 ndipo ng'ambani mitima yanu, si zovala zanu ai; ndi kutembenukira kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu; pakuti Iye ndiye wachisomo, ndi wodzala chifundo, wosapsa mtima msanga, ndi wochuluka kukoma mtima, ndi woleka choipacho." 
Joel2:14 Kaya, Yona kapena adzabwerera, nadzalekerera, ndi kusiya mdalitso pambuyo pake, ndiwo nsembe yaufa ndi nsembe yothira ya Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joel2:15 Ombani lipenga m'Ziyoni, patulani tsiku losala, lalikirani msonkhano woletsa," 
Joel2:16 sonkhanitsani anthu, patulani msonkhano, memezani akuluakulu, sonkhanitsani ana ndi oyamwa mawere; mkwati atuluke m'chipinda mwake, ndi mkwatibwi m'mogona mwake." 
Joel2:17 Ansembe, atumiki a Yehova, alire pakati pa khonde la pakhomo ndi guwa la nsembe, nanene, Alekeni anthu anu, Yehova, musapereka cholowa chanu achitonze, kuti amitundu awalamulire; adzaneneranji mwa anthu, Ali kuti Mulungu wao?" 
Joel2:18 Pamenepo Yehova anachitira dziko lake nsanje, nachitira anthu ake chifundo." 
Joel2:19 Ndipo Yehova anayankha, nati kwa anthu ake, Taonani, ndidzakutumizirani tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta; ndipo mudzakhuta ndi izo; ndipo sindidzakuperekaninso mukhale chitonzo mwa amitundu;" 
Joel2:20 koma ndidzakuchotserani kutali nkhondo ya kumpoto, ndi kulingira kudziko louma ndi lopasuka, a kumaso kwake kunyanja ya kum'mawa, ndi a kumbuyo kwake kunyanja ya kumadzulo; ndi kununkha kwake kudzakwera, ndi fungo lake loipa lidzakwera; pakuti inachita zazikulu." 
Joel2:21 Usaopa, dziko iwe; kondwera, nusekerere; pakuti Yehova wachita zazikulu." 
Joel2:22 Musamaopa, nyama zakuthengo inu; pakuti m'chipululu muphukanso msipu; pakuti mitengo ibala zipatso zao; mikuyu ndi mipesa ipatsa mphamvu zao." 
Joel2:23 Mukondwere tsono, inu ana a Ziyoni, nimusekerere m'Yehova Mulungu wanu; pakuti adzayamba kukupatsani mvula ya chizimalupsa, monga mwa chilungamo chake; nakuvumbitsirani mvula, mvula ya chizimalupsa ndi ya masika mwezi woyamba." 
Joel2:24 Ndipo madwale adzakhala ndi tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta; zidzasefuka m'zosungiramo zao." 
Joel2:25 Ndipo ndidzakubwezerani zaka zidazidya dzombe, ndi chirimamine, ndi anoni, ndi chimbalanga, gulu langa lalikulu la nkhondo, limene ndinalitumiza pakati pa inu." 
Joel2:26 Ndipo mudzadyaidya ndi kukhuta, nimudzalemekeza dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene anachita nanu modabwitsa; ndi anthu anga sadzachita manyazi nthawi zonse." 
Joel2:27 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndili pakati pa Israele, ndi kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, palibe wina; ndi anthu anga sadzachita manyazi nthawi zonse." 
Joel2:28 Ndipo kudzachitika m'tsogolo mwake, ndidzatsanulira mzimu wanga pa anthu onse, ndi ana aamuna ndi aakazi adzanenera, akuluakulu anu adzalota maloto, anyamata anu adzaona masomphenya;" 
Joel2:29 ndi pa akapolo ndi adzakazi omwe ndidzatsanulira mzimu wanga masiku awo. 
Joel2:30 Ndipo ndidzaonetsa zodabwitsa kuthambo ndi pa dziko lapansi, mwazi, ndi moto, ndi utsi tolo." 
Joel2:31 Dzuwa lidzasanduka mdima, ndi mwezi udzasanduka mwazi, lisanadze tsiku la Yehova lalikulu ndi loopsa." 
Joel2:32 Ndipo kudzachitika kuti aliyense adzaitana pa dzina la Yehova adzapulumutsidwa; pakuti m'phiri la Ziyoni ndi m'Yerusalemu mudzakhala chipulumutso, monga Yehova anatero, ndi mwa otsala amene Yehova adzawaitana." 
Joel3:1 Pakuti taonani, masiku awo, ndi nthawi iyo, pamene ndibwera nao andende a Yuda ndi a Yerusalemu," 
Joel3:2 ndidzasonkhanitsa amitundu onse, ndi kutsikira nao kuchigwa cha Yehosafati; ndipo ndidzaweruzana nao komweko za anthu anga, ndi cholowa changa Israele, amene anawabalalitsa mwa amitundu, nagawa dziko langa." 
Joel3:3 Ndipo anachitira anthu anga maere, napereka mwana wamwamuna kusinthana ndi mkazi wadama, nagula vinyo ndi mwana wamkazi kuti amwe." 
Joel3:4 Ndiponso ndili ndi chiyani ndi inu, Tiro ndi Sidoni, ndi malire onse a Afilisti? Mudzandibwezera chilango kodi? Mukandibwezera chilango msanga, mofulumira, ndidzabwezera chilango chanu pamutu panu." 
Joel3:5 Popeza inu munatenga siliva wanga ndi golide wanga, ndi kulonga zofunika zanga zokoma m'akachisi anu;" 
Joel3:6 munagulitsanso ana a Yuda ndi ana a Yerusalemu kwa ana a Yavani, kuwachotsa kutali kwa malire ao;" 
Joel3:7 taonani, ndidzawautsa kumalo kumene munawagulitsako, ndi kubwezera chilango chanu pamutu panu;" 
Joel3:8 ndipo ndidzagulitsa ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi m'dzanja la ana a Yuda; ndipo iwo adzawagulitsa kwa anthu a Seba, kwa anthu okhala kutali; pakuti Yehova wanena." 
Joel3:9 Mulalikire ichi mwa amitundu, mukonzeretu nkhondo; utsani amuna amphamvu; amuna onse a nkhondo ayandikire nakwere." 
Joel3:10 Sulani makasu anu akhale malupanga, ndi zikwakwa zanu zikhale nthungo; wofooka anene, Ndine wamphamvu." 
Joel3:11 Fulumirani, idzani, amitundu inu nonse pozungulirapo; sonkhanani pamodzi, mutsitsire komweko amphamvu anu, Yehova." 
Joel3:12 Agalamuke amitundu, nakwerere kuchigwa cha Yehosafati; pakuti ndidzakhala komweko kuweruza amitundu onse ozungulira." 
Joel3:13 Longani chisenga, pakuti dzinthu dzacha; idzani, pondani, pakuti chadzala choponderamo mphesa; zosungiramo zisefuka; pakuti zoipa zao nzazikulu." 
Joel3:14 Aunyinji, aunyinji m'chigwa chotsirizira mlandu! Pakuti layandikira tsiku la Yehova m'chigwa chotsirizira mlandu." 
Joel3:15 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zada, ndi nyenyezi zibweza kuwala kwao." 
Joel3:16 Ndipo Yehova adzadzuma ali ku Ziyoni, ndi kumveketsa mau ake ali ku Yerusalemu; ndi thambo ndi dziko lapansi zidzagwedezeka; koma Yehova adzakhala chopulumukirako anthu adzakhala chopulumukirako anthu ake, ndi linga la ana a Israele." 
Joel3:17 Momwemo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu wakukhala m'Ziyoni, phiri langa lopatulika; pamenepo Yerusalemu adzakhala wopatulika, osapitanso alendo pakati pake," 
Joel3:18 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku ilo mapiri adzakhetsa vinyo wozuna, ndi pazitunda padzayenda mkaka, ndi m'mitsinje yonse ya Yuda mudzayenda madzi; ndi madzi akasupe adzatuluka m'nyumba ya Yehova, nadzamwetsa madzi chigwa cha Sitimu." 
Joel3:19 Ejipito adzasanduka bwinja, ndi Edomu adzasanduka chipululu chopanda kanthu, chifukwa cha chiwawachi anawachitira ana a Yuda; popeza anakhetsa mwazi wosachimwa m'dziko lao." 
Joel3:20 Koma Yuda adzakhala chikhalire, ndi Yerusalemu ku mibadwomibadwo." 
Joel3:21 Ndipo ndidzayeretsa mwazi wao umene sindinauyeretsa, pakuti Yehova akhala m'Ziyoni." 
Amos1:1 Mau a Amosi, amene anali mwa oweta ng'ombe a ku Tekowa, ndiwo amene anawaona za Israele masiku a Uziya mfumu ya Yuda, ndi masiku a Yerobowamu mwana wa Yowasi mfumu ya Israele, zitatsala zaka ziwiri chisanafike chivomezi." 
Amos1:2 Ndipo anati, Yehova adzadzuma ali m'Ziyoni, nadzamveketsa mau ake ali m'Yerusalemu; podyetsa abusa padzachita chisoni, ndi mutu wa Karimele udzauma." 
Amos1:3 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za Damasiko, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza anapuntha Giliyadi ndi zopunthira zachitsulo;" 
Amos1:4 koma ndidzatumiza moto kunyumba ya Hazaele, ndipo udzanyeketsa nyumba zachifumu za Benihadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ndipo ndidzathyola mpiringidzo wa Damasiko, ndi kulikha okhala m'chigwa cha Aveni, ndi iye wogwira ndodo yachifumu m'Betedeni; ndi anthu a Aramu adzalowa ndende ku Kiri, ati Yehova." 
Amos1:6 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za Gaza, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza anatenga ndende anthu onse kuwapereka kwa Edomu;" 
Amos1:7 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa linga la Gaza, ndipo udzatha nyumba zake zachifumu;" 
Amos1:8 ndipo ndidzalikha okhala m'Asidodi, ndi iye wogwira ndodo yachifumu m'Asikeloni; ndipo ndidzabwezera Ekeroni dzanja langa limlange; ndi Afilisti otsala adzatayika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Amos1:9 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za Tiro, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza anapereka anthu onse kwa Edomu, osakumbukira pangano lachibale;" 
Amos1:10 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa linga la Tiro, ndipo udzanyeketsa nyumba zake zachifumu." 
Amos1:11 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za Edomu, kapena zinani, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza analondola mphwake ndi lupanga, nafetsa chifundo chake chonse, ndi mkwiyo wake unang'amba ching'ambire nasunga mkwiyo wake chisungire;" 
Amos1:12 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa Temani, udzanyeketsa nyumba zachifumu za Bozira." 
Amos1:13 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za ana a Amoni, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza anatumbula akazi ali m'pakati a Giliyadi, kuti akuze malire ao;" 
Amos1:14 koma ndidzayatsa moto pa linga la Raba, udzanyeketsa nyumba zachifumu zake, ndi kufuula tsiku la nkhondo, ndi namondwe, tsiku la kamvulumvulu;" 
Amos1:15 ndipo mfumu yao idzalowa kundende, iyo ndi akalonga ake pamodzi, ati Yehova." 
Amos2:1 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za Mowabu, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza anatentha mafupa a mfumu ya ku Edomu asanduke njereza;" 
Amos2:2 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa Mowabu, udzanyeketsa nyumba zachifumu za Keriyoti; ndipo Mowabu adzafa ndi phokoso, ndi kufuula, ndi mau a lipenga;" 
Amos2:3 ndipo ndidzalikha woweruza pakati pake, ndi kupha akalonga ake onse, ati Yehova." 
Amos2:4 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za Yuda, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza akaniza chilamulo cha Yehova, osasunga malemba ake; ndipo awalakwitsa mabodza ao amene makolo ao anawatsata;" 
Amos2:5 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa Yuda, udzanyeketsa nyumba zachifumu za m'Yerusalemu." 
Amos2:6 Atero Yehova, Chifukwa cha zolakwa zitatu za Israele, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwake; popeza agulitsa wolungama ndi ndalama, ndi wosowa chifukwa cha nsapato;" 
Amos2:7 ndiwo amene aliralira fumbi lapansi lili pamutu pa wosauka, napotoza njira ya wofatsa; ndipo munthu ndi atate wake amuka kwa namwali yemweyo, kuti aipse dzina langa loyera;" 
Amos2:8 nagona pansi pa zofunda za chikole kumaguwa a nsembe ali onse, ndi m'nyumba ya Mulungu wao akumwa vinyo wa iwo olipitsidwa." 
Amos2:9 Koma ndinaononga Ine pamaso pa Aamori, amene msinkhu wao unanga msinkhu wa mikungudza, nakhala nayo mphamvu ngati thundu; koma ndinaononga zipatso zao m'mwamba, ndi mizu yao pansi." 
Amos2:10 Ndipo ndinakukwezani kuchokera m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kukutsogolerani zaka makumi anai m'chipululu, kuti mulandire dziko la Aamori likhale cholowa chanu." 
Amos2:11 Ndipo ndinaukitsa mwa ana anu aneneri, ndi mwa anyamata anu Anaziri. Si momwemo, inu ana a Israele, ati Yehova?" 
Amos2:12 Koma munamwetsa Anaziri vinyo, ndi kulamulira aneneri ndi kuti, Musamanenera." 
Amos2:13 Taonani, ndidzakupsinjani m'malo mwanu, monga lipsinja galeta lodzala ndi mitolo fwa." 
Amos2:14 Ndipo populumukirapo padzasowera waliwiro, ndi wamphamvu; sadzalimbikitsa mphamvu yake, ndi ngwazi siidzapulumutsa moyo wake;" 
Amos2:15 ndi wokoka uta sadzalimbika, ndi waliwiro sadzadzipulumutsa; ngakhale woyenda pa akavalo sadzapulumutsa moyo wake;" 
Amos2:16 ndi wolimba mtima mwa ngwazi adzathawa wamaliseche tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova." 
Amos3:1 Tamverani mau awa akunenerani Yehova motsutsa, inu ana a Israele, kulinenera banja lonse ndinalikweza kulitulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kuti," 
Amos3:2 Inu nokha ndinakudziwani mwa mabanja onse a pa dziko lapansi, m'mwemo ndidzakulangani chifukwa cha mphulupulu zanu zonse." 
Amos3:3 Kodi awiri adzayenda pamodzi asanapanganiranetu? 
Amos3:4 Kodi mkango udzabangula m'nkhalango wosakhala nayo nyama? Kodi msona wa mkango udzalira m'ngaka mwake usanagwire kanthu? 
Amos3:5 Kodi mbalame idzakodwa mumsampha pansi popanda msampha woitchera? Kodi msampha ufwamphuka pansi wosakola kanthu? 
Amos3:6 Kodi adzaomba lipenga m'mudzi osanjenjemera anthu? Kodi choipa chidzagwera mudzi osachichita Yehova? 
Amos3:7 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova sadzachita kanthu osawulula chinsinsi chake kwa atumiki ake aneneri. 
Amos3:8 Mkango ukabangula, ndani amene saopa? Ambuye Yehova wanena, ndani amene sanenera?" 
Amos3:9 Bukitsani kunyumba zachifumu za Asidodi, ndi kunyumba zachifumu za m'dziko la Ejipito, nimuziti, Sonkhanani pa mapiri a Samariya, ndipo penyani masokosero akulu m'menemo, ndi ozunzika m'kati mwake." 
Amos3:10 Pakuti sadziwa kuchita zolungama, amene akundika zachiwawa ndi umbala m'nyumba zao zachifumu, ati Yehova." 
Amos3:11 Chifukwa chake, atero Ambuye Yehova, Padzakhala mdani pozungulira pake pa dziko, nadzatsitsa kukuchotsera mphamvu yako; ndi za m'nyumba zako zachifumu adzazifunkha." 
Amos3:12 Atero Yehova, Monga mbusa alanditsa m'kamwa mwa mkango miyendo iwiri, kapena kansonga ka khutu, momwemo adzalanditsidwa ana a Israele okhala pansi m'Samariya, m'ngodya ya guwa logonapo, ndi pa mitsamiro ya kama." 
Amos3:13 Tamverani inu, muchitire umboni wotsutsa nyumba ya Yakobo, ati Ambuye Yehova Mulungu wa makamu." 
Amos3:14 Pakuti tsiku lakumlanga Israele chifukwa cha zolakwa zake, ndidzalanganso maguwa a nsembe a ku Betele; ndi nyanga za guwa la nsembe zidzadulidwa, nizidzagwa pansi." 
Amos3:15 Ndipo ndidzakantha nyumba ya nyengo yachisanu, pamodzi ndi nyumba zaminyanga zidzaonongeka; ndi nyumba zazikuluzo zidzatha, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:1 Tamverani mau awa, inu ng'ombe zazikazi za ku Basani, zokhala m'phiri la Samariya, zosautsa aumphawi, zopsinja osowa, zonena kwa ambuyao, Bwerani nacho, timwe." 
Amos4:2 Ambuye Yehova walumbira pali chiyero chake, kuti taonani, adzakugwerani masiku akuti adzakuchotsani ndi zokowera, ndi otsala anu ndi mbedza." 
Amos4:3 Ndipo mudzatulukira popasuka linga, yense m'tsogolo mwake, ndi kutayika ku Harimoni, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:4 Idzani ku Betele, mudzalakwe ku Giligala, nimuchulukitse zolakwa, nimubwere nazo nsembe zanu zophera m'mawa ndi m'mawa, magawo anu akhumi atapita masiku atatuatatu;" 
Amos4:5 nimutenthe nsembe zolemekeza zachotupitsa, nimulalikire nsembe zaufulu, ndi kuzimveketsa; pakuti ichi muchikonda, inu ana a Israele, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Amos4:6 Ndipo Ine ndakupatsaninso mano oyera m'midzi yanu yonse, ndi kusowa mkate m'malo mwanu monse; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:7 Ndipo Ine ndakumanani mvula, itatsala miyezi itatu isanafika nyengo yakukolola; ndipo ndinavumbitsira mudzi umodzi mvula, osavumbitsira mudzi wina; munda wina unavumbidwa mvula, ndi m'munda mosavumbidwa mvula munafota." 
Amos4:8 M'mwemo midzi iwiri kapena itatu inayenda peyupeyu kumudzi umodzi kukamwa madzi, koma sanakhute; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:9 Ndinakukanthani ndi chinsikwi ndi chinoni; minda yanu yochuluka yamipesa, ndi yamikuyu, ndi ya azitona, yaonongeka ndi dzombe; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:10 Ndinatumiza mliri pakati panu monga m'Ejipito; anyamata anu ndawapha ndi lupanga, ndi kutenga akavalo anu; ndipo ndinakweretsa kununkha kwa chigono chanu kufikitsa kumphuno kwanu; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:11 Ndinagubuduza ena mwa inu, monga umo Mulungu anagubuduzira Sodomu ndi Gomora; ndipo inu munali ngati muuni wofumulidwa kumoto; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:12 Chifukwa chake ndidzatero nawe, Israele; popeza ndidzakuchitira ichi, dzikonzeretu kukomana ndi Mulungu wako, Israele." 
Amos4:13 Pakuti taona, Iye amene aumba mapiri, nalenga mphepo, nafotokozera munthu maganizo ake, nasanduliza m'mawa ukhale mdima, naponda pa misanje ya dziko lapansi, dzina lake ndiye Yehova Mulungu wa makamu." 
Amos5:1 Tamverani mau awa ndinenawa, akhalire inu nyimbo ya maliro, nyumba ya Israele inu." 
Amos5:2 Namwali wa Israele wagwa, sadzaukanso; wagwetsedwa pa nthaka yake, palibe womuutsa." 
Amos5:3 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, M'nyumba ya Israele, mudzi wotulukamo chikwi chimodzi adzautsalira zana limodzi, ndi uwu wotulukamo zana limodzi adzautsalira khumi." 
Amos5:4 Pakuti atero Yehova kwa nyumba ya Israele, Mundifunefune Ine, ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo;" 
Amos5:5 koma musamafuna Betele, kapena kumalowa m'Giligala; musamapita ku Beereseba; pakuti Giligala adzalowadi m'ndende, ndi Betele adzasanduka chabe." 
Amos5:6 Funani Yehova, ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo; angabuke ngati moto m'nyumba ya Yosefe, ndipo unganyeke wopanda wakuzima m'Betele;" 
Amos5:7 inu osintha chiweruzo chikhale chivumulo, nimugwetsa pansi chilungamo." 
Amos5:8 Iye wakulenga Nsangwe ndi Akamwiniatsatana, nasanduliza mdima wandiweyani ukhale m'mawa, nasanduliza usana ude ngati usiku, wakuitana madzi a m'nyanja, nawatsanulira pa dziko lapansi, dzina lake ndiye Yehova;" 
Amos5:9 wakufikitsa chionongeko pa wamphamvu modzidzimuka, chionongeko nichigwera linga." 
Amos5:10 Iwo adana naye wodzudzula kuchipata, nanyansidwa naye wolunjikitsa mau." 
Amos5:11 Popeza tsono mupondereza aumphawi, ndi kumsokhetsa tirigu; mwamanga nyumba za miyala yosema, koma simudzakhala m'mwemo; mwaoka minda ya mipesa yokonda, koma simudzamwa vinyo wake." 
Amos5:12 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti zolakwa zanu nzochuluka, ndi machimo anu ndi olimba, inu akusautsa olungama, akulandira chokometsera mlandu, akukankha osowa kuchipata." 
Amos5:13 Chifukwa chake wochenjerayo akhala chete nthawi yomweyo; pakuti ndiyo nthawi yoipa. 
Amos5:14 Funani chokoma, si choipa ai; kuti mukhale ndi moyo; motero Yehova Mulungu wa makamu adzakhala ndi inu, monga munena." 
Amos5:15 Danani nacho choipa, nimukonde chokoma; nimukhazikitse chiweruzo kuchipata; kapena Yehova Mulungu wa makamu adzachitira chifundo otsala a Yosefe." 
Amos5:16 Chifukwa chake atero Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, Ambuye, M'makwalala onse mudzakhala kulira, ndi m'miseu yonse adzati, Kalanga ine! Kalanga ine! Nadzaitana wakumunda adze kumaliro, ndi odziwa maliridwe a nthetemya alire." 
Amos5:17 Ndi m'minda yonse yamipesa mudzakhala kulira, pakuti ndipita pakati pako, ati Yehova." 
Amos5:18 Tsoka inu akufuna tsiku la Yehova? Mudzapindulanji nalo tsiku la Yehova? Ndilo mdima, si kuunika ai." 
Amos5:19 Kudzakhala monga munthu akathawa mkango, ndi chimbalangondo chikomana naye; kapena akalowa m'nyumba, natsamira kukhoma ndi dzanja lake, nimluma njoka." 
Amos5:20 Kodi tsiku la Yehova silidzakhala la mdima, si la kuunika ai? Lakuda bii, lopanda kuwala m'menemo?" 
Amos5:21 Ndidana nao, ndinyoza zikondwerero zanu, sindidzakondwera nao masonkhano anu oletsa." 
Amos5:22 Inde, mungakhale mupereka kwa Ine nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi nsembe zaufa, sindidzazilandira Ine; ndi nsembe zoyamika za ng'ombe zanu zonenepa, sindidzazisamalira Ine." 
Amos5:23 Mundichotsere phokoso la nyimbo zanu; sindifuna kumva mayimbidwe a zisakasa zanu. 
Amos5:24 Koma chiweruzo chiyende ngati madzi, ndi chilungamo ngati mtsinje wosefuka." 
Amos5:25 Ngati munabwera nazo kwa Ine nsembe zophera ndi zaufa zaka makumi anai m'chipululu, inu nyumba ya Israele?" 
Amos5:26 Inde mwasenza hema wa mfumu yanu, ndi tsinde la mafano anu, nyenyezi ya mulungu wanu, amene mudadzipangira." 
Amos5:27 M'mwemo ndidzakutengani kunka nanu kundende kutsogolo kwa Damasiko, ati Yehova, amene dzina lake ndiye Mulungu wa makamu." 
Amos6:1 Tsoka osalabadirawo m'Ziyoni, ndi iwo okhazikika m'phiri la Samariya, ndiwo anthu omveka a mtundu woposa wa anthu, amene nyumba ya Israele iwafikira!" 
Amos6:2 Pitani ku Kaline, nimuone; kuchokera komweko mupite ku Hamati wamkulu mutsikire ku Gati wa Afilisti; kodi awo ndi okoma koposa maufumu ano? Kapena malire ao aposa malire anu?" 
Amos6:3 Inu akutalikitsa tsiku loipa, ndi kusendeza pafupi mpando wachiwawa;" 
Amos6:4 ogona pamakama aminyanga, nadzithinula pa maguwa ao ogonapo, nadya anaankhosa a kuzoweta, ndi anaang'ombe ochoka pakati pa khola;" 
Amos6:5 akungoimba kutsata maliridwe a zeze, nadzilingiririra zoimbira nazo ngati Davide;" 
Amos6:6 akumwera vinyo m'zipanda, nadzidzoza ndi mafuta abwino oposa, osagwidwa chisoni ndi kuthyoka kwa Yosefe." 
Amos6:7 Chifukwa chake tsono, adzatengedwa ndende ndi oyamba kutengedwa ndende; ndi phokoso la iwo odzithinula lidzapita." 
Amos6:8 Ambuye Yehova walumbira pali Iye mwini, ati Yehova Mulungu wa makamu, Ndinyansidwa nako kudzikuza kwa Yakobo, ndidana nazo nyumba zake zachifumu; m'mwemo ndidzapereka mudzi, ndi zonse zili m'menemo." 
Amos6:9 Ndipo kudzachitika, mukatsala amuna khumi m'nyumba imodzi, adzafa." 
Amos6:10 Ndipo mbale wake wa munthu akamnyamula, ndiye womtentha, kutulutsa mafupa m'nyumba, nakati kwa iye ali m'kati mwa nyumbamo, Atsala wina nawe kodi? Nakati Iai; pamenepo adzati, Khala chete; pakuti sitingatchule dzina la Yehova." 
Amos6:11 Pakuti taonani, Yehova walamulira, nadzakantha nyumba yaikulu ichite mpata, ndi nyumba yaing'ono ichite mindala." 
Amos6:12 Kodi akavalo adzathamanga pathanthwe? Kodi adzalimako ndi ng'ombe pakuti mwasanduliza chiweruzo chikhale ndulu, ndi chipatso cha chilungamo chikhale chivumulo;" 
Amos6:13 inu okondwera nacho chopanda pake, ndi kuti, Kodi sitinadzilimbitsa tokha ndi kulanda Karinaimu mwa mphamvu yathuyathu?" 
Amos6:14 Pakuti taonani, ndidzakuutsirani mtundu wa anthu, nyumba ya Israele, ati Yehova Mulungu wa makamu; ndipo adzakupsinjani kuyambira polowera ku Hamati kufikira mtsinje wa kuchidikha." 
Amos7:1 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa chotere; ndipo taonani, anaumba dzombe, poyamba kuphuka kwa udzu a chibwereza; ndipo taonani, ndicho chibwereza atawasengera mfumu." 
Amos7:2 Ndipo kunachitika m'mene lidatha kudya msipu wa dziko, ndinati, Ambuye Yehova, khululukiranitu Yakobo; adzakhala chilili bwanji? Popeza ndiye wamng'ono." 
Amos7:3 Ndipo Yehova anachileka. Sichidzachitika, ati Yehova." 
Amos7:4 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa chotere; ndipo taonani, Ambuye Yehova anaitana kuti atsutse ndi moto; ndipo unanyambita chakuya chachikulu ukadanyambitanso dziko." 
Amos7:5 Pamenepo ndinati, Ambuye Yehova, lekanitu; Yakobo adzakhala chilili bwanji? Pakuti ali wamng'ono." 
Amos7:6 Ndipo Yehova anachileka. Ichi chomwe sichidzachitika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Amos7:7 Anandionetsa chotere; ndipo taonani, Ambuye anaima pa khoma lomangidwa ndi chingwe cholungamitsira chilili; ndi chingwe cholungamitsira chilili m'dzanja lake." 
Amos7:8 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Amosi, uona chiyani? Ndipo ndinati, Chingwe cholungamitsira chilili. Nati Ambuye, Taona, ndidzaika chingwe cholungamitsira chilili pakati pa anthu anga Israele, sindidzawalekanso:" 
Amos7:9 ndi misanje ya Isaki idzakhala bwinja; ndi malo opatulika a Israele adzapasuka; ndipo ndidzaukira nyumba ya Yerobowamu ndi lupanga. 
Amos7:10 Pamenepo Amaziya wansembe wa ku Betele anatumiza kwa Yerobowamu mfumu ya Israele, ndi kuti, Amosi wapangira inu chiwembu pakati pa nyumba ya Israele; dziko silikhoza kulola mau ake onse." 
Amos7:11 Pakuti atero Amosi, Yerobowamu adzafa ndi lupanga, ndi Israele adzatengedwadi ndende, kuchoka m'dziko lake." 
Amos7:12 Amaziya anatinso kwa Amosi, Mlauli iwe, choka, thawira kudziko la Yuda, nudye, nunenere komweko;" 
Amos7:13 koma usaneneranso ku Betele; pakuti pamenepo mpa malo opatulika a mfumu, ndiyo nyumba yachifumu." 
Amos7:14 Pamenepo Amosi anayankha, nati kwa Amaziya, Sindinali mneneri, kapena mwana wa mneneri, koma ndinali woweta ng'ombe, ndi wakutchera nkhuyu;" 
Amos7:15 ndipo Yehova ananditenga ndilikutsata nkhosa, nati kwa ine Yehova, Muka, nenera kwa anthu anga Israele." 
Amos7:16 Chifukwa chake tsono, tamvera mau a Yehova, Iwe ukuti, Usamanenera chotsutsana ndi Israele, usadonthetsa mau akutsutsana ndi nyumba ya Isaki;" 
Amos7:17 chifukwa chake atero Yehova, Mkazi wako adzakhala wadama m'mudzi, ndi ana ako aamuna ndi aakazi adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi dziko lako lidzagawanidwa ndi kuyesa chingwe, ndi iwe mwini udzafa m'dziko lodetsedwa; ndipo Israele adzatengedwadi ndende kuchoka m'dziko lake." 
Amos8:1 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa chotere; ndipo taonani, dengu la zipatso zamalimwe." 
Amos8:2 Ndipo anati, Amosi uona chiyani? Ndipo ndinati, Dengu la zipatso zamalimwe. Nati Yehova kwa ine, Chitsiriziro chafikira anthu anga Israele, sindidzawalekanso." 
Amos8:3 Koma nyimbo za ku Kachisi zidzasanduka kubuma tsiku ilo, ati Ambuye Yehova; mitembo idzachuluka; adzaitaya paliponse padzakhala zii." 
Amos8:4 Tamverani ichi, inu akumeza aumphawi, ndi kuwatha ofatsa m'dziko, ndi kuti," 
Amos8:5 Mwezi wokhala upita liti, kuti tigulitse dzinthu? Ndi Sabata, kuti titsegulire tirigu? Ndi kuchepsa efa, ndi kukulitsa sekeli, ndi kuchenjerera nayo miyeso yonyenga;" 
Amos8:6 kuti tigule osauka ndi ndalama, ndi aumphawi ndi nsapato, ndi kugulitsa nsadwa za tirigu." 
Amos8:7 Yehova walumbira pali kudzikuza kwa Yakobo, Ngati ndidzaiwala konse ntchito zao zilizonse?" 
Amos8:8 Kodi dziko silidzanjenjemera chifukwa cha ichi, ndi kulira aliyense wokhalamo? Inde lidzakwera lonseli ngati madzi a m'mtsinje; lidzagwezeka, ndi kutsikanso ngati mtsinje wa Ejipito." 
Amos8:9 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndidzalowetsa dzuwa usana, ndi kudetsa dziko pausana poyera." 
Amos8:10 Ndipo ndidzasanduliza zikondwerero zanu zikhale maliro, ndi nyimbo zanu zikhale za maliro, ndi kufikitsa ziguduli m'chuuno monse, ndi mpala pa mutu uliwonse; nadzakhala ngati maliro a mwana mmodzi yekha, ndi chitsiriziro chake ngati tsiku lowawa." 
Amos8:11 Taonani, akudza masiku, ati Ambuye Yehova, akuti ndidzatumiza njala m'dzikomo, si njala ya mkate kapena ludzu la madzi, koma njala ya kumva mau a Yehova." 
Amos8:12 Ndipo adzayendayenda peyupeyu kuyambira kunyanja kufikira kunyanja ndi kuyambira kumpoto kufikira kum'mawa; adzathamangathamanga kufunafuna mau a Yehova, koma osawapeza." 
Amos8:13 Tsiku lomwelo anamwali okongola ndi anyamata adzakomoka nalo ludzu. 
Amos8:14 Iwo akulumbira ndi kutchula tchimo la Samariya, ndi kuti, Pali Mulungu wako, Dani; ndipo, Pali moyo wa njira ya ku Beereseba, iwowa adzagwa, osaukanso konse." 
Amos9:1 Ndinaona Ambuye alikuima pa guwa la nsembe, nati Iye, Kantha mitu ya nsanamira, kuti ziundo zigwedezeke; nuphwanye mitu yao yonse; ndipo ndidzapha otsiriza ao ndi lupanga; wothawayo mwa iwo sadzathawadi, ndi wopulumukayo mwa iwo sadzapulumukadi." 
Amos9:2 Angakhale akumba mpaka kunsi kwa manda, dzanja langa lidzawatenga kumeneko; angakhale akwera kumwamba, ndidzawatsitsa komweko." 
Amos9:3 Angakhale abisala pamwamba pa Karimele, ndidzawapwaira ndi kuwatenga komweko; angakhale abisala pamaso panga pansi pa nyanja, kumeneko ndidzalamulira njoka, ndipo idzawaluma." 
Amos9:4 Angakhale alowa ndende pamaso pa adani ao, kumeneko ndidzalamulira lupanga, ndipo lidzawapha; ndipo ndidzayang'anitsa maso anga kwa iwowa, kuwachitira choipa, si chokoma ai." 
Amos9:5 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova wa makamu ndiye amene akhudza dziko, nilisungunuka; ndi onse okhalamo adzachita maliro; ndipo lidzakwera lonseli ngati madzi a m'nyanja; nilidzatsikanso ngati nyanja ya m'Ejipito;" 
Amos9:6 ndiye amene amanga zipinda zake zosanja m'mwamba, nakhazika tsindwi lake pa dziko lapansi; Iye amene aitana madzi a m'nyanja, nawatsanulira padziko; dzina lake ndiye Yehova." 
Amos9:7 Kodi simukhala kwa Ine ngati ana a Kusi, inu ana a Israele? Ati Yehova. Sindinakweza Israele ndine, kumtulutsa m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi Afilisti ku Kafitori, ndi Aaramu ku Kiri?" 
Amos9:8 Taonani, maso a Ambuye Yehova ali pa ufumu wochimwawo, ndipo ndidzauononga kuuchotsa pa dziko lapansi; pokhapo sindidzaononga nyumba ya Yakobo kuitha konse, ati Yehova." 
Amos9:9 Pakuti taonani, ndidzalamulira, ndipo ndidzapeta nyumba ya Israele mwa amitundu onse, monga apeta tirigu m'lichero; koma silidzagwa pansi diso, ndi limodzi lonse." 
Amos9:10 Ochimwa onse a anthu anga adzafa ndi lupanga, ndiwo amene akuti, Choipa sichidzatipeza, kapena kutidulira." 
Amos9:11 Tsiku lomwelo ndidzautsa msasa wa Davide udagwawo, ndi kukonzanso zopasuka zake; ndipo ndidzautsa zogumuka zake, ndi kuumanga monga masiku a kalelo;" 
Amos9:12 kuti alandire otsala a Edomu akhale cholowa chao, ndi amitundu onse a kutchedwa dzina langa, ati Yehova wakuchita izi." 
Amos9:13 Taonani, akudza masiku, ati Yehova, akuti wolima adzapezana ndi wodula, ndi woponda mphesa adzapezana ndi wofetsa, ndi mapiri adzakhetsa vinyo watsopano, ndi zitunda zonse zidzasungunuka." 
Amos9:14 Ndipo ndidzabwezanso undende wa anthu anga Israele, ndipo adzamanganso mabwinja, ndi kukhala m'menemo; nadzaoka minda ya mipesa nadzamwa vinyo wake, nadzalima minda ndi kudya zipatso zake." 
Amos9:15 Ndipo ndidzawaoka m'dziko mwao ndipo sadzazulidwanso m'dziko lao limene ndawapatsa, ati Yehova Mulungu wako." 
Obadiah1:1 Masomphenya a Obadiya. Atero Ambuye Yehova za Edomu: Tamva mbiri yochokera kwa Yehova, ndi mthenga wotumidwa mwa amitundu, ndi kuti, Nyamukani, timuukire kumthira nkhondo." 
Obadiah1:2 Taona, ndakuika wamng'ono mwa amitundu; unyozedwa kwambiri." 
Obadiah1:3 Kudzikuza kwa mtima wako kwakunyenga, iwe wokhala m'mapanga a thanthwe, iwe pokhala pako pamwamba, wakunena m'mtima mwake, Adzanditsitsira pansi ndani?" 
Obadiah1:4 Chinkana ukwera pamwamba penipeni ngati chiombankhanga, chinkana chisanja chako chisanjika pakati pa nyenyezi, ndidzakutsitsa kumeneko, ati Yehova." 
Obadiah1:5 Akakudzera akuba, kapena mbala usiku, (Ha! Waonongeka) sadzaba mpaka adzakhuta kodi? Akakudzera akutchera mphesa sadzasiya khunkha kodi?" 
Obadiah1:6 Ha! Za Esau zasanthulidwa; ha! Zobisika zake zafunidwa. 
Obadiah1:7 Anthu onse a akupangana nawe anakuperekeza mpaka pamalire; anthu okhala ndi mtendere nawe anakunyenga, nakuposa mphamvu; iwo akudya chakudya chako akutchera msampha pansi pako; mulibe nzeru mwa iye." 
Obadiah1:8 Ati Yehova, Kodi sindidzaononga tsiku lija anzeru mwa Edomu, ndi luntha m'phiri la Esau?" 
Obadiah1:9 Ndipo amuna anu amphamvu adzatenga nkhawa, Temani iwe, kuti onse aonongeke m'phiri la Edomu, ndi kuphedwa." 
Obadiah1:10 Chifukwa cha chiwawa unamchitira mphwako Yakobo, udzakutidwa ndi manyazi, nudzaonongeka kunthawi yonse." 
Obadiah1:11 Tsiku lija unaima padera, tsiku lija alendo anagwira ndende makamu ake, nalowa m'zipata zake achilendo, nachitira Yerusalemu maere, iwenso unakhala ngati mmodzi wa iwowa." 
Obadiah1:12 Koma usapenyerera tsiku la mphwako, tsiku loyesedwa mlendo iye, nusasekerere ana a Yuda tsiku la kuonongeka kwao, kapena kuseka chikhakha tsiku lakupsinjika." 
Obadiah1:13 Usalowe m'mudzi wa anthu anga tsiku la tsoka lao, kapena kupenyerera iwe choipa chao tsiku la tsoka lao, kapena kuthira manja khamu lao tsiku la tsoka lao." 
Obadiah1:14 Ndipo usaime pamphambano kuononga opulumuka ake; kapena kupereka otsala ake tsiku lakupsinjika. 
Obadiah1:15 Pakuti tsiku la Yehova layandikira amitundu onse; monga unachita iwe, momwemo adzakuchitira; chochita iwe chidzakubwerera pamtu pako." 
Obadiah1:16 Pakuti monga munamwa pa phiri langa lopatulika, momwemo amitundu onse adzamwa kosalekeza; inde adzamwa, nadzameza, nadzakhala monga ngati sanalipo." 
Obadiah1:17 Koma m'phiri la Ziyoni mudzakhala opulumuka, ndipo lidzakhala lopatulika; ndi a nyumba ya Yakobo adzakhala nazo zolowa zao." 
Obadiah1:18 Ndipo nyumba ya Yakobo idzakhala moto, ndi nyumba ya Yosefe lawi, ndi nyumba ya Esau ngati chiputu, ndipo adzawatentha pakati pao, ndi kuwapsereza; ndipo sadzakhalapo otsalira nyumba ya Esau; pakuti Yehova wanena." 
Obadiah1:19 Ndipo akumwera adzakhala nalo phiri la Esau cholowa chao; ndi iwo a kuchidikha adzakhala nalo dziko la Afilisti; ndipo adzakhala nayo minda ya Efuremu, ndi minda ya Samariya cholowa chao; ndi Benjamini adzakhala nalo la Giliyadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Ndipo andende a khamu ili la ana a Israele, okhala mwa Akanani, adzakhala nacho cholowa chao mpaka pa Zarefati; ndi andende a ku Yerusalemu okhala m'Sefaradi adzakhala nayo midzi ya kumwera, cholowa chao." 
Obadiah1:21 Ndipo apulumutsi adzakwera pa phiri la Ziyoni kuweruza phiri la Esau; ndipo ufumu udzakhala wake wa Yehova. 
Jonah1:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yona mwana wa Amitai, ndi kuti," 
Jonah1:2 Nyamuka, pita ku Ninive, mudzi waukuluwo, nulalikire motsutsana nao; pakuti choipa chao chandikwerera pamaso panga." 
Jonah1:3 Koma Yona ananyamuka kuti athawire ku Tarisisi, kuzemba Yehova; ndipo anatsikira ku Yopa, napezako chombo chomuka ku Tarisisi, napereka ndalama zake, natsikira m'menemo, kuti apite nao ku Tarisisi kuzemba Yehova." 
Jonah1:4 Koma Yehova anautsa chimphepo chachikulu panyanja, ndipo panali namondwe wamkulu panyanja, ndi chombo chikadasweka." 
Jonah1:5 Pamenepo amalinyero anachita mantha, nafuulira yense kwa mulungu wake, naponya m'nyanja akatundu anali m'chombo kuchipepuza. Koma Yona adatsikira m'munsi mwa chombo, nagona tulo tofa nato." 
Jonah1:6 Ndipo mwini chombo anadza kwa iye, nanena naye, Utani iwe wam'tulo? Uka, itana Mulungu wako, kapena Mulunguyo adzatikumbukira tingatayike." 
Jonah1:7 Ndipo anati yense kwa mnzake, Tiyeni tichite maere, kuti tidziwe choipa ichi chatigwera chifukwa cha yani. M'mwemo anachita maere, ndipo maere anagwera Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Pamenepo anati kwa iye, Utiuzetu choipa ichi chatigwera chifukwa cha yani? Ntchito yako njotani? Ufumu kuti? Dziko lako nliti? Nanga mtundu wako?" 
Jonah1:9 Ndipo ananena nao, Ndine Muhebri, ndiopa Yehova Mulungu wa Kumwamba, amene analenga nyanja ndi mtunda." 
Jonah1:10 Pamenepo amunawo anaopa kwambiri, nati kwa iye, Ichi nchiyani wachichita? Pakuti amunawo anadziwa kuti anathawa pamaso pa Yehova, popeza adawauza." 
Jonah1:11 Tsono anati kwa iye, Tichitenji nawe, kuti nyanja itichitire bata? Popeza namondwe anakulakulabe panyanja." 
Jonah1:12 Ndipo anati nao, Mundinyamule ndi kundiponya m'nyanja, momwemo nyanja idzachitira inu bata; pakuti ndidziwa kuti namondwe wamkulu amene wakugwerani chifukwa cha ine." 
Jonah1:13 Koma amunawo anapalasa kubwerera kumtunda, koma sanathe; pakuti namondwe wa panyanja anakulakula mokomana nao." 
Jonah1:14 Pamenepo anafuulira kwa Yehova, nati, Tikupemphanitu, Yehova, tisatayike chifukwa cha moyo wa munthu uyu, musatisenzetse mwazi wosachimwa; pakuti, Inu Yehova, mwachita monga mudakomera Inu." 
Jonah1:15 Momwemo ananyamula Yona, namponya m'nyanja; ndipo nyanja inaleka kukokoma kwake." 
Jonah1:16 Ndipo amunawo anaopa Yehova ndi mantha akulu, namphera Yehova nsembe, nawinda." 
Jonah1:17 Koma Yehova anaikiratu chinsomba chachikulu chimeze Yona; ndipo Yona anali m'mimba mwa nsombayi masiku atatu usana ndi usiku. 
Jonah2:1 Pamenepo Yona anapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wake ali m'mimba mwa nsombayo. 
Jonah2:2 Ndipo anati, Ndinaitana Yehova m'nsautso yanga, ndipo anandiyankha ine; ndinafuula ndili m'mimba ya manda, ndipo munamva mau anga." 
Jonah2:3 Pakuti munandiponya mwakuya m'kati mwa nyanja, ndipo madzi anandizinga; mafunde anu onse a nyondonyondo anandimiza." 
Jonah2:4 Ndipo ndinati, Ndatayika ndichoke pamaso panu; koma ndidzapenyanso Kachisi wanu wopatulika." 
Jonah2:5 Madzi anandizinga mpaka moyo wanga, madzi akuya anandizungulira, kayandeyande wa m'nyanja anandikulunga mutu." 
Jonah2:6 Ndinatsikira kumatsinde a mapiri, mipingiridzo ya dziko inanditsekereza kosatha; koma munandikwezera moyo wanga kuuchotsa kuchionongeko, Yehova Mulungu wanga." 
Jonah2:7 Pokomoka moyo wanga m'kati mwanga ndinakumbukira Yehova; ndi pemphero langa linafikira Inu m'Kachisi wanu wopatulika. 
Jonah2:8 Iwo osamalira mabodza opanda pake ataya chifundo chaochao. 
Jonah2:9 Koma ine ndidzakupherani Inu nsembe ndi mau akuyamika, ndidzakwaniritsa chowinda changa. Chipulumutso ncha Yehova." 
Jonah2:10 Pamenepo Yehova analankhula ndi nsombayo, ndipo inamsanzira Yona kumtunda." 
Jonah3:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yona nthawi yachiwiri, ndi kuti," 
Jonah3:2 Nyamuka, pita ku Ninive mudzi waukulu uja, nuulalikire uthenga umene ndikuuza." 
Jonah3:3 Ndipo Yona ananyamuka, napita ku Ninive, monga mwa mau a Yehova. Koma Ninive ndiwo mudzi waukulu pamaso pa Yehova, wa ulendo wa masiku atatu." 
Jonah3:4 Ndipo Yona anayamba kulowa mudziwo ulendo wa tsiku limodzi, nalalikira, nati, Atsala masiku makumi anai ndipo Ninive adzapasuka." 
Jonah3:5 Ndipo anthu a Ninive anakhulupirira Mulungu, nalalikira chosala, navala chiguduli, kuyambira wamkulu kufikira wamng'ono wa iwowa." 
Jonah3:6 Pakuti mau awa anafikira mfumu ya Ninive, ndipo inanyamuka kumpando wake wachifumu, nivula chofunda chake, nifunda chiguduli, nikhala m'maphulusa." 
Jonah3:7 Ndipo analalikira, nanena m'Ninive mwa lamulo la mfumu ndi nduna zake, ndi kuti, Ngakhale munthu kapena nyama, ngakhale ng'ombe kapena nkhosa, zisalawe kanthu, zisadye, zisamwe madzi;" 
Jonah3:8 koma zifundidwe ndi chiguduli munthu ndi nyama, nizifuulire kolimba kwa Mulungu; ndipo abwere yense kuleka njira yake yoipa, ndi chiwawa chili m'manja mwake." 
Jonah3:9 Kaya, akatembenuka Mulungu, ndi kuleka kubwera ku mkwiyo wake waukali, kuti tisatayike." 
Jonah3:10 Ndipo Mulungu anaona ntchito zao, kuti anabwera kuleka njira yao yoipa; ndipo Mulungu analeka choipa adanenachi kuti adzawachitira, osachichita." 
Jonah4:1 Koma sikudakomera Yona konse, ndipo anapsa mtima." 
Jonah4:2 Ndipo anapemphera kwa Yehova, nati, Ha, Yehova! Si ndiwo mau anga ndikali m'dziko langa? Chifukwa chake ndinafulumira kuthawira ku Tarisisi, pakuti ndinadziwa kuti Inu ndinu Mulungu wachisomo ndi wodzala chifundo, wolekerera ndi wokoma mtima mochuluka, ndi woleka choipacho." 
Jonah4:3 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova, mundichotseretu moyo wanga, kundikomera ine kufa, osakhala ndi moyo ai." 
Jonah4:4 Ndipo Yehova anati, Uyenera kupsa mtima kodi?" 
Jonah4:5 Pamenepo Yona anatuluka m'mudzi, nakhala pansi kum'mawa kwa mudzi, nadzimangira komweko thandala, nakhala pansi pake mumthunzi mpaka adzaona chochitikira mudzi." 
Jonah4:6 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaikiratu msatsi, naumeretsera Yona, uchite mthunzi pamutu pake, kumlanditsa m'nsautso yake. Ndipo Yona anakondwera kwambiri chifukwa cha msatsiwo." 
Jonah4:7 Koma Mulungu anauikira mphanzi pakucha m'mawa mwake, ndiyo inadya msatsi, nufota." 
Jonah4:8 Ndipo kunali, potuluka dzuwa Mulungu anaika mphepo ya kum'mawa yotentha, ndipo dzuwa linatentha mutu wake wa Yona, nalefuka iye, nadzipempherera kuti afe; nati, Kundikomera ine kufa, kukhala ndi moyo ai." 
Jonah4:9 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Yona, Uyenera kodi kupsa mtima chifukwa cha msatsiwo? Nati iye, Ee, kundiyenera ine kupsa mtima mpaka imfa." 
Jonah4:10 Ndipo Yehova anati, Unachitira chifundo msatsiwo umene sunagwirapo ntchito, kapena kuumeretsa, umene unamera usiku, nutha usiku;" 
Jonah4:11 ndipo sindiyenera Ine kodi kuchitira chifundo Ninive mudzi waukulu uwu; m'mene muli anthu oposa zikwi zana limodzi mphambu zikwi makumi awiri osadziwa kusiyanitsa pakati pa dzanja lao lamanja ndi lamanzere, ndi zoweta zambiri zomwe?" 
Micah1:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Mika wa ku Moreseti masiku a Yotamu, Ahazi, ndi Hezekiya, mafumu a Yuda, amene adaona za Samariya ndi Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:2 Imvani, mitundu ya anthu, inu nonse; tamvera, dziko lapansi, ndi zonse zili m'mwemo; ndipo Ambuye Yehova akhale mboni yakutsutsa inu, Ambuye m'Kachisi wake wopatulika." 
Micah1:3 Pakuti, taonani, Yehova alikutuluka m'malo mwake, nadzatsika, nadzaponda pa misanje ya dziko lapansi." 
Micah1:4 Ndi mapiri adzasungunuka pansi pa Iye, ndi zigwa zidzang'ambika, ngati sera pamoto, ngati madzi otsanulidwa potsetseremba." 
Micah1:5 Chichitika ichi chonse chifukwa cha kulakwa kwa Yakobo, ndi machimo a nyumba ya Israele. Kulakwa kwa Yakobo nkotani? Si ndiko Samariya? Ndi misanje ya Yuda ndi iti? Si ndiyo Yerusalemu?" 
Micah1:6 Chifukwa chake ndidzaika Samariya ngati mulu wa miyala ya m'munda, ngati zooka m'munda wamphesa; ndipo ndidzataya miyala yake m'chigwa, ndi kufukula maziko ake." 
Micah1:7 Ndi mafano ake osema onse adzaphwanyika, ndi mphotho zake zonse zidzatenthedwa ndi moto, ndi mafano ake onse ndidzawapasula; pakuti anazisonkhanitsa pa mphotho ya mkazi wachiwerewere, ndipo zidzabwerera kumphotho ya mkazi wachiwerewere." 
Micah1:8 Chifukwa cha ichi ndidzachita maliro, ndi kuchema, ndidzayenda wolandidwa ndi wamaliseche; ndidzalira ngati nkhandwe, ndi kubuma ngati nthiwatiwa." 
Micah1:9 Pakuti mabala ake ndi osapola; pakuti afikira ku Yuda; afikira ku chipata cha anthu anga, ku Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:10 Musachifotokoza m'Gati, musalira misozi konse; m'nyumba ya Afira ndinagubuduka m'fumbi." 
Micah1:11 Pitiratu, wokhala m'Safiri iwe, wamaliseche ndi wamanyazi; wokhala m'Zanani sanatuluke; maliro a Betezele adzakulandani pokhala pake." 
Micah1:12 Pakuti wokhala m'Maroti alindira chokoma, popeza choipa chatsika kwa Yehova kunka kuchipata cha Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:13 Manga galeta kukavalo waliwiro, wokhala m'Lakisi iwe, woyamba kuchimwitsa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni ndi iye; pakuti zolakwa za Israele zinapezedwa mwa iwe." 
Micah1:14 Chifukwa chake pereka mphatso zolawirana kwa Moreseti-Gati; nyumba za Akizibu zidzakhala chinthu chabodza kwa mafumu a Israele. 
Micah1:15 Ndidzakutengeranso wokhala m'Maresa iwe, iye amene adzakulandira ukhale cholowa chake; ulemerero wa Israele udzafikira ku Adulamu." 
Micah1:16 Udziyeseze wadazi, udzimete wekha chifukwa cha ana ako okondwera nao; kuza dazi lako ngati la muimba; pakuti anakuchokera, nalowa ndende." 
Micah2:1 Tsoka iwo akulingirira chinyengo, ndi kukonza choipa pakama pao! Kutacha m'mawa achichita, popeza chikhozeka m'manja mwao." 
Micah2:2 Ndipo akhumbira minda, nailanda; ngakhale nyumba, nazichotsa; asautsa mwamuna ndi nyumba yake, inde munthu ndi cholowa chake."
