Micah2:3 Chifukwa chake atero Yehova, Taonani, ndilingirira choipa pa banja ili, chimene simudzachotsako makosi anu, kapena kuyenda modzikuza inu; pakuti nyengo iyi ndi yoipa." 
Micah2:4 Tsiku ilo adzanena fanizo lakunena inu, nadzalira maliro olemerera, ndi kuti, Tapasuka konse; iye asintha gawo la anthu anga; ha! Andichotsera ili! Agawira opikisana minda yathu." 
Micah2:5 Chifukwa chake udzasowa woponya chingwe chamaere m'msonkhano wa Yehova. 
Micah2:6 Musamanenera, amanenera ati. Sadzanenera kwa awa; matonzo sadzachoka." 
Micah2:7 Kodi adzati, Nyumba ya Yakobo iwe, Mzimu wa Yehova waperewera kodi? Izi ndi ntchito zake kodi? Mau anga samchitira zokoma kodi, iye amene ayenda choongoka?" 
Micah2:8 Koma ngakhale dzulo anthu anga anauka ngati mdani; mukwatula chofunda kumalaya a iwo opitirira mosatekeseka, ngati anthu osafuna nkhondo." 
Micah2:9 Muwataya akazi a anthu anga kunja kwa nyumba zao zokondweretsa; muchotsa ulemerero wanga kwa ana ao kosatha. 
Micah2:10 Nyamukani, chokani, pakuti popumula panu si pano ai; chifukwa cha udyo wakuononga ndi chionongeko chachikulu." 
Micah2:11 Munthu akayenda ndi mtima wachinyengo ndi kunama, ndi kuti, Ndidzanenera kwa iwe za vinyo ndi chakumwa chakuledzeretsa; iye ndiye mneneri wa anthu ake." 
Micah2:12 Ndidzakumemezani ndithu, Yakobo, inu nonse; ndidzasonkhanitsa ndithu otsala a Israele; ndidzawaika pamodzi ngati nkhosa za ku Bozira; ngati zoweta pakati pa busa pao adzachita phokoso chifukwa cha kuchuluka anthu." 
Micah2:13 Wothyola wakwera pamaso pao; iwo anathyola, napita kuchipata, natuluka pomwepo; ndi mfumu yao yapita pamaso pao, ndipo Yehova awatsogolera." 
Micah3:1 Ndipo ndinati, Imvanitu, inu akulu a Yakobo, ndi oweruza a nyumba ya Israele; simuyenera kodi kudziwa chiweruzo?" 
Micah3:2 Inu amene mudana nacho chokoma ndi kukondana nacho choipa; inu akumyula khungu lao pathupi pao, ndi mnofu wao pa mafupa ao;" 
Micah3:3 inu amene mukudyanso mnofu wa anthu anga; ndi kusenda khungu lao ndi kuthyola mafupa ao; inde awaduladula ngati nyama yoti aphike, ndi ngati nyama ya mumphika." 
Micah3:4 Pamenepo adzafuulira kwa Yehova, koma sadzawayankha; inde, adzawabisira nkhope yake nthawi yomweyo, monga momwe anaipsa machitidwe ao." 
Micah3:5 Atero Yehova za aneneri akulakwitsa anthu anga; akuluma ndi mano ao, ndi kufuula, Mtendere; ndipo aliyense wosapereka m'kamwa mwao, amkonzera nkhondo;" 
Micah3:6 chifukwa chake kudzakhala ngati usiku kwa inu, wopanda masomphenya; ndipo kudzadera inu, wopanda kulosa; ndi dzuwa lidzalowera aneneri, ndi usana udzawadera bii." 
Micah3:7 Ndipo alauli adzachita manyazi, ndi olosa adzathedwa nzeru; ndipo onsewo adzasunama; pakuti kuyankha kwa Mulungu kulibe." 
Micah3:8 Koma ine ndidzala nayo mphamvu mwa Mzimu ya Yehova, ndi chiweruzo, ndi chamuna, kufotokozera Yakobo kulakwa kwake, ndi kwa Israele tchimo lake." 
Micah3:9 Tamvanitu ichi, akulu a nyumba ya Yakobo inu, ndi oweruza a nyumba ya Israele inu, akuipidwa nacho chiweruzo, ndi kupotoza zoongoka zonse." 
Micah3:10 Amanga Ziyoni ndi mwazi, ndi Yerusalemu ndi chisalungamo." 
Micah3:11 Akulu ake aweruza chifukwa cha mphotho, ndi ansembe ake aphunzitsa chifukwa cha malipo, ndi aneneri ake alosa chifukwa cha ndalama; koma atsamira pa Yehova, nati, Kodi Yehova sali pakati pa ife? Palibe choipa chodzatigwera." 
Micah3:12 Momwemo Ziyoni adzalimidwa ngati munda chifukwa cha inu, ndi m'Yerusalemu mudzasanduka miunda, ndi phiri la nyumba ngati misanje ya m'nkhalango." 
Micah4:1 Koma kudzachitika masiku otsiriza, kuti phiri la nyumba ya Yehova lidzakhazikika pamwamba pa mapiri, nilidzakuzika pamwamba pa zitunda; ndi mitundu ya anthu idzayendako." 
Micah4:2 Ndipo amitundu ambiri adzamuka, nadzati, Tiyeni, tikwere kuphiri la Yehova, ndi kunyumba ya Mulungu wa Yakobo; kuti Iye atiphunzitse njira zake, ndipo tidzayenda m'mabande ake; pakuti ku Ziyoni kudzatuluka chilamulo, ndi ku Yerusalemu mau a Yehova." 
Micah4:3 Ndipo Iye adzaweruza mwa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, nadzadzudzula amitundu amphamvu ali kutali; ndipo iwo adzasula malupanga ao akhale makasu, ndi mikondo yao ikhale zolimira, mtundu wa anthu sudzasamulira mtundu unzake lupanga, kapena kuphunziranso nkhondo." 
Micah4:4 Koma adzakhala munthu yense patsinde pa mpesa wake, ndi patsinde pa mkuyu wake; ndipo sipadzakhala wakuwaopsa; pakuti pakamwa pa Yehova wa makamu padanena." 
Micah4:5 Pakuti mitundu yonse ya anthu idzayenda, wonse m'dzina la mulungu wake, ndipo ife tidzayenda m'dzina la Yehova Mulungu wathu kunthawi yonka muyaya." 
Micah4:6 Tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, ndidzamemeza wakutsimphinayo, ndi kusonkhanitsa wopirikitsidwayo, ndi iye amene ndinamsautsa;" 
Micah4:7 ndipo wotsimphinayo ndidzamuyesa wotsala, ndi iye wotayidwa kutali mtundu wamphamvu; ndipo Yehova adzakhala mfumu yao m'phiri la Ziyoni kuyambira pamenepo kufikira kosatha." 
Micah4:8 Ndipo iwe, nsanja ya nkhosa, chitunda cha mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, udzafikira iwe, inde udzafika ulamuliro wakale, ufumu wa mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu." 
Micah4:9 Tsono ufuulitsa chifukwa ninji? Palibe mfumu mwa iwe kodi? Watayika kodi mu uphungu wako, kuti zowawa zakugwira ngati mkazi wobala?" 
Micah4:10 Imva zowawa, nuyesetse kubala, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, ngati mkazi wakubala; pakuti udzatuluka m'mudzi tsopano, nudzakhala kuthengo, nudzafika ku Babiloni; komweko udzapulumutsidwa; komweko Yehova adzakuombola m'manja a adani ako." 
Micah4:11 Ndipo tsopano amitundu ambiri asonkhana kuyambana nawe, akuti, Aipsidwe, diso lathu lipenye ku Ziyoni." 
Micah4:12 Koma sadziwa zolingirira za Yehova, kapena kuzindikira uphungu wake; pakuti anawasonkhanitsa ngati mitolo kudwale." 
Micah4:13 Nyamuka nupunthe, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; pakuti ndidzasanduliza nyanga yako ikhale yachitsulo, ndi ziboda zako zikhale zamkuwa; ndipo udzaphwanya mitundu yambiri ya anthu; ndipo uzipereka chiperekere phindu lao kwa Yehova, ndi chuma chao kwa Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Micah5:1 Uzisonkhana tsopano magulumagulu, mwana wamkazi wa magulu iwe; watimangira misasa, adzapanda woweruza wa Israele ndi ndodo patsaya." 
Micah5:2 Koma iwe, Betelehemu Efurata, ndiwe wamng'ono kuti ukhale mwa zikwi za Yuda, mwa iwe mudzanditulukira wina wakudzakhala woweruza m'Israele; matulukiro ake ndiwo a kale lomwe, kuyambira nthawi yosayamba." 
Micah5:3 Chifukwa chake Iye adzawapereka kufikira nthawi yoti wobalayo wabala; pamenepo otsala a abale ake adzabwera pamodzi ndi ana a Israele. 
Micah5:4 Ndipo adzaimirira, nadzadyetsa nkhosa zake mu mphamvu ya Yehova, m'ukulu wa dzina la Yehova Mulungu wake; ndipo iwo adzakhalabe; pakuti pamenepo Iye adzakhala wamkulu kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Micah5:5 Ndipo ameneyo adzakhala Mtendere; pamene a ku Asiriya adzalowa m'dziko lathu, ndi pamene adzaponda m'zinyumba zathu, tidzawaukitsira abusa asanu ndi awiri, ndi akalonga asanu ndi atatu." 
Micah5:6 Ndipo iwo adzatha dziko la Asiriya ndi lupanga, ndi dziko la Nimirodi, ndilo polowera pake; ndipo adzatilanditsa kwa a ku Asiriya pamene alowa m'dziko lathu, pamene aponda m'kati mwa malire athu." 
Micah5:7 Ndipo otsala a Yakobo adzakhala pakati pa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ngati mame ochokera kwa Yehova ngati mvula paudzu, yosachedwera munthu, yosalindira ana a anthu." 
Micah5:8 Ndipo otsala a Yakobo adzakhala mwa amitundu, pakati pa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ngati mkango mwa nyama zakuthengo, ngati msona wa mkango mwa magulu a nkhosa; umenewo ukapitako, upondereza, numwetula, ndipo palibe wakupulumutsa." 
Micah5:9 Dzanja lako likwezeke pamwamba pa iwo akuyambana nawe, ndi adani ako onse aonongeke." 
Micah5:10 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, ndidzaononga akavalo ako m'kati mwako, ndi kutha magaleta ako;" 
Micah5:11 ndipo ndidzaononga midzi ya m'dziko lako, ndi kupasula malinga ako onse;" 
Micah5:12 ndipo ndidzaononga zanyanga za m'dzanja lako; ndipo sudzakhalanso nao alosi; 
Micah5:13 ndidzaononganso mafano ako osema, ndi zoimiritsa zako pakati pako; ndipo sudzalambiranso ntchito za manja ako." 
Micah5:14 Ndipo ndidzazula zifanizo zako m'kati mwako, ndi kutha midzi yako." 
Micah5:15 Ndipo ndidzabwezera amitundu osamvera chilango mu mkwiyo waukali. 
Micah6:1 Tamverani tsono chonena Yehova: Nyamuka, tsutsana nao mapiri, ndi zitunda zimve mau ako." 
Micah6:2 Tamverani, mapiri inu, chitsutsano cha Yehova, ndi inu maziko olimba a dziko lapansi; pakuti Yehova ali nacho chitsutsano ndi anthu ake, ndipo adzatsutsana ndi Israele." 
Micah6:3 Anthu anga inu, ndakuchitirani chiyani? Ndakulemetsani ndi chiyani? Chitani umboni wonditsutsa." 
Micah6:4 Pakuti ndinakukwezani kukutulutsani m'dziko la Ejipito, ndi kuombola inu m'nyumba ya ukapolo; ndipo ndinatuma akutsogolereni Mose, Aroni, ndi Miriyamu." 
Micah6:5 Anthu anga, kumbukiranitu chofunsira Balaki mfumu ya Mowabu, ndi chomuyankha Balamu mwana wa Beori, kuyambira ku Sitimu kufikira ku Giligala; kuti mudziwe zolungama za Yehova." 
Micah6:6 Ndidzafika kwa Yehova ndi chinai, ndi kuwerama kwa Mulungu Wam'mwamba? Kodi ndifike kwa Iye ndi nsembe zopsereza, ndi anaang'ombe a chaka chimodzi?" 
Micah6:7 Kodi Yehova adzakondwera nazo nkhosa zamphongo zikwi, kapena ndi mitsinje ya mafuta zikwi khumi? Kodi ndipereke mwana wanga woyamba chifukwa cha kulakwa kwanga, chipatso cha thupi langa chifukwa cha kuchimwa kwa moyo wanga?" 
Micah6:8 Iye anakuuza, munthuwe, chomwe chili chokoma; ndipo Yehova afunanji nawe koma kuti uchite cholungama, ndi kukonda chifundo ndi kuyenda modzichepetsa ndi Mulungu wako." 
Micah6:9 Mau a Yehova aitana mudzi, ndi wanzeru aopa dzina lanu; tamverani ndodo, ndi Iye amene anaiika." 
Micah6:10 Kodi m'nyumba ya woipa mukali chuma chosalungama, ndi muyeso wochepa umene ayenera kuipidwa nao?" 
Micah6:11 Kodi ndikhoza kuyera ndi miyeso yoipa, ndi thumba la miyala yonyenga?" 
Micah6:12 Pakuti anthu ake olemera adzala ndi chiwawa, ndi okhalamo amanena bodza, ndi lilime lao limachita monyenga m'kamwa mwao." 
Micah6:13 Chifukwa chake Inenso ndakukantha ndi kukupweteketsa; ndakupulula chifukwa cha zochimwa zako. 
Micah6:14 Udzadya koma osakhuta; ndi njala yako idzakhala pakati pako; ndipo udzachotsa koma osalanditsa; ndi ichi wachilanditsa ndidzachipereka kulupanga. 
Micah6:15 Udzafesa koma osacheka; udzaponda azitona koma osadzola mafuta; udzaponda mphesa koma osamwa vinyo. 
Micah6:16 Pakuti asunga malemba a Omuri, ndi ntchito za nyumba ya Ahabu, ndipo mumayenda m'uphungu wao; kuti ndikusandulize bwinja, ndi okhalamo chotsonya; ndipo mudzasenza chitonzo cha anthu anga." 
Micah7:1 Kalanga ine! Pakuti ndikunga atapulula zipatso za m'mwamvu, atakunkha m'munda wamphesa; palibe mphesa zakudya; moyo wanga ukhumba nkhuyu yoyamba kupsa." 
Micah7:2 Watha wachifundo m'dziko, palibe woongoka mwa anthu; onsewo alalira mwazi; yense asaka mbale wake ndi ukonde." 
Micah7:3 Manja ao onse awiri agwira choipa kuchichita ndi changu; kalonga apempha, ndi woweruza aweruza chifukwa cha mphotho; ndi wamkuluyo angonena chosakaza moyo wake; ndipo achiluka pamodzi." 
Micah7:4 Wokoma wa iwo akunga mitungwi; woongoka wao aipa koposa mpanda waminga; tsiku la alonda ako la kulangidwa kwako lafika, tsopano kwafika kuthedwa nzeru kwao." 
Micah7:5 Musakhulupirira bwenzi, musatama bwenzi loyanja; usamtsegulire pakhomo pakamwa pako, ngakhale kwa iye wogona m'fukato mwako." 
Micah7:6 Pakuti mwana wamwamuna apeputsa atate, mwana wamkazi aukira amake, mpongozi aukira mpongozi wake; adani ake a munthu ndiwo a m'nyumba yake." 
Micah7:7 Koma ine, ndidzadikira Yehova; ndidzalindirira Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa; Mulungu wanga adzandimvera." 
Micah7:8 Usandiseka, mdani wangawe; pakugwa ine ndidzaukanso; pokhala ine mumdima Yehova adzakhala kuunika kwanga." 
Micah7:9 Ndidzasenza mkwiyo wa Yehova, chifukwa ndamchimwira, mpaka andinenera mlandu wanga, ndi kundiweruzira mlandu wanga; adzanditulutsira kwa kuunika, ndipo ndidzapenya chilungamo chake." 
Micah7:10 Pamenepo mdani wanga adzachiona, ndi manyazi adzamkuta iye amene adati kwa ine, Ali kuti Yehova Mulungu wako? Maso anga adzamuona; tsopano adzampondereza ngati thope la m'miseu." 
Micah7:11 Tsiku lakumanga malinga ako, tsiku lomwelo lembalo lidzachotsedwa kunka kutali." 
Micah7:12 Tsiku lomwelo adzadza kwa iwe, kuchokera ku Asiriya ndi midzi ya ku Ejipito, kuyambira ku Ejipito kufikira ku Mtsinje, ndi kuyambira kunyanja kufikira kunyanja, ndi kuyambira kuphiri kufikira kuphiri." 
Micah7:13 Koma dziko lidzakhala labwinja chifukwa cha iwo okhalamo, mwa zipatso za machitidwe ao." 
Micah7:14 Mudyetse anthu anu ndi ndodo yanu, nkhosa za cholowa chanu zokhala pa zokha m'nkhalango pakati pa Karimele, zidye m'Basani ndi m'Giliyadi masiku a kale lomwe." 
Micah7:15 Monga masiku a kutuluka kwako m'dziko la Ejipito ndidzamuonetsa zodabwitsa. 
Micah7:16 Amitundu adzaona nadzachita manyazi ndi mphamvu yao yonse; adzagwira pakamwa, m'makutu mwao mudzagontha." 
Micah7:17 Adzanyambita fumbi ngati njoka; ngati zokwawa za padziko, adzanjenjemera potuluka m'ngaka mwao; adzafika kwa Yehova Mulungu wao ndi mantha, nadzaopa chifukwa cha iwe." 
Micah7:18 Ndani Mulungu wofanana ndi Inu, wakukhululukira mphulupulu, wakupitirira zolakwa za otsala a cholowa chake? Sasunga mkwiyo wake kunthawi yonse popeza akondwera nacho chifundo." 
Micah7:19 Adzabwera, nadzatichitira nsoni; adzagonjetsa mphulupulu zathu; ndipo mudzataya zochimwa zao zonse m'nyanja yakuya." 
Micah7:20 Mudzapatsa kwa Yakobo choonadi, ndi kwa Abrahamu chifundo chimene munalumbirira makolo athu kuyambira masiku a kale lomwe." 
Nahum1:1 Katundu wa Ninive. Buku la masomphenya a Nahumu wa ku Elikosi. 
Nahum1:2 Yehova ndiye Mulungu wansanje, nabwezera chilango; Yehova ndiye wobwezera chilango, ndi waukali ndithu; Yehova ndiye wobwezera chilango oyambana naye, nasungira mkwiyo pa adani ake." 
Nahum1:3 Yehova ndiye wolekerera mkwiyo, koma wa mphamvu yaikulu; ndi wosamasula ndithu wopalamula; njira ya Yehova ili m'kamvulumvulu ndi mumkuntho; ndipo mitambo ndiyo fumbi la mapazi ake." 
Nahum1:4 Adzudzula nyanja, naiphwetsa, naumitsa mitsinje yonse; Basani ndi Karimele afota, ndi duwa la ku Lebanoni linyala." 
Nahum1:5 Mapiri agwedezeka chifukwa cha Iye, ndi zitunda zisungunuka; ndi dziko lapansi likwezeka pamaso pake, ndi maiko ndi onse okhala m'mwemo." 
Nahum1:6 Adzaima ndani pa kulunda kwake? Ndipo adzakhalitsa ndani pa mkwiyo wake wotentha? Ukali wake utsanulidwa ngati moto, ndi matanthwe asweka ndi Iye." 
Nahum1:7 Yehova ali wabwino, ndiye polimbikirapo tsiku la msauko; ndipo adziwa iwo omkhulupirira Iye." 
Nahum1:8 Koma ndi chigumula chosefukira adzatha konse malo ake, nadzapirikitsira adani ake kumdima." 
Nahum1:9 Mulingaliranji chotsutsana ndi Yehova? Iye adzatha psiti; nsautso siidzauka kawiri. 
Nahum1:10 Pakuti chinkana akunga minga yoyangayanga, naledzera nacho choledzeretsa chao, adzathedwa konse ngati chiputu chouma." 
Nahum1:11 Mwa iwe watuluka wina wolingalira choipa chotsutsana ndi Yehova, ndiye phungu wopanda pake." 
Nahum1:12 Atero Yehova: Angakhale iwo ali ndi mphamvu yokwanira, nachuluka momwemo, koma momwemonso adzasalikidwa, ndipo iye adzapitiratu. Chinkana ndakuzunza iwe, sindidzakuzunzanso." 
Nahum1:13 Koma tsopano ndidzathyola ndi kukuchotsera goli lake, ndipo ndidzadula zomangira zako." 
Nahum1:14 Ndipo Yehova walamulira za iwe kuti asabzalidwenso ena a dzina lako; m'nyumba ya milungu yako ndidzachotsa fano losema ndi fano loyenga; ndidzakukonzerapo manda, pakuti iwe ndiwe wopepuka." 
Nahum1:15 Taonani pamapiri mapazi a iye wakulalikira uthenga wabwino, wakubukitsa mtendere! Chita chikondwerero chako, Yuda, kwaniritsa zowinda zako; pakuti wopanda pakeyo sadzapitanso mwa iwe; iye waonongeka konse." 
Nahum2:1 Wophwanyayo wakwera pamaso pako; sunga linga, yang'anira panjira, limbitsa m'chuuno mwako, limbikitsatu mphamvu yako." 
Nahum2:2 Pakuti Yehova abwezeranso ukulu wake wa Yakobo ngati ukulu wake wa Israele; pakuti okhuthula anawakhuthula, naipsa nthambi zake za mpesa." 
Nahum2:3 Zikopa za amphamvu ake zasanduka zofiira, ngwazi zivala mlangali; magaleta anyezimira ndi chitsulo tsiku la kukonzera kwake, ndi mikondo itinthidwa." 
Nahum2:4 Magaleta achita mkokomo m'miseu, akankhana m'makwalala; maonekedwe ao akunga miuni, athamanga ngati mphezi." 
Nahum2:5 Akumbukira omveka ake; akhumudwa m'kupita kwao, afulumira kulinga lake, ndi chotchinjiriza chakonzeka." 
Nahum2:6 Pa zipata za mitsinje patseguka, ndi chinyumba chasungunuka." 
Nahum2:7 Chatsimikizika, avulidwa, atengedwa, adzakazi ake alira ngati mau a nkhunda, nadziguguda pachifuwa pao." 
Nahum2:8 Koma Ninive wakhala chiyambire chake ngati thamanda lamadzi; koma athawa. Imani, Imani! Ati, koma palibe wocheuka." 
Nahum2:9 Funkhani siliva, funkhani golide; pakuti palibe kutha kwake kwa zosungikazo, kwa chuma cha zipangizo zofunika zilizonse." 
Nahum2:10 Ndiye mopanda kanthu mwakemo ndi mwachabe, ndi wopasuka; ndi mtima usungunuka, ndi maondo aombana, ndi m'zuuno zonse muwawa, ndi nkhope zao zatumbuluka." 
Nahum2:11 Ili kuti ngaka ya mikango, ndi podyera misona ya mikango, kumene mkango, waumuna ndi waukazi, ukayenda ndi mwana wa mkango, kopanda wakuiposa?" 
Nahum2:12 Mkangowo unamwetula zofikira ana ake, nusamira yaikazi yake, nudzaza mapanga ake ndi nyama, ngaka zake ndi zojiwa." 
Nahum2:13 Taona, nditsutsana nawe, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo ndidzatentha magaleta ake m'utsi; ndi lupanga lidzadya misona yako ya mkango; ndipo ndidzachotsa zofunkha zako pa dziko lapansi, ndi mau a mithenga yako sadzamvekanso." 
Nahum3:1 Tsoka mudzi wa mwazi! Udzala nao mabodza ndi zachifwamba; zachifwamba sizidukiza. 
Nahum3:2 Kumveka kwa chikoti, ndi mkokomo wa kuyenda kwa njinga za magaleta; ndi kaphatakaphata wa akavalo, ndi gwegwegwe wa magaleta;" 
Nahum3:3 munthu wokwera pa kavalo, ndi lupanga lonyezimira, ndi mkondo wong'anipa; ndi aunyinji ophedwa, ndi chimulu cha mitembo, palibe kutha zitanda; angokhumudwa ndi zitanda;" 
Nahum3:4 chifukwa cha chiwerewere chochuluka cha wachiwerewere wokongola, ndiye mkaziyo mwini nyanga, wakugulitsa amitundu mwa chiwerewere chake, ndi mabanja mwa nyanga zake." 
Nahum3:5 Taona, nditsutsana nawe, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzaphimba nkhope yako ndi nsalu yako yoyesa mthendene; ndipo ndidzaonetsa amitundu umaliseche wako, ndi mafumu manyazi ako." 
Nahum3:6 Ndipo ndidzakuponyera zonyansa, ndi kukuchititsa manyazi, ndi kukuika chopenyapo." 
Nahum3:7 Ndipo kudzali kuti onse akupenyerera iwe adzakuthawa, nadzati, Ninive wapasuka, adzamlira maliro ndani? Ndidzakufunira kuti akukutonthoza?" 
Nahum3:8 Kodi uli wabwino woposa No-Amoni, wokhala pakati pa mitsinje wozingidwa ndi madzi; amene tchemba lake ndilo nyanja, ndi linga lake ndilo nyanja?" 
Nahum3:9 Kusi ndi Ejipito ndiwo mphamvu yake, ndiyo yosatha, Puti ndi Libiya ndiwo akukuthandiza." 
Nahum3:10 Koma iye anatengedwa, analowa ndende; ana ake a makanda anaphwanyika polekeza pake pa miseu yake yonse; ndi pa omveka ake anachita maere, ndi akulu ake onse anamangidwa maunyolo." 
Nahum3:11 Iwenso udzaledzera, udzabisala; iwenso udzafunanso polimbikira chifukwa cha mdani." 
Nahum3:12 Malinga ako onse adzanga mikuyu ndi nkhuyu zoyamba kupsa; akagwedeza zingokugwa m'kamwa mwa wakudya. 
Nahum3:13 Taona, anthu ako m'kati mwako akunga akazi, zipata za dziko lako zatsegulidwira adani ako papakulu; moto watha mipingiridzo yako." 
Nahum3:14 Udzitungiretu madzi a nthawi yokumangira misasa, limbikitsa malinga ako, lowa kuthope, ponda dothi, limbitsa ng'anjo yanjerwa." 
Nahum3:15 Pomwepo moto udzatha iwe; lupanga lidzakuononga; lidzatha iwe ngati chirimamine; udzichulukitse ngati chirimamine, udzichulukitse ngati dzombe." 
Nahum3:16 Wachulukitsa amalonda ako koposa nyenyezi za kuthambo; chirimamine anyambita, nauluka, nathawa." 
Nahum3:17 Ovala korona ako akunga dzombe, ndi akazembe, ndi akazemba ako ngati ziwalamsatsi zakutera m'matchinga tsiku lachisanu, koma likafundukula dzuwa ziuluka nizithawa, ndi kumene zinakhalako sikudziwikanso." 
Nahum3:18 Abusa ako aodzera, mfumu ya ku Asiriya; omveka ako apumula; anthu ako amwazika pamapiri, ndipo palibe wakuwasonkhanitsa." 
Nahum3:19 Palibe chakulunzitsa kuthyoka kwako; bala lako liwawa; onse akumva mbiri yako akuombera manja; pakuti ndaniyo kuipa kwako sikunampitapitabe? 
Habakkuk1:1 Katundu adamuona mneneri Habakuku 
Habakkuk1:2 Yehova, ndidzafuula mpaka liti osamva Inu? Ndifuulira kwa Inu za chiwawa, koma simupulumutsa." 
Habakkuk1:3 Mundionetseranji zopanda pake, ndi kundionetsa zovuta? Pakuti kufunkha ndi chiwawa zili pamaso panga; ndipo pali ndeu, nauka makani." 
Habakkuk1:4 Pakuti chilamulo chalekeka, ndi chiweruzo sichitulukira konse; popeza woipa azinga wolungama, chifukwa chake chiweruzo chituluka chopindika." 
Habakkuk1:5 Penyani mwa amitundu, penyetsetsani, nimudabwe kwakukulu, pakuti ndichita ntchito masiku anu, imene simudzavomera chinkana akufotokozerani." 
Habakkuk1:6 Pakuti taonani, ndiukitsa Ababiloni, mtundu uja wowawa ndi waliwiro, wopitira pa chitando cha dziko lapansi, kulowa m'malo mosati mwao, mukhale mwaomwao." 
Habakkuk1:7 Ali oopsa, achititsa mantha, chiweruzo chao ndi ukulu wao zituluka kwa iwo eni." 
Habakkuk1:8 Akavalo ao aposa anyalugwe liwiro lao, aposa mimbulu ya madzulo ukali wao, ndipo apakavalo ao atanda; inde apakavalo ao afumira kutali; auluka ngati chiombankhanga chofulumira kudya." 
Habakkuk1:9 Adzera chiwawa onsewo; nkhope zao zikhazikika zolunjika m'tsogolo; asonkhanitsa andende ngati mchenga. 
Habakkuk1:10 Inde anyoza mafumu, aseka akalonga; aseka linga lililonse; popeza aunjika dothi, nalilanda." 
Habakkuk1:11 Pamenepo adzapitirira ngati mphepo, nadzalakwa ndi kupalamula, iye amene aiyesa mphamvu yake mulungu wake." 
Habakkuk1:12 Si ndinu wachikhalire, Yehova Mulungu wanga, wopatulika wanga? Sitidzafa. Yehova munamuikiratu kuti aweruzidwe; ndipo Inu, Thanthwe, munamkhazika kuti alangidwe." 
Habakkuk1:13 Inu wa maso osalakwa, osapenya choipa, osakhoza kupenyerera chovuta, mupenyereranji iwo akuchita mochenjerera, ndi kukhala chete pamene woipa ammeza munthu wolungama woposa iye mwini;" 
Habakkuk1:14 ndi kuyesa anthu ngati nsomba za m'nyanja, ngati zokwawa zopanda wakuzilamulira." 
Habakkuk1:15 Aziwedza zonse ndi mbedza, azigwira m'ukonde wake, nazisonkhanitsa m'khoka mwake; chifukwa chake asekera nakondwerera." 
Habakkuk1:16 Chifukwa chake aphera nsembe ukonde wake, nafukizira khoka lake, pakuti mwa izi gawo lake lilemera, ndi chakudya chake chichuluka." 
Habakkuk1:17 Kodi m'mwemo adzakhuthula m'ukonde mwake osaleka kuphabe amitundu? 
Habakkuk2:1 Ndidzaima pa dindiro langa ndi kudziika palinga, ndipo ndidzayang'anira ndione ngati adzanenanji mwa ine, ngatinso ndidzamyankha chiyani pa choneneza changa." 
Habakkuk2:2 Ndipo Yehova anandiyankha nati, Lembera masomphenyawo, nuwachenutse pamagome, kuti awawerenge mofulumira." 
Habakkuk2:3 Pakuti masomphenyawo alindira nyengo yoikidwiratu, ndipo afulumirira potsirizira pake, osanama; akachedwa uwalindirire; popeza afika ndithu, osazengereza." 
Habakkuk2:4 Taonani, moyo wake udzikuza, wosaongoka m'kati mwake; koma wolungama adzakhala ndi moyo mwa chikhulupiriro chake." 
Habakkuk2:5 Ndiponso vinyo ngwonyenga, ngati munthu wodzikuza, wosakhala kwao; wakukulitsa chikhumbo chake ngati kunsi kwa manda, akunga imfa, yosakhuta, koma adzisonkhanitsira amitundu onse, nadzimemezera mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
Habakkuk2:6 Kodi sadzamnenera fanizo onsewo, ndi mwambi womnyodola, ndi kuti, Tsoka iye wochulukitsa zimene sizili zake? Mpaka liti? Iye wodzisenzera zigwiriro." 
Habakkuk2:7 Sadzauka kodi modzidzimuka iwo amene adzakuluma, ndi kugalamuka iwo amene adzakugwedezetsa; ndipo udzakhala zofunkha zao?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Popeza iwe wafunkha amitundu ambiri, otsala onse a mitundu ya anthu adzakufunkha iwe; chifukwa cha mwazi wa anthu, ndi chiwawa chochitikira dziko, mudzi, ndi onse okhalamo." 
Habakkuk2:9 Tsoka iye wakupindulitsira nyumba yake phindu loipa, kuti aike chisanja chake ponyamuka, kuti alanditsidwe m'dzanja la choipa!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Wapangira nyumba yako chamanyazi, pakuononga mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ndipo wachimwira moyo wako." 
Habakkuk2:11 Pakuti mwala wa m'khoma ufuula, ndi mtanda wa kuphaso udzauvomereza." 
Habakkuk2:12 Tsoka iye wakumanga mudzi ndi mwazi, nakhazikitsa mudzi ndi chisalungamo!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Taonani, sichichokera kwa Yehova wa makamu kodi kuti mitundu ya anthu ingogwirira moto ntchito, ndi anthu angodzilemetsa pa zopanda pake?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Pakuti dziko lapansi lidzadzazidwa ndi chidziwitso cha ulemerero wa Yehova, monga madzi amphimba pansi pa nyanja." 
Habakkuk2:15 Tsoka wakuninkha mnzake chakumwa, ndi kuonjezako mankhwala ako, ndi kumledzeretsa, kuti upenyerere manyazi ao!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Udzazidwa nao manyazi m'malo mwa ulemerero; imwa iwenso, nukhale wosadulidwa; chikho cha dzanja lamanja la Yehova chidzatembenukira iwe, ndi kusanza kwa manyazi kudzakhala pa ulemerero wako." 
Habakkuk2:17 Pakuti chiwawa chidachitikira Lebanoni chidzakukuta, ndi chionongeko cha nyama chidzakuopsa; chifukwa cha mwazi wa anthu, ndi chiwawa chochitidwira dziko, mudzi, ndi onse okhalamo." 
Habakkuk2:18 Apindulanji nalo fano losema, kuti wakulipanga analisema; fano loyenga ndi mphunzitsi wamabodza, kuti wakulipanga alikhulupirira, atapanga mafano osanena mau?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Tsoka iye wakunena kwa mtengo, Galamuka; ndi kwa mwala wosalankhula, Nyamuka! Kodi ichi chiphunzitsa? Taona chakutidwa ndi golide ndi siliva, ndi m'kati mwake mulibe mpweya konse." 
Habakkuk2:20 Koma Yehova ali m'Kachisi wake wopatulika; dziko lonse lapansi likhale chete pamaso pake. 
Habakkuk3:1 Pemphero la Habakuku mneneri, pa Sigionoti." 
Habakkuk3:2 Yehova, ndinamva mbiri yanu ndi mantha; Yehova, tsitsimutsani ntchito yanu pakati pa zaka, pakati pa zaka mudziwitse; pa mkwiyo mukumbukire chifundo." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mulungu anafuma ku Temani, ndi Woyerayo kuphiri la Parani. Ulemerero wake unaphimba miyamba, ndi dziko lapansi linadzala ndi kumlemekeza." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ndi kunyezimira kwake kunanga kuunika; anali nayo mitsitsi ya dzuwa yotuluka m'dzanja lake, ndi komweko kunabisika mphamvu yake." 
Habakkuk3:5 Patsogolo pake panapita mliri, ndi makala amoto anatuluka pa mapazi ake." 
Habakkuk3:6 Anaimirira, nandengulitsa dziko lapansi; anapenya, nanjenjemeretsa amitundu; ndi mapiri achikhalire anamwazika, zitunda za kale lomwe zinawerama; mayendedwe ake ndiwo a kale lomwe." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ndinaona mahema a Kusani ali mkusauka; nsalu zotchinga za dziko la Midiyani zinanjenjemera. 
Habakkuk3:8 Kodi Yehova anaipidwa nayo mitsinje? Mkwiyo wanu unali pamitsinje kodi, kapena ukali wanu panyanja, kuti munayenda pa akavalo anu, pa magaleta anu a chipulumutso?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Munapombosola uta wanu; malumbiro analumbirira mafuko anali mau oona. Munang'amba dziko lapansi ndi mitsinje. 
Habakkuk3:10 Mapiri anakuonani, namva zowawa; chigumula cha madzi chinapita; madzi akuya anamveketsa mau ake, nakweza manja ake m'mwamba." 
Habakkuk3:11 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zinaima njera mokhala mwao; pa kuunika kwa mivi yanu popita iyo. Pa kung'anipa kwa nthungo yanu yonyezimira. 
Habakkuk3:12 Munaponda dziko ndi kulunda, munapuntha amitundu ndi mkwiyo." 
Habakkuk3:13 Munatulukira chipulumutso cha anthu anu, chipulumutso cha odzozedwa anu; munakantha mutu wa nyumba ya woipa, ndi kufukula maziko kufikira m'khosi." 
Habakkuk3:14 Munapyoza ndi maluti ake mutu wa ankhondo ake; anadza ngati kamvulumvulu kundimwaza; kukondwerera kwao kunanga kufuna kutha ozunzika mobisika. 
Habakkuk3:15 Munaponda panyanja ndi akavalo anu, madzi amphamvu anaunjikana mulu." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ndinamva, ndi m'mimba mwanga munabwadamuka, milomo yanga inanthunthumira pamau, m'mafupa mwanga mudalowa chivundi, ndipo ndinanjenjemera m'malo mwanga; kuti ndipumule tsiku lamsauko, pamene akwerera anthu kuti ayambane nao ndi makamu." 
Habakkuk3:17 Chinkana mkuyu suphuka, kungakhale kulibe zipatso kumpesa; yalephera ntchito ya azitona, ndi m'minda m'mosapatsa chakudya; ndi zoweta zachotsedwa kukhola, palibenso ng'ombe m'makola mwao;" 
Habakkuk3:18 koma ndidzakondwera mwa Yehova, ndidzasekerera mwa Mulungu wa chipulumutso changa." 
Habakkuk3:19 Yehova, Ambuye, ndiye mphamvu yanga, asanduliza mapazi anga ngati a mbawala, nadzandipondetsa pa misanje yanga." 
Zephaniah1:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Zefaniya mwana wa Kusi, mwana wa Gedaliya, mwana wa Amariya, mwana wa Hezekiya, masiku a Yosiya, mwana wa Amoni mfumu ya Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Kuzitha ndidzazitha zonse kuzichotsa panthaka, ati Yehova." 
Zephaniah1:3 Ndidzatha munthu ndi nyama; ndidzatha mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi nsomba za m'nyanja, ndi zokhumudwitsa pamodzi ndi oipa; ndipo ndidzaononga anthu kuwachotsa panthaka, ati Yehova." 
Zephaniah1:4 Ndipo ndidzatambasulira dzanja langa pa Yuda, ndi pa onse okhala m'Yerusalemu; ndipo ndidzaononga otsala a Baala kuwachotsa m'malo muno, ndi dzina la Akemari pamodzi ndi ansembe;" 
Zephaniah1:5 ndi iwo akulambira khamu la kumwamba pamwamba pa matsindwi; ndi iwo akulambira, akulumbira pali Yehova, nalumbiranso pali mfumu;" 
Zephaniah1:6 ndi iwo akubwerera osamtsata Yehova; ndi osamfuna Yehova, kapena kufunsira kwa Iye." 
Zephaniah1:7 Khala chete pamaso pa Ambuye Yehova; pakuti tsiku la Yehova liyandikira; pakuti Yehova wakonzeratu nsembe, anapatula oitanidwa ake." 
Zephaniah1:8 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku la nsembe ya Yehova, kuti ndidzalanga akalonga ndi ana a mfumu, ndi onse akuvala chovala chachilendo." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ndipo tsiku ilo ndidzalanga olumpha chiundo, nadzaza nyumba ya mbuye wao ndi chiwawa ndi chinyengo." 
Zephaniah1:10 Ndipo tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, kudzakhala phokoso lakulira lochokera kuchipata chansomba, ndi kuchema kochokera kudera lachiwiri, ndi kugamuka kwakukulu kochokera kuzitunda." 
Zephaniah1:11 Chemani okhala m'chigwa, pakuti amalonda onse atayika, onsewo osenza siliva aonongeka." 
Zephaniah1:12 Ndipo kudzachitika nthawi yomweyi kuti ndidzasanthula Yerusalemu ndi nyali, ndipo ndidzalanga amunawo okhala ndi nsenga, onena m'mtima mwao, Yehova sachita chokoma, kapena kuchita choipa." 
Zephaniah1:13 Ndipo zolemera zao zidzakhala zakufunkhidwa; ndi nyumba zao zabwinja; adzamangadi nyumba, koma sadzagonamo; adzaoka minda yampesa koma sadzamwa vinyo wake." 
Zephaniah1:14 Tsiku lalikulu la Yehova lili pafupi, lili pafupi lifulumira kudza, mau a tsiku la Yehova; munthu wamphamvu adzalirapo mowawa mtima." 
Zephaniah1:15 Tsikulo ndi tsiku la mkwiyo, tsiku la msauko ndi lopsinja tsiku la bwinja, ndi chipasuko, tsiku la mdima ndi la chisisira, tsiku la mitambo ndi lakuda bii;" 
Zephaniah1:16 tsiku la lipenga ndi lakufuulira midzi yamlinga, ndi nsanja zazitali za kungodya." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ndipo ndidzatengera anthu zowapsinja, kuti adzayenda ngati anthu akhungu, popeza anachimwira Yehova; ndi mwazi wao udzatsanulidwa ngati fumbi, ndi nyama yao idzanga ndowe." 
Zephaniah1:18 Ngakhale siliva wao, ngakhale golide wao sizidzakhoza kuwalanditsa tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova; koma dziko lonse lidzatha ndi moto wa nsanje yake; pakuti adzachita chakutsiriza, mofulumira, onse okhala m'dziko." 
Zephaniah2:1 Dzisanthuleni, inde santhulani; inu mtundu wosakhumba kanthu;" 
Zephaniah2:2 lamulo lisanabale, tsiku lisanapitirire ngati mungu, usanakugwereni mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova, lisanakugwereni tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova." 
Zephaniah2:3 Funani Yehova, ofatsa inu nonse a m'dziko, amene munachita chiweruzo chake; funani chilungamo, funani chifatso; kapena mudzabisika tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova." 
Zephaniah2:4 Pakuti Gaza adzasiyidwa, ndi Asikeloni adzakhala bwinja; adzaingitsa Asidodi usana, ndi Ekeroni adzazulidwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Tsoka, okhala m'dziko la kunyanja, mtundu wa Akereti! Mau a Yehova atsutsana nawe, Kanani, dziko la Afilisti; ndidzakuononga, kuti pasakhale wokhala m'dziko." 
Zephaniah2:6 Ndipo dziko la kunyanja lidzakhala busa, ndi mapanga a abusa, ndi makola a zoweta." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ndipo dziko la kunyanja lidzakhala la otsala a nyumba ya Yuda; adzadyetsa zoweta zao pamenepo; madzulo adzagona m'nyumba za Asikeloni; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wao adzawazonda, nadzabweza undende wao." 
Zephaniah2:8 Ndinamva kutonza kwa Mowabu ndi matukwano a ana a Amoni, zimene anatonza nazo anthu anga, ndi kudzikuza pa malire ao." 
Zephaniah2:9 Chifukwa chake, pali moyo wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israele, Zedi Mowabu adzakhala ngati Sodomu, ndi ana a Amoni ngati Gomora, pochuluka khwisa ndi maenje a mchere, ndi bwinja losatha; otsala a anthu anga adzalanda zao, ndi otsala a mtundu wa anthu anga adzawalandira akhale cholowa chao." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ichi adzakhala nacho m'malo mwa kudzikuza kwao, chifukwa anatonza, nadzikuza pa anthu a Yehova wa makamu." 
Zephaniah2:11 Yehova adzawakhalira woopsa; pakuti adzaondetsa milungu yonse ya pa dziko lapansi; ndipo adzamlambira Iye, yense pamalo pake, a m'zisumbu zonse za amitundu." 
Zephaniah2:12 Inunso Akusi, mudzaphedwa ndi lupanga langa." 
Zephaniah2:13 Ndipo adzatambasulira dzanja lake kumpoto nadzaononga Asiriya, nadzasanduliza Ninive akhale bwinja, wouma ngati chipululu." 
Zephaniah2:14 Ndipo zoweta zidzagona pansi pakati pake; nyama zonse za mitundumitundu; ndi vuwo ndi nungu zidzakhala m'mitu ya nsanamira zake; adzaimba mau ao m'mazenera; paziundo padzakhala chipasuko; pakuti anagadamula ntchito yake ya mkungudza. 
Zephaniah2:15 Uwu ndi mudzi wosekererawo unakhala wosasamalira, unanena m'mtima mwake, Ine ndine, ndi wopanda ine palibe wina; ha! Wasanduka bwinja, mogonera nyama za kuthengo! Yense wakuupitirira adzatsonya mtsonyo, ndi kupukusa mutu." 
Zephaniah3:1 Tsoka uyo wopanduka, ndi wodetsedwa, ndiye mudzi wozunza!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Sanamvera mau, sanalole kulangizidwa; sanakhulupirire Yehova, sanayandikire kwa Mulungu wake." 
Zephaniah3:3 Akalonga ake m'kati mwake ndiwo mikango yobangula; oweruza ake ndi mimbulu ya madzulo, sasiya kanthu ka mawa." 
Zephaniah3:4 Aneneri ake ndiwo anthu a matukutuku ndi onyenga; ansembe ao anaipsa malo opatulika, napotoza chilamulo." 
Zephaniah3:5 Yehova pakati pake ali wolungama; sadzachita chosalungama, m'mawa ndi m'mawa aonetsera chiweruzo chake poyera, chosasowa kanthu; koma wosalungama sadziwa manyazi." 
Zephaniah3:6 Ndaononga amitundu; nsanja zao za kungodya nza bwinja, ndapasula miseu yao, palibe wopitapo; midzi yao yaonongeka, palibe munthu, palibe wokhalamo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ndinati, Zedi udzandiopa Ine, udzalola kulangizidwa, kuti pokhala pake pasaonongeke, monga mwa zonse ndamuikira; koma analawirira mamawa, navunditsa machitidwe ao onse." 
Zephaniah3:8 Chifukwa chake, mundilindire, ati Yehova, kufikira tsiku loukira Ine zofunkha; pakuti ndatsimikiza mtima Ine kusonkhanitsa amitundu, kuti ndimemeze maufumu kuwatsanulira kulunda kwanga, ndilo mkwiyo wanga wonse waukali; pakuti dziko lonse lapansi lidzathedwa ndi moto wa nsanje yanga." 
Zephaniah3:9 Pakuti pamenepo ndidzapatsa mitundu ya anthu mlomo woyera, kuti onsewa aitanire pa dzina la Yehova kumtumikira ndi mtima umodzi." 
Zephaniah3:10 Kuchokera tsidya lija la mitsinje ya Kusi ondipembedza, ndiwo mwana wamkazi wa obalalika anga, adzabwera nacho chopereka changa." 
Zephaniah3:11 Tsiku ilo sudzachita manyazi ndi zochita zako zonse unandilakwira nazo; pakuti pamenepo ndidzachotsa pakati pako amene akondwera ndi kudzikuza kwako, ndipo sudzachita kudzikuzanso m'phiri langa lopatulika." 
Zephaniah3:12 Koma ndidzasiya pakati pako anthu ozunzika ndi osauka, ndipo iwo adzakhulupirira dzina la Yehova." 
Zephaniah3:13 Otsala a Israele sadzachita chosalungama, kapena kunena mabodza; ndi m'kamwa mwao simudzapezeka lilime lonyenga; pakuti adzadya nadzagona pansi, ndi palibe wakuwaopsa." 
Zephaniah3:14 Imba, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; fuula, Israele; kondwera nusekerere ndi mtima wonse, mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu." 
Zephaniah3:15 Yehova wachotsa maweruzo ako, anataya kunja mdani wako; mfumu ya Israele, Yehova, ali pakati pako, sudzaopanso choipa." 
Zephaniah3:16 Tsiku lomwelo adzati kwa Yerusalemu, Usaopa Ziyoni, manja anu asakhale olefuka." 
Zephaniah3:17 Yehova Mulungu wako ali pakati pako, wamphamvu wakupulumutsa; adzakondwera nawe ndi chimwemwe, adzakhala wopanda thamo m'chikondi chake; adzasekerera nawe ndi kuimbirapo." 
Zephaniah3:18 Ndidzasonkhanitsa iwo akulirira msonkhano woikika, ndiwo a mwa iwe, amene katundu wake anawakhalira mtonzo." 
Zephaniah3:19 Taonani, nthawi yomweyo ndidzachita nao onse akuzunza iwe; ndipo ndidzapulumutsa wotsimphinayo, ndi kusonkhanitsa wopirikitsidwayo; ndipo ndidzawaika akhale chilemekezo ndi dzina, iwo amene manyazi ao anali m'dziko lonse." 
Zephaniah3:20 Nthawi yomweyo ndidzakulowetsani, ndi nthawi yomweyo ndidzakusonkhanitsani; pakuti ndidzakuikani mukhale dzina, ndi chilemekezo mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi, pamene ndibweza undende wanu pamaso panu, ati Yehova." 
Haggai1:1 Chaka chachiwiri cha mfumu Dariusi, mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi, mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri kwa Zerubabele mwana wa Sealatiele, chiwanga cha Yuda, ndi kwa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkulu wa ansembe, ndi kuti," 
Haggai1:2 Atero Yehova wa makamu, akuti, Anthu awa anena, Nthawi siinafike, nthawi yakumanga nyumba ya Yehova." 
Haggai1:3 Pamenepo mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Haggai1:4 Kodi imeneyi ndiyo nthawi yakuti inu nokha mukhala m'nyumba zanu zochingidwa m'katimo, ndi nyumba iyi ikhale yopasuka?" 
Haggai1:5 Chifukwa chake tsono, atero Yehova wa makamu: Mtima wanu usamalire njira zanu." 
Haggai1:6 Mwabzala zambiri, koma mututa pang'ono; mukudya, koma osakhuta; mukumwa, koma osakoledwa; mudziveka, koma palibe wofundidwa; ndi iye wolembedwa ntchito yakulipidwa alandirira kulipirako m'thumba lobooka." 
Haggai1:7 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Mtima wanu usamalire njira zanu. 
Haggai1:8 Kwerani kudziko la mapiri, ndi kukwera nayo mitengo, nimumange nyumbayi; ndipo kudzandikomera, ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa, ati Yehova." 
Haggai1:9 Munayembekezera zambiri, koma taonani, pang'ono; ndipo, mutabwera napo kwanu, ndinauzirapo. Chifukwa ninji? Ati Yehova wa makamu. Chifukwa cha nyumba yanga yokhala yopasuka, ndipo nuthamangira yense kunyumba kwake." 
Haggai1:10 M'mwemo chifukwa cha inu kumwamba kukaniza mame, ndi nthaka ikaniza zipatso zake." 
Haggai1:11 Ndipo ndinaitana chilala chidzere dziko, ndi mapiri, ndi tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi zimene ibala nthaka, ndi anthu, ndi zoweta, ndi ntchito zonse za manja." 
Haggai1:12 Pamenepo Zerubabele mwana wa Sealatiele, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkulu wa ansembe, ndi otsala onse a anthu, anamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wao, ndi mau a Hagai mneneri, monga Yehova Mulungu wao adamtuma; ndipo anthu anaopa pamaso pa Yehova." 
Haggai1:13 Ndipo Hagai mthenga wa Yehova, m'uthenga wa Yehova ananena ndi anthu, ndi kuti, Ine ndili nanu, ati Yehova." 
Haggai1:14 Ndipo Yehova anautsa mzimu wa Zerubabele mwana wa Sealatiele, chiwanga cha Yuda, ndi mzimu wa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkulu wa ansembe, ndi mzimu wa otsala onse a anthu, ndipo anadza nagwira ntchito m'nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wao," 
Haggai1:15 tsiku la makumi awiri ndi anai la mwezi, mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi, chaka chachiwiri cha mfumu Dariusi." 
Haggai2:1 Mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri ndi chimodzi la mweziwo, mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:2 Unenetu kwa Zerubabele, mwana wa Sealatiele, chiwanga cha Yuda, ndi kwa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkulu wa ansembe, ndi kwa otsala a anthu, kuti," 
Haggai2:3 Adatsala ndani mwa inu amene anaona nyumba iyi m'ulemerero wake woyamba? Ndipo muiona yotani tsopano? Kodi siikhala m'maso mwanu ngati chabe? 
Haggai2:4 Koma limbika tsopano, Zerubabele, ati Yehova; ulimbikenso Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkulu wa ansembe; ndipo mulimbike inu nonse anthu a m'dziko, ati Yehova, ndi kuchita; pakuti Ine ndili pamodzi ndi inu, ati Yehova wa makamu;" 
Haggai2:5 monga momwe ndinapangana nanu muja munatuluka m'Ejipito, ndi Mzimu wanga unakhala pakati pa inu; musamaopa inu." 
Haggai2:6 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu: Kamodzinso, katsala kanthawi, ndidzagwedeza miyamba ndi dziko lapansi, ndi nyanja, ndi mtunda womwe;" 
Haggai2:7 ndipo ndidzagwedeza amitundu onse, ndi zofunika za amitundu onse zidzafika, ndipo ndidzadzaza nyumba iyi ndi ulemerero, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Haggai2:8 Siliva ndi wanga, ya golide ndi wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Haggai2:9 Ulemerero wotsiriza wa nyumba iyi udzaposa woyambawo, ati Yehova wa makamu; ndipo m'malo muno ndidzapatsa mtendere, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Haggai2:10 Tsiku la makumi awiri ndi anai la mwezi wachisanu ndi chinai, chaka chachiwiri cha Dariusi, mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:11 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Funsatu ansembe za chilamulo, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:12 Munthu akanyamulira nyama yopatulika m'ngudulira, nakhudza mkate, kapena ndiwo, kapena vinyo, kapena mafuta, kapena chakudya chilichonse, ndi ngudulira, kodi chisandulika chopatulika? Ndipo ansembe anayankha nati, Iai." 
Haggai2:13 Pamenepo Hagai anati, Munthu wodetsedwa ndi mtembo akakhudza kanthu ka izi, kodi kali kodetsedwa kanthuka? Ndipo ansembe anayankha nati, Kadzakhala kodetsedwa." 
Haggai2:14 Ndipo Hagai anayankha, nati, Momwemo anthu awa, ndi momwemo mtundu uwu pamaso panga, ati Yehova; ndi momwemo ntchito iliyonse ya manja ao; ndi ichi achipereka, chili chodetsedwa." 
Haggai2:15 Ndipo tsono, samalirani, kuyambira lero ndi m'tsogolomo, kuti, kusanaikidwe mwala pa mwala m'Kachisi wa Yehova," 
Haggai2:16 pamenepo ponse munthu akadza ku mulu woyenera miyeso makumi awiri, pali khumi yokha; munthu akadza ku choponderamo mphesa kudzatunga mbiya makumi asanu, pali makumi awiri okha." 
Haggai2:17 Ndinakukanthani ndi chinsikwi ndi chinoni ndi matalala m'ntchito zonse za manja anu, koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Haggai2:18 Musamalire, kuyambira lero ndi m'tsogolo, kuyambira tsiku la makumi awiri ndi chinai la mwezi wachisanu ndi chinai, kuyambira tsiku lija anamanga maziko a Kachisi wa Yehova, samalirani." 
Haggai2:19 Kodi mbeu ikali m'nkhokwe? Ngakhale mpesa, ndi mkuyu, ndi khangaza ndi azitona sizinabala; kuyambira lero lino ndidzakudalitsani." 
Haggai2:20 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza nthawi yachiwiri kwa Hagai tsiku la makumi awiri la mwezi, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:21 Nena ndi Zerubabele chiwanga cha Yuda, kuti, Ndidzagwedeza miyamba ndi dziko lapansi;" 
Haggai2:22 ndipo ndidzagubuduza mipando yachifumu ya maufumu, ndidzaononga mphamvu ya maufumu a amitundu; ndidzagubuduza magaleta ndi iwo akuyendapo; ndi akavalo ndi apakavalo adzatsika, yense ndi lupanga la mbale wake." 
Haggai2:23 Tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzakutenga, Zerubabele mtumiki wanga, mwana wa Sealatiele, ati Yehova, ndi kuika iwe ngati mphete yosindikizira; pakuti ndakusankha, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah1:1 Mwezi wachisanu ndi chitatu, chaka chachiwiri cha Dariusi, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Ido mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah1:2 Yehova anakwiya kwambiri ndi makolo anu. 
Zechariah1:3 Chifukwa chake uziti nao, Atero Yehova wa makamu: Bwererani kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo Ine ndidzabwerera kudza kwa inu, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah1:4 Musamakhala ngati makolo anu, amene aneneri akale anawafuulira, ndi kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu Bwereranitu kuleka njira zanu zoipa, ndi machitidwe anu oipa; koma sanamve, kapena kumvera Ine ati Yehova." 
Zechariah1:5 Makolo anu, ali kuti iwowo? Ndi aneneri, akhala ndi moyo kosatha kodi?" 
Zechariah1:6 Koma mau anga ndi malemba anga, amene ndinalamulira atumiki anga aneneriwo, kodi sanawapeze makolo anu? Ndipo anabwera, nati, Monga umo Yehova wa makamu analingirira kutichitira ife, monga mwa njira zathu ndi monga mwa machitidwe athu, momwemo anatichitira." 
Zechariah1:7 Tsiku la makumi awiri ndi chinai la mwezi wakhumi ndi chimodzi, ndiwo mwezi wa Sebati, chaka chachiwiri cha Dariusi, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Ido mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah1:8 Ndinaona usiku, taonani, munthu woyenda pa kavalo wofiira, alikuima pakati pa mitengo yamchisu inali kunsi; ndi pambuyo pake panali akavalo ofiira, odera ndi oyera." 
Zechariah1:9 Pamenepo ndinati, Awa ndi chinai, mbuyanga? Ndi mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anati kwa ine, Ndidzakuonetsa awa ndi chiyani." 
Zechariah1:10 Ndipo wakuima pakati pa mitengo yamchisu anayankha, nati, Awa ndiwo amene Yehova anawatumiza ayendeyende m'dziko." 
Zechariah1:11 Ndipo iwo anamyankha mthenga wa Yehova wakuima pakati pa mitengo yamchisu, nati, Tayendayenda m'dziko, ndipo taonani, dziko lonse likhala chete, lipumula." 
Zechariah1:12 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anayankha nati, Yehova wa makamu, mudzakhala mpaka liti osachitira chifundo Yerusalemu, ndi midzi ya Yuda, imene munakwiya nayo zaka izi makumi asanu ndi awiri?" 
Zechariah1:13 Ndipo Yehova anamyankha mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine mau okoma, mau akutonthoza mtima." 
Zechariah1:14 Ndipo mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anati kwa ine, fuula, ndi kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu: Ndichitira nsanje Yerusalemu ndi Ziyoni ndi nsanje yaikulu." 
Zechariah1:15 Ndipo ndikwiya nao amitundu okhala osatekeseka ndi mkwiyo waukulu; pakuti ndinakwiya pang'ono, ndipo anathandizira choipa." 
Zechariah1:16 Chifukwa chake atero Yehova: Ndabwera kudza ku Yerusalemu ndi zachifundo; nyumba yanga idzamangidwamo, atero Yehova wa makamu, ndipo adzayesa Yerusalemu ndi chingwe." 
Zechariah1:17 Fuulanso, ndi kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu: Midzi yanga idzalemerera ndi kufalikiranso; ndipo Yehova adzasangalatsanso Ziyoni, nadzasankhamo Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:18 Ndipo ndinakweza maso anga, ndinapenya, taonani, nyanga zinai." 
Zechariah1:19 Ndipo ndinati kwa mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine, Izi nziyani? Ndipo anandiyankha, Izi ndi nyangazi zinabalalitsa Yuda, Israele, ndi Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:20 Ndipo Yehova anandionetsa osula anai. 
Zechariah1:21 Pamenepo ndinati, Adzeranji awa? Ndipo ananena, nati, Izi ndi nyanga zimene zinabalalitsa Yuda, wopandanso wina woweramutsa mutu wake; koma awa anadza kuziopsa, kugwetsa nyanga za amitundu, amene anakwezera dziko la Yuda nyanga zao kulimwaza." 
Zechariah2:1 Ndinakwezanso maso anga, ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, munthu ndi chingwe choyesera m'dzanja lake." 
Zechariah2:2 Ndipo ndinati, Upita kuti? Ndipo anati kwa ine, Kukayesa Yerusalemu, kuona ngati chitando chake nchotani, ndi m'litali mwake motani." 
Zechariah2:3 Ndipo taonani, mthenga wolankhula nane anatuluka, ndi mthenga wina anatuluka kukomana naye," 
Zechariah2:4 nanena naye, Thamanga, lankhula ndi mnyamata uyu, ndi kuti, M'Yerusalemu mudzakhala anthu ngati m'midzi yopanda malinga, chifukwa cha kuchuluka anthu ndi zoweta momwemo." 
Zechariah2:5 Pakuti Ine, ati Yehova, ndidzakhala kwa iye linga lamoto pozungulira pake, ndipo ndidzakhala ulemerero m'kati mwake." 
Zechariah2:6 Haya, haya, thawani kudziko la kumpoto ati Yehova; pakuti ndinakubalalitsani ngati mphepo zinai za kuthambo, ati Yehova." 
Zechariah2:7 Haya Ziyoni, thawa iwe wakukhala ndi mwana wamkazi wa Babiloni." 
Zechariah2:8 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu: Utatha ulemererowo ananditumiza kwa amitundu amene anakufunkhani; pakuti iye wokhudza inu, akhudza mwana wa m'diso lake." 
Zechariah2:9 Pakuti, taonani, ndidzawayambasira dzanja langa, ndipo adzakhala zofunkha za iwo amene anawatumikira; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makamu anandituma." 
Zechariah2:10 Imba, nukondwere, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; pakuti taonani, ndilinkudza, ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pako, ati Yehova." 
Zechariah2:11 Ndipo amitundu ambiri adzaphatikidwa kwa Yehova tsiku ilo, nadzakhala anthu anga; ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pako, ndipo udzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makamu anandituma kwa iwe." 
Zechariah2:12 Ndipo Yehova adzalandira cholowa chake Yuda, ngati gawo lake m'dziko lopatulikalo, nadzasankhanso Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah2:13 Khalani chete, anthu onse, pamaso pa Yehova; pakuti wagalamuka mokhalira mwake mopatulika." 
Zechariah3:1 Pamenepo anandionetsa Yoswa mkulu wa ansembe alikuima pamaso pa mthenga wa Yehova, ndi Satana alikuima pa dzanja lake lamanja, atsutsana naye." 
Zechariah3:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Satana, Yehova akudzudzula, Satana iwe; inde Yehova amene anasankha Yerusalemu akudzudzula; uyu sindiye muuni wofumulidwa kumoto?" 
Zechariah3:3 Koma Yoswa analikuvala nsalu zonyansa naima pamaso pa mthenga. 
Zechariah3:4 Ndipo Iye anayankha nanena ndi iwo akuima pamaso pake, ndi kuti, Mumvule nsalu zonyansazi. Nati kwa iye, Taona, ndakuchotsera mphulupulu zako, ndipo ndidzakuveka zovala za mtengo wake." 
Zechariah3:5 Ndipo ndinati, Amuike nduwira yoyera pamutu pake. Naika nduwira yoyera pamutu pake, namveka ndi zovala; ndi mthenga wa Yehova anaimirirapo." 
Zechariah3:6 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamchitira Yoswa umboni, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah3:7 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Ukadzayenda m'njira zanga, ndi kusunga udikiro wanga, pamenepo udzaweruza nyumba yanga, ndi kusunga mabwalo anga, ndipo ndidzakupatsa malo oyendamo mwa awa oimirirapo." 
Zechariah3:8 Tamvera tsono, Yoswa mkulu wa ansembe, iwe ndi anzako akukhala pansi pamaso pako; pakuti iwo ndiwo chizindikiro; pakuti taonani, ndidzafikitsa mtumiki wanga, ndiye Mphukira." 
Zechariah3:9 Pakuti taona mwalawo ndinauika pamaso pa Yoswa; pa mwala umodzi pali maso asanu ndi awiri; taonani, ndidzalocha malochedwe ake, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo ndidzachotsa mphulupulu ya dziko lija tsiku limodzi." 
Zechariah3:10 Tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, mudzaitanizana yense mnansi wake patsinde pa mpesa ndi patsinde pa mkuyu." 
Zechariah4:1 Ndipo mthengayo adalankhula nane, anadzanso, nandiutsa ngati munthu woutsidwa m'tulo take." 
Zechariah4:2 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Uona chiyani? Ndipo ndinati, Ndaona, taonani, choikapo nyali cha golide yekhayekha, ndi mbale yake pamwamba pake, ndi nyali zake zisanu ndi ziwiri pamenepo; nyalizo zinali ndi misiwe isanu ndi iwiri, ndiyo ya nyalizo zinali pamwamba pake;" 
Zechariah4:3 ndi mitengo iwiri ya azitona pomwepo, wina kudzanja lamanja la mbaleyo, ndi wina kudzanja lake lamanzere." 
Zechariah4:4 Ndipo ndinayankha ndi kunena ndi mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine, ndi kuti, Izi nziyani mbuyanga?" 
Zechariah4:5 Ndipo mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anayankha, nati kwa ine, Sudziwa kodi kuti nziyani izi? Ndipo ndinati, Iai, mbuyanga." 
Zechariah4:6 Pamenepo anayankha, nanena kwa ine, ndi kuti, Awa ndi mau a Yehova kwa Zerubabele, Ndi khamu la nkhondo ai, ndi mphamvu ai, koma ndi Mzimu wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah4:7 Ndiwe yani, phiri lalikulu iwe? Pamaso pa Zerubabele udzasanduka chidikha; ndipo adzatulutsa mwala woikidwa pamwamba, ndi kufuula, Chisomo, chisomo nao." 
Zechariah4:8 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah4:9 Manja a Zerubabele anaika maziko a nyumba iyi, manja ake omwe adzaitsiriza; ndipo udzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makamu anandituma kwa inu." 
Zechariah4:10 Pakuti wapeputsa tsiku la tinthu tating'ono ndani? Pakuti adzakondwera, asanu ndi awiri awa, nadzaona chingwe cholungamitsira chilili m'dzanja la Zerubabele, ndiwo maso a Yehova; ayendayenda mwa dziko lonse." 
Zechariah4:11 Pamenepo ndinayankha, ndinati kwa iye, Mitengo iyi iwiri ya azitona kulamanja ndi kulamanzere kwa choikapo nyali nchiyani?" 
Zechariah4:12 Ndipo ndinayankha kachiwiri, ndinati naye, Nzotani nthambi ziwiri izi za azitona zilikutsanula zokha mafuta onga golide mwa misiwe iwiri yagolide?" 
Zechariah4:13 Ndipo anandiyankha, nati, Sudziwa kodi kuti nziyani izi? Ndipo ndinati, Iai, mbuyanga." 
Zechariah4:14 Pamenepo anati, Awa ndi ana amuna awiri a mafuta oimirira pamaso pa Mbuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Zechariah5:1 Pamenepo ndinakwezanso maso anga, ndinapenya, taonani, mpukutu wouluka." 
Zechariah5:2 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Uona chiyani? Ndipo ndinayankha, Ndiona mpukutu wouluka; utali wake mikono makumi awiri, ndi chitando chake mikono khumi." 
Zechariah5:3 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Ili ndi temberero lilikutulukira pa dziko lonse; pakuti aliyense wakuba adzapirikitsidwa kuno monga mwa ili; ndi aliyense wakulumbira zonama adzapirikitsidwa kuno monga mwa ili." 
Zechariah5:4 Ndidzalitulutsa ili, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo lidzalowa m'nyumba ya wakuba, ndi m'nyumba ya iye wolumbira monama pa dzina langa; ndipo lidzakhala pakati pa nyumba yake, ndi kuitha pamodzi ndi mitengo yake ndi miyala yake." 
Zechariah5:5 Pamenepo mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anatuluka, nati kwa ine, Kwezatu maso ako, nuone ngati nchiyani ichi chilikutulukachi." 
Zechariah5:6 Ndipo ndinati, Nchiyani ichi? Nati iye, Ichi ndi efa alikutuluka. Natinso, Ichi ndi maonekedwe ao m'dziko lonse;" 
Zechariah5:7 ndipo taonani, chozunguniza chantovu chotukulidwa: ndipo ichi ndi mkazi wokhala pakati pa efa." 
Zechariah5:8 Ndipo anati, Uyu ndi uchimo; namgwetsa m'kati mwa efa; naponya ntovu wolemerawo pakamwa pake." 
Zechariah5:9 Pamenepo ndinakweza maso anga, ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, anatuluka akazi awiri, ndi m'mapiko mwao munali mphepo; ndipo anali nao mapiko ngati mapiko a chumba, nanyamula efayo pakati pa dziko ndi thambo." 
Zechariah5:10 Ndipo ndinati kwa mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine, Amenewa amuka naye kuti efayo?" 
Zechariah5:11 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Kummangira nyumba m'dziko la Sinara; kuti amuike efayo, namkhazikeko pa malo kwake." 
Zechariah6:1 Ndipo ndinakwezanso maso anga, ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, anatuluka magaleta anai pakati pa mapiri awiri; ndi mapiriwo ndiwo mapiri amkuwa." 
Zechariah6:2 Ku galeta woyamba kunali akavalo ofiira; ndi kugaleta wachiwiri akavalo akuda; 
Zechariah6:3 ndi kugaleta wachitatu a kavalo oyera; ndi kugaleta wachinai akavalo olimba amawanga. 
Zechariah6:4 Ndipo ndinayankha ndinati kwa mthenga wolankhula ndi ine, Izi nziyani, mbuyanga?" 
Zechariah6:5 Ndi mthenga anayankha, nati kwa ine, Izi ndi mphepo zinai zakumwamba zakutuluka kumene zimaimirira pamaso pa Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Zechariah6:6 Galeta wa akavalo akuda atulukira kudziko la kumpoto; ndi oyerawo atulukira kuwatsata; ndi amawanga atulukira kudziko la kumwera. 
Zechariah6:7 Ndi amphamvuwo anatuluka nayesa kunka kuyendayenda m'dziko; pakuti adati, Mukani, yendayendani m'dziko. Momwemo anayendayenda m'dziko." 
Zechariah6:8 Ndipo anandiitana, nanena nane, kuti, Taonani, iwo akutuluka kunka kudziko la kumpoto anapumulitsa Mzimu wanga m'dziko la kumpoto." 
Zechariah6:9 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah6:10 Tenga a iwo a kundende, a Helidai, a Tobiya, ndi a Yedaya; nudze tsiku lomwelo, nulowe kunyumba ya Yosiya, mwana wa Zefaniya, kumene anafikirako kuchokera ku Babiloni," 
Zechariah6:11 ndipo utenge siliva ndi golide, nupange akorona, nuwaike pamutu pa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki mkulu wa ansembe;" 
Zechariah6:12 nunene naye, kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu, ndi kuti, Taonani, munthu dzina lake ndilo Mphukira, ndipo adzaphuka m'malo mwake, nadzamanga Kachisi wa Yehova:" 
Zechariah6:13 inde adzamanga Kachisi wa Yehova; nadzasenza ulemererowo, nadzakhala ndi kulamulira pa mpando wachifumu wake; nadzakhala wansembe pampando wachifumu wake; ndi uphungu wa mtendere udzakhala pakati pa iwo awiri." 
Zechariah6:14 Ndipo akorona adzakhala wa Helidai, ndi wa Tobiya, ndi wa Yedaya, ndi wa Heni mwana wa Zefaniya, akhale chikumbutso m'Kachisi wa Yehova." 
Zechariah6:15 Ndipo iwo akukhala kutali adzafika, nadzamanga ku Kachisi wa Yehova, ndipo inu mudzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makamu ananditumiza kwa inu. Ndipo ichi chidzachitika ngati mudzamvera mwachangu mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Zechariah7:1 Ndipo kunachitika chaka chachinai cha mfumu Dariusi, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya tsiku lachinai la mwezi wachisanu ndi chinai, ndiwo Kisilevi." 
Zechariah7:2 Ndipo a ku Betele anatuma Sarezere ndi Regemumeleke ndi anthu ao, apepeze Yehova," 
Zechariah7:3 nanene kwa ansembe a nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu, ndi kwa aneneri, ndi kuti, Kodi ndilire mwezi wachisanu, ndi kudzipatula, monga umo ndikachitira zaka izi zambiri?" 
Zechariah7:4 Ndipo mau a Yehova wa makamu anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah7:5 Nena kwa anthu onse a m'dziko, ndi kwa ansembe, kuti, Muja mukasala ndi kulira mwezi wachisanu, ndi wachisanu ndi chitatu, zaka izi makumi asanu ndi awiri, kodi mukasalira Ine, Inedi?" 
Zechariah7:6 Ndipo pamene mukadya si ndinu, mukamwa si ndinu kodi?" 
Zechariah7:7 Si ndiwo mau Yehova anawalalikira mwa aneneri oyamba aja, muja Yerusalemu anali nao okhalamo, ndi wokhazikika; ndi m'midzi mwake pozungulira pake, ndi m'dziko la kumwera, ndi m'chidikha munali anthu okhalamo?" 
Zechariah7:8 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah7:9 Watero Yehova wa makamu, kuti, Weruzani chiweruzo choona, nimuchitire yense mnzake chifundo ndi ukoma mtima;" 
Zechariah7:10 musazunza mkazi wamasiye, kapena ana amasiye, mlendo kapena waumphawi; ndipo nnena mmodzi wa inu alingirire m'mtima mwake kumchitira choipa munthu mnzake." 
Zechariah7:11 Koma anakana kumvera, nakaniza phewa lao, natseka makutu ao, kuti asamve." 
Zechariah7:12 Inde, anasanduliza mitima yao ikhale ngati mwala woti gwa, kuti angamve chilamulo, ndi mau amene Yehova wa makamu anatumiza ndi Mzimu wake mwa aneneri oyamba aja; m'menemo munafuma mkwiyo waukulu wochokera kwa Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah7:13 Ndipo kunachitika, monga Iye anafuula, koma iwo sanamvere; momwemo iwo adzafuula, koma Ine sindidzamva, ati Yehova wa makamu;" 
Zechariah7:14 koma ndidzawabalalitsa ndi kamvulumvulu mwa amitundu onse amene sanawadziwe. Motero dziko linakhala bwinja, m'mbuyo mwao; palibe munthu wopitapo ndi kubwererako; pakuti adaika dziko lofunikalo labwinja." 
Zechariah8:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova wa makamu anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah8:2 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Ndimchitira nsanje Ziyoni ndi nsanje yaikulu, ndipo ndimchitira nsanje ndi ukali waukulu." 
Zechariah8:3 Atero Yehova: Ndabwerera kudza ku Ziyoni, ndidzakhala pakati pa Yerusalemu; ndi Yerusalemu adzatchedwa, Mudzi wa choonadi; ndi phiri la Yehova wa makamu, Phiri lopatulika." 
Zechariah8:4 Atero Yehova wa makamu: M'miseu ya Yerusalemu mudzakhalanso amuna ndi akazi okalamba, yense ndi ndodo yake m'dzanja lake chifukwa cha ukalamba wake." 
Zechariah8:5 Ndi m'miseu ya mudzi mudzakhala ana aamuna ndi aakazi akusewera m'miseu yake. 
Zechariah8:6 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Chikakhala chodabwitsa pamaso pa otsala a anthu awa masiku awo, kodi chidzakhalanso chodabwitsa pamaso panga? Ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah8:7 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Taonani, ndidzapulumutsa anthu anga m'dziko la kum'mawa, ndi m'dziko la kumadzulo;" 
Zechariah8:8 ndipo ndidzabwera nao, nadzakhala m'kati mwa Yerusalemu; ndipo iwo adzakhala anthu anga, nanenanso ndidzakhala Mulungu wao, m'choonadi ndi m'chilungamo." 
Zechariah8:9 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Alimbike manja anu, inu akumva masiku ano mau awa pakamwa pa aneneri amene anakhalako tsiku lakuikidwa maziko a nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu, ndiyo Kachisi, kuti amangidwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Pakuti asanafike masiku aja, panalibe kulipidwira munthu, kapena kulipidwira nyama, ndipo analibe mtendere iye wakutuluka, kapena wakulowa, chifukwa cha wosautsa; pakuti ndinatumiza munthu yense atsutsane naye mnzake." 
Zechariah8:11 Koma tsopano sindidzakhala kwa otsala a anthu awa monga momwe ndinakhalira masiku oyamba, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah8:12 Pakuti padzakhala mbeu ya mtendere; mpesa udzapatsa zipatso zake, ndi nthaka idzapatsa zobala zake, ndi miyamba idzapata mame ao; ndipo ndidzalandiritsa otsala a anthu awa izi zonse, chikhale cholowa chao." 
Zechariah8:13 Ndipo kudzachitika kuti, monga munali chotembereretsa mwa amitundu, inu nyumba ya Yuda, ndi nyumba ya Israele, momwemo ndidzakusungani, ndipo mudzakhala chodalitsa nacho; musaope, alimbike manja anu." 
Zechariah8:14 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu: Monga ndinalingirira kuchitira inu choipa, muja makolo anu anautsa mkwiyo wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo sindinawaleka;" 
Zechariah8:15 momwemonso ndinalingirira masiku ano kuchitira chokoma Yerusalemu ndi nyumba ya Yuda; musaopa. 
Zechariah8:16 Izi ndizo muzichite: Nenani choonadi yense ndi mnzake; weruzani zoona ndi chiweruzo cha mtendere m'zipata zanu; 
Zechariah8:17 ndipo musalingirira choipa m'mtima mwanu yense pa mnzake; nimusakonde lumbiro lonama; pakuti izi zonse ndidana nazo, ati Yehova." 
Zechariah8:18 Ndipo mau a Yehova wa makamu anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah8:19 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Kusala kwa mwezi wachinai, ndi kusala kwa mwezi wachisanu, ndi kusala kwa mwezi wachisanu ndi chiwiri, ndi kusala kwa mwezi wakhumi kukhale kwa nyumba ya Yuda chimwemwe ndi chikondwerero, ndi nyengo zoikika zosekerera; chifukwa chake kondani choonadi ndi mtendere." 
Zechariah8:20 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Kudzachitikanso kuti mitundu ya anthu, ndi okhalamo m'midzi yambiri adzafika," 
Zechariah8:21 ndi okhala m'mudzi umodzi adzamuka kumudzi wina, ndi kuti, Tiyeni msanga kukapepeza Yehova, ndi kufunafuna Yehova wa makamu; ndimuka inenso." 
Zechariah8:22 Inde, mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ndi amitundu amphamvu adzadza kufunafuna Yehova wa makamu m'Yerusalemu, ndi kupepeza Yehova." 
Zechariah8:23 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Kudzachitika masiku awo amuna khumi adzagwira, ndiwo a manenedwe onse a amitundu, inde adzagwira mkawo wa munthu ali Myuda, ndi kuti, Tidzamuka nanu, pakuti tamva kuti Mulungu ali ndi inu." 
Zechariah9:1 Katundu wa mau a Yehova pa dziko la Hadaraki, ndipo Damasiko adzakhala popumula pake; pakuti Yehova apenyerera anthu monga apenyerera mafuko onse a Israele;" 
Zechariah9:2 ndi Hamati yemwe wogundana naye malire; Tiro ndi Sidoni, angakhale ali ndi nzeru zambiri." 
Zechariah9:3 Ndipo Tiro adzadzimangira polimbikirapo, nadzakundika siliva ngati fumbi, ndi golide woyenga ngati thope la kubwalo." 
Zechariah9:4 Taonani, Yehova adzamlanda zake, nadzakantha mphamvu yake igwe m'manja; ndipo adzatha ndi moto." 
Zechariah9:5 Asikeloni adzachiona, nadzaopa; Gazanso, nadzanjenjemera kwambiri; ndi Ekeroni, pakuti chiyembekezo chake chachitidwa manyazi; ndipo mfumu idzataika ku Gaza, ndi Asikeloni adzasowa okhalamo." 
Zechariah9:6 Ndi mtundu wa anthu osokonezeka udzakhala m'Asidodi, ndipo ndidzaononga kudzikuza kwa Afilisti." 
Zechariah9:7 Ndipo ndidzachotsa mwazi wake m'kamwa mwake, ndi zonyansa zake pakati pa mano ake; momwemo iyenso adzakhala wotsalira wa Mulungu wathu, ndipo adzakhala ngati mkulu wa fuko m'Yuda, ndi Ekeroni ngati Myebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ndipo ndidzamangira nyumba yanga misasa, kuiletsera nkhondo, asapitepo munthu kapena kubweranso; ndipo wakuwasautsa sadzapitanso pakati pao; pakuti tsopano ndapenya ndi maso anga." 
Zechariah9:9 Kondwera kwambiri, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; fuula mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu; taona, Mfumu yako ikudza kwa iwe; ndiye wolungama, ndi mwini chipulumutso; wofatsa ndi wokwera pa bulu, ndi mwana wamphongo wa bulu." 
Zechariah9:10 Ndipo ndidzaononga magaleta kuwachotsa m'Efuremu, ndi akavalo kuwachotsa m'Yerusalemu; ndi uta wa nkhondo udzaonongeka; ndipo adzanena zamtendere kwa amitundu; ndi ufumu wake udzakhala kuyambira kunyanja kufikira nyanja, ndi kuyambira ku Mtsinje kufikira malekezero a dziko." 
Zechariah9:11 Iwenso, chifukwa cha mwazi wa pangano lako ndinatulutsa andende ako m'dzenje m'mene mulibe madzi." 
Zechariah9:12 Bwererani kudza kulinga, andende a chiyembekezo inu; ngakhale lero lino ndilalikira kuti ndidzakubwezera chowirikiza." 
Zechariah9:13 Pakuti ndadzikokera Yuda, ndadzaza uta ndi Efuremu; ndipo ndidzautsa ana ako, Ziyoni, alimbane nao ana ako, Yavani, ndipo ndidzakuyesa lupanga la ngwazi." 
Zechariah9:14 Ndipo Yehova adzaoneka pamwamba pao, ndi muvi wake udzatuluka ngati mphezi; ndipo Ambuye Mulungu adzaomba lipenga, nadzayenda ndi akavumbulu a kumwera." 
Zechariah9:15 Yehova wa makamu adzawatchinjiriza; ndipo adzadza, nadzapondereza miyala yoponyera; ndipo adzamva, nadzachita phokoso ngati avinyo; ndipo adzadzazidwa ngati mbale, ngati ngodya za guwa la nsembe." 
Zechariah9:16 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wao adzawapulumutsa tsiku ilo, ngati zoweta za anthu ake; pakuti adzakhala ngati miyala ya m'korona yakunyezimira pa dziko lake." 
Zechariah9:17 Pakuti ukoma wake ndi waukulu ndithu, ndi kukongola kwake nkwakukulu ndithu! Tirigu adzakometsera anyamata, ndi vinyo watsopano anamwali." 
Zechariah10:1 Pemphani kwa Yehova mvula, m'nyengo ya mvula ya masika, kwa Yehova wolenga mphezi; ndipo adzawapatsa mivumbi ya mvula, kwa yense zophukira kuthengo." 
Zechariah10:2 Pakuti aterafi anena zopanda pake, ndi aula aona bodza; nafotokoza maloto achabe, asangalatsa nazo zopanda pake; chifukwa chake ayendayenda ngati nkhosa, azunzika popeza palibe mbusa." 
Zechariah10:3 Mkwiyo wanga wayakira abusa, ndipo ndidzalanga atonde; pakuti Yehova wa makamu adzazonda zoweta zake, ndizo nyumba ya Yuda, nadzaziika ngati kavalo wake waulemerero kunkhondo." 
Zechariah10:4 Kwa iye kudzafuma mwala wa kungodya, kwa iye msomali, kwa iye uta wankhondo, kwa iye osautsa onse pamodzi." 
Zechariah10:5 Ndipo adzakhala ngati ngwazi zakupondereza adani m'thope la kubwalo kunkhondo; ndipo adzachita nkhondo, chifukwa Yehova ali nao; ndi apakavalo adzachitidwa manyazi." 
Zechariah10:6 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa nyumba ya Yuda, ndi kusunga nyumba ya Yosefe, ndipo ndidzawakhalitsa, pakuti ndawachitira chifundo; ndipo adzakhala monga ngati sindinawataya konse; pakuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao, ndipo ndidzawamvera." 
Zechariah10:7 Ndipo iwo a ku Efuremu adzakhala ngati ngwazi, ndi mtima wao udzakondwera ngati ndi vinyo; ndipo ana ao adzachiona nadzakondwera; mtima wao udzakondwerera mwa Yehova." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndidzawaimbira mluzu ndi kuwasonkhanitsa, pakuti ndawaombola; ndipo adzachuluka monga anachulukira kale." 
Zechariah10:9 Ndipo ndidzawafesa mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndipo adzandikumbukira m'maiko akutali; nadzakhala pamodzi ndi ana ao, nadzabwera." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndidzawatenganso kudziko la Ejipito, ndi kuwasonkhanitsa m'Asiriya; ndipo ndidzalowa nao m'dziko la Giliyadi ndi Lebanoni; koma sadzawafikira." 
Zechariah10:11 Ndipo adzapita pakati pa nyanja ya nsautso, nadzapanda mafunde a m'nyanja, ndi maiwe onse a mtsinje adzaphwa; ndi kudzikuza kwa Asiriya kudzagwetsedwa; ndi ndodo yachifumu ya Ejipito idzachoka." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndipo ndidzawalimbitsa mwa Yehova; ndipo adzayendayenda m'dzina lake; ati Yehova. 
Zechariah11:1 Tsegula pa makomo ako Lebanoni, kuti moto uthe mikungudza yako." 
Zechariah11:2 Chema, mtengo wamlombwa, pakuti mkungudza wagwa, popeza mitengo yokoma yaipitsidwa; chemani athundu a ku Basani, pakuti nkhalango yotchinjirizika yagwa pansi." 
Zechariah11:3 Mau a kuchema kwa abusa! Pakuti ulemerero wao waipsidwa; mau a kubangula kwa misona ya mikango! Pakuti kudzikuza kwa Yordani kwaipsidwa. 
Zechariah11:4 Atero Yehova Mulungu wanga: Dyetsani zoweta zakukaphedwa; 
Zechariah11:5 zimene eni ake azipha, nadziyesera osapalamula; ndi iwo akuwagulitsa akuti, Alemekezedwe Yehova, pakuti ine ndine wolemera; ndi abusa ao sazichitira chifundo." 
Zechariah11:6 Pakuti sindidzachitiranso chifundo okhala m'dzikomo, ati Yehova; koma taonani, ndidzapereka anthu, yense m'dzanja la mnansi wake, ndi m'dzanja la mfumu yake; ndipo iwo adzakantha dzikoli, ndi m'dzanja mwao sindidzawalanditsa." 
Zechariah11:7 M'mwemo ndinadyetsa zoweta zakukaphedwa, ndizo zoweta zonyankhalala. Ndipo ndinadzitengera ndodo ziwiri; ina ndinaitcha Chisomo, inzake ndinaitcha Chomanganitsa; ndipo ndinadyetsa zowetazo." 
Zechariah11:8 Ndipo ndinatha abusa atatuwo mwezi umodzi; pakuti mtima wanga unalema nao, ndi mtima waonso unaipidwa nane." 
Zechariah11:9 Pamenepo ndinati, Sindidzadyetsanso inu; chilikufa chife; chosoweka chisoweke; ndi zotsala zidyane, chonse nyama ya chinzake." 
Zechariah11:10 Ndipo ndinatenga ndodo yanga Chisomo, ndi kuidula pakati, kuti ndiphwanye pangano langa ndinalichita ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
Zechariah11:11 Ndipo linathyoka tsikulo, momwemo zonyankhalala za zoweta, zakundisamalira Ine, zinadziwa kuti ndiwo mau a Yehova." 
Zechariah11:12 Ndipo ndinanena nao, Chikakomera inu, ndipatseni mphotho yanga; ngati iai, lekani. Ndipo anayesa mphotho yanga, kulemera kwake masekeli a siliva makumi atatu." 
Zechariah11:13 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Kaziponye kwa woumba mbiya, mtengo wake wokometsetsa anandiyesawo. Ndipo ndinatenga masekeli makumi atatu a siliva, ndi kuziponya kwa woumba mbiya, m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
Zechariah11:14 Pamenepo ndinadula ndodo yanga ina, ndiyo Chomanganitsa, kuti ndithetse chibale cha pakati pa Yuda ndi Israele." 
Zechariah11:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Dzitengerenso zipangizo za mbusa wopusa." 
Zechariah11:16 Pakuti taonani, ndidzautsa mbusa m'dziko amene sadzazonda otayika, kapena kufunafuna zomwazika, kapena kulunzitsa yothyoka, kapena kudyetsa yamoyo, koma adzadya nyama ya zonenepa, nadzang'amba ziboda zao." 
Zechariah11:17 Tsoka mbusa wopanda pake, wakusiya zoweta! Lupanga pa dzanja lake, ndi pa diso lake la kumanja; dzanja lake lidzauma konse, ndi diso lake lamanja lidzada bii." 
Zechariah12:1 Katundu wa mau a Yehova wakunena Israele. Atero Yehova, wakuyala miyamba, ndi kuika maziko a dziko lapansi, ndi kulenga mzimu wa munthu m'kati mwake;" 
Zechariah12:2 Taonani, ndidzaika Yerusalemu akhale chipanda chodzandiritsa kwa mitundu yonse ya anthu yozungulirapo, ndipo chidzafikira Yuda yemwe pomangira misasa Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:3 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku ilo, ndidzaika Yerusalemu akhale mwala wolemetsa mitundu yonse ya anthu; onse akuusenza adzadzilasa nao; ndi amitundu onse a pa dziko lapansi adzasonkhana kutsutsana nao." 
Zechariah12:4 Tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, ndidzakantha kavalo aliyense ndi kumdabwitsa, ndi womkwera adzayaluka; ndipo ndidzatsegulira maso anga nyumba ya Yuda, ndi kukantha kavalo aliyense wa mitundu ya anthu akhale wakhungu." 
Zechariah12:5 Ndipo akalonga a Yuda adzanena m'mtima mwao, Okhala m'Yerusalemu ndiwo mphamvu yanga m'Yehova wa makamu Mulungu wao." 
Zechariah12:6 Tsiku ilo ndidzaika akalonga a Yuda ngati phale la moto pansi pa nkhuni, ndi ngati muuni wamoto mwa mitolo ya tirigu; ndipo adzatha mitundu yonse ya anthu pozungulirapo, kudzanja lamanja ndi lamanzere; ndipo Yerusalemu adzakhalanso m'malo mwake, m'Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:7 Ndipo Yehova adzayamba kupulumutsa mahema a Yuda, kuti ulemerero wa nyumba ya Davide ndi ulemerero wa okhala m'Yerusalemu usakulire Yuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Tsiku ilo Yehova adzatchinjiriza okhala m'Yerusalemu; ndi iye wokhumudwa pakati pao tsiku lomwelo adzakhala ngati Davide; ndi nyumba ya Davide idzakhala ngati Mulungu, ngati mthenga wa Yehova pakati pao." 
Zechariah12:9 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo, ndidzayesa kuononga amitundu onse akudza kuyambana ndi Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:10 Ndipo ndidzatsanulira pa nyumba ya Davide, ndi pa okhala m'Yerusalemu, mzimu wa chisomo ndi wakupembedza; ndipo adzandipenyera Ine amene anandipyoza; nadzamlira ngati munthu alira mwana wake mmodzi yekha, nadzammvera zowawa mtima, monga munthu amvera zowawa mtima mwana wake woyamba." 
Zechariah12:11 Tsiku lomwelo kudzakhala maliro akulu m'Yerusalemu, ngati maliro a Hadadirimoni m'chigwa cha Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Ndipo dziko lidzalira, banja lililonse pa lokha; banja la nyumba ya Davide pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa okha; banja la nyumba ya Natani pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa okha;" 
Zechariah12:13 banja la nyumba ya Levi pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa lokha; banja la Asimei pa okha, ndi akazi ao pa okha;" 
Zechariah12:14 mabanja onse otsala, banja lililonse pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa okha." 
Zechariah13:1 Tsiku lomwelo padzatsegukira nyumba ya Davide ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu kasupe wa kwa uchimo ndi chidetso. 
Zechariah13:2 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzaononga maina a mafano m'dziko; ndipo sadzakumbukikanso; ndipo ndidzachotsa m'dziko aneneri ndi mzimu wachidetso." 
Zechariah13:3 Ndipo kudzachitika, akaneneranso wina, atate wake ndi mai wake ombala adzanena naye, Sudzakhala ndi moyo, pakuti unena bodza m'dzina la Yehova; ndipo atate wake ndi mai wake ombala adzamgwaza ponenera iye." 
Zechariah13:4 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo kuti aneneri adzachita manyazi yense ndi masomphenya ake, ponenera iye; ndipo sadzavala chofunda chaubweya kunyenga nacho;" 
Zechariah13:5 koma adzati, Sindili mneneri, ndili wolima munda; pakuti munthu anandiyesa kapolo kuyambira ubwana wanga." 
Zechariah13:6 Ndipo wina akati kwa iye, Zipsera izi m'manja mwako nza chiyani? Adzayankha, Ndizo za mabala anandilasa m'nyumba ya ondikonda." 
Zechariah13:7 Galamuka, lupanga, pa mbusa wanga, ndi pa munthu mnzanga wa pamtima, ati Yehova wa makamu; kantha mbusa, ndi nkhosa zidzabalalika; koma ndidzabwezera dzanja langa pa zazing'onozo." 
Zechariah13:8 Ndipo kudzachitika m'dziko lonse, ati Yehova, magawo awiri m'menemo adzalikhidwa nadzafa; koma gawo lachitatu lidzasiyidwa m'mwemo." 
Zechariah13:9 Ndi gawo lachitatulo ndidzalitengera kumoto, ndi kuwayenga ngati ayenga siliva, ndi kuwayesa monga ayesa golide; adzaitana dzina langa, ndipo ndidzawamvera; ndidzati, Awa ndi anthu anga; ndi iwo adzati, Yehova ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Zechariah14:1 Taonani likudza tsiku la Yehova, limene zofunkha zako zidzagawanika pakati pako." 
Zechariah14:2 Pakuti ndidzasonkhanitsa amitundu onse alimbane ndi Yerusalemu; ndipo mudziwo udzalandidwa, ndi nyumba zidzafunkhidwa, ndi akazi adzakakamizidwa; ndi limodzi la magawo awiri la mudzi lidzatuluka kunka kundende, koma anthu otsala sadzaonongeka m'mudzimo." 
Zechariah14:3 Pamenepo Yehova adzatuluka, nadzachita nkhondo ndi amitundu aja, monga anachitira nkhondo tsiku lakudumana." 
Zechariah14:4 Ndi mapazi ake adzaponda tsiku lomwelo pa phiri la Azitona, lili pandunji pa Yerusalemu kum'mawa, ndi phiri la Azitona lidzang'ambika pakati kuloza kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo, ndipo padzakhala chigwa chachikulu; ndi gawo lina la phirilo lidzamuka kumpoto, ndi gawo lina kumwera." 
Zechariah14:5 Pamenepo mudzathawa kudzera chigwa cha mapiri anga; pakuti chigwa cha mapiri chidzafikira ku Azali; ndipo mudzathawa monga umo munathawira chivomezi, masiku a Uziya mfumu ya Yuda; ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanga adzadza, ndi opatulika onse pamodzi ndi Inu." 
Zechariah14:6 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo, sikudzakhala kuunika, zowalazo zidzada;" 
Zechariah14:7 koma lidzakhala tsiku la pa lokha lodziwika ndi Yehova; palibe usana, palibe usiku; koma kudzatero kuti madzulo kudzati mbee." 
Zechariah14:8 Ndipo kudzachitika tsiku lomwelo kuti madzi amoyo adzatuluka ku Yerusalemu; gawo lao lina kunka ku nyanja ya kum'mawa, ndi gawo lina kunka ku nyanja ya kumadzulo; adzatero nyengo ya dzinja ndi ya mwamvu." 
Zechariah14:9 Ndipo Yehova adzakhala mfumu ya dziko lonse; tsiku lomwelo Yehova adzakhala Iye yekha, ndi dzina lake ilo lokha." 
Zechariah14:10 Dziko lonse lidzasandulika, lidzanga chidikha, kuyambira ku Geba kufikira ku Rimoni, kumwera kwa Yerusalemu; ndipo pali uwupo padzakhala ponyamuka, ndipo udzakhala m'malo mwake, kuyambira ku chipata cha Benjamini kufikira ku malo a chipata choyamba, kufikira ku chipata cha kungodya, ndi kuyambira nsanja ya Hananele kufikira ku zoponderamo mphesa za mfumu." 
Zechariah14:11 Ndipo anthu adzakhala m'menemo, ndipo sipadzakhalanso kuonongetsa; koma Yerusalemu adzakhala mosatekeseka." 
Zechariah14:12 Ndipo mliri umene Yehova adzakantha nao mitundu yonse ya anthu imene idathira nkhondo pa Yerusalemu ndi uwu: nyama yao idzaonda akali chilili pa mapazi ao, ndi maso ao adzapuwala m'funkha mwao, ndi lilime lao lidzanyala m'kamwa mwao." 
Zechariah14:13 Ndipo kudzali tsiku lomwelo, kuti chisokonezo chachikulu chochokera kwa Yehova chidzakhala pakati pao; ndipo adzagwira yense dzanja la mnzake; ndi dzanja lake lidzaukira dzanja la mnzake." 
Zechariah14:14 Ndi Yuda yemwe adzachita nkhondo ku Yerusalemu; ndi zolemera za amitundu onse ozungulirapo zidzasonkhanitsidwa, golide, ndi siliva, ndi zovala zambirimbiri." 
Zechariah14:15 Momwemonso mliri wa pa akavalo, nyuru, ngamira, ndi abulu, ndi nyama zonse zokhala m'misasa iyo, udzakhala ngati mliri uwo." 
Zechariah14:16 Ndipo kudzachitika kuti otsala onse a amitundu onse anadzawo kulimbana ndi Yerusalemu, adzakwera chaka ndi chaka kulambira mfumu Yehova wa makamu, ndi kusunga chikondwerero cha Misasa." 
Zechariah14:17 Ndipo kudzachitika kuti aliyense wa mabanja a dziko wosakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kulambira mfumu Yehova wa makamu, pa iwowa sipadzakhala mvula." 
Zechariah14:18 Ndipo banja la ku Ejipito likapanda kukwera, losafika, sudzawagwera kodi mliri umene Yehova adzakantha nao amitundu osakwera kusunga chikondwerero cha Misasa?" 
Zechariah14:19 Ili ndi tchimo la Ejipito, ndi tchimo la amitundu onse osakwerako kusunga chikondwerero cha Misasa." 
Zechariah14:20 Tsiku lomwelo padzaoneka pa miliu ya akavalo Opatulikira Yehova; ndi mbiya za m'nyumba ya Yehova zidzanga mbale za kuguwa la nsembe. 
Zechariah14:21 Inde mbiya zonse za m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda zidzakhala zopatulikira Yehova wa makamu; ndi onse akuphera nsembe adzafika nadzatengako, ndi kuphikamo; ndipo tsiku lomwelo simudzakhalanso Mkanani m'nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:1 Katundu wa mau a Yehova wa kwa Israele mwa Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 Ndakukondani, ati Yehova; koma inu mukuti, Mwatikonda motani? Esau si mkulu wake wa Yakobo kodi? Ati Yehova; ndipo ndinakonda Yakobo;" 
Malachi1:3 koma Esau ndinamuda, ndinasanduliza mapiri ake abwinja, ndi kupereka cholowa chake kwa ankhandwe a m'chipululu." 
Malachi1:4 Chinkana Edomu akuti, Taphwanyika, koma tidzabwera ndi kumanganso mabwinja; atero Yehova wa makamu, Adzamanga, koma Ine ndidzapasula; ndipo adzawatcha, Dziko la choipa, ndiponso, Anthu amene Yehova akwiya nao chikwiyire." 
Malachi1:5 Ndipo maso anu adzaona, nimudzati, Yehova ali wamkulu kupitirira malire a Israele." 
Malachi1:6 Mwana alemekeza atate wake, ndi mnyamata mbuye wake; ngati Ine tsono ndine atate, uli kuti ulemu wanga? Ngati Ine ndine mbuye, kundiopa kuli kuti? Ati Yehova wa makamu kwa inu ansembe akupeputsa dzina langa. Ndipo mukuti, Tapeputsa dzina lanu motani?" 
Malachi1:7 Mupereka mkate wodetsedwa pa guwa langa la nsembe; ndipo mukuti, Takudetsani motani? M'menemo, mwakuti munena, Gome la Yehova nlonyozeka." 
Malachi1:8 Ndipo pamene mupereka yakhungu ikhale nsembe, mukuti, Palibe choipa! Ndi popereka yotsimphina ndi yodwala, palibe choipa! Kaiperekeni kwa kazembe wanu, mudzamkomera kodi? Kapena adzakuvomerezani kodi? Ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:9 Ndipo tsopano, mupepeze Mulungu, kuti atichitire chifundo; ichicho chichokera kwa inu; kodi Iye adzavomereza ena a inu? Ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:10 Mwenzi atakhala wina mwa inu wakutseka pamakomo, kuti musasonkhe moto chabe pa guwa langa la nsembe! Sindikondwera nanu, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo sindidzalandira chopereka m'dzanja lanu." 
Malachi1:11 Pakuti kuyambira kotulukira dzuwa kufikira kolowera kwake dzina langa lidzakhala lalikulu mwa amitundu; ndipo m'malo monse adzaperekera dzina langa chofukiza ndi chopereka choona; pakuti dzina langa lidzakhala lalikulu mwa amitundu, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:12 Koma inu muliipsa, pakunena inu, Gome la Yehova laipsidwa, ndi zipatso zake, chakudya chake, chonyozeka." 
Malachi1:13 Mukutinso, Taonani, ncholemetsa ichi! Ndipo mwachipeputsa, ati Yehova wa makamu; ndipo mwabwera nazo zofunkha, ndi zotsimphina, ndi zodwala; momwemo mubwera nayo nsembe; kodi ndiyenera kuilandira kudzanja lanu? Ati Yehova." 
Malachi1:14 Koma wotembereredwa wonyengayo, wokhala nayo yaimuna m'gulu lake, nawinda, naphera Yehova nsembe chinthu chachilema; pakuti Ine ndine mfumu yaikulu, ati Yehova wa makamu; ndipo dzina langa ndi loopsa pakati pa amitundu." 
Malachi2:1 Ndipo tsono, ansembe inu, lamulo ili ndi la kwa inu." 
Malachi2:2 Mukapanda kumvera, mukapanda kuliika mumtima mwanu, kupatsa dzina langa ulemerero, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzakutumizirani temberero, ndi kutemberera madalitso anu; inde, ndawatemberera kale chifukwa simuliika mumtima." 
Malachi2:3 Taonani, ndidzaipsa mbeu chifukwa cha inu, ndi kuwaza ndowe pankhope panu, ndizo ndowe za nsembe zanu, ndipo adzakuchotsani pamodzi nacho." 
Malachi2:4 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti ndatumiza lamulo ili kwa inu, kuti chipangano changa chikhale ndi Levi, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi2:5 Chipangano changa chinali naye cha moyo ndi cha mtendere; ndipo ndinampatsa izi kuti aope; nandiopa, naopsedwa chifukwa cha dzina langa." 
Malachi2:6 Chilamulo cha zoona chinali m'kamwa mwake, ndi chosalungama sichinapezeka m'milomo mwake; anayenda nane mumtendere ndi moongoka, nabweza ambiri aleke mphulupulu." 
Malachi2:7 Pakuti milomo ya wansembe iyenera kusunga chidziwitso, ndi anthu ayenera kufunafuna chilamulo pakamwa pake; pakuti iye ndiye mthenga wa Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi2:8 Koma inu mwapatuka m'njira; mwakhumudwitsa ambiri m'chilamulo; mwaipsa chipangano cha Levi, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi2:9 Chifukwa chake Inenso ndakuikani onyozeka ndi ochepseka kwa anthu onse, popeza simunasunga njira zanga, koma munaweruza mwankhope pochita chilamulo."
